title_en: France-Italy-Switzerland Deep-Dive: 10-Day Small-Group Tour (Paris to Rome)
title_zh: 法意瑞深度10天精品小团游（巴黎至罗马）
short_en: A 10-day one-way small-group journey from Paris to Rome through Burgundy, the Swiss Alps, Jungfrau, Milan, Venice, Florence and Tuscany.
short_zh: 10天单线精品小团，从巴黎一路深度玩到罗马，途经勃艮第、瑞士阿尔卑斯、少女峰、米兰、威尼斯、佛罗伦萨与托斯卡纳。
desc_en: This 10-day, one-way deep-dive tour runs from Paris all the way to Rome, weaving together the very best of France, Switzerland and Italy. You'll savour Burgundy's vineyards and a Relais & Chateaux castle hotel, ride the GoldenPass panoramic train through the Alps, gaze at Lake Geneva, Chillon Castle and the Jungfrau region, then cross into Italy for Milan, romantic Venice, Renaissance Florence, the Cinque Terre coast, the Leaning Tower of Pisa and the medieval hill towns of Tuscany before finishing in the Eternal City. With scenic hotels, the GoldenPass rail and all attractions included in one all-inclusive price, it is a relaxed yet richly cultural Alps-to-Mediterranean adventure.
desc_zh: 这是一条10天单线深度行程，从巴黎一路畅游至罗马，将法国、瑞士、意大利的精华串联成线。您将品味勃艮第葡萄酒庄与罗莱夏朵古堡酒店，乘坐金色山口全景观光列车穿越阿尔卑斯，饱览日内瓦湖、西庸城堡与少女峰地区，再进入意大利游览米兰、浪漫的威尼斯、文艺复兴之都佛罗伦萨、五渔村海岸、比萨斜塔以及托斯卡纳的中世纪古城，最后抵达永恒之城罗马。景观酒店、金色山口列车与各项门票一价全含，是一段从阿尔卑斯到地中海、轻松而又充满人文气息的旅程。

highlights.en: One-way deep route from Paris to Rome across France, Switzerland and Italy
highlights.zh: 巴黎到罗马单线深度路线，横跨法国、瑞士、意大利

highlights.en: Ride the GoldenPass panoramic train through the Swiss Alps from Lungern to Lucerne
highlights.zh: 乘坐金色山口全景观光列车，从龙疆穿越阿尔卑斯抵达卢塞恩

highlights.en: Jungfrau region, Lake Geneva, the UNESCO Lavaux vineyard terraces and Chillon Castle
highlights.zh: 少女峰地区、日内瓦湖、世界遗产拉沃葡萄梯田与西庸城堡

highlights.en: Scenic stays: a five-star Relais & Chateaux castle, the lakeside Giessbach hotel and a Tuscan villa
highlights.zh: 景观酒店：五星级罗莱夏朵古堡、湖畔吉斯巴赫酒店与托斯卡纳庄园别墅

highlights.en: Italian icons: Milan Cathedral, romantic Venice, Renaissance Florence and the Leaning Tower of Pisa
highlights.zh: 意大利经典：米兰大教堂、浪漫威尼斯、文艺复兴佛罗伦萨与比萨斜塔

highlights.en: Cinque Terre coast and medieval Tuscan hill towns: San Gimignano, Siena and Pienza
highlights.zh: 五渔村海岸与托斯卡纳中世纪古城：圣吉米尼亚诺、锡耶纳与皮恩扎

highlights.en: End in Rome, the Eternal City, with the Colosseum, Pantheon and Trevi Fountain
highlights.zh: 终点罗马永恒之城，畅游斗兽场、万神殿与特莱维喷泉

highlights.en: All-inclusive pricing with city-centre 4-star hotels, all attractions and no forced shopping
highlights.zh: 一价全含，市中心四星酒店、各项门票全包，无强制购物

includes.en: Hotels: 1 night in a 5-star hotel plus 8 nights in 4-star hotels
includes.zh: 【酒店】五星级酒店1晚及四星级酒店8晚

includes.en: Meals: 9 breakfasts in total — buffet breakfast at the hotel or breakfast in another form
includes.zh: 【餐饮】酒店内自助早餐或其他形式早餐共计9餐

includes.en: Taxes and fees: tourist city tax, city-entry fees, residence tax, the Venice island-landing fee, driver/guide meal allowance and various other travel taxes payable within the itinerary
includes.zh: 【税费】游客城市税、进城费、居住税、威尼斯登岛费、司导餐补及各类旅游税等行程内执行费用

includes.en: Transport: a 7–9 seat business touring vehicle
includes.zh: 【交通】7-9座商务旅行车

includes.en: Guide: a Chinese-speaking driver-cum-guide throughout the trip
includes.zh: 【导游】全程中文司机兼导游

includes.en: Luggage: one 23 kg checked bag and one carry-on per person
includes.zh: 【行李】1件23公斤行李及1件随身行李

includes.en: Admissions: the Burgundy winery visit and tasting; the GoldenPass scenic train (Lungern–Lucerne leg); the Cinque Terre local train; and the canal ferry to the islands in Venice. (For the spring/summer/autumn product the Giessbach cog railway and the Interlaken lake cruise are included, available 3 Apr–11 Oct 2026; outside that window these two experiences are replaced by a Lake Lucerne cruise.)
includes.zh: 【门票】勃艮第酒庄参观及品酒费用、金色山口列车（龙疆-卢塞恩段）、五渔村小火车、威尼斯运河上岛渡轮。（每年春夏秋季产品含吉斯巴赫齿轮火车和因特拉肯游轮，体验时间：2026年4月3日-10月11日；2026年无法体验以上两项目期间，我社将替换为卢塞恩湖游船。）

excludes.en: Passport: the cost of your personal passport
excludes.zh: 护照：个人护照费用

excludes.en: Visa: the tourist visa fees required for the countries listed in the itinerary
excludes.zh: 签证：行程中所列旅游国家所需的观光签证费用

excludes.en: Insurance: travel insurance (if the itinerary involves high-risk sports, please confirm whether your travel insurance covers that activity)
excludes.zh: 保险：旅游保险费用（如行程内涉及到高风险运动，请核实旅游保险是否包含该项运动）

excludes.en: Tips: gratuities for the guide and driver totaling EUR 10 per person per day, same rate for adults and children
excludes.zh: 小费：游客支付导游和司机小费一共10欧/人/天，大小同价

excludes.en: Meals: apart from the special meals included in the itinerary, lunches and dinners are not included
excludes.zh: 餐饮：除行程内包含的特色餐外，行程中不包含午、晚正餐费用

excludes.en: Admissions: any attraction whose admission is not noted as included — including but not limited to sights marked '(exterior)', and all 'recommended', 'optional' and 'experience' items not stated as included; please pay on your own if you wish to enter
excludes.zh: 门票：行程中未注明费用包含的景点（包括但不仅限于行程中注明“外观”的景点，“推荐”“可选”“体验”等所有未提及费用包含的项目，如游客需要参观，敬请自理）

excludes.en: Extended stays: any extra accommodation, transport or sightseeing beyond the itinerary
excludes.zh: 延长住宿：行程外额外延长的住宿、交通、观光费用

excludes.en: Personal spending: drinks and alcohol, taxis, phone charges and other personal expenses
excludes.zh: 私人消费：如饮料酒类、出租车、电话费等个人消费

excludes.en: Other transport: transport not mentioned in the inclusions beyond the business touring vehicle/minibus — e.g. the Venice gondola, and sightseeing trains, electric taxis etc. inside vehicle-restricted zones — at your own cost
excludes.zh: 其他交通：除包含商务旅行车或者中巴之外，费用包含中未提及的其他交通费用，如威尼斯贡多拉，以及车辆限行区的观光火车、电瓶出租车等费用敬请自理

excludes.en: Free-time activities: evening self-touring and the recommended optional projects, plus any transport, dining, admissions and shopping costs they incur
excludes.zh: 自由活动：游客夜间自行游览及行程中的推荐项目，以及产生的交通、餐饮、门票、购物等费用

excludes.en: Experience activities: any travel experience activities not included in the itinerary
excludes.zh: 体验活动：行程中没有包含的各项旅游体验活动

excludes.en: Other costs: any costs not mentioned in the inclusions. In cases of force majeure (natural disaster, war, strike), traffic delays, flight cancellation/rescheduling, consulate visa delays, insufficient group numbers etc., or other extra costs not caused by our company (e.g. overseas visa-extension fees, extra accommodation/meals/transport, airline fare adjustments), the company reserves the right to charge the price difference
excludes.zh: 其他费用：费用包含中未提及的费用。如因天灾、战争、罢工等不可抗力的原因，及因交通延阻、航班取消或更改时间、使馆延误出签、人数不足等特殊情况或其他非我公司原因所引致的额外费用（如在外延期签证费、住食及交通费、国家航空运价调整等），我公司有权追加差价

timeline.title_en: Paris to Dijon — Burgundy wine country & a Relais & Châteaux château hotel
timeline.title_zh: 巴黎 - 第戎：勃艮第美景美食之都与罗莱夏朵奢华古堡酒店
timeline.description_en: After meeting up in Paris in the morning, drive to Dijon, capital of the Burgundy region and the original home of red wine, snails, rose mustard and the white Charolais cattle; visit Dijon's old town and the Cathedral of Notre-Dame de Dijon (exterior), a 13th-century church with its gargoyle-lined facade and 14th-century clock. After lunch, head into the Burgundy vineyards to tour a winery's courtyard, production workshop, vineyards and cellars, where the estate's professional sommelier handles tastings and gives an in-depth talk. Then continue to Poligny to check in at the Relais & Châteaux château hotel, an 18th-century castle set in the Jura parkland with a 2-star Michelin restaurant by chef Steven Naessens and a Caudalie Vinothérapie spa. Overnight: Relais & Châteaux château hotel or an equivalent 5-star hotel. (Note: from 4 Jan to 11 Feb 2026 the Relais & Châteaux is closed and replaced by a 5-star hotel in central Dijon; rooms are base category, randomly assigned with no choice of size, view or aspect.)
timeline.description_zh: 上午在巴黎集合后，前往勃艮第大区首府第戎——红酒、蜗牛、玫瑰芥末及白牛（夏洛莱牛）的原产地；参观第戎老城与第戎圣母院（外观），这座建于13世纪的教堂以三列兽形排水口的门面和一座14世纪的报时钟而著称。午餐后前往勃艮第葡萄产区，参观酒庄的庭院、生产工坊、葡萄园及酒窖，由酒庄专业侍酒师负责侍酒服务并作深度讲解。随后前往波尔莱斯内，入住罗莱夏朵城堡酒店——一座坐落于茹安公园中的18世纪古堡，设有米其林主厨Steven Naessens的米其林二星餐厅以及欧缇丽（Caudalie）水疗中心。夜宿：罗莱夏朵城堡酒店或同等5星级酒店。（提示：2026年1月4日至2月11日罗莱夏朵关闭，改为第戎市区五星级酒店；房型为基础房型，不指定大小、风景和朝向，均为随机分配。）

timeline.title_en: Poligny to Lausanne, Vevey, Montreux & Interlaken — the Lake Geneva scenic route, a UNESCO World Heritage site
timeline.title_zh: 波尔莱斯内 - 洛桑 - 沃韦 - 蒙特勒 - 因特拉肯：人类自然遗产，日内瓦环湖风景线
timeline.description_en: In the morning travel to flower-filled Lausanne, capital of the Vaud canton and the Olympic Capital, with free time at the Olympic Park (home of the IOC and Olympic Museum) and a stop at the Ouchy waterfront lined with cafes, restaurants and hotels. Then drive the spectacular Lake Geneva (Lake Léman) scenic route past the Lavaux vineyard terraces, an 800-year-old, roughly 40 km stretch of terraced vines that is a UNESCO World Heritage site. In the afternoon admire Montreux's Château de Chillon (exterior), the iconic medieval 'floating' castle reflected in the lake and immortalized by Byron's 'The Prisoner of Chillon'; pass Lake Thun on the way to the hotel. Overnight: Grandhotel Giessbach (the 'Bach Conservatory') or an equivalent 4-star hotel. Optional add-on: Interlaken paragliding from the Beatenberg launch site (EUR 220) — a high-risk activity (ages 10–65, weight 10–95 kg, must be in good health) not covered by ordinary travel insurance.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往四季布满鲜花的洛桑（沃州首府、奥林匹克之都），自由游览奥林匹克公园（国际奥委会与奥林匹克博物馆所在地），并在沿岸布满咖啡厅、餐厅和酒店的乌希码头停留。随后驶上最精彩的环日内瓦湖（莱蒙湖）景观之路，途经绵延约40公里、拥有800多年历史、被列为世界文化遗产的拉沃葡萄梯田。下午欣赏蒙特勒的西庸城堡（外观）——这座倒影于湖中的瑞士标志性中世纪“水上”城堡，因拜伦的《西庸的囚徒》而名扬天下；之后途经图恩湖前往酒店入住。夜宿：吉斯巴赫酒店（巴赫音乐学院）或同等4星级酒店。推荐自费项目：因特拉肯高空滑翔伞，从贝阿滕贝格山滑翔伞基地出发（220欧元）——属高风险项目（年龄10–65周岁、体重10–95公斤、身体健康者方可参加），普通旅游保险不包含此项目。

timeline.title_en: Interlaken to the Jungfrau region and back — the Giessbach château hotel beneath the Aletsch glacier falls
timeline.title_zh: 因特拉肯 - 少女峰地区 - 因特拉肯：阿莱奇冰川瀑布下的吉斯巴赫城堡酒店
timeline.description_en: Spend the day in the Jungfrau region. Three options are offered, choose only one: Option 1 (included) — drive with the guide via Wilderswil (the 'red train' photo spot), Grindelwald's classic 'dream slope' alpine scenery and Lauterbrunnen to view the Jungfrau and Eiger glaciers; Option 2 (EUR 230) — the Jungfrau panoramic cog railway to the summit via Grindelwald and the Eiger glacier up to the Top of Europe and the Sphinx observation deck overlooking the snow-capped Jungfrau and the great Aletsch glacier; Option 3 (EUR 70) — the First aerial gondola from Grindelwald to the First summit with the First Cliff Walk and optional thrill activities. Then visit Interlaken town with free time on Höheweg street and the Höhematte green, set between Lake Thun and Lake Brienz. Overnight: Grandhotel Giessbach (the 'Bach Conservatory' filming location for 'Crash Landing on You') or an equivalent 4-star hotel, perched above Lake Brienz with the Giessbach Falls running through the grounds.
timeline.description_zh: 全天游览少女峰地区，以下三个推荐项目仅可三选一，不可同时选择两项：项目一（费用包含）——跟随导游乘车依次游览维尔德斯维尔的网红“红色火车站”、格林德尔瓦尔德经典瑞士山景“梦幻山坡”，并在劳特布龙嫩远观少女峰及艾格冰川；项目二（230欧元）——乘少女峰全景缆车登顶，经格林德尔瓦尔德、艾格冰川至欧洲海拔最高的火车站“欧洲之巅”，登上“斯芬克斯观景台”俯瞰白雪皑皑的少女峰和阿莱奇冰川；项目三（70欧元）——从格林德尔瓦尔德乘空中贡多拉直达菲斯特峰巅，游览悬崖天梭巅峰栈道First Cliff Walk及多种高空刺激活动。随后参观因特拉肯小镇，自由游览何维克街与荷黑马特绿地广场，小镇位于图恩湖与布里恩茨湖之间。夜宿：吉斯巴赫酒店（韩剧《爱的迫降》取景地“巴赫音乐学院”）或同等4星级酒店，酒店坐落于布里恩茨湖上方山丘，吉斯巴赫瀑布横穿酒店园区。

timeline.title_en: Interlaken to Lungern, Lucerne & Zurich — the GoldenPass scenic train through picture-perfect Switzerland
timeline.title_zh: 因特拉肯 - 龙疆 - 卢塞恩 - 苏黎世：乘坐金色山口列车，尽览瑞士如画风景
timeline.description_en: In the morning go to Lungern to enjoy Lake Lungern and the village scenery, then board the GoldenPass scenic train for the roughly one-hour Lungern–Lucerne leg, winding through the Alps past sapphire lakes, snow-capped peaks and red-roofed villages with panoramic glass windows. In the afternoon tour Lucerne and its lake: hear the story of Swiss loyalty and fortitude told by the Lion Monument (a dying lion carved into rock in 1821 to honor the 786 Swiss Guards who fell defending the Tuileries in 1792, called by Mark Twain 'the most mournful and moving piece of stone in the world'), then see the Chapel Bridge (Kapellbrücke) and the octagonal Water Tower. Then continue to Zurich for the night. Overnight: Crowne Plaza Zurich or an equivalent 4-star hotel, set in Zurich's lively commercial district within walking distance of shops, bars and restaurants. (Note: the Lucerne–Lungern direction of the GoldenPass has no guide on board.)
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往龙疆，游览龙疆湖及小镇风光，随后乘坐金色山口观光列车走龙疆—卢塞恩段，约1小时车程，穿山越岭、全景玻璃车窗一路串起蓝宝石般的湖泊、白雪皑皑的群山和红瓦彩屋。下午游览卢塞恩湖的湖光山色，聆听狮子纪念碑讲述瑞士人忠贞坚毅的历史（1821年由丹麦雕塑家在天然岩石上雕刻的濒死雄狮，纪念1792年为保护巴黎杜乐丽宫的路易十六家族而全部战死的786名瑞士雇佣兵，被马克·吐温誉为“世界上最悲壮、最感人的石雕”），并参观卡贝尔廊桥与八角形水塔等景点。之后前往苏黎世入住酒店。夜宿：苏黎世皇冠假日酒店或同等4星级酒店，坐落于苏黎世热闹的商业街区，步行可达商店、酒吧与餐馆。（提示：金色山口列车卢塞恩—龙疆段车上无导游陪同。）

timeline.title_en: Zurich to Milan — along the Alps to a 500-year Gothic masterpiece
timeline.title_zh: 苏黎世 - 米兰：沿阿尔卑斯山脉，瞻仰历时500年建成的哥特式精美建筑
timeline.description_en: After breakfast tour the Swiss financial metropolis of Zurich: explore the old town, Lake Zurich, the Lindenhof park (the tree-covered hilltop overlooking the Limmat and a 'Crash Landing on You' filming spot) and stroll along the Limmat River. Then drive to Milan to freely admire its landmark Milan Cathedral / Duomo (exterior) — a Gothic masterpiece begun in 1386 and finished after 500 years, with 135 spires and some 6,000 marble statues — and the Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II, one of Europe's finest shopping arcades and one of the world's oldest, home to flagship boutiques such as Prada and Gucci and historic cafes like Caffè Biffi and Savini. Overnight: UNA Hotel Milano or an equivalent 4-star hotel in central Milan, about 10 minutes from the Duomo.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往瑞士金融大都会苏黎世，参观苏黎世老城、苏黎世湖、林登霍夫公园（俯瞰利马特河、苏黎世大教堂及右岸风光的菩提树山丘，也是《爱的迫降》取景地），漫步利马特河边。之后前往米兰，自由参观米兰的标志性建筑米兰大教堂（外观）——这座始建于1386年、历时500年才完工的哥特式建筑，共有135座大小尖塔、约6000多座大理石雕像；以及欧洲最美的商业拱廊之一、世界最古老的购物中心之一——埃马努埃莱二世长廊，这里汇聚Prada、Gucci等意大利奢侈品牌旗舰店及Caffè Biffi、Savini Milano等老字号咖啡馆。夜宿：米兰UNA酒店或同等4星级酒店，位于米兰市中心，距米兰大教堂约10分钟车程。

timeline.title_en: Milan to Venice — romantic Venice on gentle blue waves
timeline.title_zh: 米兰 - 威尼斯：温柔碧波上浪漫的威尼斯
timeline.description_en: In the morning set off for Venice, the 'Pearl of the Adriatic', a city of 118 islands joined by 177 canals and 401 bridges. Visit St Mark's Basilica (exterior), a lavish Byzantine church famed for its five onion domes and golden mosaics; St Mark's Square (Piazza San Marco), the rectangular heart of the city ringed by Renaissance buildings, the campanile and the Doge's Palace; the Bridge of Sighs (exterior), the early-Baroque enclosed bridge that condemned prisoners once crossed from the Doge's Palace to the cells; and the magnificent Doge's Palace (exterior). These waterborne buildings and winding canals make Venice's romance linger long. Overnight: voco Venice (InterContinental) or the Four Points by Sheraton Venice, or an equivalent 4-star hotel — one of Venice's newly renovated, stylishly modern hotels.
timeline.description_zh: 上午出发前往“亚得里亚海明珠”威尼斯——这座由118个小岛、以177条水道和401座桥梁连成一体的水上都市。参观圣马可大教堂（外观），这座拜占庭风格的华丽教堂以五座洋葱形圆顶和金色马赛克装饰闻名；圣马可广场，威尼斯政治、宗教与节庆的中心，由公爵府、圣马可大教堂、钟楼及文艺复兴时期精美建筑围合而成的长方形广场；叹息桥（外观），古代由法院向监狱押送死囚必经的早期巴洛克式封闭拱桥；以及华丽的总督宫（外观）。这些建在水上的美丽建筑与蜿蜒水巷一起，让威尼斯的浪漫风情久久挥之不去。夜宿：威尼斯洲际voco酒店或威尼斯福朋喜来登酒店，或同等4星级酒店——为威尼斯新近装修、现代时尚的酒店之一。

timeline.title_en: Venice to Florence — the soul of the Renaissance, a journey through art
timeline.title_zh: 威尼斯 - 佛罗伦萨：诗歌之地，文艺复兴之魂，享受艺术之旅
timeline.description_en: In the morning head to Florence, birthplace of the Renaissance. Visit the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore (the 'Duomo', the world's third-largest church; entry involves queuing), whose white, red and green marble facade epitomizes Renaissance classicism and which took 175 years to build from 1296; the Piazza della Signoria, an open-air sculpture museum and the city's political heart with the Palazzo Vecchio, a copy of Michelangelo's David and the Fountain of Neptune; the Ponte Vecchio (Old Bridge), built in 1345 over the Arno, where Dante is said to have met Beatrice; and Piazzale Michelangelo, the panoramic terrace looking over the whole city — a fine spot to watch sunrise and sunset. Overnight: a Tuscan-villa hotel in Florence (an 18th-century Tuscan-style villa with antique furnishings, gardens of century-old olive trees, an outdoor pool and gym) or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午出发前往文艺复兴的发源地佛罗伦萨。参观世界第三大教堂——圣母百花大教堂（需排队进入），其白、红、绿三色大理石贴面将文艺复兴推崇的古典与优雅诠释得淋漓尽致，自1296年起历时175年建成；市政广场，有“露天雕塑博物馆”之称、数个世纪的政治生活中心，广场上有维琪奥宫（旧宫）、米开朗基罗《大卫》复制品及海神喷泉；老桥（维奇奥桥），建于1345年、横跨阿诺河，相传但丁曾在此邂逅比阿特丽丝；以及米开朗基罗广场，可登高俯瞰全城风景，也是观赏日出和日落的好位置，阳光下佛罗伦萨焕发出不同光彩。夜宿：佛罗伦萨托斯卡纳别墅酒店（一栋18世纪托斯卡纳风格别墅，配仿古家具，拥有种植百年橄榄树的花园，设室外游泳池与健身房）或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Florence to Cinque Terre, Pisa & back to Florence — the Cinque Terre scenic train along the Ligurian coast
timeline.title_zh: 佛罗伦萨 - 五渔村 - 比萨 - 佛罗伦萨：乘坐五渔村景观火车，赏利古里亚湾美景
timeline.description_en: After breakfast travel to the Cinque Terre to visit the beautiful clifftop fishing villages along the Ligurian coast — Monterosso al Mare, Vernazza, Corniglia, Manarola and Riomaggiore — a UNESCO World Heritage site since 1997. In the afternoon go to Pisa to see the Leaning Tower of Pisa (exterior) and the Piazza dei Miracoli (Square of Miracles) at the city's historic and cultural heart, the walled square holding the cathedral, the leaning bell tower, the baptistery and the cemetery. Overnight: the Tuscan-villa hotel in Florence or an equivalent 4-star hotel. (Note: if bad weather or a rail strike makes the Cinque Terre inaccessible, the itinerary automatically switches to touring coastal towns by coach or another means.)
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后出发前往五渔村，沿利古里亚海岸线游览悬崖上的美丽渔村——蒙特罗索、韦尔纳扎、科尔尼利亚、马纳罗拉及里奥马焦雷，五渔村于1997年被联合国教科文组织列入世界文化遗产名录。下午前往比萨，游览比萨斜塔（外观）和位于比萨历史文化中心的奇迹广场——这片围墙包围的区域内有比萨主教座堂、比萨斜塔（钟楼）、圣乔瓦尼洗礼堂和比萨墓园。夜宿：佛罗伦萨托斯卡纳别墅酒店或同等4星级酒店。（提示：如遇恶劣天气或铁路公司罢工等因素导致无法游览五渔村，行程将自动更改为乘坐大巴车或其他形式游览海岸线城市。）

timeline.title_en: Florence to San Gimignano, Siena, Pienza & Rome — the medieval town of towers and the cypress lane of Val d'Orcia
timeline.title_zh: 佛罗伦萨 - 圣吉米尼亚诺 - 锡耶纳 - 皮恩扎 - 罗马：中世纪万塔古城，奥尔恰谷丝柏树小径
timeline.description_en: After breakfast tour San Gimignano, the Tuscan hill town known as the 'Medieval Manhattan' for its surviving towers, with free time at the Torre Grossa (exterior), the Town Hall (exterior) and the Piazza della Cisterna (well square). Then go to Siena to explore the old city, Siena Cathedral (exterior), the shell-shaped Piazza del Campo, the Town Hall (exterior) and the Torre del Mangia (exterior), Italy's second-tallest tower at 102 m. Next visit Pienza, the 'ideal city' rebuilt by Pope Pius II in 1459, with views from its walls over the World Heritage Val d'Orcia. Finally stop for free photos at the famous winding cypress lane before driving on to Rome to check in. Overnight: a riverside palace hotel in Rome near the Borghese Park (with classic Italian design, antique furnishings and a large breakfast buffet) or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后出发游览圣吉米尼亚诺小镇——以保存完好的中世纪塔楼著称、有“中世纪曼哈顿”之称的托斯卡纳山城，自由游览格罗萨塔楼（外观）、市政厅（外观）、水井广场等景点。随后前往锡耶纳，游览锡耶纳古城、锡耶纳大教堂（外观）、贝壳形的田野广场、市政厅（外观）及曼吉亚塔楼（外观），后者高102米，是意大利第二高的塔楼。随后前往皮恩扎，这座1459年由教皇皮乌斯二世主持重建的“理想城市”，可从城墙上俯瞰世界遗产奥尔恰山谷的景致。之后前往绵延的丝柏树小路自由拍照，再前往罗马入住酒店。夜宿：罗马河畔宫殿酒店（比邻波格赛公园，采用意大利古典设计、配古董家具，提供丰盛自助早餐）或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Rome — a walking deep-dive into the glory of the 'Eternal City'
timeline.title_zh: 罗马：徒步深度游览“万城之城”古罗马帝国的辉煌
timeline.description_en: After breakfast explore Rome, the cradle of the Roman Empire known as the 'Eternal City'. See the Colosseum (exterior) rising on the ancient site, the Pantheon (exterior, more than 2,000 years old and the resting place of artists such as Raphael), and visit the Spanish Steps (Piazza di Spagna, from 'Roman Holiday') and the Trevi Fountain (exterior), where tossing a coin over your shoulder is said to make a wish come true. The tour concludes in the early afternoon. Overnight: none. (Note: the main sights of Rome's old city lie within the vehicle-restricted ZTL zone; the hotel is within walking distance, and today is a walking tour of roughly 5 km round trip — please wear light, comfortable shoes. Luggage can be left at the hotel.)
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往世界著名的历史文化名城罗马，这里是古罗马帝国的发祥地，因历史悠久而被称为“永恒之城”。参观矗立在古罗马遗址上的斗兽场（外观）、万神殿（外观，距今已有2000多年历史，拉斐尔等艺术家长眠于此），游览西班牙广场（电影《罗马假日》取景地）和特莱维喷泉（许愿池，外观）——据说背对喷泉从肩上投出一枚硬币便能梦想成真。当天午后结束美好行程。住宿：无。（提示：罗马古城区主要景点均在车辆禁行区ZTL内，酒店位置方便步行游览各景点，当天为步行游览，往返约5公里，请穿着轻便舒适的鞋；酒店可寄存行李。）

meeting_en: Paris, France. Group assembles in central Paris on the morning of Day 1 before departure to Dijon.
meeting_zh: 法国巴黎。第1天上午于巴黎市区集合，随后出发前往第戎。

faqs.question_en: Where and when do we meet and disperse?
faqs.question_zh: 集合及集散地点和时间是怎样的？
faqs.answer_en: The trip starts in Paris and ends in Rome. Meet at Piazza d'Italia (Place d'Italie) in Paris at 09:00 on Day 1; the group disperses in central Rome or at the hotel at around 14:00 in the afternoon of Day 10 (luggage can be left at the hotel). Times and places are for reference — the actual departure time follows the departure notice. We do not recommend a flight that lands in Paris on the morning of the start day; on the final day you can book an evening flight out of Rome.
faqs.answer_zh: 巴黎出发、罗马结束。行程第1天上午09:00在巴黎意大利广场集合；第10天午后约14:00左右在罗马市区或酒店解散（酒店可寄存行李）。以上为参考时间及地点，实际出发时间以出团通知书为准。本产品不推荐参团当天早上才降落巴黎的航班；结束当天可预订晚上的航班离开罗马。

faqs.question_en: Can I do the Interlaken paragliding?
faqs.question_zh: 我是否可以体验因特拉肯滑翔伞活动？
faqs.answer_en: Not included. If you wish to add Interlaken paragliding, please consider carefully — it is a unique extreme sport not covered by ordinary travel insurance. The guide will take you to the paragliding shuttle point (luggage can be left in the vehicle); after the activity you land at the town-center square and rejoin the group there.
faqs.answer_zh: 不包含。如果希望额外游览因特拉肯滑翔伞，请慎重考虑——滑翔伞属独特极限运动，普通旅游保险并未包含。导游负责将客人送至滑翔伞活动的接驳处（行李可寄存在车上），游客参加完滑翔伞项目后随滑翔伞降落到市中心广场集合。

faqs.question_en: Can we visit the Jungfrau panoramic cable car summit and the Sphinx observation deck?
faqs.question_zh: 我们是否可以游览少女峰全景缆车登顶及“斯芬克斯观景台”？
faqs.answer_en: Not included. If you wish to add the Jungfrau, you can tour it on your own from Interlaken Ost station.
faqs.answer_zh: 不包含。如果希望额外增加游览少女峰，可以在因特拉肯东站自行游览少女峰。

faqs.question_en: Can we visit the First cliff walk in the Jungfrau region?
faqs.question_zh: 我们是否可以游览少女峰的菲斯特栈道？
faqs.answer_en: Not included. If you wish to visit the First Cliff Walk and the summit zip-line and other outdoor activities, you can go with the guide to Grindelwald and then tour Grindelwald BGF – First Top of Adventure freely; total touring time is about 3 hours. You then get off at Interlaken Ost station and rejoin the guide.
faqs.answer_zh: 不包含。如果希望游览少女峰菲斯特悬崖栈道及山顶空中飞索等户外活动，可以跟随导游前往格林德尔瓦尔德，随后自由游览 Grindelwald BGF – First Top of Adventure，全程游览时间约3小时。随后在因特拉肯东站下车与导游再次汇合。

faqs.question_en: Can the Jungfrau scenic train and Sphinx deck be combined with the other sights of the Jungfrau region?
faqs.question_zh: 少女峰观光列车及“斯芬克斯观景台”能否和少女峰地区的景点同时参加？
faqs.answer_en: We organize all travelers to tour Wilderswil (the red Swiss train), the fairytale scenery of Lauterbrunnen and then Grindelwald at the foot of the Jungfrau. If you choose the scenic train, it conflicts with the 'dream slope' and 'red train station' viewpoints — you cannot see both at the same time.
faqs.answer_zh: 我社组织所有游客游览维尔德斯维尔（观赏红色瑞士火车）、劳特布龙嫩的瑞士童话风景，随后来到少女峰脚下的格林德尔瓦尔德。如果选择观光列车，则与“梦幻山坡”“红色火车站”有冲突，不可以同时看到。

faqs.question_en: Does the Jungfrau scenic train conflict with paragliding, the Brienz cog railway or the Interlaken cruise?
faqs.question_zh: 少女峰观光列车是否和滑翔伞、布里恩茨齿轮火车、因特拉肯游船有冲突？
faqs.answer_en: If you take the Jungfrau scenic train in the morning there is no conflict. However, if you take it in the afternoon to evening, you may not be able to experience all of the Giessbach items.
faqs.answer_zh: 如上午乘坐少女峰观光列车，没有冲突；但如果选择下午到晚间乘坐，则有可能无法体验到吉斯巴赫的全部项目。

faqs.question_en: What are the best plans for touring the Jungfrau region?
faqs.question_zh: 少女峰地区最佳游览方案是什么？
faqs.answer_en: A) Wellness route — a full free day in the Giessbach scenic area, including the Giessbach Falls, the Lake Brienz shore, the Interlaken cruise and the Giessbach cog railway (included Apr–Oct each year; not available in winter due to equipment maintenance). B) Easy package (included) — go with the guide to Wilderswil (red Swiss train), Lauterbrunnen's fairytale scenery and Grindelwald at the foot of the Jungfrau, then in the afternoon tour the Giessbach scenic area and the Lake Brienz shore. C) 'Commando' route — take the Jungfrau scenic train to the Sphinx observation deck, then tour the Giessbach scenic area. D) Extreme route (not included) — combine the First cliff walk, the summit zip-line and Interlaken paragliding.
faqs.answer_zh: A、养生游：全天自由游览吉斯巴赫风景区，包含吉斯巴赫瀑布、布里恩茨湖畔、因特拉肯游船、吉斯巴赫齿轮火车等门票（每年4月到10月份包含，冬季设备维护无法游览）。B、懒人包（费用包含）：跟随导游依次游览维尔德斯维尔（红色瑞士火车）、劳特布龙嫩的瑞士童话风景、随后来到少女峰脚下的格林德尔瓦尔德，当天下午游览吉斯巴赫风景区及布里恩茨湖畔。C、特种兵：乘坐少女峰景观列车游览斯芬克斯观景台，随后游览吉斯巴赫风景区。D、极限游（费用不包含）：同时游览菲斯特悬崖步道、山顶空中飞索及因特拉肯滑翔伞。

faqs.question_en: Can you help book the Maison Jeunet Michelin-starred restaurant?
faqs.question_zh: 是否可以协助预定 Maison Jeunet 米其林星级餐厅？
faqs.answer_en: Yes. On the B route (Rome start / Paris end) we recommend booking dinner at Maison Jeunet (two Michelin stars), the chef's recommended 8-course tasting dinner at EUR 195 (drinks not included). On the A route (Paris start / Rome end) you may book lunch at Maison Jeunet, the chef's recommended set lunch (3-course set at EUR 85, drinks not included). Because of the Relais & Châteaux brand's special booking method, we send a booking link that the traveler must confirm in person and guarantee with a credit card.
faqs.answer_zh: 可以。B路线（罗马出发、巴黎结束）推荐预订 Maison Jeunet（米其林两星级）餐厅晚餐，主厨推荐8道式晚餐195欧元（不含酒水）。A路线（巴黎出发、罗马结束）可选预订 Maison Jeunet 餐厅午餐，主厨推荐午餐（三道式套餐85欧元，不含酒水）。由于罗莱夏朵品牌的特殊预订方式，我社发送预订链接，需要游客本人确认预订，并且提供信用卡担保。

faqs.question_en: Can I book an airport transfer?
faqs.question_zh: 是否可以预定机场接送服务？
faqs.answer_en: Yes. Please select the airport transfer for the city you need within the fee options, and note your arriving flight number in the order.
faqs.answer_zh: 可以预订。请在费用选项内选择所需的城市机场接送服务，并在订单内备注到达的航班号。

faqs.question_en: Can I book hotels before the trip starts or after it ends?
faqs.question_zh: 是否可以预定行程开始前的酒店和行程结束后的酒店？
faqs.answer_en: Yes. The itinerary does not require early arrival and dovetails seamlessly with the round-trip flights to Paris and Rome. If a flight is delayed, the transfer driver can help you join the group directly in your departure city.
faqs.answer_zh: 可以。行程不要求提前到达，行程无缝衔接巴黎及罗马的往返航班时间；如遇晚点，接送机的司机可协助游客在出发地所在的城市直接参团。

faqs.question_en: Do I need a visa?
faqs.question_zh: 是否需要签证？
faqs.answer_en: Yes. This product does NOT include the visa fee — a Schengen visa (single or multiple entry) is required; if you need visa processing, choose a Schengen-visa product. After booking we provide all the materials needed to apply for the Schengen visa free of charge (see the detailed materials list), and we buy Schengen-compliant travel insurance for travelers whose visa we handle. 'Worry-free visa guarantee': if you sign with us 61 days before departure and have not obtained the visa within 45 days before departure, we bear all losses and immediately refund the full travel cost; travelers who do not meet this clause and still fail to obtain the visa are refunded per the change & cancellation terms. A rejection must be reported within 48 hours with the consulate's rejection letter. Your passport must be valid for at least six months from the date of departure, or customs may refuse entry. Visa fees, visa service fees, Schengen insurance fees and visa-center appointment fees are all non-refundable and non-transferable, even if the product is changed or cancelled.
faqs.answer_zh: 需要。本产品不包含签证费用——需要申根签证（单次或多次入境）；如需办理签证请选择申根签证产品。预订后免费提供办理申根签证的全部材料（参考详细材料清单），并为委托我社办理签证的游客购买符合申根要求的申根旅游保险。“保签无忧”：游客在出发日前61天与我社签约，如在出发前45天内未获取签证，我社承担所有损失，立即退还全部旅游费用；不符合该条款且仍未正常获取签证的游客，按“退改与取消条款”退费。如遇拒签需在48小时内通知我社并出具使领馆拒签函。护照有效期需在离境之日起至少还有六个月，否则海关有权拒绝入境。签证费、签证服务费、申根保险费、签证中心预约费均不可退款，也无法更改使用者，即使产品退改签，签证费用亦无法退款。

faqs.question_en: Booking, changes & cancellation
faqs.question_zh: 预订、变更与取消须知
faqs.answer_en: Free cancellation: up to 30 days before departure (not counting the 30th day) both the agency and the traveler may cancel without reason; after that, refunds follow the Change & Cancellation Terms. The product is a shared/joining group tour; the minimum group size to depart is 10 people, and optional activities also need 10 people or they may be cancelled and replaced with 'free time'. Because flights, traffic, ferries and strikes often force schedule and order changes, travelers must arrive in the meeting city one day before the tour and leave the dispersal city one day after, allowing reasonable connection time (at least 5 hours for a same-airport transfer, 7 hours for different airports in the same city; reasonable meet/disperse window 07:00–21:00). Room types: a single traveler pays a single-room supplement (refundable pro-rata if successfully matched as a share); two travelers default to a standard double (bed type assigned by the hotel, not selectable); a triple family room is for two parents plus a minor with bed type assigned by the hotel. European hotels are non-smoking, no cooking in rooms, check-in 14:00 / check-out 11:00, and air-conditioning is not a standard fixture. All hotels are base room types, randomly assigned with no choice of size, view or aspect; the listed hotel name is the preferred hotel and may be swapped for a same-star equivalent without separate notice. Pricing is in EUR at the time of booking; if you pay in CNY, the amount follows the Bank of China real-time 'euro selling price' on the day of payment, and refunds likewise use the rate of the refund day (the traveler bears any exchange differences and bank fees). Itinerary contingencies: the GoldenPass Lucerne–Lungern leg has no guide on board; the Cinque Terre is only partly visited and switches to coach in bad weather or rail strikes; Rome's old city is a walking tour (wear comfortable shoes); the Capri Blue Grotto is a natural attraction that may close in high tide/wind (its fee is not included; tip the boatman EUR 2–5); if extreme sea weather cancels the Positano/Amalfi cruise, the day is replaced with a coach visit to Sorrento and the cruise fee is refunded.
faqs.answer_zh: 免费取消：跟团游产品出发前30天（不含第30天）旅行社和旅行者均可无理由取消；其后按《更改与取消条例条款》退费。本产品为散客拼团，成团人数为10人，未达10人旅行社有权取消旅游团；团内自费活动未达10人也可能取消并改为“自由活动”。因航班、交通、渡轮取消、罢工等常导致行程时间及先后顺序调整，旅行者须在参团日前一天抵达集合地、离团日后一天离开集散地，并预留合理衔接时间（同机场转机至少5小时、同城不同机场至少7小时；合理集合集散时间段为07:00–21:00）。房型：单人报名默认含单人房差（成功拼房则按比例退还）；两人报名默认标准双人间（床型由酒店安排不可选）；三人家庭间默认两位父母与一位未成年儿童入住，床型由酒店安排。欧洲酒店全部禁烟、禁止房内做饭，入住14:00/退房11:00，且空调并非标准设施；所有酒店均为基础房型，不指定大小、风景和朝向，随机分配；行程内列明酒店为优先入住酒店，如订满可换为相同星级酒店且不另行通知。价格以欧元为预订计价单位；如选择人民币支付，则以当天支付时中国银行实时“欧元卖出价”自动计算的人民币价格为准，退款同样适用申请退款当日汇率（汇率差异及银行手续费由旅行者承担）。行程应变：金色山口列车卢塞恩—龙疆段车上无导游；五渔村只游览个别村子，恶劣天气或铁路罢工时改为大巴；罗马古城为徒步游览（请穿轻便舒适鞋）；卡布里蓝洞属自然景观，遇涨潮风浪可能关闭（蓝洞费用不含，请付船工2–5欧元小费）；如遇海上极端天气取消波西塔诺与阿马尔菲出海，则改为乘大巴参观索伦托老城，出海游船费用退还游客。

faqs.question_en: Health & safety requirements
faqs.question_zh: 健康与安全须知
faqs.answer_en: To prevent accidents, please have a health check before departure and DO NOT join if you have: infectious diseases (e.g. active tuberculosis, typhoid); cardiovascular disease (severe hypertension, heart insufficiency, myocardial ischemia/infarction); cerebrovascular disease (embolism, hemorrhage, brain tumor); respiratory disease (emphysema, cor pulmonale); psychiatric conditions (epilepsy and other mental illness); severe anemia (hemoglobin below 50 g/L); or if you are in the recovery period of major/medium surgery. Pregnancy: not permitted at all from 35 weeks; from 28 weeks a doctor's report (within 7 days) and the attending physician's consent are required; under 28 weeks please book with caution, sign a liability waiver, and you cannot join adventure, ski, sea, high-altitude or outdoor items. Persons with disabilities need a recent (7-day) doctor's report and consent, an accompanying immediate family member, and must apply at least 61 days ahead for a reserved place and facilities. Travelers over 70 need a health certificate and physical-exam report and an accompanying immediate family member (or sign a waiver); the trip is long and physically demanding, so those lacking stamina should book with caution; adventure/ski/sea/high-altitude/outdoor items require an attending physician's consent letter, and elder-care service should be requested at least 61 days ahead. Minors (under 18) must be accompanied by an immediate relative or guardian; some sights have special rules for under-18/12/6; children under 30 kg need a confirmed safety seat in advance; an under-18 traveling without parents needs a parental authorization letter; infants under 2 are not accepted. Under Article 15 of the Tourism Law, travelers must truthfully declare health information relevant to the activity (pregnancy, lactation, chronic disease, infectious-disease history, suspected symptoms or recent travel to epidemic areas) and follow safety warnings; concealment that causes harm or transmission makes the traveler liable for the resulting losses, medical/quarantine costs and damages.
faqs.answer_zh: 为确保安全出行、防止旅途中发生人身意外，请在出行前做一次必要的身体检查，如存在下列情况请勿报名：传染性疾病患者（如活动期肺结核、伤寒）；心血管疾病患者（如严重高血压、心功能不全、心肌缺氧、心肌梗塞）；脑血管疾病患者（如脑栓塞、脑出血、脑肿瘤）；呼吸系统疾病患者（如肺气肿、肺心病）；精神病患者（如癫痫及各种精神病）；严重贫血患者（血红蛋白低于50克/升）；大中型手术恢复期病患者。孕妇：妊娠35周及以上任何情况下都无法参团；28周及以上需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书；28周以下请慎重报名，需签署旅行社免责声明书，且无法参加探险、滑雪、出海、高空、户外等项目。残疾人：需提供7日内医生检查报告及同意书、需直系家属陪同、并提前至少61天申请预留位置及专用设施。老年旅游者：70周岁以上需提供健康证明、体检报告并由直系家属陪同（否则需签署免责声明书）；本行程较长、对体力要求较高，体力不支者请慎重报名；探险/滑雪/出海/高空/户外项目需持主治医师同意书；并提前至少61天申请适老化服务及设施。未成年旅游者（未满18周岁）须由直系亲属或监护人陪同；部分项目对未满18/12/6周岁有特殊限定；30公斤以下儿童需提前确认安全座椅；无父母陪同的18岁以下未成年人须持父母授权书；本产品不接受2周岁以下婴儿参团。根据《旅游法》第15条，旅游者需如实告知与旅游活动相关的个人健康信息（包括妊娠期、哺乳期、慢性病、传染病史、疑似症状或近期疫区旅居史）并遵守安全警示规定；若因隐瞒健康信息导致人身损害或传播风险，旅游者需自行承担相应医疗、隔离费用及赔偿责任。

title_en: Paris Art & Culture Panorama: 3-Day Small-Group Tour
title_zh: 巴黎全景人文艺术之旅3天跟团游
short_en: Three days exploring the soul of Paris: a guided Louvre tour, a Seine river cruise, the Palace of Versailles, and the city's elegant fashion boulevards.
short_zh: 三天深度领略巴黎之魂：卢浮宫专人讲解、塞纳河游船、凡尔赛宫，以及奥斯曼大街的优雅时尚。
desc_en: This three-day Paris tour pairs world-class art with the city's living culture. Begin with an in-depth guided visit to the Louvre led by a French national-museum lecturer, then take in Notre-Dame, the Eiffel Tower, and a romantic Seine river cruise. Day two crosses to the Baroque splendour of the Palace of Versailles before returning to the fashion heart of Paris along Boulevard Haussmann. A relaxed final morning and a midday checkout round off the journey, with central 4-star hotels and a Chinese-speaking guide throughout.
desc_zh: 这趟三天巴黎之旅将世界级艺术与城市鲜活的人文风情融为一体。首日由法兰西国家博物馆讲解师带您深度参观卢浮宫，随后游览巴黎圣母院、埃菲尔铁塔，并乘塞纳河游船感受浪漫风光。次日前往巴洛克艺术瑰宝凡尔赛宫，再返回巴黎时尚中心奥斯曼大街。末日睡到自然醒、午时退房自行散团。全程入住市中心四星级酒店，配中文导游。

highlights.en: In-depth guided Louvre visit led by a French national-museum lecturer
highlights.zh: 由法兰西国家博物馆讲解师带领深度参观卢浮宫

highlights.en: Romantic Seine river cruise past Notre-Dame, the Louvre and the Alexandre III bridge
highlights.zh: 乘塞纳河游船，途经巴黎圣母院、卢浮宫与亚历山大三世大桥

highlights.en: Visit the Baroque masterpiece, the Palace of Versailles
highlights.zh: 参观巴洛克艺术瑰宝凡尔赛宫

highlights.en: Stroll the fashion heart of Paris: Boulevard Haussmann, Galeries Lafayette and Printemps
highlights.zh: 漫步巴黎时尚中心奥斯曼大街、老佛爷百货与春天百货

highlights.en: See Notre-Dame, the Eiffel Tower, Les Invalides and Place de la Concorde
highlights.zh: 饱览巴黎圣母院、埃菲尔铁塔、荣军院与协和广场

highlights.en: Central Paris 4-star hotels (Novotel / Mercure or equivalent)
highlights.zh: 入住巴黎市中心四星级酒店（诺富特/美居或同级）

highlights.en: All listed attraction tickets included — Louvre, Versailles and Seine cruise
highlights.zh: 含全部所列景点门票：卢浮宫、凡尔赛宫与塞纳河游船

highlights.en: Chinese-speaking guide and all-inclusive pricing, no forced shopping
highlights.zh: 中文导游、全包价格，无强制购物

includes.en: Hotels: 2 nights in 4-star hotels.
includes.zh: 【酒店】：四星级酒店2晚。

includes.en: Meals: 2 breakfasts in total, served as buffet or other in-hotel breakfast.
includes.zh: 【餐饮】：酒店内自助早餐或其他形式早餐共计2餐。

includes.en: Operating costs: tourist/city tax, city-entry fees, residence tax, road and bridge tolls, parking and fuel charges, driver-guide meal allowances and other in-itinerary operating expenses.
includes.zh: 【执行】：游客城市税、进城费、居住税、过路过桥费、停车燃油费、司导餐补等行程内执行费用。

includes.en: Transport: tour coach or business travel vehicle.
includes.zh: 【交通】：旅游巴士或者商务旅行车。

includes.en: Guide: professional driver plus Chinese-speaking guide, or a Chinese-speaking driver-guide throughout (note: groups of 8 or fewer use a business vehicle with a Chinese-speaking driver-guide; groups of more than 8 use a tour coach with a professional driver plus a Chinese-speaking guide).
includes.zh: 【导游】：职业司机+中文导游或者全程中文司机兼导游（注：8人以下为商务车+中文司机兼导游，8人以上为旅游巴士+专业司机+中文导游）。

includes.en: Luggage: one 23 kg checked bag and one piece of hand luggage.
includes.zh: 【行李】：1件23公斤行李及1件随身行李。

includes.en: Admission tickets: Louvre ticket (including national-gallery guide), Versailles ticket (including national-gallery guide), and the Seine river cruise.
includes.zh: 【门票】：卢浮宫门票（含国家馆讲解师）、凡尔赛门票（含国家馆讲解师）、塞纳河游船。

excludes.en: Passport: personal passport fees.
excludes.zh: 护照：个人护照费用。

excludes.en: Visa: tourist visa fees for the destination countries listed in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 签证：行程中所列旅游国家所需的观光签证费用。

excludes.en: Insurance: travel insurance fees (if the itinerary involves high-risk sports, please verify whether your travel insurance covers them).
excludes.zh: 保险：旅游保险费用；（如行程内涉及到高风险运动，请核实旅游保险是否包含该项运动）。

excludes.en: Tips: gratuities for the guide and driver totaling 10 EUR per person per day, same rate for adults and children.
excludes.zh: 小费：游客支付导游和司机小费一共10欧/人/天，大小同价。

excludes.en: Meals: apart from any special meals included in the itinerary, lunches and dinners are not included.
excludes.zh: 餐饮：除行程内包含的特色餐外，行程中不包含午、晚正餐费用。

excludes.en: Admissions: sights not marked as fee-included (including but not limited to those marked 'exterior', and all 'recommended', 'optional', 'experience' items not noted as included) are at your own expense if you wish to visit.
excludes.zh: 门票：行程中未注明费用包含的景点（包括但不仅限于行程中注明“外观”的景点，“推荐”“可选”“体验”等等所有未提及费用包含的项目，如游客需要参观，敬请自理）。

excludes.en: Extended stays: any extra accommodation, transport or sightseeing beyond the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 延长住宿：行程外额外延长的住宿、交通、观光费用。

excludes.en: Personal expenses: drinks, alcohol, taxis, phone charges and other personal spending.
excludes.zh: 私人消费：如饮料酒类、出租车、电话费等个人消费。

excludes.en: Other transport: any transport not mentioned in the inclusions beyond the business vehicle or minibus, such as the Venice gondola, sightseeing trains in restricted-traffic zones, electric taxis, etc., at your own expense.
excludes.zh: 其他交通：除包含商务旅行车或者中巴之外，费用包含中未提及的其他交通费用，如威尼斯贡多拉，以及车辆限行区的观光火车、电瓶出租车等费用敬请自理。

excludes.en: Free activities: any sightseeing you do on your own in the evening, plus recommended items and their associated transport, meals, admissions, shopping, etc.
excludes.zh: 自由活动：游客夜间自行游览及行程中的推荐项目，以及产生的交通、餐饮、门票、购物等费用。

excludes.en: Experience activities: any travel-experience activities not included in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 体验活动：行程中的没有包含的各项旅游体验活动。

excludes.en: Other costs: any expense not mentioned in the inclusions. In cases of force majeure (natural disaster, war, strike, etc.), or special situations such as traffic delays, flight cancellations or rescheduling, embassy visa delays or insufficient group numbers, or other causes not attributable to our company, the company reserves the right to charge the additional cost (e.g. overseas visa extension, board, lodging and transport, national airline fare adjustments, etc.).
excludes.zh: 其他费用：费用包含中未提及的费用。如因天灾、战争、罢工等不可抗力的原因，及因交通延阻、航班取消或更改时间、使馆延误出签证、人数不足等特殊情况或其他非我公司原因所引致的额外费用（如在外延期签证费、住、食及交通费、国家航空运价调整等），我公司有权追加差价。

timeline.title_en: Paris: The Louvre & the Heart of the City (Seine River Cruise)
timeline.title_zh: 巴黎：卢浮宫与市中心精华（塞纳河游船）
timeline.description_en: In the morning, visit the Louvre Museum, the pride of France, where a guide from the museum's national-gallery program gives an in-depth, theme-based talk on selected masterpieces. In the afternoon, tour Notre-Dame Cathedral, the Ile de la Cite, the Eiffel Tower (exterior) and the Champ de Mars, then board a Seine river cruise that passes the Hotel des Invalides (exterior), the Grand and Petit Palais (exterior), the Pont Alexandre III, the love-lock bridge and the Place de la Concorde. The famous glass-cabin 'Bateaux Mouches' covers about 3.2 km in roughly one hour, weaving past Notre-Dame, the Louvre and the Champs-Elysees. The full day is spent on the central Paris sights. Overnight at the Novotel or Mercure Paris, or an equivalent 4-star hotel, located in the safer southern part of the city. Note: in peak season the Louvre limits in-museum guiding, in which case the 10 EUR per-person in-museum guiding fee is refunded; Versailles has no official guide for groups of fewer than 3 people and an audio guide is used instead.
timeline.description_zh: 上午参观法兰西引以为傲的卢浮宫博物馆，由法兰西国家馆讲解师精选主题进行深度讲解。下午前往游览巴黎圣母院、西岱岛、埃菲尔铁塔（外观）以及战神广场，之后乘坐塞纳河游船游览荣军院（外观）、大小皇宫（外观）、亚历山大三世桥、巴黎锁桥与协和广场等地。著名的透明船舱“苍蝇船”航程约3.2公里、约1小时，途经巴黎圣母院、卢浮宫、香榭丽舍大道等地，被称为“巴黎不可错过的深度游览项目”。全天游览巴黎市中心景点。夜宿巴黎诺富特酒店或美居酒店或同等4星级酒店，位于更为安全的巴黎南部。提示：旺季卢浮宫限制馆内讲解员讲解时将退还馆内讲解费10欧元/每位；凡尔赛不足3人无官导讲解，由讲解器代替。

timeline.title_en: Paris - Versailles - Paris: Palace of Versailles & Haussmann Fashion District
timeline.title_zh: 巴黎—凡尔赛—巴黎：凡尔赛宫与奥斯曼时尚街区
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, head to the Palace of Versailles in the southwestern suburbs of Paris to tour this magnificent monument to France's age of absolute monarchy, built by Louis XIV at the cost of more than thirty thousand workers, architects and engineers. In the afternoon, return to central Paris and visit the city's fashion hub around Boulevard Haussmann and Rue Royale, with free time to see the Paris Opera (Palais Garnier, exterior) and to shop the famous department stores. Boulevard Haussmann, between the 8th and 9th arrondissements, is home to the Galeries Lafayette and Printemps stores, and it was at No. 102 that Marcel Proust wrote much of 'In Search of Lost Time.' The Paris Opera, designed by Charles Garnier in 1861, is a masterpiece of eclectic architecture blending Greco-Roman colonnades and Baroque forms, one of the signature buildings of the Napoleon III era. Overnight at the Novotel or Mercure Paris, or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往位于巴黎西南部郊区的凡尔赛宫，游览这座法国封建专制鼎盛时期的华丽纪念碑——当年路易十四为建造它动用了三万余名工人、建筑师、工程师与技师。下午返回巴黎市区，前往时尚中心奥斯曼大街和皇家大道，自由参观巴黎歌剧院（外观）及春天百货、巴黎老佛爷等时尚街区。奥斯曼大道位于巴黎第八区与第九区之间，拥有老佛爷百货与春天百货两大百货公司，《追忆似水年华》的作者马塞尔·普鲁斯特曾在这条街102号完成了该书的大部分写作。巴黎歌剧院由查尔斯·加尼叶于1861年设计，融合古希腊罗马式柱廊与巴洛克形式，是折衷主义的登峰造极之作，也是拿破仑三世典型建筑之一。夜宿巴黎诺富特酒店或美居酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Paris: Free Morning & Departure
timeline.title_zh: 巴黎：自由活动与散团
timeline.description_en: Sleep in at the hotel and enjoy a relaxed morning. Check out at the hotel front desk by 12:00, after which the group disperses on its own. There is no hotel for this night and no further sightseeing is arranged.
timeline.description_zh: 在酒店睡到自然醒，享受悠闲的上午。12:00在酒店前台退房，之后自行散团。当晚不含酒店，无其他游览安排。

meeting_en: Paris — tour starts and ends in Paris; specific hotel pickup details confirmed in the departure notice.
meeting_zh: 巴黎 — 行程在巴黎集合并结束，具体酒店接送安排以出团通知书为准。

faqs.question_en: I'm joining from a Rome group tour that ends in Paris - do I need to add an extra night's hotel?
faqs.question_zh: 我从罗马跟团到巴黎结束行程，是否需要增加一晚酒店？
faqs.answer_en: This product connects with our group tours. You can book Itinerary B, which includes the previous night's hotel in Paris.
faqs.answer_zh: 该产品衔接我社跟团游，您可以报B线路，含有前一晚巴黎酒店。

faqs.question_en: What are the meeting/start arrangements for Itineraries A, B and C, and which flights are suitable?
faqs.question_zh: A、B、C三种行程的集合安排是怎样的？哪些航班合适？
faqs.answer_en: Itinerary A (3 days): meet at 09:00 on the departure day in front of the McDonald's at Place d'Italie in Paris's 13th arrondissement. Flights landing in Paris on the morning of the start day are NOT recommended; you may book a flight leaving Paris on the evening of the final day. Itinerary B (3 days): make your own way to the hotel to check in at 14:00 on the departure day. A flight landing in Paris on the morning of the start day IS acceptable; a flight leaving Paris on the evening of the final day is NOT recommended. Itinerary C (2 days): meet at 09:00 on the departure day in front of the McDonald's at Place d'Italie in the 13th arrondissement. Flights landing in Paris on the morning of the start day are NOT recommended, and a flight leaving on the evening of the final day is NOT recommended either.
faqs.answer_zh: 行程A（3天）：出发当天09:00在巴黎13区意大利广场麦当劳门口集合。本产品不推荐参团当天早上降落巴黎的航班！可预定结束当天晚上的航班离开巴黎。行程B（3天）：出发当天14:00自行前往酒店入住。本产品可以预定参团当天早上降落巴黎的航班！不推荐预定结束当天晚上的航班离开巴黎。行程C（2天）：出发当天09:00在巴黎13区意大利广场麦当劳门口集合。本产品不推荐参团当天早上降落巴黎的航班，也不推荐预定结束当天晚上的航班离开巴黎。

faqs.question_en: Do I need a visa?
faqs.question_zh: 是否需要签证？
faqs.answer_en: This product does NOT include the visa fee. A Schengen visa (single- or multiple-entry) is required; if you need to apply, please choose a Schengen-visa product. After booking we provide free of charge all the materials needed to apply for the Schengen visa (see the detailed checklist). Your passport must be valid for at least six months from the date of departure, or customs may refuse entry. 'Worry-free visa' guarantee: for travelers who sign with us 61 days before departure, if the visa is not obtained within 45 days before departure we bear all losses and immediately refund the full tour fee; travelers who do not meet this clause and fail to obtain the visa are refunded per the change-and-cancellation terms. In case of refusal, notify us within 48 hours with the consulate's rejection letter, and submit any supplementary/amended materials within five days. Visa fees, visa service fees, Schengen insurance fees and visa-center appointment fees are all non-refundable and non-transferable, even if the product itself is changed or cancelled.
faqs.answer_zh: 本产品不包含签证费用，需要申根签证（单次或多次入境）；如需办理请选择申根签证产品。预定后我社免费提供办理申根签证的全部材料（参考详细材料清单）。护照有效期需在离境之日起至少还有六个月，否则海关有权拒绝入境。保签无忧：游客在出发日前61天与我社签约，如在出发前45天内未获取签证，我社承担所有损失，立即退还全部旅游费用；不符合该条款的游客如未正常获取签证，将按“退改与取消条款”退费。如遇拒签需在48小时内通知我社并出具使领馆拒签函，如需补充或更改材料须在五天内提交。签证费、签证服务费、申根保险费、签证中心预约费均不可退款，也无法更改使用者，即使产品退改签，签证费用亦无法退款。

faqs.question_en: Booking, changes & cancellation
faqs.question_zh: 预订、变更与取消须知
faqs.answer_en: Free cancellation: both the agency and the traveler may cancel without reason more than 30 days before departure (not including the 30th day); within that window, refunds follow the Change and Cancellation Terms. Itinerary contingency: because of frequent flight changes, traffic, ferry cancellations, strikes/marches and route-order optimization, the actual arrival times and order of sightseeing may change; you are required to arrive at the meeting point one day before the tour starts and leave the dispersal point one day after it ends, allowing reasonable connection time (at least 5 hours for same-airport transfers, 7 hours for different airports in the same city; reasonable meeting/dispersal window is 07:00-21:00). The agency may adjust the route order without being in breach. Group formation (成团): this is a shared/join-in group tour; the minimum group size to confirm departure is 10 people - if not reached 30 days before departure (not including the 30th day) either side may cancel without liability before departure is confirmed; before 14 days out, if the minimum is still unmet you may switch to another arrangement/product or get a refund, with no compensation owed. Rooms: single travelers default to a single-supplement deposit (refunded pro-rata if successfully share-roomed); two travelers default to a standard twin (bed type assigned by the hotel, cannot be specified); a triple/family room is for two parents and one minor, bed type assigned by the hotel. Pricing: all pricing is quoted in EUR at the time of booking; if you pay in CNY, the amount is the real-time CNY value auto-calculated from the Bank of China 'EUR sell' rate on the day of payment, and the same applies to refunds (any exchange-rate differences or bank fees are borne by the traveler). Payment does not equal confirmation - book at least 14 days ahead and allow up to 48 hours for second confirmation by the organizing agency; do not book connecting flights/hotels before your itinerary is confirmed. The product includes no shopping stops and no forced spending; optional self-paid items may be recommended on the ground but are never compulsory.
faqs.answer_zh: 免费取消：出发前30天（不含第30天）旅行社和旅行者均有权无理由取消；在此之内的退费按《更改与取消条例条款》执行。行程应变：因航班变动、交通拥堵、渡轮取消、罢工游行及行程顺序优化，实际到达时间和游览顺序可能变动；要求旅行者至少在参团日期的前一天抵达集合地，并在离团日期的后一天离开集散地，预留充足衔接时间（同一机场转机至少5小时，同城不同机场至少7小时；合理集合集散时段为07:00至21:00）。旅行社保留调整行程先后顺序的权利，不视为违约。成团：本产品为散客拼团，宣布成团人数为10人，行程开始前30天（不含第30天）未达成团人数双方均可解约且成团前互不承担违约责任；发团前14天仍未达到最低成团人数，可改选其他组团方式/产品或退还旅游费用，且不产生旅行社赔偿。房型：单人报名默认含单人房差押金（成功拼房按比例退款）；两人同时报名默认标准双人间（床型由酒店安排，不可指定）；三人家庭间默认两位父母与一位未成年儿童，床型由酒店安排。价格：所有定价以欧元为预定时计价单位，如选择人民币支付，则以当天支付时按中国银行实时“欧元卖出价”自动计算的人民币价格为准，退款同理（汇率差异或银行手续费由旅行者承担）。支付不等于确认行程，建议提前至少14天预订，并最多48小时由组团社二次确认；未获确认前请勿预定衔接机票及酒店。本产品全程不含购物店行程、无强制消费，当地可能推荐自费项目，但绝无强制。

faqs.question_en: Health & safety requirements
faqs.question_zh: 健康与安全须知
faqs.answer_en: To ensure a safe trip, please have a medical check before departure and do NOT enroll if you have: infectious diseases (e.g. active tuberculosis, typhoid); cardiovascular disease (e.g. severe hypertension, heart failure, myocardial ischemia or infarction); cerebrovascular disease (e.g. cerebral embolism, hemorrhage, tumor); respiratory disease (e.g. emphysema, cor pulmonale); psychiatric conditions including epilepsy; severe anemia (hemoglobin below 50 g/L); or if you are recovering from major/medium surgery. Pregnancy: travel is not permitted at all from week 35; from week 28 a doctor's report within 7 days plus an attending physician's consent letter is required; below week 28, enroll with caution, sign a liability waiver, and you cannot join any adventure/skiing/sea/high-altitude/outdoor activities. Travelers with disabilities need a doctor's report within 7 days plus consent letter, must be accompanied by an immediate family member, and must request reserved seating and facilities at least 61 days ahead. Elderly travelers over 70 need a health certificate, physical exam report and an accompanying immediate family member (otherwise sign a waiver); the trip requires a good walking ability and physical stamina. Minors (under 18) must be accompanied by an immediate relative or guardian; some sights have special rules for those under 18/12/6; for infants under 6 or children under 30 kg, confirm a safety child seat in advance (or bring an EU-standard seat yourself); minors traveling without parents need parental authorization, and the product does not accept infants under 2 years old. Per Article 15 of the Tourism Law (and the Infectious Disease Prevention Law), travelers must truthfully declare health information relevant to the trip (pregnancy, lactation, chronic illness, infectious-disease history, suspected symptoms or recent travel to epidemic areas) and comply with safety warnings; concealment that causes harm makes the traveler liable, and in the case of concealed infectious disease the agency may terminate the contract without refund and the traveler may also owe compensation.
faqs.answer_zh: 为确保旅游顺利、防止旅途意外，请出行前做一次必要的身体检查，如存在下列情况请勿报名：传染性疾病患者（如活动期肺结核、伤寒）；心血管疾病患者（如严重高血压、心功能不全、心肌缺氧、心肌梗塞）；脑血管疾病患者（如脑栓塞、脑出血、脑肿瘤）；呼吸系统疾病患者（如肺气肿、肺心病）；精神病患者（如癫痫及各种精神病）；严重贫血（血红蛋白量50克/升以下）；大中型手术恢复期病患者。孕妇：妊娠第35周及以上任何情况下都无法参团；第28周及以上需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书；第28周以下请慎重报名，需签署旅行社免责声明书，且行程内探险、滑雪、出海、高空、户外等项目都无法参加。残疾人：需提供7日内医生检查报告及同意书，需直系家属陪同，并提前至少61天申请预留位置及专用配套设施。老年旅游者：70周岁以上需提供健康证明、体检报告并需直系家属陪同（否则签署免责声明书）；行程较长需有一定步行能力与体力，体力不支者请慎重报名。未成年（未满18周岁）需由直系亲属或监护人陪同；部分项目对未满18/12/6周岁有特殊限定；6岁以下婴儿或30公斤以下儿童请提前确认安全儿童座椅（否则需自备符合欧盟标准的座椅）；无父母陪同的未成年人须持父母授权书；本产品不接受2周岁以下婴儿参团。根据《旅游法》第15条及《传染病防治法》，旅游者需如实告知与旅游活动相关的个人健康信息（包括妊娠期、哺乳期、慢性病、传染病史、疑似症状或近期疫区旅居史）并遵守安全警示规定；因隐瞒导致人身或财产损害的，旅游者需自行承担责任，隐瞒传染病情况的，旅行社可解除合同且不退还费用，旅游者还需赔偿其他游客及旅行社损失。

title_en: Mont-Saint-Michel & Loire Valley Castles 2-Day Small-Group Tour from Paris
title_zh: 圣山与卢瓦尔河谷城堡2天精品小团（巴黎出发）
short_en: A 2-day small-group escape from Paris to mystical Mont-Saint-Michel, the Breton city of Rennes and the Loire Valley's grandest castle, Chambord.
short_zh: 巴黎出发2天精品小团，探访神秘的圣米歇尔山、布列塔尼名城雷恩，以及卢瓦尔河谷最恢弘的香波堡。
desc_en: This intimate 4-8 person tour leads you from Paris to one of France's most iconic sights, the tidal island abbey of Mont-Saint-Michel, where you photograph the winding river, the sacred mount and grazing sheep across the Normandy flats. You then overnight in Rennes, the historic capital of Brittany, before heading into the Loire Valley to explore Chambord, the largest and most magnificent of the valley's UNESCO-listed Renaissance chateaux. With all attraction entries included and no forced shopping, it is a culture-focused two-day journey blending Breton heritage and French royal grandeur.
desc_zh: 这趟4-8人精品小团带您从巴黎出发，前往法国最具标志性的景点之一——潮汐孤岛上的圣米歇尔山修道院，在诺曼底滩涂上拍摄蜿蜒小河、圣山与羊群的治愈画面。随后夜宿布列塔尼历史名城雷恩，次日深入卢瓦尔河谷，参观河谷城堡群中最大、最恢弘的世界文化遗产——文艺复兴杰作香波堡。全程景点门票一价全含、无强制购物，是一趟融合布列塔尼风情与法兰西皇家气派的2天文化之旅。

highlights.en: Mont-Saint-Michel: France's mystical tidal-island abbey, the third-holiest site in Catholicism
highlights.zh: 圣米歇尔山：法国神秘的潮汐孤岛修道院，天主教第三大圣地

highlights.en: Photograph the winding river, sacred mount and grazing sheep across the Normandy tidal flats
highlights.zh: 在诺曼底滩涂拍摄蜿蜒小河、圣山与羊群的治愈画面

highlights.en: Rennes, the historic capital of Brittany, with its old town and Thabor Garden
highlights.zh: 布列塔尼大区首府雷恩，漫步老城与美丽的他泊花园

highlights.en: Château de Chambord: the largest and grandest castle of the Loire Valley
highlights.zh: 香波堡：卢瓦尔河谷城堡群中最大、最恢弘的城堡

highlights.en: UNESCO-listed Loire Valley, a 280 km ribbon of Renaissance chateaux
highlights.zh: 世界文化遗产卢瓦尔河谷，绵延280公里的文艺复兴城堡群

highlights.en: All-inclusive pricing: Mont-Saint-Michel Abbey and Chambord entries included
highlights.zh: 一价全含：圣米歇尔山修道院与香波堡门票全包

highlights.en: Intimate 4-8 person small group with no forced shopping
highlights.zh: 4-8人精品小团，无强制购物

highlights.en: Centrally located 4-star hotel in Rennes with Chinese-speaking guide-driver
highlights.zh: 雷恩市区4星级酒店，中文司机兼导游全程服务

includes.en: Hotels: 1 night in a 4-star hotel.
includes.zh: 【酒店】：四星级酒店1晚。

includes.en: Breakfast: buffet or other-style breakfast in the hotel, 1 meal in total.
includes.zh: 【早餐】：酒店内的自助式早餐或其他形式早餐，共1餐。

includes.en: Transport: business travel van.
includes.zh: 【交通】：商务旅行车。

includes.en: Guide: Chinese-speaking driver-guide service.
includes.zh: 【导游】：中文司机兼导游服务。

includes.en: Operating fees: tourist city tax, city-entry fees, residence tax, road and bridge tolls, parking and fuel charges, driver-guide meal allowances and other in-itinerary operating costs.
includes.zh: 【执行】：游客城市税、进城费、居住税、过路过桥费、停车燃油费、司导餐补等行程内执行费用。

includes.en: Baggage: 1 piece of checked luggage up to 23 kg and 1 piece of carry-on luggage.
includes.zh: 【行李】：1件23公斤行李及1件随身行李。

includes.en: Admission: first-entry tickets to the Mont Saint-Michel abbey and to Chambord.
includes.zh: 【门票】：圣米歇尔山修道院、香波堡首道门票。

excludes.en: Passport: personal passport fees.
excludes.zh: 护照：个人护照费用。

excludes.en: Visa: the tourist/visit visa fees required for the countries on the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 签证：行程中所列旅游国家所需的观光签证费用。

excludes.en: Insurance: travel insurance fees (if the itinerary involves high-risk activities, please verify whether your travel insurance covers them).
excludes.zh: 保险：旅游保险费用（如行程内涉及到高风险运动，请核实旅游保险是否包含该项运动）。

excludes.en: Tips: gratuities for the guide and driver, totaling 10 EUR per person per day, same rate for adults and children.
excludes.zh: 小费：游客支付导游和司机小费一共10欧/人/天，大小同价。

excludes.en: Meals: apart from the special meals included in the itinerary, lunches and dinners are not included.
excludes.zh: 餐饮：除行程内包含的特色餐外，行程中不包含午、晚正餐费用。

excludes.en: Admission: sights not marked as fee-included in the itinerary (including but not limited to those noted as "exterior," as well as any "recommended," "optional," "experience" or other items not stated as included; payable by the guest if they wish to visit).
excludes.zh: 门票：行程中未注明费用包含的景点（包括但不仅限于行程中注明“外观”的景点，“推荐”、“可选”、“体验”等等所有未提及费用包含的项目，如游客需要参观，敬请自理）。

excludes.en: Extended stay: any accommodation, transport or sightseeing costs for extensions beyond the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 延长住宿：行程外额外延长的住宿、交通、观光费用。

excludes.en: Personal expenses: such as drinks and alcohol, taxis, phone charges and other personal spending.
excludes.zh: 私人消费：如饮料酒类、出租车、电话费等个人消费。

excludes.en: Other transport: any transport not mentioned in the inclusions beyond the included business van or minibus, such as a Venice gondola, and sightseeing trains, electric rental carts, etc. in traffic-restricted zones, payable by the guest.
excludes.zh: 其他交通：除包含商务旅行车或者中巴之外，费用包含中未提及的其他交通费用，如威尼斯贡多拉，以及车辆限行区的观光火车、电瓶出租车等费用敬请自理。

excludes.en: Free-time activities: guests' own evening sightseeing and recommended items on the itinerary, plus any resulting transport, dining, admission and shopping costs.
excludes.zh: 自由活动：游客夜间自行游览及行程中的推荐项目，以及产生的交通、餐饮、门票、购物等费用。

excludes.en: Experience activities: any travel experience activities not included in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 体验活动：行程中的没有包含的各项旅游体验活动。

excludes.en: Other costs: any costs not mentioned in the inclusions. In cases of force majeure such as natural disaster, war or strikes, or special circumstances such as traffic delays, flight cancellations or time changes, embassy visa delays or insufficient group numbers, or other extra costs not caused by our company (e.g. overseas visa-extension fees, accommodation, meals and transport, national airfare adjustments), our company reserves the right to charge the price difference.
excludes.zh: 其他费用：费用包含中未提及的费用。如因天灾、战争、罢工等不可抗力的原因，及因交通延阻、航班取消或更改时间、使馆延误出签证、人数不足等特殊情况或其他非我公司原因所引致的额外费（如在外延期签证费、住、食及交通费、国家航空运价调整等），我公司有权追加差价。

timeline.title_en: Paris - Mont Saint-Michel - Rennes (The devout hermit's isle and the heart of Brittany)
timeline.title_zh: 巴黎 - 圣米歇尔山 - 雷恩（虔诚的隐修居士与布列塔尼的心脏）
timeline.description_en: In the morning, travel to Mont Saint-Michel, the solitary island off the Normandy coast, to tour the Mont Saint-Michel site and its abbey. The mount is one of Catholicism's great pilgrimage sites with a thousand years of history: a cone-shaped granite island about 900 meters in circumference and 88 meters high, two kilometers from the coast, it becomes an island at high tide and a peninsula at low tide, a strange landscape inscribed by UNESCO as a World Heritage site; legend holds that in 708 the Archangel Michael appeared in Bishop Aubert's dream and told him to build a sanctuary here, the abbey later served as a national prison in the Napoleonic era, and monks and nuns still live there today, their evening chants echoing through the mount (visiting time about 2 hours for the site and about 1 hour for the abbey). Depending on the tides, you can walk on the mirror-like Normandy mud flats at the foot of the mount, then head to a popular photo spot to capture the soothing scene of the winding little river, the holy mount and grazing sheep. You then continue to Rennes to check in. Overnight at the Novotel Rennes or an equivalent 4-star hotel, located in the Alma commercial district in southern Rennes, with restaurants, supermarkets and malls all around, away from the crowded old town yet only about 10 minutes by car from the city center and the Parliament of Brittany; the hotel offers spacious modern rooms, a French restaurant and bar, a seasonal outdoor pool and large garden grounds.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往诺曼底海滩的独立小岛——圣米歇尔山，游览圣米歇尔山景区和修道院。圣米歇尔山是天主教第三大圣地，拥有千年历史，位于距海岸两公里的孤岛上，小岛呈圆锥形、周长约900米、海拔88米，由花岗石构成，涨潮时为海岛、退潮时为半岛，是被联合国教科文组织列入的世界人类遗产；相传公元708年大天使米歇尔托梦给奥贝主教，让他在此建造修道院，修道院曾在拿破仑时代作为国家监狱，如今仍有修士修女常住，夜晚的圣歌回荡山间（圣米歇尔山景区游玩约2小时，修道院游玩约1小时）。根据潮汐情况，可游览位于山脚下如同镜片的诺曼底海水浅水滩涂，之后前往热门拍照点，拍摄弯弯的小河、圣山、羊群的治愈画面。之后前往雷恩入住酒店。夜宿雷恩诺富特酒店或同等4星级酒店，酒店位于雷恩南部Alma商业区，周围餐饮、超市、商场一应俱全，远离老城拥挤，同时距市中心、布列塔尼议会宫等核心景点仅约10分钟车程；酒店拥有宽敞现代化客房，内设法式餐厅与酒吧、季节性室外泳池及大面积花园空间。

timeline.title_en: Rennes - Chateau de Chambord - Paris (The chateaux of the Loire - the finest expression of classic French noble elegance)
timeline.title_zh: 雷恩 - 香波堡 - 巴黎（城堡河谷——法兰西古典贵族优雅的最佳诠释）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, explore Rennes, capital of the Brittany region, a city of history and vitality. Tour the old town of Rennes, the most charming quarter of the Breton capital, with its many colorful, leaning 16th-17th-century half-timbered houses, cobbled streets, arched gateways and old squares, plus cafes, restaurants and a youthful university-town atmosphere (visiting time about 2 hours); the beautiful Thabor Garden, a roughly 10-hectare park blending a French formal garden, an English landscape area and vast rose and botanical gardens with over 3,000 plant species and 2,000 rose varieties, a bandstand, aviary, fountains and a children's playground (about 30 minutes); and the Parliament of Brittany (exterior), a 17th-century masterpiece of French classical architecture, one of Rennes's most representative landmarks, once the seat of the region's judiciary and still in use as a court today (about 15 minutes). You then drive to the Chateau de Chambord in the Loire Valley, traveling along the D952 riverside road through the wild, untamed Loire forests that hide roe deer and wild boar. Chambord is the largest and most magnificent of all the chateaux of France and the Loire Valley, a typical medieval-style hunting lodge of the French kings begun under Francois I; its layout, form and decoration reflect French architectural tradition while drawing on the Italian Renaissance, making it one of the masterpieces of the French Renaissance, a national treasure added to the UNESCO World Heritage List in 1981 (visiting time about 2 hours 30 minutes). Afterward, return to Paris, where the wonderful journey ends. No hotel accommodation this evening.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往布列塔尼大区首府、历史与活力的魅力之城雷恩。游览雷恩老城，这里是布列塔尼首府最具魅力的区域，保存着大量16–17世纪色彩斑斓、线条倾斜的木筋房（半木结构建筑），石板街道、拱形门洞与古老广场交织出浓厚的历史氛围，咖啡馆、餐厅与大学城氛围让古老街区充满年轻活力（游玩约2小时）；美丽的他泊花园，面积约10公顷，融合法式几何庭园、英式自然风景区、庞大的玫瑰园与植物园，拥有超过3000种植物和2000余种玫瑰，并设有音乐亭、鸟舍、喷泉与儿童游乐区（游玩约30分钟）；以及布列塔尼议会宫（外观），建于17世纪，是法国古典主义建筑的典范、雷恩最具代表性的历史地标之一，曾是布列塔尼地区司法机构所在地，如今仍作为法院使用（游玩约15分钟）。随后沿D952河畔大道前往卢瓦尔河谷香波堡，穿过隐藏着从未被驯服的獐鹿、野猪的原生态丛林，参观全法兰西最恢弘的香波堡。香波堡是卢瓦尔河谷城堡群中最大的一个，较为典型的中世纪古堡布局，是法国君王狩猎的行宫，兴建于弗朗索瓦一世时期，在布局、造型、风格装饰上反映法国传统建筑艺术，同时受到意大利文艺复兴影响，成为法国文艺复兴时期的代表作之一，被法国人视为值得炫耀的国宝，1981年列入世界遗产名录（游玩约2小时30分钟）。之后返回巴黎，结束美好旅行。当晚无酒店住宿。

meeting_en: Departs from Paris; pick-up and return in central Paris.
meeting_zh: 巴黎出发，巴黎市区接送，行程结束返回巴黎。

faqs.question_en: Where and when do we meet for departure?
faqs.question_zh: 集合地点和时间？
faqs.answer_en: The group meets at 09:00 on Day 1 in front of the McDonald's at Place d'Italie in Paris. (This is a reference time and place; the actual departure time is per the departure notice.) This product is NOT recommended for guests whose flight lands in Paris on the morning of the tour's start.
faqs.answer_zh: 行程第1天09:00在巴黎意大利广场麦当劳门口集合。（参考时间及地点，实际出发时间以出团通知书为准。）本产品不推荐参团当天早上降落巴黎的航班！

faqs.question_en: Where and when does the tour disperse?
faqs.question_zh: 集散地点和时间？
faqs.answer_en: The group disperses at 19:00 in the afternoon at Place d'Italie in the 13th arrondissement of Paris. This product is NOT recommended for guests leaving Paris on the same day the tour ends.
faqs.answer_zh: 当天下午19:00在巴黎13区意大利广场解散。本产品不推荐结束当天离开巴黎的航班！

faqs.question_en: Do I need a visa?
faqs.question_zh: 是否需要签证？
faqs.answer_en: Yes. This product requires a Schengen visa (single or multiple entry) and does NOT include the visa fee - if you need one, please choose a Schengen-visa product. After booking, we provide free of charge all materials needed to apply for the Schengen visa (see the detailed materials checklist), and if you commission us to handle the visa we will buy you Schengen-compliant travel insurance; if not, you must arrange your own insurance and handle claims yourself. Your passport must be valid for at least 6 months from the date of departure, or customs may refuse entry. "Visa-worry-free" guarantee: for guests who sign with us at least 61 days before departure, if a visa is not obtained within 45 days before departure, we bear all losses and immediately refund the full tour cost; guests who do not qualify and fail to obtain a visa are refunded per the change-and-cancellation terms. A refusal must be reported to us within 48 hours with the consulate's refusal letter, any supplementary or changed materials submitted within 5 days, and you may not unilaterally waive the right of "visa defense." Note: visa fees, visa-service fees, Schengen insurance fees and visa-center appointment fees are all non-refundable and non-transferable, even if the product is changed or cancelled.
faqs.answer_zh: 需要。本产品需办理申根签证（单次或多次入境），且不包含签证费用，如需办理请选择申根签证产品。预订后我社免费提供办理申根签证的全部材料（参考详细材料清单）；若委托我社办理签证，我社为您购买符合申根要求的旅游保险，未委托则需自行购买保险并自行负责理赔。护照有效期需在离境之日起至少还有六个月，否则海关有权拒绝入境。保签无忧：出发日前61天与我社签约的旅游产品，如在出发前45天内未获取签证，我社承担所有损失并立即退还全部旅游费用；不符合该条款且未正常获签者，将按“退改与取消条款”退费。如遇拒签需在48小时内通知我社并出具使领馆拒签函，如需补充或更改材料需在五天内提交，并且不得单方面放弃“签证抗辩”权利。注意：签证费、签证服务费、申根保险费、签证中心预约费均不可退款，也无法更改使用者，即使产品退改签亦无法退款。

faqs.question_en: Booking, changes & cancellation
faqs.question_zh: 预订、变更与取消须知
faqs.answer_en: Prices are quoted in EUR; for payments in CNY, the day-of exchange rate applies. We recommend arriving in Paris at least one day before the tour starts and departing at least one day after it ends - the product is not recommended for flights landing on the morning of departure or leaving on the day the tour ends. This is a 2-day premium small-group tour departing from and returning to Place d'Italie in Paris (meet 09:00 Day 1, disperse 19:00 Day 2); final group size, vehicle and timing are confirmed in the departure notice. Accommodation is 1 night at the Novotel Rennes or an equivalent 4-star hotel; there is no accommodation on the second night. Key contingency note: the mud-flat walk at the foot of Mont Saint-Michel depends on the tides on the day. Standard rooms are assigned per the operator's arrangement. Free cancellation is generally available up to 30 days before departure; please confirm exact cancellation and change deadlines, any deposit and the applicable change-and-cancellation terms with us at the time of booking.
faqs.answer_zh: 价格以欧元报价，如以人民币支付按当日汇率结算。建议提前一天抵达巴黎、结束后再过一天离开——本产品不推荐参团当天早上降落或结束当天离开的航班。本产品为2天精品小团，从巴黎意大利广场出发并返回（第1天09:00集合，第2天19:00解散），最终人数、用车及时间以出团通知书为准。住宿为1晚雷恩诺富特酒店或同等4星级酒店，第二晚无酒店住宿。重要应变提示：圣米歇尔山脚下的滩涂游览视当天潮汐情况而定。房型由组团方安排。一般情况下出发前30天可免费取消；请于预订时与我社确认具体退改截止时间、定金事宜及适用的退改与取消条款。

faqs.question_en: Health & safety requirements
faqs.question_zh: 健康与安全须知
faqs.answer_en: To ensure a safe trip and prevent accidents, please have a necessary health check before departure and do NOT join if you have: infectious diseases (e.g. active tuberculosis, typhoid); cardiovascular disease (e.g. severe hypertension, heart failure, myocardial ischemia/infarction); cerebrovascular disease (e.g. cerebral embolism, hemorrhage, tumor); respiratory disease (e.g. emphysema, cor pulmonale); psychiatric conditions including epilepsy; severe anemia (hemoglobin below 50 g/L); or are recovering from major/medium surgery. Pregnancy: at 35 weeks or more you cannot join under any circumstances; at 28 weeks or more you must provide a doctor's report from within 7 days plus the attending physician's consent; under 28 weeks please book with caution, sign the agency's liability waiver, and you cannot take part in adventure, skiing, sea, high-altitude or outdoor items. Travelers with disabilities need a recent (within 7 days) medical report and physician's consent, an accompanying immediate family member, and at least 61 days' advance request for a reserved place and special facilities. Seniors over 70 need a health certificate and physical-exam report and an accompanying immediate family member (or must sign the liability waiver); this itinerary is fairly long and requires good walking ability and stamina, so those with limited stamina should book carefully, and any adventure/ski/sea/high-altitude/outdoor items require the attending physician's consent. Minors (under 18) must be accompanied by an immediate relative or guardian; some sights have special rules for those under 18/12/6; infants under 6 or children under 30 kg need a confirmed/owned EU-standard safety seat; minors travelling without both parents need parental authorization; and infants under 2 years are not accepted. Per Article 15 of the Tourism Law (and the Infectious Disease Prevention Law), travelers must truthfully declare health information relevant to the activity (including pregnancy, lactation, chronic illness, infectious-disease history, suspected symptoms or recent stays in epidemic areas) and comply with safety warnings; concealing such information that leads to harm makes the traveler liable, and concealing an infectious disease may bring civil compensation and administrative penalties, with the agency entitled to terminate the contract without refund.
faqs.answer_zh: 为确保旅游顺利出行、防止旅途中发生人身意外伤害事故，请出行前做一次必要的身体检查，如存在以下情况请勿报名：传染性疾病（如活动期肺结核、伤寒）；心血管疾病（如严重高血压、心功能不全、心肌缺氧、心肌梗塞）；脑血管疾病（如脑栓塞、脑出血、脑肿瘤）；呼吸系统疾病（如肺气肿、肺心病）；精神病（含癫痫）；严重贫血（血红蛋白低于50克/升）；大中型手术恢复期患者。孕妇：妊娠第35周及以上任何情况下都无法参团；第28周及以上需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书；第28周以下请慎重报名，需签署旅行社免责声明书，且无法参加探险、滑雪、出海、高空、户外等项目。残疾人：需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书、需直系家属陪同，并提前至少61天申请预留位置及专用配套设施。老年旅游者：70周岁以上需提供健康证明、体检报告并由直系家属陪同（否则需签署免责声明书）；本行程较长、需要一定步行能力且对体力要求较高，体力不支者请慎重报名，行程内如涉及探险、滑雪、出海、高空、户外等项目需持主治医师同意书。未成年人（未满18周岁）须由直系亲属或监护人陪同，部分景点对未满18/12/6周岁有特殊限定；6岁以下婴儿或30公斤以下儿童需确认符合欧盟安全制式的安全座椅；无父母陪同的18岁以下未成年人须持父母授权书；不接受2周岁以下婴儿参团。根据《旅游法》第15条及《中华人民共和国传染病防治法（2025修订）》，旅游者须如实告知与旅游活动相关的个人健康信息（包括妊娠期、哺乳期、慢性病、传染病史、疑似症状或近期疫区旅居史）并遵守安全警示规定，若因隐瞒健康信息导致人身损害或财产损失需自行承担责任；隐瞒传染病情况导致传播风险的，可能面临民事赔偿及行政处罚，需自行承担医疗、隔离费用及赔偿责任，旅行社可解除合同且不退还费用，旅游者还需赔偿其他游客及旅行社的损失。

title_en: Normandy & Loire Valley 3-Day Small-Group Tour from Paris
title_zh: 诺曼底与卢瓦尔河谷3天精品小团（巴黎往返）
short_en: A 3-day small-group escape from Paris through Monet's Garden, Honfleur, Mont-Saint-Michel, Saint-Malo and the Loire Valley castles, with Michelin-star dining.
short_zh: 3天精品小团，从巴黎出发探访莫奈花园、翁弗勒尔、圣米歇尔山、圣马洛与卢瓦尔河谷城堡群，入住米其林城堡酒店。
desc_en: This 3-day small-group journey (4-8 travellers) loops out from Paris into Normandy and the Loire Valley, tracing French art, history and gastronomy. Day one follows the Impressionists through Monet's Garden at Giverny, the fishing port of Honfleur and the twin towns of Deauville and Trouville to the gourmet city of Caen. Day two reaches the island abbey of Mont-Saint-Michel and the corsair city of Saint-Malo before settling into a Loire Valley chateau hotel. The final day explores the water-borne castle of Chenonceau, the old town of Blois and the majestic royal hunting lodge of Chambord before returning to Paris.
desc_zh: 这趟3天精品小团（4-8人）从巴黎出发，环游诺曼底与卢瓦尔河谷，串联法兰西的艺术、历史与美食。第一天追随印象派脚步，游览吉维尼的莫奈花园、渔港小镇翁弗勒尔以及双子之城多维尔与特鲁维尔，傍晚抵达美食之都卡昂。第二天前往海上孤岛圣米歇尔山与海盗古城圣马洛，随后入住卢瓦尔河谷城堡酒店。最后一天探访建在水上的舍农索城堡、古朴的布洛瓦老城与宏伟的皇家狩猎行宫香波堡，之后返回巴黎，结束旅程。

highlights.en: Monet's Garden at Giverny, birthplace of Impressionist inspiration (open April-October)
highlights.zh: 吉维尼莫奈花园，印象派灵感的发源地（4月初至10月末开放）

highlights.en: Mont-Saint-Michel, the legendary island abbey rising from the Normandy tidal flats
highlights.zh: 圣米歇尔山，矗立于诺曼底潮汐滩涂之上的传奇海上修道院

highlights.en: Saint-Malo, the walled corsair city and Brittany's celebrated gourmet old town
highlights.zh: 圣马洛，被海盗城墙环绕的布列塔尼美食古城

highlights.en: UNESCO Loire Valley castles: Chenonceau, Blois old town and the grand Chambord
highlights.zh: 世界文化遗产卢瓦尔河谷城堡群：舍农索城堡、布洛瓦老城与宏伟的香波堡

highlights.en: Impressionist coast: Honfleur fishing port and the twin towns of Deauville & Trouville
highlights.zh: 印象派海岸：翁弗勒尔渔港与双子之城多维尔、特鲁维尔

highlights.en: Two nights in 5-star Norman chateau hotels, including a Michelin-starred property
highlights.zh: 两晚入住五星级诺曼底城堡酒店，其中一晚为米其林星级酒店

highlights.en: Intimate small group of just 4-8 travellers for a relaxed, cultural deep-dive
highlights.zh: 仅4-8人的轻奢小团，深度文化体验，节奏从容

highlights.en: Optional Michelin-star three-course tasting menu by chef Ivan Vautier in Caen
highlights.zh: 可选名厨伊万沃蒂尔的米其林三道式主厨推荐套餐（卡昂）

includes.en: Hotels: 1 night in a 5-star Spa hotel + 1 night in a 5-star château hotel, for a total of two nights in 5-star hotels.
includes.zh: 【酒店】：五星SPA酒店1晚，五星城堡酒店1晚，共计两晚五星级酒店。

includes.en: Breakfast: buffet breakfast at the hotel or other form of breakfast, 2 meals in total.
includes.zh: 【早餐】：酒店内的自助式早餐或其他形式早餐，共2餐。

includes.en: Transport: business travel vehicle.
includes.zh: 【交通】：商务旅行车。

includes.en: Guide: Chinese-speaking driver-guide service.
includes.zh: 【导游】：中文司机兼导游服务。

includes.en: Operating fees: in-itinerary operating costs such as city/tourist tax, city-entry fees, residence tax, road and bridge tolls, parking and fuel fees, and driver-guide meal allowances.
includes.zh: 【执行】：游客城市税、进城费、居住税、过路过桥费、停车燃油费、司导餐补等行程内执行费用。

includes.en: Luggage: one piece of 23 kg checked luggage and one piece of carry-on luggage.
includes.zh: 【行李】：1件23公斤行李及1件随身行李。

includes.en: Admission: first-entry tickets to Monet's Garden (closed in winter; open from early April to the end of October each year, exact opening times per the Monet's Garden official site), the Château de Chambord, and the Château de Chenonceau.
includes.zh: 【门票】：莫奈花园（莫奈花园故居冬季关闭，每年自四月初起至十月末参观，具体开放时间以莫奈花园故居官网通知为准）、香波堡、舍农索城堡景点首道门票。

excludes.en: Passport: personal passport fees.
excludes.zh: 护照：个人护照费用。

excludes.en: Visa: tourist visa fees required for the countries listed in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 签证：行程中所列旅游国家所需的观光签证费用。

excludes.en: Insurance: travel insurance fees (if the itinerary involves high-risk sports, please verify whether your travel insurance covers them).
excludes.zh: 保险：旅游保险费用（如行程内涉及到高风险运动，请核实旅游保险是否包含该项运动）。

excludes.en: Tips: guide and driver gratuities totalling 10 EUR per person per day, same rate for adults and children.
excludes.zh: 小费：游客支付导游和司机小费一共10欧/人/天，大小同价。

excludes.en: Meals: apart from the special meals included in the itinerary, lunches and dinners are not included.
excludes.zh: 餐饮：除行程内包含的特色餐外，行程中不包含午、晚正餐费用。

excludes.en: Admission not specified as included: any attraction not noted as included (including but not limited to sights marked "exterior," "recommended," "optional," "experience," etc.); if you wish to visit them, please pay on your own.
excludes.zh: 门票：行程中未注明费用包含的景点（包括但不仅限于行程中注明"外观"的景点，"推荐"、"可选"、"体验"等等所有未提及费用包含的项目，如游客需要参观，敬请自理）。

excludes.en: Extended stay: any extra accommodation, transport or sightseeing costs beyond the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 延长住宿：行程外额外延长的住宿、交通、观光费用。

excludes.en: Personal spending: such as drinks and alcohol, taxis, phone charges and other personal expenses.
excludes.zh: 私人消费：如饮料酒类、出租车、电话费等个人消费。

excludes.en: Other transport: transport not mentioned in the inclusions beyond the business vehicle or minibus, such as Venice gondolas and sightseeing trains, electric/battery taxis in traffic-restricted zones, etc. — please pay on your own.
excludes.zh: 其他交通：除包含商务旅行车或者中巴之外，费用包含中未提及的其他交通费用，如威尼斯贡多拉，以及车辆限行区的观光火车、电瓶出租车等费用敬请自理。

excludes.en: Free-time activities: guests' own night sightseeing and the recommended optional programmes, plus any transport, dining, admission and shopping costs arising from them.
excludes.zh: 自由活动：游客夜间自行游览及行程中的推荐项目，以及产生的交通、餐饮、门票、购物等费用。

excludes.en: Experience activities: any travel experience activities not included in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 体验活动：行程中没有包含的各项旅游体验活动。

excludes.en: Other costs: any fee not mentioned in the inclusions. In cases of force majeure (natural disaster, war, strike, etc.) or special circumstances such as transport delays, flight cancellations/rescheduling, embassy visa delays, insufficient group numbers, or other causes not attributable to our company, leading to extra costs (e.g. overseas visa extension, lodging, food and transport, national airline fare adjustments, etc.), our company reserves the right to charge the difference.
excludes.zh: 其他费用：费用包含中未提及的费用。如因天灾、战争、罢工等不可抗力的原因，及因交通延阻、航班取消或更改时间、使馆延误出签证、人数不足等特殊情况或其他非我公司原因所导致的额外费（如在外延期签证费、住、食及交通费、国家航空运价调整等），我公司有权追加差价。

timeline.title_en: Paris - Monet's Garden (Giverny) - Honfleur - Deauville & Trouville - Caen
timeline.title_zh: 巴黎 - 莫奈花园（吉维尼）- 翁弗勒尔 - 多维尔与特鲁维尔 - 卡昂
timeline.description_en: After meeting up, we set out for the village of Giverny to visit Monet's Garden, where the artist spent 43 years of his life and which he called "my most beautiful work" — from the tulips of April to the famous summer water lilies and the October chrysanthemums, the colours of Monet's paintings are still here (the house and garden are closed in winter, open roughly from early April to the end of October per the official site). We then cross the striking 2-km Normandy Bridge over the Seine estuary to reach Honfleur, the gateway to the Flower Coast, an ancient thousand-year fishing port with a flowered harbour, an old bell-tower quarter and a maze-like old town beloved by the Impressionists (about 1.5 hours). Next come the "twin cities" of Deauville and Trouville, which together form the protected zone of Norman-Anglo half-timbered architecture: Deauville is the chic, aristocratic summer resort of the elite (about 30 min), while Trouville, at the mouth of the Touques river, has a gentler, fairy-tale charm of colourful seaside villas (about 1 hour). In the evening we head to Caen, Normandy's gastronomic capital, and check in at the Ivan Vautier Michelin hotel (or an equivalent 5-star), a Spa hotel founded by Michelin-starred chef Ivan Vautier in Caen's old town, within walking distance of the Saint-Ouen church, the old Saint-Étienne church and the Men's Abbey. The optional chef's three-course "Saveurs" tasting dinner (130 EUR/person, drinks not included, not selectable) is recommended.
timeline.description_zh: 集合后出发前往吉维尼小镇的莫奈花园游览，莫奈曾在此生活了43年、并自称"花园是我最美的作品"——从四月开园的郁金香、到盛夏最著名的睡莲、再到十月闭馆前的菊花，你都能在这里找到莫奈画中的色彩（莫奈花园故居冬季关闭，每年自四月初起至十月末参观，具体以官网通知为准）。随后横跨长达2公里、跨越塞纳河入海口的诺曼底大桥，前往鲜花海岸门户的印象派经典小镇翁弗勒尔，这座千年古老渔港拥有鲜花海港、古钟楼区和迷宫般的老城，是众多印象派画师笔下的盛景（约1.5小时）。之后游览完整保留诺曼-盎格鲁木质骨架建筑群的"双子之城"——多维尔与特鲁维尔：多维尔是名流云集、宫廷贵气的高级夏季度假胜地（约30分钟），坐落于图克河入海口的特鲁维尔则更显优雅，有童话般的彩色海滨城堡（约1小时），两城共同构成诺曼-盎格鲁建筑群保护区。当晚前往诺曼底美食之都卡昂，入住伊万沃蒂尔米其林酒店或同等五星级酒店——这是由米其林星级主厨伊万沃蒂尔创建的Spa酒店，位于卡昂古城区，步行可达圣旺教堂、圣艾蒂安老教堂和卡昂男子修道院。推荐自费品尝主厨三道式"Saveurs"推荐晚宴（130欧元/位，不含酒水、菜单不可自选）。

timeline.title_en: Caen - Mont-Saint-Michel - Saint-Malo - Loire Valley
timeline.title_zh: 卡昂 - 圣米歇尔山 - 圣马洛 - 卢瓦尔河谷
timeline.description_en: In the morning we travel to Mont-Saint-Michel, the conical granite island on the Normandy shore (900 m around, 88 m high, two km off the coast) that becomes an island at high tide and joins the mainland at low tide — a UNESCO World Heritage site and one of France's most famous monuments and a Christian pilgrimage centre (visit about 2 hours); depending on the tides we walk on the mirror-like shallow tidal flats at the foot of the mount. We also view the Mont-Saint-Michel Abbey (exterior) crowning the summit, where Bishop Aubert built the first chapel dedicated to the Archangel Michael and which once served as a national prison under Napoleon (about 1 hour). We then continue to Saint-Malo, the "corsair city" — a well-preserved medieval Breton walled town once ringed by towering pirate ramparts; today it is a city of gastronomy whose four square kilometres of old town are packed with characterful restaurants, cafés, bars and shops (old town about 2 hours), and we also see the Saint-Malo beach and its ring of intact medieval sea-defence fortifications, looking out toward Jersey, with square forts reachable on foot at low tide (about 30 min). Afterwards we drive to the Loire Valley region and check in at the Château de Pray–style castle hotel (the source names the Château d'Artigny / Dartanyan castle hotel or equivalent 5-star), set in 25 hectares of French gardens near the Château de Chenonceau — a majestic white-stone château designed largely by 17th-century architect Jean-Michel Chevotet that once received England's Queen Elizabeth, with rooms kept in François-period style and antique furniture. Overnight: the château hotel or equivalent 5-star (elegant double rooms may be in the banquet, attic or pavilion wings; contact customer service before booking to specify or upgrade).
