timeline.description_zh: 上午前往诺曼底海滩上距海岸两公里的孤岛——圣米歇尔山，小岛呈圆锥形、周长900米、海拔88米、由花岗石构成，涨潮时成海岛、退潮时连陆地，已被联合国教科文组织列入世界人类遗产，是法国著名古迹和基督教圣地（游览约2小时）；根据潮汐情况可在山脚下如同镜片的诺曼底浅水滩涂上行走。同时远观位于山顶的圣米歇尔山修道院（外观）——奥贝主教曾在岛上最高处修建奉献给大天使米歇尔的小教堂、成为朝圣中心，拿破仑执政期间修道院也曾作为国家监狱（约1小时）。随后前往"魔鬼城/海盗城"圣马洛，这座建于中世纪、保存完好的布列塔尼古城曾被高耸的海盗城墙环绕，如今是一座美食之城，古城中心四平方公里内遍布各具特色的餐厅、咖啡、酒吧与特色店铺（老城约2小时）；还可游览圣马洛海滩和环绕古城、保持完整的中世纪海防军事要塞，眺望英国的泽西岛，退潮时可步行前往方形堡垒（约30分钟）。之后前往卢瓦尔河谷大区入住城堡酒店（原文为达赫蒂涅城堡酒店或同等5星级酒店），酒店坐落在25公顷的法式花园中、毗邻舍农索城堡，是一座由白色石头堆砌、主体由十七世纪著名建筑师Jean-Michel Chevotet设计的雄伟艺术城堡，曾接待过英国伊丽莎白女王，房间保留弗朗索瓦时期风格和古董家具。夜宿：达赫蒂涅城堡酒店或同等5星级酒店（典雅大床房可能分布在城堡的宴会、阁楼、凉亭三个区域，如对房型或区域有指定要求，请在报名前联系客服升级房型）。

timeline.title_en: Loire Valley - Château de Chenonceau - Blois - Château de Chambord - Paris
timeline.title_zh: 卢瓦尔河谷 - 舍农索城堡 - 布洛瓦 - 香波堡 - 巴黎
timeline.description_en: In the morning we visit the Château de Chenonceau, a 15th–16th-century castle built across the Cher river (a tributary of the Loire) — the most romantic of the Loire "water châteaux," likened to a ship moored on the Cher, with Mediterranean gardens and two large round towers; it is also known as the "Ladies' Château" because its successive owners were all women (visit about 1.5 hours). We then head north and stop at the refined old town of Blois: though largely destroyed in WWII, the rebuilt town is well worth seeing, especially the church bell-tower lit up at night and, opposite, the Acrobats' House decorated with medieval jester woodcarvings — one of the few 15th-century houses to survive the war (about 15 min). Finally we visit the Château de Chambord in the Loire Valley, the largest of the Loire châteaux and a classic medieval-style royal hunting lodge built under François I, where roe deer and wild boar still roam the surrounding forest along the D952 riverside road; its layout, form and decoration reflect traditional French architecture blended with Italian Renaissance influence, making it a masterpiece of the French Renaissance and a national treasure (listed as World Heritage in 1981; about 2 hours). The whole region is part of the UNESCO World Heritage Loire Valley castle area, a 280-km tourist route. Afterwards we return to Paris and end this wonderful journey. No accommodation tonight.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往游览卢瓦尔河谷里一座建在水上的城堡——舍农索城堡，这座15世纪和16世纪的建筑横跨卢瓦尔河支流希尔河河面，是河谷宫堡群中最富浪漫情调的"水上城堡"、被喻为停泊在希尔河上的航船，种满地中海植物的花园与两座庞大的骑士塔楼相串联；因几代主人皆为女性，又被称为"女人堡"（游览约1.5小时）。随后北上沿途参观精致古朴的布洛瓦老城：老城虽在二战中几乎被毁，但修复后的城市建筑依然值得一看，尤其是教堂钟鼓楼夜晚灯光投影下光彩熠熠，教堂对面是装饰着中世纪滑稽戏小丑木雕的杂技演员之家，是战争中幸存下来为数不多的15世纪古屋（约15分钟）。最后参观卢瓦尔河谷的香波堡，它是河谷城堡群中最大的一个、较为典型的中世纪古堡布局，是法国君王狩猎的行宫，兴建于弗朗索瓦一世时期，沿D952河畔大道的原生态丛林里隐藏着从未被驯服的獐鹿与野猪；其布局、造型与风格装饰反映法国传统建筑艺术并受意大利文艺复兴影响，是法国文艺复兴时期的代表作之一、被视为国宝，1981年列入世界遗产名录（约2小时）。整片区域属于世界文化遗产卢瓦尔河谷城堡区，是长达280公里的旅游线路。之后返回巴黎，结束美好旅行。当晚无住宿。

meeting_en: Paris — group assembly at a central Paris meeting point on the morning of Day 1; exact location confirmed in the departure notice.
meeting_zh: 巴黎——第1天上午于巴黎市区集合点集合，具体地点以出团通知书为准。

faqs.question_en: Where and when do we meet?
faqs.question_zh: 集合地点和时间？
faqs.answer_en: Meet at 8:30 a.m. on the day in front of the McDonald's at Place d'Italie in the 13th arrondissement of Paris. This product does NOT recommend booking a flight that lands in Paris on the morning of the departure day.
faqs.answer_zh: 当天上午8:30在巴黎13区意大利广场麦当劳门口集合。本产品不推荐参团当天早上降落巴黎的航班！

faqs.question_en: Where and when does the tour disperse?
faqs.question_zh: 集散地点和时间？
faqs.answer_en: The tour disperses at 7:00 p.m. (19:00) on the final day at Place d'Italie in the 13th arrondissement of Paris. This product does NOT recommend booking a flight that leaves Paris on the final day.
faqs.answer_zh: 当天下午19:00在巴黎13区意大利广场解散。本产品不推荐结束当天离开巴黎的航班！

faqs.question_en: Is the Michelin restaurant at the Ivan Vautier Michelin hotel included?
faqs.question_zh: 伊万沃蒂尔米其林酒店的米其林餐厅是否包含？
faqs.answer_en: No, it is not included. We recommend that guests dine at this hotel's Michelin restaurant at their own expense, but the cost is not included. Normally the chef offers two different versions of his recommended dish pairings, but the dishes cannot be chosen — you can only taste the seasonal ingredients the chef selects that day. The restaurant can provide à la carte service.
faqs.answer_zh: 费用不包含，我社推荐游客自费前往此酒店的米其林餐厅，但是不包含费用。通常情况下，主厨推荐两个不同版本的菜式搭配，但是菜品不可选择，只能品尝当天主厨选择的当季食材。餐厅可以提供点单服务。

faqs.question_en: Is the admission to Mont-Saint-Michel included?
faqs.question_zh: 是否包含圣米歇尔山的门票？
faqs.answer_en: The shuttle bus and entry to Mont-Saint-Michel are both free; however, the abbey at the summit requires a ticket that, depending on age and nationality, is either collected free of charge or purchased on site. Recommended visit time for the abbey is 45 minutes. Free (with ID required to collect the ticket) for all nationalities under 18; free (with ID) for EU nationals under 26.
faqs.answer_zh: 圣米歇尔山的摆渡车和门票都是免费，但是山顶上的修道院需要根据年龄和国籍，免费领取门票或者现场购买门票。修道院推荐游览时间为45分钟。全部国籍18岁以下：免费，但需凭证件领取门票；欧盟国籍26岁以下：免费，但需凭证件领取门票。

faqs.question_en: How might the order of the itinerary be changed?
faqs.question_zh: 如何更改行程的先后顺序？
faqs.answer_en: Depending on the Michelin restaurant's reservation availability, the itinerary may be run in reverse — visiting the Loire Valley on day 1 and Mont-Saint-Michel on the last day. The sightseeing content stays the same and the change does not affect the overall experience; the final arrangement follows the departure notice.
faqs.answer_zh: 根据米其林餐厅预定情况，可能第一天游览卢瓦尔河谷、最后一天游览圣米歇尔山。游览内容一致，行程改变不影响全程体验，具体以出团通知书为准。

faqs.question_en: Do I need a visa?
faqs.question_zh: 是否需要签证？
faqs.answer_en: This product does NOT include visa fees. You need a Schengen visa (single or multiple entry); if you need to apply, please choose a Schengen-visa product. After booking we provide, free of charge, all the materials needed to apply for the Schengen visa (refer to the detailed materials list). Your passport must be valid for at least six months from the date of departure, otherwise customs may refuse entry. "Visa-worry-free" guarantee: if you sign your travel contract with us at least 61 days before departure and have not obtained the visa within 45 days before departure, we bear all losses and immediately refund your full travel fee; guests who do not meet this clause and fail to obtain the visa are refunded per the "Refund, Change & Cancellation Terms." If refused, notify us within 48 hours with the consulate's refusal letter; supplementary/changed materials must be submitted within five days, and you may not unilaterally waive the right to a "visa appeal." Visa fees, visa service fees, Schengen insurance fees and visa-centre appointment fees are all non-refundable and non-transferable, even if the product itself is changed or cancelled.
faqs.answer_zh: 本产品不包含签证费用，需要申根签证（单次或多次入境）；如您需要办理签证请选择申根签证产品。预订后免费提供办理申根签证的全部材料（参考详细材料清单）。护照有效期需在离境之日起至少还有六个月有效期，否则海关有权拒绝入境。保签无忧：游客在出发日前61天与我社签约的旅游产品，如在出发前45天内未获取签证，我社承担所有损失，立即退还游客全部旅游费用；不符合该条款的游客如未正常获取签证，将按照"退改与取消条款"进行退费。如遇拒签需在48小时内通知我社并出具使领馆的拒签函，如需补充或更改材料需在五天内提交，并且不得单方面放弃"签证抗辩"权利。签证费、签证服务费、申根保险费、签证中心预约费均不可退款，也无法更改使用者，即使产品退改签，签证费用也无法退款。

faqs.question_en: Booking, changes & cancellation
faqs.question_zh: 预订、变更与取消须知
faqs.answer_en: This is a 4–8 person boutique small-group tour. We recommend arriving in Paris at least one day before departure and leaving Paris at least one day after the tour ends, since the meeting point is 8:30 a.m. at Place d'Italie (13th arr.) and dispersal is 7:00 p.m. there on the final day — flights landing/leaving Paris on those same days are not recommended. The tour is one-way and route order may be reversed depending on the Ivan Vautier Michelin restaurant's availability (e.g. Loire Valley first, Mont-Saint-Michel last); the sightseeing content stays the same and the change follows the departure notice. We assign elegant double rooms for guests, which at the château hotel may fall in the banquet, attic or pavilion wings — if you have a specific room-type or location requirement, contact customer service to upgrade before booking. Note that Monet's Garden is closed in winter (open roughly early April to end of October). Pricing is in EUR; the CNY amount is converted at the day's exchange rate. For free-cancellation windows and detailed refund terms, please refer to the operator's "Refund, Change & Cancellation Terms."
faqs.answer_zh: 本产品为4-8人精品小团。建议至少提前一天抵达巴黎、并在行程结束后至少一天再离开巴黎，因为集合为当天上午8:30在巴黎13区意大利广场、末日19:00在同地解散，故不推荐参团当天早上降落或结束当天离开巴黎的航班。行程为单程深度游览，根据伊万沃蒂尔米其林餐厅的预定情况，游览顺序可能前后调整、往返次序相反（如第一天游览卢瓦尔河谷、最后一天游览圣米歇尔山），但游览内容一致，具体以出团通知书为准。我社为宾客选择典雅大床房，在城堡酒店可能分布在宴会、阁楼、凉亭三个区域，如对房型或区域有指定要求，敬请在报名前联系客服升级房型。请注意莫奈花园冬季关闭（约四月初至十月末开放）。报价以欧元计价，人民币金额按当日汇率换算。免费取消时限及详细退费条款，请以运营方的"退改与取消条款"为准。

faqs.question_en: Health & safety requirements
faqs.question_zh: 健康与安全须知
faqs.answer_en: To ensure a smooth trip and prevent accidents, please have a necessary medical check-up before travelling. Do NOT book if you have any of the following: infectious diseases (e.g. active tuberculosis, typhoid); cardiovascular disease (e.g. severe hypertension, cardiac insufficiency, myocardial ischaemia/infarction); cerebrovascular disease (e.g. cerebral embolism, haemorrhage, tumour); respiratory disease (e.g. emphysema, cor pulmonale); psychiatric illness (e.g. epilepsy and various mental disorders); severe anaemia (haemoglobin below 50 g/L); or recovery from major/medium surgery. Pregnancy: not allowed at all from 35 weeks; from 28 weeks a doctor's check-up report (within 7 days) and attending physician's consent are required; under 28 weeks, book with caution, sign the agency's disclaimer, and you cannot join any adventure/skiing/sea/high-altitude/outdoor activities. People with disabilities: provide a 7-day medical report and physician's consent, be accompanied by an immediate family member, and apply for a reserved place and special facilities at least 61 days in advance. Elderly: those over 70 must provide a health certificate and physical-exam report and be accompanied by an immediate family member (otherwise sign the disclaimer); this is a long trip requiring a certain walking ability and good physical stamina, so book with caution if not fit. Minors (under 18) must be accompanied by an immediate relative or guardian; some sights have special rules for under-18/12/6; for infants under 6 or children under 30 kg confirm a safety child seat with us in advance (otherwise bring an EU-standard seat yourself); minors travelling without parents need parental authorization (a written authorization from the absent parent if only one accompanies, or a guardian's authorization from both parents if travelling with others); infants under 2 years old are NOT accepted. Per Article 15 of the Tourism Law (and the 2025-revised Infectious Disease Prevention Law), travellers must truthfully declare health information relevant to the trip (including pregnancy, lactation, chronic illness, infectious-disease history, suspected symptoms or recent travel to epidemic areas) and follow safety warnings; concealment causing harm makes the traveller liable, and concealing an infectious disease may bring civil/administrative penalties, self-borne medical/quarantine/compensation costs, and contract termination without refund.
faqs.answer_zh: 为确保旅游顺利出行、防止旅途中发生人身意外伤害，请在出行前做一次必要的身体检查，如存在以下情况请勿报名：传染性疾病（如活动期肺结核、伤寒）；心血管疾病（如严重高血压、心功能不全、心肌缺氧、心肌梗塞）；脑血管疾病（如脑栓塞、脑出血、脑肿瘤）；呼吸系统疾病（如肺气肿、肺心病）；精神病（如癫痫及各种精神病）；严重贫血（血红蛋白量在50克/升以下）；大中型手术的恢复期病患者。孕妇：妊娠第35周及以上任何情况下都无法参团；第28周及以上需提供7日内的医生检查报告及主治医生同意书；第28周以下请慎重报名，需签署旅行社免责声明书，且无法参加探险、滑雪、出海、高空、户外等项目。残疾人：需提供7日内的医生检查报告及主治医生同意书，需直系家属陪同，并需提前至少61天申请预留位置及专用配套设施。老年旅游者：70周岁以上需提供健康证明、体检报告并需直系家属陪同（否则需签署免责声明书）；因行程较长、需要一定步行能力和较高体力，体力不支者请慎重报名。未成年人（未满18周岁）需由直系亲属或监护人陪同，部分景点对未满18/12/6周岁有特殊限定；如有6岁以下婴儿或30公斤以下儿童请提前与我社确认安全儿童座椅（否则需自备符合欧盟安全制式的座椅）；无父母陪同的18岁以下未成年人出境须持父母授权书（仅一方陪同需另一方书面授权，与他人同行需父母双方监护人授权书）；本产品不接受2周岁以下婴儿参团。根据《旅游法》第15条及《传染病防治法（2025修订）》，旅游者需如实告知与旅游活动相关的个人健康信息（包括妊娠期、哺乳期、慢性病、传染病史、疑似症状或近期疫区旅居史）并遵守安全警示规定，若因隐瞒导致人身损害或财产损失需自行承担责任，隐瞒传染病情况可能面临民事赔偿及行政处罚，需自行承担医疗、隔离费用及赔偿，旅行社可解除合同且不退还费用。

title_en: Paris & Mont-Saint-Michel 4-Day Art & Heritage Tour
title_zh: 巴黎圣山4天跟团游
short_en: A 4-day deep-dive from the Louvre and Versailles to the island abbey of Mont-Saint-Michel and the Loire's Chambord castle.
short_zh: 4天深度之旅，从卢浮宫、凡尔赛宫到海上孤岛圣米歇尔山修道院与卢瓦尔河谷香波堡。
desc_en: This 4-day round trip from Paris pairs two days of in-depth Parisian art and history with two days exploring Normandy and Brittany. Begin with curator-led tours of the Louvre and Versailles, a Seine river cruise and the fashion boulevards of Haussmann, then journey west to the legendary island abbey of Mont-Saint-Michel and the Renaissance grandeur of Chambord in the Loire Valley. With a French national-museum lecturer guiding you through royal, religious and Impressionist history, it is an all-inclusive cultural escape that goes far beyond a standard city break.
desc_zh: 这趟从巴黎出发往返的4天行程，将两天巴黎深度艺术人文与两天诺曼底、布列塔尼探索完美结合。先由法国国家博物馆讲解员带您深度参观卢浮宫与凡尔赛宫，乘塞纳河游船、漫步奥斯曼时尚大街，再向西前往传奇的海上孤岛圣米歇尔山修道院，以及卢瓦尔河谷文艺复兴瑰宝香波堡。讲解员为您细说法兰西皇室正史、宗教史与印象派艺术，是一段远超普通城市游的一价全含文化之旅。

highlights.en: Curator-led, in-depth tour of the Louvre by a French national-museum lecturer
highlights.zh: 法国国家博物馆讲解员主题深度精讲卢浮宫

highlights.en: Seine river cruise aboard the famous glass-roofed bateaux-mouches past Notre-Dame and the Louvre
highlights.zh: 乘著名透明船舱苍蝇船夜游塞纳河，途经巴黎圣母院、卢浮宫

highlights.en: Visit the Baroque masterpiece of the Palace of Versailles
highlights.zh: 参观巴洛克圣殿凡尔赛宫

highlights.en: Mont-Saint-Michel island abbey, a UNESCO World Heritage site
highlights.zh: 世界文化遗产——海上孤岛圣米歇尔山修道院

highlights.en: Chambord, the grandest Renaissance castle of the Loire Valley
highlights.zh: 卢瓦尔河谷最恢弘的文艺复兴城堡香波堡

highlights.en: All attractions included — Louvre, Versailles, Seine cruise, Mont-Saint-Michel abbey & Chambord
highlights.zh: 一价全含——卢浮宫、凡尔赛、塞纳河游船、圣山修道院、香波堡门票

highlights.en: Small-group experience (4-8 people) for the Mont-Saint-Michel leg, with no forced shopping
highlights.zh: 圣山段4-8人精品小团，全程无强制购物

highlights.en: City-centre 4-star hotels with daily breakfast and a Chinese-speaking guide-driver
highlights.zh: 市区四星级酒店、每日早餐、中文司机兼导游全程服务

includes.en: Hotels: 3 nights in 4-star hotels.
includes.zh: 【酒店】：四星级酒店3晚。

includes.en: Breakfast: buffet or other-style breakfast in the hotel, 3 meals in total.
includes.zh: 【早餐】：酒店内的自助式早餐或其他形式早餐，共3餐。

includes.en: Transport: tourist coach or business travel van.
includes.zh: 【交通】：旅游巴士或商务旅行车。

includes.en: Guide: Chinese-speaking driver-guide service.
includes.zh: 【导游】：中文司机兼导游服务。

includes.en: Operating fees: tourist city tax, city-entry fees, residence tax, road and bridge tolls, parking and fuel charges, driver-guide meal allowances and other in-itinerary operating costs.
includes.zh: 【执行】：游客城市税、进城费、居住税、过路过桥费、停车燃油费、司导餐补等行程内执行费用。

includes.en: Baggage: 1 piece of checked luggage up to 23 kg and 1 piece of carry-on luggage.
includes.zh: 【行李】：1件23公斤行李及1件随身行李。

includes.en: Admission: first-entry tickets to the Louvre (with national-museum guide), Versailles (with national-museum guide), the Seine river cruise, Chambord, and the abbey at the top of Mont Saint-Michel.
includes.zh: 【门票】：卢浮宫门票（含国家馆讲解师）、凡尔赛门票（含国家馆讲解师）、塞纳河游船、香波堡、圣米歇尔山顶修道院景点首道门票。

excludes.en: Passport: personal passport fees.
excludes.zh: 护照：个人护照费用。

excludes.en: Visa: the tourist/visit visa fees required for the countries on the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 签证：行程中所列旅游国家所需的观光签证费用。

excludes.en: Insurance: travel insurance fees (if the itinerary involves high-risk activities, please verify whether your travel insurance covers them).
excludes.zh: 保险：旅游保险费用（如行程内涉及到高风险运动，请核实旅游保险是否包含该项运动）。

excludes.en: Tips: gratuities for the guide and driver, totaling 10 EUR per person per day, same rate for adults and children.
excludes.zh: 小费：游客支付导游和司机小费一共10欧/人/天，大小同价。

excludes.en: Meals: apart from the special meals included in the itinerary, lunches and dinners are not included.
excludes.zh: 餐饮：除行程内包含的特色餐外，行程中不包含午、晚正餐费用。

excludes.en: Admission: sights not marked as fee-included in the itinerary (including but not limited to those noted as "exterior," as well as any "recommended," "optional," "experience" or other items not stated as included; payable by the guest if they wish to visit).
excludes.zh: 门票：行程中未注明费用包含的景点（包括但不仅限于行程中注明“外观”的景点，“推荐”、“可选”、“体验”等等所有未提及费用包含的项目，如游客需要参观，敬请自理）。

excludes.en: Extended stay: any accommodation, transport or sightseeing costs for extensions beyond the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 延长住宿：行程外额外延长的住宿、交通、观光费用。

excludes.en: Personal expenses: such as drinks and alcohol, taxis, phone charges and other personal spending.
excludes.zh: 私人消费：如饮料酒类、出租车、电话费等个人消费。

excludes.en: Other transport: any transport not mentioned in the inclusions beyond the included business van or minibus, such as a Venice gondola, and sightseeing trains, electric rental carts, etc. in traffic-restricted zones, payable by the guest.
excludes.zh: 其他交通：除包含商务旅行车或者中巴之外，费用包含中未提及的其他交通费用，如威尼斯贡多拉，以及车辆限行区的观光火车、电瓶出租车等费用敬请自理。

excludes.en: Free-time activities: guests' own evening sightseeing and recommended items on the itinerary, plus any resulting transport, dining, admission and shopping costs.
excludes.zh: 自由活动：游客夜间自行游览及行程中的推荐项目，以及产生的交通、餐饮、门票、购物等费用。

excludes.en: Experience activities: any travel experience activities not included in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 体验活动：行程中的没有包含的各项旅游体验活动。

excludes.en: Other costs: any costs not mentioned in the inclusions. In cases of force majeure such as natural disaster, war or strikes, or special circumstances such as traffic delays, flight cancellations or time changes, embassy visa delays or insufficient group numbers, or other extra costs not caused by our company (e.g. overseas visa-extension fees, accommodation, meals and transport, national airfare adjustments), our company reserves the right to charge the price difference.
excludes.zh: 其他费用：费用包含中未提及的费用。如因天灾、战争、罢工等不可抗力的原因，及因交通延阻、航班取消或更改时间、使馆延误出签证、人数不足等特殊情况或其他非我公司原因所引致的额外费（如在外延期签证费、住、食及交通费、国家航空运价调整等），我公司有权追加差价。

timeline.title_en: Paris - Louvre - Paris (Curated guided tour of the Louvre's masterpieces, plus central Paris sightseeing)
timeline.title_zh: 巴黎 - 卢浮宫 - 巴黎（深度理解艺术的起源，卢浮宫殿杰作精讲）
timeline.description_en: In the morning, visit the Louvre, the museum France is most proud of, where a guide from the national museum service gives an in-depth themed tour of selected masterpieces. The Louvre is one of the world's oldest museums, a U-shaped complex of old and new wings whose glass-pyramid entrance was designed by the Chinese-American architect I. M. Pei; it holds more than 400,000 works of art (about 35,000 on long-term display) spanning ancient Egypt, Greece, Etruria, Rome, medieval Europe and the Orient. In the afternoon, tour central Paris: Notre-Dame Cathedral on the Ile de la Cite, the Eiffel Tower (exterior) and the Champ de Mars parade ground. You then board a Seine river cruise aboard a glass-cabin "bateau-mouche," passing Les Invalides (exterior), the Grand and Petit Palais (exterior), Place de la Concorde and other landmarks. Overnight at the Mercure Paris or Novotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel. Note: the standard Louvre tour includes ordinary individual tickets (no Chinese-language audio guide); because of crowd-control limits, especially in peak season, a 10 EUR per-person in-museum guiding fee may be refunded.
timeline.description_zh: 上午参观法兰西引以为傲的卢浮宫博物馆，由法兰西国家馆讲解师精选主题深度讲解。卢浮宫是世界上古老的博物馆之一，建筑呈U形，分为新旧两部分，宫前玻璃金字塔入口由华裔建筑大师贝聿铭设计；馆内珍藏40余万件艺术珍品（长期展出约3.5万件），囊括古埃及、希腊、伊特鲁里亚、罗马到欧洲中世纪及东方各国的艺术品。下午游览巴黎市中心：西岱岛上的巴黎圣母院、埃菲尔铁塔（外观）以及战神广场。之后乘坐塞纳河透明船舱的“苍蝇船”游船，途经荣军院（外观）、大小皇宫（外观）、亚历山大三世大桥、巴黎锁桥、香榭丽舍大道、协和广场等地，3.2公里约1小时的航程感受巴黎的浪漫。夜宿巴黎美居酒店或诺富特酒店或同等4星级酒店。提示：行程含卢浮宫普通散客门票（无中文讲解器），因旺季限流可能退还馆内讲解费10欧元/位。

timeline.title_en: Paris - Versailles - Paris (In-depth tour of the Baroque shrine of Versailles, plus Paris's fashion and art quarter)
timeline.title_zh: 巴黎 - 凡尔赛 - 巴黎（精讲巴洛克圣殿凡尔赛宫，品味巴黎时尚艺术街区）
timeline.description_en: In the morning, head to Paris's fashion heart along Boulevard Haussmann and Rue Royale, with free time to admire the Palais Garnier opera house (exterior) and to explore the chic shopping district around Printemps and Galeries Lafayette. Boulevard Haussmann, between the 8th and 9th arrondissements, is lined with grand Haussmann-era architecture, a lively commercial atmosphere and a strong artistic spirit; it was at no. 102 that Marcel Proust wrote most of "In Search of Lost Time." In the afternoon, travel to the Palace of Versailles in the southwestern suburbs of Paris. Versailles stands as a magnificent monument to the era of French absolute monarchy: not only the royal court but the nation's administrative center, built under Louis XIV with more than 30,000 workers, architects, engineers and technicians, who solved enormous technical, water-supply and road challenges to create it. You then check in at the hotel. Overnight at the Mercure Paris or Novotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel. Note: with fewer than 3 guests there is no official guide at Versailles and an electronic audio guide is used instead.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往巴黎时尚中心奥斯曼大街和皇家大道，自由参观巴黎歌剧院（外观）及春天百货、巴黎老佛爷等时尚街区。奥斯曼大街位于巴黎第八区与第九区之间，拥有华丽的奥斯曼建筑群和繁华的商业氛围，街上有老佛爷和春天两大百货公司，《追忆似水年华》的作者马塞尔·普鲁斯特曾在该街102号居所完成大部分写作。下午前往位于巴黎西南郊区的凡尔赛宫，凡尔赛宫是法国封建统治历史时期一座华丽的纪念碑，不仅是法兰西宫廷，也是国家行政中心；路易十四为建造它共动用三万余名工人、建筑师、工程师和技师，解决了建造、引水、道路等诸多复杂难题。之后入住酒店。夜宿巴黎美居酒店或诺富特酒店或同等4星级酒店。提示：凡尔赛宫不足3人无官导讲解，由电子讲解器代替。

timeline.title_en: Paris - Mont Saint-Michel - Rennes (The devout hermit's isle and the heart of Brittany)
timeline.title_zh: 巴黎 - 圣米歇尔山 - 雷恩（虔诚的隐修居士与布列塔尼的心脏）
timeline.description_en: In the morning, travel to Mont Saint-Michel, the solitary island off the coast of Normandy, to tour the Mont Saint-Michel site and its abbey. The island is one of Catholicism's great pilgrimage sites with a thousand years of history: roughly 900 meters around and 88 meters high, built of granite, it becomes an island only at high tide and a peninsula at low tide, a UNESCO World Heritage landscape; legend holds that in 708 the Archangel Michael appeared in a bishop's dream and told him to build a sanctuary here, and the abbey later served as a prison in the Napoleonic era while monks and nuns still live there today. Depending on the tides, you can walk on the mirror-like Normandy mud flats at the foot of the mount, then head to a popular photo spot to capture the soothing scene of the winding little river, the holy mount and grazing sheep. You then continue to Rennes to check in. Overnight at the Novotel Rennes or an equivalent 4-star hotel, located in the Alma commercial district in southern Rennes, about 10 minutes by car from the city center and the Parliament of Brittany.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往诺曼底海滩的独立小岛——圣米歇尔山，游览圣米歇尔山景区和修道院。圣米歇尔山是天主教第三大圣地，拥有千年历史，位于距海岸两公里的孤岛上，周长约900米、海拔88米，由花岗石构成，涨潮时为海岛、退潮时为半岛，被联合国教科文组织列入世界人类遗产；相传公元708年大天使米歇尔托梦给主教让他在此建造修道院，修道院曾在拿破仑时代作为国家监狱，如今仍有修士修女常住。根据潮汐情况，可游览位于山脚下如同镜片的诺曼底海水浅水滩涂，之后前往热门拍照点，拍摄弯弯的小河、圣山、羊群的治愈画面。之后前往雷恩入住酒店。夜宿雷恩诺富特酒店或同等4星级酒店，酒店位于雷恩南部Alma商业区，距市中心、布列塔尼议会宫等核心景点仅约10分钟车程。

timeline.title_en: Rennes - Chateau de Chambord - Paris (The chateaux of the Loire - the finest expression of classic French noble elegance)
timeline.title_zh: 雷恩 - 香波堡 - 巴黎（城堡河谷——法兰西古典贵族优雅的最佳诠释）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, explore Rennes, capital of the Brittany region, a city of history and vitality. Tour the old town of Rennes, with its many colorful, leaning 16th-17th-century half-timbered houses, cobbled streets, arched gateways and old squares; the beautiful Thabor Garden, a roughly 10-hectare park blending a French formal garden, an English landscape area and vast rose and botanical gardens (over 3,000 plant species and 2,000 rose varieties, with a bandstand, aviary, fountains and a children's playground); and the Parliament of Brittany (exterior), a 17th-century masterpiece of French classical architecture and one of Rennes's most representative landmarks, still in use as a court today. You then drive to the Loire Valley to visit the Chateau de Chambord, traveling along the D952 riverside road through the wild Loire forests that hide untamed roe deer and wild boar. Chambord is the largest of the Loire chateaux, a typical medieval-style hunting lodge of the French kings begun under Francois I, reflecting French architectural tradition with Italian Renaissance influence; it was added to the UNESCO World Heritage List in 1981. Afterward, return to Paris, where the wonderful journey ends. No hotel accommodation this evening.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后游览布列塔尼大区首府、历史与活力的魅力之城雷恩。游览雷恩老城，这里保存着大量16–17世纪色彩斑斓、线条倾斜的木筋房（半木结构建筑），石板街道、拱形门洞与古老广场交织出浓厚的历史氛围；美丽的他泊花园，面积约10公顷，融合法式几何庭园、英式自然风景区、庞大的玫瑰园与植物园，拥有超过3000种植物和2000余种玫瑰，并设有音乐亭、鸟舍、喷泉与儿童游乐区；以及布列塔尼议会宫（外观），建于17世纪，是法国古典主义建筑的典范、雷恩最具代表性的历史地标之一，如今仍作为法院使用。随后前往卢瓦尔河谷，沿D952河畔大道穿过隐藏着獐鹿、野猪的原生态丛林，参观全法兰西最恢弘的香波堡。香波堡是卢瓦尔河谷城堡群中最大的一个，较为典型的中世纪古堡布局，是法国君王狩猎的行宫，兴建于弗朗索瓦一世时期，反映法国传统建筑艺术并受意大利文艺复兴影响，1981年列入世界遗产名录。之后返回巴黎，结束美好旅行。当晚无酒店住宿。

meeting_en: Departs from Paris; round trip returning to Paris.
meeting_zh: 巴黎出发，往返巴黎。

faqs.question_en: Where and when do we meet for departure?
faqs.question_zh: 集合地点和时间？
faqs.answer_en: The group meets at 09:00 on Day 1 in front of the McDonald's at Place d'Italie in Paris. (This is a reference time and place; the actual departure time is per the departure notice.) This product is NOT recommended for guests whose flight lands in Paris on the morning of the tour's start.
faqs.answer_zh: 行程第1天09:00在巴黎意大利广场麦当劳门口集合。（参考时间及地点，实际出发时间以出团通知书为准。）本产品不推荐参团当天早上降落巴黎的航班！

faqs.question_en: Where and when does the tour disperse?
faqs.question_zh: 集散地点和时间？
faqs.answer_en: The group disperses at 19:00 that day at Place d'Italie in the 13th arrondissement of Paris. This product is NOT recommended for guests leaving Paris on the same day the tour ends.
faqs.answer_zh: 当天下午19:00在巴黎13区意大利广场解散。本产品不推荐结束当天离开巴黎的航班！

faqs.question_en: How does the group size and vehicle arrangement work?
faqs.question_zh: 团队规模和用车如何安排？
faqs.answer_en: Because of departure scheduling, the two days in Paris are run as a join-in minibus or coach group of roughly 10-30 people, while the two days around Mont Saint-Michel are a small premium group of 4-8 people. The exact arrangement is per the departure notice and the actual itinerary.
faqs.answer_zh: 由于团期安排，巴黎两天行程将调整为散拼中巴或大巴团，人数10–30人左右；圣山两天为4–8人精品小团。具体安排以出团通知书及实际行程为准。

faqs.question_en: Is the Louvre guiding fee always provided, and what about a guide at Versailles?
faqs.question_zh: 卢浮宫讲解费和凡尔赛宫讲解如何安排？
faqs.answer_en: The itinerary includes ordinary individual Louvre tickets (no Chinese-language audio guide). Because the Louvre limits visitor numbers and, especially in peak season, restricts guides from lecturing inside the museum, a 10 EUR per-person in-museum guiding fee will be refunded in that case. At Versailles, if there are fewer than 3 guests there is no official guide and an electronic audio guide is used instead.
faqs.answer_zh: 行程含卢浮宫普通散客门票（无中文讲解器）。由于卢浮宫限流，特别是旺季限制讲解员在馆内讲解，届时将退还馆内讲解费10欧元/每位游客。凡尔赛宫不足3人无官导讲解，由电子讲解器代替。

faqs.question_en: Do I need a visa?
faqs.question_zh: 是否需要签证？
faqs.answer_en: Yes. This product requires a Schengen visa (single or multiple entry) and does NOT include the visa fee - if you need one, please choose a Schengen-visa product. After booking, we provide all materials needed to apply for the Schengen visa (see the detailed materials checklist), and if you commission us to handle the visa we will buy you Schengen-compliant travel insurance; if not, you must arrange your own insurance and claims. Your passport must be valid for at least 6 months from the date of departure, or customs may refuse entry. "Visa-worry-free" guarantee: for guests who sign with us at least 61 days before departure, if a visa is not obtained within 45 days before departure, we bear all losses and immediately refund the full tour cost; guests who do not qualify and fail to obtain a visa are refunded per the change-and-cancellation terms. A refusal must be reported to us within 48 hours with the consulate's refusal letter, and any supplementary/changed materials submitted within 5 days. Note: visa fees, visa-service fees, Schengen insurance fees and visa-center appointment fees are all non-refundable and non-transferable, even if the product is changed or cancelled.
faqs.answer_zh: 需要。本产品需办理申根签证（单次或多次入境），且不包含签证费用，如需办理请选择申根签证产品。预订后我社免费提供办理申根签证的全部材料（参考详细材料清单）；若委托我社办理签证，我社为您购买符合申根要求的旅游保险，未委托则需自行购买保险并自行负责理赔。护照有效期需在离境之日起至少还有六个月，否则海关有权拒绝入境。保签无忧：出发日前61天与我社签约的产品，如在出发前45天内未获取签证，我社承担所有损失并立即退还全部旅游费用；不符合该条款且未获签者按“退改与取消条款”退费。如遇拒签需在48小时内通知我社并出具使领馆拒签函，补充或更改材料需在五天内提交。注意：签证费、签证服务费、申根保险费、签证中心预约费均不可退款，也无法更改使用者，即使产品退改签亦无法退款。

faqs.question_en: Booking, changes & cancellation
faqs.question_zh: 预订、变更与取消须知
faqs.answer_en: Prices are quoted in EUR; for payments in CNY, the day-of exchange rate applies. We recommend arriving in Paris at least one day before the tour starts and departing at least one day after it ends - the product is not recommended for flights landing on the morning of departure or leaving on the day the tour ends. The tour runs as a join-in (shared) group: the two days in Paris carry roughly 10-30 people by minibus/coach, and the two days around Mont Saint-Michel are a 4-8 person premium small group; final group size, vehicle and timing are confirmed in the departure notice. Hotels are the Mercure/Novotel Paris (or equivalent 4-star) for nights 1-2 and the Novotel Rennes (or equivalent 4-star) for night 3, with no accommodation on night 4. Key contingency notes: the Louvre 10 EUR in-museum guiding fee is refunded when crowd-control limits apply; Versailles uses an electronic audio guide when there are fewer than 3 guests; and the mud-flat walk at Mont Saint-Michel depends on the tides. Standard rooms are assigned per the operator's arrangement. Please confirm cancellation/change deadlines and any deposit with us at the time of booking.
faqs.answer_zh: 价格以欧元报价，如以人民币支付按当日汇率结算。建议提前一天抵达巴黎、结束后再过一天离开——本产品不推荐参团当天早上降落或结束当天离开的航班。本产品为散拼成团：巴黎两天约10–30人乘中巴/大巴，圣山两天为4–8人精品小团，最终人数、用车及时间以出团通知书为准。住宿为第1–2晚巴黎美居/诺富特（或同等4星级），第3晚雷恩诺富特（或同等4星级），第4晚无酒店住宿。重要应变提示：卢浮宫因限流时退还馆内讲解费10欧/位；凡尔赛宫不足3人改用电子讲解器；圣米歇尔山脚滩涂游览视潮汐情况而定。房型由组团方安排。请于预订时与我社确认退改截止时间及定金事宜。

faqs.question_en: Health & safety requirements
faqs.question_zh: 健康与安全须知
faqs.answer_en: To ensure a safe trip, please have a health check before departure and do NOT join if you have: infectious diseases (e.g. active tuberculosis, typhoid); cardiovascular disease (e.g. severe hypertension, heart failure, myocardial ischemia/infarction); cerebrovascular disease (e.g. cerebral embolism, hemorrhage, tumor); respiratory disease (e.g. emphysema, cor pulmonale); psychiatric conditions including epilepsy; severe anemia (hemoglobin below 50 g/L); or are recovering from major/medium surgery. Pregnancy: at 35 weeks or more you cannot join under any circumstances; at 28 weeks or more you must provide a doctor's report from within 7 days plus the attending physician's consent; under 28 weeks please book with caution, sign the agency's liability waiver, and you cannot take part in adventure, skiing, sea, high-altitude or outdoor items. Travelers with disabilities need a recent (within 7 days) medical report and physician's consent, an accompanying immediate family member, and at least 61 days' advance request for a reserved place and facilities. Seniors over 70 need a health certificate and physical-exam report and an accompanying immediate family member (or must sign the liability waiver); this is a long itinerary requiring good walking ability, so those with limited stamina should book carefully. Minors (under 18) must be accompanied by an immediate relative or guardian; some sights have special rules for those under 18/12/6; infants under 30 kg need a confirmed/owned EU-standard safety seat; minors travelling without both parents need parental authorization, and infants under 2 years are not accepted. Per Article 15 of the Tourism Law, travelers must truthfully declare health information relevant to the activity (including pregnancy, lactation, chronic illness, infectious-disease history, suspected symptoms or recent stays in epidemic areas) and comply with safety warnings; concealing such information that leads to harm makes the traveler liable, and concealing an infectious disease may bring civil compensation and administrative penalties, with the agency entitled to terminate the contract without refund.
faqs.answer_zh: 为确保旅游顺利出行，请出行前做必要的身体检查，如存在以下情况请勿报名：传染性疾病（如活动期肺结核、伤寒）；心血管疾病（如严重高血压、心功能不全、心肌缺氧、心肌梗塞）；脑血管疾病（如脑栓塞、脑出血、脑肿瘤）；呼吸系统疾病（如肺气肿、肺心病）；精神病（含癫痫）；严重贫血（血红蛋白低于50克/升）；大中型手术恢复期患者。孕妇：妊娠第35周及以上任何情况下都无法参团；第28周及以上需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书；第28周以下请慎重报名，需签署旅行社免责声明书，且无法参加探险、滑雪、出海、高空、户外等项目。残疾人：需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书、需直系家属陪同，并提前至少61天申请预留位置及专用设施。老年旅游者：70周岁以上需提供健康证明、体检报告并由直系家属陪同（否则需签署免责声明书）；本行程较长、对体力要求较高，体力不支者请慎重报名。未成年人（未满18周岁）须由直系亲属或监护人陪同，部分景点对未满18/12/6周岁有特殊限定；30公斤以下儿童需确认符合欧盟安全制式的安全座椅；无父母陪同的18岁以下未成年人须持父母授权书；不接受2周岁以下婴儿参团。根据《旅游法》第15条及《传染病防治法》，旅游者须如实告知与旅游活动相关的个人健康信息（包括妊娠期、哺乳期、慢性病、传染病史、疑似症状或近期疫区旅居史）并遵守安全警示，若因隐瞒健康信息导致损害需自行承担责任；隐瞒传染病情况可能面临民事赔偿及行政处罚，旅行社可解除合同且不退还费用。

title_en: Provence & French Riviera by High-Speed Rail – 5-Day Tour from Paris
title_zh: 普罗旺斯与蔚蓝海岸高铁5天跟团游（巴黎出发）
short_en: A 5-day high-speed rail escape from Paris to lavender fields, hilltop villages, the Verdon Gorge and the glamorous French Riviera.
short_zh: 巴黎高铁直达南法5天：薰衣草花海、山顶古镇、凡尔登大峡谷与蔚蓝海岸名城一网打尽。
desc_en: Board the TGV in Paris and reach Provence in just over two hours for a five-day journey through the soul of southern France. Wander medieval hilltop villages like Gordes (the model for Miyazaki's 'Castle in the Sky'), the Sénanque Abbey and Fontaine-de-Vaucluse, lose yourself in the purple lavender fields of Valensole, and gaze over the turquoise Verdon Gorge and Lake of Sainte-Croix. The route then sweeps along the French Riviera through Cannes, Nice, Menton, Monaco and the clifftop village of Èze, with a Mediterranean boat cruise to Saint-Tropez, Van Gogh's Arles and the Roman city of Nîmes before the high-speed train carries you back to Paris.
desc_zh: 从巴黎乘坐法国高铁TGV，两个多小时直抵南法，开启五天的普罗旺斯与蔚蓝海岸深度之旅。漫步宫崎骏《天空之城》原型——高德古城，以及塞南克修道院、泉水小镇等中世纪山城；置身瓦朗索勒紫色薰衣草花海，俯瞰碧蓝的凡尔登大峡谷与圣十字湖。随后沿蔚蓝海岸串联戛纳、尼斯、芒通、摩纳哥与悬崖小镇埃兹，乘船巡游地中海直达圣特罗佩，并探访梵高笔下的阿尔勒与古罗马名城尼姆，最后乘高铁返回巴黎。

highlights.en: Explore Gordes, the medieval hilltop village said to inspire Miyazaki's 'Castle in the Sky'
highlights.zh: 探访宫崎骏《天空之城》原型——中世纪山顶古城高德

highlights.en: Stand amid the purple lavender fields of Valensole (in season) and the Sénanque Abbey
highlights.zh: 走进瓦朗索勒紫色薰衣草花海与塞南克修道院（薰衣草花期内）

highlights.en: Overlook the turquoise Verdon Gorge and the Lake of Sainte-Croix
highlights.zh: 俯瞰碧蓝的凡尔登大峡谷与圣十字湖

highlights.en: Two nights in Nice for a deep dive into the French Riviera's coastal gems
highlights.zh: 尼斯连住两晚，深度游览蔚蓝海岸核心城市

highlights.en: Visit Cannes, Menton's 'lemon town', Monaco and the clifftop village of Èze
highlights.zh: 畅游戛纳、芒通柠檬小镇、摩纳哥公国与悬崖小镇埃兹

highlights.en: Cruise the Mediterranean by boat to the legendary resort of Saint-Tropez
highlights.zh: 乘船出海巡游地中海，直达传奇度假胜地圣特罗佩

highlights.en: Direct TGV high-speed rail from Paris, cutting travel time to about 2.5 hours
highlights.zh: 巴黎高铁TGV直达南法，约两个半小时大幅缩短车程

highlights.en: All-inclusive pricing: included rail, attractions and a Chinese-speaking guide-driver
highlights.zh: 一价全含：含高铁、指定门票及中文司导服务

includes.en: Hotels: 4 nights in comfortable 2-3 star hotels.
includes.zh: 【酒店】：舒适2-3星级酒店4晚。

includes.en: Breakfast: buffet breakfast at the hotels or breakfast in another form.
includes.zh: 【早餐】：酒店内的自助式早餐或其他形式早餐。

includes.en: Operating fees: tourist city tax, city entry fees, residence tax, road and bridge tolls, parking and fuel charges and other in-itinerary operating costs.
includes.zh: 【执行】：游客城市税、进城费、居住税、过路过桥费、停车燃油费等行程内执行费用。

includes.en: Transport: tourist coach or business travel vehicle.
includes.zh: 【交通】：旅游巴士或商务旅行车。

includes.en: Main transport: 2 direct high-speed TGV train tickets between Paris and the south of France (round trip).
includes.zh: 【大交通】：巴黎往返南法的高铁直达火车票2程。

includes.en: Guide: professional driver plus Chinese-speaking guide service, or a Chinese-speaking driver-guide (note: for groups under 9 people a business vehicle with a Chinese-speaking driver-guide is used; for 9 or more people a tourist coach with a professional driver plus a Chinese-speaking guide is used).
includes.zh: 【导游】：职业司机+中文导游服务或中文司机兼导游服务（注：9人以下为商务车+中文司机兼导游，9人以上为旅游巴士+专业司机+中文导游）。

includes.en: Luggage: 1 piece of checked luggage up to 23 kg plus 1 piece of carry-on luggage.
includes.zh: 【行李】：1件23公斤行李及1件随身行李。

includes.en: Tickets: first-entry admission to the Saint-Tropez boat cruise, the perfume museum and the Eze sky garden.
includes.zh: 【门票】：圣特罗佩出海渡轮、香水博物馆、埃兹空中花园首道门票。

excludes.en: Passport: personal passport fees.
excludes.zh: 护照：个人护照费用。

excludes.en: Visa: the tourist visa fees required for the countries listed in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 签证：行程中所列旅游国家所需的观光签证费用。

excludes.en: Insurance: travel insurance fees (if the itinerary involves high-risk activities, please confirm whether your travel insurance covers them).
excludes.zh: 保险：旅游保险费用（如行程内涉及高风险运动，请核实旅游保险是否包含该项运动）。

excludes.en: Tips: gratuities for the guide and driver totalling EUR 10 per person per day, same rate for adults and children.
excludes.zh: 小费：游客支付导游和司机小费一共10欧/人/天，大小同价。

excludes.en: Meals: lunch and dinner are not included in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 餐饮：行程中不包含午、晚正餐费用。

excludes.en: Admission: attractions not marked as included (including but not limited to sights marked "exterior," and all "recommended," "optional," "experience" and other items not stated as included; if you wish to visit, please pay on your own).
excludes.zh: 门票：行程中未注明费用包含的景点（包括但不限于行程中注明“外观”的景点，以及“推荐”“可选”“体验”等所有未提及费用包含的项目，如需参观敬请自理）。

excludes.en: Extended stay: any extra accommodation, transport or sightseeing costs beyond the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 延长住宿：行程外额外延长的住宿、交通、观光费用。

excludes.en: Personal spending: such as drinks and alcohol, taxis, phone charges and other personal expenses.
excludes.zh: 私人消费：如饮料酒类、出租车、电话费等个人消费。

excludes.en: Other transport: transport not mentioned in the inclusions beyond the included business vehicle or minibus, such as the Venice gondola, and sightseeing trains or electric taxis in vehicle-restricted zones, all at your own expense.
excludes.zh: 其他交通：除包含的商务旅行车或中巴之外，费用包含中未提及的其他交通费用，如威尼斯贡多拉，以及车辆限行区的观光火车、电瓶出租车等费用敬请自理。

excludes.en: Free-time activities: nighttime self-guided sightseeing and recommended items during the trip, and the resulting transport, dining, admission, shopping and other expenses.
excludes.zh: 自由活动：游客夜间自行游览及行程中的推荐项目，以及产生的交通、餐饮、门票、购物等费用。

excludes.en: Experience activities: all travel experience activities not included in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 体验活动：行程中没有包含的各项旅游体验活动。

excludes.en: Other costs: any costs not mentioned in the inclusions. Where force majeure such as natural disasters, war or strikes, or special circumstances such as transport delays, flight cancellations or rescheduling, embassy visa delays or insufficient group numbers, or other reasons not attributable to our company, give rise to extra fees (such as overseas visa-extension fees, accommodation, meals and transport, national air-fare adjustments, etc.), our company reserves the right to charge the price difference.
excludes.zh: 其他费用：费用包含中未提及的费用。如因天灾、战争、罢工等不可抗力原因，及因交通延阻、航班取消或更改时间、使馆延误出签证、人数不足等特殊情况或其他非我公司原因所导致的额外费用（如在外延期签证费、住、食及交通费、国家航空运价调整等），我公司有权追加差价。

timeline.title_en: Paris - Avignon/Nimes - Provence villages - Avignon: Miyazaki's "Castle in the Sky" and the renowned theatre festival
timeline.title_zh: 巴黎-阿维尼翁/尼姆-南法小镇-阿维尼翁：宫崎骏笔下的“天空之城”与精妙绝伦的戏剧节
timeline.description_en: Board the French TGV high-speed train in Paris bound for the south of France, a journey of roughly 2 to 3 hours. After a short rest on arrival, begin a tour of Provence's most beautiful villages, visiting in turn Fontaine-de-Vaucluse (the spring-water village), the hilltop old town of Gordes, and Senanque Abbey. Fontaine-de-Vaucluse, about half an hour from Avignon, is a famous spring-water resort village whose cool mountain spring waters relieve the summer heat; Gordes, the inspiration for Miyazaki's "Castle in the Sky," is a medieval cliffside town of stone walls, winding cobbled lanes and a 16th-century chateau housing artists' works; Senanque Abbey, built by Mazan monks in 1148 some 2 km north of Gordes, lies hidden in a quiet valley and is the backdrop of the book "A Year in Provence" (please keep your voice low when visiting). Then continue to Avignon to explore the old town independently, the Pont d'Avignon broken bridge (exterior), and the Palais des Papes (Papal Palace, exterior) before checking in. Overnight at Ibis Avignon Centre Pont de l'Europe or Ibis Avignon Sud, or equivalent 2-3 star hotel; the centrally located old-town Ibis is within walking distance of the Palais des Papes, ideal for soaking up the Avignon Festival, when in July the city becomes the capital of theatre and street art with puppet shows, opera, contemporary performances and all-night street theatre.
timeline.description_zh: 当天乘坐法国高铁TGV前往南法，车程约2至3小时。抵达后稍作休息，开启普罗旺斯绝美小镇之旅，依次游览：泉水小镇（Fontaine de Vaucluse）、高德古城（Gordes）、塞南克修道院（Senanque）。泉水小镇离阿维尼翁约半小时车程，是南法知名的泉水度假小村，从山中流淌而下的清凉泉水带走了夏日炙热；高德古城是宫崎骏《天空之城》的原型，建筑均建于中世纪，蜿蜒而上的碎石路、青藤环绕的门前石凳，山顶16世纪的高德城堡内收藏了许多艺术家的作品；塞南克修道院由Mazan修道院的僧侣于1148年修建于石头城小镇以北2公里处，隐藏在宁静的山谷中，是《山居岁月》一书的故事背景，参观时请尽量保持安静。之后前往阿维尼翁，自行参观阿维尼翁古城、罗纳河断桥（外观）、阿维尼翁教皇宫（外观），随后入住酒店。夜宿：阿维尼翁老城宜必思酒店或阿维尼翁南宜必思酒店或同等2-3星级酒店；老城宜必思酒店位置优越，可步行到达教皇宫，方便您晚上自由参观古城、环城护城墙、罗纳河断桥与教皇宫，尤其每年7月阿维尼翁戏剧节期间，这里是戏剧及街头艺术的首都，木偶剧、歌剧、当代街头表演及通宵街头戏剧点亮整座古城的夜晚。

timeline.title_en: Avignon - Valensole - Verdon Gorge & Lake of Sainte-Croix - Cannes - Nice: the purple sea of lavender
timeline.title_zh: 阿维尼翁-瓦朗索勒-凡尔登大峡谷及圣十字湖-戛纳-尼斯：薰衣草紫色花海
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, set out for the lavender fields of Valensole and along the D907 road (during the lavender blooming season), immersing yourself in the romantic purple sea. In the afternoon visit Europe's grand canyon, the Verdon Gorge, the second-largest canyon in the world at 25 km long and 700 m deep, together with the Lake of Sainte-Croix, which from the clifftop viewpoint looks like a flat sheet of jade set among the mountains (the drive from the Valensole lavender fields to the lake takes about 40 minutes). Then continue to the cinema town and seaside resort of Cannes to see the Palais des Festivals (built in 1982, the venue of the Cannes Film Festival and home of the Palme d'Or, now 44,000 sqm with 15 halls) and the Walk of Fame beside it with over 300 stars' handprints, with free time to stroll the Cannes seafront promenade. Arrive in Nice in the evening. Overnight at B&B Hotel Nice Arenas or equivalent 3-star hotel, well situated near the Phoenix Park and the Asian Art Museum, close to the beach and Nice old town and just minutes from the Promenade des Anglais. Note: depending on temperature, lavender generally blooms from mid/late June and is harvested up to late July, varying by altitude and variety; if it cannot be seen during the tour dates the visit is changed to a ceramics village instead.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后出发前往瓦朗索勒（Valensole）及D907公路的薰衣草花田（薰衣草花期期间），置身浪漫花海，留下紫色记忆。下午前往游览欧洲峡谷——凡尔登大峡谷（Verdon）以及圣十字湖（Lac de Sainte-Croix）。凡尔登大峡谷是世界第二大峡谷，长25公里、深700米，因壮美景色闻名于欧洲；从居高临下的悬崖景观台望去，圣十字湖仿佛一片平整的翡翠镶嵌在群山之中（从瓦朗索勒薰衣草海洋开车到圣十字湖约需40分钟）。随后前往南法电影重镇及海滨小城戛纳，参观电影宫（建于1982年，是戛纳影展的重要会议地点，金棕榈奖即在此颁发，现有44000平方米展览面积、15个音乐厅）与旁边的星光大道（已累计300多个明星手印），自由漫步戛纳海滨大道。傍晚抵达尼斯。夜宿：B&B尼斯竞技场酒店或同等3星级酒店，毗邻凤凰园和亚洲艺术博物馆，靠近海滩与尼斯老城区，距盎格鲁大道仅几分钟。备注：根据气温不同，薰衣草一般于6月中下旬绽放、视海拔与品种通常截止到7月下旬收割，如团期内无法参观薰衣草，则改为参观陶瓷小镇。

timeline.title_en: Nice - Menton - Monaco - Eze - Nice: the clifftop "eagle's nest" sky garden on Princess Grace's corniche
timeline.title_zh: 尼斯-芒通-摩纳哥-埃兹-尼斯：摩纳哥格蕾丝公主悬崖峭壁上的“鹫巢”空中花园
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, head to Menton to tour the "lemon town," which like its local citrus is wrapped in lemon hues with long beaches, varied architecture and orange groves, where you can lose yourself in the Baroque old town and walk its "lemon road." Then continue to the Principality of Monaco to visit the country and its yacht harbour; with a land area of just 2 sqkm, Monaco is one of the world's richest and most densely populated micro-states, its yacht port and Monte-Carlo being the most representative areas to tour. Next visit the clifftop village of Eze, a purely classic Monaco-style hilltop town with a Mediterranean exotic garden that is also the back garden of the famous Chevre d'Or hotel and a superb vantage point to overlook the Mediterranean from the "eagle's nest" (allow about 3 hours; the Fragonard perfume museum at the foot of Eze, opened in 1983, may also be seen). The corniche road, Avenue Princesse de Grace, named after Monaco's Princess Grace, runs along the beautiful Cote d'Azur. Returning to Nice, freely visit the Baie des Anges beach, the Promenade des Anglais and the old town with its 18th-century Baroque churches and Italian-style buildings, including the Cours Saleya market. Overnight at B&B Hotel Nice Arenas or equivalent 3-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往芒通（Menton）游览“柠檬小镇”，这里和当地盛产的柑橘类水果一样被柠檬色调所包裹，修长的海滩、各式建筑与成片的柑橘果园仿佛自然的调色板，可迷失在巴洛克式风格的老城区，踏上“柠檬之路”。随后前往摩纳哥公国，参观摩纳哥及游艇码头；摩纳哥国土面积仅2平方公里，是世界上人口稠密且最富裕的国家之一，其中游艇海港和蒙特卡洛为最具代表性的游览区域。随后前往悬崖小镇埃兹（Eze），从充满地中海风情的“鹫巢”俯瞰地中海——这是纯古典摩纳哥风格的小镇，山顶种有地中海花园，也是法国有名的金羊酒店的后花园（游玩约3小时；埃兹山下的香水博物馆建于1983年，亦可了解香水的历史与调配）。这条以摩纳哥格蕾丝公主命名的峭壁公路（Av. Princesse de Grace）途经蔚蓝海岸美丽风景。参观结束返回尼斯，自由参观尼斯天使湾沙滩、尼斯英格兰海滨大道及保留18世纪以来巴洛克教堂、意大利风格建筑的老城区，并可逛萨雷雅广场集市（Cours Saleya）。夜宿：B&B尼斯竞技场酒店或同等3星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Nice - Saint-Raphael - Saint-Tropez - Arles - Nimes: a Mediterranean boat cruise along the Cote d'Azur and a post-Impressionist journey
timeline.title_zh: 尼斯-圣拉斐尔-圣特罗佩-阿尔勒-尼姆：地中海出海巡游蔚蓝海岸与后印象派之旅
timeline.description_en: In the morning travel to the Cote d'Azur seaside town of Saint-Raphael, a lively spot of bars, restaurants and boutiques reached by a 15-minute walk along the Rose Coast beaches from Frejus harbour and nicknamed the carnival of the southern French coast. Then board a boat at Sainte-Maxime to cruise the Mediterranean (the crossing takes about 20 minutes) straight to the maritime art town of Saint-Tropez, the "sun city" near the Var coast about 100 km from Marseille, famed for its near-hundred small beaches, luxury hotels and private villas, and bays filled with elegant yachts (notably 1930s-style Italian Riva boats). Then take the bus to Arles to tour the old town and the Van Gogh Cafe, admiring the brilliant sunflower fields under the sky; Arles, called the "little Rome of the Gauls," prospered under Caesar and is world-famous through Van Gogh, who painted and spent the end of his life here, with his traces felt everywhere. Arrive in the evening at the "water spirit city" of Nimes and check in. Overnight at Ibis Styles Nimes Gare Centre or equivalent 3-star hotel, steps from the train station and old town, within walking distance of the Maison Carree and the Arenes de Nimes. Note: sunflowers bloom June-July; in hot weather they are harvested early, in which case the sunflower fields cannot be visited.
timeline.description_zh: 早上前往蔚蓝海岸海滨重镇圣拉斐尔（Saint-Raphael），从弗雷瑞斯海港沿玫瑰海岸沙滩徒步15分钟即可到达，这里酒吧、餐厅、精品小店与海水浴场热闹非凡，被称为南法海岸腹地的狂欢节。随后前往圣马克西姆（Sainte-Maxime）乘船出海巡游地中海，直达海洋艺术之城圣特罗佩（Saint-Tropez，游船时长约20分钟）。圣特罗佩位于瓦尔省、距马赛约100公里，别称“太阳城”，号称拥有法国美丽的海滩——由近百个小型海滩组成，豪华酒店和私人别墅占据海滩，盛夏海湾泊满优雅游艇，尤以20世纪30年代风格的意大利Riva快艇居多。随后乘坐巴士前往阿尔勒（Arles），参观阿尔勒老城区、梵高咖啡馆，欣赏天空下灿烂的向日葵花田；阿尔勒被誉为“高卢人的小罗马”，因凯撒大帝占领而繁荣、因梵高画作而蜚声世界，梵高在此作画并走过人生终途，随处可感受到他的足迹。傍晚抵达水精灵之城尼姆（Nimes），入住酒店。夜宿：尼姆火车站中心宜必思尚品酒店或同等3星级酒店，距火车站和老城仅几步之遥，可步行到达内毛苏斯和尼姆竞技场。备注：向日葵花期6月-7月，如气候炎热向日葵提前收割，则无法游览向日葵花田。

timeline.title_en: Nimes/Avignon - Paris: exploring the millennia-old charm of the "water spirit city" of Nimes
timeline.title_zh: 尼姆/阿维尼翁-巴黎：探访水精灵之城尼姆的千年古韵
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, explore the old town of the "water spirit city" of Nimes on foot to discover the splendour and mystery of ancient Rome. Starting from the Avenue Feucheres by Nimes station to learn about the Roman aqueduct-bridge structures, walk to the Jardin de la Fontaine, a more than thousand-year-old "mysterious garden" of well-preserved Roman ruins and parkland created to honour the spirit believed to dwell in the spring around which Nimes grew. Nimes gathers many marvels of Roman ingenuity, including the well-preserved Roman arena (Arenes de Nimes) and the Tour Magne, the Roman watchtower on the hill offering far-reaching views; the Maison Carree (square temple), about 17 m high and 26 m deep, built in the 1st century BC under Emperor Augustus with Corinthian columns, once served as a town hall and church and is now an antiquities museum. Then depart from Nimes or Avignon train station aboard the French TGV to Paris Gare de Lyon, ending the journey through the south of France. No accommodation today.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后徒步参观水精灵之城尼姆古城，探索古罗马的辉煌和神秘花园。从尼姆火车站的水泉大道（Avenue Feucheres）了解古罗马时期水渠桥的建筑结构开始，前往建于一千多年前的神秘花园——古迹庭院泉边公园（le Jardin de la Fontaine），这是保存完好的古罗马建筑群与林园景观，因尼姆是以泉水为中心发展而成的都市，人们深信泉水有精灵，泉边公园即为奉献给泉水精灵而建。尼姆汇集了众多古罗马智慧结晶：保存完好的古罗马竞技场、丘陵上的古罗马瞭望塔马涅塔（la Tour de Magne）可登高远望；方形神殿（Maison Carree）以科林斯式圆柱为特色，高约17米、深26米，建于公元前1世纪奥古斯都大帝时代，曾作为市政府大楼和教堂，现为古代博物馆。随后从尼姆或阿维尼翁火车站出发，乘坐法国TGV高铁抵达巴黎里昂火车站，结束南法旅程。当天无住宿。

meeting_en: Paris — departure by TGV high-speed train from a Paris station; the tour returns to Paris Gare de Lyon.
meeting_zh: 巴黎——从巴黎火车站乘坐TGV高铁出发，行程结束返回巴黎里昂火车站。

faqs.question_en: Where and how do we meet at the start?
faqs.question_zh: 集合地点和方法是什么？
faqs.answer_en: On the departure day, make your own way to Paris Gare de Lyon or Marne-la-Vallee station and board the train with your e-ticket; it is recommended to arrive at least 30 minutes before departure. There is no guide on the train; the guide meets you at the Avignon/Nimes TGV station. Trains depart between 06:30 and 12:00 and arrive between 10:00 and 15:00; departure times and stations vary by tour date, so the times given are for reference only and the actual ticket and tour notice prevail. This product does not recommend a flight that lands in Paris on the day the tour starts.
faqs.answer_zh: 出发当天自行抵达巴黎里昂火车站或马恩河谷火车站，持电子票登车，建议至少在列车发车前30分钟抵达车站；列车上无导游陪同，导游在阿维尼翁/尼姆高铁站接站。高铁出发时间段为06:30-12:00，抵达时间段为10:00-15:00，因团期不同出发时间与出发高铁站有所区别，提供时间仅供参考，请以实际车票与出团通知书为准。本产品不推荐参团当天降落巴黎的航班！

faqs.question_en: Where and how does the tour disperse at the end?
faqs.question_zh: 集散地点和方法是什么？
faqs.answer_en: On the dispersal day the group disbands on the spot at Nimes/Avignon station; after the guide helps you board, you take the train to a Paris station (Gare de Lyon or Marne-la-Vallee). Arrival is around 15:00 to around 19:00; times vary by tour date and are for reference only, with the actual ticket and tour notice prevailing. This product does not recommend leaving Paris by flight on the day the tour ends.
faqs.answer_zh: 集散当天在尼姆/阿维尼翁火车站就地解散，导游协助登车后，游客乘坐火车前往巴黎火车站（巴黎里昂火车站或马恩河谷车站）。抵达时间段约为15:00至19:00，因团期不同有所区别，提供时间仅供参考，请以实际车票与出团通知书为准。本产品不推荐结束当天离开巴黎的航班！

faqs.question_en: Can the train tickets be changed?
faqs.question_zh: 火车票是否可以更改？
faqs.answer_en: Train tickets are booked in advance and cannot be changed. If you do not need the train tickets, you may choose a tour that departs the next day and runs round-trip from Avignon or Nice. On the return day you take the train back from Avignon/Nimes; the tickets are non-refundable and non-exchangeable. If you wish to forgo a ticket, please give advance notice to cancel that one-way ticket; otherwise, not using the flight/train tickets in sequence may result in penalty cancellation.
faqs.answer_zh: 火车票提前预定不可更改。如果不需要火车票，可以选择次日出发在阿维尼翁或尼斯往返的团。返回当天从阿维尼翁/尼姆乘坐火车返回，火车票不可退、不可更换。如需放弃票，请提前通知取消该单程票，否则未按顺序使用机票/火车票，可能被处罚取消。

faqs.question_en: Can I skip Monaco and spend a whole day on the Nice beach?
faqs.question_zh: 是否可以不去摩纳哥而停留一整天在尼斯海滩？
faqs.answer_en: Yes. Please notify the guide in advance that you will give up the Monaco itinerary on Day 3.
faqs.answer_zh: 可以，请提前通知导游放弃摩纳哥当天行程（第三天）。

faqs.question_en: I get seasick, can I skip the Mediterranean boat cruise?
faqs.question_zh: 我晕船，是否可以不参加地中海乘船出海项目？
faqs.answer_en: Yes, you may travel by vehicle to the Saint-Tropez (Saint-Pierre) harbour instead. However, the boat ticket is non-refundable.
faqs.answer_zh: 可以，您随车前往圣佩罗海港码头，但无法获得退票。

faqs.question_en: Are there strenuous walking or climbing activities in the itinerary?
faqs.question_zh: 行程中有徒步、爬山比较消耗体能的活动吗？
faqs.answer_en: The clifftop "eagle's nest" sky garden at the top of Eze requires an uphill walk, but the difficulty and physical demand are relatively easy and most people can manage it. Note: on certain tour dates, due to the botanical garden being closed or group-size issues, it may not be possible to reach the top of the garden; if so, the visit is changed to a town walk.
faqs.answer_zh: 埃兹山顶的“鹰巢”空中花园需登山前往，难度和体能消耗比较简单，大多数人都可以前往。提示：个别团期因植物园不开放及参团人数问题，有可能无法登顶植物园，如无法前往将改为小镇游览。

faqs.question_en: Are there chances and places to go into the sea and swim during the trip?
faqs.question_zh: 行程中是否有下海、泡海水浴的机会和地点？
faqs.answer_en: Two nights of the itinerary are in seaside towns where you can swim in the sea, so please bring your own swimwear. You may also give up the Monaco day trip and freely explore the Nice seafront; as the Nice hotel is on the Promenade des Anglais, it is very convenient for free activity.
faqs.answer_zh: 行程内两晚酒店在海滨城市，都可以下海游泳，请自备泳衣。也可以放弃摩纳哥一日游，自由在尼斯城市海滨游览，由于尼斯入住在英格兰人散步大道上，非常方便自由活动。

faqs.question_en: What are the dates and locations of festivals during the itinerary?
faqs.question_zh: 行程内节日庆典的日期和地点？
faqs.answer_en: Avignon Festival: 4 July 2026 to 25 July 2026. Also the Nimes International Music Festival, the Arles International Photography Festival and the Nice International Jazz Festival.
faqs.answer_zh: 阿维尼翁戏剧节：2026年7月4日-2026年7月25日。另有尼姆国际音乐节、阿尔勒国际摄影节、尼斯国际爵士节。

faqs.question_en: When is the lavender blooming season?
faqs.question_zh: 薰衣草的花期是什么时候？
faqs.answer_en: The blooming time varies each year with the climate and also differs by altitude, so we slightly adjust the itinerary and the flower-viewing areas according to the season. Generally, lavender blooms from early/mid-June to mid/late August. From late May, local farmers and the tourism board specially plant large fields of violets and lupins, which also form vast purple seas; in fact the purple sea widely circulated online is usually purple lupin (Lupinus violet, family Fabaceae) rather than lavender (family Lamiaceae).
faqs.answer_zh: 根据每年气候不同，开花时间不同，不同海拔开花时间也不同，我社会根据节气略微调整行程和观看花海的区域。一般情况下，每年6月中上旬到8月中下旬都有薰衣草盛开；从5月底开始，当地农户及旅游局特意安排种植大量紫罗兰和鲁冰花花田，同样是一大片紫色花海，其实网上广为流传的紫色花海通常是紫色鲁冰花（羽扇豆科-Lupinus violet）并非唇形科的薰衣草。

faqs.question_en: Do I need a visa?
faqs.question_zh: 是否需要签证？
faqs.answer_en: Yes. This product does not include visa fees; you need a Schengen visa (single or multiple entry). If you require a visa, please choose a Schengen-visa product. After booking we provide free of charge all the materials needed to apply for the Schengen visa (see the detailed materials list). Your passport must be valid for at least six months from the date of departure, otherwise customs may refuse entry. Visa fees, visa service fees, Schengen insurance fees and visa-centre appointment fees are all non-refundable and cannot be transferred to another user, even if the product itinerary is changed or cancelled. "Worry-free visa guarantee": for travellers who sign a contract with us at least 61 days before departure, if the visa is not obtained within 45 days before departure, we bear all losses and immediately refund the full travel cost; travellers who do not meet this clause and fail to obtain the visa normally are refunded per the change/cancellation terms. In case of refusal, you must notify us within 48 hours, provide the consulate's refusal letter, submit any supplementary or amended materials within five days, and may not unilaterally waive the "visa appeal" right. If we handle the Schengen visa for you, we purchase compliant Schengen travel insurance; if not, you must arrange your own insurance and claims.
faqs.answer_zh: 需要。本产品不包含签证费用，需办理申根签证（单次或多次入境），如需办理请选择申根签证产品。预订后免费提供办理申根签证的全部材料（参考详细材料清单）。护照有效期需在离境之日起至少还有六个月，否则海关有权拒绝入境。签证费、签证服务费、申根保险费、签证中心预约费均不可退款，也无法更改使用者，即使产品退改签，签证费用亦无法退款。保签无忧：游客在出发日前61天与我社签约的旅游产品，如在出发前45天内未获取签证，我社承担所有损失，立即退还全部旅游费用；不符合该条款的游客如未正常获取签证，将按照退改与取消条款退费。如遇拒签需在48小时内通知我社并出具使领馆拒签函，如需补充或更改材料需在五天内提交，且不得单方面放弃“签证抗辩”权利。若委托我社办理申根签证，我社为您购买符合要求的申根旅游保险；若未委托，需自行购买旅游保险并自行负责理赔。

faqs.question_en: Booking, changes & cancellation
faqs.question_zh: 预订、变更与取消须知
faqs.answer_en: Free, no-reason cancellation is available up to 30 days before departure (not including the 30th day), by either the agency or the traveller. It is recommended to book at least 14 days in advance; after successful payment the order awaits a second confirmation by the organizing agency, and if not confirmed within 48 hours it is automatically refunded, so do not book connecting flights or hotels before your itinerary is confirmed. Because of frequent flight changes, traffic, ferry cancellations, strikes and itinerary reordering, the order of dates and sights may often be adjusted (without changing the route or sights, this is not a breach); travellers are required to arrive at the meeting point one day before the tour starts and leave one day after it ends, allowing reasonable connection time (5 hours for same-airport transfers, 7 hours for different-airport transfers in the same city; reasonable meet/disperse window 07:00-21:00). A coach may replace the high-speed train in case of force majeure; the tour notice prevails. This is a join-in (shared) group tour with a minimum group size of 10 people; if it is not reached by 30 days before departure (or 14 days for the join-in minimum) either party may cancel without liability before the group is announced, and if not reached the agency may cancel without compensation. Standard double rooms are auto-assigned to two travellers booking together with bed type (double or twin) decided by the hotel and not selectable; solo travellers pay a single-room supplement unless they opt into room-sharing; triple/family rooms default to two parents plus one minor with bed type set by the hotel. European hotels are non-smoking, check-in is 14:00 and check-out 11:00, do not provide disposable toiletries or free hot water, and air-conditioning is not a standard facility. All pricing is quoted in EUR at the time of booking; if you pay in CNY, the amount is the real-time CNY figure auto-calculated from the Bank of China "EUR selling price" foreign-exchange rate on the day of payment, with the same rule applied to refunds and any exchange-rate differences or bank fees borne by the traveller.
faqs.answer_zh: 出发前30天（不含第30天）旅行社和旅行者均有权申请无理由取消。建议至少提前14天预订；支付成功后需等待组团社二次确认，如超48小时未确认则默认自动退款，未获确定行程前请勿预订衔接机票及酒店。由于航变频繁、交通拥堵、渡轮取消、罢工游行或行程前后顺序调整，行程时间及游览先后顺序常被调整（在不改变路线及景点的情况下不视为旅行社违约）；本产品要求旅游者在开始前一天到达集合地、结束后一天离开集散地，并预留合理衔接时间（同机场转机至少5小时、同城不同机场至少7小时；合理集合集散时间段为07:00至21:00）。遇不可抗力可能使用大巴车代替高铁，请以出团通知书为准。本产品为散客拼团，成团人数为10人，行程开始前30天未达成团人数双方均可解除合同、宣布成团前互不担责，未达人数我社有权取消且不承担违约责任。标准双人间在两人同时报名时自动安排，床型（大床或双床）由酒店安排不可选；单人报名默认含单人房差，不愿拼房请备注单人入住；三人家庭间默认两位父母与一位未成年儿童入住，床型由酒店安排。欧洲酒店全面禁烟，入住14:00、退房11:00，不提供一次性洗漱用品及免费开水，且不以空调为标准设施。所有定价以欧元为计价单位，如选择人民币支付，则以当天本网站依据中国银行实时“欧元卖出价”自动计算的人民币实时价格为准，退款同样适用申请当日即时汇率，汇率差异或银行手续费由旅行者承担。

faqs.question_en: Health & safety requirements
faqs.question_zh: 健康与安全须知
faqs.answer_en: For your safety, please have a necessary medical check before departure and do not book if you have any of the following: infectious diseases (e.g. active tuberculosis, typhoid); cardiovascular disease (e.g. severe hypertension, cardiac insufficiency, myocardial ischemia or infarction); cerebrovascular disease (e.g. embolism, hemorrhage, brain tumor); respiratory disease (e.g. emphysema, cor pulmonale); mental illness (e.g. epilepsy and various psychiatric conditions); severe anemia (hemoglobin below 50 g/L); or being in recovery from major surgery. Pregnancy: from week 35 you may not join under any circumstances; from week 28 a doctor's check report within 7 days and the attending physician's consent letter are required; under 28 weeks please book with caution, sign the agency's disclaimer, and you cannot take part in adventure, skiing, boating, high-altitude or outdoor items. Persons with disabilities need a doctor's report within 7 days plus consent letter, a direct-relative companion, and to apply for a reserved place and facilities at least 61 days ahead. Travellers over 70 need a health certificate, medical check report and a direct-relative companion (or to sign the disclaimer), should have adequate walking ability for this long itinerary, and need a physician's consent letter for any adventure/skiing/boating/high-altitude/outdoor items. Minors under 18 must be accompanied by a direct relative or guardian; some sights have restrictions for those under 18, 12 or 6; infants under 30 kg need a confirmed child safety seat (otherwise bring your own EU-standard seat); under-18s travelling without parents need a parental authorization letter (both parents' if not travelling with either parent), and infants under 2 years are not accepted. Per Article 15 of the Tourism Law, travellers must truthfully declare health information relevant to the activity (including pregnancy, breastfeeding, chronic illness, infectious-disease history, suspected symptoms or recent travel to epidemic areas) and follow safety warnings; concealment that causes harm or transmission risk makes the traveller liable for the resulting losses, medical and quarantine costs and compensation, and the agency may terminate the contract without refund.
faqs.answer_zh: 为确保顺利出行，请于出行前做必要的身体检查，若存在以下情况请勿报名：传染性疾病（如活动期肺结核、伤寒）；心血管疾病（如严重高血压、心功能不全、心肌缺氧、心肌梗塞）；脑血管疾病（如脑栓塞、脑出血、脑肿瘤）；呼吸系统疾病（如肺气肿、肺心病）；精神病（如癫痫及各种精神病）；严重贫血（血红蛋白低于50克/升）；大中型手术恢复期。孕妇：妊娠35周及以上任何情况下都无法参团；28周及以上需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书；28周以下请慎重报名，需签署旅行社免责声明书，且无法参加探险、滑雪、出海、高空、户外等项目。残疾人需提供7日内医生检查报告及同意书、需直系家属陪同，并至少提前61天申请预留位置及专用设施。70周岁以上老年人需提供健康证明、体检报告并由直系家属陪同（否则签署免责声明书），因行程较长需有一定步行能力，涉及探险/滑雪/出海/高空/户外项目需持主治医师同意书。未成年人（未满18周岁）须由直系亲属或监护人陪同，部分项目对未满18/12/6周岁有特殊限定；30公斤以下儿童请提前确认安全座椅，否则需自备符合欧盟标准的座椅；无父母陪同的18岁以下未成年人须持父母授权书（仅一方陪同需另一方书面授权），本产品不接受2周岁以下婴儿参团。根据《旅游法》第15条，旅游者须如实告知与旅游活动相关的个人健康信息（包括妊娠期、哺乳期、慢性病、传染病史、疑似症状或近期疫区旅居史）并遵守安全警示，若因隐瞒导致人身损害或传播风险，需自行承担相应损失、医疗与隔离费用及赔偿责任，旅行社可解除合同且不退还费用。

title_en: France, Switzerland & Italy 6-Day Tour: Paris to Milan One-Way
title_zh: 法瑞意6天跟团游：巴黎至米兰单程路线
short_en: A 6-day one-way journey from Paris to Milan via Geneva, Interlaken, Lucerne and Zurich, with the Louvre, Versailles, a Seine cruise and the Jungfrau region.
short_zh: 6天单程之旅，从巴黎一路游览至米兰，途经日内瓦、因特拉肯、卢塞恩与苏黎世，深度体验卢浮宫、凡尔赛宫、塞纳河游船与少女峰地区。
desc_en: This 6-day one-way escorted tour runs deep from Paris to Milan with no backtracking, cutting coach mileage so you spend more time sightseeing. Begin with two full days in Paris exploring the Louvre with a French national-museum guide, Notre-Dame, a Seine river cruise and Versailles, then cross into Switzerland for Geneva's lakeside old town, the two-lakes Interlaken and Jungfrau region, the fairy-tale village of Lungern, Lucerne and Zurich. The journey closes along the Alps in Milan with its iconic Duomo and the Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II. Themes weave together world-class art, French elegance, Alpine lakes and snow peaks, and Italian fashion.
desc_zh: 这是一条从巴黎到米兰的6天单程深度游线路，单程行程不走回头路，大幅降低大巴行车里程，让您把更多时间留给游览。行程以巴黎两整天开篇，由法国国家馆讲解师带您深度品鉴卢浮宫，并游览巴黎圣母院、乘塞纳河游船、参观凡尔赛宫；随后进入瑞士，游览日内瓦湖畔老城、两湖之间的因特拉肯与少女峰地区、童话小镇龙疆、卢塞恩与苏黎世；最后沿阿尔卑斯山脉抵达时尚之都米兰，瞻仰米兰大教堂与埃马努埃莱二世拱廊。世界级艺术、法式优雅、阿尔卑斯湖光雪山与意式时尚交织成一段美好旅程。

highlights.en: In-depth Louvre tour led by a French national-museum guide
highlights.zh: 由法国国家馆讲解师带领深度游览卢浮宫

highlights.en: Seine river cruise past Notre-Dame, the bridges and the Louvre
highlights.zh: 乘塞纳河游船，途经巴黎圣母院、各座大桥与卢浮宫

highlights.en: Versailles Palace and the Opera / Haussmann fashion district
highlights.zh: 游览凡尔赛宫与奥斯曼大街、巴黎歌剧院时尚街区

highlights.en: Geneva lakeside old town, Flower Clock and Jet d'Eau
highlights.zh: 日内瓦湖畔老城、花钟与大喷泉

highlights.en: Two-lakes Interlaken and panoramic views of the Jungfrau region
highlights.zh: 两湖之间的因特拉肯与少女峰地区全景

highlights.en: Fairy-tale Lungern village, Lucerne and Zurich along the lakes
highlights.zh: 童话小镇龙疆、卢塞恩与苏黎世的湖光山色

highlights.en: Milan's Gothic Duomo and the Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II
highlights.zh: 米兰哥特式大教堂与埃马努埃莱二世拱廊

highlights.en: One-way deep route, city-centre 4-star hotels, no forced shopping
highlights.zh: 单程深度线路，市中心四星酒店，全程无强制购物

includes.en: Hotel: 5 nights in 4-star hotels.
includes.zh: 【酒店】：四星级酒店5晚。

includes.en: Meals: 5 meals in total, hotel breakfasts or meals in other forms.
includes.zh: 【餐饮】：酒店内早餐或其他形式餐饮共计5餐。

includes.en: Taxes and fees: all itinerary taxes and fees such as tourist city tax, entry/city-access fees, residence tax, road and bridge tolls, island-landing fees, etc.
includes.zh: 【税费】：游客城市税、进城费、居住税、路桥费、登岛费等行程内的所有税费。

includes.en: Transport: tour coach or business travel vehicle.
includes.zh: 【交通】：旅游巴士或者商务旅行车。

includes.en: Guide: professional driver plus Chinese-speaking guide, or a Chinese-speaking driver-guide throughout (note: for groups of 8 people or fewer, a business travel vehicle plus a Chinese-speaking driver-guide is arranged, and the driver-guide leads the entire city itinerary).
includes.zh: 【导游】：职业司机+中文导游，或者全程中文司机兼导游（备注：8人及以下则安排为商务旅行车+中文司机兼导游，届时将由司兼导带领游览全部城市行程）。

includes.en: Luggage: one piece of checked luggage up to 23 kg and one piece of carry-on luggage.
includes.zh: 【行李】：1件23公斤行李及1件随身行李。

includes.en: Activities and tickets: Louvre admission (including a national-gallery guide), Versailles admission (including a national-gallery guide), and the Seine river cruise.
includes.zh: 【活动及门票】：卢浮宫门票（含国家馆讲解师）、凡尔赛门票（含国家馆讲解师）、塞纳河游船。

excludes.en: Passport: personal passport costs.
excludes.zh: 护照：个人护照费用。

excludes.en: Visa: tourist visa fees for the destination countries listed in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 签证：行程中所列旅游国家所需的观光签证费用。

excludes.en: Insurance: travel insurance fees (if the itinerary involves high-risk sports, please verify whether your travel insurance covers that activity).
excludes.zh: 保险：旅游保险费用（如行程内涉及到高风险运动，请核实旅游保险是否包含该项运动）。

excludes.en: Tips: guide and driver tips totalling 10 EUR per person per day, same rate for adults and children.
excludes.zh: 小费：游客支付导游和司机小费一共10欧/人/天，大小同价。

excludes.en: Meals: lunch and dinner are not included in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 餐饮：行程中不包含午、晚正餐费用。

excludes.en: Tickets: attractions not noted as fee-included (including but not limited to sights marked 'exterior', and all 'recommended', 'optional', 'experience' and other items not stated as included; if you wish to visit them, please cover the cost yourself).
excludes.zh: 门票：行程中未注明费用包含的景点（包括但不仅限于行程中注明“外观”的景点，以及“推荐”、“可选”、“体验”等所有未提及费用包含的项目，如游客需要参观，敬请自理）。

excludes.en: Extended stays: accommodation, transport and sightseeing beyond the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 延长住宿：行程外额外延长的住宿、交通、观光费用。

excludes.en: Personal spending: drinks and alcohol, taxis, phone charges and other personal expenses.
excludes.zh: 私人消费：如饮料酒类、出租车、电话费等个人消费。

excludes.en: Other transport: transport not mentioned as included beyond the business travel vehicle or minibus, e.g. the Venice gondola, and sightseeing trains, electric taxis, etc. in vehicle-restricted zones, all at your own cost.
excludes.zh: 其他交通：除包含商务旅行车或者中巴之外，费用包含中未提及的其他交通费用，如威尼斯贡多拉，以及车辆限行区的观光火车、电瓶出租车等费用敬请自理。

excludes.en: Free-time activities: guests' own evening sightseeing and the recommended/optional projects in the itinerary, plus any resulting transport, dining, tickets, shopping and other costs.
excludes.zh: 自由活动：游客夜间自行游览及行程中的推荐项目，以及产生的交通、餐饮、门票、购物等费用。

excludes.en: Experience activities: any travel experience activities in the itinerary that are not included.
excludes.zh: 体验活动：行程中没有包含的各项旅游体验活动。

excludes.en: Other costs: anything not mentioned under what is included. In cases of force majeure such as natural disaster, war or strikes, and special situations such as traffic delays, flight cancellations or rescheduling, embassy visa delays or insufficient group numbers, or other extra costs not caused by our company (e.g. overseas visa-extension fees, board, lodging and transport, national airfare adjustments), our company has the right to add a price difference.
excludes.zh: 其他费用：费用包含中未提及的费用。如因天灾、战争、罢工等不可抗力的原因，及因交通延阻、航班取消或更改时间、使馆延误出签证、人数不足等特殊情况或其他非我公司原因所导致的额外费用（如在外延期签证费、住、食及交通费、国家航空运价调整等），我公司有权追加差价。

timeline.title_en: Paris - The Louvre - Paris (Guided masterpiece tour at the birthplace of Western art)
timeline.title_zh: 巴黎 - 卢浮宫 - 巴黎（深度理解艺术的起源，卢浮宫殿杰作精讲）
timeline.description_en: In the morning, visit France's pride, the Louvre Museum, where a French national-gallery guide gives an in-depth, themed tour of selected masterpieces. In the afternoon, tour the city center: Notre-Dame de Paris, the Ile de la Cite, the Eiffel Tower (exterior) and the Champ de Mars. Then board a Seine river cruise that passes Les Invalides (exterior), the Grand and Petit Palais (exterior), Place de la Concorde and more, spending the whole day among central Paris landmarks. The famous glass-cabin 'Bateaux Mouches' cruise runs about 3.2 km in roughly one hour, passing Notre-Dame, the Grand and Petit Palais, the Pont Alexandre III, the love-lock bridge, the Louvre, the Champs-Elysees and the Ile de la Cite. Overnight at Mercure or Novotel Paris, or an equivalent 4-star hotel. Note: in peak season the Louvre limits in-gallery guiding, in which case a 10 EUR per-person guiding fee is refunded; Versailles has no official guide for groups under 3 people and an audio guide is used instead.
timeline.description_zh: 上午参观法兰西引以为傲的卢浮宫博物馆，由法兰西国家馆讲解师精选主题深度讲解。下午前往游览巴黎圣母院、西岱岛、埃菲尔铁塔（外观）以及战神广场，之后乘坐塞纳河游船游览荣军院（外观）、大小皇宫（外观）、协和广场等地，全天游览巴黎市中心景点。著名的透明船舱“苍蝇船”游船在塞纳河上航行约3.2公里、约1小时，途经巴黎圣母院、大小皇宫、亚历山大三世大桥、巴黎锁桥、卢浮宫、香榭丽舍大道和西岱岛等著名景点，在塞纳河面上感受巴黎的浪漫。夜宿巴黎美居酒店或诺富特酒店或同等4星级酒店。提示：旺季卢浮宫可能限制馆内讲解，届时退还每位10欧元讲解费；凡尔赛不足3人无官导讲解，由讲解器代替。

timeline.title_en: Paris - Versailles - Paris (Guided tour of the baroque Palace of Versailles, plus Paris's fashion and art quarter)
timeline.title_zh: 巴黎 - 凡尔赛 - 巴黎（精讲巴洛克圣殿凡尔赛宫，品味巴黎时尚艺术街区）
timeline.description_en: In the morning, head to Paris's fashion heart along Boulevard Haussmann and Rue Royale, with free time to see the Palais Garnier (Paris Opera, exterior) and shop the Printemps and Galeries Lafayette department stores. Boulevard Haussmann is the elegant, art-rich commercial core of Paris, lined with grand Haussmann-style buildings; the writer Marcel Proust completed most of In Search of Lost Time at his home at no. 102. In the afternoon, travel to the southwestern suburbs to tour the Palace of Versailles, a magnificent monument of France's royal era that served as both the French court and the nation's administrative center, then return to the hotel. Overnight at Mercure or Novotel Paris, or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往巴黎时尚中心奥斯曼大街和皇家大道，自由参观巴黎歌剧院（外观）及春天百货、巴黎老佛爷等时尚街区。奥斯曼大街是巴黎的核心区域，拥有华丽的奥斯曼建筑群和繁华的商业氛围，《追忆似水年华》的作者马塞尔·普鲁斯特曾在这条街102号的居所里完成了大部分写作。下午前往位于巴黎西南部郊区的凡尔赛宫游览——它是法国封建统治历史时期一座华丽的纪念碑，既是法兰西宫廷，也是当时国家的行政中心；之后返回酒店。夜宿巴黎美居酒店或诺富特酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Paris - Geneva (Lake Geneva, the Flower Bridge and the old town)
timeline.title_zh: 巴黎 - 日内瓦（游日内瓦湖畔，看花桥横渡古城区）
timeline.description_en: In the morning, set off for Geneva, capital of French-speaking Switzerland. On arrival, tour Geneva's old town, the Lake Geneva waterfront, the Flower Clock and the Jet d'Eau fountain, and stroll the 'Flower Bridge' (Pont des Bergues / Ile Rousseau) area packed with local eateries and specialty shops. Lake Geneva (Lac Leman) straddles Switzerland and France and the whole lake region is a World Heritage area; the Jet d'Eau shoots water 140 m high at 500 litres per second and is visible from far across the city. The upper old town on the right bank of the Rhone is dense with churches and historic sites, winding lanes of antique shops, and the former home of the Enlightenment thinker Rousseau. Afterwards, check in at the Novotel Geneva Port (Annemasse). Overnight at Novotel Geneve Centre Gare / Port (Annemasse) or Crowne Plaza, or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午出发前往瑞士法语区首府日内瓦，到达后游览日内瓦老城、日内瓦湖区、花钟和大喷泉，并游览云集各种当地美食和特色商店的“花桥”区域。日内瓦湖又名莱芒湖，横跨瑞士和法国，整个湖区被列为世界遗产；大喷泉高140米、喷水量每秒500公升，从市中心很远就能看见，夜晚还有灯光照明。隆河右岸山坡上的上城区是教堂、古迹的聚集地，蜿蜒小巷里有许多古董商店，启蒙思想家卢梭的故居也位于旧城区内。随后入住安纳马斯日内瓦港诺富特酒店。夜宿安娜玛斯日内瓦港诺富特酒店或皇冠假日酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Geneva - Interlaken (Between Switzerland's 'two lakes', with views of the Jungfrau)
timeline.title_zh: 日内瓦 - 因特拉肯（行瑞士“两湖”之间，赏“少女峰”全景）
timeline.description_en: In the morning, travel to Interlaken, set between Lake Brienz and Lake Thun (nicknamed God's 'left and right eyes'). You may freely explore Hoheweg street and the Hohematte green, a peaceful village setting woven into the landscape. There is also a choice of one (and only one) Jungfrau-region option: the included drive through Grindelwald to admire the classic Swiss 'Dreamy Hillside'; or the optional Jungfrau panoramic cable car to the summit (230 EUR), reaching the Top of Europe, Europe's highest railway station, with the Sphinx Observatory and the Aletsch Glacier, riding cog railways, aerial cableways, the red panoramic train and the vertical lift to see the Ice Palace, Sphinx and Alpine viewpoints; or the optional First-Grindelwald aerial gondola round trip (70 EUR) up to the First summit for the famous First Cliff Walk and thrilling high-altitude activities such as the First Flyer zip line and the First Glider. Overnight at the Sigriswil snow-and-lake-view hotel (Hotel Solbadhotel Sigriswil area) or an equivalent 4-star hotel, beside the Sigriswil panorama bridge with views over Lake Thun and the surrounding mountains.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往有“上帝左眼与右眼”之称的布里恩茨湖和图恩湖之间的因特拉肯，可自由游览何维克街、荷黑马特等宁静村庄景致。当日在少女峰地区有三项推荐项目，仅可三选一、不可同时选两项：项目一为乘车游览少女峰地区【费用包含】，跟随导游乘车游览格林德尔瓦尔德经典的瑞士“梦幻山坡”；项目二为少女峰全景缆车登顶【230欧元】，依次经格林德尔瓦尔德、艾格冰川到达少女峰登顶——Top of Europe欧洲较高的火车站，前往“斯芬克斯观景台”俯瞰阿莱奇冰川，乘齿轮火车、空天缆车、红色全景列车、垂直天梯游览水晶宫等经典景点；项目三为菲斯特-格林德尔瓦尔德空中贡多拉往返票【70欧元】，乘空中贡多拉直达菲斯特峰巅，游览著名的悬崖天梭巅峰栈道（First Cliff Walk），并可选择高空飞索、神鹰飞梭等刺激活动。夜宿锡格里斯维尔雪山湖景酒店或同等4星级酒店，酒店位于锡格里斯维尔全景桥旁，客房享有图恩湖或周围群山的景致。

timeline.title_en: Interlaken - Lucerne - Zurich (The idyllic village of Lungern and Switzerland's classic lake-and-mountain scenery)
timeline.title_zh: 因特拉肯 - 卢塞恩 - 苏黎世（世外桃源龙疆镇，瑞士湖光山色代表作）
timeline.description_en: In the morning, drive to the small town of Lungern to enjoy Lake Lungern and the village scenery (the filming location for the happy ending of the drama 'Crash Landing on You'), a tranquil idyll where the famous GoldenPass line passes through. Then continue to Lucerne for the lake-and-mountain scenery of Lake Lucerne, the Lion Monument that tells of the loyalty and resolve of the Swiss, the Chapel Bridge (Kapellbrucke) and the octagonal Water Tower. The Lion Monument, carved into natural rock in 1821 by a Danish sculptor, commemorates the 786 Swiss Guards who died in 1792 defending Louis XVI's family at the Tuileries; Mark Twain called it 'the most mournful and moving piece of stone in the world'. Lucerne, in central German-speaking Switzerland, keeps its medieval beauty of churches, towers and old streets. Afterwards, travel on to Zurich. Overnight at the Harry's Home Zurich-Limmattal hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel, set in the scenic Limmattal beside Switzerland's largest shopping center.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往龙疆小镇，游览龙疆湖及小镇风光——这里是“爱的迫降”大团圆结局的取景地，宛如世外桃源，著名的金色山口快车也会从这里经过。之后前往卢塞恩，游览卢塞恩湖的湖光山色，听狮子纪念碑讲述瑞士人忠贞坚毅的那段历史，以及卡贝尔廊桥（教堂桥）和八角形水塔等景点。狮子纪念碑由丹麦雕塑家于1821年雕刻在天然岩石上，是为纪念1792年8月10日为保护巴黎杜乐丽宫中路易十六家族而全部战死的786名瑞士雇佣兵，马克·吐温称其为“世界上最悲壮和最感人的雕像”。卢塞恩位于瑞士中部、属德语区，依山傍水，保留着中世纪的教堂、塔楼与长街古巷。之后前往苏黎世。夜宿苏黎世利马塔尔哈利之家酒店或同等4星级酒店，酒店坐落于风景秀丽的利马塔尔中心地带，紧邻瑞士较大的购物中心。

timeline.title_en: Zurich - Milan (Along the Alps, from the financial capital to the fashion capital)
timeline.title_zh: 苏黎世 - 米兰（沿阿尔卑斯山脉，从金融之都游览时尚之都）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, tour Zurich: the Grossmunster cathedral (exterior), Lake Zurich and Bahnhofstrasse. Lake Zurich is about 4 km wide and 39 km long, lined with yachts and home to swans and ducks, with the wealthy 'Gold Coast' on the north shore; Bahnhofstrasse is one of Europe's longest and most expensive shopping avenues, lined with luxury brands and private banks. The Grossmunster (exterior), built around 1100 and consecrated about 1220, played a pivotal role in the 16th-century Swiss Reformation and houses stained glass by the modern master Giacometti. Then set off for the fashion capital, Milan, where there is free time to admire the city's landmark Milan Cathedral / Duomo (exterior) - a Gothic masterpiece begun in 1386 that took some 500 years to build, famed for its countless spires and marble sculptures - and the Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II, one of Europe's most beautiful shopping arcades, home to a flagship Prada boutique and many fine restaurants and cafes. The tour then ends. No accommodation tonight.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，游览苏黎世大教堂（外观）、苏黎世湖、班霍夫大街等景点。苏黎世湖宽约4公里、长约39公里，湖面停满游艇，白天鹅、野鸭随处可见，北岸为富人居住的“金岸”；班霍夫大街（车站大街）是欧洲较长、世界上昂贵的购物大道之一，遍布世界各地的奢侈品牌与私人银行。苏黎世大教堂（Grossmünster，外观）始建于1100年前后、约1220年揭幕，在16世纪瑞士宗教改革中起到举足轻重的作用，教堂内的彩画玻璃是现代艺术大师贾科梅蒂的杰作。之后出发前往时尚之都米兰，到达后自由参观米兰主教堂（Duomo，外观）——这座始建于1386年、历经约500年才建成的哥特式建筑以众多精美雕刻和尖塔闻名于世——以及欧洲漂亮的商业拱廊之一埃马努埃莱二世拱廊（其中有规模数一数二的Prada精品店及众多高级餐馆、咖啡厅）。随后结束美好行程。今晚无住宿。

meeting_en: Paris, France — tour departs from your central Paris hotel (Mercure/Novotel or equivalent); exact pickup confirmed in the final departure notice.
meeting_zh: 法国巴黎 — 行程从巴黎市中心酒店（美居/诺富特或同等）出发，具体接团地点以出团通知书为准。

faqs.question_en: Where and when does the tour meet and disperse?
faqs.question_zh: 集合及集散地点和方法是怎样的？
faqs.answer_en: Meet at 09:00 on Day 1 outside the McDonald's at Place d'Italie in Paris. The tour disperses around 19:00 on Day 6 in central Milan. (Times and places are for reference; the actual departure time follows the tour notification letter.) This product does not recommend flights that land in Paris on the morning of the joining day, or flights leaving Milan on the final day.
faqs.answer_zh: 行程第1天09:00在巴黎意大利广场麦当劳门口集合；行程第6天19:00左右在米兰市区解散。（参考时间及地点，实际出发时间以出团通知书为准。）本产品不推荐参团当天早上降落巴黎的航班，以及结束当天离开米兰的航班！

faqs.question_en: Will the coach journeys on the route be very long?
faqs.question_zh: 行程路线乘坐大巴时间会不会很久？
faqs.answer_en: Only the Geneva-Paris leg is long, about 6 hours 45 minutes; all other planned legs are around 3-4 hours of driving. Road traffic is complex, especially in city centers where congestion or other factors can increase driving time, and the tunnel between Lucerne and Milan is prone to traffic jams that can lengthen the journey.
faqs.answer_zh: 该产品仅日内瓦至巴黎段约为6小时45分，其余计划行程均为3-4小时左右的行车时间。公路交通情况复杂，特别是市区内容易发生堵车或其它因素导致行车时间增加，同时卢塞恩到米兰的隧道容易发生堵车，导致行程时间增加。

faqs.question_en: Can I go to the summit of the Jungfrau?
faqs.question_zh: 产品是否可以游览少女峰登顶？
faqs.answer_en: Yes, you can visit it, but the cost is not included. If you wish to take part it is recommended to book in advance. The available experience time is limited and may conflict with the original itinerary, affecting the arrangement of other activities.
faqs.answer_zh: 可以游览，但是费用不包含。如需参加建议提前预定。可选的体验时间受限，可能跟原行程安排产生冲突，导致影响其他行程和体验的安排。

faqs.question_en: Can I visit the First Top of Adventure activities?
faqs.question_zh: 我是否能游览菲斯特瑞士空天探险活动（First Top of Adventure）？
faqs.answer_en: Yes, you can visit, but the cost is not included. If you wish to take part it is recommended to book in advance.
faqs.answer_zh: 可以游览，但是费用不包含。如需参加建议提前预定。

faqs.question_en: What adventure activities are there at First?
faqs.question_zh: 菲斯特都有什么探险活动？
faqs.answer_en: The First aerial-adventure area has many thrilling mountain activities, mainly: the Aerial gondola, the First Cliff Walk, the First Flyer zip line and the First Glider. These can be bought on site depending on the day's queue and weather conditions.
faqs.answer_zh: 菲斯特空天探险有很多惊险刺激的高山活动，主要项目有：空中贡多拉（Aerial gondola）、悬崖天梭巅峰栈道（First Cliff Walk）、高空飞索（First Flyer）、神鹰飞梭（First Glider）。可以根据当天排队时间及天气情况现场购买。

faqs.question_en: Can I choose both the Jungfrau sightseeing train and the First aerial adventure on the same day?
faqs.question_zh: 我是否能同时选择少女峰观光列车和菲斯特空天探险两个项目？
faqs.answer_en: No. There are only 5-6 hours of free time in Interlaken that day. The recommended time for the Jungfrau is about 4 hours, and First needs 3-4 hours, so the two cannot both be done in one day.
faqs.answer_zh: 不可以。当天在因特拉肯仅有5-6小时自由活动时间，推荐游览少女峰时间为4小时，菲斯特需要3-4个小时，因此两个项目无法同一天同时选择。

faqs.question_en: Can I choose to ride the GoldenPass to see Switzerland?
faqs.question_zh: 我是否可以选择乘坐金色山口游览瑞士？
