faqs.answer_en: Yes, you may take the GoldenPass on the Lungern (or Meiringen) to Interlaken or Lucerne leg. Before buying the train ticket, agree with the guide on the time and journey for rejoining the group; at that point the Lungern or Lucerne sightseeing will be shortened. The train ticket plus seat reservation costs about 35 EUR.
faqs.answer_zh: 可以选择龙疆或梅林根到因特拉肯或卢塞恩段。需要在购买火车票前与导游协商再次返回旅游团的时间点和车程，届时龙疆或卢塞恩的游览行程将会缩减。火车票及座位费约为35欧元。

faqs.question_en: If I don't choose any of the Interlaken activities, how should I spend the day?
faqs.question_zh: 如果我不选择任何因特拉肯的活动，该如何游览？
faqs.answer_en: You can explore the town of Interlaken freely. As a well-known Swiss resort town, its tourist facilities are very complete, and the 6-hour plan can cover the whole of Interlaken town.
faqs.answer_zh: 可以在因特拉肯小镇上自由游览。作为瑞士知名的旅游度假小镇，所有的旅游设施非常齐全，6小时的游览计划可以覆盖因特拉肯小镇的全貌。

faqs.question_en: Are there important operational notes I should know (small-group switch, Louvre limits, paragliding risk, recurring departures)?
faqs.question_zh: 有哪些重要的注意事项（小团调整、卢浮宫限流、滑翔伞风险、循环发团）？
faqs.answer_en: 1) If 8 or fewer people are booked, the group automatically becomes a small group with a business travel vehicle and a driver-guide who leads the whole city itinerary. 2) In peak season the Louvre may limit group entry: if it is changed to individual (FIT) tickets, 10 EUR guiding fee per person is refunded; if entry is impossible, the ticket plus guiding fee is refunded and it becomes an exterior visit. Versailles uses an audio guide instead of an official guide when there are fewer than 3 people. 3) The optional paragliding is a high-risk activity (possible weightlessness, impact, weather effects): age 10-65, weight 10-95 kg, in good health (people with underlying illness, high blood pressure, heart disease, pregnant women etc. are prohibited); you must follow the instructor, not operate equipment yourself, and obey site rules. Ordinary travel insurance does not cover high-risk activities; the operator provides only basic medical/rescue insurance. 4) This is a recurring (rotating) departure: other guests join and leave at different points along the way, with different start/end cities and different prices, so begin and end according to the destination you personally booked.
faqs.answer_zh: 1）如报名人数为8人及以下，本团将自动改为小团，安排商务旅行车+司机兼导游，由司兼导带领游览全部城市行程。2）卢浮宫在旅游旺季可能针对旅游团限流：如改为散拼门票，则退还每位10欧元讲解费；如无法入内，则退还景点门票+讲解费，改为外观游览。凡尔赛不足3人时由讲解器替代官导讲解。3）本产品内自费项目滑翔伞为高风险项目（可能存在失重、撞击、天气影响等）：年龄要求10-65周岁，体重10-95公斤，身体健康（基础疾病、高血压、心脏病、孕妇等禁止参与），必须听从教练指挥、不得擅自操作装备、遵守场地规定及安全规范；普通旅游保险不包含高风险项目，活动方仅提供医疗和救援的基础保险。4）本产品为循环套发团，途中会有其他游客在不同地点上下团，开始和结束的城市不同、价格不同，敬请根据自己报名的目的地开始和结束行程。

faqs.question_en: Do I need a visa?
faqs.question_zh: 是否需要签证？
faqs.answer_en: Yes. This product does not include visa fees; if you need a visa, please choose a Schengen-visa product. It requires a Schengen visa (single or multiple entry). 'Worry-free visa' guarantee: for guests who sign a tour contract with us at least 61 days before departure, if no visa is obtained within 45 days before departure, we bear all losses and immediately refund the full tour fee; guests not meeting this clause who fail to obtain a visa are refunded per the change-and-cancellation terms. In case of refusal, notify us within 48 hours with the consulate's refusal letter; any supplementary or amended materials must be submitted within five days, and you may not unilaterally waive the right of 'visa defence'. We provide Schengen-compliant travel insurance if you commission us to handle the visa; otherwise buy your own. After booking, we provide all Schengen application materials free of charge. Your passport must be valid for at least six months from the departure date, or customs may refuse entry. Visa fees, visa service fees, Schengen insurance fees and visa-center appointment fees are all non-refundable and non-transferable, even if the product is changed or cancelled.
faqs.answer_zh: 需要。本产品不包含签证费用，如需办理签证请选择申根签证产品。本产品需要申根签证（单次或多次入境）。保签无忧：游客在出发日前61天与我社签约的旅游产品，如在出发前45天内未获取签证，我社承担所有损失，立即退还全部旅游费用；不符合该条款的游客如未正常获取签证，将按“退改与取消条款”退费。如遇拒签需在48小时内通知我社并出具使领馆拒签函，如需补充或更改材料需在五天内提交，且不得单方面放弃“签证抗辩”权利。如委托我社办理签证，我社为游客购买符合申根要求的申根旅游保险；若未委托，需自行购买保险并自行负责理赔。预定后免费提供办理申根签证的全部材料。护照有效期需在离境之日起至少还有六个月，否则海关有权拒绝入境。签证费、签证服务费、申根保险费、签证中心预约费均不可退款，也无法更改使用者，即使产品退改签，签证费用亦无法退款。

faqs.question_en: Booking, changes and cancellation
faqs.question_zh: 预订、变更与取消须知
faqs.answer_en: Free cancellation: both the agency and the traveller may cancel without reason up to 30 days before departure (the 30th day excluded). This is a shared (join-in) tour with a minimum group size of 10; if the minimum is not reached by 30 days before departure either side may cancel without liability, and the same 10-person minimum applies to group optional activities, which may be cancelled and turned into 'free time' if not met. Because of frequent flight changes, traffic, ferry cancellations, strikes or itinerary reordering, the visiting order and times may change; travellers must arrive at the meeting point at least one day before the tour starts and leave the dispersal point at least one day after it ends, allowing reasonable connection time (at least 5 hours for same-airport transfers, 7 hours for different airports in the same city; reasonable meet/disperse window 07:00-21:00) - losses from not doing so are the traveller's own. Rooms: solo bookings include a single-supplement deposit (refunded pro-rata if room-sharing succeeds); two people default to a standard twin/double with bed type assigned by the hotel (not selectable); a triple family room is by default two parents plus one minor, with bed configuration assigned by the hotel. European hotels are non-smoking, no cooking in rooms, no free toiletries or boiled water, check-in 14:00 / check-out 11:00, and air-conditioning is not standard. Listed hotel names are preferred; if full, an equivalent same-star hotel is substituted without separate notice. Payment does not equal confirmation: book at least 14 days ahead; orders need a second confirmation within 48 hours or are auto-refunded. Pricing: all prices are quoted in EUR at booking; if you pay in CNY, the amount follows the real-time Bank of China 'EUR selling rate' on the day of payment (refunds likewise use that day's rate, and any exchange/bank fees are borne by the traveller). Per the Tourism Law and Contract Law, no extra charge may be added for children or the elderly on the same tour. Itinerary contingency: order and timing may be adjusted without being a breach by the agency provided the route and sights are unchanged; force-majeure delays are not compensated and a coach may replace a high-speed train - follow the tour notification letter, and on-site the guide's instructions prevail.
faqs.answer_zh: 免费取消：出发前30天（不含第30天）旅行社和旅行者均有权无理由取消。本产品为散客拼团，成团人数为10人；行程开始前30天（不含第30天）未达成团人数，双方均有权解除合同且不承担违约责任，团队自费活动同样需达到10人，否则旅行社有权取消并改为“自由活动”。由于航变、交通拥堵、渡轮取消、罢工或行程顺序调整，游览时间及先后顺序经常调整，要求旅行者至少在参团日期前一天抵达集合地、离团日期后一天离开集散地，并预留合理衔接时间（同机场转机至少5小时、同城不同机场至少7小时，合理集散时段07:00-21:00），未预留时间所致损失由旅行者自行承担。房型：单人报名默认含单人房差押金（拼房成功按比例退还）；两人报名默认标准双人间，床型由酒店安排不可选；三人家庭间默认两位父母与一位未成年儿童，床型由酒店安排不可选。欧洲酒店全部禁烟、禁止房内做饭、不提供一次性洗漱用品及免费开水，入住14:00、退房11:00，且空调并非标准设施。行程内所列酒店为优先入住，如订满则更换为相近条件、同星级酒店，不再另行通知。支付不等于确认：建议至少提前14天预订，订单需在48小时内二次确认，超时未确认默认自动退款。价格：所有定价以欧元为计价单位，如选择人民币支付，则以当天支付时本网站依据中国银行实时外汇牌价“欧元卖出价”自动计算的人民币价格为准（退款同样适用申请当日汇率，汇率差及银行手续费由旅行者承担）。根据《旅游法》及合同法，不得对同团儿童、老人额外加收费用。行程应变：在不改变路线及景点前提下，调整游览日期、时间及先后顺序不视为旅行社违约；不可抗力导致的延误不予赔偿，并可能以大巴代替高铁，请以出团通知书为准，现场以导游通知为准。

faqs.question_en: Health and safety requirements
faqs.question_zh: 健康与安全须知
faqs.answer_en: For your safety, please have a physical check before travelling and do NOT book if you have any of the following: infectious diseases (e.g. active tuberculosis, typhoid); cardiovascular disease (e.g. severe hypertension, heart failure, myocardial ischemia or infarction); cerebrovascular disease (e.g. cerebral embolism, hemorrhage, brain tumor); respiratory disease (e.g. emphysema, cor pulmonale); psychiatric conditions (e.g. epilepsy and various mental illnesses); severe anemia (hemoglobin below 50 g/L); or recovery from major/medium surgery. Pregnancy: at 35 weeks or more you cannot join under any circumstances; at 28 weeks or more you must provide a doctor's check report within 7 days and an attending physician's consent letter; under 28 weeks, book with caution, sign a disclaimer, and you cannot take part in adventure, ski, sea-going, high-altitude or outdoor activities. People with disabilities need a 7-day medical report plus physician's consent, a direct family escort, and must apply at least 61 days ahead for a reserved place and facilities. Elderly travellers over 70 need a health certificate, medical report and a direct family escort (or must sign a disclaimer); this tour is long and demands a fair amount of walking and stamina, so those not physically fit should book with caution, and a physician's consent letter is required for any adventure/ski/sea/high-altitude/outdoor activity. Minors under 18 must be accompanied by a direct relative or guardian; some sights have special rules for under-18s, under-12s or under-6s; for infants under 6 / children under 30 kg confirm a safe child seat in advance (or bring an EU-standard one); an under-18 travelling without parents needs a parental authorization letter (both parents' if travelling with non-parents); infants under 2 are not accepted. Under Article 15 of the Tourism Law (and the Infectious Disease Prevention Law, 2025 revision), travellers must truthfully declare health information relevant to the trip (including pregnancy, lactation, chronic illness, infectious-disease history, suspected symptoms or recent travel to epidemic areas) and obey safety warnings; concealment that causes harm or transmission risk means the traveller bears liability, including medical, quarantine and compensation costs, and the agency may terminate the contract without refund.
faqs.answer_zh: 为确保顺利出行，请在出行前做一次必要的身体检查，如存在下列情况请勿报名：传染性疾病患者（如活动期肺结核、伤寒等）；心血管疾病患者（如严重高血压、心功能不全、心肌缺氧、心肌梗塞等）；脑血管疾病患者（如脑栓塞、脑出血、脑肿瘤等）；呼吸系统疾病患者（如肺气肿、肺心病等）；精神病患者（如癫痫及各种精神病）；严重贫血患者（血红蛋白低于50克/升）；大中型手术恢复期患者。孕妇：妊娠35周及以上任何情况下都无法参团；28周及以上需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书；28周以下请慎重报名，需签署旅行社免责声明书，且无法参加探险、滑雪、出海、高空、户外等项目。残疾人：需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书、需直系家属陪同、需至少提前61天申请预留位置及专用设施。老年游客：70周岁以上需提供健康证明、体检报告并由直系家属陪同（否则需签署免责声明书）；本行程较长、需要一定步行能力和体力，体力不支者请慎重报名；涉及探险、滑雪、出海、高空、户外等项目需持主治医师同意书。未成年游客（未满18周岁）须由直系亲属或监护人陪同；部分项目对未满18/12/6周岁有特殊限定；6岁以下婴儿或30公斤以下儿童请提前确认安全座椅（否则需自备符合欧盟制式的座椅）；无父母陪同的18岁以下未成年人须持父母授权书（与非父母同行需父母双方授权书）；本产品不接受2周岁以下婴儿参团。根据《旅游法》第15条及《传染病防治法（2025修订）》，旅游者需如实告知与旅游活动相关的个人健康信息（包括妊娠期、哺乳期、慢性病、传染病史、疑似症状或近期疫区旅居史）并遵守安全警示规定，若因隐瞒导致人身损害或传播风险，需自行承担相应医疗、隔离及赔偿责任，旅行社可解除合同且不退还费用。

title_en: France-Switzerland-Italy 8-Day Tour: Paris to Rome One-Way Deep Route
title_zh: 法瑞意8天跟团游：巴黎至罗马单程深度路线
short_en: 8-day Paris-to-Rome escorted journey through all four Swiss language regions and Italy's Renaissance cities, with intercity rail, 4-star city hotels and taxes all included.
short_zh: 8天巴黎至罗马单程跟团游，纵贯瑞士四大语区与意大利文艺复兴名城，城际火车、市区四星酒店及税费全含。
desc_en: This 8-day one-way escorted tour runs deep from Paris to Rome, cutting coach mileage by entering and exiting at two different cities. From Lake Geneva and the Jungfrau region to Lucerne, Zurich, Milan, Venice, Florence, the Cinque Terre, Pisa and the medieval hill towns of Siena and Pienza, you traverse all four Swiss language regions and tour one Italian city a day. Hand-picked city-centre 4-star hotels keep sightseeing efficient, and all taxes are included with no hidden fees.
desc_zh: 这条8天单程跟团线路从巴黎一路深度玩到罗马，两点进出大幅缩短大巴行车里程。行程从日内瓦湖与少女峰地区，延伸至卢塞恩、苏黎世、米兰、威尼斯、佛罗伦萨、五渔村、比萨，以及锡耶纳与皮恩扎等中世纪山城，纵贯瑞士四大语区，并在意大利每天游览一座城市。精选市中心四星酒店提升游览效率，各项税费全含、绝无隐藏费用。

highlights.en: Lake Geneva, the flower clock and the Jet d'Eau in Switzerland's French-speaking capital
highlights.zh: 瑞士法语区首府日内瓦：日内瓦湖、花钟与大喷泉

highlights.en: Interlaken and the Jungfrau region between Lake Brienz and Lake Thun, the 'eyes of God'
highlights.zh: 因特拉肯与少女峰地区，畅游有'上帝左右眼'之称的布里恩茨湖与图恩湖之间

highlights.en: Lucerne's lakeside, Lion Monument and Chapel Bridge, plus the idyllic village of Lungern
highlights.zh: 卢塞恩湖光山色、狮子纪念碑、卡贝尔廊桥，及世外桃源般的龙疆小镇

highlights.en: Milan Cathedral and the Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II in Italy's fashion capital
highlights.zh: 时尚之都米兰：米兰大教堂与埃马努埃莱二世拱廊

highlights.en: Romantic Venice: St Mark's Square, St Mark's Basilica, the Bridge of Sighs and Doge's Palace
highlights.zh: 浪漫水城威尼斯：圣马可广场、圣马可大教堂、叹息桥与总督宫

highlights.en: Florence, cradle of the Renaissance: the Duomo (Santa Maria del Fiore), Ponte Vecchio and Piazza della Signoria
highlights.zh: 文艺复兴发源地佛罗伦萨：圣母百花大教堂、老桥与市政广场

highlights.en: The Cinque Terre cliffside villages by scenic train, the Leaning Tower of Pisa and Siena's old town
highlights.zh: 景观列车游五渔村悬崖渔村、比萨斜塔与锡耶纳古城

highlights.en: Brand promise: intercity rail included, city-centre 4-star hotels, one-way deep route, no forced shopping, all-inclusive pricing
highlights.zh: 品牌承诺：城际火车全含、市中心四星酒店、单程深度路线、无强制购物、税费全含一价全包

includes.en: Hotels: 7 nights in 4-star hotels.
includes.zh: 【酒店】：四星级酒店7晚。

includes.en: Meals: 7 meals total, breakfast in the hotel or in another form.
includes.zh: 【餐饮】：酒店内早餐或其他形式餐饮共计7餐。

includes.en: Taxes and fees: all in-itinerary taxes such as city/tourist tax, city-entry fees, residence tax, road and bridge tolls, island-landing fees, etc.
includes.zh: 【税费】：游客城市税、进城费、居住税、路桥费、登岛费等行程内的所有税费。

includes.en: Transport: tourist coach or business travel van.
includes.zh: 【交通】：旅游巴士或者商务旅行车。

includes.en: Guide: professional driver plus Chinese-speaking guide, or a Chinese-speaking driver-guide throughout (note: for groups of 8 or fewer, a business travel van plus a Chinese-speaking driver-guide is arranged to lead the full city itinerary).
includes.zh: 【导游】：职业司机+中文导游或者全程中文司机兼导游（备注：8人及以下则安排为商务旅行车+中文司机兼导游，届时将由司兼导带领游览全部城市行程）。

includes.en: Luggage: one 23 kg checked bag plus one carry-on bag.
includes.zh: 【行李】：1件23公斤行李及1件随身行李。

includes.en: Activities and tickets: the Venice island ferry and the Cinque Terre scenic train.
includes.zh: 【活动及门票】：威尼斯登岛轮渡、五渔村景观列车。

excludes.en: Passport: the cost of your personal passport.
excludes.zh: 护照：个人护照费用。

excludes.en: Visa: the tourist/sightseeing visa fees required for the countries on the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 签证：行程中所列旅游国家所需的观光签证费用。

excludes.en: Insurance: travel insurance fees (if the itinerary involves high-risk sports, verify whether your travel insurance covers them).
excludes.zh: 保险：旅游保险费用（如行程内涉及到高风险运动，请核实旅游保险是否包含该项运动）。

excludes.en: Tips: gratuities for the guide and driver totalling 10 EUR per person per day, same rate for adults and children.
excludes.zh: 小费：游客支付导游和司机小费一共10欧/人/天，大小同价。

excludes.en: Meals: lunch and dinner (main meals) during the itinerary are not included.
excludes.zh: 餐饮：行程中不包含午、晚正餐费用。

excludes.en: Admission tickets: any sight not explicitly marked as included, including but not limited to sights marked 'exterior', and all 'recommended', 'optional', 'experience' and similar items not stated as included; pay locally if you wish to enter.
excludes.zh: 门票：行程中未注明费用包含的景点（包括但不仅限于行程中注明“外观”的景点，以及“推荐”“可选”“体验”等所有未提及费用包含的项目，如游客需要参观，敬请自理）。

excludes.en: Extended stay: any extra accommodation, transport or sightseeing beyond the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 延长住宿：行程外额外延长的住宿、交通、观光费用。

excludes.en: Personal spending: drinks/alcohol, taxis, phone charges and other personal expenses.
excludes.zh: 私人消费：如饮料酒类、出租车、电话费等个人消费。

excludes.en: Other transport: transport other than the included business van or minibus and not mentioned in inclusions, e.g. the Venice gondola, and sightseeing trains or electric carts in vehicle-restricted zones; pay locally.
excludes.zh: 其他交通：除包含商务旅行车或者中巴之外，费用包含中未提及的其他交通费用，如威尼斯贡多拉，以及车辆限行区的观光火车、电瓶出租车等费用敬请自理。

excludes.en: Free activities: independent night-time sightseeing and any recommended optional projects, plus the transport, meals, tickets and shopping they incur.
excludes.zh: 自由活动：游客夜间自行游览及行程中的推荐项目，以及产生的交通、餐饮、门票、购物等费用。

excludes.en: Experience activities: any tourist experience activities not included in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 体验活动：行程中没有包含的各项旅游体验活动。

excludes.en: Other costs: any cost not mentioned in the inclusions. In cases of force majeure (natural disaster, war, strike, etc.), or special circumstances such as transport delays, flight cancellation/rescheduling, visa delays by the consulate, or insufficient group numbers, or other causes not attributable to the company that lead to extra costs (e.g. overseas visa-extension fees, accommodation, meals and transport, national airfare adjustments), the company reserves the right to charge the price difference.
excludes.zh: 其他费用：费用包含中未提及的费用。如因天灾、战争、罢工等不可抗力原因，及因交通延阻、航班取消或更改时间、使馆延误出签证、人数不足等特殊情况或其他非我公司原因所导致的额外费用（如在外延期签证费、住、食及交通费、国家航空运价调整等），我公司有权追加差价。

timeline.title_en: Paris - Geneva (Geneva lakefront, the Flower Clock and the old town across the bridges)
timeline.title_zh: 巴黎-日内瓦（游日内瓦湖畔，看花桥横渡古城区）
timeline.description_en: Depart Paris in the morning for Geneva, capital of Switzerland's French-speaking region. On arrival, tour Geneva's old town and the Lake Geneva (Lac Léman) waterfront, taking in the Flower Clock and the Jet d'Eau (the Grand Fountain). The famous Pont des Bergues / 'Flower Bridge' area gathers local delicacies and specialty shops. Lake Geneva straddles Switzerland and France and is a UNESCO-listed scenic region; the Jet d'Eau on the lakefront near the English Garden shoots water some 140 metres high. The Upper Town (old town) on the right bank of the Rhône is dense with churches and historic sites and includes the former home of the Enlightenment thinker Rousseau. Overnight at the Novotel Geneva Centre Annemasse or Crowne Plaza, or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午从巴黎出发前往瑞士法语区首府日内瓦。抵达后游览日内瓦老城与日内瓦湖（莱芒湖）湖区，观赏花钟与大喷泉。云集当地美食和特色商店的“花桥”区域也在此处。日内瓦湖横跨瑞士与法国，整个湖区被列为世界遗产；位于英国花园附近湖面上的大喷泉高约140米、喷水量达500公升，从市中心很远就能看见。隆河右岸的上城区（旧城区）教堂、古迹聚集，并有启蒙思想家卢梭的故居。夜宿安纳马斯日内瓦港诺富特酒店或皇冠假日酒店，或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Geneva - Interlaken (Between Switzerland's 'two lakes', panoramas of the Jungfrau region)
timeline.title_zh: 日内瓦-因特拉肯（行瑞士“两湖”之间，赏“少女峰”全景）
timeline.description_en: Travel in the morning to Interlaken, set between Lake Brienz and Lake Thun (the 'left and right eyes of God'). You can freely stroll Höheweg street and the Höhematte green, a peaceful village setting where people and nature blend. Today offers a choose-one-of-three option (you cannot combine two): Option 1 (included) is a coach tour of the Jungfrau region around Grindelwald and the classic 'dreamy slope' Swiss scenery; Option 2 (230 EUR) is the Jungfrau panoramic cable-car summit trip via Grindelwald and the Eiger Glacier up to the Jungfraujoch, the 'Top of Europe', visiting the Sphinx Observatory, the Ice Palace and the Aletsch Glacier; Option 3 (70 EUR) is the First-Grindelwald aerial gondola round-trip to the First peak and the First Cliff Walk, with thrilling activities such as the First Flyer zip-line. Sights along the way include Höhematte, Grindelwald, First (optional) and the Jungfrau (optional, 4,158 m, a UNESCO natural World Heritage site). Overnight at the Solis Cademario / Sigriswil panoramic mountain-and-lake hotel beside the Sigriswil panorama bridge, or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往位于布里恩茨湖和图恩湖之间、有“上帝左眼与右眼”之称的因特拉肯。可自由游览何维克街与荷黑马特绿地广场，宁静村庄绿树掩映，人与自然浑然一体。今日为三选一项目（不可同时选两项）：项目一（费用包含）乘车游览少女峰地区，跟随导游游览格林德尔瓦尔德经典瑞士山景“梦幻山坡”；项目二（230欧元）少女峰全景缆车登顶，经格林德尔瓦尔德、艾格冰川到达少女峰登顶——欧洲较高的火车站“Top of Europe”，游览斯芬克斯观景台、水晶宫（冰宫）、高原观景台与阿莱奇冰川；项目三（70欧元）菲斯特-格林德尔瓦尔德空中贡多拉往返票，登菲斯特峰巅游览懸崖天梭巅峰栈道（First Cliff Walk），并可选高空飞索（First Flyer）等刺激活动。沿途景点包括荷黑马特、格林德尔瓦尔德、菲斯特（自费）及少女峰（自费，海拔4158米，2001年列为世界自然遗产）。夜宿锡格里斯维尔雪山湖景酒店（位于全景桥旁），或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Interlaken - Lucerne - Zurich (The idyllic Lungern village, the essence of Swiss lakes and mountains)
timeline.title_zh: 因特拉肯-卢塞恩-苏黎世（世外桃源龙疆镇，瑞士湖光山色代表作）
timeline.description_en: In the morning head to the little town of Lungern to enjoy Lungern Lake and the village scenery, a tranquil idyll that served as a filming location for the K-drama 'Crash Landing on You'. Continue to Lucerne to take in the lakes-and-mountains beauty of Lake Lucerne, hear the story of Swiss loyalty and resolve told by the Lion Monument, and see the Chapel Bridge (Kapellbrücke) and the octagonal Water Tower. The Lion Monument, carved into natural rock in 1821 by a Danish sculptor, commemorates the 786 Swiss Guards who died on 10 August 1792 defending Louis XVI's family at the Tuileries; Mark Twain called it 'the most mournful and moving piece of stone in the world'. Overnight at the Harry's Home Zürich-Limmattal hotel in the scenic heart of the Limmat valley, or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往龙疆小镇，游览龙疆湖及小镇风光——这里是韩剧《爱的迫降》大团圆结局的取景地，人间天堂般的湖光山色宛如世外桃源。之后前往卢塞恩，游览卢塞恩湖的湖光山色，聆听狮子纪念碑讲述瑞士人忠贞坚毅的那段历史，并游览卡贝尔廊桥（卡佩尔桥）与八角形水塔等景点。狮子纪念碑由丹麦雕塑家于1821年雕刻在天然岩石上，纪念1792年8月10日为保护巴黎杜乐丽宫路易十六家族而全部战死的786名瑞士雇佣兵，马克·吐温誉之为“世界上最悲壮和最感人的雕像”。夜宿苏黎世利马塔尔哈利之家酒店（位于利马塔尔河谷中心地带），或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Zurich - Milan (Along the Alps, from the financial capital to the fashion capital)
timeline.title_zh: 苏黎世-米兰（沿阿尔卑斯山脉，从金融之都游览时尚之都）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, tour the Grossmünster (Zurich Cathedral, exterior), Lake Zurich and Bahnhofstrasse. Lake Zurich is about 4 km wide and 39 km long, lined with yachts and swans; Bahnhofstrasse is one of Europe's longest and most expensive shopping avenues, packed with luxury brands and private banks. Then set off for the fashion capital, Milan, where you freely visit Milan's landmark cathedral, the Duomo (exterior), and the Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II, one of Europe's most beautiful shopping arcades with its Prada flagship and elegant restaurants and cafés. The Milan Duomo, begun in 1386, is a Gothic masterpiece of countless spires and thousands of marble statues that took some 500 years to complete. Overnight at the Royal Garden Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后游览苏黎世大教堂（外观）、苏黎世湖与班霍夫大街等景点。苏黎世湖宽约4公里、长约39公里，湖面游艇与白天鹅随处可见；班霍夫大街（车站大街）是欧洲较长、世界上昂贵的购物大道之一，遍布世界各地奢侈品牌与私人银行。之后出发前往时尚之都米兰，抵达后自由参观米兰标志性建筑米兰主教堂（外观）以及欧洲漂亮的商业拱廊之一埃马努埃莱二世拱廊（内有Prada精品店及众多高级餐厅、咖啡厅与商店）。米兰大教堂始建于1386年，是历经约500年建成、以众多精美雕刻和哥特式塔尖闻名的哥特式建筑。夜宿皇家花园酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Milan - Venice (The romantic city on gentle blue waters)
timeline.title_zh: 米兰-威尼斯（游览温柔碧波上浪漫的威尼斯）
timeline.description_en: Depart in the morning for the water city of Venice. On arrival visit St Mark's Basilica (exterior), St Mark's Square (Piazza San Marco), the Bridge of Sighs (exterior) and the magnificent Doge's Palace (exterior). These buildings raised on water, threaded by winding canals, leave Venice's romance lingering long. Venice, a Renaissance hub, is made of 118 islands linked by 177 waterways and 401 bridges. St Mark's Basilica, first built in 829 and rebuilt 1043-1071, was once one of medieval Europe's great churches; the Bridge of Sighs was the route along which condemned prisoners were taken from the court to the prison. Here you can also try Venice's signature three-course squid-ink pasta meal (at your own expense). Overnight at the voco Venice (InterContinental) or the Hilton Garden Inn / Hilton Ambassador, or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午出发前往水城威尼斯。抵达后参观圣马可大教堂（外观）、圣马可广场、叹息桥（外观）以及华丽的总督宫（外观）。这些建造在水上的美丽建筑与蜿蜒水巷一起，让威尼斯的浪漫风情久久挥之不去。威尼斯作为文艺复兴重镇之一，由118个小岛组成，以177条水道、401座桥梁连成一体，有“水上都市”“百岛城”“桥城”之称。圣马可大教堂始建于公元829年、重建于1043至1071年，曾是中世纪欧洲较大的教堂；叹息桥是古代由法院向监狱押送死囚的必经之路。在这里您还可以品尝威尼斯特色大餐墨鱼面三道式（自理）。夜宿威尼斯洲际VOCO酒店或希尔顿大使酒店，或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Venice - Florence (Land of poetry, the soul of the Renaissance, a journey through art)
timeline.title_zh: 威尼斯-佛罗伦萨（诗歌之地，文艺复兴之魂享受艺术之旅）
timeline.description_en: Set off in the morning for Florence, birthplace of the Renaissance, and tour the old-town sights: the world's third-largest cathedral, Santa Maria del Fiore (the Duomo, entry requires queueing), the Piazza della Signoria, the Ponte Vecchio (Old Bridge), and the Piazza di Santa Croce with the Basilica di Santa Croce (exterior). Santa Maria del Fiore, clad in white, red and green marble, stands on the site of the 4th-century Santa Reparata; financed by Giovanni de' Medici from 1296, it took 175 years to build. The Piazza della Signoria is an open-air sculpture museum with the Palazzo Vecchio, a copy of Michelangelo's David and the Fountain of Neptune; the Ponte Vecchio (built 1345) over the Arno is one of Europe's earliest large arch bridges, where Dante is said to have met Beatrice. Overnight at the Hilton Florence Metropole or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午出发前往文艺复兴的发源地佛罗伦萨，参观佛罗伦萨老城景点：世界第三大教堂圣母百花大教堂（需排队进入）、市政广场、老桥（维奇奥桥）以及圣十字广场和圣十字教堂（外观）。圣母百花大教堂使用白、红、绿三色花岗岩贴面，原址为建于4世纪的圣·雷帕拉塔教堂，1296年由乔凡尼·美第奇出资建造，历时175年才建成。市政广场素有露天雕塑博物馆之称，广场上坐落着维琪奥宫（旧宫）、米开朗基罗《大卫》的复制品及海神喷泉；建于1345年、位于阿诺河上的维奇奥（老）桥是欧洲较早的大跨度圆弧拱桥，相传但丁在此邂逅少女比阿特丽丝。夜宿佛罗伦萨希尔顿大都会酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Florence - Cinque Terre - Pisa - Siena (Scenic train through the Cinque Terre)
timeline.title_zh: 佛罗伦萨-五渔村-比萨-锡耶纳（景观列车游览五渔村）
timeline.description_en: Depart in the morning to visit the Cinque Terre, the beautiful cliffside fishing villages along the Ligurian coast (you ride the scenic train between villages, an included activity). The Cinque Terre, in La Spezia province of Liguria, comprises Monterosso al Mare, Vernazza, Corniglia, Manarola and Riomaggiore, linked by one of the world's most beautiful hiking trails and listed as a UNESCO World Heritage Site in 1997. In the afternoon continue to Pisa to see the Leaning Tower (exterior) and the walled Piazza dei Miracoli (Square of Miracles), home to the cathedral, the Leaning Tower (bell tower), the Baptistery and the Camposanto, where Galileo is said to have performed his free-fall experiment in 1590. Note: if bad weather or a rail strike makes the Cinque Terre inaccessible, the itinerary automatically changes to touring the coastal towns by coach or another means. Overnight at the Four Points by Sheraton Siena or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午出发前往游览五渔村，沿利古里亚海岸线游览悬崖上的美丽渔村（村庄之间乘坐景观列车，为费用包含项目）。五渔村位于意大利利古里亚大区拉斯佩齐亚省海岸，由蒙特罗索、韦尔纳扎、科尔尼利亚、马纳罗拉及里奥马焦雷五个悬崖边村镇组成，串联五村的徒步线路是世界上美丽的徒步路线之一，1997年被列入世界文化遗产。下午前往比萨，游览比萨斜塔（外观）和比萨历史文化中心的奇迹广场——广场上有比萨主教座堂、比萨斜塔（钟楼）、圣乔瓦尼洗礼堂、比萨墓园四大建筑，相传伽利略于1590年曾在此做自由落体实验。备注：如遇恶劣天气或铁路公司罢工等因素导致无法游览五渔村，行程将自动更改为乘坐大巴车或其它形式游览海岸线城市。夜宿锡耶纳福朋喜来登酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Siena - Pienza old town - Rome (The medieval art treasure of Siena and the cypress lane of the Val d'Orcia)
timeline.title_zh: 锡耶纳-皮恩扎古城-罗马（中世纪艺术瑰宝-锡耶纳，遇奥尔恰谷丝柏树小径）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, head to the old town of Siena and tour Siena Cathedral (exterior), the Piazza del Campo (Field/Shell Square), the Palazzo Pubblico / town hall (exterior) and the Torre del Mangia (exterior). The Piazza del Campo is one of Europe's largest surviving medieval squares; the Torre del Mangia, beside the town hall, rises 102 m and is one of Italy's tallest medieval towers (332 steps to the top). Continue to the old town of Pienza to visit Piazza Pio II and Pienza Cathedral (exterior); Pienza, founded by Pope Pius II, is an early ideal Renaissance town listed as a World Heritage Site in 1996. Then drive to Rome, stopping for free photos along the cypress lane, with distant views over the Val d'Orcia (a UNESCO World Heritage Site since 2004), before reaching Rome and ending this wonderful journey.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后出发前往锡耶纳古城，游览锡耶纳大教堂（外观）、田野广场、锡耶纳市政厅（外观）、曼吉亚塔楼（外观）等景点。田野广场（因形似贝壳又称贝壳广场）是欧洲现存较大的中世纪广场之一；紧邻市政厅的曼吉亚塔楼垂直高度达102米，是意大利中世纪较高的塔楼之一，可经332级台阶登顶一览锡耶纳风光。之后前往皮恩扎古城参观二世广场与皮恩扎大教堂（外观）——皮恩扎由罗马教皇庇护二世创立，是文艺复兴时期最早的理想小镇，1996年列入世界遗产名录。随后前往罗马，途中在丝柏树小径自由拍照，远观奥尔恰山谷（2004年列入世界遗产），抵达罗马后结束美好旅程！

meeting_en: Paris, France — tour departs from Paris in the morning and ends in Rome (one-way route).
meeting_zh: 法国巴黎——行程上午从巴黎出发，于罗马结束（单程路线）。

faqs.question_en: Where and when do we meet and disperse?
faqs.question_zh: 集合及集散地点和方法是怎样的？
faqs.answer_en: Route A (departing Paris): meet at 08:30 on Day 1 outside the McDonald's at Place d'Italie, Paris; disperse around 19:00 on Day 8 at Roma Tiburtina railway station. Route B (departing Geneva): meet at 16:30 on Day 1 outside the Warwick Geneva hotel (Rue de Lausanne 14, 1201 Genève, Switzerland); disperse around 19:00 on Day 8 at Roma Tiburtina station. Times and places are for reference; the actual departure follows the tour-confirmation notice. We do not recommend flights that land in Paris the morning of departure, nor flights leaving Rome the same day the tour ends. On Route B you may join as late as 17:00 in Geneva, but you will then miss the Geneva city sights with no refund.
faqs.answer_zh: A线路（巴黎出发）：行程第1天08:30在巴黎意大利广场麦当劳门口集合；第8天19:00左右在Roma Tiburtina火车站解散。B线路（日内瓦出发）：第1天16:30在日内瓦沃里克酒店（Warwick Geneva）门口集合，地址：Rue de Lausanne 14, 1201 Genève, 瑞士；第8天19:00左右在Roma Tiburtina火车站解散。以上时间地点为参考，实际出发时间以出团通知书为准。本产品不推荐参团当天早上降落巴黎的航班，也不推荐结束当天离开罗马的航班。B线路可最晚于当天17:00在日内瓦上团，但日内瓦市区景点将无法游览，且无费用可退。

faqs.question_en: Will the coach rides on this route be very long?
faqs.question_zh: 行程路线乘坐大巴时间会不会很久？
faqs.answer_en: Only the Geneva-Paris leg is about 6 hours 45 minutes; all other planned legs are roughly 3-4 hours of driving. Road conditions are complex, especially in city centres where traffic jams can lengthen the journey, and the Lucerne-to-Milan tunnel is prone to congestion that can extend travel time.
faqs.answer_zh: 该产品仅日内瓦巴黎段约为6小时45分，其余计划行程均为3-4小时左右的行车时间。公路交通情况复杂，特别是市区内容易发生堵车，同时卢塞恩到米兰的隧道容易发生堵车，可能导致行程时间增加。

faqs.question_en: Can the tour go up to the top of the Jungfrau?
faqs.question_zh: 本产品是否可以游览少女峰登顶？
faqs.answer_en: Yes, you can visit, but the cost is not included. If you wish to go, book in advance. The available experience time is limited and may conflict with the original itinerary, affecting other arrangements.
faqs.answer_zh: 可以游览，但费用不包含。如需参加建议提前预定，可选的体验时间受限，可能与原行程安排产生冲突，影响其他行程和体验的安排。

faqs.question_en: Can I do the First / Top of Adventure activities?
faqs.question_zh: 我是否能游览菲斯特瑞士空天探险活动（First Top of Adventure）？
faqs.answer_en: Yes, you can visit, but the cost is not included. If you wish to take part, booking in advance is recommended.
faqs.answer_zh: 可以游览，但费用不包含。如需参加建议提前预定。

faqs.question_en: What adventure activities does First offer?
faqs.question_zh: 菲斯特都有什么探险活动？
faqs.answer_en: First's sky-adventure park offers many thrilling alpine activities, mainly the Aerial Gondola, the First Cliff Walk, the First Flyer zip-line and the First Glider. You can buy tickets on the spot depending on the day's queue and weather.
faqs.answer_zh: 菲斯特空天探险有很多惊险刺激的高山活动，主要项目有：空中贡多拉（Aerial gondola）、悬崖天梭巅峰栈道（First Cliff Walk）、高空飞索（First Flyer）、神鹰飞梭（First Glider）。可根据当天排队时间及天气情况现场购买。

faqs.question_en: Can I do both the Jungfrau train and the First sky-adventure on the same day?
faqs.question_zh: 我是否能同时选择少女峰观光列车与菲斯特空天探险两个项目？
faqs.answer_en: No. There are only 5-6 hours of free time in Interlaken that day; the Jungfrau visit is recommended at 4-5 hours and First needs 3-4 hours, so you cannot do both.
faqs.answer_zh: 不可以。当天在因特拉肯仅有5-6小时自由活动时间，推荐游览少女峰时间为4到5小时，菲斯特需要3-4个小时，无法同时选择。

faqs.question_en: Can I choose to take the GoldenPass to tour Switzerland?
faqs.question_zh: 我是否可以选择乘坐金色山口游览瑞士？
faqs.answer_en: Yes, you may choose the Lungern- or Meiringen-to-Interlaken or -Lucerne section. Before buying the train ticket, agree with the guide on the time and place to rejoin the group; the Lungern or Lucerne sightseeing will then be shortened. The train ticket plus seat reservation costs about 35 EUR.
faqs.answer_zh: 可以选择龙疆或梅林根到因特拉肯或卢塞恩段。购买火车票前需与导游协商再次返回旅游团的时间点和车程，届时龙疆或卢塞恩的游览行程将会缩减。火车票及座位费约为35欧元。

faqs.question_en: Why is sightseeing in central Rome done on foot?
faqs.question_zh: 罗马市中心为什么要徒步游览？
faqs.answer_en: Because Rome's sights are very concentrated and located in pedestrian areas, central Rome must be toured on foot.
faqs.answer_zh: 由于罗马各个景点非常集中，并且都是步行街区，因此罗马市中心景点需要徒步游览。

faqs.question_en: Can we choose different menus and dishes for dinner?
faqs.question_zh: 我们的晚餐是否能根据喜好选择不同的菜单和菜品？
faqs.answer_en: The meals recommended in the itinerary are all local specialty meals and are not included in the price, for example Venice's famous black squid-ink pasta and the Tuscan steak. If a dish is not to your taste, you are free to choose other dining options.
faqs.answer_zh: 行程内推荐的餐饮全部为推荐当地特色餐，费用并未包含，比如威尼斯著名的黑墨鱼面、托斯卡纳的牛排等。如果菜品并非您的首选，可以自行选择其他餐饮。

faqs.question_en: Is this a circulating/looping shared group?
faqs.question_zh: 本产品是循环套发的拼团吗？
faqs.answer_en: Yes. This is a circulating shared-group product. During the meeting and ending of the tour you will encounter other travellers boarding and leaving at different places; the start and end cities differ and so do the prices. Please follow the start and end points for the destination you personally signed up for.
faqs.answer_zh: 是的。本产品为循环套发团，在旅游团集合与结束的途中会有其他游客在不同地点上下团，开始和结束的城市不同，价格也不同，敬请根据自己个人报名的目的地开始和结束行程。

faqs.question_en: Do I need a visa?
faqs.question_zh: 是否需要签证？
faqs.answer_en: Yes. This product does not include the visa fee; it requires a Schengen visa (single- or multiple-entry). If you sign up for a visa product, after booking we provide all the materials needed to apply for the Schengen visa free of charge. 'Worry-free visa guarantee': for travellers who sign with us at least 61 days before departure, if the visa is not obtained within 45 days before departure, we bear all losses and immediately refund the full travel fee; travellers who do not meet this clause are refunded per the change-and-cancellation terms. Your passport must be valid for at least six months from the departure date or customs may refuse entry. Visa fees, visa service fees, Schengen insurance fees and visa-centre appointment fees are all non-refundable and non-transferable, even if the product itself is changed or cancelled. If a visa is refused, notify us within 48 hours with the consulate's refusal letter; any supplementary or amended materials must be submitted within five days.
faqs.answer_zh: 需要。本产品不包含签证费用，需要申根签证（单次或多次入境）；如需办理请选择申根签证产品。预定后免费提供办理申根签证的全部材料。保签无忧：游客在出发日前61天与我社签约的旅游产品，如在出发前45天内未获取签证，我社承担所有损失，立即退还游客全部旅游费用；不符合该条款的游客按“退改与取消条款”退费。护照有效期需在离境之日起至少还有六个月，否则海关有权拒绝入境。签证费、签证服务费、申根保险费、签证中心预约费均不可退款，也无法更改使用者，即使产品退改签也不可退。如遇拒签需在48小时内通知我社并出具使领馆拒签函，如需补充或更改材料需在五天内提交。

faqs.question_en: Booking, changes and cancellation policy
faqs.question_zh: 预订、变更与取消须知
faqs.answer_en: Free cancellation: both the agency and the traveller may cancel without reason more than 30 days before departure (not including the 30th day). After that, refunds for reducing numbers, cancelling, or changing the itinerary or date follow the change-and-cancellation rules. Transport change fees follow the carriers' terms (typically hotels 6-18 EUR for a name change, airlines 100-120 EUR per leg, trains/ferries 35-180 EUR each), and round-trip/connecting tickets must be used in order. Because flight changes, congestion, ferry cancellations and strikes often shift the timing and order of sights, travellers must arrive at the meeting point one day before the tour and leave the dispersal point one day after; losses from not doing so are the traveller's own. Rooms: standard twin rooms are the default for two travellers with bed type (double or twin) assigned randomly by the hotel and not selectable; triple/family rooms default to two parents plus a minor with bed type set by the hotel; solo travellers pay a single-room supplement unless they opt to share (per the share-room terms). Booking flow: payment is not confirmation; book at least 14 days ahead, with second confirmation by the group operator within 48 hours (auto-refund if not confirmed in time). Listed hotels are preferred; if full, an equivalent same-star hotel is substituted without separate notice. Pricing is quoted in EUR; if you pay in CNY, the amount is the real-time CNY price auto-calculated from the Bank of China 'euro selling' rate on the day of payment, and the same applies to refunds (exchange-rate differences and bank fees are borne by the traveller). Group size: this is a shared group that is confirmed to depart at 10 people; if the minimum is not met more than 30 days before departure, either side may cancel without liability. Contingency: if a rail strike or bad weather prevents visiting the Cinque Terre, the coastal towns are toured by coach or other means instead; the itinerary order may be adjusted without changing the route or sights, and where the itinerary sheet and the tour-confirmation notice conflict, the notice prevails. Charges based on a traveller's age, occupation or region (extra fees for children/elderly) are not allowed under the Tourism Law and will be refunded.
faqs.answer_zh: 免费取消：出发前30天（不含第30天）旅行社与旅行者均可无理由取消；之后减少人数、取消订单、更改行程或日期均按《更改与取消条例条款》退费。交通变更费参照各承运方条款（通常酒店更名6-18欧、航空每程100-120欧、火车及游轮每张35-180欧），往返或联程票须按顺序使用。因航变、拥堵、渡轮取消、罢工等导致行程时间及顺序常有调整，旅游者须在团开始前一天到达集合地、结束后一天离开集散地，未遵守所致损失自行承担。房型：两人报名默认标准双人间，床型（大床或双床）由酒店随机安排不可选；三人家庭间默认两位父母与一位未成年儿童，床型由酒店安排；单人报名含单人房差，除非选择拼房（按拼房条款）。预订流程：支付不等于确认行程，建议至少提前14天预订，组团社需在48小时内二次确认，超时未确认默认自动退款；行程内列明酒店为优先入住，如订满则换同星级相近酒店，不另行通知。所有定价以欧元为计价单位，如选人民币支付则以当天支付时中国银行“欧元卖出价”实时折算的人民币价格为准，退款同样适用当日即时汇率，汇率差及银行手续费由旅行者承担。成团：本产品拼团成团人数为10人，出发前30天（不含第30天）未达成团人数双方均可解约且不担责。应急：如遇罢工或恶劣天气无法游览五渔村，将改为乘大巴或其它方式游览海岸线城市；在不改变路线及景点的前提下行程顺序可调整，行程单与出团通知书冲突时以出团通知书为准。根据旅游法，对儿童、老人按年龄、职业、地区差异加收费用属同团不同价，旅行社应返还增收费用。

faqs.question_en: Health and safety requirements
faqs.question_zh: 健康与安全须知
faqs.answer_en: To ensure a safe trip, please have a health check before departure and do NOT sign up if you have: infectious diseases (e.g. active tuberculosis, typhoid); cardiovascular disease (severe hypertension, heart insufficiency, myocardial ischemia, infarction); cerebrovascular disease (stroke, cerebral haemorrhage, brain tumour); respiratory disease (emphysema, cor pulmonale); psychiatric illness (epilepsy or any mental illness); severe anaemia (haemoglobin below 50 g/L); or recovery from major/medium surgery. Pregnancy: at 35 weeks or more you cannot join under any circumstance; at 28 weeks or more you must provide a doctor's exam report from within 7 days plus the attending physician's consent; under 28 weeks please consider carefully, sign the agency's liability waiver, and you may not take part in adventure, skiing, sea-going, high-altitude or outdoor activities. Disabled travellers need a medical report from within 7 days, a doctor's consent, a direct-family companion, and at least 61 days' advance request for reserved seating/facilities. Elderly: travellers over 70 need a health certificate, physical-exam report and a direct-family companion (or sign the liability waiver); this long itinerary demands good walking ability and stamina. Minors (under 18) must be accompanied by a direct relative or guardian; some sights have rules for under-18/12/6; for infants under 6 or children under 30 kg confirm a child seat in advance; infants under 2 years old are NOT accepted. Per Article 15 of the Tourism Law, travellers must truthfully declare health information relevant to the trip (pregnancy, lactation, chronic illness, infectious-disease history, suspected symptoms, recent travel to epidemic areas) and follow safety warnings; concealment leading to harm or loss is the traveller's own responsibility, and the agency may terminate the contract without refund.
faqs.answer_zh: 为确保旅途安全，请出行前做必要的身体检查，如有下列情况请勿报名：传染性疾病（如活动期肺结核、伤寒）；心血管疾病（严重高血压、心功能不全、心肌缺氧、心肌梗塞）；脑血管疾病（脑栓塞、脑出血、脑肿瘤）；呼吸系统疾病（肺气肿、肺心病）；精神病（癫痫及各种精神病）；严重贫血（血红蛋白低于50克/升）；大中型手术恢复期患者。孕妇：妊娠35周及以上任何情况下都无法参团；28周及以上须提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书；28周以下请慎重报名，需签署旅行社免责声明书，且行程内探险、滑雪、出海、高空、户外等项目均无法参加。残疾人：需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书、需直系家属陪同、需提前至少61天申请预留位置及专用配套设施。老年人：70周岁以上需提供健康证明、体检报告并由直系家属陪同（否则需签免责声明书），本行程较长需一定步行能力和体力。未成年人（未满18周岁）须由直系亲属或监护人陪同，部分景点对未满18/12/6周岁有特殊限定；6岁以下婴儿或30公斤以下儿童请提前确认安全座椅；本产品不接受2周岁以下婴儿参团。根据《旅游法》第15条，旅游者须如实告知与旅游活动相关的个人健康信息（包括妊娠期、哺乳期、慢性病、传染病史、疑似症状或近期疫区旅居史）并遵守安全警示规定，若因隐瞒导致人身损害或财产损失需自行承担责任，旅行社可解除合同且不退还费用。

title_en: France-Switzerland-Italy 9-Day Group Tour: Paris to Rome One-Way
title_zh: 法瑞意9天跟团游：巴黎至罗马单程深度线
short_en: A one-way 9-day journey from Paris to Rome through the Swiss Alps and Italy's Renaissance heart, with included transport, city-centre 4-star hotels and no forced shopping.
short_zh: 9天单程之旅，从巴黎一路深入瑞士阿尔卑斯与意大利文艺复兴名城至罗马，含交通、市中心四星酒店，绝无强制购物。
desc_en: Travel one-way from Paris to Rome on a deep, low-mileage route that crosses Switzerland's four language regions before sweeping down through Italy's most storied cities. Stand by Lake Geneva, gaze at the Jungfrau region from Interlaken, wander lakeside Lucerne and the fairy-tale village of Iseltwald, then cross the Alps into fashionable Milan, romantic Venice, Renaissance Florence, the cliffside Cinque Terre, leaning Pisa and medieval Siena, finishing in the Eternal City of Rome. With one Italian city explored each day, brand-name city hotels and all taxes included, it pairs Alpine scenery with art and history at an easy, all-inclusive pace.
desc_zh: 采用巴黎进、罗马出的单程优选行程，大幅降低大巴行车里程，贯穿瑞士四大语区并一路深入意大利最具魅力的名城。从日内瓦湖畔出发，在因特拉肯遥望少女峰地区，漫步湖光山色的卢塞恩与童话小镇龙疆，翻越阿尔卑斯进入时尚之都米兰、浪漫水城威尼斯、文艺复兴发源地佛罗伦萨、悬崖渔村五渔村、比萨斜塔与中世纪古城锡耶纳，最终抵达永恒之城罗马。意大利段每天游览一座城市，精选品牌城市酒店，各项税费一价全含，将阿尔卑斯风光与艺术历史完美结合。

highlights.en: One-way Paris-to-Rome deep route that minimises coach mileage
highlights.zh: 巴黎罗马两点进出，单程深度行程，大幅降低大巴行车里程

highlights.en: Cross all four of Switzerland's language regions in depth
highlights.zh: 贯穿瑞士四大语区，深度游览

highlights.en: Lake Geneva, the Jungfrau region and lakeside Lucerne in the Swiss Alps
highlights.zh: 饱览日内瓦湖、少女峰地区与湖光山色的卢塞恩

highlights.en: Fairy-tale Alpine village of Iseltwald on the Golden Pass route
highlights.zh: 金色山口沿线世外桃源般的童话小镇龙疆

highlights.en: One Italian city explored each day: Milan, Venice, Florence and Rome
highlights.zh: 意大利段每天游览一座城市：米兰、威尼斯、佛罗伦萨、罗马

highlights.en: Scenic train along the cliffside Cinque Terre and the Tuscan Val d'Orcia
highlights.zh: 景观列车游览悬崖渔村五渔村，途经托斯卡纳奥尔恰谷

highlights.en: Brand-name city-centre 4-star hotels for efficient sightseeing and quality rest
highlights.zh: 精选市中心品牌四星酒店，提高游览效率、保证高质量休息

highlights.en: All-inclusive pricing with all taxes covered and no forced shopping
highlights.zh: 税费全含、一价全含，绝无隐藏费用与强制购物

includes.en: Accommodation: 8 nights in 4-star hotels.
includes.zh: 【酒店】：四星级酒店8晚。

includes.en: Meals: 8 meals total, breakfast at the hotel or another form of dining.
includes.zh: 【餐饮】：酒店内早餐或其他形式餐饮共计8餐。

includes.en: Taxes and fees: all in-itinerary taxes including tourist city tax, town-entry fees, residence tax, road/bridge tolls, island-landing fees, etc.
includes.zh: 【税费】：游客城市税、进城费、居住税、路桥费、登岛费等行程内的所有税费。

includes.en: Transport: tourist coach or business travel vehicle.
includes.zh: 【交通】：旅游巴士或者商务旅行车。

includes.en: Guide: professional driver plus a Chinese-speaking guide, or a Chinese-speaking driver-guide for the whole trip (note: for 8 people or fewer, a business travel vehicle with a Chinese-speaking driver-guide who leads the full city itinerary is arranged).
includes.zh: 【导游】：职业司机+中文导游或者全程中文司机兼导游（备注：8人及以下则安排为商务旅行车+中文司机兼导游，届时将有司兼导带领游览全部城市行程）。

includes.en: Luggage: one 23 kg checked bag and one carry-on bag.
includes.zh: 【行李】：1件23公斤行李及1件随身行李。

includes.en: Activities and tickets: the Venice island ferry and the Cinque Terre scenic train.
includes.zh: 【活动及门票】：威尼斯登岛轮渡、五渔村景观列车。

excludes.en: Passport: personal passport fees.
excludes.zh: 护照：个人护照费用。

excludes.en: Visa: the tourist visa fees required for the countries listed in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 签证：行程中所列旅游国家所需的观光签证费用。

excludes.en: Insurance: travel insurance fees (if the itinerary involves high-risk sports, please confirm whether the travel insurance covers that activity).
excludes.zh: 保险：旅游保险费用（如行程内涉及到高风险运动，请核实旅游保险是否包含该项运动）。

excludes.en: Tips: gratuities for the guide and driver totaling EUR 10 per person per day, same price for adults and children.
excludes.zh: 小费：游客支付导游和司机小费一共10欧/人/天，大小同价。

excludes.en: Meals: lunch and dinner main meals are not included in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 餐饮：行程中不包含午、晚正餐费用。

excludes.en: Tickets: any sight not marked as fee-included (including but not limited to sights noted as 'exterior', and all 'recommended', 'optional', 'experience' items and anything else not stated as included) is at your own expense if you wish to enter.
excludes.zh: 门票：行程中未注明费用包含的景点（包括，但不仅限于行程中注明“外观”的景点，“推荐”、“可选”、“体验”等等所有未提及费用包含的项目，如游客需要参观，敬请自理）。

excludes.en: Extended stay: any extra accommodation, transport or sightseeing beyond the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 延长住宿：行程外额外延长的住宿、交通、观光费用。

excludes.en: Personal spending: drinks/alcohol, taxis, phone calls and other personal expenses.
excludes.zh: 私人消费：如饮料酒类、出租车、电话费等个人消费。

excludes.en: Other transport: transport beyond the included business vehicle or minibus that is not mentioned in the inclusions, such as Venice gondolas and, in vehicle-restricted zones, sightseeing trains and electric-cart taxis, all at your own expense.
excludes.zh: 其他交通：除包含商务旅行车或者中巴之外，费用包含中未提及的其他交通费用，如威尼斯贡多拉，以及车辆限行区的观光火车、电瓶出租车等费用敬请自理。

excludes.en: Free-time activities: night-time self-touring and recommended items in the itinerary, plus any resulting transport, dining, tickets, shopping, etc.
excludes.zh: 自由活动：游客夜间自行游览及行程中的推荐项目，以及产生的交通、餐饮、门票、购物等费用。

excludes.en: Experience activities: any travel-experience activities not included in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 体验活动：行程中没有包含的各项旅游体验活动。

excludes.en: Other costs: any cost not mentioned in the inclusions. Due to force majeure (natural disaster, war, strike, etc.) or special circumstances (transport delays, flight cancellation/rescheduling, embassy visa delays, insufficient group numbers, etc.) or other causes not attributable to our company, the company reserves the right to add a price difference for extra fees incurred (such as overseas visa-extension fees, board, lodging, transport, national airfare adjustments, etc.).
excludes.zh: 其他费用：费用包含中未提及的费用。如因天灾、战争、罢工等不可抗力的原因，及因交通延阻、航班取消或更改时间、使馆延误出签证、人数不足等特殊情况或其他非我公司原因所引致的额外费（如在外延期签证费、住、食及交通费、国家航空运价调整等），我公司有权追加差价。

timeline.title_en: Paris - Geneva (Geneva lakefront, the Flower Bridge across the old town)
timeline.title_zh: 巴黎-日内瓦（游日内瓦湖畔，看花桥横渡古城区）
timeline.description_en: Depart in the morning for Geneva, capital of Switzerland's French-speaking region. On arrival, tour the Geneva Old Town, the Lake Geneva lakefront, the Flower Clock and the Jet d'Eau fountain, then wander the 'Flower Bridge' (Pont des Bergues) district packed with local delicacies and specialty shops. Lake Geneva (Lac Léman) straddles Switzerland and France and the whole lake region is a World Heritage area; the Jet d'Eau shoots water about 140 metres high and is one of the city's signature sights. In the hillside Old Town on the right bank of the Rhône you can stroll winding lanes lined with antique shops and pass the former home of the Enlightenment thinker Rousseau. Overnight at the Novotel Geneva Port or Crowne Plaza in Annemasse, or a comparable 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午出发前往瑞士法语区首府日内瓦，抵达后游览日内瓦老城、日内瓦湖区、花钟和大喷泉景点，并漫步云集各种当地美食与特色商店的“花桥”区域。日内瓦湖又名莱芒湖，横跨瑞士和法国，整个湖区被列为世界遗产；大喷泉位于湖面上，高约140米、喷水量约500公升，是日内瓦极具代表性的景观之一。隆河右岸山坡上的上城区是教堂、古迹的聚集地，蜿蜒小巷间藏着许多小巧的古董商店，欧洲启蒙时代思想家卢梭的故居也位于旧城区内。夜宿安娜玛斯日内瓦港诺富特酒店或皇冠假日酒店，或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Geneva - Interlaken (between Switzerland's 'two lakes', panorama of the Jungfrau)
timeline.title_zh: 日内瓦-因特拉肯（行瑞士“两湖”之间，赏“少女峰”全景）
timeline.description_en: Head in the morning to Interlaken, set between Lake Brienz and Lake Thun (nicknamed God's 'left and right eyes'), where you can freely explore Höheweg street and the Höhematte green, or drive to the Grindelwald and Wilderswil Jungfrau area. Today offers three options of which you may pick only ONE: Option 1 (included) is a coach tour of the Jungfrau region following the guide to Grindelwald's classic Swiss 'dreamy slope'; Option 2 (EUR 230) is the panoramic cable car to the summit of the Jungfrau via Grindelwald and the Eiger Glacier up to the Top of Europe, with the Sphinx Observation Deck, Aletsch Glacier, Ice Palace and Plateau; Option 3 (EUR 70) is the round-trip aerial gondola from Grindelwald to First peak to walk the famous First Cliff Walk, with thrilling high-altitude activities such as the First Flyer zip-line and First Glider. The Jungfrau (4,158 m) was listed as a World Natural Heritage site in 2001. Overnight at the Sigriswil Snow Mountain Lake View Hotel or a comparable 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往位于布里恩茨湖和图恩湖之间、有“上帝左眼与右眼”之称的因特拉肯，可自由游览何维克街、荷黑马特绿地与宁静村庄，或随车前往格林德尔瓦尔德及维尔德斯维尔少女峰山区。今日推荐项目仅可三选一，不可同时选两项：项目一（费用包含）为跟随导游乘车游览少女峰地区，欣赏格林德尔瓦尔德经典瑞士山景“梦幻山坡”；项目二（230欧元）为乘坐全景缆车登顶少女峰，依次经格林德尔瓦尔德、艾格冰川到达“欧洲之巅”，游览斯芬克斯观景台、阿莱奇冰川、水晶宫、高原观景台等；项目三（70欧元）为从格林德尔瓦尔德菲斯特乘空中贡多拉往返First峰巅，游览悬崖天梭巅峰栈道（First Cliff Walk），并可选高空飞索、神鹰飞行等刺激活动。少女峰海拔4158米，2001年被列为世界自然遗产。夜宿锡格里斯维尔雪山湖景酒店，或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Interlaken - Lucerne - Zurich (the idyllic Lungern village, the essence of Swiss lake-and-mountain scenery)
timeline.title_zh: 因特拉肯-卢塞恩-苏黎世（世外桃源龙疆镇，瑞士湖光山色代表作）
timeline.description_en: In the morning visit the small town of Lungern to see Lungern Lake and the village scenery, a tranquil idyll made famous as a filming location for the K-drama 'Crash Landing on You'. Then continue to Lucerne to enjoy the lake-and-mountain views of Lake Lucerne, hear the story of Swiss loyalty and resolve told by the Lion Monument (the dying lion carved in 1821 to commemorate the 786 Swiss Guards who died in 1792 defending Louis XVI at the Tuileries, called by Mark Twain 'the most mournful and moving piece of stone in the world'), and see the Chapel Bridge (Kapellbrücke) and its octagonal water tower. Lucerne lies in central Switzerland in the German-speaking region and retains a medieval beauty of churches, towers and old streets. Afterwards drive to Zurich for the overnight. Overnight at the Hotel Allegra Lodge / Limmattal area hotel in Zurich, or a comparable 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往龙疆小镇，游览龙疆湖及小镇风光，这里是韩剧《爱的迫降》大团圆结局的取景地，人间天堂般的湖光山色宛如世外桃源。之后前往卢塞恩，游览卢塞恩湖的湖光山色，聆听狮子纪念碑讲述瑞士人忠贞坚毅的历史（这座1821年雕刻的濒死雄狮，是为纪念1792年为保护巴黎杜乐丽宫中路易十六家族而全部战死的786名瑞士雇佣兵，被马克·吐温誉为“世界上最悲壮和最感人的雕像”），并参观卡贝尔廊桥和八角形水塔等景点。卢塞恩位于瑞士中部、属德语区，依山傍水，保有中世纪教堂、塔楼与古巷之美。之后前往苏黎世入住酒店。夜宿苏黎世利马塔尔哈利之家酒店，或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Zurich - Milan (along the Alps, from the financial capital to the fashion capital)
timeline.title_zh: 苏黎世-米兰（沿阿尔卑斯山脉，从金融之都游览时尚之都）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, tour Zurich's old town sights: the Grossmünster (Zurich Cathedral, exterior), Lake Zurich and Bahnhofstrasse. The Grossmünster, founded around 1100 and inaugurated around 1220, played a key role in the 16th-century Swiss Reformation and houses stained glass by Giacometti. Bahnhofstrasse is one of Europe's longest and most expensive shopping avenues, lined with luxury brands and private banks. Then set off for the fashion capital of Milan, where you can freely admire Milan's landmark, the Duomo (Milan Cathedral, exterior) - a Gothic masterpiece begun in 1386 that took roughly 500 years to complete, with hundreds of spires and thousands of marble statues - and the Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II, one of Europe's most beautiful shopping arcades. Overnight at the Royal Garden Hotel or a comparable 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，游览苏黎世老城景点：苏黎世大教堂（外观）、苏黎世湖、班霍夫大街。苏黎世大教堂始建于约1100年、约1220年揭幕，在16世纪瑞士宗教改革中起到举足轻重的作用，教堂内的彩绘玻璃是大师贾科梅蒂的杰作；班霍夫大街是欧洲较长、世界上较昂贵的购物大道之一，遍布奢侈品牌与私人银行。之后出发前往时尚之都米兰，抵达后自由参观米兰的标志性建筑米兰主教堂（外观）——这座始建于1386年、历经约500年才完工的哥特式建筑，数百座尖塔耸入云霄、白色大理石外墙雕刻着数千座雕像——以及欧洲漂亮的商业拱廊之一埃马努埃莱二世拱廊。夜宿皇家花园酒店，或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Milan - Venice (romantic Venice on its gentle blue waves)
timeline.title_zh: 米兰-威尼斯（游览温柔碧波上浪漫的威尼斯）
timeline.description_en: Depart in the morning for the water city of Venice. On arrival, visit St Mark's Basilica (exterior), St Mark's Square, the Bridge of Sighs (exterior) and the magnificent Doge's Palace (exterior); these beautiful buildings raised on water, together with the winding canals, give Venice its lingering romance. Venice is made up of 118 islands joined by 177 waterways and 401 bridges, earning it the names 'city on water', 'city of a hundred islands' and 'city of bridges'. St Mark's Square was called by Napoleon 'the most beautiful drawing room in Europe', and the Bridge of Sighs was the route condemned prisoners once took from the courts to the prison. Here you can also try the local specialty, a three-course Venetian cuttlefish-ink pasta meal (at your own expense). Overnight at the voco Venice (InterContinental) or the Hilton Garden / Ambassador Hotel, or a comparable 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午出发前往水城威尼斯，抵达后参观圣马可大教堂（外观）、圣马可广场、叹息桥（外观）和华丽的总督宫（外观），这些建造在水上的美丽建筑和蜿蜒水巷一起，让威尼斯的浪漫风情久久萦绕。威尼斯由118个小岛组成，并以177条水道、401座桥梁连成一体，素有“水上都市”“百岛城”“桥城”之称；圣马可广场曾被拿破仑称作“欧洲美丽的客厅”，叹息桥则是古代由法院向监狱押送死囚的必经之路。在这里您还可以品尝威尼斯特色大餐墨鱼面三道式（自理）。夜宿威尼斯洲际voco酒店或希尔顿大使酒店，或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Venice - Florence (land of poetry, the soul of the Renaissance, a journey of art)
timeline.title_zh: 威尼斯-佛罗伦萨（诗歌之地，文艺复兴之魂享受艺术之旅）
timeline.description_en: Depart in the morning for the birthplace of the Renaissance, Florence. Tour the old-town sights: the world's third-largest church, the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore (the Duomo / 'Florence Cathedral', queue to enter), the Piazza della Signoria, the Ponte Vecchio (Old Bridge), and Piazza Santa Croce with the Basilica of Santa Croce (exterior). The Duomo, faced in white, red and green granite, sits on the site of the 4th-century church of Santa Reparata and took 175 years to build. The Piazza della Signoria is an open-air sculpture museum, with the Palazzo Vecchio, a copy of Michelangelo's David and the Neptune Fountain. The Ponte Vecchio, built in 1345 over the Arno, is one of Europe's earliest large-span segmental-arch bridges, where legend says Dante met Beatrice. The Basilica of Santa Croce holds the tombs and monuments of figures such as Dante, Michelangelo, Galileo, Machiavelli and Rossini. Overnight at the Hilton Florence Metropole or a comparable 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午出发前往文艺复兴的发源地佛罗伦萨，参观老城景点：世界第三大教堂——圣母百花大教堂（需排队进入）、市政广场、老桥（维奇奥桥），以及圣十字广场和圣十字教堂（外观）。圣母百花大教堂使用白、红、绿三色花岗岩贴面，原址为4世纪的圣·雷帕拉塔教堂，花了175年才建成；市政广场素有露天雕塑博物馆之美誉，坐落着维奇奥宫（旧宫）、米开朗基罗《大卫》复制品及海神喷泉；老桥建于1345年、横跨阿诺河，是欧洲较早的大跨度圆弧拱桥，相传但丁在此邂逅少女比阿特丽丝；圣十字教堂内有但丁、米开朗基罗、伽利略、马基雅维利、罗西尼等名人的纪念碑和陵墓。夜宿佛罗伦萨希尔顿大都会酒店，或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Florence - Cinque Terre - Pisa - Siena (the Cinque Terre by scenic train)
timeline.title_zh: 佛罗伦萨-五渔村-比萨-锡耶纳（景观列车游览五渔村）
timeline.description_en: Set off in the morning to explore the Cinque Terre, touring the beautiful clifftop fishing villages along the Ligurian coast. The Cinque Terre, in the La Spezia province of Liguria, is the collective name for the five clifftop villages of Monterosso al Mare, Vernazza, Corniglia, Manarola and Riomaggiore, linked by a 15-20 km coastal hiking trail (about 5 hours) and listed as a UNESCO World Heritage site in 1997. In the afternoon head to Pisa to see the Leaning Tower (exterior) and the Piazza dei Miracoli (Square of Miracles), the historic-cultural heart of Pisa, whose four great buildings are the cathedral, the leaning bell tower, the Baptistery and the cemetery (a UNESCO World Heritage site). Then continue to Siena for the overnight. Note: if bad weather or a rail strike makes the Cinque Terre inaccessible, the itinerary automatically changes to touring the coastal towns by coach or other means. Overnight at the Four Points by Sheraton Siena or a comparable 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午出发前往游览五渔村，沿利古里亚海岸线游览悬崖上的美丽渔村。五渔村位于意大利利古里亚大区拉斯佩齐亚省海岸，是蒙特罗索、韦尔纳扎、科尔尼利亚、马纳罗拉及里奥马焦雷这五个悬崖边村镇的统称，串联五村的徒步线路约15-20公里、需约5小时，1997年被列入世界文化遗产名录。下午前往比萨，游览比萨斜塔（外观）和比萨历史文化中心的奇迹广场——广场上有比萨主教座堂、比萨斜塔（钟楼）、圣乔瓦尼洗礼堂和比萨墓园四大建筑，被列为世界遗产。之后前往锡耶纳入住酒店。备注：如遇恶劣天气或铁路公司罢工等因素导致无法游览五渔村，行程将自动更改为乘坐大巴车或其它形式游览海岸线城市。夜宿锡耶纳福朋喜来登酒店，或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Siena - Pienza - Rome (medieval art treasure Siena, the cypress lane of the Val d'Orcia)
timeline.title_zh: 锡耶纳-皮恩扎-罗马（中世纪艺术瑰宝-锡耶纳，遇奥尔恰谷丝柏树小径）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, head to the old city of Siena to tour the Siena Cathedral (exterior), the Piazza del Campo (Field Square, also called the Shell Square for its shape, one of Europe's largest surviving medieval squares), the Siena Town Hall (Palazzo Pubblico, exterior) and the Torre del Mangia bell tower (exterior, 102 m high, Italy's second-tallest tower). Then visit the old town of Pienza to see the Piazza Pio II, with its 15th-century buildings including Pienza Cathedral (exterior) and the Piccolomini Palace; Pienza was the first 'ideal town' of the Renaissance, founded by Pope Pius II and a UNESCO World Heritage site since 1996. Continue to Rome, stopping en route to freely photograph the cypress lane, an iconic image of the Tuscan countryside in the Val d'Orcia (a UNESCO World Heritage site since 2004). Overnight at the Sheraton Roma Hotel (Parco de' Medici) or the Mantegna Hotel, or a comparable 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后出发前往锡耶纳古城，游览锡耶纳大教堂（外观）、田野广场（因形似贝壳也叫贝壳广场，是欧洲现存较大的中世纪广场之一）、锡耶纳市政厅（外观）、曼吉亚塔楼（外观，垂直高度102米，是意大利第二高的塔楼）等景点。之后前往皮恩扎古城参观二世广场（Piazza Pio II），广场内有15世纪的主要建筑如皮恩扎大教堂（外观）、皮科洛米尼宫等；皮恩扎是文艺复兴时期最早的理想小镇，由罗马教皇庇护二世创立，1996年被列入世界遗产名录。之后前往罗马，途中在丝柏树小径自由拍照——两旁种满意大利柏树的乡村道路，是托斯卡纳田园风光（奥尔恰谷，2004年被列入世界遗产）的象征之一。抵达罗马后入住酒店。夜宿罗马梅第奇喜来登酒店或曼特尼亚酒店，或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Rome (relive the glory of the 'city of cities', the ancient Roman Empire)
timeline.title_zh: 罗马（重温“万城之城”古罗马帝国的辉煌）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, follow the guide on a walking tour of the world-famous historic city of Rome, birthplace of the Roman Empire and known as the 'Eternal City'. Visit the Colosseum (exterior), built by the ancient Romans for gladiatorial games and one of Rome's most famous monuments; the Pantheon (exterior), a 2,000-year-old building where Raphael and the kings Vittorio Emanuele II and Umberto I are buried, praised by Michelangelo as 'the design of angels'; the Spanish Steps (Piazza di Spagna), made famous by the film 'Roman Holiday', whose 138 steps are the widest in Europe; and the Trevi Fountain (exterior), where tradition says tossing a coin over your shoulder makes a wish come true. Free time afterwards, then the pleasant journey ends. Note: because of the protection of Rome's ancient buildings, vehicles are banned and most areas are pedestrian zones, so today's walking tour covers roughly 5-6 km on foot. No overnight hotel (tour concludes).
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，在导游带领下徒步游览世界著名的历史文化名城罗马，这里是古罗马帝国的发祥地，因历史悠久而被称为“永恒之城”。参观斗兽场（外观），它是古罗马专供观看斗兽或角斗的地方，是罗马较著名的历史遗迹；万神殿（外观），距今已有2000多年历史，拉斐尔及罗马皇帝维托里奥·埃曼努埃尔二世、温布尔一世等长眠于此，被米开朗基罗赞叹为“天使的设计”；西班牙广场，曾出现在电影《罗马假日》中，西班牙台阶共138级，是欧洲最宽的台阶；以及特莱维喷泉（许愿池，外观），相传背对喷泉从肩上投一枚硬币入水即可梦想成真。之后自由活动，结束愉快旅程。备注：由于罗马古城建筑保护，禁止车辆行驶，大多数区域为步行街区，当天徒步参观罗马，步行行程约为5-6公里。无夜宿酒店（行程结束）。

meeting_en: Paris, France. The tour departs from Paris on Day 1 and ends in Rome, Italy; exact pickup details are confirmed before departure.
meeting_zh: 法国巴黎。行程第1天从巴黎出发，结束于意大利罗马；具体接送细节于出发前确认。

faqs.question_en: Where and how do we meet and disperse?
faqs.question_zh: 集合及集散地点和方法？
faqs.answer_en: Route A departs from Paris: meet on Day 1 at 08:30 in front of the McDonald's at Place d'Italie, Paris; the group disperses on Day 9 around 16:30 near Piazza del Popolo (dispersal address: Piazzale Flaminio, 00187 Roma RM, Italy) and again around 17:00 at Roma Tiburtina train station. Route B departs from Geneva: meet on Day 1 around 16:30 in front of the Warwick Geneva hotel (Rue de Lausanne 14, 1201 Genève, Switzerland); same dispersal as Route A on Day 9. These are reference times/places; the actual departure time follows the tour-confirmation notice. For Route A we do not recommend booking a flight that arrives in Paris on the same day. For Route B you may join as late as 17:00 in Geneva, but the Geneva city sights will be missed with no refund. You may book a flight leaving Rome late on the final night, but any Rome sights missed as a result are non-refundable.
faqs.answer_zh: A线路巴黎出发：行程第1天08:30在巴黎意大利广场麦当劳门口集合；第9天16:30左右在人民广场附近解散（解散地址：Piazzale Flaminio, 00187 Roma RM, Italy），17:00左右在Roma Tiburtina火车站解散。B线日内瓦出发：第1天16:30左右在日内瓦沃里克酒店（Warwick Geneva）门口集合，地址：Rue de Lausanne 14, 1201 Genève；第9天解散同A线。以上为参考时间及地点，实际出发时间以出团通知书为准。A线不推荐预定当天抵达巴黎的航班；B线最晚可于17:00在日内瓦上团，但日内瓦市区景点将无法游览且无费用可退。可预定结束当天夜里离开罗马的航班，导致罗马景点无法参观的无费用可退。

faqs.question_en: Will the coach rides on this route take a very long time?
faqs.question_zh: 行程路线乘坐大巴时间会不会很久？
faqs.answer_en: Only the Geneva-Paris leg is about 6 hours 45 minutes; the remaining planned legs are roughly 3-4 hours of driving each. Road conditions are complex, especially in city centers where traffic jams or other factors can increase driving time; in particular the Lucerne-to-Milan tunnel is prone to congestion that can lengthen the journey.
faqs.answer_zh: 该产品仅日内瓦巴黎段约为6小时45分，其余计划行程均为3-4小时左右的行车时间。公路交通情况复杂，特别是市区内容易发生堵车或其它因素导致行车时间增加；同时，卢塞恩到米兰的隧道容易发生堵车导致行程时间增加。

faqs.question_en: Can we go up to the summit of the Jungfrau?
faqs.question_zh: 产品是否可以游览少女峰登顶？
faqs.answer_en: Yes, you can, but the cost is not included. If you wish to take part, we recommend booking in advance. The optional experience time is limited and may conflict with the original itinerary, which could affect the arrangement of other parts of the trip.
faqs.answer_zh: 可以游览但是费用不包含，如需参加建议提前预定。可选的体验时间受限，可能跟原行程安排产生冲突，导致影响其他行程和体验的安排。

faqs.question_en: Can I do the First (Top of Adventure) Swiss aerial-adventure activity?
faqs.question_zh: 我是否能游览菲斯特瑞士空天探险活动（First Top of Adventure）？
faqs.answer_en: Yes, you can, but the cost is not included. If you wish to take part, we recommend booking in advance.
faqs.answer_zh: 可以游览但是费用不包含，如需参加建议提前预定。

faqs.question_en: What adventure activities does First have?
faqs.question_zh: 菲斯特都有什么探险活动？
faqs.answer_en: First's aerial-adventure park has many thrilling high-mountain activities, mainly: the Aerial gondola, the First Cliff Walk, the First Flyer zip-line and the First Glider. You can buy them on-site depending on that day's queue length and weather.
faqs.answer_zh: 菲斯特空天探险有很多惊险刺激的高山活动，主要项目有：空中贡多拉（Aerial gondola）、悬崖天梭巅峰栈道（First Cliff Walk）、高空飞索（First Flyer）、神鹰飞梭（First Glider）。可以根据当天排队时间及天气情况现场购买。

faqs.question_en: Can I choose both the Jungfrau sightseeing train and the First aerial-adventure activity on the same day?
faqs.question_zh: 我是否能同时选择少女峰观光列车、菲斯特空天探险两个项目？
faqs.answer_en: No. There are only 5-6 hours of free time in Interlaken that day; the recommended time for the Jungfrau is 4-5 hours and First needs 3-4 hours, so the two cannot both be done.
faqs.answer_zh: 不可以。当天在因特拉肯仅有5-6小时自由活动时间，推荐游览少女峰的时间为4到5小时，菲斯特需要3-4小时，两者无法同时选择。

faqs.question_en: Can I choose to tour Switzerland by the GoldenPass train?
faqs.question_zh: 我是否可以选择乘坐金色山口游览瑞士？
faqs.answer_en: Yes, you can take the GoldenPass on the Lungern- or Meiringen-to-Interlaken/Lucerne leg. Before buying the train ticket you must agree with the guide the time and journey for rejoining the group; the touring time in Lungern or Lucerne will then be shortened. The train ticket plus seat fee is about EUR 35.
faqs.answer_zh: 可以选择龙疆或梅林根到因特拉肯或卢塞恩段，需要在购买火车票前与导游协商再次返回旅游团的时间点和车程，届时龙疆或卢塞恩的游览行程将会缩减，火车票及座位费约为35欧元。

faqs.question_en: Why is Rome city center toured on foot?
faqs.question_zh: 罗马市中心，为什么要徒步游览？
faqs.answer_en: Because Rome's sights are very concentrated and all in pedestrian zones, the city-center sights must be toured on foot.
faqs.answer_zh: 由于罗马各个景点非常集中，并且都是步行街区，因此罗马市中心景点需要徒步游览。

faqs.question_en: Can we choose different menus and dishes for dinner according to our preferences?
faqs.question_zh: 我们的晚餐是否能根据喜欢选择不同的菜单和菜品？
faqs.answer_en: All meals recommended in the itinerary are recommended local specialties and are not included in the price, for example Venice's famous black cuttlefish-ink pasta and the Tuscan steak. If a dish is not your first choice, you are free to pick other dining options.
faqs.answer_zh: 行程内推荐的餐饮全部为推荐当地特色餐，费用并未包含，比如威尼斯较著名的黑墨鱼面、托斯卡纳的牛排等。如果菜品并非您的首选，可以自行选择其他餐饮。

faqs.question_en: Do I need a visa?
faqs.question_zh: 是否需要签证？
faqs.answer_en: This product does not include the visa fee; if you need a visa, please choose a Schengen-visa product. It requires a Schengen visa (single or multiple entry). 'Worry-free visa guarantee': for travelers who sign the contract with us at least 61 days before departure, if the visa is not obtained within 45 days before departure, we bear all losses and immediately refund the full travel fee; travelers who do not meet this clause and fail to obtain the visa normally are refunded per the 'change and cancellation terms'. A rejection must be reported to us within 48 hours with the consulate's rejection letter; any supplementary or changed materials must be submitted within five days, and the traveler may not unilaterally waive the 'visa defense' right. We provide all materials for the Schengen visa application free of charge after booking, and arrange a Schengen travel-insurance policy meeting Schengen requirements if you commission us to handle the visa. Your passport must be valid for at least six months from the date of departure, or customs may refuse entry. Visa fees, visa service fees, Schengen-insurance fees and visa-center appointment fees are all non-refundable and non-transferable, even if the product is changed or cancelled.
faqs.answer_zh: 本产品不包含签证费用，如需办理请选择申根签证产品。本产品需要申根签证（单次或多次入境）。保签无忧：游客在出发日前61天与我社签约，如在出发前45天内未获取签证，我社承担所有损失并立即退还全部旅游费用；不符合该条款的游客如未正常获取签证，将按“退改与取消条款”退费。如遇拒签需在48小时内通知我社并出具使领馆拒签函，如需补充或更改材料需在五天内提交，且不得单方面放弃“签证抗辩”权利。预定后免费提供办理申根签证的全部材料；如委托我社办理签证，我社为游客购买符合申根要求的申根旅游保险，未委托办理则需自行购买保险及负责理赔。护照有效期需自离境之日起至少还有六个月，否则海关有权拒绝入境。签证费、签证服务费、申根保险费、签证中心预约费均不可退款，也无法更改使用者，即使产品退改签亦不可退。

faqs.question_en: Booking, changes and cancellation
faqs.question_zh: 预订、变更与取消须知
faqs.answer_en: Both the agency and the traveler may apply for free no-reason cancellation more than 30 days before departure (the 30th day not included). Payment does not equal confirmation: book at least 14 days ahead; the operator re-confirms within at most 48 hours, and if not confirmed within 48 hours the order is auto-refunded, so do not book connecting flights/hotels until confirmed. This is a shared/join-in tour (拼团) on a rotating dispatch basis - other travelers board and alight at different points - and the announced group size is the daily-average maximum; it is declared formed at 10 people, and if 10 is not reached more than 30 days before departure either side may cancel without liability. Because flights, traffic, ferry cancellations and strikes often force schedule and order changes, you must arrive at the meeting point one day before the group starts and leave the dispersal point one day after it ends, allowing reasonable connection time (at least 5 hours for transfers at the same airport, 7 hours for different airports in the same city; reasonable meet/disperse window 07:00-21:00). Room types: two people booked together default to a standard double with bed type (one big bed or twin) assigned by the hotel and not selectable; a triple/family room defaults to two parents plus one minor with non-selectable bed configuration; single travelers pay a single-room supplement (refunded pro-rata if room-sharing succeeds). The listed hotels are first-choice; if full, a hotel of similar standard and the same star rating is substituted without separate notice. All hotels are non-smoking, check-in 14:00 / check-out 11:00, and air conditioning is not a standard amenity. All pricing is in EUR at the time of booking; if you pay in CNY the amount is the real-time CNY value auto-calculated from the Bank of China 'euro selling price' on the day of payment, and refunds likewise use the day's rate (exchange differences and bank fees are borne by the traveler). Itinerary order may be adjusted for flight/traffic reasons without being deemed a breach; if the Cinque Terre cannot be visited due to bad weather or a rail strike, it is replaced by a coach or other tour of the coastal towns.
faqs.answer_zh: 出发前30天（不含第30天）旅行社与旅行者均可申请无理由取消。支付不等于确认：建议提前至少14天预订，组团社最多48小时内二次确认，如超48小时未确认则默认自动退款，未获确定行程前请勿预定衔接机票及酒店。本产品为散客拼团、循环套发团，沿途会有其他游客在不同地点上下团；披露的最多参团人数为该团每天人数的上限，成团人数为10人，行程开始前30天（不含第30天）未达成团人数双方均可解除合同且不担违约责任。由于航变、交通拥堵、渡轮取消、罢工等常导致行程时间及顺序调整，旅行者须在参团日前一天抵达集合地、离团日后一天离开集散地，并预留合理衔接时间（同机场转机至少5小时、同城不同机场至少7小时；合理集散时段07:00至21:00）。房型：两人同时报名默认标准双人间，床型由酒店安排不可选（大床或双床）；三人家庭间默认两位父母与一位未成年儿童，床型不可选；单人报名含单人房差，拼房成功按比例退还房差。行程内列明酒店为优先入住酒店，如订满则换为相同星级、相近条件酒店且不另行通知。欧洲酒店均禁烟，入住14:00、退房11:00，空调并非标准设施。所有定价以欧元为计价单位，如选择人民币支付，则以当天支付时按中国银行实时“欧元卖出价”自动计算的人民币价格为准，退款同样适用申请当日即时汇率，汇率差异及银行手续费由旅行者承担。行程顺序可能因航班/交通调整，在不改变路线及景点的情况下不视为违约；如遇恶劣天气或铁路罢工无法游览五渔村，将改为乘大巴或其它形式游览海岸线城市。

faqs.question_en: Health and safety requirements
faqs.question_zh: 健康与安全须知
faqs.answer_en: To ensure a safe trip, please have a health check before departure and do NOT enroll if you have any of the following: infectious diseases (e.g. active tuberculosis, typhoid); cardiovascular disease (severe hypertension, heart failure, myocardial ischemia/infarction, etc.); cerebrovascular disease (cerebral embolism, hemorrhage, brain tumor, etc.); respiratory disease (emphysema, cor pulmonale, etc.); psychiatric conditions (epilepsy and various mental illnesses); severe anemia (hemoglobin below 50 g/L); or recovery from major/medium surgery. Pregnancy: at 35 weeks or more you cannot join under any circumstances; at 28 weeks or more you must provide a doctor's exam report from within 7 days plus the attending physician's consent letter; under 28 weeks please enroll with caution, sign the agency's disclaimer, and you cannot take part in any adventure, skiing, sea-going, high-altitude or outdoor items. Travelers with disabilities need a doctor's report from within 7 days plus consent letter, must be accompanied by an immediate family member, and must apply at least 61 days in advance. Elderly travelers over 70 need a health certificate and medical report and an accompanying immediate family member (or sign the disclaimer); this is a long trip requiring a certain walking ability and good stamina, so the frail should enroll with caution. Minors (under 18) must be accompanied by an immediate relative or guardian; some sights have special rules for under-18/12/6; this product does not accept infants under 2 years old, and infants under 6 / children under 30 kg need a confirmed safety child seat. Per Article 15 of the Tourism Law, travelers must truthfully declare health information relevant to the trip (pregnancy, lactation, chronic illness, infectious-disease history, suspected symptoms, recent travel to epidemic areas, etc.) and follow safety warnings; concealment that causes harm or transmission risk makes the traveler liable, and the agency may terminate the contract without refund.
faqs.answer_zh: 为确保旅游顺利出行、防止旅途中发生人身意外，请在出行前做一次必要的身体检查，如存在下列情况请勿报名：传染性疾病患者（如活动期肺结核、伤寒）；心血管疾病患者（如严重高血压、心功能不全、心肌缺氧、心肌梗塞）；脑血管疾病患者（如脑栓塞、脑出血、脑肿瘤）；呼吸系统疾病患者（如肺气肿、肺心病）；精神病患者（如癫痫及各种精神病）；严重贫血病患者（血红蛋白50克/升以下）；大中型手术恢复期病患者。孕妇：妊娠35周及以上任何情况下都无法参团；28周及以上需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书；28周以下请慎重报名，需签署旅行社免责声明书，且无法参加探险、滑雪、出海、高空、户外等项目。残疾人需提供7日内医生检查报告及同意书、需直系家属陪同、并提前至少61天申请。70周岁以上老年人需提供健康证明、体检报告并由直系家属陪同（否则需签免责声明书）；本行程较长，需要一定步行能力与体力，体力不支者请慎重报名。未成年人（未满18周岁）须由直系亲属或监护人陪同，部分景点对未满18/12/6周岁有特殊限定；本产品不接受2周岁以下婴儿参团，6岁以下婴儿或30公斤以下儿童需提前确认安全儿童座椅。根据《旅游法》第15条，旅游者需如实告知与旅游活动相关的个人健康信息（妊娠期、哺乳期、慢性病、传染病史、疑似症状或近期疫区旅居史等）并遵守安全警示规定，若因隐瞒导致人身损害或传播风险，旅游者需自行承担责任，旅行社可解除合同且不退还费用。

title_en: France & Switzerland Alpine Loop: 5-Day Small-Group Leisure Tour
title_zh: 法瑞环线5天享乐小团
short_en: A relaxed 5-day small-group loop from Paris through Geneva, Bern, Interlaken, the Jungfrau region, Lucerne and Zurich.
short_zh: 5天法瑞环线享乐小团，从巴黎出发，游历日内瓦、伯尔尼、因特拉肯、少女峰地区、卢塞恩与苏黎世。
desc_en: This 5-day small-group loop departs Paris and dives deep into the Swiss Alps, looping through the lakeside old town of Geneva, the medieval UNESCO capital of Bern, the storybook resort of Interlaken beneath the Jungfrau, and the lake-and-mountain scenery of Lucerne and Zurich before returning to Paris. Travellers enjoy the Lake Thun and Lake Brienz 'eyes of God', the Golden Pass scenic rail between Lungern and Lucerne, and a stay at the historic Giessbach castle hotel above Lake Brienz. With seasonal cogwheel trains and lake cruises, optional Jungfrau summit and paragliding add-ons, and city-centre 4-star hotels, it blends Alpine grandeur with leisurely small-group comfort.
desc_zh: 这条5天环线小团从巴黎出发，深入瑞士阿尔卑斯腹地，依次游览日内瓦湖畔老城、被列为世界遗产的中世纪联邦首府伯尔尼、少女峰脚下的童话度假小镇因特拉肯，以及卢塞恩与苏黎世的湖光山色，最后返回巴黎。沿途可饱览有“上帝双眼”之称的图恩湖与布里恩茨湖，乘坐龙疆至卢塞恩段金色山口列车，并入住布里恩茨湖畔的历史名宿吉斯巴赫城堡酒店。行程含季节性齿轮小火车与游船，可自选少女峰登顶、滑翔伞等项目，搭配市中心四星酒店，将阿尔卑斯壮景与小团休闲舒适完美融合。

highlights.en: Stroll Geneva's lakeside old town with the Flower Clock and the iconic Jet d'Eau fountain
highlights.zh: 漫步日内瓦湖畔老城，欣赏花钟与标志性大喷泉

highlights.en: Explore the medieval UNESCO World Heritage old town of Bern, Switzerland's capital
highlights.zh: 游览被列为世界遗产的中世纪联邦首府伯尔尼老城

highlights.en: Take in Lake Thun and Lake Brienz, the storybook 'eyes of God', from Interlaken
highlights.zh: 在因特拉肯饱览有“上帝双眼”之称的图恩湖与布里恩茨湖

highlights.en: Stay at the historic Giessbach castle hotel above Lake Brienz, beside the Giessbach Falls
highlights.zh: 入住布里恩茨湖畔、紧邻吉斯巴赫瀑布的历史名宿吉斯巴赫城堡酒店

highlights.en: Ride the Golden Pass scenic train from Lungern to Lucerne through Alpine peaks
highlights.zh: 乘坐龙疆至卢塞恩段金色山口列车，穿越阿尔卑斯群峰

highlights.en: Discover Lucerne's Chapel Bridge, Water Tower and Lion Monument, plus Zurich's old town
highlights.zh: 探访卢塞恩的卡贝尔廊桥、八角水塔与狮子纪念碑，以及苏黎世老城

highlights.en: Relaxed small group with city-centre 4-star hotels and an included scenic Jungfrau-region drive
highlights.zh: 休闲小团，入住市中心四星酒店，含少女峰地区景观巴士游览

highlights.en: Optional Jungfrau summit cable car, First gondola and paragliding over the Jungfrau
highlights.zh: 可自选少女峰全景缆车登顶、菲斯特空中贡多拉及少女峰滑翔伞

includes.en: Hotels: 4 nights in 4-star hotels.
includes.zh: 【酒店】四星级酒店4晚。

includes.en: Operating fees: tourist city tax, city-entry fees, residence tax, road and bridge tolls, parking and fuel charges, driver/guide meal allowances and other in-itinerary operating costs.
includes.zh: 【执行】游客城市税、进城费、居住税、过路过桥费、停车燃油费、司导餐补等行程内执行费用。

includes.en: Transport: business travel car or tour coach.
includes.zh: 【交通】商务旅行车或者旅游巴士。

includes.en: Guide: professional driver plus Chinese-speaking guide, or a Chinese-speaking driver-guide throughout (note: for fewer than 8 people, a business car plus Chinese-speaking driver-guide; for more than 8 people, a tour coach plus professional driver plus Chinese-speaking guide).
includes.zh: 【导游】职业司机+中文导游或全程中文司机兼导游（注：8人以下为商务车+中文司机兼导游，8人以上为旅游巴士+专业司机+中文导游）。

includes.en: Baggage: one 23 kg checked bag plus one piece of carry-on luggage.
includes.zh: 【行李】1件23公斤行李及1件随身行李。

includes.en: Tickets: the Interlaken cruise and the Bach (Giessbach) cog railway (experience period 3 Apr 2026 - 11 Oct 2026); the Lucerne cruise (used in place of the Interlaken cruise and Bach cog railway when those cannot be experienced); the Brienz Rothorn steam train (experience period 6 Jun 2026 - 25 Oct 2026); the GoldenPass (Lungern-Lucerne section) (used in place of the Brienz Rothorn steam train when that cannot be experienced).
includes.zh: 【门票】因特拉肯游船和巴赫齿轮小火车（体验时间：2026年4月3日-2026年10月11日）；卢塞恩游船（无法体验因特拉肯游船和巴赫齿轮小火车期间，以卢塞恩游船代替）；布里恩茨洪峰蒸汽火车（体验时间：2026年6月6日-2026年10月25日）；金色山口号（龙疆-卢塞恩段，无法体验布里恩茨洪峰蒸汽火车期间，以金色山口列车代替）。

includes.en: Meals: 3 Swiss-style buffet breakfasts plus 1 buffet breakfast at Bach (Giessbach) Falls, 4 meals in total.
includes.zh: 【餐饮】瑞士式自助早餐3餐，巴赫瀑布自助早餐1餐，共4餐。

excludes.en: Passport: personal passport fees.
excludes.zh: 护照：个人护照费用。

excludes.en: Visa: tourist visa fees for the countries on the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 签证：行程中所列旅游国家所需的观光签证费用。

excludes.en: Insurance: travel insurance fees (if the itinerary involves high-risk sports, verify whether your travel insurance covers that activity).
excludes.zh: 保险：旅游保险费用（如行程内涉及高风险运动，请核实旅游保险是否包含该项运动）。

excludes.en: Tips: guide and driver gratuities, EUR 10 per person per day in total, same rate for adults and children.
excludes.zh: 小费：游客支付导游和司机小费一共10欧/人/天，大小同价。

excludes.en: Meals: apart from the specialty meals included in the itinerary, lunches and dinners are not included.
excludes.zh: 餐饮：除行程内包含的特色餐外，行程中不包含午、晚正餐费用。

excludes.en: Tickets: sights not marked as fee-included (including but not limited to sights noted as 'exterior', and all 'recommended', 'optional', 'experience' and other items not stated as included; please cover these yourself if you wish to visit).
excludes.zh: 门票：行程中未注明费用包含的景点（包括但不仅限于行程中注明“外观”的景点，以及“推荐”“可选”“体验”等所有未提及费用包含的项目，如游客需要参观，敬请自理）。

excludes.en: Extended stays: any extra accommodation, transport or sightseeing beyond the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 延长住宿：行程外额外延长的住宿、交通、观光费用。

excludes.en: Personal spending: drinks/alcohol, taxis, phone charges and other personal expenses.
excludes.zh: 私人消费：如饮料酒类、出租车、电话费等个人消费。

excludes.en: Other transport: transport not covered by the included business car or minibus and not mentioned in the inclusions, such as Venice gondolas and, in vehicle-restricted zones, sightseeing trains or electric taxis (to be covered by the traveller).
excludes.zh: 其他交通：除包含的商务旅行车或中巴之外、费用包含中未提及的其他交通费用，如威尼斯贡多拉，以及车辆限行区的观光火车、电瓶出租车等费用敬请自理。

excludes.en: Free time: night-time sightseeing on your own and the itinerary's recommended activities, plus any transport, meals, tickets and shopping arising from them.
excludes.zh: 自由活动：游客夜间自行游览及行程中的推荐项目，以及产生的交通、餐饮、门票、购物等费用。

excludes.en: Experience activities: any travel experience activities not included in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 体验活动：行程中没有包含的各项旅游体验活动。

excludes.en: Other costs: anything not mentioned in the inclusions. In cases of force majeure (natural disaster, war, strikes), or special circumstances such as transport delays, flight cancellations/reschedules, embassy visa delays or insufficient group size — or other causes not attributable to us — the company reserves the right to charge a price difference for extra costs (e.g. visa-extension fees abroad, accommodation, meals and transport, and national airfare adjustments).
excludes.zh: 其他费用：费用包含中未提及的费用。如因天灾、战争、罢工等不可抗力，及因交通延阻、航班取消或更改时间、使馆延误出签证、人数不足等特殊情况或其他非我公司原因所致的额外费用（如在外延期签证费、住食及交通费、国家航空运价调整等），我公司有权追加差价。

timeline.title_en: Paris - Geneva: Lakeside Geneva, the Flower Clock & the Jet d'Eau Fountain
timeline.title_zh: 巴黎 - 日内瓦：漫步日内瓦湖畔，赏花钟与大喷泉
timeline.description_en: In the morning you set off for Geneva, capital of Switzerland's French-speaking region, to begin a relaxed holiday. On arrival you have free time to explore Geneva's Old Town, the lakeside district, the Flower Clock and the Jet d'Eau fountain, wandering the lakefront old quarter dotted with local eateries and specialty shops. Lake Geneva (also called Lake Leman) straddles Switzerland and France; by day you can take a boat cruise to admire the water, snow-capped mountains and blue sky merging together (about 30 minutes), and by night the lakeshore glitters with neon lights. The Old Upper Town (Haute-Ville) on the right bank of the Rhone gathers churches and historic sites, antique shops along its winding lanes, and the former residence of Enlightenment thinker Rousseau (about 30 min). The Jet d'Eau, on the lake near the English Garden, shoots water like a whale spout to 140 metres at 500 litres per second and is Geneva's most iconic sight (about 15 min); the Flower Clock beside the lake on the western edge of the English Garden symbolises Geneva's fame as the 'watchmaking capital' (about 15 min). Overnight at the Novotel Geneve Centre Gare (Annemasse) or Crowne Plaza, or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往瑞士法语区首府日内瓦，开始休闲度假之旅。到达后自由游览日内瓦老城、日内瓦湖区、花钟和大喷泉等景点，漫步湖畔老城区域，这里云集着日内瓦各种当地美食和特色商店。日内瓦湖又名莱芒湖，横跨瑞士和法国，是西欧重要湖泊；白天可乘游船游览（约30分钟），看湖水、雪山和蓝天连成一片，夜晚岸边霓虹闪烁。隆河右岸的上城区聚集着教堂、古迹与蜿蜒小巷中的古董商店，启蒙时代思想家卢梭的故居也在旧城区内（约30分钟）。大喷泉位于英国花园附近的日内瓦湖面上，宛若鲸鱼喷出的水柱，高140米、喷水量500公升，是日内瓦最具代表性的景观（约15分钟）；花钟坐落在湖畔英国花园西边，彰显日内瓦“钟表之都”的美名（约15分钟）。夜宿安娜玛斯日内瓦港诺富特酒店或皇冠假日酒店，或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Geneva - Bern - Interlaken: Medieval Bern & the Fairytale Town beneath the Jungfrau
timeline.title_zh: 日内瓦 - 伯尔尼 - 因特拉肯：少女峰下的童话小镇因特拉肯
timeline.description_en: In the morning you head to Bern, the Swiss federal capital, a beautifully preserved medieval town of quaint clock towers, fountains every few steps, cobbled streets and red-roofed traditional buildings; on arrival you tour the UNESCO World Heritage Old Town. Bern means 'bear' in German and is nicknamed the 'Bear City'; the 12th-century old town has more than 100 fountains, arcaded walkways, towering towers, a bear park and the intricate astronomical clock whose figures perform on the hour (about 40 min).
