faqs.answer_zh: 本产品不包含签证费用，如您需要办理签证请选择申根签证产品。本产品需要申根签证（单次或多次入境）。预订后免费提供办理申根签证的全部材料（参考详细材料清单）。护照有效期需在离境之日起至少还有六个月，否则海关有权拒绝入境。如委托我社办理申根签证，我社为您购买符合申根签证要求的申根旅游保险；若未委托我社办理，需自行购买旅游保险及自行负责理赔。签证费、签证服务费、申根保险费、签证中心预约费均不可退款，也无法更改使用者，即使产品退改签亦无法退款。【保签无忧】：游客在出发日前61天与我社签约，如在出发前45天内未获取签证，我社承担所有损失，立即退还全部旅游费用；不符合该条款的游客如未正常获取签证，将按照“退改与取消条款”退费。如遇拒签需在48小时内通知我社并出具使领馆拒签函，如需补充或更改材料需在五天内提交，且不得单方面放弃“签证抗辩”权利。

faqs.question_en: Booking, changes & cancellation
faqs.question_zh: 预订、变更与取消须知
faqs.answer_en: Free no-reason cancellation: both the travel agency and the traveler may apply to cancel without reason up to 30 days before departure (excluding the 30th day). This is a shared-departure group tour (recurring batches) where other guests board and leave at different points; the start/end cities and prices differ, so book according to your own start and end destinations. The minimum group size is 10 people - if not reached by 30 days before departure either side may cancel; before a departure is confirmed neither side bears default liability. For groups of 8 or fewer the tour automatically becomes a small group with a business travel vehicle plus driver-guide. Because flight changes, traffic, ferry cancellations and strikes are frequent, the order of sights often shifts, so travelers must arrive at the meeting point one day before the tour starts and leave the dispersal point one day after it ends, allowing reasonable connection time (same-airport transfers at least 5 hours, different-airport same-city transfers at least 7 hours; reasonable meet/disperse window 07:00-21:00). Room types: two people booking together default to a standard double (bed type assigned by the hotel, not selectable); a three-person family room defaults to two parents plus one minor with bed types assigned by the hotel; solo bookings include a single-room supplement deposit by default (refunded pro-rata if room-sharing succeeds, or note 'single occupancy, no room-sharing, no refund of single supplement' to be assigned a single room). European hotels are non-smoking, no cooking in rooms, no free toiletries or free hot water, check-in 14:00 and check-out 11:00, and many do not have air conditioning as standard. Listed hotel names are preferred; if unavailable, a similar same-star hotel is substituted without separate notice. Itinerary contingencies: in peak season the Louvre and Pompeii may limit groups - if changed to individual tickets, a 10 EUR Louvre guide fee and 6 EUR Pompeii guide fee are refunded per person, and if entry is impossible the ticket plus guide fee are refunded and the visit becomes exterior-only; Versailles uses an audio guide instead of an official guide when fewer than 3 people. If bad weather or a rail strike prevents the Cinque Terre, the coastal towns are toured by coach instead; the Capri Blue Grotto may be closed by the maritime authority; and if extreme sea conditions cancel the Positano/Amalfi boat trip, Sorrento old town is toured by coach and the boat fee refunded. Pricing: all prices are quoted in EUR at booking; if you pay in CNY, the CNY amount is the real-time figure auto-calculated on the day of payment from the Bank of China 'EUR sell' rate, and refunds use the same-day rate (you bear any exchange-rate difference or bank fees).
faqs.answer_zh: 免费无理由取消：跟团游产品出发前30天（不含第30天）旅行社和旅行者均有权申请无理由取消。本产品为散客拼团循环套发团，集合与结束途中会有其他游客在不同地点上下团，开始和结束的城市不同、价格不同，请根据自己报名的目的地开始和结束行程。成团人数为10人，行程开始前30天（不含第30天）未达成团人数，双方均有权解除合同；宣布成团前双方不承担违约责任。报名人数为8人及以下时本团自动改为小团，安排商务旅行车+司机兼导游。由于航变、交通、渡轮取消及罢工频繁，游览先后顺序常有调整，故要求旅游者在旅游团开始前一天到达集合地、结束后一天离开集散地，并预留合理衔接时间（同机场转机至少5小时、同城不同机场至少7小时；合理集合集散时间段为07:00至21:00）。房型：两人同时报名默认标准双人间（床型由酒店安排不可选）；三人家庭间默认两位父母与一位未成年儿童入住，床型由酒店安排；单人报名默认含单人房差押金（成功拼房按比例退还，或备注“要求单人入住、请勿安排拼房、不退单人房差”按单人价安排）。欧洲酒店禁烟、禁止房内做饭、不提供一次性洗漱用品及免费开水，入住14:00、退房11:00，多数不以空调为标准设施。行程内列明酒店为优先入住，如订满则换为相同星级相近酒店，恕不另行通知。行程应变：旺季卢浮宫、龐贝古城可能对旅游团限流——如改为散拼门票则退还卢浮宫每位10欧元、龐贝古城每位6欧元讲解费，如无法入内则退还门票+讲解费并改为外观游览；凡尔赛不足3人时以讲解器替代官导。如遇恶劣天气或铁路罢工无法游览五渔村，改乘大巴游览海岸线城市；卡普里蓝洞可能被海洋气象机构关闭；如海上极端天气取消波西塔诺/阿马尔菲出海，则改乘大巴参观索伦托老城并退还出海游船费用。价格：所有定价以欧元为预订时计价单位，如选择人民币支付，则以当天支付时本网站依据中国银行实时“欧元卖出价”自动计算的人民币实时价格为准，退款同样适用申请退款当日即时汇率（汇率差异或银行手续费由旅行者承担）。

faqs.question_en: Health & safety requirements
faqs.question_zh: 健康与安全须知
faqs.answer_en: To ensure a smooth trip and prevent personal injury, please have a necessary medical check before departure and do NOT book if you have any of the following: infectious diseases (e.g. active tuberculosis, typhoid); cardiovascular disease (e.g. severe hypertension, heart failure, myocardial ischemia, myocardial infarction); cerebrovascular disease (e.g. cerebral embolism, cerebral hemorrhage, brain tumor); respiratory disease (e.g. emphysema, cor pulmonale); psychiatric conditions (e.g. epilepsy and various mental illnesses); severe anemia (hemoglobin below 50 g/L); or recovery from major/medium surgery. Pregnancy: at 35 weeks or more you cannot join under any circumstances; at 28 weeks or more you must provide a doctor's exam report (within 7 days) and the attending physician's consent letter; below 28 weeks, book with caution, sign the agency's disclaimer, and you cannot take part in adventure, skiing, sea, high-altitude or outdoor activities. Disabled travelers must provide a doctor's exam report (within 7 days) plus the attending physician's consent letter, be accompanied by an immediate family member, and apply at least 61 days in advance for a reserved place and special facilities. Elderly: travelers over 70 must provide a health certificate and medical report and be accompanied by an immediate family member (or sign the agency's disclaimer if these cannot be provided); the long itinerary demands a certain walking ability and good stamina, so those with limited stamina should book with caution, adventure/ski/sea/high-altitude/outdoor items require the attending physician's consent, and 'age-friendly' service should be requested at least 61 days in advance. Minors (under 18) must be accompanied by an immediate relative or guardian; some sights have special limits for those under 18/12/6; infants under 6 or children under 30 kg need a confirmed safety child seat (otherwise bring your own EU-compliant seat); unaccompanied minors under 18 need a parental authorization letter (both parents' authorization if traveling with non-parents); infants under 2 are not accepted. Per Article 15 of the Tourism Law and the Infectious Disease Prevention Law (2025 revision), travelers must truthfully declare health information relevant to the trip (pregnancy, lactation, chronic disease, infectious-disease history, suspected symptoms or recent travel to epidemic areas) and comply with safety warnings; concealment causing harm or transmission risk makes the traveler liable for resulting damages, medical/quarantine costs and compensation, and the agency may terminate the contract without refund.
faqs.answer_zh: 为确保顺利出行、防止旅途中发生人身意外，请在出行前做一次必要的身体检查，如存在下列情况请勿报名：传染性疾病（如活动期肺结核、伤寒等）；心血管疾病（如严重高血压、心功能不全、心肌缺氧、心肌梗塞等）；脑血管疾病（如脑栓塞、脑出血、脑肿瘤等）；呼吸系统疾病（如肺气肿、肺心病等）；精神病（如癫痫及各种精神病）；严重贫血（血红蛋白水平在50克/升以下）；大中型手术恢复期。孕妇：妊娠第35周及以上任何情况下都无法参团；第28周及以上需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书；第28周以下请慎重报名，需签署旅行社免责声明书，且无法参加探险、滑雪、出海、高空、户外等项目。残疾人：需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书，需直系家属陪同，并提前至少61天申请预留位置及专用配套设施。老年旅游者：70周岁以上需提供健康证明、体检报告并由直系家属陪同（无法提供则需签署免责声明书）；因行程较长需有一定步行能力和体力，体力不支者请慎重报名，涉及探险/滑雪/出海/高空/户外项目需持主治医师同意书，需提前至少61天申请适老化服务及设施。未成年旅游者（未满18周岁）需由直系亲属或监护人陪同；部分景点对未满18/12/6周岁有特殊限定；6岁以下婴儿或30公斤以下儿童请提前确认安全儿童座椅（未确认需自行携带符合欧盟制式的座椅）；无父母陪同的18岁以下未成年人须持父母授权书（与非父母同行需父母双方监护人授权书）；本产品不接受2周岁以下婴儿参团。根据《旅游法》第15条及《传染病防治法》（2025修订），旅游者需如实告知与旅游活动相关的个人健康信息（包括妊娠期、哺乳期、慢性病、传染病史、疑似症状或近期疫区旅居史）并遵守安全警示规定；若因隐瞒导致人身损害或传播风险，需自行承担相应责任、医疗隔离费用及赔偿，旅行社可解除合同且不退还费用。

title_en: France, Italy & Switzerland 11-Day Tour: Paris to Rome
title_zh: 法意瑞11天跟团游：巴黎至罗马
short_en: An 11-day one-way journey from Paris to Rome through France, Switzerland and Italy, with the Jungfrau, Burgundy wine country, the Alps and Renaissance Italy.
short_zh: 11天从巴黎一路畅游至罗马，纵贯法国、瑞士与意大利，登顶少女峰、品勃艮第美酒、穿越阿尔卑斯、饱览文艺复兴名城。
desc_en: This 11-day small-group tour traces a single deep route from Paris to Rome, never doubling back. Begin with the Louvre, Versailles and a Seine cruise in Paris, drink in Burgundy's wine country at Dijon, then cross into Switzerland via fairy-tale Colmar to summit the Jungfrau and ride the GoldenPass panoramic train. Continue into Italy through Milan, Venice, Tuscany, the Cinque Terre, Pisa and Florence, finishing amid the ancient grandeur of Rome. Expert national-museum guides, scenic 5-star and castle hotels and an all-inclusive design make this a relaxed yet richly cultural Grand Tour.
desc_zh: 这条11天精品小团线路从巴黎一路向南直抵罗马，单程深度、不走回头路。先在巴黎参观卢浮宫、凡尔赛宫并乘塞纳河游船，再到勃艮第首府第戎品味红酒与美食，经童话小镇科尔马进入瑞士，登顶少女峰、乘坐金色山口观光列车。随后进入意大利，途经米兰、威尼斯、托斯卡纳、五渔村、比萨与佛罗伦萨，最终在永恒之城罗马收束行程。全程配国家博物馆讲解员、入住雪山湖景与古堡五星酒店、一价全含，是一段轻松而文化厚重的欧洲深度之旅。

highlights.en: Summit the Jungfrau by cable car and stand on the Sphinx Observation Deck above the Aletsch Glacier
highlights.zh: 乘缆车登顶少女峰，在斯芬克斯观景台俯瞰阿莱奇冰川

highlights.en: In-depth Louvre and Versailles tours led by French national-museum guides
highlights.zh: 法兰西国家博物馆讲解员深度讲解卢浮宫与凡尔赛宫

highlights.en: Ride the GoldenPass panoramic train through the Swiss Alps (Lungern–Lucerne)
highlights.zh: 乘坐金色山口观光列车（龙疆—卢塞恩段）穿越瑞士阿尔卑斯

highlights.en: Burgundy wine road: visit a famed estate near Romanée-Conti with guided tasting
highlights.zh: 勃艮第红酒之路：探访罗曼尼·康帝产区名庄并由侍酒师深度品鉴

highlights.en: Scenic stays including a Burgundy medieval castle, a Swiss lakeside mountain hotel and a Tuscan 5-star
highlights.zh: 入住勃艮第中世纪古堡、瑞士雪山湖景酒店与托斯卡纳五星酒店

highlights.en: One-way deep route from Paris to Rome with no backtracking, three full days across Switzerland
highlights.zh: 巴黎至罗马单程深度线路、不走回头路，超长三天纵览瑞士全景

highlights.en: All-inclusive pricing: all listed attractions, trains, cruises and cable cars covered
highlights.zh: 一价全含：卢浮宫、凡尔赛、勃艮第酒庄、金色山口、五渔村、少女峰缆车等门票项目全包

highlights.en: Flights & intercity transport, city-centre 4-star hotels, Chinese-speaking guide, no forced shopping
highlights.zh: 含交通与城际接送、市中心四星酒店、中文导游、无强制购物

includes.en: Hotels: 2 nights in 5-star hotels and 8 nights in comfort-class 4-star hotels.
includes.zh: 【酒店】：2晚五星级酒店，8晚舒适型四星级酒店。

includes.en: Meals: 10 breakfasts in total, served buffet-style at the hotel or in another form.
includes.zh: 【餐饮】：酒店内自助早餐或其他形式早餐共计10餐。

includes.en: Operating fees: in-itinerary operating costs such as city/tourist tax, city-entry fees, residence tax, road and bridge tolls, parking and fuel charges, and driver/guide meal allowances.
includes.zh: 【执行】：游客城市税、进城费、居住税、过路过桥费、停车燃油费、司导餐补等行程内执行费用。

includes.en: Transport: a business travel car or a tour coach.
includes.zh: 【交通】：商务旅行车或者旅游巴士。

includes.en: Guide: a professional driver plus a Chinese-speaking guide, or a Chinese driver-guide throughout (note: fewer than 8 people = business car + driver-guide; 8 or more = tour coach + professional driver + Chinese-speaking guide).
includes.zh: 【导游】：职业司机+中文导游或者全程中文华人司机兼导游（注：8人以下为商务车+司机兼导游，8人以上为旅游巴士+职业司机+中文导游）。

includes.en: Luggage: one 23 kg checked bag and one carry-on bag.
includes.zh: 【行李】：1件23公斤行李及1件随身行李。

includes.en: Tickets: Louvre first-entry ticket with official guide; Palace of Versailles first-entry ticket with official guide; Seine river cruise ticket; Burgundy winery visit and wine-tasting fees; GoldenPass train (Lucerne-Lungern section); Cinque Terre local train; Venice canal ferry to the island; and the Jungfrau cable-car package ticket.
includes.zh: 【门票】：卢浮宫首道门票及官导讲解、凡尔赛宫首道门票及官导讲解、塞纳河游船船票、勃艮第酒庄参观门票及品酒费用、金色山口列车（卢塞恩-龙疆段）、五渔村小火车、威尼斯运河上岛渡轮、少女峰缆车套票。

excludes.en: Passport: personal passport application fees.
excludes.zh: 护照：个人护照费用。

excludes.en: Visa: the tourist visa fees required for the countries on the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 签证：行程中所列旅游国家所需的观光签证费用。

excludes.en: Insurance: travel insurance fees (if the trip involves high-risk sports, verify whether your travel insurance covers them).
excludes.zh: 保险：旅游保险费用（如行程内涉及到高风险运动，请核实旅游保险是否包含该项运动）。

excludes.en: Tips: guests pay the guide and driver a total tip of 10 EUR per person per day, same rate for adults and children.
excludes.zh: 小费：游客支付导游和司机小费一共10欧/人/天，大小同价。

excludes.en: Meals: apart from the special meals included in the itinerary, lunches and dinners are not included.
excludes.zh: 餐饮：除行程内包含的特色餐外，行程中不包含午、晚正餐费用。

excludes.en: Admissions: any sight whose admission is not stated as included (including but not limited to sights marked "(exterior)", and all "recommended", "optional" or "experience" items not stated as included) — if you wish to visit, please pay on your own.
excludes.zh: 门票：行程中未注明费用包含的景点（包括但不仅限于行程中注明“外观”的景点，以及“推荐”“可选”“体验”等所有未提及费用包含的项目，如游客需要参观，敬请自理）。

excludes.en: Extended stays: accommodation, transport and sightseeing added outside the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 延长住宿：行程外额外延长的住宿、交通、观光费用。

excludes.en: Personal spending: e.g. drinks and alcohol, taxis, phone charges and other personal expenses.
excludes.zh: 私人消费：如饮料酒类、出租车、电话费等个人消费。

excludes.en: Other transport: any transport beyond the included business car or minibus not mentioned in the inclusions, such as the Venice gondola and the sightseeing trains or electric taxis used inside vehicle-restricted zones — please pay on your own.
excludes.zh: 其他交通：除包含商务旅行车或者中巴之外，费用包含中未提及的其他交通费用，如威尼斯贡多拉，以及车辆限行区的观光火车、电瓶出租车等费用敬请自理。

excludes.en: Free-time activities: guests' own evening sightseeing and recommended projects, and any transport, meals, admissions or shopping arising from them.
excludes.zh: 自由活动：游客夜间自行游览及行程中的推荐项目，以及产生的交通、餐饮、门票、购物等费用。

excludes.en: Experience activities: any tourist experience activities not included in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 体验活动：行程中没有包含的各项旅游体验活动。

excludes.en: Other costs: anything not mentioned in the inclusions. Where force majeure such as natural disaster, war or strike, or special situations such as transport delays, flight cancellation/rescheduling, embassy visa delays or insufficient group numbers cause extra costs (e.g. overseas visa-extension fees, accommodation, food and transport, or national air-fare adjustments), the company reserves the right to charge the price difference.
excludes.zh: 其他费用：费用包含中未提及的费用。如因天灾、战争、罢工等不可抗力原因，及因交通延阻、航班取消或更改时间、使馆延误出签证、人数不足等特殊情况或其他非我公司原因所导致的额外费用（如在外延期签证费、住、食及交通费、国家航空运价调整等），我公司有权追加差价。

timeline.title_en: Paris - The Louvre - Paris (in-depth guided tour of the Louvre by a French national-museum docent)
timeline.title_zh: 巴黎 - 卢浮宫 - 巴黎（法兰西国家博物馆讲解员深度讲解卢浮宫）
timeline.description_en: In the morning you visit the Louvre, France's most celebrated museum and one of the oldest in the world, a U-shaped palace whose glass pyramid entrance was designed by Chinese-American architect I.M. Pei; the visit lasts about 1.5 hours with a standard general-admission ticket (no Chinese audio guide). In the afternoon you tour central Paris: Notre-Dame Cathedral on the Île de la Cité (the island where the city was born), then the Champ-de-Mars and the Eiffel Tower (exterior). You finish with a Seine river cruise aboard the famous glass-cabin bateaux mouches, a 3.2 km / roughly 1-hour voyage passing Notre-Dame, the Grand and Petit Palais, the Pont Alexandre III, the love-lock bridge, the Louvre, the Champs-Élysées, and Les Invalides, the Grand and Petit Palais and the Musée d'Orsay (all viewed from the water / exterior). Overnight at Mercure Paris or Novotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel in the safer southern part of Paris. Note: in peak season the Louvre may restrict in-museum guiding, in which case the 20 EUR per-person in-museum guide fee is refunded.
timeline.description_zh: 上午参观法兰西引以为傲的卢浮宫博物馆，它是世界上古老的博物馆之一，建筑呈“U”形，门前的玻璃金字塔入口由华裔建筑大师贝聿铭设计，馆内珍藏40余万件艺术珍品（长期展出约3.5万件），游览约1.5小时，使用普通散客门票（无中文讲解器）。下午游览巴黎市中心：参观西岱岛（巴黎的发源地）上的巴黎圣母院，之后前往塞纳河边的战神广场及埃菲尔铁塔（外观）。最后乘坐著名的透明船舱“苍蝇船”塞纳河游船，3.2公里、约1小时航程，途经巴黎圣母院、大小皇宫、亚历山大三世大桥、巴黎锁桥、卢浮宫、香榭丽舍大道，并从河面眺望荣军院、大小皇宫、奥赛博物馆等地（均为外观）。夜宿巴黎南部的巴黎美居酒店或诺富特酒店或同等4星级酒店。提示：旺季卢浮宫可能限制馆内讲解，届时退还每位游客20欧元的馆内讲解费。

timeline.title_en: Paris - Versailles - Paris (the Palace of Versailles, classical splendor of the Bourbon kings)
timeline.title_zh: 巴黎 - 凡尔赛 - 巴黎（凡尔赛宫探访法国路易王朝的古典奢华）
timeline.description_en: In the morning you head to the Palace of Versailles in the southwestern suburbs of Paris, the lavish monument of France's monarchy that served not only as the royal court but as the nation's administrative center; the visit lasts about 1.5 hours. In the afternoon you return to central Paris and head to the fashion district around Boulevard Haussmann and the Rue Royale, with free time of about 3 hours to stroll past the Palais Garnier / Paris Opera (exterior) and to browse the Printemps and Galeries Lafayette department stores and the surrounding stylish streets. Overnight at Mercure Paris or Novotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel. Note: if Versailles has fewer than 3 guests there is no official in-palace guide, and an audio guide is provided instead.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往位于巴黎西南郊区的凡尔赛宫，它是法国封建统治时期一座华丽的纪念碑，不仅是法兰西宫廷，也是国家的行政中心，游览约1.5小时。下午返回巴黎市区，前往时尚中心奥斯曼大街和皇家大道，约3小时自由活动，参观巴黎歌剧院（外观）及春天百货、巴黎老佛爷等时尚街区，感受世界时尚潮流与橱窗艺术。夜宿巴黎美居酒店或诺富特酒店或同等4星级酒店。提示：凡尔赛宫不足3人时无官方馆内讲解，由讲解器代替。

timeline.title_en: Paris - Dijon (a life of red wine and roses; overnight in a Burgundy château hotel)
timeline.title_zh: 巴黎 - 第戎（充满红酒和玫瑰的人生，入住勃艮第古堡酒店）
timeline.description_en: In the morning you travel to Dijon, capital of Burgundy and a celebrated French gastronomic city famed for red wine, snails, rose mustard and white cattle. You visit the old town of Dijon (about 1 hour), with its many surviving historic buildings, palaces, churches and timber-framed houses, and Dijon's 13th-century Gothic Notre-Dame de Dijon church (about 15 minutes). After lunch you continue into the Burgundy wine region to a winery in the Romanée-Conti area, touring the courtyard, production workshop, vineyards and cellars, where a sommelier explains the wine and pours three to five tastings of red and white wine. Overnight at a Burgundy château hotel, or the Oceania hotel in central Dijon, or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往法国著名的美食之都、勃艮第首府第戎，这里是红酒、蜗牛、玫瑰芥末及白牛的原产地。游览第戎老城（约1小时），城内仍散布着不同时期的历史建筑、宫殿、教堂与古朴的木框架房屋，并参观13世纪哥特式的第戎圣母院（约15分钟）。午餐后前往勃艮第大区葡萄酒产区，参观位于罗曼尼·康帝（La Romanée-Conti）产区的酒庄，游览酒庄的庭院、生产工坊、葡萄园及酒窖，由专业侍酒师讲解并提供三到五杯红酒及白酒的品鉴。夜宿勃艮第古堡酒店，或第戎市区大洋洲酒店，或市区同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Dijon - Colmar - Zurich (a romantic fairy-tale town and an international financial metropolis)
timeline.title_zh: 第戎 - 科尔马 - 苏黎世（浪漫的童话小镇与国际金融大都会）
timeline.description_en: In the morning you visit Colmar, one of France's most romantic fairy-tale towns, the visual inspiration for Miyazaki's "Howl's Moving Castle" and a filming location for the Chinese show "Chinese Restaurant 2"; with the Ill river winding through, you tour the beautiful old town (about 1 hour) and its landmark Maison des Têtes, a 1609 Renaissance building whose façade is carved with 105 expressive faces. In the afternoon you continue to Zurich, touring the old town (about 1 hour) with its craftsmen, antique dealers, bookshops and jewelers, the twin-towered Grossmünster / Zurich Cathedral (exterior), Lake Zurich, and the famous Bahnhofstrasse, one of the world's most expensive shopping avenues lined with luxury brands and private banks. Overnight at the Crowne Plaza Zurich or the Fassbind hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往法国最浪漫、最童话般的小镇之一科尔马，这里是宫崎骏电影《哈尔的移动城堡》的原型及《中餐厅2》的实景拍摄地，伊尔河从小城静静淌过；游览美丽的科尔马老城区（约1小时）和地标人头屋（Maison des Têtes），这座建于1609年的文艺复兴建筑正面雕刻着105颗表情各异的人面头像。下午出发前往苏黎世，游览苏黎世老城区（约1小时），这里汇聚传统工匠、古董商、书店和珠宝店，还有双塔耸立的苏黎世大教堂（外观）、苏黎世湖以及云集世界奢侈品牌和私人银行、被誉为世界上昂贵购物大道之一的班霍夫大街。夜宿苏黎世皇冠假日酒店或法斯宾德酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Zurich - Jungfrau - Interlaken (Jungfrau panoramic cable cars up to the Sphinx Observatory)
timeline.title_zh: 苏黎世 - 少女峰 - 因特拉肯（少女峰全景缆车登顶斯芬克斯观景台）
timeline.description_en: In the morning you visit the alpine village of Grindelwald at the foot of the Eiger, home to the photographers' beloved Swiss "dream slope," then ride cable cars up to the Jungfrau (4,158 m), the "roof of the Alps," listed as a UNESCO World Natural Heritage site in 2001. At the Sphinx Observatory (3,571 m) you look out over the spectacular 23.6 km Aletsch Glacier, the largest in the Alps, and on clear days as far as the Vosges in France and Germany's Black Forest. Afterwards you descend to Interlaken, the "town between the lakes" set between Lake Thun and Lake Brienz, with free time to explore Höheweg street and the Höhematte green, a former monastery garden kept free of buildings and a prime spot for viewing the Jungfrau. Overnight at the Sigriswil snow-mountain lake-view hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往参观位于艾格峰北麓脚下的格林德尔瓦尔德小镇，这里有摄影家心头最爱的瑞士“梦幻山坡”著名明信片拍摄地，之后乘坐缆车登顶阿尔卑斯山著名风景区——海拔4158米的少女峰（2001年被列为世界自然遗产）。在海拔3571米的斯芬克斯观景台俯瞰长达23.6公里、阿尔卑斯山最壮丽的阿莱奇冰川，天气晴朗时甚至能远眺法国浮日山脉和德国黑森林。之后前往位于图恩湖与布里恩茨湖之间、又名“湖间镇”的因特拉肯，自由游览何维克街和荷黑马特绿地广场——这片昔日修道院庭园现禁止兴建任何建筑，是眺望少女峰的好场所。夜宿锡格里斯维尔雪山湖景酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Interlaken - Lungern - Lucerne - Milan (the GoldenPass train through Switzerland's picture-perfect scenery)
timeline.title_zh: 因特拉肯 - 龙疆 - 卢塞恩 - 米兰（乘坐金色山口列车，尽览瑞士如画风景）
timeline.description_en: In the morning you head to Lungern, a tranquil village set among Switzerland's purest alpine lake water, to enjoy Lake Lungern and the village scenery, then board the GoldenPass panoramic train for the roughly 1-hour Lungern-Lucerne stretch, riding through the Alps past lakes, snow-capped peaks and red-roofed villages behind huge panoramic windows. In the afternoon you tour Lucerne (about 2.5 hours) and the lake's scenery, hearing the story of Swiss loyalty told by the Lion Monument (the dying lion carved into the rock in 1821 to honor the 786 Swiss Guards who died defending Louis XVI's family at the Tuileries in 1792), and seeing the Chapel Bridge (Kapellbrücke) and the octagonal Water Tower. Afterwards you continue to the fashion capital, Milan. Overnight at the UNA hotel Milan or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往龙疆，这里拥有瑞士最纯净的高山湖水，群山环抱、古朴的村庄散落于龙疆湖畔，游览龙疆湖及小镇风光，之后乘坐金色山口观光列车前往卢塞恩（龙疆—卢塞恩段，约1小时车程），透过全景大玻璃窗一路穿山越岭，饱览湖泊、雪山和红瓦彩屋。下午游览卢塞恩（约2.5小时）及卢塞恩湖的湖光山色，聆听狮子纪念碑讲述的瑞士忠勇历史（这座1821年雕刻在天然岩石上的濒死雄狮，纪念1792年为保护巴黎杜乐丽宫中路易十六家族而全部战死的786名瑞士雇佣兵），并参观卡贝尔廊桥和八角形水塔。之后前往时尚之都米兰。夜宿米兰UNA酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Milan - Venice (the exquisite Gothic cathedral that took 500 years to build)
timeline.title_zh: 米兰 - 威尼斯（瞻仰历经500年建成的哥特式精美建筑）
timeline.description_en: In the morning you visit the Sforza Castle (exterior), Milan's medieval-to-Renaissance fortress and later residence of the Sforza family, now housing the city's museums (about 20 minutes). You then see Milan's landmark Duomo / Milan Cathedral (exterior), a Gothic masterpiece begun in 1386 that took 500 years to complete, crowned with 135 spires and over 6,000 marble statues (about 25 minutes). Nearby you visit the Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II, one of Europe's most beautiful shopping arcades, home to a flagship Prada boutique and elegant cafés and restaurants (about 30 minutes). In the afternoon you depart for Venice. Overnight at the voco Venezia / Hilton Garden Inn Venice Mestre San Giuliano or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往参观米兰中世纪到文艺复兴时期的堡垒——斯福尔扎城堡（外观），它是米兰最重要的建筑之一，见证了斯福尔扎家族的兴衰，现被辟为博物馆（约20分钟）。之后参观米兰的标志性建筑米兰大教堂（外观），这座始建于1386年、历经500年才完工的哥特式建筑共有135座尖塔、6000多座大理石雕像（约25分钟）。随后游览欧洲最漂亮的商业拱廊之一埃马努埃莱二世拱廊，内有Prada精品店及众多高级餐馆、咖啡厅和商店（约30分钟）。下午出发前往威尼斯。夜宿威尼斯洲际VOCO酒店或希尔顿大使酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Venice - Tuscany (romantic Venice on the gentle waves; overnight in a 5-star hotel)
timeline.title_zh: 威尼斯 - 托斯卡纳（温柔碧波上浪漫的威尼斯，入住五星酒店）
timeline.description_en: In the morning you have free time to explore Venice, the "Pearl of the Adriatic," built across 118 islands linked by 177 canals and 401 bridges. You see St. Mark's Square, called by Napoleon "the most beautiful drawing room in Europe" (about 20 minutes); St. Mark's Basilica (exterior), begun in 829 AD and a masterpiece of Venetian architecture (about 15 minutes); the Bridge of Sighs (exterior), the early-Baroque covered bridge that condemned prisoners once crossed from the Doge's court to the prison (about 10 minutes); and the magnificent Doge's Palace (exterior) on Piazza San Marco (about 15 minutes). Afterwards you transfer to a 5-star hotel in the Tuscany region. Overnight at the Montecatini Terme spa hotel in Tuscany or an equivalent 5-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午自由参观威尼斯，这座“亚得里亚海明珠”由118个小岛组成，以177条水道、401座桥梁连成一体。游览被拿破仑称作“欧洲美丽的客厅”的圣马可广场（约20分钟）；始建于公元829年、为威尼斯建筑艺术经典之作的圣马可大教堂（外观，约15分钟）；古代由法院向监狱押送死囚必经、早期巴洛克风格的叹息桥（外观，约10分钟）；以及位于圣马可广场上、华丽的总督宫（外观，约15分钟）。之后入住托斯卡纳地区五星酒店。夜宿托斯卡纳蒙特卡蒂尼SPA酒店或同等5星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Tuscany - Cinque Terre - Pisa (admiring the beauty of the Cinque Terre)
timeline.title_zh: 托斯卡纳 - 五渔村 - 比萨（鉴赏五渔村美景）
timeline.description_en: In the morning you set out for the Cinque Terre along the Ligurian coast, visiting the five beautiful cliffside fishing villages: Monterosso al Mare, Vernazza, Corniglia, Manarola and Riomaggiore, a UNESCO World Cultural Heritage site since 1997 famed for one of the world's most beautiful coastal hiking trails (about 2 hours). In the afternoon you go to Pisa to see the Leaning Tower of Pisa (exterior), the freestanding bell tower where Galileo is said to have performed his free-fall experiment in 1590 (about 20 minutes), and the Piazza dei Miracoli (Square of Miracles) at the heart of Pisa's historic center, which holds the cathedral, the baptistery, the Leaning Tower and the cemetery (about 30 minutes). Overnight at the Montecatini Terme spa hotel in Tuscany or an equivalent 5-star hotel. Note: if bad weather or a railway strike prevents visiting the Cinque Terre, the itinerary automatically switches to touring the coastal towns by coach or another means.
timeline.description_zh: 上午出发前往五渔村，沿利古里亚海岸线游览悬崖上的五座美丽渔村——蒙特罗索（Monterosso al Mare）、韦尔纳扎（Vernazza）、科尔尼利亚（Corniglia）、马纳罗拉（Manarola）及里奥马焦雷（Riomaggiore），1997年被联合国教科文组织列入世界文化遗产名录，串起五村的徒步线路被誉为世界上美丽的徒步路线之一（约2小时）。下午前往比萨，游览比萨斜塔（外观，相传1590年伽利略曾在此做自由落体实验，约20分钟）和比萨历史文化中心的奇迹广场（Piazza dei Miracoli，含大教堂、洗礼堂、斜塔、墓园，约30分钟）。夜宿托斯卡纳蒙特卡蒂尼SPA酒店或同等5星级酒店。备注：如遇恶劣天气或铁路公司罢工等因素导致无法游览五渔村，行程将自动改为乘坐大巴车或其它形式游览海岸线城市。

timeline.title_en: Pisa - Florence - Rome (an artistic feast in the treasure house of the Renaissance)
timeline.title_zh: 比萨 - 佛罗伦萨 - 罗马（文艺复兴宝库的艺术盛宴）
timeline.description_en: In the morning you tour Florence, the birthplace of the Renaissance, visiting the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore (the "Cathedral of the Flower"), the world's third-largest cathedral, faced in white, red and green marble and 175 years in the building (about 25 minutes). You then see the Piazza della Signoria, an open-air sculpture gallery and the city's center of political life with the Palazzo Vecchio, a replica of Michelangelo's David and the Neptune Fountain (about 20 minutes); the Ponte Vecchio over the Arno, built in 1345 and one of Europe's earliest large-span arch bridges (about 10 minutes); and Piazza Santa Croce with the Basilica of Santa Croce (exterior), resting place of Michelangelo and Galileo (about 30 minutes). In the afternoon you continue to Rome and check in to rest. Overnight at the San Martino hotel or the Hotel Moderno in Rome or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午出发游览佛罗伦萨，这座世界艺术之都、文艺复兴的发源地，参观世界第三大教堂——使用白、红、绿三色花岗岩贴面、花费175年才建成的圣母百花大教堂（约25分钟）。随后游览有露天雕塑博物馆美誉的市政广场，广场上坐落着维琪奥宫（旧宫）、米开朗基罗《大卫》雕塑复制品及海神喷泉（约20分钟）；建于1345年、欧洲较早的大跨度圆弧拱桥维奇奥桥（老桥，约10分钟）；以及聖十字广场和米开朗基罗与伽利略安息地——哥特式的圣十字教堂（外观，约30分钟）。下午前往罗马，到达后入住酒店休息。夜宿罗马圣马丁酒店或现代酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Rome (reliving the glory of ancient Rome, the "city of all cities")
timeline.title_zh: 罗马（重温“万城之城”古罗马帝国的辉煌）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast you tour Rome, the "Eternal City" and cradle of the Roman Empire. You see the Colosseum (exterior), the vast and majestic ancient arena built for gladiatorial games (about 30 minutes); the Pantheon (exterior), one of the best-preserved ancient Roman buildings at over 2,000 years old, praised by Michelangelo as "the design of angels" (about 20 minutes); the Spanish Steps / Piazza di Spagna, made famous by the film "Roman Holiday," with 138 steps, the widest in Europe (about 20 minutes); and the Trevi Fountain (exterior), the "wishing fountain" where a coin tossed over the shoulder is said to make wishes come true (about 15 minutes). The trip then concludes. Note: Rome's main old-town sights all lie within the vehicle-restricted zone (ZTL); the day is on foot, about 5 km round trip, so wear light, comfortable shoes. No hotel on this final day.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后开始游览世界著名的历史文化名城罗马，这里是古罗马帝国的发祥地，因历史悠久而被称为“永恒之城”。参观矗立在罗马古都遗址上的斗兽场（外观，古罗马观看斗兽角斗之地，约30分钟）、距今2000多年、被米开朗基罗赞叹为“天使的设计”的万神殿（外观，约20分钟），游览因电影《罗马假日》而闻名、拥有欧洲最宽138级台阶的西班牙广场（约20分钟），以及又称“许愿池”的特莱维喷泉（外观，约15分钟），随后结束美好行程。提示：罗马古城区内主要景点均在车辆禁行区（ZTL）内，当天为步行游览，往返约5公里，请穿着轻便舒适的鞋。最后一天不含住宿。

meeting_en: Paris, France. The tour begins in central Paris (city-centre 4-star hotel); pickup and exact start details are confirmed in your departure notice.
meeting_zh: 法国巴黎。行程从巴黎市中心开始（市中心四星级酒店），具体接团及出发安排以出团通知书为准。

faqs.question_en: Where and how does the group meet and disperse?
faqs.question_zh: 集合及集散地点和方法是怎样的？
faqs.answer_en: Departing from Paris: on Day 1 make your own way to Piazza d'Italia (Place d'Italie) in the 13th arrondissement of Paris to meet at 09:00; on Day 11 the group disperses in central Rome around 14:00. These are reference times — the final times are stated in the departure notice. This product does NOT recommend a flight that lands in Paris on the morning of the meeting day; on the last day you may book an evening flight out of Rome.
faqs.answer_zh: 巴黎出发：行程第1天自行前往巴黎13区意大利广场09:00集合；行程第11天14:00左右在罗马市区解散。以上为参考时间，具体以出团通知书时间为准。本产品不推荐参团当天早上才降落巴黎的航班！结束当天可预订晚上的航班离开罗马。

faqs.question_en: Can I visit both Mount Titlis and the Jungfrau on the same trip?
faqs.question_zh: 铁力士雪山和少女峰雪山可以同时游览吗？
faqs.answer_en: No. Mount Titlis and the Jungfrau belong to different departure schedules and cannot be visited on the same tour. Please check the specific itinerary based on your travel dates.
faqs.answer_zh: 不可以。铁力士雪山和少女峰雪山的游览分别属于不同的团期，不能同时游览，建议您根据自己的出行时间查看具体行程。

faqs.question_en: What does the Rome-departure itinerary look like, and do the sights or hotel standards change?
faqs.question_zh: 部分团期从罗马出发的行程是什么？景点和酒店标准是否有变化？
faqs.answer_en: For Rome-departure dates the route runs in reverse: Day 1 Rome; Day 2 Rome-Florence-Pisa; Day 3 Pisa-Cinque Terre-Tuscany; Day 4 Tuscany-Venice; Day 5 Venice-Milan; Day 6 Milan-Lucerne-Lungern-Interlaken; Day 7 Interlaken-Jungfrau-Zurich; Day 8 Zurich-Colmar-Dijon; Day 9 Dijon-Paris; Day 10 Paris (joining the local Paris tour); Day 11 Paris (joining the local Paris tour). The sights and hotel standards are identical to the Paris-departure itinerary — there is no change. Final details follow the departure notice.
faqs.answer_zh: 从罗马出发的团期，实际行程是把展示行程反过来执行：第1天罗马；第2天罗马-佛罗伦萨-比萨；第3天比萨-五渔村-托斯卡纳；第4天托斯卡纳-威尼斯；第5天威尼斯-米兰；第6天米兰-卢塞恩-龙疆-因特拉肯；第7天因特拉肯-少女峰-苏黎世；第8天苏黎世-科尔马-第戎；第9天第戎-巴黎；第10天巴黎（参加巴黎当地游团）；第11天巴黎（参加巴黎当地游团）。罗马出发团期的景点和酒店标准与巴黎出发的行程一致，没有变化，具体参见出团通知。

faqs.question_en: What's the difference between the 9-day and 11-day France-Italy-Switzerland group tours?
faqs.question_zh: 【法意瑞跟团游】9天和11天的行程有什么区别？
faqs.answer_en: (a) The 11-day itinerary adds a 2-day in-depth Paris "two-palaces" tour on top of the 9-day itinerary. (b) The 9-day and 11-day departure dates differ depending on whether the local Paris sightseeing is chosen — please refer to each product's own listing. (c) You can flexibly choose whichever product better suits your schedule and time. (d) Note: other guests joining locally may take part in the itinerary.
faqs.answer_zh: a. 11天行程在9天行程的基础上增加了巴黎两天两宫深度游团；b. 9天和11天的行程团期根据是否选择巴黎当地游览而有差异，请以各自的产品展示为准；c. 游客可根据自身行程和时间安排，灵活选择更适合的产品；d. 注意：行程中可能有当地参团的其他客人参加进来。

faqs.question_en: Why is the connection between the 9-day France-Italy-Switzerland boutique small group and the 2-day Paris-only tour described as "seamless"?
faqs.question_zh: 为什么法意瑞9天精品小团和巴黎一地两天团为“无感衔接”？
faqs.answer_en: This product already uses the 9-day boutique group's last-night hotel as the starting hotel for the next day's tour, and you stay in the same hotel when the trip ends on Day 11 — so it feels as if you never changed groups. However, some fellow travelers may finish their trip on Day 9, or new travelers may join the itinerary.
faqs.answer_zh: 该产品已经把9天精品小团结束日的“当晚酒店”作为次日旅游团开始的酒店，而在第11天结束旅行时入住相同酒店，完全没有更换旅游团的感觉。但是，可能有同团的其他旅客到第9天结束行程，或者有新的游客加入到行程内。

faqs.question_en: Can I spend an extra day in Paris for a more in-depth visit, or for a convenient connecting hotel before the tour?
faqs.question_zh: 我能否在巴黎多玩一天，在11天基础上更深度游览巴黎，或方便参团前的衔接酒店？
faqs.answer_en: Yes. You can select an optional add-on: the pre-tour/post-tour Paris extended one-day package (hotel included).
faqs.answer_zh: 可以选择自费项目，即巴黎团前/团后延续一日游套餐（含酒店）。

faqs.question_en: Can the itinerary include airport transfers between the Paris/Rome start point and the hotel?
faqs.question_zh: 行程内是否能包含巴黎/罗马起始点到酒店的接送机？
faqs.answer_en: Yes. You can choose the Paris or Rome airport transfer service, where a Chinese-speaking driver-guide will take you to your hotel. Note that the private-car service costs a little more than a taxi.
faqs.answer_zh: 可以选择巴黎、罗马机场接送服务，将由中文司机导游把您送到入住的酒店。但是，专车服务的价格略高于出租车。

faqs.question_en: There are no vehicles in central Rome — how do I sightsee on my own?
faqs.question_zh: 罗马市区内无车辆，我该如何自行游览罗马？
faqs.answer_en: Rome's sights are concentrated in the old town (a heritage-protected vehicle-restricted area) and the hotel is well placed for walking. From the hotel you walk to: Santa Maria Maggiore (Basilica, 5-10 min), the Colosseum (10-15 min), the Mouth of Truth (20-25 min), the Trevi Fountain (15-20 min) and the Spanish Steps (5-10 min), then return to the hotel (20-25 min). Skipping the Mouth of Truth saves about 35 minutes of walking (about 2 km).
faqs.answer_zh: 由于罗马的景点比较集中，几乎所有景点都位于罗马古城区（历史保护区车辆限行），酒店位置方便步行。当天从酒店步行前往圣母大殿（步行5-10分钟）、斗兽场（步行10-15分钟）、真理之口（步行20-25分钟）、许愿池（步行15-20分钟）、西班牙广场（步行5-10分钟），随后返回酒店（步行20-25分钟）。如果不游览真理之口，可减少约35分钟步行时间（约2公里）。

faqs.question_en: Can I take a vehicle in Rome?
faqs.question_zh: 我可以在罗马乘坐车辆吗？
faqs.answer_en: All tour groups sightsee on foot inside Rome's old town, but you may take the metro or a taxi from the last stop back to the hotel (about 8-10 EUR). Since the sights are close together and the route is lined with ancient Roman ruins and shopping districts, walking between sights is recommended.
faqs.answer_zh: 所有旅行团在罗马古城区内都是步行游览，但可以乘坐地铁或出租车从最后一站返回酒店，约8-10欧元。由于各个景点相邻较近，且沿途都是古罗马的历史遗迹和各种商业街区，因此建议在各个景点间徒步游览。

faqs.question_en: Do I need a visa?
faqs.question_zh: 是否需要签证？
faqs.answer_en: Yes. This product does NOT include the visa fee — you need a Schengen visa (single or multiple entry); if you need help applying, choose a Schengen-visa product. A "worry-free visa" guarantee applies: if you sign your travel contract with us at least 61 days before departure and still have not obtained the visa within 45 days before departure, we bear all losses and immediately refund your full travel cost (travelers not meeting this clause are refunded per the change-and-cancellation terms). A rejection must be reported to us within 48 hours with the consulate's rejection letter; supplementary/changed materials must be submitted within 5 days, and you may not unilaterally waive the "visa defense" right. After booking we provide all Schengen-visa application materials for free, and if you entrust us with the visa we purchase a Schengen-compliant travel insurance for you. Your passport must be valid for at least 6 months from the date of departure, or customs may refuse entry. The visa fee, visa service fee, Schengen insurance fee and visa-center appointment fee are all non-refundable and non-transferable, even if the product is changed or cancelled.
faqs.answer_zh: 需要。本产品不包含签证费用，需办理申根签证（单次或多次入境）；如需办理请选择申根签证产品。保签无忧：游客在出发日前61天与我社签约的旅游产品，如在出发前45天内未获取签证，我社承担所有损失，立即退还游客全部旅游费用（不符合该条款的游客如未正常获取签证，将按“退改与取消条款”退费）。如遇拒签需在48小时内通知我社并出具使领馆拒签函，补充或更改材料需在五天内提交，且不得单方面放弃“签证抗辩”权利。预订后免费提供办理申根签证的全部材料；如委托我社办理签证，我社为您购买符合申根要求的申根旅游保险。护照有效期需在离境之日起至少还有六个月，否则海关有权拒绝入境。签证费、签证服务费、申根保险费、签证中心预约费均不可退款，也无法更改使用者，即使产品退改签亦然。

faqs.question_en: Booking, changes & cancellation
faqs.question_zh: 预订、变更与取消须知
faqs.answer_en: Free cancellation: both the agency and the traveler may cancel without reason more than 30 days before departure (Day 30 not included). Departure / group size: this is a shared (join-in) group tour with 10 people required to confirm departure; if the minimum is not reached more than 30 days before departure either side may cancel without liability. Connecting timing: because of frequent flight changes, traffic, ferry cancellations and strikes, the itinerary order may shift — you must arrive at the meeting point one day before the tour starts and leave the dispersal point one day after it ends, allowing at least 5 hours for a same-airport connection and 7 hours for a different-airport connection in the same city (reasonable meet/disperse window 07:00-21:00); losses from not doing so are the traveler's own. Rooms: a double room is auto-assigned for two people booking together with the bed type set by the hotel (not selectable); solo travelers pay a single supplement unless room-sharing; a triple/family room (2 adults + 1 minor) has bed types set by the hotel. Listed hotels are preferred; if full, a same-star equivalent is substituted without further notice. Hotels: all European hotels are non-smoking, no cooking in rooms, no free toiletries or boiling water; check-in 14:00, check-out 11:00; air-conditioning is not a standard fitting. Pricing: all prices are quoted in EUR at the time of booking; if you pay in CNY, the amount is the real-time CNY figure auto-calculated from the Bank of China "EUR sell" rate on the day of payment (refunds use the same-day rate; exchange differences and bank fees are borne by the traveler). Itinerary contingencies: the Louvre is name-registered (enter names correctly); if Louvre/Versailles in-museum guiding is restricted the 20 EUR per-person guide fee is refunded and Versailles uses an audio guide if under 3 people; hotels may shift if a Milan convention is on; and the Cinque Terre may visit only selected villages, switching to coach/coastal-town touring in bad weather or a rail strike. Activity costs are calculated on a year-round average, so no fee is refundable for special-needs travelers.
faqs.answer_zh: 免费取消：出发前30天（不含第30天）旅行社和旅行者均有权申请无理由取消。成团/团期：本产品为散客拼团，成团人数为10人，出发前30天（不含第30天）未达成团人数双方均可解约且不承担违约责任。衔接时间：因航变、交通拥堵、渡轮取消、罢工等行程顺序可能调整，要求旅游者在参团日前一天到达集合地、离团日后一天离开集散地，同机场转机至少预留5小时、同城不同机场至少预留7小时（合理集散时段07:00-21:00），未遵守导致的损失自行承担。房型：两人同时报名默认入住标准双人间，床型由酒店安排不可选；单人报名默认含单人房差，可申请拼房；三人家庭间默认两位父母+一位未成年儿童，床型由酒店安排。行程内列明酒店为优先入住，如订满则换同星级相近酒店，不再另行通知。酒店：欧洲酒店全部禁烟、禁止房内做饭、不提供一次性洗漱用品及免费开水，入住14:00、退房11:00，空调并非标准设施。价格：所有定价以欧元为预订计价单位，如选择人民币支付，则以支付当天中国银行实时“欧元卖出价”自动计算的人民币价格为准（退款同样适用申请当日即时汇率，汇差及银行手续费由旅行者承担）。行程应急：卢浮宫为实名制，请正确填写姓名；若卢浮宫/凡尔赛馆内讲解受限，退还每人20欧元讲解费，凡尔赛不足3人由讲解器代替；如遇米兰会议酒店位置可能调整；五渔村因体力和时间只安排个别村庄，遇恶劣天气或铁路罢工将改为大巴或其他形式游览海岸线。本产品所含活动按全年平均成本计算，特殊人群并无费用可退。

faqs.question_en: Health & safety requirements
faqs.question_zh: 健康与安全须知
faqs.answer_en: Please have a health check before departure. Do NOT join if you have: infectious diseases (e.g. active tuberculosis, typhoid); cardiovascular disease (e.g. severe hypertension, heart failure, myocardial ischemia/infarction); cerebrovascular disease (e.g. cerebral embolism, hemorrhage, brain tumor); respiratory disease (e.g. emphysema, cor pulmonale); psychiatric illness (e.g. epilepsy, mental disorders); severe anemia (hemoglobin below 50 g/L); or are recovering from major/medium surgery. Pregnancy: at 35 weeks or more you cannot join under any circumstances; at 28 weeks or more you must provide a doctor's exam report (within 7 days) and the attending physician's consent; under 28 weeks, join with caution, sign the agency's liability waiver, and you cannot take part in any adventure, ski, sailing, high-altitude or outdoor activities. Disabled travelers: provide a doctor's report (within 7 days) and physician's consent, be accompanied by an immediate family member, and apply for a reserved place and special facilities at least 61 days ahead. Elderly travelers (over 70): provide a health certificate and physical-exam report and be accompanied by an immediate family member (or sign the liability waiver); the trip is long and physically demanding, so those lacking stamina should reconsider. Minors (under 18): must be accompanied by an immediate relative or guardian; without parents, an under-18 needs both parents' authorization letter (or the other parent's written authorization if traveling with one parent); some sights have rules for under-18 / under-12 / under-6; infants under 6 / children under 30 kg need a confirmed safety seat; and infants under 2 are not accepted on this product. Per Article 15 of the Tourism Law and the Infectious Disease Prevention Law (2025 revision), travelers must truthfully declare health information relevant to the trip (pregnancy, lactation, chronic illness, infectious-disease history, suspected symptoms, recent epidemic-area travel); concealment that causes harm makes the traveler liable, and the agency may terminate the contract without refund.
faqs.answer_zh: 请在出行前做一次必要的身体检查。如存在下列情况，请勿报名：传染性疾病患者（如活动期肺结核、伤寒）；心血管疾病患者（如严重高血压、心功能不全、心肌缺氧、心肌梗塞）；脑血管疾病患者（如脑栓塞、脑出血、脑肿瘤）；呼吸系统疾病患者（如肺气肿、肺心病）；精神病患者（如癫痫及各种精神病）；严重贫血患者（血红蛋白低于50克/升）；大中型手术恢复期病患者。孕妇：妊娠第35周及以上任何情况下都无法参团；第28周及以上需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书；第28周以下请慎重报名，需签署旅行社免责声明书，且不能参加探险、滑雪、出海、高空、户外等项目。残疾人：需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书，需直系家属陪同，并需提前至少61天申请预留位置及专用设施。老年旅游者（70周岁以上）：需提供健康证明、体检报告并由直系家属陪同（否则需签署免责声明书）；本行程较长、对体力要求较高，体力不支者请慎重报名。未成年人（未满18周岁）：须由直系亲属或监护人陪同；无父母陪同需持父母双方授权书（仅一方陪同需另一方书面授权）；部分景点对未满18/12/6周岁有特殊限定；6岁以下婴儿或30公斤以下儿童需提前确认安全座椅；本产品不接受2周岁以下婴儿参团。根据《旅游法》第15条及《传染病防治法》（2025修订），旅游者需如实告知与旅游活动相关的个人健康信息（含妊娠期、哺乳期、慢性病、传染病史、疑似症状或近期疫区旅居史）并遵守安全警示规定；若因隐瞒导致人身或财产损害，旅游者自行承担责任，旅行社可解除合同且不退还费用。

title_en: France, Switzerland & Italy 11-Day Group Tour (Paris to Rome One-Way)
title_zh: 法意瑞11天跟团游（巴黎至罗马单程深度线路）
short_en: Cross France, Switzerland and Italy in one deep 11-day journey from Paris to Rome, with the Louvre, the Alps, Venice, Florence and the Eternal City.
short_zh: 11天单程深度穿越法、瑞、意三国，从巴黎到罗马，遍览卢浮宫、阿尔卑斯山、威尼斯、佛罗伦萨与永恒之城。
desc_en: This 11-day one-way tour traces a deep route from Paris to Rome, crossing France, Switzerland and Italy without doubling back, so coach mileage stays low and every day reveals a new city. Begin with curated Louvre and Versailles masterpiece talks in Paris, follow the Alps through Geneva, Interlaken, Lucerne and Zurich, then journey south through Milan, Venice, Florence, the Cinque Terre and Tuscany before finishing in ancient Rome. The trip pairs five in-depth history talks and four city walks with comfortable city-centre 4-star hotels, all taxes included and no hidden fees.
desc_zh: 这条11天单程线路从巴黎一路深入至罗马，贯穿法国、瑞士、意大利三国，全程不走回头路，大幅降低大巴行车里程，每天游览一座新城市。行程以巴黎卢浮宫与凡尔赛宫的主题精讲开篇，沿阿尔卑斯山穿越日内瓦、因特拉肯、卢塞恩与苏黎世，再南下米兰、威尼斯、佛罗伦萨、五渔村与托斯卡纳，最终抵达古老的罗马。全程包含5场深度历史讲解与4场城市漫步，入住市中心舒适四星酒店，各项税费一价全含，绝无隐藏费用。

highlights.en: Curated Louvre masterpiece talk by a national-museum guide and an in-depth visit to the Palace of Versailles
highlights.zh: 国家博物馆讲解师精讲卢浮宫杰作，深度游览巴洛克圣殿凡尔赛宫

highlights.en: Seine River cruise past Notre-Dame, the Eiffel Tower and Paris's most romantic landmarks
highlights.zh: 乘塞纳河游船，饱览巴黎圣母院、埃菲尔铁塔等浪漫地标

highlights.en: Alpine highlights across Switzerland: Geneva, the Jungfrau region, fairy-tale Iseltwald, Lucerne and Zurich
highlights.zh: 穿越瑞士阿尔卑斯精华：日内瓦、少女峰地区、童话小镇龙疆、卢塞恩与苏黎世

highlights.en: Italy a city a day: Milan's Duomo, romantic Venice, Renaissance Florence and the colourful Cinque Terre
highlights.zh: 意大利每天一城：米兰大教堂、浪漫水城威尼斯、文艺复兴佛罗伦萨与五彩五渔村

highlights.en: Tuscan scenery through Siena, Pienza and the cypress-lined lanes of the Val d'Orcia
highlights.zh: 穿行托斯卡纳：锡耶纳、皮恩扎与奥尔恰谷的丝柏树小径

highlights.en: Ancient Rome on foot — the Colosseum, Pantheon, Spanish Steps and Trevi Fountain
highlights.zh: 徒步探访古罗马：斗兽场、万神殿、西班牙广场与特莱维喷泉

highlights.en: One-way deep route Paris to Rome — no backtracking, less coach time, more sightseeing
highlights.zh: 巴黎罗马两点进出单程深度线路——不走回头路，行车更少，游览更深

highlights.en: Intercity transport, city-centre 4-star hotels and all taxes included — no forced shopping, no hidden fees
highlights.zh: 城际交通、市中心四星酒店与各项税费全含——无强制购物，绝无隐藏费用

includes.en: Hotels: 10 nights in 4-star hotels.
includes.zh: 【酒店】：四星级酒店10晚。

includes.en: Meals: 10 meals in total, breakfast in the hotel or other meal arrangements.
includes.zh: 【餐饮】：酒店内早餐或其他形式餐饮共计10餐。

includes.en: Taxes: all taxes within the itinerary, including tourist city tax, city-entry fees, accommodation tax, road and bridge tolls, island-landing fees, etc.
includes.zh: 【税费】：游客城市税、进城费、居住税、路桥费、登岛费等行程内的所有税费。

includes.en: Transport: tourist coach or business travel vehicle.
includes.zh: 【交通】：旅游巴士或者商务旅行车。

includes.en: Guide: professional driver plus Chinese-speaking guide, or a Chinese-speaking driver-guide throughout (note: for groups of 8 or fewer, a business travel vehicle plus a Chinese-speaking driver-guide is arranged to lead the whole city itinerary).
includes.zh: 【导游】：职业司机+中文导游，或者全程中文司机兼导游（备注：8人及以下则安排为商务旅行车+中文司机兼导游，届时将有司兼导带领游览全部城市行程）。

includes.en: Luggage: one 23 kg checked bag plus one carry-on.
includes.zh: 【行李】：1件23公斤行李及1件随身行李。

includes.en: Activities and tickets: Louvre ticket (including national-gallery lecturer), Versailles ticket (including national-gallery lecturer), Seine River cruise, Venice island ferry, and the Cinque Terre scenic train.
includes.zh: 【活动及门票】：卢浮宫门票（含国家馆讲解师）、凡尔赛门票（含国家馆讲解师）、塞纳河游船、威尼斯登岛轮渡、五渔村景观列车。

excludes.en: Passport: personal passport fees.
excludes.zh: 护照：个人护照费用。

excludes.en: Visa: the tourist visa fees required for the countries listed in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 签证：行程中所列旅游国家所需的观光签证费用。

excludes.en: Insurance: travel insurance fees (if the itinerary involves high-risk sports, please confirm whether your travel insurance covers that activity).
excludes.zh: 保险：旅游保险费用（如行程内涉及到高风险运动，请核实旅游保险是否包含该项运动）。

excludes.en: Tips: guide and driver gratuities totaling 10 EUR per person per day, same rate for adults and children.
excludes.zh: 小费：游客支付导游和司机小费一共10欧/人/天，大小同价。

excludes.en: Meals: lunch and dinner main meals are not included in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 餐饮：行程中不包含午、晚正餐费用。

excludes.en: Tickets: attractions not noted as included (including but not limited to sights marked 'exterior', and all 'recommended', 'optional' or 'experience' items not stated as included); if you wish to visit them, please pay on your own.
excludes.zh: 门票：行程中未注明费用包含的景点（包括但不仅限于行程中注明“外观”的景点，以及“推荐”、“可选”、“体验”等所有未提及费用包含的项目，如游客需要参观，敬请自理）。

excludes.en: Extended stays: any accommodation, transport and sightseeing extended beyond the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 延长住宿：行程外额外延长的住宿、交通、观光费用。

excludes.en: Personal spending: drinks, alcohol, taxis, phone charges and other personal expenses.
excludes.zh: 私人消费：如饮料酒类、出租车、电话费等个人消费。

excludes.en: Other transport: transport beyond the included business vehicle or minibus that is not mentioned in the inclusions, e.g. the Venice gondola and, in vehicle-restricted zones, the sightseeing train or electric taxi, to be paid on your own.
excludes.zh: 其他交通：除包含商务旅行车或者中巴之外、费用包含中未提及的其他交通费用，如威尼斯贡多拉，以及车辆限行区的观光火车、电瓶出租车等费用敬请自理。

excludes.en: Free-time activities: guests' own evening sightseeing and the itinerary's recommended items, and any transport, dining, tickets and shopping costs arising from them.
excludes.zh: 自由活动：游客夜间自行游览及行程中的推荐项目，以及产生的交通、餐饮、门票、购物等费用。

excludes.en: Experience activities: all travel experience activities not included in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 体验活动：行程中没有包含的各项旅游体验活动。

excludes.en: Other costs: any costs not mentioned in the inclusions. For extra costs caused by force majeure (natural disaster, war, strike, etc.) or by traffic delays, flight cancellations or time changes, embassy visa delays, insufficient group numbers and other special circumstances or causes not attributable to our company (e.g. overseas visa-extension fees, accommodation/meals/transport, national airfare adjustments), our company reserves the right to charge the difference.
excludes.zh: 其他费用：费用包含中未提及的费用。如因天灾、战争、罢工等不可抗力原因，及因交通延阻、航班取消或更改时间、使馆延误出签证、人数不足等特殊情况或其他非我公司原因所引致的额外费用（如在外延期签证费、住食及交通费、国家航空运价调整等），我公司有权追加差价。

timeline.title_en: Paris - Louvre Museum - Paris (in-depth masterpiece talk on the origins of art)
timeline.title_zh: 巴黎-卢浮宫-巴黎（深度理解艺术的起源，卢浮宫殿杰作精讲）
timeline.description_en: In the morning visit the Louvre Museum, the pride of France, where a French national-gallery lecturer gives an in-depth talk on selected masterpiece themes (standard individual entry tickets, no Chinese audio guide). In the afternoon tour central Paris: Notre-Dame Cathedral, the Ile de la Cite, the Eiffel Tower (exterior) and the Champ de Mars. Then take a Seine River sightseeing cruise aboard the famous glass-roofed 'Bateaux Mouches' (about 3.2 km, roughly 1 hour), passing Notre-Dame, the Grand and Petit Palais (exterior), the Pont Alexandre III, the love-lock bridge, the Louvre and the Champs-Elysees, taking in the Invalides (exterior), the Grand and Petit Palais (exterior) and the Place de la Concorde. Note: in peak season the Louvre may restrict in-gallery lecturers, in which case the 10 EUR per-person guiding fee is refunded; Versailles is replaced by audio guide if fewer than 3 people. Overnight at Mercure Paris or Novotel, or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午参观法兰西引以为傲的卢浮宫博物馆，由法兰西国家馆讲解师精选主题深度讲解（行程含普通散客门票，无中文讲解器）。下午游览巴黎市中心：巴黎圣母院、西岱岛、埃菲尔铁塔（外观）以及战神广场；随后乘坐著名的透明船舱“苍蝇船”塞纳河游船（约3.2公里、约1小时），途经巴黎圣母院、大小皇宫、亚历山大三世大桥、巴黎锁桥、卢浮宫、香榭丽舍大道等景点，并游览荣军院（外观）、大小皇宫（外观）、协和广场等地，感受巴黎的浪漫夜色。提示：旅游旺季卢浮宫可能限制馆内讲解，届时退还每位10欧元讲解费；凡尔赛不足3人则由讲解器代替官导。夜宿巴黎美居酒店或诺富特酒店，或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Paris - Versailles - Paris (Baroque sanctuary of Versailles, plus Paris's fashion and art quarter)
timeline.title_zh: 巴黎-凡尔赛-巴黎（精讲巴洛克圣殿凡尔赛宫，品味巴黎时尚艺术街区）
timeline.description_en: In the morning head to Paris's fashion heart along Boulevard Haussmann and Rue Royale, with free time around the Palais Garnier opera house (exterior), Printemps department store and Galeries Lafayette. The Haussmann quarter is the core of Paris, lined with grand Haussmannian buildings and luxury and private banking; Marcel Proust wrote most of 'In Search of Lost Time' at No. 102 on this street. In the afternoon drive to the southwestern suburbs to tour the Palace of Versailles, a magnificent monument of France's royal era and former administrative center of the state, before returning to your Paris hotel. Overnight at Mercure Paris or Novotel, or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往巴黎时尚中心奥斯曼大街和皇家大道，自由参观巴黎歌剧院（外观）、春天百货及巴黎老佛爷等时尚街区。奥斯曼大街是巴黎的核心区域，拥有华丽的奥斯曼建筑群、繁华商业与浓郁艺术气息，《追忆似水年华》的作者马塞尔·普鲁斯特曾在这条街102号完成大部分写作。下午前往位于巴黎西南部郊区的凡尔赛宫，游览这座法国封建统治时期的华丽纪念碑及当时的国家行政中心，游览后返回巴黎市区送回酒店。夜宿巴黎美居酒店或诺富特酒店，或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Paris - Geneva (Lake Geneva shore, flower clock and the Flower Bridge old town)
timeline.title_zh: 巴黎-日内瓦（游日内瓦湖畔，看花桥横渡古城区）
timeline.description_en: In the morning set off for Geneva, capital of French-speaking Switzerland. On arrival tour Geneva's old town, the Lake Geneva (Lac Leman) waterfront, the Flower Clock and the Jet d'Eau fountain, then explore the 'Flower Bridge' (Pont des Bergues / Iles area) packed with local eateries and specialty shops. Lake Geneva straddles Switzerland and France and the whole lake district is a World Heritage area, with well-preserved medieval towns and fountains; the Jet d'Eau on the lake shoots a 140-meter column of water with a 500-liter flow, visible from far across the city. The old upper town on the Rhone's right bank gathers churches and antique shops, and the home of Enlightenment thinker Rousseau also stands here. Overnight at the Novotel Geneve Centre Gare (Annemasse) or Crowne Plaza, or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午出发前往瑞士法语区首府日内瓦。到达后游览日内瓦老城、日内瓦湖区、花钟和大喷泉，随后游览云集各种当地美食和特色商店的“花桥”区域。日内瓦湖（莱芒湖）横跨瑞士和法国，整个湖区被列为世界遗产，沿岸有保存完好的中世纪小城与众多喷泉；湖面上的大喷泉高达140米、喷水量500公升，从市中心很远就能看见。隆河右岸山坡上的旧城（上城）是教堂、古迹与古董商店的聚集地，欧洲启蒙时代思想家卢梭的故居也位于此。夜宿安娜玛斯日内瓦港诺富特酒店或皇冠假日酒店，或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Geneva - Interlaken (between Switzerland's 'two lakes', panoramic views of the Jungfrau)
timeline.title_zh: 日内瓦-因特拉肯（行瑞士“两湖”之间，赏“少女峰”全景）
timeline.description_en: In the morning travel to Interlaken, set between Lake Brienz and Lake Thun (the 'left and right eyes of God'). Enjoy free time around Hoheweg and the Hohematte green, or drive into the Jungfrau region around Grindelwald and Wilderswil. There are three optional choices, only one of which may be selected: included Option One is a coach tour of the Grindelwald area and its classic 'dreamy slopes'; Recommended Option One is the Jungfrau panoramic cableway to the summit (230 EUR) via three transfers through Grindelwald, Eiger Glacier and up to the Jungfraujoch 'Top of Europe' (Europe's highest railway station), with the Sphinx Observatory, Ice Palace, plateau viewpoint and Aletsch Glacier; Recommended Option Two is the First-Grindelwald aerial gondola round-trip (70 EUR) to the First summit and the famous First Cliff Walk, with thrill activities such as the First Flyer zipline and First Glider. Overnight at the Sigriswil panoramic mountain-and-lake-view hotel, or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往有“上帝左眼与右眼”之称的布里恩茨湖和图恩湖之间的因特拉肯。可自由游览何维克街、荷黑马特等宁静村庄，或随车前往格林德尔瓦尔德及维尔德斯维尔等少女峰山区景点。推荐项目三选一，不可同时选择两项：包含项目一为乘车游览格林德尔瓦尔德经典瑞士山景——梦幻山坡；推荐项目一为少女峰全景缆车登顶（230欧元），先后换乘3种交通经格林德尔瓦尔德、艾格冰川到达少女峰登顶——Top of Europe欧洲较高的火车站，游览斯芬克斯观景台、水晶宫、高原观景台、阿莱奇冰川冰宫；推荐项目二为菲斯特-格林德尔瓦尔德空中贡多拉往返票（70欧元），直达菲斯特峰巅游览著名的悬崖天梭巅峰栈道，并有高空飞索、神鹰飞梭等惊险刺激的高空活动。夜宿锡格里斯维尔雪山湖景酒店，或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Interlaken - Lucerne - Zurich (the idyllic village of Lungern, a showcase of Swiss lakes and mountains)
timeline.title_zh: 因特拉肯-卢塞恩-苏黎世（世外桃源龙疆镇，瑞士湖光山色代表作）
timeline.description_en: In the morning visit the village of Lungern, taking in Lungern Lake and the village scenery, a tranquil idyll famous as a filming location for the drama 'Crash Landing on You'. Then continue to Lucerne to enjoy the lakes-and-mountains views of Lake Lucerne, see the Lion Monument that tells of Swiss loyalty and courage (a dying lion carved into natural rock in 1821, commemorating the 786 Swiss Guards who died in 1792 protecting Louis XVI at the Tuileries; Mark Twain called it the world's most moving stone), and visit the Chapel Bridge (Kapellbrucke) and its octagonal water tower. Afterwards drive to Zurich. Overnight at the Zurich Limmattal H+ Hotel (Halli area), or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往龙疆小镇，游览龙疆湖及小镇风光——这里是“爱的迫降”大团圆结局的取景地，人间天堂般的湖光山色宛如世外桃源。之后前往卢塞恩，游览卢塞恩湖的湖光山色，听狮子纪念碑讲述瑞士人忠贞坚毅的历史（1821年由丹麦雕塑家在天然岩石上雕刻的濒死雄狮，纪念1792年为保护巴黎杜乐丽宫路易十六家族而全部战死的786名瑞士雇佣兵，马克·吐温誉之为世界上最悲壮感人的雕像），以及卡贝尔廊桥和八角形水塔等景点。之后前往苏黎世。夜宿苏黎世利马塔尔哈利之家酒店，或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Zurich - Milan (along the Alps, from finance capital to fashion capital)
timeline.title_zh: 苏黎世-米兰（沿阿尔卑斯山脉，从金融之都游览时尚之都）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast tour Zurich's old town: the Grossmunster cathedral (exterior), Lake Zurich and Bahnhofstrasse, one of Europe's longest and most expensive shopping avenues, lined with luxury brands and private banks. Then drive to the fashion capital Milan, where you have free time at the city's landmark Milan Cathedral (Duomo) (exterior) - a Gothic masterpiece begun in 1386 and worked on for over five centuries, with hundreds of spires and thousands of marble statues - and at the Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II (exterior), one of Europe's most beautiful shopping arcades, home to a famous Prada boutique. Overnight at the Royal Garden Hotel (Hotel Parco dei Principi style), or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后游览苏黎世老城景点：苏黎世大教堂（外观）、苏黎世湖、班霍夫大街——欧洲较长、世界上最昂贵的购物大道之一，奢侈品牌林立、私人银行云集。之后出发前往时尚之都米兰，到达后自由参观米兰的标志性建筑米兰主教堂（外观）——始建于1386年、历经500多年才建成的哥特式建筑，数以百计的尖塔与数千座白色大理石雕像；以及欧洲漂亮的商业拱廊之一埃马努埃莱二世拱廊（外观），中央拱廊下有著名的Prada精品店。夜宿皇家花园酒店，或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Milan - Venice (the romantic city floating on gentle waters)
timeline.title_zh: 米兰-威尼斯（游览温柔碧波上浪漫的威尼斯）
timeline.description_en: In the morning set off for the water city of Venice. On arrival tour St. Mark's Basilica (exterior), founded in 829 and rebuilt in 1043-1071; St. Mark's Square, which Napoleon called 'the most beautiful drawing room in Europe'; the Bridge of Sighs (exterior), the enclosed early-Baroque bridge over which condemned prisoners once passed from the Doge's Palace to the dungeons; and the magnificent Doge's Palace (exterior). These beautiful structures built upon the water, together with the winding canals, give Venice its lingering romance. Here you can also try the local Venetian set meal of squid-ink pasta in three courses (at your own expense). Overnight at the voco Venezia (InterContinental) or Hilton Garden Inn / Ambassador, or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午出发前往水城威尼斯。到达后参观圣马可大教堂（外观，始建于公元829年、重建于1043至1071年）、圣马可广场（曾被拿破仑称作“欧洲美丽的客厅”）、叹息桥（外观，古代由法院向监狱押送死囚的必经之路，早期巴洛克式封闭桥）以及华丽的总督宫（外观）。这些建造在水上的美丽建筑和蜿蜒的水巷一起，让威尼斯的浪漫风情久久挥之不去。在这里您还可以品尝威尼斯特色大餐墨鱼面三道式（自理）。夜宿威尼斯洲际VOCO酒店或希尔顿大使酒店，或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Venice - Florence (cradle of poetry and the Renaissance, a journey through art)
timeline.title_zh: 威尼斯-佛罗伦萨（诗歌之地，文艺复兴之魂享受艺术之旅）
timeline.description_en: In the morning travel to Florence, birthplace of the Renaissance. Tour the old city's highlights: the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore (the world's third-largest church, queue to enter), faced in white, red and green granite and built over 175 years from 1296; the Piazza della Signoria, an open-air sculpture museum with the Palazzo Vecchio, a copy of Michelangelo's David and the Neptune Fountain; the Ponte Vecchio (Old Bridge) over the Arno, built in 1345, one of Europe's earliest large-span arch bridges and where Dante is said to have met Beatrice; and the Piazza Santa Croce with the Basilica of Santa Croce (exterior), the Gothic church where Michelangelo and Galileo rest. Then check in to your hotel. Overnight at the Hilton Florence Metropole, or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午出发前往文艺复兴的发源地佛罗伦萨。参观老城景点：世界第三大教堂——圣母百花大教堂（需排队进入，使用白、红、绿三色花岗岩贴面，自1296年起花了175年建成）、市政广场（享有露天雕塑博物馆美誉，有维琪奥宫、米开朗基罗《大卫》复制品及海神喷泉）、维奇奥老桥（建于1345年的阿诺河上，是欧洲较早的大跨度圆弧拱桥，相传但丁在此邂逅比阿特丽丝）、圣十字广场及圣十字教堂（外观，是米开朗基罗和伽利略的安息地）。之后入住酒店。夜宿佛罗伦萨希尔顿大都会酒店，或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Florence - Cinque Terre - Pisa - Siena (scenic train through the Cinque Terre)
timeline.title_zh: 佛罗伦萨-五渔村-比萨-锡耶纳（景观列车游览五渔村）
timeline.description_en: In the morning set off for the Cinque Terre, touring the beautiful clifftop fishing villages along the Ligurian coast - Monterosso al Mare, Vernazza, Corniglia, Manarola and Riomaggiore - a UNESCO World Heritage site since 1997 linked by one of the world's most beautiful coastal walking trails. In the afternoon continue to Pisa to see the Leaning Tower of Pisa (exterior), the freestanding bell tower where Galileo is said to have performed his free-fall experiment in 1590, and the Piazza dei Miracoli (Square of Miracles) at the historic-cultural center of Pisa, with its cathedral, baptistery, leaning tower and cemetery. Then drive to Siena to check in. Note: if bad weather or a railway strike makes the Cinque Terre inaccessible, the itinerary automatically switches to touring the coastal towns by coach or other means. Overnight at the Four Points by Sheraton Siena, or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午出发前往五渔村，沿利古里亚海岸线游览悬崖上的美丽渔村——蒙特罗索、韦尔纳扎、科尔尼利亚、马纳罗拉及里奥马焦雷，1997年被联合国教科文组织列入世界文化遗产，串起五村的徒步线路被誉为世界上美丽的徒步路线。下午前往比萨，游览比萨斜塔（外观，比萨大教堂的独立式钟楼，相传伽利略于1590年在此做自由落体实验）和比萨历史文化中心的奇迹广场（主教座堂广场，广场上有主教座堂、斜塔、洗礼堂和墓园）。之后前往锡耶纳入住酒店。备注：如遇恶劣天气或铁路公司罢工等因素导致无法游览五渔村，行程将自动更改为乘坐大巴车或其它形式游览海岸线城市。夜宿锡耶纳福朋喜来登酒店，或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Siena - Pienza - Rome (medieval gem Siena and the cypress lanes of the Val d'Orcia)
timeline.title_zh: 锡耶纳-皮恩扎-罗马（中世纪艺术瑰宝-锡耶纳，遇奥尔恰谷丝柏树小径）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast tour the old city of Siena: the Siena Cathedral (exterior); the Piazza del Campo (the shell-shaped square, one of the largest surviving medieval squares in Europe); the Palazzo Pubblico / town hall (exterior); and the Torre del Mangia (exterior), at 102 m one of Italy's tallest towers, housing the Civic Museum with Lorenzetti's 'Allegory of Good and Bad Government' frescoes. Then visit the old town of Pienza, birthplace of Pope Pius II and a model 'ideal city', touring the Piazza Pio II and the Pienza Cathedral (exterior); from its walls you overlook the World Heritage Val d'Orcia. Continue to Rome, stopping for free photos along the famous cypress-lined lane (distant view of the Val d'Orcia). On arrival check in to your hotel. Overnight at the Sheraton Roma (Medici) or Mantegna Hotel, or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后出发前往锡耶纳古城，游览锡耶纳大教堂（外观）、田野广场（因形似贝壳又称贝壳广场，是欧洲现存较大的中世纪广场之一）、锡耶纳市政厅（外观）、曼吉亚塔楼（外观，高102米、意大利第二高塔楼，市政厅内市立博物馆藏有《好政府，坏政府》系列壁画）等景点。之后前往皮恩扎古城参观二世广场、皮恩扎大教堂（外观）等景点——皮恩扎是教皇皮乌斯二世的出生地、被视为“理想城市”典范，可从城墙俯瞰世界遗产奥尔恰山谷。之后前往罗马，途中在丝柏树小径自由拍照（远观奥尔恰谷）。抵达罗马后入住酒店。夜宿罗马梅第奇喜来登酒店或曼特尼亚酒店，或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Rome (reliving the glory of the 'city of cities', the ancient Roman Empire)
timeline.title_zh: 罗马（重温“万城之城”古罗马帝国的辉煌）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, a guide leads a walking tour of Rome, the 'Eternal City' and birthplace of the ancient Roman Empire. See the Colosseum (exterior), the grand arena built to glorify the empire; the Pantheon (exterior), the best-preserved ancient Roman building, over 2,000 years old, resting place of Raphael, praised by Michelangelo as 'the design of angels'; the Spanish Steps, made famous by the film 'Roman Holiday' (138 steps, the widest in Europe); and the Trevi Fountain (exterior), the 'wishing fountain' where tossing a coin over your shoulder is said to make dreams come true. Free time follows, then your pleasant journey ends. Note: because Rome's old city protects its ancient buildings, vehicles are largely banned and most areas are pedestrian streets, so the day is on foot, about 5-6 km of walking. Day-1 meeting is 09:00 at the McDonald's by Piazza Italia in Paris; dispersal on day 11 is around 16:30 near Piazzale Flaminio and around 17:00 at Roma Tiburtina station.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后在导游带领下徒步游览“永恒之城”罗马，这里是古罗马帝国的发祥地。参观古都遗址上矗立的斗兽场（外观，古罗马供观看斗兽角斗的壮观建筑）、万神殿（外观，古罗马保存完好的建筑、距今2000多年，拉斐尔长眠于此，被米开朗基罗赞为“天使的设计”），游览西班牙广场（电影《罗马假日》取景地，西班牙台阶共138级、是欧洲最宽的台阶）和特莱维喷泉（许愿池，外观，背对喷泉投币许愿可梦想成真）。之后自由活动，结束愉快旅程。备注：由于罗马古城建筑保护、禁止车辆行驶，大多数区域为步行街区，当天徒步参观约5-6公里。第1天09:00在巴黎意大利广场麦当劳门口集合；第11天约16:30在人民广场（Piazzale Flaminio）附近解散、约17:00在罗马Tiburtina火车站解散。

meeting_en: Paris, France — tour departs from Paris (city-centre hotel; pickup details per the final tour confirmation).
meeting_zh: 法国巴黎——行程从巴黎出发（市中心酒店，具体接团安排以出团通知书为准）。

faqs.question_en: Where and when does the tour meet and disperse?
faqs.question_zh: 集合及集散地点和方法？
faqs.answer_en: Day 1: meet at 09:00 at the McDonald's by Piazza Italia in Paris. Day 11: dispersal around 16:30 near Piazza del Popolo / Piazzale Flaminio (address: Piazzale Flaminio, 00187 Roma RM, Italy), and around 17:00 at Roma Tiburtina railway station. These are reference times and places; the actual departure time follows the final tour-confirmation document. We do not recommend booking a flight that arrives in Paris on the same day as day 1; you may book a flight that leaves Rome late at night on the last day, but note that any Rome city sights you then miss are non-refundable.
faqs.answer_zh: 第1天09:00在巴黎意大利广场麦当劳门口集合；第11天约16:30在人民广场附近解散（解散地址：Piazzale Flaminio, 00187 Roma RM, Italy），约17:00在罗马Tiburtina火车站解散。以上为参考时间及地点，实际出发时间以出团通知书为准。本产品不推荐预订当天抵达巴黎的航班，可预订当天夜里离开罗马的航班，但由此导致罗马市区景点无法参观，无费用可退。

faqs.question_en: Are the coach transfers between cities very long?
faqs.question_zh: 行程路线乘坐大巴时间会不会很久？
faqs.answer_en: Only the Geneva-Paris leg is about 6 hours 45 minutes; all other planned legs are roughly 3-4 hours of driving. Road conditions can be complex - traffic jams are common in city centers and other factors may extend travel time, and the tunnel between Lucerne and Milan is prone to congestion that can lengthen the journey.
faqs.answer_zh: 该产品仅日内瓦-巴黎段约为6小时45分，其余计划行程均为3-4小时左右的行车时间。公路交通情况复杂，特别是市区内容易发生堵车或其它因素导致行车时间增加，同时卢塞恩到米兰的隧道容易发生堵车导致行程时间增加。

faqs.question_en: Can I go up to the summit of the Jungfrau?
faqs.question_zh: 产品是否可以游览少女峰登顶？
faqs.answer_en: Yes, but it is not included in the price. If you wish to join, we recommend booking in advance. The available time for this experience is limited and it may conflict with the original itinerary arrangement, affecting other arrangements and experiences.
faqs.answer_zh: 可以游览，但费用不包含。如需参加建议提前预订，可选的体验时间受限，可能与原行程安排产生冲突，导致影响其他行程和体验的安排。

faqs.question_en: Can I visit the First Top of Adventure activities?
faqs.question_zh: 我是否能游览菲斯特瑞士空天探险活动（First Top of Adventure）？
faqs.answer_en: Yes, but it is not included in the price. If you wish to join, we recommend booking in advance.
faqs.answer_zh: 可以游览，但费用不包含。如需参加建议提前预订。

faqs.question_en: What adventure activities are there at First (Fiesch)?
faqs.question_zh: 菲斯特都有什么探险活动？
faqs.answer_en: First's sky-adventure park has many thrilling high-mountain activities, the main ones being: the Aerial gondola, the First Cliff Walk, the First Flyer zipline, and the First Glider. You can buy them on site depending on that day's queues and weather.
faqs.answer_zh: 菲斯特空天探险有很多惊险刺激的高山活动，主要项目有：空中贡多拉（Aerial gondola）、悬崖天梭巅峰栈道（First Cliff Walk）、高空飞索（First Flyer）、神鹰飞梭（First Glider）。可以根据当天排队时间及天气情况现场购买。

faqs.question_en: Can I choose both the Jungfrau sightseeing train and the First sky-adventure on the same day?
faqs.question_zh: 我是否能同时选择少女峰观光列车和菲斯特空天探险两个项目？
faqs.answer_en: No. There are only 5-6 hours of free time in Interlaken that day. The recommended time for the Jungfrau is 4-5 hours, while First needs 3-4 hours, so the two cannot both be done.
faqs.answer_zh: 不可以。当天在因特拉肯仅有5-6小时自由活动时间，推荐游览少女峰时间为4到5小时，菲斯特需要3-4个小时，两者无法同时选择。

faqs.question_en: Can I take the GoldenPass to tour Switzerland?
faqs.question_zh: 我是否可以选择乘坐金色山口游览瑞士？
faqs.answer_en: Yes, you may take the Lungern or Meiringen to Interlaken or Lucerne leg. Before buying the train ticket you must agree with the guide on the time and journey to rejoin the tour group; the Lungern or Lucerne sightseeing will then be shortened. The train ticket and seat reservation cost about 35 EUR.
faqs.answer_zh: 可以选择龙疆或梅林根到因特拉肯或卢塞恩段，需要在购买火车票前与导游协商再次返回旅游团的时间点和车程，届时龙疆或卢塞恩的游览行程将会缩减，火车票及座位费约为35欧元。

faqs.question_en: Why is the tour of central Rome on foot?
faqs.question_zh: 罗马市中心为什么要徒步游览？
faqs.answer_en: Rome's sights are concentrated and almost all lie within the old city (a historic protection zone with vehicle restrictions). That day, from the hotel you walk to Santa Maria Maggiore (5-10 min), the Colosseum (10-15 min), the Mouth of Truth (20-25 min), the Trevi Fountain (15-20 min) and the Spanish Steps (5-10 min), then return to the hotel (20-25 min). Skipping the Mouth of Truth saves about 35 minutes of walking (about 2 km).
faqs.answer_zh: 由于罗马的景点比较集中，几乎所有景点都位于罗马古城区（历史保护区车辆限行），当天从酒店步行前往圣母大殿（步行5到10分钟）、斗兽场（步行10到15分钟）、真理之口（步行20到25分钟）、许愿池（步行15到20分钟）、西班牙广场（步行5到10分钟），随后返回酒店（步行20-25分钟）。如果不游览真理之口可减少约35分钟的步行时间（约2公里）。

faqs.question_en: Can we choose different menus and dishes for dinner?
faqs.question_zh: 我们的晚餐是否能根据喜好选择不同的菜单和菜品？
faqs.answer_en: All dining recommended in the itinerary consists of recommended local specialties and is not included in the price - for example Venice's famous black squid-ink pasta and Tuscan steak. If the recommended dishes are not your preference, you are free to choose other dining.
faqs.answer_zh: 行程内推荐的餐饮全部为推荐当地特色餐，费用并未包含，比如威尼斯较著名的黑墨鱼面、托斯卡纳的牛排等。如果菜品并非您的首选，可以自行选择其他餐饮。

faqs.question_en: Is paragliding (a self-paid item) safe, and who can join?
faqs.question_zh: 自费的滑翔伞项目是否安全？谁可以参加？
faqs.answer_en: The self-paid paragliding is a high-risk item that may involve weightlessness, impact and weather effects. Age requirement is 10-65 years, weight 10-95 kg, and you must be in good health (those with underlying conditions, high blood pressure, heart disease, or who are pregnant are prohibited). You must follow the instructor, must not operate equipment on your own, and must obey site rules and safety norms. Ordinary travel insurance does not cover high-risk items; the activity operator provides only basic medical and rescue insurance.
faqs.answer_zh: 本产品内自费的滑翔伞为高风险项目：可能存在失重、撞击、天气影响等。参加本活动的年龄要求为10周岁-65周岁，体重在10公斤-95公斤，身体健康（如基础疾病、高血压、心脏病、孕妇等禁止参与），必须听从教练指挥、不得擅自操作装备、遵守场地规定及安全规范。普通旅游保险不包含高风险项目，活动方仅提供医疗和救援的基础保险。

faqs.question_en: Why might the start and end cities differ, and the price vary?
faqs.question_zh: 为什么开始和结束城市不同、价格也不同？
faqs.answer_en: This product is a rolling/recurring departure tour. During the trip other guests will join and leave the group at different points, so the start and end cities (and prices) differ. Please begin and end your itinerary according to the destination you personally signed up for. Note that the Louvre may impose group caps in peak season - if changed to FIT tickets the 10 EUR Louvre guiding fee is refunded, and if entry is impossible the ticket plus guiding fee are refunded and it becomes an exterior visit; at Versailles, if there are fewer than 3 people an audio guide replaces the official guide.
faqs.answer_zh: 本产品为循环套发团，在旅游团集合与结束的途中会有其他游客在不同地点上下团，开始和结束的城市不同、价格不同，敬请根据自己个人报名的目的地开始和结束行程。注意：卢浮宫在旅游旺季可能针对旅游团限流，如更改为散拼门票则退还每位10欧元讲解费，如无法入内则退还景点门票+讲解费并改为外观游览；凡尔赛不足3人时由讲解器替代官导讲解。

faqs.question_en: Do I need a visa?
faqs.question_zh: 是否需要签证？
faqs.answer_en: Yes. The price does not include the visa fee; this product requires a Schengen visa (single or multiple entry) - if you need one, please choose the Schengen-visa product option. After booking we provide all the materials for the Schengen application for free (see the detailed materials list), and if you commission us to handle the visa we will buy you Schengen-compliant travel insurance (otherwise you must buy your own insurance and handle claims yourself). Your passport must be valid for at least 6 months from the date of departure, or customs may refuse entry. The visa fee, visa-service fee, Schengen insurance fee and visa-center appointment fee are all non-refundable and non-transferable, even if the product is changed or cancelled. 'Visa-worry-free' guarantee: if you sign your travel contract with us at least 61 days before departure and have not obtained the visa within 45 days before departure, we bear all losses and immediately refund all your travel costs; guests not meeting this clause who fail to obtain a visa are refunded per the change/cancellation terms. A refusal must be reported to us within 48 hours with the consulate's rejection letter; any supplementary or amended materials must be submitted within five days, and you may not unilaterally waive your 'visa appeal' right.
faqs.answer_zh: 需要。本产品不包含签证费用，需办理申根签证（单次或多次入境），如需办理请选择申根签证产品。预订后免费提供办理申根签证的全部材料（参考详细材料清单）；如委托我社办理签证，我社为您购买符合申根要求的申根旅游保险，若未委托我社办理则需自行购买旅游保险并自行负责理赔。护照有效期需在离境之日起至少还有六个月，否则海关有权拒绝入境。签证费、签证服务费、申根保险费、签证中心预约费均不可退款，也无法更改使用者，即使产品退改签也无法退款。保签无忧：出发日前61天与我社签约的旅游产品，如在出发前45天内未获取签证，我社承担所有损失并立即退还全部旅游费用；不符合该条款的游客如未正常获取签证，将按“退改与取消条款”退费。如遇拒签需在48小时内通知我社并出具使领馆的拒签函，如需补充或更改材料需在五天内提交，且不得单方面放弃“签证抗辩”权利。

faqs.question_en: Booking, changes & cancellation
faqs.question_zh: 预订、变更与取消须知
faqs.answer_en: Free, no-reason cancellation is available more than 30 days before departure (excluding the 30th day) for both the agency and the traveller. This is a shared/join-in (pin tuan) tour; the announced group size is 10 people - if the group does not reach 10 within 30 days of departure, either side may cancel without liability, and a self-paid activity may also be cancelled (becoming free time) if it has fewer than 10 participants. We recommend booking at least 14 days ahead; orders need a second confirmation within 48 hours or they auto-refund, so do not book connecting flights/hotels before confirmation. Because flights, traffic, ferries and strikes often shift the schedule, travellers must arrive at the assembly city one day before the tour starts and leave the dispersal city one day after it ends, allowing buffer for connections (at least 5 hours for a same-airport connection, 7 hours for a different-airport connection in the same city; reasonable assembly/dispersal window is 07:00-21:00). Rooms: two people booking together default to a standard twin/double with bed type assigned by the hotel (not selectable); a single traveller pays a single-room supplement (refunded proportionally if successfully shared); a triple/family room defaults to two parents plus one minor with bed type at the hotel's discretion. European hotels are non-smoking, no cooking in rooms, check-in 14:00 and check-out 11:00, and air conditioning is not a standard fixture. All pricing is quoted in EUR; if you pay in CNY, the amount is the real-time CNY price auto-calculated on the day of payment using the Bank of China 'EUR selling' rate, and the same applies to refunds (any exchange-rate difference or bank fees are borne by the traveller). Named hotels are first-choice; if full they are swapped for similar same-star hotels without separate notice. If the Cinque Terre cannot be visited due to bad weather or a rail strike, the day switches to coach or another form of coastal-town touring.
faqs.answer_zh: 出发前30天（不含第30天）旅行社和旅行者均有权申请无理由取消。本产品为散客拼团，宣布成团人数为10人——行程开始前30天（不含第30天）未达成团人数的，双方均可解除合同且不承担违约责任；团内自费活动若未达10人，旅行社有权取消该自费活动并改为“自由活动”。建议至少提前14天预订，订单需在48小时内二次确认，否则默认自动退款，未获确认前请勿预订衔接机票及酒店。由于航变、交通、渡轮及罢工常导致行程顺序调整，本产品要求旅行者在参团日期前一天抵达集合地、离团日期后一天离开集散地并预留合理衔接时间（同机场转机至少5小时、同城不同机场至少7小时，合理集散时间段为07:00至21:00）。房型：两人同时报名默认标准双人间，床型由酒店安排不可选；单人报名含单人房差（成功拼房按比例退还）；三人家庭间默认两位父母与一位未成年儿童入住，床型由酒店安排。欧洲酒店全面禁烟、禁止房间内做饭，入住14:00、退房11:00，且不以安装空调为标准设施。所有定价以欧元为计价单位，如选择人民币支付，则以当天支付时依据中国银行实时“欧元卖出价”自动计算的人民币实时价格为准，退款同理（汇率差异或银行手续费由旅行者承担）。行程内列明的酒店为优先入住酒店，如订满则换为相近条件、相同星级酒店，不再另行通知。如遇恶劣天气或铁路罢工无法游览五渔村，当天将改为乘坐大巴或其它形式游览海岸线城市。

faqs.question_en: Health & safety requirements
faqs.question_zh: 健康与安全须知
faqs.answer_en: To ensure a safe trip, please have a health check before departure and do NOT sign up if you have: infectious diseases (e.g. active tuberculosis, typhoid); cardiovascular disease (e.g. severe hypertension, heart insufficiency, myocardial ischemia/infarction); cerebrovascular disease (e.g. cerebral embolism/hemorrhage, brain tumor); respiratory disease (e.g. emphysema, cor pulmonale); psychiatric conditions (e.g. epilepsy, mental illness); severe anemia (hemoglobin below 50 g/L); or are recovering from major/medium surgery. Pregnancy: at 35+ weeks you cannot join under any circumstances; at 28+ weeks a doctor's report within 7 days plus the attending doctor's consent is required; under 28 weeks please book with caution, sign the agency disclaimer, and you may not join any adventure, skiing, sea-going, high-altitude or outdoor items. Travellers with disabilities need a doctor's report within 7 days plus consent, must be accompanied by an immediate family member, and must request reserved seats and facilities at least 61 days ahead. Elderly travellers over 70 need a health certificate and check-up report and an immediate-family escort (or must sign the disclaimer); this is a long itinerary requiring good walking ability and stamina. Minors (under 18) must be accompanied by an immediate relative or guardian, some sights restrict those under 18/12/6, infants under 30 kg need a confirmed child safety seat, and unaccompanied minors need parental authorization; infants under 2 years old are not accepted. Per Article 15 of the Tourism Law and the Infectious Disease Prevention Law (2025 revision), travellers must truthfully declare health information relevant to the trip (pregnancy, lactation, chronic disease, infectious-disease history, suspected symptoms, recent epidemic-area travel) and follow safety warnings; concealment causing harm makes the traveller liable, and the agency may terminate the contract without refund.
faqs.answer_zh: 为确保旅游安全，请在出行前做一次必要的身体检查，如存在以下情况请勿报名：传染性疾病患者（如活动期肺结核、伤寒）；心血管疾病患者（如严重高血压、心功能不全、心肌缺氧、心肌梗塞）；脑血管疾病患者（如脑栓塞、脑出血、脑肿瘤）；呼吸系统疾病患者（如肺气肿、肺心病）；精神病患者（如癫痫及各种精神病）；严重贫血（血红蛋白50克/升以下）；大中型手术恢复期病患。孕妇：妊娠35周及以上任何情况下都无法参团；28周及以上需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书；28周以下请慎重报名，需签署旅行社免责声明书，且行程内探险、滑雪、出海、高空、户外等项目均无法参加。残疾人需提供7日内医生检查报告及同意书、需直系家属陪同，并提前至少61天申请预留位置及专用设施。70周岁以上老年人需提供健康证明、体检报告并由直系家属陪同（否则需签免责声明书）；本行程较长，需要一定步行能力和体力。未成年人（未满18周岁）需由直系亲属或监护人陪同，部分景点对未满18/12/6周岁有特殊限定，30公斤以下儿童需提前确认安全座椅，无父母陪同的未成年人需持授权书；本产品不接受2周岁以下婴儿参团。根据《旅游法》第15条及《传染病防治法（2025修订）》，旅游者需如实告知与旅游活动相关的个人健康信息（包括妊娠期、哺乳期、慢性病、传染病史、疑似症状或近期疫区旅居史）并遵守安全警示，若因隐瞒导致损害需自行承担责任，旅行社可解除合同且不退还费用。

title_en: Provence & French Riviera 5-Day Small-Group Tour (Avignon Round-Trip)
title_zh: 普罗旺斯与蔚蓝海岸5天跟团游（阿维尼翁往返）
short_en: Five days through Provence's lavender fields, hilltop villages and the French Riviera, with a Saint-Tropez sea cruise and two nights in Nice.
short_zh: 5天畅游普罗旺斯薰衣草花田、山间古镇与蔚蓝海岸，含圣特罗佩出海巡游，尼斯连住两晚。
desc_en: A locally-joined 5-day loop from Avignon through the heart of southern France. Wander Provence's storybook villages of Gordes and Sénanque, drift into Valensole's purple lavender fields, sail the Mediterranean to Saint-Tropez and explore the glamorous Riviera from Cannes and Nice to Menton, Monaco and the clifftop village of Eze. The journey closes with the Roman heritage of Arles and Nîmes, blending floral landscapes, coastal cruising and ancient history.
desc_zh: 目的地参团的5天环线，从阿维尼翁出发深入法国南部腹地。漫步高德、塞南克等普罗旺斯童话小镇，徜徉瓦朗索勒紫色薰衣草花海，乘船巡游地中海直抵圣特罗佩，再从戛纳、尼斯一路游览芒通、摩纳哥与悬崖小镇埃兹等蔚蓝海岸名城；最后探访阿尔勒与尼姆的古罗马遗迹，将花田、海上巡游与千年历史融为一体。

highlights.en: Gordes hilltop village, inspiration for Miyazaki's 'Castle in the Sky', and Sénanque Abbey
highlights.zh: 宫崎骏《天空之城》原型——高德古城，以及塞南克修道院

highlights.en: Valensole lavender fields in full purple bloom (in season)
highlights.zh: 瓦朗索勒薰衣草花田，盛放成紫色花海（花期内）

highlights.en: Mediterranean sea cruise to Saint-Tropez (ferry ticket included)
highlights.zh: 乘船出海巡游地中海直抵圣特罗佩（含渡轮门票）

highlights.en: Two nights in Nice for an in-depth taste of the French Riviera
highlights.zh: 尼斯连住两晚，深度游览蔚蓝海岸核心城市

highlights.en: Insta-worthy stops: lemon town Menton, clifftop Eze and legendary Saint-Tropez
highlights.zh: Ins打卡名所：柠檬小镇芒通、悬崖小镇埃兹、传奇圣特罗佩

highlights.en: Eze exotic clifftop garden and a perfume museum, both included
highlights.zh: 埃兹空中花园与香水博物馆门票全含

highlights.en: Verdon Gorge and the Tiffany-blue Lac Sainte-Croix
highlights.zh: 欧洲峡谷凡尔登大峡谷与蒂芙尼蓝的圣十字湖

highlights.en: Roman heritage of Arles and Nîmes, with Van Gogh's café and ancient arenas
highlights.zh: 阿尔勒与尼姆的古罗马遗迹，含梵高咖啡馆与古罗马竞技场

includes.en: Hotels: 4 nights in comfortable 2–3 star hotels.
includes.zh: 【酒店】：舒适2-3星级酒店4晚。

includes.en: Breakfast: buffet breakfast at the hotels, or breakfast in another form.
includes.zh: 【早餐】：酒店内的自助式早餐或其他形式早餐。

includes.en: Operating fees: in-itinerary operating costs such as the tourist city tax, city-entry fees, residence tax, road and bridge tolls, parking and fuel charges.
includes.zh: 【执行】：游客城市税、进城费、居住税、过路过桥费、停车燃油费等行程内执行费用。

includes.en: Transport: tourist coach or business travel vehicle.
includes.zh: 【交通】：旅游巴士或商务旅行车。

includes.en: Guide: professional driver plus Chinese-speaking guide, or a Chinese-speaking driver-guide (note: groups of fewer than 9 people use a business vehicle with a Chinese-speaking driver-guide; groups of 9 or more use a tourist coach with a professional driver plus a Chinese-speaking guide).
includes.zh: 【导游】：职业司机+中文导游服务，或中文司机兼导游服务（注：9人以下为商务车+中文司机兼导游，9人以上为旅游巴士+专业司机+中文导游）。

includes.en: Luggage: one piece of 23 kg checked luggage and one piece of hand luggage.
includes.zh: 【行李】：1件23公斤行李及1件随身行李。

includes.en: Tickets: first-entry admission for the Saint-Tropez sea-crossing ferry, the perfume museum, and the Èze hanging gardens.
includes.zh: 【门票】：圣特罗佩出海渡轮、香水博物馆、埃兹空中花园首道门票。

excludes.en: Passport: personal passport fees.
excludes.zh: 护照：个人护照费用。

excludes.en: Visa: the tourist visa fees required for the countries listed in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 签证：行程中所列旅游国家所需的观光签证费用。

excludes.en: Insurance: travel insurance fees (if the itinerary involves high-risk sports, please verify whether your travel insurance covers that activity).
excludes.zh: 保险：旅游保险费用（如行程内涉及到高风险运动，请核实旅游保险是否包含该项运动）。

excludes.en: Tips: tips for the guide and driver totalling EUR 10 per person per day, the same rate for adults and children.
excludes.zh: 小费：游客支付导游和司机小费一共10欧/人/天，大小同价。

excludes.en: Meals: lunch and dinner are not included in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 餐饮：行程中不包含午、晚正餐费用。
