excludes.en: Tickets: admission for sights not specifically noted as included (including but not limited to sights marked "exterior," as well as any "recommended," "optional," "experience" items and all other items not stated as included; if you wish to visit them, please pay on your own).
excludes.zh: 门票：行程中未注明费用包含的景点（包括但不仅限于行程中注明"外观"的景点，以及"推荐""可选""体验"等所有未提及费用包含的项目，如游客需要参观，敬请自理）。

excludes.en: Extended stays: accommodation, transport and sightseeing costs for stays extended beyond the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 延长住宿：行程外额外延长的住宿、交通、观光费用。

excludes.en: Personal spending: such as drinks and alcohol, taxis, phone charges and other personal expenses.
excludes.zh: 私人消费：如饮料酒类、出租车、电话费等个人消费。

excludes.en: Other transport: transport not mentioned in the inclusions beyond the business vehicle or minibus, such as a Venice gondola, and tourist trains or electric taxis in vehicle-restricted zones — please cover these yourself.
excludes.zh: 其他交通：除包含商务旅行车或者中巴之外，费用包含中未提及的其他交通费用，如威尼斯贡多拉，以及车辆限行区的观光火车、电瓶出租车等费用敬请自理。

excludes.en: Free activities: night-time sightseeing on your own and recommended items during the itinerary, together with the transport, meals, tickets, shopping and other costs they incur.
excludes.zh: 自由活动：游客夜间自行游览及行程中的推荐项目，以及产生的交通、餐饮、门票、购物等费用。

excludes.en: Experience activities: the various travel experience activities not included in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 体验活动：行程中没有包含的各项旅游体验活动。

excludes.en: Other costs: any fees not mentioned in the inclusions. Where force majeure such as natural disasters, war or strikes occurs, or special circumstances such as transport delays, flight cancellations or rescheduling, embassy delays in issuing visas, or insufficient group numbers, or other extra costs not caused by our company (such as overseas visa-extension fees, accommodation, meals and transport, or national airline fare adjustments) arise, our company reserves the right to charge the price difference.
excludes.zh: 其他费用：费用包含中未提及的费用。如因天灾、战争、罢工等不可抗力的原因，及因交通延阻、航班取消或更改时间、使馆延误出签证、人数不足等特殊情况或其他非我公司原因所导致的额外费用（如在外延期签证费、住、食及交通费、国家航空运价调整等），我公司有权追加差价。

timeline.title_en: Avignon – Provence Villages – Avignon (Miyazaki's "Castle in the Sky" and the magnificent theatre festival)
timeline.title_zh: 阿维尼翁 – 普罗旺斯小镇 – 阿维尼翁（宫崎骏笔下的"天空之城"与精妙绝伦的戏剧节）
timeline.description_en: Board the group in the afternoon at the Ibis Budget Avignon Centre in Avignon's old town, then set off on a tour of Provence's most beautiful villages, visiting in turn Fontaine-de-Vaucluse, the hilltop old town of Gordes, and Sénanque Abbey. Fontaine-de-Vaucluse is a famous spring-fed resort village about half an hour from Avignon, where cool spring water flowing down from the mountains takes the edge off the summer heat (about 1 hour). Gordes, the inspiration for Miyazaki's animated "Castle in the Sky," is a hillside old town of medieval stone buildings, winding cobbled lanes and an art-filled atmosphere, with its 16th-century château crowning the summit (about 30 minutes). Sénanque Abbey, founded by Mazan monks in 1148 and hidden in a tranquil valley, is one of France's most beautiful valleys and the setting for the book "A Year in Provence" (about 30 minutes). Afterwards return to Avignon to explore the old town on your own — the Pont Saint-Bénézet (broken bridge) (exterior) and the Palais des Papes (Popes' Palace) (exterior) — before checking into the hotel. Overnight at the Ibis Avignon Centre (old town), Ibis Avignon Sud, or an equivalent 2–3 star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 当天下午在阿维尼翁老城宜必思酒店（Ibis Budget Avignon Centre）上团集合，随后开启普罗旺斯绝美小镇之旅，依次游览：泉水小镇（Fontaine-de-Vaucluse）、高德古城（Gordes）、塞南克修道院（Sénanque）。泉水小镇距阿维尼翁约半小时车程，是南法知名的泉水度假小村，从山中流淌而来的清凉泉水带走了夏日的炙热（约1小时）。高德古城是宫崎骏《天空之城》的原型，城中建筑均建于中世纪，碎石路蜿蜒而上，艺术气息浓厚，山顶矗立着16世纪的高德城堡（约30分钟）。塞南克修道院由Mazan修道院的僧侣建于1148年，隐藏在宁静的山谷之中，被称为"全法国最美山谷"之一，也是《山居岁月》一书的故事背景（约30分钟）。随后前往阿维尼翁，自行参观阿维尼翁古城、罗纳河断桥（外观）、阿维尼翁教皇宫（外观），之后入住酒店。夜宿：阿维尼翁老城宜必思酒店或阿维尼翁南宜必思酒店或同等2-3星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Avignon – Valensole – Lake Sainte-Croix – Cannes – Nice (Wandering the purple lavender fields and boating on a Tiffany-blue lake)
timeline.title_zh: 阿维尼翁 – 瓦朗索勒 – 圣十字湖 – 戛纳 – 尼斯（徜徉薰衣草紫色花海，泛舟蒂芙尼蓝的湖上）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, set off for the lavender fields of Valensole and along the D907 road (during lavender season), immersing yourself in the romantic purple sea and the famous "Yi Lian You Meng" filming location (about 1 hour). In the afternoon, visit the Verdon Gorge — Europe's second-largest canyon, 25 km long and 700 m deep — and Lake Sainte-Croix, which sits below like a sheet of polished emerald set among the mountains (about 1 hour). Then continue to Cannes, the cinema capital and seaside town, to see the Palais des Festivals (built 1982, where the Palme d'Or is awarded) and the Walk of Fame with its 300-plus celebrity handprints, with free time to stroll the Cannes seafront promenade (about 1 hour). Arrive in Nice in the evening. Overnight at the B&B Nice Arénas hotel or an equivalent 3-star hotel, ideally located near Phoenix Park, the Museum of Asian Art, the beach and Nice old town. Note: depending on temperatures the lavender generally blooms from mid-to-late June and is usually harvested by late July; if it cannot be seen during your departure dates, the visit is changed to a ceramics village instead.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后出发前往瓦朗索勒（Valensole）及D907公路的薰衣草花田（薰衣草花期期间），置身浪漫紫色花海，打卡《又见一帘幽梦》的浪漫拍摄地，留下紫色记忆（约1小时）。下午前往游览欧洲第二大峡谷——凡尔登大峡谷（全长25公里、深700米）以及圣十字湖，从居高临下的视角看，圣十字湖仿佛一片平整的翡翠镶嵌在群山之中（约1小时）。随后前往南法电影重镇及海滨小城戛纳，参观电影宫（建于1982年，金棕榈奖在此颁发）、星光大道（已累计300多位明星手印），自由漫步戛纳海滨大道（约1小时）。傍晚抵达尼斯。夜宿：B&B尼斯竞技场酒店或同等3星级酒店，地理位置优越，毗邻凤凰园和亚洲艺术博物馆，靠近海滩与尼斯老城区。备注：根据气温不同，薰衣草一般在6月中下旬绽放，通常截止到7月下旬收割。如团期内无法参观薰衣草，则更改为参观陶瓷小镇。

timeline.title_en: Nice – Menton – Monaco – Èze – Nice (Princess Grace's clifftop "eagle's nest" hanging gardens in Monaco)
timeline.title_zh: 尼斯 – 芒通 – 摩纳哥 – 埃兹 – 尼斯（摩纳哥格蕾丝公主悬崖峭壁上的"鹫巢"空中花园）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, head to Menton to explore the "lemon town," wrapped in citrus-yellow tones with long beaches, varied architecture and orange groves, and the winding lanes of its baroque old town along the "lemon road" (about 1 hour). Continue to the Principality of Monaco to see the country and its yacht harbour, where the marina and Monte Carlo are the most representative sights (about 1 hour 30 minutes), travelling along the clifftop coastal road named after Princess Grace (Av. Princesse de Grace). Then visit the clifftop village of Èze and its exotic hanging gardens — a classic Monaco-style hilltop village with a Mediterranean garden at its summit, the back garden of the famous Château de la Chèvre d'Or and a superb vantage point over the Mediterranean (about 3 hours); below sits the Fragonard perfume museum, opened in 1983 (about 1 hour). Return to Nice to freely visit the Baie des Anges beach and the Promenade des Anglais, then explore Nice old town with its baroque churches, Italian-style buildings and the Cours Saleya market (about 1 hour). Overnight at the B&B Nice Arénas hotel or an equivalent 3-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往芒通（Menton）游览"柠檬小镇"，这座海滨小镇被柠檬色调所包裹，拥有修长的海滩、各式建筑与成片的柑橘果园，可在巴洛克风格的老城区与"柠檬之路"中漫步（约1小时）。随后前往摩纳哥公国，参观摩纳哥及游艇码头，其中游艇海港和蒙特卡洛为最具代表性的游览区域（约1小时30分钟），沿途行驶在以格蕾丝公主命名的峭壁公路（Av. Princesse de Grace）上。之后前往悬崖小镇埃兹（Èze），游览异国风情的"鹫巢"空中花园——纯古典摩纳哥风格的小镇，山顶种有地中海花园，是法国著名金羊酒店的后花园，也是俯瞰地中海美景的绝佳位置（约3小时）；埃兹山下坐落着建于1983年的香水博物馆（约1小时）。参观结束返回尼斯，自由参观尼斯天使湾沙滩、英格兰人海滨大道，并游览尼斯老城——这里保留了18世纪以来的巴洛克式教堂、意大利风格建筑以及萨雷雅广场集市（Cours Saleya）（约1小时）。夜宿：B&B尼斯竞技场酒店或同等3星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Nice – Saint-Raphaël – Saint-Tropez – Arles – Nîmes (A Mediterranean cruise along the Côte d'Azur and a post-Impressionist journey)
timeline.title_zh: 尼斯 – 圣拉斐尔 – 圣特罗佩 – 阿尔勒 – 尼姆（地中海出海巡游蔚蓝海岸与后印象派之旅）
timeline.description_en: In the morning head to the Côte d'Azur seaside town of Saint-Raphaël — reached by a 15-minute walk along the rose-coloured coast from Fréjus harbour and known as the carnival of the southern French coast for its lively bars, restaurants and beaches (about 1 hour). Then board a boat at Sainte-Maxime to cruise the Mediterranean directly to the art-loving "sun city" of Saint-Tropez (cruise about 20 minutes), famed for some of France's finest beaches made up of nearly a hundred small coves, luxury hotels and a harbour packed with elegant yachts, especially 1930s-style Italian Riva speedboats (about 2 hours). Continue by bus to Arles to visit the old town and the Van Gogh café terrace, taking in the brilliant sunflower fields under the sky; nicknamed the "little Rome of the Gauls," Arles flourished under Caesar and became world-famous through Van Gogh, whose footsteps can be felt everywhere (about 2 hours 30 minutes). Arrive in the evening at Nîmes, the "city of water spirits," and check in. Overnight at the Ibis Styles Nîmes Gare Centre hotel or an equivalent 3-star hotel. Note: sunflowers bloom from June to July; in hot weather they may be harvested early, in which case the sunflower fields cannot be visited.
timeline.description_zh: 早上前往蔚蓝海岸海滨重镇圣拉斐尔（Saint-Raphaël）——从弗雷瑞斯海港沿玫瑰海岸的沙滩徒步15分钟即可到达，这里酒吧、餐厅、海水浴场热闹非凡，被称为南法海岸腹地的狂欢节（约1小时）。随后在圣马克西姆（Sainte-Maxime）乘船出海巡游地中海，直达海洋艺术之城圣特罗佩（Saint-Tropez）（游船时长约20分钟），这座别称"太阳城"的小城号称拥有法国最美的海滩，由近百个小型海滩组成，豪华酒店与私人别墅林立，盛夏海湾泊满优雅游艇，尤以20世纪30年代风格的意大利Riva快艇居多（约2小时）。随后乘坐巴士前往阿尔勒（Arles），参观阿尔勒老城区、梵高咖啡馆，欣赏天空下灿烂的向日葵花田；阿尔勒被誉为"高卢人的小罗马"，因凯撒大帝的占领而繁荣、因梵高的画作而蜚声世界，随处都能感受到梵高的足迹（约2小时30分钟）。傍晚抵达水精灵之城尼姆（Nîmes），入住酒店。夜宿：尼姆火车站中心宜必思尚品酒店或同等3星级酒店。备注：向日葵花期6月-7月，如气候炎热向日葵提前收割，则无法游览向日葵花田。

timeline.title_en: Nîmes – Avignon (Exploring the thousand-year charm of Nîmes, the city of water spirits)
timeline.title_zh: 尼姆 – 阿维尼翁（探访水精灵之城尼姆的千年古韵）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, explore the old town of Nîmes on foot to discover the splendour and mystery of ancient Rome, starting from the Avenue Feuchères by the train station to appreciate the architecture of the Roman aqueduct before heading to the Jardin de la Fontaine. Nîmes gathers many astonishing Roman achievements: the well-preserved Roman amphitheatre (arena), the Jardin de la Fontaine spring-side gardens that hint at a city built around its springs, and the Tour Magne, a Roman watchtower on the hill offering sweeping views (about 1 hour). Visit the Maison Carrée, with its Corinthian columns, about 17 m high and 26 m deep, built in the 1st century BC under Emperor Augustus and one of the best-preserved Roman temples, having served as a town hall, church and now an antiquities museum (about 30 minutes). The thousand-year-old "mysterious garden" — the Jardin de la Fontaine — is an architectural marvel of well-preserved Roman structures and landscaped grounds, built by the people of Nîmes to honour the spirit they believed inhabited their life-giving springs (about 30 minutes). Afterwards depart Nîmes for the Ibis Budget Avignon Centre in Avignon, where the group disbands, ending the southern France journey. No accommodation on this day.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后徒步参观水精灵之城尼姆古城，探索古罗马的辉煌与神秘。从尼姆火车站的水泉大道（Avenue Feuchères）了解古罗马时期水渠桥的建筑结构开始，前往神秘花园。尼姆汇集了太多古罗马人令人惊叹的智慧结晶：保存完好的古罗马竞技场；古迹庭院泉边公园（le Jardin de la Fontaine），仿佛在暗示尼姆即是一座以泉为生的暖城；还有丘陵上的古罗马瞭望塔马涅塔（la Tour de Magne），登高远望可将无限风光尽收眼底（约1小时）。参观方形神殿（Maison Carrée），其建筑特色是科林斯式圆柱，高约17米、深26米，建于公元前1世纪奥古斯都大帝时代，是保存最完好的罗马神殿之一，曾作为市政府大楼和教堂，现为古代博物馆（约30分钟）。建于一千多年前的神秘花园——古迹庭院泉边公园堪称建筑奇迹，因当时尼姆以泉水为中心发展而成，人们深信泉水有精灵，泉边公园便是为奉献给泉水精灵而建造的庭园（约30分钟）。随后从尼姆出发前往阿维尼翁老城宜必思酒店（Ibis Budget Avignon Centre）下团，结束南法旅程。当天无住宿。

meeting_en: Avignon — tour joins in the afternoon at a hotel in Avignon's old town (e.g. Ibis Budget Avignon Centre) and ends back in Avignon on the final day.
meeting_zh: 阿维尼翁——当天下午在阿维尼翁老城酒店（如阿维尼翁老城宜必思酒店）上团，最后一天回到阿维尼翁下团。

faqs.question_en: Where and how do we meet, and where does the group disband?
faqs.question_zh: 集合地点和方法？解散地点在哪里？
faqs.answer_en: The group assembles at the Ibis Budget Avignon Centre in Avignon's old town, reference time 15:00–15:30 (exact time per the final departure notice). The group disbands at central Nîmes or at the Ibis Budget Avignon Centre in Avignon old town, reference time 11:00–12:00 (exact time per the departure notice). You may arrive in Avignon on the same day the group starts, but that day's sights cannot be visited and no refund applies. On the last day you may book an evening flight to leave from Nîmes.
faqs.answer_zh: 在阿维尼翁老城宜必思酒店（Ibis Budget Avignon Centre）上团集合，参考时间15:00-15:30，具体时间以出团通知为准。在尼姆市中心或阿维尼翁老城宜必思酒店（Ibis Budget Avignon Centre）就地解散，参考时间11:00-12:00，具体时间以出团通知为准。本产品可以参团当天抵达阿维尼翁，但当天景点会无法游览，并无费用可退！结束当天可预定晚上的航班离开尼姆。

faqs.question_en: Can I skip Monaco and spend a whole day on the Nice beach instead?
faqs.question_zh: 是否可以不去摩纳哥而停留一整天在尼斯海滩？
faqs.answer_en: Yes. Please notify the guide in advance that you wish to give up the Monaco portion on day 3.
faqs.answer_zh: 可以，请提前通知导游放弃摩纳哥当天行程（第三天）。

faqs.question_en: I get seasick — can I skip the Mediterranean boat cruise?
faqs.question_zh: 我晕船，是否可以不参加地中海乘船出海项目？
faqs.answer_en: Yes. You can travel by the coach to the Saint-Tropez harbour instead, but the ferry ticket is non-refundable.
faqs.answer_zh: 可以，您随车前往圣特罗佩海港码头，但是无法获得退票。

faqs.question_en: Are there any walking or climbing activities that require a lot of stamina?
faqs.question_zh: 行程中有徒步、爬山等比较消耗体能的活动吗？
faqs.answer_en: The "eagle's nest" hanging gardens at the top of Èze require an uphill walk, but the difficulty and physical effort are fairly low and most people can manage it. Please note: on certain departure dates the botanical garden may be closed or, due to group size, it may not be possible to reach the summit garden; if you cannot go up, this is changed to a village walk instead.
faqs.answer_zh: 埃兹山顶的"鹫巢"空中花园需要登山前往，难度和体能消耗比较简单，大多数人都可以前往。注：个别团期因植物园不开放及参团人数问题，有可能无法登顶植物园，如无法前往将改为小镇游览。

faqs.question_en: Are there chances and places to swim in the sea?
faqs.question_zh: 行程中是否有下海、泡海水浴的机会和地点？
faqs.answer_en: Two nights are spent at hotels in seaside cities where you can swim — please bring your own swimwear. You can also give up the Monaco day trip and explore the Nice seafront freely; since the Nice hotel is on the Promenade des Anglais, it is very convenient for free activities.
faqs.answer_zh: 行程内两晚酒店在海滨城市，都可以下海游泳，请自备泳衣。也可以放弃摩纳哥一日游，自由在尼斯城市海滨游览，由于尼斯入住在英格兰人散步大道上，非常方便自由活动。

faqs.question_en: What festivals fall within the itinerary, and where?
faqs.question_zh: 行程内的节日庆典日期和地点？
faqs.answer_en: Avignon Festival: 4 July 2026 – 25 July 2026. Also the Nîmes International Music Festival, the Arles International Photography Festival and the Nice International Jazz Festival.
faqs.answer_zh: 阿维尼翁戏剧节：2026年7月4日-2026年7月25日。另有尼姆国际音乐节、阿尔勒国际摄影节、尼斯国际爵士节。

faqs.question_en: When is the lavender season?
faqs.question_zh: 薰衣草的花期是什么时候？
faqs.answer_en: The bloom time varies each year with the climate and altitude, so we adjust the itinerary and viewing areas slightly according to the season. Generally lavender blooms from early-to-mid June through mid-to-late August. From late May, local farmers and the tourism board deliberately plant large fields of violets and lupins, which also form a vast purple sea. In fact, the purple sea widely circulated online is usually purple lupin (Lupinus violet, family Fabaceae) rather than true lavender (family Lamiaceae).
faqs.answer_zh: 根据每年气候不同，开花时间不同，不同海拔的开花时间也不同，我社会根据节气略微调整行程和观看花海的区域。一般情况下，每年6月中上旬到8月中下旬都有薰衣草盛开。从5月底开始，当地农户及旅游局特意种植大量紫罗兰和鲁冰花花田，同样是一大片紫色花海。其实网上广为流传的紫色花海通常是紫色鲁冰花（羽扇豆科 Lupinus violet）而非唇形科的薰衣草。

faqs.question_en: Do I need a visa?
faqs.question_zh: 是否需要签证？
faqs.answer_en: This product does not include visa fees; if you need a visa, please choose a Schengen-visa product. A Schengen visa (single or multiple entry) is required. "Worry-free visa" guarantee: for travellers who sign with us at least 61 days before departure, if the visa is not obtained within 45 days before departure we bear all losses and immediately refund the full travel cost; travellers who do not meet this clause and fail to obtain a visa are refunded per the change-and-cancellation terms. In case of a visa refusal you must notify us within 48 hours and provide the consulate's refusal letter; any supplementary or amended materials must be submitted within 5 days, and you may not unilaterally waive the right to appeal the visa. If you commission us to handle the Schengen visa we will buy the Schengen travel insurance required for the visa; otherwise you must buy your own travel insurance and handle claims yourself. After booking, we provide all materials for the Schengen visa application free of charge. Your passport must be valid for at least 6 months from the date of departure, or customs may refuse entry. Visa fees, visa service fees, Schengen insurance fees and visa-centre appointment fees are all non-refundable and non-transferable, even if the product is changed or cancelled.
faqs.answer_zh: 本产品不包含签证费用，如您需要办理签证请选择申根签证产品。本产品需要申根签证（单次或多次入境）。保签无忧：游客在出发日前61天与我社签约的旅游产品，如在出发前45天内未获取签证，我社承担所有损失，立即退还游客全部旅游费用；不符合该条款的游客如未正常获取签证，将按照"退改与取消条款"进行退费。如遇拒签需在48小时内通知我社，并出具使领馆的拒签函，如需补充或更改材料需在五天内提交，并且不得单方面放弃"签证抗辩"权利。如委托我社办理申根签证，我社为您购买符合申根签证要求的申根旅游保险；若未委托我社办理，需自行购买旅游保险及负责理赔手续。预定后免费提供办理申根签证的全部材料。护照有效期需在离境之日起至少还有六个月，否则海关有权拒绝入境。签证费、签证服务费、申根保险费、签证中心预约费均不可退款，也无法更改使用者，即使产品退改签，签证费用也无法退款。

faqs.question_en: Booking, changes & cancellation
faqs.question_zh: 预订、变更与取消须知
faqs.answer_en: Free no-reason cancellation is available for both the agency and the traveller more than 30 days before departure (not including the 30th day). Because flights, traffic, ferry cancellations and strikes often shift the timing and order of the itinerary, travellers must arrive at the meeting point one day before the tour starts and leave the dispersal point one day after it ends, allowing reasonable flight-connection time (at least 5 hours for connections at the same airport, 7 hours for different airports in the same city); losses from not following this are borne by the traveller. This is a shared/join-in tour with a minimum group size of 10; if 10 are not reached by 30 days before departure (or 14 days for the join-in minimum) either party may cancel without liability, and below 10 people we may cancel the tour or downgrade an optional activity to "free time." Room types: two people booking together default to a standard twin/double (bed type assigned by the hotel, not selectable); a triple family room is for two parents plus one minor child (bed type assigned by the hotel); solo travellers pay a single-room deposit by default, with partial refund if successfully matched for room-sharing, or note "single occupancy, no sharing" to take a single room at the single price. All European hotels are non-smoking, check-in is 14:00 and check-out 11:00, air conditioning is not a standard feature, and named hotels are the preferred choice — if unavailable they are replaced by a similar same-star hotel without further notice. Pricing is quoted in EUR; if you pay in RMB, the amount is calculated from the Bank of China "euro sell" rate at the moment of payment that day, and the same applies to refunds, with any exchange-rate difference or bank fees borne by the traveller. Pay promptly after booking; orders need a second confirmation within 48 hours, and if not confirmed within 48 hours they are automatically refunded — do not book connecting flights or hotels before the itinerary is confirmed. The order of the itinerary may be adjusted for flight/traffic/strike reasons without this counting as a breach, and the final departure notice prevails over the itinerary sheet, while the guide's on-site notice prevails over the departure notice.
faqs.answer_zh: 跟团游产品在出发前30天（不含第30天）旅行社和旅行者均有权申请无理由取消。由于航变、交通拥堵、渡轮取消、罢工游行等导致行程时间及游览先后顺序经常调整，本产品要求旅游者在旅游团开始前一天到达集合地，旅游团结束后一天离开集散地，并预留合理的航班衔接时间（同一机场转机至少预留5小时，同城不同机场至少预留7小时），如未遵守由此导致的损失由旅行者自行承担。本产品为散客拼团，成团人数为10人；行程开始前30天（拼团最低成团为14天）未达到成团人数，双方均可解除合同且不承担违约责任，未达10人我社有权取消旅游团或将自费活动改为"自由活动"。房型说明：两人同时报名默认入住标准双人间（床型由酒店安排不可选）；三人家庭间默认为两位父母与一位未成年儿童入住（床型由酒店安排）；单人报名默认包含单人房差押金，成功拼房按比例退款，如不愿拼房可备注"要求单人入住，不退单人房差"按单人价安排。欧洲所有酒店禁烟，入住时间14:00、退房11:00，空调并非标准设施；行程内列明的酒店为优先入住酒店，如订满则换为相近条件、相同星级的酒店，恕不另行通知。所有定价以欧元为计价单位，如选择人民币支付，则以当天支付时中国银行实时"欧元卖出价"计算的人民币价格为准，退款同样适用当日即时汇率，汇率差异及银行手续费由旅行者承担。支付不等于确认行程，订单需在48小时内二次确认，超48小时未确认则自动退款，未获确定行程前请勿预订衔接机票及酒店。行程顺序可能因航班、交通、罢工等原因调整，不视为旅行社违约；如行程单与出团通知书冲突以出团通知书为准，出团通知书与导游现场通知冲突以导游现场通知为准。

faqs.question_en: Health & safety requirements
faqs.question_zh: 健康与安全须知
faqs.answer_en: To ensure a smooth trip and prevent personal injury, please have a health check before departure and do not book if you have any of the following: infectious diseases (e.g. active tuberculosis, typhoid); cardiovascular disease (e.g. severe hypertension, cardiac insufficiency, myocardial ischaemia, myocardial infarction); cerebrovascular disease (e.g. cerebral embolism, cerebral haemorrhage, brain tumour); respiratory disease (e.g. emphysema, cor pulmonale); psychiatric conditions (e.g. epilepsy and various mental illnesses); severe anaemia (haemoglobin below 50 g/L); or recovery from major or medium surgery. Pregnancy: travellers at 35 weeks or more cannot join under any circumstances; at 28 weeks or more a doctor's exam report within 7 days plus the attending physician's consent letter is required; under 28 weeks please book with caution, sign the agency's disclaimer, and you cannot take part in adventure, skiing, sea-going, high-altitude or outdoor activities. Disabled travellers need a doctor's exam within 7 days plus the attending physician's consent, a direct family member to accompany them, and at least 61 days' advance request for a reserved place and facilities. Elderly travellers over 70 need a health certificate and exam report and a direct family member to accompany them (otherwise sign the disclaimer); the trip is long and requires a degree of walking ability and stamina, so please book with caution if not physically up to it, and a physician's consent letter is needed for any adventure/skiing/sea-going/high-altitude/outdoor activity. Minors (under 18) must be accompanied by a direct relative or guardian; some sights have special rules for those under 18, 12 or 6; infants under 6 or children under 30 kg need a confirmed child safety seat in advance (otherwise bring an EU-compliant seat); minors travelling without parents need a parental authorisation letter (both parents' if travelling with non-parents); infants under 2 are not accepted. Per Article 15 of the Tourism Law, travellers must truthfully declare health information relevant to the trip (including pregnancy, breastfeeding, chronic disease, infectious-disease history, suspected symptoms or recent travel to epidemic areas) and follow safety warnings; concealment that causes injury, loss or transmission risk makes the traveller liable for their own damages and may incur civil compensation and administrative penalties.
faqs.answer_zh: 为确保旅游顺利出行、防止旅途中发生人身意外伤害，请在出行前做一次必要的身体检查，如存在以下情况请勿报名：传染性疾病患者（如活动期肺结核、伤寒等）；心血管疾病患者（如严重高血压、心功能不全、心肌缺氧、心肌梗塞等）；脑血管疾病患者（如脑栓塞、脑出血、脑肿瘤等）；呼吸系统疾病患者（如肺气肿、肺心病等）；精神病患者（如癫痫及各种精神病）；严重贫血病患者（血红蛋白水平在50克/升以下）；大中型手术的恢复期病患者。孕妇：妊娠第35周及以上在任何情况下都无法参团；妊娠第28周及以上需提供7日内的医生检查报告及主治医生同意书；妊娠第28周以下请慎重报名，需签署旅行社免责声明书，且无法参加探险、滑雪、出海、高空、户外等项目。残疾人：需提供7日内的医生检查报告及主治医生同意书，需直系家属陪同，需提前至少61天申请预留位置及专用配套设施。老年旅游者：70周岁以上需提供健康证明、体检报告并需直系家属陪同（否则需签署免责声明书）；本次行程较长，需要一定步行能力和体力，体力不支者请慎重报名；如涉及探险、滑雪、出海、高空、户外等项目需持主治医师同意书。未成年人（未满18周岁）须由直系亲属或监护人陪同，部分景点对未满18/12/6周岁有特殊限定；如有6岁以下婴儿或30公斤以下儿童请提前确认安全座椅，否则需自备符合欧盟制式的座椅；无父母陪同的未成年人需持父母授权书，与非父母同行需持父母双方监护人授权书；本产品不接受2周岁以下婴儿参团。根据《旅游法》第15条，旅游者需如实告知与旅游活动相关的个人健康信息（包括妊娠期、哺乳期、慢性病、传染病史、疑似症状或近期疫区旅居史）并遵守安全警示规定，若因隐瞒导致人身损害、财产损失或传播风险，旅游者需自行承担相应责任，并可能面临民事赔偿及行政处罚。

title_en: France, Italy & Switzerland 9-Day Tour: Paris to Rome with Jungfrau
title_zh: 法意瑞9天跟团游：巴黎到罗马·登顶少女峰
short_en: A 9-day one-way journey from Paris to Rome through Burgundy wine country, the Swiss Alps, Jungfrau, the GoldenPass rail, Milan, Venice, Tuscany and Cinque Terre.
short_zh: 9天单程深度游，从巴黎一路抵达罗马，途经勃艮第酒乡、瑞士阿尔卑斯、少女峰、金色山口列车、米兰、威尼斯、托斯卡纳与五渔村。
desc_en: This 9-day small-group tour traces a single, no-backtracking route from Paris through three countries to the Eternal City of Rome. You will savour Burgundy's wine route and a château stay, wander the fairytale lanes of Colmar, ride the GoldenPass panoramic train and ascend the Jungfrau to the Sphinx observatory, then sweep through Milan, romantic Venice, a two-night stay in Tuscany, the cliffside villages of Cinque Terre, Pisa and Renaissance Florence. The journey blends alpine scenery, Italian art cities and all-inclusive comfort, with two five-star and six four-star hotels along the way.
desc_zh: 这趟9天精品小团采用单程不走回头路的路线，从巴黎穿越法意瑞三国，一路抵达永恒之城罗马。行程品味勃艮第红酒之路并入住中世纪古堡酒店，漫步童话小镇科尔马，乘坐金色山口全景列车，登顶少女峰斯芬克斯观景台，再经时尚之都米兰、浪漫水城威尼斯、托斯卡纳两晚深度停留、悬崖上的五渔村、比萨与文艺复兴之都佛罗伦萨。阿尔卑斯雪山风光与意大利艺术名城交织，全程一价全含，沿途入住两晚五星、六晚四星酒店。

highlights.en: Ascend the Jungfrau by cable car to the Sphinx observatory for views over the Aletsch Glacier
highlights.zh: 乘缆车登顶少女峰，在斯芬克斯观景台俯瞰阿莱奇冰川

highlights.en: Ride the GoldenPass panoramic train (Lucerne–Lungern) through the heart of the Swiss Alps
highlights.zh: 乘坐金色山口全景观光列车（卢塞恩—龙疆段），穿行瑞士阿尔卑斯山间

highlights.en: Burgundy wine route with a château stay and a guided estate tasting near La Romanée-Conti
highlights.zh: 勃艮第红酒之路，入住古堡酒店并在罗曼尼·康帝产区名庄品鉴红酒

highlights.en: Romantic Venice — St. Mark's Square, the Bridge of Sighs and the island ferry
highlights.zh: 浪漫水城威尼斯——圣马可广场、叹息桥与上岛渡轮

highlights.en: Cinque Terre's five cliffside fishing villages by the local coastal train
highlights.zh: 乘小火车游览五渔村，欣赏利古里亚海岸悬崖上的五座渔村

highlights.en: Renaissance Florence and the cliff-perched art cities of Italy
highlights.zh: 文艺复兴之都佛罗伦萨与意大利艺术名城

highlights.en: One-way deep route with no backtracking, travelling by private coach with scenic rail segments included
highlights.zh: 单程深度路线不走回头路，全程专属大巴并含沿途观光列车段

highlights.en: All-inclusive pricing, city-centre 4-star hotels plus two 5-star stays, no forced shopping
highlights.zh: 一价全含，市中心四星酒店加两晚五星，无强制购物

includes.en: Hotels: 2 nights in 5-star hotels and 6 nights in 4-star hotels.
includes.zh: 【酒店】：2晚五星级酒店及6晚四星级酒店。

includes.en: Meals: 8 breakfasts in total (buffet breakfast at the hotel or breakfast in another form).
includes.zh: 【餐饮】：酒店内自助早餐或其他形式早餐共计8餐。

includes.en: Operating fees: in-itinerary execution costs such as city tourist tax, city-entry fees, residence tax, road and bridge tolls, parking and fuel, and meal allowances for the driver/guide.
includes.zh: 【执行】：游客城市税、进城费、居住税、过路过桥费、停车燃油费、司导餐补等行程内执行费用。

includes.en: Transport: tourist coach or business travel vehicle.
includes.zh: 【交通】：旅游巴士或者商务旅行车。

includes.en: Guide: a professional driver plus a Chinese-speaking guide, or a Chinese-speaking driver-guide throughout (note: fewer than 8 people = business vehicle + Chinese-speaking driver-guide; more than 8 people = tourist coach + professional driver + Chinese-speaking guide).
includes.zh: 【导游】：职业司机+中文导游或者全程中文司机兼导游（注：8人以下为商务车+中文司机兼导游，8人以上为旅游巴士+专业司机+中文导游）。

includes.en: Luggage: 1 piece of checked luggage up to 23 kg plus 1 piece of carry-on luggage.
includes.zh: 【行李】：1件23公斤行李及1件随身行李。

includes.en: Admission tickets: Burgundy winery visit and wine-tasting fee, the GoldenPass train (Lucerne-Lungern stretch), the Cinque Terre train, the Venice island ferry, and the Jungfrau cable car package ticket.
includes.zh: 【门票】：勃艮第酒庄参观门票及品酒费用、金色山口列车（卢塞恩-龙疆段）、五渔村小火车、威尼斯上岛渡轮、少女峰缆车套票。

excludes.en: Passport: personal passport application fees.
excludes.zh: 护照：个人护照费用。

excludes.en: Visa: the tourist visa fees required for the countries on the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 签证：行程中所列旅游国家所需的观光签证费用。

excludes.en: Insurance: travel insurance fees (if the itinerary involves high-risk sports, please verify whether your travel insurance covers them).
excludes.zh: 保险：旅游保险费用（如行程内涉及到高风险运动，请核实旅游保险是否包含该项运动）。

excludes.en: Gratuities: guide and driver tips totalling EUR 10 per person per day, same price for adults and children.
excludes.zh: 小费：游客支付导游和司机小费一共10欧/人/天，大小同价。

excludes.en: Meals: apart from the special meals included in the itinerary, lunches and dinners are not included.
excludes.zh: 餐饮：除行程内包含的特色餐外，行程中不包含午、晚正餐费用。

excludes.en: Admission tickets: attractions not marked as included (including but not limited to sights marked '(exterior)', and all 'recommended', 'optional', 'experience' and other unstated items - if you wish to enter, please pay on your own).
excludes.zh: 门票：行程中未注明费用包含的景点（包括但不仅限于行程中注明"外观"的景点，以及"推荐"、"可选"、"体验"等所有未提及费用包含的项目，如游客需要参观，敬请自理）。

excludes.en: Extended stay: accommodation, transport and sightseeing costs for any extension beyond the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 延长住宿：行程外额外延长的住宿、交通、观光费用。

excludes.en: Personal spending: such as drinks and alcohol, taxis, phone charges and other personal expenses.
excludes.zh: 私人消费：如饮料酒类、出租车、电话费等个人消费。

excludes.en: Other transport: transport not mentioned in the inclusions beyond the included business vehicle or minibus - e.g. the Venice gondola, and the sightseeing trains or electric taxis inside vehicle-restricted zones - please pay on your own.
excludes.zh: 其他交通：除包含商务旅行车或者中巴之外，费用包含中未提及的其他交通费用，如威尼斯贡多拉，以及车辆限行区的观光火车、电瓶出租车等费用敬请自理。

excludes.en: Free-time activities: self-guided evening sightseeing and recommended items on the itinerary, plus the resulting transport, dining, tickets and shopping costs.
excludes.zh: 自由活动：游客夜间自行游览及行程中的推荐项目，以及产生的交通、餐饮、门票、购物等费用。

excludes.en: Experience activities: any travel experience activities not included in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 体验活动：行程中没有包含的各项旅游体验活动。

excludes.en: Other costs: any costs not mentioned in the inclusions. For extra costs caused by force majeure (natural disasters, war, strikes), transport delays, flight cancellations or time changes, embassy delays in issuing visas, insufficient group numbers or other special circumstances or causes not attributable to our company (e.g. overseas visa-extension fees, accommodation, food and transport, national airfare adjustments), our company has the right to charge the difference.
excludes.zh: 其他费用：费用包含中未提及的费用。如因天灾、战争、罢工等不可抗力的原因，及因交通延阻、航班取消或更改时间、使馆延误出签证、人数不足等特殊情况或其他非我公司原因所引致的额外费用（如在外延期签证费、住食及交通费、国家航空运价调整等），我公司有权追加差价。

timeline.title_en: Paris - Dijon (Burgundy wine country, overnight in a Burgundy chateau hotel)
timeline.title_zh: 巴黎-第戎（充满红酒和玫瑰的勃艮第风情，入住勃艮第古堡酒店）
timeline.description_en: In the morning depart Paris for Dijon, the gastronomic capital and seat of the Burgundy region, home of fine red wine, escargot, roses, mustard and Charolais white beef. Stroll the old town of Dijon and visit the 13th-century Gothic Notre-Dame de Dijon (about 15 minutes), known for its rows of grotesque gargoyles and its 14th-century jacquemart clock. After lunch continue into the Burgundy vineyards (the Cote de Nuits and Cote d'Or) to tour an estate in the Romanee-Conti area, visiting the chateau courtyard, the production workshop, the vineyards and the cellars; a professional sommelier guides a tasting of three to five red and white wines. Overnight at the Burgundy Chateau Hotel, or the Oceania Dijon city-centre hotel, or a comparable 4-star hotel. Note: on some departures the order of sightseeing is adjusted but the content is unchanged.
timeline.description_zh: 上午从巴黎前往法国著名的美食之都、勃艮第大区首府第戎，这里是红酒、蜗牛、玫瑰、芥末和夏洛莱白牛的原产地。漫步第戎老城，参观建于13世纪的哥特式第戎圣母院（约15分钟），其门面有成排的兽形假排水口和一座14世纪的报时钟。午餐后前往勃艮第葡萄产区（夜丘与金岭地区），参观位于罗曼尼·康帝产区的酒庄，游览酒庄庭院、生产工坊、葡萄园和藏酒酒窖，由专业侍酒师讲解并品鉴三到五杯红酒及白酒。夜宿勃艮第古堡酒店，或第戎市区大洋洲酒店，或同等4星级酒店。备注：部分团期游览先后次序有所调整，但游览内容一致。

timeline.title_en: Dijon - Colmar - Zurich (a fairy-tale town and an international financial metropolis)
timeline.title_zh: 第戎-科尔马-苏黎世（浪漫的童话小镇与国际金融大都会）
timeline.description_en: In the morning travel to Colmar, one of France's most romantic, fairy-tale towns, the inspiration for Hayao Miyazaki's Howl's Moving Castle and a filming location for the Chinese show Chinese Restaurant 2. Explore Colmar's beautiful old town (about 1 hour), the half-timbered houses, and the Renaissance Maison des Tetes (House of Heads, built 1609, about 15 minutes), whose facade is carved with 105 expressive faces and is topped by a bronze statue by Bartholdi, designer of the Statue of Liberty. In the afternoon continue to Zurich to see the old town, Zurich Cathedral / Grossmunster (exterior), Lake Zurich and the famous Bahnhofstrasse shopping street. Overnight at the Crowne Plaza Zurich, the Fassbind, or a comparable 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往法国最浪漫、童话般的小镇之一科尔马，这里是宫崎骏电影《哈尔的移动城堡》的原型及《中餐厅2》的实景拍摄地。游览美丽的科尔马老城区（约1小时）、木筋屋以及文艺复兴时期的人头屋（建于1609年，约15分钟）——其正面墙壁雕刻有105颗表情各异的人面头像，屋顶的青铜雕像出自自由女神像设计者巴托尔迪之手。下午前往苏黎世，游览苏黎世老城区、苏黎世大教堂（外观）、苏黎世湖和班霍夫大街等景点。夜宿苏黎世皇冠假日酒店，或法斯宾德酒店，或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Zurich - Jungfrau - Interlaken (cable car to the top of the Jungfrau and the Sphinx Observatory)
timeline.title_zh: 苏黎世-少女峰-因特拉肯（少女峰全景缆车登顶斯芬克斯观景台）
timeline.description_en: In the morning visit the Alpine village of Grindelwald beneath the north face of the Eiger, famous for its postcard 'dreamy hillside' photo spot (about 30 minutes). Then ascend by cable car to the Jungfrau, one of the highest peaks of the Alps at 4,158 m and a UNESCO World Natural Heritage site (sightseeing about 3 hours), and reach the Sphinx Observatory at 3,571 m for sweeping views of the snow-capped Jungfrau and the mighty Aletsch Glacier, the largest glacier in the Alps. Continue to Interlaken, the 'town between the lakes' set between Lake Thun and Lake Brienz, with free time to enjoy the Hoheweg shopping street and the green Hohematte meadow (the ideal spot to gaze at the Jungfrau and a paragliding landing ground). Overnight at the Sigriswil snow-mountain lake-view hotel, or a comparable 4-star hotel, beside the Sigriswil panorama bridge.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往艾格峰北麓脚下的格林德尔瓦尔德小镇，欣赏著名的瑞士"梦幻山坡"明信片拍摄地（约30分钟）。随后乘坐缆车登顶少女峰——海拔4158米，是阿尔卑斯山脉最高的山峰之一，2001年被列为世界自然遗产（游览约3小时）；登上海拔3571米的"斯芬克斯观景台"，俯瞰白雪皑皑的少女峰和阿尔卑斯山中最壮丽的阿莱奇冰川。之后前往因特拉肯——位于图恩湖与布里恩茨湖之间的"湖间镇"，自由游览何维克街和荷黑马特绿地广场（眺望少女峰的最佳地点，也是滑翔翼降落地）。夜宿锡格里斯维尔雪山湖景酒店（位于锡格里斯维尔全景桥旁），或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Interlaken - Lungern - Lucerne - Milan (the GoldenPass scenic train through picture-perfect Switzerland)
timeline.title_zh: 因特拉肯-龙疆-卢塞恩-米兰（乘坐金色山口列车，尽览瑞士如画风景）
timeline.description_en: In the morning head to Lungern to enjoy the lake and village scenery, then board the GoldenPass scenic train (Lucerne-Interlaken Express, the roughly 55-minute Lungern-Lucerne stretch is the most beautiful) for a journey through mountains, sapphire lakes and snow-capped Alpine peaks. In the afternoon visit Lucerne (about 2.5 hours): take in Lake Lucerne (which inspired the 'Moonlight' atmosphere of Beethoven's 14th Piano Sonata), the Lion Monument carved into natural rock in 1821 to commemorate the 786 Swiss Guards who died defending Louis XVI at the Tuileries in 1792 (Mark Twain called it 'the most mournful and moving piece of stone in the world'), plus the Chapel Bridge and the octagonal Water Tower. Then continue to the fashion capital of Milan. Overnight at the Milan central UNA / Best Western hotel, or a comparable 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往龙疆，游览龙疆湖及小镇风光，随后乘坐金色山口观光列车（卢塞恩-因特拉肯快线，其中龙疆至卢塞恩段约55分钟最为美丽），一路穿山越岭，欣赏蓝宝石般的湖泊、白雪皑皑的群山和红瓦彩屋。下午游览卢塞恩（约2.5小时）：欣赏卢塞恩湖的湖光山色（贝多芬《第14钢琴奏鸣曲》"月光"意境的灵感来源），聆听狮子纪念碑讲述瑞士人忠贞的历史——这座1821年由丹麦雕塑家在天然岩石上雕刻的雄狮，纪念1792年为保护杜乐丽宫中路易十六家族而全部战死的786名瑞士雇佣兵，马克·吐温誉其为"世界上最悲壮和最感人的雕像"；并游览卡贝尔廊桥和八角形水塔。之后前往时尚之都米兰。夜宿米兰中心UNA/BW酒店，或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Milan - Venice (admiring a Gothic masterpiece that took 500 years to build)
timeline.title_zh: 米兰-威尼斯（瞻仰历经500年建成的哥特式精美建筑）
timeline.description_en: In the morning visit the Sforza Castle (exterior), Milan's medieval-to-Renaissance fortress and former residence of the Sforza family, now home to several museums. Then see Milan's landmark Duomo / Milan Cathedral (exterior), the Gothic marvel begun in 1386 that took 500 years to complete, with hundreds of spires and several thousand marble statues, and stroll the Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II (about 40 minutes), one of Europe's most beautiful shopping arcades, lined with Prada and other luxury boutiques, cafes and restaurants. In the afternoon depart for Venice. Overnight at the Venice voco / Hilton Garden Inn-class hotel, or a comparable 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往参观米兰中世纪到文艺复兴时期的堡垒斯福尔扎城堡（外观），它由斯福尔扎家族兴建并居住，如今辟为多座博物馆。之后参观米兰的标志性建筑米兰大教堂（外观）——这座哥特式杰作始建于1386年，历经500年才完工，拥有数百座尖塔和数千座大理石雕像；并漫步欧洲最漂亮的商业拱廊之一埃马努埃莱二世拱廊（约40分钟），廊下遍布Prada等高级精品店、餐馆和咖啡厅。下午出发前往威尼斯。夜宿威尼斯洲际VOCO酒店或希尔顿大使酒店，或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Venice - Tuscany (romantic Venice on the gentle waves, overnight at a 5-star hotel)
timeline.title_zh: 威尼斯-托斯卡纳（温柔碧波上浪漫的威尼斯，入住五星酒店）
timeline.description_en: In the morning explore Venice on your own: St Mark's Basilica (exterior), built from 829 and rebuilt in 1043-1071, once the largest church in medieval Europe; St Mark's Square, called by Napoleon 'the most beautiful drawing room in Europe'; the Bridge of Sighs (exterior), the early-Baroque enclosed bridge once used to lead condemned prisoners to the dungeons; and the magnificent pink-marble Gothic Doge's Palace (exterior), the former residence of the Doge and seat of government. In the afternoon transfer to the Tuscany region and check in. Overnight at the Tuscany Montecatini Spa Hotel, or a comparable 5-star hotel, in the spa-resort town of Montecatini Terme.
timeline.description_zh: 上午自由参观威尼斯：圣马可大教堂（外观，始建于公元829年，1043-1071年重建，曾是中世纪欧洲最大的教堂）、圣马可广场（被拿破仑称作"欧洲最美丽的客厅"）、叹息桥（外观，早期巴洛克式封闭桥，古代押送死囚的必经之路），以及华丽的粉色大理石哥特式总督宫（外观，昔日威尼斯共和国总督的官邸与政府中心）。这些建在水上的美丽建筑与蜿蜒水巷让威尼斯的浪漫久久难忘。下午入住托斯卡纳地区五星酒店。夜宿托斯卡纳蒙特卡蒂尼SPA酒店（位于著名康养度假地蒙特卡蒂尼泰尔梅），或同等5星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Tuscany - Cinque Terre - Pisa (admiring the cliffside fishing villages)
timeline.title_zh: 托斯卡纳-五渔村-比萨（鉴赏五渔村美景）
timeline.description_en: In the morning travel to the Cinque Terre on the Ligurian coast to admire the five beautiful cliffside fishing villages - Monterosso al Mare, Vernazza, Corniglia, Manarola and Riomaggiore - a UNESCO World Cultural Heritage site since 1997, with its famous coastal hiking trail (about 2 hours of sightseeing). In the afternoon continue to Pisa to see the Leaning Tower of Pisa (exterior), where legend says Galileo conducted his free-fall experiment in 1590 (about 20 minutes), and the walled Piazza dei Miracoli / Square of Miracles, which holds the cathedral, the Leaning Tower (bell tower), the baptistery and the cemetery (about 30 minutes). Overnight again at the Tuscany Montecatini Spa Hotel, or a comparable 5-star hotel. Note: if bad weather or a railway strike makes the Cinque Terre inaccessible, the itinerary automatically switches to viewing the coastal towns by coach or other means.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往五渔村，沿利古里亚海岸线游览悬崖上的五座美丽渔村——蒙特罗索、韦尔纳扎、科尔尼利亚、马纳罗拉及里奥马焦雷（1997年被联合国教科文组织列入世界文化遗产，著名的徒步线路沿海岸而建，游览约2小时）。下午前往比萨，游览比萨斜塔（外观，相传1590年伽利略曾在此做自由落体实验，约20分钟）和比萨历史文化中心的奇迹广场——广场内有比萨主教座堂、比萨斜塔（钟楼）、圣乔瓦尼洗礼堂和比萨墓园（约30分钟）。夜宿托斯卡纳蒙特卡蒂尼SPA酒店，或同等5星级酒店。备注：如遇恶劣天气或铁路公司罢工等因素导致无法游览五渔村，行程将自动改为乘坐大巴或其它形式游览海岸线城市。

timeline.title_en: Pisa - Florence - Rome (a Renaissance feast of art)
timeline.title_zh: 比萨-佛罗伦萨-罗马（文艺复兴宝库的艺术盛宴）
timeline.description_en: In the morning explore Florence, the birthplace of the Renaissance: visit the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore (the 'Cathedral of the Flower', the world's third-largest church, begun in 1296 and taking 175 years to build, about 25 minutes); the Piazza della Signoria (an open-air sculpture museum with the Palazzo Vecchio, a copy of Michelangelo's David, and the Fountain of Neptune); the Ponte Vecchio / Old Bridge over the Arno, built in 1345 and tied to Dante and Beatrice; and Piazza Santa Croce with the Basilica of Santa Croce (exterior), the burial place of Michelangelo and Galileo. In the afternoon travel to Rome and check in to rest. Overnight at the Rome San Martino Hotel or the Hotel Moderno, or a comparable 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午游览佛罗伦萨——文艺复兴的发源地：参观世界第三大教堂圣母百花大教堂（1296年出资建造，花了175年才建成，约25分钟）；市政广场（露天雕塑博物馆，坐落着维琪奥宫、米开朗基罗《大卫》复制品及海神喷泉）；阿诺河上的维奇奥桥（又称老桥，建于1345年，与但丁和比阿特丽斯的邂逅相关）；以及圣十字广场与圣十字教堂（外观，米开朗基罗和伽利略的安息地）。下午前往罗马，到达后入住酒店休息。夜宿罗马圣马丁酒店或现代酒店，或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Rome (reliving the glory of the 'Eternal City' and ancient Rome)
timeline.title_zh: 罗马（重温"万城之城"古罗马帝国的辉煌）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast tour Rome, the cradle of the ancient Roman Empire, known as the 'Eternal City'. Visit the Colosseum (exterior), the most famous monument of Rome where gladiators once fought (about 30 minutes); the Pantheon (exterior), the best-preserved ancient Roman building, over 2,000 years old, resting place of Raphael, and praised by Michelangelo as 'the design of angels' (about 20 minutes); the Spanish Steps / Piazza di Spagna, made famous by the film Roman Holiday, with the widest staircase in Europe at 138 steps (about 20 minutes); and the Trevi Fountain (exterior), the 'wishing fountain' (about 15 minutes; note that from 2025 Rome plans to charge an estimated EUR 2 photo fee if the relevant bill passes - to be paid by guests themselves). The trip ends here. Note: all the main sights of central Rome lie within the city's vehicle-restricted ZTL zone; the hotel is conveniently located for walking, and the day is on foot, about 5 km round trip - please wear light, comfortable clothing. No overnight (final day).
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后游览世界著名历史文化名城罗马——古罗马帝国的发祥地，因历史悠久被称为"永恒之城"。参观古都遗址上矗立的斗兽场（外观，古罗马最著名的历史遗迹，约30分钟）、万神殿（外观，古罗马保存最完好的建筑，距今2000多年，拉斐尔长眠于此，被米开朗基罗赞叹为"天使的设计"，约20分钟），游览西班牙广场（曾出现在电影《罗马假日》中，台阶共138级，是欧洲最宽的台阶，约20分钟）和特莱维喷泉/许愿池（外观，约15分钟；注：自2025年起罗马市政厅计划对许愿池拍照收费，如该法案通过，游客需自行支付预计2欧元的拍照费）。随后结束美好行程。备注：罗马古城主要景点均在车辆禁行区（ZTL）内，酒店位置方便步行，当天为步行游览，往返约5公里，请穿着轻便舒适。当天无住宿（行程最后一天）。

meeting_en: Tour begins in Paris, France; the route ends in Rome (one-way, no backtracking).
meeting_zh: 行程从法国巴黎出发，于罗马结束（单程，不走回头路）。

faqs.question_en: Where and when do we meet and disperse?
faqs.question_zh: 集合及集散地点和方法是怎样的？
faqs.answer_en: Paris departure: on Day 1, make your own way to Piazza Italia (Place d'Italie) in the 13th arrondissement of Paris to assemble at 09:00; on Day 9, the group disperses in central Rome around 14:00. (These are reference times; the actual times in the departure notice prevail.) We do NOT recommend a flight that lands in Paris on the morning of the join day; you may book an evening flight to leave Rome on the final day.
faqs.answer_zh: 巴黎出发：行程第1天自行前往巴黎13区意大利广场09:00集合；行程第9天14:00左右在罗马市区解散。（以上为参考时间，具体以出团通知书时间为准。）本产品不推荐参团当天早上降落巴黎的航班！结束当天可预订晚上的航班离开罗马。

faqs.question_en: Can I visit both Mt Titlis and the Jungfrau on this trip?
faqs.question_zh: 铁力士雪山和少女峰雪山可以同时游览吗？
faqs.answer_en: No. Mt Titlis and the Jungfrau belong to different departures and cannot be visited on the same trip. Please check the specific itinerary according to your travel dates.
faqs.answer_zh: 不可以的。铁力士雪山和少女峰雪山的游览分别属于不同的团期，不能同时游览，建议您根据自己的出行时间查看具体行程。

faqs.question_en: Some departures start from Rome - what does that itinerary look like, and do the sights or hotel standard change?
faqs.question_zh: 部分团期从罗马出发的行程是什么？景点和酒店标准是否有变化？
faqs.answer_en: For Rome departures, the displayed itinerary simply runs in reverse: Day 1 Rome; Day 2 Rome-Florence-Pisa; Day 3 Pisa-Cinque Terre-Tuscany; Day 4 Tuscany-Venice; Day 5 Venice-Milan; Day 6 Milan-Lucerne-Lungern-Interlaken; Day 7 Interlaken-Jungfrau-Zurich; Day 8 Zurich-Colmar-Dijon; Day 9 Dijon-Paris (see the departure notice). The sights and hotel standard are identical to the Paris-departure itinerary, with no change.
faqs.answer_zh: 从罗马出发，实际行程是展示行程反过来执行：第1天罗马；第2天罗马-佛罗伦萨-比萨；第3天比萨-五渔村-托斯卡纳；第4天托斯卡纳-威尼斯；第5天威尼斯-米兰；第6天米兰-卢塞恩-龙疆-因特拉肯；第7天因特拉肯-少女峰-苏黎世；第8天苏黎世-科尔马-第戎；第9天第戎-巴黎（参见出团通知）。罗马出发团期的景点和酒店标准与巴黎出发行程一致，没有变化。

faqs.question_en: There are no cars in central Rome - how do I sightsee on my own?
faqs.question_zh: 罗马市区内无车辆，我该如何自行游览罗马？
faqs.answer_en: Rome's sights are clustered together and almost all lie within the protected old city (vehicle-restricted zone). On the day you walk from the hotel to the Basilica di Santa Maria Maggiore (5-10 min), the Colosseum (10-15 min), the Mouth of Truth (20-25 min), the Trevi Fountain (15-20 min) and the Spanish Steps (5-10 min), then return to the hotel (20-25 min). Skipping the Mouth of Truth saves about 35 minutes of walking (about 2 km).
faqs.answer_zh: 由于罗马的景点比较集中，几乎所有景点都位于罗马古城区（历史保护区车辆限行）。当天从酒店步行前往圣母大殿（步行5-10分钟）、斗兽场（10-15分钟）、真理之口（20-25分钟）、许愿池（15-20分钟）、西班牙广场（5-10分钟），随后返回酒店（20-25分钟）。如果不游览真理之口，可减少约35分钟步行时间（约2公里）。

faqs.question_en: Can I take a vehicle within Rome?
faqs.question_zh: 我可以在罗马乘坐车辆吗？
faqs.answer_en: All tour groups sightsee on foot within Rome's old city. You may take the metro or a taxi from the last stop back to the hotel (about EUR 8-10). Since the sights are close together and the route is lined with ancient Roman ruins and shopping streets, walking between them is recommended.
faqs.answer_zh: 所有旅行团在罗马古城区内都是步行游览，但可以乘坐地铁或出租车从最后一站返回酒店，约8-10欧元。由于各景点相邻较近，沿途都是古罗马历史遗迹和各种商业街区，因此建议在各景点间徒步游览。

faqs.question_en: Do I need a visa?
faqs.question_zh: 是否需要签证？
faqs.answer_en: Yes. This product does NOT include the visa fee; you will need a Schengen visa (single or multiple entry) - if you need a visa, please choose the Schengen-visa version. After booking we provide free of charge all the materials needed to apply for the Schengen visa (see the detailed materials list). 'Visa-worry-free' guarantee: if you sign your travel contract with us at least 61 days before departure and your visa is not obtained within 45 days before departure, we bear all losses and immediately refund the full travel cost; guests who do not meet this clause and fail to obtain a visa are refunded per the 'Change & Cancellation Terms'. In case of refusal, notify us within 48 hours with the consulate's refusal letter, submit any supplementary/changed materials within five days, and do not unilaterally waive the right of 'visa defence'. If you commission us to handle the Schengen visa, we buy you Schengen-compliant travel insurance; otherwise you must buy your own insurance and handle claims yourself. Your passport must be valid for at least six months from the date of departure, or customs may refuse entry. Visa fees, visa service fees, Schengen insurance fees and visa-centre appointment fees are all non-refundable and non-transferable, even if the product is changed or cancelled.
faqs.answer_zh: 需要。本产品不包含签证费用，需办理申根签证（单次或多次入境）；如您需要办理签证，请选择申根签证产品。预订后我社免费提供办理申根签证的全部材料（参考详细材料清单）。保签无忧：游客在出发日前61天与我社签约旅游产品，如在出发前45天内未获取签证，我社承担所有损失，立即退还全部旅游费用；不符合该条款且未正常获签的游客，按"退改与取消条款"退费。如遇拒签，须在48小时内通知我社并出具使领馆拒签函，如需补充或更改材料须在五天内提交，且不得单方面放弃"签证抗辩"权利。如委托我社办理申根签证，我社为您购买符合申根要求的申根旅游保险；若未委托办理，则需自行购买旅游保险并负责理赔。护照有效期需在离境之日起至少还有六个月，否则海关有权拒绝入境。签证费、签证服务费、申根保险费、签证中心预约费均不可退款，也无法更改使用者，即使产品退改签也无法退款。

faqs.question_en: Booking, changes & cancellation
faqs.question_zh: 预订、变更与取消须知
faqs.answer_en: Cancellation: both agency and traveller may cancel without reason up to 30 days before departure (the 30th day itself excluded). Connections: because flight changes, traffic, ferry cancellations and strikes often force schedule and order adjustments, you must arrive at the assembly point one day before the join date and leave the dispersal point one day after the end date (reasonable assembly/dispersal window 07:00-21:00; allow at least 5 hours for a same-airport connection, 7 hours for different airports in the same city) - losses from not doing so are borne by the traveller. Group/成团: this is a shared (join-in) group requiring a minimum of 10 people; if 10 is not reached by 30 days before departure either side may cancel without penalty, and the disclosed maximum is the daily average cap. Rooms: a single booker pays a single-room-difference deposit (refunded pro-rata if successfully matched as a share); two bookers default to a standard twin/double with bed type assigned by the hotel (not selectable); a triple family room is for two parents + one minor, with various bed configurations. All European hotels are non-smoking, forbid cooking in rooms (including self-heating food), do not provide disposable toiletries or free boiling water, check-in is 14:00 and check-out 11:00, and air conditioning is not a standard fitting. Listed hotel names are preferred; if full, a comparable same-star hotel is substituted without separate notice. Pricing: all prices are denominated in EUR at the time of booking; if you pay in CNY, the rate is the Bank of China real-time 'EUR selling price' on the day of payment, and refunds likewise use the same-day rate (exchange differences and bank fees are borne by the traveller). Itinerary contingencies: on some departures the order of sightseeing is adjusted but the content is identical; if there is a Milan trade fair or other event the hotel location may change; only selected Cinque Terre villages are visited due to time/energy, and if bad weather or a railway strike prevents the visit the itinerary automatically switches to coach or other coastal sightseeing; costs are calculated on a year-round average basis so no refund is due to special groups for unused portions.
faqs.answer_zh: 取消：出发前30天（不含第30天）旅行社和旅行者均有权申请无理由取消。衔接：因航变、交通拥堵、渡轮取消、罢工等常导致时间及先后顺序调整，旅行者须在参团日期前一天抵达集合地、离团日期后一天离开集散地（合理集散时段07:00-21:00；同机场转机至少预留5小时，同城不同机场至少7小时），未遵守导致的损失由旅行者自行承担。成团：本产品为散客拼团，成团人数为10人，出发前30天未达成团人数双方均可解约且不担责；披露的最多参团人数为每日平均人数上限。房型：单人报名默认含单人房差押金（成功拼房按比例退还）；两人报名默认标准双人间，床型由酒店安排不可选；三人家庭间默认两位父母与一位未成年儿童入住，床型组合多样。欧洲所有酒店禁烟、禁止房内做饭（含自热食品）、不提供一次性洗漱用品及免费开水，入住14:00、退房11:00，且空调非标准设施。所列酒店名称为优先入住，如订满则换为同星级相近酒店且不另行通知。价格：所有定价以欧元为预订计价单位，如选择人民币支付，则以支付当天中国银行实时"欧元卖出价"计算，退款同样适用申请当日汇率，汇率差及银行手续费由旅行者承担。行程应变：部分团期游览先后次序调整但内容一致；如遇米兰会议或其他活动，酒店位置会调整；五渔村因体力和时间只安排个别村子游览，如遇恶劣天气或铁路罢工无法游览，则自动改为乘大巴或其它形式游览海岸线城市；本产品按全年平均成本计算，特殊人群对未参加项目并无费用可退。

faqs.question_en: Health & safety requirements
faqs.question_zh: 健康与安全须知
faqs.answer_en: Please have a health check before travelling. Do NOT join if you have: an infectious disease (e.g. active tuberculosis, typhoid); cardiovascular disease (severe hypertension, heart failure, myocardial ischaemia/infarction); cerebrovascular disease (embolism, haemorrhage, brain tumour); respiratory disease (emphysema, cor pulmonale); a psychiatric condition (epilepsy and other mental illness); severe anaemia (haemoglobin below 50 g/L); or are recovering from major surgery. Pregnancy: at 35 weeks or more you cannot join under any circumstances; at 28 weeks or more you must provide a doctor's exam report from within 7 days plus the attending doctor's consent; under 28 weeks please book with caution, sign the agency's liability waiver, and you cannot take part in adventure, skiing, sea, high-altitude or outdoor activities. Disabled travellers must provide a 7-day exam report and doctor's consent, be accompanied by an immediate family member, and apply at least 61 days ahead for a reserved place and special facilities. Travellers over 70 need a health certificate and exam report and an immediate-family escort (or sign the waiver); this is a long trip needing a degree of walking ability and stamina. Minors (under 18) must be accompanied by an immediate relative or guardian; some sights have special rules for those under 18/12/6; infants under 6 or children under 30 kg need a child safety seat confirmed in advance; an unaccompanied minor needs a parental authorisation letter; infants under 2 years old are not accepted. Per Article 15 of the Tourism Law, travellers must truthfully declare health information relevant to the trip (pregnancy, lactation, chronic disease, infectious-disease history, suspected symptoms or recent epidemic-area travel) and follow safety warnings; concealment leading to injury, loss or transmission risk makes the traveller liable for medical, quarantine and compensation costs, and the agency may terminate the contract without refund.
faqs.answer_zh: 出行前请做一次必要的身体检查。如存在下列情况请勿报名：传染性疾病（如活动期肺结核、伤寒）；心血管疾病（严重高血压、心功能不全、心肌缺氧、心肌梗塞）；脑血管疾病（脑栓塞、脑出血、脑肿瘤）；呼吸系统疾病（肺气肿、肺心病）；精神病（癫痫及各种精神病）；严重贫血（血红蛋白50克/升以下）；大中型手术恢复期患者。孕妇：妊娠35周及以上任何情况下都无法参团；28周及以上需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书；28周以下请慎重报名，需签署旅行社免责声明书，且无法参加探险、滑雪、出海、高空、户外等项目。残疾人需提供7日内检查报告及主治医生同意书、需直系家属陪同，并提前至少61天申请预留位置及专用设施。70周岁以上老年人需提供健康证明、体检报告并由直系家属陪同（否则签署免责声明书）；本行程较长，需要一定步行能力和体力。未成年人（未满18周岁）需由直系亲属或监护人陪同；部分景点对未满18/12/6周岁有特殊限定；6岁以下婴儿或30公斤以下儿童需提前确认安全座椅；无父母陪同的未成年人须持父母授权书；本产品不接受2周岁以下婴儿参团。根据《旅游法》第15条，旅游者需如实告知与旅游活动相关的个人健康信息（包括妊娠期、哺乳期、慢性病、传染病史、疑似症状或近期疫区旅居史）并遵守安全警示；若因隐瞒导致人身损害、财产损失或传播风险，需自行承担医疗、隔离费用及赔偿责任，旅行社可解除合同且不退还费用。

title_en: Provence & French Riviera 5-Day Tour from Nice
title_zh: 尼斯出发普罗旺斯与蔚蓝海岸5天跟团游
short_en: A 5-day deep dive into the Côte d'Azur and Provence from Nice — Monaco, Èze, Saint-Tropez sailing, Avignon, lavender fields and Verdon Gorge.
short_zh: 尼斯出发5天深度畅游蔚蓝海岸与普罗旺斯：摩纳哥、埃兹、圣特罗佩出海、阿维尼翁、薰衣草花田与凡尔登大峡谷。
desc_en: Starting and ending in Nice, this 5-day group tour weaves together the glamour of the French Riviera and the romance of Provence. Drive the clifftop Princess Grace coast road to Menton, Monaco and the eagle's-nest village of Èze, cruise the Mediterranean to Saint-Tropez, then head inland to Roman Nîmes, the 'castle in the sky' hilltop town of Gordes, Sénanque Abbey and the papal city of Avignon. The journey climaxes among Valensole's lavender fields, the turquoise Lake Sainte-Croix and the Verdon Gorge before a final glide along the red carpets of Cannes back to Nice. All-inclusive pricing with city-centre hotels, a Chinese-speaking guide-driver and no forced shopping.
desc_zh: 本5天跟团游以尼斯为起终点，将蔚蓝海岸的璀璨与普罗旺斯的浪漫串联成一线。沿格蕾丝公主峭壁公路游览柠檬小镇芒通、摩纳哥与悬崖上的“鹫巢”埃兹，乘船出海巡游地中海直抵圣特罗佩；随后深入内陆，探访古罗马名城尼姆、宫崎骏笔下“天空之城”原型高德古城、塞南克修道院与教皇之城阿维尼翁。行程在瓦朗索勒薰衣草花海、蒂芙尼蓝的圣十字湖与凡尔登大峡谷达到高潮，最后漫步戛纳红毯星光大道返回尼斯。一价全含，入住市区酒店，配中文司机兼导游，全程无强制购物。

highlights.en: Drive the Princess Grace clifftop coast road with sweeping Mediterranean views over Cap-Ferrat and Villefranche
highlights.zh: 驰骋格蕾丝公主峭壁公路，俯瞰费拉角与滨海自由城的地中海美景

highlights.en: Visit Monaco, the lemon town of Menton, and the eagle's-nest clifftop village of Èze
highlights.zh: 游览摩纳哥公国、柠檬小镇芒通与悬崖小镇“鹫巢”埃兹

highlights.en: Mediterranean sailing from Sainte-Maxime across to the legendary sun city of Saint-Tropez
highlights.zh: 从圣马克西姆乘船出海，巡游地中海直达传奇“太阳城”圣特罗佩

highlights.en: Explore Roman Nîmes and the hilltop village of Gordes — the real-world model for Miyazaki's 'Castle in the Sky'
highlights.zh: 探访古罗马名城尼姆与宫崎骏《天空之城》原型——高德古城

highlights.en: Discover Provence's gems: Fontaine-de-Vaucluse, Sénanque Abbey and the papal city of Avignon
highlights.zh: 畅游普罗旺斯瑰宝：泉水小镇、塞南克修道院与教皇之城阿维尼翁

highlights.en: Wander the Valensole lavender fields, turquoise Lake Sainte-Croix and the Verdon Gorge (in season)
highlights.zh: 徜徉瓦朗索勒薰衣草花海、蒂芙尼蓝圣十字湖与凡尔登大峡谷（花期内）

highlights.en: Stroll the Cannes Palais des Festivals and Walk of Fame on the glamorous seafront
highlights.zh: 漫步戛纳影节宫与星光大道，感受海滨大道的电影之都风情

highlights.en: All-inclusive local departure tour: city hotels, listed attraction entries, Chinese-speaking guide-driver, two nights in Nice, no forced shopping
highlights.zh: 目的地参团一价全含：市区酒店、含景点门票、中文司机兼导游、尼斯连住两晚、全程无强制购物

includes.en: Hotels: 4 nights in comfortable 2-3 star hotels.
includes.zh: 【酒店】舒适2-3星级酒店4晚。

includes.en: Breakfast: buffet breakfast at the hotel or breakfast in another form.
includes.zh: 【早餐】酒店内的自助式早餐或其他形式早餐。

includes.en: Operating costs: in-itinerary operating fees such as city/tourist tax, city-entry fees, residence tax, road and bridge tolls, and parking and fuel charges.
includes.zh: 【执行】游客城市税、进城费、居住税、过路过桥费、停车燃油费等行程内执行费用。

includes.en: Transport: tour coach or business travel vehicle.
includes.zh: 【交通】旅游巴士或商务旅行车。

includes.en: Guide: professional driver plus a Chinese-speaking guide, or a Chinese-speaking driver-guide (note: fewer than 9 people = business vehicle + Chinese-speaking driver-guide; 9 or more = tour coach + professional driver + Chinese-speaking guide).
includes.zh: 【导游】职业司机+中文导游服务，或中文司机兼导游服务（注：9人以下为商务车+中文司机兼导游，9人以上为旅游巴士+专业司机+中文导游）。

includes.en: Luggage: one 23 kg checked bag and one piece of hand luggage.
includes.zh: 【行李】1件23公斤行李及1件随身行李。

includes.en: Admissions: first-entry tickets to the Saint-Tropez crossing ferry, the Perfume Museum and the Eze exotic garden.
includes.zh: 【门票】圣特罗佩出海渡轮、香水博物馆、埃兹空中花园首道门票。

excludes.en: Passport: the cost of your personal passport.
excludes.zh: 护照：个人护照费用。

excludes.en: Visa: the tourist/sightseeing visa fees required for the countries listed in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 签证：行程中所列旅游国家所需的观光签证费用。

excludes.en: Insurance: travel insurance (if the itinerary involves high-risk sports, please verify whether your travel insurance covers that activity).
excludes.zh: 保险：旅游保险费用（如行程内涉及到高风险运动，请核实旅游保险是否包含该项运动）。

excludes.en: Tips: gratuities for the guide and driver, totaling EUR 10 per person per day (same price for adults and children).
excludes.zh: 小费：游客支付导游和司机小费一共10欧/人/天，大小同价。

excludes.en: Meals: lunches and dinners are not included.
excludes.zh: 餐饮：行程中不包含午、晚正餐费用。

excludes.en: Admissions not specified as included: any sight not marked as included (including but not limited to sights noted as "exterior," and all "recommended," "optional," "experience" and other items not stated as included) - to be paid by guests who wish to visit.
excludes.zh: 门票：行程中未注明费用包含的景点（包括但不仅限于行程中注明"外观"的景点，以及"推荐"、"可选"、"体验"等所有未提及费用包含的项目，如游客需要参观，敬请自理）。

excludes.en: Extended stays: any accommodation, transport or sightseeing extended beyond the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 延长住宿：行程外额外延长的住宿、交通、观光费用。

excludes.en: Personal spending: drinks and alcohol, taxis, phone charges and other personal consumption.
excludes.zh: 私人消费：如饮料酒类、出租车、电话费等个人消费。

excludes.en: Other transport: any transport not mentioned in the inclusions beyond the included business vehicle/minibus, such as Venice gondolas, and sightseeing trains, electric taxis etc. in vehicle-restricted zones - to be paid by the guest.
excludes.zh: 其他交通：除包含商务旅行车或中巴之外、费用包含中未提及的其他交通费用，如威尼斯贡多拉，以及车辆限行区的观光火车、电瓶出租车等费用敬请自理。

excludes.en: Free time: night-time self-touring and recommended in-itinerary activities, plus the resulting transport, meals, admissions and shopping costs.
excludes.zh: 自由活动：游客夜间自行游览及行程中的推荐项目，以及由此产生的交通、餐饮、门票、购物等费用。

excludes.en: Experience activities: any travel-experience activities not included in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 体验活动：行程中没有包含的各项旅游体验活动。

excludes.en: Other costs: any cost not mentioned in the inclusions. In the event of force majeure (natural disaster, war, strikes etc.) or special circumstances such as traffic delays, flight cancellations or schedule changes, embassy visa delays, or insufficient group numbers, or other causes not attributable to our company, our company reserves the right to charge the price difference for any extra costs incurred (e.g. overseas visa-extension fees, accommodation, meals and transport, national airfare adjustments).
excludes.zh: 其他费用：费用包含中未提及的费用。如因天灾、战争、罢工等不可抗力原因，及因交通延阻、航班取消或更改时间、使馆延误出签证、人数不足等特殊情况或其他非我公司原因所导致的额外费用（如在外延期签证费、住宿、餐饮及交通费、国家航空运价调整等），我公司有权追加差价。

timeline.title_en: Nice - Menton - Monaco - Eze - Nice: the cliff-top "eagle's nest" gardens of the Cote d'Azur
timeline.title_zh: 尼斯-芒通-摩纳哥-埃兹-尼斯：摩纳哥格蕾丝公主悬崖峭壁上的"鹫巢"空中花园
timeline.description_en: The group forms up at the B&B Hotel Nice Aeroport Arenas, then heads to Menton, the "lemon town," to wander its Baroque old quarter and lemon-toned streets. Next is the Principality of Monaco, visiting Monaco itself and its yacht harbour (Monte-Carlo and the marina are the most iconic areas). The route then climbs the clifftop village of Eze along the Cote d'Azur corniche named for Princess Grace (Av. Princesse de Grace), to look out over the Mediterranean from the medieval "eagle's nest" exotic garden (the rear garden of the famous Chevre d'Or hotel; about 3 hours), with a stop at the Perfume Museum at the foot of Eze (a 1983 museum tracing the history and craft of perfume; about 1 hour). After returning to Nice you are free to explore Nice old town, the Promenade des Anglais and the Baie des Anges beach. Overnight at the B&B Hotel Nice Aeroport Arenas or a comparable 3-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 当天在B&B尼斯竞技场酒店（B&B Hotel Nice Aeroport Arenas）集合上团，随后前往"柠檬小镇"芒通，漫步巴洛克风格的老城区与柠檬色调的街巷。接着前往摩纳哥公国，参观摩纳哥及其游艇码头（蒙特卡洛与游艇海港为最具代表性的游览区域）。随后沿以格蕾丝公主命名的蔚蓝海岸峭壁公路（Av. Princesse de Grace）登上悬崖小镇埃兹，从中世纪"鹫巢"异国风情花园俯瞰地中海（此处也是著名金羊酒店的后花园，游玩约3小时），并在埃兹山下的香水博物馆停留（1983年落成，讲述香水的历史与调配工艺，约1小时）。返回尼斯后可自由参观尼斯老城、英格兰人散步大道及天使湾沙滩。夜宿B&B尼斯竞技场酒店或同等3星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Nice - Saint-Raphael - Saint-Tropez - Arles - Nimes: a Mediterranean cruise on the Cote d'Azur and a Post-Impressionist journey
timeline.title_zh: 尼斯-圣拉斐尔-圣特罗佩-阿尔勒-尼姆：地中海出海巡游蔚蓝海岸与后印象派之旅
timeline.description_en: The morning begins at the Cote d'Azur resort town of Saint-Raphael, a lively spot of bars, restaurants and beaches reached on foot along the Esterel coast. You then board a boat at Sainte-Maxime for a Mediterranean cruise (about 20 minutes) across to the "sun city" of Saint-Tropez, the glamorous resort famous for its dozens of small beaches studded with luxury hotels and 1930s-style Italian Riva yachts (about 2 hours). By coach the tour continues to Arles, the art-steeped "little Rome of Gaul," to visit the old town and the Van Gogh cafe, with sunflower fields in season. In the evening you reach the "water-sprite city" of Nimes for check-in. Overnight at the Ibis Styles Nimes Gare Centre or a comparable 3-star hotel. Note: sunflowers bloom June-July; in very hot years they may be harvested early and the sunflower fields cannot be visited.
timeline.description_zh: 早上前往蔚蓝海岸海滨重镇圣拉斐尔，这里酒吧、餐厅、海水浴场云集，气氛热闹。随后在圣马克西姆乘船出海巡游地中海（游船约20分钟），直达有"太阳城"之称的海洋艺术之城圣特罗佩——这座璀璨度假胜地以近百个小型海滩闻名，豪华酒店与20世纪30年代意大利Riva快艇遍布海湾（游玩约2小时）。随后乘巴士前往阿尔勒，参观充满艺术气息、被誉为"高卢人的小罗马"的老城区及梵高咖啡馆，并在花期欣赏向日葵花田。傍晚抵达"水精灵之城"尼姆入住酒店。夜宿尼姆火车站中心宜必思尚品酒店或同等3星级酒店。备注：向日葵花期为6月-7月，如气候炎热提前收割，则无法游览向日葵花田。

timeline.title_en: Nimes - Avignon - Provence hill villages - Avignon: Miyazaki's "Castle in the Sky" and the celebrated theatre festival
timeline.title_zh: 尼姆-阿维尼翁-南法小镇-阿维尼翁：宫崎骏笔下的"天空之城"与精妙绝伦的戏剧节
timeline.description_en: After breakfast you explore the ancient Roman city of Nimes on foot, taking in its remarkably preserved arena and the Jardin de la Fontaine, with the Tour Magne watchtower on the hill above. The tour then sets off on a circuit of Provence's loveliest hill villages: Fontaine-de-Vaucluse, the spring-fed water village about half an hour from Avignon (about 1 hour); Gordes, the hillside stone town said to be the model for Miyazaki's "Castle in the Sky," crowned by its 16th-century chateau (about 30 minutes); and the Senanque Abbey, founded in 1148 and set in a quiet valley framed by lavender, the backdrop of many postcards (please keep quiet when visiting; about 30 minutes). You then return to Avignon to explore the old city on your own, viewing the Pont d'Avignon (exterior) and the Palais des Papes (exterior). Overnight at the Ibis Avignon Centre Gare or Ibis Avignon Sud, or a comparable 2-3 star hotel; the in-town location is ideal during the Avignon Theatre Festival each July, when puppet shows, opera, street art and all-night performances light up the old city.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后徒步参观古罗马历史名城尼姆，欣赏保存完好的古罗马竞技场与古迹庭院泉边公园（Jardin de la Fontaine），以及丘陵上的古罗马瞭望塔马涅塔。随后开启普罗旺斯绝美小镇之旅，依次游览：泉水小镇（Fontaine de Vaucluse，距阿维尼翁约半小时车程，约1小时）；高德古城（依山而建的石头古城，相传为宫崎骏《天空之城》原型，山顶矗立16世纪城堡，约30分钟）；塞南克修道院（1148年由Mazan修道院僧侣修建，隐于宁静山谷中、四周环绕薰衣草，是众多明信片取景地，参观时请保持安静，约30分钟）。之后前往阿维尼翁，自行参观阿维尼翁古城、罗纳河断桥（外观）、阿维尼翁教皇宫（外观）。夜宿阿维尼翁老城宜必思酒店或阿维尼翁南宜必思酒店或同等2-3星级酒店；每年7月阿维尼翁戏剧节期间，木偶剧、歌剧、街头艺术及通宵街头戏剧表演点亮整个古城，老城内的酒店便于沉浸式体验戏剧节。

timeline.title_en: Avignon - Valensole - Lac de Sainte-Croix - Cannes - Nice: through purple lavender seas and across a Tiffany-blue lake
timeline.title_zh: 阿维尼翁-瓦朗索勒-圣十字湖-戛纳-尼斯：徜徉薰衣草紫色花海，泛舟蒂芙尼蓝的湖上
timeline.description_en: After breakfast you set off for the lavender fields of Valensole and the D907 road (during the lavender season), immersing yourself in the romantic purple sea. In the afternoon the tour visits Europe's Verdon Gorge - the second-largest canyon in the world, 25 km long and 700 m deep - and the Lac de Sainte-Croix, whose emerald waters sit jewel-like among the mountains, viewed from a clifftop terrace (about 1 hour). Next is the film town and seaside resort of Cannes, where you visit the Palais des Festivals (built 1982, home of the Palme d'Or) and the Walk of Fame with its 300-plus star handprints beside the Palais, with free time to stroll the Croisette seafront (about 1 hour). You reach Nice in the evening. Overnight at the B&B Hotel Nice Aeroport Arenas or a comparable 3-star hotel. Note: depending on temperature, lavender blooms from mid-to-late June and is usually harvested by late July; if lavender cannot be seen during the tour dates, this is changed to a visit to the pottery town (Moustiers).
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后出发前往瓦朗索勒及D907公路的薰衣草花田（薰衣草花期期间），置身浪漫紫色花海，留下紫色记忆。下午游览欧洲峡谷——凡尔登大峡谷（世界第二大峡谷，长25公里、深700米）以及圣十字湖，从居高临下的悬崖景观台俯瞰，湖水仿佛镶嵌在群山之中的翡翠（约1小时）。随后前往南法电影重镇及海滨小城戛纳，参观电影宫（建于1982年，金棕榈奖颁奖地）及其旁的星光大道（已累积300多个明星手印），并自由漫步戛纳海滨大道（约1小时）。傍晚抵达尼斯。夜宿B&B尼斯竞技场酒店或同等3星级酒店。备注：根据气温不同，薰衣草一般于6月中下旬绽放、7月下旬收割；如团期内无法参观薰衣草，则改为参观陶瓷小镇（穆斯捷）。

timeline.title_en: Nice: free morning and dispersal
timeline.title_zh: 尼斯：自由上午与解散
timeline.description_en: After breakfast guests may either sleep in, check out and leave on their own, or join the group transfer into central Nice where the tour disperses, bringing this wonderful journey to a close. There is no accommodation on this final day. The group disbands at the B&B Hotel Nice Aeroport Arenas. Because the itinerary's pacing can shift with flights and traffic, it is recommended to leave the dispersal point one day after the tour ends and allow a reasonable connection time.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，各位贵宾可选择睡到自然醒后自行退房离开，或跟团至尼斯市区解散，结束美好旅行！当天无住宿安排，在B&B尼斯竞技场酒店就地解散。由于行程节奏可能因航班与交通调整，建议在离团日期的后一天再离开集散地，并预留合理的衔接时间。

meeting_en: Nice — group meets at the B&B Hotel Nice Aéroport Arenas (or equivalent 3-star hotel); local-departure tour starting and ending in Nice.
meeting_zh: 尼斯——在B&B尼斯竞技场酒店（或同等3星级酒店）集合上团；目的地参团，尼斯出发、尼斯结束。

faqs.question_en: Where and how does the group meet, and where does it disperse?
faqs.question_zh: 集合地点和方法？解散地点在哪里？
faqs.answer_en: Meet at 08:00 on the day in front of the B&B Hotel Nice Aeroport Arenas (B&B Hotel Nice Aeroport Arenas); the exact time follows the departure notice. The tour disperses at the same B&B Hotel Nice Aeroport Arenas. You may join the tour arriving in Nice on the same day, but you will not be able to visit that day's sights and no refund is given. Flights landing in Nice on the start day are not recommended.
faqs.answer_zh: 当天早上08:00，在B&B尼斯竞技场酒店门口（B&B Hotel Nice Aeroport Arenas）上团集合，具体时间以出团通知为准。在B&B尼斯竞技场酒店就地解散。本产品可以参团当天抵达尼斯，但当天景点将无法游览，且无费用可退！不推荐参团当天降落尼斯的航班！

faqs.question_en: Can I skip Monaco and spend the whole day on the beach in Nice?
faqs.question_zh: 是否可以不去摩纳哥，而在尼斯海滩停留一整天？
faqs.answer_en: Yes. Please notify the guide in advance that you wish to give up that day's Monaco itinerary (Day 1). Since the Nice hotel is on the Promenade des Anglais, free activity there is very convenient.
faqs.answer_zh: 可以，请提前通知导游放弃摩纳哥当天行程（第一天）。由于尼斯入住在英格兰人散步大道上，自由活动非常方便。

faqs.question_en: I get seasick - can I skip the Mediterranean boat cruise?
faqs.question_zh: 我晕船，是否可以不参加地中海乘船出海项目？
faqs.answer_en: Yes. You can travel by coach to the harbour at Saint-Tropez instead, but the boat ticket is non-refundable.
faqs.answer_zh: 可以，您可随车前往圣特罗佩海港码头，但无法获得退票。

faqs.question_en: Does the itinerary include strenuous walking or climbing?
faqs.question_zh: 行程中有徒步、爬山等较消耗体能的活动吗？
faqs.answer_en: Reaching the "eagle's nest" exotic garden at the top of Eze requires a climb, but the difficulty and effort are fairly easy and most people can manage it. Note: on some departures, due to the garden being closed or group-size issues, it may not be possible to climb to the garden; if so, this is changed to a village visit.
faqs.answer_zh: 埃兹山顶的"鹫巢"空中花园需要登山前往，但难度和体能消耗较简单，大多数人都可以前往。备注：个别团期因植物园不开放及参团人数问题，有可能无法登顶植物园，如无法前往将改为小镇游览。

faqs.question_en: Is there a chance to swim in the sea during the trip?
faqs.question_zh: 行程中是否有下海、泡海水浴的机会和地点？
faqs.answer_en: Two of the nights are spent in seaside cities where you can swim - please bring your own swimwear. You can also give up the one-day Monaco trip and roam the Nice seafront freely instead; as the Nice hotel is on the Promenade des Anglais, free activity is very convenient.
faqs.answer_zh: 行程内两晚酒店在海滨城市，都可以下海游泳，请自备泳衣。也可以放弃摩纳哥一日游，自由在尼斯城市海滨游览；由于尼斯入住在英格兰人散步大道上，非常方便自由活动。

faqs.question_en: What are the dates and locations of the festivals along the route?
faqs.question_zh: 行程内节日庆典的日期和地点？
faqs.answer_en: Avignon Theatre Festival: 4 July 2026 - 25 July 2026. Other festivals along the route include the Nimes International Music Festival, the Arles International Photography Festival and the Nice International Jazz Festival.
faqs.answer_zh: 阿维尼翁戏剧节：2026年7月4日-2026年7月25日。沿线其他节庆包括尼姆国际音乐节、阿尔勒国际摄影节、尼斯国际爵士节。

faqs.question_en: When is the lavender blooming season?
faqs.question_zh: 薰衣草的花期是什么时候？
faqs.answer_en: Bloom timing varies by year, climate and altitude, and we adjust the itinerary and viewing areas slightly with the season. Generally lavender blooms from early-to-mid June through mid-to-late August. From late May, local farmers and the tourist board also plant large fields of violets and lupins, which form another vast purple sea - in fact the purple fields widely seen online are usually purple lupins (Lupinus, of the legume family), not the lavender of the mint family.
faqs.answer_zh: 每年因气候不同开花时间不同，海拔不同开花时间也不同，我社会根据节气略微调整行程和观看花海的区域。一般情况下，每年6月中上旬到8月中下旬都有薰衣草盛开；从5月底开始，当地农户及旅游局还会特意种植大量紫罗兰和鲁冰花花田，同样形成一大片紫色花海。其实网上广为流传的紫色花海通常是紫色鲁冰花（豆科羽扇豆属-Lupinus），并非唇形科的薰衣草。

faqs.question_en: Do I need a visa?
faqs.question_zh: 是否需要签证？
faqs.answer_en: Yes. This product does not include the visa fee; a Schengen visa (single- or multiple-entry) is required - if you need one, please choose a Schengen-visa product. After booking we provide all materials for the Schengen visa application free of charge (see the detailed materials list). Your passport must be valid for at least six months beyond your departure date or customs may refuse entry. "Visa guarantee" (bao qian wu you): for products signed with us at least 61 days before departure, if the visa is not obtained within 45 days before departure we bear all losses and immediately refund the full travel cost; guests not meeting this clause who fail to obtain a visa are refunded per the change-and-cancellation terms. A refusal must be reported within 48 hours with the consulate's refusal letter, and any supplementary/changed materials submitted within five days; you may not unilaterally waive the "visa defence" right. If you commission us to handle the Schengen visa, we will buy Schengen-compliant travel insurance for you; otherwise you must arrange your own insurance and claims. Note: visa fees, visa-service fees, Schengen insurance fees and visa-centre appointment fees are all non-refundable and non-transferable, even if the product itself is changed or cancelled.
faqs.answer_zh: 需要。本产品不包含签证费用，需办理申根签证（单次或多次入境）——如需办理请选择申根签证产品。预订后免费提供办理申根签证的全部材料（参考详细材料清单）。护照有效期需在离境之日起至少还有六个月，否则海关有权拒绝入境。保签无忧：游客在出发日前61天与我社签约的旅游产品，如在出发前45天内未获取签证，我社承担所有损失并立即退还全部旅游费用；不符合该条款的游客如未正常获取签证，将按"退改与取消条款"退费。如遇拒签需在48小时内通知我社并出具使领馆拒签函，如需补充或更改材料须在五天内提交，且不得单方面放弃"签证抗辩"权利。如委托我社办理申根签证，我社将为您购买符合申根签证要求的旅游保险；若未委托，则需自行购买保险并负责理赔。注意：签证费、签证服务费、申根保险费、签证中心预约费均不可退款，也无法更改使用者，即使产品退改签，签证费用亦无法退款。

faqs.question_en: Booking, changes and cancellation
faqs.question_zh: 预订、变更与取消须知
faqs.answer_en: Free, no-reason cancellation is allowed up to 30 days before departure (not including the 30th day) by either party. Pricing is quoted in EUR; if you pay in CNY, the amount is calculated at the Bank of China "euro selling" rate on the day of payment, and refunds likewise use the rate on the refund day (exchange differences and bank fees are borne by the traveller). Confirmation: payment does not equal a confirmed itinerary - book at least 14 days ahead; the operator re-confirms within 48 hours, otherwise an automatic refund applies, so do not book connecting flights/hotels before confirmation. This is a shared/joining tour with a minimum group size of 10; if 10 is not reached by 14 days before departure (final cutoff 30 days for the no-fault cancellation right) you may switch product or get a refund. Rooms: two people booking together default to a standard twin/double with bed type assigned by the hotel (cannot be specified); solo travellers pay a single-room supplement unless successfully matched for room-sharing; triple/family rooms default to two parents plus one minor with bed type assigned by the hotel. European hotels are non-smoking, no cooking in rooms, no free toiletries or boiling water, check-in 14:00 / check-out 11:00, and air-conditioning is not standard. Itinerary contingency: because of frequent flight changes, traffic, ferry cancellations, strikes/parades and route optimisation, the actual arrival times and order of sights may change - please arrive one day before the tour starts and leave one day after it ends, allowing at least 5 hours for a same-airport connection and 7 hours for a different-airport connection, within the reasonable meet/disperse window of 07:00-21:00. Where sights cannot be visited due to force majeure, the guide may, after consulting you, cancel/replace them or refund the ticket price per the product (not the gate price). The whole tour has no leader (local guides serve on the ground), no forced shopping, and no shopping stops; optional self-pay activities may be recommended locally without any compulsion.
faqs.answer_zh: 出发前30天（不含第30天）旅行社和旅行者均可无理由取消。所有定价以欧元为计价单位；如选择人民币支付，则以当天支付时按中国银行"欧元卖出价"自动计算的人民币实时价格为准，退款同样适用申请退款当日汇率（汇率差异及银行手续费由旅行者承担）。确认：支付不等于确认行程，建议至少提前14天预订，组团社在48小时内二次确认，超48小时未确认则默认自动退款，未确认前请勿预订衔接机票及酒店。本产品为散客拼团，成团人数为10人；如发团前14天（无理由取消权截止为30天）仍未达10人，可改选其他组团方式/产品或退还旅游费用。房型：两人同时报名默认标准双人间，床型由酒店安排不可指定；单人报名含单人房差，拼房成功后按比例退还；三人家庭间默认两位父母与一位未成年儿童入住，床型由酒店安排。欧洲酒店全面禁烟、房内禁止做饭、不提供一次性洗漱用品及免费开水，入住14:00、退房11:00，且空调并非标准设施。行程应变：因航变频繁、交通拥堵、渡轮取消、罢工游行及行程顺序优化，实际到达时间与游览顺序可能调整，请于参团前一天抵达集合地、离团后一天离开集散地，同机场转机至少预留5小时、不同机场转机至少预留7小时，合理集散时间段为07:00至21:00。如因不可抗力导致景点无法游览，服务人员经与您协商后可取消/更换该景点，或按产品门票价（非景区挂牌价）退费。全程无领队（由当地导游服务）、无强制购物、无购物店行程，当地可能推荐自费项目但绝无强制消费。

faqs.question_en: Health and safety requirements
faqs.question_zh: 健康与安全须知
faqs.answer_en: Please have a health check before travelling and do NOT book if you have any of the following: infectious disease (e.g. active tuberculosis, typhoid); cardiovascular disease (e.g. severe hypertension, heart failure, myocardial ischemia or infarction); cerebrovascular disease (e.g. cerebral embolism, hemorrhage, brain tumour); respiratory disease (e.g. emphysema, cor pulmonale); psychiatric conditions including epilepsy; severe anemia (hemoglobin below 50 g/L); or recovery from major/medium surgery. Pregnancy: travel is not permitted at all at 35 weeks or beyond; at 28 weeks or beyond a doctor's exam report (within 7 days) and physician consent are required; under 28 weeks please book with caution, sign a liability waiver, and you cannot join adventure, skiing, boating, high-altitude or outdoor activities. Travellers with disabilities need a recent (within 7 days) medical report and physician consent, an accompanying direct family member, and at least 61 days' advance request for a reserved space and facilities. Elderly: travellers over 70 need a health certificate and medical report and a direct family member accompanying (or sign a waiver), good walking ability for this fairly long itinerary, physician consent for any adventure/ski/boat/high-altitude/outdoor activities, and at least 61 days' advance request for age-friendly services. Minors (under 18) must be accompanied by a direct relative or guardian; some sights have special rules for those under 18/12/6; infants/children under 6 or under 30 kg need a confirmed safety seat in advance (otherwise bring an EU-standard seat); minors travelling abroad without parents need parental authorization (a written authorization from the other parent if only one parent travels, or both parents' guardian authorization if travelling with non-parents); infants under 2 are not accepted. Under Article 15 of the Tourism Law (and the Infectious Diseases Prevention Law, 2025 revision), travellers must truthfully declare health information relevant to the trip (pregnancy, lactation, chronic disease, infectious-disease history, suspected symptoms, recent travel to epidemic areas) and follow safety warnings; concealment that causes harm makes the traveller liable for the resulting injury, loss, medical/quarantine costs and compensation, and the agency may terminate the contract without refund.
faqs.answer_zh: 出行前请做必要的身体检查，如有以下情况请勿报名：传染性疾病（如活动期肺结核、伤寒）；心血管疾病（如严重高血压、心功能不全、心肌缺氧、心肌梗塞）；脑血管疾病（如脑栓塞、脑出血、脑肿瘤）；呼吸系统疾病（如肺气肿、肺心病）；精神病（含癫痫及各种精神病）；严重贫血（血红蛋白低于50克/升）；大中型手术恢复期。孕妇：妊娠35周及以上任何情况下均不可参团；妊娠28周及以上需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书；妊娠28周以下请慎重报名，需签署免责声明书，且不可参加探险、滑雪、出海、高空、户外等项目。残疾人：需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书、需直系家属陪同、并至少提前61天申请预留位置及专用设施。老年人：70周岁以上需提供健康证明、体检报告并由直系家属陪同（否则签署免责声明书），本行程较长、需有一定步行能力，涉及探险/滑雪/出海/高空/户外项目需持主治医师同意书，并至少提前61天申请适老化服务及设施。未成年人（未满18岁）须由直系亲属或监护人陪同，部分景点对未满18/12/6周岁有特殊限定；6岁以下或30公斤以下儿童请提前确认安全座椅，否则需自备符合欧盟标准的座椅；无父母陪同的未成年人出境须持父母授权书（仅一方陪同需另一方书面授权，与非父母同行需父母双方监护人授权）；不接受2周岁以下婴儿参团。根据《旅游法》第15条及《传染病防治法》（2025修订），旅游者须如实告知与旅游活动相关的个人健康信息（含妊娠期、哺乳期、慢性病、传染病史、疑似症状或近期疫区旅居史）并遵守安全警示，若因隐瞒导致人身损害或财产损失，旅游者须自行承担相应医疗、隔离费用及赔偿责任，旅行社可解除合同且不退还费用。

title_en: France, Italy & Switzerland 14-Day Deep-Dive Small-Group Tour (Paris to Rome)
title_zh: 法意瑞深度14天精品小团游（巴黎出发，罗马结束）
short_en: A 14-day Paris-to-Rome small-group journey through France, Switzerland and Italy, with curated museum talks, scenic rail and the Amalfi Coast.
short_zh: 14天巴黎到罗马一线深度小团游，串联法国、瑞士与意大利，含国家馆专题讲解、景观列车与阿马尔菲海岸。
desc_en: This 14-day boutique small-group tour traces a single deep route from Paris all the way to Rome, weaving together three countries without doubling back. Begin with two unhurried days in Paris and Versailles guided by French national-museum lecturers, glide through Burgundy and the Swiss Lake Geneva and Jungfrau regions by scenic Golden Pass rail, then descend into Italy for Milan, Venice, Florence, the Cinque Terre, the Tuscan hill towns and the Eternal City. The journey ends on the Sorrento peninsula with an Amalfi Coast cruise and the legendary Blue Grotto of Capri. With art-history deep dives, lake-and-mountain landscapes and an all-inclusive small-group format, it is a culture-and-scenery odyssey across the heart of Europe.
desc_zh: 这条14天精品小团线路从巴黎一路深入直抵罗马，单线不走回头路地串联法国、瑞士与意大利三国。行程以巴黎与凡尔赛两天由法兰西国家馆讲解师陪同的深度艺术之旅开篇，随后穿越勃艮第，乘金色山口景观列车饱览日内瓦湖与少女峰地区的湖光山色，再南下意大利游览米兰、威尼斯、佛罗伦萨、五渔村、托斯卡纳山城与永恒之城罗马。旅程在索伦托半岛收尾，出海畅游阿马尔菲海岸、探秘卡普里岛蓝洞。深度艺术史讲解、湖山美景与一价全含的小团形式，共同成就这场横跨欧洲腹地的文化与风景之旅。

highlights.en: French national-museum lecturers give themed deep-dive talks at the Louvre and Versailles
highlights.zh: 法兰西国家馆讲解师在卢浮宫与凡尔赛宫进行主题深度讲解

highlights.en: Scenic Golden Pass panoramic train from Lungern to Lucerne through the Alps
highlights.zh: 乘金色山口观光列车从龙疆至卢塞恩，穿越阿尔卑斯山如画风景

highlights.en: Lake Geneva scenic route with the UNESCO Lavaux vineyard terraces and Chillon Castle
highlights.zh: 日内瓦湖景观之路，途经世界遗产拉沃葡萄梯田与西庸城堡

highlights.en: Jungfrau region: Interlaken, Grindelwald and Lauterbrunnen alpine scenery
highlights.zh: 少女峰地区：因特拉肯、格林德尔瓦尔德与劳特布龙嫩的高山风光

highlights.en: Italy's icons: Milan Cathedral, romantic Venice, Renaissance Florence and the Leaning Tower of Pisa
highlights.zh: 意大利经典：米兰大教堂、浪漫威尼斯、文艺复兴佛罗伦萨与比萨斜塔

highlights.en: Cinque Terre cliffside fishing villages and the Tuscan hill towns of San Gimignano, Siena and Pienza
highlights.zh: 五渔村悬崖渔村，以及圣吉米尼亚诺、锡耶纳、皮恩扎托斯卡纳山城

highlights.en: Amalfi Coast cruise to Positano and Amalfi, plus Capri's Blue Grotto
highlights.zh: 出海畅游阿马尔菲海岸的波西塔诺与阿马尔菲，并探秘卡普里岛蓝洞

highlights.en: All-inclusive 4-8 person small group: city-centre hotels, all listed attractions, no forced shopping
highlights.zh: 4-8人一价全含精品小团：市中心酒店、所列景点全含、无强制购物

includes.en: Hotels: 1 night in a 5-star hotel and 12 nights in 4-star hotels.
includes.zh: 【酒店】：五星级酒店1晚及四星级酒店12晚。

includes.en: Meals: 13 breakfasts in total - buffet breakfast at the hotels or breakfast in another form.
includes.zh: 【餐饮】：酒店内自助早餐或其他形式早餐共计13餐。

includes.en: Taxes and fees: city tourist tax, town-entry fees, accommodation tax, the Venice island-landing fee, driver/guide meal allowance and various tourism taxes - all execution fees within the itinerary.
includes.zh: 【税费】：游客城市税、进城费、居住税、威尼斯登岛费、司导餐补及各类旅游税等行程内执行费用。

includes.en: Transport: a 7-9 seat business travel vehicle.
includes.zh: 【交通】：7-9座商务旅行车。

includes.en: Guide: a Chinese-speaking driver-guide throughout the trip.
includes.zh: 【导游】：全程中文司机兼导游。

includes.en: Luggage: 1 piece of checked luggage up to 23 kg plus 1 piece of hand luggage.
includes.zh: 【行李】：1件23公斤行李及1件随身行李。
