includes.en: Admissions: first-entry tickets and official guiding for the Louvre; first-entry tickets and official guiding for the Palace of Versailles; the Seine River cruise; the Burgundy winery visit and wine tasting; the GoldenPass train (Lucerne-Lungern leg); the Cinque Terre train; the ferry to the islands on the Venice canals; the Sorrento-Amalfi boat tour; and the round-trip Capri ferry.
includes.zh: 【门票】：卢浮宫首道门票及官导讲解、凡尔赛宫首道门票及官导讲解、塞纳河游船、勃艮第酒庄参观及品酒费用、金色山口列车（卢塞恩-龙疆段）、五渔村小火车、威尼斯运河上岛渡轮、索伦托阿马尔菲出海环游、卡普里岛往返渡船。

excludes.en: Passport: personal passport fees.
excludes.zh: 护照：个人护照费用。

excludes.en: Visa: the tourist visa fees required for the countries on the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 签证：行程中所列旅游国家所需的观光签证费用。

excludes.en: Insurance: travel insurance (if the itinerary involves high-risk sports, please verify whether your travel insurance covers them).
excludes.zh: 保险：旅游保险费用（如行程内涉及到高风险运动，请核实旅游保险是否包含该项运动）。

excludes.en: Tips: guide and driver gratuities totalling 10 EUR per person per day, the same rate for adults and children.
excludes.zh: 小费：游客支付导游和司机小费一共10欧/人/天，大小同价。

excludes.en: Meals: apart from the special meals included in the itinerary, lunches and dinners are not included.
excludes.zh: 餐饮：除行程内包含的特色餐外，行程中不包含午、晚正餐费用。

excludes.en: Admissions: any sights not explicitly marked as included - including but not limited to sights noted as 'exterior', and all 'recommended', 'optional', 'experience' and other items where inclusion is not mentioned; if you wish to enter, please arrange this at your own expense.
excludes.zh: 门票：行程中未注明费用包含的景点（包括但不仅限于行程中注明“外观”的景点，以及“推荐”、“可选”、“体验”等所有未提及费用包含的项目，如游客需要参观，敬请自理）。

excludes.en: Extended stays: any extra accommodation, transport and sightseeing beyond the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 延长住宿：行程外额外延长的住宿、交通、观光费用。

excludes.en: Personal expenses: drinks and alcohol, taxis, phone charges and other personal spending.
excludes.zh: 私人消费：如饮料酒类、出租车、电话费等个人消费。

excludes.en: Other transport: transport beyond the included business vehicle or minibus and not mentioned in the inclusions - such as the Venice gondola, and sightseeing trains and electric cabs in vehicle-restricted zones - is at your own expense.
excludes.zh: 其他交通：除包含商务旅行车或者中巴之外，费用包含中未提及的其他交通费用，如威尼斯贡多拉，以及车辆限行区的观光火车、电瓶出租车等费用敬请自理。

excludes.en: Free activities: guests' own evening sightseeing and recommended projects, and any resulting transport, meals, admissions, shopping and other costs.
excludes.zh: 自由活动：游客夜间自行游览及行程中的推荐项目，以及产生的交通、餐饮、门票、购物等费用。

excludes.en: Experience activities: the various travel experience activities not included in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 体验活动：行程中的没有包含的各项旅游体验活动。

excludes.en: Other costs: any costs not mentioned in the inclusions. In cases of force majeure such as natural disasters, war or strikes, or extra costs arising from transport delays, flight cancellations or rescheduling, embassy visa-issuance delays, insufficient group numbers or other special circumstances not attributable to the operator (e.g. overseas visa-extension fees, accommodation, meals and transport, national airfare adjustments), the operator reserves the right to charge the difference.
excludes.zh: 其他费用：费用包含中未提及的费用。如因天灾、战争、罢工等不可抗力的原因，及因交通延阻、航班取消或更改时间、使馆延误出签证、人数不足等特殊情况或其他非我公司原因所引致的额外费用（如在外延期签证费、住、食及交通费、国家航空运价调整等），我公司有权追加差价。

timeline.title_en: Paris - Louvre Museum - Paris (Origins of French art with a national-museum guide)
timeline.title_zh: 巴黎 - 卢浮宫 - 巴黎（与国家馆讲解师探讨法兰西艺术风潮起源）
timeline.description_en: In the morning visit the Louvre Museum, where a French national-museum guide gives an in-depth, thematically curated talk on the origins of European art and history. Then tour Notre-Dame de Paris and the Ile de la Cite, see the Eiffel Tower (exterior) and the Champ de Mars, and take a Seine River sightseeing cruise (the famous glass-cabin 'bateaux-mouches', about 3.2 km / 1 hour) passing the Invalides (exterior), the Grand and Petit Palais (exterior), the Pont Alexandre III, the love-lock bridge, the Louvre, the Champs-Elysees and the Place de la Concorde. Note: the Louvre limits visitor numbers and especially in peak season restricts in-gallery guiding, in which case the 20 EUR per guest in-museum guiding fee is refunded; Versailles has no official guide for groups under 3 people and an audio guide is used instead. Overnight at Mercure or Novotel Paris or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午参观法兰西引以为傲的卢浮宫博物馆，由法兰西国家馆讲解师精选主题深度讲解，从艺术角度读懂欧洲历史。随后游览巴黎圣母院、西岱岛，远观埃菲尔铁塔（外观）及战神广场；之后乘坐塞纳河游船（著名的透明船舱“苍蝇船”，约3.2公里、1小时航程）游览荣军院（外观）、大小皇宫（外观）、亚历山大三世大桥、巴黎锁桥、卢浮宫、香榭丽舍大道及协和广场等地。提示：由于卢浮宫限流、尤其旺季限制馆内讲解，届时将退还馆内讲解费每人20欧元；凡尔赛不足3人无官导讲解，由讲解器代替。夜宿巴黎美居或诺富特酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Paris - Palace of Versailles - Paris (Baroque masterpieces of Versailles with a national-museum guide)
timeline.title_zh: 巴黎 - 凡尔赛宫 - 巴黎（国家馆讲解员深度讲解凡尔赛宫殿巴洛克艺术瑰宝）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast head to the Palace of Versailles in the southwestern suburbs of Paris for an in-depth visit, where a national-museum guide explains this Baroque masterpiece and birthplace of Rococo art (a curated specialist talk). In the afternoon return to central Paris and head to the fashion hub of Boulevard Haussmann and Rue Royale, with free time around the Paris Opera / Palais Garnier (exterior), Printemps department store and Galeries Lafayette. Note: if the Opera has a major performance or reception it may not be open to visitors and the operator cannot accurately predict public opening times, so the 15 EUR entrance fee is not included; if open for visits, tickets can be bought on site. Overnight at Mercure or Novotel Paris or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往位于巴黎西南郊区的凡尔赛宫游览，由国家馆讲解员深度讲解这座巴洛克登峰之作、也是洛可可艺术的起点（精选专辑深度讲解）。下午返回巴黎市区，前往时尚中心奥斯曼大街和皇家大道，自由参观巴黎歌剧院（加尼叶歌剧院，外观）、春天百货及老佛爷百货等时尚地区。提示：巴黎歌剧院如有重要演出或接待活动则无法入内，我社无法准确预测公众开放时间，因此不含门票15欧元，如可参观可现场自行购票。夜宿巴黎美居或诺富特酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Paris - Dijon (City of fine views and food in France; Relais & Chateaux luxury chateau hotel)
timeline.title_zh: 巴黎 - 第戎（法兰西美景、美食之都，罗莱夏朵奢华古堡酒店）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast travel to Dijon, capital of the Burgundy region and home of red wine, snails, rose mustard and the white Charolais ox; tour the old town of Dijon and the Church of Notre-Dame de Dijon (exterior). After lunch continue to the Burgundy wine region to visit a Burgundy winery's courtyard, production workshop, vineyards and cellars, with a professional sommelier providing wine service and an in-depth explanation. Then head to Poligny / Port-Lesney to check into a Relais & Chateaux chateau hotel - an 18th-century castle set in parkland, with a Michelin 2-star restaurant by chef Steven Naessens and a Caudalie vinotherapie spa (note: the Maison Jeunet restaurant did not open year-round in 2022 and was therefore rated 2 Michelin stars in 2023). Overnight at the Relais & Chateaux chateau hotel or an equivalent 5-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往勃艮第大区首府第戎，这里是红酒、蜗牛、玫瑰芥末及白牛的原产地，参观第戎老城和第戎圣母院（外观）。午餐后前往勃艮第葡萄产区，参观勃艮第酒庄的庭院、生产工坊、葡萄园及酒窖，酒庄专业侍酒师负责侍酒服务和深度讲解。随后前往波尔莱斯内入住罗莱夏朵城堡酒店——一座坐落于茹安公园中的18世纪古堡，设有米其林传奇主厨Steven Naessens主理的米其林2星餐厅及欧缇丽（Caudalie）水疗中心（备注：因2022年Maison Jeunet餐厅未全年营业，故2023年被评为米其林2星级餐厅）。夜宿罗莱夏朵城堡酒店或同等5星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Port-Lesney - Lausanne - Vevey - Montreux - Interlaken (UNESCO heritage; the Lake Geneva scenic route)
timeline.title_zh: 波尔莱斯内 - 洛桑 - 沃韦 - 蒙特勒 - 因特拉肯（人类自然遗产，日内瓦环湖风景线）
timeline.description_en: In the morning travel to flower-filled Lausanne for free time at the Olympic Park and the Ouchy waterfront, lined with cafes, restaurants and hotels. Then enjoy the scenic Lake Geneva (Lac Leman) route, passing the rolling Lavaux vineyard terraces - both a beautiful landscape and a precious UNESCO World Heritage site. In the afternoon admire the lonely reflection of the Chateau de Chillon (exterior) at Montreux in the lake waters, then pass Lake Thun on the way to the hotel. An optional Interlaken paragliding experience (220 EUR) is available, launching from the Beatenberg 1558 paragliding base over Interlaken and the Jungfrau. Overnight at the Parkhotel du Sauvage Meiringen or an equivalent 4-star hotel - an 1880 Art Nouveau hotel famous for its Sherlock Holmes connection.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往四季鲜花盛开的洛桑，自由游览奥林匹克公园，并停留于乌希码头，沿岸布满咖啡厅、餐厅和酒店。之后迎来最精彩的环日内瓦湖（莱蒙湖）瑞士景观之路，尽享旖旎湖光，途经绵延的拉沃葡萄梯田——这不仅是美丽风景，更是珍贵的世界文化遗产。下午欣赏蒙特勒的西庸城堡（外观）孤独地倒影在湖水之中，之后途经图恩湖前往酒店入住。可自费体验因特拉肯高空滑翔伞（220欧元），从贝阿滕贝格1558滑翔伞基地起飞，俯瞰因特拉肯及少女峰、并飞越图恩湖。夜宿迈林根自然公园酒店（一家1880年新艺术风格、因夏洛克·福尔摩斯渊源而闻名的酒店）或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Interlaken - Jungfrau region - Interlaken (Scenery and mountain villages of the Jungfrau)
timeline.title_zh: 因特拉肯 - 少女峰地区 - 因特拉肯（游览“少女峰”地区唯美风光和山间小镇）
timeline.description_en: In the morning head into the Jungfrau region. You may either ride the coach to see the red Swiss train at Wilderswil, the fairytale scenery of Lauterbrunnen and the village of Grindelwald at the foot of the Jungfrau (included); or, choose one of two paid alternatives - the Jungfrau panorama cableway to the summit (230 EUR), ascending via Kleine Scheidegg to the 'Sphinx' observation deck to overlook the snow-covered Jungfrau and the great Aletsch Glacier; or the First-Grindelwald aerial gondola round-trip ticket (70 EUR) up to First peak with its famous First Cliff Walk and thrilling activities. Also visit the town of Interlaken with free time on Hoheweg and at Hohematte, the tranquil green between the mountains. Note: the Jungfrau summit itself is at your own expense. Overnight at the Parkhotel du Sauvage Meiringen or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午出发前往少女峰地区。可选择随车前往维尔德斯维尔观赏红色瑞士火车、勞特布龍嫩的童话风景，随后来到少女峰脚下的格林德尔瓦尔德（费用包含）；或自费三选一：少女峰全景缆车登顶（230欧元，途经小夏戴克登上少女峰，前往“斯芬克斯观景台”俯瞰白雪皑皑的少女峰及阿莱奇冰川），或菲斯特-格林德尔瓦尔德空中贡多拉往返票（70欧元，直达菲斯特峰巅，游览著名的悬崖天梭巅峰栈道First Cliff Walk及高空飞索等刺激项目）。之后游览因特拉肯小镇，自由游览何维克街、荷黑马特等宁静绿地。提示：少女峰登顶需自费。夜宿迈林根自然公园酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Interlaken - Lungern - Lucerne - Zurich (Ride the GoldenPass train through picture-perfect Switzerland)
timeline.title_zh: 因特拉肯 - 龙疆 - 卢塞恩 - 苏黎世（乘坐金色山口列车，尽览瑞士如画风景）
timeline.description_en: In the morning travel to Lungern to enjoy Lake Lungern and the village scenery, then board the GoldenPass scenic train for the roughly one-hour Lungern-Lucerne leg through the Alps, taking in beautiful villages, sapphire lakes and snow-capped mountains through its panoramic glass windows. In the afternoon tour Lake Lucerne, hear the story of Swiss loyalty told by the Lion Monument, and see the Chapel Bridge (Kapellbrucke) and the octagonal Water Tower. Then continue to Zurich to check in. Note: there is no tour guide on board for the Lucerne-Lungern leg of the GoldenPass train. Overnight at the Crowne Plaza Zurich or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往龙疆，游览龙疆湖及小镇风光。之后乘坐金色山口观光列车前往卢塞恩，约1小时车程穿山越岭，透过全景玻璃光窗一路欣赏村庄、碧蓝湖泊与白雪皑皑的群山。下午游览卢塞恩湖的湖光山色，由狮子纪念碑讲述瑞士人忠贞坚毅的那段历史，并游览卡贝尔廊桥和八角形水塔等景点。之后前往苏黎世入住酒店。提示：金色山口列车卢塞恩-龙疆段车上无导游陪同。夜宿苏黎世皇冠假日酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Zurich - Milan (Along the Alps to a Gothic masterpiece built over 500 years)
timeline.title_zh: 苏黎世 - 米兰（沿阿尔卑斯山脉，瞻仰500年建成的哥特式精美建筑）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast tour Zurich, Switzerland's financial metropolis: the old town, Lake Zurich, Lindenhof park and a stroll along the Limmat River. Then head to Milan for free time around its landmark Milan Cathedral / Duomo (exterior) - a Gothic masterpiece begun in 1386 and completed over 500 years, with around 6,000 marble statues - and the Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II, one of Europe's most beautiful shopping arcades and home to flagship boutiques of Italian luxury brands such as Prada and Gucci, plus historic cafes like Caffe Biffi and Savini. Overnight at the UNA Hotel Milano or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往瑞士金融大都会苏黎世，参观苏黎世老城、苏黎世湖、林登霍夫公园，并漫步利马特河边。之后前往米兰，自由参观其标志性建筑米兰大教堂（外观）——这座始建于1386年、历经500年建成的哥特式建筑，拥有约6000多座大理石雕像；以及欧洲漂亮的商业拱廊之一埃马努埃莱二世长廊，这里汇聚Prada、Gucci等意大利奢侈品牌旗舰店，长廊尽头还有Caffè Biffi、Savini Milano等老字号咖啡馆。夜宿米兰UNA酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Milan - Venice (Romantic Venice upon gentle blue waters)
timeline.title_zh: 米兰 - 威尼斯（温柔碧波上浪漫的威尼斯）
timeline.description_en: In the morning travel to Venice and visit St Mark's Basilica (exterior) - the Byzantine church famous for its five onion domes and golden mosaics - St Mark's Square (Piazza San Marco), the Bridge of Sighs (exterior) and the magnificent Doge's Palace (exterior). These beautiful buildings raised upon the water, together with the winding canals, give Venice its lingering romance; the city of 118 islands linked by 177 waterways and 401 bridges is the 'Pearl of the Adriatic'. Overnight at the voco Venezia or the Four Points by Sheraton Venice or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午出发前往威尼斯，参观圣马可大教堂（拜占庭风格、以五座洋葱形圆顶和金色马赛克装饰闻名，外观）、圣马可广场、叹息桥（外观）以及华丽的总督宫（外观）。这些建造在水上的美丽建筑与蜿蜒的水巷一起，让威尼斯的浪漫风情久久挥之不去；这座由118个小岛、以177条水道和401座桥梁连成一体的“亚得里亚海明珠”依旧璀璨夺目。夜宿威尼斯洲际VOCO酒店或威尼斯福朋喜来登酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Venice - Florence (Land of poetry, the soul of the Renaissance)
timeline.title_zh: 威尼斯 - 佛罗伦萨（诗歌之地，文艺复兴之魂享受艺术之旅）
timeline.description_en: In the morning head to Florence, birthplace of the Renaissance, and visit the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore - the 'world's third-largest church' (note: expect to queue to enter), the Piazza della Signoria, the Ponte Vecchio (Old Bridge) and Piazzale Michelangelo. From the Piazzale Michelangelo you can look out over the whole city - taking in the Duomo, Giotto's Bell Tower, the Bargello and the Old Bridge - and it is a fine spot to watch the sunrise and sunset as Florence glows in changing light. Overnight at a Tuscan villa hotel in Florence (an 18th-century Tuscan-style villa with antique-furnished rooms, gardens of century-old olive trees, an outdoor pool and gym) or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午出发前往文艺复兴的发源地佛罗伦萨，参观世界第三大教堂圣母百花大教堂（需排队进入）、市政广场、维奇奥老桥以及米开朗基罗广场。在米开朗基罗广场登高俯瞰，全城风景尽收眼底——圣母百花大教堂、乔托钟楼、巴杰罗美术馆、老桥等一览无余，这里也是观赏日出和日落的好位置，阳光下佛罗伦萨焕发出不同的光彩。夜宿佛罗伦萨托斯卡纳别墅酒店（一栋18世纪托斯卡纳风格别墅，配仿古家具，拥有百年橄榄树花园、室外游泳池和健身房）或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Florence - Cinque Terre - Pisa - Florence (Ride the Cinque Terre scenic train; views of the Ligurian coast)
timeline.title_zh: 佛罗伦萨 - 五渔村 - 比萨 - 佛罗伦萨（乘坐五渔村景观火车，赏利古里亚湾美景）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast travel to the Cinque Terre to tour the beautiful clifftop fishing villages along the Ligurian coast - the five villages of Monterosso al Mare, Vernazza, Corniglia, Manarola and Riomaggiore, a UNESCO World Heritage site since 1997. In the afternoon continue to Pisa to see the Leaning Tower of Pisa (exterior) and the Piazza dei Miracoli (Square of Miracles) in the historic centre, with its cathedral, baptistery, leaning tower and cemetery. Note: if bad weather or a railway strike prevents the Cinque Terre visit, the itinerary automatically changes to touring the coastal towns by coach or other means. Overnight at the Tuscan villa hotel in Florence or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后出发前往五渔村，沿利古里亚海岸线游览悬崖上的美丽渔村——蒙特罗索、韦尔纳扎、科尔尼利亚、马纳罗拉及里奥马焦雷五个村镇，1997年被列入世界文化遗产名录。下午前往比萨，游览比萨斜塔（外观）和比萨历史文化中心的奇迹广场（含主教座堂、洗礼堂、斜塔/钟楼及墓园）。备注：如遇恶劣天气或铁路公司罢工等因素导致无法游览五渔村，行程将自动更改为乘坐大巴车或其它形式游览海岸线城市。夜宿佛罗伦萨托斯卡纳别墅酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Florence - San Gimignano - Siena - Pienza - Rome (Medieval town of towers; cypress lanes of the Val d'Orcia)
timeline.title_zh: 佛罗伦萨 - 圣吉米尼亚诺 - 锡耶纳 - 皮恩扎 - 罗马（中世纪万塔古城，奥尔恰谷丝柏树小径）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast tour the hill town of San Gimignano - the medieval 'Manhattan of the Middle Ages' famous for its preserved towers - with free time at the Torre Grossa (exterior), the town hall (exterior) and the Piazza della Cisterna (well square). Then continue to Siena to tour the old town, Siena Cathedral (exterior), the Piazza del Campo, the town hall (exterior) and the Torre del Mangia (exterior). Next visit the hill town of Pienza, birthplace of Pope Pius II and a Renaissance 'ideal city', then stop at the famous cypress lane (Val d'Orcia) for free photos before heading to Rome to check in. Overnight at the Palazzo Naiadi / a riverside palace hotel in Rome or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后出发游览圣吉米尼亚诺小镇——以保存完好的中世纪塔楼闻名、有“中世纪曼哈顿”之称，自由游览格罗萨塔楼（外观）、市政厅（外观）、水井广场等景点。随后前往锡耶纳，游览锡耶纳古城、锡耶纳大教堂（外观）、田野广场、市政厅（外观）、曼吉亚塔楼（外观）。之后前往皮恩扎，游览这座教皇皮乌斯二世出生地、被誉为文艺复兴“理想城市”的古城，再前往丝柏小路自由拍照，之后前往罗马入住酒店。夜宿罗马河畔宫殿酒店（毗邻波格赛公园、采用意大利古典设计并配古董家具）或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Rome - Sorrento (Walking tour of the glory of the ancient Roman Empire, the 'Eternal City')
timeline.title_zh: 罗马 - 索伦托（徒步深度游览“万城之城”古罗马帝国的辉煌）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast head to the world-famous historic city of Rome, cradle of the ancient Roman Empire and known as the 'Eternal City'. See the Colosseum (exterior), the Pantheon (exterior), the Spanish Steps and Square, and the Trevi Fountain (exterior). Note: the main sights in Rome's old town lie within the vehicle-restricted ZTL zone, so the day is on foot, with about 5 km of walking round-trip - please wear light, comfortable shoes. In the afternoon continue to Sorrento to check in. Overnight at a Sorrento coast hotel (a seafront hotel with bay views on three sides, a private beach and jetty, two restaurants and a marine spa) or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往世界著名的历史文化名城罗马，这里是古罗马帝国的发祥地，因历史悠久被称为“永恒之城”。参观矗立在古罗马古都遗址上的斗兽场（外观）、万神殿（外观），游览西班牙广场和特莱维喷泉（许愿池，外观）。提示：罗马古城区内主要景点均在车辆禁行区（ZTL）内，当天为步行游览，往返步行约5公里，请穿着轻便舒适。下午前往索伦托入住酒店。夜宿索伦托海岸酒店（三面环海、拥有私人沙滩和私家码头、两间餐厅及海洋SPA中心）或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Sorrento - Amalfi - Positano - Sorrento (Amalfi Coast boat tour; the lemon scent of Positano)
timeline.title_zh: 索伦托 - 阿马尔菲 - 波西塔诺 - 索伦托（阿马尔菲出海环游，感受波西塔诺的柠檬香）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast set off on a charming boat day-trip to explore the treasures of the Amalfi Coast, a UNESCO World Heritage site. Sail to Positano to explore the enchanting clifftop village, then by boat to Amalfi for panoramic views of the coastal town, before returning by boat to the hotel. Note: in case of extreme weather at sea, for guest safety the boat operator cancels the sailing to Positano and Amalfi; the operator then arranges a coach tour of Sorrento's old town that day instead (Positano and Amalfi cannot be visited), and the boat-tour fee is refunded to guests. Overnight at the Sorrento coast hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后踏上迷人的游船一日游，探索世界文化遗产阿马尔菲海岸的宝藏。乘船前往波西塔诺，探索迷人的悬崖村庄，然后乘船前往阿马尔菲，欣赏阿马尔菲海岸小镇全景，之后乘船返回入住酒店。备注：如遇海上极端天气情况，出于游客安全考虑，游船公司取消出海游览波西塔诺和阿马尔菲活动，我社将安排当天乘坐大巴车参观索伦托老城（无法参观波西塔诺和阿马尔菲），出海游船费用将退还给游客。夜宿索伦托海岸酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Sorrento - Naples - Capri - Naples - Rome (Into the Mediterranean paradise of Capri; the Blue Grotto)
timeline.title_zh: 索伦托 - 那不勒斯 - 卡普里岛 - 那不勒斯 - 罗马（走进地中海天堂-卡普里岛，探秘蓝洞）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast travel to the port of Naples to take the ferry to Capri. On the island you have free time - stroll by the sea, then visit the Blue Grotto, or take a boat around the island to discover the Blue Grotto, or head into Capri town to the Gardens of Augustus (exterior) overlooking the whole bay; the recommended walking route from the main port via Capri's old town to the Gardens of Augustus is about 1.3 km of mountain path (funiculars and taxis are available at extra cost). Then take the ferry back to Naples and return to Rome, where the happy tour ends. Notes: the Blue Grotto is a natural site and cannot be visited if local maritime authorities close it due to high tide, wind or waves; the Blue Grotto fee is not included, and besides the rowers' fee a 2-5 EUR tip per local custom is expected. No accommodation tonight.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往那不勒斯码头乘坐渡船到达卡普里岛港口。当天可自行前往海边漫步后前往蓝洞参观，或自行乘船环岛探秘蓝洞，或自行前往卡普里城中游览奥古斯都花园（外观）俯瞰整个海湾；推荐路线为大港-卡普里古城-奥古斯都花园，单程约1.3公里山路，途中纜车和出租车需额外付费。之后坐渡船返回那不勒斯，再返回罗马，在罗马市区结束愉快旅行。提示：卡普里的蓝洞属于自然景观，如遇涨潮、风浪或当地海洋气象机构宣布关闭则无法入内游览；蓝洞游览费用不包含在团内，除蓝洞人力船工费用外，请按当地习俗支付2-5欧元小费。当天无住宿。

meeting_en: Paris, France - tour departs from Paris (group transfers and hotel details confirmed in the final departure notice).
meeting_zh: 法国巴黎——行程于巴黎出发（具体集合与酒店安排以出团通知书为准）。

faqs.question_en: Where and when does the tour meet and disperse?
faqs.question_zh: 集合及集散地点和方法是怎样的？
faqs.answer_en: This is a Paris-start / Rome-end tour. On Day 1 the group meets at 09:00 in the morning at Piazza d'Italia (Place d'Italie) in Paris. On Day 14 the group disperses in the afternoon at around 19:30 near Roma Termini central station. (Times and places are for reference; the actual departure time is confirmed in the departure notice.) This product does not recommend a flight that lands in Paris on the morning of the join-up day; on the final day you can book an evening flight to leave Rome.
faqs.answer_zh: 本产品为巴黎出发、罗马结束。行程第1天上午09:00在巴黎意大利广场集合；行程第14天午后约19:30左右在罗马中央火车站附近解散。（参考时间及地点，实际出发时间以出团通知书为准。）本产品不推荐参团当天早上降落巴黎的航班！结束当天可预订晚上的航班离开罗马。

faqs.question_en: Can I do the Interlaken paragliding activity?
faqs.question_zh: 我是否可以体验因特拉肯滑翔伞活动？
faqs.answer_en: It is not included. If you wish to add Interlaken paragliding, please consider carefully - paragliding is an extreme sport not covered by ordinary travel insurance. The guide is responsible for taking guests to the paragliding shuttle point (luggage can be left on the vehicle), and after the activity guests land at the town-centre square to regroup.
faqs.answer_zh: 不包含。如果希望额外游览因特拉肯滑翔伞，请慎重考虑：滑翔伞涉及独特极限运动，普通旅游保险并未包含。导游负责将客人送至滑翔伞活动的接驳处（行李可寄存在车上），游客参加完滑翔伞项目后随滑翔伞降落到市中心广场集合。

faqs.question_en: Can we ride the Jungfrau panorama cableway to the summit and the 'Sphinx' observation deck?
faqs.question_zh: 我们是否可以游览少女峰全景缆车登顶及“斯芬克斯观景台”？
faqs.answer_en: It is not included. If you wish to add the Jungfrau ascent, you can do it on your own from Interlaken Ost (East) station.
faqs.answer_zh: 不包含。如果希望额外增加游览少女峰，可以在因特拉肯东站自行游览少女峰。

faqs.question_en: Can we visit the First cliff walk in the Jungfrau region?
faqs.question_zh: 我们是否可以游览少女峰的菲斯特栈道？
faqs.answer_en: It is not included. If you wish to do the First cliff walk and the summit zip-line and other outdoor activities, you can go with the guide to Grindelwald and then explore freely (Grindelwald BGF - First Top of Adventure), about 5 hours in total, then get off at Interlaken Ost station to rejoin the guide.
faqs.answer_zh: 不包含。如果希望游览少女峰菲斯特悬崖栈道及山顶空中飞索等户外活动，可以跟随导游前往格林德尔瓦尔德，随后自由游览Grindelwald BGF – First Top of Adventure，全程游览时间约5小时，随后在因特拉肯东站下车与导游再次汇集。

faqs.question_en: Can the Jungfrau scenic train / 'Sphinx' deck be combined with the other sights of the Jungfrau region?
faqs.question_zh: 少女峰观光列车及“斯芬克斯观景台”是否可以和少女峰地区的景点同时参加？
faqs.answer_en: The operator takes all guests to see the red Swiss train at Wilderswil, the fairytale scenery of Lauterbrunnen, and then Grindelwald at the foot of the Jungfrau. If you choose the scenic train, it conflicts with the 'Dreamy Hillside' and the 'red train station', so you cannot see both.
faqs.answer_zh: 我社组织所有游客游览维尔德斯维尔观赏红色瑞士火车、勞特布龍嫩的瑞士童话风景，随后来到少女峰脚下的格林德尔瓦尔德。如果选择观光列车，则和“梦幻山坡”、“红色火车站”有冲突，不可以同时看到。

faqs.question_en: Does the Jungfrau scenic train conflict with paragliding, the Brienz cog railway or the Interlaken cruise?
faqs.question_zh: 少女峰观光列车是否和滑翔伞、布里恩茨齿轮火车、因特拉肯游船有冲突？
faqs.answer_en: If you take the Jungfrau scenic train in the morning there is no conflict. However, if you choose to ride it from the afternoon into the evening, you may not be able to experience all the Giessbach activities.
faqs.answer_zh: 如上午乘坐少女峰观光列车没有冲突；但是如果选择下午到晚间乘坐，则有可能无法体验到吉斯巴赫的全部项目。

faqs.question_en: What are the best ways to tour the Jungfrau region?
faqs.question_zh: 少女峰地区最佳游览方案是什么？
faqs.answer_en: A. Wellness tour: a full free day in the Giessbach scenic area, including the Giessbach Falls, the Lake Brienz shore, the Interlaken cruise, the Brienz Rothorn cableway and the Giessbach cog railway (included April-October each year; not available in winter due to equipment maintenance; the Brienz Rothorn cableway opens 8 June 2024). B. Easy plan: follow the guide in turn to see the red Swiss train at Wilderswil, the fairytale scenery of Lauterbrunnen, then Grindelwald at the foot of the Jungfrau, and in the afternoon tour the Giessbach scenic area and the Lake Brienz shore (this option is included). C. 'Commando' plan: take the Jungfrau scenic train to the 'Sphinx' observation deck, then tour the Giessbach scenic area. D. Extreme plan: do the First cliff walk, the summit zip-line and Interlaken paragliding together (not included).
faqs.answer_zh: A、养生游：全天自由游览吉斯巴赫风景区，其中包含吉斯巴赫瀑布、布里恩茨湖畔、因特拉肯游船、布里恩茨洪峰缆车、吉斯巴赫齿轮火车等门票（每年4月到10月份包含，冬季设备维护无法游览，布里恩茨洪峰缆车2024年6月8日开放）。B、懒人包：跟随导游依次游览维尔德斯维尔观赏红色瑞士火车、勞特布龍嫩的瑞士童话风景，随后来到少女峰脚下的格林德尔瓦尔德，当天下午游览吉斯巴赫风景区及布里恩茨湖畔（费用包含）。C、特种兵：乘坐少女峰景观列车游览斯芬克斯观景台，随后游览吉斯巴赫风景区。D、极限游：同时游览菲斯特悬崖步道、山顶空中飞索及因特拉肯滑翔伞（费用不包含）。

faqs.question_en: Can you help book the Maison Jeunet Michelin-starred restaurant?
faqs.question_zh: 是否可以协助预定Maison Jeunet米其林星级餐厅？
faqs.answer_en: For the Rome-start / Paris-end route (B), a dinner at Maison Jeunet (2 Michelin stars) is recommended: the chef's 8-course tasting dinner is 195 EUR (excluding drinks). For the Paris-start / Rome-end route (A), a lunch at Maison Jeunet can be chosen: the chef's recommended 4-course lunch / 3-course set is 85 EUR (excluding drinks). Because of the Relais & Chateaux brand's special booking method, the operator sends a booking link that the guest must confirm in person, providing a credit card guarantee.
faqs.answer_zh: B路线（罗马出发巴黎结束）：推荐预定Maison Jeunet（米其林两星级）餐厅晚餐，主厨推荐8道式晚餐195欧元（不含酒水）。A路线（巴黎出发罗马结束）：可选预定Maison Jeunet（米其林两星级）餐厅午餐，主厨推荐4道式午餐/三道式套餐85欧（不含酒水）。由于罗莱夏朵品牌的特殊预定方式，我社发送预定链接，需要游客本人确认预定，并且提供信用卡担保。

faqs.question_en: Can I book airport transfer service?
faqs.question_zh: 是否可以预定机场接送服务？
faqs.answer_en: Yes. Please select the city airport transfer service you need in the fee options, and note your arriving flight number in the order.
faqs.answer_zh: 可以预定。请在费用选项内选择所需的城市机场接送服务，并请在订单内备注到达的航班号。

faqs.question_en: Can I book hotels before the tour starts and after it ends?
faqs.question_zh: 是否可以预定开始前的酒店和行程后的酒店？
faqs.answer_en: The itinerary does not require early arrival and connects seamlessly with round-trip flights to/from Paris and Rome. In case of delays, the transfer driver can help the guest join the group directly in the departure city.
faqs.answer_zh: 行程不要求提前到达，行程无缝衔接巴黎及罗马的往返航班时间，如遇晚点，接送机的司机可协助游客在出发地所在的城市直接参团。

faqs.question_en: I get seasick - can I still join the Sorrento island-hopping tour of the four coastal towns?
faqs.question_zh: 我晕船是否能参加索伦托的跳岛游览四大城市？
faqs.answer_en: First, the Mediterranean is an inland sea with relatively few waves, and the boats are large, so seasickness is unlikely. Second, on the island-hopping the boat is a means of transport, not the sightseeing object - each leg averages about 40 minutes to 1 hour, after which you disembark to tour; many included sights such as Capri, Positano and Amalfi cannot be reached by vehicle or are inconvenient to reach by road. Finally, the Sorrento seafront hotel is surrounded by sea on three sides with a private beach, private jetty, two restaurants of different styles and a famous marine spa, so even on a boat-tour day you can enjoy the Bay of Naples views and food at the hotel.
faqs.answer_zh: 首先，地中海为内海，相对风浪比较少，加之船体又比较大，因此晕船的概率比较低。其次，跳岛游览中船为交通工具，并非游览工具，平均每段行程为40分钟到1小时，随后即可登陆游览；行程中包含的许多景点，如卡普里、波西塔诺、阿马尔菲等都是车辆无法到达或者不便到达的景点。再次，索伦托海滨酒店三面环海，拥有私人沙滩和私家码头、两间不同风格的餐厅和一间著名的海洋Spa中心，如果当天有跳岛活动，也可以在酒店内享受那不勒斯湾的美景和美食。

faqs.question_en: What happens if extreme weather forces the boat tour to cancel the Positano and Amalfi visit?
faqs.question_zh: 如遇极端天气情况，游船出海取消参观波西塔诺和阿马尔菲怎么办？
faqs.answer_en: In case of extreme weather at sea, for guest safety the boat operator cancels the sailing to Positano and Amalfi; the operator then arranges a visit to Sorrento's old town that day (Positano and Amalfi cannot be visited), and the boat-tour fee is refunded to guests.
faqs.answer_zh: 如遇海上极端天气情况，出于游客安全考虑，游船公司取消出海游览波西塔诺和阿马尔菲活动，我社将安排当天参观索伦托老城（无法参观波西塔诺和阿马尔菲），出海游船费用将退还给游客。

faqs.question_en: Do I need a visa?
faqs.question_zh: 是否需要签证？
faqs.answer_en: This product does not include visa fees - you need a Schengen visa (single or multiple entry); if you need to apply, please choose a Schengen visa product. After booking, all materials for the Schengen visa application are provided free of charge. The operator buys a Schengen-compliant travel insurance for guests who entrust it with the visa service; if you do not, you must arrange your own insurance and claims. Your passport must be valid for at least six months from the date of departure, otherwise customs may refuse entry. Visa fees, visa service fees, Schengen insurance fees and visa-centre appointment fees are all non-refundable and non-transferable, even if the product is changed or cancelled. 'Worry-free visa guarantee': for guests who sign a contract 61 or more days before departure, if the visa is not obtained within 45 days before departure the operator bears all losses and immediately refunds the full tour cost (guests not meeting this clause who fail to obtain a visa are refunded per the change & cancellation terms). If refused, you must notify the operator within 48 hours with the consulate's refusal letter, submit any supplementary/changed materials within five days, and may not unilaterally waive the right to appeal the visa decision.
faqs.answer_zh: 本产品不包含签证费用，需要申根签证（单次或多次入境），如需办理请选择申根签证产品。预订后免费提供办理申根签证的全部材料。如委托我社办理申根签证，我社会为您购买符合申根签证要求的申根旅游保险；若未委托办理，则需自行购买旅游保险及自行负责理赔。护照有效期需在离境之日起至少还有六个月，否则海关有权拒绝入境。签证费、签证服务费、申根保险费、签证中心预约费均不可退款，也无法更改使用者，即使产品退改签，签证费用也无法退款。【保签无忧】：游客在出发日前61天与我社签约，如在出发前45天内未获取签证，我社承担所有损失，立即退还全部旅游费用（不符合该条款的游客如未正常获签，将按“退改与取消条款”退费）。如遇拒签需在48小时内通知我社并出具使领馆拒签函，如需补充或更改材料须在五天内提交，并且不得单方面放弃“签证抗辩”权利。

faqs.question_en: Booking, changes & cancellation
faqs.question_zh: 预订、变更与取消须知
faqs.answer_en: Free, no-reason cancellation is allowed by both the operator and the traveller more than 30 days before departure (not counting the 30th day). This is a group tour requiring at least 10 people to confirm (成团); if 10 people are not reached more than 30 days before departure, either party may cancel without liability. Because flights, traffic, ferries and strikes often cause schedule and order changes, you must arrive at the meeting point one day before the tour starts and leave the dispersal point one day after it ends, allowing reasonable flight-connection time (at least 5 hours for transfers at the same airport, 7 hours for different airports in the same city); losses from not doing so are the traveller's own. Two people booking together get a standard double room with bed type (twin or double) assigned by the hotel and not selectable; three-person family rooms are for two parents plus one minor with bed type assigned by the hotel; named hotels are preferred but may be replaced by a same-star equivalent without separate notice. European hotels are non-smoking, check-in 14:00 / check-out 11:00, and air-conditioning is not a standard fixture. All pricing is quoted in EUR at the time of booking; if you pay in CNY, the amount is the real-time CNY price auto-calculated from the Bank of China 'euro selling price' on the day of payment, and the same applies to refunds (any exchange-rate differences or bank fees are borne by the traveller). Key itinerary contingencies: the Louvre is name-registered with limited entry (20 EUR in-museum guiding fee refunded if guiding is restricted; Versailles uses audio guides for groups under 3); the Lucerne-Lungern GoldenPass leg has no guide on board; in spring/summer/autumn (3 Apr 2026 - 11 Oct 2026) the Brienz cog train and Interlaken cruise are included, replaced by a Lucerne cruise otherwise; the Cinque Terre may switch to a coach tour in bad weather or rail strikes; Rome's old town is a walking tour (wear comfortable shoes); the Capri Blue Grotto may close due to tides/waves and is not included; and the Positano/Amalfi boat tour is replaced by a Sorrento old-town coach tour (with refund) in extreme sea weather.
faqs.answer_zh: 出发前30天（不含第30天），旅行社和旅行者均有权申请无理由取消。本产品为拼团游，成团人数为10人；出发前30天（不含第30天）未达到成团人数，双方均有权解除合同且不承担违约责任。由于航班、交通、渡轮、罢工等常导致行程时间及先后顺序调整，本产品要求旅游者在旅游团开始前一天到达集合地、结束后一天离开集散地，并预留合理航班衔接时间（同一机场转机至少预留5小时，同城不同机场至少7小时），未遵守由此导致的损失由旅行者自行承担。两人同时报名默认入住标准双人间，床型（大床或双床）由酒店安排不可选；三人家庭间默认为两位父母与一位未成年儿童，床型由酒店安排；行程内列明酒店为优先入住酒店，如订满可换为相同星级的相近酒店且不另行通知。所有定价以欧元为预订时计价单位，如选择人民币支付，则以当天支付时本网站依据中国银行实时“欧元卖出价”自动计算的人民币实时价格为准，退款同样适用申请当日即时汇率（汇率差异或银行手续费由旅行者承担）。重要行程提示：卢浮宫为实名制且限流（如限制馆内讲解则退还讲解费每人20欧元；凡尔赛不足3人用讲解器）；金色山口列车卢塞恩-龙疆段车上无导游；春夏秋季（2026年4月3日-10月11日）含布里恩茨齿轮小火车和因特拉肯游轮，无法体验期间替换为卢塞恩游船；五渔村遇恶劣天气或铁路罢工可能改为大巴游览海岸线；罗马古城为徒步游览，请穿轻便舒适鞋；卡普里蓝洞可能因涨潮风浪关闭且不含费用；阿马尔菲/波西塔诺出海如遇海上极端天气，改为大巴游览索伦托老城并退还出海游船费用。

faqs.question_en: Health & safety requirements
faqs.question_zh: 健康与安全须知
faqs.answer_en: To ensure a safe trip, please have a health check before departure and do NOT join if you have: an infectious disease (e.g. active tuberculosis, typhoid); cardiovascular disease (e.g. severe hypertension, heart failure, myocardial ischemia/infarction); cerebrovascular disease (e.g. cerebral embolism, hemorrhage, brain tumor); respiratory disease (e.g. emphysema, cor pulmonale); a psychiatric condition (e.g. epilepsy, mental illness); severe anemia (hemoglobin below 50 g/L); or are recovering from major surgery. Pregnancy: at 35+ weeks you cannot join under any circumstances; at 28+ weeks you must provide a doctor's exam report (within 7 days) and attending physician's consent; under 28 weeks please book with caution, sign a liability waiver, and you cannot join any adventure, skiing, boating, high-altitude or outdoor activities. People with disabilities need a doctor's report (within 7 days) and consent, a direct-relative companion, and must apply at least 61 days ahead for reserved facilities. Elderly travellers over 70 need a health certificate, exam report and a direct-relative companion (or sign a waiver); this is a long trip requiring good walking ability and stamina; activities like adventure/skiing/boating/high-altitude/outdoor need a physician's consent letter; apply at least 61 days ahead for age-friendly services. Minors (under 18) must be accompanied by a direct relative or guardian; some sights have special rules for under-18/12/6; for infants under 6 or children under 30 kg please confirm an EU-compliant safety seat in advance or bring your own; an unaccompanied minor needs both parents' authorization (or the absent parent's written authorization if travelling with one parent / guardian authorization if travelling with others); infants under 2 are not accepted. Per Article 15 of the Tourism Law, travellers must truthfully declare health information relevant to the trip (including pregnancy, lactation, chronic and infectious diseases, suspected symptoms or recent travel to epidemic areas) and follow safety warnings; concealment that causes harm or transmission risk makes the traveller liable for the consequences, including medical, quarantine and compensation costs, and may allow the operator to terminate the contract without refund.
faqs.answer_zh: 为确保旅游顺利出行、防止旅途中发生人身意外，请出行前做一次必要的身体检查，如存在下列情况请勿报名：传染性疾病患者（如活动期肺结核、伤寒等）；心血管疾病患者（如严重高血压、心功能不全、心肌缺氧、心肌梗塞等）；脑血管疾病患者（如脑栓塞、脑出血、脑肿瘤等）；呼吸系统疾病患者（如肺气肿、肺心病等）；精神病患者（如癫痫及各种精神病人）；严重贫血患者（血红蛋白低于50克/升）；大中型手术恢复期病患者。孕妇：妊娠35周及以上任何情况下均无法参团；妊娠28周及以上需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书；妊娠28周以下请慎重报名，需签署旅行社免责声明书，且行程内探险、滑雪、出海、高空、户外等项目均无法参加。残疾人：需提供7日内医生检查报告及同意书、需直系家属陪同、并至少提前61天申请预留位置及专用设施。70周岁以上老年人：需提供健康证明、体检报告及直系家属陪同（否则需签署免责声明书）；本行程较长，需要一定步行能力和体力，体力不支者请慎重报名；涉及探险、滑雪、出海、高空、户外等项目需持主治医师同意书；需至少提前61天申请适老化服务及设施。未成年人（未满18周岁）：须由直系亲属或监护人陪同，部分景点对未满18/12/6周岁有特殊限定；如有6岁以下婴儿或30公斤以下儿童请提前确认安全座椅或自行携带符合欧盟标准的座椅；无父母陪同的18岁以下未成年人须持父母授权书（仅一方陪同需另一方书面授权，与其他亲友同行需父母双方监护人授权书）；本产品不接受2周岁以下婴儿参团。根据《旅游法》第15条，旅游者需如实告知与旅游活动相关的个人健康信息（包括妊娠期、哺乳期、慢性病、传染病史、疑似症状或近期疫区旅居史等）并遵守安全警示规定；若因隐瞒健康信息导致人身损害或传播风险，旅游者需自行承担相应医疗、隔离费用及赔偿责任，旅行社可解除合同且不退还费用。

title_en: Paris & Normandy 5-Day Boutique Small-Group Tour
title_zh: 巴黎诺曼底5天精品小团
short_en: A 5-day art-and-history journey from Paris through Versailles to Normandy's coast, Mont-Saint-Michel and the Loire chateaux, in a 4-8 person small group.
short_zh: 5天艺术人文之旅，从巴黎、凡尔赛宫一路深入诺曼底海岸、圣米歇尔山与卢瓦尔河谷城堡，4-8人精品小团。
desc_en: This boutique small-group tour traces the roots of French art and culture, from the masterpieces of the Louvre and the Baroque grandeur of Versailles to the Impressionist landscapes of Normandy. With a national-museum lecturer guiding you through royal and religious history, you will cross the Normandy Bridge to Honfleur, Deauville and Caen, stand before the island abbey of Mont-Saint-Michel, wander the corsair city of Saint-Malo, and end among the fairy-tale chateaux of the Loire Valley. A round trip from Paris, it pairs Michelin-level dining and five-star castle hotels with deep cultural commentary for groups of just 4-8 travellers.
desc_zh: 这趟精品小团循着法兰西艺术与文化的源头：从卢浮宫的旷世杰作、凡尔赛宫的巴洛克瑰宝，到诺曼底的印象派风光。由法国国家博物馆讲解员带您深度领略皇室正史与宗教艺术，跨越诺曼底大桥前往翁弗勒尔、多维尔与卡昂，登临海中孤岛圣米歇尔山，漫步海盗古城圣马洛，最后徜徉于卢瓦尔河谷的童话城堡群。行程从巴黎往返，配以米其林星级美食与五星城堡酒店，专为4-8人小团打造深度文化体验。

highlights.en: Themed deep-dive lecture inside the Louvre by a French national-museum guide
highlights.zh: 由法国国家博物馆讲解员在卢浮宫做主题深度讲解

highlights.en: Versailles Palace with expert commentary on its Baroque and Rococo art
highlights.zh: 凡尔赛宫巴洛克与洛可可艺术专题深度讲解

highlights.en: Monet's Garden at Giverny and the Impressionist harbour town of Honfleur
highlights.zh: 吉维尼莫奈花园与印象派经典小镇翁弗勒尔

highlights.en: Mont-Saint-Michel, the UNESCO island abbey, and the corsair city of Saint-Malo
highlights.zh: 世界遗产海中孤岛圣米歇尔山与海盗古城圣马洛

highlights.en: Loire Valley chateaux: Chenonceau on the water, Blois old town and grand Chambord
highlights.zh: 卢瓦尔河谷城堡：水上舍农索城堡、布洛瓦老城与恢弘的香波堡

highlights.en: Five-star Michelin castle hotels (Ivan Vautier, Chateau d'Artigny)
highlights.zh: 入住伊万沃蒂尔、达赫蒂涅城堡等五星米其林城堡酒店

highlights.en: Intimate 4-8 person small group with city-centre 4-star Paris hotels
highlights.zh: 4-8人轻奢小团，巴黎入住市中心4星级酒店

highlights.en: No forced shopping, deep cultural commentary throughout the route
highlights.zh: 全程无强制购物，深度文化讲解贯穿始终

includes.en: Hotels: 4 nights in total - 1 night in a five-star spa hotel, 1 night in a five-star chateau hotel and 2 nights in four-star hotels.
includes.zh: 【酒店】：五星SPA酒店1晚，五星城堡酒店1晚，四星级酒店2晚，共计四晚酒店。

includes.en: Breakfast: hotel buffet breakfast or breakfast in another form.
includes.zh: 【早餐】：酒店内的自助式早餐或其他形式早餐。

includes.en: Transport: a business travel van.
includes.zh: 【交通】：商务旅行车。

includes.en: Guide: Chinese-speaking driver-cum-guide service.
includes.zh: 【导游】：中文司机兼导游服务。

includes.en: Operating costs: tourist city tax, city-entry fees, residence tax, road and bridge tolls, parking and fuel, driver-guide meal allowance and other in-itinerary operating fees.
includes.zh: 【执行】：游客城市税、进城费、居住税、过路过桥费、停车燃油费、司导餐补等行程内执行费用。

includes.en: Baggage: one 23 kg checked bag and one carry-on bag.
includes.zh: 【行李】：1件23公斤行李及1件随身行李。

includes.en: Admissions: first-entry tickets to the Louvre (including the national museum lecturer), Versailles (including the national museum lecturer), the Seine river cruise, Monet's Garden (closed in winter; open only from early April to the end of October, with exact opening per the official Monet garden website), Chambord and the Chateau de Chenonceau.
includes.zh: 【门票】：卢浮宫门票（含国家馆讲解师）、凡尔赛门票（含国家馆讲解师）、塞纳河游船、莫奈花园（莫奈花园故居冬季关闭，每年自四月初起至十月末参观，具体开放时间以莫奈花园故居官网通知为准）、香波堡、舍农索城堡景点首道门票。

excludes.en: Passport: personal passport fees.
excludes.zh: 护照：个人护照费用。

excludes.en: Visa: the tourist visa fees required for the countries listed in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 签证：行程中所列旅游国家所需的观光签证费用。

excludes.en: Insurance: travel insurance fees (if the itinerary involves high-risk sports, verify your travel insurance covers that activity).
excludes.zh: 保险：旅游保险费用（如行程内涉及到高风险运动，请核实旅游保险是否包含该项运动）。

excludes.en: Tips: gratuities to the guide and driver totaling EUR 10 per person per day, same rate for adults and children.
excludes.zh: 小费：游客支付导游和司机小费一共10欧/人/天，大小同价。

excludes.en: Meals: apart from the special meals included in the itinerary, lunches and dinners are not included.
excludes.zh: 餐饮：除行程内包含的特色餐外，行程中不包含午、晚正餐费用。

excludes.en: Admissions: attractions not marked as fee-included (including but not limited to sights noted as 'exterior', and all 'recommended', 'optional', 'experience' and other items where inclusion is not mentioned); pay on your own if you wish to visit.
excludes.zh: 门票：行程中未注明费用包含的景点（包括但不仅限于行程中注明“外观”的景点，以及“推荐”“可选”“体验”等所有未提及费用包含的项目，如游客需要参观，敬请自理）。

excludes.en: Extended stay: any extra accommodation, transport or sightseeing beyond the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 延长住宿：行程外额外延长的住宿、交通、观光费用。

excludes.en: Personal spending: drinks and alcohol, taxis, phone charges and other personal expenses.
excludes.zh: 私人消费：如饮料酒类、出租车、电话费等个人消费。

excludes.en: Other transport: transport not mentioned in 'included' beyond the business van or coach, such as Venice gondolas, and sightseeing trains or electric taxis in vehicle-restricted zones, payable on your own.
excludes.zh: 其他交通：除包含商务旅行车或者中巴之外，费用包含中未提及的其他交通费用，如威尼斯贡多拉，以及车辆限行区的观光火车、电瓶出租车等费用敬请自理。

excludes.en: Free activities: night sightseeing on your own and recommended in-itinerary projects, plus any transport, meals, admissions and shopping they incur.
excludes.zh: 自由活动：游客夜间自行游览及行程中的推荐项目，以及产生的交通、餐饮、门票、购物等费用。

excludes.en: Experience activities: any travel experience activities not included in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 体验活动：行程中没有包含的各项旅游体验活动。

excludes.en: Other costs: anything not mentioned under 'included'. The company reserves the right to add a surcharge for extra costs caused by force majeure (natural disasters, war, strikes), transport delays, flight cancellations or time changes, embassy visa delays, insufficient group numbers, etc.
excludes.zh: 其他费用：费用包含中未提及的费用。如因天灾、战争、罢工等不可抗力原因，及因交通延阻、航班取消或更改时间、使馆延误出签、人数不足等特殊情况或其他非我公司原因所导致的额外费用（如在外延期签证费、住食及交通费、国家航空运价调整等），我公司有权追加差价。

timeline.title_en: Paris - Louvre - Paris (Tracing the Origins of French Art with a National Museum Lecturer)
timeline.title_zh: 巴黎-卢浮宫-巴黎（与国家馆讲解师探讨法兰西艺术风潮起源）
timeline.description_en: In the morning visit the Louvre Museum, the pride of France, where a French national museum lecturer gives an in-depth, themed presentation that reads European history through the eyes of art (the U-shaped palace with I.M. Pei's glass-pyramid entrance houses over 400,000 works, around 35,000 on long-term display). In the afternoon tour the city center, visiting Notre-Dame Cathedral on the Ile de la Cite, the Ile de la Cite itself, the Eiffel Tower (exterior) and the Champ de Mars, then take a Seine river cruise on the glass-roofed Bateaux Mouches, a roughly 3.2 km, one-hour voyage passing the Grand and Petit Palais (exterior), the Hotel des Invalides (exterior), the Pont Alexandre III, the Pont des Arts love-lock bridge, the Champs-Elysees, Place de la Concorde and more. Overnight at the Mercure or Novotel Paris or an equivalent 4-star hotel; the classic Mercure sits by the Place d'Italie commercial heart, near the Butte-aux-Cailles bistro district and the Saint-Emilion modern food quarter. Note: because the Louvre limits visitor numbers (and restricts in-house lecturing in peak season), the EUR 20 per-person in-museum guiding fee may be refunded; if Versailles has fewer than 3 people, an audio guide replaces the official guide; Monet's garden is closed in winter and open only from early April to the end of October.
timeline.description_zh: 上午参观法兰西引以为傲的卢浮宫博物馆，由法兰西国家馆讲解师精选主题深度讲解，从艺术的角度看懂欧洲历史（这座呈“U”形的宫殿设有华裔建筑大师贝聿铭设计的玻璃金字塔入口，珍藏40余万件艺术珍品，长期展出约3.5万件）。下午游览巴黎市中心，参观西岱岛上的巴黎圣母院、西岱岛、埃菲尔铁塔（外观）以及战神广场，随后乘坐著名的透明船舱“苍蝇船”塞纳河游船，约3.2公里、一小时的航程途经大小皇宫（外观）、荣军院（外观）、亚历山大三世大桥、巴黎锁桥、香榭丽舍大道、协和广场等著名景点，在塞纳河上感受巴黎浪漫风光。夜宿巴黎美居或诺富特酒店或同等4星级酒店；国际连锁美居古典酒店位于繁华的意大利广场商业中心，毗邻传统法式酒馆美食街区“山鹌之丘”和现代美食广场“圣艾美侬”。重要提示：因卢浮宫限流（旺季限制馆内讲解），届时将退还馆内讲解费20欧元/每位游客；凡尔赛宫不足3人无官导讲解，由电子讲解器代替；莫奈花园故居冬季关闭，每年自四月初起至十月末开放参观。

timeline.title_en: Paris - Versailles - Paris (A National Museum Lecturer's Deep Dive into the Baroque Treasures of the Palace of Versailles)
timeline.title_zh: 巴黎-凡尔赛宫-巴黎（国家馆讲解员深度讲解凡尔赛宫殿巴洛克艺术瑰宝）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast head to the Palace of Versailles in the southwestern suburbs of Paris, a magnificent monument of the French monarchy that was not only the royal court but also the administrative center of the state, built by Louis XIV with over 30,000 workers, architects, engineers and technicians; a national museum lecturer gives an in-depth presentation on its Baroque grandeur and the birth of the Rococo style. In the afternoon return to central Paris and visit the fashion district of Boulevard Haussmann and Rue Royale, with free time around the Paris Opera / Palais Garnier (exterior) and the Printemps and Galeries Lafayette department stores. Overnight at the Mercure or Novotel Paris or an equivalent 4-star hotel near the Place d'Italie. Note: the Palais Garnier may be closed to the public for major performances or receptions and the agency cannot accurately predict its public opening hours, so the EUR 15 admission is not included; if it is open, you may buy a ticket on site.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往位于巴黎西南部郊区的凡尔赛宫，游览这座法兰西封建统治时期华丽的纪念碑——它既是法兰西宫廷，也是当时国家的行政中心，路易十四为建造它动用了三万余名工人、建筑师、工程师与技师；由国家馆讲解员深度讲解其巴洛克登峰之作与洛可可艺术的起点。下午返回巴黎市区，前往时尚中心奥斯曼大街和皇家大道，自由参观巴黎歌剧院（外观）及春天百货、巴黎老佛爷等时尚地区。夜宿巴黎美居或诺富特酒店或同等4星级酒店，位于意大利广场附近。提示：巴黎歌剧院如有重要演出或接待活动则无法入内参观，我社无法准确预测公众开放时间，故不包含门票15欧元，如开放可在现场自行购买门票。

timeline.title_en: Paris - Monet's Garden - Honfleur - Deauville - Caen (Exploring Norman Impressionism with a Michelin-Starred Restaurant)
timeline.title_zh: 巴黎-莫奈花园-翁弗勒尔-多维尔-卡昂（与米其林星级餐厅探讨诺曼底印象主义）
timeline.description_en: Set out in the morning for Monet's Garden in the village of Giverny (88 km northwest of Paris, in Upper Normandy), where Monet lived for 43 years and which is still kept as it was in his day, from spring tulips to the famous summer water lilies and autumn chrysanthemums. Then cross the Pont de Normandie (a 2 km cable-stayed bridge over the Seine estuary linking Le Havre and Honfleur) to the classic Impressionist town of Honfleur, an ancient thousand-year fishing port on the Cote Fleurie with its flower-filled harbor, old bell-tower quarter and labyrinthine old town painted by many Impressionists. Continue to the twin towns of Deauville and Trouville, which preserve the most complete Norman-Anglo architecture (timber-framed mansions) and form a protected architectural reserve, Deauville aristocratic and Trouville elegant with fairytale colored chateaux. In the evening arrive in Caen, the gastronomic capital of Normandy, and stay at the Ivan Vautier Hotel; the chef's three-course set dinner is recommended. Overnight at the Ivan Vautier Hotel or an equivalent 5-star hotel - a five-star spa hotel created by Michelin-starred chef Ivan Vautier with a classic courtyard, Michelin-starred restaurant, tea room, Turkish bath and spa, in Caen's old town within walking distance of the Saint-Ouen church, the old Saint-Etienne church and the Abbaye aux Hommes (Men's Abbey). Note: the Michelin restaurant is closed Monday lunch and dinner and Sunday dinner and takes no reservations; the chef's recommended dinner is EUR 130 per person and is not included; depending on the restaurant's opening, the order of some departures' itinerary may be reversed (an equivalent itinerary).
timeline.description_zh: 早上出发前往吉维尼小镇的莫奈花园游览（位于巴黎西北方向88公里、属上诺曼底省，莫奈曾在此生活43年，至今仍按其生前原状维护，从开园时的郁金香到盛夏著名的睡莲、闭馆前的菊花，皆可寻得莫奈画中色彩）。随后横跨诺曼底大桥（全长2公里，横跨塞纳河入海口，连接勒阿弗尔与翁弗勒尔）前往印象派经典小镇翁弗勒尔，这座千年古老渔港位于鲜花海岸门户，拥有鲜花海港、古钟楼区和迷宫般的老城，是诸多印象派画师笔下盛景。之后前往保留完整诺曼-盎格鲁建筑群（木质骨架结构宅邸）的双子之城——多维尔和特鲁维尔，两城共同构成诺曼-盎格鲁建筑群保护区，多维尔显宫廷贵气、特鲁维尔优雅而有童话般彩色城堡。当晚前往诺曼底美食之都卡昂，入住伊万沃蒂尔酒店，推荐伊万沃蒂尔三道式晚宴套餐。夜宿伊万沃蒂尔米其林酒店或同等5星级酒店——由米其林星级主厨伊万沃捷创建的这间五星级Spa酒店拥有独特古典庭院，配有米其林星级餐厅、美食茶室、土耳其浴室及spa中心，位于卡昂古城区，毗邻圣旺教堂、圣艾蒂安老教堂和卡昂男子修道院，均可步行到达。提示：米其林餐厅每周一午晚餐、周日晚餐休息且不接受预定；主厨推荐晚餐130欧元/位，不含费用；根据餐厅开放情况，部分团期行程游览顺序或前后对调（视为同等行程）。

timeline.title_en: Caen - Mont-Saint-Michel - Saint-Malo - Loire Valley (The Devout Hermit's Isle and the Gourmet Capital of the Corsair City)
timeline.title_zh: 卡昂-圣米歇尔山-圣马洛-卢瓦尔河谷（虔诚的隐修居士与魔鬼城的美食之都）
timeline.description_en: In the morning travel to Mont-Saint-Michel, a lone conical granite island 2 km off the Normandy coast that becomes an island at high tide and joins the mainland at low tide, a UNESCO World Heritage site and one of France's great Christian pilgrimage centers (tour about 2 hours, viewing the mirror-like tidal flats at its foot depending on the tides); see the Mont-Saint-Michel Abbey (exterior), built at the island's highest point and dedicated to the Archangel Michael, which once served as a national prison under Napoleon. Then continue to the corsair city of Saint-Malo, a walled medieval Breton town once nicknamed the 'pirate city' for fending off raiders and now a gourmet town whose four-square-kilometer old center is packed with distinctive restaurants, cafes, bars and shops; explore the old town and its seafront, including the Saint-Malo beach and ramparts where you can walk the complete medieval sea-defense fortress and look out toward the Channel Islands and Jersey. Afterward head to the Loire Valley region to check in. Overnight at the Chateau d'Artigny Hotel or an equivalent 5-star hotel - a majestic white-stone art chateau set in a 25-hectare French garden near the Chateau de Chenonceau, with Doric granite columns and Roman-style wall lamps, its main 17th-century section designed by architect Jean-Michel Chevotet and once host to Queen Elizabeth, offering a supremely luxurious aristocratic experience. Note: the agency selects an elegant double room for guests, possibly in the banquet, attic or pavilion wings; if you have specific room-type or wing requirements, contact customer service to upgrade before booking.
timeline.description_zh: 当天上午前往诺曼底海滩的独立小岛——圣米歇尔山（距海岸两公里，呈圆锥形、由花granite构成，涨潮时为海岛、退潮时为陆地，被联合国教科文组织列入世界遗产，是法国著名古迹和基督教圣地，游览约2小时，并根据潮汐情况观赏山脚下如镜片般的诺曼底浅水滩涂）；远观圣米歇尔山修道院（外观），修道院建于岛上最高处，奉献给大天使米歇尔，拿破仑执政期间曾作为国家监狱。之后前往“魔鬼城”——圣马洛，这座中世纪布列塔尼古城曾因抵御海盗袭击而被称为“海盗城”，今天是一座美食之城，古城中心四平方公里内遍布各具特色的餐厅、咖啡、酒吧与店铺；游览圣马洛老城及海滨城中区，包括圣马洛海滩和海防工事，可漫步保存完整的中世纪海防军事要塞、环绕古城并眺望英国的泽西岛屿。随后前往卢瓦尔河谷大区入住酒店。夜宿达赫蒂涅城堡酒店或同等5星级酒店——这座由白色石头堆砌的雄伟艺术城堡坐落于25公顷法式花园中，毗邻舍农索城堡，配有陶立克式花岗石立柱及罗马式风灯，主体部分为十七世纪著名建筑师Jean-Michel Chevotet设计，曾接待过英国伊丽莎白女王，提供极致奢华的贵族体验。提示：我社为宾客选择典雅大床房，可能分布在城堡的宴会、阁楼、凉亭三个区域，如对房型或区域有指定要求，敬请在报名前联系客服升级房型。

timeline.title_en: Loire Valley - Blois - Chambord - Paris (Chateaux of the Valley: The Finest Expression of Classical French Aristocratic Elegance)
timeline.title_zh: 卢瓦尔河谷-布洛瓦-香波堡-巴黎（城堡河谷——法兰西古典贵族优雅的最佳诠释）
timeline.description_en: In the morning visit the Chateau de Chenonceau, the romantic 'water chateau' of the Loire Valley built across the River Cher, a 15th-16th-century structure with Mediterranean gardens and two great knight's towers, linking a main keep, gallery, terrace and round tower; nicknamed the 'Ladies' Chateau' because its successive owners were all women, it offers magnificent views over the Loire. Then head north to tour the refined old town of Blois, largely rebuilt after near-total WWII destruction, noted for its illuminated cathedral bell-tower and the 15th-century House of the Acrobats with its medieval carved-jester woodwork, one of the few surviving old houses. Finally visit the Chateau de Chambord in the Loire Valley, the largest of the Loire chateaux and a classic medieval-layout hunting lodge of the French kings, built under Francois I, reflecting French traditional architecture with Italian Renaissance influence and listed as a UNESCO World Heritage site in 1981; reach it along the D952 riverside road through wild forests that hide untamed roe deer and wild boar. Afterward return to Paris, where the wonderful journey ends. No accommodation tonight. This region is the World Heritage chateaux area of the Loire Valley, France's largest tourist area, offering a 280 km route from Sully-sur-Loire to Chalonnes-sur-Loire.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往游览卢瓦尔河谷里一座建在水上的城堡——舍农索城堡（15和16世纪的建筑，横跨卢瓦尔河支流希尔河，由主堡垒、长廊、平台和圆塔串联而成，种满地中海植物的花园和两座骑士塔楼，是河谷宫堡群中最富浪漫情调的“水上城堡”，又称“女人堡”，因其历代主人皆为女性，从这里可观赏卢瓦尔河畔壮丽景色）。之后北上沿途参观精致古朴的布洛瓦老城（二战时几乎被毁、修复后依然值得一看，尤以夜间灯光下熠熠生辉的教堂钟鼓楼著称，对面是装饰中世纪小丑木雕的“杂技演员之家”，是为数不多幸存的15世纪古屋）。最后沿着D952河畔大道、穿过隐藏着从未被驯服的獐鹿与野猪的原生态丛林，参观卢瓦尔河谷香波堡——全法兰西最恢弘、河谷城堡群中最大的城堡，是法国君王狩猎的行宫，兴建于弗朗索瓦一世时期，反映法国传统建筑艺术并受意大利文艺复兴影响，1981年列入世界遗产名录。之后返回巴黎，结束美好旅行。当晚无住宿。此区为世界文化遗产卢瓦尔河谷城堡区，是法国最大的旅游景区，从叙利（Sully-sur-Loire）到沙洛那（Chalonnes-sur-Loire）提供一条长达280公里的旅游线路。

meeting_en: Paris (round trip starting and ending in Paris); pickup details confirmed in your departure notice.
meeting_zh: 巴黎（从巴黎出发并返回巴黎）；具体接团安排以出团通知书为准。

faqs.question_en: Where and when does the group meet up?
faqs.question_zh: 集合地点和时间是什么？
faqs.answer_en: The group meets at 8:30 in the morning at the Place d'Italie in Paris's 13th arrondissement. This product does not recommend flights that land in Paris on the morning of the tour day.
faqs.answer_zh: 当天上午8:30在巴黎13区意大利广场集合。本产品不推荐参团当天早上降落巴黎的航班！

faqs.question_en: Where and when does the group disperse?
faqs.question_zh: 集散地点和时间是什么？
faqs.answer_en: The group disperses at 19:00 in the evening at the Place d'Italie in Paris's 13th arrondissement. This product does not recommend flights that leave Paris on the day the tour ends.
faqs.answer_zh: 当天下午19:00在巴黎13区意大利广场解散。本产品不推荐结束当天离开巴黎的航班！

faqs.question_en: Is the Michelin restaurant at the Ivan Vautier hotel included?
faqs.question_zh: 伊万沃蒂尔米其林酒店的米其林餐厅是否包含？
faqs.answer_en: No, the cost is not included. We recommend that guests pay to dine at this hotel's Michelin restaurant, but the cost is not included. The chef usually recommends two different versions of a paired tasting menu, but the dishes cannot be chosen - you only taste what the chef has selected from the day's seasonal produce. The restaurant can provide a la carte service.
faqs.answer_zh: 费用不包含，我社推荐游客自费前往此酒店的米其林餐厅，但是不包含费用。通常情况下，主厨推荐两个不同版本的菜式搭配，但菜品不可选择，只能品尝当天主厨选择的当季食材。餐厅可以提供点单服务。

faqs.question_en: Is the Mont-Saint-Michel admission included?
faqs.question_zh: 是否包含圣米歇尔山的门票？
faqs.answer_en: The shuttle bus and the visit to Mont-Saint-Michel itself are both free, but the abbey at the top requires a ticket that is either obtained free or bought on site depending on age and nationality. The recommended visiting time for the abbey is 45 minutes. Visitors of any nationality under 18 are free but must collect a ticket with ID; EU nationals under 26 are free but must collect a ticket with ID.
faqs.answer_zh: 圣米歇尔山的摆渡车和门票都是免费的，但山顶上的修道院需要根据年龄和国籍免费领取门票或现场购买门票。修道院推荐游览时间为45分钟。全部国籍18岁以下：免费，但需凭证件领取门票；欧盟国籍26岁以下：免费，但需凭证件领取门票。

faqs.question_en: How might the order of the itinerary be changed?
faqs.question_zh: 如何更改行程的先后顺序？
faqs.answer_en: Depending on the Michelin restaurant's reservation situation, some departures may visit the Loire Valley on the first day and Mont-Saint-Michel on the last day. The order of the itinerary may be reversed but the content stays the same, and this does not affect the overall experience; the actual arrangement follows the departure notice.
faqs.answer_zh: 根据米其林餐厅预定情况，可能第一天游览卢瓦尔河谷，最后一天游览圣米歇尔山。行程往返次序可能相反，但游览内容一致、不影响全程体验，具体以出团通知书为准。

faqs.question_en: Do I need a visa?
faqs.question_zh: 是否需要签证？
faqs.answer_en: This product does not include visa fees; you need a Schengen visa (single or multiple entry). If you need a visa, please choose a Schengen-visa product. After booking we provide, free of charge, all materials needed to apply for the Schengen visa (see the detailed materials list). 'Worry-free visa guarantee': for travelers who sign with us at least 61 days before departure, if the visa is not obtained within 45 days before departure we bear all losses and immediately refund the full travel cost; travelers who do not meet this clause and fail to obtain a visa are refunded per the change-and-cancellation terms. A refusal must be reported to us within 48 hours with the consulate's refusal letter, supplementary or amended materials must be submitted within five days, and you may not unilaterally waive the 'visa defense' right. If you commission us to handle the Schengen visa, we buy you the Schengen travel insurance required for the visa; if you do not, you must buy your own travel insurance and handle claims yourself. Your passport must be valid for at least 6 months from the date of departure, or customs may deny entry. Visa fees, visa service fees, Schengen insurance fees and visa-center appointment fees are all non-refundable and non-transferable, even if the product is changed or cancelled.
faqs.answer_zh: 本产品不包含签证费用，需要申根签证（单次或多次入境）；如需办理签证请选择申根签证产品。预订后免费提供办理申根签证的全部材料（参考详细材料清单）。“保签无忧”：游客在出发日前61天与我社签约的旅游产品，如在出发前45天内未获取签证，我社承担所有损失，立即退还游客全部旅游费用；不符合该条款的游客如未正常获取签证，将按照“退改与取消条款”退费。如遇拒签需在48小时内通知我社并出具使领馆拒签函，如需补充或更改材料须在五天内提交，且不得单方面放弃“签证抗辩”权利。如委托我社办理申根签证，我社为游客购买符合申根签证要求的申根旅游保险；若未委托办理，需自行购买旅游保险并自行负责理赔。护照有效期需在离境之日起至少还有六个月，否则海关有权拒绝入境。签证费、签证服务费、申根保险费、签证中心预约费均不可退款、不可更改使用者，即使产品退改签也无法退款。

faqs.question_en: Booking, changes & cancellation
faqs.question_zh: 预订、变更与取消须知
faqs.answer_en: Free no-reason cancellation is available up to 30 days before departure; closer to departure, refunds follow the change-and-cancellation terms. All pricing is quoted in EUR; if you pay in CNY the amount is the real-time CNY value calculated on the day of payment from the Bank of China 'euro selling' rate. Because this is a small-group tour using special properties, base rooms are assigned by the hotel and the room type cannot be chosen; for the Chateau d'Artigny the agency selects an elegant double that may be in the banquet, attic or pavilion wing, so contact customer service to upgrade before booking if you have specific requirements. Please arrive in Paris at least one day before the tour starts (the meeting point is the Place d'Italie in the 13th arrondissement at 8:30) and leave at least one day after it ends (dispersal at the Place d'Italie at 19:00 on the final day) - flights landing or leaving Paris on the tour day are not recommended. Key itinerary contingency notes: because the Louvre limits visitor numbers, the EUR 20 in-museum guiding fee may be refunded; if Versailles has fewer than 3 people an audio guide replaces the official guide; the Palais Garnier (EUR 15) and the Ivan Vautier Michelin dinner (EUR 130) are not included; Monet's Garden is open only from early April to the end of October; and depending on the Michelin restaurant's availability, the order of the itinerary may be reversed (for example visiting the Loire Valley first and Mont-Saint-Michel last) with identical content - the actual arrangement follows the departure notice.
faqs.answer_zh: 出发前30天可免费无理由取消；临近出发的退费按“退改与取消条款”执行。所有定价以欧元为计价单位，如选择人民币支付，则以付款当日依据中国银行实时“欧元卖出价”自动计算的人民币实时价格为准。本产品为使用特殊酒店的精品小团，基础房型由酒店随机安排、不可选择房型；达赫蒂涅城堡酒店由我社选择典雅大床房，可能分布在宴会、阁楼、凉亭区域，如有指定要求请在报名前联系客服升级。请至少提前一天抵达巴黎（集合地点为13区意大利广场，上午8:30），并在行程结束后至少一天再离开（最后一天19:00在意大利广场解散）——不推荐参团或离团当天降落/离开巴黎的航班。重要应急条款：因卢浮宫限流，馆内讲解费20欧元/位届时将退还；凡尔赛宫不足3人由电子讲解器代替官导；巴黎歌剧院（15欧元）及伊万沃蒂尔米其林晚餐（130欧元/位）均不含费用；莫奈花园仅每年四月初至十月末开放；根据米其林餐厅预定情况，行程顺序可能对调（如第一天游览卢瓦尔河谷、最后一天游览圣米歇尔山），内容一致，具体以出团通知书为准。

faqs.question_en: Health & safety requirements
faqs.question_zh: 健康与安全须知
faqs.answer_en: Please have a necessary health check before travel. Do not sign up if you have: an infectious disease (e.g. active tuberculosis, typhoid); cardiovascular disease (severe hypertension, heart failure, myocardial ischemia, myocardial infarction); cerebrovascular disease (cerebral embolism, hemorrhage, brain tumor); respiratory disease (emphysema, cor pulmonale); a mental illness (epilepsy and other psychiatric conditions); severe anemia (hemoglobin below 50 g/L); or are recovering from major or moderate surgery. Pregnancy: from week 35 you cannot join under any circumstances; from week 28 a doctor's report within 7 days plus the attending physician's consent are required; under 28 weeks, sign up with caution, sign the liability waiver, and you cannot take part in adventure, skiing, sea-going, high-altitude or outdoor activities. Disabled travelers need a doctor's report within 7 days plus consent, must be accompanied by an immediate family member, and must apply at least 61 days ahead for a reserved place and dedicated facilities. Travelers over 70 need a health certificate and physical-exam report and an immediate-family escort (or sign the waiver); because this is a long itinerary it requires a certain walking ability and good stamina, so those with limited stamina should sign up with care. Minors (under 18) must be accompanied by an immediate relative or guardian; some sights have special rules for those under 18, 12 or 6; infants under 6 or children under 30 kg need a confirmed EU-standard child safety seat (otherwise buy or bring your own); an unaccompanied minor needs a parental authorization letter (and the other parent's written authorization if traveling with only one parent, or both parents' guardian authorization if traveling with others); infants under 2 cannot join. Per Article 15 of the Tourism Law and the Infectious Disease Prevention Law, travelers must truthfully declare health information relevant to the trip (pregnancy, lactation, chronic illness, infectious-disease history, suspected symptoms, recent travel to epidemic areas) and follow safety warnings; concealment that causes harm or transmission means the traveler bears liability, including possible civil compensation, administrative penalties, and medical/quarantine costs, and the agency may terminate the contract without refund.
faqs.answer_zh: 出行前请做一次必要的身体检查，如有下列情况请勿报名：传染性疾病（如活动期肺结核、伤寒）；心血管疾病（严重高血压、心功能不全、心肌缺氧、心肌梗塞）；脑血管疾病（脑栓塞、脑出血、脑肿瘤）；呼吸系统疾病（肺气肿、肺心病）；精神病（癫痫及各种精神病）；严重贫血（血红蛋白低于50克/升）；大中型手术恢复期患者。孕妇：妊娠第35周及以上任何情况下都无法参团；第28周及以上需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书；第28周以下请慎重报名，需签署免责声明书，且无法参加探险、滑雪、出海、高空、户外等项目。残疾人需提供7日内医生检查报告及同意书、需直系家属陪同，并提前至少61天申请预留位置及专用配套设施。70周岁以上老年人需提供健康证明、体检报告并由直系家属陪同（否则需签署免责声明书）；因本次行程较长，需有一定步行能力且对体力要求较高，体力不支者请慎重报名。未成年人（未满18周岁）须由直系亲属或监护人陪同；部分景点对未满18/12/6周岁有特殊限定；6岁以下婴儿或30公斤以下儿童需提前确认符合欧盟安全制式的儿童安全座椅（否则需自行购买或携带）；无父母陪同的未成年人需持父母授权书（如仅一方陪同需另一方书面授权，与他人同行需持父母双方监护人授权书）；不接受2周岁以下婴儿参团。根据《旅游法》第15条及《传染病防治法》，游客需如实告知与旅游相关的个人健康信息（妊娠期、哺乳期、慢性病、传染病史、疑似症状或近期疫区旅居史）并遵守安全警示，若因隐瞒导致人身损害或传播风险，游客须自行承担相应责任，并可能面临民事赔偿、行政处罚及医疗隔离费用，旅行社可解除合同且不退还费用。

title_en: South of France 6-Day Small-Group Tour: Provence & the French Riviera
title_zh: 南法6天精品小团：普罗旺斯与蔚蓝海岸
short_en: A 6-day small-group escape through Provence's lavender, pink salt lakes and the Cote d'Azur, with round-trip TGV from Paris.
short_zh: 6天精品小团，畅游普罗旺斯薰衣草、粉红盐湖与蔚蓝海岸，巴黎高铁直达往返。
desc_en: Travel one-way deep into the south of France on this 6-day small-group tour, departing Paris by high-speed TGV into the heart of Provence. From the hilltop village of Gordes and the Senanque Abbey to the flamingo-filled pink salt lakes of Aigues-Mortes, then along the glamorous Cote d'Azur through Cannes, Saint-Paul-de-Vence, Antibes, Monaco, Eze and Nice, the route blends lavender fields, Mediterranean fjords and ancient Roman heritage. The journey ends amid the Roman monuments of Nimes before a TGV ride back to Paris, with two-night hotel stays for a relaxed pace and an all-inclusive price.
desc_zh: 这趟6天精品小团带您深度畅游法国南部，从巴黎乘高速TGV直达普罗旺斯腹地。行程串联山城高德古城、塞南克修道院，到火烈鸟栖息的艾格莫尔特粉红盐湖，再沿魅力四射的蔚蓝海岸游览戛纳、圣保罗德旺斯、昂提布、摩纳哥、埃兹与尼斯，融合薰衣草花海、地中海峡湾与古罗马遗迹。最后在尼姆的古罗马遗址间收尾，乘TGV返回巴黎；多处连住两晚、节奏轻松，一价全含。

highlights.en: Round-trip high-speed TGV from Paris straight into the south of France
highlights.zh: 巴黎高速TGV往返直达南法，减少舟车劳顿

highlights.en: Gordes hilltop village and the Senanque Abbey in the heart of Provence
highlights.zh: 普罗旺斯腹地的高德古城与塞南克修道院

highlights.en: Pink salt lakes of Aigues-Mortes with flamingos and the Pont de Gau bird park
highlights.zh: 艾格莫尔特粉红盐湖与蓬德高鸟类公园，邂逅火烈鸟

highlights.en: Lavender fields of Valensole and the D907 (in season)
highlights.zh: 瓦朗索勒与D907公路薰衣草花海（花期内）

highlights.en: Cote d'Azur glamour: Cannes, Saint-Paul-de-Vence, Monaco, Eze and Nice
highlights.zh: 蔚蓝海岸风情：戛纳、圣保罗德旺斯、摩纳哥、埃兹与尼斯

highlights.en: Calanques boat cruise from Cassis along dramatic Mediterranean cliffs
highlights.zh: 卡西斯出发的卡朗格峡湾游船，欣赏壮丽地中海峭壁

highlights.en: Roman heritage in Arles and Nimes, in the footsteps of Van Gogh
highlights.zh: 阿尔勒与尼姆的古罗马遗迹，追寻梵高足迹

highlights.en: Intimate 4-8 person small group with city-centre 4-star hotels and all-inclusive pricing
highlights.zh: 4-8人精品小团，入住市区四星酒店，一价全含

includes.en: Hotels: 5 nights in 4-star hotels; because special properties are used, room type cannot be chosen.
includes.zh: 【酒店】：四星级酒店5晚，由于选用特殊酒店，不可选择房型。

includes.en: Meals: 5 breakfasts (hotel buffet breakfast or breakfast in another form).
includes.zh: 【餐饮】：酒店自助早餐或其他形式早餐5餐。

includes.en: Operating costs: tourist city tax, city-entry fees, residence tax, road and bridge tolls, parking and fuel, driver-guide meal allowance and other in-itinerary operating fees.
includes.zh: 【执行】：游客城市税、进城费、居住税、过路过桥费、停车燃油费、司导餐补等行程内执行费用。

includes.en: Transport: a business travel van.
includes.zh: 【交通】：商务旅行车。

includes.en: Long-distance transport: round-trip direct TGV high-speed train tickets between Paris and Avignon/Nimes station.
includes.zh: 【大交通】：巴黎至阿维尼翁/尼姆火车站往返高铁直达火车票。

includes.en: Guide: Chinese-speaking driver-cum-guide service.
includes.zh: 【导游】：中文司机兼导游服务。

includes.en: Baggage: one 23 kg checked bag and one carry-on bag.
includes.zh: 【行李】：1件23公斤行李及1件随身行李。

includes.en: Admissions: Eze hilltop botanical garden, Cassis Calanques boat cruise, perfume museum, Pont de Gau Ornithological Park, and the Aigues-Mortes salt lake plus sightseeing train.
includes.zh: 【门票】：埃兹山顶植物园、卡西斯峡湾游船、香水博物馆、蓬德高鸟类公园门票、艾格莫尔特盐湖及观光火车。

excludes.en: Passport: personal passport fees.
excludes.zh: 护照：个人护照费用。

excludes.en: Visa: the tourist visa fees required for the countries listed in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 签证：行程中所列旅游国家所需的观光签证费用。

excludes.en: Insurance: travel insurance fees (if the itinerary involves high-risk sports, verify your travel insurance covers that activity).
excludes.zh: 保险：旅游保险费用（如行程内涉及到高风险运动，请核实旅游保险是否包含该项运动）。

excludes.en: Tips: gratuities to the guide and driver totaling EUR 10 per person per day, same rate for adults and children.
excludes.zh: 小费：游客支付导游和司机小费一共10欧/人/天，大小同价。

excludes.en: Meals: apart from the special meals included in the itinerary, lunches and dinners are not included.
excludes.zh: 餐饮：除行程内包含的特色餐外，行程中不包含午、晚正餐费用。

excludes.en: Admissions: attractions not marked as fee-included, including but not limited to sights noted as 'exterior', and all 'recommended', 'optional', 'experience' and other items where inclusion is not mentioned; pay on your own if you wish to visit.
excludes.zh: 门票：行程中未注明费用包含的景点（包括但不仅限于行程中注明“外观”的景点，以及“推荐”“可选”“体验”等所有未提及费用包含的项目，如游客需要参观，敬请自理）。

excludes.en: Extended stay: any extra accommodation, transport or sightseeing beyond the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 延长住宿：行程外额外延长的住宿、交通、观光费用。

excludes.en: Personal spending: drinks and alcohol, taxis, phone charges and other personal expenses.
excludes.zh: 私人消费：如饮料酒类、出租车、电话费等个人消费。

excludes.en: Other transport: transport not mentioned in 'included' beyond the business van or coach, such as Venice gondolas, and sightseeing trains or electric taxis in vehicle-restricted zones, payable on your own.
excludes.zh: 其他交通：除包含商务旅行车或者中巴之外，费用包含中未提及的其他交通费用，如威尼斯贡多拉，以及车辆限行区的观光火车、电瓶出租车等费用敬请自理。

excludes.en: Free activities: night sightseeing on your own and recommended in-itinerary projects, plus any transport, meals, admissions and shopping they incur.
excludes.zh: 自由活动：游客夜间自行游览及行程中的推荐项目，以及产生的交通、餐饮、门票、购物等费用。

excludes.en: Experience activities: any travel experience activities not included in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 体验活动：行程中没有包含的各项旅游体验活动。

excludes.en: Other costs: anything not mentioned under 'included'. The company reserves the right to add a surcharge for extra costs caused by force majeure (natural disasters, war, strikes), transport delays, flight cancellations or time changes, embassy visa delays, insufficient group numbers, etc.
excludes.zh: 其他费用：费用包含中未提及的费用。如因天灾、战争、罢工等不可抗力原因，及因交通延阻、航班取消或更改时间、使馆延误出签、人数不足等特殊情况或其他非我公司原因所导致的额外费用（如在外延期签证费、住食及交通费、国家航空运价调整等），我公司有权追加差价。

timeline.title_en: Paris to Avignon - Provence Hill Villages (Lavender, Gordes & the World of A Year in Provence)
timeline.title_zh: 巴黎-阿维尼翁（漫天紫色 | 山居岁月普罗旺斯小镇）
timeline.description_en: Take the French TGV high-speed train on your own from Paris down to southern France (no guide on the train; the ride is about 2-3 hours). On arrival you meet the group and begin the Provence hill-village tour, visiting in turn Fontaine-de-Vaucluse spring village, the medieval hilltop town of Gordes (said to be the inspiration for Miyazaki's Castle in the Sky), and the Senanque Abbey (exterior) tucked in a quiet valley amid its lavender fields, the setting of the book A Year in Provence. Overnight at the Novotel Avignon Nord or an equivalent 4-star hotel, set in the green Provencal countryside about 15 minutes from Avignon's historic center. Note: because summer TGV seats are tight and trains can be cancelled by heat, strikes or delays, the rail segment may be rerouted to Pont-du-Gard or Montpellier Sud de France station, and the order of Day 1 and the final day may be swapped (treated as an equivalent itinerary). The train is unaccompanied and tickets are name-bound, so carry your passport and e-ticket.

timeline.title_en: Avignon to Aigues-Mortes to Marseille - Pink Salt Lake & Flamingo Habitat
timeline.title_zh: 阿维尼翁-艾格莫尔特-马赛（梦幻粉红 | 粉色盐湖火烈鸟栖息地）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast explore the walled old city of Avignon on your own, including the Pont d'Avignon / Pont Saint-Benezet broken bridge (exterior) and the Palais des Papes / Popes' Palace (exterior). Continue to the Pont de Gau Ornithological Park in the Camargue wetlands, a major flamingo habitat home to 300+ bird species, then to the medieval salt town of Aigues-Mortes, where you board the sightseeing tourist train to tour the pink salt lake, whose color comes from salt-loving Dunaliella algae against snow-white quartz beaches and salt hills. In the afternoon head into Marseille, where you may visit Palais Longchamp park, the Notre-Dame de la Garde basilica atop its 154m hill, and the Vieux-Port / Old Port. Overnight at the Novotel Marseille or a Crowne Plaza / equivalent 4-star hotel in the city center, close to the Old Port.

timeline.title_en: Marseille to Valensole to Cannes to Saint-Paul-de-Vence to Antibes - Lavender Fields & the Riviera
timeline.title_zh: 马赛-瓦朗索勒-戛纳-圣保罗德旺斯-昂提布（彩色集市 | 薰衣草花海与马塞纳长廊的喧嚣）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast set out for the lavender fields of Valensole and along the D907 road (during the lavender bloom), immersing yourself in the purple sea celebrated by National Geographic and the filming location of the romance dramas based on Chiung Yao's novels. In the afternoon continue to the film city and seaside resort of Cannes to see the Palais des Festivals and the Walk of Fame / Allee des Stars (300+ celebrity handprints), then stroll the seafront promenade. Visit the hilltop medieval art village of Saint-Paul-de-Vence, once home to Chagall and Picasso, then in the evening go on to Antibes to wander its old town on your own. Overnight at the Novotel Antibes Sophia Antipolis or an equivalent 4-star hotel. Note: lupins bloom from mid-to-late May and lavender typically from mid-to-late June through late July depending on altitude and weather; if lavender cannot be seen during your departure, this is replaced by a visit to a pottery town.

timeline.title_en: Antibes to Menton to Monaco to Eze to Nice to Antibes - Princess Grace's Riviera Corniche
timeline.title_zh: 昂提布-芒通-摩纳哥-埃兹-尼斯-昂提布（柠檬色调 | 摩纳哥格蕾丝公主之路）
timeline.description_en: In the morning depart Antibes for Menton, the lemon town, then follow the Avenue Princesse Grace and the famous Moyenne Corniche clifftop road, taking in the scenery of Villefranche-sur-Mer and visiting Monaco and its yacht harbor. In the afternoon head to the clifftop village of Eze to look down over the Mediterranean from its garden, and visit a perfume museum to learn about distillation, the perfume laboratory and the workshop. Then return to Nice for free time on the Baie des Anges / Bay of Angels pebble beach and the Promenade des Anglais, with a stroll through the old town and the Cours Saleya market. Overnight again at the Novotel Antibes Sophia Antipolis or an equivalent 4-star hotel.

timeline.title_en: Antibes to Cassis to Arles to Nimes - Calanques Boat Cruise & Roman Heritage
timeline.title_zh: 昂提布-卡西斯-阿尔勒-尼姆（蓝色峡湾 | 蔚蓝海岸国家公园环游）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast leave the Riviera at Antibes and drive along the Mediterranean to the charming fishing village of Cassis, where you take a boat cruise through the Calanques National Park to see the steep limestone cliffs and turquoise water, passing the calm Port-Miou inlet, the pink-cliffed Port-Pin and the most famous Calanque d'En-Vau. Continue to the historic city of Arles, the Little Rome of the Gauls, to explore the ancient Roman amphitheatre and the landscapes immortalized by Van Gogh. In the afternoon arrive in Nimes to walk the old city and its well-preserved Roman remains. Overnight at the Best Western Hotel L'Orangerie or an equivalent 4-star hotel, set in a private garden minutes from the Nimes old town and Roman arena.

timeline.title_en: Nimes to Paris - Van Gogh & the Roman City of the Water Spirit
timeline.title_zh: 尼姆-巴黎（橘黄阳光 | 梵高与古罗马秘境之旅）
timeline.description_en: Tour the old city of Nimes on foot, the city of the water spirit, starting from the Avenue Feucheres by the station to understand the structure of the Roman aqueduct, then exploring the Maison Carree (a Corinthian-columned 1st-century BC Roman temple, now a museum) and the Jardins de la Fontaine spring-side gardens, with views from the Tour Magne Roman watchtower on the hill. Afterward, depart from Nimes or Avignon station to take the TGV high-speed train back on your own (no guide on the train), ending the southern France journey. There is no hotel on this final day. Note: due to summer rail constraints the train may be rerouted to Avignon or Montpellier Sud de France station with a shuttle bus connection, and Day 1 and the final day may be swapped (treated as an equivalent itinerary).

meeting_en: Departs Paris; travellers take the TGV on their own to Avignon (south of France), where the group meets on arrival. Train ticket is name-registered - bring your passport and e-ticket.
meeting_zh: 巴黎出发；游客自行乘坐TGV高铁前往阿维尼翁（南法），抵达后集合。火车票为实名制，请携带护照及电子版火车票。

faqs.question_en: Where and how does the group meet up?
faqs.question_zh: 集合地点和方法是什么？
faqs.answer_en: Depart from Paris Gare de Lyon or Marne-la-Vallee station and take the high-speed train on your own to meet the group at Avignon/Nimes station (see your departure notice). For some departure dates the start station is Marne-la-Vallee (Chessy), about 38 minutes from Paris Gare de Lyon via the Paris RER A line.
faqs.answer_zh: 在巴黎里昂火车站或马恩河谷火车站出发，自行乘坐高铁前往阿维尼翁/尼姆火车站集合（参见出团通知书）。本产品部分团期的出发火车站为马恩河谷（Marne-la-Vallee Chessy），距离巴黎里昂火车站约38分钟车程（巴黎轻轨A线）。

faqs.question_en: Where and how does the group disperse?
faqs.question_zh: 集散地点和方法是什么？
faqs.answer_en: On the final day you take the train on your own from Avignon/Nimes station back to Paris Gare de Lyon or Marne-la-Vallee station (see your departure notice). For some departure dates the ending station is Marne-la-Vallee (Chessy), about 38 minutes from Paris Gare de Lyon via the Paris RER A line.
faqs.answer_zh: 当天在阿维尼翁/尼姆火车站，游客自行乘坐火车返回到巴黎里昂火车站或马恩河谷火车站（参见出团通知书）。本产品部分团期的结束火车站为马恩河谷站（Marne-la-Vallee Chessy），距离巴黎里昂火车站约38分钟车程（巴黎轻轨A线）。

faqs.question_en: Can the train tickets be changed?
faqs.question_zh: 火车票是否可以更改？
faqs.answer_en: Train tickets are pre-booked and cannot be changed. If you do not need the train tickets, you can choose to join and leave the group at Avignon/Nimes instead. On the return day you take the train back from Avignon/Nimes; the tickets are non-refundable and non-exchangeable. If you wish to forgo a ticket, notify us in advance to cancel that one-way ticket, otherwise using tickets out of sequence may trigger a penalty cancellation.
faqs.answer_zh: 火车票提前预定不可更改：如果不需要火车票，可以选择在阿维尼翁/尼姆上下团。返回当天从阿维尼翁/尼姆乘坐火车返回，火车票不可退、不可更换。如需放弃车票，请提前通知取消该单程票，否则未按顺序使用机票/火车票可能被处罚取消。

faqs.question_en: Do I need a visa?
faqs.question_zh: 是否需要签证？
faqs.answer_en: This product does not include visa fees; you need a Schengen visa (single or multiple entry). If you need a visa, please choose a Schengen-visa product. After booking we provide, free of charge, all materials needed to apply for the Schengen visa (see the detailed materials list). 'Worry-free visa guarantee': for travelers who sign with us at least 61 days before departure, if the visa is not obtained within 45 days before departure we bear all losses and immediately refund the full travel cost; travelers who do not meet this clause and fail to obtain a visa are refunded per the change-and-cancellation terms. A refusal must be reported to us within 48 hours with the consulate's refusal letter. Your passport must be valid for at least 6 months from the date of departure, or customs may deny entry. Visa fees, visa service fees, Schengen insurance fees and visa-center appointment fees are all non-refundable and non-transferable, even if the product is changed or cancelled.
faqs.answer_zh: 本产品不包含签证费用，需要申根签证（单次或多次入境）；如需办理签证请选择申根签证产品。预订后免费提供办理申根签证的全部材料（参考详细材料清单）。“保签无忧”：游客在出发日前61天与我社签约的旅游产品，如在出发前45天内未获取签证，我社承担所有损失，立即退还游客全部旅游费用；不符合该条款的游客如未正常获取签证，将按照“退改与取消条款”退费。如遇拒签需在48小时内通知我社并出具使领馆拒签函。护照有效期需在离境之日起至少还有六个月，否则海关有权拒绝入境。签证费、签证服务费、申根保险费、签证中心预约费均不可退款、不可更改使用者，即使产品退改签也无法退款。

faqs.question_en: Booking, changes & cancellation
faqs.question_zh: 预订、变更与取消须知
faqs.answer_en: Free no-reason cancellation is available to both the agency and the traveler up to 30 days before departure (the 30th day excluded). This is a join-in group tour (sharing the vehicle with other agencies' guests); the announced minimum group size is 10, and if fewer than 10 sign up 30 days before departure either party may cancel without liability. Pay promptly to lock in pricing; orders need a second confirmation within 48 hours, otherwise they auto-refund, so book at least 14 days ahead. All pricing is quoted in EUR; if you pay in CNY the amount is the real-time CNY value calculated on the day of payment from the Bank of China 'euro selling' rate. Room types: two people booking together default to a standard double (bed type assigned by the hotel, big bed or twin, not selectable); a triple family room is for two parents plus one minor (bed configuration assigned by the hotel); solo travelers pay a single-room supplement deposit unless they request a shared room. European hotels are all non-smoking, no cooking in rooms, no free toiletries or free hot water, check-in 14:00 / check-out 11:00, and air conditioning is not standard. Listed hotel names are preferred properties; if full, an equivalent same-star hotel is substituted without separate notice. Key contingency note: because of tight summer TGV seats, heat-related cancellations, strikes and delays, the SNCF segment may be rerouted to Pont-du-Gard, Avignon or Montpellier Sud de France station with a shuttle bus connection, and Day 1 and the final day may be swapped - the content is identical and this is treated as an equivalent itinerary, not a change. During the Avignon theatre festival (4-25 July 2026) hotels may be moved to equivalent 4-star hotels in nearby cities. You must arrive at the meeting point one day before the tour starts and leave the dispersal point one day after it ends (reasonable connection window 07:00-21:00). The train is unaccompanied and tickets are name-bound; carry your passport and e-ticket.
faqs.answer_zh: 出发前30天（不含第30天）旅行社与旅行者均有权无理由取消。本产品为散客拼团（可能与其他旅行社客人合并用车），成团人数为10人，行程开始前30天（不含第30天）未达成团人数双方均可解约且不担违约责任。请及时支付以锁定价格；订单支付后需组团社在48小时内二次确认，超48小时未确认默认自动退款，建议至少提前14天预订。所有定价以欧元为计价单位，如选择人民币支付，则以付款当日本网站依据中国银行实时“欧元卖出价”自动计算的人民币实时价格为准。房型：两人同时报名默认标准双人间（床型由酒店安排，大床或双床，不可指定）；三人家庭间默认两位父母加一位未成年儿童（床型由酒店安排）；单人报名默认含单人房差押金，除非备注要求单人入住。欧洲酒店均禁烟、禁止房内做饭、不提供一次性洗漱用品及免费开水，入住14:00、退房11:00，且空调非标配。所列酒店为优先入住酒店，如订满则换为相同星级同等酒店，恕不另行通知。重要应急条款：因夏季高铁位置紧张、高温停运、罢工、延期等取消风险，SNCF行程可能调整到嘉尔站（Pont-du-Gard）、阿维尼翁站或蒙彼利埃（Montpellier Sud de France）站并提供穿梭巴士衔接，第一天与最后一天行程可能对调，内容完全一致，视为同等行程而非行程更改。2026年7月4日至7月25日阿维尼翁戏剧节期间，酒店可能调整到周边城市的同等四星级酒店。游客须在出团前一天到达集合地、结束后一天离开集散地（合理衔接时段为07:00至21:00）。高铁无导游陪同，火车票为实名制，请携带护照及电子版火车票。

faqs.question_en: Health & safety requirements
faqs.question_zh: 健康与安全须知
faqs.answer_en: Please have a health check before travel.
