Do not sign up if you have: an infectious disease (e.g. active tuberculosis, typhoid); cardiovascular disease (severe hypertension, heart failure, myocardial ischemia, myocardial infarction); cerebrovascular disease (cerebral embolism, hemorrhage, brain tumor); respiratory disease (emphysema, cor pulmonale); a mental illness (epilepsy and other psychiatric conditions); severe anemia (hemoglobin below 50 g/L); or are recovering from major surgery. Pregnancy: from week 35 you cannot join under any circumstances; from week 28 a doctor's report within 7 days plus an attending physician's consent are required; under 28 weeks, sign up with caution, sign the liability waiver, and you cannot take part in adventure, skiing, sea-going, high-altitude or outdoor activities. Disabled travelers need a doctor's report within 7 days plus consent, must be accompanied by an immediate family member, and must apply at least 61 days ahead for a reserved place and facilities. Travelers over 70 need a health certificate and physical-exam report and an immediate-family escort (or sign the waiver); the long itinerary requires a certain walking ability. Minors (under 18) must be accompanied by an immediate relative or guardian; some sights have special rules for under-18/12/6; infants under 30 kg need a confirmed child safety seat; an unaccompanied minor needs a parental authorization letter; infants under 2 cannot join. Per Article 15 of the Tourism Law, travelers must truthfully declare health information relevant to the trip (pregnancy, lactation, chronic illness, infectious-disease history, suspected symptoms, recent travel to epidemic areas) and follow safety warnings; concealment that causes harm or transmission means the traveler bears liability, including possible civil compensation and administrative penalties.
faqs.answer_zh: 出行前请做一次必要的身体检查，如有下列情况请勿报名：传染性疾病（如活动期肺结核、伤寒）；心血管疾病（严重高血压、心功能不全、心肌缺氧、心肌梗塞）；脑血管疾病（脑栓塞、脑出血、脑肿瘤）；呼吸系统疾病（肺气肿、肺心病）；精神病（癫痫及各种精神病）；严重贫血（血红蛋白低于50克/升）；大中型手术恢复期患者。孕妇：妊娠第35周及以上任何情况下都无法参团；第28周及以上需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书；第28周以下请慎重报名，需签署免责声明书，且无法参加探险、滑雪、出海、高空、户外等项目。残疾人需提供7日内医生检查报告及同意书、需直系家属陪同，并提前至少61天申请预留位置及专用设施。70周岁以上老年人需提供健康证明、体检报告并由直系家属陪同（否则需签署免责声明书），因行程较长需有一定步行能力。未成年人（未满18周岁）须由直系亲属或监护人陪同；部分景点对未满18/12/6周岁有特殊限定；30公斤以下儿童需提前确认安全座椅；无父母陪同的未成年人需持父母授权书；不接受2周岁以下婴儿参团。根据《旅游法》第15条，游客需如实告知与旅游相关的个人健康信息（妊娠期、哺乳期、慢性病、传染病史、疑似症状或近期疫区旅居史）并遵守安全警示，若因隐瞒导致人身损害或传播风险，游客须自行承担相应责任，并可能面临民事赔偿及行政处罚。

title_en: France 9-Day Boutique Small-Group Tour: Normandy, Loire Castles & the French Riviera
title_zh: 法国9天精品小团：诺曼底、卢瓦尔城堡与南法蔚蓝海岸
short_en: A 9-day boutique small-group journey from Normandy's Impressionist coast and Loire châteaux to Provence lavender and the French Riviera, TGV-linked and all-inclusive.
short_zh: 9天精品小团之旅：从诺曼底印象派海岸、卢瓦尔河谷城堡，到普罗旺斯薰衣草与南法蔚蓝海岸，TGV高铁直达，一价全含。
desc_en: This 9-day boutique small-group tour (4-8 guests) loops out of Paris to two of France's most evocative regions. The first half traces Normandy and the Loire: Monet's garden at Giverny, the Impressionist harbour of Honfleur, Mont-Saint-Michel, the corsair city of Saint-Malo, and the Loire Valley châteaux of Chenonceau and Chambord, with nights in a Michelin-starred spa hotel and a 17th-century château. A high-speed TGV then whisks you south to Provence and the Côte d'Azur, where lavender fields, the pink salt lakes of Aigues-Mortes, Cannes, Monaco, Èze, Nice, the Cassis calanques and the Roman cities of Arles and Nîmes unfold before a TGV return to Paris. Themes throughout: Impressionist art, medieval castles, Mediterranean colour and gourmet culture.
desc_zh: 这条9天精品小团线路（4-8人成行）从巴黎出发，深入法国最具风情的两大区域。前半程探索诺曼底与卢瓦尔河谷：吉维尼的莫奈花园、印象派渔港翁弗勒尔、圣米歇尔山、海盗之城圣马洛，以及卢瓦尔河谷的舍农索城堡与香波堡，夜宿米其林星级SPA酒店与十七世纪城堡酒店。随后乘坐TGV高铁南下普罗旺斯与蔚蓝海岸，依次邂逅薰衣草花田、艾格莫尔特粉色盐湖、戛纳、摩纳哥、埃兹、尼斯、卡西斯峡湾，以及阿尔勒与尼姆的古罗马名城，最后乘高铁返回巴黎。全程串联印象派艺术、中世纪城堡、地中海色彩与美食文化。

highlights.en: Monet's Garden at Giverny and the Impressionist harbour town of Honfleur
highlights.zh: 吉维尼莫奈花园与印象派渔港小镇翁弗勒尔

highlights.en: Mont-Saint-Michel island abbey and the corsair walled city of Saint-Malo
highlights.zh: 海上孤岛圣米歇尔山修道院与海盗城墙古城圣马洛

highlights.en: Loire Valley châteaux — Chenonceau on the water and the majestic Chambord
highlights.zh: 卢瓦尔河谷城堡——水上城堡舍农索与雄伟的香波堡

highlights.en: Provence highlights: lavender fields, Gordes hilltop village and the pink salt lakes of Aigues-Mortes
highlights.zh: 普罗旺斯精华：薰衣草花田、高德山顶古城与艾格莫尔特粉色盐湖

highlights.en: French Riviera in full: Cannes, Monaco's Grace Princess road, Èze, Nice and the Cassis calanque cruise
highlights.zh: 尽览蔚蓝海岸：戛纳、摩纳哥格蕾丝公主大道、埃兹、尼斯与卡西斯峡湾游船

highlights.en: Roman heritage and Van Gogh's Provence at Arles and Nîmes
highlights.zh: 阿尔勒与尼姆的古罗马遗产及梵高笔下的普罗旺斯

highlights.en: Boutique small group (4-8), Michelin-starred spa hotel + château stay, two-night stays for comfort
highlights.zh: 4-8人精品小团，米其林星级SPA酒店与城堡酒店，两晚连住更舒适

highlights.en: All-inclusive pricing with TGV high-speed rail, city-centre hotels, all 10 listed activities and no forced shopping
highlights.zh: 一价全含，含TGV高铁、市中心酒店、十项精选活动门票，绝无强制购物

includes.en: Hotels: 1 night five-star Spa hotel, 1 night five-star château hotel, and 6 nights four-star hotels; due to the use of special hotels, room types cannot be chosen.
includes.zh: 【酒店】：五星SPA酒店1晚、五星城堡酒店1晚、四星级酒店6晚；由于选用特殊酒店，不可选择房型。

includes.en: Meals: 8 breakfasts (hotel buffet breakfast or breakfast in another form).
includes.zh: 【餐饮】：酒店自助早餐或其他形式早餐8餐。

includes.en: Operating costs: tourist city tax, town-entry fees, residence tax, road and bridge tolls, parking and fuel charges, driver-guide meal allowance and other in-itinerary operating costs.
includes.zh: 【执行】：游客城市税、进城费、居住税、过路过桥费、停车燃油费、司导餐补等行程内执行费用。

includes.en: Transport: business travel vehicle (private coach/van).
includes.zh: 【交通】：商务旅行车。

includes.en: Long-distance transport: round-trip direct high-speed TGV train tickets between Paris and the Avignon / Nîmes station.
includes.zh: 【大交通】：巴黎至阿维尼翁/尼姆火车站往返高铁直达火车票。

includes.en: Guide: Chinese-speaking driver-guide service.
includes.zh: 【导游】：中文司机兼导游服务。

includes.en: Luggage: 1 piece of checked luggage up to 23 kg plus 1 piece of carry-on luggage.
includes.zh: 【行李】：1件23公斤行李及1件随身行李。

includes.en: Admission tickets: first-entry tickets for Monet's Garden (the Monet house closes in winter and is open early April to late October; exact opening times per the official Monet Garden site), Château de Chambord and Château de Chenonceau; plus the Èze hilltop botanical garden, the Cassis Calanques boat tour, the perfume museum, the Pont de Gau Ornithological Park, and the Aigues-Mortes salt lake and sightseeing train.
includes.zh: 【门票】：莫奈花园（故居冬季关闭，每年四月初至十月末参观，具体开放时间以莫奈花园故居官网通知为准）、香波堡、舍农索城堡景点首道门票；埃兹山顶植物园、卡西斯峡湾游船、香水博物馆、蓬德高鸟类公园门票、艾格莫尔特盐湖及观光火车。

excludes.en: Passport: personal passport fees.
excludes.zh: 护照：个人护照费用。

excludes.en: Visa: the tourist visa fees required for the countries on the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 签证：行程中所列旅游国家所需的观光签证费用。

excludes.en: Insurance: travel insurance fees (if the itinerary involves high-risk sports, please verify whether your travel insurance covers that activity).
excludes.zh: 保险：旅游保险费用（如行程内涉及高风险运动，请核实旅游保险是否包含该项运动）。

excludes.en: Tips: gratuities for the guide and driver, totalling 10 EUR per person per day, same rate for adults and children.
excludes.zh: 小费：游客支付导游和司机小费一共10欧/人/天，大小同价。

excludes.en: Meals: apart from the special meals included in the itinerary, lunches and dinners are not included.
excludes.zh: 餐饮：除行程内包含的特色餐外，行程中不包含午、晚正餐费用。

excludes.en: Admission: attractions not explicitly marked as included (including but not limited to sights marked "exterior", and all "recommended", "optional", "experience" items whose fees are not mentioned); if you wish to enter, please pay on your own.
excludes.zh: 门票：行程中未注明费用包含的景点（包括但不仅限于行程中注明“外观”的景点，以及“推荐”、“可选”、“体验”等所有未提及费用包含的项目，如游客需要参观，敬请自理）。

excludes.en: Extended stays: accommodation, transport and sightseeing costs for any extension beyond the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 延长住宿：行程外额外延长的住宿、交通、观光费用。

excludes.en: Personal spending: e.g. drinks and alcohol, taxis, phone charges and other personal expenses.
excludes.zh: 私人消费：如饮料酒类、出租车、电话费等个人消费。

excludes.en: Other transport: beyond the included business vehicle/mini-coach, any other transport not mentioned in the inclusions — e.g. a Venice gondola, and sightseeing trains, electric taxis etc. in vehicle-restricted zones — is at your own expense.
excludes.zh: 其他交通：除包含商务旅行车或中巴之外，费用包含中未提及的其他交通费用，如威尼斯贡多拉，以及车辆限行区的观光火车、电瓶出租车等费用敬请自理。

excludes.en: Free activities: independent night-time sightseeing and recommended items during the trip, and any transport, dining, tickets, shopping etc. arising from them.
excludes.zh: 自由活动：游客夜间自行游览及行程中的推荐项目，以及由此产生的交通、餐饮、门票、购物等费用。

excludes.en: Experience activities: the various travel-experience activities not included in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 体验活动：行程中没有包含的各项旅游体验活动。

excludes.en: Other costs: any costs not mentioned in the inclusions. In the case of force majeure (natural disaster, war, strike, etc.), or extra costs caused by transport delays, flight cancellation/rescheduling, embassy delays in issuing visas, insufficient group numbers, or other special circumstances not attributable to the company (e.g. overseas visa-extension fees, accommodation, food and transport, national airfare adjustments), the company reserves the right to charge the price difference.
excludes.zh: 其他费用：费用包含中未提及的费用。如因天灾、战争、罢工等不可抗力，及因交通延阻、航班取消或更改时间、使馆延误出签、人数不足等特殊情况或其他非本公司原因所导致的额外费用（如在外延期签证费、住、食及交通费、国家航空运价调整等），本公司有权追加差价。

timeline.title_en: Paris - Monet's Garden (Giverny) - Honfleur - Deauville/Trouville - Caen
timeline.title_zh: 巴黎 - 莫奈花园（吉维尼）- 翁弗勒尔 - 多维尔/特鲁维尔 - 卡昂
timeline.description_en: After meeting in the morning the group sets out for the village of Giverny to visit Monet's Garden, the painter's former home where the grounds are still maintained as in his day (tulips in April, the famous water lilies in high summer, chrysanthemums before the October close; the house is shut in winter and open early April to late October). We then cross the spectacular 2-km Pont de Normandie over the Seine estuary to the picture-postcard fishing town of Honfleur, with its flower harbour, old bell-tower quarter and maze of old streets beloved by the Impressionists. The day continues to the twin towns of Deauville and Trouville, which together form a protected Norman-Anglo half-timbered architectural ensemble - elegant Deauville with its grand seaside villas and the fairytale, colourful Trouville on the mouth of the Touques. In the evening we reach Caen, Normandy's gastronomic capital, for the overnight stay; the Michelin-starred chef's three-course dinner is recommended (at extra cost).
timeline.description_zh: 上午集合后出发前往吉维尼小镇游览莫奈花园——画家的故居，园中至今仍按莫奈当年生活的原状维护（四月郁金香、盛夏著名的睡莲、十月闭馆前的菊花；故居冬季关闭，每年四月初至十月末开放）。随后横跨约2公里长、横亘塞纳河入海口的诺曼底大桥，前往印象派笔下古色古香的渔村小镇翁弗勒尔，欣赏鲜花海港、古钟楼区和迷宫般的老城。之后游览保留完整诺曼-盎格鲁木骨架建筑群的双子之城多维尔和特鲁维尔——多维尔以名流云集的海滨别墅显宫廷贵气，图克河入海口的特鲁维尔则如童话般色彩缤纷。傍晚抵达诺曼底美食之都卡昂入住，推荐自费品尝米其林星级主厨的三道式晚宴套餐。
timeline._hotel_en: Ivan Vautier (Michelin) five-star Spa hotel in Caen, or equivalent five-star hotel
timeline._hotel_zh: 卡昂伊万沃蒂尔米其林五星SPA酒店或同等五星级酒店

timeline.title_en: Caen - Mont-Saint-Michel - Saint-Malo - Loire Valley
timeline.title_zh: 卡昂 - 圣米歇尔山 - 圣马洛 - 卢瓦尔河谷
timeline.description_en: In the morning we head to the tidal island of Mont-Saint-Michel off the Normandy coast, visiting the site and - depending on the tides - the mirror-like shallow sand flats at the foot of the mount; the conical granite islet is ringed by sand and becomes a true island only at high tide. The famous hilltop Abbey of Mont-Saint-Michel, founded in the 8th century by Bishop Aubert in honour of the Archangel Michael (and once used as a state prison under Napoleon), is one of Christendom's great pilgrimage sites. We then continue to the corsair city of Saint-Malo, a walled medieval Breton town once nicknamed the "pirates' city", strolling its old town within the high ramparts and the seaside quarter, with views over the sea defences, the offshore forts and Jersey. In the evening we transfer to the Loire Valley for the overnight stay.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往诺曼底海滨的潮汐小岛圣米歇尔山，游览景区，并视潮汐情况游览山脚下如镜面般的诺曼底浅水滩涂；这座由花岗岩构成的圆锥形小岛周长约900米，常被大片沙岸包围，仅涨潮时才成为孤岛。山顶著名的圣米歇尔山修道院由红衣主教奥贝于公元8世纪为奉献给大天使米歇尔而建（拿破仑执政期间亦曾作为国家监狱），在基督徒心中地位崇高。随后前往“海盗城”圣马洛，这座环以高耸海盗城墙的中世纪布列塔尼古城，可漫步老城狭窄小巷与海滨城区，登城墙眺望辽阔海滩、海防工事、远处礁石与英国泽西岛。傍晚前往卢瓦尔河谷大区入住。
timeline._hotel_en: Château hotel near Chenonceau in the Loire Valley (Château hotel), or equivalent five-star hotel
timeline._hotel_zh: 卢瓦尔河谷达赫蒂涅城堡酒店或同等五星级酒店

timeline.title_en: Loire Valley - Château de Chenonceau - Blois - Château de Chambord - Paris
timeline.title_zh: 卢瓦尔河谷 - 舍农索城堡 - 布卢瓦 - 香波堡 - 巴黎
timeline.description_en: In the morning we visit Château de Chenonceau, the most romantic of the Loire's "châteaux on the water", a 15th-16th-century building of keep, gallery, terrace and round towers that spans the River Cher and is known as the "Ladies' Château" because successive owners were women. We then head north, pausing to see the refined old town of Blois (largely rebuilt after WWII, its church bell-tower lit at night, with rare surviving 15th-century houses opposite). Next we tour Château de Chambord in the Loire Valley - the grandest château in all France, a typical medieval-plan hunting lodge of the kings built under François I, blending French tradition with Italian Renaissance influence and listed as a World Heritage Site in 1981; it sits amid wild forest along the D952 riverside road where roe deer and wild boar roam. We then return to Paris for the overnight stay.
timeline.description_zh: 上午游览卢瓦尔河谷一座建在水上的城堡——舍农索城堡，这座15、16世纪的建筑由主堡垒、长廊、平台和圆塔串联，横跨卢瓦尔河支流希尔河，是河谷宫堡群中最富浪漫情调的“水上城堡”；因几代主人皆为女性，又被称为“女人堡”。随后北上，沿途参观精致古朴的布卢瓦老城（二战中几乎被毁，修复后教堂钟鼓楼夜间灯光投影下光彩熠熠，对面留有为数不多的15世纪古屋）。之后参观卢瓦尔河谷香波堡——全法兰西最恢弘的城堡，中世纪典型古堡布局，是法国君王狩猎的行宫，兴建于弗朗索瓦一世时期，融合法国传统与意大利文艺复兴风格，1981年列入世界遗产名录，沿D952河畔大道隐于丛林之中，林间有獐鹿、野猪出没。之后返回巴黎入住。
timeline._hotel_en: Mercure Paris Gare de Lyon TGV (by the Gare de Lyon), or equivalent four-star hotel
timeline._hotel_zh: 巴黎里昂车站美居酒店或同等四星级酒店

timeline.title_en: Paris - Avignon (by TGV) - Fontaine-de-Vaucluse - Gordes - Sénanque Abbey (exterior)
timeline.title_zh: 巴黎 - 阿维尼翁（搭乘TGV）- 泉水小镇 - 高德古城 - 塞南克修道院（外观）
timeline.description_en: Today you travel independently by French TGV high-speed train to the south of France (no guide accompanies you on the train; the journey takes about 2-3 hours). On arrival the group meets and the Provence villages tour begins, visiting in turn: Fontaine-de-Vaucluse, the well-known spring-water resort village about half an hour from Avignon, quaint and quiet beside its cool mountain-fed spring; the hilltop old town of Gordes, said to be the model for Miyazaki's "Castle in the Sky", built entirely in the medieval period with winding cobbled lanes and stone houses; and the exterior of Sénanque Abbey, founded by the monks of Mazan in 1148 and hidden in a tranquil valley (the backdrop of "A Year in Provence"), one of "the most beautiful valleys in France" - please keep quiet when visiting, and note its lavender field is relatively small. We then check in to the hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 当天自行乘坐法国高铁TGV前往南法（高铁上无导游陪同），车程约2至3小时。抵达后集合，开启普罗旺斯小镇之旅，依次游览：泉水小镇（Fontaine-de-Vaucluse），距阿维尼翁约半小时车程，是南法知名的泉水度假小村，古朴小巧，静静依偎在清凉泉水之畔；高德古城，依山而建、被誉为宫崎骏《天空之城》原型的中世纪山城，蜿蜒碎石路与石屋别具风格，山顶矗立着16世纪的高德城堡；以及塞南克修道院（外观），由马赞修道院的僧侣于1148年修建，隐于宁静山谷，是《山居岁月》一书的故事背景，被称为“全法国最美丽的山谷”之一（薰衣草花田规模较小，游客较密集，参观时请尽量保持安静）。之后入住酒店。
timeline._hotel_en: Novotel Avignon Nord, or equivalent four-star hotel
timeline._hotel_zh: 阿维尼翁城北诺富特酒店或同等四星级酒店

timeline.title_en: Avignon - Aigues-Mortes (pink salt lake) - Marseille
timeline.title_zh: 阿维尼翁 - 艾格莫尔特（粉色盐湖）- 马赛
timeline.description_en: After breakfast you visit the old city of Avignon on your own, seeing the Pont d'Avignon (the broken bridge, exterior) and the Palais des Papes (Papal Palace, exterior) of this World Heritage "City of the Popes" and host of the famous Avignon Festival. We then head to the Pont de Gau Ornithological Park in the heart of the Camargue wetlands - a key flamingo habitat where 300+ bird species (herons, egrets, pelicans, ibises) live among lakes, reeds and salt marsh, explored along flat boardwalk and loop trails. Next is the small town of Aigues-Mortes, set between "salt" and "sea", where we board the sightseeing tourist train to tour the pink salt lake - the water turns pink from salt-loving Dunaliella algae and high salinity, contrasting with white quartz sand and salt mounds. In the afternoon we visit central Marseille, where you may choose to see the Palais Longchamp park, the Notre-Dame de la Garde basilica (its gilded Madonna-and-child statue the city's symbol, on a 154 m hill with a viewing terrace) and the Old Port (Vieux-Port), the historic heart of the city lined with cafés, restaurants and bars. Then check in to the hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后自行参观阿维尼翁古城，外观罗纳河断桥（外观）与阿维尼翁教皇宫（外观）——这座世界历史文化名城被称为“教皇之城”，亦是著名阿维尼翁戏剧节的举办地。随后前往卡马格湿地中心地带的蓬德高鸟类公园，这里是重要的火烈鸟栖息地，湖泊、芦苇荡、盐沼交错，栖息着鹭、苍鹭、鹈鹕、白鹮等300多种鸟类，沿平缓的木栈道与环形步道参观。接着前往处于“盐”与“海”之间的南法小镇艾格莫尔特，乘坐观光小火车游览粉红盐湖——因嗜盐的杜氏盐藻与高含盐量使湖面呈粉红色，与岸边雪白的石英沙滩、数米高的白色盐丘相映，如同草莓雪糕。下午前往马赛市区游览，可选择参观隆尚宫公园、守护圣母圣殿（顶上的圣母圣子金像是马赛象征，坐落于154米高的小山丘上、设有观景台）以及马赛老港（自公元前600年古希腊人建城以来一直是城市心脏，两侧濒海大道布满咖啡馆、餐馆与酒吧）。之后入住酒店。
timeline._hotel_en: Novotel Marseille or Crowne Plaza Marseille, or equivalent four-star hotel
timeline._hotel_zh: 马赛诺富特酒店或皇冠假日酒店同等四星级酒店

timeline.title_en: Marseille - Valensole (lavender) - Cannes - Saint-Paul-de-Vence - Antibes
timeline.title_zh: 马赛 - 瓦朗索勒（薰衣草）- 戛纳 - 圣保罗德旺斯 - 昂蒂布
timeline.description_en: After breakfast we set off for the lavender fields of Valensole and the D907 road (during the lavender season), to immerse ourselves in the romantic purple sea of flowers. In the afternoon we head to the film town and seaside city of Cannes to see the Palais des Festivals (built 1982, where the Palme d'Or is awarded) and the Walk of Fame / Allée des Étoiles beside it, with 300+ celebrity handprints, then stroll freely along the Cannes seafront. We continue to the medieval hilltop art village of Saint-Paul-de-Vence, set on heights between Nice and Antibes, famed for its well-preserved stone ramparts, narrow winding lanes and many galleries, long home to artists such as Marc Chagall and Pablo Picasso. Towards evening we reach Antibes for a self-guided walk through its old town, with its fish market, seafront ramparts and the renowned Provençal market. Then check in to the hotel. (Note: if lavender cannot be seen during your departure, this is changed to a visit to a ceramics town.)
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后出发前往瓦朗索勒及D907公路的薰衣草花田（薰衣草花期期间），置身浪漫紫色花海，留下紫色记忆。下午前往南法电影重镇及海滨小城戛纳，参观影节宫（建于1982年，金棕榈奖在此颁发）及其旁的星光大道（已累计300多个明星手印），自由漫步戛纳海滨大道。随后前往坐落在尼斯与昂蒂布之间高地上的中世纪艺术山城圣保罗德旺斯，以保存完好的石砌城墙、蜿蜒狭窄小巷和遍布的画廊闻名，曾吸引马克·夏加尔、毕加索等众多艺术家长期居住与创作。傍晚前往昂蒂布，自行游览昂蒂布老城（老城鱼市、海滩上的城防堡垒，以及著名的普罗旺斯生鲜市场）。之后入住酒店。（备注：如团期内无法参观薰衣草，则更改为参观陶瓷小镇。）
timeline._hotel_en: Novotel Antibes Sophia Antipolis, or equivalent four-star hotel
timeline._hotel_zh: 昂蒂布诺富特酒店（索菲亚安蒂波利斯）或同等四星级酒店

timeline.title_en: Antibes - Menton - Monaco - Èze - Nice - Antibes
timeline.title_zh: 昂蒂布 - 芒通 - 摩纳哥 - 埃兹 - 尼斯 - 昂蒂布
timeline.description_en: In the morning we leave Antibes for Menton, the "lemon town" wrapped in citrus-yellow tones, then take the Princess Grace coastal route along the Moyenne Corniche - the famous cliff road of the south - passing the beautiful Côte d'Azur scenery of Villefranche-sur-Mer and viewing Monaco and its yacht harbour. In the afternoon we visit the clifftop village of Èze for views over the Mediterranean and its exotic hilltop botanical garden, and call at a perfume museum to learn about perfume distillation, the laboratory and the manufacturing workshop (the museum, founded in 1983 at the foot of Èze, has production, history and fragrance-collection areas). We then return to Nice for a free visit to the Baie des Anges (Angels' Bay) pebble beach and the Promenade des Anglais, also exploring the maze-like old town with its Baroque churches, Italianate buildings and the colourful Cours Saleya market. Then check in to the hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早上从昂蒂布出发前往芒通游览“柠檬小镇”——这座被柠檬色调包裹的海滨小镇盛产柑橘，巴洛克式建筑与狭窄安静的街道别具风情。随后沿以摩纳哥格蕾丝公主命名的峭壁公路（Moyenne Corniche，南法出名的峭壁之路）行进，欣赏蔚蓝海岸美景，途经海滨自由城滨海自由城（Villefranche-sur-Mer），参观摩纳哥及游艇码头。下午前往悬崖小镇埃兹俯眺地中海，游览山顶异国风情花园，并拜访香水博物馆，了解香水的蒸馏过程、香水实验室和制造车间（该馆于1983年落成于埃兹山下，分生产过程区、香水历史区和香料收藏品区）。随后返回尼斯，自由参观尼斯天使湾鹅卵石沙滩、英格兰海滨大道（Promenade des Anglais），并漫步迷宫般的老城区，欣赏巴洛克教堂、意大利风格建筑及色彩鲜艳的萨雷雅广场集市。之后入住酒店。
timeline._hotel_en: Novotel Antibes Sophia Antipolis, or equivalent four-star hotel
timeline._hotel_zh: 昂蒂布诺富特酒店（索菲亚安蒂波利斯）或同等四星级酒店

timeline.title_en: Antibes - Cassis (Calanques boat tour) - Arles - Nîmes
timeline.title_zh: 昂蒂布 - 卡西斯（卡朗格峡湾游船）- 阿尔勒 - 尼姆
timeline.description_en: After breakfast we leave Antibes on the Côte d'Azur and drive along the Mediterranean to the charming village of Cassis, where we take a boat cruise to admire the steep cliffs, azure water and unique coastline of the Calanques - passing the calm waters of Port-Miou, the pink limestone cliffs of Port-Pin and the famous Calanque d'En-Vau. Cassis itself is a colourful fishing village in the heart of the Calanques National Park, ringed by hills on three sides with brightly coloured houses by the water and a small harbour of fishing boats and yachts. We then head to the historic city of Arles to explore the Roman amphitheatre and the scenes painted by Van Gogh; nicknamed "the little Rome of the Gauls", Arles prospered under Caesar and is famous worldwide through Van Gogh's work. In the afternoon we reach Nîmes and stroll its old town to take in the remarkably well-preserved Roman remains and Provençal atmosphere, then check in to the hotel in Nîmes.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后从蔚蓝海岸的昂蒂布出发，沿地中海驶向迷人的卡西斯，乘坐游轮欣赏险峻悬崖、碧蓝海水与独特海岸地貌的卡朗格峡湾——沿途欣赏Port-Miou港口峡湾的宁静水面、Port-Pin峡湾的粉色石灰岩悬崖，以及最著名的Calanque En-Vau峡湾的壮丽碧水与峭壁。卡西斯本身是蔚蓝海岸国家公园中山海相拥的彩色渔村，三面环山、一面临海，五彩缤纷的房屋临水而建，小巧港口停泊着渔船与游艇。随后前往历史名城阿尔勒，探索古罗马竞技场与梵高笔下的经典景观——阿尔勒被誉为“高卢人的小罗马”，因凯撒大帝占领而繁荣、因梵高画作而蜚声世界。下午抵达尼姆，漫步古城，感受保存完好的古罗马遗迹与南法风情，随后入住尼姆酒店。
timeline._hotel_en: Best Western Orangerie hotel (L'Orangerie), Nîmes, or equivalent four-star hotel
timeline._hotel_zh: 尼姆贝斯特韦斯特橘园酒店或同等四星级酒店

timeline.title_en: Nîmes - Paris (return by TGV) — end of tour
timeline.title_zh: 尼姆 - 巴黎（搭乘TGV返回）——行程结束
timeline.description_en: Today we explore the old city of Nîmes on foot, the "city of the water spirit", discovering the glory of Roman antiquity and its mysterious garden. Highlights include the well-preserved Roman amphitheatre (the Arena); the Maison Carrée, a Corinthian-columned temple about 17 m high built in the 1st century BC under Augustus; and the Jardin de la Fontaine (the mysterious garden), a more-than-thousand-year-old spring-side park and architectural marvel built around the sacred spring, with the Tour Magne watchtower on the hill above. Afterwards you depart independently by TGV from the Nîmes or Avignon station (no guide accompanies you on the train), arriving back in Paris and ending the southern France journey. There is no accommodation on this day. Important: due to summer rail congestion / heat suspensions / strikes / delays, SNCF may, subject to availability, switch to the Gare d'Avignon or Montpellier Sud de France station with a shuttle bus connection, and the order of the first and last days may be swapped — this counts as an equivalent itinerary, not a change.
timeline.description_zh: 当天徒步参观“水精灵之城”尼姆古城，探索古罗马的辉煌与神秘花园。亮点包括：保存完好的古罗马竞技场；方形神殿（Maison Carrée），其科林斯式圆柱建筑高约17米、建于公元前1世纪奥古斯都大帝时代；以及神秘花园——古迹庭院泉边公园（Jardin de la Fontaine），这座建于一千多年前、围绕圣泉而建的泉边公园堪称建筑奇迹，山丘上还有古罗马瞭望塔马涅塔（Tour Magne）。之后从尼姆或阿维尼翁火车站出发，自行乘坐法国TGV高铁（高铁上无导游陪同），抵达后结束南法旅程。当天无住宿。重要提示：由于普罗旺斯地区夏季高铁位置紧张、受到高温停运、罢工、延期等取消风险，法国铁路公司SNCF可能根据可用性调整到阿维尼翁站或蒙彼利埃（Montpellier Sud de France）站，届时提供穿梭巴士衔接，并可能调整第一天和最后一天的先后顺序，视为同等行程，不视为行程调整。
timeline._hotel_en: No accommodation on the final day

meeting_en: Paris — group assembles in Paris on Day 1 before departure; tour also ends in Paris via TGV return.
meeting_zh: 巴黎——第1天在巴黎集合后出发；行程同样以乘坐TGV返回巴黎结束。

faqs.question_en: Where and how do we meet at the start?
faqs.question_zh: 集合地点和方法是什么？
faqs.answer_en: The group meets at 08:30 on the day of departure in front of the McDonald's at Place d'Italie in the 13th arrondissement of Paris. This product does NOT recommend a flight that lands in Paris on the morning of the tour day.
faqs.answer_zh: 当天上午8:30在巴黎13区意大利广场麦当劳门口集合。本产品不推荐参团当天早上降落巴黎的航班！

faqs.question_en: Where and how does the tour disperse at the end?
faqs.question_zh: 集散地点和方法是什么？
faqs.answer_en: On the final day you take the train on your own from Avignon / Nîmes station back to Paris, to the Gare de Lyon or to Marne-la-Vallée station (see your departure notice). For some departures the ending station is Marne-la-Vallée (Chessy), which is about 38 minutes from the Gare de Lyon by Paris RER Line A.
faqs.answer_zh: 当天在阿维尼翁/尼姆乘坐火车，游客自行返回到巴黎里昂火车站或马恩河谷火车站（参见出团通知书）。本产品部分团期结束火车站为马恩河谷站（Marne-la-Vallée Chessy），距巴黎里昂火车站约38分钟车程（巴黎轻轨A线）。

faqs.question_en: Is the Michelin restaurant at the Ivan Vautier (Michelin) hotel included?
faqs.question_zh: 伊万沃蒂尔米其林酒店的米其林餐厅是否包含？
faqs.answer_en: It is NOT included. We recommend that guests visit this hotel's Michelin restaurant at their own expense, but the cost is not included. Normally the chef recommends two different versions of dish pairings (the chef's recommendation); dishes cannot be chosen — you can only taste the seasonal ingredients the chef selects on the day. The restaurant can provide à la carte service. Note the restaurant is closed for lunch and dinner on Mondays and for dinner on Sundays, and does not accept reservations on those slots.
faqs.answer_zh: 费用不包含。我社推荐游客自费前往此酒店的米其林餐厅，但不包含费用。通常情况下，主厨推荐两个不同版本的菜式搭配（主厨推荐），但菜品不可选择，只能品尝当天主厨选择的当季食材，餐厅可提供点单服务。（餐厅每周一午晚餐、周日晚餐休息，不接受预定。）

faqs.question_en: Is the admission to Mont-Saint-Michel included?
faqs.question_zh: 是否包含圣米歇尔山的门票？
faqs.answer_en: The shuttle bus and entry to Mont-Saint-Michel are both free, but the hilltop abbey requires a ticket that, depending on your age and nationality, is either collected free or purchased on site (recommended visit time about 45 minutes). All nationalities under 18: free, but you must collect the ticket with ID. EU nationals under 26: free, but you must collect the ticket with ID.
faqs.answer_zh: 圣米歇尔山的摆渡车和门票都是免费的，但山顶上的修道院需根据年龄和国籍，免费领取门票或现场购买门票（修道院推荐游览时间约45分钟）。全部国籍18岁以下：免费，但需凭证件领取门票；欧盟国籍26岁以下：免费，但需凭证件领取门票。

faqs.question_en: How might the order of the itinerary be changed?
faqs.question_zh: 行程的先后顺序如何更改？
faqs.answer_en: Depending on the Michelin restaurant's reservation availability, the itinerary may be reversed: you might visit the Loire Valley on the first day and Mont-Saint-Michel on the last day. The content remains the same and this is regarded as an equivalent itinerary.
faqs.answer_zh: 根据米其林餐厅的预定情况，可能第一天游览卢瓦尔河谷、最后一天游览圣米歇尔山。游览内容一致，视为同等行程。

faqs.question_en: Can the train tickets be changed?
faqs.question_zh: 火车票是否可以更改？
faqs.answer_en: Train tickets booked in advance cannot be changed. The return train from Avignon / Nîmes on the final day is non-refundable and non-exchangeable. If you wish to forgo a ticket, please notify us in advance to cancel that one-way ticket; otherwise, using flight/train tickets out of sequence may result in penalty cancellation.
faqs.answer_zh: 火车票提前预定不可更改：返回当天从阿维尼翁/尼姆乘坐火车返回，火车票不可退、不可更换。如需放弃票，请提前通知取消单程票，否则未按顺序使用机票/火车票，可能被处罚取消。

faqs.question_en: Do I need a visa?
faqs.question_zh: 是否需要签证？
faqs.answer_en: Yes. This product requires a Schengen visa (single or multiple entry) and the visa fee is NOT included — if you need a visa, please choose a Schengen visa product. After booking we provide, free of charge, all the materials needed to apply for the Schengen visa (see the detailed checklist). If you commission us to handle your Schengen visa, we will buy Schengen travel insurance that meets the visa requirements; if you do not, you must buy your own travel insurance and handle claims yourself. Your passport must be valid for at least six months from the date of departure, or customs may refuse entry. Visa fees, visa service fees, Schengen insurance fees and visa-centre appointment fees are all non-refundable and non-transferable, even if the product is changed or cancelled. "Guaranteed-visa peace of mind": if you sign the contract at least 61 days before departure and have not obtained the visa within 45 days before departure, we bear all losses and immediately refund the full tour cost; if you do not meet this clause and do not obtain the visa normally, refunds follow the "changes and cancellation terms". In case of refusal, notify us within 48 hours with the consulate's refusal letter, submit any supplementary/amended materials within five days, and do not unilaterally waive the right of "visa defence".
faqs.answer_zh: 需要。本产品需要申根签证（单次或多次入境），且不包含签证费用——如需办理请选择申根签证产品。预订后免费提供办理申根签证的全部材料（参考详细材料清单）。若委托我社办理申根签证，我社为您购买符合申根签证要求的申根旅游保险；若未委托，需自行购买旅游保险并自行负责理赔。护照有效期须自离境之日起至少还有六个月，否则海关有权拒绝入境。签证费、签证服务费、申根保险费、签证中心预约费均不可退款，也无法更改使用者，即使产品退改签亦无法退还。【保签无忧】：游客在出发日前61天与我社签约，如在出发前45天内未获取签证，我社承担所有损失，立即退还全部旅游费用；不符合该条款而未正常获签者，按“退改与取消条款”退费。如遇拒签需在48小时内通知我社并出具使领馆拒签函，如需补充或更改材料须在五天内提交，且不得单方面放弃“签证抗辩”权利。

faqs.question_en: Booking, changes & cancellation
faqs.question_zh: 预订、变更与取消须知
faqs.answer_en: Free cancellation: for this group tour, both the agency and the traveller may request a no-reason cancellation up to 30 days before departure (the 30th day excluded). Confirmation: payment does not equal confirmation — book at least 14 days ahead; the operator re-confirms within 48 hours, and if not confirmed within 48 hours the order is auto-refunded, so do not book connecting flights/hotels before confirmation. Group size (成团): this is a shared/join-in tour and the announced size is 10 people; if fewer than 10 sign up the group may not run, and either party may cancel up to 30 days before departure with no liability before the group is announced. Arrival/departure buffer: because flights, rail and ferries are often re-sequenced, you must arrive at the meeting point one day before the tour starts and leave the dispersal point one day after it ends, reserving sensible connection time (the reasonable meet/disperse window is 07:00-21:00); losses from not doing so are the traveller's own. Rooms: two people booking together default to a standard twin/double with bed type assigned by the hotel (cannot be specified); solo travellers pay a single-room supplement deposit unless you note "single occupancy, no room-sharing"; triple/family rooms default to two adults + one minor with bed type assigned by the hotel. European hotels: check-in 14:00, check-out 11:00, all non-smoking, no cooking in rooms, no free disposable toiletries or free boiled water, and air-conditioning is not a standard feature. Itinerary contingency: the first and last days may shift by one day according to train schedules (equivalent itinerary, not a change); in summer, due to rail congestion / heat suspensions / strikes / delays, SNCF may switch to Pont-du-Gard, Gare d'Avignon or Montpellier Sud de France stations with a shuttle-bus connection (equivalent itinerary); some departures may use Marne-la-Vallée station (ask sales before buying); during the Avignon Festival (4-25 July 2026) hotels may be moved to equivalent four-star hotels in nearby towns per the departure notice; the TGV is unaccompanied — carry your passport and e-ticket (tickets are name-registered). Pricing: all prices are quoted in EUR at the time of booking; if you pay in CNY, the amount is the real-time CNY value auto-calculated from the Bank of China "euro selling price" on the day of payment, and the same applies to refunds (any exchange-rate difference or bank fees are borne by the traveller).
faqs.answer_zh: 免费取消：本跟团游产品出发前30天（不含第30天），旅行社与旅行者均有权申请无理由取消。确认：支付不等于确认行程，建议至少提前14天预订；组团社需在48小时内二次确认，超48小时未确认则默认自动退款，未获确认前请勿预订衔接机票及酒店。成团：本产品为散客拼团，宣布成团人数为10人，未达10人则可能不成团；成团前任何一方在出发前30天均可解除合同且不承担违约责任。抵离缓冲：因航班、火车、渡轮常需调整顺序，旅行者须在参团前一天到达集合地、离团后一天离开集散地，并预留合理衔接时间（合理集合集散时段为07:00至21:00），未遵守由此产生的损失自行承担。房型：两人同时报名默认入住标准双人间，床型由酒店安排不可指定；单人报名默认含单人房差押金，如不拼房请备注《要求单人入住、不退单人房差》；三人/家庭间默认两位父母与一位未成年儿童，床型由酒店安排。欧洲酒店：入住14:00、退房11:00，全部禁烟，禁止房内做饭，不提供一次性洗漱用品及免费开水，并不以空调为标准设施。行程应变：第一天和最后一天可能根据火车班次调整一天（视为同等行程，不视为更改）；夏季因高铁紧张、高温停运、罢工、延期等风险，SNCF可能调整到嘉尔站（Pont-du-Gard）、阿维尼翁站或蒙彼利埃（Montpellier Sud de France）站并提供穿梭巴士衔接（视为同等行程）；部分团期可能包含马恩河谷火车站（购买前请咨询销售）；2026年7月4日至7月25日阿维尼翁戏剧节期间酒店可能调整到周边城市同等四星级酒店（以出团通知书为准）；高铁无导游陪同，请自行持票乘坐，火车票为实名制，需携带护照及电子版火车票。价格：所有定价以欧元为预订计价单位，如选择人民币支付，则以当天支付时按中国银行实时外汇牌价“欧元卖出价”自动计算的人民币实时价格为准，退款同样适用申请退款当日即时汇率（如有汇率差异或银行手续费由旅行者承担）。

faqs.question_en: Health & safety requirements
faqs.question_zh: 健康与安全须知
faqs.answer_en: To ensure a safe trip, please have a health check before departure. Do NOT join if you have: an infectious disease (e.g. active tuberculosis, typhoid); cardiovascular disease (e.g. severe hypertension, heart failure, myocardial ischaemia/infarction); cerebrovascular disease (e.g. cerebral embolism, haemorrhage, brain tumour); respiratory disease (e.g. emphysema, cor pulmonale); a psychiatric condition (e.g. epilepsy or other mental illness); severe anaemia (haemoglobin below 50 g/L); or are in recovery from major/medium surgery. Pregnancy: at 35 weeks or more you cannot join under any circumstances; at 28 weeks or more you must provide a doctor's report from within 7 days plus your attending physician's consent; under 28 weeks please join with caution, sign the agency's disclaimer, and you cannot take part in adventure, skiing, sea-going, high-altitude or outdoor activities. Travellers with disabilities: provide a doctor's report from within 7 days plus physician's consent, be accompanied by an immediate family member, and apply at least 61 days in advance for a reserved place and dedicated facilities. Elderly travellers: those over 70 need a health certificate and physical-exam report and must be accompanied by an immediate family member (or sign the disclaimer); the trip is long and requires a degree of walking ability, so the physically frail should reconsider. Minors (under 18) must be accompanied by an immediate relative or guardian; some sights have special restrictions for under-18/12/6; for infants under 6 or children under 30 kg, confirm a safety child seat with us in advance or bring an EU-compliant seat; an under-18 travelling without parents needs parental authorisation (one parent: a written authorisation from the other; with non-parents: authorisation from both parents); infants under 2 years old are not accepted on this product. Per Article 15 of the Tourism Law, travellers must truthfully declare health information relevant to the trip (including pregnancy, lactation, chronic illness, infectious-disease history, suspected symptoms or recent travel to epidemic areas) and follow safety warnings; concealment that causes harm or spread risk means the traveller bears liability (including civil compensation, medical/quarantine costs, and possible administrative penalties), and the agency may terminate the contract without refund.
faqs.answer_zh: 为确保安全出行，请于出行前做必要的身体检查。如存在以下情况请勿报名：传染性疾病患者（如活动期肺结核、伤寒）；心血管疾病患者（如严重高血压、心功能不全、心肌缺氧、心肌梗塞）；脑血管疾病患者（如脑栓塞、脑出血、脑肿瘤）；呼吸系统疾病患者（如肺气肿、肺心病）；精神病患者（如癫痫及各种精神病）；严重贫血患者（血红蛋白低于50克/升）；大中型手术恢复期病患者。孕妇：妊娠35周及以上任何情况下都无法参团；28周及以上需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书；28周以下请慎重报名，需签署旅行社免责声明书，且无法参加探险、滑雪、出海、高空、户外等项目。残疾人：需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书，需直系家属陪同，并提前至少61天申请预留位置及专用配套设施。老年旅游者：70周岁以上需提供健康证明、体检报告并需直系家属陪同（否则需签署免责声明书）；本行程较长、需要一定步行能力和体力，体力不支者请慎重报名。未成年人（未满18岁）须由直系亲属或监护人陪同；部分景点对未满18/12/6周岁有特殊限定；6岁以下婴儿或30公斤以下儿童请提前确认安全儿童座椅，否则需自备符合欧盟制式的座椅；无父母陪同的18岁以下未成年人须持父母授权书（仅一方陪同需另一方书面授权）；本产品不接受2周岁以下婴儿参团。根据《旅游法》第15条，旅游者须如实告知与旅游活动相关的个人健康信息（包括妊娠期、哺乳期、慢性病、传染病史、疑似症状或近期疫区旅居史）并遵守安全警示规定；若因隐瞒导致人身损害或传播风险，需自行承担责任（含民事赔偿、医疗及隔离费用、可能的行政处罚），旅行社可解除合同且不退还费用。

title_en: Southern France & French Riviera 8-Day Small-Group Tour
title_zh: 南法蔚蓝海岸8天精品小团
short_en: An 8-day small-group loop from Paris through Burgundy, the Alpine lakes, Provence lavender fields and the French Riviera, with TGV high-speed rail.
short_zh: 8天精品小团，从巴黎出发，畅游勃艮第酒乡、阿尔卑斯湖畔、普罗旺斯薰衣草花海与蔚蓝海岸，搭乘TGV高铁直达。
desc_en: This 8-day small-group journey traces a deep route from Paris down to the Mediterranean and back by TGV high-speed rail. You overnight in a Relais & Châteaux castle hotel in Burgundy's wine country, wander the Alpine lakeside town of Annecy, explore Provence's hill towns and lavender fields, and spend two nights in Nice on the French Riviera. Highlights include Monaco, the corniche cliff roads, a Mediterranean boat cruise to Saint-Tropez, and the pink salt lakes and flamingos of the Camargue. With a 6-8 person small group, a Chinese-speaking guide-driver and all listed attractions included, it blends Burgundy gastronomy, Alpine scenery, and azure-coast glamour.
desc_zh: 8天精品小团深度环线，从巴黎一路南下直抵地中海，再乘TGV高铁返回。行程入住勃艮第酒乡的罗莱夏朵古堡酒店，漫步阿尔卑斯湖畔小镇安纳西，探访普罗旺斯山城与薰衣草花海，并在蔚蓝海岸尼斯连住两晚。亮点包括摩纳哥、峭壁海岸公路、乘船巡游地中海直达圣特罗佩，以及卡马格的粉红盐湖与火烈鸟家园。6-8人精品小团，中文司机兼导游全程陪同，列明景点一价全含，融合勃艮第美食、阿尔卑斯风光与蔚蓝海岸的优雅风情。

highlights.en: Overnight in a Relais & Châteaux 18th-century castle hotel in Burgundy wine country
highlights.zh: 入住勃艮第酒乡18世纪罗莱夏朵古堡酒店

highlights.en: Two nights in Nice with day trips along the French Riviera and to Monaco
highlights.zh: 尼斯连住两晚，畅游蔚蓝海岸并探访摩纳哥

highlights.en: Provence lavender fields at Valensole and the Verdon Gorge & Lake Sainte-Croix
highlights.zh: 瓦朗索勒薰衣草花海，凡尔登大峡谷与圣十字湖

highlights.en: Gaud hill town, the real-life model for Miyazaki's 'Castle in the Sky'
highlights.zh: 高德古城，宫崎骏《天空之城》的原型

highlights.en: Mediterranean boat cruise from Sainte-Maxime to the 'sun city' of Saint-Tropez
highlights.zh: 从圣马克西姆乘船出海，巡游直达阳光之城圣特罗佩

highlights.en: Aigues-Mortes pink salt lakes and the Camargue flamingo bird park
highlights.zh: 艾格莫尔特粉红盐湖与卡马格蓬德高火烈鸟鸟类公园

highlights.en: TGV high-speed rail between Paris and southern France, saving long road hours
highlights.zh: 巴黎往返南法搭乘TGV高铁直达，大幅减少乘车时间

highlights.en: 6-8 person small group with Chinese-speaking guide-driver and all listed attractions included
highlights.zh: 6-8人精品小团，中文司机兼导游，列明景点一价全含

includes.en: Hotels: 1 night in a 5-star chateau hotel plus 6 nights in 4-star hotels; because special hotels are used, room types cannot be chosen.
includes.zh: 【酒店】：五星级古堡酒店1晚及四星级酒店6晚，由于选用特殊酒店，不可选择房型。

includes.en: Meals: 7 breakfasts (hotel buffet breakfast or breakfast in another form).
includes.zh: 【餐饮】：酒店自助早餐或其他形式早餐7餐。

includes.en: Operating costs: tourist city tax, city-entry fees, residence tax, road and bridge tolls, parking and fuel costs, driver-guide meal allowances and other in-itinerary operating fees.
includes.zh: 【执行】：游客城市税、进城费、居住税、过路过桥费、停车燃油费、司导餐补等行程内执行费用。

includes.en: Transport: business travel vehicle (chauffeured tour vehicle).
includes.zh: 【交通】：商务旅行车。

includes.en: Long-distance transport: Route A — one-way direct TGV high-speed train ticket from Avignon/Nimes station to Paris; Route B — one-way direct TGV high-speed train ticket from Paris to Avignon/Nimes station.
includes.zh: 【大交通】：A线路——阿维尼翁/尼姆火车站至巴黎单程高铁直达火车票；B线路——巴黎至阿维尼翁/尼姆火车站单程高铁直达火车票。

includes.en: Guide: Chinese-speaking driver-guide service.
includes.zh: 【导游】：中文司机兼导游服务。

includes.en: Luggage: one 23 kg checked bag plus one piece of carry-on luggage.
includes.zh: 【行李】：1件23公斤行李及1件随身行李。

includes.en: Admissions: Burgundy winery visit ticket and wine-tasting fee, the Eze hilltop botanical garden, the Saint-Raphael boat cruise (ferry), the perfume museum, the Pont-de-Gau bird park ticket, and the Aigues-Mortes salt lake plus sightseeing train.
includes.zh: 【门票】：勃艮第酒庄参观门票及品酒费用、埃兹山顶植物园、圣拉斐尔出海渡轮、香水博物馆、蓬德高鸟类公园门票、艾格莫尔特盐湖及观光火车。

excludes.en: Passport: personal passport fees.
excludes.zh: 护照：个人护照费用。

excludes.en: Visa: the tourist visa fees required for the countries listed in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 签证：行程中所列旅游国家所需的观光签证费用。

excludes.en: Insurance: travel insurance fees (if the itinerary involves high-risk sports, please verify whether your travel insurance covers that activity).
excludes.zh: 保险：旅游保险费用（如行程内涉及到高风险运动，请核实旅游保险是否包含该项运动）。

excludes.en: Tips: travellers pay the guide and driver a tip totalling 10 EUR per person per day, same rate for adults and children.
excludes.zh: 小费：游客支付导游和司机小费一共10欧/人/天，大小同价。

excludes.en: Meals: apart from the special meals included in the itinerary, lunches and dinners are not included.
excludes.zh: 餐饮：除行程内包含的特色餐外，行程中不包含午、晚正餐费用。

excludes.en: Admissions: attractions not stated as fee-included (including but not limited to sights marked '(exterior)' (外观), and all 'recommended', 'optional', 'experience' items, etc. where the cost is not mentioned as included); if you wish to visit them, please pay on your own.
excludes.zh: 门票：行程中未注明费用包含的景点（包括但不仅限于行程中注明“外观”的景点，“推荐”、“可选”、“体验”等等所有未提及费用包含的项目，如游客需要参观，敬请自理）。

excludes.en: Extended stays: any extra accommodation, transport or sightseeing costs beyond the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 延长住宿：行程外额外延长的住宿、交通、观光费用。

excludes.en: Personal expenses: such as drinks and alcohol, taxis, phone charges and other personal consumption.
excludes.zh: 私人消费：如饮料酒类、出租车、电话费等个人消费。

excludes.en: Other transport: transport not mentioned as included beyond the business vehicle or minibus, such as a Venice gondola, and sightseeing trains / electric taxis in vehicle-restricted zones — please pay these on your own.
excludes.zh: 其他交通：除包含商务旅行车或者中巴之外，费用包含中未提及的其他交通费用，如威尼斯贡多拉，以及车辆限行区的观光火车、电瓶出租车等费用敬请自理。

excludes.en: Free-time activities: self-guided sightseeing at night and recommended items in the itinerary, and the resulting transport, dining, admission and shopping costs.
excludes.zh: 自由活动：游客夜间自行游览及行程中的推荐项目，以及产生的交通、餐饮、门票、购物等费用。

excludes.en: Experience activities: the various travel experience activities in the itinerary that are not included.
excludes.zh: 体验活动：行程中没有包含的各项旅游体验活动。

excludes.en: Other costs: any fees not mentioned in 'fee included'. In cases of force majeure such as natural disaster, war or strike, or special circumstances such as transport delays, flight cancellation/rescheduling, embassy visa delays or insufficient group size, or other reasons not attributable to our company, the company reserves the right to charge the additional difference (e.g. overseas visa-extension fees, accommodation, food and transport, airfare adjustments).
excludes.zh: 其他费用：费用包含中未提及的费用。如因天灾、战争、罢工等不可抗力的原因，及因交通延阻、航班取消或更改时间、使馆延误出签证、人数不足等特殊情况或其他非我公司原因所引致的额外费用（如在外延期签证费、住、食及交通费、国家航空运价调整等），我公司有权追加差价。

timeline.title_en: Paris to Dijon — The Burgundy Wine Route & a luxury chateau hotel
timeline.title_zh: 巴黎 - 第戎【勃艮第名酒之路与奢华古堡酒店】
timeline.description_en: Meet in the morning at Place d'Italie in Paris and set off for Dijon, the capital of Burgundy and France's renowned wine region — the birthplace of red wine, snails, rose mustard and Charolais white cattle, and widely regarded as France's gastronomic capital. After arrival you tour Dijon old town, including Place de la Liberation (Liberty Square), praised by the Michelin guide as a must-see and laid out in Versailles-style Baroque by Jules Hardouin-Mansart, flanked by the Palace of the Dukes of Burgundy and the city hall. After lunch the Burgundy Romanee wine route begins, with a visit to a famous Cote de Nuits winery (depending on which estates are open). You then check into a Relais & Chateaux castle hotel. Note: depending on the departure date the order of the itinerary may be reversed (content stays the same), and during the Avignon Theatre Festival (4-25 July 2026) the hotel location may change per the final tour confirmation.
timeline.description_zh: 早上在巴黎意大利广场集合，前往法国产酒名区勃艮第首府第戎，这里是红酒、蜗牛、玫瑰芥末及白牛的原产地，也是法国的美食之都。抵达后参观第戎老城，包括被米其林旅游指南评为“不可错过、即使绕道也要造访”的自由广场——由设计凡尔赛宫的著名设计师儒勒·哈杜安·孟萨尔按皇室标准规划，北侧是勃艮第公爵宫和市政厅，南侧为半圆弧形拱廊，巴洛克风格与凡尔赛一脉相承。午餐后开启勃艮第罗曼蒂产区的名酒之路，根据酒庄开放情况选择著名的夜丘红酒产区酒庄参观，随后入住罗莱夏朵城堡酒店。提醒：根据团期排列，部分团期游览顺序可能前后调整（内容一致）；2026年7月4日至25日阿维尼翁戏剧节期间酒店位置可能会有调整，具体以出团通知书为准。夜宿：罗莱夏朵城堡酒店或同等5星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Dijon to Annecy — A lakeside town at the foot of the Alps
timeline.title_zh: 第戎 - 安纳西【阿尔卑斯山脚下的湖畔小镇】
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, travel to the romantic, French-flavoured town of Annecy, a medieval city set against the Alps with the beautiful Lake Annecy to its southeast. Stroll the charming Annecy old town — a classic European old quarter with well-preserved old buildings, alpine snow-melt lakes, canals running through the streets, dark-green distant mountains and densely packed, vividly coloured houses, ranked among the world's six most charming small towns. Walk along Lake Annecy, France's second-largest glacial lake and reputed to be the purest in Europe, fed by alpine snowmelt and rain, stretching 15 km in emerald blue (the philosopher Rousseau spent twelve happy years here). Visit the Lovers' Bridge (Pont des Amours) over the Thiou River, the spot where Rousseau met Madame de Warens, today a favourite walk for locals and couples. Overnight: Novotel Annecy or equivalent 4-star hotel, in the town centre about 5 minutes' walk from the old town, the lake and the Chateau d'Annecy.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往法式情调的浪漫小镇安纳西，这座中世纪小城背靠阿尔卑斯山，东南方有美丽的安纳西湖。漫步安纳西老城——一派典型的欧洲古城风貌，保留完好的老建筑、阿尔卑斯融雪形成的湖泊、穿城而过的运河、青黛色远山和鳞次栉比、色彩浓烈的房屋，被评为世界六大魅力小镇之一。在安纳西湖畔散步，这是法国第二大冰川湖，被誉为全欧洲最纯净的湖泊，湖水来自阿尔卑斯高山雪水和雨水，绵延15公里、如翡翠般碧蓝（启蒙思想家卢梭曾在此度过一生中“美好的12年”）。游览坐落在休河上的爱情桥，这里是思想家卢梭与华伦夫人约会之地，如今是市民和情侣们喜爱的散步去处。夜宿：安纳西诺富特酒店或同等4星级酒店，位于市中心，距老城区、安纳西湖和安纳西城堡仅5分钟步行路程。

timeline.title_en: Annecy to the Provence villages to Avignon — Miyazaki's 'Castle in the Sky'
timeline.title_zh: 安纳西 - 南法小镇 - 阿维尼翁【亲临宫崎骏笔下的“天空之城”】
timeline.description_en: Depart in the morning for the Provence region and a tour of its hilltop villages, visiting in turn Fontaine-de-Vaucluse, the hilltop town of Gordes and the Senanque Abbey. Fontaine-de-Vaucluse, about half an hour from Avignon, is France's largest spring and the world's fifth-largest by output (around 630 million cubic metres a year); the poet Petrarch lived here in 1339. Gordes (the 'stone city'), a quintessential medieval Provencal village whose granite houses pile up in a terraced tier like a castle in the air, is said to be the model for Miyazaki's 'Howl's Moving Castle' / Castle in the Sky. The Romanesque Senanque Abbey, built by Mazan monks in 1148 two kilometres north of Gordes, hides in a tranquil valley and is one of Provence's 'three sisters' (with Silvacane and Le Thoronet), a favourite postcard subject. Return to Avignon and explore the old town, the broken bridge over the Rhone (Pont d'Avignon) and the Palais des Papes (Papal Palace) on your own in the evening. Overnight: Mercure Avignon Pont d'Avignon or equivalent 4-star hotel (located between the Avignon bridge and the Papal Palace; note that during the Avignon Theatre Festival, 4-25 July 2026, the hotel location may be adjusted per the final tour confirmation).
timeline.description_zh: 早上出发前往普罗旺斯地区，开启南法小镇之旅，依次游览泉水小镇（Fontaine-de-Vaucluse）、高德古城和塞南克修道院。泉水小镇离阿维尼翁约半小时车程，是法国最大的泉、世界排名第5位，每年泉水流量达6亿3千万立方米，1339年诗人彼得拉克曾在此居住。高德古城又叫石头城，是典型的中世纪普罗旺斯小镇，房屋由花岗岩堆砌、呈梯形盘踞，远看犹如空中的房子，正是宫崎骏《哈尔的移动城堡》“天空之城”的原型。塞南克修道院位于石头城以北2公里，由Mazan修道院僧侣于1148年修建，采用罗马式风格、朴实无华，隐藏在宁静山谷中，是《山居岁月》一书的故事背景，与西瓦冈、多宏内修道院并称“普罗旺斯三姐妹”。返回阿维尼翁，当晚自行参观阿维尼翁古城、罗纳河断桥和阿维尼翁教皇宫。夜宿：阿维尼翁断桥美居酒店或同等4星级酒店，坐落于阿维尼翁桥与教皇宫之间；2026年7月4日至25日戏剧节期间酒店位置可能调整，以出团通知书为准。

timeline.title_en: Avignon to Valensole to Lake Sainte-Croix to Nice — Lavender fields and the Riviera sands
timeline.title_zh: 阿维尼翁 - 瓦朗索勒 - 圣十字湖 - 尼斯【徜徉紫色花海，脚踩海滨细沙】
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, head to Valensole and the lavender fields along the D907 road (during the lavender season), immersing yourself in the romantic purple sea — also the filming location of Chiung Yao's 'Dreams Link'. In the afternoon visit the Verdon Gorge, Europe's grand canyon (the world's second-largest, 25 km long and 700 m deep, in the Provence-Cote d'Azur region), and Lake Sainte-Croix, which from the cliff viewing platform looks like a sheet of emerald set among the mountains (about 40 minutes' drive from the Valensole lavender fields). Then continue to Nice, where you freely explore Nice old town — a labyrinth of winding lanes lined with Baroque churches and Italian-style buildings, with the colourful Cours Saleya market of fruit, sweets and flowers — and stroll the Bay of Angels (Baie des Anges), named for its angel-wing shape, with deep-blue water and Nice's distinctive pebble beaches (climbing the castle hill gives a fine view from the east). Note: lavender generally blooms from mid/late June and is cut by late July depending on temperature; if it cannot be seen during your tour dates this is replaced by a visit to the ceramics town. Overnight: Mercure Nice Centre Notre Dame or Novotel or equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往瓦朗索勒及D907公路的薰衣草花田（薰衣草花期期间），置身浪漫紫色花海，留下紫色记忆，这里也是琼瑶同名小说《一帘幽梦》和《又见一帘幽梦》的拍摄地。下午游览欧洲峡谷——凡尔登大峡谷（世界第二大峡谷，25公里长、700米深，位于普罗旺斯-蔚蓝海岸大区）以及圣十字湖，从居高临下的悬崖景观台望去，圣十字湖仿佛一片平整的翡翠镶嵌在群山之中（从瓦朗索勒薰衣草海洋到圣十字湖约需40分钟车程）。之后前往尼斯，当天自由参观尼斯老城——这里完好保留了18世纪以来巴洛克风格教堂、意大利风格建筑等，迷宫般的曲折小巷中色彩鲜明，走到萨雷雅广场集市（Cours Saleya）便可见琳琅满目的鲜果、糖果与鲜花；并漫步天使湾，它紧邻英国人漫步大道、因形似天使翅膀而得名，海水十分湛蓝、海滩由鹅卵石铺成，爬上城堡从东面俯瞰更佳。提醒：每年5月中下旬开始普罗旺斯盛开紫色鲁冰花，薰衣草一般6月中下旬绽放、至7月下旬收割，如团期内无法观看薰衣草，则改为参观陶瓷小镇。夜宿：尼斯中心圣母院美居酒店或诺富特酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Nice to Eze to Monaco to Menton to Nice — Riviera viewpoints and the cliff road
timeline.title_zh: 尼斯 - 埃兹 - 摩纳哥 - 芒通 - 尼斯【蔚蓝海岸海滨美景城峭壁之路】
timeline.description_en: Set off from Nice in the morning for the clifftop village of Eze to overlook the Mediterranean, then visit the perfume museum to learn the distillation and blending process of perfume (touring the distillation, the laboratory and the manufacturing workshop, which reveal the secrets of making perfume, toilet water and soap). Eze is an ancient medieval stone village perched on a huge rock by the sea between Nice and Monaco — known as the 'eagle's nest' — from whose 600-metre summit much of the Cote d'Azur can be seen, with narrow winding stone lanes and stone houses. In the afternoon take the Avenue Princesse Grace, the Riviera's beautiful scenic road, driving the famous Moyenne Corniche cliff road past Villefranche-sur-Mer (the 'seaside beauty town') and stopping to find photo spots. Visit Monaco and Monte Carlo — a world-famous seaside yacht resort with the Opera, the seafront and the Hotel de Paris, the city built along the mountain road with the yacht harbour below the cliff — and the yacht marina. Then continue to Menton to tour the 'Lemon Town', wrapped in lemon tones with its long beaches, varied architecture and citrus groves, wandering the Baroque old town and the 'Lemon Route'. Overnight: Mercure Nice Centre Notre Dame or Novotel or equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早上从尼斯出发前往悬崖小镇埃兹俯眺地中海，拜访香水博物馆，了解香水的蒸馏、调配与制造过程（参观蒸馏过程、香水实验室和制造车间，揭开制造香水、化妆水以及香皂的“秘密”）。埃兹是建于中世纪的古老石头小镇，地处海边一块巨大岩石上，位于尼斯和摩纳哥之间，被称为鹫巢村，站在六百多米的顶端可鸟瞰大半个蔚蓝海岸，石块砌成的房屋与狭窄石板路风情无限。下午前往以摩纳哥格蕾丝公主命名的格雷斯公主大道，沿南法出名的Moyenne Corniche峭壁之路行驶，途经海滨自由城Villefranche-sur-Mer（有“海滨美景城”之称），在海岸线上停停走走寻找美丽的拍摄点。参观摩纳哥及蒙特卡洛——世界著名的海滨游艇旅游胜地，有王子歌剧院、海滨浴场及巴黎大酒店，城市沿山道而建、悬崖下即是游艇停泊港，并参观游艇码头。之后前往芒通游览“柠檬小镇”，整座小镇被柠檬色调包裹，有修长的海滩、各式建筑与成片柑橘果园，迷失在巴洛克式老城十字路口、踏上“柠檬之路”令人流连忘返。夜宿：尼斯中心圣母院美居酒店或诺富特酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Nice to Cannes to Saint-Raphael to Saint-Tropez to Marseille — A Mediterranean boat cruise
timeline.title_zh: 尼斯 - 戛纳 - 圣拉斐尔 - 圣特罗佩 - 马赛【出海巡游地中海传奇小镇】
timeline.description_en: Depart in the morning for Cannes to visit the Palais des Festivals (the film palace) and the seafront — built in 1982 as the key venue of the Cannes Film Festival where the Palme d'Or is awarded, now with 44,000 square metres of exhibition space and 15 halls, beside which the Walk of Fame holds over 300 stars' handprints. Then follow the Corniche d'Or (the rose coast) to the Riviera town of Saint-Raphael, said to be the setting behind 'Romeo and Juliet', with its calm seaside life, lively shopping streets and popular bathing beaches. Continue to Sainte-Maxime and take a boat out to sea across the Cote d'Azur (cruise about 20 minutes) directly to the city of maritime art, Saint-Tropez — a town in the Var department about 100 km from Marseille, nicknamed the 'City of the Sun', famed for France's beautiful beaches made up of nearly a hundred small coves, luxury hotels and private villas, and harbours full of elegant yachts (notably 1930s-style Italian Riva speedboats). Then travel to Marseille to check in. Overnight: Crowne Plaza Marseille or Novotel or equivalent 4-star hotel (newly opened in 2023, spacious modern rooms, just 6 minutes' drive from the Palais Longchamp, with the Cucina Victoria restaurant serving southern French cuisine).
timeline.description_zh: 早上出发前往戛纳，参观戛纳影节宫（电影宫）和海滨——电影宫建于1982年，是戛纳影展的重要会议地点，备受注目的金棕榈奖即在此颁发，目前总展览面积44000平方米、含15个厅，旁边的星光大道已累计300多个明星手印，是到戛纳不容错过的景点。随后沿玫瑰海岸前往蔚蓝海岸重镇圣拉斐尔（《罗密欧与朱丽叶》原型所在地），这里海滨生活宁静祥和、商业街区热闹非凡、海水浴场倍受欢迎。随后前往圣马克西姆，乘船出海巡游地中海（游船时长约20分钟），直达海洋艺术之城圣特罗佩——它是瓦尔省的一个镇、距马赛约100公里，别称“太阳城”，号称拥有法国最美丽的海滩，由近百个小型海滩组成，豪华酒店和私人别墅占据银沙海滩，盛夏海湾泊满修长优雅的游艇、尤以20世纪30年代意大利Riva快艇居多。随后前往马赛入住酒店。夜宿：马赛皇冠酒店或诺富特酒店或同等4星级酒店（2023年新开业，房间宽敞、设计时尚，距隆尚宫仅6分钟车程，酒店Cucina Victoria餐厅提供南法特色美食）。

timeline.title_en: Marseille to Aigues-Mortes to Nimes — Aigues-Mortes pink salt lake and the flamingos' home
timeline.title_zh: 马赛 - 艾格莫尔特 - 尼姆【艾格莫尔特粉红盐湖 拜访火烈鸟家园】
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, tour central Marseille, a city with an untamed, unpolished charm: optionally visit the Palais Longchamp park, the Notre-Dame de la Garde basilica and the Old Port (Vieux-Port). The Old Port has been the city's heart since the Greeks founded Marseille around 600 BC, today a mooring for fishing boats and yachts ringed by cafes, restaurants and bars; Notre-Dame de la Garde, with its golden Madonna and Child atop a 154-metre hill, is the city's symbol and protector of sailors, with a viewing terrace overlooking Marseille and the Mediterranean islands; Palais Longchamp is a grand curved building blending Baroque, Roman and oriental styles around a fountain sculpture. In the afternoon visit the Parc Ornithologique de Pont-de-Gau and the southern French town of Aigues-Mortes, then ride the Aigues-Mortes sightseeing train along the pink salt lake. Pont-de-Gau, in the heart of the Camargue wetlands, is a key flamingo habitat and home to 300+ bird species (egrets, herons, pelicans, ibis) amid lakes, reed beds and salt marshes, with gentle boardwalk trails for all ages. About 90% of France's salt comes from Aigues-Mortes; the small train stops at the white salt mountains for views over the old city, blue sky and pink lake, whose colour comes from salt-loving algae and high salinity rich in beta-carotene (the source of the flamingos' pink). Then continue to the medieval city of Nimes. Overnight: Le Comptoir des Arenes (Arenes count's apartment hotel) or equivalent 4-star hotel, a protected 17th-century Romanesque courtyard building next to the Roman arena.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往马赛市区游览，马赛有一种不加过多修饰的野性风情，可选择参观隆尚宫公园、守护圣母圣殿和马赛旧港。马赛老港自公元前600年古希腊人建立马赛以来一直是城市的心脏，如今是渔船和游艇的停泊地，两侧环绕滨海大道、布满咖啡馆餐馆与酒吧；守护圣母教堂顶上的圣母圣子金像是马赛的象征、也是水手与渔民的保护神，座落在154米高的小山丘上、外设观景台，是观赏马赛和地中海小岛的绝佳地点；隆尚宫则是集巴洛克、罗马及东方风格于一体的弧形建筑，中央是以“水之赞歌”为主题的群雕和喷泉。下午前往蓬德高鸟类公园和南法小镇艾格莫尔特，随后乘坐艾格莫尔特观光火车沿粉红盐湖游览。蓬德高鸟类公园位于卡马格湿地中心，是重要的火烈鸟栖息地，也是鹭鸟、苍鹭、鹈鹕、白鹮等300多种鸟类的栖息地，湖泊、芦苇荡、盐沼交错，木栈道步道全程平缓、适合各年龄段。法国约90%的盐产自艾格莫尔特，乘坐观光小火车会停靠白色盐山，登高远望、古城、蓝天与粉湖相映成趣；盐湖之所以呈粉色，源于光照和高含盐量令湖中藻类产生丰富的β-胡萝卜素，火烈鸟以藻类为食、因此长腿与嘴部也呈迷人粉红色。之后前往中世纪古城尼姆。夜宿：尼姆Arenes伯爵公寓酒店或同等4星级酒店，位于尼姆地标古罗马竞技场旁，是一座17世纪罗曼式庭院的保护建筑。

timeline.title_en: Nimes to Paris — The city of the water spirit, then TGV home
timeline.title_zh: 尼姆 - 巴黎
timeline.description_en: On the final day, explore the old Roman city of Nimes on foot, the 'city of the water spirit', discovering Roman glory and the mysterious garden. Start from the Avenue Feucheres by Nimes station to understand the structure of the Roman aqueduct bridges, then head to the Jardins de la Fontaine. Nimes gathers many astonishing Roman achievements: the well-preserved Roman arena (amphitheatre); the spring-side Jardins de la Fontaine, built over a thousand years ago around the spring the Romans believed was inhabited by a water spirit, a marvel of Roman architecture and landscape; and the Tour Magne (the Magne tower) on the hill, offering boundless views from the top. Also see the Maison Carree, a Corinthian-columned temple about 17 m high and 26 m deep, built in the 1st century BC under Augustus, faithfully preserving the Roman temple form (later a town hall and church, now the museum of antiquities). Afterwards depart from Nimes or Avignon station by TGV high-speed train to Paris Gare de Lyon, ending the southern France journey. No overnight accommodation on this day.
timeline.description_zh: 当天徒步参观水精灵之城尼姆古城，探索古罗马的辉煌和神秘花园。从尼姆火车站的水泉大道（Avenue Feucheres）了解古罗马时期水渠桥的建筑结构开始，前往神秘花园徒步探索古罗马辉煌。尼姆汇集了诸多令人惊叹的古罗马智慧结晶：保存完好的古罗马竞技场；古迹庭院泉边公园（le Jardin de la Fontaine），暗示尼姆是一座以泉为生的暖城；还有丘陵上的古罗马瞭望塔马涅塔（la Tour de Magne），登高远望可将无限风光尽收眼底。还可参观方形神殿，其建筑特色为科林斯式圆柱，高约17米、深26米，建于公元前1世纪奥古斯都大帝时代，原原本本保留了罗马时期神殿形式，曾作为市政府大楼和教堂、现为古代博物馆。神秘花园建于一千多年前，是保存完好的古罗马建筑群和林园景观，因当时尼姆以泉水为中心发展、人们深信泉水有精灵，泉边公园即是当时为奉献给泉水精灵而建造的庭园。随后从尼姆或阿维尼翁火车站出发，乘坐法国TGV高铁抵达巴黎里昂火车站，结束南法旅程。当天无住宿。

meeting_en: Paris — morning meet-up at Place d'Italie; the tour returns to Paris by TGV on Day 8.
meeting_zh: 巴黎——上午在意大利广场集合；第8天搭乘TGV高铁返回巴黎。

faqs.question_en: Where and how do we meet, and where does the tour disperse?
faqs.question_zh: 集合地点和方法？集散地点和方法？
faqs.answer_en: Meeting: Group A meets at Place d'Italie in the 13th arrondissement of Paris; Group B departs from Paris Gare de Lyon or Marne-la-Vallee station by high-speed train to meet at Avignon/Nimes station (see the tour confirmation). This product does NOT recommend a flight that lands in Paris on the same day you join the tour. Dispersal: for Group A, on the final day the guide helps you board the train at Avignon/Nimes station and you return to Paris Gare de Lyon or Marne-la-Vallee; for Group B, you return by vehicle from Dijon to Place d'Italie in Paris and disperse there (see the tour confirmation). It is NOT recommended to leave Paris by flight on the same day the tour ends.
faqs.answer_zh: 集合：团期A在巴黎13区意大利广场集合；团期B在巴黎里昂火车站或马恩河谷火车站出发，乘坐高铁前往阿维尼翁/尼姆火车站集合（参见出团通知书）。本产品不推荐参团当天降落巴黎的航班！集散：团期A当天在阿维尼翁/尼姆火车站由导游协助登车后，游客乘坐火车返回巴黎里昂火车站或马恩河谷火车站；团期B游客从第戎随车返回巴黎意大利广场后解散（参见出团通知书）。本产品不推荐结束当天离开巴黎的航班！

faqs.question_en: Can the train tickets be changed?
faqs.question_zh: 火车票是否可以更改？
faqs.answer_en: Train tickets are booked in advance and cannot be changed. If you do not need the train ticket, you may choose to join/leave the tour at Avignon/Nimes. On the return day you take the train back from Avignon/Nimes; the train ticket is non-refundable and non-exchangeable. If you wish to forgo the ticket, please notify us in advance to cancel the one-way ticket — otherwise, not using the flight/train ticket in sequence may result in a penalty cancellation.
faqs.answer_zh: 火车票提前预定不可更改。如果不需要火车票，可以选择出发在阿维尼翁/尼姆上下团，返回当天从阿维尼翁/尼姆乘坐火车返回，火车票不可退、不可更换。如需放弃票，请提前通知取消单程票，否则未按照顺序使用机票/火车票，可能被处罚取消。

faqs.question_en: Can the Avignon hotel be added or changed?
faqs.question_zh: 是否能加订阿维尼翁的酒店？
faqs.answer_en: The Avignon hotel for that night cannot be changed, is non-refundable, and cannot be booked as an extra night — during the Theatre Festival hotels in Avignon are extremely tight and no rooms are available.
faqs.answer_zh: 阿维尼翁当晚酒店不可更改、不可退、不可额外预定（戏剧节期间酒店非常紧张，无可用的房间）。

faqs.question_en: What festivals fall within the itinerary, and on what dates?
faqs.question_zh: 行程内的节日庆典日期和地点是什么？
faqs.answer_en: Festival dates and locations are for reference only: the Avignon Theatre Festival (4-25 July 2026), the Nimes International Music Festival, the Arles International Photography Festival and the Nice International Jazz Festival.
faqs.answer_zh: 行程内节日庆典的日期和地点仅供参考：阿维尼翁戏剧节（2026年7月4日-2026年7月25日）、尼姆国际音乐节、阿尔勒国际摄影节、尼斯国际爵士节。

faqs.question_en: Do I need a visa?
faqs.question_zh: 是否需要签证？
faqs.answer_en: This product does NOT include the visa fee. You need a Schengen visa (single or multiple entry); if you need to apply, please choose a Schengen-visa product. After booking we provide all the materials needed to apply for the Schengen visa free of charge (refer to the detailed materials list), and if you apply through us we purchase Schengen-compliant travel insurance for you (if you do not entrust us with the visa, you must arrange your own insurance and claims). Your passport must be valid for at least six months from the date of departure, or customs may refuse entry. 'Visa-worry-free' guarantee: if you sign with us 61+ days before departure and have not obtained the visa within 45 days before departure, we bear all losses and immediately refund all travel fees; travellers not meeting this clause who fail to obtain a visa are refunded per the change-and-cancellation terms. A refusal must be reported to us within 48 hours with the consulate's refusal letter. Note: the visa fee, visa service fee, Schengen insurance fee and visa-centre appointment fee are all non-refundable and non-transferable, even if the product itself is changed or cancelled.
faqs.answer_zh: 本产品不包含签证费用。本产品需要申根签证（单次或多次入境）；如需办理请选择申根签证产品。预订后免费提供办理申根签证的全部材料（参考详细材料清单）；若委托我社办理申根签证，我社为您购买符合申根签证要求的申根旅游保险（若未委托我社办理签证，需自行购买旅游保险及自行负责理赔手续）。护照有效期需在离境之日起至少还有六个月，否则海关有权拒绝入境。保签无忧：游客在出发日前61天与我社签约的旅游产品，如在出发前45天内未获取签证，我社承担所有损失，立即退还全部旅游费用；不符合该条款的游客如未正常获取签证，按“退改与取消条款”退费。如遇拒签需在48小时内通知我社并出具使领馆拒签函。注意：签证费、签证服务费、申根保险费、签证中心预约费均不可退款、也无法更改使用者，即使产品退改签，签证费用也无法退款。

faqs.question_en: Booking, changes & cancellation
faqs.question_zh: 预订、变更与取消须知
faqs.answer_en: Both the agency and the traveller may apply for a no-reason cancellation up to 30 days before departure (the 30th day not included); after that, refunds follow the Change and Cancellation Terms. Because of frequent flight changes, traffic, ferry cancellations, strikes or order adjustments, the itinerary sequence and timing are often adjusted (this is not a breach, and is treated as consistent with the itinerary sheet); you must arrive at the meeting point ONE DAY BEFORE the tour starts and leave the dispersal point ONE DAY AFTER it ends, allowing buffer time for connections (5h for same-airport transfers, 7h for different-airport transfers; reasonable meet/disperse window 07:00-21:00). High-speed trains may be replaced by coach — refer to the tour confirmation. This product is a shared (join-in) group tour; the minimum group size is 10 people, and if it is not reached 30 days before departure either side may cancel without liability. Rooms: single travellers default to a single-room supplement deposit (partly refunded if successfully matched); two people default to a standard twin/double (bed type assigned by the hotel, not selectable); three people get a family room (parents + one minor), bed type per the hotel. All European hotels are non-smoking, do not allow cooking in rooms, do not provide disposable toiletries or free hot water; check-in 14:00, check-out 11:00; air-conditioning is not a standard fixture. Listed hotel names are preferred; if full, an equivalent same-star hotel is used without separate notice. Pricing is quoted in EUR; if you pay in CNY, the price is the real-time CNY amount auto-calculated from the Bank of China 'EUR sell' rate on the day of payment; refunds use the rate on the refund-application day, and any exchange/bank-handling fees are borne by the traveller. Orders need timely payment and a second confirmation within 48 hours (auto-refund if not confirmed); book the product at least 14 days in advance, and do not book connecting flights/hotels before the itinerary is confirmed.
faqs.answer_zh: 出发前30天（不含第30天）旅行社和旅行者均有权申请无理由取消；之后按《更改与取消条例条款》退费。由于航变频繁、交通拥堵、渡轮取消、罢工游行或行程前后顺序调整，行程时间及游览先后顺序经常调整（不视为旅行社违约，视为与行程单一致）；旅行者须在旅游团开始前一天到达集合地，结束后一天离开集散地，并预留合理的航班衔接时间（同一机场转机至少5小时、不同机场至少7小时；合理集合集散时间为07:00至21:00）。高铁可能用大巴代替，请以出团通知书为准。本产品为散客拼团，成团人数为10人，行程开始前30天（不含第30天）未达成团人数，双方均有权解除合同且不承担违约责任。房型：单人报名默认含单人房差押金（成功拼房按比例退款）；两人同时报名默认标准双人间（床型由酒店安排、不可选）；三人默认家庭间（两位父母与一位未成年儿童，床型由酒店安排）。欧洲所有酒店禁烟、禁止房内做饭、不提供一次性洗漱用品及免费开水；入住14:00、退房11:00；空调并非酒店标准设施。行程内列明酒店名称为优先入住，如订满则换同星级相近酒店、不再另行通知。所有定价以欧元为计价单位，如选择人民币支付，则以当天支付时按中国银行实时“欧元卖出价”自动计算的人民币价格为准；退款同样适用申请退款当日汇率，汇率差异或银行手续费由旅行者承担。订单需及时支付，支付后需等待二次确认（超48小时未确认默认自动退款）；建议至少提前14天预订，未获确定行程前请勿预定衔接机票及酒店。

faqs.question_en: Health & safety requirements
faqs.question_zh: 健康与安全须知
faqs.answer_en: Please have a health check before departure. Do NOT book if you have: infectious diseases (e.g. active tuberculosis, typhoid); cardiovascular disease (e.g. severe hypertension, heart failure, myocardial ischemia or infarction); cerebrovascular disease (e.g. cerebral embolism, hemorrhage, brain tumour); respiratory disease (e.g. emphysema, cor pulmonale); psychiatric illness (e.g. epilepsy and various mental illnesses); severe anaemia (hemoglobin below 50 g/L); or recovery from major/medium surgery. Pregnancy: at 35 weeks or more you cannot join under any circumstances; at 28 weeks or more you must provide a doctor's exam report (within 7 days) and the attending physician's consent; under 28 weeks join with caution, sign a disclaimer, and you cannot take part in adventure, skiing, boating, aerial or outdoor activities. People with disabilities need a 7-day medical report and physician's consent, an accompanying immediate family member, and to apply at least 61 days ahead for a reserved place/facilities. Elderly travellers over 70 need a health certificate, medical report and an accompanying immediate family member (or sign a disclaimer); as this is a long itinerary requiring good walking ability and stamina, those not physically fit should book with caution. Minors (under 18) must be accompanied by an immediate relative or guardian; an under-18 travelling without parents needs a parental authorisation letter (a single-parent escort needs the other parent's written authorisation); infants under 2 years old are not accepted, and a safety child seat must be confirmed in advance for infants under 6 or children under 30 kg. Per Article 15 of the Tourism Law (and the 2025 Infectious Disease Prevention Law), travellers must truthfully declare health information relevant to the trip (pregnancy, lactation, chronic illness, infectious-disease history, suspected symptoms, recent epidemic-area travel) and obey safety warnings; concealment causing harm or transmission risk makes the traveller liable (including medical, isolation and compensation costs, with the agency able to terminate the contract without refund).
faqs.answer_zh: 请在出行前做一次必要的身体检查，如存在以下情况请勿报名：传染性疾病患者（如活动期肺结核、伤寒等）；心血管疾病患者（如严重高血压、心功能不全、心肌缺氧、心肌梗塞等）；脑血管疾病患者（如脑栓塞、脑出血、脑肿瘤等）；呼吸系统疾病患者（如肺气肿、肺心病等）；精神病患者（如癫痫及各种精神病人）；严重贫血患者（血红蛋白50克/升以下）；大中型手术恢复期病患者。孕妇：妊娠第35周及以上任何情况下都无法参团；第28周及以上需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书；第28周以下请慎重报名，需签署旅行社免责声明书，且无法参加探险、滑雪、出海、高空、户外等项目。残疾人需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书、需直系家属陪同，并提前至少61天申请预留位置及专用配套设施。70周岁以上老年人需提供健康证明、体检报告并由直系家属陪同（或签署免责声明书）；本行程较长、需要一定步行能力和体力，体力不支者请慎重报名。未成年人（未满18周岁）须由直系亲属或监护人陪同；无父母陪同的18岁以下未成年人需持父母授权书（仅父母一方陪伴需另一方书面授权）；不接受2周岁以下婴儿参团；如有6岁以下婴儿或30公斤以下儿童，请提前确认安全儿童座椅。根据《旅游法》第15条及《传染病防治法（2025修订）》，游客需如实告知与旅游活动相关的个人健康信息（包括妊娠期、哺乳期、慢性病、传染病史、疑似症状或近期疫区旅居史）并遵守安全警示规定，若因隐瞒导致人身损害或传播风险，游客需自行承担相应责任（含医疗、隔离费用及赔偿，旅行社可解除合同且不退还费用）。

title_en: France, Italy & Switzerland 12-Day Deluxe Small-Group Tour (Paris to Rome)
title_zh: 法意瑞12天精品小团深度游（巴黎至罗马）
short_en: A 12-day one-way journey from Paris to Rome through the Swiss Alps, with expert Louvre & Versailles talks, scenic rail, lake castles and Renaissance cities.
short_zh: 12天巴黎到罗马单程深度之旅，穿越瑞士阿尔卑斯，含卢浮宫与凡尔赛专业讲解、观光列车、湖畔古堡与文艺复兴名城。
desc_en: This 12-day small-group adventure runs one-way from Paris to Rome, threading France, Switzerland and Italy into a single deep route. Begin with curator-led talks at the Louvre and Versailles, descend through Burgundy's vineyards to the shores of Lake Geneva, then ride the GoldenPass panoramic train and explore the Jungfrau region around Interlaken. Cross the Alps into Italy for Milan, Venice, Florence, the Cinque Terre, Pisa, the Tuscan hill towns and finally the eternal city of Rome. With city-centre 4-star hotels, scenic châteaux stays, included attractions and no forced shopping, it blends art, alpine landscapes and Italian romance.
desc_zh: 这是一段12天的精品小团之旅，从巴黎单程直抵罗马，将法国、瑞士与意大利串联成一条深度环线。旅程以卢浮宫和凡尔赛宫的国家馆讲解师专题讲解开篇，经勃艮第酒乡南下日内瓦湖畔，乘坐金色山口全景观光列车，畅游因特拉肯与少女峰地区。随后翻越阿尔卑斯进入意大利，游览米兰、威尼斯、佛罗伦萨、五渔村、比萨、托斯卡纳山城，最终抵达永恒之城罗马。全程入住市中心四星酒店，含景观古堡住宿与门票，无强制购物，融艺术、阿尔卑斯风光与意式浪漫于一体。

highlights.en: Curator-led deep-dive talks inside the Louvre and the Palace of Versailles
highlights.zh: 卢浮宫与凡尔赛宫国家馆讲解师专题深度讲解

highlights.en: GoldenPass panoramic train from Lungern to Lucerne through the Alps
highlights.zh: 乘坐金色山口全景观光列车，从龙疆穿越阿尔卑斯抵卢塞恩

highlights.en: Jungfrau region & Interlaken, with Lake Geneva, Chillon Castle and the Lavaux vineyard terraces
highlights.zh: 少女峰地区与因特拉肯，日内瓦湖、西庸城堡与世界遗产拉沃葡萄梯田

highlights.en: Venice, Florence, the Cinque Terre, Pisa and Rome's ancient landmarks
highlights.zh: 威尼斯、佛罗伦萨、五渔村、比萨及罗马古迹

highlights.en: One-way deep route Paris to Rome with all intercity transport included
highlights.zh: 巴黎至罗马单程深度环线，含全程城际交通

highlights.en: City-centre 4-star hotels plus scenic château and Tuscan villa stays
highlights.zh: 市中心四星酒店，外加景观古堡与托斯卡纳庄园住宿

highlights.en: Listed attraction entries included with no forced shopping stops
highlights.zh: 含行程所列景点门票，全程无强制购物

highlights.en: Small group of 4-8 travellers with a Chinese-speaking guide-driver
highlights.zh: 4-8人精品小团，配中文导游兼司机

includes.en: Hotels: 1 night in a 5-star hotel plus 10 nights in 4-star hotels, 11 nights' accommodation in total
includes.zh: 【酒店】五星级酒店1晚及四星级酒店10晚，共计11晚住宿

includes.en: Meals: 11 breakfasts in total (hotel buffet breakfast or breakfast in another form)
includes.zh: 【餐饮】酒店内自助早餐或其他形式早餐共计11餐

includes.en: Taxes & fees: tourist city tax, town-entry fees, residence tax, Venice island-landing fee, driver/guide meal allowance and all other in-itinerary travel taxes
includes.zh: 【税费】游客城市税、进城费、居住税、威尼斯登岛费、司导餐补及各类旅游税等行程内执行费用

includes.en: Transport: a 7-9 seat business touring vehicle
includes.zh: 【交通】7-9座商务旅行车

includes.en: Guide: a Chinese-speaking driver-guide throughout
includes.zh: 【导游】全程中文司机兼导游

includes.en: Luggage: 1 piece of 23 kg checked luggage and 1 carry-on bag
includes.zh: 【行李】1件23公斤行李及1件随身行李

includes.en: Tickets: Louvre first-entry ticket and official guide; Versailles first-entry ticket and official guide; Seine River cruise; Burgundy winery visit and tasting; GoldenPass train (Lungern-Lucerne leg); Cinque Terre train; Venice canal island ferry. (Spring-summer-autumn departures also include the Giessbach cog railway and the Interlaken boat, available 3 Apr-11 Oct 2026; outside that window these two are replaced with a Lake Lucerne cruise.)
includes.zh: 【门票】卢浮宫首道门票及官导讲解，凡尔赛宫首道门票及官导讲解，塞纳河游船，勃艮第酒庄参观及品酒费用，金色山口列车（龙疆-卢塞恩段），五渔村小火车、威尼斯运河上岛渡轮（每年春夏秋季产品含吉斯巴赫齿轮火车和因特拉肯游轮，体验时间2026年4月3日-10月11日，无法体验期间替换为卢塞恩湖游船）

excludes.en: Passport: personal passport fees
excludes.zh: 护照：个人护照费用

excludes.en: Visa: tourist visa fees for the countries on the itinerary
excludes.zh: 签证：行程中所列旅游国家所需的观光签证费用

excludes.en: Insurance: travel insurance (if the itinerary involves high-risk sports, verify whether your travel insurance covers that activity)
excludes.zh: 保险：旅游保险费用（如行程内涉及到高风险运动，请核实旅游保险是否包含该项运动）

excludes.en: Tips: gratuities to the guide and driver totaling 10 EUR per person per day, same rate for adults and children
excludes.zh: 小费：游客支付导游和司机小费一共10欧/人/天，大小同价

excludes.en: Meals: apart from the special meals included in the itinerary, lunches and dinners are not included
excludes.zh: 餐饮：除行程内包含的特色餐外，行程中不包含午、晚正餐费用

excludes.en: Tickets: sights not marked as included (including but not limited to sights marked "exterior," and all "recommended," "optional," "experience" etc. items not noted as included — pay on your own if you wish to enter)
excludes.zh: 门票：行程中未注明费用包含的景点（包括但不仅限于行程中注明“外观”的景点，“推荐”“可选”“体验”等所有未提及费用包含的项目，如需参观敬请自理）

excludes.en: Extended stays: any accommodation, transport or sightseeing added outside the itinerary
excludes.zh: 延长住宿：行程外额外延长的住宿、交通、观光费用

excludes.en: Personal spending: drinks/alcohol, taxis, phone charges and other personal expenses
excludes.zh: 私人消费：如饮料酒类、出租车、电话费等个人消费

excludes.en: Other transport: transport not covered by the business vehicle/minibus and not mentioned as included, e.g. the Venice gondola, plus sightseeing trains and electric taxis in traffic-restricted zones — pay on your own
excludes.zh: 其他交通：除包含商务旅行车或中巴外，费用包含中未提及的其他交通费用，如威尼斯贡多拉，以及车辆限行区的观光火车、电瓶出租车等费用敬请自理

excludes.en: Free-time activities: independent night touring and any recommended optional projects, plus the resulting transport, meals, tickets and shopping costs
excludes.zh: 自由活动：游客夜间自行游览及行程中的推荐项目，以及产生的交通、餐饮、门票、购物等费用

excludes.en: Experience activities: any travel-experience activities not included in the itinerary
excludes.zh: 体验活动：行程中没有包含的各项旅游体验活动

excludes.en: Other costs: any costs not mentioned as included. The company reserves the right to charge price differences for extra costs caused by force majeure (natural disasters, war, strikes), transport delays, flight cancellations/changes, embassy visa delays, insufficient group numbers, etc.
excludes.zh: 其他费用：费用包含中未提及的费用。如因天灾、战争、罢工等不可抗力，及交通延阻、航班取消或更改时间、使馆延误出签证、人数不足等特殊情况或其他非我公司原因所引致的额外费用，我公司有权追加差价

timeline.title_en: Paris - Louvre - Paris (Origins of French art with a national-museum guide)
timeline.title_zh: 巴黎 - 卢浮宫 - 巴黎（与国家馆讲解师探讨法兰西艺术风潮起源）
timeline.description_en: In the morning visit the Louvre Museum, the pride of France, where a French national-museum guide gives an in-depth, theme-based talk that lets you read European history through the lens of art; the Louvre is one of the world's oldest museums, with its glass-pyramid entrance designed by the Chinese-American architect I.M. Pei. In the afternoon tour central Paris: Notre-Dame Cathedral, the Ile de la Cite, the Eiffel Tower (exterior), and the Champ de Mars parade ground. Then take a Seine River sightseeing cruise aboard the famous glass-roofed Bateaux Mouches, a roughly 1-hour, 3.2 km voyage passing Les Invalides (exterior), the Grand and Petit Palais (exterior), Place de la Concorde and other landmarks. Notes: in peak season the Louvre may restrict in-gallery guiding, in which case a 20 EUR per-person guide fee is refunded; Versailles has no official guide for groups under 3 people (an audio guide is used instead). Overnight at Mercure or Novotel Paris or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午参观法兰西引以为傲的卢浮宫博物馆，由法兰西国家馆讲解师精选主题深度讲解，以艺术的角度看懂欧洲历史；卢浮宫是世界上古老的博物馆之一，门前玻璃金字塔入口由华裔建筑大师贝聿铭设计。下午游览巴黎市中心：巴黎圣母院、西岱岛、埃菲尔铁塔（外观）以及战神广场。随后乘坐著名透明船舱的“苍蝇船”塞纳河游船，约1小时、3.2公里航程，途经荣军院（外观）、大小皇宫（外观）、协和广场等地。提示：旺季卢浮宫可能限制馆内讲解，届时退还馆内讲解费20欧元/人；凡尔赛不足3人无官导讲解，由讲解器代替。夜宿巴黎美居或诺富特酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Paris - Palace of Versailles - Paris (Baroque masterpieces of Versailles with a national-museum guide)
timeline.title_zh: 巴黎 - 凡尔赛宫 - 巴黎（国家馆讲解员深度讲解凡尔赛宫殿巴洛克艺术瑰宝）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast head to the Palace of Versailles in the southwestern suburbs of Paris and tour the palace, the pinnacle of Baroque art and the starting point of the Rococo style, built from the era of the Sun King and serving as both the French royal court and the nation's administrative center. In the afternoon return to central Paris and visit the fashion district around Boulevard Haussmann and Rue Royale, with free time at the Paris Opera (exterior), Printemps and Galeries Lafayette department stores. Note: the Opera ticket (15 EUR) is not included because public opening cannot be predicted; if it is open you may buy a ticket on site. Overnight at Mercure or Novotel Paris or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往位于巴黎西南部郊区的凡尔赛宫，游览凡尔赛宫——从太阳王时代开始修建，是巴洛克的登峰之作、也是洛可可艺术的起点，既是法兰西宫廷也是国家行政中心。下午返回巴黎市区，前往时尚中心奥斯曼大街和皇家大道，自由参观巴黎歌剧院（外观）及春天百货、巴黎老佛爷等时尚地区。提示：巴黎歌剧院如有重要演出或接待活动无法入内，无法预测公众开放时间，因此不含门票15欧元，如开放可现场自行购票。夜宿巴黎美居或诺富特酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Paris - Dijon (Burgundy gourmet capital; Relais & Chateaux luxury castle hotel)
timeline.title_zh: 巴黎 - 第戎（法兰西美景、美食之都，罗莱夏朵奢华古堡酒店）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast drive to Dijon, capital of the Burgundy region and home of red wine, snails, rose mustard and Charolais beef, and visit Dijon Old Town and the Church of Our Lady of Dijon (exterior, built in the 13th century with its 14th-century chiming clock). After lunch continue to the Burgundy vineyards to visit a winery's courtyard, production workshop, vineyards and cellar, where a professional sommelier hosts the tasting and gives an in-depth explanation; depending on the harvest you may see the wine-making process. Then transfer to Port-Lesney to check in to the Relais & Chateaux castle hotel, an 18th-century chateau set in Joux Park with a 2-Michelin-star restaurant by chef Steven Naessens and a Caudalie spa. Overnight at the Relais & Chateaux castle hotel or an equivalent 5-star hotel; rooms are base category, randomly assigned with no specified size, view or orientation.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往勃艮第大区首府第戎——红酒、蜗牛、玫瑰芥末及白牛的原产地，参观第戎老城、第戎圣母院（外观，建于13世纪，配有14世纪报时钟）。午餐后前往勃艮第葡萄产区，参观酒庄的庭院、生产工坊、葡萄园及酒窖，由酒庄专业侍酒师负责侍酒服务和深度讲解，运气好时可参观葡萄酒的酿造过程（取决于葡萄产期）。随后前往波尔莱斯内入住罗莱夏朵城堡酒店——一座18世纪古堡，坐落于茹安公园中，设有米其林传奇主厨Steven Naessens的米其林2星餐厅及欧缇丽水疗中心。夜宿罗莱夏朵城堡酒店或同等5星级酒店；房型为基础房型，不指定大小、风景和朝向，均为随机分配。

timeline.title_en: Port-Lesney - Lausanne - Vevey - Montreux - Interlaken (UNESCO heritage; the Lake Geneva scenic route)
timeline.title_zh: 波尔莱斯内 - 洛桑 - 沃韦 - 蒙特勒 - 因特拉肯（人类自然遗产，日内瓦环湖风景线）
timeline.description_en: In the morning head to flower-filled Lausanne, the Olympic capital, with free time at the Olympic Park (home of the IOC and the Olympic Museum) and a stop at Ouchy waterfront lined with cafes and restaurants. Then enjoy the scenic drive around Lake Geneva (Lac Leman), passing the rolling Lavaux vineyard terraces, a UNESCO World Heritage site with over 800 years of history stretching about 40 km between Lausanne and Vevey. In the afternoon admire the Chateau de Chillon at Montreux, its silhouette reflected in the lake (immortalized by Byron's "The Prisoner of Chillon"), then pass Lake Thun on the way to the hotel. Overnight at the Grand Hotel Giessbach (the "Bach Music Academy") or an equivalent 4-star hotel, a historic 1874 Belle Epoque hotel above Lake Brienz with the Giessbach Waterfall running through its grounds; rooms are base category, randomly assigned with no specified view or orientation. Optional add-on: Interlaken paragliding from the Beatenberg base (220 EUR; a high-risk activity, ages 10-65, weight 10-95 kg, not covered by ordinary travel insurance).
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往四季布满鲜花的洛桑（奥林匹克之都），自由游览奥林匹克公园（国际奥委会与奥林匹克博物馆所在地），并停留乌希码头，沿岸布满咖啡厅、餐厅和酒店。随后开启环日内瓦湖（莱蒙湖）景观之路，途经绵延约40公里、有800多年历史的拉沃葡萄梯田——这是珍贵的世界文化遗产。下午欣赏蒙特勒的西庸城堡孤独地倒影在湖水之中（拜伦《西庸的囚徒》使其名扬天下），之后途经图恩湖前往酒店入住。夜宿吉斯巴赫酒店（巴赫音乐学院）或同等4星级酒店——这是一座始建于1874年的瑞士历史名宿，位于布里恩茨湖上方山丘，吉斯巴赫瀑布横穿整个酒店，保留了19世纪末美好年代的典雅风格；房型为基础房型，不指定风景和朝向，均为随机分配。推荐自费项目：因特拉肯高空滑翔伞（220欧元；属高风险项目，年龄10-65周岁、体重10-95公斤，普通旅游保险不含此项目）。

timeline.title_en: Interlaken - Jungfrau Region - Interlaken (Giessbach castle hotel beneath the Aletsch glacier falls)
timeline.title_zh: 因特拉肯 - 少女峰地区 - 因特拉肯（阿莱奇冰川瀑布下的吉斯巴赫城堡酒店）
timeline.description_en: Today explore the Jungfrau region with a choice of one of three options. By coach (included): your guide drives you to Wilderswil to see the red Swiss train, the postcard "dream slope" at Grindelwald, and Lauterbrunnen's fairytale waterfall valley below the Jungfrau and Eiger. Optional add-on Jungfrau panorama summit (230 EUR): ride via Grindelwald and Kleine Scheidegg up to Europe's highest railway station and the Sphinx observation deck overlooking the snow-capped Jungfrau and the long Aletsch Glacier. Optional add-on First gondola round trip (70 EUR): take the aerial gondola from Grindelwald to First peak for the First Cliff Walk and thrill activities such as the First Flyer zip-line. The Jungfrau (4,158 m) was listed as a UNESCO Natural World Heritage site in 2001. Also visit Interlaken town with free time at Hoheweg street and the Hohematte green, set between Lake Thun and Lake Brienz. Overnight at the Grand Hotel Giessbach or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 今日游览少女峰地区，以下三个推荐项目仅可三选一、不可同时选两项。选择一：乘坐汽车游览（费用包含）——跟随导游依次游览维尔德斯维尔的网红红色火车站、格林德尔瓦尔德的经典“梦幻山坡”、勞特布龍嫩远观少女峰及艾格冰川。选择二：少女峰全景缆车登顶（230欧元）——经格林德尔瓦尔德、艾格冰川至少女峰登顶 Top of Europe 欧洲最高火车站，并登“斯芬克斯观景台”俯瞰白雪皑皑的少女峰和阿莱奇冰川。选择三：菲斯特-格林德尔瓦尔德空中贡多拉往返票（70欧元）——乘空中贡多拉直达菲斯特峰巅，游览悬崖天梭巅峰栈道 First Cliff Walk，并可体验高空飞索等惊险活动。少女峰海拔4158米，2001年被列为世界自然遗产。随后参观因特拉肯小镇，自由游览何维克街、荷黑马特绿地，小镇位于图恩湖与布里恩茨湖之间。夜宿吉斯巴赫酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Interlaken - Lungern - Lucerne - Zurich (GoldenPass panoramic train through picturesque Switzerland)
timeline.title_zh: 因特拉肯 - 龙疆 - 卢塞恩 - 苏黎世（乘坐金色山口列车，尽览瑞士如画风景）
