timeline.description_en: In the morning go to Lungern to enjoy Lake Lungern and the town's scenery, then board the GoldenPass panoramic train for the roughly 1-hour Lungern-to-Lucerne leg, winding through the Alps past sapphire lakes, snow-capped peaks and red-roofed villages seen through the train's large panoramic windows. In the afternoon tour Lucerne and its lake (Lake Lucerne), seeing the Lion Monument (carved in 1821 to commemorate the 786 Swiss Guards who died defending Louis XVI at the Tuileries in 1792, which Mark Twain called "the most mournful and moving piece of stone in the world"), the Chapel Bridge (Kapellbrucke) and the octagonal Water Tower. Then transfer to Zurich to check in. Overnight at the Crowne Plaza Zurich or an equivalent 4-star hotel, located in Zurich's lively shopping district.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往龙疆，游览龙疆湖及小镇风光。之后乘坐金色山口观光列车前往卢塞恩，约1小时车程，穿山越岭，沿途碧蓝湖泊、白雪皑皑的群山和红瓦彩屋透过全景大玻璃窗尽收眼底。下午游览卢塞恩湖的湖光山色，聆听狮子纪念碑讲述瑞士雇佣兵忠贞坚毅的历史（1821年由丹麦雕塑家雕刻，纪念1792年为保护路易十六家族在杜乐丽宫全部战死的786名瑞士雇佣兵，马克·吐温称其为“世界上最悲壮和最感人的雕像”），以及卡贝尔廊桥和八角形水塔等景点。之后前往苏黎世入住酒店。夜宿苏黎世皇冠假日酒店或同等4星级酒店，坐落于苏黎世热闹的商业街区。

timeline.title_en: Zurich - Milan (Along the Alps to Milan's 500-year Gothic cathedral)
timeline.title_zh: 苏黎世 - 米兰（沿阿尔卑斯山脉，瞻仰500年建成的哥特式精美建筑）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast tour Zurich, Switzerland's financial metropolis: Zurich Old Town, Lake Zurich, Lindenhof Park (the hill where the film "Crash Landing on You" opens) and a stroll along the Limmat River. Then drive to Milan with free time to see its landmark Milan Cathedral / Duomo (exterior) — a Gothic masterpiece begun in 1386 that took 500 years to complete, crowned with 135 spires and more than 6,000 marble statues — and the Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II, one of Europe's most beautiful 19th-century cross-shaped glass-vaulted shopping arcades, home to flagship boutiques such as Prada and Gucci and historic cafes like Caffe Biffi and Savini Milano. Overnight at the UNA Hotel Milan or an equivalent 4-star hotel in the city center, about 10 minutes from the Duomo.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后游览瑞士金融大都会苏黎世：参观苏黎世老城、苏黎世湖、林登霍夫公园（《爱的迫降》正片开场的取景地），漫步利马特河边。之后前往米兰，自由参观米兰标志性建筑米兰大教堂（外观）——始建于1386年、历经500年才建成的哥特式建筑，共有135座大小尖塔和6000多座大理石雕像，以及欧洲最古老、最漂亮的商业拱廊之一埃马努埃莱二世长廊，汇聚Prada、Gucci等意大利奢侈品牌旗舰店及Caffè Biffi、Savini Milano等老字号咖啡馆。夜宿米兰UNA酒店或同等4星级酒店，位于市中心、距米兰大教堂约10分钟车程。

timeline.title_en: Milan - Venice (Romantic Venice upon the gentle waves)
timeline.title_zh: 米兰 - 威尼斯（温柔碧波上浪漫的威尼斯）
timeline.description_en: In the morning set off for Venice, the "Pearl of the Adriatic," a city of 118 islands linked by 177 canals and 401 bridges. Visit St Mark's Basilica (exterior), the Byzantine-style church famous for its five onion domes and golden mosaics; St Mark's Square (Piazza San Marco), the rectangular heart of the city ringed with Renaissance buildings; the Bridge of Sighs (exterior), the early-Baroque enclosed bridge over which condemned prisoners were once led to the dungeons; and the magnificent Doge's Palace (exterior) on the square. These beautiful buildings rising from the water, together with the winding canals, leave Venice's romance lingering long in memory. Overnight at the voco Venice or Four Points by Sheraton Venice or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午出发前往威尼斯——“亚得里亚海明珠”，由118个小岛组成，以177条水道、401座桥梁连成一体。参观圣马可大教堂（外观），这座拜占庭风格的华丽教堂以五座洋葱形圆顶和金色马赛克装饰闻名；圣马可广场，是由公爵府、圣马可大教堂、钟楼等围成的长方形广场，四周皆为文艺复兴时期精美建筑；叹息桥（外观），早期巴洛克式封闭桥梁，是古代押送死囚通往监狱的必经之路；以及华丽的总督宫（外观）。这些建造在水上的美丽建筑与蜿蜒水巷一起，让威尼斯的浪漫风情久久挥之不去。夜宿威尼斯洲际VOCO酒店或威尼斯福朋喜来登酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Venice - Florence (Land of poetry and the soul of the Renaissance)
timeline.title_zh: 威尼斯 - 佛罗伦萨（诗歌之地，文艺复兴之魂享受艺术之旅）
timeline.description_en: In the morning depart for Florence, birthplace of the Renaissance. Visit the world's third-largest church, the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore (queue to enter) — the beautiful white, red and green marble "Cathedral of the Flower" that took 175 years to build from 1296; the Piazza della Signoria (an open-air sculpture museum with the Palazzo Vecchio, a replica of Michelangelo's David and the Neptune Fountain); the Ponte Vecchio (Old Bridge over the Arno, built in 1345, one of Europe's earliest large-span arch bridges); and Piazzale Michelangelo, where you climb up for a panoramic view of the whole city — also a fine spot for sunrise and sunset. Overnight at a Tuscan-villa hotel in Florence or an equivalent 4-star hotel, an 18th-century villa with antique furnishings, an Italian garden, outdoor pool and gym.
timeline.description_zh: 上午出发前往文艺复兴的发源地佛罗伦萨。参观世界第三大教堂——圣母百花大教堂（需排队进入），这座以白、红、绿三色花岗岩贴面的美丽教堂自1296年起花了175年才建成；市政广场（有露天雕塑博物馆之誉，坐落着维琪奥宫、米开朗基罗《大卫》的复制品及海神喷泉）；老桥（维奇奥桥，位于阿诺河上，建于1345年，是欧洲较早的大跨度圆弧拱桥）；以及佛罗伦萨米开朗琪罗广场，在此登高俯瞰全城，也是观赏日出和日落的好位置。夜宿佛罗伦萨托斯卡纳别墅酒店或同等4星级酒店——一栋18世纪托斯卡纳风格别墅，配仿古家具，设意大利花园、室外游泳池和健身房。

timeline.title_en: Florence - Cinque Terre - Pisa - Florence (Cinque Terre scenic train; the Ligurian coast)
timeline.title_zh: 佛罗伦萨 - 五渔村 - 比萨 - 佛罗伦萨（乘坐五渔村景观火车，赏利古里亚湾美景）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast travel to the Cinque Terre to tour the beautiful clifftop fishing villages along the Ligurian coastline — Monterosso al Mare, Vernazza, Corniglia, Manarola and Riomaggiore — five villages listed as a UNESCO World Heritage site in 1997, linked by a famous coastal hiking trail. In the afternoon continue to Pisa to see the Leaning Tower of Pisa (exterior) and the Piazza dei Miracoli (Square of Miracles) in Pisa's historic center, a walled World Heritage area containing the Cathedral, the Leaning Tower (bell tower), the Baptistery and the Camposanto monumental cemetery. Note: if bad weather or a railway strike prevents visiting the Cinque Terre, the itinerary automatically switches to a coach or other form of touring the coastal towns. Overnight at a Tuscan-villa hotel in Florence or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后出发前往五渔村，沿利古里亚海岸线游览悬崖上的美丽渔村——蒙特罗索、韦尔纳扎、科尔尼利亚、马纳罗拉及里奥马焦雷五个村镇，1997年被联合国教科文组织列入世界文化遗产，并以串联五村的海岸徒步线路闻名。下午前往比萨，游览比萨斜塔（外观）和比萨历史文化中心的奇迹广场——一片围墙包围的世界遗产区域，内有比萨主教座堂、比萨斜塔（钟楼）、圣乔瓦尼洗礼堂和墓园。提示：如遇恶劣天气或铁路公司罢工等因素导致无法游览五渔村，行程将自动改为乘坐大巴车或其它形式游览海岸线城市。夜宿佛罗伦萨托斯卡纳别墅酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Florence - San Gimignano - Siena - Pienza - Rome (Medieval city of towers; Val d'Orcia cypress lane)
timeline.title_zh: 佛罗伦萨 - 圣吉米尼亚诺 - 锡耶纳 - 皮恩扎 - 罗马（中世纪万塔古城，奥尔恰谷丝柏树小径）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast tour San Gimignano, the famous medieval Tuscan hill town known as the "Medieval Manhattan" for its surviving towers, with free time at the Torre Grossa (exterior, its tallest tower at 54 m), the Town Hall (exterior) and the Piazza della Cisterna (well square). Then continue to Siena to tour the old city, Siena Cathedral (exterior), the shell-shaped Piazza del Campo, the Town Hall (exterior) and the Torre del Mangia (exterior, Italy's second-tallest tower at 102 m). Next visit Pienza, the "ideal city" rebuilt in 1459 by Pope Pius II, where you can look out over the World Heritage Val d'Orcia, and stop for free photos along the winding cypress lane lined with Italian cypress trees, an icon of the Tuscan countryside. Then drive to Rome to check in. Overnight at a riverside palace hotel in Rome or an equivalent 4-star hotel, next to Villa Borghese park and within walking distance of central Rome's sights.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后游览圣吉米尼亚诺小镇——以保存完好的中世纪塔楼闻名、有“中世纪曼哈顿”之称的托斯卡纳山城，自由游览格罗萨塔楼（外观，最高塔楼，高54米）、市政厅（外观）、水井广场等景点。随后前往锡耶纳，游览锡耶纳古城、锡耶纳大教堂（外观）、形似贝壳的田野广场、市政厅（外观）及曼吉亚塔楼（外观，意大利第二高塔楼，高102米）。随后前往皮恩扎，游览这座1459年由教皇皮乌斯二世主持重建的“理想城市”，可从城墙上俯瞰世界遗产奥尔恰山谷，之后前往丝柏小路自由拍照——两旁种满意大利柏树的乡村道路，是托斯卡纳田园风光的象征之一。之后前往罗马入住酒店。夜宿罗马河畔宫殿酒店或同等4星级酒店，比邻波格赛公园，步行可达古罗马市中心各景点。

timeline.title_en: Rome - Rome (Walking tour of the "Eternal City" and the glory of ancient Rome)
timeline.title_zh: 罗马 - 罗马（徒步深度游览“万城之城”古罗马帝国的辉煌）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast explore Rome, the birthplace of the ancient Roman Empire and the "Eternal City." Visit the Colosseum (exterior), the grand amphitheater built for gladiatorial and beast contests; the Pantheon (exterior), the well-preserved 2,000-year-old temple where Raphael and Italian kings are buried, praised by Michelangelo as "the design of angels"; the Spanish Steps (famous from the film "Roman Holiday," Europe's widest staircase with 138 steps); and the Trevi Fountain (exterior), where tradition says a coin tossed over your shoulder will make a wish come true. Note: Rome's old-town core is within a restricted-traffic zone (ZTL), so today is a walking tour of about 5 km round trip — please wear light, comfortable shoes. The tour concludes in the early afternoon. No overnight hotel (tour ends today).
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后游览世界著名的历史文化名城罗马——古罗马帝国的发祥地，因历史悠久被称为“永恒之城”。参观矗立在古都遗址上的斗兽场（外观，古罗马供观看斗兽或角斗的壮观竞技场）、万神殿（外观，保存完好、距今2000多年，拉斐尔等长眠于此，被米开朗基罗赞为“天使的设计”），游览西班牙广场（电影《罗马假日》取景地，西班牙台阶共138级，是欧洲较宽的台阶）和特莱维喷泉（许愿池，外观）。提示：罗马古城主要景点均在车辆禁行区（ZTL）内，当天为徒步游览，往返约5公里，请穿着轻便舒适。当天午后结束美好行程。无住宿（行程当天结束）。

meeting_en: Paris, France — tour departs from Paris (typically your central Paris hotel); the journey ends one-way in Rome.
meeting_zh: 法国巴黎——行程从巴黎出发（通常于巴黎市区酒店集合），单程结束于罗马。

faqs.question_en: Where and when do we meet and disperse?
faqs.question_zh: 集合及集散地点和方法是怎样的？
faqs.answer_en: Routes A and C: meet at 09:00 on Day 1 at Place d'Italie in Paris; disperse around 14:00 on Day 12 in central Rome or at the hotel (luggage can be stored at the hotel). We do not recommend a flight that lands in Paris on the morning of Day 1; on the last day you can book an evening flight out of Rome. Route B: meet at 09:00 on Day 1 at Place d'Italie in Paris; disperse around 19:30 on Day 12 near Roma Termini central station. These times and places are for reference; the actual departure time follows the final tour notice.
faqs.answer_zh: A、C行程：第1天上午09:00在巴黎意大利广场集合；第12天午后约14:00左右在罗马市区或酒店解散（酒店可寄存行李）。不推荐参团当天早上才降落巴黎的航班，结束当天可预订晚上的航班离开罗马。B行程：第1天上午09:00在巴黎意大利广场集合；第12天午后约19:30左右在罗马中央火车站附近解散。以上为参考时间及地点，实际出发时间以出团通知书为准。

faqs.question_en: Can I do the Interlaken paragliding activity?
faqs.question_zh: 我是否可以体验因特拉肯滑翔伞活动？
faqs.answer_en: It is not included. If you wish to add Interlaken paragliding, please consider it carefully: paragliding is an extreme sport that ordinary travel insurance does not cover. The guide will take you to the paragliding shuttle point (luggage can be left on the vehicle), and after the activity you will land at the town-center square to regroup.
faqs.answer_zh: 不包含。如果希望额外游览因特拉肯滑翔伞，请慎重考虑——滑翔伞属独特极限运动，普通旅游保险并未包含。导游负责将客人送至滑翔伞活动接驳处（行李可寄存在车上），游客参加完滑翔伞项目后随滑翔伞降落到市中心广场集合。

faqs.question_en: Can we visit the Jungfrau panorama summit cable car and the Sphinx observation deck?
faqs.question_zh: 我们是否可以游览少女峰全景缆车登顶及“斯芬克斯观景台”？
faqs.answer_en: It is not included. If you wish to add the Jungfrau, you can tour it on your own from Interlaken Ost (East) station.
faqs.answer_zh: 不包含。如果希望额外增加游览少女峰，可以在因特拉肯东站自行游览少女峰。

faqs.question_en: Can we visit the First cliff walk in the Jungfrau region?
faqs.question_zh: 我们是否可以游览少女峰的菲斯特栈道？
faqs.answer_en: It is not included. If you wish to do the First Cliff Walk and the summit zip-lines and other outdoor activities, you can go with the guide to Grindelwald and then explore Grindelwald BGF - First Top of Adventure on your own; the full visit takes about 3 hours, after which you get off and regroup with the guide at Interlaken Ost (East) station.
faqs.answer_zh: 不包含。如果希望游览少女峰菲斯特悬崖栈道及山顶空中飞索等户外活动，可以跟随导游前往格林德尔瓦尔德，随后自由游览 Grindelwald BGF – First Top of Adventure，全程游览时间约为3小时，随后在因特拉肯东站下车与导游再次汇集。

faqs.question_en: Can the Jungfrau scenic train and the Sphinx deck be combined with the other Jungfrau-region sights?
faqs.question_zh: 少女峰观光列车及“斯芬克斯观景台”是否可以和少女峰地区的景点同时参加？
faqs.answer_en: We organize all guests to visit Wilderswil for the red Swiss train and Lauterbrunnen's fairytale scenery, then the dream slope at Grindelwald below the Jungfrau. If you choose the scenic train it conflicts with the "dream slope" and "red train station," so you cannot see both at the same time.
faqs.answer_zh: 我社组织所有游客游览维尔德斯维尔观赏红色瑞士火车、勞特布龍嫩的瑞士童话风景，随后来到少女峰脚下的格林德尔瓦尔德。如果选择观光列车，则与“梦幻山坡”“红色火车站”有冲突，不可以同时看到。

faqs.question_en: Does the Jungfrau scenic train conflict with paragliding, the Brienz cog railway or the Interlaken boat?
faqs.question_zh: 少女峰观光列车是否和滑翔伞、布里恩茨齿轮火车、因特拉肯游船有冲突？
faqs.answer_en: If you take the Jungfrau scenic train in the morning there is no conflict. However, if you choose to take it from afternoon to evening, you may not be able to experience all of the Giessbach activities.
faqs.answer_zh: 如上午乘坐少女峰观光列车没有冲突；但如果选择下午到晚间乘坐，则有可能无法体验到吉斯巴赫的全部项目。

faqs.question_en: What are the best ways to tour the Jungfrau region?
faqs.question_zh: 少女峰地区最佳游览方案是什么？
faqs.answer_en: Option A (relaxing): a full free day in the Giessbach scenic area, including tickets for the Giessbach Waterfall, the Lake Brienz shore, the Interlaken boat and the Giessbach cog railway (included Apr-Oct each year; unavailable in winter due to equipment maintenance). Option B (easy): follow the guide to Wilderswil's red Swiss train and Lauterbrunnen's fairytale scenery, then Grindelwald below the Jungfrau, and in the afternoon the Giessbach scenic area and Lake Brienz shore (cost included). Option C (intensive): ride the Jungfrau scenic train to the Sphinx observation deck, then visit the Giessbach scenic area. Option D (extreme): do the First cliff walk, summit zip-lines and Interlaken paragliding together (cost not included).
faqs.answer_zh: A养生游：全天自由游览吉斯巴赫风景区，含吉斯巴赫瀑布、布里恩茨湖畔、因特拉肯游船、吉斯巴赫齿轮火车等门票（每年4月到10月份包含，冬季设备维护无法游览）。B懒人包：跟随导游依次游览维尔德斯维尔红色瑞士火车、勞特布龍嫩童话风景，随后来到少女峰脚下的格林德尔瓦尔德，当天下午游览吉斯巴赫风景区及布里恩茨湖畔（费用包含）。C特种兵：乘坐少女峰景观列车游览斯芬克斯观景台，随后游览吉斯巴赫风景区。D极限游：同时游览菲斯特悬崖步道、山顶空中飞索及因特拉肯滑翔伞（费用不包含）。

faqs.question_en: Can you help book the Maison Jeunet Michelin-starred restaurant?
faqs.question_zh: 是否可以协助预订 Maison Jeunet 米其林星级餐厅？
faqs.answer_en: Yes. For Route B (departs Rome, ends Paris), we recommend booking dinner at Maison Jeunet (2 Michelin stars), an 8-course chef's-recommendation dinner at 195 EUR (drinks excluded). For Route A (departs Paris, ends Rome), you can book lunch at Maison Jeunet, a 4-course chef's-recommendation lunch; the 3-course set is 85 EUR (drinks excluded). Because of the Relais & Chateaux brand's special booking method, we send a booking link that the guest must confirm in person and guarantee with a credit card.
faqs.answer_zh: 可以。B路线（罗马出发、巴黎结束）推荐预订 Maison Jeunet（米其林两星级）餐厅晚餐，主厨推荐8道式晚餐195欧元（不含酒水）。A路线（巴黎出发、罗马结束）可选预订 Maison Jeunet 餐厅午餐，主厨推荐4道式午餐，三道式套餐85欧（不含酒水）。由于罗莱夏朵品牌特殊的预订方式，我社发送预订链接，需要游客本人确认预订，并提供信用卡担保。

faqs.question_en: Can I book airport transfers?
faqs.question_zh: 是否可以预订机场接送服务？
faqs.answer_en: Yes. Please select the airport-transfer service for the city you need in the fee options, and note your arriving flight number in the order.
faqs.answer_zh: 可以预订，请在费用选项内选择所需的城市机场接送服务，并在订单内备注到达的航班号。

faqs.question_en: Can I book hotels before the tour starts or after it ends?
faqs.question_zh: 是否可以预订开始前的酒店和行程后的酒店？
faqs.answer_en: The itinerary does not require early arrival; it is designed to connect seamlessly with the return flights to/from Paris and Rome. If your flight is delayed, the transfer driver can help you join the group directly in your departure city.
faqs.answer_zh: 行程不要求提前到达，行程无缝衔接巴黎及罗马的往返航班时间；如遇晚点，接送机的司机可协助游客在出发地所在的城市直接参团。

faqs.question_en: Do I need a visa?
faqs.question_zh: 是否需要签证？
faqs.answer_en: Yes. This product does not include visa fees and requires a Schengen visa (single or multiple entry); if you need visa processing, please choose a Schengen-visa product. After booking we provide all the materials needed to apply for the Schengen visa free of charge, and if you commission us to handle the visa we will buy a Schengen-compliant travel insurance for you. Your passport must be valid for at least 6 months from your departure date, or customs may refuse entry. Visa fees, visa service fees, Schengen insurance and visa-center appointment fees are all non-refundable and non-transferable, even if the product is changed or cancelled. "Worry-free visa guarantee": for travelers who sign with us 61 days before departure, if the visa is not obtained within 45 days before departure, we bear all losses and immediately refund the full tour cost; travelers not meeting this clause who fail to obtain a visa are refunded per the change/cancellation terms. In case of refusal, notify us within 48 hours with the consulate's refusal letter.
faqs.answer_zh: 需要。本产品不包含签证费用，需要申根签证（单次或多次入境）；如需办理请选择申根签证产品。预订后我社免费提供办理申根签证的全部材料；如委托我社办理签证，我社会为您购买符合申根要求的申根旅游保险。护照有效期需在离境之日起至少还有六个月，否则海关有权拒绝入境。签证费、签证服务费、申根保险费、签证中心预约费均不可退款，也无法更改使用者，即使产品退改签也无法退款。保签无忧：游客在出发日前61天与我社签约的旅游产品，如在出发前45天内未获取签证，我社承担所有损失并立即退还全部旅游费用；不符合该条款的游客如未正常获取签证，将按“退改与取消条款”退费。如遇拒签需在48小时内通知我社并出具使领馆拒签函。

faqs.question_en: Booking, changes & cancellation
faqs.question_zh: 预订、变更与取消须知
faqs.answer_en: Free cancellation: both the agency and the traveler may cancel for any reason up to 30 days before departure (excluding the 30th day). Because flights, traffic, ferries and strikes often cause reordering, travelers must arrive at the meeting point one day before the tour starts and leave the dispersal point one day after it ends, allowing reasonable flight connection time (at least 5 hours for same-airport transfers, 7 hours for different airports in the same city; reasonable meet/disperse window 07:00-21:00). This is a shared group tour with a minimum group size of 10 people; if 10 is not reached by 30 days before departure either party may cancel, and if not reached by 14 days before, you may switch products or get a refund. Rooms are base category, randomly assigned with no specified size/view/orientation; two people booking together get a standard double (bed type assigned by the hotel, cannot be specified); solo travelers pay a single-room supplement deposit or may request "single occupancy, no sharing." Itinerary contingencies: the order of sights may be adjusted without changing the route; the Louvre is name-registered (enter your correct name) and may refund the 20 EUR in-gallery guide fee in peak season; Versailles under 3 people uses an audio guide; the Giessbach cog railway and Interlaken boat run 3 Apr-11 Oct 2026, otherwise replaced by a Lake Lucerne cruise; the GoldenPass Lucerne-Lungern leg has no guide on board; the Cinque Terre may only cover a few villages and switches to coach in bad weather/strikes; Rome's old town is a walking tour. Pricing is quoted in EUR; if you pay in CNY, the amount is calculated at the Bank of China "EUR selling price" rate on the day of payment, and refunds use the same-day rate (bank fees borne by the traveler).
faqs.answer_zh: 免费取消：出发前30天（不含第30天）旅行社和旅行者均可无理由申请取消。因航班、交通、渡轮、罢工等常导致顺序调整，旅游者须在旅游团开始前一天到达集合地、结束后一天离开集散地，并预留合理航班衔接时间（同机场转机至少5小时、同城不同机场至少7小时；合理集散时间段为07:00至21:00）。本产品为散客拼团，成团人数为10人；出发前30天未达成团人数双方均可解除合同，发团前14天仍未达到最低成团人数可改选其他产品或退还费用。所有酒店均为基础房型，不指定大小/风景/朝向，随机分配；两人同时报名默认入住标准双人间（床型由酒店安排不可指定）；单人报名默认含单人房差押金，或可备注“要求单人入住、请勿安排拼房”。行程应变：景点先后次序可能调整但内容一致；卢浮宫为实名制（请填写正确名字），旺季可能退还馆内讲解费20欧元/人；凡尔赛不足3人由讲解器代替；吉斯巴赫齿轮火车和因特拉肯游轮体验时间为2026年4月3日-10月11日，期间外替换为卢塞恩湖游船；金色山口列车卢塞恩-龙疆段车上无导游；五渔村可能只游览个别村子，遇恶劣天气或罢工改乘大巴；罗马古城为徒步游览。所有定价以欧元为计价单位，如选择人民币支付，以当天支付时中国银行“欧元卖出价”实时计算的人民币价格为准，退款同样适用申请当日即时汇率（银行手续费由旅行者承担）。

faqs.question_en: Health & safety requirements
faqs.question_zh: 健康与安全须知
faqs.answer_en: To prevent accidents, please have a physical check before traveling and do NOT join if you have: infectious diseases (e.g. active tuberculosis, typhoid); cardiovascular disease (severe hypertension, heart insufficiency, myocardial ischemia/infarction); cerebrovascular disease (stroke, cerebral hemorrhage, brain tumor); respiratory disease (emphysema, cor pulmonale); mental illness (including epilepsy); severe anemia (hemoglobin below 50 g/L); or are recovering from major surgery. Pregnancy: 35 weeks or more cannot join under any circumstances; 28 weeks or more requires a doctor's report within 7 days and a physician's consent; under 28 weeks should book with caution, must sign a waiver, and cannot do adventure/skiing/sea/aerial/outdoor activities. Disabled travelers need a 7-day medical report and physician's consent, a direct family member as companion, and must apply at least 61 days ahead. Travelers over 70 need a health certificate and a family companion, and high-risk activities need a physician's consent. Minors (under 18) must be accompanied by a direct relative or guardian; minors traveling without parents need parental authorization; infants under 2 are not accepted. Per Article 15 of the Tourism Law, travelers must truthfully declare health information relevant to the trip (pregnancy, lactation, chronic illness, infectious-disease history, etc.); concealment that causes harm makes the traveler liable and may allow the agency to terminate the contract without refund.
faqs.answer_zh: 为确保安全出行，请出行前做必要的身体检查，如存在下列情况请勿报名：传染性疾病患者（如活动期肺结核、伤寒）；心血管疾病患者（如严重高血压、心功能不全、心肌缺氧、心肌梗塞）；脑血管疾病患者（如脑栓塞、脑出血、脑肿瘤）；呼吸系统疾病患者（如肺气肿、肺心病）；精神病患者（如癫痫及各种精神病）；严重贫血患者（血红蛋白50克/升以下）；大中型手术恢复期患者。孕妇：妊娠35周及以上任何情况都无法参团；28周及以上需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书；28周以下请慎重报名，需签署免责声明书，且探险、滑雪、出海、高空、户外等项目无法参加。残疾人需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书、需直系家属陪同、并提前至少61天申请。70周岁以上老年人需提供健康证明及体检报告、需直系家属陪同，涉及高风险项目需主治医师同意书。未成年人（未满18周岁）须由直系亲属或监护人陪同，无父母陪同需父母授权书；不接受2周岁以下婴儿参团。根据《旅游法》第15条，旅游者需如实告知与旅游活动相关的个人健康信息（妊娠期、哺乳期、慢性病、传染病史等），若因隐瞒导致人身损害或财产损失需自行承担责任，旅行社可解除合同且不退还费用。

title_en: France-Italy-Switzerland 11-Day Small-Group Tour (Rome to Paris)
title_zh: 法意瑞11天小团游（罗马出发，巴黎结束）
short_en: An 11-day one-way journey from Rome to Paris through Italy's Renaissance cities, the Swiss Alps and Jungfrau, French wine country and Paris - scenic rail and attractions all included.
short_zh: 11天单程深度游，从罗马一路畅游至巴黎，遍览意大利文艺复兴名城、瑞士阿尔卑斯少女峰、法国勃艮第酒乡与巴黎，观光列车与景点门票一价全含。
desc_en: This 11-day small-group tour traces a single deep route from Rome to Paris across three countries, never doubling back. In Italy you explore Eternal-City Rome, Renaissance Florence, the cliff-side Cinque Terre, romantic Venice and fashionable Milan; in Switzerland you ride the GoldenPass scenic train through Lucerne and Interlaken and ascend the Jungfrau to the Sphinx observatory; in France you visit fairytale Colmar, a Burgundy chateau and vineyard, Versailles, the Seine and the Louvre. Highlights include two nights at a five-star Tuscan spa hotel, a Burgundy castle stay, the GoldenPass railway, the Jungfrau cable-car pass and a wine-estate tasting - all bundled into one all-inclusive price.
desc_zh: 11天精品小团沿罗马至巴黎的单程深度路线，横跨意大利、瑞士、法国三国，全程不走回头路。意大利段游览永恒之城罗马、文艺复兴发源地佛罗伦萨、悬崖上的五渔村、浪漫水城威尼斯与时尚之都米兰；瑞士段乘坐金色山口观光列车穿越卢塞恩与因特拉肯，登顶少女峰斯芬克斯观景台；法国段探访童话小镇科尔马、勃艮第古堡与酒庄、凡尔赛宫、塞纳河与卢浮宫。行程亮点包括托斯卡纳五星SPA酒店连住两晚、勃艮第中世纪古堡酒店、金色山口列车、少女峰缆车套票及酒庄品酒，全部一价全含。

highlights.en: Eternal City Rome: Colosseum, Pantheon, Spanish Steps and the Trevi Fountain
highlights.zh: 永恒之城罗马：斗兽场、万神殿、西班牙广场与特莱维喷泉

highlights.en: Renaissance Florence and the cliff-side villages of Cinque Terre
highlights.zh: 文艺复兴名城佛罗伦萨与悬崖上的五渔村

highlights.en: Romantic Venice and Gothic Milan Cathedral, plus a Tuscan five-star spa stay
highlights.zh: 浪漫水城威尼斯、哥特式米兰大教堂，连住托斯卡纳五星SPA酒店

highlights.en: GoldenPass scenic train through Lucerne and Interlaken, summiting the Jungfrau to the Sphinx observatory
highlights.zh: 金色山口观光列车穿越卢塞恩与因特拉肯，登顶少女峰斯芬克斯观景台

highlights.en: Fairytale Colmar, a Burgundy castle hotel and a vineyard wine tasting
highlights.zh: 童话小镇科尔马、勃艮第中世纪古堡酒店与酒庄品酒

highlights.en: Versailles, a Seine river cruise and the Louvre - included with official guided entry
highlights.zh: 凡尔赛宫、塞纳河游船与卢浮宫，含官方导览门票

highlights.en: Intercity scenic rail included; central 4-star (and 5-star Tuscan) hotels
highlights.zh: 含城际观光列车；市中心四星酒店（含托斯卡纳五星）

highlights.en: All attractions included, no forced shopping, one-way deep route, all-inclusive pricing
highlights.zh: 景点门票全含、不进购物店、单程深度路线、一价全含

includes.en: Hotels: 2 nights in 5-star hotels and 8 nights in comfort-class 4-star hotels.
includes.zh: 【酒店】：2晚五星级酒店，8晚舒适型四星级酒店。

includes.en: Meals: 10 breakfasts in total — buffet breakfast at the hotels or breakfast in another form.
includes.zh: 【餐饮】：酒店内自助早餐或其他形式早餐共计10餐。

includes.en: Operating fees: visitor city tax, city-entry fees, residence tax, road and bridge tolls, parking and fuel charges, driver/guide meal allowances and other in-itinerary operating costs.
includes.zh: 【执行】：游客城市税、进城费、居住税、过路过桥费、停车燃油费、司导餐补等行程内执行费用。

includes.en: Transport: a tour coach or a business travel vehicle.
includes.zh: 【交通】：旅游巴士或者商务旅行车。

includes.en: Guide: a professional driver plus a Chinese-speaking guide, or a Chinese-speaking driver-guide throughout (note: under 8 people — a business vehicle with a Chinese-speaking driver-guide; 8 people or more — a tour coach with a professional driver plus a Chinese-speaking guide).
includes.zh: 【导游】：职业司机+中文导游，或者全程中文司机兼导游（注：8人以下为商务车+中文司机兼导游，8人以上为旅游巴士+专业司机+中文导游）。

includes.en: Luggage: one 23 kg checked bag and one carry-on bag.
includes.zh: 【行李】：1件23公斤行李及1件随身行李。

includes.en: Admissions: Louvre first-entry ticket with official guide, Versailles first-entry ticket with official guide, Seine river-cruise ticket, Burgundy winery visit and wine-tasting fees, GoldenPass train (Lucerne–Lungern section), Cinque Terre small train, Venice canal island ferry, and the Jungfrau cable-car package.
includes.zh: 【门票】：卢浮宫首道门票及官导讲解、凡尔赛宫首道门票及官导讲解、塞纳河遊船船票、勃艮第酒庄参观门票及品酒费用、金色山口列车（卢塞恩-龙疆段）、五渔村小火车、威尼斯运河上岛渡轮、少女峰缆车套票。

excludes.en: Passport: personal passport costs.
excludes.zh: 护照：个人护照费用。

excludes.en: Visa: the tourist-visa fees required for the destination countries listed in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 签证：行程中所列旅游国家所需的观光签证费用。

excludes.en: Insurance: travel insurance (if the trip involves high-risk activities, verify that your travel insurance covers them).
excludes.zh: 保险：旅游保险费用（如行程内涉及到高风险运动，请核实旅游保险是否包含该项运动）。

excludes.en: Gratuities: guide and driver tips totaling 10 EUR per person per day, same rate for adults and children.
excludes.zh: 小费：游客支付导游和司机小费一共10欧/人/天，大小同价。

excludes.en: Meals: apart from the special meals included in the itinerary, lunches and dinners are not included.
excludes.zh: 餐饮：除行程内包含的特色餐外，行程中不包含午、晚正餐费用。

excludes.en: Admissions: sights for which the fee is not stated as included — including but not limited to sights marked "(exterior)", and all "recommended", "optional", "experience" and other unmentioned items; if you wish to enter, please pay on your own.
excludes.zh: 门票：行程中未注明费用包含的景点（包括但不仅限于行程中注明“外观”的景点，以及“推荐”“可选”“体验”等所有未提及费用包含的项目，如游客需要参观，敬请自理）。

excludes.en: Extended stays: any extra accommodation, transport or sightseeing outside the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 延长住宿：行程外额外延长的住宿、交通、观光费用。

excludes.en: Personal spending: drinks and alcohol, taxis, phone charges and other personal expenses.
excludes.zh: 私人消费：如饮料酒类、出租车、电话费等个人消费。

excludes.en: Other transport: transport not mentioned in the inclusions beyond the business vehicle or minibus — e.g. Venice gondolas, and the sightseeing trains and electric taxis used inside vehicle-restricted zones — please pay on your own.
excludes.zh: 其他交通：除包含商务旅行车或者中巴之外，费用包含中未提及的其他交通费用，如威尼斯贡多拉，以及车辆限行区的观光火车、电瓶出租车等费用敬请自理。

excludes.en: Free-time activities: self-guided evening visits and recommended programs in the itinerary, plus any resulting transport, meals, admissions and shopping.
excludes.zh: 自由活动：游客夜间自行游览及行程中的推荐项目，以及产生的交通、餐饮、门票、购物等费用。

excludes.en: Experience activities: any travel-experience activities not included in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 体验活动：行程中没有包含的各项旅游体验活动。

excludes.en: Other costs: any costs not mentioned in the inclusions. For force majeure such as natural disaster, war or strike, or special circumstances such as transport delays, flight cancellation or time changes, embassy delays in issuing visas, or insufficient numbers, and other extra costs not caused by our company (e.g. overseas visa-extension fees, accommodation/food/transport, national airfare adjustments), our company reserves the right to charge the additional difference.
excludes.zh: 其他费用：费用包含中未提及的费用。如因天灾、战争、罢工等不可抗力原因，及因交通延阻、航班取消或更改时间、使馆延误出签证、人数不足等特殊情况或其他非我公司原因所致的额外费用（如在外延期签证费、住食及交通费、国家航空运价调整等），我公司有权追加差价。

timeline.title_en: Rome — Reliving the Glory of the Ancient Roman Empire
timeline.title_zh: 罗马——重温“万城之城”古罗马帝国的辉煌
timeline.description_en: After the group gathers, explore Rome, the cradle of the ancient Roman Empire and the famed "Eternal City". See the Colosseum (exterior) and the Pantheon (exterior) standing among the ruins of the ancient capital, then visit the Spanish Steps and the Trevi Fountain (exterior). Note that Rome's old-town sights all lie within the vehicle-restricted zone (ZTL), so the day is on foot — about 5 km of walking round trip — please wear comfortable, light shoes. After 14:00 you may check in to the hotel with your order, or store luggage at the front desk in advance. Overnight at the Rome San Martino Hotel or Hotel Moderno, or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 集合后游览古罗马帝国的发祥地、因历史悠久而被称为“永恒之城”的罗马。参观矗立在古罗马都城遗址上的斗兽场（外观）、万神殿（外观），并游览西班牙广场和特莱维喷泉（许愿池，外观）。罗马古城区的主要景点均位于车辆禁行区（ZTL）内，因此当天为步行游览，往返约5公里，请穿着轻便舒适的鞋子。当天14点后可凭订单自行入住酒店，或提前将行李寄存在酒店前台。夜宿罗马圣马丁酒店或现代酒店，或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Rome – Florence – Pisa — A Feast of Renaissance Art
timeline.title_zh: 罗马-佛罗伦萨-比萨——文艺复兴宝库的艺术盛宴
timeline.description_en: Set out in the morning for Florence, the birthplace of the Renaissance. Visit the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore (the world's third-largest cathedral), the Piazza della Signoria, the Ponte Vecchio (old bridge) over the Arno, and the Piazza Santa Croce with the Basilica of Santa Croce (exterior). Wander the squares, churches and museums where the spirit of the Renaissance still lingers. Afterward transfer to the Tuscany region for the night. Overnight at the Tuscany Montecatini Spa Hotel, or an equivalent 5-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午出发前往文艺复兴的发源地佛罗伦萨。参观世界第三大教堂——圣母百花大教堂、市政广场，游览横跨阿诺河的维奇奥桥（老桥），以及圣十字广场与圣十字教堂（外观）。在大街小巷、广场教堂与博物馆之间感受文艺复兴的气息。之后入住托斯卡纳地区酒店。夜宿托斯卡纳蒙特卡蒂尼SPA酒店，或同等5星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Pisa – Cinque Terre – Tuscany — The Sublime Cliffside Fishing Villages, 5-Star Stay
timeline.title_zh: 比萨-五渔村-托斯卡纳——鉴赏五渔村绝世美景，入住五星酒店
timeline.description_en: In the morning head to the Cinque Terre along the Ligurian coast and explore the five beautiful clifftop fishing villages — Monterosso al Mare, Vernazza, Corniglia, Manarola and Riomaggiore — a UNESCO World Heritage site linked by the famous coastal hiking trail. In the afternoon continue to Pisa to see the Leaning Tower (exterior) and the Piazza dei Miracoli (Square of Miracles) at the heart of Pisa's historic center, with its cathedral, baptistery and walled grounds. Note: if bad weather or a railway strike makes the Cinque Terre inaccessible, the itinerary automatically switches to a coach or other means to tour the coastal towns. Overnight at the Tuscany Montecatini Spa Hotel, or an equivalent 5-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午沿利古里亚海岸线前往五渔村，游览悬崖上的五座美丽渔村——蒙特罗索、韦尔纳扎、科尔尼利亚、马纳罗拉与里奥马焦雷，1997年被联合国教科文组织列入世界文化遗产，由著名的沿海徒步线路串联。下午前往比萨，游览比萨斜塔（外观）和比萨历史文化中心的奇迹广场（含主教座堂、洗礼堂等，四周保留古城墙城门）。备注：如遇恶劣天气或铁路公司罢工等因素导致无法游览五渔村，行程将自动改为乘坐大巴或其他形式游览海岸线城市。夜宿托斯卡纳蒙特卡蒂尼SPA酒店，或同等5星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Tuscany – Venice — Romantic Venice on Gentle Waters
timeline.title_zh: 托斯卡纳-威尼斯——温柔碧波上浪漫的威尼斯
timeline.description_en: Travel in the morning to Venice, the "Pearl of the Adriatic", a city of 118 islands linked by canals and bridges. Explore freely St. Mark's Square (the "finest drawing room in Europe"), St. Mark's Basilica (exterior), the Bridge of Sighs (exterior) and the magnificent Doge's Palace (exterior) — water-borne buildings and winding canals that make Venice's romance unforgettable. Overnight at the Venice InterContinental VOCO Hotel or Hilton Ambassador Hotel, or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往由118个小岛组成、以水道和桥梁连成一体的“亚得里亚海明珠”威尼斯。自由游览威尼斯的中心广场圣马可广场（曾被拿破仑称作“欧洲最美丽的客厅”）、圣马可大教堂（外观）、叹息桥（外观）以及华丽的总督宫（外观）。这些建在水上的美丽建筑与蜿蜒水巷一起，让威尼斯的浪漫久久萦绕。夜宿威尼斯洲际VOCO酒店或希尔顿大使酒店，或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Venice – Milan — Gazing at a Gothic Masterpiece 500 Years in the Making
timeline.title_zh: 威尼斯-米兰——瞻仰历经500年建成的哥特式精美建筑
timeline.description_en: Depart in the morning for Milan, Italy's fashion capital. Visit the Sforza Castle (exterior), the medieval-to-Renaissance fortress and seat of the Sforza family, then Milan's landmark Duomo (exterior) — a Gothic cathedral begun in 1387 that took 500 years to complete, crowned with 135 spires and thousands of marble statues — and the Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II, one of Europe's most beautiful shopping arcades. Overnight at the Milan Central UNA Hotel, or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午出发前往意大利时尚之都米兰，参观米兰中世纪到文艺复兴时期的堡垒——斯福尔扎古堡（外观），它曾是斯福尔扎家族的住所，现辟为博物馆。之后前往米兰的标志性建筑米兰主教堂（外观）——始建于1387年、历经500年建成的哥特式建筑，拥有135座尖塔与数千座大理石雕像，以及欧洲最漂亮的商业拱廊之一埃马努埃莱二世拱廊。夜宿米兰中心UNA酒店，或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Milan – Lucerne – Lungern – Interlaken — The GoldenPass Train Through Picture-Perfect Switzerland
timeline.title_zh: 米兰-卢塞恩-龙疆-因特拉肯——乘坐金色山口列车，尽览瑞士如画风景
timeline.description_en: In the morning go to Lucerne to enjoy the lake-and-mountain scenery of Lake Lucerne, hear the story of Swiss loyalty told by the Lion Monument, and see the Chapel Bridge and octagonal Water Tower. Then board the GoldenPass panoramic train (Luzern–Lungern Express) for the roughly one-hour ride over hills and valleys to Lungern, taking in the lake and small-town views. Continue to Interlaken, strolling freely along Höheweg and the Höhematte green, the tranquil villages nestled among greenery between Lake Thun and Lake Brienz. Overnight at the Sigriswil Snow-Mountain & Lake-View Hotel, or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往卢塞恩，游览卢塞恩湖的湖光山色，聆听狮子纪念碑讲述瑞士人忠贞坚毅的历史，并参观卡贝尔廊桥与八角形水塔。之后乘坐金色山口观光列车（卢塞恩—龙疆段，Luzern–Lungern Express），约1小时车程穿山越岭，欣赏沿途美景，游览龙疆湖及小镇风光。随后前往因特拉肯，自由游览何维克街、荷黑马特绿地广场——位于图恩湖与布里恩茨湖之间、绿树掩映的宁静村庄。夜宿锡格里斯维尔雪山湖景酒店，或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Interlaken – Jungfrau – Zurich — Cable Car to the Sphinx Observatory atop the Jungfrau
timeline.title_zh: 因特拉肯-少女峰-苏黎世——少女峰全景缆车登顶斯芬克斯观景台
timeline.description_en: In the morning visit the village of Grindelwald and its dreamlike slopes, then ascend the famous Jungfrau (4,158 m), an Alpine scenic area listed as a UNESCO World Natural Heritage site in 2001. Take the cable car to the top and stand on the "Sphinx Observatory" at 3,571 m to overlook the snow-capped Jungfrau and Europe's great Aletsch Glacier. Afterward transfer by coach to Zurich and check in. Overnight at the Zurich Crowne Plaza Hotel or Fassbind Hotel, or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往参观格林德尔瓦尔德小镇与梦幻山坡，之后登顶阿尔卑斯山著名风景区——少女峰（海拔4158米，2001年被列为世界自然遗产）。乘坐缆车登顶迷人的少女峰，前往海拔3571米的“斯芬克斯观景台”，俯瞰白雪皑皑的少女峰和欧洲最壮丽的“阿莱奇冰川”（Aletsch）。随后乘车前往苏黎世，入住酒店。夜宿苏黎世皇冠假日酒店或法斯宾德酒店，或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Zurich – Colmar – Dijon — A Fairytale Town and an International Finance Hub, Staying at a Burgundy Château
timeline.title_zh: 苏黎世-科尔马-第戎——浪漫的童话小镇与国际金融大都会，入住勃艮第古堡酒店
timeline.description_en: In the morning tour Zurich's old town, the Grossmünster / Zurich Cathedral (exterior), Lake Zurich and the Bahnhofstrasse, one of Europe's longest and most expensive shopping avenues. Then continue to Colmar, one of France's most romantic, fairytale towns — the inspiration for Miyazaki's Howl's Moving Castle and a filming location for the variety show Chinese Restaurant 2. Stroll the beautiful old quarter and see the Maison des Têtes (House of Heads) and the elegant Pfister House. Overnight at a Burgundy Château Hotel, or the Dijon city-center Oceania Hotel, or an equivalent city-center 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午游览苏黎世老城、苏黎世大教堂（外观）、苏黎世湖和班霍夫大街（欧洲较长、世界上昂贵的购物大道之一）。之后前往法国浪漫、童话般的小镇之一科尔马，这里也是宫崎骏电影《哈尔的移动城堡》的原型及《中餐厅2》的实景拍摄地。游览美丽的科尔马老城区，参观人头屋（Maison des Têtes，建于1609年、正面雕有105颗人面头像）及科尔马漂亮的建筑普菲斯泰屋等景点。夜宿勃艮第古堡酒店，或第戎市区大洋洲酒店，或市区同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Dijon – Paris — A Life Full of Red Wine and Roses
timeline.title_zh: 第戎-巴黎——充满红酒和玫瑰的人生
timeline.description_en: In the morning head into Burgundy's vineyard country to visit a Burgundy winery's courtyard, production workshop, vineyards and cellar, with three to five tastings of red and white wine guided by a sommelier. Then continue to Dijon, capital of the wine region and home of snails, rose mustard and Charolais beef, to see the old town and the Gothic Notre-Dame de Dijon (begun in the 13th century, with its rows of gargoyles and a 14th-century clock). In the afternoon transfer to Paris and check in. Overnight at the Paris Mercure Hotel or Novotel Hotel, or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往勃艮第大区葡萄产区，参观勃艮第酒庄的庭院、生产工坊、葡萄园及酒窖，由专业侍酒师讲解并提供三到五杯红酒及白酒淺尝。随后前往法国产酒名区勃艮第首府、蜗牛与玫瑰芥末及白牛原产地第戎，参观第戎老城与第戎圣母院（13世纪哥特式建筑，门面有兽形假排水口及14世纪报时钟）。下午前往巴黎，入住酒店。夜宿巴黎美居酒店或诺富特酒店，或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Paris – Versailles – Paris — The Classical Splendor of the French Royal Court at Versailles
timeline.title_zh: 巴黎-凡尔赛-巴黎——凡尔赛宫探访法国路易王朝的古典奢华
timeline.description_en: In the morning go to the Palace of Versailles in the southwestern suburbs of Paris and tour the palace. In the afternoon visit Notre-Dame de Paris and the Île de la Cité, then the Champ-de-Mars beside the Seine and the Eiffel Tower (exterior). Take a Seine river cruise (the famous glass-cabin "bateau") past Les Invalides (exterior), the Grand and Petit Palais (exterior), the Musée d'Orsay (exterior) and other landmarks — about a 3.2 km, one-hour voyage through the heart of Paris. Overnight at the Paris Mercure Hotel or Novotel Hotel, or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往位于巴黎西南郊区的凡尔赛宫，游览凡尔赛宫。下午参观巴黎圣母院、西岱岛，之后游览塞纳河畔的战神广场及埃菲尔铁塔（外观）。乘坐塞纳河遊船（著名的透明船舱“苍蝇船”）游览荣军院（外观）、大小皇宫（外观）、奥赛博物馆（外观）等地，约3.2公里、1小时航程，全天游览巴黎市中心景点。夜宿巴黎美居酒店或诺富特酒店，或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Paris – Louvre – Paris — The Treasure-Palace Louvre and Romantic Parisian Images
timeline.title_zh: 巴黎-卢浮宫-巴黎——万宝之宫卢浮宫与巴黎浪漫影像
timeline.description_en: In the morning visit the Louvre Museum, one of the world's oldest museums and a renowned art treasury, with its glass pyramid entrance designed by I. M. Pei (admission includes the standard general ticket, with no Chinese audio guide). Then head to Paris's fashion center along Boulevard Haussmann and Rue Royale, with free time to see the Paris Opera / Palais Garnier (exterior) and the fashionable Printemps and Galeries Lafayette department stores. The tour ends at the beautiful Place d'Italie in Paris. No hotel tonight. Note: because the Louvre limits visitor numbers and, especially in high season, restricts guides from lecturing inside, the 20 EUR per guest in-museum guide fee will be refunded if this occurs.
timeline.description_zh: 上午参观法兰西引以为傲的卢浮宫博物馆——世界上古老的博物馆之一、举世闻名的艺术宝库，玻璃金字塔入口由华裔建筑大师贝聿铭设计（行程含普通散客门票，无中文讲解器）。随后前往巴黎时尚中心奥斯曼大街和皇家大道，自由参观巴黎歌剧院（外观）及春天百货、巴黎老佛爷等时尚街区。之后在美丽的巴黎意大利广场结束行程。今晚无酒店。备注：由于卢浮宫限流、特别是旺季限制讲解员在馆内讲解，届时将退还馆内讲解费20欧元/每位游客。

meeting_en: Rome, Italy. The group meets in central Rome; the historic centre is a vehicle-restricted zone (ZTL) and is explored on foot, so wear comfortable shoes.
meeting_zh: 意大利罗马。于罗马市中心集合；古城区为车辆禁行区（ZTL），当天为步行游览，请穿着轻便舒适的鞋子。

faqs.question_en: Where and how do we meet and disperse?
faqs.question_zh: 集合及集散地点和方法是怎样的？
faqs.answer_en: Rome departure: on Day 1, make your own way to the hotel near Rome's train station and gather at the hotel entrance the evening of check-in. On Day 11 the group disperses around 18:00 at Place d'Italie in Paris. These are reference times — the final times follow the departure notice. You may join the tour on the departure day in Rome, but you will then miss the Rome city sights, with no refund. We do not recommend a flight that leaves Paris on the final day.
faqs.answer_zh: 罗马出发：行程第1天自行前往罗马火车站附近、当晚入住酒店门口集合；行程第11天18:00左右在巴黎意大利广场解散（以上为参考时间，具体以出团通知书为准）。本产品参团当天可在罗马上团，但罗马市区景点将无法游览，并无费用可退！不推荐结束当天离开巴黎的航班！

faqs.question_en: Can Mount Titlis and the Jungfrau be visited on the same tour?
faqs.question_zh: 铁力士雪山和少女峰雪山可以同时游览吗？
faqs.answer_en: No. Mount Titlis and the Jungfrau belong to different departure dates and cannot be visited on the same tour. Please check the specific itinerary according to your travel dates.
faqs.answer_zh: 不可以。铁力士雪山和少女峰雪山游览分别属于不同的团期，不能同时游览，建议您根据自己的出行时间查看具体行程。

faqs.question_en: Some departures start from Paris — what is that itinerary, and do the sights and hotel standard change?
faqs.question_zh: 部分团期从巴黎出发的行程是什么？景点和酒店标准是否有变化？
faqs.answer_en: A Paris-departure run is simply the displayed (Rome-start) itinerary executed in reverse: Day 1 Paris, Day 2 Paris, Day 3 Paris–Dijon, Day 4 Dijon–Colmar–Zurich, Day 5 Zurich–Jungfrau–Interlaken, Day 6 Interlaken–Lungern–Lucerne–Milan, Day 7 Milan–Venice, Day 8 Venice–Tuscany, Day 9 Tuscany–Cinque Terre–Pisa, Day 10 Pisa–Florence–Rome, Day 11 Rome (see the departure notice). The sights and hotel standard for Paris-departure dates are the same as the displayed itinerary — no change.
faqs.answer_zh: 从巴黎出发的实际行程就是展示行程（罗马出发）反过来执行：第一天巴黎，第二天巴黎，第三天巴黎-第戎，第四天第戎-科尔马-苏黎世，第五天苏黎世-少女峰-因特拉肯，第六天因特拉肯-龙疆-卢塞恩-米兰，第七天米兰-威尼斯，第八天威尼斯-托斯卡纳，第九天托斯卡纳-五渔村-比萨，第十天比萨-佛罗伦萨-罗马，第十一天罗马（参见出团通知）。巴黎出发团期的景点和酒店标准与展示行程一致，没有变化。

faqs.question_en: What is the difference between the 9-day and 11-day France–Italy–Switzerland group tours?
faqs.question_zh: 【法意瑞跟团游】9天和11天的行程有什么区别？
faqs.answer_en: (a) The 11-day itinerary adds 2 days of in-depth Paris sightseeing on top of the 9-day one; (b) the 9-day and 11-day departure dates differ depending on whether Paris local sightseeing is chosen — refer to each product's own listing; (c) you can flexibly choose the product that better suits your schedule and time; (d) note that other locally-joining guests may take part in the tour.
faqs.answer_zh: a. 11天行程在9天行程的基础上增加了巴黎2日深度游览；b. 9天和11天的团期根据是否选择巴黎当地游览而有差异，请以各自的产品展示为准；c. 游客可根据自身行程和时间灵活选择更适合的产品；d. 注意：行程中可能有当地参团的其他客人参加进来。

faqs.question_en: There are no vehicles inside Rome's old town — how do I sightsee on my own?
faqs.question_zh: 罗马市区内无车辆，我该如何自行游览罗马？
faqs.answer_en: Rome's sights are clustered in the old town (a historic protection zone closed to vehicles), so the day is on foot from the hotel: Basilica of Santa Maria Maggiore (5–10 min walk), the Colosseum (10–15 min), the Mouth of Truth (20–25 min), the Trevi Fountain (15–20 min) and the Spanish Steps (5–10 min), then back to the hotel (20–25 min). Skipping the Mouth of Truth saves about 35 minutes of walking (about 2 km).
faqs.answer_zh: 罗马景点比较集中，几乎都位于罗马古城区（历史保护区车辆限行）。当天从酒店步行前往圣母大殿（步行5到10分钟）、斗兽场（10到15分钟）、真理之口（20到25分钟）、许愿池（15到20分钟）、西班牙广场（5到10分钟），随后返回酒店（20到25分钟）。如果不游览真理之口，可减少约35分钟步行时间（约2公里）。

faqs.question_en: Can I take a vehicle in Rome?
faqs.question_zh: 我可以在罗马乘坐车辆吗？
faqs.answer_en: All tour groups sightsee on foot within Rome's old town, but you can take the metro or a taxi from the last stop back to the hotel for about 8–10 EUR. Because the sights are close together and the route passes ancient Roman ruins and shopping streets, we recommend walking between them.
faqs.answer_zh: 所有旅行团在罗马古城区内都是步行游览，但可以乘坐地铁或出租车从最后一站返回酒店，约8到10欧元。由于各景点相邻较近，沿途又都是古罗马历史遗迹和商业街区，因此建议在各景点间徒步游览。

faqs.question_en: Do I need a visa?
faqs.question_zh: 是否需要签证？
faqs.answer_en: This product does not include visa fees — if you need a visa, please choose a Schengen-visa product. It requires a Schengen visa (single or multiple entry). "Worry-free visa guarantee": for guests who sign with us at least 61 days before departure, if the visa is not obtained within 45 days before departure, we bear all losses and immediately refund the full tour fee; guests who do not qualify and fail to obtain a visa are refunded per the change/cancellation terms. On a refusal, notify us within 48 hours with the consulate's refusal letter; any supplementary or amended materials must be submitted within five days, and you may not unilaterally waive the right of "visa appeal." If you entrust us to handle the Schengen visa we will buy compliant Schengen travel insurance; otherwise you must buy your own. All materials for the Schengen visa are provided free after booking. Your passport must be valid for at least six months from the date of departure, or customs may refuse entry. Visa fees, visa service fees, Schengen insurance fees and visa-center appointment fees are non-refundable and non-transferable, even if the product is changed or cancelled.
faqs.answer_zh: 本产品不包含签证费用，如需办理请选择申根签证产品。本产品需要申根签证（单次或多次入境）。保签无忧：游客在出发日前61天与我社签约的产品，如在出发前45天内未获取签证，我社承担所有损失并立即退还全部旅游费用；不符合该条款而未获签者按“退改与取消条款”退费。如遇拒签需在48小时内通知我社并出具使领馆拒签函，需补充或更改材料的须在五天内提交，且不得单方面放弃“签证抗辩”权利。若委托我社办理申根签证，我社为您购买符合要求的申根旅游保险；未委托则需自行购买。预订后免费提供办理申根签证的全部材料。护照有效期需在离境之日起至少还有六个月，否则海关有权拒绝入境。签证费、签证服务费、申根保险费、签证中心预约费均不可退款，也无法更改使用者，即使产品退改签亦无法退款。

faqs.question_en: Booking, changes & cancellation
faqs.question_zh: 预订、变更与取消须知
faqs.answer_en: Group-tour products allow free no-reason cancellation up to 30 days before departure (excluding the 30th day); thereafter, and for partial cancellations, room-type re-pricing, transport name-change fees (hotel 6–18 EUR, air 100–120 EUR per leg, train/cruise 35–180 EUR per ticket) and refund standards follow the change/cancellation terms. Because of frequent flight changes, traffic, ferry cancellations, strikes and itinerary reordering, you must arrive at the meeting point one day before the tour starts and leave one day after it ends (allow 5 hours for same-airport transfers, 7 hours for different airports in the same city; reasonable meet/disperse window 07:00–21:00). Rooms: a single booking includes a single-supplement deposit (refunded pro-rata if room-sharing succeeds); two people booking together default to a standard double with bed type assigned by the hotel (cannot be specified); a triple is for two parents plus one minor with bed type assigned by the hotel. All European hotels are non-smoking, no cooking in rooms, no free toiletries or free hot water, check-in 14:00 / check-out 11:00, and air-conditioning is not a standard feature. Listed hotels are preferred; if full, a comparable same-star hotel is substituted without separate notice. Pricing is in EUR at booking; if you pay in RMB, the day-of price is auto-calculated from Bank of China's real-time "EUR sell" rate, and any rate difference or bank fees on refunds are borne by the traveler. This is a shared (拼团) group tour with a minimum group size of 10; if the minimum is not reached 30 days before departure, either party may cancel without liability. Order payment does not equal confirmation — book at least 14 days ahead and await second confirmation within 48 hours, or the order auto-refunds. Itinerary contingencies: the Louvre is name-registered (enter names correctly) and, with crowd limits especially in peak season, the 20 EUR/guest in-museum guide fee is refunded; Versailles has no official guide for groups under 3 (an audio guide is used instead); if a Milan conference or other event occurs, hotel locations may be adjusted per the departure notice; for the Cinque Terre, only selected villages are visited and, in bad weather or a rail strike, touring switches to coach or another form along the coast; because costs are averaged year-round, no refund is due to special-needs travelers.
faqs.answer_zh: 跟团游产品出发前30天（不含第30天）旅行社和旅行者均可无理由取消；此后及部分退团，需按调整后房型重新核算单价，交通更名费（酒店6-18欧、航空每程100-120欧、火车及游轮每张35-180欧）及退费标准按《更改与取消条例条款》执行。由于航变频繁、交通拥堵、渡轮取消、罢工游行及行程顺序调整，旅游者须在出团前一天到达集合地、结束后一天离开集散地（同机场转机至少留5小时，同城不同机场至少7小时，合理集散时段07:00至21:00）。房型：单人报名默认含单人房差押金（拼房成功后按比例退还）；两人同时报名默认标准双人间，床型由酒店安排不可指定；三人家庭间默认两位父母与一位未成年儿童，床型由酒店安排。欧洲酒店全部禁烟、禁止房内做饭、不提供一次性洗漱用品及免费开水，入住14:00、退房11:00，且不以空调为标配。行程内列明酒店为优先入住，如订满则更换为相近条件、相同星级酒店且不再另行通知。价格以欧元计价，如选择人民币支付，则按当日中国银行“欧元卖出价”实时计算，退款汇率差及银行手续费由旅行者承担。本产品为散客拼团，成团人数为10人，行程前30天未成团双方均可解约且互不担责。所有订单支付不等于确认行程，建议至少提前14天预订并在48小时内二次确认，超时默认自动退款。行程提示：卢浮宫为实名制（请正确填写姓名），因限流（尤其旺季限制讲解员入馆）将退还馆内讲解费20欧/人；凡尔赛不足3人无官导讲解，由讲解器代替；如遇米兰会议或其他活动，酒店位置会调整、以出团通知书为准；五渔村因体力和时间只安排个别村子游览，如遇恶劣天气或铁路罢工将改为大巴或其他形式游览海岸线城市；本产品活动采取全年平均成本计算，特殊人群并无费用可退。

faqs.question_en: Health & safety requirements
faqs.question_zh: 健康与安全须知
faqs.answer_en: To ensure a safe trip, please have a health check before departure and DO NOT book if you have: an infectious disease (e.g. active tuberculosis, typhoid); cardiovascular disease (severe hypertension, heart insufficiency, myocardial ischemia/infarction); cerebrovascular disease (cerebral embolism, hemorrhage, brain tumor); respiratory disease (emphysema, cor pulmonale); a psychiatric condition (epilepsy, etc.); severe anemia (hemoglobin below 50 g/L); or you are recovering from major/medium surgery. Pregnancy: at 35 weeks or more you may not join under any circumstances; at 28 weeks or more you must provide a doctor's report from within 7 days plus the attending physician's consent; under 28 weeks, book with caution, sign a liability waiver, and you cannot take part in adventure, skiing, sailing, high-altitude or outdoor activities. Travelers with disabilities must provide a 7-day medical report and physician's consent, be accompanied by an immediate family member, and apply at least 61 days ahead for a reserved place and facilities. Seniors over 70 must provide a health certificate and physical-exam report and be accompanied by immediate family (otherwise sign a liability waiver); the trip is long and physically demanding, so those lacking stamina should book with caution. Minors (under 18) must be accompanied by an immediate relative or guardian; some sights have special rules for under-18s, under-12s or under-6s; for infants under 6 or children under 30 kg confirm a child seat in advance (or bring an EU-standard one); an unaccompanied minor needs parental authorization (both parents' authorization if traveling with non-parents); infants under 2 are not accepted. Under Article 15 of the Tourism Law (and the Infectious Disease Prevention Law, 2025 revision), travelers must truthfully declare health information relevant to the trip (pregnancy, lactation, chronic disease, infectious-disease history, suspected symptoms or recent epidemic-area travel) and follow safety warnings; concealment causing harm or transmission risk makes the traveler liable for their own losses and for medical, quarantine and compensation costs, and the agency may terminate the contract without refund.
faqs.answer_zh: 为确保旅游顺利、防止旅途中发生人身意外，请在出行前做必要的身体检查，如存在以下情况请勿报名：传染性疾病（如活动期肺结核、伤寒）；心血管疾病（如严重高血压、心功能不全、心肌缺氧、心肌梗塞）；脑血管疾病（如脑栓塞、脑出血、脑肿瘤）；呼吸系统疾病（如肺气肿、肺心病）；精神病（如癫痫及各种精神病）；严重贫血（血红蛋白水平在50克/升以下）；大中型手术恢复期。孕妇：妊娠第35周及以上任何情况下都无法参团；第28周及以上需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书；第28周以下请慎重报名，需签署旅行社免责声明书，且行程内探险、滑雪、出海、高空、户外等项目均无法参加。残疾人需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书、需直系家属陪同、并至少提前61天申请预留位置及专用配套设施。70周岁以上老年人需提供健康证明、体检报告并由直系家属陪同（否则签署免责声明书）；本次行程较长、对体力要求较高，体力不支者请慎重报名。未成年人（未满18周岁）须由直系亲属或监护人陪同，部分景点对未满18／12／6周岁有特殊限定；如有6岁以下婴儿或30公斤以下儿童请提前确认安全座椅（或自带符合欧盟标准的座椅）；无父母陪同的18岁以下未成年人须持父母授权书；本产品不接受2周岁以下婴儿参团。根据《旅游法》第15条及《传染病防治法（2025修订）》，旅游者须如实告知与旅游活动相关的个人健康信息（含妊娠期、哺乳期、慢性病、传染病史、疑似症状或近期疫区旅居史）并遵守安全警示，若因隐瞒导致人身损害或传播风险，须自行承担医疗、隔离费用及赔偿责任，旅行社可解除合同且不退还费用。

title_en: Switzerland Panorama Loop: 5-Day Small-Group Alpine Tour
title_zh: 瑞士全景环线5天享乐小团
short_en: A 5-day small-group loop from Zurich through the Swiss Alps, Liechtenstein, the Jungfrau region, Matterhorn and Lake Geneva.
short_zh: 5天小团从苏黎世出发，深度环游瑞士阿尔卑斯雪山冰川、列支敦士登、少女峰地区、马特洪峰与日内瓦湖。
desc_en: This 5-day small-group escape loops out of Zurich and back, threading together the icons of the Swiss Alps. Cross into the tiny principality of Liechtenstein, ride the famed Glacier Express segment past the Devil's Bridge, soak up Lucerne's lakeside charm and spend two nights amid the lakes and peaks of the Interlaken-Jungfrau region. The route climbs toward the Matterhorn at car-free Zermatt before finishing along the Lake Geneva shore with the UNESCO old town of Bern. With a 6-15 person group, fixed airport and station transfers, and lake-view hotels, it is a relaxed all-round tour of Switzerland's greatest panoramas.
desc_zh: 5天享乐小团从苏黎世出发再返回，串联起瑞士阿尔卑斯的众多名片。穿越迷你公国列支敦士登，体验著名的冰川列车梅德尔冰峰、魔鬼桥精彩路段，徜徉湖光山色的卢塞恩，并连续两晚入住因特拉肯-少女峰大区的雪山湖景酒店。行程登临无车小镇采尔马特，远眺阿尔卑斯擎天柱马特洪峰，最后沿日内瓦湖一线游览洛桑与世界遗产伯尔尼老城。6-15人小团、机场与火车站固定时间接送、雪山湖景酒店，轻松饱览瑞士全景之美。

highlights.en: Two icons in one day: Zurich's financial old town and the fairytale castle principality of Liechtenstein
highlights.zh: 一日双景：苏黎世金融老城与童话般的城堡之国列支敦士登

highlights.en: Glacier Express scenery on the Chur-Andermatt leg, past Medelser peak and the Devil's Bridge
highlights.zh: 冰川列车库尔-安德玛特段，途经梅德尔冰峰与天险魔鬼桥

highlights.en: Lucerne's lakeside charm, Chapel Bridge, Water Tower and the Lion Monument
highlights.zh: 卢塞恩湖光山色，卡贝尔廊桥、八角水塔与狮子纪念碑

highlights.en: Two nights in the Interlaken-Jungfrau region with full Jungfrau-area panoramas
highlights.zh: 连续两晚住宿因特拉肯-少女峰大区，饱览少女峰地区全貌

highlights.en: Car-free Zermatt and the triangular Matterhorn, the symbol of the Swiss Alps
highlights.zh: 无车小镇采尔马特与阿尔卑斯象征——三角山峰马特洪峰

highlights.en: Lake Geneva scenic line: Geneva's Flower Clock and fountain, Lausanne's Olympic Park, UNESCO Bern old town
highlights.zh: 日内瓦湖环湖风景线：日内瓦花钟与大喷泉、洛桑奥林匹克公园、世界遗产伯尔尼老城

highlights.en: Small group of 6-15 with fixed Geneva, Zurich, airport and station transfers
highlights.zh: 6-15人享乐小团，日内瓦、苏黎世、机场与火车站固定时间接送

highlights.en: City-centre 4-star hotels with Alpine lake views and no forced shopping
highlights.zh: 城市核心区4星级雪山湖景酒店，全程无强制购物

includes.en: Hotels: 4 nights in 4-star hotels.
includes.zh: 【酒店】4晚四星级酒店。

includes.en: Operating costs: tourist city tax, city-entry fees, residence tax, road and bridge tolls, parking and fuel charges, driver/guide meal allowances and other in-itinerary operating fees.
includes.zh: 【执行】游客城市税、进城费、居住税、过路过桥费、停车燃油费、司导餐补等行程内执行费用。

includes.en: Transport: business travel car or tour coach.
includes.zh: 【交通】商务旅行车或者旅游巴士。

includes.en: Guide: professional coach driver or a Chinese-speaking driver-cum-guide throughout (note: for fewer than 8 people, a business car + driver-cum-guide; for 8 or more, a tour coach + professional driver + Chinese-speaking guide).
includes.zh: 【导游】专业巴士司机或全程中文华人司机兼导游；（注：8人以下为商务车+司机兼导游，8人以上为旅游巴士+专业司机+中文导游）。

includes.en: Luggage: one 23 kg checked bag plus one piece of hand luggage.
includes.zh: 【行李】1件23公斤行李及1件随身行李。

includes.en: Meals: 4 Swiss-style buffet or European breakfasts.
includes.zh: 【餐饮】瑞士式自助式或者欧式早餐4餐。

includes.en: Tickets: Tasch-Zermatt scenic train ticket; Lake Interlaken boat cruise (automatically replaced by a Lake Lucerne cruise depending on the sailing schedule).
includes.zh: 【门票】塔什-采尔马特段观光火车票，因特拉肯湖游船（根据不同船期自动更换为卢塞恩湖游船）。

excludes.en: Passport: personal passport fees.
excludes.zh: 护照：个人护照费用。

excludes.en: Visa: tourist visa fees for the countries listed in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 签证：行程中所列旅游国家所需的观光签证费用。

excludes.en: Insurance: travel insurance (if the itinerary involves high-risk sports, verify whether your travel insurance covers them).
excludes.zh: 保险：旅游保险费用；（如行程内涉及到高风险运动，请核实旅游保险是否包含该项运动）。

excludes.en: Tips: tips for the guide and driver totalling 10 EUR per person per day, same rate for adults and children.
excludes.zh: 小费：游客支付导游和司机小费一共10欧/人/天，大小同价。

excludes.en: Meals: lunches and dinners are not included, except for the specialty meals listed in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 餐饮：除行程内包含的特色餐外，行程中不包含午、晚正餐费用。

excludes.en: Tickets: sights not marked as fee-included (including but not limited to sights marked 'exterior', and all 'recommended', 'optional', 'experience' items not mentioned as included); please pay on your own if you wish to visit.
excludes.zh: 门票：行程中未注明费用包含的景点（包括但不仅限于行程中注明"外观"的景点，以及"推荐""可选""体验"等所有未提及费用包含的项目，如游客需要参观，敬请自理）。

excludes.en: Extended stay: any extra accommodation, transport or sightseeing beyond the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 延长住宿：行程外额外延长的住宿、交通、观光费用。

excludes.en: Personal spending: beverages and alcohol, taxis, phone charges and other personal expenses.
excludes.zh: 私人消费：如饮料酒类、出租车、电话费等个人消费。

excludes.en: Other transport: transport not covered beyond the business car or minibus, e.g. Venice gondolas, sightseeing trains in vehicle-restricted zones, electric taxis, etc. - please pay on your own.
excludes.zh: 其他交通：除包含商务旅行车或者中巴之外，费用包含中未提及的其他交通费用，如威尼斯贡多拉，以及车辆限行区的观光火车、电瓶出租车等费用敬请自理。

excludes.en: Free-time activities: independent night-time touring and the itinerary's recommended programs, plus any resulting transport, meals, tickets and shopping costs.
excludes.zh: 自由活动：游客夜间自行游览及行程中的推荐项目，以及产生的交通、餐饮、门票、购物等费用。

excludes.en: Experience activities: any travel-experience activities not included in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 体验活动：行程中没有包含的各项旅游体验活动。

excludes.en: Other costs: anything not mentioned under inclusions. In cases of force majeure (natural disaster, war, strike) or special circumstances such as traffic delays, flight cancellation/rescheduling, embassy visa delays or insufficient group size, the company reserves the right to charge price differences for the extra costs incurred (e.g. overseas visa-extension fees, additional accommodation/meals/transport, national airfare adjustments).
excludes.zh: 其他费用：费用包含中未提及的费用。如因天灾、战争、罢工等不可抗力的原因，及因交通延阻、航班取消或更改时间、使馆延误出签证、人数不足等特殊情况或其他非我公司原因所引致的额外费（如在外延期签证费、住、食及交通费、国家航空运价调整等），我公司有权追加差价。

timeline.title_en: Zurich - Liechtenstein - Flims (from the financial metropolis to a unique castle kingdom)
timeline.title_zh: 苏黎世 - 列支敦士登 - 弗利姆斯（从金融大都会到独特的城堡王国）
timeline.description_en: After meeting in the morning, tour Zurich's Old Town with its traditional craftsmen, antique dealers, bookshops and luxury boutiques, then see Grossmunster (Zurich's main cathedral, exterior), the famous Bahnhofstrasse shopping avenue, Lake Zurich, Lindenhof Park (a linden-shaded hilltop overlooking the Limmat and the cathedral, a famous scene from the drama Crash Landing on You), and stroll along the Limmat River. In the afternoon head to the European microstate of Liechtenstein to visit its capital Vaduz and Vaduz Castle (exterior). Then continue to Flims to check in. Note: this itinerary includes regular sights above 1000 m elevation (Zermatt 1640 m, Grindelwald 1034 m, Andermatt 1470 m); travellers with pre-existing conditions should consult a doctor before booking about visiting high-altitude areas. Overnight: Me and All Hotel (Hyatt) in Flims, or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午集合后游览苏黎世老城区，这里汇聚了传统工匠、古董商、书店和奢侈品牌精品店，随后参观苏黎世大教堂（外观）、著名的班霍夫大街购物大道、苏黎世湖、林登霍夫公园（老城中心一片菩提树覆盖的小山丘，是俯瞰利马特河与苏黎世大教堂的理想之地，也是电视剧《爱的迫降》开场的取景地），并漫步利马特河边。下午前往欧洲小国列支敦士登，游览首都瓦杜兹和瓦杜兹城堡（外观），之后前往弗利姆斯入住。注意：本行程含超过1000米海拔的常规景点（采尔马特1640米、格林德尔瓦尔德1034米、安德马特1470米），如有基础疾病，请报名前与医生确认是否能前往高海拔地区。夜宿：弗利姆斯Me and All凯悦酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Chur - Andermatt - Lucerne - Lungern - Interlaken (crossing the Medel peaks; the Glacier Express skirts the perilous Devil's Bridge)
timeline.title_zh: 库尔 - 安德马特 - 卢塞恩 - 龙疆 - 因特拉肯（横跨梅德尔冰峰，冰川列车掠过天险魔鬼桥）
timeline.description_en: In the morning head to Andermatt; you may optionally pay to ride the Glacier Express from Chur to Andermatt, experiencing one of the most spectacular sections of the Swiss glacier line, including the Alpine pass, the Medel glacier-peak scenery and the Devil's Bridge (under 3 hours, full of unmissable Swiss views). Then continue to Lucerne to see the lake's scenery on Lake Lucerne, the Lion Monument (telling the story of the loyal Swiss Guard), the Chapel Bridge (Kapellbrucke) and the octagonal Water Tower. Afterward visit the small town of Lungern and its lake scenery, then check in. Overnight: Crown Hotel in Sarnen or the Kruz lakeside/snow-mountain-view hotel, or an equivalent 4-star hotel. Note: Glacier Express seats are limited, especially in peak season; booking at least 30 days ahead is recommended, and once confirmed the optional booking (train fare + seat reservation + booking service fee) cannot be changed or refunded; seats cannot be designated as window or aisle. If the Glacier Express is not booked, the Chur-Andermatt route is toured by coach instead; the Glacier Express runs in this section 2 May 2026 - 10 Oct 2026.
timeline.description_zh: 早上前往安德马特；您也可选择自费从库尔乘坐"冰川列车"前往安德马特，体验瑞士冰川快线最精彩的一段——库尔至安德马特段，包括阿尔卑斯山口、梅德尔冰峰景观和魔鬼桥，行程不到3小时，有很多不容错过的瑞士美景。之后前往卢塞恩，游览湖光山色的卢塞恩湖、聆听狮子纪念碑讲述瑞士雇佣兵忠贞坚毅的历史，以及卡佩尔廊桥和八角形水塔等景点；随后前往龙疆小镇，游览龙疆湖及小镇风光，之后入住酒店。夜宿：萨尔嫩皇冠酒店或克鲁兹雪山湖景酒店，或同等4星级酒店。注意：冰川列车座位较少，旅游旺季尤甚，建议至少提前30天预订；自费项目（含火车票费、预订座位费和预订服务费）一旦预订成功不可退改，且座位无法指定靠窗或过道。如未选择预订冰川列车，则随车游览库尔-安德马特路线；该段冰川列车运行时间为2026年5月2日至2026年10月10日。

timeline.title_en: Interlaken - Jungfrau Region - Interlaken (admiring Switzerland's 'two lakes' and the full Jungfrau Region)
timeline.title_zh: 因特拉肯 - 少女峰地区 - 因特拉肯（赏瑞士"两湖"之美，游览"少女峰地区"全貌）
timeline.description_en: In the morning depart for the Jungfrau Region. You may ride along by coach to see the red Swiss trains at Wilderswil and the fairy-tale scenery of Lauterbrunnen, then arrive at Grindelwald at the foot of the Jungfrau; or you may optionally pay to take one of Europe's highest railways via the ski-and-hiking mecca of Grindelwald, ascending from Kleine Scheidegg to the Jungfrau and the Sphinx Observatory, overlooking the snow-capped Jungfrau and the great Aletsch Glacier (Europe's largest and longest). Afterward pass through Lauterbrunnen to enjoy its alpine scenery and waterfalls, then go to the town of Interlaken (between Lake Thun and Lake Brienz) for free time. Of four optional programs only one may be chosen: (1) tour the Jungfrau Region by coach (included); (2) summit the Jungfrau by scenic cable car and cog railway - Top of Europe (230 EUR); (3) First-Grindelwald aerial gondola round trip with the First Cliff Walk (70 EUR); (4) Interlaken paragliding from the Beatenberg 1558 base (220 EUR, a high-risk activity with age 10-65 and weight 10-95 kg limits, not covered by ordinary travel insurance). Overnight: Crown Hotel in Sarnen or the Kruz lakeside/snow-mountain-view hotel, or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午出发前往少女峰地区。您可选择随车前往维尔德斯维尔观赏红色瑞士火车、欣赏劳特布伦嫩的瑞士童话风景，随后抵达少女峰脚下的格林德尔瓦尔德；也可选择自费乘坐欧洲海拔极高的铁路，途经滑雪远足圣地格林德尔瓦尔德，再由小夏戴克（Kleine Scheidegg）登上少女峰，前往"斯芬克斯观景台"俯瞰白雪皑皑的少女峰和欧洲第一大、第一长的阿莱奇冰川（Aletsch）。之后途经劳特布伦嫩，欣赏美丽的高山风光和瀑布群，随后前往因特拉肯小镇（位于图恩湖与布里恩茨湖之间）自由游览。以下四个推荐项目仅可四选一：一、乘车游览少女峰地区（费用包含）；二、乘景观缆车及齿轮火车登顶少女峰——欧洲之巅Top of Europe（230欧元）；三、菲斯特-格林德尔瓦尔德空中贡多拉往返票，含悬崖天梭巅峰栈道First Cliff Walk（70欧元）；四、因特拉肯高空滑翔伞，从贝阿滕贝格山1558滑翔伞基地出发（220欧元，高风险项目，年龄要求10-65周岁、体重10-95公斤，普通旅游保险不包含）。夜宿：萨尔嫩皇冠酒店或克鲁兹雪山湖景酒店，或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Interlaken - Zermatt - Annemasse (the glacier city of Zermatt and the Alpine triangle peak, the Matterhorn)
timeline.title_zh: 因特拉肯 - 采尔马特 - 安纳马斯（冰川之城采尔马特，欣赏阿尔卑斯三角山峰马特洪峰）
timeline.description_en: In the morning depart for Zermatt and freely explore this car-free town (only a few electric vehicles and horse carriages are allowed), where you can clearly see the Matterhorn, 'king of the Alpine winds'. Optionally pay to ride the cable car up to the Matterhorn Glacier Paradise to admire the magnificent views from the snow-capped peaks and glaciers. Note: there is no guide on the Zermatt cable cars or the Matterhorn Glacier Paradise cable car; the itinerary includes the Tasch-Zermatt scenic train, which the guide cannot accompany you on; if you buy the Matterhorn Glacier Paradise cable car you must transfer on your own and bring your own light meal. Afterward proceed to the hotel: Novotel Annemasse Porte de Geneve. Overnight: Novotel Annemasse Porte de Geneve or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午出发前往采尔马特，随后自由参观采尔马特镇——这里没有汽车，仅有少量电瓶车和马车，可清晰看到有"阿尔卑斯山风之王"之称的马特洪峰。或自费乘坐缆车参观马特洪峰冰川天堂，欣赏雪山冰川之巅的壮丽美景。注意：采尔马特及马特洪峰冰川天堂缆车上无导游陪同；行程内包含塔什-采尔马特观光列车，导游无法陪同前往；如购买马特洪峰冰川天堂缆车，需自行换乘并自备简餐。随后前往酒店，入住安纳马斯日内瓦港诺富特酒店。夜宿：安纳马斯日内瓦港诺富特酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Geneva - Lausanne - Bern - Zurich (the Geneva lakeshore route, a journey through World Heritage)
timeline.title_zh: 日内瓦 - 洛桑 - 伯尔尼 - 苏黎世（日内瓦环湖风景线，人类文化遗产之旅）
timeline.description_en: In the morning head to Geneva to tour the Old Town, the lake district, the Flower Clock and the Jet d'Eau fountain (a 140 m water jet visible from far across the city). Then continue to Lausanne, stopping at the Ouchy waterfront lined with cafes, restaurants and hotels, and freely visit the Olympic Park (home to the Olympic Museum, the world's largest Olympic archive). In the afternoon go to Bern, the well-preserved medieval Swiss federal capital, with its quaint clock tower, fountains every few steps, cobbled streets and red-roofed traditional buildings, and tour the UNESCO World Heritage Old Town. Then return to Zurich, where the wonderful journey ends. No hotel tonight (tour ends).
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往日内瓦，游览日内瓦老城、日内瓦湖区、花钟和大喷泉（高达140米的水柱，从市中心很远就能看见）。之后前往洛桑，停留在乌希码头——沿岸布满咖啡厅、餐厅和酒店，并自由游览奥林匹克公园（园内有世界最大的奥林匹克资料中心奥林匹克博物馆）。下午前往瑞士联邦所在地伯尔尼，这座保存十分完好的中世纪小城拥有古朴的钟楼、每走三五步即可见的喷泉、鹅卵石街面和红瓦屋顶的传统建筑，游览被列入世界遗产名录的伯尔尼老城区。之后返回苏黎世，结束美好旅程。今晚无酒店（行程结束）。

meeting_en: Zurich, Switzerland. Fixed-time pickups are arranged at Geneva, Zurich, the airport and the train station.
meeting_zh: 瑞士苏黎世。日内瓦、苏黎世、机场及火车站均提供固定时间接送。

faqs.question_en: What are the meeting/dispersal points and times?
faqs.question_zh: 集合及集散地点和方法是什么？
faqs.answer_en: Package A meet: 09:00 at Zurich Airport, 09:45 at Zurich Central Station. Package A dispersal: 11:30 at Geneva Station and 11:40 at Geneva Airport, or 19:00 at Zurich Central Station. Package C meet: 08:30 at Zurich Airport, 09:00 at Zurich Central Station, 18:00 at Geneva Station; Package C dispersal: 18:00 at Zurich Central Station. This is not a private transfer, so late arrivals cannot be waited for; if your flight is delayed you must catch up to the group on your own. We do not recommend a flight leaving Zurich on the final day. You may join in Zurich by 12:00 at the latest on the start day, but Zurich city sights will then be missed with no refund. Exact times follow the final departure notice; delays caused by traffic or natural disasters are coordinated but extra costs are not covered.
faqs.answer_zh: A套餐集合：09:00在苏黎世机场，09:45在苏黎世中央火车站。A套餐解散：11:30在日内瓦火车站、11:40在日内瓦机场，或19:00在苏黎世中央火车站。C套餐集合：08:30在苏黎世机场，09:00在苏黎世中央火车站，18:00在日内瓦火车站；C套餐解散：18:00在苏黎世中央火车站。本产品并非专车接送，迟到无法等待，如航班晚点需自行追团。本产品不推荐结束当天离开苏黎世的航班。参团当天最晚12:00前可在苏黎世上团，但苏黎世市区景点将无法游览，且无费用可退。具体时间以出团通知书为准；因交通路况及自然灾害等不可抗力导致解散时间推迟，我社将尽力协调，但不承担由此产生的额外费用。

faqs.question_en: Does the product include the Jungfrau summit cog railway, Interlaken paragliding and the First experience programs?
faqs.question_zh: 产品是否包含少女峰登顶齿轮火车、因特拉肯滑翔伞及菲斯特体验项目？
faqs.answer_en: No. If you wish to join, book in advance; the available experience times are limited and may conflict with the original itinerary, affecting other arrangements. If you choose none of these, you ride along with the coach and guide to tour Wilderswil, Grindelwald and Lauterbrunnen.
faqs.answer_zh: 不包含。如需参加建议提前预订，可选的体验时间受限，可能与原行程安排产生冲突，导致影响其他行程和体验的安排。如不选择上述项目，则跟车跟导游游览维尔德斯维尔、格林德尔瓦尔德及劳特布伦嫩。

faqs.question_en: Does the guide accompany us on the Jungfrau cog railway and the First programs?
faqs.question_zh: 少女峰齿轮火车和菲斯特的体验项目导游陪伴我们前往吗？
faqs.answer_en: No. The guide and vehicle cannot go to these; you can only reach them by cable car.
faqs.answer_zh: 导游不陪同。上述项目导游和车辆均不可前往，只能乘坐缆车前往。

faqs.question_en: Can I sign up for both the Jungfrau cog railway and the First cable car experience?
faqs.question_zh: 我可以同时报名少女峰齿轮火车和菲斯特纜车的体验项目吗？
faqs.answer_en: No - time only allows one of the two. Summiting the Jungfrau by cog railway or cable car takes about 5 hours or more up and down; First plus its 3 experience programs usually also takes over 4 hours. Choosing the Jungfrau means skipping First, and vice versa; if you choose neither, you ride along by coach to tour Wilderswil, Grindelwald and Lauterbrunnen.
faqs.answer_zh: 不可以，时间上只允许二选一。少女峰登顶（乘齿轮火车或缆车）上下山约需5小时甚至更久；菲斯特（First）缆车加3项体验项目通常也需4小时以上。选择少女峰则默认不去菲斯特，选择菲斯特则默认不上少女峰；如都不选择，则默认跟车游览维尔德斯维尔、格林德尔瓦尔德及劳特布伦嫩。

faqs.question_en: How do we visit Zermatt and the Matterhorn?
faqs.question_zh: 采尔马特和马特洪峰怎么游玩？
faqs.answer_en: The guide and vehicle can only accompany you to Tasch station; you then take the train yourself into the car-free Zermatt area. The fare includes the Tasch-Zermatt scenic train ticket, but that ticket cannot be used for the Matterhorn Glacier Paradise cable car. To visit the Matterhorn Glacier Paradise area you must buy tickets at the Zermatt cable-car station.
faqs.answer_zh: 导游和车辆仅可陪同游客至塔什火车站，游客自行乘坐火车游览采尔马特景区（该区域为无车区）。费用包含塔什-采尔马特段观光火车票，但该火车票不可用于马特洪峰冰川天堂缆车。如需参观游览马特洪峰冰川天堂景区，需要在采尔马特缆车站购票。

faqs.question_en: How should we visit the Glacier Paradise (3883)?
faqs.question_zh: 我们应该怎么游玩冰川天堂（Glacier Paradise 3883）？
faqs.answer_en: After reaching Zermatt station, walk about 1 km through the commercial pedestrian street to the Zermatt Bergbahnen AG cable-car station; check in there, take a small cable car to the mid-station, then change to a large cable car to the Matterhorn Glacier Paradise. The cable-car ride is 45 minutes each way and the visit takes about 3 hours (including 1.5 hours at the summit). Visiting the Glacier Paradise greatly reduces your time to explore Zermatt itself.
faqs.answer_zh: 到达采尔马特火车站后，步行约1公里穿过商业步行街，前往采尔马特缆车站Zermatt Bergbahnen AG，在此检票乘坐小缆车前往中间段后更换大缆车前往马特洪峰冰川天堂。单程乘坐45分钟缆车，游览时间约为3小时（含山顶1小时30分钟）。如果游览冰川天堂，则大幅度降低采尔马特的游览时间。

faqs.question_en: Switzerland has so many activities - how should I choose?
faqs.question_zh: 瑞士有这么多游玩项目，我应该如何选择？
faqs.answer_en: Switzerland's variety of outdoor activities makes it world-famous; some young travellers come purely for paragliding or the First adventure park. For ordinary travellers, summiting the Jungfrau plus the activities already included in the tour fee is plenty. You can equally admire the mighty Matterhorn from Zermatt - touring the Swiss alpine towns and tasting local food is really what this trip is about.
faqs.answer_zh: 瑞士的风格和户外活动的丰富性使其成为世界盛名的旅游目的地，一些年轻游客来瑞士就是为了滑翔伞或菲斯特空天冒险。对于普通游客，选择少女峰登顶加上团费内包含的活动已经足够；我们在采尔马特一样可以欣赏马特洪峰的伟岸，游览瑞士高山小镇、品尝当地美食才是来这里的主旨。

faqs.question_en: Does the Glacier Express run all year round?
faqs.question_zh: 冰川列车一整年都运行吗？
faqs.answer_en: No. The Glacier Express stops running from 11 October 2026 to 4 December 2026.
faqs.answer_zh: 不是。冰川列车在2026年10月11日至2026年12月4日期间停止运行。

faqs.question_en: Do I need a visa?
faqs.question_zh: 是否需要签证？
faqs.answer_en: Yes. This product does not include visa fees; you need a Schengen visa (single or multiple entry) - if needed, choose a Schengen-visa product. After booking we provide all the materials for the Schengen visa application free of charge, and we purchase the Schengen-compliant travel insurance if you entrust us with the visa service (otherwise you arrange your own insurance and claims). Your passport must be valid for at least six months from the date of departure, or customs may refuse entry. Visa fees, visa service fees, Schengen insurance fees and visa-centre appointment fees are all non-refundable and non-transferable, even if the product is changed or cancelled. Visa-guarantee assurance: if you sign with us at least 61 days before departure and the visa is not obtained within 45 days before departure, we bear all losses and immediately refund the full tour cost; if a refusal occurs, notify us within 48 hours with the consulate's refusal letter, submit any supplementary materials within five days, and do not unilaterally waive the 'visa appeal' right.
faqs.answer_zh: 需要。本产品不含签证费用，需办理申根签证（单次或多次入境），如需办理请选择申根签证产品。预订后免费提供办理申根签证的全部材料；若委托我社办理签证，我社为您购买符合申根要求的申根旅游保险，否则需自行购买旅游保险并负责理赔手续。护照有效期需在离境之日起至少还有六个月，否则海关有权拒绝入境。签证费、签证服务费、申根保险费、签证中心预约费均不可退款，也无法更改使用者，即使产品退改签亦无法退款。保签无忧：出发日前61天与我社签约，如出发前45天内未获取签证，我社承担所有损失并立即退还全部旅游费用；如遇拒签需在48小时内通知我社并出具使领馆拒签函，需补充或更改材料的应在五天内提交，且不得单方面放弃"签证抗辩"权利。

faqs.question_en: Booking, changes & cancellation
faqs.question_zh: 预订、变更与取消须知
faqs.answer_en: Free cancellation: both parties may cancel the group tour for any reason up to 30 days before departure (the 30th day excluded). This is a shared-group (join-in) tour; the disclosed maximum group size is the daily average upper limit and the product is declared 'formed' at 10 people - if not reached 30 days before departure, either side may cancel. To accommodate flight/traffic/strike contingencies, the visit order may be adjusted; travellers must arrive one day before the start date and leave one day after the end date, with reasonable connection time (at least 5 hours for transfers at the same airport, 7 hours for different airports in the same city; reasonable meet/dispersal window 07:00-21:00). Room types: two people booking together default to a standard twin (bed type assigned by hotel, cannot be specified); a solo booker pays a single-room supplement deposit (refunded proportionally if a roommate is matched, or note 'single occupancy, no room-sharing' to be charged the single rate); a triple family room is for two parents plus one minor with bed type set by the hotel. All European hotels are non-smoking, check-in 14:00 / check-out 11:00, and air conditioning is not standard. Pricing is quoted in EUR at the time of booking; if you pay in CNY, the amount follows the website's real-time CNY price auto-calculated from the Bank of China 'EUR selling' rate on the day of payment, and the same applies to refunds (exchange-rate differences and bank fees are borne by the traveller). Key itinerary notes: the order of days may change without changing the route or sights (not a breach of contract); Glacier Express seats are limited (book 30+ days ahead, non-refundable once confirmed); there is no tour leader throughout - local guides provide service, with no forced shopping.
faqs.answer_zh: 免费取消：跟团游产品出发前30天（不含第30天）旅行社和旅行者均有权无理由取消。本产品为散客拼团，披露的最多参团人数为每天平均人数上限，成团人数为10人，行程开始前30天（不含第30天）未达成团人数则双方均可解除合同。为应对航班/交通/罢工等不可抗力，游览先后顺序可能调整；旅行者须在参团日期前一天抵达集合地、离团日期后一天离开集散地，并预留合理衔接时间（同机场转机至少5小时、同城不同机场至少7小时，合理集散时间段为07:00至21:00）。房型：两人同时报名默认标准双人间（床型由酒店安排，不可指定）；单人报名默认含单人房差押金（成功拼房按比例退款，或备注"要求单人入住、请勿安排拼房、不退单人房差"按单人价安排）；三人家庭间默认两位父母与一位未成年儿童入住，床型由酒店安排。欧洲所有酒店禁烟，入住14:00、退房11:00，且空调并非标准设施。所有定价以欧元为预订计价单位，如选择人民币支付，则以当天支付时本网站依据中国银行实时外汇牌价"欧元卖出价"自动计算的人民币实时价格为准，退款同样适用申请退款当日即时汇率（汇率差异及银行手续费由旅行者承担）。关键行程提示：行程先后顺序可在不改变路线及景点的情况下调整（不视为违约）；冰川列车座位较少（建议提前30天以上预订，确认后不可退改）；全程不含领队，由当地导游提供服务，无任何强制购物消费。

faqs.question_en: Health & safety requirements
faqs.question_zh: 健康与安全须知
faqs.answer_en: For your safety, please have a medical check before travelling. Do NOT book if you have: infectious diseases (e.g. active tuberculosis, typhoid); cardiovascular disease (severe hypertension, heart failure, myocardial ischemia/infarction); cerebrovascular disease (cerebral embolism, hemorrhage, brain tumour); respiratory disease (emphysema, cor pulmonale); psychiatric conditions (epilepsy, etc.); severe anemia (hemoglobin below 50 g/L); or are recovering from major/medium surgery. Pregnancy: not permitted at all from week 35; from week 28, a doctor's report within 7 days plus the attending physician's consent are required; under 28 weeks, book with caution, sign the liability waiver, and you cannot join adventure/ski/sea/high-altitude/outdoor programs. Disabled travellers need a 7-day medical report, physician's consent, an immediate-family companion, and must apply at least 61 days ahead for reserved seating/facilities. Elderly (over 70) need a health certificate and physical exam, an immediate-family companion (or sign the waiver), good walking ability and stamina (this is a long itinerary), a physician's consent for adventure/ski/sea/high-altitude/outdoor programs, and a 61-day-advance request for elderly-care services. Minors (under 18) must be accompanied by immediate family/guardian (with parental authorization if travelling without parents); some sights restrict those under 18/12/6; child safety seats must be confirmed in advance for infants under 6 or children under 30 kg; infants under 2 cannot join. Per Article 15 of the Tourism Law, travellers must truthfully declare health information relevant to the trip (pregnancy, lactation, chronic disease, infectious-disease history, suspected symptoms or recent travel to epidemic areas) and follow safety warnings; concealment causing harm or loss is the traveller's own responsibility.
faqs.answer_zh: 为确保旅途安全、防止意外，请出行前做必要的身体检查，如存在下列情况请勿报名：传染性疾病（如活动期肺结核、伤寒）；心血管疾病（严重高血压、心功能不全、心肌缺氧、心肌梗塞）；脑血管疾病（脑栓塞、脑出血、脑肿瘤）；呼吸系统疾病（肺气肿、肺心病）；精神病（癫痫及各种精神病）；严重贫血（血红蛋白低于50克/升）；大中型手术恢复期。孕妇：妊娠第35周及以上任何情况下都无法参团；第28周及以上需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书；第28周以下请慎重报名，需签署旅行社免责声明书，且无法参加探险、滑雪、出海、高空、户外等项目。残疾人需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书、需直系家属陪同，并至少提前61天申请预留位置及专用设施。老年旅游者（70周岁以上）需提供健康证明及体检报告、需直系家属陪同（否则签署免责声明书），本行程较长对步行能力和体力要求较高，体力不支者请慎重报名；涉及探险、滑雪、出海、高空、户外等项目需持主治医师同意书，并至少提前61天申请适老化服务与设施。未成年人（未满18周岁）须由直系亲属或监护人陪同（无父母陪同需持父母授权书）；部分景点对未满18/12/6周岁有特殊限定；6岁以下婴儿或30公斤以下儿童需提前确认安全座椅；本产品不接受2周岁以下婴儿参团。根据《旅游法》第15条，旅游者需如实告知与旅游活动相关的个人健康信息（包括妊娠期、哺乳期、慢性病、传染病史、疑似症状或近期疫区旅居史）并遵守安全警示规定，若因隐瞒健康信息导致人身损害或财产损失，旅游者需自行承担责任。

title_en: Switzerland & Italy 8-Day Tour: Zurich to Rome One-Way
title_zh: 瑞士意大利8天跟团游：苏黎世至罗马单程线路
short_en: An 8-day one-way journey from Zurich to Rome — Golden Pass rail, Alpine peaks, Milan, Venice, Florence, Cinque Terre and the Eternal City.
short_zh: 8天单程之旅，从苏黎世直抵罗马——金色山口列车、阿尔卑斯雪山、米兰、威尼斯、佛罗伦萨、五渔村与永恒之城罗马。
desc_en: Travel one-way from Zurich to Rome on this 8-day Switzerland-Italy escape. Begin among Swiss lakes and the Golden Pass scenic railway, overnight beneath the Jungfrau and at the infinity-pool Cambrian hotel in Adelboden, then cross the Simplon Pass past the Matterhorn into Italy. From there discover Milan, romantic Venice, Renaissance Florence, the cliffside fishing villages of Cinque Terre and Pisa, ending with a free day to wander Rome's timeless ruins. A deep, one-direction route that trades backtracking for more sightseeing time and city-centre comfort.
desc_zh: 这条8天瑞士意大利单程线路，带您从苏黎世一路畅游至罗马。旅程始于瑞士湖光山色与金色山口观光列车，夜宿少女峰山脚及阿德尔博登的无边泳池寒武纪酒店，随后翻越辛普朗山口、远眺马特洪峰进入意大利。接着探访米兰、浪漫威尼斯、文艺复兴之都佛罗伦萨、悬崖上的五渔村与比萨，最后以罗马自由活动一整天收尾，漫步千年古迹。单向深度路线，减少折返、增加游览时长，并享受市中心住宿的舒适便利。

highlights.en: Ride the Golden Pass scenic train through the Swiss Alps to Lungern
highlights.zh: 乘坐金色山口观光列车穿越瑞士阿尔卑斯山直达龙疆镇

highlights.en: Overnight at the infinity-pool Cambrian hotel in Adelboden with panoramic Alpine views
highlights.zh: 夜宿阿德尔博登无边泳池寒武纪酒店，尽享阿尔卑斯雪山全景

highlights.en: Cross the Simplon Pass past the iconic Matterhorn and car-free Zermatt into Italy
highlights.zh: 翻越辛普朗山口，途经标志性的马特洪峰与无车小镇采尔马特进入意大利

highlights.en: Explore Milan, romantic Venice and Renaissance Florence
highlights.zh: 畅游米兰、浪漫威尼斯与文艺复兴之都佛罗伦萨

highlights.en: Scenic train to the cliffside fishing villages of Cinque Terre and the Leaning Tower of Pisa
highlights.zh: 搭乘景观列车游览悬崖上的五渔村，并造访比萨斜塔

highlights.en: Full free day in Rome — Colosseum, Pantheon, Spanish Steps and Trevi Fountain
highlights.zh: 罗马自由活动一整天——斗兽场、万神殿、西班牙广场与特莱维喷泉

highlights.en: High-speed rail and flights included with city-centre 4-star hotels and a one-way deep route
highlights.zh: 含高铁与机票、市中心四星级酒店，单程深度路线

highlights.en: Small group of 6-15, all-inclusive pricing with no forced shopping
highlights.zh: 6-15人精品小团，全含报价，绝无强制购物

includes.en: Hotels: 7 nights in 4-star hotels.
includes.zh: 【酒店】：四星级酒店7晚。

includes.en: Meals: 7 meals total, hotel breakfast or meals in another form.
includes.zh: 【餐饮】：酒店内早餐或其他形式餐饮共计7餐。

includes.en: Taxes and fees: all taxes within the itinerary, including the tourist city tax, town-entry fee, residence tax, road and bridge tolls, island-landing fee, etc.
includes.zh: 【税费】：游客城市税、进城费、居住税、路桥费、登岛费等行程内的所有税费。

includes.en: Transport: tour coach or business travel van.
includes.zh: 【交通】：旅游巴士或者商务旅行车。

includes.en: Guide: professional driver plus Chinese-speaking guide, or a Chinese-speaking driver-guide throughout (note: for groups of 8 or fewer, a business travel van with a Chinese-speaking driver-guide is arranged, who will lead the tour of all the cities on the itinerary).
includes.zh: 【导游】：职业司机+中文导游或者全程中文司机兼导游（备注：8人及以下则安排为商务旅行车+中文司机兼导游，届时将由司兼导带领游览全部城市行程）。

includes.en: Luggage: one 23 kg checked bag plus one carry-on.
includes.zh: 【行李】：1件23公斤行李及1件随身行李。

includes.en: Activities and tickets: GoldenPass train second-class ticket (Lucerne–Lungern section), Täsch–Zermatt scenic train ticket, Venice island ferry, and the Cinque Terre scenic train.
includes.zh: 【活动及门票】：金色山口列车二等票（卢塞恩-龙疆段）、塔什-采尔马特段观光火车票、威尼斯登岛轮渡、五渔村景观列车。

excludes.en: Passport: personal passport fees.
excludes.zh: 护照：个人护照费用。

excludes.en: Visa: the tourist visa fees required for the countries on the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 签证：行程中所列旅游国家所需的观光签证费用。

excludes.en: Insurance: travel insurance fees (if the itinerary involves high-risk sports, verify whether your travel insurance covers them).
excludes.zh: 保险：旅游保险费用（如行程内涉及到高风险运动，请核实旅游保险是否包含该项运动）。

excludes.en: Gratuities: guide and driver tips totalling EUR 10 per person per day, same rate for adults and children.
excludes.zh: 小费：游客支付导游和司机小费一共10欧/人/天，大小同价。

excludes.en: Meals: lunches and dinners are not included.
excludes.zh: 餐饮：行程中不包含午、晚正餐费用。
