excludes.en: Entrance fees: any sight not explicitly marked as included — including but not limited to sights noted as "exterior", and all "recommended", "optional", "experience" and other items not stated as included; if you wish to enter, please pay on your own.
excludes.zh: 门票：行程中未注明费用包含的景点（包括但不仅限于行程中注明“外观”的景点，以及“推荐”“可选”“体验”等所有未提及费用包含的项目，如游客需要参观，敬请自理）。

excludes.en: Extended stays: any accommodation, transport and sightseeing beyond the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 延长住宿：行程外额外延长的住宿、交通、观光费用。

excludes.en: Personal spending: drinks and alcohol, taxis, phone charges and other personal expenses.
excludes.zh: 私人消费：如饮料酒类、出租车、电话费等个人消费。

excludes.en: Other transport: transport not mentioned in the inclusions beyond the included business van or minibus, such as the Venice gondola and the scenic trains, electric taxis, etc. in vehicle-restricted zones — please pay on your own.
excludes.zh: 其他交通：除包含商务旅行车或者中巴之外，费用包含中未提及的其他交通费用，如威尼斯贡多拉，以及车辆限行区的观光火车、电瓶出租车等费用敬请自理。

excludes.en: Free-time activities: guests' own evening sightseeing and the itinerary's recommended items, plus any transport, dining, tickets and shopping arising from them.
excludes.zh: 自由活动：游客夜间自行游览及行程中的推荐项目，以及产生的交通、餐饮、门票、购物等费用。

excludes.en: Experience activities: any travel experience activities not included in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 体验活动：行程中的没有包含的各项旅游体验活动。

excludes.en: Other costs: any fees not mentioned in the inclusions. In cases of force majeure such as natural disaster, war or strike, or transport delays, flight cancellations or rescheduling, embassy visa delays, insufficient group numbers and similar special circumstances or other causes not attributable to the company (e.g. overseas visa-extension fees, accommodation, meals and transport, national airfare adjustments), the company reserves the right to charge the price difference.
excludes.zh: 其他费用：费用包含中未提及的费用。如因天灾、战争、罢工等不可抗力的原因，及因交通延阻、航班取消或更改时间、使馆延误出签证、人数不足等特殊情况或其他非我公司原因所引致的额外费用（如在外延期签证费、住、食及交通费、国家航空运价调整等），我公司有权追加差价。

timeline.title_en: Zurich – Lucerne – Lungern – Interlaken (GoldenPass scenic train direct to Lungern, sweeping Swiss lake views)
timeline.title_zh: 苏黎世-卢塞恩-龙疆-因特拉肯（金色山口列车直达龙疆镇，尽览瑞士如画湖景）
timeline.description_en: Meet in Zurich, then tour Zurich Cathedral (exterior), Lake Zurich and the Bahnhofstrasse shopping avenue. Continue to Lucerne to take in the lake and mountain scenery, the Lion Monument that tells of Swiss loyalty and resolve, the Chapel Bridge (Kapellbrücke) and the octagonal Water Tower. Then board the GoldenPass scenic train (Luzern–Lungern Express) for the roughly one-hour ride over mountains and valleys to Lungern, taking in Lake Lungern and the small-town scenery along the way. Drive on to the Jungfrau Region around Interlaken to check in. Overnight: Victoria Meiringen or an equivalent 4-star hotel. Note: this product can also start from Frankfurt (Frankfurt–Zurich, e.g. ICE 275 06:50–11:00) or from Paris (Paris–Zurich, e.g. Lyria 9203 07:22–11:26); on departures of 26 Apr / 3 May / 12 Jul / 26 Jul, guests stay at a spa hotel in the Leukerbad area instead of The Cambrian, with thermal-spa fees at own expense.
timeline.description_zh: 苏黎世集合后，游览苏黎世大教堂（外观）、苏黎世湖与班霍夫大街等景点。之后前往卢塞恩，欣赏卢塞恩湖的湖光山色，聆听狮子纪念碑讲述瑞士人忠贞坚毅的那段历史，并游览卡贝尔廊桥与八角形水塔等景点。随后乘坐金色山口观光列车（卢塞恩-龙疆段）前往龙疆，约1小时车程穿山越岭，一路欣赏美丽风景，游览龙疆湖及小镇风光。前往因特拉肯少女峰大区入住酒店。夜宿：迈林根维多利亚或同等4星级酒店。提示：本产品也可从法兰克福出发（法兰克福-苏黎世，参考班次ICE 275 06:50–11:00）或从巴黎出发（巴黎-苏黎世，参考班次Lyria 9203 07:22–11:26）；4月26日、5月3日、7月12日、7月26日团期不住寒武纪，改住洛伊克巴德地区温泉酒店，温泉费用敬请自理。

timeline.title_en: Interlaken – Jungfrau Region – Adelboden (dreamlike Alpine slopes, infinity pool at The Cambrian)
timeline.title_zh: 因特拉肯-少女峰地区-阿德尔博登（阿尔卑斯梦幻山坡景观，无边泳池寒武纪酒店）
timeline.description_en: In the morning head to Interlaken, set between Lake Brienz and Lake Thun (the so-called "left and right eyes of God"), where you can freely explore the Höheweg promenade, the Höhematte green and quiet tree-shaded villages. From here you choose ONE of three options (you cannot combine them): (1) included — a coach tour of the Jungfrau Region, visiting Grindelwald's classic "dreamy slopes" with views of the Jungfrau and the Eiger Glacier; (2) at own cost EUR 230 — the panoramic cable car up to the Jungfraujoch ("Top of Europe", Europe's highest railway station) to the Sphinx Observatory and the Aletsch Glacier, passing Lauterbrunnen and its waterfalls, covering six classic sights including the Ice Palace and Plateau viewpoint; (3) at own cost EUR 70 — the First–Grindelwald aerial gondola round-trip up to First peak for the famous First Cliff Walk, with optional thrill activities like the First Flyer zipline and First Glider. Afterwards check in. Overnight: The Cambrian hotel (Adelboden). The Cambrian's Alpine thermal spa is NOT included (bring your own swimwear; underwear is not allowed); rooms are base category with random bed type, view and orientation that cannot be specified. On 26 Apr / 3 May / 12 Jul / 26 Jul departures, guests stay at a Leukerbad-area spa hotel instead, thermal fees at own expense.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往位于布里恩茨湖与图恩湖之间（有“上帝左眼与右眼”之称）的因特拉肯，可自由游览何维克街、荷黑马特及绿树掩映的宁静村庄。此处需在以下三项中三选一，不可同时选择两项：（一）费用包含——跟随导游乘车游览少女峰地区，游览格林德尔瓦尔德经典的“梦幻山坡”，远观少女峰及艾格冰川；（二）自费230欧元——乘坐全景缆车登顶少女峰（Top of Europe，欧洲最高火车站），前往斯芬克斯观景台俯瞰少女峰与阿莱奇冰川，途经劳特布龙嫩欣赏高山风光与瀑布群，游览水晶宫、高原观景台等6个经典景点；（三）自费70欧元——从格林德尔瓦尔德乘坐空中贡多拉往返菲斯特峰，游览著名的悬崖天梭巅峰栈道First Cliff Walk，并可选择高空飞索、神鹰飞行等惊险活动。之后入住酒店。夜宿：寒武纪酒店（阿德尔博登）。本行程不含寒武纪阿尔卑斯景观温泉（需自备泳衣，穿内衣可能被禁止入内）；房型为基础房型，床型、风景与朝向均随机分配，无法指定。4月26日、5月3日、7月12日、7月26日团期改住洛伊克巴德地区温泉酒店，温泉费用敬请自理。

timeline.title_en: Adelboden – Zermatt – Milan (a cloud-top theatre to admire the Matterhorn's reflection and golden glow)
timeline.title_zh: 阿德尔博登-采尔马特-米兰（雪山云端剧场欣赏马特洪峰的倒影与金色礼服）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast set off for Zermatt; transfer onto the Täsch–Zermatt shuttle train into the car-free village (only a few electric carts and horse carriages are allowed) for free time. Here you may, at your own cost, ride the cable car up to the Matterhorn Glacier Paradise (adult EUR 150, child 9–15 EUR 90) for spectacular views of snow and glaciers — note the guide does not accompany this ascent, you transfer on your own and should bring your own light meal. The famous Matterhorn (4,478 m) is viewed from afar from Zermatt, where the classic shot is its reflection in the Riffelsee. Then drive over the majestic Simplon Pass into Italy and on to the fashion capital, Milan. (The Simplon car-train rail service may be unavailable after heavy snowfall or rain-triggered mudslide risk.) Overnight: Milan UNA or BW, or an equivalent 4-star hotel near the Duomo.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后出发前往采尔马特，乘坐塔什-采尔马特观光列车进入这座无汽车的小镇（仅有少量电瓶车和马车），自由参观。可自费乘坐缆车前往马特洪峰冰川天堂（成人150欧/人，9–15岁儿童90欧/人），欣赏雪山冰川之巅的壮丽美景——此段无导游陪同，需自行换乘并自备简餐。海拔4478米的马特洪峰为远观，在采尔马特可拍到其在利菲尔湖中的完美倒影这一标志性画面。之后乘车穿越雄伟的辛普朗山口进入意大利境内，前往时尚之都米兰。（辛普朗山口的铁路汽车服务在强暴雪后或降雨引发泥石流风险下将无法体验。）夜宿：米兰UNA或BW或同等4星级酒店，位于市中心，距米兰大教堂约10分钟车程。

timeline.title_en: Milan – Venice (admire the exquisite Gothic architecture that took 500 years to complete)
timeline.title_zh: 米兰-威尼斯（瞻仰历经500年建成的哥特式精美建筑）
timeline.description_en: In the morning visit Sforza Castle (exterior), Milan's medieval-to-Renaissance fortress and later residence of the Sforza family, now a city museum complex. Then see Milan's landmark, the Milan Cathedral / Duomo (exterior) — a Gothic masterpiece begun in 1386 and finished only after 500 years, crowned with some 135 spires and around 6,000 marble statues. Stroll the Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II, one of Europe's most beautiful shopping arcades, home to a flagship Prada boutique and elegant cafés and restaurants. In the afternoon depart for Venice. Overnight: Venice voco Hotel or Hilton Garden Inn, or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往参观米兰中世纪到文艺复兴时期的堡垒斯福尔扎城堡（外观），它见证了米兰的沧桑历史，现被辟为博物馆群。之后参观米兰的标志性建筑米兰大教堂/Duomo（外观）——始建于1386年、历经500年才建成的哥特式杰作，共有约135座尖塔与约6000座大理石雕像。漫步欧洲漂亮的商业拱廊之一埃马努埃莱二世拱廊，廊下有规模数一数二的Prada精品店及众多高级餐馆、咖啡厅。下午出发前往威尼斯。夜宿：威尼斯洲际voco酒店或希尔顿大使酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Venice – Florence (the romance of Venice on gentle blue waters)
timeline.title_zh: 威尼斯-佛罗伦萨（游览温柔碧波上浪漫的威尼斯）
timeline.description_en: In the morning take the ferry to the main island of Venice to see St Mark's Basilica (exterior), St Mark's Square — once called "the most beautiful drawing room in Europe" by Napoleon — the Bridge of Sighs (exterior) and the magnificent Doge's Palace (exterior); these water-bound buildings and winding canals make Venice's romance unforgettable. Here you may also sample Venice's signature squid-ink pasta set meal (at own expense). Afterwards travel to Florence to check in. Overnight: Hilton Garden Inn Florence, or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午乘轮渡前往威尼斯大岛，参观圣马可大教堂（外观）、圣马可广场（曾被拿破仑称作“欧洲美丽的客厅”）、叹息桥（外观）以及华丽的总督宫（外观）；这些建造在水上的美丽建筑与蜿蜒的水巷让威尼斯的浪漫风情久久挥之不去。在这里您还可以品尝威尼斯特色墨鱼面三道式（自理）。之后前往佛罗伦萨入住酒店。夜宿：佛罗伦萨希尔顿花园酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Florence – Cinque Terre – Pisa – Florence (a scenic train to the beautiful cliff-side fishing villages)
timeline.title_zh: 佛罗伦萨-五渔村-比萨-佛罗伦萨（景观列车游览悬崖上的美丽渔村）
timeline.description_en: In the morning set off for Cinque Terre along the Ligurian coast to explore the beautiful cliff-side fishing villages — Monterosso al Mare, Vernazza, Corniglia, Manarola and Riomaggiore (a UNESCO World Heritage Site) — usually visiting a selection of the villages as time and stamina allow. In the afternoon continue to Pisa to see the Leaning Tower of Pisa (exterior) and the Piazza dei Miracoli (Square of Miracles), home to the cathedral, baptistery, leaning bell tower and cemetery. Then return to Florence to check in. Overnight: Hilton Garden Inn Florence, or an equivalent 4-star hotel. Note: if bad weather or a rail strike prevents the Cinque Terre visit, the itinerary automatically switches to touring the coastal towns by coach or other means.
timeline.description_zh: 上午出发前往五渔村，沿利古里亚海岸线游览悬崖上的美丽渔村——蒙特罗索、韦尔纳扎、科尔尼利亚、马纳罗拉及里奥马焦雷（1997年列入世界文化遗产），通常因时间和体力原因选择其中个别村子游览，由导游具体安排。下午前往比萨，游览比萨斜塔（外观）和比萨历史文化中心的奇迹广场（广场上有主教座堂、斜塔钟楼、洗礼堂、墓园四大建筑）。之后返回佛罗伦萨入住酒店。夜宿：佛罗伦萨希尔顿花园酒店或同等4星级酒店。备注：如遇恶劣天气或铁路公司罢工等因素导致无法游览五渔村，行程将自动更改为乘坐大巴或其它形式游览海岸线城市。

timeline.title_en: Florence – Rome (land of poetry and the soul of the Renaissance — an artistic journey)
timeline.title_zh: 佛罗伦萨-罗马（诗歌之地，文艺复兴之魂，享受艺术之旅）
timeline.description_en: In the morning explore Florence, the cradle of the Renaissance, touring the old-town sights: the Florence Cathedral (Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore, the world's third-largest church; entry requires queueing), the Piazza della Signoria with the Palazzo Vecchio and a replica of Michelangelo's David, the Ponte Vecchio (old bridge), and the Basilica of Santa Croce (exterior) and its square — Santa Croce holds memorials and tombs of Dante, Michelangelo, Galileo, Machiavelli, Rossini and others. Then travel to Rome to check in. Overnight: Rome San Martino Hotel or Hotel Moderno, or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午游览文艺复兴的发源地佛罗伦萨，参观老城景点：世界第三大教堂——圣母百花大教堂（需排队进入）、市政广场（坐落着维琪奥宫与米开朗基罗《大卫》雕像的复制品及海神喷泉）、老桥（维奇奥桥），以及圣十字大教堂（外观）及圣十字广场——堂内有但丁、米开朗基罗、伽利略、马基雅维利、罗西尼等名人的纪念碑与陵墓。之后前往罗马入住酒店。夜宿：罗马圣马丁酒店或现代酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Rome (free day — wander the legends of the Eternal City from your hotel)
timeline.title_zh: 罗马（以酒店为半径，漫步游览罗马之城的所有传奇）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast you may leave your luggage at the hotel front desk and enjoy a full free day in Rome, after which the group disperses on its own. Recommended sights: the Colosseum, the Pantheon, the Spanish Steps and the Trevi Fountain. As central Rome's landmarks are clustered together in pedestrian areas, you can explore on foot combined with the metro. You may book a flight departing Rome the same day.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后可将行李寄存酒店前台，罗马自由活动一整天，随后自行散团。推荐景点：斗兽场、万神殿、西班牙广场和特莱维喷泉。由于罗马市中心各景点非常集中且都是步行街区，可徒步加地铁游览。可预定当天离开罗马的航班。

meeting_en: Zurich, Switzerland — group meets in Zurich on Day 1; tour ends in Rome (disbands after the free day). Optional departures from Frankfurt or Paris by high-speed rail.
meeting_zh: 瑞士苏黎世——第1天在苏黎世集合，行程于罗马结束（自由活动后散团）。可选择从法兰克福或巴黎乘高铁出发。

faqs.question_en: Where and how do we meet and disperse?
faqs.question_zh: 集合及集散地点和方法？
faqs.answer_en: Route A from Zurich: on Day 1 meet at Zurich Airport at 11:00, or in front of the McDonald's at Zurich Central Station at 11:30; on Day 8 Rome is a free day, after hotel breakfast you may leave luggage at the front desk (times/places are for reference; the actual departure follows the tour-confirmation letter). You may book a flight landing in Zurich on the morning of the start day, but you will then miss the Zurich city sights with no refund; you may book a flight leaving Rome the same day. Route B from Paris: on Day 1 travel by train to Zurich on your own to meet (reference Lyria 9203 07:22–11:26); latest boarding in Zurich is 13:00, but the Zurich city sights will be missed with no refund. Route C from Frankfurt: on Day 1 travel by train to Zurich on your own (reference ICE 275 06:50–11:00); latest boarding in Zurich is 13:00, same no-refund rule for missed Zurich sights. All three routes end with a free day in Rome on Day 8.
faqs.answer_zh: A线路苏黎世出发：第1天11:00在苏黎世机场集合，11:30在苏黎世中央火车站麦当劳门口集合；第8天罗马自由活动，酒店早餐后可将行李寄存前台（参考时间及地点，实际出发以出团通知书为准）。可预订当天早上降落苏黎世的航班，但苏黎世市区景点将无法游览且无费用可退；可预定当天离开罗马的航班。B线路巴黎出发：第1天自行乘火车前往苏黎世集合（参考班次Lyria 9203 07:22–11:26），最晚13:00在苏黎世上团，但苏黎世市区景点将无法游览且无费用可退。C线路法兰克福出发：第1天自行乘火车前往苏黎世集合（参考班次ICE275 06:50–11:00），最晚13:00在苏黎世上团，同样无费用可退。三条线路第8天均为罗马自由活动后自行散团。

faqs.question_en: Are the coach rides very long?
faqs.question_zh: 行程路线乘坐大巴时间会不会很久？
faqs.answer_en: The planned driving times are around 3–4 hours each. Road conditions can be complex — city traffic jams or other factors may increase travel time, and the Lucerne-to-Milan tunnel is prone to congestion that can lengthen the journey.
faqs.answer_zh: 该产品计划行程均为3–4小时左右的行车时间。公路交通情况复杂，特别是市区内容易发生堵车或其它因素导致行车时间增加，同时卢塞恩到米兰的隧道容易发生堵车导致行程时间增加。

faqs.question_en: Can we go to the top of the Jungfrau?
faqs.question_zh: 产品是否可以游览少女峰登顶？
faqs.answer_en: Yes, but it is not included in the price. If you want to do it, book in advance. The available time for this option is limited and may conflict with the original itinerary, affecting other arrangements and experiences.
faqs.answer_zh: 可以游览但费用不包含，如需参加建议提前预定。可选的体验时间受限，可能跟原行程安排产生冲突，导致影响其他行程和体验的安排。

faqs.question_en: Can we visit the First (Top of Adventure) area, and what activities are there?
faqs.question_zh: 我是否能游览菲斯特瑞士空天探险活动（First Top of Adventure）？都有什么探险活动？
faqs.answer_en: Yes, but it is not included — book in advance if you want to go. First's Top of Adventure offers many thrilling Alpine activities, mainly: the Aerial Gondola, the First Cliff Walk, the First Flyer zipline and the First Glider. These can be purchased on site depending on the day's queue and weather.
faqs.answer_zh: 可以游览但费用不包含，如需参加建议提前预定。菲斯特空天探险有很多惊险刺激的高山活动，主要项目有：空中贡多拉（Aerial gondola）、悬崖天梭巅峰栈道（First Cliff Walk）、高空飞索（First Flyer）、神鹰飞梭（First Glider），可根据当天排队时间及天气情况现场购买。

faqs.question_en: Can we do both the Jungfrau panoramic train and the First Top of Adventure on the same day?
faqs.question_zh: 我是否能同时选择少女峰观光列车和菲斯特空天探险两个项目？
faqs.answer_en: No. There are only about 5–6 hours of free time in Interlaken that day. The Jungfrau is recommended to take 4–5 hours and First needs 3–4 hours, so the two cannot both be done.
faqs.answer_zh: 不可以。当天在因特拉肯仅有5–6小时自由活动时间，推荐游览少女峰时间为4到5小时，菲斯特需要3–4个小时，因此两者无法同时选择。

faqs.question_en: Is the free day in Rome convenient to get around?
faqs.question_zh: 罗马自由行是否方便？
faqs.answer_en: Yes. Central Rome's sights are very concentrated and located in pedestrian zones, so you can tour the city centre on foot combined with the metro.
faqs.answer_zh: 方便。由于罗马市中心各景点非常集中并且都是步行街区，罗马市中心景点可徒步+地铁游览。

faqs.question_en: Can we choose different dinner menus and dishes to our taste?
faqs.question_zh: 我们的晚餐是否能根据喜好选择不同的菜单和菜品？
faqs.answer_en: The recommended meals on the itinerary are all recommended local specialities and are NOT included in the price — for example Venice's famous squid-ink pasta and the Tuscan steak. If a dish is not your first choice you are free to choose other dining on your own.
faqs.answer_zh: 行程内推荐的餐饮全部为推荐当地特色餐，费用并未包含，比如威尼斯著名的黑墨鱼面、托斯卡纳的牛排等。如果菜品并非您的首选，可以自行选择其他餐饮。

faqs.question_en: Are Zermatt / "Zelmate" the same, is it car-free, and how do we visit?
faqs.question_zh: 泽尔马特和采尔马特是无车村？我们应该怎么玩？都包含什么？
faqs.answer_en: "Zelmate" and "Zermatt" are the same town, just different transliterations. That day the cost includes the Zermatt red shuttle train; after reaching the car-free village you have about 4 hours of free time (the guide cannot accompany you up the mountain). If you wish to take the cable car to the Matterhorn Glacier Paradise on your own you must buy your own ticket and bring your own light meal.
faqs.answer_zh: 泽尔马特和采尔马特是相同的城市，不同的翻译。当天费用包含采尔马特红色专列，到达无车村小镇后自由活动（导游无法陪同登山），当天约4小时；如希望自行乘坐缆车登顶马特洪峰，则需自己购票并自备简餐。

faqs.question_en: Can we specify a south-facing twin-bed balcony room (or a classic room type) at The Cambrian?
faqs.question_zh: 我们是否能指定寒武纪酒店南坡的阳台双床房？或者指定经典寒武纪房型？
faqs.answer_en: No. The Cambrian rooms we book are base category — bed type (twin or double cannot be specified), orientation and view cannot be chosen or guaranteed. We recommend upgrading in advance to a junior or large suite, which allows you to choose orientation and bed type and offers a larger room and better views.
faqs.answer_zh: 我社预定的寒武纪酒店为基础房型，无法选择房型、床型（包含无法指定双床房或大床房）、朝向等，无法确保指定房型或者双人床。推荐提前升级为小型套房或大型套房，这类房型可以选择朝向和床型，并且房间面积比较大，视野更好。

faqs.question_en: Do I need a visa?
faqs.question_zh: 是否需要签证？
faqs.answer_en: Yes. This product requires a Schengen visa (single or multiple entry) and the visa fee is NOT included — if you need one, choose a product with a Schengen visa. After booking we provide free of charge all the materials for the Schengen visa application (see the detailed materials checklist). Your passport must be valid for at least six months from the date of departure, or customs may refuse entry. "Visa-worry-free guarantee": if you sign a tour contract with us at least 61 days before departure and have not obtained the visa within 45 days before departure, we bear all losses and immediately refund your full travel cost. If you are refused, notify us within 48 hours with the consulate's refusal letter, submit any supplementary/amended materials within five days, and do not unilaterally waive the right to a visa appeal. If you commission us to handle the Schengen visa, we will buy you Schengen-compliant travel insurance; otherwise you must arrange your own. Note: the visa fee, visa service fee, Schengen insurance fee and visa-centre appointment fee are all non-refundable and non-transferable, even if the product is changed or cancelled.
faqs.answer_zh: 需要。本产品需要申根签证（单次或多次入境），且不包含签证费用——如需办理请选择申根签证产品。预定后免费提供办理申根签证的全部材料（参考详细材料清单）。护照有效期需在离境之日起至少还有六个月，否则海关有权拒绝入境。“保签无忧”：游客在出发日前61天与我社签约旅游产品，如在出发前45天内未获取签证，我社承担所有损失，立即退还全部旅游费用；如遇拒签需在48小时内通知我社并出具使领馆拒签函，如需补充或更改材料须在五天内提交，且不得单方面放弃“签证抗辩”权利。如委托我社办理申根签证，我社为您购买符合要求的申根旅游保险，否则需自行购买。签证费、签证服务费、申根保险费、签证中心预约费均不可退款，也无法更改使用者，即使产品退改签，签证费用也无法退款。

faqs.question_en: Booking, changes & cancellation
faqs.question_zh: 预订、变更与取消须知
faqs.answer_en: Free no-reason cancellation is allowed by both sides up to 30 days before departure (the 30th day excluded). Because flights, traffic, ferries and strikes can shift the order and timing of sightseeing, you must arrive at the meeting point one day before the tour starts and leave the dispersal point one day after it ends, allowing reasonable connection time (recommended meeting/dispersal window 07:00–21:00; allow at least 5 hours for connecting at the same airport, 7 hours for different airports in the same city). This is a multi-origin shared ("join-in") group: other guests start and end in different cities at different prices, so follow your own booked origin and end point. Train tickets are booked in advance and are non-refundable/non-changeable. Pricing is in EUR at the time of booking; if you pay in CNY, the rate is the Bank of China "EUR selling price" automatically calculated on the day of payment (refunds use the same-day rate; any exchange differences or bank fees are borne by the traveller). Rooms: two people booking together default to a standard double (bed type assigned by the hotel, cannot be specified); three-person family rooms default to two parents plus one minor; solo travellers include a single-room supplement deposit (refunded pro-rata if successfully matched as a roommate). The Cambrian is base category (double bed) with random view/orientation and does NOT include its Alpine thermal spa (roughly CHF 30–60, paid on site). Itinerary contingencies: the Simplon car-train may be unavailable after heavy snow or mudslide risk; if bad weather or a rail strike prevents Cinque Terre, the coast is toured by coach instead; the Paris–Zurich Lyria may be rerouted (e.g. via Mulhouse) or replaced by bus, adding ~2 hours, with free door-to-door transfer provided and treated as an equivalent itinerary. The group is announced as confirmed (成团) at 10 people; if 10 is not reached 30 days before departure (or 14 days for the join-in minimum), either side may cancel without liability.
faqs.answer_zh: 出发前30天（不含第30天）旅行社与旅行者均有权无理由取消。由于航变、交通拥堵、渡轮取消、罢工游行等因素及行程顺序调整，游览时间与先后顺序常有变动，故要求旅行者在旅游团开始前一天到达集合地、结束后一天离开集散地，并预留合理衔接时间（建议集散时段07:00–21:00；同一机场转机至少预留5小时，同城不同机场至少7小时）。本产品为多出发目的地“散客”拼团，其他游客在不同城市、以不同价格开始和结束，敬请按本人报名的目的地开始和结束行程。火车票提前预定，不可退改。所有定价以欧元为预定时计价单位，如选择人民币支付，则以当天支付时本网站依据中国银行实时“欧元卖出价”自动计算的人民币实时价格为准（退款同样适用申请当日即时汇率，汇率差异或银行手续费由旅行者承担）。房型：两人同时报名默认标准双人间（床型由酒店安排不可指定）；三人家庭间默认两位父母与一位未成年儿童；单人报名默认含单人房差押金，成功拼房后按比例退款。寒武纪酒店为基础房型（大床）、风景与朝向随机分配，且不含阿尔卑斯雪山温泉（约30–60瑞郎，现场计费）。行程应急：辛普朗山口在强暴雪或泥石流风险下铁路汽车服务无法体验；如恶劣天气或铁路罢工无法游览五渔村，改乘大巴游览海岸线；巴黎-苏黎世段Lyria可能改至其他车站（如Mulhouse）或全程改用巴士，行车时间增加约2小时，将免费提供点对点接送并视为同等行程。本产品成团人数为10人，开始前30天（拼团最低成团另以发团前14天计）未达成团人数，双方均可解除合同且不承担违约责任。

faqs.question_en: Health & safety requirements
faqs.question_zh: 健康与安全须知
faqs.answer_en: For your safety, please have a physical check before travelling and do NOT join if you have: an infectious disease (e.g. active tuberculosis, typhoid); cardiovascular disease (e.g. severe hypertension, heart failure, myocardial ischemia/infarction); cerebrovascular disease (e.g. embolism, hemorrhage, tumour); respiratory disease (e.g. emphysema, cor pulmonale); a psychiatric/neurological condition (e.g. epilepsy); severe anemia (hemoglobin below 50 g/L); or are recovering from major surgery. The itinerary includes regular sights above 1,000 m (Grindelwald 1,034 m, Zermatt 1,640 m) — if you have an underlying condition, confirm with your doctor before booking whether you can go to high altitude. Pregnancy: not allowed at all from week 35; from week 28 a doctor's report (within 7 days) and attending physician's consent are required; under week 28 join with caution, sign a liability waiver, and you cannot take part in adventure/ski/sea/high-altitude/outdoor activities. People with disabilities: doctor's report within 7 days, immediate-family escort, and apply at least 61 days ahead for reserved space/facilities. Elderly: those over 70 need a health certificate and family escort (or sign a waiver), need adequate walking ability for this long itinerary, and need an attending physician's consent for any adventure/ski/sea/high-altitude/outdoor activity. Minors: under-18s must be accompanied by immediate family/guardian; some sights have rules for under-18/12/6; infants under 2 are not accepted; child seats (under 6 / under 30 kg) must be confirmed in advance or brought (EU-compliant); an unaccompanied minor needs parental authorization (both parents' if not travelling with a parent). Per Article 15 of the PRC Tourism Law (and the Infectious Disease Prevention Law, 2025 revision), travellers must truthfully declare health information relevant to the trip — including pregnancy, lactation, chronic illness, infectious-disease history, suspected symptoms or recent travel to epidemic areas — and follow safety warnings; concealment causing harm makes the traveller liable for their own losses, medical/quarantine costs and compensation to others, and the agency may terminate the contract without refund.
faqs.answer_zh: 为确保顺利出行、防止旅途中发生人身意外，请出行前做必要的身体检查，如有下列情况请勿报名：传染性疾病（如活动期肺结核、伤寒）；心血管疾病（如严重高血压、心功能不全、心肌缺氧、心肌梗塞）；脑血管疾病（如脑栓塞、脑出血、脑肿瘤）；呼吸系统疾病（如肺气肿、肺心病）；精神病（如癫痫及各种精神病）；严重贫血（血红蛋白50克/升以下）；大中型手术恢复期。本行程含超过1000米海拔的常规景点（格林瓦尔德1034米、采尔马特1640米），如有基础疾病请报名前与医生确认是否能前往高海拔地区。孕妇：妊娠第35周及以上任何情况都无法参团；第28周及以上需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书；第28周以下请慎重报名，需签署旅行社免责声明书，且无法参加探险、滑雪、出海、高空、户外等项目。残疾人：需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书，需直系家属陪同，需提前至少61天申请预留位置及专用设施。老年旅游者：70周岁以上需提供健康证明、体检报告并直系家属陪同（否则需签署免责声明书），本行程较长需有一定步行能力，涉及探险、滑雪、出海、高空、户外等项目需持主治医师同意书，需提前至少61天申请适老化服务及设施。未成年人：未满18周岁需由直系亲属或监护人陪同，部分项目针对未满18/12/6周岁有特殊限定，不接受2周岁以下婴儿参团，6岁以下或30公斤以下儿童需提前确认安全座椅（否则需自备符合欧盟制式的座椅），无父母陪同的18岁以下未成年人须持父母授权书（仅一方陪同需另一方书面授权）。根据《旅游法》第15条及《传染病防治法（2025修订）》，旅游者需如实告知与旅游活动相关的个人健康信息（包括妊娠期、哺乳期、慢性病、传染病史、疑似症状或近期疫区旅居史）并遵守安全警示；若因隐瞒导致人身损害或传播风险，旅游者需自行承担责任及医疗、隔离费用与赔偿，旅行社可解除合同且不退还费用。

title_en: France-Italy-Switzerland In-Depth Small-Group Tour: Rome to Paris (10 Days)
title_zh: 法意瑞深度10天精品小团游：罗马至巴黎
short_en: A 10-day one-way journey from Rome to Paris across Italy, Switzerland and France, with Cinque Terre, the GoldenPass scenic train, Jungfrau and Burgundy wine country.
short_zh: 10天罗马至巴黎单程深度之旅，串联意大利、瑞士与法国，乘五渔村景观火车与金色山口列车，登少女峰，访勃艮第酒乡。
desc_en: This one-way 10-day small-group tour runs deep from Rome to Paris, weaving together three countries in a single seamless route. You begin in the Eternal City of Rome, roll through Tuscany's medieval hill towns, the cliffside villages of Cinque Terre, Renaissance Florence, romantic Venice and fashionable Milan, then cross the Alps into Switzerland for Lucerne, the GoldenPass scenic train, Interlaken and the Jungfrau region. The journey closes through Lake Geneva, a five-star Relais & Châteaux castle stay and the wine and gastronomy heartland of Burgundy before reaching Paris. With scenic landmark hotels, an all-inclusive price covering taxes, attractions and experiences, and an intimate small-group format, it is a culturally rich, slow-paced grand tour of Western Europe.
desc_zh: 这是一条从罗马一路深入直抵巴黎的10天单程精品小团之旅，将意大利、瑞士、法国三国景致串成一条无缝路线。旅程始于古罗马帝国发祥地、被誉为永恒之城的罗马，途经托斯卡纳中世纪山城、悬崖之上的五渔村、文艺复兴名城佛罗伦萨、浪漫水城威尼斯与时尚之都米兰，随后翻越阿尔卑斯山进入瑞士，游卢塞恩、乘金色山口景观列车、抵因特拉肯与少女峰地区，最后沿日内瓦湖、入住五星罗莱夏朵古堡酒店，并探访美酒美食之乡勃艮第，终抵巴黎。全程入住景观酒店，一价全含各项税费、门票与体验项目，精品小团形式，深度而从容地领略西欧人文风光。

highlights.en: Explore Rome, cradle of the Roman Empire, with the Colosseum, Pantheon, Spanish Steps and Trevi Fountain
highlights.zh: 深度探访古罗马帝国发祥地罗马，外观斗兽场、万神殿，游西班牙广场与特莱维喷泉

highlights.en: Ride the Cinque Terre scenic train along the Ligurian coast to the cliffside fishing villages
highlights.zh: 乘五渔村景观火车沿利古里亚海岸，畅游悬崖上的彩色渔村

highlights.en: Renaissance Florence: Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore, Ponte Vecchio and Piazzale Michelangelo
highlights.zh: 文艺复兴名城佛罗伦萨：圣母百花大教堂、老桥与米开朗琪罗广场登高俯瞰全城

highlights.en: Romantic Venice and fashionable Milan with its iconic Gothic Duomo
highlights.zh: 浪漫水城威尼斯与时尚之都米兰，瞻仰哥特式米兰大教堂

highlights.en: Ride the classic GoldenPass scenic train through the picture-perfect Swiss Alps
highlights.zh: 乘瑞士经典金色山口景观列车，尽览阿尔卑斯如画风景

highlights.en: Jungfrau region and a stay at the lakeside Giessbach hotel, a Crash Landing on You filming location
highlights.zh: 畅游少女峰地区，入住《爱的迫降》取景地——布里恩茨湖畔吉斯巴赫景观酒店

highlights.en: Lake Geneva, a five-star Relais & Châteaux castle stay and Burgundy wine country with cellar tasting
highlights.zh: 环游日内瓦湖，入住五星罗莱夏朵古堡酒店，探访勃艮第酒乡并由专业侍酒师讲解品酒

highlights.en: All-inclusive small-group tour: flights, rail, taxes, attractions and experiences covered, no forced shopping
highlights.zh: 一价全含精品小团：交通、税费、门票与体验项目全含，无强制购物

includes.en: Hotels: 1 night in a 5-star hotel and 8 nights in 4-star hotels
includes.zh: 【酒店】五星级酒店1晚及四星级酒店8晚

includes.en: Meals: 9 breakfasts (in-hotel buffet breakfast or breakfast in another form)
includes.zh: 【餐饮】酒店内自助早餐或其他形式早餐共计9餐

includes.en: Taxes & fees: city/tourist tax, city-entry fees, residence tax, Venice island-landing fee, driver-guide meal allowance and various travel taxes payable within the itinerary
includes.zh: 【税费】游客城市税、进城费、居住税、威尼斯登岛费、司导餐补及各类旅游税等行程内执行费用

includes.en: Transport: 7–9 seat business touring vehicle
includes.zh: 【交通】7-9座商务旅行车

includes.en: Guide: Chinese-speaking driver-guide throughout (driver doubles as guide)
includes.zh: 【导游】全程中文司机兼导游

includes.en: Luggage: 1 piece of 23 kg checked luggage and 1 carry-on piece
includes.zh: 【行李】1件23公斤行李及1件随身行李

includes.en: Tickets: Burgundy winery visit and wine tasting; the GoldenPass train (Lungern–Lucerne section); the Cinque Terre train; the Venice canal island ferry. (Spring/summer/autumn departures include the Giessbach cogwheel funicular and the Interlaken/Lake Brienz cruise, available 3 Apr–11 Oct 2026; when these two are not available in 2026, they are replaced by a Lake Lucerne cruise.)
includes.zh: 【门票】勃艮第酒庄参观及品酒费用、金色山口列车（龙疆-卢塞恩段）、五渔村小火车、威尼斯运河上岛渡轮。（每年春夏秋季产品含吉斯巴赫齿轮火车和因特拉肯游轮，体验时间：2026年4月3日-10月11日；2026年无法体验以上两项目期间，我社将替换为卢塞恩湖游船。）

excludes.en: Passport: personal passport fees
excludes.zh: 护照：个人护照费用

excludes.en: Visa: the tourist visa fees required for the countries listed in the itinerary
excludes.zh: 签证：行程中所列旅游国家所需的观光签证费用

excludes.en: Insurance: travel insurance fees (if the itinerary involves high-risk sports, please verify whether the travel insurance covers that activity)
excludes.zh: 保险：旅游保险费用（如行程内涉及到高风险运动，请核实旅游保险是否包含该项运动）

excludes.en: Tips: tips for guide and driver totalling EUR 10 per person per day, same price for adults and children
excludes.zh: 小费：游客支付导游和司机小费一共10欧/人/天，大小同价

excludes.en: Meals: apart from the special meals included in the itinerary, lunches and dinners are not included
excludes.zh: 餐饮：除行程内包含的特色餐外，行程中不包含午、晚正餐费用

excludes.en: Tickets: sights not marked as included (including but not limited to sights marked "(exterior)", as well as all "recommended", "optional", "experience" items and anything not stated as included — please cover these yourself if you wish to enter)
excludes.zh: 门票：行程中未注明费用包含的景点（包括但不仅限于行程中注明“外观”的景点，“推荐”“可选”“体验”等所有未提及费用包含的项目，如游客需要参观，敬请自理）

excludes.en: Extended stays: any extra accommodation, transport or sightseeing beyond the itinerary
excludes.zh: 延长住宿：行程外额外延长的住宿、交通、观光费用

excludes.en: Personal expenses: such as drinks/alcohol, taxis, phone charges and other personal spending
excludes.zh: 私人消费：如饮料酒类、出租车、电话费等个人消费

excludes.en: Other transport: transport not mentioned in the inclusions beyond the business touring vehicle or minibus — e.g. Venice gondolas, and sightseeing trains, electric taxis etc. in vehicle-restricted zones — to be paid for by the traveller
excludes.zh: 其他交通：除包含商务旅行车或者中巴之外，费用包含中未提及的其他交通费用，如威尼斯贡多拉，以及车辆限行区的观光火车、电瓶出租车等费用敬请自理

excludes.en: Free-time activities: nighttime self-guided touring and the recommended add-on items, plus any transport, meals, tickets and shopping costs arising from them
excludes.zh: 自由活动：游客夜间自行游览及行程中的推荐项目，以及产生的交通、餐饮、门票、购物等费用

excludes.en: Experience activities: any travel-experience activities not included in the itinerary
excludes.zh: 体验活动：行程中没有包含的各项旅游体验活动

excludes.en: Other costs: any fees not mentioned in the inclusions. If force majeure such as natural disasters, war or strikes, or special circumstances such as transport delays, flight cancellations/rescheduling, embassy visa delays, insufficient group numbers, etc. — or any extra costs not caused by our company — arise, our company reserves the right to charge a price difference
excludes.zh: 其他费用：费用包含中未提及的费用。如因天灾、战争、罢工等不可抗力的原因，及因交通延阻、航班取消或更改时间、使馆延误出签证、人数不足等特殊情况或其他非我公司原因所引致的额外费用，我公司有权追加差价

timeline.title_en: Rome — the Eternal City of the Roman Empire
timeline.title_zh: 罗马——重温“万城之城”古罗马帝国的辉煌
timeline.description_en: Assemble in Rome and explore the world-famous historic and cultural capital, the birthplace of the Roman Empire, known as the "Eternal City" for its long history. Tour the landmarks rising on the ruins of ancient Rome: the Colosseum (exterior) and the Pantheon (exterior), then visit the Spanish Steps (Piazza di Spagna) and the Trevi Fountain (exterior). After 14:00 you may check into the hotel on your own with your booking confirmation, or leave luggage at the front desk earlier. Note that the main sights in Rome's old town lie within the vehicle-restricted ZTL zone, so the day is on foot with a round-trip walk of about 5 km — please wear comfortable, lightweight footwear. Overnight at Rome's Hotel River Palace or a comparable 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 当天集合后游览世界著名的历史文化名城罗马，这里是古罗马帝国的发祥地，因历史悠久而被称为“永恒之城”。参观矗立在古罗马都城遗址上的斗兽场（外观）、万神殿（外观），并游览西班牙广场和特莱维喷泉（许愿池，外观）。当天14点后可凭订单自行入住酒店，或提前将行李寄存在酒店前台。罗马古城区主要景点均位于车辆禁行区（ZTL）内，当天为步行游览，往返步行约5公里，请穿着轻便舒适。夜宿罗马河畔宫殿酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Rome – Pienza – Siena – San Gimignano – Florence (Val d'Orcia cypress lane, medieval town of a thousand towers)
timeline.title_zh: 罗马—皮恩扎—锡耶纳—圣吉米尼亚诺—佛罗伦萨（奥尔恰谷丝柏树小径，中世纪万塔古城）
timeline.description_en: In the morning head to Pienza to walk the cypress lane and the old town, seeing Pienza Cathedral (exterior) and other sights. Continue to Siena to explore its medieval old town, Siena Cathedral (exterior), Piazza del Campo (the shell-shaped square), the Town Hall (Palazzo Pubblico, exterior) and the Torre del Mangia (exterior). Then visit the hilltop town of San Gimignano, the "Medieval Manhattan," viewing the Torre Grossa (exterior), the town hall (exterior) and the Piazza della Cisterna (Well Square). Pienza, the birthplace of Pope Pius II, is regarded as a model "ideal city" and offers views over the UNESCO-listed Val d'Orcia. Overnight at Florence's Tuscan-villa hotel (an 18th-century Tuscan-style villa with antique furnishings, a park of century-old olive trees, an outdoor pool and gym) or a comparable 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往皮恩扎，游览丝柏小路和皮恩扎古城，皮恩扎大教堂（外观）等景点；随后前往锡耶纳，游览锡耶纳古城、锡耶纳大教堂（外观）、田野广场（贝壳广场）、市政厅（外观）和曼吉亚塔楼（外观）；之后前往“中世纪曼哈顿”圣吉米尼亚诺小镇，外观格罗萨塔楼、市政厅（外观）和水井广场。皮恩扎是教皇皮乌斯二世的出生地，被视为“理想城市”的典范，可从城墙上俯瞰世界遗产奥尔恰山谷（Val d'Orcia）的景致。当晚入住佛罗伦萨托斯卡纳别墅酒店（18世纪托斯卡纳风格别墅，配仿古家具，拥有百年橄榄树花园、室外游泳池和健身房）或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Florence – Cinque Terre – Pisa – Florence (the scenic Cinque Terre train and the Ligurian coast)
timeline.title_zh: 佛罗伦萨—五渔村—比萨—佛罗伦萨（乘坐五渔村景观火车，赏利古里亚湾美景）
timeline.description_en: Set out in the morning for Pisa, touring the Leaning Tower of Pisa (exterior) and the Piazza dei Miracoli (Square of Miracles) at the heart of the city, where the cathedral, baptistery, leaning bell tower and cemetery — a UNESCO World Heritage site — stand together. Continue to the Cinque Terre, traveling along the Ligurian coastline to the five cliff-side fishing villages (Monterosso al Mare, Vernazza, Corniglia, Manarola and Riomaggiore), a UNESCO World Heritage site since 1997. Then return to the Florence hotel. Note: if bad weather or a railway strike makes the Cinque Terre inaccessible, the day automatically switches to touring the coastal towns by coach or other means. Overnight at Florence's Tuscan-villa hotel or a comparable 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午出发前往比萨，游览比萨斜塔（外观）和位于比萨历史文化中心的奇迹广场（Piazza dei Miracoli）——广场上集中了主教座堂、洗礼堂、斜塔（钟楼）和墓园，已列入世界遗产。随后沿利古里亚海岸线前往五漁村，游览悬崖上的五座美丽渔村（蒙特罗索、韦尔纳扎、科尔尼利亚、马纳罗拉及里奥马焦雷），1997年被联合国教科文组织列入世界文化遗产。之后返回佛罗伦萨酒店。备注：如遇恶劣天气或铁路公司罢工等因素导致无法游览五渔村，行程将自动改为乘坐大巴车或其它形式游览海岸线城市。夜宿佛罗伦萨托斯卡纳别墅酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Florence – Venice (Florence, cradle of the Renaissance, then on to Venice)
timeline.title_zh: 佛罗伦萨—威尼斯（温柔碧波上的威尼斯）
timeline.description_en: In the morning explore Florence, the birthplace of the Renaissance: visit the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore (the world's third-largest church, queue to enter), Piazza della Signoria (an open-air sculpture museum with the Palazzo Vecchio, a replica of Michelangelo's David and the Fountain of Neptune), the Ponte Vecchio (the old bridge over the Arno, built in 1345), and Piazzale Michelangelo, where you climb up for a sweeping panorama of the whole city. In the afternoon depart for Venice. Overnight at Venice's voco InterContinental hotel or the Four Points by Sheraton Venice, or a comparable 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午出发游览文艺复兴发源地佛罗伦萨，参观世界第三大教堂——圣母百花大教堂（需排队进入）、市政广场（露天雕塑博物馆，坐落着维琪奥宫、米开朗基罗《大卫》复制品及海神喷泉）、维奇奥桥（建于1345年的阿诺河老桥）以及米开朗基罗广场，在此登高俯瞰全城风景。下午出发前往威尼斯。夜宿威尼斯洲际VOCO酒店或威尼斯福朋喜来登酒店，或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Venice – Milan (the floating city, then the fashion capital)
timeline.title_zh: 威尼斯—米兰（时尚之都米兰）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, explore Venice freely: St Mark's Basilica (exterior), St Mark's Square (called by Napoleon "the most beautiful drawing room in Europe"), the Bridge of Sighs (exterior) and the magnificent Doge's Palace (exterior) — these waterborne buildings and winding canals make Venice's romance linger. Venice is built on 118 small islands linked by 177 canals and 401 bridges, earning the names "City on Water," "City of a Hundred Islands" and "City of Bridges." In the afternoon travel to Milan and check in. Overnight at Milan's UNA Hotel or a comparable 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，自由参观圣马可大教堂（外观）、圣马可广场（拿破仑称之为“欧洲最美丽的客厅”）、叹息桥（外观）以及华丽的总督宫（外观），这些建造在水上的美丽建筑与蜿蜒水巷一起，让威尼斯的浪漫风情久久挥之不去。威尼斯由118个小岛组成，并以177条水道、401座桥梁连成一体，有“水上都市”“百岛城”“桥城”之称。下午前往米兰入住酒店。夜宿米兰UNA酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Milan – Zurich (along the Alps, from the fashion capital to the financial capital)
timeline.title_zh: 米兰—苏黎世（沿阿尔卑斯山脉，从时尚之都游览金融之都）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, freely visit Milan's landmark Duomo (Milan Cathedral, exterior) — a Gothic masterpiece begun in 1386 and over 500 years in the making — and the Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II, one of Europe's most beautiful shopping arcades. In the afternoon travel to Zurich and tour the Old Town, Lake Zurich, the Lindenhof park, and stroll along the Limmat river. Other sights include the twin-towered Grossmünster cathedral (exterior), set in Zurich's old town with its artisan shops, antique dealers, bookstores and the famous Bahnhofstrasse, Rennweg and Niederdorf lanes. Overnight at Zurich's Crowne Plaza or a comparable 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，自由参观米兰的标志性建筑米兰大教堂（外观，始建于1386年、历时500余年建成的哥特式建筑），以及欧洲最漂亮的商业拱廊之一埃马努埃莱二世长廊。下午前往苏黎世，参观苏黎世老城、苏黎世湖、林登霍夫公园，漫步利马特河边。其他景点包括双塔地标苏黎世大教堂（外观），老城区汇聚了传统工匠与古董商、书店和花铺，班霍夫大街、伦韦格街、尼德道尔夫等著名街巷皆在此。夜宿苏黎世皇冠假日酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Zurich – Lucerne – Lungern – Interlaken (the GoldenPass train through picture-perfect Switzerland)
timeline.title_zh: 苏黎世—卢塞恩—龙疆—因特拉肯（乘坐金色山口列车，尽览瑞士如画风景）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, head to Lucerne to enjoy Lake Lucerne's scenery, the Lion Monument (which tells of the Swiss Guards' loyalty), the Chapel Bridge (Kapellbrücke) and the octagonal Water Tower. Then board Switzerland's classic GoldenPass scenic train (the Luzern–Lungern Express) to Lungern, admiring the lakes, mountains and villages along the way, and visit the village of Lungern. Continue to Interlaken to explore Höheweg street and Höhematte freely — tranquil villages woven among greenery, mountains and water. Overnight at the Grandhotel Giessbach (the "Bach Conservatory" in the K-drama "Crash Landing on You"), a historic 1874 Belle Époque hotel above Lake Brienz with its own Giessbach Waterfall and Europe's oldest funicular, or a comparable 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，前往卢塞恩，游览卢塞恩湖的湖光山色，听狮子纪念碑讲述瑞士人忠贞坚毅的那段历史，以及卡贝尔廊桥和八角形水塔等景点；之后乘坐瑞士经典的景观列车“金色山口”（卢塞恩—龙疆段）前往龙疆，沿途欣赏瑞士秀美景色，游览龙疆小镇；之后前往因特拉肯，自由游览何维克街、荷黑马特，宁静的村庄掩映于绿树山水之间。夜宿吉斯巴赫酒店（即《爱的迫降》中的“巴赫音乐学院”，坐落于布里恩茨湖畔，始建于1874年的瑞士著名历史酒店，保留19世纪末美好年代风格，配有吉斯巴赫瀑布及欧洲最古老的齿轮小火车）或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Interlaken – Jungfrau – Interlaken (the Giessbach castle hotel beneath the Aletsch glacier falls)
timeline.title_zh: 因特拉肯—少女峰—因特拉肯（阿莱奇冰川瀑布下的吉斯巴赫城堡酒店）
timeline.description_en: Head into the Jungfrau region. You may either ride with the coach to see the red Swiss trains at Wilderswil, the fairytale scenery of Lauterbrunnen and arrive at Grindelwald at the foot of the Jungfrau (included); or, at your own expense, take Europe's highest railway via Grindelwald and Kleine Scheidegg up to the Jungfraujoch "Top of Europe" and the Sphinx observation deck, overlooking the snow-capped Jungfrau and the great Aletsch Glacier, then pass through Lauterbrunnen with its alpine scenery and waterfalls. Three optional add-ons are offered and only one may be chosen: Option 1 — coach tour of the Jungfrau region (included); Option 2 — Jungfrau panoramic cable-car summit (EUR 230); Option 3 — First–Grindelwald aerial gondola round-trip with the First Cliff Walk (EUR 70). Other sights today: Grindelwald, Lauterbrunnen (the "waterfall town" with over 70 falls) and Lake Brienz, the "left eye of God." Overnight at the Grandhotel Giessbach or a comparable 4-star hotel; rooms are base category, randomly assigned with no specified size, view or aspect.
timeline.description_zh: 上午出发前往少女峰地区。可选择随车前往维尔德斯维尔观赏红色瑞士火车、劳特布龙嫩的童话风景，随后抵达少女峰脚下的格林德尔瓦尔德（费用包含）；或自费乘坐欧洲海拔较高的铁路，途经格林德尔瓦尔德、小夏戴克（Kleine Scheidegg）登上少女峰站，前往“斯芬克斯观景台”俯瞰白雪皑皑的少女峰和欧洲较大较长的阿莱奇冰川（Aletsch），之后途经劳特布龙嫩，欣赏高山风光和瀑布群。以下三个推荐项目仅可三选一：项目一——乘车游览少女峰地区（费用包含）；项目二——少女峰全景缆车登顶（230欧元）；项目三——菲斯特–格林德尔瓦尔德空中贡多拉往返票含懸崖天梭巅峰栈道 First Cliff Walk（70欧元）。当天其他景点：格林德尔瓦尔德、劳特布龙嫩（拥有70多个瀑布的“瀑布镇”）及有“上帝左眼”之称的布里恩茨湖。夜宿吉斯巴赫酒店或同等4星级酒店；吉斯巴赫为基础房型，不指定大小、风景和朝向，房型随机分配。

timeline.title_en: Interlaken – Montreux – Vevey – Lausanne – Poligny (Pollais) (stay at a 5-star Relais & Châteaux castle hotel)
timeline.title_zh: 因特拉肯—蒙特勒—沃韦—洛桑—波尔莱斯内（入住五星级罗莱夏朵古堡酒店）
timeline.description_en: In the morning travel to Montreux to see the Château de Chillon (exterior), Switzerland's iconic medieval "floating" lake castle, mirrored in the waters of Lake Geneva. Then enjoy the fairytale scenic route around Lake Geneva to Lausanne, passing the Lavaux vineyard terraces — a beautiful 800-year-old UNESCO World Heritage landscape — stopping at the Ouchy waterfront lined with cafés, restaurants and hotels, and freely visiting the Olympic Park (home of the IOC and the Olympic Museum). Then continue to Poligny to stay at the 5-star Relais & Châteaux castle hotel, an 18th-century château with a Michelin 2-star restaurant by chef Steven Naessens and a Caudalie spa. Overnight at the Relais & Châteaux castle hotel or a comparable 5-star hotel; rooms are base category, randomly assigned with no specified size, view or aspect.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往蒙特勒，欣赏西庸城堡（外观）孤独地倒映在湖水之中——这是瑞士标志性的中世纪“水上漂”城堡；之后迎来环日内瓦湖、宛如童话仙境的瑞士景观之途；前往洛桑，途径绵延的拉沃葡萄园梯田（已有800年历史、珍贵的世界文化遗产），停留在乌希码头（沿岸布满咖啡厅、餐厅和酒店），自由游览奥林匹克公园（国际奥委会及奥林匹克博物馆所在地）；之后前往波尔莱斯内入住五星罗莱夏朵城堡酒店（18世纪古堡，设有米其林主厨Steven Naessens的米其林2星餐厅及Caudalie欧缇丽水疗中心）。夜宿罗莱夏朵城堡酒店或同等5星级酒店；罗莱夏朵为基础房型，不指定大小、风景和朝向，房型随机分配。

timeline.title_en: Poligny (Pollais) – Dijon – Paris (the scenery, cuisine and wines of Burgundy)
timeline.title_zh: 波尔莱斯内—第戎—巴黎（法兰西美景、美食之都勃艮第，享受红酒和玫瑰的人生）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, head to Dijon — home of red wine, snails, rose mustard and white cattle — to tour the Dijon Old Town and the Church of Notre-Dame de Dijon (built in the 13th century, with its rows of gargoyles and a 14th-century jacquemart clock). After lunch, continue to the Burgundy wine region to visit the courtyard, production workshop, vineyards and cellars of a Burgundy winery, where a professional sommelier provides wine service and an in-depth introduction (you may see the wine-aging and cellar fermentation process, and with luck the winemaking process depending on the grape season). Then proceed to Place d'Italie in central Paris, where the group disperses. No accommodation tonight.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，前往红酒、蜗牛、玫瑰芥末及白牛的原产地第戎，参观第戎老城、第戎圣母院（建于13世纪，门面上有三列兽形假排水口，并有一座14世纪的报时钟）；午餐后前往勃艮第大区葡萄产区，参观勃艮第酒庄的庭院、生产工坊、葡萄园及酒窖，酒庄专业侍酒师负责侍酒服务和深度讲解（可参观葡萄酒陈酿熟化及酒窖发酵过程，运气好时可参观酿造过程，取决于葡萄产期）。随后前往巴黎市意大利广场散团。当天无住宿。

meeting_en: Rome, Italy — group meets in the city centre on Day 1; check-in to the hotel from 14:00 (luggage can be stored at reception earlier).
meeting_zh: 意大利罗马 — 第1天于罗马市区集合；当天14点后可凭订单入住酒店（亦可提前在酒店前台寄存行李）。

faqs.question_en: What are the meeting/dispersal points, times and method?
faqs.question_zh: 集合及集散地点和方法是怎样的？
faqs.answer_en: The tour starts in Rome and ends in Paris. On Day 1, assemble at 09:00 at the hotel you will stay at that night in Rome (check-in is at 14:00, and the hotel can store luggage). On Day 10, the group disperses around 18:00 at Place d'Italie in central Paris. These are reference times and locations — the actual departure time follows the tour notification letter. You may join the group in Rome on the start day, but you will then miss the Rome city sights, and no refund applies. Flights leaving Paris on the dispersal day are not recommended.
faqs.answer_zh: 罗马出发、巴黎结束。行程第一天09:00在罗马当晚入住的酒店集合（14点办理入住，酒店可寄存行李）。行程第10天18:00左右在巴黎市区意大利广场解散。以上为参考时间及地点，实际出发时间以出团通知书为准。参团当天可在罗马上团，但罗马市区景点将无法游览，并无费用可退！不推荐结束当天离开巴黎的航班。

faqs.question_en: Can I do the Interlaken paragliding activity?
faqs.question_zh: 我可以体验因特拉肯滑翔伞活动吗？
faqs.answer_en: Not included. If you wish to add Interlaken paragliding, please consider carefully — paragliding is an extreme sport and is not covered by ordinary travel insurance. The guide is responsible for taking you to the paragliding shuttle point (luggage can be stored in the vehicle); after the activity you land by paraglider at the town-centre square to rejoin the group.
faqs.answer_zh: 不包含。如果希望额外游览因特拉肯滑翔伞，请慎重考虑——滑翔伞属于独特的极限运动，普通旅游保险并未包含。导游负责将客人送至滑翔伞活动的接驳处（行李可寄存在车上），游客参加完滑翔伞项目后随滑翔伞降落到市中心广场集合。

faqs.question_en: Can we go up the Jungfrau by panoramic cable car to the Sphinx observation deck?
faqs.question_zh: 我们可以游览少女峰全景缆车登顶及“斯芬克斯观景台”吗？
faqs.answer_en: Not included. If you wish to add the Jungfrau, you can tour it on your own from Interlaken Ost (East) station.
faqs.answer_zh: 不包含。如果希望额外增加游览少女峰，可以在因特拉肯东站自行游览少女峰。

faqs.question_en: Can we visit the First cliff walk in the Jungfrau area?
faqs.question_zh: 我们可以游览少女峰的菲斯特栈道吗？
faqs.answer_en: Not included. If you wish to visit the First cliff walk and the summit zip-line and other outdoor activities, you can go with the guide to Grindelwald and then freely tour Grindelwald-First (Top of Adventure); the whole visit takes about 3 hours. You then get off at Interlaken Ost (East) station to rejoin the guide.
faqs.answer_zh: 不包含。如果希望游览少女峰菲斯特悬崖栈道及山顶空中飞索等户外活动，可以跟随导游前往格林德尔瓦尔德，随后自由游览 Grindelwald BGF – First Top of Adventure，全程游览时间约3小时。随后在因特拉肯东站下车与导游再次汇集。

faqs.question_en: Can the Jungfrau sightseeing train and Sphinx deck be combined with the other Jungfrau-area sights on the same day?
faqs.question_zh: 少女峰观光列车及“斯芬克斯观景台”是否可以和少女峰地区的景点同时参加？
faqs.answer_en: We organise all travellers to tour the red Swiss train at Wilderswil, the fairytale scenery of Lauterbrunnen and then Grindelwald at the foot of the Jungfrau. If you choose the sightseeing train, it conflicts with the "dream slope" and the "red train station" — you cannot see both at the same time.
faqs.answer_zh: 我社组织所有游客游览维尔德斯维尔观赏红色瑞士火车、劳特布龙嫩的瑞士童话风景，随后来到少女峰脚下的格林德尔瓦尔德。如果选择观光列车，与“梦幻山坡”“红色火车站”有冲突，不可以同时看到。

faqs.question_en: Does the Jungfrau sightseeing train conflict with paragliding, the Brienz cogwheel train or the Interlaken cruise?
faqs.question_zh: 少女峰观光列车是否和滑翔伞、布里恩茨齿轮火车、因特拉肯游船有冲突？
faqs.answer_en: If you ride the Jungfrau sightseeing train in the morning there is no conflict. However, if you choose to ride it from the afternoon into the evening, you may not be able to experience all of the Giessbach activities.
faqs.answer_zh: 如上午乘坐少女峰观光列车，没有冲突；但如果选择下午到晚间乘坐，则有可能无法体验到吉斯巴赫的全部项目。

faqs.question_en: What are the best ways to tour the Jungfrau region?
faqs.question_zh: 少女峰地区最佳游览方案是什么？
faqs.answer_en: A) Wellness tour — a full free day at the Giessbach scenic area, including the Giessbach Waterfall, Lake Brienz shore, the Interlaken cruise and the Giessbach cogwheel train (included April–October each year; not available in winter due to equipment maintenance). B) Easy package — follow the guide to Wilderswil (red Swiss train), Lauterbrunnen (fairytale scenery) and Grindelwald at the foot of the Jungfrau, then tour the Giessbach scenic area and Lake Brienz shore in the afternoon (included). C) Hardcore — ride the Jungfrau scenic train to the Sphinx observation deck, then tour the Giessbach scenic area. D) Extreme — combine the First cliff walk, the summit zip-line and Interlaken paragliding (not included).
faqs.answer_zh: A、养生游：全天自由游览吉斯巴赫风景区，其中包含吉斯巴赫瀑布、布里恩茨湖畔、因特拉肯游船、吉斯巴赫齿轮火车等门票（每年4月到10月份包含，冬季设备维护无法游览）。B、懒人包：跟随导游依次游览维尔德斯维尔观赏红色瑞士火车、劳特布龙嫩的童话风景，随后来到少女峰脚下的格林德尔瓦尔德，当天下午游览吉斯巴赫风景区及布里恩茨湖畔（费用包含）。C、特种兵：乘坐少女峰景观列车游览斯芬克斯观景台，随后游览吉斯巴赫风景区。D、极限游：同时游览菲斯特悬崖步道、山顶空中飞索及因特拉肯滑翔伞（费用不包含）。

faqs.question_en: Can we visit the town of Lungern?
faqs.question_zh: 是否可以游览龙疆小镇？
faqs.answer_en: You can tour the town of Lungern with the guide, but it conflicts with the GoldenPass train — so you would then not be able to experience the GoldenPass train.
faqs.answer_zh: 可以跟随导游游览龙疆小镇，但是与金色山口列车冲突，因此无法体验金色山口列车。

faqs.question_en: Can you help book the Maison Jeunet Michelin-starred restaurant?
faqs.question_zh: 是否可以协助预定 Maison Jeunet 米其林星级餐厅？
faqs.answer_en: Route B (Rome start, Paris end) — we recommend booking dinner at Maison Jeunet (Michelin 2-star), the chef's recommended 8-course dinner at EUR 195 (drinks not included). Route A (Paris start, Rome end) — you may book lunch at Maison Jeunet, the chef's recommended 4-course lunch / 3-course set at EUR 85 (drinks not included). Because of Relais & Châteaux's special booking method, we send the booking link, which the traveller must confirm in person and secure with a credit-card guarantee.
faqs.answer_zh: B路线（罗马出发、巴黎结束）：推荐预定 Maison Jeunet（米其林两星级）餐厅晚餐，主厨推荐8道式晚餐195欧元（不含酒水）。A路线（巴黎出发、罗马结束）：可选预定 Maison Jeunet 餐厅午餐，主厨推荐4道式午餐/三道式套餐85欧（不含酒水）。由于罗莱夏朵品牌的特殊预定方式，我社发送预定链接，需要游客本人确认预定，并提供信用卡担保。

faqs.question_en: Can I book airport transfers?
faqs.question_zh: 是否可以预定机场接送服务？
faqs.answer_en: Yes. Please select the desired city airport-transfer service in the fee options, and note your arriving flight number in the order.
faqs.answer_zh: 可以预定，请在费用选项内选择所需的城市机场接送服务，并请在订单内备注到达的航班号。

faqs.question_en: Can I book hotels before the tour starts or after it ends?
faqs.question_zh: 是否可以预定开始前的酒店和行程后的酒店？
faqs.answer_en: The itinerary does not require early arrival; it dovetails seamlessly with the round-trip flight times for Paris and Rome. If there is a delay, the airport-transfer driver can assist you to join the group directly in the departure city.
faqs.answer_zh: 行程不要求提前到达，行程无缝衔接巴黎及罗马的往返航班时间，如遇晚点，接送机的司机可协助游客在出发地所在的城市直接参团。

faqs.question_en: Do I need a visa?
faqs.question_zh: 是否需要签证？
faqs.answer_en: This product does not include visa fees. You need a Schengen visa (single or multiple entry); if you require visa processing, please choose the Schengen-visa product. After booking, we provide all the materials for the Schengen visa application free of charge, and we purchase Schengen-compliant travel insurance when you commission us to handle the visa (if you do not, you must buy your own insurance and handle claims yourself). Your passport must be valid for at least 6 months from the date of departure, otherwise customs may refuse entry. Visa fees, visa-service fees, Schengen-insurance fees and visa-centre appointment fees are all non-refundable and non-transferable, even if the product is changed or cancelled. "Visa-guarantee" assurance: for travellers who sign with us 61 days before departure, if the visa is not obtained within 45 days before departure, we bear all losses and immediately refund the full travel cost; travellers who do not meet this clause and fail to obtain the visa are refunded per the change-and-cancellation terms. In case of refusal, notify us within 48 hours with the embassy/consulate's refusal letter; any supplementary or amended materials must be submitted within 5 days, and you may not unilaterally waive the "visa appeal" right.
faqs.answer_zh: 本产品不包含签证费用，需要申根签证（单次或多次入境）；如需办理签证请选择申根签证产品。预订后免费提供办理申根签证的全部材料，若委托我社办理签证，我社为您购买符合申根要求的申根旅游保险（若未委托我社办理，需自行购买旅游保险并自行负责理赔手续）。护照有效期需在离境之日起至少还有六个月，否则海关有权拒绝入境。签证费、签证服务费、申根保险费、签证中心预约费均不可退款，也无法更改使用者，即使产品退改签亦无法退款。保签无忧：游客在出发日前61天与我社签约，如在出发前45天内未获取签证，我社承担所有损失并立即退还全部旅游费用；不符合该条款且未正常获签的游客，按“退改与取消条款”退费。如遇拒签需在48小时内通知我社并出具使领馆拒签函，如需补充或更改材料需在五天内提交，且不得单方面放弃“签证抗辩”权利。

faqs.question_en: Booking, changes & cancellation
faqs.question_zh: 预订、变更与取消须知
faqs.answer_en: Free cancellation: up to 30 days before departure (excluding the 30th day) both the agency and the traveller may cancel without reason. Because flights, traffic, ferries and strikes often cause reordering of the itinerary, travellers must arrive at the meeting point one day before the tour starts and leave the dispersal point one day after it ends, allowing reasonable flight-connection time (at least 5 hours for same-airport transfers, 7 hours for different airports in the same city; reasonable assembly/dispersal window 07:00–21:00); losses from not doing so are borne by the traveller. The itinerary order may be adjusted without changing the route or sights, which is not a breach. Group/成团: this is a shared (join-in) group tour; the minimum to confirm departure is 10 people, and if this is not reached 30 days before start (excluding the 30th day) either side may cancel with no liability; optional group activities also require 10 people or the agency may cancel them. Rooms are base category, randomly assigned (size/view/aspect not specified); standard double (bed type assigned by hotel), triple family room (2 parents + 1 minor), single-room supplement for solo travellers or share-room arrangement by booking order. Pricing: all prices are quoted in EUR at booking; if you pay in CNY, the amount is the real-time CNY price auto-calculated from the Bank of China "EUR sell" rate on the payment day (refunds likewise use the day's rate, and any rate difference or bank fees are borne by the traveller). Pay promptly after booking to avoid exchange-rate increases. Payment is not confirmation — orders need second confirmation within 48 hours; book at least 14 days ahead and do not book connecting flights/hotels before the itinerary is confirmed. Key contingency notes: the GoldenPass train (Lucerne–Lungern) has no guide on board; the Cinque Terre visits only some villages, switching to coach in bad weather/strikes; Rome old town is a walking tour; hotel check-in 14:00 / check-out 11:00; listed hotels are preferred and may be replaced by same-star alternatives without separate notice. No shopping stops, no forced consumption, and no tour leader throughout — local Chinese-speaking guides provide service.
faqs.answer_zh: 免费取消：出发前30天（不含第30天）旅行社和旅行者均有权无理由取消。由于航变、交通拥堵、渡轮取消、罢工游行等常导致行程先后顺序调整，本产品要求旅游者在旅游团开始前一天到达集合地、结束后一天离开集散地，并预留合理航班衔接时间（同机场转机至少5小时、同城不同机场至少7小时，合理集散时段07:00–21:00），未遵守导致的损失由旅行者自行承担。在不改变路线及景点的情况下调整游览顺序不视为违约。成团：本产品为散客拼团，成团人数为10人，行程开始前30天（不含第30天）未达成团人数，双方均可解除合同且互不担责；团内自费活动同样需达10人，否则我社有权取消该自费活动。房型为基础房型，随机分配（不指定大小、风景、朝向）：标准双人间（床型由酒店安排）、三人家庭间（默认两位父母与一位未成年儿童）、单人报名默认含单人房差或按报名先后顺序安排拼房。价格：所有定价以欧元为预订计价单位，如选择人民币支付，则以当天中国银行实时“欧元卖出价”自动计算的人民币实时价格为准（退款同样适用当日汇率，汇率差异或银行手续费由旅行者承担）。预订后请及时支付以避免汇率上涨；支付不等于确认行程，订单需在48小时内二次确认，建议至少提前14天预订，未确认行程前请勿预定衔接机票及酒店。关键行程提示：金色山口列车（卢塞恩–龙疆段）车上无导游陪同；五渔村因时间体力原因只游览个别村子，遇恶劣天气或罢工改为大巴游览海岸线城市；罗马古城为徒步游览；酒店入住14:00、退房11:00；行程内列明酒店为优先入住酒店，如订满则换为相同星级酒店，恕不另行通知。全程无购物店、无强制消费、无领队，由当地中文导游提供服务。

faqs.question_en: Health & safety requirements
faqs.question_zh: 健康与安全须知
faqs.answer_en: For your safety, please have a health check before travelling and do NOT join if you have: infectious diseases (e.g. active TB, typhoid); cardiovascular disease (severe hypertension, cardiac insufficiency, myocardial ischemia, myocardial infarction); cerebrovascular disease (cerebral embolism, cerebral hemorrhage, brain tumor); respiratory disease (emphysema, cor pulmonale); psychiatric illness (epilepsy and various mental illnesses); severe anemia (hemoglobin below 50 g/L); or are recovering from major/medium surgery. Pregnancy: at 35 weeks or more you cannot join under any circumstances; at 28 weeks or more you must provide a doctor's exam report within 7 days plus the attending doctor's consent; under 28 weeks please consider carefully, sign a liability waiver, and you cannot join adventure/ski/sea/high-altitude/outdoor activities. Disabled travellers: provide a 7-day medical report and attending doctor's consent, be accompanied by an immediate family member, and apply for reserved space/facilities at least 61 days ahead. Elderly: travellers over 70 need a health certificate, physical exam report and immediate-family accompaniment (or sign a liability waiver); this is a long itinerary requiring some walking ability and stamina. Minors (under 18) must be accompanied by an immediate relative/guardian; some sights have special limits for under-18/12/6; infants under 30 kg need a verified child safety seat; minors travelling without parents need a parental authorization letter; infants under 2 years old are not accepted. Per Article 15 of the Tourism Law, travellers must truthfully declare health information relevant to the activity (pregnancy, lactation, chronic disease, infectious-disease history, suspected symptoms, recent travel to epidemic areas) and follow safety warnings; concealment that causes harm makes the traveller liable for resulting medical, isolation and compensation costs, and the agency may terminate the contract without refund.
faqs.answer_zh: 为确保旅游顺利、防止意外，请出行前做必要的身体检查，如存在下列情况请勿报名：传染性疾病患者（如活动期肺结核、伤寒）；心血管疾病患者（如严重高血压、心功能不全、心肌缺氧、心肌梗塞）；脑血管疾病患者（如脑栓塞、脑出血、脑肿瘤）；呼吸系统疾病患者（如肺气肿、肺心病）；精神病患者（如癫痫及各种精神病）；严重贫血患者（血红蛋白量在50克/升以下）；大中型手术恢复期病患者。孕妇：妊娠35周及以上任何情况下都无法参团；28周及以上需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书；28周以下请慎重报名，需签署旅行社免责声明书，且行程内涉及探险、滑雪、出海、高空、户外等项目均无法参加。残疾人：需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书，需直系家属陪同，并需提前至少61天申请预留位置及专用配套设施。老年旅游者：70周岁以上需提供健康证明、体检报告并需直系家属陪同（如无法提供则需签署免责声明书），本次行程较长、对步行能力和体力要求较高，体力不支者请慎重报名。未成年旅游者（未满18周岁）须由直系亲属或监护人陪同，部分景点对未满18/12/6周岁有特殊限定，30公斤以下儿童请提前确认安全座椅，无父母陪同的未成年人须持父母授权书，本产品不接受2周岁以下婴儿参团。根据《旅游法》第15条，旅游者须如实告知与旅游活动相关的个人健康信息（包括妊娠期、哺乳期、慢性病、传染病史、疑似症状或近期疫区旅居史）并遵守安全警示规定，若因隐瞒导致人身损害或财产损失，需自行承担相应医疗、隔离费用及赔偿责任，旅行社可解除合同且不退还费用。

title_en: Southern Italy 4-Day Tour: Rome, Capri, Amalfi Coast & Pompeii
title_zh: 意大利南部4天跟团游：罗马、卡普里岛、阿马尔菲海岸与庞贝
short_en: A 4-day round trip from Rome through the Amalfi Coast, Capri Island and Pompeii, with sea-view hotels and all ferries and entries included.
short_zh: 罗马往返4天南意之旅，深度游览阿马尔菲海岸、卡普里岛与庞贝古城，入住海景酒店，渡船与门票全含。
desc_en: Begin in the Eternal City of Rome with a walking tour of its ancient landmarks, then head south to the sun-drenched Sorrento Peninsula. Over four days you cruise to the legendary Blue Grotto of Capri, sail the dramatic cliffs of the Amalfi Coast to Positano and Amalfi, and step back two thousand years amid the ruins of Pompeii. With two nights in a sea-view hotel in Sorrento, a one-way deep-route design and all key ferries and entries included, this is southern Italy at its most relaxed.
desc_zh: 行程从永恒之城罗马开始，由导游带领徒步游览古罗马的著名地标，随后南下阳光灿烂的索伦托半岛。四天里，您将乘船探秘卡普里岛传奇的蓝洞，沿阿马尔菲海岸壮丽的悬崖航行至波西塔诺与阿马尔菲，并在庞贝古城遗址中追溯两千年前的文明。索伦托两晚海景酒店、单程深度路线设计，以及关键渡船与门票全含，让您以最轻松的方式领略南意之美。

highlights.en: Walking tour of ancient Rome: Colosseum, Pantheon, Spanish Steps & Trevi Fountain
highlights.zh: 徒步游览古罗马：斗兽场、万神殿、西班牙广场与特莱维喷泉

highlights.en: Cruise to Capri Island, home of the world-famous Blue Grotto
highlights.zh: 乘船前往卡普里岛，探访世界闻名的蓝洞

highlights.en: Boat tour of the Amalfi Coast to the cliffside villages of Positano & Amalfi
highlights.zh: 乘船环游阿马尔菲海岸，探访悬崖小镇波西塔诺与阿马尔菲

highlights.en: Explore the buried ancient city of Pompeii with a national-museum guide
highlights.zh: 在国家馆讲解师带领下探索庞贝古城遗址

highlights.en: Two nights in a Sorrento sea-view hotel wrapped by the Bay of Naples
highlights.zh: 索伦托两晚三面环海的海湾景观酒店

highlights.en: One-way deep route minimizes coach time for a relaxed pace
highlights.zh: 单程深度路线设计，大幅减少大巴行车里程，节奏轻松

highlights.en: City-centre 4-star hotels, daily breakfast and a Chinese-speaking guide-driver
highlights.zh: 市区四星级酒店、每日早餐及全程中文司机兼导游

highlights.en: All-inclusive pricing: city taxes, island ferries and the Amalfi cruise fully covered
highlights.zh: 全含报价：城市税、登岛渡船与阿马尔菲出海费用全含，绝无隐藏费用

includes.en: Hotel: 3 nights in 4-star hotels.
includes.zh: 【酒店】：四星级酒店3晚。

includes.en: Meals: 3 meals total, breakfast in the hotel or other forms of dining.
includes.zh: 【餐饮】：酒店内早餐或其他形式餐饮共计3餐。

includes.en: Taxes and fees: all taxes within the itinerary, such as tourist city tax, city-entry fees, residence tax, road and bridge tolls, island-landing fees, etc.
includes.zh: 【税费】：游客城市税、进城费、居住税、路桥费、登岛费等行程内的所有税费。

includes.en: Transport: tourist coach or business travel vehicle.
includes.zh: 【交通】：旅游巴士或者商务旅行车。

includes.en: Guide: professional driver plus a Chinese-speaking guide, or a Chinese-speaking driver-guide throughout (note: for groups of 8 or fewer, a business travel vehicle with a Chinese-speaking driver-guide is arranged, who leads the full city itinerary).
includes.zh: 【导游】：职业司机+中文导游或者全程中文司机兼导游（备注：8人及以下则安排为商务旅行车+中文司机兼导游，届时将有司兼导带领游览全部城市行程）。

includes.en: Luggage: one 23 kg piece of checked luggage and one carry-on piece.
includes.zh: 【行李】：1件23公斤行李及1件随身行李。

includes.en: Activities and admissions: the Sorrento–Amalfi boat cruise, the round-trip Capri ferry, and Pompeii admission (including a national-museum docent/guide).
includes.zh: 【活动及门票】：索伦托阿马尔菲出海环游、卡普里岛往返渡船、庞贝古城门票（含国家馆讲解师）。

excludes.en: Passport: personal passport fees.
excludes.zh: 护照：个人护照费用。

excludes.en: Visa: the tourist visa fees required for the destination countries listed in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 签证：行程中所列旅游国家所需的观光签证费用。

excludes.en: Insurance: travel insurance fees (if the itinerary involves high-risk sports, verify whether your travel insurance covers that activity).
excludes.zh: 保险：旅游保险费用；（如行程内涉及到高风险运动，请核实旅游保险是否包含该项运动）。

excludes.en: Tips: guide and driver tips totaling 10 euros per person per day, same price for adults and children.
excludes.zh: 小费：游客支付导游和司机小费一共10欧/人/天，大小同价。

excludes.en: Meals: lunches and dinners are not included in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 餐饮：行程内不包含午、晚正餐费用。

excludes.en: Admissions: sights not marked as included (including but not limited to sights marked "exterior", and all "recommended", "optional", "experience" or other items not stated as included); if you wish to enter, please pay at your own expense.
excludes.zh: 门票：行程中未注明费用包含的景点（包括，但不仅限于行程中注明“外观”的景点，“推荐”、“可选”、“体验”等等所有未提及费用包含的项目，如游客需要参观，敬请自理）。

excludes.en: Extended stay: accommodation, transport and sightseeing costs for any extension beyond the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 延长住宿：行程外额外延长的住宿、交通、观光费用。

excludes.en: Personal spending: drinks and alcohol, taxis, phone calls and other personal expenses.
excludes.zh: 私人消费：如饮料酒类、出租车、电话费等个人消费。

excludes.en: Other transport: transport costs not mentioned in the inclusions beyond the included business travel vehicle or minibus, such as sightseeing trains or electric taxis in vehicle-restricted zones, are at your own expense.
excludes.zh: 其他交通：除包含商务旅行车或者中巴之外，费用包含中未提及的其他交通费用，车辆限行区的观光火车、电瓶出租车等费用敬请自理。

excludes.en: Free activities: night-time self-guided sightseeing and recommended items in the itinerary, plus any resulting transport, dining, admission and shopping costs.
excludes.zh: 自由活动：游客夜间自行游览及行程中的推荐项目，以及产生的交通、餐饮、门票、购物等费用。

excludes.en: Experience activities: any travel experience activities not included in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 体验活动：行程中没有包含的各项旅游体验活动。

excludes.en: Other costs: any fees not mentioned in the inclusions. In cases of force majeure (natural disaster, war, strikes, etc.), or special situations such as traffic delays, flight cancellation or rescheduling, embassy delays in issuing visas, or insufficient group numbers, or other extra costs not caused by our company (e.g. overseas visa-extension fees, accommodation, food and transport, national airfare adjustments), our company reserves the right to charge the price difference.
excludes.zh: 其他费用：费用包含中未提及的费用。如因天灾、战争、罢工等不可抗力的原因，及因交通延阻、航班取消或更改时间、使馆延误出签证、人数不足等特殊情况或其他非我公司原因所引致的额外费（如在外延期签证费、住、食及交通费、国家航空运价调整等），我公司有权追加差价。

timeline.title_en: Rome — Revisiting the Glory of the Eternal City
timeline.title_zh: 罗马——重温“万城之城”古罗马帝国的辉煌
timeline.description_en: After meeting in the morning, set off on a guided walking tour of Rome, the world-famous historic and cultural city known as the "Eternal City" and the birthplace of the ancient Roman Empire. Visit the Colosseum (exterior) and the Pantheon (exterior), then stroll through the Piazza di Spagna (Spanish Steps) and the Trevi Fountain (exterior). Because Rome's old city is protected and largely pedestrianized with vehicles banned, all sightseeing is on foot, covering roughly 5–6 km that day. After the tour there is free time before checking in to the hotel. Overnight: Sheraton Roma Hotel (Medici) or Hotel Mantegna or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午集合后，在导游带领下徒步游览世界著名的历史文化名城罗马——古罗马帝国的发祥地，因历史悠久而被称为“永恒之城”。参观矗立于古罗马遗址上的斗兽场（外观）、万神殿（外观），并游览西班牙广场和特莱维喷泉（许愿池，外观）。由于罗马古城建筑受保护、大多数区域为禁止车辆通行的步行街区，当天全程徒步参观，步行约5–6公里。游览结束后为自由活动，随后入住酒店休息。夜宿：罗马梅第奇喜来登酒店或曼特尼亚酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Rome → Naples/Sorrento → Capri → Sorrento — Into the Mediterranean Paradise of Capri and the Blue Grotto
timeline.title_zh: 罗马—那不勒斯/索伦托—卡普里岛—索伦托——走进地中海天堂卡普里岛，探秘蓝洞
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, travel to Naples/Sorrento and take a ferry to the port of Capri. On the island you have free time: stroll along the seaside and visit the Blue Grotto, or take a boat to circle the island and explore the Blue Grotto, or head up into Capri town to see the Gardens of Augustus and look out over the whole bay. The recommended route from the main port (Marina Grande) to Capri's old town and the Gardens of Augustus is about 1.3 km of uphill road passing three key sights, with funicular and taxis available at extra cost. The Blue Grotto is a natural feature: if high tide, wind, waves or other conditions cause the local marine authority to close it, entry is not possible; the Blue Grotto visit is not included in the tour, and aside from the boatman's fee a customary tip of 2–5 euros is suggested. In the afternoon take the ferry back to Sorrento and transfer to the hotel. Overnight: a Sorrento coast hotel or equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，前往那不勒斯/索伦托，乘渡船抵达卡普里岛港口。登岛后为自由活动：可沿海边漫步后前往蓝洞参观，或自行乘船环岛探秘蓝洞，或自行前往卡普里城中游览奥古斯都花园、俯瞰整个海湾。推荐路线为大港（玛丽娜大港）—卡普里古城—奥古斯都花园，单程约1.3公里山路，途经三个重要景点，沿途有缆车和出租车，需额外付费。卡普里蓝洞属于自然景观，如遇涨潮、风浪或其他因素被当地海洋气象机构宣布关闭，则无法入内游览；蓝洞游览费用不含在团费内，除蓝洞人力船工费外，建议按当地习俗支付2–5欧元小费。之后乘渡船返回索伦托码头，前往酒店入住。夜宿：索伦托海岸酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Sorrento → Amalfi → Positano → Sorrento — A Boat Cruise of the Amalfi Coast and the Lemon Scent of Positano
timeline.title_zh: 索伦托—阿马尔菲—波西塔诺—索伦托——阿马尔菲出海环游，感受波西塔诺的柠檬香
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, set out on a charming full-day boat cruise to explore the treasures of the Amalfi Coast, a UNESCO World Heritage site named by National Geographic as one of 51 places of a lifetime, famed for its winding coastline, dramatic cliffs and hidden medieval fishing towns. Cruise to Positano to explore the enchanting cliffside village, then continue by boat to Amalfi to take in the panorama of this Amalfi Coast town. Afterwards return by boat and check in to the hotel. Note: in case of extreme sea conditions, the boat company may cancel the cruise to Positano and Amalfi for safety reasons; the agency will instead arrange a bus tour of Sorrento's old town that day, Positano and Amalfi will not be visited, and the boat cruise fee will be refunded. Overnight: a Sorrento coast hotel or equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，踏上迷人的游船一日游，探索阿马尔菲海岸的宝藏。阿马尔菲海岸是世界文化遗产，被美国《国家地理》杂志评为一生中必须去的51个美丽的地方之一，以蜿蜒的海岸线、壮观的悬崖峭壁和隐藏其间的中世纪渔业小镇而闻名。乘船前往波西塔诺，探索迷人的悬崖村庄，再乘船前往阿马尔菲，欣赏阿马尔菲海岸小镇全景。之后乘船返回，入住酒店。备注：如遇海上极端天气情况，出于游客安全考虑，游船公司可能取消出海游览波西塔诺和阿马尔菲的活动，我社将安排当天乘坐大巴车参观索伦托老城，无法参观波西塔诺和阿马尔菲，出海游船费用将退还给游客。夜宿：索伦托海岸酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Sorrento → Pompeii → Naples → Rome — Unsealing History and the Lost Civilization of Pompeii
timeline.title_zh: 索伦托—庞贝—那不勒斯—罗马——“解封”历史遗迹，寻找消失的庞贝文明
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, head to Pompeii to explore the ruins of the ancient city and learn about the once-thriving Pompeian civilization, buried by volcanic ash and lava when Mount Vesuvius erupted; sights here include the open-air amphitheatre, the excavated city with its plaster casts of victims, the Temple of Apollo and the central Forum (with its surviving Corinthian columns and a view back toward Vesuvius). Then continue to Naples to visit the old town, the Royal Palace of Naples (exterior) and the Castel Nuovo / New Castle (exterior). In the afternoon, drive back to Rome, where the wonderful itinerary concludes. Overnight: no accommodation (tour ends).
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，前往庞贝，探索庞贝古城遗址，了解曾经的庞贝文明——公元79年维苏威火山爆发，火山灰与炽热岩浆瞬间将其掩埋。这里可参观露天剧场、完整保留两千多年前生活场景的庞贝古城（含遇难者石膏铸像）、阿波罗神庙以及中心广场（公共广场，保存完好的科林斯式圆柱并可眺望维苏威火山）。之后前往那不勒斯，游览那不勒斯老城、那不勒斯皇宫（外观）、新堡（安茹城堡，外观）。下午返回罗马，行程在罗马结束。住宿：无（行程结束）。

meeting_en: Rome — group meets in the morning of Day 1 for the walking tour; the tour starts and ends in Rome.
meeting_zh: 罗马——第1天上午集合开始徒步游览，行程罗马开始、罗马结束。

faqs.question_en: Where and how do we meet and disperse?
faqs.question_zh: 集合及集散地点和方法是什么？
faqs.answer_en: Meeting point is Roma Tiburtina railway station at 09:00 on Day 1; the group disperses at Roma Tiburtina railway station around 19:00 on Day 4 (these are reference times and places — the actual departure time follows the tour confirmation notice). You may book a flight arriving in Rome on the day the tour starts, but if you arrive after 14:00 the Rome city sights cannot be visited and no fee is refunded. We do not recommend booking a flight that leaves Rome on the final day.
faqs.answer_zh: 行程第1天09:00在罗马提布蒂纳（Roma Tiburtina）火车站集合；行程第4天19:00左右在罗马提布蒂纳火车站解散（以上为参考时间及地点，实际出发时间以出团通知书为准）。本产品可预订当天抵达罗马的航班，但14:00之后罗马市区景点将无法游览，且无费用可退；不推荐预订结束当天离开罗马的航班。

faqs.question_en: Will the bus rides on the route take a long time?
faqs.question_zh: 行程路线乘坐大巴时间会不会很久？
faqs.answer_en: On this product the total bus time is about 3 hours, with the remaining daily transfers planned at roughly half an hour each. Note that road traffic is complex and city-centre congestion or other factors can increase driving time.
faqs.answer_zh: 该产品乘坐大巴时间约为3小时，其余行程计划时间为每日半小时左右的行车时间。公路交通情况复杂，特别是市区内容易发生堵车或其他因素导致行车时间增加。

faqs.question_en: Can we sightsee by vehicle in central Rome?
faqs.question_zh: 罗马市中心，我们是否可以乘车游览？
faqs.answer_en: No. Because Rome's sights are very concentrated and located in pedestrian zones, we cannot arrange a tourist coach there; sights in central Rome must be visited on foot.
faqs.answer_zh: 不可以。由于罗马各个景点非常集中，并且都是步行街区，因此我社无法安排旅游大巴，罗马市中心景点需要徒步游览。

faqs.question_en: Can we choose different menus and dishes for our dinner?
faqs.question_zh: 我们的晚餐能否根据喜好选择不同的菜单和菜品？
faqs.answer_en: The dining recommended in the itinerary is all suggested local specialty meals and the cost is not included. If the dishes are not your first choice, you are free to choose other dining options.
faqs.answer_zh: 行程内推荐的餐饮全部为推荐当地特色餐，费用并未包含；如果菜品并非您的首选，可以自行选择其他餐饮。

faqs.question_en: I get seasick — can I still join the Sorrento island-hopping cruise of the four towns?
faqs.question_zh: 我晕船，是否能参加索伦托的跳岛游览四大城市？
faqs.answer_en: Yes. First, the Mediterranean is an inland sea with relatively few waves and the boats are large, so the chance of seasickness is low. Second, on the island-hopping the boat is a means of transport rather than the sightseeing itself; each leg averages 40 minutes to 1 hour, after which you disembark to sightsee, and many included sights such as Capri, Positano and Amalfi cannot be reached by vehicle. Third, the Sorrento seaside hotel is surrounded on three sides by sea with a private beach and private pier, two restaurants of different styles and a renowned sea spa centre, so on an island-hopping day you can also enjoy the views and food of the Bay of Naples at the hotel.
faqs.answer_zh: 可以。首先，地中海为内海，相对风浪较少，加之船体较大，因此晕船的概率比较低；其次，跳岛游览中船为交通工具而非游览工具，平均每段行程为40分钟到1小时，随后即可登陆游览，行程中包含的许多景点（如卡普里、波西塔诺、阿马尔菲等）都是车辆无法到达的景点；再次，索伦托海滨酒店三面环海，拥有私人沙滩和私家码头、两间不同风格的餐厅和一间著名的海洋SPA中心，若当天进行跳岛活动，也可在酒店内享受那不勒斯湾的美景和美食。

faqs.question_en: What happens to Positano and Amalfi if extreme weather cancels the boat cruise?
faqs.question_zh: 如遇极端天气导致游船出海取消，波西塔诺和阿马尔菲怎么办？
faqs.answer_en: In case of extreme sea conditions, for the safety of guests the boat company will cancel the cruise to Positano and Amalfi. On that day the agency will instead arrange a visit to Sorrento's old town; Positano and Amalfi cannot be visited, and the boat cruise fee will be refunded to guests.
faqs.answer_zh: 如遇海上极端天气情况，出于游客安全考虑，游船公司将取消出海游览波西塔诺和阿马尔菲的活动；我社将安排当天参观索伦托老城，无法参观波西塔诺和阿马尔菲，出海游船费用将退还给游客。

faqs.question_en: Do I need a visa?
faqs.question_zh: 是否需要签证？
faqs.answer_en: Yes. This product does not include the visa fee; you need a Schengen visa (single or multiple entry) — if you need a visa, please choose a Schengen-visa product. After booking we provide all materials for the Schengen visa application free of charge (refer to the detailed materials list), and if you commission us to handle the Schengen visa we will purchase Schengen-compliant travel insurance for you; otherwise you must arrange your own insurance and claims. Your passport must be valid for at least six months from the date of departure or customs may refuse entry. "Visa-worry-free guarantee": for guests who sign with us 61 days or more before departure, if the visa is not obtained within 45 days before departure we bear all losses and immediately refund the full tour fee; guests not meeting this clause who fail to obtain a visa are refunded per the change-and-cancellation terms. If refused, notify us within 48 hours with the consulate's refusal letter, submit any supplementary/amended materials within five days, and do not unilaterally waive the right to a visa appeal. Note: visa fees, visa service fees, Schengen insurance fees and visa-centre appointment fees are all non-refundable and non-transferable, even if the product itself is changed or cancelled.
faqs.answer_zh: 需要。本产品不包含签证费用，需办理申根签证（单次或多次入境），如需办理签证请选择申根签证产品。预订后免费提供办理申根签证的全部材料（参考详细材料清单）；如委托我社办理申根签证，我社将为您购买符合申根签证要求的申根旅游保险，若未委托我社办理签证服务，需自行购买旅游保险并自行负责理赔手续。护照有效期需在离境之日起至少还有六个月，否则海关有权拒绝入境。“保签无忧”：游客在出发日前61天与我社签约的旅游产品，如在出发前45天内未获取签证，我社承担所有损失，立即退还游客全部旅游费用；不符合该条款的游客如未正常获取签证，将按照“退改与取消条款”进行退费。如遇拒签，需在48小时内通知我社并出具使领馆的拒签函，如需补充或更改材料须在五天内提交，且不得单方面放弃“签证抗辩”权利。签证费、签证服务费、申根保险费、签证中心预约费均不可退款，也无法更改使用者，即使产品退改签，签证费用亦无法退款。

faqs.question_en: Booking, changes and cancellation notes
faqs.question_zh: 预订、变更与取消须知
faqs.answer_en: Free cancellation: for group-tour products, both the agency and the traveller may apply for cancellation without reason more than 30 days before departure (the 30th day not included). This is a circular/back-to-back group product where other guests join and leave at different points along the route — the start and end cities and prices differ, so book according to your own chosen destination start/end. Group size: for 8 guests or fewer the group is automatically changed to a small group with a business travel vehicle and a driver-guide; this is a join-in (shared) group and the announced group size is 10 — if fewer than 10 sign up the agency may cancel the group, and the same applies to optional activities. Itinerary contingencies: in peak season Pompeii may limit tour-group entry — if changed to individual tickets each guest is refunded the 6-euro docent fee for Pompeii, and if entry is impossible the admission plus docent fee is refunded and it becomes an exterior visit; the Capri Blue Grotto is a natural feature and may be closed by tides, wind or waves (the Blue Grotto is not included, and a 2–5 euro tip beyond the boatman's fee is customary); if extreme sea conditions occur, the Positano/Amalfi cruise is replaced by a bus tour of Sorrento old town and the cruise fee is refunded. Because flight changes, congestion, ferry cancellations, strikes or sequence adjustments often shift timing, you must arrive at the meeting point one day before the tour starts and leave one day after it ends, allowing reasonable connection time (at least 5 hours for a same-airport transfer, 7 hours for different airports in the same city); reasonable meeting/dispersal hours are 07:00–21:00. Rooms: two people booking together default to a standard double (bed type assigned by the hotel, cannot be specified); solo travellers pay a single-room supplement deposit (refunded proportionally if successfully matched as a roommate, or note "single occupancy, do not arrange a roommate, no supplement refund" for guaranteed single use); a triple family room defaults to two parents plus one minor child. Pricing: all prices are quoted in euros at the time of booking; if you pay in RMB, the rate is the Bank of China real-time "euro selling price" on the day of payment, and the same applies to refunds — any exchange-rate difference or bank handling fees are borne by the traveller. Pay promptly after booking to avoid RMB price increases from rate fluctuations; payment does not equal confirmation — orders require a second confirmation by the organizing agency within at most 48 hours, after which an unconfirmed order is auto-refunded, so do not book connecting flights/hotels before confirmation.
faqs.answer_zh: 免费取消：跟团游产品出发前30天（不含第30天）旅行社和旅行者均有权申请无理由取消。本产品为循环套发团，在集合与结束途中会有其他游客在不同地点上下团，开始和结束的城市不同、价格不同，请根据自己报名的目的地开始和结束行程。成团人数：报名人数为8人及以下时，本团自动改为小团，安排商务旅行车+司机兼导游；本产品为散客拼团，宣布成团人数为10人，未达10人旅行社有权取消旅游团，自费活动同理。行程应急：庞贝古城在旅游旺季可能对旅游团限流，如改为散拼门票则每位退还庞贝6欧元讲解费，如无法入内则退还门票+讲解费并改为外观游览；卡普里蓝洞属自然景观，如遇涨潮、风浪等被宣布关闭则无法入内（蓝洞不含在团费内，除船工费外建议支付2–5欧小费）；如遇海上极端天气，波西塔诺/阿马尔菲出海游改为大巴参观索伦托老城，出海游船费用退还。由于航变、堵车、渡轮取消、罢工或顺序调整常导致时间及游览顺序调整，要求旅行者在开团前一天到达集合地、结束后一天离开集散地，并预留合理衔接时间（同机场转机至少5小时，同城不同机场至少7小时）；合理集合集散时间段为07:00至21:00。房型：两人同时报名默认入住标准双人间（床型由酒店安排，不可指定）；单人报名默认含单人房差押金，成功拼房按比例退款，若不愿拼房请备注“要求单人入住，请勿安排拼房，不退单人房差”；三人家庭间默认为两位父母与一位未成年儿童入住。价格：所有定价以欧元为预订时计价单位，如选择人民币支付，则以当天支付时中国银行实时“欧元卖出价”自动计算的人民币价格为准，退款同样适用当日即时汇率，汇率差异或银行手续费由旅行者承担。预订后请及时支付以免汇率变动导致人民币价格上涨；支付不等于确认行程，订单需组团社在最多48小时内二次确认，超时未确认则默认自动退款，未确定行程前请勿预订衔接机票及酒店。

faqs.question_en: Health and safety requirements
faqs.question_zh: 健康与安全须知
faqs.answer_en: To ensure a smooth trip and prevent accidents, please have a necessary medical check-up before departure and do not sign up if you have any of the following: infectious diseases (e.g. active tuberculosis, typhoid); cardiovascular disease (e.g. severe hypertension, heart failure, myocardial ischemia, myocardial infarction); cerebrovascular disease (e.g. cerebral embolism, cerebral hemorrhage, brain tumour); respiratory disease (e.g. emphysema, cor pulmonale); psychiatric illness (e.g. epilepsy and various mental illnesses); severe anemia (hemoglobin below 50 g/L); or recovery from major/medium surgery. Pregnancy: at 35 weeks or more you cannot join under any circumstances; at 28 weeks or more you must provide a doctor's examination report from within 7 days plus a treating physician's consent letter; under 28 weeks please consider carefully, sign the agency's disclaimer, and you cannot join any adventure, skiing, boating, high-altitude or outdoor items. Disabled travellers must provide a doctor's report from within 7 days plus a physician's consent letter, be accompanied by an immediate family member, and apply for a reserved place and special facilities at least 61 days in advance. Elderly travellers: those over 70 need a health certificate and medical report, must be accompanied by an immediate family member (or sign the disclaimer if unable to provide these); the trip is long and requires walking ability and good stamina, so those with insufficient strength should sign up cautiously; adventure/ski/boating/high-altitude/outdoor items require a physician's consent letter, and an "age-friendly" service request should be made at least 61 days ahead. Minors (under 18) must be accompanied by an immediate relative or guardian; some sights have special rules for those under 18, 12 or 6; infants under 6 or children under 30 kg need a confirmed/own EU-standard safety child seat; a minor traveling abroad without parents needs a parental authorization letter (a letter from the other parent if only one accompanies, or both parents' guardian authorization if traveling with others); infants under 2 years old are not accepted.
