Per Article 15 of the Tourism Law (and the Infectious Disease Prevention Law, 2025 revision), travellers must truthfully declare health information relevant to the trip (including pregnancy, lactation, chronic disease, infectious-disease history, suspected symptoms or recent travel to epidemic areas) and comply with safety warnings; concealment leading to harm or transmission risk means bearing one's own liability (including medical, quarantine and compensation costs), and the agency may terminate the contract without refund.
faqs.answer_zh: 为确保旅游顺利出行、防止旅途中发生人身意外伤害，请在出行前做一次必要的身体检查；如存在下列情况请勿报名：传染性疾病（如活动期肺结核、伤寒等）；心血管疾病（如严重高血压、心功能不全、心肌缺氧、心肌梗塞）；脑血管疾病（如脑栓塞、脑出血、脑肿瘤）；呼吸系统疾病（如肺气肿、肺心病）；精神病（如癫痫及各种精神病）；严重贫血（血红蛋白50克/升以下）；大中型手术恢复期。孕妇：妊娠第35周及以上任何情况下都无法参团；第28周及以上需提供7日内的医生检查报告及主治医生同意书；第28周以下请慎重报名，需签署旅行社免责声明书，且行程内涉及探险、滑雪、出海、高空、户外等项目都无法参加。残疾人需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书、需直系家属陪同，并至少提前61天申请预留位置及专用配套设施。老年旅游者：70周岁以上需提供健康证明、体检报告并由直系家属陪同（无法提供则需签署免责声明书）；本次行程较长、需要一定步行能力和较高体力，体力不支者请慎重报名；如涉及探险、滑雪、出海、高空、户外等项目需持主治医师同意书，并至少提前61天申请适老化服务及设施。未成年人（未满18周岁）需由直系亲属或监护人陪同；部分项目对未满18/12/6周岁有特殊限定；6岁以下婴儿或30公斤以下儿童需确认或自备符合欧盟安全制式的安全座椅；无父母陪同的18岁以下未成年人出境须持父母授权书（仅一方陪同需另一方书面授权，与其他亲友同行需父母双方监护人授权书）；本产品不接受2周岁以下婴儿参团。根据《旅游法》第15条及《传染病防治法（2025修订）》，旅游者需如实告知与旅游活动相关的个人健康信息（包括妊娠期、哺乳期、慢性病、传染病史、疑似症状或近期疫区旅居史）并遵守安全警示规定；若因隐瞒导致人身损害或传播风险，需自行承担相应责任（含医疗、隔离费用及赔偿），旅行社可解除合同且不退还费用。

title_en: Italy, Switzerland & France in 6 Days: Milan to Paris One-Way Tour
title_zh: 意大利-瑞士-法国6天跟团游（米兰至巴黎单程线路）
short_en: A 6-day one-way journey from Milan to Paris through the Swiss Alps, Lucerne, Interlaken, Geneva, the Louvre and Versailles.
short_zh: 6天单程之旅，从米兰出发横穿瑞士阿尔卑斯山，途经卢塞恩、因特拉肯、日内瓦，最后游览巴黎卢浮宫与凡尔赛宫。
desc_en: Travel one-way from fashion-capital Milan across the Swiss Alps to romantic Paris on this 6-day small-group tour. Discover Zurich's old town, the lakeside scenery of Lucerne and the storybook village of Iseltwald, the twin lakes around Interlaken beneath the Jungfrau, and Geneva's lakefront before crossing into France. In Paris you enjoy an in-depth Louvre tour led by a French national-gallery lecturer, a Seine river cruise, and the Baroque splendour of the Palace of Versailles. The deliberate one-way routing greatly reduces backtracking and coach mileage so more time is spent sightseeing.
desc_zh: 这条6天精品小团采用单程线路，从时尚之都米兰出发，横穿瑞士阿尔卑斯山，一路抵达浪漫的巴黎。沿途游览苏黎世老城、卢塞恩的湖光山色与童话般的伊塞尔特瓦尔德（龙疆）小镇、少女峰脚下因特拉肯的“两湖”风光，以及日内瓦湖畔，随后进入法国。在巴黎，由法国国家馆讲解师带您深度讲解卢浮宫，乘塞纳河游船，并参观巴洛克艺术瑰宝凡尔赛宫。单程路线大幅减少折返和大巴里程，把更多时间留给观光。

highlights.en: One-way deep route Milan to Paris that cuts coach mileage and backtracking
highlights.zh: 米兰至巴黎单程深度线路，大幅降低大巴行车里程，减少折返

highlights.en: Cross the Swiss Alps from Zurich and Lucerne to Interlaken at the foot of the Jungfrau
highlights.zh: 横穿瑞士阿尔卑斯山，从苏黎世、卢塞恩一路到少女峰脚下的因特拉肯

highlights.en: Lakeside scenery of Lucerne and the fairy-tale village of Iseltwald (Crash Landing on You filming location)
highlights.zh: 卢塞恩湖光山色与《爱的迫降》取景地——童话小镇伊塞尔特瓦尔德（龙疆）

highlights.en: Geneva lakefront with the Flower Clock, Jet d'Eau and old town
highlights.zh: 日内瓦湖畔的花钟、大喷泉与老城区

highlights.en: In-depth Louvre tour led by a French national-gallery lecturer
highlights.zh: 由法国国家馆讲解师带领的卢浮宫深度讲解

highlights.en: Seine river cruise past Notre-Dame, the Eiffel Tower and more
highlights.zh: 乘塞纳河游船，饱览巴黎圣母院、埃菲尔铁塔等沿岸景观

highlights.en: Baroque masterpiece: the Palace of Versailles
highlights.zh: 巴洛克艺术瑰宝——凡尔赛宫

highlights.en: City-centre 4-star hotels with daily breakfast and no forced shopping
highlights.zh: 市中心四星酒店、每日早餐，全程无强制购物

includes.en: Hotels: 5 nights in 4-star hotels.
includes.zh: 【酒店】：四星级酒店5晚。

includes.en: Meals: 5 meals in total, breakfast at the hotel or other forms of dining.
includes.zh: 【餐饮】：酒店内早餐或其他形式餐饮共计5餐。

includes.en: Taxes & fees: all in-itinerary taxes and fees including city/tourist tax, town-entry fee, residence tax, road & bridge tolls, island-landing fees, etc.
includes.zh: 【税费】：游客城市税、进城费、居住税、路桥费、登岛费等行程内的所有税费。

includes.en: Transport: tour coach or business travel van.
includes.zh: 【交通】：旅游巴士或者商务旅行车。

includes.en: Guide: professional driver + Chinese-speaking guide, or a Chinese-speaking driver-guide for the whole trip (note: for groups of 8 or fewer, a business travel van + Chinese-speaking driver-guide is arranged, and the driver-guide leads all city sightseeing).
includes.zh: 【导游】：职业司机+中文导游或者全程中文司机兼导游（备注：8人及以下则安排为商务旅行车+中文司机兼导游，届时将有司兼导带领游览全部城市行程）。

includes.en: Luggage: one piece of 23 kg checked luggage plus one carry-on.
includes.zh: 【行李】：1件23公斤行李及1件随身行李。

includes.en: Activities & tickets: Louvre admission (including national-museum docent), Versailles admission (including national-museum docent), and the Seine River cruise.
includes.zh: 【活动及门票】：卢浮宫门票（含国家馆讲解师）、凡尔赛门票（含国家馆讲解师）、塞纳河游船。

excludes.en: Passport: personal passport fees.
excludes.zh: 护照：个人护照费用。

excludes.en: Visa: tourist visa fees for the countries on the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 签证：行程中所列旅游国家所需的观光签证费用。

excludes.en: Insurance: travel insurance fees (if the itinerary involves high-risk activities, please verify whether your travel insurance covers them).
excludes.zh: 保险：旅游保险费用（如行程内涉及到高风险运动，请核实旅游保险是否包含该项运动）。

excludes.en: Tips: gratuities for the guide and driver, EUR 10 per person per day, same rate for adults and children.
excludes.zh: 小费：游客支付导游和司机小费一共10欧/人/天，大小同价。

excludes.en: Meals: lunches and dinners are not included.
excludes.zh: 餐饮：行程内不包含午、晚正餐费用。

excludes.en: Tickets: admission to sights not noted as included (including but not limited to sights marked "exterior", and all "recommended", "optional", "experience" items not stated as included — at your own expense if you wish to enter).
excludes.zh: 门票：行程中未注明费用包含的景点（包括但不仅限于行程中注明“外观”的景点，以及“推荐”“可选”“体验”等所有未提及费用包含的项目，如游客需要参观，敬请自理）。

excludes.en: Extended stay: any accommodation, transport or sightseeing costs added outside the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 延长住宿：行程外额外延长的住宿、交通、观光费用。

excludes.en: Personal spending: drinks/alcohol, taxis, phone charges and other personal expenses.
excludes.zh: 私人消费：如饮料酒类、出租车、电话费等个人消费。

excludes.en: Other transport: transport not mentioned in the inclusions beyond the included business van or minibus, e.g. the Venice gondola and, in vehicle-restricted zones, the sightseeing train or electric taxis — at your own expense.
excludes.zh: 其他交通：除包含商务旅行车或者中巴之外，费用包含中未提及的其他交通费用，如威尼斯贡多拉，以及车辆限行区的观光火车、电瓶出租车等费用敬请自理。

excludes.en: Free activities: any evening sightseeing on your own and the itinerary's recommended items, plus the resulting transport, dining, tickets and shopping costs.
excludes.zh: 自由活动：游客夜间自行游览及行程中的推荐项目，以及产生的交通、餐饮、门票、购物等费用。

excludes.en: Experience activities: any travel-experience activities not included in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 体验活动：行程中没有包含的各项旅游体验活动。

excludes.en: Other costs: anything not mentioned in the inclusions. Note that for extra costs caused by force majeure such as natural disasters, war or strikes, or by traffic delays, flight cancellation/rescheduling, embassy visa delays, insufficient group size, or other reasons not attributable to our company (e.g. overseas visa-extension fees, accommodation/meals/transport, national airfare adjustments), our company reserves the right to charge the price difference.
excludes.zh: 其他费用：费用包含中未提及的费用。如因天灾、战争、罢工等不可抗力的原因，及因交通延阻、航班取消或更改时间、使馆延误出签证、人数不足等特殊情况或其他非我公司原因所导致的额外费用（如在外延期签证费、住、食及交通费、国家航空运价调整等），我公司有权追加差价。

timeline.title_en: Milan – Zurich: Along the Alps, from the fashion capital to the financial capital
timeline.title_zh: 米兰 – 苏黎世：沿阿尔卑斯山脉，从时尚之都游览金融之都
timeline.description_en: After the morning gathering at the tour-bus parking lot of Sforza Castle in Milan (around 09:00), you have free time to admire Milan's landmark Milan Cathedral / Duomo (exterior) and the Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II, one of Europe's most beautiful shopping arcades with its famous Prada boutique. In the afternoon the group travels to Zurich to take in the lakeside-and-mountain scenery of Lake Zurich, visit the Grossmünster (Zurich Cathedral, exterior), stroll along the luxury Bahnhofstrasse and walk beside the Limmat River. Bahnhofstrasse is one of Europe's longest and most expensive shopping avenues, lined with the world's luxury brands and private banks. Overnight at the Hali's House Hotel in Zurich Limmattal or an equivalent 4-star hotel, set in the scenic heart of the Limmat valley next to one of Switzerland's largest shopping centers.
timeline.description_zh: 上午在米兰斯福尔扎城堡旅游大巴停车站集合（约09:00）后，自由参观米兰的标志性建筑米兰主教堂/杜莫主教座堂（外观），以及欧洲最漂亮的商业拱廊之一埃马努埃莱二世长廊——中央拱廊下设有著名的Prada精品店。下午前往苏黎世，游览苏黎世湖的湖光山色，参观苏黎世大教堂（外观），漫步寸土寸金的班霍夫大街并沿利马特河边散步。班霍夫大街是欧洲最长、世界上最昂贵的购物大道之一，遍布世界各地的奢侈品牌与私人银行。夜宿苏黎世利马塔尔哈利之家酒店或同等4星级酒店，酒店坐落于风景秀丽的利马塔尔中心地带，紧邻瑞士较大的购物中心。

timeline.title_en: Zurich – Lucerne – Interlaken: The hidden paradise of Iseltwald and Switzerland's signature lakes and mountains
timeline.title_zh: 苏黎世 – 卢塞恩 – 因特拉肯：世外桃源龙疆镇，瑞士湖光山色代表作
timeline.description_en: In the morning the group sets off for Lucerne to enjoy the lake-and-mountain scenery of Lake Lucerne, see the Lion Monument that tells the story of the loyal and steadfast Swiss mercenaries, and visit the Chapel Bridge (Kapellbrücke) and its octagonal water tower. The Lion Monument, carved into natural rock in 1821, commemorates the 786 Swiss Guards who died protecting Louis XVI's family at the Tuileries in 1792 — Mark Twain called it the most mournful and moving stone in the world. The group then continues to the village of Iseltwald (Longjiang) to admire the Iseltwald lake and village scenery, the famous filming location of the K-drama Crash Landing on You, before heading in the afternoon to Interlaken at the foot of the Jungfrau, Europe's roof. Overnight at the Solis Cademario / Sigriswil Snow-Mountain & Lake-View Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel beside the Sigriswil panorama bridge, with Swiss country-style rooms overlooking Lake Thun and the surrounding peaks.
timeline.description_zh: 上午出发前往卢塞恩，游览卢塞恩湖的湖光山色，聆听狮子纪念碑讲述瑞士人忠贞坚毅的那段历史，并参观卡贝尔廊桥及八角形水塔等景点。狮子纪念碑于1821年由丹麦雕塑家雕刻在天然岩石上，为纪念1792年为保护巴黎杜乐丽宫中路易十六家族而全部战死的786名瑞士雇佣兵，马克·吐温曾誉之为世界上最悲壮、最感人的雕像。之后前往龙疆小镇，游览龙疆湖及小镇风光——这里是《爱的迫降》大团圆结局的取景地，群山环抱、绿草茵茵，俨然一座远离尘嚣的世外桃源；下午前往欧洲屋脊“少女峰”山脚下的小镇因特拉肯。夜宿锡格里斯维尔雪山湖景酒店或同等4星级酒店，酒店位于锡格里斯维尔全景桥旁的山涧，客房为瑞士乡村典雅风格，可远眺图恩湖与周围群山。

timeline.title_en: Interlaken – Jungfrau – Geneva: Between Switzerland's "two lakes", with panoramic Jungfrau views
timeline.title_zh: 因特拉肯 – 少女峰 – 日内瓦：行瑞士“两湖”之间，赏“少女峰”全景
timeline.description_en: In the morning you explore Interlaken, set between Lake Brienz and Lake Thun (nicknamed the left and right eyes of God), with the option to freely wander Höheweg street and the Höhematte meadow, a tranquil green space and the launch point for paragliders. The day offers three mutually exclusive options (choose only one): Option 1 — included: a coach tour of the Jungfrau region with the guide, viewing Grindelwald's classic "dream slope" Swiss scenery; Option 2 — EUR 230: ascend to the top of the Jungfrau by panoramic cog railway via Grindelwald and the Eiger Glacier to Top of Europe (Europe's highest railway station), visiting the Sphinx Observatory, the Crystal Palace, the plateau viewpoint and the Aletsch Glacier ice palace; Option 3 — EUR 70: a round-trip aerial gondola from Grindelwald-First (Top of Adventure) to the First peak to walk the famous First Cliff Walk, with optional thrill rides such as the First Flyer zipline (up to 80 km/h) and the First Glider. In the afternoon the group transfers to Annemasse near Geneva. Overnight at the Novotel Genève Centre Gare or Crowne Plaza in Annemasse or an equivalent 4-star hotel, an Accor comfort hotel opened in 2020 with a rooftop bar overlooking the Alps and the Jura.
timeline.description_zh: 上午游览位于布里恩茨湖和图恩湖之间（有上帝左眼与右眼之称）的因特拉肯，可自由游览何维克街、荷黑马特绿地广场——这片宁静绿地是眺望少女峰的好去处，也是滑翔翼的降落地。当天提供三选一的推荐项目（仅可三选一，不可同时选择两项）：项目一【费用包含】：跟随导游乘车游览格林德尔瓦尔德经典瑞士山景“梦幻山坡”；项目二【230欧元】：乘少女峰全景缆车，经格林德尔瓦尔德、艾格冰川登顶——Top of Europe欧洲较高的火车站，游览斯芬克斯观景台、水晶宫、高原观景台及阿莱奇冰川冰宫；项目三【70欧元】：从格林德尔瓦尔德菲斯特空天探险站（Top of Adventure）乘空中贡多拉往返菲斯特First峰巅，游览懸崖天梭巅峰栈道First Cliff Walk，并可选高空飞索（时速80公里）、神鹰飞行等惊险刺激项目。下午乘车前往安纳马斯（近日内瓦）。夜宿安娜玛斯日内瓦港诺富特酒店或皇冠假日酒店或同等4星级酒店，诺富特为雅高旗下2020年开业的舒适型商务酒店，8层Rooftop酒吧可俯瞰阿尔卑斯山和侏罗山脉。

timeline.title_en: Geneva – Paris: Strolling Lake Geneva's shore and the Old Town's Flower Bridge
timeline.title_zh: 日内瓦 – 巴黎：漫步日内瓦湖畔，看花桥横渡古城区
timeline.description_en: In the morning you visit the "Flower Bridge" (Pont des Bergues) area beside the hotel, gathering local Geneva delicacies and specialty shops, and tour Geneva's Old Town, the Lake Geneva waterfront, the Flower Clock (L'horloge fleurie) and the Jet d'Eau fountain. The Jet d'Eau, on the lake near the English Garden, shoots a 140-meter-high column of water at 500 liters per second and is one of Geneva's most representative sights. The Old Town on the slopes of the right bank of the Rhône is a cluster of churches and monuments, with antique shops along its winding lanes and the former home of the Enlightenment thinker Rousseau. In the afternoon the group drives to Paris. Overnight at the Mercure or Novotel Paris or an equivalent 4-star hotel, an Accor comfort 4-star hotel located near large shopping centers.
timeline.description_zh: 上午游览位于酒店旁的“花桥”区域，这里云集了日内瓦各种当地美食和特色商店，参观日内瓦老城、日内瓦湖区、花钟和大喷泉等景点。大喷泉位于英国花园附近的日内瓦湖面上，水柱高140米、喷水量每秒500公升，是日内瓦最具代表性的景观之一。隆河右岸山坡上的旧城区是教堂、古迹的聚集地，蜿蜒小巷间散布着古董商店，欧洲启蒙时代思想家卢梭的故居也位于此。下午乘车前往巴黎。夜宿巴黎美居酒店或诺富特酒店或同等4星级酒店，为雅高旗下的舒适型四星酒店，位于大型商超附近，方便用餐购物。

timeline.title_en: Paris – Louvre – Paris: Understanding the origins of art at the Louvre, falling for salon culture
timeline.title_zh: 巴黎 – 卢浮宫 – 巴黎：深度理解艺术的起源——卢浮宫，爱上沙龙文化
timeline.description_en: In the morning you visit the Louvre, the pride of France, with an in-depth, theme-curated commentary from a French national-museum docent. The Louvre, one of the world's oldest museums, holds over 400,000 works (about 35,000 on long-term display) spanning ancient Egypt, Greece, Rome and the East; its glass-pyramid entrance was designed by I. M. Pei. In the afternoon the group visits Notre-Dame de Paris, the Île de la Cité, the Eiffel Tower (exterior) and the Champ de Mars, then takes a Seine River cruise to view Les Invalides (exterior), the Grand and Petit Palais (exterior) and the Place de la Concorde, touring the center of Paris all day. The roughly one-hour, 3.2 km "Bateaux Mouches" cruise passes Notre-Dame, the Grand and Petit Palais, the Pont Alexandre III, the love-lock bridge, the Louvre, the Champs-Élysées and the Île de la Cité. Overnight at the Mercure or Novotel Paris or an equivalent 4-star hotel. (Note: due to Louvre crowd control, especially in peak season when in-museum guiding is restricted, the EUR 10 in-museum commentary fee per guest will be refunded.)
timeline.description_zh: 上午参观法兰西引以为傲的卢浮宫博物馆，由法兰西国家馆讲解师精选主题深度讲解。卢浮宫是世界上最古老的博物馆之一，珍藏40余万件藝術珍品（长期展出约3.5万件），囊括古埃及、希腊、罗马及东方各国艺术品，宫前玻璃金字塔入口由华裔建筑大师贝聿铭设计。下午前往游览巴黎圣母院、西岱岛、埃菲尔铁塔（外观）及战神广场，之后乘坐塞纳河游船游览荣军院（外观）、大小皇宫（外观）、协和广场等地，全天游览巴黎市中心景点。塞纳河“苍蝇船”游船约1小时、3.2公里航程，途经巴黎圣母院、大小皇宫、亚历山大三世大桥、巴黎锁桥、卢浮宫、香榭丽舍大道及西岱岛等著名景点。夜宿巴黎美居酒店或诺富特酒店或同等4星级酒店。（备注：由于卢浮宫限流，特别是旺季限制讲解员在馆内讲解，届时将退还馆内讲解费10欧元/每位游客。）

timeline.title_en: Paris – Versailles – Paris: The Baroque treasure of the Palace of Versailles, fashion-and-art pioneer
timeline.title_zh: 巴黎 – 凡尔赛 – 巴黎：巴洛克艺术瑰宝凡尔赛宫，时尚艺术先锋
timeline.description_en: In the morning the group heads to Paris's fashion hub on Boulevard Haussmann and Boulevard de la Madeleine, with free time to admire the Palais Garnier opera house / Paris Opera (exterior) and to browse the Printemps and Galeries Lafayette department stores. Boulevard Haussmann, between the 8th and 9th arrondissements, is famous for these two great stores and is where Marcel Proust wrote most of In Search of Lost Time at No. 102. In the afternoon you travel to the Palace of Versailles in the southwestern suburbs of Paris and tour the palace — a magnificent monument of France's feudal era built by Louis XIV, requiring more than 30,000 workers, architects and engineers. The tour then returns to Place d'Italie in Paris to conclude. No accommodation on this final day.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往巴黎时尚中心奥斯曼大街和皇家大道，自由参观巴黎歌剧院（外观）及春天百货、巴黎老佛爷等时尚街区。奥斯曼大街位于巴黎第八区和第九区之间，因老佛爺百货（Galeries Lafayette）及以家饰精品著称的春天百货（Printemps）两大百货公司而生动起来，《追忆似水年华》作者马塞尔·普鲁斯特曾在该街102号居所完成大部分写作。下午前往位于巴黎西南部郊区的凡尔赛宫，游览凡尔赛宫——这座法国封建统治历史时期的华丽纪念碑由路易十四下令建造，共动用三万余名工人及建筑师、工程师、技师。随后返回巴黎意大利广场结束美好行程。当天无住宿。

meeting_en: Milan: assemble around 09:00 at the tourist coach parking by Sforzesco Castle (Castello Sforzesco, Parcheggio bus turistici Lanza, 20121 Milano MI, Italy).
meeting_zh: 米兰：约09:00在米兰斯福尔扎城堡旅游大巴停车站集合，地址：Castello Sforzesco, Parcheggio bus turistici Lanza, 20121 Milano MI, Italie。

faqs.question_en: Where and how do we meet and disperse?
faqs.question_zh: 集合及集散地点和方法是怎样的？
faqs.answer_en: On Day 1 the group gathers around 09:00 at the tour-bus parking lot of Sforza Castle in Milan (address: Castello-Sforzesco Parcheggio bus turistici Lanza 20121 Milano MI, Italy). On Day 6 the group disperses around 19:00 at Place d'Italie in Paris. These are reference times and places; actual departure follows the tour notification letter. We do not recommend booking a flight that lands in Milan on the meeting day or one that leaves Paris on the final day.
faqs.answer_zh: 行程第1天约09:00在米兰斯福尔扎城堡旅游大巴停车站集合（地址：Castello-Sforzesco Parcheggio bus turistici Lanza 20121 Milano MI, Italy）。行程第6天约19:00在巴黎意大利广场解散。以上为参考时间及地点，实际出发时间以出团通知书为准。不推荐预订当天落地米兰的航班和结束当天离开巴黎的航班！

faqs.question_en: Will the coach rides on the route be very long?
faqs.question_zh: 行程路线乘坐大巴时间会不会很久？
faqs.answer_en: On this product only the Geneva–Paris leg is about 6 hours 45 minutes; all other planned legs are roughly 3–4 hours of driving. Road traffic is complex — congestion or other factors, especially within cities, can increase driving time.
faqs.answer_zh: 该产品仅日内瓦至巴黎段约为6小时45分，其余计划行程均为3-4小时左右的行车时间。公路交通情况复杂，特别是市区内容易发生堵车或其它因素导致行车时间增加。

faqs.question_en: Can we go to the summit of the Jungfrau?
faqs.question_zh: 产品是否可以游览少女峰登顶？
faqs.answer_en: Yes, but it is not included in the price. If you want to take part, we recommend booking in advance. Available experience time is limited and it may conflict with the original itinerary, affecting the arrangement of other sightseeing and experiences.
faqs.answer_zh: 可以游览，但是费用不包含。如需参加建议提前预定。可选的体验时间受限，可能跟原行程安排产生冲突，导致影响其他行程和体验的安排。

faqs.question_en: Can we visit the First Top of Adventure activities?
faqs.question_zh: 我是否能游览菲斯特瑞士空天探险活动（First Top of Adventure）？
faqs.answer_en: Yes, but it is not included in the price. If you want to take part, we recommend booking in advance.
faqs.answer_zh: 可以游览，但是费用不包含。如需参加建议提前预定。

faqs.question_en: What adventure activities are available at First?
faqs.question_zh: 菲斯特都有什么探险活动？
faqs.answer_en: First Top of Adventure offers many thrilling alpine activities, mainly: the Aerial gondola, the First Cliff Walk, the First Flyer zipline, and the First Glider eagle-flight ride. These can be purchased on site depending on the day's queue times and weather.
faqs.answer_zh: 菲斯特空天探险有很多惊险刺激的高山活动，主要项目有：空中贡多拉（Aerial gondola）、悬崖天梭巅峰栈道（First Cliff Walk）、高空飞索（First Flyer）、神鹰飞梭（First Glider）。可根据当天排队时间及天气情况现场购买。

faqs.question_en: Can I choose both the Jungfrau sightseeing train and the First adventure activities?
faqs.question_zh: 我能否同时选择少女峰观光列车和菲斯特空天探险两个项目？
faqs.answer_en: No. There are only 5–6 hours of free time in Interlaken that day. The recommended time for the Jungfrau visit is about 4 hours, and First takes about 3–4 hours, so the two cannot both be done.
faqs.answer_zh: 不可以。当天在因特拉肯仅有5-6小时自由活动时间，推荐游览少女峰时间为4小时，菲斯特需要3-4个小时，因此两者无法同时选择。

faqs.question_en: Can I choose to ride the GoldenPass to tour Switzerland?
faqs.question_zh: 我是否可以选择乘坐金色山口游览瑞士？
faqs.answer_en: Yes, you may take the Iseltwald (Longjiang) or Meiringen to Interlaken or Lucerne leg. Before buying the train ticket you must agree with the guide on the time and journey for rejoining the group; the Iseltwald or Lucerne sightseeing will then be shortened. The train ticket and seat fee are about EUR 35.
faqs.answer_zh: 可以选择龙疆或梅林根到因特拉肯或卢塞恩段，需要在购买火车票前与导游协商再次返回旅游团的时间点和车程，届时龙疆或卢塞恩的游览行程将会缩减，火车票及座位费约为35欧元。

faqs.question_en: If I don't choose any Interlaken activity, how do I spend the time?
faqs.question_zh: 如果我不选择任何因特拉肯的活动，该如何游览？
faqs.answer_en: You can freely explore the town of Interlaken. As a well-known Swiss resort town its tourist facilities are very complete, and the 6-hour plan is enough to cover the whole of Interlaken.
faqs.answer_zh: 可以在因特拉肯小镇上自由游览。作为瑞士知名的旅游度假小镇，所有的旅游设施非常齐全，6小时的游览计划可以覆盖因特拉肯小镇的全貌。

faqs.question_en: Do I need a visa?
faqs.question_zh: 是否需要签证？
faqs.answer_en: Yes. This product does not include the visa fee — a Schengen visa (single or multiple entry) is required; if you need visa processing, please choose a Schengen-visa product. After booking we provide all the materials needed to apply for the Schengen visa free of charge. Your passport must be valid for at least six months from the date of departure, or customs may refuse entry. Visa fees, visa service fees, Schengen insurance fees and visa-center appointment fees are all non-refundable and cannot be transferred to another user, even if the product is changed or cancelled. "Guaranteed-visa" assurance: if you sign with us 61 or more days before departure and have not obtained the visa within 45 days before departure, we bear all losses and immediately refund all travel costs; cases not meeting this clause follow the change-and-cancellation terms. In case of refusal, notify us within 48 hours with the consulate's refusal letter; any supplementary or changed materials must be submitted within five days, and you may not unilaterally waive the right of "visa defence".
faqs.answer_zh: 需要。本产品不包含签证费用——需要申根签证（单次或多次入境）；如您需要办理签证，请选择申根签证产品。预定后免费提供办理申根签证的全部材料。护照有效期需在离境之日起至少还有六个月有效期，否则海关有权拒绝入境。签证费、签证服务费、申根保险费、签证中心预约费均不可退款，也无法更改使用者，即使产品退改签，签证费用也无法退款。保签无忧：游客在出发日前61天与我社签约，如在出发前45天内未获取签证，我社承担所有损失，立即退还游客全部旅游费用；不符合该条款的游客如未正常获取签证，将按照“退改与取消条款”进行退费。如遇拒签需在48小时内通知我社并出具使领馆的拒签函，如需补充或更改材料须在五天内提交，且不得单方面放弃“签证抗辩”权利。

faqs.question_en: Booking, changes & cancellation
faqs.question_zh: 预订、变更与取消须知
faqs.answer_en: All orders are confirmed only after payment plus a second confirmation by the operator within 48 hours; book at least 14 days ahead, and do not book connecting flights/hotels before your itinerary is confirmed. Up to 30 days before departure (excluding the 30th day), both the agency and the traveler may cancel without cause; afterwards, refunds for reducing headcount, cancelling, or changing the itinerary/date follow the change-and-cancellation terms. Because flights, traffic, ferries, strikes and order optimization frequently shift the timing and sequence, you must arrive at the meeting point one day before the tour starts and leave the dispersal point one day after it ends, allowing reasonable flight buffers (at least 5 hours for transfers at the same airport, 7 hours across different airports in the same city). For groups of 8 or fewer the tour becomes a small group with a business van + Chinese-speaking driver-guide. Room types: two people booking together default to a standard double (bed type assigned by the hotel, not selectable — could be one large bed or twin beds); three people default to a family room (two parents + one minor, bed configuration assigned by the hotel); solo travelers pay a single-room supplement unless they request room-sharing. European hotels are non-smoking, no cooking in rooms, no free toiletries or boiling water, check-in 14:00 and check-out 11:00, and air-conditioning is not standard. Named hotels are preferred; if full they are swapped for a similar same-star hotel without separate notice. Group is formed (成团) at 10 people; if the minimum is not reached 30 days before departure either side may cancel without liability. Pricing is in EUR; if you pay in CNY, the rate is the Bank of China "EUR sell" rate at the moment of payment, and the same applies to refunds. Itinerary contingency: the Louvre may impose crowd control in peak season — if changed to walk-in tickets the EUR 10 commentary fee per person is refunded, and if entry is impossible the ticket + commentary fee are refunded and it becomes an exterior visit; Versailles uses an audio device instead of the official docent when the group has fewer than 3 people. This is a rolling/combined departure, so other travelers board and alight at different points with different start/end cities and prices.
faqs.answer_zh: 所有订单支付不等于确认行程，需等组团社在48小时内二次确认，建议至少提前14天预订；未获确认前请勿预订衔接机票及酒店。出发前30天（不含第30天）旅行社和旅行者均可无理由取消；之后减少人数、取消整张订单、更改行程或日期的退费按《更改与取消条例条款》执行。由于航变、交通拥堵、渡轮取消、罢工游行或顺序调整频繁导致行程时间及先后顺序经常调整，旅行者须在参团日期前一天抵达集合地、离团日期后一天离开集散地，并预留合理航班衔接时间（同一机场转机至少5小时，同城不同机场至少7小时）。8人及以下将自动改为小团，安排商务旅行车+中文司机兼导游。房型：两人同时报名默认标准双人间（床型由酒店安排，不可指定，可能为大床或双床）；三人默认家庭间（两位父母与一位未成年儿童，床型由酒店安排）；单人报名默认含单人房差，如不愿拼房需备注“要求单人入住”。欧洲酒店禁烟、禁止房内做饭、不提供一次性洗漱用品及免费开水，入住14:00、退房11:00，且空调并非标准设施。行程内列明酒店为优先入住，如订满则换相同星级相近酒店，不另行通知。本产品成团人数为10人，行程前30天（不含第30天）未达成团人数，双方均可解除合同且不承担违约责任。所有定价以欧元为计价单位，如选择人民币支付，则以付款当日中国银行“欧元卖出价”实时折算的人民币价格为准，退款同样适用申请当日即时汇率。行程应急安排：旺季卢浮宫可能对旅游团限流——如改为散拼门票则退还每位10欧元讲解费，如无法入内则退还门票+讲解费并改为外观游览；凡尔赛不足3人时由讲解器替代官导讲解。本产品为循环套发团，途中会有其他游客在不同地点上下团，开始和结束的城市及价格各不相同，敬请根据个人报名的目的地开始和结束行程。

faqs.question_en: Health & safety requirements
faqs.question_zh: 健康与安全须知
faqs.answer_en: To prevent personal-injury accidents, please have a health check before departure. Do not book if you have: an infectious disease (e.g. active tuberculosis, typhoid); cardiovascular disease (severe hypertension, heart failure, myocardial ischemia, myocardial infarction); cerebrovascular disease (cerebral embolism, hemorrhage, brain tumor); respiratory disease (emphysema, cor pulmonale); a mental illness (epilepsy, etc.); severe anemia (hemoglobin below 50 g/L); or recovery from major surgery. Pregnancy: travelers at 35 weeks or more cannot join under any circumstances; at 28 weeks or more, a doctor's exam report within 7 days plus the attending doctor's consent letter are required; under 28 weeks, please book with caution, sign a liability waiver, and you cannot join adventure, skiing, sea, high-altitude or outdoor activities. Travelers with disabilities need a doctor's report within 7 days plus consent letter, an accompanying immediate family member, and must apply at least 61 days ahead for a reserved place and facilities. Seniors over 70 need a health/medical report and an accompanying immediate family member (otherwise a liability waiver); this is a long trip requiring good walking ability and stamina. Minors (under 18) must be accompanied by an immediate family member or guardian; an unaccompanied minor needs both parents' authorization (or the other parent's written authorization if traveling with only one); infants under 2 are not accepted, and a safety seat must be confirmed in advance for infants under 6 or children under 30 kg. Under Article 15 of the Tourism Law (and the Infectious Disease Prevention Law, 2025 revision), travelers must truthfully declare health information relevant to the trip — including pregnancy, lactation, chronic disease, infectious-disease history, suspected symptoms or recent travel to epidemic areas — and follow safety warnings. Concealing such information that causes harm makes the traveler liable for the resulting medical, isolation and compensation costs, and the agency may terminate the contract without refund.
faqs.answer_zh: 为确保旅游顺利出行、防止旅途中发生人身意外伤害事故，请在出行前做一次必要的身体检查，如存在下列情况请勿报名：传染性疾病患者（如活动期肺结核、伤寒等）；心血管疾病患者（如严重高血压、心功能不全、心肌缺氧、心肌梗塞等）；脑血管疾病患者（如脑栓塞、脑出血、脑肿瘤等）；呼吸系统疾病患者（如肺气肿、肺心病等）；精神病患者（如癫痫及各种精神病）；严重贫血病患者（血红蛋白水平在50克/升以下）；大中型手术的恢复期病患者。孕妇：妊娠第35周及以上在任何情况下都无法参团；第28周及以上需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书；第28周以下请慎重报名，需签署旅行社免责声明书，且无法参加探险、滑雪、出海、高空、户外等项目。残疾人：需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书，需直系家属陪同，并需提前至少61天申请预留位置及专用配套设施。70周岁以上老年人出游需提供健康证明、体检报告并由直系家属陪同（否则需签署免责声明书）；本次行程较长，需有一定步行能力和体力，体力不支者请慎重报名。未成年人（未满18周岁）须由直系亲属或监护人陪同，无父母陪同的未成年人须持父母授权书（仅一方陪同则需另一方书面授权）；本产品不接受2周岁以下婴儿，6岁以下婴儿或30公斤以下儿童请提前确认安全儿童座椅。根据《旅游法》第15条及《传染病防治法（2025修订）》，旅游者须如实告知与旅游活动相关的个人健康信息（包括妊娠期、哺乳期、慢性病、传染病史、疑似症状或近期疫区旅居史）并遵守安全警示，若因隐瞒导致人身损害或传播风险，需自行承担医疗、隔离费用及赔偿责任，旅行社可解除合同且不退还费用。

title_en: France, Italy & Switzerland 8-Day One-Way Tour: Rome to Paris
title_zh: 法意瑞8天跟团游：罗马至巴黎单程深度线
short_en: An 8-day one-way escape from Rome to Paris through Tuscany's hill towns, Venice, the Italian Lakes, and Switzerland's alpine lakes and Jungfrau region.
short_zh: 8天单程深度游，从罗马一路北上至巴黎，串联托斯卡纳古城、威尼斯、米兰、苏黎世与少女峰区，畅游瑞士湖光山色。
desc_en: Travel one-way from Rome to Paris on this 8-day France-Italy-Switzerland tour that maximises sightseeing while cutting down on coach mileage. In Italy you visit a different city each day — the medieval gem of Siena, the Val d'Orcia cypress lanes around Pienza, Pisa's Leaning Tower, the cliff-hugging villages of Cinque Terre, Renaissance Florence, and romantic Venice. Crossing into Switzerland you take in Zurich, Lucerne, the fairy-tale lakeside town of Iseltwald, Interlaken between its two lakes, and the Jungfrau region, before finishing along Lake Geneva and returning to Paris. Brand-name 4-star hotels, all taxes included, and no hidden costs make this a relaxed, all-inclusive route.
desc_zh: 这条8天法意瑞单程线从罗马一路北上至巴黎，单程行程深度游览，大幅降低大巴行车里程。在意大利每天一座城：中世纪艺术瑰宝锡耶纳、奥尔恰谷绝美丝柏树小径与古城皮恩扎、比萨斜塔、悬崖上的五渔村、文艺复兴之都佛罗伦萨、水城威尼斯。进入瑞士后贯穿四大语区深度游览：苏黎世、卢塞恩、童话般的龙疆小镇、两湖之间的因特拉肯与少女峰区，最后沿日内瓦湖返回巴黎。全程精选品牌四星酒店，各项税费全含，绝无隐藏费用。

highlights.en: One-way deep route from Rome to Paris — less coach time, more sightseeing
highlights.zh: 罗马至巴黎单程深度线，大幅降低大巴行车里程

highlights.en: A different Italian city every day: Siena, Pisa, Florence, Venice
highlights.zh: 意大利每天一座城：锡耶纳、比萨、佛罗伦萨、威尼斯

highlights.en: Val d'Orcia cypress lanes and the medieval hill town of Pienza
highlights.zh: 奥尔恰谷田园美景与中世纪古城皮恩扎、绝美丝柏树小径

highlights.en: Scenic train along the Ligurian coast to the Cinque Terre villages
highlights.zh: 景观列车沿利古里亚海岸线游览悬崖上的五渔村

highlights.en: Romantic Venice: St Mark's Square, the Bridge of Sighs and the canals
highlights.zh: 浪漫水城威尼斯：圣马可广场、叹息桥与蜿蜒水巷

highlights.en: Switzerland's four language regions: Zurich, Lucerne, Interlaken & Jungfrau
highlights.zh: 瑞士四大语区贯穿游览：苏黎世、卢塞恩、因特拉肯与少女峰区

highlights.en: Lakeside Iseltwald and Lake Geneva's old town, flower bridge and fountain
highlights.zh: 童话龙疆小镇与日内瓦湖畔花桥、老城及大喷泉

highlights.en: Brand 4-star hotels, all taxes included, no forced shopping or hidden fees
highlights.zh: 品牌四星酒店，各项税费全含，无强制购物、绝无隐藏费用

includes.en: Hotels: 7 nights in 4-star hotels.
includes.zh: 【酒店】：四星级酒店7晚。

includes.en: Meals: 7 meals in total, breakfast at the hotel or meals in other forms.
includes.zh: 【餐饮】：酒店内早餐或其他形式餐饮共计7餐。

includes.en: Taxes & fees: all taxes within the itinerary, including tourist city tax, city-entry fees, residence tax, road and bridge tolls, island-landing fees, etc.
includes.zh: 【税费】：游客城市税、进城费、居住税、路桥费、登岛费等行程内的所有税费。

includes.en: Transport: tour coach or business travel vehicle.
includes.zh: 【交通】：旅游巴士或者商务旅行车。

includes.en: Guide: professional driver plus Chinese-speaking guide, or a Chinese-speaking driver-guide throughout (note: for groups of 8 people or fewer, a business travel vehicle plus a Chinese-speaking driver-guide will be arranged).
includes.zh: 【导游】：职业司机+中文导游，或者全程中文司机兼导游（备注：8人及以下则安排为商务旅行车+中文司机兼导游）。

includes.en: Luggage: 1 piece of checked luggage up to 23 kg plus 1 piece of hand luggage.
includes.zh: 【行李】：1件23公斤行李及1件随身行李。

includes.en: Activities & tickets: the Venice island ferry and the Cinque Terre scenic train.
includes.zh: 【活动及门票】：威尼斯登岛轮渡、五渔村景观列车。

excludes.en: Passport: personal passport fees.
excludes.zh: 护照：个人护照费用。

excludes.en: Visa: the tourist visa fees required for the countries on the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 签证：行程中所列旅游国家所需的观光签证费用。

excludes.en: Insurance: travel insurance fees (if the itinerary involves high-risk sports, please verify whether your travel insurance covers that activity).
excludes.zh: 保险：旅游保险费用（如行程内涉及到高风险运动，请核实旅游保险是否包含该项运动）。

excludes.en: Tips: gratuities to the guide and driver, totaling EUR 10 per person per day, same price for adults and children.
excludes.zh: 小费：游客支付导游和司机小费一共10欧/人/天，大小同价。

excludes.en: Meals: lunch and dinner are not included in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 餐饮：行程内不包含午、晚正餐费用。

excludes.en: Tickets: sights not noted as included (including but not limited to sights marked "exterior", and all "recommended", "optional", "experience" and other items not mentioned as included). If you wish to enter/visit, please pay on your own.
excludes.zh: 门票：行程中未注明费用包含的景点（包括但不仅限于行程中注明"外观"的景点，"推荐"、"可选"、"体验"等等所有未提及费用包含的项目，如游客需要参观，敬请自理）。

excludes.en: Extended stays: any accommodation, transport or sightseeing extended beyond the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 延长住宿：行程外额外延长的住宿、交通、观光费用。

excludes.en: Personal expenses: such as drinks and alcohol, taxis, phone charges and other personal spending.
excludes.zh: 私人消费：如饮料酒类、出租车、电话费等个人消费。

excludes.en: Other transport: transport not mentioned as included beyond the business vehicle or minibus, such as the Venice gondola and, in restricted-traffic zones, sightseeing trains, electric taxis, etc. - please cover these yourself.
excludes.zh: 其他交通：除包含商务旅行车或者中巴之外，费用包含中未提及的其他交通费用，如威尼斯贡多拉，以及车辆限行区的观光火车、电瓶出租车等费用敬请自理。

excludes.en: Free activities: guests' own sightseeing at night and the recommended/optional items in the itinerary, plus any transport, meals, tickets and shopping costs arising from them.
excludes.zh: 自由活动：游客夜间自行游览及行程中的推荐项目，以及产生的交通、餐饮、门票、购物等费用。

excludes.en: Experience activities: the various tour experience activities not included in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 体验活动：行程中没有包含的各项旅游体验活动。

excludes.en: Other costs: anything not mentioned in the inclusions. In cases of force majeure such as natural disasters, war or strikes, or extra costs caused by transport delays, flight cancellations or rescheduling, embassy visa delays, insufficient group numbers and other special circumstances not attributable to our company (e.g. overseas visa-extension fees, accommodation, food and transport, national airline fare adjustments), our company reserves the right to charge the price difference.
excludes.zh: 其他费用：费用包含中未提及的费用。如因天灾、战争、罢工等不可抗力的原因，及因交通延阻、航班取消或更改时间、使馆延误出签证、人数不足等特殊情况或其他非我公司原因所引致的额外费用（如在外延期签证费、住、食及交通费、国家航空运价调整等），我公司有权追加差价。

timeline.title_en: Rome - Pienza - Siena (Medieval art treasure Siena; the cypress lane of Val d'Orcia)
timeline.title_zh: 罗马 - 皮恩扎 - 锡耶纳（中世纪艺术瑰宝锡耶纳，邂逅奥尔恰谷丝柏树小径）
timeline.description_en: Meet in Rome in the morning and set off for the old town of Pienza, stopping along the way at the famous cypress lane for free photos, where rows of Italian cypresses lining a winding country road form one of the iconic images of the Tuscan countryside. In Pienza, a UNESCO World Heritage Renaissance "ideal town" founded by Pope Pius II, visit Piazza Pio II and Pienza Cathedral (exterior). Then continue to Siena, a medieval city full of artistic masterpieces and classical architecture, to see Siena Cathedral (exterior), the shell-shaped Piazza del Campo, the Palazzo Pubblico (city hall, exterior) and the Torre del Mangia (exterior). The route also offers views over the World Heritage landscape of the Val d'Orcia. Overnight at the Four Points by Sheraton Siena or a similar 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午在罗马集合，出发前往皮恩扎古城，途中在著名的丝柏树小径自由拍照——蜿蜒乡村道路两旁种满成排的意大利柏树，是托斯卡纳田园风光的标志之一。皮恩扎是文艺复兴时期由罗马教皇庇护二世创立的理想小镇，已列入联合国世界遗产名录，在此游览二世广场（Piazza Pio II）与皮恩扎大教堂（外观）。之后前往锡耶纳，这座中世纪古城布满艺术大师杰作与古典建筑，游览锡耶纳大教堂（外观）、形似贝壳的田野广场、锡耶纳市政厅（外观）以及曼吉亚塔楼（外观）。沿途还可俯瞰世界遗产奥尔恰谷的田园美景。夜宿锡耶纳福朋喜来登酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Siena - Pisa - Cinque Terre - Florence (scenic train through Cinque Terre; Ligurian seaside towns)
timeline.title_zh: 锡耶纳 - 比萨 - 五渔村 - 佛罗伦萨（景观列车游五渔村，游利古里亚海景城镇）
timeline.description_en: In the morning travel to Pisa to see the Leaning Tower of Pisa (exterior) and the Piazza dei Miracoli (Square of Miracles), the walled center of Pisa that holds the cathedral, baptistery, leaning bell tower and cemetery, all UNESCO World Heritage. Then head to the Cinque Terre along the Ligurian coast to visit the beautiful clifftop fishing villages - Monterosso al Mare, Vernazza, Corniglia, Manarola and Riomaggiore - strung together by one of the world's most scenic coastal walking routes. Note: if bad weather, a railway strike or similar factors make it impossible to visit the Cinque Terre, the itinerary will automatically switch to touring the coastal towns by coach or other means. Overnight at the Hilton Florence Metropole or a similar 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往比萨，游览比萨斜塔（外观）和比萨历史文化中心的奇迹广场——这片围墙环绕的区域内有比萨主教座堂、比萨斜塔（钟楼）、圣乔瓦尼洗礼堂和墓园，1987年被列为世界遗产。随后沿利古里亚海岸线前往五渔村，游览悬崖边的美丽渔村——蒙特罗索、韦尔纳扎、科尔尼利亚、马纳罗拉和里奥马焦雷，这五个村镇由世界上最美的徒步线路之一串联起来。备注：如遇恶劣天气或铁路公司罢工等因素导致无法游览五渔村，行程将自动更改为乘坐大巴车或其它形式游览海岸线城市。夜宿佛罗伦萨希尔顿大都会酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Florence - Venice (land of poetry, soul of the Renaissance - an art journey)
timeline.title_zh: 佛罗伦萨 - 威尼斯（诗歌之地，文艺复兴之魂，享受艺术之旅）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, explore Florence, the birthplace of the Renaissance: visit the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore (Florence Cathedral, exterior), the world's third-largest cathedral, faced in white, red and green marble; the Piazza della Signoria, an open-air sculpture museum overlooked by the Palazzo Vecchio and a copy of Michelangelo's David; the Ponte Vecchio (Old Bridge) over the Arno, built in 1345; and the Piazza Santa Croce with the Basilica of Santa Croce (exterior), the Gothic church that is the resting place of Michelangelo and Galileo. Then continue to Venice and check in. Overnight at the voco Venice or Hilton Garden Inn Venice Mestre type property, or a similar 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后游览文艺复兴发源地佛罗伦萨：参观世界第三大教堂——圣母百花大教堂（外观），其白、红、绿三色大理石贴面尽显古典优雅；市政广场，这座露天雕塑博物馆周围环绕着维琪奥宫（旧宫）与米开朗基罗《大卫》雕像的复制品；建于1345年、横跨阿诺河的维奇奥桥（老桥）；以及圣十字广场与圣十字大教堂（外观），这座哥特式教堂是米开朗基罗和伽利略的安息地。之后前往威尼斯入住酒店。夜宿威尼斯洲际voco酒店或希尔顿大使酒店，或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Venice - Milan (the romance of Venice on gentle waters)
timeline.title_zh: 威尼斯 - 米兰（游览温柔碧波上浪漫的威尼斯）
timeline.description_en: In the morning visit St Mark's Basilica (exterior), first built in 829 and rebuilt in 1043-1071; St Mark's Square, which Napoleon called "the most beautiful drawing room in Europe"; the Bridge of Sighs (exterior), the covered bridge over which condemned prisoners were once led from the Doge's Palace to the prison; and the magnificent Doge's Palace (exterior) on Piazza San Marco. These buildings rising from the water, together with the winding canals, give Venice its lingering romance. Then travel to the fashion capital, Milan. Overnight at the Hotel Royal Garden or a similar 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午参观圣马可大教堂（外观），始建于公元829年，1043至1071年重建；圣马可广场，曾被拿破仑称作"欧洲最美丽的客厅"；叹息桥（外观），古代由法院向监狱押送死囚的必经之路；以及矗立于圣马可广场的华丽总督宫（外观）。这些建在水上的美丽建筑与蜿蜒的水巷一起，让威尼斯的浪漫风情久久挥之不去。之后前往时尚之都米兰。夜宿皇家花园酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Milan - Zurich (along the Alps, from the fashion capital to the financial capital)
timeline.title_zh: 米兰 - 苏黎世（沿阿尔卑斯山脉，从时尚之都游览金融之都）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, freely visit Milan's landmark, the Milan Cathedral (Duomo, exterior), a Gothic masterpiece begun in 1386 that took 500 years to complete, with hundreds of spires and thousands of marble statues; and the Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II, one of Europe's most beautiful shopping arcades. In the afternoon travel to Zurich to visit Grossmunster (Zurich Cathedral, exterior), stroll along Lake Zurich, the upscale Bahnhofstrasse shopping street, and the banks of the Limmat River. Overnight at the H+ Hotel Zurich (Limmattal) or a similar 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后自由参观米兰的标志性建筑米兰大教堂（外观）——这座哥特式建筑始建于1386年，历时500年才完工，数以百计的尖塔耸入云霄，白色大理石外墙上雕刻着数千座雕像；以及欧洲最漂亮的商业拱廊之一埃马努埃莱二世长廊。下午前往苏黎世，游览苏黎世大教堂（外观）、苏黎世湖、班霍夫大街，并漫步利马特河边。夜宿苏黎世利马塔尔哈利之家酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Zurich - Lucerne - Interlaken (the idyllic village of Lungern; Swiss lakes and mountains at their best)
timeline.title_zh: 苏黎世 - 卢塞恩 - 因特拉肯（世外桃源龙疆镇，瑞士湖光山色代表作）
timeline.description_en: In the morning set off for Lucerne to enjoy the lake-and-mountain scenery of Lake Lucerne, hear the story of Swiss loyalty told by the Lion Monument (the dying lion carved in 1821 to commemorate the 786 Swiss Guards who fell in 1792), and see the Chapel Bridge (Kapellbrucke) and its octagonal water tower. Then go to the small town of Lungern to admire Lungern Lake and the village scenery, a tranquil idyll between Lucerne and Interlaken that the famous Golden Pass line passes through. In the afternoon continue to Interlaken, the town at the foot of the "roof of Europe" - the Jungfrau. Overnight at the Solbadhotel Sigriswil (alpine lake-view hotel) or a similar 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午出发前往卢塞恩，游览卢塞恩湖的湖光山色，聆听狮子纪念碑讲述瑞士人忠贞坚毅的历史（这座濒死的雄狮雕像于1821年雕刻于天然岩石上，纪念1792年为保护路易十六家族而全部战死的786名瑞士雇佣兵），以及卡贝尔廊桥和八角形水塔等景点。之后前往龙疆小镇，游览龙疆湖及小镇风光——这片群山环抱的世外桃源位于卢塞恩与因特拉肯之间，著名的金色山口快车从此经过。下午前往欧洲屋脊"少女峰"山脚下的小镇因特拉肯。夜宿锡格里斯维尔雪山湖景酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Interlaken - Jungfrau - Geneva (between Switzerland's two lakes; panoramic views of the Jungfrau)
timeline.title_zh: 因特拉肯 - 少女峰 - 日内瓦（行瑞士"两湖"之间，赏"少女峰"全景）
timeline.description_en: In the morning enjoy Interlaken, set between Lake Brienz and Lake Thun (the "left and right eyes of God"). You may choose one of three options (only one, not two): Option 1 (included) - a coach tour of the Jungfrau region with the guide, viewing the classic Swiss "dreamy slopes" of Grindelwald; Option 2 (EUR 230, optional) - the Jungfrau panoramic cable car to the top, ascending via Grindelwald and the Eiger Glacier to the Jungfraujoch, Top of Europe (Europe's highest railway station), with the Sphinx Observatory, Ice Palace, plateau viewpoint and Aletsch Glacier; or Option 3 (EUR 70, optional) - the First-Grindelwald aerial gondola round-trip to the summit of First, with the famous First Cliff Walk and thrilling high-altitude activities such as the First Flyer zipline and First Glider. Alternatively, freely stroll Hoheweg street and the Hohematte green in the quiet village. Overnight at the Novotel or Crowne Plaza Geneve (Annemasse Geneve Port area) or a similar 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午游览位于布里恩茨湖与图恩湖（有上帝左眼与右眼之称）之间的因特拉肯。当天三个推荐项目仅可三选一，不可同时选择两项：推荐项目一（费用包含）——跟随导游乘车游览格林德尔瓦尔德经典瑞士山景"梦幻山坡"；推荐项目二（230欧元，自费）——少女峰全景缆车登顶，依次经格林德尔瓦尔德、艾格冰川到达少女峰登顶Top of Europe（欧洲最高的火车站），登"斯芬克斯观景台"俯瞰白雪皑皑的少女峰，游览水晶宫、高原观景台、阿莱奇冰川冰宫等；推荐项目三（70欧元，自费）——菲斯特-格林德尔瓦尔德空中贡多拉往返票，从菲斯特峰巅游览著名的悬崖天梭巅峰栈道（First Cliff Walk），并可选择高空飞索、神鹰飞行等惊险刺激的高空活动。亦可自由游览何维克街、荷黑马特绿地及宁静村庄。夜宿安娜玛斯日内瓦港诺富特酒店或皇冠假日酒店，或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Geneva - Paris (stroll Lake Geneva's shore; cross the old town by the Flower Bridge)
timeline.title_zh: 日内瓦 - 巴黎（漫步日内瓦湖畔，看花桥横渡古城区）
timeline.description_en: In the morning explore the "Flower Bridge" (Pont des Bergues / flower-bridge) area next to the hotel, gathering Geneva's local food and specialty shops, then visit Geneva's Old Town on the hillside above the Rhone, the shores of Lake Geneva (Lake Leman, a World Heritage area straddling Switzerland and France), the Flower Clock (L'horloge fleurie) and the Jet d'Eau, Geneva's iconic 140-metre-high fountain. In the afternoon take the coach back to Paris, where the wonderful journey ends. No overnight accommodation on this day.
timeline.description_zh: 上午游览位于酒店旁的"花桥"区域，这里云集日内瓦各种当地美食和特色商店，参观日内瓦老城（位于隆河右岸山坡上的上城区）、日内瓦湖区（莱芒湖，横跨瑞士与法国，整个湖区被列为世界遗产）、花钟以及大喷泉——这座140米高的喷泉是日内瓦最具代表性的景观之一。下午乘车返回巴黎，结束美好旅程！当天无住宿。

meeting_en: Rome, Italy — group meets in the morning of Day 1; the tour ends in Paris on Day 8.
meeting_zh: 意大利罗马——第1天上午集合；行程于第8天在巴黎结束。

faqs.question_en: Where and how do we meet and disperse?
faqs.question_zh: 集合及集散地点和方法是什么？
faqs.answer_en: For Route A, the group meets on Day 1 at around 08:30 outside Roma Tiburtina railway station, and disperses on Day 8 at around 18:30 at Place d'Italie in Paris. These times and places are for reference only - actual departure follows the tour confirmation notice. We do not recommend booking a flight that lands in Rome on the day the tour starts, or a flight that leaves Paris on the day it ends.
faqs.answer_zh: 行程A第1天08:30左右在Roma Tiburtina火车站门口集合，第8天18:30左右在巴黎意大利广场解散。【参考时间及地点，实际出发时间以出团通知书为准】不推荐预订当天落地罗马的航班和结束当天离开巴黎的航班！

faqs.question_en: Will the coach rides along the route be very long?
faqs.question_zh: 行程路线乘坐大巴时间会不会很久？
faqs.answer_en: Only the Geneva-Paris leg is long, at about 6 hours 45 minutes; all other planned legs are around 3-4 hours of driving. Road conditions are complex - traffic jams in city areas and other factors can increase driving time.
faqs.answer_zh: 该产品仅日内瓦巴黎段约为6小时45分，其余计划行程均为3-4小时左右的行车时间。【公路交通情况复杂，特别是市区内容易发生堵车或其它因素导致行车时间增加】

faqs.question_en: Can the product include going up to the summit of the Jungfrau?
faqs.question_zh: 产品是否可以游览少女峰登顶？
faqs.answer_en: Yes, it can be visited, but the cost is not included. If you wish to take part, we recommend booking in advance. The available time for this option is limited and may conflict with the original itinerary, affecting the arrangement of other sights and experiences.
faqs.answer_zh: 可以游览但是费用不包含，如需参加建议提前预定。可选的体验时间受限，可能跟原行程安排产生冲突，导致影响其他行程和体验的安排。

faqs.question_en: Can I visit the First Top of Adventure activities in Switzerland?
faqs.question_zh: 我是否能游览菲斯特瑞士空天探险活动（First Top of Adventure）？
faqs.answer_en: Yes, it can be visited, but the cost is not included. If you wish to take part, we recommend booking in advance.
faqs.answer_zh: 可以游览但是费用不包含，如需参加建议提前预定。

faqs.question_en: What adventure activities are there at First?
faqs.question_zh: 菲斯特都有什么探险活动？
faqs.answer_en: First Top of Adventure has many thrilling alpine activities, the main ones being the Aerial Gondola, the First Cliff Walk, the First Flyer zipline and the First Glider. These can be bought on the spot depending on the day's queue and weather.
faqs.answer_zh: 菲斯特空天探险有很多惊险刺激的高山活动，主要项目有：空中贡多拉（Aerial gondola）、悬崖天梭巅峰栈道（First Cliff Walk）、高空飞索（First Flyer）、神鹰飞梭（First Glider）。可根据当天排队时间及天气情况现场购买。

faqs.question_en: Can I choose both the Jungfrau sightseeing train and the First adventure activities on the same day?
faqs.question_zh: 我是否能同时选择少女峰观光列车和菲斯特空天探险两个项目？
faqs.answer_en: No. On that day there are only 5-6 hours of free time in Interlaken; the recommended time for the Jungfrau is 4-5 hours, and First needs 3-4 hours, so the two cannot be done together.
faqs.answer_zh: 不可以，当天在因特拉肯仅有5-6小时自由活动时间，推荐游览少女峰时间为4到5小时，菲斯特需要3-4个小时，两者无法同时选择。

faqs.question_en: Can I choose to tour the Cinque Terre by boat?
faqs.question_zh: 我是否可以选择乘船游览五渔村？
faqs.answer_en: Boat tours are affected by weather, so this product does not include a Cinque Terre boat ticket. You may choose to tour by boat, but the train ticket cost cannot be refunded or exchanged, and you must buy the boat ticket yourself, at about EUR 35.
faqs.answer_zh: 由于乘船游览受气候影响，该产品并非包含五渔村船票，但是可以选择乘船游览，但是无法退换火车票的费用，并且需要自行购买船票，约35欧元。

faqs.question_en: In central Rome, can we tour by vehicle?
faqs.question_zh: 罗马市中心，我们是否可以乘车游览？
faqs.answer_en: Because Rome's sights are very concentrated and are all pedestrian areas, we cannot arrange a tour coach; the sights in central Rome must be visited on foot.
faqs.answer_zh: 由于罗马各个景点非常集中，并且都是步行街区，因此我社无法安排旅游大巴，罗马市中心景点需要徒步游览。

faqs.question_en: Can we choose different menus and dishes for our dinners according to preference?
faqs.question_zh: 我们的晚餐是否能根据喜好选择不同的菜单和菜品？
faqs.answer_en: All the dining recommended in the itinerary is recommended local specialty fare, and the cost is not included - for example Venice's famous black cuttlefish-ink pasta or Tuscan steak. You cannot choose other dishes; if the recommended dish is not your first choice, you are free to choose other dining yourself.
faqs.answer_zh: 行程内推荐的餐饮全部为推荐当地特色餐，费用并未包含，比如威尼斯较著名的黑墨鱼面、托斯卡纳的牛排等。无法选择其它的菜式，如果菜品并非您的首选，可以自行选择其他餐饮！

faqs.question_en: Do I need a visa?
faqs.question_zh: 是否需要签证？
faqs.answer_en: This product does not include visa fees; if you need a visa, please choose a Schengen visa product. A Schengen visa (single or multiple entry) is required. After booking we provide, free of charge, all the materials needed to apply for the Schengen visa, and if you commission us to handle the visa we will purchase Schengen-compliant travel insurance for you (otherwise you arrange your own insurance and claims). Your passport must be valid for at least 6 months from the date of departure, or customs may refuse entry. Visa fees, visa service fees, Schengen insurance fees and visa-center appointment fees are all non-refundable and non-transferable, even if the product is cancelled or changed. "Worry-free visa guarantee": if you sign with us at least 61 days before departure and have not obtained the visa within 45 days before departure, we bear all losses and immediately refund the full tour cost; cases not meeting this clause that fail to obtain a visa normally are refunded per the change-and-cancellation terms. A visa refusal must be reported to us within 48 hours with the consulate's refusal letter, and any supplementary/amended materials submitted within five days.
faqs.answer_zh: 本产品不包含签证费用，如您需要办理签证请选择申根签证产品。本产品需要申根签证（单次或多次入境）。预订后免费提供办理申根签证的全部材料；如委托我社办理签证，我社将为您购买符合申根要求的申根旅游保险，若未委托我社办理，则需自行购买旅游保险并自行负责理赔。护照有效期需在离境之日起至少还有六个月，否则海关有权拒绝入境。签证费、签证服务费、申根保险费、签证中心预约费均不可退款，也无法更改使用者，即使产品退改签，签证费用亦无法退款。【保签无忧】游客在出发日前61天与我社签约的旅游产品，如在出发前45天内未获取签证，我社承担所有损失，立即退还游客全部旅游费用；不符合该条款的游客如未正常获取签证，将按照"退改与取消条款"退费。如遇拒签需在48小时内通知我社并出具使领馆拒签函，如需补充或更改材料需在五天内提交。

faqs.question_en: Booking, changes & cancellation
faqs.question_zh: 预订、变更与取消须知
faqs.answer_en: Free, no-reason cancellation is available up to 30 days before departure (not including the 30th day) for both the agency and the traveler. Because of frequent flight/transport changes, congestion, ferry cancellations and strikes, the order of sights may often be adjusted; travelers are required to arrive at the meeting point one day before the tour starts and leave the dispersal point one day after it ends, with reasonable flight-connection buffers (at least 5 hours for transfers at the same airport, 7 hours for different airports in the same city), or bear the resulting losses. This is a circulating shuttle group: other guests join and leave at different points, with different start/end cities and prices - follow the start and end matching your own booked destination. Pay promptly after booking; orders need a second confirmation by the operating agency within 48 hours (auto-refunded if not confirmed) - book at least 14 days ahead and do not book connecting flights/hotels until confirmed. The minimum group size is 10 people; if not reached 30 days before departure either side may cancel without liability, and groups of 8 or fewer are automatically run as a small group with a business vehicle plus a driver-guide. Room types: solo bookings include a single-supplement deposit (refunded proportionally if room-sharing succeeds); a standard double is assigned automatically for two bookings with bed type (one large bed or twin) decided by the hotel and not selectable; a triple family room is for two parents plus one minor child. All European hotels are non-smoking, check-in 14:00 / check-out 11:00, and air-conditioning is not a standard fitting. The listed hotels are preferred; if unavailable, a similar same-star hotel is substituted without separate notice. All pricing is in EUR at the time of booking; if you pay in CNY, the amount is the real-time CNY figure auto-calculated from the Bank of China "EUR sell" rate on the day of payment, and the same applies to refunds (you bear any rate difference or bank fees). For the Cinque Terre, only some of the villages are visited depending on time and physical condition, and if bad weather or a railway strike makes it impossible, the itinerary automatically switches to touring the coastal towns by coach or other means.
faqs.answer_zh: 出发前30天（不含第30天）旅行社和旅行者均有权申请无理由取消。由于航变、交通拥堵、渡轮取消、罢工游行或行程顺序调整，游览先后顺序经常变动，故要求旅游者至少在参团日期前一天抵达集合地、离团日期后一天离开集散地，并预留合理的航班衔接时间（同一机场转机至少5小时，同城不同机场至少7小时），否则损失自理。本产品为循环套发团，途中会有其他游客在不同地点上下团，开始和结束的城市及价格不同，敬请按自己报名的目的地开始和结束行程。支付不等于确认，订单需由组团社在48小时内二次确认（超时自动退款），建议提前至少14天预订，未确认前请勿预订衔接机票及酒店。本产品成团人数为10人，行程开始前30天未达成团人数双方均可解约且不承担违约责任；报名8人及以下将自动改为商务旅行车+司机兼导游的小团。房型：单人报名默认含单人房差押金（拼房成功按比例退还）；两人报名默认标准双人间，床型由酒店安排不可指定（大床或双床）；三人家庭间默认两位父母与一位未成年儿童入住。欧洲酒店全部禁烟，入住14:00、退房11:00，并不以安装空调为标准设施。所列酒店为优先入住，如订满则换为相近条件、相同星级酒店，恕不另行通知。所有定价以欧元为计价单位，如选择人民币支付，则以支付当日中国银行"欧元卖出价"实时折算的人民币价格为准，退款同理，汇率差异及银行手续费由游客承担。五渔村因时间及体力原因仅选部分村庄游览，如遇恶劣天气或铁路罢工无法游览，将自动改为乘大巴或其它形式游览海岸线城市。

faqs.question_en: Health & safety requirements
faqs.question_zh: 健康与安全须知
faqs.answer_en: To ensure a smooth trip and prevent accidents, please have a necessary health check before departure and do NOT book if you have any of the following: infectious diseases (e.g. active tuberculosis, typhoid); cardiovascular disease (severe hypertension, heart failure, myocardial ischaemia/infarction); cerebrovascular disease (embolism, haemorrhage, tumour); respiratory disease (emphysema, cor pulmonale); psychiatric illness (epilepsy and various mental illnesses); severe anaemia (haemoglobin below 50 g/L); or recovery from major/medium surgery. Pregnancy: at 35 weeks or more you cannot join under any circumstances; at 28 weeks or more you must provide a doctor's exam report within 7 days plus the attending physician's consent; under 28 weeks please book with caution, sign the agency's disclaimer, and you cannot take part in adventure, skiing, sea, high-altitude or outdoor activities. Disabled travelers need a doctor's report within 7 days plus consent, an accompanying immediate family member, and to apply at least 61 days ahead for reserved seating/facilities. Travelers over 70 need a health certificate, medical report and an accompanying immediate family member (or sign the disclaimer); the trip is long and demands good walking ability and stamina. Minors (under 18) must be accompanied by an immediate relative or guardian; some sights have special rules for under-18/12/6; for infants under 6 or children under 30 kg confirm a child safety seat in advance; an unaccompanied minor needs parental authorization; infants under 2 years are not accepted. Per Article 15 of the Tourism Law (and the Infectious Disease Prevention Law), travelers must truthfully declare health information relevant to the trip (pregnancy, lactation, chronic illness, infectious-disease history, suspected symptoms, recent travel to epidemic areas) and comply with safety warnings; concealment leading to harm or loss is the traveler's own liability, and concealing an infectious disease may incur civil compensation and administrative penalties, with the agency entitled to terminate the contract without refund.
faqs.answer_zh: 为确保旅游顺利、防止旅途中发生人身意外，请出行前做一次必要的身体检查，如存在下列情况请勿报名：传染性疾病患者（如活动期肺结核、伤寒）；心血管疾病患者（如严重高血压、心功能不全、心肌缺氧、心肌梗塞）；脑血管疾病患者（如脑栓塞、脑出血、脑肿瘤）；呼吸系统疾病患者（如肺气肿、肺心病）；精神病患者（如癫痫及各种精神病）；严重贫血患者（血红蛋白水平在50克/升以下）；大中型手术恢复期病患者。孕妇：妊娠35周及以上任何情况下都无法参团；28周及以上需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书；28周以下请慎重报名，需签署旅行社免责声明书，且无法参加探险、滑雪、出海、高空、户外等项目。残疾人需提供7日内医生检查报告及同意书、需直系家属陪同，并至少提前61天申请预留位置及专用设施。70周岁以上老年人需提供健康证明、体检报告并由直系家属陪同（否则需签免责声明书）；本行程较长，对步行能力及体力要求较高，体力不支者请慎重报名。未成年人（未满18周岁）须由直系亲属或监护人陪同，部分项目对未满18/12/6周岁有特殊限定；如有6岁以下婴儿或30公斤以下儿童请提前确认安全座椅；无父母陪同的未成年人须持父母授权书；本产品不接受2周岁以下婴儿参团。根据《旅游法》第15条及《传染病防治法》，旅游者须如实告知与旅游活动相关的个人健康信息（包括妊娠期、哺乳期、慢性病、传染病史、疑似症状或近期疫区旅居史），并遵守安全警示；若因隐瞒导致人身损害或财产损失，旅游者需自行承担责任，隐瞒传染病情况可能面临民事赔偿及行政处罚，旅行社可解除合同且不退还费用。

title_en: France, Italy & Switzerland in Depth: 9-Day Rome-to-Paris Group Tour
title_zh: 法意瑞深度9天跟团游（罗马进巴黎出单程线路）
short_en: A 9-day one-way journey from Rome to Paris through Tuscany, the Cinque Terre, Venice, Milan and the Swiss Alps, with city-centre 4-star hotels and all-inclusive pricing.
short_zh: 9天单程深度游，从罗马一路畅游托斯卡纳、五渔村、威尼斯、米兰直至瑞士阿尔卑斯雪山，最终抵达巴黎；全程市中心四星酒店，一价全含。
desc_en: This 9-day one-way tour runs deep across France, Italy and Switzerland, entering in Rome and finishing in Paris so you never backtrack. From the Eternal City you wind through Tuscan hill towns Pienza and Siena, the leaning tower of Pisa and the cliffside fishing villages of the Cinque Terre, then on to Renaissance Florence, romantic Venice and fashionable Milan. Crossing the Alps you reach Zurich, Lucerne, the storybook lakeside town of Iseltwald, the Jungfrau region and Interlaken, before following Lake Geneva to a grand finale in Paris. With one city visited per day in Italy and all four Swiss language regions covered, it pairs efficient routing with hand-picked city-centre 4-star hotels.
desc_zh: 9天单程深度行程贯穿法国、意大利与瑞士，罗马进、巴黎出，全程不走回头路。从永恒之城罗马出发，途经托斯卡纳的皮恩扎与锡耶纳古城、比萨斜塔，以及悬崖上的五渔村，再前往文艺复兴之都佛罗伦萨、水城威尼斯与时尚之都米兰。翻越阿尔卑斯山脉后抵达苏黎世、卢塞恩、童话般的龙疆小镇、少女峰地区与因特拉肯，最后沿日内瓦湖畔一路返回巴黎。意大利段每天深度游览一座城市，并贯穿瑞士四大语区，行程高效之余，精选市中心四星酒店保障舒适。

highlights.en: Explore Rome on foot — the Colosseum, Pantheon, Spanish Steps and Trevi Fountain
highlights.zh: 徒步深度探访罗马——斗兽场、万神殿、西班牙广场与特莱维喷泉

highlights.en: Tuscan hill towns Pienza & Siena and the UNESCO Val d'Orcia cypress lanes
highlights.zh: 游览托斯卡纳古城皮恩扎与锡耶纳，邂逅世界遗产奥尔恰谷的绝美绝柏树小径

highlights.en: Scenic train ride along the cliffside Cinque Terre and the Leaning Tower of Pisa
highlights.zh: 乘景观列车游览悬崖上的五渔村，打卡比萨斜塔

highlights.en: Renaissance Florence, romantic canal-laced Venice and fashionable Milan
highlights.zh: 文艺复兴之都佛罗伦萨、水巷浪漫的威尼斯与时尚之都米兰

highlights.en: Swiss highlights: Zurich, Lucerne, the storybook town of Iseltwald, Interlaken & the Jungfrau region
highlights.zh: 瑞士精华：苏黎世、卢塞恩、童话小镇龙疆、因特拉肯与少女峰地区

highlights.en: One-way Rome-to-Paris deep route — no backtracking, minimal coach mileage
highlights.zh: 罗马进巴黎出单程深度线路，不走回头路，大幅降低大巴行车里程

highlights.en: City-centre 4-star brand hotels for high sightseeing efficiency and quality rest
highlights.zh: 精选市中心四星品牌酒店，提高游览效率并确保高质量休息

highlights.en: All-inclusive pricing — taxes and fees fully covered, no hidden costs
highlights.zh: 税费全含，一价全含，绝无隐藏费用

includes.en: Hotels: 8 nights in 4-star hotels.
includes.zh: 【酒店】：四星级酒店8晚。

includes.en: Meals: 8 meals total — in-hotel breakfasts or other forms of dining.
includes.zh: 【餐饮】：酒店内早餐或其他形式餐饮共计8餐。

includes.en: Taxes: all taxes within the itinerary, including tourist city tax, city-entry fees, residence tax, road/bridge tolls, island-landing fees, etc.
includes.zh: 【税费】：游客城市税、进城费、居住税、路桥费、登岛费等行程内的所有税费。

includes.en: Transport: tour coach or business travel van.
includes.zh: 【交通】：旅游巴士或者商务旅行车。

includes.en: Guide: professional driver + Chinese-speaking guide, or a Chinese-speaking driver-guide throughout (note: for groups of 8 or fewer, a business van + Chinese-speaking driver-guide is arranged).
includes.zh: 【导游】：职业司机+中文导游或者全程中文司机兼导游（备注：8人及以下则安排为商务旅行车+中文司机兼导游）。

includes.en: Luggage: 1 piece of 23 kg checked luggage and 1 piece of carry-on luggage.
includes.zh: 【行李】：1件23公斤行李及1件随身行李。

includes.en: Activities & tickets: the Venice island-landing ferry and the Cinque Terre scenic train.
includes.zh: 【活动及门票】：威尼斯登岛轮渡、五渔村景观列车。

excludes.en: Passport: personal passport fees.
excludes.zh: 护照：个人护照费用。

excludes.en: Visa: tourist visa fees for the countries on the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 签证：行程中所列旅游国家所需的观光签证费用。

excludes.en: Insurance: travel insurance fees (if the itinerary involves high-risk sports, verify whether the travel insurance covers that activity).
excludes.zh: 保险：旅游保险费用（如行程内涉及到高风险运动，请核实旅游保险是否包含该项运动）。

excludes.en: Tips: guide and driver tips totaling EUR 10 per person per day, same rate for adults and children.
excludes.zh: 小费：游客支付导游和司机小费一共10欧/人/天，大小同价。

excludes.en: Meals: lunch and dinner main meals are not included.
excludes.zh: 餐饮：行程内不包含午、晚正餐费用。

excludes.en: Tickets: any attraction not marked as fee-included (including but not limited to sights marked "exterior", and all "recommended"/"optional"/"experience" items not stated as included) — if you wish to visit, pay on your own.
excludes.zh: 门票：行程中未注明费用包含的景点（包括但不仅限于行程中注明“外观”的景点，“推荐”“可选”“体验”等所有未提及费用包含的项目，如游客需要参观，敬请自理）。

excludes.en: Extended stay: any extra accommodation, transport or sightseeing beyond the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 延长住宿：行程外额外延长的住宿、交通、观光费用。

excludes.en: Personal spending: drinks/alcohol, taxis, phone charges and other personal expenses.
excludes.zh: 私人消费：如饮料酒类、出租车、电话费等个人消费。

excludes.en: Other transport: any transport not mentioned as included beyond the business van or minibus — e.g. the Venice gondola, and sightseeing trains or electric taxis in vehicle-restricted zones, all at your own expense.
excludes.zh: 其他交通：除包含商务旅行车或者中巴之外，费用包含中未提及的其他交通费用，如威尼斯贡多拉，以及车辆限行区的观光火车、电瓶出租车等费用敬请自理。

excludes.en: Free activities: independent night sightseeing and the recommended optional items, plus their transport, dining, ticket and shopping costs.
excludes.zh: 自由活动：游客夜间自行游览及行程中的推荐项目，以及产生的交通、餐饮、门票、购物等费用。

excludes.en: Experience activities: any travel experience activities not included in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 体验活动：行程中没有包含的各项旅游体验活动。

excludes.en: Other costs: anything not mentioned under inclusions. For force majeure (natural disaster, war, strike, etc.), traffic delays, flight cancellations/changes, embassy visa delays, insufficient group numbers and other special circumstances or causes not attributable to our company, the company reserves the right to charge a price difference.
excludes.zh: 其他费用：费用包含中未提及的费用。如因天灾、战争、罢工等不可抗力原因，及因交通延阻、航班取消或更改时间、使馆延误出签证、人数不足等特殊情况或其他非我公司原因所致的额外费用（如在外延期签证费、住食及交通费、国家航空运价调整等），我公司有权追加差价。

timeline.title_en: Rome — the glory of the Eternal City and ancient Roman Empire
timeline.title_zh: 罗马——重温“万城之城”古罗马帝国的辉煌
timeline.description_en: Meet in the morning and, led by the guide, set out on a walking tour of Rome, the cradle of the ancient Roman Empire and the city known as the "Eternal City" for its long history. You will see the Colosseum (exterior), the Pantheon (exterior), the Spanish Steps and Piazza di Spagna, and the Trevi Fountain (exterior). Because vehicles are banned inside Rome's protected old city and most areas are pedestrian streets, the day is on foot, covering roughly 5-6 km. Free time follows before checking in to the hotel. Overnight at the Sheraton Roma Hotel (Medici) or Hotel Mantegna, or an equivalent 4-star hotel. Note: on some departures the order of sightseeing may be adjusted, but the content is the same and the overall experience is unaffected; the final tour notice prevails.
timeline.description_zh: 上午集合，在导游带领下徒步游览世界著名的历史文化名城罗马，这里是古罗马帝国的发祥地，因历史悠久被称为“永恒之城”。参观斗兽场（外观）、万神殿（外观），游览西班牙广场与西班牙台阶，以及特莱维喷泉（许愿池，外观）。由于罗马古城建筑保护、市区禁止车辆行驶且多为步行街区，当天全程徒步，步行约5-6公里。之后自由活动，入住酒店休息。夜宿：罗马梅第奇喜来登酒店或曼特尼亚酒店，或同等4星级酒店。备注：部分团期游览先后次序有所调整，但游览内容一致，不影响全程体验，具体以出团通知书及实际行程为准。

timeline.title_en: Rome — Pienza — Siena (medieval Siena and the cypress lanes of Val d'Orcia)
timeline.title_zh: 罗马—皮恩扎—锡耶纳（中世纪艺术瑰宝锡耶纳，邂逅奥尔恰谷丝柏树小径）
timeline.description_en: In the morning depart Rome for the medieval hill town of Pienza, stopping along the way for free photos at the famous cypress-tree lane in Val d'Orcia. In Pienza, visit Piazza Pio II and Pienza Cathedral (exterior); Pienza was rebuilt by Pope Pius II in 1459 as the ideal Renaissance town and offers views over the UNESCO World Heritage Val d'Orcia from its town walls. After lunch continue to Siena to see Siena Cathedral (exterior), Piazza del Campo, the Palazzo Pubblico / town hall (exterior) and the Torre del Mangia (exterior), Italy's second-tallest tower at 102 m. Overnight at the Four Points by Sheraton Siena or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午从罗马出发前往托斯卡纳南部山丘上的中世纪古镇皮恩扎，途中在著名的丝柏树小径自由拍照。在皮恩扎游览二世广场（庇护二世广场）、皮恩扎大教堂（外观）；皮恩扎是教皇庇护二世于1459年主持重建的“理想城市”典范，可从城墙上俯瞰世界遗产奥尔恰山谷（Val d'Orcia）的景致。午餐后前往锡耶纳，游览锡耶纳大教堂（外观）、田野广场（贝壳广场）、锡耶纳市政厅（外观）和曼吉亚塔楼（外观，高102米，为意大利第二高塔）。夜宿：锡耶纳福朋喜来登酒店，或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Siena — Pisa — Cinque Terre — Florence (scenic-train Cinque Terre and the Ligurian coast)
timeline.title_zh: 锡耶纳—比萨—五渔村—佛罗伦萨（景观列车游览五渔村，游利古里亚海景城镇）
timeline.description_en: In the morning head to Pisa to see the Leaning Tower of Pisa (exterior) and the Piazza dei Miracoli (Square of Miracles), the walled UNESCO World Heritage area that holds the cathedral, baptistery, leaning bell tower and cemetery. Then travel to the Cinque Terre and tour the beautiful clifftop fishing villages — Monterosso al Mare, Vernazza, Corniglia, Manarola and Riomaggiore — strung along the Ligurian coast. Note: if bad weather or a railway strike makes the Cinque Terre inaccessible, the itinerary automatically switches to viewing the coastal towns by coach or other means. Overnight at the Hilton Florence Metropole or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往比萨，游览比萨斜塔（外观）和比萨历史文化中心的奇迹广场（Piazza dei Miracoli，主教座堂广场）——这片被城墙环绕的世界遗产区域包含比萨主教座堂、洗礼堂、斜塔（钟楼）和墓园。之后前往五渔村，沿利古里亚海岸线游览蒙特罗索、韦尔纳扎、科尔尼利亚、马纳罗拉和里奥马焦雷这五座悬崖边上的美丽渔村。备注：如遇恶劣天气或铁路公司罢工等因素导致无法游览五渔村，行程将自动更改为乘坐大巴车或其它形式游览海岸线城市。夜宿：佛罗伦萨希尔顿大都会酒店，或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Florence — Venice (Renaissance art and the city of poetry)
timeline.title_zh: 佛罗伦萨—威尼斯（诗歌之地，文艺复兴之魂，享受艺术之旅）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast explore Florence, the birthplace of the Renaissance: visit the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore (the "Duomo of the Flower", world's third-largest church, exterior), Piazza della Signoria, the Ponte Vecchio (Old Bridge, built 1345), and Piazza Santa Croce with the Basilica of Santa Croce (exterior), resting place of Michelangelo and Galileo. The source notes the Duomo may require queueing to enter. Afterwards transfer to Venice and check in. Overnight at the voco Venice (InterContinental) or the Hilton Garden Inn Venice Mestre San Giuliano (Hilton Ambassador), or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后游览文艺复兴发源地佛罗伦萨，参观世界第三大教堂——圣母百花大教堂（外观，进入需排队）、市政广场（领主广场，含旧宫、《大卫》复制品与海神喷泉）、维奇奥桥（老桥，建于1345年），以及圣十字广场和圣十字大教堂（外观）——米开朗基罗与伽利略长眠于此。之后前往威尼斯入住酒店。夜宿：威尼斯洲际voco酒店或希尔顿大使酒店，或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Venice — Milan (romantic Venice on the gentle lagoon)
timeline.title_zh: 威尼斯—米兰（游览温柔碧波上浪漫的威尼斯）
timeline.description_en: In the morning visit St Mark's Basilica (exterior), St Mark's Square (Piazza San Marco) — called by Napoleon "the most beautiful drawing room in Europe" — the Bridge of Sighs (exterior) and the ornate Doge's Palace (exterior); these waterborne buildings and winding canals give Venice its lingering romance. Venice is built on 118 islands joined by 177 waterways and 401 bridges. Afterwards travel to the fashion capital, Milan. Overnight at the Royal Garden Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午参观圣马可大教堂（外观）、圣马可广场（被拿破仑称为“欧洲最美丽的客厅”）、叹息桥（外观）和华丽的总督宫（外观）；这些建在水上的美丽建筑与蜿蜒水巷一起，让威尼斯的浪漫风情久久难忘。威尼斯由118个小岛、177条水道和401座桥梁连成一体。之后前往时尚之都米兰。夜宿：皇家花园酒店，或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Milan — Zurich (along the Alps, from fashion capital to financial capital)
timeline.title_zh: 米兰—苏黎世（沿阿尔卑斯山脉，从时尚之都到金融之都）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast take free time around Milan's landmark Milan Cathedral (Duomo, exterior) and the Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II, one of Europe's most beautiful shopping arcades. In the afternoon travel to Zurich and visit the Grossmünster / Zurich Cathedral (exterior), Lake Zurich, the luxury Bahnhofstrasse shopping street, and stroll along the banks of the Limmat River. Overnight at the Sorell Hotel Zürichberg / Limmattal area (Hôtel-style residence) or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后自由参观米兰的标志性建筑米兰大教堂（Duomo，外观，哥特式建筑，始建于1386年）和欧洲漂亮的商业拱廊之一——埃马努埃莱二世长廊。下午前往苏黎世，游览苏黎世大教堂（Grossmünster，外观）、苏黎世湖、班霍夫大街（车站大街，世界著名奢侈品购物大道），并漫步利马特河边。夜宿：苏黎世利马塔尔哈利之家酒店，或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Zurich — Lucerne — Interlaken (the idyll of Lungern, Switzerland's lakes and mountains)
timeline.title_zh: 苏黎世—卢塞恩—因特拉肯（世外桃源龙疆镇，瑞士湖光山色代表作）
timeline.description_en: In the morning travel to Lucerne to enjoy the lake-and-mountain scenery of Lake Lucerne, hear the story of Swiss loyalty told by the Lion Monument (carved into natural rock in 1821 in memory of the Swiss Guards who died in 1792, called by Mark Twain "the most mournful and moving piece of stone in the world"), and see the Chapel Bridge (Kapellbrücke) and its octagonal water tower. Then continue to the small town of Lungern to enjoy Lake Lungern and the village scenery, a tranquil idyll along the Golden Pass route. In the afternoon head to Interlaken, the town at the foot of "the top of Europe" — the Jungfrau. Overnight at the Hotel Solsana / Sigriswil snow-mountain lake-view hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午出发前往卢塞恩，游览卢塞恩湖的湖光山色，听狮子纪念碑讲述瑞士人忠贞坚毅的历史（1821年由丹麦雕塑家雕刻于天然岩石，纪念1792年为保护路易十六家族而全部战死的786名瑞士雇佣兵，被马克·吐温誉为“世界上最悲壮、最感人的雕像”），以及卡贝尔廊桥（教堂桥）和八角形水塔等景点。之后前往龙疆小镇，游览龙疆湖及小镇风光，这里群山环抱、是远离尘嚣的世外桃源，著名的金色山口快车经过此地。下午前往欧洲屋脊“少女峰”山脚下的小镇因特拉肯。夜宿：锡格里斯维尔雪山湖景酒店，或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Interlaken — Jungfrau — Geneva (between two lakes, panoramas of the Jungfrau)
timeline.title_zh: 因特拉肯—少女峰—日内瓦（行瑞士“两湖”之间，赏“少女峰”全景）
timeline.description_en: In the morning visit Interlaken, set between Lake Brienz and Lake Thun (nicknamed God's left and right eyes). Here you choose ONE of three options (you cannot do two): Option 1 (included) — a coach tour of the Grindelwald area and the classic Swiss "Dream Slope" mountain scenery; Option 2 (optional, EUR 230) — the Jungfrau panorama cable-car ascent to the Top of Europe (Europe's highest railway station), with the Sphinx Observatory, Ice Palace, plateau viewing terrace and the Aletsch Glacier; or Option 3 (optional, EUR 70) — the First-Grindelwald aerial gondola round trip to the First summit and the famous First Cliff Walk, with optional thrill activities like the First Flyer zip-line and First Glider. You may also take free time around Höheweg / Höhematte park and the quiet villages of Interlaken. Afterwards check in near Geneva. Overnight at the Novotel Genève Centre (Annemasse / Geneva Port) or the Crowne Plaza, or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午游览位于布里恩茨湖与图恩湖（有上帝左眼、右眼之称）之间的因特拉肯。当天在三个推荐项目中三选一，不可同时选择两项：项目一（费用包含）——跟随导游乘车游览格林德尔瓦尔德地区经典的瑞士山景“梦幻山坡”；推荐项目二（自费230欧元）——少女峰全景缆车登顶Top of Europe（欧洲较高的火车站），依次游览格林德尔瓦尔德、艾格冰川，登顶后前往斯芬克斯观景台、水晶宫、高原观景台、阿莱奇冰川冰宫等；推荐项目三（自费70欧元）——菲斯特-格林德尔瓦尔德空中贡多拉往返，直达菲斯特峰巅，游览著名的悬崖天梭巅峰栈道First Cliff Walk，并可选高空飞索、神鹰飞行等惊险活动。也可自由游览何维克街、荷黑马特绿地广场等宁静村庄。随后前往安纳马斯入住。夜宿：安娜玛斯日内瓦港诺富特酒店或皇冠假日酒店，或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Geneva — Paris (strolling Lake Geneva and the flower bridge of the old town)
timeline.title_zh: 日内瓦—巴黎（漫步日内瓦湖畔，看花桥横渡古城区）
timeline.description_en: In the morning explore the "flower bridge" district beside the hotel, packed with local Geneva delicacies and specialty shops, then visit Geneva's old town (the upper city on the right bank of the Rhône, home to churches, antique shops and Rousseau's birthplace), the Lake Geneva (Lac Léman) area, the Flower Clock (L'horloge fleurie) and the Jet d'Eau, Geneva's iconic 140 m-high water jet. In the afternoon drive back to Paris, ending this wonderful journey. No hotel accommodation on this final day; the tour disperses around 18:30 at Place d'Italie in Paris.
timeline.description_zh: 上午游览位于酒店旁的“花桥”区域，这里云集日内瓦各种当地美食和特色商店，参观日内瓦老城（位于隆河右岸山坡上的上城区，教堂古迹聚集，卢梭故居亦在此）、日内瓦湖区（莱芒湖）、花钟和大喷泉（高140米、是日内瓦最具代表性的景观之一）等景点。下午乘车返回巴黎，结束美好旅程。当天无酒店住宿，约18:30在巴黎意大利广场解散。

meeting_en: Rome, Italy — group meets in the morning of Day 1 in central Rome (exact assembly point confirmed in your departure notice).
meeting_zh: 意大利罗马——第1天上午于罗马市区集合（具体集合地点以出团通知书为准）。

faqs.question_en: Where and when do we meet and disperse?
faqs.question_zh: 集合及集散地点和方法？
faqs.answer_en: Route A: meet at 09:00 on Day 1 at Roma Tiburtina railway station; the tour disperses around 18:30 on Day 9 at Place d'Italie in Paris. You may book a flight arriving in Rome the same day, but arrivals after 14:00 will miss the Rome city sights, with no refund — and a same-day departure from Paris on the last day is not recommended. Route B: meet around 18:30 on Day 1 in front of Roma Tiburtina station; disperses around 18:30 on Day 9 at Place d'Italie in Paris; a same-day arrival in Rome is fine, but a same-day departure from Paris on the last day is not recommended. Times and locations are for reference; the actual departure time follows the tour notice.
faqs.answer_zh: 行程A：第1天09:00在罗马Roma Tiburtina火车站集合，第9天18:30左右在巴黎意大利广场解散。可预订当天抵达罗马的航班，但14:00之后上团将无法游览罗马市区景点，且无费用可退；不推荐结束当天离开巴黎的航班。行程B：第1天18:30左右在Roma Tiburtina火车站门口集合，第9天18:30左右在巴黎意大利广场解散；可预订当天抵达罗马的航班，但不推荐结束当天离开巴黎的航班。以上为参考时间及地点，实际出发时间以出团通知书为准。

faqs.question_en: Will the coach rides on this route be very long?
faqs.question_zh: 行程路线乘坐大巴时间会不会很久？
faqs.answer_en: Only the Geneva-to-Paris leg is long, about 6 hours 45 minutes; all other planned drives are roughly 3-4 hours. Road conditions can be complex and city-center traffic jams or other factors may increase driving time.
faqs.answer_zh: 该产品仅日内瓦巴黎段约为6小时45分，其余计划行程均为3-4小时左右的行车时间。公路交通情况复杂，特别是市区内容易发生堵车或其它因素导致行车时间增加。

faqs.question_en: Can we go to the top of the Jungfrau?
faqs.question_zh: 产品是否可以游览少女峰登顶？
faqs.answer_en: Yes, but it is not included in the fee. If you wish to join, booking in advance is recommended. The available time for this optional experience is limited and may conflict with the original itinerary, affecting other arrangements.
faqs.answer_zh: 可以游览，但是费用不包含，如需参加建议提前预定。可选的体验时间受限，可能跟原行程安排产生冲突，导致影响其他行程和体验的安排。

faqs.question_en: Can I join the First Top of Adventure activities?
faqs.question_zh: 我是否能游览菲斯特瑞士空天探险活动（First Top of Adventure）？
faqs.answer_en: Yes, but it is not included in the fee. If you wish to join, booking in advance is recommended.
faqs.answer_zh: 可以游览，但是费用不包含，如需参加建议提前预定。

faqs.question_en: What adventure activities are there at First?
faqs.question_zh: 菲斯特都有什么探险活动？
faqs.answer_en: First Top of Adventure offers many thrilling mountain activities, mainly: the Aerial Gondola, the First Cliff Walk, the First Flyer zip-line, and the First Glider. You can buy these on site depending on the day's queue and weather.
faqs.answer_zh: 菲斯特空天探险有很多惊险刺激的高山活动，主要项目有：空中贡多拉（Aerial gondola）、悬崖天梭巅峰栈道（First Cliff Walk）、高空飞索（First Flyer）、神鹰飞梭（First Glider）。可根据当天排队时间及天气情况现场购买。

faqs.question_en: Can I choose both the Jungfrau panorama train and the First adventure activities?
faqs.question_zh: 我是否能同时选择少女峰观光列车和菲斯特空天探险两个项目吗？
faqs.answer_en: No. There are only 5-6 hours of free time in Interlaken that day. The recommended time for the Jungfrau is 4-5 hours, while First needs 3-4 hours, so the two cannot both be done.
faqs.answer_zh: 不可以。当天在因特拉肯仅有5-6小时自由活动时间，推荐游览少女峰时间为4到5小时，菲斯特需要3-4小时，因此无法同时选择两项。

faqs.question_en: Can I tour the Cinque Terre by boat?
faqs.question_zh: 我是否可以选择乘船游览五渔村？
faqs.answer_en: Boat tours depend on the weather, so this product does not include a Cinque Terre boat ticket. You may choose to go by boat, but the train ticket cost cannot be refunded or exchanged, and you must buy the boat ticket yourself, about EUR 35.
faqs.answer_zh: 由于乘船游览受气候影响，该产品并不包含五渔村船票，但可以选择乘船游览，只是无法退换火车票的费用，并且需要自行购买船票，约35欧元。

faqs.question_en: Can we choose different menus and dishes for dinner?
faqs.question_zh: 我们的晚餐是否能根据喜好选择不同的菜单和菜品？
faqs.answer_en: The dining recommended in the itinerary is all recommended local specialty meals and is not included in the fee — for example Venice's famous squid-ink black pasta or the Tuscan steak. You cannot choose other dishes; if a recommended dish is not your preference, you are free to choose other dining on your own.
faqs.answer_zh: 行程内推荐的餐饮全部为推荐当地特色餐，费用并未包含，比如威尼斯著名的黑墨鱼面、托斯卡纳的牛排等。无法选择其它菜式；如果菜品并非您的首选，可以自行选择其他餐饮。

faqs.question_en: Do I need a visa?
faqs.question_zh: 是否需要签证？
faqs.answer_en: Yes. This product requires a Schengen visa (single or multiple entry) and the visa fee is NOT included — if you need one, choose a Schengen-visa product. After booking we provide all the materials needed to apply for the Schengen visa (see the detailed checklist). Your passport must be valid for at least six months from the date of departure, or customs may refuse entry. Visa-related fees (visa fee, visa service fee, Schengen insurance fee, visa-center appointment fee) are all non-refundable and non-transferable, even if the product itself is changed or cancelled. "Worry-free visa" guarantee: for travel products contracted with us 61+ days before departure, if the visa is not obtained within 45 days before departure we bear all losses and immediately refund the full travel fee; if you do not qualify under this clause and fail to obtain the visa normally, refunds follow the change/cancellation terms. A refusal must be reported within 48 hours with the consulate's refusal letter; any supplementary or revised materials must be submitted within five days, and you may not unilaterally waive the right of "visa defense". If you commission us to handle the Schengen visa, we will buy Schengen-compliant travel insurance for you; if not, you must buy your own travel insurance and handle claims yourself.
faqs.answer_zh: 需要。本产品需要申根签证（单次或多次入境），且不包含签证费用——如需办理请选择申根签证产品。预订后我社免费提供办理申根签证的全部材料（参考详细材料清单）。护照有效期需在离境之日起至少还有六个月，否则海关有权拒绝入境。签证费、签证服务费、申根保险费、签证中心预约费均不可退款，也无法更改使用者，即使产品退改签，签证费用亦无法退款。“保签无忧”：游客在出发日前61天与我社签约的旅游产品，如在出发前45天内未获取签证，我社承担所有损失，立即退还游客全部旅游费用；不符合该条款的游客如未正常获取签证，将按照“退改与取消条款”进行退费。如遇拒签需在48小时内通知我社并出具使领馆拒签函，如需补充或更改材料需在五天内提交，并不得单方面放弃“签证抗辩”权利。若委托我社办理申根签证，我社将为您购买符合申根签证要求的申根旅游保险；若未委托办理，需自行购买旅游保险并自行负责理赔。

faqs.question_en: Booking, changes & cancellation
faqs.question_zh: 预订、变更与取消须知
faqs.answer_en: Free cancellation: both the agency and the traveler may cancel without reason up to 30 days before departure (the 30th day not included). Because flights, traffic, ferries and strikes often cause the order and timing of sightseeing to shift, travelers must arrive at the meeting point one day before the tour starts and leave the dispersal point one day after it ends, allowing reasonable flight-connection time (at least 5 hours for connections at the same airport, 7 hours for different airports in the same city; reasonable meet/disperse window is 07:00-21:00); losses from not following this are borne by the traveler. Payment does not equal confirmation — book at least 14 days ahead; orders need a second confirmation within 48 hours by the operator, and auto-refund if not confirmed in time. Groups of 8 or fewer are automatically run as a small group with a business van + driver-guide. Group formation (成团): this is a shared/join group requiring 10 people to form; if not reached 30 days before departure either side may cancel, and reaching it before that locks the group. It is a rolling/recurring group with other travelers boarding and leaving at different points, so start/end cities and prices differ by booking. Rooms: two people booking together default to a standard twin/double (bed type assigned by the hotel, not selectable); a triple/family room is for two parents + one minor (bed configuration assigned by hotel); solo travelers pay a single-room supplement deposit unless successfully sharing. European hotels are non-smoking, no cooking in rooms, no free disposable toiletries or boiling water, check-in 14:00 / check-out 11:00, and air-conditioning is not a standard fixture. The listed hotel names are preferred; if full, an equivalent same-star hotel is substituted without separate notice. Pricing: all prices are quoted in EUR at the time of booking; if you pay in CNY, the amount is the real-time CNY price auto-calculated from the Bank of China "EUR selling rate" on the day of payment; refunds use the same-day rate and the traveler bears any exchange-rate difference or bank fees. Itinerary contingencies: if a railway strike or bad weather makes the Cinque Terre inaccessible, it switches to coach/other coastal touring; the order of sights may be adjusted without it counting as a breach; if force majeure (strikes, delays, high temperatures, etc.) forces cancellation or substitution of sights, no extra fee is charged and no compensation is owed for unused resources.
faqs.answer_zh: 免费取消：出发前30天（不含第30天）旅行社和旅行者均有权无理由取消。由于航班、交通、渡轮、罢工等因素常导致游览顺序和时间调整，旅游者须在旅游团开始前一天到达集合地、结束后一天离开集散地，并预留合理航班衔接时间（同一机场转机至少5小时、同城不同机场至少7小时，合理集散时段为07:00至21:00），未遵守导致的损失由旅行者自行承担。支付不等于确认行程，建议提前至少14天预订，订单需组团社在48小时内二次确认，超时未确认则自动退款。报名人数为8人及以下时，本团自动改为小团，安排商务旅行车+司机兼导游。成团：本产品为散客拼团，成团人数为10人，行程开始前30天（不含第30天）未达成团人数，双方均有权解除合同；达到成团人数即宣布成团。本产品为循环套发团，途中有其他游客在不同地点上下团，开始与结束城市不同、价格不同，请按各自报名的目的地起止。房型：两人同时报名默认标准双人间（床型由酒店安排不可选）；三人家庭间默认两位父母与一位未成年儿童入住（床型由酒店安排）；单人报名默认含单人房差押金，拼房成功后按比例退还。欧洲酒店均禁烟、禁止房内做饭、不提供一次性洗漱用品及免费开水，入住14:00、退房11:00，且不以空调为标准设施。行程内所列酒店为优先入住酒店，如订满则换为相同星级相近条件酒店，恕不另行通知。价格：所有定价以欧元为预订计价单位；如选择人民币支付，则以当天支付时本网站依据中国银行实时“欧元卖出价”自动计算的人民币实时价格为准；退款同样适用申请当日即时汇率，汇率差异或银行手续费由旅行者承担。行程应变：如遇恶劣天气或铁路罢工导致无法游览五渔村，将改为乘大巴等形式游览海岸线城市；游览先后顺序可能调整，不视为旅行社违约；如因罢工、晚点、高温等不可抗力导致景点临时关闭或更换，我社不收取额外费用，也不承担未使用资源的赔偿。

faqs.question_en: Health & safety requirements
faqs.question_zh: 健康与安全须知
