faqs.answer_en: For your safety, please have a health check before traveling and DO NOT join if you have: infectious diseases (e.g. active tuberculosis, typhoid); cardiovascular disease (severe hypertension, heart failure, myocardial ischemia/infarction); cerebrovascular disease (cerebral embolism, hemorrhage, brain tumor); respiratory disease (emphysema, cor pulmonale); mental illness (epilepsy and other psychiatric conditions); severe anemia (hemoglobin below 50 g/L); or are recovering from major/medium surgery. Pregnancy: at 35+ weeks you cannot join under any circumstances; at 28+ weeks you must provide a doctor's exam report within 7 days plus a physician's consent letter; under 28 weeks please book with caution, sign a liability waiver, and you cannot join adventure/ski/sea/aerial/outdoor activities. Disabled travelers: provide a 7-day medical report + physician's consent, must be accompanied by an immediate family member, and apply at least 61 days ahead for a reserved place and facilities. Elderly travelers (over 70): provide a health certificate and physical-exam report, be accompanied by immediate family, or sign a liability waiver; this is a long tour requiring good walking ability and stamina; physician's consent is needed for adventure/ski/sea/aerial/outdoor items; apply at least 61 days ahead for elderly-friendly services. Minors (under 18) must be accompanied by an immediate relative or guardian; some sights have special rules for under-18/12/6; for infants under 6 or children under 30 kg confirm a child safety seat in advance; unaccompanied minors abroad need a parental authorization letter (both parents' if traveling with non-parents); infants under 2 are not accepted. Per Article 15 of the Tourism Law and the Infectious Disease Prevention Law, travelers must truthfully declare health information relevant to the trip (pregnancy, lactation, chronic illness, infectious-disease history, suspected symptoms, recent travel to epidemic areas) and follow safety warnings; concealing health information that causes injury, loss or transmission risk makes the traveler liable for the resulting medical, quarantine and compensation costs, and the agency may terminate the contract without refund.
faqs.answer_zh: 为确保顺利出行、防止旅途中发生意外，请出行前做必要的身体检查，如存在下列情况请勿报名：传染性疾病患者（如活动期肺结核、伤寒等）；心血管疾病患者（严重高血压、心功能不全、心肌缺氧、心肌梗塞等）；脑血管疾病患者（脑栓塞、脑出血、脑肿瘤等）；呼吸系统疾病患者（肺气肿、肺心病等）；精神病患者（癫痫及各种精神病）；严重贫血患者（血红蛋白50克/升以下）；大中型手术恢复期病患者。孕妇：妊娠35周及以上任何情况下都无法参团；28周及以上需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书；28周以下请慎重报名，需签署旅行社免责声明书，且无法参加探险、滑雪、出海、高空、户外等项目。残疾人：需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书，需直系家属陪同，并提前至少61天申请预留位置及专用设施。老年旅游者（70周岁以上）：需提供健康证明、体检报告并由直系家属陪同，否则需签署免责声明书；本行程较长、对步行能力与体力要求较高，体力不支者请慎重报名；涉及探险、滑雪、出海、高空、户外等项目需持主治医师同意书；需提前至少61天申请适老化服务及设施。未成年人（未满18周岁）需由直系亲属或监护人陪同；部分项目对未满18/12/6周岁有特殊限定；如有6岁以下婴儿或30公斤以下儿童请提前确认安全座椅；无父母陪同的未成年人出境需持父母授权书；不接受2周岁以下婴儿参团。根据《旅游法》第15条及《传染病防治法》，旅游者须如实告知与旅游活动相关的个人健康信息（包括妊娠期、哺乳期、慢性病、传染病史、疑似症状或近期疫区旅居史）并遵守安全警示规定，若因隐瞒导致人身损害、财产损失或传播风险，旅游者需自行承担医疗、隔离费用及赔偿责任，旅行社可解除合同且不退还费用。

title_en: France, Italy & Switzerland in 9 Days: Rome to Paris Small-Group Tour
title_zh: 法意瑞9天精品小团：罗马出发 巴黎结束
short_en: A 9-day one-way small-group journey from Rome to Paris through Tuscany, Cinque Terre, Venice, Milan and the Swiss Alps with the GoldenPass train and Jungfrau, ending on the Burgundy wine road.
short_zh: 9天罗马至巴黎单程精品小团，畅游托斯卡纳、五渔村、威尼斯、米兰与瑞士阿尔卑斯，搭乘金色山口列车登顶少女峰，终于勃艮第红酒之路。
desc_en: This nine-day one-way tour starts in the Eternal City of Rome and ends in Paris, weaving together the highlights of Italy, Switzerland and France without ever backtracking. Trace the Renaissance in Florence, marvel at the clifftop villages of Cinque Terre, drift through romantic Venice and admire Milan's gothic cathedral. Cross into Switzerland for the GoldenPass scenic train, the lakeside charm of Interlaken and a cable-car ascent to the Jungfrau's Sphinx viewing platform. The journey closes in the storybook town of Colmar and Burgundy, where a winery visit and tasting cap a route built around scenic hotels and all-inclusive pricing.
desc_zh: 这趟九天单程之旅从永恒之城罗马出发、以巴黎收尾，串联意大利、瑞士与法国的精华景致，全程不走回头路。在佛罗伦萨追寻文艺复兴的光芒，惊叹于五渔村的悬崖渔村，徜徉浪漫水城威尼斯，仰望米兰哥特式大教堂。随后进入瑞士，乘坐金色山口观光列车，漫步湖畔小镇因特拉肯，搭乘缆车登顶少女峰斯芬克斯观景台。旅程最终来到童话小镇科尔马与勃艮第产区，以一场酒庄参观与品酒收官，全程入住景观酒店、一价全含。

highlights.en: Explore the Eternal City of Rome: Colosseum, Pantheon, Spanish Steps and Trevi Fountain
highlights.zh: 深度探访永恒之城罗马：斗兽场、万神殿、西班牙广场与特莱维喷泉

highlights.en: Renaissance Florence and the leaning Tower of Pisa on the Square of Miracles
highlights.zh: 文艺复兴之都佛罗伦萨与比萨奇迹广场的比萨斜塔

highlights.en: Cinque Terre's five clifftop fishing villages along the Ligurian coast
highlights.zh: 利古里亚海岸线上的五渔村悬崖渔村美景

highlights.en: Romantic Venice, gothic Milan Cathedral, and the GoldenPass scenic train through the Alps
highlights.zh: 浪漫威尼斯、哥特式米兰大教堂，乘金色山口观光列车穿越阿尔卑斯

highlights.en: Cable-car ascent of the Jungfrau to the Sphinx viewing platform above the Aletsch Glacier
highlights.zh: 搭乘缆车登顶少女峰，于斯芬克斯观景台俯瞰阿莱奇冰川

highlights.en: Fairytale Colmar (Miyazaki's Howl's Moving Castle) and a Burgundy winery visit with tasting
highlights.zh: 童话小镇科尔马（宫崎骏《哈尔的移动城堡》原型）及勃艮第酒庄参观品酒

highlights.en: One-way deep route with no backtracking; flights, rail and all listed attractions included
highlights.zh: 单程深度路线不走回头路，含列车与全部所列景点门票，一价全含

highlights.en: Scenic stays: 2 five-star Tuscany hotels, a Swiss alpine lake-view hotel and a Burgundy château
highlights.zh: 景观酒店：2晚五星托斯卡纳酒店、瑞士雪山湖景酒店与勃艮第中世纪古堡

includes.en: Hotels: 2 nights in 5-star hotels and 6 nights in 4-star hotels.
includes.zh: 【酒店】：2晚五星级酒店及6晚四星级酒店。

includes.en: Meals: 8 breakfasts in total — buffet breakfast at the hotel or in another form.
includes.zh: 【餐饮】：酒店内自助早餐或其他形式早餐，共计8餐。

includes.en: Operating fees: city/tourist tax, city-entry fees, residence tax, road and bridge tolls, parking and fuel, driver/guide meal allowances and other in-itinerary operating costs.
includes.zh: 【执行】：游客城市税、进城费、居住税、过路过桥费、停车燃油费、司导餐补等行程内执行费用。

includes.en: Transport: tour coach or business travel vehicle.
includes.zh: 【交通】：旅游巴士或者商务旅行车。

includes.en: Guide: professional driver + Chinese-speaking guide, or a Chinese-speaking driver-guide throughout (note: for fewer than 8 people, a business vehicle + Chinese-speaking driver-guide; for 8 or more, a tour coach + professional driver + Chinese-speaking guide).
includes.zh: 【导游】：职业司机+中文导游，或全程中文司机兼导游（注：8人以下为商务车+中文司机兼导游，8人以上为旅游巴士+专业司机+中文导游）。

includes.en: Baggage: one 23 kg checked bag and one carry-on bag.
includes.zh: 【行李】：1件23公斤行李及1件随身行李。

includes.en: Tickets: Burgundy winery visit and tasting, the GoldenPass train (Lucerne–Lungern section), the Cinque Terre local train, the Venice island ferry, and the Jungfrau cable-car package.
includes.zh: 【门票】：勃艮第酒庄参观门票及品酒费用，金色山口列车（卢塞恩-龙疆段），五渔村小火车，威尼斯上岛渡轮，少女峰缆车套票。

excludes.en: Passport: personal passport fees.
excludes.zh: 护照：个人护照费用。

excludes.en: Visa: the tourist visa fees required for the countries on the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 签证：行程中所列旅游国家所需的观光签证费用。

excludes.en: Insurance: travel insurance (if the itinerary involves high-risk sports, please confirm whether your travel insurance covers that activity).
excludes.zh: 保险：旅游保险费用（如行程内涉及高风险运动，请核实旅游保险是否包含该项运动）。

excludes.en: Tips: guide and driver gratuities totaling EUR 10 per person per day, same rate for adults and children.
excludes.zh: 小费：游客支付导游和司机小费一共10欧/人/天，大小同价。

excludes.en: Meals: apart from the special meals included in the itinerary, lunches and dinners are not included.
excludes.zh: 餐饮：除行程内包含的特色餐外，行程中不包含午、晚正餐费用。

excludes.en: Tickets: sights not stated as included (including but not limited to those marked "exterior", as well as all "recommended", "optional", "experience" and other items not stated as included) — please pay on your own if you wish to visit.
excludes.zh: 门票：行程中未注明费用包含的景点（包括但不仅限于行程中注明“外观”的景点，以及“推荐”“可选”“体验”等所有未提及费用包含的项目，如需参观敬请自理）。

excludes.en: Extended stays: any additional accommodation, transport or sightseeing outside the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 延长住宿：行程外额外延长的住宿、交通、观光费用。

excludes.en: Personal spending: drinks/alcohol, taxis, phone charges and other personal expenses.
excludes.zh: 私人消费：如饮料酒类、出租车、电话费等个人消费。

excludes.en: Other transport: transport not covered by the included business vehicle or minibus and not otherwise mentioned — e.g. the Venice gondola, and sightseeing trains or electric cabs within vehicle-restricted zones — please pay on your own.
excludes.zh: 其他交通：除包含商务旅行车或中巴之外、费用包含中未提及的其他交通费用，如威尼斯贡多拉，以及车辆限行区的观光火车、电瓶出租车等费用敬请自理。

excludes.en: Free time: guests' independent evening sightseeing and recommended activities, plus any transport, dining, tickets or shopping they incur.
excludes.zh: 自由活动：游客夜间自行游览及行程中的推荐项目，以及由此产生的交通、餐饮、门票、购物等费用。

excludes.en: Experience activities: any travel experience activities not included in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 体验活动：行程中没有包含的各项旅游体验活动。

excludes.en: Other costs: anything not mentioned under "included". For force majeure such as natural disasters, war or strikes, and for special circumstances (transport delays, flight cancellations/reschedules, embassy delays in issuing visas, insufficient group numbers, etc.) or other causes not attributable to us, we reserve the right to charge the price difference for extra costs (e.g. overseas visa-extension fees, accommodation, food and transport, national airfare adjustments, etc.).
excludes.zh: 其他费用：费用包含中未提及的费用。如因天灾、战争、罢工等不可抗力，及因交通延阻、航班取消或更改时间、使馆延误出签、人数不足等特殊情况或其他非我公司原因所致的额外费用（如在外延期签证费、住食及交通费、国家航空运价调整等），我公司有权追加差价。

timeline.title_en: Rome — Reliving the glory of the Roman Empire in the "City of Cities"
timeline.title_zh: 罗马——重温“万城之城”古罗马帝国的辉煌
timeline.description_en: After meeting up, tour Rome, the cradle of the ancient Roman Empire and the famed "Eternal City". Walk the historic core to see the Colosseum (exterior), the Pantheon (exterior), the Spanish Steps and the Trevi Fountain (exterior); the Spanish Steps comprise 138 steps, the widest staircase in Europe. From 14:00 you can check in to the hotel on your own with your booking, or leave luggage at the front desk beforehand. Note that Rome's old-town sights all lie within the vehicle-restricted ZTL zone, so the day is on foot — about 5 km round trip — so wear comfortable, light clothing. Overnight at Rome San Martino Hotel or Hotel Moderno, or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 集合后游览古罗马帝国的发祥地、被称为“永恒之城”的罗马。在历史核心区步行参观斗兽场（外观）、万神殿（外观），并游览西班牙广场和特莱维喷泉（许愿池，外观）；西班牙台阶共138级，是欧洲最宽的台阶。当天14点后可凭订单自行入住酒店，或提前在酒店前台寄存行李。罗马古城区主要景点均位于车辆禁行区（ZTL）内，当天为步行游览，往返约5公里，请穿着轻便舒适。夜宿罗马圣马丁酒店或现代酒店，或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Rome – Florence – Pisa — A Renaissance feast, with a 5-star stay
timeline.title_zh: 罗马-佛罗伦萨-比萨——文艺复兴宝库的艺术盛宴，入住五星酒店
timeline.description_en: Depart in the morning for Florence, the birthplace of the Renaissance. Visit the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore (the world's third-largest church), the Piazza della Signoria (an open-air sculpture museum with a copy of Michelangelo's David and the Fountain of Neptune, ringed by the Uffizi and the Loggia dei Lanzi), the Ponte Vecchio (the old bridge over the Arno, built in 1345), and the Piazza Santa Croce with the Basilica of Santa Croce (exterior), the resting place of Michelangelo and Galileo. Then settle into a hotel in the Tuscany region. Overnight at Tuscany Montecatini Terme SPA Hotel, or an equivalent 5-star hotel, set in the renowned spa town of Montecatini Terme with indoor and outdoor pools, a sauna with forest views, and a private park.
timeline.description_zh: 上午出发前往文艺复兴发源地佛罗伦萨。参观世界第三大教堂——圣母百花大教堂、市政广场（露天雕塑博物馆，立有米开朗基罗《大卫》复制品与海神喷泉，周围环绕乌菲兹美术馆与佣兵凉亭）、横跨阿诺河、建于1345年的维奇奥老桥，以及圣十字广场与米开朗基罗、伽利略长眠之地圣十字教堂（外观）。随后入住托斯卡纳地区酒店。夜宿托斯卡纳蒙特卡蒂尼SPA酒店或同等5星级酒店——位于著名康养度假地蒙特卡蒂尼泰尔梅，设室内外2个泳池、享森林景观的桑拿房及占地4万平方米的私人公园。

timeline.title_en: Pisa – Cinque Terre – Tuscany — Marveling at the Cinque Terre's matchless scenery
timeline.title_zh: 比萨-五渔村-托斯卡纳——鉴赏五渔村绝世美景
timeline.description_en: Set out in the morning for the Cinque Terre, touring the five cliffside fishing villages strung along the Ligurian coast — Monterosso al Mare, Vernazza, Corniglia, Manarola and Riomaggiore — a UNESCO World Heritage site since 1997. In the afternoon head to Pisa to see the Leaning Tower of Pisa (exterior) and the walled Piazza dei Miracoli (Square of Miracles), home to four monuments: the Cathedral, the Leaning Tower (bell tower), the Baptistery and the Camposanto cemetery. Note: if bad weather or a rail strike makes the Cinque Terre inaccessible, the itinerary automatically switches to touring the coastal towns by coach or other means. Overnight at Tuscany Montecatini Terme SPA Hotel, or an equivalent 5-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午出发前往五渔村，沿利古里亚海岸线依次游览悬崖上的五座美丽渔村——蒙特罗索、韦尔纳扎、科尔尼利亚、马纳罗拉及里奥马焦雷，1997年被联合国教科文组织列入世界文化遗产。下午前往比萨，游览比萨斜塔（外观）和奇迹广场（主教座堂广场）——广场内有四大建筑：比萨主教座堂、比萨斜塔（钟楼）、圣乔瓦尼洗礼堂与比萨墓园。备注：如遇恶劣天气或铁路罢工等因素无法游览五渔村，行程将自动改为乘坐大巴或其它形式游览海岸线城市。夜宿托斯卡纳蒙特卡蒂尼SPA酒店或同等5星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Tuscany – Venice — Romance on gentle blue waters
timeline.title_zh: 托斯卡纳-威尼斯——温柔碧波上浪漫的威尼斯
timeline.description_en: Travel in the morning to Venice for free time exploring St. Mark's Basilica (exterior), St. Mark's Square — called by Napoleon "the most beautiful drawing room in Europe" — the Bridge of Sighs (exterior), the route by which condemned prisoners were once led from the courts to the prison, and the magnificent Doge's Palace (exterior). These water-borne buildings and winding canals give Venice its lingering romance. Overnight at Venice voco Hotel or Hilton Garden Inn (Ambassador), or an equivalent 4-star hotel, one of Venice's newly refurbished hotels with stylish modern rooms and the Ludico Venice restaurant.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往威尼斯，自由参观圣马可大教堂（外观）、被拿破仑称为“欧洲最美客厅”的圣马可广场、由法院向监狱押送死囚必经之路的叹息桥（外观），以及华丽的总督宫（外观）。这些建在水上的美丽建筑与蜿蜒水巷一起，让威尼斯的浪漫风情久久挥之不去。夜宿威尼斯洲际VOCO酒店或希尔顿大使酒店，或同等4星级酒店——为威尼斯新近装修的酒店之一，客房现代时尚，设Ludico Venice餐厅。

timeline.title_en: Venice – Milan — Beholding a Gothic masterpiece 500 years in the making
timeline.title_zh: 威尼斯-米兰——瞻仰历经500年建成的哥特式精美建筑
timeline.description_en: Depart in the morning for Milan, Italy's capital of fashion. Visit the Sforza Castle (exterior), a fortress dating from the medieval to Renaissance era and once the seat of the Sforza family, now home to the city's museums. Then see Milan's landmark, the Milan Cathedral / Duomo (exterior) — begun in 1386 and completed over 500 years, a Gothic marvel bristling with 135 spires and some 6,000 marble statues — and one of Europe's most beautiful shopping arcades, the Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II. Overnight at UNA/Best Western Milano Centro, or an equivalent 4-star hotel in the city center, about 10 minutes by car from the Duomo.
timeline.description_zh: 上午出发前往意大利时尚之都米兰，参观从中世纪到文艺复兴时期的堡垒——斯福尔扎古堡（外观），它曾是斯福尔扎家族住所，现辟为博物馆。之后前往米兰的标志性建筑米兰主教堂（外观）——始建于1386年、历经500年建成，拥有135座尖塔、约6000座大理石雕像的哥特式杰作，以及欧洲最漂亮的商业拱廊之一埃马努埃莱二世拱廊。夜宿米兰中心UNA/BW酒店或同等级4星级酒店——位于市中心，距米兰大教堂约10分钟车程。

timeline.title_en: Milan – Lucerne – Lungern – Interlaken — The GoldenPass train and Switzerland's picture-perfect scenery
timeline.title_zh: 米兰-卢塞恩-龙疆-因特拉肯——乘坐金色山口列车，尽览瑞士如画风景
timeline.description_en: Drive in the morning to Lucerne to enjoy the lake-and-mountain scenery of Lake Lucerne, see the Lion Monument (carved in 1821 to honor the 786 Swiss Guards who died in 1792), and visit the Chapel Bridge and octagonal Water Tower. Then board the GoldenPass scenic train (the Luzern–Lungern Express) for the roughly 55-minute ride to Lungern, winding through the Alps past lakes, villages and snow-capped peaks. Tour Lake Lungern and the village, then continue to Interlaken for free time on Höheweg street and the Höhematte green — the open lawn and best vantage for the Jungfrau. Overnight at Sigriswil Snow-Mountain & Lake View Hotel, or an equivalent 4-star hotel, beside the Sigriswil panorama bridge with views of Lake Thun.
timeline.description_zh: 上午出发前往卢塞恩，游览卢塞恩湖的湖光山色，聆听狮子纪念碑（1821年雕刻，纪念1792年战死的786名瑞士雇佣兵）讲述瑞士人忠贞坚毅的历史，并游览卡贝尔廊桥与八角形水塔。之后乘坐金色山口观光列车（卢塞恩—龙疆段，约55分钟）前往龙疆，穿山越岭欣赏沿途湖泊、村庄与雪山美景，游览龙疆湖及小镇风光。随后前往因特拉肯，自由游览何维克街与荷黑马特——这片绿地是眺望少女峰最佳之处。夜宿锡格里斯维尔雪山湖景酒店或同等4星级酒店——位于锡格里斯维尔全景桥旁，可远眺图恩湖。

timeline.title_en: Interlaken – Jungfrau – Zurich — Riding the panoramic cable car to the Sphinx Observatory
timeline.title_zh: 因特拉肯-少女峰-苏黎世——少女峰全景缆车登顶斯芬克斯观景台
timeline.description_en: In the morning visit the village of Grindelwald and its dreamy hillsides, then take the cable car up to the Jungfrau (4,158 m), one of the highest peaks in the Alps and a UNESCO World Natural Heritage site since 2001. Ascend to the Sphinx Observatory at 3,571 m for a breathtaking panorama, including the 23.6 km Aletsch Glacier — Europe's largest glacier, weighing over 1.1 billion tons and likewise UNESCO-listed — flowing from the Eiger, Mönch and Jungfrau. On clear days you can even see the Vosges in France and the Black Forest in Germany. Then continue to Zurich. Overnight at Crowne Plaza Zürich or Hotel Fassbind, or an equivalent 4-star hotel in Zurich's lively shopping district.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往参观格林德尔瓦尔德小镇及梦幻山坡，之后乘坐缆车登顶阿尔卑斯山著名风景区——海拔4158米、2001年列为世界自然遗产的少女峰。前往海拔3571米的“斯芬克斯观景台”俯瞰白雪皑皑的少女峰与欧洲最大的阿莱奇冰川（长23.6公里、冰重超11亿吨，源自艾格峰、僧侣峰与少女峰，亦列入世界遗产名录）；天气晴朗时甚至能远眺法国境内的孚日山脉与德国境内的黑森林。随后前往苏黎世。夜宿苏黎世皇冠假日酒店或法斯宾德酒店，或同等4星级酒店——坐落于苏黎世热闹的商业街区。

timeline.title_en: Zurich – Colmar – Dijon — A romantic fairy-tale town and an international finance hub, with a Burgundy château stay
timeline.title_zh: 苏黎世-科尔马-第戎——浪漫的童话小镇与国际金融大都会，入住勃艮第古堡酒店
timeline.description_en: In the morning tour Zurich's Old Town, the Grossmünster / Zurich Cathedral (exterior) whose twin towers are the city's landmark, Lake Zurich and the Bahnhofstrasse, one of Europe's longest and most expensive shopping avenues. Then head to Colmar, one of France's most romantic towns — the inspiration for Miyazaki's Howl's Moving Castle and a filming location for Chinese Restaurant 2 — to wander its beautiful old quarter and admire the Maison des Têtes, a 1609 Renaissance building whose facade is carved with 105 lifelike human faces, and other handsome Colmar architecture. Overnight at a Burgundy château hotel set in a 27-hectare park in a grand cru wine region, or the Dijon Oceania (city center) or an equivalent 4-star hotel within walking distance of Dijon Cathedral.
timeline.description_zh: 上午游览苏黎世老城、双塔为城市地标的苏黎世大教堂（外观）、苏黎世湖，以及欧洲最长、世界上最昂贵的购物大道之一班霍夫大街。随后前往法国最浪漫的童话小镇之一科尔马——它是宫崎骏电影《哈尔的移动城堡》原型及《中餐厅2》实景拍摄地，游览美丽的科尔马老城区，欣赏建于1609年、正面墙壁雕有105颗表情各异人面头像的文艺复兴建筑人头屋等漂亮景点。夜宿勃艮第古堡酒店——坐落于特级葡萄产区、占地27公顷的雄伟公园中央；或第戎市区大洋洲或市区同等4星级酒店——位于第戎市中心，可步行前往第戎大教堂。

timeline.title_en: Dijon – Paris — A life full of red wine and roses
timeline.title_zh: 第戎-巴黎——充满红酒和玫瑰的人生
timeline.description_en: In the morning head into the Burgundy wine region to visit the courtyard, production workshop, vineyards and cellars of a Burgundy estate — located in the Romanée-Conti area, one of France's top appellations — with a professional sommelier guiding a tasting of three to five reds and whites. Then enter Dijon, capital of Burgundy and home of escargot, rose mustard and Charolais beef, to tour the old town and the Gothic Notre-Dame de Dijon (built in the 13th century, with a 14th-century chiming clock). In the afternoon transfer to Paris, where the tour ends at Place d'Italie. No hotel is included on this final night.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往勃艮第大区葡萄产区，参观勃艮第酒庄的庭院、生产工坊、葡萄园及酒窖——酒庄位于罗曼尼·康帝（La Romanée-Conti）葡萄酒产区，是法国高级产区之一，由专业侍酒师讲解并品鉴三到五杯红、白葡萄酒。随后前往勃艮第首府、蜗牛与玫瑰芥末及白牛原产地第戎，参观第戎老城与建于13世纪、设有14世纪报时钟的哥特式第戎圣母院。下午前往巴黎，到达后在意大利广场结束美好行程。当晚无酒店住宿。

meeting_en: Rome, Italy — group meets in central Rome on Day 1; the old town is explored on foot.
meeting_zh: 意大利罗马——第1天在罗马市区集合，古城区为步行游览。

faqs.question_en: Where and when do we meet and disperse?
faqs.question_zh: 集合及集散地点和时间是怎样的？
faqs.answer_en: Departing from Rome: on Day 1 make your own way to the hotel near Rome's train station and meet at the hotel entrance that evening; on Day 9 the group disperses around 18:00 at Place d'Italie in Paris. (Times are for reference; the final-confirmation departure notice prevails.) You may join the group on arrival day in Rome, but you will then miss the Rome city sights, with no refund. We do not recommend booking a flight that leaves Paris on the last day.
faqs.answer_zh: 罗马出发：行程第1天自行前往罗马火车站附近当晚入住的酒店，在酒店门口集合；第9天18:00左右在巴黎意大利广场解散。（以上为参考时间，具体以出团通知书为准。）本产品参团当天可在罗马上团，但罗马市区景点将无法游览，且无费用可退！不推荐结束当天离开巴黎的航班！

faqs.question_en: Can I visit both Mt. Titlis and the Jungfrau on the same trip?
faqs.question_zh: 铁力士雪山和少女峰可以同时游览吗？
faqs.answer_en: No. Mt. Titlis and the Jungfrau belong to different departure dates and cannot be visited on the same trip; please check the specific itinerary against your travel dates. If you want Mt. Titlis, book a departure before 1 September 2024; if you want the Jungfrau, book a departure on or after 1 September 2024.
faqs.answer_zh: 不可以。铁力士雪山和少女峰分别属于不同的团期，不能同时游览，建议您根据出行时间查看具体行程。若想游览铁力士雪山，建议报名2024年9月1日以前的团期；若想游览少女峰，请报名2024年9月1日及以后的团期。

faqs.question_en: What does the Paris-departure version look like? Do the sights or hotel standards change?
faqs.question_zh: 从巴黎出发的团期行程是怎样的？景点和酒店标准会变化吗？
faqs.answer_en: From the Rome departure, the actual itinerary simply runs the displayed route in reverse: Day 1 Paris–Dijon; Day 2 Dijon–Colmar–Zurich; Day 3 Zurich–Jungfrau–Interlaken; Day 4 Interlaken–Lungern–Lucerne–Milan; Day 5 Milan–Venice; Day 6 Venice–Tuscany; Day 7 Tuscany–Cinque Terre–Pisa; Day 8 Pisa–Florence–Rome; Day 9 Rome (refer to the departure notice). The sights and hotel standards on Paris departures are identical — no change.
faqs.answer_zh: 相对于罗马出发，实际行程是把展示行程反过来执行：第1天巴黎-第戎；第2天第戎-科尔马-苏黎世；第3天苏黎世-少女峰-因特拉肯；第4天因特拉肯-龙疆-卢塞恩-米兰；第5天米兰-威尼斯；第6天威尼斯-托斯卡纳；第7天托斯卡纳-五渔村-比萨；第8天比萨-佛罗伦萨-罗马；第9天罗马（参见出团通知）。巴黎出发团期的景点和酒店标准与原行程一致，没有变化。

faqs.question_en: What's the difference between the 9-day and 11-day "French Châteaux, Swiss Alps & Italian Cuisine" itineraries?
faqs.question_zh: 【法兰西城堡 瑞士雪山与意式美食】9天和11天行程有什么区别？
faqs.answer_en: (a) The 11-day adds a 2-day in-depth tour of Paris on top of the 9-day route. (b) The 9-day and 11-day departures differ depending on whether Paris local sightseeing is chosen — refer to each product's own display. (c) Choose whichever suits your schedule. (d) Note: other locally-joining guests may take part in the itinerary.
faqs.answer_zh: a. 11天行程在9天行程的基础上增加了巴黎2日深度游览；b. 9天和11天团期根据是否选择巴黎当地游览而有差异，请以各自产品展示为准；c. 游客可根据自身行程和时间灵活选择更合适的产品；d. 注意：行程中可能有当地参团的其他客人加入。

faqs.question_en: Rome's center is car-free — how do I tour it on my own?
faqs.question_zh: 罗马市区内无车辆，我该如何自行游览罗马？
faqs.answer_en: Rome's sights are clustered in the old town (a vehicle-restricted historic conservation zone). From the hotel you can walk to the Basilica di Santa Maria Maggiore (5–10 min), the Colosseum (10–15 min), the Mouth of Truth (20–25 min), the Trevi Fountain (15–20 min) and the Spanish Steps (5–10 min), then back to the hotel (20–25 min). Skipping the Mouth of Truth cuts about 35 minutes of walking (roughly 2 km).
faqs.answer_zh: 罗马的景点比较集中，几乎都位于罗马古城区（历史保护区车辆限行）。当天可从酒店步行前往圣母大殿（步行5-10分钟）、斗兽场（10-15分钟）、真理之口（20-25分钟）、许愿池（15-20分钟）、西班牙广场（5-10分钟），随后返回酒店（20-25分钟）。如不游览真理之口，可减少约35分钟步行（约2公里）。

faqs.question_en: Can I take a vehicle inside Rome?
faqs.question_zh: 我可以在罗马乘坐车辆吗？
faqs.answer_en: All tour groups explore Rome's old town on foot, but you may take the metro or a taxi back to the hotel from the last stop (about EUR 8–10). Because the sights are close together and the route passes ancient Roman ruins and shopping streets, walking between them is recommended.
faqs.answer_zh: 所有旅行团在罗马古城区内都是步行游览，但可以乘坐地铁或出租车从最后一站返回酒店，约8-10欧元。由于各景点相邻较近，沿途又都是古罗马历史遗迹和商业街区，因此建议在景点间徒步游览。

faqs.question_en: Do I need a visa?
faqs.question_zh: 是否需要签证？
faqs.answer_en: Yes. This product does not include visa fees; it requires a Schengen visa (single or multiple entry). If you need a visa, choose a Schengen-visa product. After booking we provide, free of charge, all the materials needed to apply for the Schengen visa, and (if you entrust us with the visa service) we buy the Schengen-compliant travel insurance for you; otherwise you must arrange your own insurance and claims. Your passport must be valid for at least six months from the departure date, or customs may refuse entry. Visa fees, visa-service fees, Schengen insurance fees and visa-center appointment fees are all non-refundable and non-transferable, even if the product is changed or cancelled. "Visa-guarantee" assurance: if you sign with us at least 61 days before departure and have not obtained the visa within 45 days before departure, we bear all losses and immediately refund your full travel cost; cases not meeting this clause follow the change & cancellation terms. A refusal must be reported to us within 48 hours with the consulate's rejection letter; any supplementary/amended materials must be submitted within five days, and you may not unilaterally waive the right to appeal the visa.
faqs.answer_zh: 需要。本产品不包含签证费用，需办理申根签证（单次或多次入境），如需办理请选择申根签证产品。预订后免费提供办理申根签证的全部材料；如委托我社办理签证，我社为您购买符合申根要求的申根旅游保险，若未委托我社办理则需自行购买旅游保险并负责理赔。护照有效期需在离境之日起至少还有六个月，否则海关有权拒绝入境。签证费、签证服务费、申根保险费、签证中心预约费均不可退款，也无法更改使用者，即使产品退改签也不退。保签无忧：游客在出发日前61天与我社签约，如在出发前45天内未获取签证，我社承担所有损失，立即退还全部旅游费用；不符合该条款者按“退改与取消条款”退费。如遇拒签需在48小时内通知我社并出具使领馆拒签函，如需补充或更改材料须在五天内提交，且不得单方面放弃“签证抗辩”权利。

faqs.question_en: Booking, changes & cancellation
faqs.question_zh: 预订、变更与取消须知
faqs.answer_en: Free no-reason cancellation: both the agency and traveler may cancel without reason up to 30 days before departure (the 30th day excluded). Payment does not equal a confirmed itinerary — book at least 14 days ahead; the operator re-confirms within 48 hours or the order is auto-refunded, so do not book connecting flights/hotels before confirmation. Group size & formation: this is a join-in (shared) group; minimum group size is 10, declared once reached — if fewer than 10, the agency may cancel the tour or an optional activity; the displayed maximum is the daily per-person cap, and other agencies' guests may share the vehicle. Connections: because flights, traffic, ferry cancellations and strikes often force time/order changes, you must arrive one day before the tour starts and leave one day after it ends (allow 5 hours for same-airport transfers, 7 hours for different airports in the same city; reasonable meet/disperse window 07:00–21:00); losses from not doing so are the traveler's own. Rooms: solo bookings include a single-supplement deposit (partially refunded pro-rata if room-sharing succeeds); two people default to a standard double (king or twin, bed type assigned by the hotel, not selectable); a triple/family room is for two parents + one minor with bed type assigned by the hotel. European hotels are non-smoking, no cooking in rooms, no free toiletries or boiling water, check-in 14:00 / check-out 11:00, and air-conditioning is not a standard feature. Listed hotel names are preferred; if unavailable they are replaced by hotels of similar standard and star rating without further notice. Itinerary contingencies: the order of sights on some departures is adjusted (content stays the same; the departure notice prevails); if a Milan trade fair or other event occurs, hotel locations may change; in the Cinque Terre only some villages are visited (guide-decided), and bad weather or a rail strike switches it to a coach/other tour of the coast. Pricing: priced in EUR at booking; if you pay in CNY, the amount is the real-time CNY figure auto-calculated from Bank of China's "EUR sell" rate on the day of payment (refunds likewise use the rate on the refund day, with any rate difference or bank fees borne by the traveler). Because the activities are costed on a year-round average, no refund is due for special-population cases.
faqs.answer_zh: 免费取消：跟团游产品出发前30天（不含第30天）旅行社和旅行者均可无理由申请取消。支付不等于确认行程，建议至少提前14天预订，组团社在48小时内二次确认，超时未确认则默认自动退款，未获确认前请勿预订衔接机票及酒店。成团与人数：本产品为散客拼团，成团人数为10人，达到即宣布成团；不足10人旅行社有权取消旅游团或其中的自费活动；展示的最多参团人数为每天平均人数上限，可能与其他旅行社客人合并用车。衔接：由于航变、交通、渡轮取消、罢工等常导致时间及顺序调整，旅游者须在出团前一天到达集合地、结束后一天离开集散地（同机场转机至少留5小时，同城不同机场至少留7小时，合理集散时段07:00-21:00），未遵守所致损失自行承担。房型：单人报名默认含单人房差押金（拼房成功按比例退还）；两人默认标准双人间（大床或双床，床型由酒店安排不可选）；三人家庭间默认两位父母与一位未成年儿童入住，床型由酒店安排。欧洲酒店全面禁烟、房间内禁止做饭、不提供一次性洗漱用品及免费开水，入住14:00、退房11:00，且不以空调为标准设施；所列酒店为优先入住酒店，如订满则更换为相近条件、相同星级酒店，恕不另行通知。行程应变：部分团期游览先后次序有调整（内容一致，以出团通知书为准）；如遇米兰会议或其他活动，酒店位置会调整；五渔村因体力和时间只安排个别村庄（由导游安排），如遇恶劣天气或铁路罢工则改为乘大巴或其它形式游览海岸线城市。价格：所有定价以欧元为预订计价单位，如选择人民币支付，则以当天本网站依据中国银行实时“欧元卖出价”自动计算的人民币实时价格为准（退款同样适用申请当日汇率，汇率差异或银行手续费由旅行者承担）。本产品活动按全年平均成本计算，特殊人群并无费用可退。

faqs.question_en: Health & safety requirements
faqs.question_zh: 健康与安全须知
faqs.answer_en: For your safety, have a medical check-up before departure and do NOT enroll if you have: infectious diseases (e.g. active tuberculosis, typhoid); cardiovascular disease (severe hypertension, heart failure, myocardial ischemia/infarction); cerebrovascular disease (embolism, hemorrhage, brain tumor); respiratory disease (emphysema, cor pulmonale); psychiatric illness (epilepsy and various mental disorders); severe anemia (hemoglobin below 50 g/L); or are recovering from major surgery. Pregnancy: at 35 weeks or beyond you may not join under any circumstances; at 28 weeks or beyond you must provide a doctor's report (within 7 days) and your physician's consent; under 28 weeks, enroll with caution, sign a liability waiver, and you cannot take part in adventure, skiing, sea, high-altitude or outdoor activities. People with disabilities: provide a 7-day medical report and physician's consent, be accompanied by an immediate family member, and apply at least 61 days ahead for a reserved place and special facilities. Seniors over 70: provide a health certificate and physical-exam report and be accompanied by immediate family (or sign a waiver if not); this is a long itinerary requiring good walking ability and stamina; high-risk activities require a physician's consent letter; apply at least 61 days ahead for age-friendly services. Minors (under 18) must be accompanied by an immediate relative or guardian; some sights have special rules for under-18/12/6; an unaccompanied minor needs both parents' authorization (or one parent's written authorization if traveling with the other); infants under 2 are not accepted; child seats for infants under 6 / children under 30 kg must be confirmed in advance or provided by the guest (EU-compliant). Under Article 15 of the Tourism Law, travelers must truthfully declare health information relevant to the trip (including pregnancy, lactation, chronic and infectious diseases, suspected symptoms or recent travel to epidemic areas) and follow safety warnings; concealment that causes harm or transmission risk makes the traveler liable for the consequences, including medical/quarantine costs and compensation, and the agency may terminate the contract without refund.
faqs.answer_zh: 为确保旅途安全，出行前请做一次必要的身体检查，如有下列情况请勿报名：传染性疾病（如活动期肺结核、伤寒等）；心血管疾病（如严重高血压、心功能不全、心肌缺氧、心肌梗塞等）；脑血管疾病（如脑栓塞、脑出血、脑肿瘤等）；呼吸系统疾病（如肺气肿、肺心病等）；精神病（癫痫及各种精神病）；严重贫血（血红蛋白水平在50克/升以下）；大中型手术恢复期。孕妇：妊娠35周及以上任何情况下都无法参团；28周及以上需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书；28周以下请慎重报名，需签署免责声明书，且探险、滑雪、出海、高空、户外等项目均无法参加。残疾人：需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书，需直系家属陪同，并提前至少61天申请预留位置及专用设施。70周岁以上老年人：需提供健康证明、体检报告并由直系家属陪同（如无法提供则需签署免责声明书）；本行程较长，对步行能力和体力要求较高，体力不支者请慎重报名；涉及探险、滑雪、出海、高空、户外等项目需持主治医师同意书；需提前至少61天申请适老化服务及设施。未成年人（未满18周岁）须由直系亲属或监护人陪同；部分项目对未满18/12/6周岁有特殊限定；无父母陪同的未成年人出境须持父母授权书（仅一方陪同则需另一方书面授权）；不接受2周岁以下婴儿参团；6岁以下婴儿或30公斤以下儿童请提前确认安全座椅，否则需自备符合欧盟制式的座椅。根据《旅游法》第15条，旅游者须如实告知与旅游活动相关的个人健康信息（包括妊娠期、哺乳期、慢性病、传染病史、疑似症状或近期疫区旅居史）并遵守安全警示；若因隐瞒导致人身损害或传播风险，须自行承担责任（含医疗、隔离费用及赔偿），旅行社可解除合同且不退还费用。

title_en: France, Italy & Switzerland 14-Day Tour: Rome to Paris One-Way Deep Route
title_zh: 法意瑞14天跟团游：罗马至巴黎单程深度路线
short_en: A 14-day one-way journey from Rome to Paris through Italy's coasts and Renaissance cities, the Swiss Alps and lakes, ending in romantic Paris.
short_zh: 14天单程深度之旅，从罗马一路游览意大利海岸与文艺复兴名城、瑞士阿尔卑斯湖光山色，最终抵达浪漫巴黎。
desc_en: This 14-day one-way tour traces a deep route from Rome to Paris across three countries. In Italy you explore the Eternal City, the Amalfi Coast and Capri's Blue Grotto, ancient Pompeii, Tuscany's Val d'Orcia, Siena, the Cinque Terre, Florence and Venice. You then cross the Alps into Switzerland for Zurich, Lucerne, Interlaken and the Jungfrau region, before finishing with three full days in Paris including the Louvre, a Seine river cruise and the Palace of Versailles. The one-way design keeps coach mileage low while delivering one city a day in Italy, four Swiss language regions, six guided history walks and four city walks.
desc_zh: 这条14天单程线路串联三国，从罗马深度直达巴黎。意大利段游览永恒之城罗马、阿马尔菲海岸与卡普里岛蓝洞、千年庞贝古城、托斯卡纳奥尔恰谷、锡耶纳、五渔村、佛罗伦萨与威尼斯；随后翻越阿尔卑斯山进入瑞士，游览苏黎世、卢塞恩、因特拉肯与少女峰地区；最后在巴黎安排三整天，含卢浮宫、塞纳河游船与凡尔赛宫。单程设计大幅降低大巴行车里程，意大利每天一城，贯穿瑞士四大语区，含六场深度历史讲解与四场城市漫步。

highlights.en: Deep exploration of Rome, birthplace of the Roman Empire and the Eternal City
highlights.zh: 深度探访古罗马帝国发祥地、永恒之城罗马

highlights.en: Capri island and the world-famous Blue Grotto on the Amalfi Coast
highlights.zh: 卡普里岛与世界闻名的蓝洞，畅游阿马尔菲海岸

highlights.en: Ancient Pompeii, the city buried and reawakened after a thousand years
highlights.zh: 沉睡千年的庞贝古城，重见天日的辉煌遗迹

highlights.en: Tuscany's Val d'Orcia, Siena, the leaning tower of Pisa and the cliffside Cinque Terre
highlights.zh: 托斯卡纳奥尔恰谷、锡耶纳、比萨斜塔与悬崖上的五渔村

highlights.en: Renaissance Florence and the romantic canals of Venice
highlights.zh: 文艺复兴之都佛罗伦萨与浪漫水城威尼斯

highlights.en: Swiss Alps, lakes and the Jungfrau region across four language areas
highlights.zh: 瑞士阿尔卑斯山湖光山色与少女峰地区，贯穿四大语区

highlights.en: Three full days in Paris: Louvre with a national gallery guide, Seine cruise and Versailles
highlights.zh: 巴黎三整天：卢浮宫国家馆讲解、塞纳河游船与凡尔赛宫

highlights.en: One-way deep route, city-centre 4-star hotels, no forced shopping and all-inclusive taxes
highlights.zh: 单程深度路线、市中心四星酒店、绝无强制购物、税费全含

includes.en: Hotels: 13 nights in 4-star hotels.
includes.zh: 【酒店】：四星级酒店13晚。

includes.en: Meals: 13 meals total — breakfast in the hotel or in another form.
includes.zh: 【餐饮】：酒店内早餐或其他形式餐饮共计13餐。

includes.en: Taxes: all in-itinerary taxes and fees including tourist city tax, city-entry fee, residence tax, road/bridge tolls, island-landing fees, etc.
includes.zh: 【税费】：游客城市税、进城费、居住税、路桥费、登岛费等行程内的所有税费。

includes.en: Transport: tourist coach or business travel vehicle.
includes.zh: 【交通】：旅游巴士或者商务旅行车。

includes.en: Guide: professional driver + Chinese-speaking guide, or a Chinese-speaking driver-guide for the whole trip (note: for 8 guests or fewer, a business travel vehicle + Chinese-speaking driver-guide is arranged).
includes.zh: 【导游】：职业司机+中文导游，或者全程中文司机兼导游（备注：8人及以下则安排为商务旅行车+中文司机兼导游）。

includes.en: Luggage: one 23 kg checked bag and one carry-on bag.
includes.zh: 【行李】：1件23公斤行李及1件随身行李。

includes.en: Activities & tickets: Sorrento–Amalfi sea cruise; round-trip Capri ferry; Pompeii ancient-city admission (with national-museum docent); Cinque Terre scenic train; Venice island ferry; Seine river cruise; Louvre admission (with national-museum docent); Versailles admission (with national-museum docent).
includes.zh: 【活动及门票】：索伦托阿马尔菲出海环游、卡普里岛往返渡船、庞贝古城门票（含国家馆讲解师）、五渔村景观列车、威尼斯登岛轮渡、塞纳河游船、卢浮宫门票（含国家馆讲解师）、凡尔赛门票（含国家馆讲解师）。

excludes.en: Passport: personal passport fees.
excludes.zh: 护照：个人护照费用。

excludes.en: Visa: tourist visa fees for the countries listed in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 签证：行程中所列旅游国家所需的观光签证费用。

excludes.en: Insurance: travel insurance fees (if the itinerary involves high-risk sports, please verify whether the travel insurance covers that activity).
excludes.zh: 保险：旅游保险费用；（如行程内涉及到高风险运动，请核实旅游保险是否包含该项运动）。

excludes.en: Tips: guide and driver tips totaling 10 EUR per person per day, same price for adults and children.
excludes.zh: 小费：游客支付导游和司机小费一共10欧/人/天，大小同价。

excludes.en: Meals: lunch and dinner (main meals) are not included in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 餐饮：行程内不包含午、晚正餐费用。

excludes.en: Tickets: sights not marked as included in the itinerary — including but not limited to those marked "exterior," "recommended," "optional," "experience," and any item not stated as fee-included; if guests wish to visit, please arrange at own expense.
excludes.zh: 门票：行程中未注明费用包含的景点（包括但不仅限于行程中注明"外观"的景点，以及"推荐""可选""体验"等所有未提及费用包含的项目，如游客需要参观，敬请自理）。

excludes.en: Extended stay: any accommodation, transport or sightseeing extended beyond the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 延长住宿：行程外额外延长的住宿、交通、观光费用。

excludes.en: Personal spending: e.g. beverages and alcohol, taxis, phone charges and other personal expenses.
excludes.zh: 私人消费：如饮料酒类、出租车、电话费等个人消费。

excludes.en: Other transport: beyond the included business vehicle or minibus, other transport not mentioned in the inclusions — e.g. Venice gondola, and tourist trains, electric carts/taxis in vehicle-restricted zones — at own expense.
excludes.zh: 其他交通：除包含商务旅行车或者中巴之外，费用包含中未提及的其他交通费用，如威尼斯贡多拉，以及车辆限行区的观光火车、电瓶出租车等费用敬请自理。

excludes.en: Free-time activities: guests' independent evening touring and the itinerary's recommended projects, plus any resulting transport, meals, tickets, shopping, etc.
excludes.zh: 自由活动：游客夜间自行游览及行程中的推荐项目，以及产生的交通、餐饮、门票、购物等费用。

excludes.en: Experience activities: the various travel experience activities not included in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 体验活动：行程中没有包含的各项旅游体验活动。

excludes.en: Other costs: any fee not mentioned in the inclusions. For force majeure such as natural disaster, war or strike, or extra costs due to traffic delays, flight cancellation/rescheduling, embassy visa delays, insufficient group size or other special situations or causes not attributable to our company (e.g. overseas visa-extension fees, board/lodging/transport, national airline fare adjustments), our company reserves the right to charge the difference.
excludes.zh: 其他费用：费用包含中未提及的费用。如因天灾、战争、罢工等不可抗力原因，及因交通延阻、航班取消或更改时间、使馆延误出签证、人数不足等特殊情况或其他非我公司原因所致的额外费用（如在外延期签证费、住、食及交通费、国家航空运价调整等），我公司有权追加差价。

timeline.title_en: Rome — Reliving the glory of the ancient Roman Empire in the "city of cities"
timeline.title_zh: 罗马——重温"万城之城"古罗马帝国的辉煌
timeline.description_en: Meet in the morning and set off on a guided walking tour of Rome, the world-renowned historic and cultural city that was the cradle of the ancient Roman Empire and is known as the "Eternal City." On foot you take in the Colosseum (exterior) and the Pantheon (exterior), then stroll through the Spanish Steps/Piazza di Spagna and the Trevi Fountain (exterior). Because the old city is protected and largely closed to vehicles, the day is on foot, roughly 5–6 km. Free time follows, then check in to the hotel. Overnight at the Sheraton Roma Hotel or Hotel Mantegna, or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午集合，在导游带领下徒步游览世界著名的历史文化名城罗马——古罗马帝国的发祥地，因历史悠久而被称为"永恒之城"。徒步参观矗立于古罗马都城遗址上的斗兽场（外观）、万神殿（外观），并游览西班牙广场（西班牙台阶共138级，是欧洲最宽的台阶）和特莱维喷泉（许愿池，外观）。由于罗马古城建筑保护，大多数区域为步行街区禁止车辆行驶，当天全程徒步约5–6公里。之后自由活动，入住酒店。夜宿：罗马梅第奇喜来登酒店或曼特尼亚酒店，或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Rome – Naples/Sorrento – Capri – Sorrento — Into the Mediterranean paradise of Capri and the Blue Grotto
timeline.title_zh: 罗马-那不勒斯/索伦托-卡普里岛-索伦托——走进地中海天堂卡普里岛，探秘蓝洞
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, transfer to Naples or Sorrento to board a ferry to the port of Capri island. On the island you have free time (no transport included): you may stroll along the seafront and visit the Blue Grotto, take a boat around the island to see the grotto, or head up to Capri town to the Gardens of Augustus overlooking the whole bay. The recommended route runs Marina Grande – Capri old town – Gardens of Augustus, about 1.3 km of hill paths past three key sights, with paid funicular and taxis available. Note: the Blue Grotto is a natural site and may close due to high tide, wind or waves as declared by local maritime authorities; its visit is not included, and besides the boatman fee a 2–5 EUR tip per local custom is recommended. Then ferry back to Sorrento and check in. Overnight at a Sorrento coastal hotel or equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往那不勒斯或索伦托，乘渡船抵达卡普里岛港口。登岛后为自由活动（不含任何交通费用）：可沿海边漫步后前往蓝洞参观，或自行乘船环岛探秘蓝洞，或前往卡普里城中游览奥古斯都花园、俯瞰整个海湾。推荐路线为大港-卡普里古城-奥古斯都花园，单程约1.3公里山路，途经三个重要景点，沿途有缆车和出租车（需额外付费）。备注：蓝洞属于自然景观，如遇涨潮、风浪或当地海洋气象机构宣布关闭则无法入内游览；蓝洞游览费用不含在团费内，除人力船工费外，请按当地习俗支付2–5欧元小费。之后乘渡船返回索伦托码头，前往酒店入住。夜宿：索伦托海岸酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Sorrento – Amalfi – Positano – Sorrento — Boat cruise along the Amalfi Coast and the lemon scent of Positano
timeline.title_zh: 索伦托-阿马尔菲-波西塔诺-索伦托——阿马尔菲出海环游，感受波西塔诺的柠檬香
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, embark on a charming full-day boat cruise to explore the treasures of the Amalfi Coast, a UNESCO World Heritage site. Sail to Positano to explore the enchanting cliffside village, then cruise on to Amalfi to admire the panorama of the coastal towns, before returning by boat. Note: in extreme sea conditions the boat company may cancel the Positano and Amalfi sailing for safety; instead the day switches to a coach visit of Sorrento old town (no Positano or Amalfi), and the cruise fee is refunded to guests. Overnight at a Sorrento coastal hotel or equivalent 4-star hotel, which has a private beach and pier, two restaurants and a sea SPA, within walking distance of the lively seafront town center.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后踏上迷人的游船一日游，探索世界文化遗产阿马尔菲海岸的宝藏。乘船前往波西塔诺，探索迷人的悬崖村庄，然后乘船前往阿马尔菲，欣赏阿马尔菲海岸小镇全景，之后乘船返回入住酒店。备注：如遇海上极端天气，出于游客安全考虑游船公司将取消出海游览波西塔诺和阿马尔菲，我社改安排当天乘大巴参观索伦托老城（无法参观波西塔诺和阿马尔菲），出海游船费用将退还给游客。夜宿：索伦托海岸酒店或同等4星级酒店，酒店三面环海，拥有私人沙滩和私家码头、两间餐厅及海洋SPA中心，步行可达热闹的海滨小镇中心。

timeline.title_en: Sorrento – Pompeii – Naples – Rome — "Unsealing" history at the lost civilization of Pompeii
timeline.title_zh: 索伦托-庞贝-那不勒斯-罗马——"解封"历史遗迹，寻找消失的庞贝文明
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, head to Pompeii to explore the ruins of the ancient city, buried by the eruption of Mount Vesuvius, and learn about the once-thriving Pompeian civilization. Inside you visit the city itself plus the open-air Amphitheatre (built around the 1st century BC, the oldest Roman amphitheatre, seating nearly 20,000) and the Temple of Apollo. Then on to Naples to tour the old town with the Royal Palace of Naples (exterior) and Castel Nuovo / New Castle (exterior). In the afternoon transfer to Rome and check in. Overnight at the Sheraton Roma Hotel or Hotel Mantegna, or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往庞贝，探索因维苏威火山爆发而被掩埋的庞贝古城遗址，了解曾经的庞贝文明。园内游览庞贝古城，以及位于古城最东端、约建于公元前1世纪、可容纳近2万人的露天剧场（古罗马最古老的圆形剧场之一）和阿波罗神庙。之后前往那不勒斯游览老城，参观那不勒斯皇宫（外观）、新堡（又名安茹城堡，外观）。下午前往罗马，入住酒店。夜宿：罗马梅第奇喜来登酒店或曼特尼亚酒店，或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Rome – Pienza – Siena — Medieval art treasure Siena, and the cypress lanes of the Val d'Orcia
timeline.title_zh: 罗马-皮恩扎-锡耶纳——中世纪艺术瑰宝锡耶纳，遇奥尔恰谷丝柏树小径
timeline.description_en: In the morning depart Rome for the old town of Pienza, stopping along the famous cypress lane for free photos. In Pienza, the Renaissance "ideal city" and birthplace of Pope Pius II, you visit Piazza Pio II and Pienza Cathedral (exterior), with views over the UNESCO-listed Val d'Orcia from the town walls. Then continue to Siena, the perfectly preserved medieval city, to see Siena Cathedral (exterior), the shell-shaped Piazza del Campo, the Palazzo Pubblico / town hall (exterior) and the Torre del Mangia (exterior, Italy's second-tallest tower at 102 m). Overnight at the Four Points by Sheraton Siena or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午从罗马出发前往皮恩扎古城，途中在丝柏树小径自由拍照。皮恩扎是教皇皮乌斯二世的出生地、被视为"理想城市"典范的文艺复兴小镇，游览二世广场、皮恩扎大教堂（外观），并可从城墙俯瞰世界遗产奥尔恰山谷（Val d'Orcia，2004年列入世界遗产名录）。之后前往锡耶纳，这座保持完整古典外貌的中世纪古城，游览锡耶纳大教堂（外观）、形似贝壳的田野广场、锡耶纳市政厅（外观）及曼吉亚塔楼（外观，垂直高度102米，意大利第二高的塔楼）。夜宿：锡耶纳福朋喜来登酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Siena – Pisa – Cinque Terre – Florence — Scenic train to the Cinque Terre and the Ligurian coast
timeline.title_zh: 锡耶纳-比萨-五渔村-佛罗伦萨——景观列车游览五渔村，游利古里亚海景城镇
timeline.description_en: In the morning head to Pisa to see the Leaning Tower of Pisa (exterior) and the Piazza dei Miracoli (Square of Miracles), the UNESCO-listed walled square holding the cathedral, baptistery, leaning bell tower and cemetery. Then travel to the Cinque Terre — Monterosso al Mare, Vernazza, Corniglia, Manarola and Riomaggiore — five cliffside fishing villages strung along the Ligurian coast, visited via the scenic train. Note: if bad weather or a rail strike makes the Cinque Terre impossible, the program automatically switches to a coach or other means to tour coastal towns. Overnight at the Hilton Florence Metropole or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往比萨，游览比萨斜塔（外观）和比萨历史文化中心的奇迹广场（Piazza dei Miracoli，又名主教座堂广场，世界遗产，含大教堂、洗礼堂、斜塔/钟楼和墓园）。之后前往五渔村，沿利古里亚海岸线游览蒙特罗索、韦尔纳扎、科尔尼利亚、马纳罗拉及里奥马焦雷这五个悬崖边的美丽渔村，乘景观列车游览。备注：如遇恶劣天气或铁路公司罢工等因素导致无法游览五渔村，行程将自动改为乘坐大巴车或其它形式游览海岸线城市。夜宿：佛罗伦萨希尔顿大都会酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Florence – Venice — The cradle of the Renaissance, an art-filled journey
timeline.title_zh: 佛罗伦萨-威尼斯——诗歌之地、文艺复兴之魂，享受艺术之旅
timeline.description_en: In the morning explore Florence, the birthplace of the Renaissance, visiting the world's third-largest church, Santa Maria del Fiore / the Cathedral (the lining-up entry / exterior), Piazza della Signoria with the Palazzo Vecchio, a replica of Michelangelo's David and the Neptune fountain, the Ponte Vecchio (Old Bridge, built in 1345) and Piazza Santa Croce with the Basilica of Santa Croce (exterior), resting place of Michelangelo and Galileo. Then transfer to Venice and check in. Overnight at the voco Venezia (InterContinental) or the Hilton Garden Inn Venice Mestre, or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往文艺复兴发源地佛罗伦萨，参观世界第三大教堂——圣母百花大教堂（需排队进入），游览市政广场（坐落维琪奥宫/旧宫、米开朗基罗《大卫》复制品及海神喷泉）、维奇奥老桥（建于1345年）以及圣十字广场和圣十字教堂（外观，米开朗基罗与伽利略的安息地）。之后前往威尼斯入住酒店。夜宿：威尼斯洲际VOCO酒店或希尔顿大使酒店，或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Venice – Milan — Romantic Venice on its gentle blue waters
timeline.title_zh: 威尼斯-米兰——游览温柔碧波上浪漫的威尼斯
timeline.description_en: In the morning visit St. Mark's Basilica (exterior), St. Mark's Square (called by Napoleon "the most beautiful drawing room in Europe"), the Bridge of Sighs (exterior) and the magnificent Doge's Palace (exterior) — these waterborne buildings and winding canals make Venice's romance linger. Then transfer to the fashion capital, Milan. Overnight at the Royal Garden Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午参观圣马可大教堂（外观）、圣马可广场（曾被拿破仑称作"欧洲美丽的客厅"）、叹息桥（外观）以及华丽的总督宫（外观）——这些建造在水上的美丽建筑和蜿蜒水巷，让威尼斯的浪漫风情久久挥之不去。之后前往时尚之都米兰。夜宿：皇家花园酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Milan – Zurich — Along the Alps from the fashion capital to the financial capital
timeline.title_zh: 米兰-苏黎世——沿阿尔卑斯山脉，从时尚之都游览金融之都
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, freely visit Milan's landmark, the Milan Cathedral / Duomo (exterior, a Gothic masterpiece begun in 1386), and the Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II, one of Europe's most beautiful shopping arcades. In the afternoon transfer to Zurich to see the Grossmünster / Zurich Cathedral (exterior), Lake Zurich, the Bahnhofstrasse shopping street, and a stroll along the Limmat river. Overnight at the H+ Hotel Zürich (Limmattal area) or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后自由参观米兰的标志性建筑米兰大教堂（外观，始建于1386年的哥特式建筑），以及欧洲漂亮的商业拱廊之一埃马努埃莱二世长廊。下午前往苏黎世，游览苏黎世大教堂（Grossmünster，外观）、苏黎世湖、班霍夫大街（车站大街，欧洲较长、世界上昂贵的购物大道之一），并漫步利马特河边。夜宿：苏黎世利马塔尔哈利之家酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Zurich – Lucerne – Interlaken — The idyllic village of Lungern, a masterpiece of Swiss lakes and mountains
timeline.title_zh: 苏黎世-卢塞恩-因特拉肯——世外桃源龙疆镇，瑞士湖光山色代表作
timeline.description_en: In the morning set off for Lucerne to enjoy the lake-and-mountain scenery of Lake Lucerne, hear the story of Swiss loyalty told by the Lion Monument (carved in 1821 to commemorate the Swiss Guards who died in 1792), and see the Chapel Bridge (Kapellbrücke) and the octagonal Water Tower. Then continue to the village of Lungern to enjoy its lake and small-town scenery — a famous filming location of "Crash Landing on You." In the afternoon head to Interlaken, the town at the foot of the "Jungfrau" on the roof of Europe. Overnight at the Sigriswil alpine lake-view hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午出发前往卢塞恩，游览卢塞恩湖的湖光山色，听狮子纪念碑讲述瑞士人忠贞坚毅的那段历史（1821年雕刻，纪念1792年为保护路易十六家族而战死的瑞士雇佣兵），以及卡贝尔廊桥和八角形水塔等景点；之后前往龙疆小镇，游览龙疆湖及小镇风光（《爱的迫降》大团圆结局取景地）；下午前往欧洲屋脊"少女峰"山脚下的小镇因特拉肯。夜宿：锡格里斯维尔雪山湖景酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Interlaken – Jungfrau – Geneva — Between Switzerland's "two lakes," admiring the Jungfrau panorama
timeline.title_zh: 因特拉肯-少女峰-日内瓦——行瑞士"两湖"之间，赏"少女峰"全景
timeline.description_en: In the morning enjoy Interlaken, set between Lake Brienz and Lake Thun (the "left and right eyes of God"), with one of three recommended options (only one may be chosen): (1) included — a coach tour of the Jungfrau region with the guide to Grindelwald's classic Swiss "dreamy slope"; (2) at-cost (230 EUR) — the Jungfrau panoramic cable cars to the top, Top of Europe (Europe's highest railway station), the Sphinx Observatory, Aletsch Glacier and Ice Palace; (3) at-cost (70 EUR) — the First–Grindelwald aerial gondola round-trip to First peak and the famous First Cliff Walk. Then check in near Geneva. Overnight at the Novotel Genève Centre Annemasse or the Crowne Plaza, or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午游览位于布里恩茨湖和图恩湖（有上帝左眼与右眼之称）之间的因特拉肯，三个推荐项目仅可三选一、不可同时选两项：项目一（费用包含）跟随导游乘车游览格林德尔瓦尔德经典瑞士山景"梦幻山坡"；项目二（230欧元）少女峰全景缆车登顶——Top of Europe欧洲较高的火车站，游览斯芬克斯观景台、阿莱奇冰川、水晶宫/冰宫等；项目三（70欧元）菲斯特-格林德尔瓦尔德空中贡多拉往返票，直达菲斯特First峰巅，游览懸崖天梭巅峰栈道First Cliff Walk。可自由游览何维克街、荷黑马特绿地。随后入住安纳马斯日内瓦港。夜宿：安娜玛斯日内瓦港诺富特酒店或皇冠假日酒店，或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Geneva – Paris — Strolling Lake Geneva, the flower bridge across the old town
timeline.title_zh: 日内瓦-巴黎——漫步日内瓦湖畔，看花桥横渡古城区
timeline.description_en: In the morning explore the "Flower Bridge" (Pont des Bergues) area beside the hotel, gathering Geneva's local foods and specialty shops, and visit Geneva old town, the Lake Geneva (Lac Léman) shore, the Flower Clock and the Jet d'Eau great fountain (140 m high). In the afternoon drive back to Paris. Overnight at the Mercure or Novotel Paris, or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午游览位于酒店旁的"花桥"区域，这里云集日内瓦各种当地美食和特色商店，参观日内瓦老城、日内瓦湖区、花钟和大喷泉等景点（大喷泉高140米、喷水量500公升，是日内瓦最具代表性的景观之一）；下午乘车返回巴黎。夜宿：巴黎美居酒店或诺富特酒店，或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Paris – Louvre – Paris — Understanding the origins of art at the Louvre, falling for salon culture
timeline.title_zh: 巴黎-卢浮宫-巴黎——深度理解艺术的起源卢浮宫，爱上沙龙文化
timeline.description_en: In the morning visit the Louvre Museum, France's pride, with a French national-museum docent giving a curated in-depth theme tour (note: due to Louvre crowd control, especially in peak season when in-gallery guiding is restricted, a 10 EUR docent fee per guest is refunded; the tour includes ordinary general-admission tickets without a Chinese audio guide). In the afternoon visit Notre-Dame de Paris, Île de la Cité, the Eiffel Tower (exterior) and the Champ de Mars; then take a Seine river cruise (the famous glass-cabin "bateaux" boat, ~3.2 km / ~1 hour) passing Les Invalides (exterior), the Grand and Petit Palais (exterior), Place de la Concorde and more. Overnight at the Mercure or Novotel Paris, or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午参观法兰西引以为傲的卢浮宫博物馆，将由法兰西国家馆讲解师精选主题深度讲解（备注：由于卢浮宫限流、特别是旺季限制讲解员在馆内讲解，届时将退还馆内讲解费10欧元/每位游客；行程包含普通散客门票，无中文讲解器）。下午前往游览巴黎圣母院、西岱岛、埃菲尔铁塔（外观）以及战神广场，之后乘坐塞纳河游船（著名的透明船舱"苍蝇船"，约3.2公里、约1小时航程）游览荣军院（外观）、大小皇宫（外观）、协和广场等地。夜宿：巴黎美居酒店或诺富特酒店，或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Paris – Versailles – Paris — Baroque treasure the Palace of Versailles, a fashion-and-art finale
timeline.title_zh: 巴黎-凡尔赛-巴黎——巴洛克艺术瑰宝凡尔赛宫，时尚艺术先锋
timeline.description_en: In the morning head to Paris's fashion center, Boulevard Haussmann and Rue Royale, with free time at the Opéra Garnier / Paris Opera (exterior), Printemps and Galeries Lafayette department stores. In the afternoon visit the Palace of Versailles in the southwestern suburbs of Paris, then return to Place d'Italie in Paris to end the wonderful journey. No accommodation on this day.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往巴黎时尚中心奥斯曼大街和皇家大道，自由参观巴黎歌剧院（外观）及春天百货、巴黎老佛爷等时尚街区。下午前往位于巴黎西南部郊区的凡尔赛宫，游览凡尔赛宫；返回巴黎意大利广场结束美好行程。当天无住宿。

meeting_en: Rome, Italy — the group assembles in central Rome on the morning of Day 1.
meeting_zh: 意大利罗马——第1天上午在罗马市中心集合。

faqs.question_en: Where and when do we meet and disperse?
faqs.question_zh: 集合及集散地点和方法？
faqs.answer_en: Meet on Day 1 at 09:00 at Roma Tiburtina railway station; disperse around 18:30 on Day 14 at Place d'Italie in Paris (reference times/places — the actual departure follows the tour confirmation letter). You may book a flight arriving in Rome that same day, but after 14:00 you will miss the Rome city sights with no refund. Booking a flight that leaves Paris on the final day is not recommended.
faqs.answer_zh: 行程第1天09:00在罗马Roma Tiburtina火车站集合；第14天18:30左右在巴黎意大利广场解散（参考时间及地点，实际出发时间以出团通知书为准）。可预订当天抵达罗马的航班，但14:00之后上团将无法游览罗马市区景点，且无费用可退！不推荐结束当天离开巴黎的航班！

faqs.question_en: Will the coach rides on the route be very long?
faqs.question_zh: 行程路线乘坐大巴时间会不会很久？
faqs.answer_en: Only the Geneva–Paris leg is about 6 hours 45 minutes; all other planned legs are roughly 3–4 hours of driving. (Road conditions are complex; city traffic jams or other factors may increase driving time.)
faqs.answer_zh: 该产品仅日内瓦巴黎段约为6小时45分，其余计划行程均为3–4小时左右的行车时间。（公路交通情况复杂，特别是市区内容易发生堵车或其它因素导致行车时间增加。）

faqs.question_en: Can we go to the top of the Jungfrau?
faqs.question_zh: 产品是否可以游览少女峰登顶？
faqs.answer_en: Yes, you can, but the cost is not included. If you wish to join, book in advance. The optional experience time is limited and may conflict with the original itinerary, affecting other activities.
faqs.answer_zh: 可以游览，但是费用不包含。如需参加建议提前预定，可选的体验时间受限，可能跟原行程安排产生冲突，导致影响其他行程和体验的安排。

faqs.question_en: Can I do the First "Top of Adventure" Swiss activities?
faqs.question_zh: 我是否能游览菲斯特瑞士空天探险活动（First Top of Adventure）？
faqs.answer_en: Yes, you can, but the cost is not included. If you wish to join, book in advance.
faqs.answer_zh: 可以游览，但是费用不包含。如需参加建议提前预定。

faqs.question_en: What adventure activities are there at First?
faqs.question_zh: 菲斯特都有什么探险活动？
faqs.answer_en: First Top of Adventure offers many thrilling alpine activities, mainly: the Aerial Gondola, the First Cliff Walk, the First Flyer (zip line) and the First Glider. You can buy on site depending on the day's queue and weather.
faqs.answer_zh: 菲斯特空天探险有很多惊险刺激的高山活动，主要项目有：空中贡多拉（Aerial gondola）、悬崖天梭巅峰栈道（First Cliff Walk）、高空飞索（First Flyer）、神鹰飞梭（First Glider）。可根据当天排队时间及天气情况现场购买。

faqs.question_en: Can I choose both the Jungfrau sightseeing train and the First adventure on the same day?
faqs.question_zh: 我是否能同时选择少女峰观光列车、菲斯特空天探险两个项目？
faqs.answer_en: No. There are only 5–6 hours of free time in Interlaken that day; the recommended Jungfrau visit takes 4–5 hours and First takes 3–4 hours, so the two cannot both be done.
faqs.answer_zh: 不可以。当天在因特拉肯仅有5–6小时自由活动时间，推荐游览少女峰时间为4到5小时，菲斯特需要3–4个小时，两项无法同时进行。

faqs.question_en: Can I choose to tour the Cinque Terre by boat?
faqs.question_zh: 我是否可以选择乘船游览五渔村？
faqs.answer_en: Boat touring is weather-dependent, and this product does not include a Cinque Terre boat ticket. You may choose to go by boat, but the train fare cannot be refunded or exchanged, and you must buy the boat ticket yourself, about 35 EUR.
faqs.answer_zh: 由于乘船游览受气候影响，该产品并不包含五渔村船票，但可以选择乘船游览，无法退换火车票的费用，并且需要自行购买船票，约35欧元。

faqs.question_en: Can we tour central Rome by coach?
faqs.question_zh: 罗马市中心我们是否可以乘车游览？
faqs.answer_en: No. Rome's sights are very concentrated and all in pedestrian zones, so we cannot arrange a tourist coach; the central Rome sights must be toured on foot.
faqs.answer_zh: 不可以。由于罗马各个景点非常集中且都是步行街区，因此我社无法安排旅游大巴，罗马市中心景点需要徒步游览。

faqs.question_en: Can we choose different menus/dishes for our dinners?
faqs.question_zh: 我们的晚餐是否能根据喜好选择不同的菜单和菜品？
faqs.answer_en: All meals recommended in the itinerary are recommended local specialties and are not included — for example Venice's famous squid-ink pasta or Tuscan steak. You cannot swap to other set dishes; if a recommended dish is not your preference, you may choose other dining on your own.
faqs.answer_zh: 行程内推荐的餐饮全部为推荐当地特色餐，费用并未包含，比如威尼斯著名的黑墨鱼面、托斯卡纳的牛排等。无法选择其它的菜式，如果菜品并非您的首选，可以自行选择其他餐饮。

faqs.question_en: I get seasick — can I still join the Sorrento island-hopping to the four towns?
faqs.question_zh: 我晕船是否能参加索伦托的跳岛游览四大城市？
faqs.answer_en: The Mediterranean is an inland sea with relatively few waves, and the boats are large, so seasickness is unlikely. The boats are transport (about 40 min–1 hour per leg, then you land to sightsee), not the attraction itself; many included sights such as Capri, Positano and Amalfi cannot be reached by vehicle. If sea conditions are extreme and the cruise to Positano/Amalfi is cancelled, we arrange a coach visit of Sorrento old town and refund the cruise fee; you can also enjoy the Bay of Naples views and food at the Sorrento seafront hotel (private beach, private pier, two restaurants, a renowned sea SPA).
faqs.answer_zh: 首先，地中海为内海，相对风浪较少，加上船体较大，因此晕船概率较低。其次，跳岛游中船为交通工具而非游览工具，平均每段行程40分钟到1小时，随后即可登陆游览；行程中包含的许多景点（如卡普里、波西塔诺、阿马尔菲）都是车辆无法到达的景点。如遇海上极端天气取消出海游览波西塔诺和阿马尔菲，我社将安排参观索伦托老城并退还出海游船费用；当天也可在三面环海、拥有私人沙滩、私家码头、两间餐厅及海洋SPA中心的索伦托海滨酒店享受那不勒斯湾的美景和美食。

faqs.question_en: What happens in extreme weather when the boat cancels the Positano/Amalfi visit?
faqs.question_zh: 如遇极端天气，游船出海取消参观波西塔诺和阿马尔菲怎么办？
faqs.answer_en: In extreme sea conditions, for guest safety the boat company cancels the Positano/Amalfi sailing; we then arrange a coach visit of Sorrento old town that day (Positano and Amalfi cannot be visited), and the cruise fee is refunded to guests.
faqs.answer_zh: 如遇海上极端天气情况，出于游客安全考虑，游船公司取消出海游览波西塔诺和阿马尔菲活动，我社将安排当天乘坐大巴车参观索伦托老城（无法参观波西塔诺和阿马尔菲），出海游船费用将退还给游客。

faqs.question_en: Do I need a visa?
faqs.question_zh: 是否需要签证？
faqs.answer_en: Yes. This product does not include visa fees and requires a Schengen visa (single or multiple entry); if you need one, please select a Schengen visa product. After booking, all materials needed to apply for the Schengen visa are provided free of charge. Your passport must be valid for at least six months from the date of departure or customs may refuse entry. Visa fee, visa service fee, Schengen insurance fee and visa-center appointment fee are all non-refundable and non-transferable, even if the product is changed/cancelled. "Visa worry-free" guarantee: for guests who sign a contract with us at least 61 days before departure, if the visa is not obtained within 45 days before departure, we bear all losses and immediately refund the full travel cost; guests not meeting this clause who fail to obtain a visa are refunded per the change-and-cancellation terms. A refusal must be reported to us within 48 hours with the consulate's refusal letter.
faqs.answer_zh: 需要。本产品不包含签证费用，需要申根签证（单次或多次入境），如需办理请选择申根签证产品。预订后免费提供办理申根签证的全部材料。护照有效期需在离境之日起至少还有六个月有效期，否则海关有权拒绝入境。签证费、签证服务费、申根保险费、签证中心预约费均不可退款，也无法更改使用者，即使产品退改签也无法退款。保签无忧：游客在出发日前61天与我社签约，如在出发前45天内未获取签证，我社承担所有损失、立即退还游客全部旅游费用；不符合该条款的游客如未正常获取签证，将按"退改与取消条款"退费。如遇拒签需在48小时内通知我社并出具使领馆拒签函。

faqs.question_en: Booking, changes & cancellation
faqs.question_zh: 预订、变更与取消须知
faqs.answer_en: Free no-reason cancellation is available up to 30 days before departure (not including the 30th day) by either party. Because flight changes, traffic, ferry cancellations, strikes and order adjustments are frequent, the order and timing of the itinerary may change without being deemed a breach; you must arrive at the meeting point one day before the tour starts and leave the dispersal point one day after it ends, with sensible flight connection time (at least 5 hours for connections at the same airport, 7 hours for different airports in the same city; reasonable meet/disperse window 07:00–21:00). This is a rolling/recurring group with other guests joining and leaving at different points; start/end cities and prices differ, so follow your own booked start and end. Group is announced as formed at 10 people; if 10 is not reached by 30 days before departure either side may cancel. Standard double rooms: two people booking together get a standard double; bed type (one big bed or twin) is assigned by the hotel and cannot be specified. Triple/family rooms default to two parents + one minor with hotel-assigned bedding; if unavailable, same-sex sharing applies. Single travelers pay a single-supplement deposit by default (partial sharing is refunded pro-rata). European hotels: non-smoking, no cooking in rooms, check-in 14:00 / check-out 11:00, A/C not standard. Named hotels are preferred; if full, a similar same-star hotel is substituted without separate notice. Pricing is set in EUR; if you pay in CNY, the price is the real-time CNY auto-calculated from the Bank of China "EUR sell" rate at the moment of payment (refunds use the rate on the refund day; any rate difference or bank fee is borne by the traveler). Key contingencies: Louvre/Pompeii may cap tour-group entry in peak season — if changed to FIT tickets, 10 EUR (Louvre) / 6 EUR (Pompeii) docent fees are refunded, and if entry is impossible, ticket + docent fees are refunded and it becomes an exterior visit; Versailles uses an audio guide instead of an official docent for fewer than 3 people; the Cinque Terre may be done by visiting only some villages, and bad weather/rail strike switches it to a coach/other coastal tour; the Capri Blue Grotto may close for tide/wind/waves (visit not included, 2–5 EUR boatman tip per custom). The optional paraglider is high-risk (see the health & safety FAQ).
faqs.answer_zh: 出发前30天（不含第30天）旅行社和旅行者均可申请无理由取消。由于航变、交通拥堵、渡轮取消、罢工游行或顺序调整频繁，行程时间及游览先后顺序常有调整（不视为违约）；旅行者须在参团日期前一天抵达集合地，离团日期后一天离开集散地，并预留合理航班衔接时间（同一机场转机至少5小时、同城不同机场至少7小时，合理集散时段07:00–21:00）。本产品为循环套发团，途中有其他游客在不同地点上下团，开始与结束城市、价格不同，请按自己报名的目的地开始和结束行程。本产品成团人数为10人，出发前30天未达成团人数双方均可解除合同。标准双人间：两人同时报名默认入住标双，床型（大床或双床）由酒店安排不可指定；三人/家庭间默认两位父母与一位未成年儿童，床型由酒店安排，如不可用则按同性拼房；单人报名默认含单人房差押金，部分拼房按比例退款。欧洲酒店均禁烟、禁止房内做饭，入住14:00/退房11:00，且不以空调为标配；列明酒店为优先入住，如订满则换相近条件同星级酒店、不再另行通知。定价以欧元为计价单位，如选择人民币支付，则以付款当日中国银行"欧元卖出价"自动计算的人民币实时价格为准（退款同样适用申请当日汇率，汇率差及银行手续费由旅行者承担）。重要预案：卢浮宫、庞贝旺季可能对旅游团限流——如改为散拼门票，则退还卢浮宫10欧、庞贝6欧讲解费，如无法入内则退还门票+讲解费并改为外观游览；凡尔赛不足3人时以讲解器替代官导；五渔村可能仅选择部分村庄游览，遇恶劣天气或铁路罢工改为大巴等形式游览海岸线城市；卡普里蓝洞遇涨潮、风浪或关闭则无法入内（费用不含，除船工费外按习俗付2–5欧元小费）。自费滑翔伞为高风险项目（详见健康与安全须知）。

faqs.question_en: Health & safety requirements
faqs.question_zh: 健康与安全须知
faqs.answer_en: To ensure a smooth trip and prevent personal injury, please have a health check before departure and do NOT book if you have: infectious diseases (e.g. active tuberculosis, typhoid); cardiovascular disease (severe hypertension, cardiac insufficiency, myocardial ischemia, myocardial infarction); cerebrovascular disease (cerebral embolism, cerebral hemorrhage, brain tumor); respiratory disease (emphysema, cor pulmonale); psychiatric conditions (epilepsy and various mental illnesses); severe anemia (hemoglobin below 50 g/L); or recovery from major surgery. Pregnancy: at 35 weeks or more you cannot join under any circumstance; at 28 weeks or more you must provide a doctor's exam report within 7 days plus the attending doctor's consent; under 28 weeks please book with caution, sign the disclaimer, and you cannot join any adventure, ski, sea, high-altitude or outdoor projects. Disabled travelers need a doctor's report within 7 days plus consent, an immediate-family escort, and a request for reserved place and special facilities at least 61 days ahead. Seniors over 70 need a health certificate, a physical exam report and an immediate-family escort (or sign the disclaimer); the trip is long and requires walking ability and good stamina; adventure/ski/sea/high-altitude/outdoor projects require the attending physician's consent; request the elder-care service and facilities at least 61 days ahead. Minors (under 18) must be accompanied by an immediate relative or guardian; some sights restrict under-18/under-12/under-6; for infants under 6 or children under 30 kg confirm a safety child seat in advance (or bring an EU-compliant one); an under-18 traveling without parents needs a parental authorization, and infants under 2 are not accepted. Per Tourism Law Article 15 (and the Infectious Disease Prevention Law, 2025 revision), travelers must truthfully declare health information relevant to the trip (pregnancy, lactation, chronic disease, infectious-disease history, suspected symptoms, recent epidemic-area travel) and follow safety warnings; concealment causing harm or transmission risk means the traveler bears full liability, including medical/quarantine costs and compensation, and the agency may terminate the contract without refund.
faqs.answer_zh: 为确保顺利出行、防止人身意外伤害，请出行前做必要的身体检查，如有下列情况请勿报名：传染性疾病患者（如活动期肺结核、伤寒等）；心血管疾病患者（如严重高血压、心功能不全、心肌缺氧、心肌梗塞等）；脑血管疾病患者（如脑栓塞、脑出血、脑肿瘤等）；呼吸系统疾病患者（如肺气肿、肺心病等）；精神病患者（如癫痫及各种精神病人）；严重贫血患者（血红蛋白水平在50克/升以下）；大中型手术恢复期病患者。孕妇：妊娠第35周及以上任何情况下都无法参团；第28周及以上需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书；第28周以下请慎重报名，需签署旅行社免责声明书，且行程内探险、滑雪、出海、高空、户外等项目均无法参加。残疾人：需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书，需直系家属陪同，并至少提前61天申请预留位置及专用配套设施。老年游客：70周岁以上需提供健康证明、体检报告并由直系家属陪同（如无法提供则需签署免责声明书）；本行程较长、对步行能力和体力要求较高，体力不支者请慎重报名；涉及探险/滑雪/出海/高空/户外项目需持主治医师同意书；需至少提前61天申请适老化服务及专属设施。未成年人（未满18周岁）需由直系亲属或监护人陪同，部分项目对未满18/12/6周岁有特殊限定；6岁以下婴儿或30公斤以下儿童请提前确认安全儿童座椅（否则需自备符合欧盟制式的座椅）；无父母陪同的18岁以下未成年人须持父母授权书；本产品不接受2周岁以下婴儿参团。根据《旅游法》第15条及《传染病防治法（2025修订）》，旅游者须如实告知与旅游活动相关的个人健康信息（妊娠期、哺乳期、慢性病、传染病史、疑似症状或近期疫区旅居史）并遵守安全警示，如因隐瞒导致人身损害或传播风险，需自行承担医疗、隔离费用及赔偿责任，旅行社可解除合同且不退还费用。

title_en: Italy in Depth: Venice to Rome 5-Day Group Tour
title_zh: 意大利经典5天跟团游：威尼斯进、罗马出
short_en: A one-way 5-day journey from the canals of Venice through Renaissance Florence, the cliffside Cinque Terre and medieval Tuscany to eternal Rome.
short_zh: 5天单程深度游，从水城威尼斯一路经文艺复兴名城佛罗伦萨、悬崖五渔村与中世纪托斯卡纳古城，直抵永恒之城罗马。
desc_en: This 5-day single-direction tour traces Italy's most iconic landscapes from north to south with no backtracking. Begin among the romantic canals of Venice, then immerse yourself in the Renaissance treasures of Florence before riding the scenic train through the cliffside fishing villages of Cinque Terre and past the Leaning Tower of Pisa. Wind through the medieval hill towns of Siena and Pienza overlooking the UNESCO-listed Val d'Orcia, and finish on foot in Rome, the "Eternal City," exploring the Colosseum, Pantheon, Spanish Steps and Trevi Fountain.
desc_zh: 这是一条由北至南、单程不走回头路的5天意大利深度行程。旅程从浪漫的水城威尼斯启程，随后沉浸于文艺复兴宝库佛罗伦萨；乘坐景观列车饱览悬崖上的五渔村，途经比萨斜塔；再穿行于中世纪山城锡耶纳与皮恩扎，俯瞰世界遗产奥尔恰山谷；最终徒步探访“永恒之城”罗马，欣赏斗兽场、万神殿、西班牙广场与特莱维喷泉。

highlights.en: Romantic Venice: St Mark's Square, St Mark's Basilica, the Bridge of Sighs and the Doge's Palace amid the canals
highlights.zh: 浪漫水城威尼斯：圣马可广场、圣马可大教堂、叹息桥与总督宫，尽览水巷风情

highlights.en: Renaissance Florence with the Duomo (Santa Maria del Fiore), Piazza della Signoria and the Ponte Vecchio
highlights.zh: 文艺复兴名城佛罗伦萨：圣母百花大教堂、市政广场与老桥

highlights.en: Scenic train ride through the cliffside fishing villages of Cinque Terre along the Ligurian coast
highlights.zh: 乘景观列车沿利古里亚海岸游览悬崖渔村五渔村

highlights.en: The Leaning Tower of Pisa and the Square of Miracles
highlights.zh: 比萨斜塔与奇迹广场

highlights.en: Medieval Tuscan hill towns Siena and Pienza overlooking the UNESCO Val d'Orcia and cypress lanes
highlights.zh: 中世纪托斯卡纳古城锡耶纳与皮恩扎，俯瞰世界遗产奥尔恰山谷与丝柏小径

highlights.en: Rome the "Eternal City": Colosseum, Pantheon, Spanish Steps and Trevi Fountain on a guided walk
highlights.zh: “永恒之城”罗马：导游带领徒步游览斗兽场、万神殿、西班牙广场与特莱维喷泉

highlights.en: Single-direction deep-dive itinerary with no backtracking and city-centre 4-star brand hotels
highlights.zh: 单程深度行程不走回头路，精选城市中心四星品牌酒店

highlights.en: Cinque Terre scenic train and Venice island ferry included; Chinese-speaking guide throughout
highlights.zh: 含五渔村景观列车与威尼斯登岛轮渡，全程中文导游

includes.en: Hotels: 4 nights in 4-star hotels.
includes.zh: 【酒店】四星级酒店4晚。

includes.en: Meals: 4 meals total — buffet breakfast at the hotel or meals in another form.
includes.zh: 【餐饮】酒店内早餐或其他形式餐饮共计4餐。

includes.en: Taxes & fees: all taxes within the itinerary, including city tourist tax, entry/city-access fees, residence tax, road and bridge tolls, island-landing fees, etc.
includes.zh: 【税费】游客城市税、进城费、居住税、路桥费、登岛费等行程内的所有税费。

includes.en: Transport: tourist coach or business travel van.
includes.zh: 【交通】旅游巴士或者商务旅行车。

includes.en: Guide: professional driver plus Chinese-speaking guide, or a Chinese-speaking driver-guide for the whole trip (note: for groups of 8 or fewer, a business travel van with a Chinese-speaking driver-guide is arranged, who will lead all city sightseeing).
includes.zh: 【导游】职业司机+中文导游或者全程中文司机兼导游（备注：8人及以下则安排为商务旅行车+中文司机兼导游，届时将有司兼导带领游览全部城市行程）。

includes.en: Luggage: one 23 kg checked bag plus one carry-on.
includes.zh: 【行李】1件23公斤行李及1件随身行李。

includes.en: Activities & tickets: Cinque Terre scenic train and Venice island-landing ferry.
includes.zh: 【活动及门票】五渔村景观列车、威尼斯登岛轮渡。

excludes.en: Passport: personal passport fees.
excludes.zh: 护照：个人护照费用。

excludes.en: Visa: tourist visa fees for the countries listed in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 签证：行程中所列旅游国家所需的观光签证费用。

excludes.en: Insurance: travel insurance (if the trip involves high-risk sports, verify whether your travel insurance covers that activity).
excludes.zh: 保险：旅游保险费用（如行程内涉及到高风险运动，请核实旅游保险是否包含该项运动）。

excludes.en: Tips: gratuities for the guide and driver, totaling EUR 10 per person per day, same rate for adults and children.
excludes.zh: 小费：游客支付导游和司机小费一共10欧/人/天，大小同价。

excludes.en: Meals: apart from the specialty meals included in the itinerary, lunches and dinners are not included.
excludes.zh: 餐饮：除行程内包含的特色餐外，行程中不包含午、晚正餐费用。

excludes.en: Admissions: attractions not explicitly stated as included — including but not limited to sights marked "(exterior)" and any items labeled "recommended," "optional," "experience," etc. If you wish to enter, please pay on your own.
excludes.zh: 门票：行程中未注明费用包含的景点（包括但不仅限于行程中注明“外观”的景点，以及“推荐”“可选”“体验”等所有未提及费用包含的项目，如游客需要参观，敬请自理）。

excludes.en: Extended stays: any extra accommodation, transport or sightseeing beyond the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 延长住宿：行程外额外延长的住宿、交通、观光费用。

excludes.en: Personal spending: drinks and alcohol, taxis, phone charges and other personal expenses.
excludes.zh: 私人消费：如饮料酒类、出租车、电话费等个人消费。

excludes.en: Other transport: transport not mentioned as included beyond the van or coach — e.g. the Venice gondola, and sightseeing trains or electric taxis in vehicle-restricted zones, all at your own expense.
excludes.zh: 其他交通：除包含商务旅行车或者中巴之外，费用包含中未提及的其他交通费用，如威尼斯贡多拉，以及车辆限行区的观光火车、电瓶出租车等费用敬请自理。

excludes.en: Free-time activities: nighttime self-guided sightseeing and recommended programs, plus any resulting transport, meals, admissions, shopping, etc.
excludes.zh: 自由活动：游客夜间自行游览及行程中的推荐项目，以及产生的交通、餐饮、门票、购物等费用。

excludes.en: Experience activities: any travel experience activities not included in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 体验活动：行程中没有包含的各项旅游体验活动。

excludes.en: Other costs: anything not mentioned in the inclusions. Due to force majeure such as natural disasters, war or strikes, and special circumstances such as transport delays, flight cancellation or rescheduling, embassy visa delays or insufficient group numbers, or other extra costs not caused by our company (e.g. overseas visa-extension, accommodation, food and transport, or national airfare adjustments), our company reserves the right to add the price difference.
excludes.zh: 其他费用：费用包含中未提及的费用。如因天灾、战争、罢工等不可抗力的原因，及因交通延阻、航班取消或更改时间、使馆延误出签证、人数不足等特殊情况或其他非我公司原因所引致的额外费用（如在外延期签证费、住、食及交通费、国家航空运价调整等），我公司有权追加差价。

timeline.title_en: Venice — Cruising the romantic waters of Venice
timeline.title_zh: 威尼斯——畅游温柔碧波上浪漫的威尼斯
timeline.description_en: Meet up in Venice and begin exploring the "Pearl of the Adriatic," a city built across 118 islands and linked by 177 canals and 401 bridges. Visit St. Mark's Basilica (exterior), one of medieval Europe's largest churches and a masterpiece of Venetian architecture, and St. Mark's Square, the central plaza Napoleon called "the finest drawing room in Europe," ringed by grand palaces and the bell tower. Continue to the Doge's Palace (exterior), the seat of Venice's former glory, and the Bridge of Sighs (exterior), the early-Baroque covered bridge once used to lead condemned prisoners from the palace to the dungeons. You can sample Venice's signature three-course squid-ink pasta dinner (at your own expense). Overnight at the voco Venice (InterContinental) or the Hilton Garden Inn ambassador hotel, or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 在威尼斯集合，开始畅游有“亚得里亚海明珠”之称的水城——这座城市由118个小岛组成，以177条水道、401座桥梁连成一体，素有“水上都市”“百岛城”“桥城”之称。参观圣马可大教堂（外观），它曾是中世纪欧洲最大的教堂之一，是威尼斯建筑艺术的经典之作；游览圣马可广场，这座威尼斯的中心广场曾被拿破仑称作“欧洲最美丽的客厅”，三面被宏伟的宫殿环绕，矗立着高大的钟楼和圣马可教堂。继续游览华丽的总督宫（外观），见证威尼斯昔日的辉煌；以及叹息桥（外观）——这座早期巴洛克风格的封闭式拱桥，是古代由法院向监狱押送死囚的必经之路。在此您还可以品尝威尼斯特色的墨鱼面三道式大餐（自理）。夜宿威尼斯洲际VOCO酒店或希尔顿大使酒店，或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Venice to Florence — Cradle of the Renaissance, a journey through art
timeline.title_zh: 威尼斯-佛罗伦萨——诗歌之地、文艺复兴之魂，享受艺术之旅
timeline.description_en: Depart in the morning for Florence, the birthplace of the Renaissance, and explore the old town. Visit the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore (the Duomo), the world's third-largest church, whose white, red and green marble facade earned it the name "St. Mary of the Flower" (entry requires queuing). See the Piazza della Signoria, an open-air sculpture museum and the city's center of political life for centuries, home to the Palazzo Vecchio, a replica of Michelangelo's David, and the Fountain of Neptune. Walk across the Ponte Vecchio (Old Bridge), built in 1345 over the Arno and one of Europe's earliest large segmental-arch bridges, where Dante is said to have met Beatrice. Visit the Piazza Santa Croce and the Basilica of Santa Croce (exterior), the Gothic church that is the resting place of Michelangelo and Galileo. Overnight at the Hilton Florence Metropole or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午出发前往文艺复兴的发源地佛罗伦萨，游览老城景点。参观世界第三大教堂——圣母百花大教堂（需排队进入），其白、红、绿三色花岗岩贴面将文艺复兴时代推崇的古典与优雅诠释得淋漓尽致，故得名“花之圣母”。游览市政广场，这座享有“露天雕塑博物馆”美誉的广场是该城数个世纪以来的政治中心，坐落着维琪奥宫（旧宫）、米开朗基罗《大卫》雕像的复制品以及海神喷泉。漫步建于1345年、横跨阿诺河的维奇奥桥（老桥），这是欧洲较早的大跨度圆弧拱桥，相传但丁曾在此邂逅少女比阿特丽丝。游览圣十字广场及圣十字教堂（外观）——这座哥特式建筑是米开朗基罗与伽利略的安息之地。之后入住酒店。夜宿佛罗伦萨希尔顿大都会酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Florence to Cinque Terre to Pisa to Siena — Cinque Terre by scenic train
timeline.title_zh: 佛罗伦萨-五渔村-比萨-锡耶纳——景观列车游览五渔村
timeline.description_en: Set out in the morning for Cinque Terre, the five clifftop fishing villages — Monterosso al Mare, Vernazza, Corniglia, Manarola and Riomaggiore — strung along the rugged Ligurian coast and listed as a UNESCO World Heritage Site in 1997. Travel by the local scenic train that stops at each village, with the Mediterranean on one side and the mountains on the other, and admire the colorful houses tumbling toward the sea. In the afternoon head to Pisa to see the Leaning Tower of Pisa (exterior), the freestanding bell tower where Galileo is said to have performed his falling-bodies experiment in 1590, and the surrounding Piazza dei Miracoli (Square of Miracles), the walled cathedral square whose Duomo, baptistery, leaning tower and cemetery together form a UNESCO World Heritage Site. Then continue to Siena to check in. Overnight at the Four Points by Sheraton Siena or an equivalent 4-star hotel. Note: if bad weather or a railway strike prevents visiting Cinque Terre, the itinerary will automatically switch to touring the coastal towns by coach or another means.
timeline.description_zh: 上午出发前往游览五渔村——位于利古里亚大区拉斯佩齐亚省海岸，由蒙特罗索（Monterosso al Mare）、韦尔纳扎（Vernazza）、科尔尼利亚（Corniglia）、马纳罗拉（Manarola）和里奥马焦雷（Riomaggiore）五个悬崖边村镇组成，1997年被联合国教科文组织列入世界文化遗产名录。沿利古里亚海岸线乘坐景观小火车在各个美丽渔村停靠，一边是地中海，另一边是山脉，欣赏五彩斑斓的房子由远及近。下午前往比萨，游览比萨斜塔（外观）——这座比萨大教堂的独立式钟楼是意大利标志之一，相传伽利略曾于公元1590年在此做过自由落体实验；以及比萨历史文化中心的奇迹广场（Piazza dei Miracoli），这片由城墙围合的区域内有比萨主教座堂、斜塔、圣乔瓦尼洗礼堂和墓园四大建筑，已列入世界遗产。之后前往锡耶纳入住酒店。夜宿锡耶纳福朋喜来登酒店或同等4星级酒店。备注：如遇恶劣天气或铁路公司罢工等因素导致无法游览五渔村，行程将自动更改为乘坐大巴车或其它形式游览海岸线城市。

timeline.title_en: Siena to Pienza to Rome — Medieval Siena and the cypress lanes of Val d'Orcia
timeline.title_zh: 锡耶纳-皮恩扎古城-罗马——中世纪艺术瑰宝锡耶纳，邂逅奥尔恰谷丝柏树小径
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, head into the old town of Siena, a medieval city filled with masterpieces and classical architecture where time seems frozen since the 14th century. Visit Siena Cathedral (exterior), the Piazza del Campo (Field Square), the Palazzo Pubblico / Siena town hall (exterior) — the finest example of Sienese Gothic, housing the Museo Civico and its famous Allegory of Good and Bad Government frescoes — and the Torre del Mangia (exterior), the 102-meter tower built in 1297. Continue to the hill town of Pienza, the birthplace of Pope Pius II, who in 1459 rebuilt it as a model "ideal city"; visit Piazza Pio II and Pienza Cathedral (exterior), and look out from the town walls over the UNESCO-listed Val d'Orcia. On the way to Rome, stop for free photos along the famous cypress lanes — the winding country roads lined with Italian cypress that symbolize the Tuscan countryside. Arrive in Rome and check in. Overnight at the Sheraton Roma Hotel / Mantegna hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后出发前往锡耶纳古城——这座中世纪古城布满艺术大师的杰作与古典建筑，穿梭于纵横交错的石板小巷间，仿佛置身千年前的欧洲中世纪，城市自十四世纪起便如时间停滞般保持着完整的古典外貌。游览锡耶纳大教堂（外观）、田野广场、锡耶纳市政厅（外观）——这是锡耶纳哥特式建筑最辉煌的范例，内有市立博物馆及著名系列壁画《好政府，坏政府》，以及建于1297年、高102米的曼吉亚塔楼（外观）。之后前往皮恩扎古城，这里是教皇皮乌斯二世的出生地，1459年他主持重建的皮恩扎被视为“理想城市”的典范；参观二世广场、皮恩扎大教堂（外观），并可从城墙上俯瞰世界遗产奥尔恰山谷（Val d'Orcia）的景致。之后前往罗马，途中在丝柏树小径自由拍照——这条两旁种满意大利柏树的乡村小径是托斯卡纳田园风光的象征之一。抵达罗马后入住酒店。夜宿罗马梅第奇喜来登酒店或曼特尼亚酒店，或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Rome — Reliving the glory of the "Eternal City"
timeline.title_zh: 罗马——重温“万城之城”古罗马帝国的辉煌
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, follow your guide on a walking tour of Rome, the cradle of the Roman Empire and the "Eternal City." Visit the Pantheon (exterior), one of ancient Rome's best-preserved buildings, over 2,000 years old and the resting place of Raphael, which Michelangelo praised as "the design of angels." See the Colosseum (exterior), the colossal amphitheater built for gladiatorial spectacles and Rome's most famous historic monument. Visit the Spanish Steps, made famous by the film Roman Holiday — 138 steps, the widest staircase in Europe — and the Trevi Fountain (exterior), the magnificent Baroque fountain where tossing a coin over your shoulder is said to make wishes come true. Free time, then the trip ends. Note: because Rome's ancient core is largely pedestrianized and closed to vehicles to protect its buildings, today's sightseeing is entirely on foot, covering roughly 5-6 km.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，在导游带领下徒步游览历史文化名城罗马——古罗马帝国的发祥地，因历史悠久而被称为“永恒之城”。参观万神殿（外观），这座古罗马保存完好的建筑距今已有2000多年历史，艺术家拉斐尔等长眠于此，被米开朗基罗赞叹为“天使的设计”；游览罗马斗兽场（外观），这座以庞大、雄伟、壮观著称的古罗马竞技场是罗马最著名的历史遗迹。游览出现在电影《罗马假日》中的西班牙广场，西班牙台阶共138级，是欧洲最宽的台阶；以及特莱维喷泉（许愿池）（外观）——又称“少女喷泉”，以海神尼普顿战胜归来为题材，气势磅礴，相传背对喷泉从肩上投币入水便能梦想成真。自由活动，之后结束愉快旅程！备注：由于罗马古城建筑保护，禁止车辆行驶，大多数区域为步行街区，市区内所有景点均在古罗马城内，当天徒步参观罗马，步行行程约为5-6公里。

meeting_en: Venice, Italy — group assembles in Venice on Day 1; tour ends in Rome.
meeting_zh: 意大利威尼斯——第1天于威尼斯集合，行程于罗马结束。

faqs.question_en: Where and when does the group meet and disperse?
faqs.question_zh: 集合及集散地点和方法是怎样的？
faqs.answer_en: On Day 1, meet around 13:00 at the hotel in Venice Mestre (where you stay that night). On Day 5, the group disperses around 16:30 near Piazzale Flaminio (Piazzale Flaminio, 00187 Roma RM, Italy), and around 17:00 at Roma Tiburtina train station. (Times and places are for reference; the actual departure time follows the official tour-departure notice.) You may join the group in Venice on the first day, but you will then miss the sights on the Venice islands with no refund. On the last day you may book an evening flight out of Rome, but you will miss the Rome city sights with no refund.
faqs.answer_zh: 行程第1天13:00左右在威尼斯梅斯特当晚入住的酒店集合；第5天16:30左右在人民广场附近（解散地址：Piazzale Flaminio, 00187 Roma RM, Italy）解散，17:00左右在Roma Tiburtina火车站解散。（参考时间及地点，实际出发时间以出团通知书为准。）参团当天可在威尼斯上团，但威尼斯岛上景点将无法游览，并无费用可退！结束当天可预定晚上的航班离开罗马，但罗马市区景点将无法游览，并无费用可退！

faqs.question_en: Will the coach rides on this route take a very long time?
faqs.question_zh: 行程路线乘坐大巴的时间会不会很久？
faqs.answer_en: This product is planned for an average of about 3-4 hours of travel time per day. (Road conditions are complex, especially in city centers where traffic jams or other factors can increase driving time.)
faqs.answer_zh: 该产品行程计划平均时间为每日3-4小时的行程时间。（公路交通情况复杂，特别是市区内容易发生堵车或其它因素导致行车时间增加。）

faqs.question_en: Can I choose to visit Cinque Terre by boat?
faqs.question_zh: 我是否可以选择乘船游览五渔村？
faqs.answer_en: Because boat trips are weather-dependent, this product does not include a Cinque Terre boat ticket. You may choose to go by boat, but the train ticket cost cannot be refunded or exchanged, and you must buy the boat ticket yourself for about EUR 40.
faqs.answer_zh: 由于乘船游览受气候影响，该产品并非包含五渔村船票，但是可以选择乘船游览，只是无法退换火车票的费用，并且需要自行购买船票，约40欧元。

faqs.question_en: Can we tour central Rome by vehicle?
faqs.question_zh: 罗马市中心，我们是否可以乘车游览？
