faqs.answer_en: Because Rome's attractions are very concentrated and the area is entirely pedestrianized, we cannot arrange a tourist coach; the sights in central Rome must be toured on foot.
faqs.answer_zh: 由于罗马各个景点非常集中，并且都是步行街区，因此我社无法安排旅游大巴，罗马市中心景点需要徒步游览。

faqs.question_en: Can we choose different menus and dishes for our dinners?
faqs.question_zh: 我们的晚餐能否根据喜好选择不同的菜单和菜品？
faqs.answer_en: All the dining recommended in the itinerary consists of suggested local specialty meals, and the cost is not included — for example Venice's well-known black squid-ink pasta and Tuscan steak. You cannot swap to other set menus; if a recommended dish is not to your taste, you are free to choose other dining on your own.
faqs.answer_zh: 行程内推荐的餐饮全部为推荐当地特色餐，费用并未包含，比如威尼斯较著名的黑墨鱼面、托斯卡纳的牛排等。无法选择其它的菜式，如果菜品并非您的首选，可以自行选择其他餐饮！

faqs.question_en: Do I need a visa?
faqs.question_zh: 是否需要签证？
faqs.answer_en: Yes. This product does not include visa fees — you will need a Schengen visa (single- or multiple-entry); if you need to apply, please choose a Schengen-visa product. After booking we provide, free of charge, all the materials needed to apply for the Schengen visa (refer to the detailed materials checklist). Your passport must be valid for at least six months from the date of departure, otherwise customs may refuse entry. "Worry-free visa guarantee": if you sign the contract with us at least 61 days before departure and have not obtained your visa within 45 days before departure, we bear all losses and immediately refund all your travel costs; travelers who do not meet this clause and fail to obtain a visa are refunded per the change-and-cancellation terms. In case of refusal, notify us within 48 hours and provide the consulate's refusal letter. Note that visa fees, visa service fees, Schengen insurance fees and visa-center appointment fees are all non-refundable and non-transferable, even if the product is changed or cancelled.
faqs.answer_zh: 需要。本产品不包含签证费用，需要申根签证（单次或多次入境）；如您需要办理签证请选择申根签证产品。预订后我社免费提供办理申根签证的全部材料（参考详细材料清单）。护照有效期需在离境之日起至少还有六个月有效期，否则海关有权拒绝入境。保签无忧：游客在出发日前61天与我社签约，如在出发前45天内未获取签证，我社承担所有损失，立即退还游客全部旅游费用；不符合该条款的游客如未正常获取签证，将按照“退改与取消条款”进行退费。如遇拒签需在48小时内通知我社并出具使领馆的拒签函。签证费、签证服务费、申根保险费、签证中心预约费均不可退款，也无法更改使用者，即使产品退改签，签证费用也无法退款。

faqs.question_en: Booking, changes & cancellation
faqs.question_zh: 预订、变更与取消须知
faqs.answer_en: Free no-reason cancellation: both the agency and traveler may cancel without reason up to 30 days before departure (not including the 30th day). Group size: this product is a shared/joining tour declared to run at 10 people; if fewer than 10 sign up the agency may cancel the group, and either party may terminate the contract if the group size is not met by 30 days before departure. For groups of 8 or fewer the tour automatically becomes a small group using a business van with a Chinese-speaking driver-guide. This is a cyclical "rolling" departure: other travelers join and leave at different points, so start/end cities and prices vary — book according to your own chosen start and end points. Arrive at least one day before the join date and leave at least one day after the disperse date, allowing time for delays (same-airport transfers need 5+ hours, different-airport same-city transfers 7+ hours; reasonable meet/disperse window is 07:00-21:00). Rooms: a double room (king or twin, not selectable) is the default for two people booking together; solo travelers pay a single-room supplement unless room-sharing succeeds; triple/family rooms are for two adults plus one minor with bed types assigned by the hotel. European hotels are non-smoking, check-in 14:00 / check-out 11:00, do not provide disposable toiletries or free hot water, and air conditioning is not standard. Listed hotels are preferred; if full, an equivalent same-star hotel is substituted without separate notice. Pricing is quoted in EUR; if you pay in CNY, the amount follows the Bank of China "euro selling price" exchange rate at the moment of payment, and refunds likewise use the rate on the refund day (any exchange-rate difference or bank fees are borne by the traveler). Pay promptly after booking; payment does not equal confirmation — orders need a second confirmation from the operator within 48 hours, otherwise they auto-refund, so do not book connecting flights/hotels before confirmation. Itinerary contingencies: due to frequent flight changes, traffic, ferry cancellations, strikes or order optimization, the actual arrival times and order of sights may change; if Cinque Terre cannot be visited due to bad weather or a rail strike, the itinerary automatically switches to touring the coastal towns by coach or other means; if the official tour notice conflicts with the itinerary, the tour notice prevails, and if the guide's on-site notice conflicts with the tour notice, the guide's on-site notice prevails.
faqs.answer_zh: 免费取消：出发前30天（不含第30天）旅行社和旅行者均有权申请无理由取消。成团：本产品为散客拼团，宣布成团人数为10人，未达10人我社有权取消旅游团；出发前30天（不含第30天）未达成团人数，双方均有权解除合同。如报名人数为8人及以下，本团自动改为小团，安排商务旅行车+中文司机兼导游带领游览全部城市行程。本产品为循环套发团，集合与结束途中会有其他游客在不同地点上下团，开始和结束的城市不同、价格不同，敬请根据自己报名的目的地开始和结束行程。请至少在参团日期前一天抵达集合地，并在离团日期后一天离开集散地，预留充足时间应对延误（同机场转机至少预留5小时，同城不同机场至少7小时；合理集合集散时间段为07:00至21:00）。房型：两人同时报名默认入住标准双人间（大床或双床，床型由酒店安排不可选）；单人报名默认含单人房差，拼房成功按比例退还；三人家庭间默认两位父母与一位未成年儿童入住，床型由酒店安排。欧洲酒店全部禁烟，入住14:00、退房11:00，不提供一次性洗漱用品及免费开水，且空调并非标准设施。行程内所列酒店为优先入住酒店，如订满则更换为相同星级的相近酒店，恕不另行通知。所有定价以欧元为计价单位，如选择人民币支付，则以付款当天中国银行实时外汇牌价“欧元卖出价”自动计算的人民币价格为准，退款同样适用申请退款当日汇率，汇率差异或银行手续费由旅行者承担。预订后请及时支付；支付不等于确认行程，需等组团社在48小时内二次确认，超时未确认则默认自动退款，未获确认前请勿预订衔接机票及酒店。行程应变：因航变、交通拥堵、渡轮取消、罢工或顺序优化，实际到达时间及游览顺序可能调整；如遇恶劣天气或铁路罢工导致无法游览五渔村，行程自动改为乘大巴或其它形式游览海岸线城市；如行程单与出团通知书冲突以出团通知书为准，如出团通知书与导游现场通知冲突以导游现场通知为准。

faqs.question_en: Health & safety requirements
faqs.question_zh: 健康与安全须知
faqs.answer_en: For your safety, please have a basic health check before traveling and do not book if you have any of the following: infectious diseases (e.g. active tuberculosis, typhoid), cardiovascular disease (e.g. severe hypertension, heart failure, myocardial ischemia or infarction), cerebrovascular disease (e.g. embolism, hemorrhage, brain tumor), respiratory disease (e.g. emphysema, cor pulmonale), psychiatric conditions including epilepsy, severe anemia (hemoglobin below 50 g/L), or recovery from major/medium surgery. Pregnancy: travelers at 35 weeks or more cannot join under any circumstances; at 28 weeks or more, a doctor's exam report from within 7 days plus the attending physician's consent are required; under 28 weeks, book with caution, sign a liability waiver, and you cannot take part in adventure, skiing, sea-going, high-altitude or outdoor activities. Disabled travelers need a recent (within 7 days) medical report and physician's consent, an accompanying immediate family member, and at least 61 days' advance request for reserved space and facilities. Seniors over 70 need a health certificate and physical-exam report and an accompanying immediate family member (or must sign a waiver); the trip is long and requires reasonable walking ability and stamina. Minors under 18 must be accompanied by an immediate relative or guardian; some sights have special rules for those under 18, 12 or 6; infants under 2 are not accepted, and children may need an EU-standard safety seat (confirm in advance). Per Article 15 of the Tourism Law, travelers must truthfully disclose health information relevant to the trip (including pregnancy, lactation, chronic illness, infectious-disease history, suspected symptoms or recent travel to epidemic areas) and follow safety warnings; concealing such information that causes harm or transmission risk makes the traveler liable for the resulting losses, medical and quarantine costs, and the agency may terminate the contract without refund.
faqs.answer_zh: 为确保旅游顺利出行、防止旅途中发生人身意外，请在出行前做一次必要的身体检查，如存在以下情况请勿报名：传染性疾病患者（如活动期肺结核、伤寒等）；心血管疾病患者（如严重高血压、心功能不全、心肌缺氧、心肌梗塞等）；脑血管疾病患者（如脑栓塞、脑出血、脑肿瘤等）；呼吸系统疾病患者（如肺气肿、肺心病等）；精神病患者（含癫痫及各种精神病）；严重贫血患者（血红蛋白水平在50克/升以下）；大中型手术恢复期病患者。孕妇：妊娠第35周及以上任何情况下都无法参团；第28周及以上需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书；第28周以下请慎重报名，需签署旅行社免责声明书，且无法参加探险、滑雪、出海、高空、户外等项目。残疾人需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书、需直系家属陪同，并提前至少61天申请预留位置及专用配套设施。70周岁以上老年人需提供健康证明、体检报告并需直系家属陪同（否则需签署免责声明书）；本次行程较长，需要一定的步行能力和较高体力，体力不支者请慎重报名。未成年旅游者（未满18周岁）需由直系亲属或监护人陪同参团，部分景点对未满18、12或6周岁有特殊限定；本产品不接受2周岁以下婴儿参团，如有6岁以下婴儿或30公斤以下儿童请提前确认安全座椅。根据《旅游法》第15条，旅游者需如实告知与旅游活动相关的个人健康信息（包括妊娠期、哺乳期、慢性病、传染病史、疑似症状或近期疫区旅居史）并遵守安全警示规定，若因隐瞒健康信息导致人身损害或传播风险，旅游者需自行承担相应责任、医疗及隔离费用，旅行社可解除合同且不退还费用。

title_en: Italy in Depth: Milan to Rome 6-Day Small-Group Tour
title_zh: 意大利深度6日小团游（米兰出发 罗马结束）
short_en: A one-way 6-day journey through Italy's greatest hits — Milan, Venice, Florence, the Cinque Terre, Pisa, Siena, Pienza and Rome — with 4-star hotels and a Chinese-speaking guide.
short_zh: 6天单程深度玩转意大利经典：米兰、威尼斯、佛罗伦萨、五渔村、比萨、锡耶纳、皮恩扎与罗马，入住四星酒店，中文导游全程陪同。
desc_en: Travel one-way across the best of Italy in six unforgettable days, from the fashion capital of Milan to the eternal city of Rome. The route links the canals of Venice, the Renaissance heart of Florence, the cliffside villages of the Cinque Terre, the leaning tower of Pisa, and the medieval hill towns of Siena and Pienza set in the Val d'Orcia. Carefully designed as a single forward-moving deep itinerary with no backtracking, the trip pairs Italy's iconic sights with hand-picked central 4-star hotels for efficient sightseeing and quality rest.
desc_zh: 六天单程畅游意大利精华，从时尚之都米兰一路抵达永恒之城罗马。行程串联起威尼斯的水巷、文艺复兴之心佛罗伦萨、悬崖上的五渔村、比萨斜塔，以及奥尔恰谷中的中世纪山城锡耶纳与皮恩扎。线路设计为单程深度遊覽、不走回头路，将意大利的标志性景点与精选市区四星酒店相结合，既提升游览效率，又保证优质休息。

highlights.en: Milan's 500-year-old Gothic Duomo and the elegant Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II
highlights.zh: 历时500年建成的米兰哥特式大教堂与优雅的埃马努埃莱二世拱廊

highlights.en: Romantic Venice — St Mark's Square, St Mark's Basilica, the Bridge of Sighs and the Doge's Palace
highlights.zh: 浪漫水城威尼斯——圣马可广场、圣马可大教堂、叹息桥与总督宫

highlights.en: Florence, cradle of the Renaissance, with the Duomo, Piazza della Signoria and the Ponte Vecchio
highlights.zh: 文艺复兴发源地佛罗伦萨：圣母百花大教堂、市政广场与老桥

highlights.en: Scenic train ride to the cliffside fishing villages of the Cinque Terre
highlights.zh: 乘景观列车游览悬崖上的五渔村

highlights.en: Pisa's Leaning Tower and the Piazza dei Miracoli, plus medieval Siena and Pienza in the Val d'Orcia
highlights.zh: 比萨斜塔与奇迹广场，以及奥尔恰谷中的中世纪古城锡耶纳与皮恩扎

highlights.en: Eternal Rome on foot — the Colosseum, Pantheon, Spanish Steps and Trevi Fountain
highlights.zh: 徒步探访永恒之城罗马——斗兽场、万神殿、西班牙广场与特莱维喷泉

highlights.en: One-way deep itinerary with no backtracking and a licensed Chinese-speaking guide-driver
highlights.zh: 单程深度行程、不走回头路，全程中文司机兼导游带领

highlights.en: Central 4-star hotels, all listed attractions included and no forced shopping
highlights.zh: 市中心四星酒店、所列景点门票全含、无强制购物

includes.en: Hotels: 5 nights in 4-star hotels.
includes.zh: 【酒店】：四星级酒店5晚。

includes.en: Meals: 5 meals in total, breakfast at the hotel or meals in other form.
includes.zh: 【餐饮】：酒店内早餐或其他形式餐饮共计5餐。

includes.en: Taxes & fees: all taxes within the itinerary, including tourist city tax, city-entry fees, residence tax, road/bridge tolls and island-landing fees.
includes.zh: 【税费】：游客城市税、进城费、居住税、路桥费、登岛费等行程内的所有税费。

includes.en: Transport: tour coach or business van.
includes.zh: 【交通】：旅游巴士或者商务旅行车。

includes.en: Guide: professional driver plus Chinese-speaking guide, or a Chinese-speaking driver-guide throughout (note: for 8 guests or fewer, a business van with a Chinese-speaking driver-guide is arranged, who will lead the tour through all cities).
includes.zh: 【导游】：职业司机+中文导游或者全程中文司机兼导游（备注：8人及以下则安排为商务旅行车+中文司机兼导游，届时将有司兼导带领游览全部城市行程）。

includes.en: Luggage: 1 piece of 23 kg checked luggage and 1 piece of carry-on luggage.
includes.zh: 【行李】：1件23公斤行李及1件随身行李。

includes.en: Activities & tickets: Cinque Terre scenic train, and the Venice island-landing ferry.
includes.zh: 【活动及门票】：五渔村景观列车、威尼斯登岛轮渡。

excludes.en: Passport: personal passport fees.
excludes.zh: 护照：个人护照费用。

excludes.en: Visa: the tourist visa fees required for the countries listed in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 签证：行程中所列旅游国家所需的观光签证费用。

excludes.en: Insurance: travel insurance fees (if the itinerary involves high-risk sports, please verify whether your travel insurance covers that activity).
excludes.zh: 保险：旅游保险费用（如行程内涉及到高风险运动，请核实旅游保险是否包含该项运动）。

excludes.en: Tips: guests pay tips to the guide and driver totalling EUR 10 per person per day, same price for adults and children.
excludes.zh: 小费：游客支付导游和司机小费一共10欧/人/天，大小同价。

excludes.en: Meals: apart from the special meals included in the itinerary, lunch and dinner are not included.
excludes.zh: 餐饮：除行程内包含的特色餐外，行程中不包含午、晚正餐费用。

excludes.en: Admission tickets: any sight not noted as fee-included (including but not limited to sights marked "exterior", and all "recommended", "optional", "experience" and other items not mentioned as fee-included); if you wish to enter, please pay at your own expense.
excludes.zh: 门票：行程中未注明费用包含的景点（包括但不仅限于行程中注明“外观”的景点，“推荐”“可选”“体验”等所有未提及费用包含的项目，如游客需要参观，敬请自理）。

excludes.en: Extended stay: any extra accommodation, transport or sightseeing outside the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 延长住宿：行程外额外延长的住宿、交通、观光费用。

excludes.en: Personal spending: such as drinks and alcohol, taxis, phone charges and other personal expenses.
excludes.zh: 私人消费：如饮料酒类、出租车、电话费等个人消费。

excludes.en: Other transport: apart from the included business van or minibus, any transport not mentioned in the inclusions is at your own expense, e.g. the Venice gondola, and tourist trains, electric cabs etc. in vehicle-restricted zones.
excludes.zh: 其他交通：除包含商务旅行车或者中巴之外，费用包含中未提及的其他交通费用，如威尼斯贡多拉，以及车辆限行区的观光火车、电瓶出租车等费用敬请自理。

excludes.en: Free-time activities: guests' own evening sightseeing and the recommended items in the itinerary, plus any transport, meals, tickets, shopping etc. arising from them.
excludes.zh: 自由活动：游客夜间自行游览及行程中的推荐项目，以及产生的交通、餐饮、门票、购物等费用。

excludes.en: Experience activities: all tourist experience activities not included in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 体验活动：行程中没有包含的各项旅游体验活动。

excludes.en: Other costs: any cost not mentioned in the inclusions. For extra costs caused by force majeure (natural disasters, war, strikes etc.) or special situations such as transport delays, flight cancellation or rescheduling, embassy delays in issuing visas, or insufficient group numbers, or other reasons not attributable to our company (e.g. visa-extension fees abroad, accommodation/food/transport, national air-fare adjustments), our company reserves the right to charge the price difference.
excludes.zh: 其他费用：费用包含中未提及的费用。如因天灾、战争、罢工等不可抗力的原因，及因交通延阻、航班取消或更改时间、使馆延误出签证、人数不足等特殊情况或其他非我公司原因所引致的额外费用（如在外延期签证费、住、食及交通费、国家航空运价调整等），我公司有权追加差价。

timeline.title_en: Milan (Full Day at Leisure)
timeline.title_zh: 米兰（全天自由活动）
timeline.description_en: Today is a full free day in Milan to arrange your own sightseeing. We suggest visiting Milan Cathedral (Duomo, exterior), the city's landmark, begun in 1386 and completed over roughly five centuries, famed for its hundreds of Gothic spires soaring skyward and thousands of statues carved into its white marble facade. Nearby stands the Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II, one of Europe's most beautiful shopping arcades, where the central gallery houses a Prada boutique with celebrated window displays and is lined with upscale restaurants, cafes and shops. In the evening you meet the guide in central Milan and transfer to the hotel for check-in. Overnight at the Royal Garden Hotel or a similar 4-star hotel, set in a lush garden with fountains, palms and olive trees, within walking distance of a large shopping centre.
timeline.description_zh: 今天在米兰全天自由活动，可自行安排各项游览。建议参观米兰主教堂（米兰大教堂，外观），它是米兰市中心的标志性建筑，始建于1386年，主体历经四个多世纪、到1812年才基本完工，以众多哥特式尖塔耸入云霄、白色大理石外墙上雕刻数千座雕像而闻名于世。附近的埃马努埃莱二世拱廊是欧洲漂亮的商业拱廊之一，中央拱廊下设有Prada精品店，橱窗布置天天更新，廊内遍布高级餐馆、咖啡厅与商店。傍晚与导游在米兰市区集合，前往酒店办理入住。夜宿皇家花园酒店或同等4星级酒店——酒店坐落在郁郁葱葱的花园中，园内有喷泉、棕榈树与橄榄树，可步行至附近的大型商业中心。

timeline.title_en: Milan to Venice (Romance on the Gentle Lagoon)
timeline.title_zh: 米兰－威尼斯（游览温柔碧波上浪漫的威尼斯）
timeline.description_en: In the morning depart for the water city of Venice, made up of 118 small islands linked by 177 canals and 401 bridges. On arrival visit St Mark's Basilica (exterior), first built in 829 and rebuilt in 1043-1071, a treasury of Venetian architectural art; St Mark's Square, which Napoleon called "the most beautiful drawing room in Europe"; the Bridge of Sighs (exterior), the early-Baroque enclosed bridge over which condemned prisoners were once led from the Doge's Palace to the prison; and the magnificent Doge's Palace (exterior) on St Mark's Square, a museum of Venice's former glory holding frescoes and medieval arms. Here you may also try Venice's signature squid-ink pasta in a three-course local meal (at your own expense). Overnight at the InterContinental / voco Venice or Hilton Ambasciatori, or a similar 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午出发前往水城威尼斯——它由118个小岛组成，以177条水道、401座桥梁连成一体，素有“水上都市”“百岛城”“桥城”之称。抵达后参观圣马可大教堂（外观），它始建于公元829年、重建于1043至1071年，是威尼斯建筑艺术的经典之作和收藏丰富的艺术宝库；圣马可广场，曾被拿破仑称作“欧洲美丽的客厅”；叹息桥（外观），属早期巴洛克式风格，是古代由法院向监狱押送死囚的必经之路；以及华丽的总督宫（外观），坐落在圣马可广场上，馆内藏有壁画与中世纪兵器，可一窥威尼斯往昔的辉煌。在这里您还可以品尝威尼斯特色大餐——墨鱼面三道式（自理）。夜宿威尼斯洲际voco酒店或希尔顿大使酒店，或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Venice to Florence (Cradle of the Renaissance, an Art-Lover's Journey)
timeline.title_zh: 威尼斯－佛罗伦萨（诗歌之地、文艺复兴之魂，享受艺术之旅）
timeline.description_en: In the morning depart for Florence, the birthplace of the Renaissance, and explore the sights of the old town. See the Ponte Vecchio (Old Bridge) over the Arno, built in 1345, one of Europe's earliest large-span segmental-arch bridges and a landmark where, legend says, Dante first met Beatrice. Visit the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore (the third-largest church in the world; queuing required to enter), faced in white, red and green marble, whose construction took 175 years. Walk through the Piazza della Signoria, an open-air sculpture gallery overlooked by the Palazzo Vecchio, a copy of Michelangelo's David and the Fountain of Neptune; and the Piazza Santa Croce with the Basilica of Santa Croce (exterior), the Gothic church that is the resting place of Michelangelo and Galileo. Overnight at the Hilton Florence Metropole or a similar 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午出发前往文艺复兴的发源地——佛罗伦萨，参观老城景点。游览阿诺河上的维奇奥桥（老桥），它建于1345年，是欧洲较早的大跨度圆弧拱桥，相传但丁曾在此邂逅少女比阿特丽丝，是佛罗伦萨著名地标之一。参观世界第三大教堂——圣母百花大教堂（需排队进入），教堂以白、红、绿三色花岗岩贴面，历时175年才建成。漫步市政广场，这座露天雕塑博物馆四周环绕着维琪奥宫（旧宫）、米开朗基罗《大卫》雕像的复制品与海神喷泉；以及圣十字广场和圣十字教堂（外观），这座哥特式建筑是米开朗基罗、伽利略等名人的安息之地。夜宿佛罗伦萨希尔顿大都会酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Florence to Cinque Terre to Pisa to Siena (Scenic Train Through Cinque Terre)
timeline.title_zh: 佛罗伦萨－五渔村－比萨－锡耶纳（景观列车游览五渔村）
timeline.description_en: In the morning depart to visit Cinque Terre, the five cliffside villages strung along the Ligurian coast (Monterosso al Mare, Vernazza, Corniglia, Manarola and Riomaggiore), connected by one of the world's most beautiful coastal walking trails between the Mediterranean and the mountains; you ride the scenic train (included) between the colourful villages. In the afternoon head to Pisa to see the Leaning Tower of Pisa (exterior), the freestanding bell tower of the cathedral and a UNESCO World Heritage Site where Galileo is said to have performed his free-fall experiment in 1590, set on the Piazza dei Miracoli (Square of Miracles), the walled complex holding the cathedral, leaning tower, baptistery and cemetery. Then continue to Siena for overnight at the Four Points by Sheraton Siena or a similar 4-star hotel. Note: if bad weather or a railway strike prevents visiting Cinque Terre, the itinerary will automatically switch to touring the coastal towns by coach or other means.
timeline.description_zh: 上午出发前往游览五渔村，它位于利古里亚大区拉斯佩齐亚省海岸，由蒙特罗索、韦尔纳扎、科尔尼利亚、马纳罗拉及里奥马焦雷五个悬崖边的村镇组成，串起五村的徒步线路沿地中海海岸而建，一边是大海、一边是山脉，是世界上美丽的徒步路线之一；途中乘坐景观列车（含）穿行于五彩斑斓的渔村之间。下午前往比萨，游览比萨斜塔（外观），它是比萨大教堂的独立式钟楼、世界遗产，相传伽利略曾于1590年在此做自由落体实验；以及比萨历史文化中心的奇迹广场（主教座堂广场），这片围墙包围的区域内有主教座堂、比萨斜塔、洗礼堂与墓园。之后前往锡耶纳入住酒店。夜宿锡耶纳福朋喜来登酒店或同等4星级酒店。备注：如遇恶劣天气或铁路公司罢工等因素导致无法游览五渔村，行程将自动更改为乘坐大巴车或其它形式游览海岸线城市。

timeline.title_en: Siena to Pienza to Rome (Medieval Treasure Siena, and the Cypress Lane of the Val d'Orcia)
timeline.title_zh: 锡耶纳－皮恩扎古城－罗马（中世纪艺术瑰宝锡耶纳，遇奥尔恰谷丝柏树小径）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast head into the old town of Siena, a medieval city full of art masterpieces and classical architecture, to see Siena Cathedral (exterior), the Piazza del Campo, the Siena Town Hall / Palazzo Pubblico (exterior) — the finest example of Sienese Gothic — and the Torre del Mangia (exterior), the 102-metre tower built in 1297. Then continue to the hill town of Pienza, birthplace of Pope Pius II and rebuilt in 1459 as a model "ideal city", visiting Piazza Pio II and Pienza Cathedral (exterior); from its walls you can look out over the UNESCO World Heritage Val d'Orcia. On the way to Rome, stop for free photos along the cypress lane, the winding country road lined with Italian cypresses that is an icon of Tuscan scenery. Arrive in Rome for overnight at the Sheraton Roma / Hotel dei Medici or Mantegna Hotel, or a similar 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后出发前往锡耶纳古城，这座中世纪古城布满艺术大师的杰作与古典建筑，游览锡耶纳大教堂（外观）、田野广场、锡耶纳市政厅（外观，是锡耶纳哥特式建筑最辉煌的范例）及曼吉亚塔楼（外观，高102米、建于1297年）等景点。之后前往皮恩扎古城，这里是教皇皮乌斯二世的出生地，1459年重建后被视为“理想城市”的典范，参观二世广场与皮恩扎大教堂（外观），并可从城墙上俯瞰世界遗产奥尔恰山谷的景致。前往罗马途中，在丝柏树小径自由拍照——这条两旁种满意大利柏树的乡村小径是托斯卡纳田园风光的象征之一。抵达罗马后入住酒店。夜宿罗马梅第奇喜来登酒店或曼特尼亚酒店，或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Rome (Reliving the Glory of the Eternal City)
timeline.title_zh: 罗马（重温“万城之城”古罗马帝国的辉煌）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, follow the guide on a walking tour of Rome, birthplace of the Roman Empire and known as the "Eternal City". See the Colosseum (exterior), the grand amphitheatre at the heart of Rome and the city's most famous ancient ruin; the Pantheon (exterior), the best-preserved building of ancient Rome, over 2,000 years old, where Raphael lies buried and which Michelangelo praised as "angelic design". Visit the Spanish Steps, the 138-step staircase made famous by the film Roman Holiday, and the Trevi Fountain (exterior), the grand Baroque "wishing fountain" where tossing a coin over your shoulder is said to make wishes come true. Free time follows, after which the pleasant journey ends. Note: because the historic centre is protected and largely pedestrianised, the day is explored entirely on foot, covering roughly 5-6 km.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，在导游带领下徒步游览世界著名的历史文化名城罗马——这里是古罗马帝国的发祥地，因历史悠久而被称为“永恒之城”。参观矗立在古都遗址上的斗兽场（外观），它是罗马中心壮观的圆形竞技场、最著名的历史遗迹；万神殿（外观），是古罗马保存完好的建筑，距今已有2000多年历史，拉斐尔等长眠于此，被米开朗基罗赞叹为“天使的设计”。游览西班牙广场，其西班牙台阶共138级、是欧洲最宽的台阶，曾出现在电影《罗马假日》中；以及特莱维喷泉（许愿池，外观），气势磅礴，相传背对喷泉从肩上投出一枚硬币若能投入水中便能梦想成真。之后自由活动，结束愉快旅程。备注：由于罗马古城建筑保护、大多数区域为步行街区，当天全程徒步参观，步行行程约5-6公里。

meeting_en: Milan city centre — meet your guide in central Milan on Day 1 before transferring to the hotel.
meeting_zh: 米兰市中心——第1天在米兰市区与导游集合，随后前往酒店入住。

faqs.question_en: Where and how do we meet and disperse?
faqs.question_zh: 集合及集散地点和方法是怎样的？
faqs.answer_en: Meet on Day 1 between 18:00-19:00 in central Milan. On Day 6 the group disperses around 16:30 near Piazza del Popolo (dispersal address: Piazzale Flaminio, 00187 Roma RM, Italy), and around 17:00 at Roma Tiburtina railway station. These are reference times and places; the actual departure time is per the final tour notice. You may join the tour in Milan on the same day, but in that case you cannot visit the Milan city sights and no fee is refundable. On the final day you can book an evening flight to leave Rome.
faqs.answer_zh: 行程第1天18:00-19:00在米兰市区集合。第6天16:30左右在人民广场附近解散（解散地址：Piazzale Flaminio, 00187 Roma RM, Italy）；17:00左右在Roma Tiburtina火车站解散。以上为参考时间及地点，实际出发时间以出团通知书为准。本产品参团当天可在米兰上团，但米兰市区景点将无法游览，且无费用可退！结束当天可预订晚上的航班离开罗马。

faqs.question_en: Will the coach travel times along the route be very long?
faqs.question_zh: 行程路线乘坐大巴时间会不会很久？
faqs.answer_en: This product is planned for an average of about 3-4 hours of travel time per day. Road traffic can be complex, especially in city centres where congestion or other factors may increase driving time.
faqs.answer_zh: 该产品行程计划平均时间为每日3-4小时的行程时间。公路交通情况复杂，特别是市区内容易发生堵车或其它因素导致行车时间增加。

faqs.question_en: Can I choose to tour Cinque Terre by boat?
faqs.question_zh: 我是否可以选择乘船游览五渔村？
faqs.answer_en: Because boat tours are weather-dependent, this product does not include a Cinque Terre boat ticket. You may choose to tour by boat, but the train ticket cost is non-refundable/non-exchangeable, and you must buy the boat ticket yourself, costing about EUR 40.
faqs.answer_zh: 由于乘船游览受气候影响，该产品并非包含五渔村船票，但您可以选择乘船游览，只是无法退换火车票的费用，并且需要自行购买船票，约40欧元。

faqs.question_en: Can we tour central Rome by vehicle?
faqs.question_zh: 罗马市中心我们是否可以乘车游览？
faqs.answer_en: Because Rome's sights are very concentrated and lie in pedestrian zones, we cannot arrange a tour coach; the sights in central Rome must be explored on foot.
faqs.answer_zh: 由于罗马各个景点非常集中，并且都是步行街区，因此我社无法安排旅游大巴，罗马市中心景点需要徒步游览。

faqs.question_en: Can we choose different menus and dishes for our dinners?
faqs.question_zh: 我们的晚餐是否能根据喜好选择不同的菜单和菜品？
faqs.answer_en: The dining recommended in the itinerary is all local-specialty food, and the cost is not included — for example Venice's famous black squid-ink pasta and the Tuscan steak. You cannot choose other dishes; if a recommended dish is not your preference, you may choose other dining on your own.
faqs.answer_zh: 行程内推荐的餐饮全部为推荐当地特色餐，费用并未包含，比如威尼斯较著名的黑墨鱼面、托斯卡纳的牛排等。无法选择其它菜式，如果菜品并非您的首选，可以自行选择其他餐饮。

faqs.question_en: Do I need a visa?
faqs.question_zh: 是否需要签证？
faqs.answer_en: This product does not include visa fees. It requires a Schengen visa (single or multiple entry); if you need to apply, please choose a Schengen-visa product. After booking we provide all the materials for the Schengen visa application free of charge, and if you commission us to handle the visa we will also buy you the Schengen travel insurance required for the visa. "Visa Worry-Free" guarantee: if you sign the travel contract with us at least 61 days before departure and have not obtained the visa within 45 days before departure, we bear all losses and immediately refund the full travel fee; guests who do not meet this clause and fail to obtain the visa are refunded per the change-and-cancellation terms. In case of a visa refusal you must notify us within 48 hours and provide the consulate's refusal letter; any supplementary or changed materials must be submitted within five days, and you may not unilaterally waive the right to a "visa appeal". Your passport must be valid for at least six months from the date of departure, otherwise customs may refuse entry. Visa fees, visa-service fees, Schengen-insurance fees and visa-centre appointment fees are all non-refundable and non-transferable, even if the product is changed or cancelled.
faqs.answer_zh: 本产品不包含签证费用，需要申根签证（单次或多次入境）；如您需要办理签证，请选择申根签证产品。预订后我社免费提供办理申根签证的全部材料；如您委托我社办理签证，我社还会为您购买符合申根签证要求的申根旅游保险。保签无忧：游客在出发日前61天与我社签约的旅游产品，如在出发前45天内未获取签证，我社承担所有损失，立即退还游客全部旅游费用；不符合该条款的游客如未正常获取签证，将按照退改与取消条款进行退费。如遇拒签，需要在48小时内通知我社，并出具使领馆的拒签函；如需补充或更改材料，需在五天内提交，且不得单方面放弃“签证抗辩”权利。护照有效期需在离境之日起至少还有六个月，否则海关有权拒绝入境。签证费、签证服务费、申根保险费、签证中心预约费均不可退款，也无法更改使用者，即使产品退改签，签证费用亦无法退款。

faqs.question_en: Booking, changes & cancellation
faqs.question_zh: 预订、变更与取消须知
faqs.answer_en: Free, no-reason cancellation is available up to 30 days before departure (excluding the 30th day) for both the agency and the traveller. It is recommended to book at least 14 days in advance; after payment the order awaits a second confirmation from the operator within 48 hours, and if not confirmed within 48 hours it is automatically refunded — do not book connecting flights or hotels before your itinerary is confirmed. The group size (成团) for this product is 10 people; if the minimum is not reached 30 days before departure either party may cancel the contract without liability. For 8 guests or fewer the tour switches to a small group with a business van and a Chinese-speaking driver-guide. This is a recurring/cyclic departure (split-group) product: other guests board and leave at different points, so the start and end cities — and prices — can differ; book according to your own start and end destinations. Because of frequent flight changes, traffic, ferry cancellations and strikes, the travel sequence and timing often shift; you are required to arrive at the meeting point one day before the tour starts and leave one day after it ends, allowing reasonable connection time (at least 5 hours for a transfer at the same airport, 7 hours between different airports in the same city; reasonable meet/disperse window 07:00-21:00). Cinque Terre: depending on time and stamina you visit only certain villages at the guide's arrangement, and in bad weather or a railway strike the visit switches to the coastal towns by coach. Rooms: two people booking together default to a standard twin/double (bed type assigned by the hotel, not selectable); single travellers pay a single-room supplement deposit (refunded pro-rata if successfully shared); a triple family room is by default two parents plus one minor, bed type assigned by the hotel. All listed hotel names are preferred hotels and may be swapped for a similar same-star hotel without separate notice. Pricing is in EUR at the time of booking; if you pay in CNY, the amount is the real-time CNY value automatically calculated from the Bank of China "euro selling price" on the day of payment, and any exchange-rate difference or bank fees on refunds are borne by the traveller.
faqs.answer_zh: 出发前30天（不含第30天）旅行社和旅行者均可申请无理由取消。建议至少提前14天预订；支付成功后需等待组团社在48小时内二次确认，如超48小时未确认则默认自动退款，未获确定行程前请勿预订衔接机票及酒店。本产品成团人数为10人，行程开始前30天（不含第30天）未达到成团人数的，双方均可解除合同且不承担违约责任。报名人数为8人及以下时，本团自动改为小团，安排商务旅行车+中文司机兼导游。本产品为循环套发团（散客拼团），途中会有其他游客在不同地点上下团，开始和结束的城市不同、价格不同，敬请根据个人报名的目的地开始和结束行程。由于航变、堵车、渡轮取消、罢工等因素，游览时间及先后顺序常有调整，要求旅行者在旅游团开始前一天到达集合地、结束后一天离开集散地，并预留合理衔接时间（同一机场转机至少5小时，同城不同机场至少7小时；合理集合集散时段为07:00至21:00）。五渔村：因时间和体力原因仅选择其中个别村子游览，由导游具体安排，如遇恶劣天气或铁路罢工则改为乘大巴游览海岸线城市。房型：两人同时报名默认标准双人间（床型由酒店安排、不可指定）；单人报名默认含单人房差押金，成功拼房后按比例退款；三人家庭间默认两位父母与一位未成年儿童入住，床型由酒店安排。行程内列明的酒店名称为优先入住酒店，如订满或无法使用则更换为相近条件、相同星级的酒店，恕不另行通知。所有定价以欧元为预订计价单位，如选择人民币支付，则以当天支付时本网站依据中国银行实时外汇牌价中“欧元卖出价”自动计算出的人民币实时价格为准，退款如有汇率差异或银行手续费由旅行者承担。

faqs.question_en: Health & safety requirements
faqs.question_zh: 健康与安全须知
faqs.answer_en: To ensure a smooth trip and prevent accidents, please have a health check before departure and do NOT book if you have any of the following: infectious diseases (e.g. active tuberculosis, typhoid); cardiovascular disease (e.g. severe hypertension, cardiac insufficiency, myocardial ischaemia, myocardial infarction); cerebrovascular disease (e.g. cerebral embolism, cerebral haemorrhage, brain tumour); respiratory disease (e.g. emphysema, cor pulmonale); mental illness (e.g. epilepsy and various psychiatric conditions); severe anaemia (haemoglobin below 50 g/L); or recovery from major/medium surgery. Pregnancy: at 35 weeks or more you cannot join under any circumstances; at 28 weeks or more you must provide a doctor's examination report within 7 days and a physician's consent letter; under 28 weeks please book with caution, sign the agency's liability waiver, and you cannot join any adventure, skiing, sea-going, high-altitude or outdoor activities. Disabled travellers must provide a doctor's report within 7 days plus a physician's consent letter, be accompanied by an immediate family member, and apply at least 61 days ahead for a reserved place and special facilities. Elderly travellers over 70 must provide a health/medical certificate and be accompanied by an immediate family member (or sign the liability waiver if unable); this is a long itinerary requiring a degree of walking ability and stamina, so those not physically fit should book with caution. Minors (under 18) must be accompanied by an immediate relative or guardian; a minor travelling without parents needs a parental authorisation letter (or the other parent's written authorisation if only one parent accompanies); the product does not accept infants under 2 years old; for infants under 6 or children under 30 kg, confirm a safety child seat with us in advance or bring an EU-compliant seat. Per Article 15 of the Tourism Law (and the Infectious Disease Prevention Law), travellers must truthfully declare health information relevant to the trip (including pregnancy, lactation, chronic illness, infectious-disease history, suspected symptoms or recent travel in epidemic areas) and comply with safety warnings; concealment causing personal harm or transmission risk makes the traveller liable for the consequences.
faqs.answer_zh: 为确保旅游顺利、防止旅途中发生人身意外伤害，请在出行前做一次必要的身体检查。如存在下列情况请勿报名：传染性疾病患者（如活动期肺结核、伤寒等）；心血管疾病患者（如严重高血压、心功能不全、心肌缺氧、心肌梗塞等）；脑血管疾病患者（如脑栓塞、脑出血、脑肿瘤等）；呼吸系统疾病患者（如肺气肿、肺心病等）；精神病患者（如癫痫及各种精神病）；严重贫血患者（血红蛋白水平在50克/升以下）；大中型手术的恢复期病患。孕妇：妊娠第35周及以上任何情况下都无法参团；第28周及以上需提供7日内的医生检查报告及主治医生同意书；第28周以下请慎重报名，需签署旅行社免责声明书，且行程内涉及探险、滑雪、出海、高空、户外等项目均无法参加。残疾人需提供7日内的医生检查报告及主治医生同意书、需直系家属陪同，并至少提前61天申请预留位置及专用配套设施。70周岁以上老年人需提供健康证明、体检报告并由直系家属陪同（无法提供或无陪同者需签署免责声明书）；本次行程较长、需要一定步行能力和体力，体力不支者请慎重报名。未成年人（未满18周岁）需由直系亲属或监护人陪同；无父母陪同的须持父母授权书（仅一方陪同需另一方书面授权）；本产品不接受2周岁以下婴儿参团；如有6岁以下婴儿或30公斤以下儿童，请提前与我社确认安全儿童座椅，否则需自备符合欧盟安全制式的座椅。根据《旅游法》第15条及《传染病防治法》，旅游者需如实告知与旅游活动相关的个人健康信息（包括妊娠期、哺乳期、慢性病、传染病史、疑似症状或近期疫区旅居史），并遵守安全警示规定，若因隐瞒健康信息导致人身损害或传播风险，需自行承担相应责任。

title_en: Italy in Depth: 8-Day Venice to Rome Tour
title_zh: 意大利全景深度8天跟团游（威尼斯进 罗马出）
short_en: An 8-day one-way journey from Venice to Rome through Florence, Cinque Terre, Tuscany, the Amalfi Coast and Capri's Blue Grotto.
short_zh: 8天单程深度游，从威尼斯一路南下至罗马，途经佛罗伦萨、五渔村、托斯卡纳、阿马尔菲海岸与卡普里岛蓝洞。
desc_en: This 8-day one-way tour traces the length of Italy from the romantic canals of Venice down to the Eternal City of Rome. Along the way you explore Renaissance Florence, the cliffside fishing villages of Cinque Terre by scenic train, the leaning tower of Pisa, the medieval hill towns of Siena and Pienza in the Val d'Orcia, and the dramatic Amalfi Coast with Capri's Blue Grotto, Positano and the ruins of Pompeii. With one city explored each day, a one-way deep route to cut down on coach mileage, City Walks led by officially licensed guides and all taxes, entries and ferries included, it is a relaxed yet richly cultural way to see the best of Italy.
desc_zh: 这是一条8天单程深度线路，从浪漫水城威尼斯一路南下直达永恒之城罗马。沿途游览文艺复兴发源地佛罗伦萨、乘坐景观列车探访悬崖上的五渔村、比萨斜塔、托斯卡纳奥尔恰谷中的中世纪古城锡耶纳与皮恩扎，再到壮美的阿马尔菲海岸，探秘卡普里岛蓝洞、波西塔诺以及沉睡千年的庞贝古城。每天深度游览一座城市，单程路线大幅减少大巴里程，由官方认证导游带领City Walk，税费、门票与出海轮渡全含，让您轻松而深入地领略意大利精华。

highlights.en: Romantic Venice: St Mark's Square, St Mark's Basilica, the Bridge of Sighs and Doge's Palace
highlights.zh: 浪漫威尼斯：圣马可广场、圣马可大教堂、叹息桥与总督宫

highlights.en: Renaissance Florence with the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore and the Ponte Vecchio
highlights.zh: 文艺复兴名城佛罗伦萨，圣母百花大教堂与老桥

highlights.en: Cinque Terre by scenic coastal train and the Leaning Tower of Pisa
highlights.zh: 乘景观列车游览五渔村，比萨斜塔与奇迹广场

highlights.en: Medieval Siena and Pienza above the UNESCO Val d'Orcia, with the iconic cypress lane
highlights.zh: 中世纪古城锡耶纳与皮恩扎，俯瞰世界遗产奥尔恰谷与绝美丝柏树小径

highlights.en: The Eternal City: Colosseum, Pantheon, Spanish Steps and Trevi Fountain on foot
highlights.zh: 永恒之城罗马：徒步游览斗兽场、万神殿、西班牙广场与特莱维喷泉

highlights.en: Capri island and the world-famous Blue Grotto, plus an Amalfi Coast boat cruise to Positano
highlights.zh: 卡普里岛与世界奇景蓝洞，阿马尔菲海岸出海环游波西塔诺

highlights.en: Pompeii: walk the ruins of a city frozen by Vesuvius two thousand years ago
highlights.zh: 庞贝古城：漫步被维苏威火山掩埋的千年遗址

highlights.en: Flights and rail not required: one-way deep route, city-centre 4-star hotels, licensed guides, no forced shopping and all-inclusive pricing
highlights.zh: 单程深度线路、市中心四星酒店、官方认证导游、绝无强制购物、税费门票全含

includes.en: Hotels: 7 nights in 4-star hotels.
includes.zh: 【酒店】：四星级酒店7晚。

includes.en: Meals: 7 meals in total, breakfast at the hotel or other forms of dining.
includes.zh: 【餐饮】：酒店内早餐或其他形式餐饮共计7餐。

includes.en: Taxes and fees: all taxes within the itinerary, including city/tourist tax, town-entry fees, residence tax, road and bridge tolls, island-landing fees, etc.
includes.zh: 【税费】：游客城市税、进城费、居住税、路桥费、登岛费等行程内的所有税费。

includes.en: Transport: tour coach or business travel van.
includes.zh: 【交通】：旅游巴士或者商务旅行车。

includes.en: Guide: professional driver plus Chinese-speaking guide, or a Chinese-speaking driver-guide throughout (note: for groups of 8 or fewer, a business travel van with a Chinese-speaking driver-guide is arranged to lead all city touring).
includes.zh: 【导游】：职业司机+中文导游，或全程中文司机兼导游（备注：8人及以下则安排为商务旅行车+中文司机兼导游，届时将有司兼导带领游览全部城市行程）。

includes.en: Luggage: one piece of 23 kg checked luggage and one piece of carry-on luggage.
includes.zh: 【行李】：1件23公斤行李及1件随身行李。

includes.en: Activities and tickets: Cinque Terre scenic train, Venice island-landing ferry, Sorrento-Amalfi sea cruise, Capri round-trip ferry, Pompeii ancient-city entry ticket (including national-pavilion docent).
includes.zh: 【活动及门票】：五渔村景观列车、威尼斯登岛轮渡、索伦托阿马尔菲出海环游、卡普里岛往返渡船、庞贝古城门票（含国家馆讲解师）。

excludes.en: Passport: personal passport fees.
excludes.zh: 护照：个人护照费用。

excludes.en: Visa: the tourist-visa fees required for the destination countries listed in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 签证：行程中所列旅游国家所需的观光签证费用。

excludes.en: Insurance: travel insurance fees (if the itinerary involves high-risk sports, please confirm whether your travel insurance covers them).
excludes.zh: 保险：旅游保险费用（如行程内涉及到高风险运动，请核实旅游保险是否包含该项运动）。

excludes.en: Tips: guide and driver tips totalling 10 euro per person per day, same price for adults and children.
excludes.zh: 小费：游客支付导游和司机小费一共10欧/人/天，大小同价。

excludes.en: Meals: apart from the specialty meals included in the itinerary, lunch and dinner are not included.
excludes.zh: 餐饮：除行程内包含的特色餐外，行程中不包含午、晚正餐费用。

excludes.en: Tickets: sights not noted as fee-included in the itinerary (including but not limited to sights marked "exterior", and all "recommended", "optional", "experience" and other items not stated as included); if you wish to visit them, please pay on your own.
excludes.zh: 门票：行程中未注明费用包含的景点（包括但不仅限于行程中注明"外观"的景点，"推荐"、"可选"、"体验"等所有未提及费用包含的项目，如游客需要参观，敬请自理）。

excludes.en: Extended stays: any extra accommodation, transport and sightseeing beyond the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 延长住宿：行程外额外延长的住宿、交通、观光费用。

excludes.en: Personal spending: drinks and alcohol, taxis, phone charges and other personal expenses.
excludes.zh: 私人消费：如饮料酒类、出租车、电话费等个人消费。

excludes.en: Other transport: transport not mentioned in the inclusions beyond the business travel van or minibus, e.g. the Venice gondola and, in vehicle-restricted zones, sightseeing trains and electric cabs — please pay on your own.
excludes.zh: 其他交通：除包含商务旅行车或者中巴之外，费用包含中未提及的其他交通费用，如威尼斯贡多拉，以及车辆限行区的观光火车、电瓶出租车等费用敬请自理。

excludes.en: Free-time activities: guests' own night-time sightseeing and the itinerary's recommended projects, plus the transport, dining, tickets, shopping and other costs they generate.
excludes.zh: 自由活动：游客夜间自行游览及行程中的推荐项目，以及产生的交通、餐饮、门票、购物等费用。

excludes.en: Experience activities: the various travel-experience activities not included in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 体验活动：行程中没有包含的各项旅游体验活动。

excludes.en: Other costs: any costs not mentioned in the inclusions. In cases of force majeure such as natural disasters, war or strikes, or special circumstances such as traffic delays, flight cancellations or rescheduling, embassy visa delays or insufficient group size, or other costs not caused by our company (e.g. overseas visa-extension fees, accommodation, food and transport, national airline fare adjustments), our company reserves the right to charge the price difference.
excludes.zh: 其他费用：费用包含中未提及的费用。如因天灾、战争、罢工等不可抗力，及因交通延阻、航班取消或更改时间、使馆延误出签、人数不足等特殊情况或其他非我公司原因所引致的额外费用（如在外延期签证费、住食及交通费、国家航空运价调整等），我公司有权追加差价。

timeline.title_en: Venice — exploring the romantic city on the gentle waves
timeline.title_zh: 威尼斯——游览温柔碧波上浪漫的威尼斯
timeline.description_en: Meet in Venice, then explore the beautiful buildings built upon the water. Visit St Mark's Basilica (exterior), St Mark's Square — once called "the most beautiful drawing room in Europe" by Napoleon, framed on three sides by grand palaces with the bell tower and basilica rising on its east side. Continue to the magnificent Doge's Palace (exterior), the museum on Piazza San Marco that holds Venice's past glory with frescoes and medieval weaponry, and the Bridge of Sighs (exterior), the early-Baroque enclosed bridge along which condemned prisoners were once led from the Doge's Palace to the dungeons. Here you can also try Venice's signature cuttlefish-ink pasta three-course meal (at your own expense). Overnight at the Hotel Voco Venice (InterContinental) or Hilton Garden Inn Venice, or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 在威尼斯当天集合后，游览建造在水上的美丽建筑。参观圣马可大教堂（外观）、圣马可广场——曾被拿破仑称作"欧洲最美丽的客厅"，广场三面被宏伟的宫殿围绕，东面耸立着高大的钟楼和圣马可教堂。继续游览华丽的总督宫（外观），这座位于圣马可广场上的博物馆收藏着威尼斯昔日的辉煌，内有壁画和中世纪兵器；以及叹息桥（外观），这座早期巴洛克风格的封闭式桥梁，是古代由法院向监狱押送死囚的必经之路。在这里您还可以品尝威尼斯特色大餐墨鱼面三道式（自理）。夜宿威尼斯洲际VOCO酒店或希尔顿大使酒店，或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Venice → Florence — land of poetry and the soul of the Renaissance
timeline.title_zh: 威尼斯—佛罗伦萨——诗歌之地，文艺复兴之魂的艺术之旅
timeline.description_en: Depart in the morning for Florence, the birthplace of the Renaissance. Tour the old town's sights: the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore (the world's third-largest cathedral, entry requires queuing) — clad in white, red and green marble and built over 175 years; the Piazza della Signoria, an open-air sculpture museum and centuries-old centre of political life, home to the Palazzo Vecchio, a replica of Michelangelo's David and the Fountain of Neptune; the Ponte Vecchio (Old Bridge) over the Arno, built in 1345, one of Europe's earliest large-span segmental arch bridges where, legend says, Dante met Beatrice; and Piazza Santa Croce with the Basilica of Santa Croce (exterior), the Gothic church that is the resting place of Michelangelo and Galileo. Overnight at the Hilton Florence Metropole or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午出发前往文艺复兴的发源地佛罗伦萨。参观老城景点：世界第三大教堂——圣母百花大教堂（需排队进入），其外墙以白、红、绿三色花岗岩贴面，历时175年建成；市政广场，享有露天雕塑博物馆美誉，是数个世纪以来的政治生活中心，广场上坐落着维琪奥宫（旧宫）、米开朗基罗《大卫》雕像复制品和海神喷泉；维奇奥桥（老桥），横跨阿诺河，建于1345年，是欧洲较早的大跨度圆弧拱桥，相传但丁曾在此邂逅少女比阿特丽丝；以及圣十字广场和圣十字教堂（外观），这座哥特式建筑是米开朗基罗与伽利略的安息之地。夜宿佛罗伦萨希尔顿大都会酒店，或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Florence → Cinque Terre → Pisa → Siena — the scenic train through the Cinque Terre
timeline.title_zh: 佛罗伦萨—五渔村—比萨—锡耶纳——景观列车游览五渔村
timeline.description_en: Set off in the morning for the Cinque Terre, the five cliff-side fishing villages — Monterosso al Mare, Vernazza, Corniglia, Manarola and Riomaggiore — strung along the Ligurian coast and listed as a UNESCO World Heritage Site in 1997. In the afternoon continue to Pisa to see the Leaning Tower of Pisa (exterior), the freestanding bell tower where Galileo is said to have performed his free-fall experiment in 1590, and the walled Piazza dei Miracoli (Square of Miracles) with its cathedral, baptistery, leaning tower and cemetery, also a World Heritage Site. Then drive to Siena to check in. Overnight at the Four Points by Sheraton Siena or an equivalent 4-star hotel. Note: if bad weather or a rail strike makes the Cinque Terre inaccessible, the itinerary automatically switches to viewing the coastal towns by coach or other means.
timeline.description_zh: 上午出发前往游览五渔村，即沿利古里亚海岸而建的五个悬崖边渔村——蒙特罗索、韦尔纳扎、科尔尼利亚、马纳罗拉及里奥马焦雷的统称，1997年被联合国教科文组织列入世界文化遗产名录。下午前往比萨，游览比萨斜塔（外观）——这座独立式钟楼相传伽利略曾于1590年在此做自由落体实验，以及四周围墙环绕的奇迹广场（Piazza dei Miracoli），广场上有比萨主教座堂、斜塔、洗礼堂和墓园，同为世界遗产。之后前往锡耶纳入住酒店。夜宿锡耶纳福朋喜来登酒店，或同等4星级酒店。备注：如遇恶劣天气或铁路公司罢工等因素导致无法游览五渔村，行程将自动更改为乘坐大巴或其它形式游览海岸线城市。

timeline.title_en: Siena → Pienza → Rome — the medieval art treasure of Siena and the cypress lanes of the Val d'Orcia
timeline.title_zh: 锡耶纳—皮恩扎—罗马——中世纪艺术瑰宝锡耶纳，邂逅奥尔恰谷丝柏树小径
timeline.description_en: After breakfast head to the old town of Siena, a medieval city full of masterpieces and classical architecture. Tour Siena Cathedral (exterior), the Piazza del Campo (the shell-shaped main square, one of Europe's largest surviving medieval squares), the Palazzo Pubblico / town hall (exterior) and the Torre del Mangia bell tower (exterior), Siena's tallest building at 102m. After lunch visit the old town of Pienza, the birthplace of Pope Pius II and a model "ideal city", touring Piazza Pio II and Pienza Cathedral (exterior), where you can look out from the town walls over the World Heritage Val d'Orcia. Then drive to Rome, stopping to photograph the winding cypress lane along the way. Overnight at the Sheraton Roma Hotel or Mercure Roma West (Mantegna), or an equivalent 4-star hotel. Note: due to building conservation, vehicles are banned in much of Rome's old town; today's walking on Rome's west bank is about 5-6 km.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后出发前往锡耶纳古城，这座布满艺术杰作与中世纪古典建筑的古城。游览锡耶纳大教堂（外观）、田野广场（因形似贝壳又称贝壳广场，是欧洲现存最大的中世纪广场之一）、锡耶纳市政厅（外观）及曼吉亚塔楼（外观）——锡耶纳最高建筑，垂直高度达102米。午餐后前往皮恩扎古城，这里是教皇皮乌斯二世的出生地、"理想城市"的典范，参观二世广场和皮恩扎大教堂（外观），可从城墙上俯瞰世界遗产奥尔恰山谷（Val d'Orcia）的景致。之后前往罗马，途中在绿柏树小径自由拍照。夜宿罗马梅第奇喜来登酒店或曼特尼亚酒店，或同等4星级酒店。备注：由于罗马建筑保护，禁止车辆行驶，大多数区域为步行街区，当天徒步参观罗马西岸，步行约5-6公里。

timeline.title_en: Rome — reliving the glory of the ancient Roman Empire, the "city of cities"
timeline.title_zh: 罗马——重温"万城之城"古罗马帝国的辉煌
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, follow your guide on a walking tour of the famed historic city of Rome, cradle of the ancient Roman Empire and known as the "Eternal City". See the Colosseum (exterior), the spectacular ancient arena built to glorify the empire; the Pantheon (exterior), the well-preserved 2,000-year-old temple where Raphael and kings of Italy are buried, praised by Michelangelo as "the design of angels"; the Spanish Steps and Piazza di Spagna, made famous by the film Roman Holiday, with the 138-step staircase, the widest in Europe; and the Trevi Fountain (exterior), the "wishing well" where tossing a coin over your shoulder is said to make wishes come true. Overnight at the Sheraton Roma Hotel or Mercure Roma West (Mantegna), or an equivalent 4-star hotel. Note: vehicles are banned in Rome's old town and all city sights lie within it, so the day is on foot — about 5-6 km of walking.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，在导游带领下徒步游览世界著名历史文化名城罗马，这里是古罗马帝国的发祥地，因历史悠久被称为"永恒之城"。参观斗兽场（外观），这座为赞美古罗马帝国而建的壮观竞技场；万神殿（外观），距今2000多年、保存完好的古罗马建筑，拉斐尔及意大利国王长眠于此，被米开朗基罗赞叹为"天使的设计"；游览西班牙广场，因电影《罗马假日》而闻名，西班牙台阶共138级，是欧洲最宽的台阶；以及特莱维喷泉（许愿池）（外观），相传背对喷泉从肩上投出硬币若能投入水中便可梦想成真。夜宿罗马梅第奇喜来登酒店或曼特尼亚酒店，或同等4星级酒店。备注：由于罗马古城建筑保护，禁止车辆行驶，市区景点皆在古罗马城内，当天徒步游览，步行约5-6公里。

timeline.title_en: Rome → Naples/Sorrento → Capri → Sorrento — Mediterranean paradise island and the Blue Grotto of Capri
timeline.title_zh: 罗马—那不勒斯/索伦托—卡普里岛—索伦托——地中海天堂岛，卡普里环岛探秘蓝洞
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, travel to Naples/Sorrento and take a ferry to the port of Capri. On the island you have free time: stroll along the shore, visit the Blue Grotto, take a boat around the island to explore the grotto, or head up into Capri town to visit the Gardens of Augustus overlooking the whole bay. Then take the ferry back to Sorrento and check in. Overnight at a Sorrento coast hotel or equivalent 4-star hotel. Note: activities on Capri are free time with no transport included; the recommended route runs from the main port to Capri old town to the Gardens of Augustus, about 1.3 km of uphill road passing three key sights, with funicular and taxis available at extra cost. The Blue Grotto is a natural feature; if high tide, waves or other conditions cause the local marine authority to close it, entry is not possible. The Blue Grotto fee is not included; besides the boatman's fee, a 2-5 euro tip is customary.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，前往那不勒斯/索伦托乘坐渡船到达卡普里岛港口。当天在岛上自由活动：可自行前往海边漫步后参观蓝洞，或自行乘船环岛探秘蓝洞，或自行前往卡普里城中游览奥古斯都花园，俯瞰整个海湾；之后坐渡船返回索伦托码头，前往酒店入住。夜宿索伦托海岸酒店或同等4星级酒店。备注：卡普里岛登岛后为自由活动，不含任何交通费用，推荐路线为大港—卡普里古城—奥古斯都花园，单程约1.3公里山路，途径三个重要景点，沿途有缆车和出租车，需额外付费。蓝洞属于自然景观，如遇涨潮、风浪或其他因素被当地海洋气象机构宣布关闭，则无法入内游览。蓝洞游览费用不包含在团费内，除人力船工费外，请按当地习俗支付2-5欧元小费。

timeline.title_en: Sorrento → Amalfi → Positano → Sorrento — cruising the Amalfi Coast and the lemon scent of Positano
timeline.title_zh: 索伦托—阿马尔菲—波西塔诺—索伦托——阿马尔菲出海环游，感受波西塔诺的柠檬香
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, embark on a charming boat day-trip to discover the treasures of the Amalfi Coast, a UNESCO World Heritage Site rated by National Geographic among the 51 most beautiful places to see in a lifetime. Sail to Positano, the enchanting cliff-side village, then continue by boat to Amalfi to take in the panorama of this coastal town. Return by boat and check in. Overnight at a Sorrento coast hotel or equivalent 4-star hotel. Note: in case of extreme sea conditions, for guest safety the boat company will cancel the Positano and Amalfi sailing; we will instead arrange a coach visit to Sorrento old town that day, Positano and Amalfi cannot be visited, and the boat-cruise fee will be refunded to guests.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，踏上迷人的游船一日游，探索阿马尔菲海岸的宝藏。阿马尔菲海岸是世界文化遗产，被美国《国家地理》杂志评为一生必去的51个美丽地方之一。乘船前往波西塔诺，探索迷人的悬崖村庄，然后乘船前往阿马尔菲，欣赏阿马尔菲海岸小镇全景。之后乘船返回，入住酒店。夜宿索伦托海岸酒店或同等4星级酒店。备注：如遇海上极端天气，出于游客安全考虑，游船公司将取消出海游览波西塔诺和阿马尔菲的活动，我社将安排当天乘坐大巴车参观索伦托老城，无法参观波西塔诺和阿马尔菲，出海游船费用将退还给游客。

timeline.title_en: Sorrento → Pompeii → Naples → Rome — "unsealing" the ruins and seeking the lost civilization of Pompeii
timeline.title_zh: 索伦托—庞贝—那不勒斯—罗马——"解封"历史遗迹，寻找消失的庞贝文明
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, head to Pompeii to explore the ruins of the ancient city buried by the eruption of Mount Vesuvius. See the Amphitheatre (built around the 1st century BC, holding nearly 20,000 people and one of the oldest Roman amphitheatres), the ancient city of Pompeii with its preserved streets, houses and the haunting plaster casts of victims, the Temple of Apollo and the Forum (the city's political, economic and religious heart, with the Temple of Apollo and views of Mount Vesuvius). Then continue to Naples to tour the old town, the Royal Palace of Naples (exterior) and the Castel Nuovo (New Castle, exterior). In the afternoon return to Rome, where the wonderful journey concludes. Note: the tour disperses around 19:00 at Roma Tiburtina station; do not book a flight departing Rome that same evening.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，前往庞贝，探索因维苏威火山爆发而被掩埋的庞贝古城遗址。游览露天剧场（约建于公元前1世纪，可容纳近2万人，是最古老的古罗马圆形剧场之一）、庞贝古城（街道、房屋及触目惊心的遇难者石膏铸像完整保留）、阿波罗神庙及中心广场（曾是庞贝的政治、经济、宗教中心，内有阿波罗神殿，可眺望维苏威火山）。之后前往那不勒斯游览那不勒斯老城、那不勒斯皇宫（外观）、新堡（外观）。下午前往罗马，之后在罗马结束美好行程。备注：行程当天约19:00在罗马Tiburtina火车站解散，请勿预订当晚离开罗马的航班。

meeting_en: Venice, Italy. The group meets in Venice on Day 1 to begin the southbound journey to Rome.
meeting_zh: 意大利威尼斯。第1天在威尼斯集合，开始一路南下至罗马的行程。

faqs.question_en: Where and how do we meet and disperse?
faqs.question_zh: 集合及集散地点和方法是怎样的？
faqs.answer_en: Day 1 meeting is at 13:00 in front of that night's hotel in Venice Mestre. On Day 8 the group disperses around 19:00 at Roma Tiburtina railway station. (Times and places are for reference; the actual departure follows the departure-notification letter.) You may join the tour in Venice on the departure day itself, but in that case the sights on Venice island cannot be visited and no refund applies. It is not recommended to book a flight leaving Rome on the same evening the tour ends.
faqs.answer_zh: 第1天13:00在威尼斯梅斯特当晚入住酒店门口集合；第8天约19:00在罗马Tiburtina火车站解散。（参考时间及地点，实际出发时间以出团通知书为准。）本产品参团当天可在威尼斯上团，但威尼斯岛区景点将无法游览，且无费用可退！不推荐预订当天晚上离开罗马的航班。

faqs.question_en: Will the coach rides on the route take a very long time?
faqs.question_zh: 行程路线乘坐大巴时间会不会很久？
faqs.answer_en: This product is planned for an average of about 3-4 hours of travel time per day. (Road traffic conditions are complex; congestion in city areas in particular can increase driving time.)
faqs.answer_zh: 该产品行程计划平均每日约3-4小时的行车时间。（公路交通情况复杂，特别是市区内容易发生堵车或其它因素导致行车时间增加。）

faqs.question_en: Can I choose to tour the Cinque Terre by boat?
faqs.question_zh: 我是否可以选择乘船游览五渔村？
faqs.answer_en: Because boat tours are weather-dependent, this product does not include a Cinque Terre boat ticket. You may choose to tour by boat, but the train-ticket cost cannot be refunded or exchanged, and you must buy the boat ticket yourself, about 40 euro.
faqs.answer_zh: 由于乘船游览受气候影响，该产品并不包含五渔村船票，但您可以选择乘船游览；不过无法退换火车票费用，并且需自行购买船票，约40欧元。

faqs.question_en: In central Rome, can we tour by vehicle?
faqs.question_zh: 罗马市中心我们是否可以乘车游览？
faqs.answer_en: Because Rome's sights are very concentrated and all in pedestrian zones, we cannot arrange a tour coach; the sights in central Rome must be toured on foot.
faqs.answer_zh: 由于罗马各个景点非常集中，并且都是步行街区，因此我社无法安排旅游大巴，罗马市中心景点需要徒步游览。

faqs.question_en: Can we choose different menus and dishes for our dinners?
faqs.question_zh: 我们的晚餐能否根据喜好选择不同的菜单和菜品？
faqs.answer_en: The dining recommended in the itinerary is all local specialty fare and is not included in the price — for example Venice's famous black cuttlefish-ink pasta and Tuscan steak. You cannot choose other dishes; if a recommended dish is not your preference, you are free to choose other dining on your own.
faqs.answer_zh: 行程内推荐的餐饮全部为推荐当地特色餐，费用并未包含，比如威尼斯著名的黑墨鱼面、托斯卡纳的牛排等。无法选择其它菜式，如果菜品并非您的首选，可自行选择其他餐饮。

faqs.question_en: I get seasick — can I still join the island-hopping tour of the four towns from Sorrento?
faqs.question_zh: 我晕船是否能参加从索伦托出发的跳岛游览四大城市？
faqs.answer_en: First, the Mediterranean is an inland sea with relatively few waves, and the boats are large, so seasickness is unlikely. Second, on the island-hopping tour the boat is a means of transport rather than the attraction itself — each leg averages 40 minutes to 1 hour, after which you disembark to sightsee; many included sights such as Capri, Positano and Amalfi cannot be reached by vehicle, or only inconveniently. Lastly, the Sorrento seaside hotel is surrounded by sea on three sides with a private beach, private dock, two differently styled restaurants and a renowned marine spa, so on island-hopping days you can also enjoy the views and cuisine of the Bay of Naples at the hotel.
faqs.answer_zh: 首先，地中海为内海，相对风浪较少，加之船体较大，因此晕船概率较低。其次，跳岛游览中船为交通工具而非游览工具，平均每段行程为40分钟到1小时，随后即可登陆游览；行程中包含的许多景点，如卡普里、波西塔诺、阿马尔菲等都是车辆无法到达或不便到达的景点。再次，索伦托海滨酒店三面环海，拥有私人沙滩和私家码头、两个不同风格的餐厅和一间著名的海洋Spa中心，如当天跳岛活动，也可在酒店内享受那不勒斯湾的美景和美食。

faqs.question_en: What happens if extreme weather causes the boat cruise to Positano and Amalfi to be cancelled?
faqs.question_zh: 如遇极端天气导致游船出海取消参观波西塔诺和阿马尔菲怎么办？
faqs.answer_en: In case of extreme sea conditions, for guest safety the boat company cancels the cruise to Positano and Amalfi; we will instead arrange a visit to Sorrento old town that day, Positano and Amalfi cannot be visited, and the boat-cruise fee will be refunded to guests.
faqs.answer_zh: 如遇海上极端天气，出于游客安全考虑，游船公司取消出海游览波西塔诺和阿马尔菲的活动，我社将安排当天参观索伦托老城，无法参观波西塔诺和阿马尔菲，出海游船费用将退还给游客。

faqs.question_en: Do I need a visa?
faqs.question_zh: 是否需要签证？
faqs.answer_en: This product does not include visa fees. It requires a Schengen visa (single or multiple entry); if you need to apply, please choose a Schengen-visa product. After booking, we provide all the materials needed to apply for the Schengen visa free of charge (refer to the detailed materials checklist). If you commission us to handle the Schengen visa, we will buy you Schengen travel insurance meeting visa requirements; otherwise you must arrange your own insurance and claims. Your passport must be valid for at least six months from the date of departure, or customs may refuse entry. Visa fees, visa-service fees, Schengen-insurance fees and visa-centre appointment fees are all non-refundable and non-transferable, even if the product is changed or cancelled. "Visa-guarantee" assurance: if you sign with us at least 61 days before departure and have not obtained the visa within 45 days before departure, we bear all losses and immediately refund your full travel cost; guests who do not meet this clause and fail to obtain the visa will be refunded per the change-and-cancellation terms. In case of refusal, notify us within 48 hours with the consulate's refusal letter; any supplementary or amended materials must be submitted within five days, and you may not unilaterally waive the right of "visa appeal".
faqs.answer_zh: 本产品不包含签证费用，需要申根签证（单次或多次入境）；如需办理签证请选择申根签证产品。预订后免费提供办理申根签证的全部材料（参考详细材料清单）。如委托我社办理申根签证，我社将为您购买符合申根签证要求的申根旅游保险；若未委托办理，需自行购买旅游保险及负责理赔手续。护照有效期需在离境之日起至少还有六个月，否则海关有权拒绝入境。签证费、签证服务费、申根保险费、签证中心预约费均不可退款，也无法更改使用者，即使产品退改签，签证费用亦无法退款。保签无忧：游客在出发日前61天与我社签约的旅游产品，如在出发前45天内未获取签证，我社承担所有损失，立即退还全部旅游费用；不符合该条款的游客如未正常获取签证，将按"退改与取消条款"退费。如遇拒签需在48小时内通知我社并出具使领馆拒签函，如需补充或更改材料需在五天内提交，并且不得单方面放弃"签证抗辩"权利。

faqs.question_en: Booking, changes & cancellation
faqs.question_zh: 预订、变更与取消须知
faqs.answer_en: Free no-reason cancellation: both travel agency and traveller may apply for no-reason cancellation more than 30 days (excluding the 30th day) before departure; within that window, refunds follow the Change & Cancellation Terms. Group / departure size: this is a shared (join-in) group product; the announced group size is 10 people — if 10 are not reached more than 30 days before departure, either party may cancel without liability. For 8 people or fewer the tour becomes a small group with a business van and a Chinese-speaking driver-guide. It is a circulating, rolling-departure product, so other guests may join and leave at different points and cities, with different start/end cities and prices — start and end your trip according to your own booking. Arrival/departure timing: arrive at the meeting point one day before the tour starts and leave the dispersal point one day after it ends, allowing reasonable flight-connection time (at least 5 hours for transfers at the same airport, 7 hours for different airports in the same city; reasonable meet/disperse window 07:00-21:00); losses from not doing so are borne by the traveller. Room types: two guests booking together default to a standard twin/double (bed type assigned by the hotel, not selectable); solo bookings include a single-room supplement deposit, refunded proportionally if room-sharing succeeds; triple/family rooms default to two parents plus one minor with hotel-assigned bedding. European hotels are non-smoking, no cooking in rooms, no free toiletries or boiling water, check-in 14:00 and check-out 11:00, and air-conditioning is not a standard facility. Itinerary contingencies: Pompeii may be capacity-limited in peak season (if changed to FIT tickets, the 6-euro docent fee per person is refunded; if entry is impossible, ticket plus docent fee are refunded and it becomes an exterior visit); if bad weather or a rail strike blocks the Cinque Terre, the coastal towns are toured by coach or other means; the Capri Blue Grotto may be closed by tides/waves/weather (fee not included, 2-5 euro boatman tip customary); in extreme sea conditions the Positano-Amalfi cruise is cancelled, replaced by a Sorrento old-town coach visit with the cruise fee refunded. Pricing: all prices are quoted in euro at booking; if you pay in CNY, the amount is the real-time CNY value auto-calculated from the Bank of China "euro sell" rate on the day of payment (refunds likewise use that day's rate; exchange differences and bank fees are borne by the traveller). Pay promptly after booking to avoid exchange-rate rises, and await second confirmation within 48 hours (otherwise auto-refunded).
faqs.answer_zh: 免费取消：出发前30天（不含第30天）旅行社和旅行者均有权申请无理由取消；该期限内的退费按《更改与取消条例条款》执行。成团/团型：本产品为散客拼团，成团人数为10人，出发前30天（不含第30天）未达成团人数双方均可解约且不承担违约责任；8人及以下自动改为小团，安排商务旅行车+中文司机兼导游。本产品为循环套发团，集合与结束途中会有其他游客在不同地点、不同城市上下团，起止城市与价格不同，请按自己报名的目的地起止行程。抵离时间：请在参团日前一天抵达集合地，离团日后一天离开集散地，并预留合理的航班衔接时间（同机场转机至少5小时、同城不同机场至少7小时，合理集散时段07:00-21:00），未遵守所致损失由旅行者自行承担。房型：两人同时报名默认标准双人间（床型由酒店安排不可选）；单人报名默认含单人房差押金，拼房成功按比例退款；三人/家庭间默认两位父母与一位未成年子女入住，床型由酒店安排。欧洲酒店全面禁烟、禁止房内做饭，不提供一次性洗漱用品和免费开水，入住14:00、退房11:00，且空调并非标准设施。行程应急：庞贝古城旺季可能限流（改散拼门票退每位6欧讲解费，无法入内则退门票+讲解费并改为外观游览）；如恶劣天气或铁路罢工无法游览五渔村，改乘大巴等方式游览海岸线城市；卡普里蓝洞可能因涨潮、风浪等关闭（费用不含，船工小费2-5欧）；海上极端天气取消波西塔诺、阿马尔菲出海，改大巴游览索伦托老城并退还出海费用。价格：所有定价以欧元为预订计价单位，如选择人民币支付，则以当天支付时本网站依据中国银行实时"欧元卖出价"自动计算的人民币实时价格为准（退款同样适用申请当日汇率，汇率差异及银行手续费由旅行者承担）。预订后请及时支付以避免汇率上涨，并等待48小时内二次确认（超时未确认则默认自动退款）。

faqs.question_en: Health & safety requirements
faqs.question_zh: 健康与安全须知
faqs.answer_en: To ensure a smooth trip and prevent personal-injury accidents, please have a health check before departure. Please do NOT sign up if you have: infectious diseases (e.g. active tuberculosis, typhoid); cardiovascular disease (severe hypertension, cardiac insufficiency, myocardial ischemia, myocardial infarction); cerebrovascular disease (cerebral embolism, cerebral haemorrhage, brain tumour); respiratory disease (emphysema, cor pulmonale); psychiatric conditions including epilepsy; severe anaemia (haemoglobin below 50 g/L); or recovery from major/medium surgery. Pregnancy: at 35 weeks or more you cannot join under any circumstances; at 28 weeks or more you must provide a doctor's check report from within 7 days plus the attending physician's consent; under 28 weeks please book with caution, sign a liability waiver, and you cannot join any adventure, skiing, sea-going, high-altitude or outdoor activities. People with disabilities need a doctor's report from within 7 days plus the attending physician's consent, must be accompanied by an immediate family member, and must apply at least 61 days in advance for reserved space and facilities. Elderly travellers over 70 need a health certificate and medical report and immediate-family accompaniment (otherwise sign a liability waiver); the trip is long and physically demanding, so those with limited stamina should book carefully, and the attending physician's consent is needed for any adventure/skiing/sea/high-altitude/outdoor activities, with adaptive-service requests made at least 61 days ahead. Minors under 18 must be accompanied by an immediate relative or guardian; some sights have special rules for under-18/12/6; infants under 30 kg need a confirmed child safety seat (otherwise bring an EU-compliant one); unaccompanied minors under 18 need parental authorization (or the absent parent's written authorization). Infants under 2 years old are not accepted. Per Article 15 of the Tourism Law, travellers must truthfully declare health information relevant to the trip (including pregnancy, lactation, chronic disease, infectious-disease history, suspected symptoms or recent travel to epidemic areas) and follow safety warnings; concealment that causes injury, property loss or transmission risk means the traveller bears the consequences, including medical, isolation and compensation costs, and the agency may terminate the contract without refund.
faqs.answer_zh: 为确保顺利出行、防止旅途中发生人身意外伤害，请出行前做一次必要的身体检查。如存在下列情况请勿报名：传染性疾病患者（如活动期肺结核、伤寒等）；心血管疾病患者（严重高血压、心功能不全、心肌缺氧、心肌梗塞等）；脑血管疾病患者（脑栓塞、脑出血、脑肿瘤等）；呼吸系统疾病患者（肺气肿、肺心病等）；精神病患者（含癫痫及各种精神病）；严重贫血患者（血红蛋白低于50克/升）；大中型手术恢复期病患者。孕妇：妊娠35周及以上任何情况下都无法参团；28周及以上需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书；28周以下请慎重报名，需签署旅行社免责声明书，且行程内探险、滑雪、出海、高空、户外等项目均无法参加。残疾人需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书、需直系家属陪同，并需提前至少61天申请预留位置及专用设施。70周岁以上老年人需提供健康证明、体检报告并由直系家属陪同（否则需签署免责声明书）；本行程较长、对体力要求较高，体力不支者请慎重报名，涉及探险/滑雪/出海/高空/户外项目需持主治医师同意书，并需提前至少61天申请适老化服务及设施。未成年人（未满18周岁）须由直系亲属或监护人陪同，部分景点对未满18/12/6周岁有特殊限定；6岁以下婴儿或30公斤以下儿童需提前确认安全座椅（否则需自备符合欧盟制式的座椅）；无父母陪同的未成年人须持父母授权书。本产品不接受2周岁以下婴儿参团。根据《旅游法》第15条，旅游者需如实告知与旅游活动相关的个人健康信息（包括妊娠期、哺乳期、慢性病、传染病史、疑似症状或近期疫区旅居史）并遵守安全警示规定；若因隐瞒导致人身损害、财产损失或传播风险，旅游者需自行承担医疗、隔离费用及赔偿责任，旅行社可解除合同且不退还费用。

title_en: Italy Panorama 9-Day Group Tour: Milan to Rome & the Amalfi Coast
title_zh: 意大利全景9天跟团游：米兰至罗马及阿马尔菲海岸
short_en: A 9-day one-way journey from Milan to Rome through Venice, Florence, Cinque Terre, Tuscany, Capri and the Amalfi Coast.
short_zh: 9天单程深度游，从米兰一路畅游威尼斯、佛罗伦萨、五渔村、托斯卡纳、卡普里岛与阿马尔菲海岸，终至罗马。
desc_en: This 9-day deep-dive tour traces Italy from north to south, one city a day, on a single one-way route that keeps coach time low and sightseeing high. Glide through romantic Venice, soak up the Renaissance soul of Florence, ride the scenic train along Cinque Terre, wander medieval Siena and the Val d'Orcia, and lose yourself in the eternal city of Rome. The journey ends in the south with the island of Capri's Blue Grotto, the cliffside villages of the Amalfi Coast, and the buried ancient city of Pompeii. With city-centre 4-star hotels, included attractions and ferries, and a Chinese-speaking guide-driver, it is an all-inclusive panorama of Italy.
desc_zh: 这条9天深度线路自北向南纵贯意大利，每天一座城市，全程单程不走回头路，大幅降低大巴行车里程、提升游览效率。漫游碧波上的浪漫水城威尼斯，感受文艺复兴发源地佛罗伦萨的艺术之魂，乘景观列车饱览悬崖渔村五渔村，探访中世纪古城锡耶纳与世界遗产奥尔恰山谷，再深度探访永恒之城罗马。行程南端深入卡普里岛蓝洞、阿马尔菲海岸的悬崖小镇，以及沉睡千年的庞贝古城。精选市中心四星酒店、含景点门票与出海轮渡、配中文司机兼导游，是一次税费全含的意大利全景之旅。

highlights.en: Romantic Venice: St Mark's Square, St Mark's Basilica and the Bridge of Sighs on the water city
highlights.zh: 浪漫水城威尼斯：圣马可广场、圣马可大教堂与叹息桥

highlights.en: Florence, cradle of the Renaissance: the Duomo (Santa Maria del Fiore), Piazza della Signoria and the Ponte Vecchio
highlights.zh: 文艺复兴发源地佛罗伦萨：圣母百花大教堂、市政广场与老桥

highlights.en: Scenic train ride through Cinque Terre's clifftop fishing villages, plus the Leaning Tower of Pisa
highlights.zh: 乘景观列车畅游五渔村悬崖渔村，并游览比萨斜塔

highlights.en: Medieval Siena, the hilltop town of Pienza and World Heritage views over the Val d'Orcia
highlights.zh: 中世纪古城锡耶纳、山顶小城皮恩扎与世界遗产奥尔恰山谷美景

highlights.en: Eternal Rome on foot: the Colosseum, Pantheon, Spanish Steps and Trevi Fountain
highlights.zh: 徒步深度游永恒之城罗马：斗兽场、万神殿、西班牙广场与特莱维喷泉

highlights.en: Capri island and the legendary Blue Grotto, with a boat cruise of the Amalfi Coast and Positano
highlights.zh: 卡普里岛与传奇蓝洞，出海环游阿马尔菲海岸与波西塔诺

highlights.en: The buried ancient city of Pompeii and the old town of Naples
highlights.zh: 沉睡千年的庞贝古城与那不勒斯老城

highlights.en: Brand promise: one-way deep route, city-centre 4-star hotels, included attractions & ferries, all taxes included, no forced shopping
highlights.zh: 品牌承诺：单程深度线路、市中心四星酒店、含景点门票与出海轮渡、税费全含、绝无强制购物

includes.en: Hotels: 8 nights in 4-star hotels.
includes.zh: 【酒店】：四星级酒店8晚。

includes.en: Meals: 8 meals total, breakfast at the hotel or in another form.
includes.zh: 【餐饮】：酒店内早餐或其他形式餐饮共计8餐。

includes.en: Taxes & fees: all taxes within the itinerary, including city tax, town-entry fees, residence tax, road/bridge tolls, island-landing fees, etc.
includes.zh: 【税费】：游客城市税、进城费、居住税、路桥费、登岛费等行程内的所有税费。

includes.en: Transport: tourist coach or business travel van.
includes.zh: 【交通】：旅游巴士或者商务旅行车。

includes.en: Guide: professional driver plus Chinese-speaking guide, or a Chinese-speaking driver-guide throughout (note: for groups of 8 or fewer, a business van with a Chinese-speaking driver-guide is arranged to lead the whole city itinerary).
includes.zh: 【导游】：职业司机+中文导游或者全程中文司机兼导游（备注：8人及以下则安排为商务旅行车+中文司机兼导游，届时将有司兼导带领游览全部城市行程）。

includes.en: Baggage: one 23 kg checked bag and one carry-on bag.
includes.zh: 【行李】：1件23公斤行李及1件随身行李。

includes.en: Activities & tickets: Cinque Terre scenic train, Venice island ferry, Sorrento-Amalfi sea cruise, round-trip ferry to Capri, and Pompeii admission (including the national-pavilion docent/guide).
includes.zh: 【活动及门票】：五渔村景观列车、威尼斯登岛轮渡、索伦托阿马尔菲出海环游、卡普里岛往返渡船、庞贝古城门票（含国家馆讲解师）。

excludes.en: Passport: personal passport fees.
excludes.zh: 护照：个人护照费用。

excludes.en: Visa: the tourist visa fees required for the destination countries on the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 签证：行程中所列旅游国家所需的观光签证费用。

excludes.en: Insurance: travel insurance fees (if the itinerary involves high-risk sports, please verify whether your travel insurance covers them).
excludes.zh: 保险：旅游保险费用（如行程内涉及到高风险运动，请核实旅游保险是否包含该项运动）。

excludes.en: Tips: guide and driver tips totaling 10 euros per person per day, same price for adults and children.
excludes.zh: 小费：游客支付导游和司机小费一共10欧/人/天，大小同价。

excludes.en: Meals: apart from the specialty meals included in the itinerary, lunches and dinners are not included.
excludes.zh: 餐饮：除行程内包含的特色餐外，行程中不包含午、晚正餐费用。

excludes.en: Admissions: attractions not noted as fee-included (including but not limited to sights marked "exterior", and all "recommended", "optional", "experience" items not stated as included); if you wish to enter, please pay on your own.
excludes.zh: 门票：行程中未注明费用包含的景点（包括但不仅限于行程中注明“外观”的景点，以及“推荐”“可选”“体验”等所有未提及费用包含的项目，如游客需要参观，敬请自理）。

excludes.en: Extended stays: any accommodation, transport or sightseeing beyond the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 延长住宿：行程外额外延长的住宿、交通、观光费用。

excludes.en: Personal spending: drinks/alcohol, taxis, phone charges and other personal expenses.
excludes.zh: 私人消费：如饮料酒类、出租车、电话费等个人消费。

excludes.en: Other transport: transport not mentioned in the inclusions beyond the business van or minibus — e.g. the Venice gondola, and tourist trains, electric taxis, etc. in vehicle-restricted zones — at your own expense.
excludes.zh: 其他交通：除包含商务旅行车或者中巴之外，费用包含中未提及的其他交通费用，如威尼斯贡多拉，以及车辆限行区的观光火车、电瓶出租车等费用敬请自理。

excludes.en: Free activities: guests' own nighttime sightseeing and the itinerary's recommended items, plus any resulting transport, meals, admissions, shopping, etc.
excludes.zh: 自由活动：游客夜间自行游览及行程中的推荐项目，以及产生的交通、餐饮、门票、购物等费用。

excludes.en: Experience activities: any travel experience activities not included in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 体验活动：行程中没有包含的各项旅游体验活动。

excludes.en: Other costs: any costs not mentioned in the inclusions. Where extra costs arise from force majeure such as natural disasters, war or strikes, or from traffic delays, flight cancellations/rescheduling, embassy visa delays, insufficient group numbers, or other circumstances not attributable to our company (e.g. overseas visa-extension fees, accommodation, food and transport, national airline fare adjustments), our company reserves the right to charge the difference.
excludes.zh: 其他费用：费用包含中未提及的费用。如因天灾、战争、罢工等不可抗力的原因，及因交通延阻、航班取消或更改时间、使馆延误出签证、人数不足等特殊情况或其他非我公司原因所引致的额外费用（如在外延期签证费、住、食及交通费、国家航空运价调整等），我公司有权追加差价。

timeline.title_en: Milan (full free day) — Milan Cathedral (exterior) & Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II
timeline.title_zh: 米兰（全天自由活动）——米兰大教堂（外观）与埃马努埃莱二世拱廊
timeline.description_en: The whole day in Milan is free, so you can arrange your own sightseeing. We suggest visiting on your own Milan's landmark, the Milan Cathedral (Duomo, exterior) — begun in 1386, this Gothic masterpiece took over 500 years to complete, with hundreds of marble spires soaring into the sky and thousands of carved statues across its white marble facade. Then stroll through the Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II, one of Europe's most beautiful shopping arcades, lined with the famous Prada boutique, upscale restaurants, cafes and shops whose window displays change daily. Later you will meet your guide in central Milan and transfer to the hotel for check-in. Overnight: Royal Garden Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel, set in lush gardens with fountains, palm and olive trees, walking distance to a large shopping center.
timeline.description_zh: 米兰全天自由活动，可自行安排各项游览。建议自行参观米兰的标志性建筑米兰大教堂（外观）——始建于1386年，这座哥特式杰作历经500多年才建成，数以百计的尖塔耸入云霄，白色大理石外墙上雕刻着数千座雕像。随后漫步欧洲漂亮的商业拱廊之一埃马努埃莱二世拱廊，廊下汇集了著名的Prada精品店以及众多高级餐馆、咖啡厅和商店，橱窗布置天天更新。之后与导游在米兰市区集合，前往酒店入住。夜宿：皇家花园酒店或同等4星级酒店，酒店坐落在郁郁葱葱的花园中，园内有喷泉、棕榈树和橄榄树，可步行至附近的大型商业中心。

timeline.title_en: Milan to Venice — St Mark's Basilica (exterior), St Mark's Square, Bridge of Sighs (exterior) & Doge's Palace (exterior)
timeline.title_zh: 米兰—威尼斯——圣马可大教堂（外观）、圣马可广场、叹息桥（外观）与总督宫（外观）
timeline.description_en: In the morning we depart for the water city of Venice. On arrival you will visit St Mark's Basilica (exterior), built from 829 AD and rebuilt in 1043-1071, once one of the largest churches in medieval Europe and a treasury of art; St Mark's Square, the city's central square that Napoleon called "the most beautiful drawing room in Europe"; the Bridge of Sighs (exterior), the early-Baroque covered bridge over which condemned prisoners once crossed from the courtroom to the dungeons; and the magnificent Doge's Palace (exterior). These beautiful buildings rising from the water, together with the winding canals, give Venice its lingering romance. Here you can also taste Venice's signature three-course cuttlefish-ink pasta meal (at your own expense). Overnight: Voco Venice (InterContinental) or Hilton Ambassador, or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午出发前往水城威尼斯。抵达后参观圣马可大教堂（外观）——始建于公元829年、重建于1043至1071年，曾是中世纪欧洲大的教堂之一，也是收藏丰富艺术品的宝库；圣马可广场——威尼斯的中心广场，曾被拿破仑称作“欧洲美丽的客厅”；叹息桥（外观）——早期巴洛克式的封闭廊桥，古代死囚由法院押往监狱的必经之路；以及华丽的总督宫（外观）。这些建在水上的美丽建筑与蜿蜒水巷一起，让威尼斯的浪漫风情久久挥之不去。在这里您还可以品尝威尼斯特色大餐墨鱼面三道式（自理）。夜宿：威尼斯洲际VOCO酒店或希尔顿大使酒店，或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Venice to Florence — Florence Cathedral (Santa Maria del Fiore), Piazza della Signoria, Ponte Vecchio & Piazza Santa Croce (Basilica exterior)
timeline.title_zh: 威尼斯—佛罗伦萨——圣母百花大教堂、市政广场、老桥与圣十字广场（圣十字教堂外观）
timeline.description_en: In the morning we set off for Florence, the birthplace of the Renaissance, to tour the old town's highlights. You will see the Florence Cathedral (Santa Maria del Fiore, the world's third-largest church; entry requires queueing) — clad in white, red and green granite, built over 175 years from 1296; Piazza della Signoria, the open-air sculpture gallery and centuries-old political heart of the city, with the Palazzo Vecchio, a replica of Michelangelo's David and the Neptune Fountain; the Ponte Vecchio (Old Bridge) over the Arno, built in 1345 and one of Europe's earliest large arch bridges, where Dante is said to have met Beatrice; and Piazza Santa Croce with the Basilica of Santa Croce (exterior), the Gothic church where Michelangelo and Galileo rest. Overnight: Hilton Florence Metropole or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午出发前往文艺复兴的发源地佛罗伦萨，参观老城景点：世界第三大教堂——圣母百花大教堂（需排队进入），以白、红、绿三色花岗岩贴面，自1296年起历时175年建成；市政广场——享有露天雕塑博物馆美誉、数个世纪以来的政治中心，广场上有维琪奥宫（旧宫）、米开朗基罗《大卫》雕塑复制品和海神喷泉；维奇奥桥（老桥）——位于阿诺河上、建于1345年的欧洲较早大跨度圆弧拱桥，相传但丁曾在此邂逅少女比阿特丽切；以及圣十字广场和圣十字教堂（外观）——这座哥特式教堂是米开朗基罗与伽利略的安息地。之后入住酒店。夜宿：佛罗伦萨希尔顿大都会酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Florence to Cinque Terre to Pisa to Siena — scenic train through the Cinque Terre, Leaning Tower of Pisa (exterior) & Piazza dei Miracoli
timeline.title_zh: 佛罗伦萨—五渔村—比萨—锡耶纳——景观列车游览五渔村、比萨斜塔（外观）与奇迹广场
timeline.description_en: In the morning we head to the Cinque Terre to visit the beautiful clifftop fishing villages along the Ligurian coast. The five villages — Monterosso al Mare, Vernazza, Corniglia, Manarola and Riomaggiore — are strung together by the famous coastal hiking trail (a UNESCO World Heritage Site since 1997), with the Mediterranean on one side and mountains on the other. In the afternoon we continue to Pisa to see the Leaning Tower (exterior) — the free-standing bell tower where Galileo is said to have performed his free-fall experiment in 1590 — and the walled Piazza dei Miracoli (Square of Miracles), which holds the cathedral, baptistery, leaning tower and cemetery. Then on to Siena. Note: if bad weather or a railway strike makes the Cinque Terre inaccessible, the program automatically changes to touring the coastal towns by coach or other means. Overnight: Four Points by Sheraton Siena or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午出发前往五渔村，沿利古里亚海岸线游览悬崖上的美丽渔村。五渔村是蒙特罗索、韦尔纳扎、科尔尼利亚、马纳罗拉及里奥马焦雷五个悬崖边村镇的统称，串联五村的徒步线路是世界上美丽的徒步路线之一，一边是地中海、另一边是山脉，1997年被联合国教科文组织列入世界文化遗产名录。下午前往比萨，游览比萨斜塔（外观）——相传公元1590年伽利略曾在此做自由落体实验——和比萨历史文化中心的奇迹广场（Piazza dei Miracoli），广场上有大教堂、洗礼堂、斜塔（钟楼）和墓园四大建筑。之后前往锡耶纳入住酒店。备注：如遇恶劣天气或铁路公司罢工等因素导致无法游览五渔村，行程将自动更改为乘坐大巴车或其它形式游览海岸线城市。夜宿：锡耶纳福朋喜来登酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Siena to Pienza to Rome — Siena Cathedral (exterior), Piazza del Campo, Palazzo Pubblico & Torre del Mangia (exterior), Pienza & the cypress lane of Val d'Orcia
timeline.title_zh: 锡耶纳—皮恩扎—罗马——锡耶纳大教堂（外观）、田野广场、锡耶纳市政厅与曼吉亚塔楼（外观）、皮恩扎与奥尔恰谷丝柏小径
timeline.description_en: After breakfast we drive to the medieval old town of Siena to see the Siena Cathedral (exterior), the shell-shaped Piazza del Campo (one of Europe's largest surviving medieval squares), the Palazzo Pubblico (town hall, exterior) and the Torre del Mangia (exterior) — Siena's tallest building and the second-tallest tower in Italy at 102 m. After lunch we visit the old town of Pienza, birthplace of Pope Pius II and a model "ideal city" rebuilt from 1459, touring Piazza Pio II and Pienza Cathedral (exterior), where you can look out over the World Heritage Val d'Orcia from the town walls. We then head to Rome, stopping for free photos along the famous cypress lane — the winding country road lined with Italian cypresses that has become a symbol of the Tuscan landscape. Overnight: Sheraton Roma (Medici) or Hotel Mantegna, or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后出发前往锡耶纳古城，游览锡耶纳大教堂（外观）、田野广场（因形似贝壳也叫贝壳广场，是欧洲现存至大的中世纪广场之一）、锡耶纳市政厅（外观）和曼吉亚塔楼（外观）——它是锡耶纳至高的建筑、意大利第二高的塔楼，垂直高度达102米。午餐后前往皮恩扎古城，参观二世广场和皮恩扎大教堂（外观）；皮恩扎是教皇皮乌斯二世的出生地，1459年起重建被视为“理想城市”的典范，可从城墙上俯瞰世界遗产奥尔恰山谷的景致。之后前往罗马，途中在丝柏树小径自由拍照——两旁种满意大利柏树的乡村道路是托斯卡纳田园风光的象征之一。抵达罗马后入住酒店。夜宿：罗马梅第奇喜来登酒店或曼特尼亚酒店，或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Rome — Colosseum (exterior), Pantheon (exterior), Spanish Steps & Trevi Fountain (exterior)
timeline.title_zh: 罗马——斗兽场（外观）、万神殿（外观）、西班牙广场与特莱维喷泉（外观）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast your guide leads a walking tour of Rome, the "Eternal City" and birthplace of the Roman Empire. You will see the Colosseum (exterior), the grand ancient amphitheatre built to host gladiatorial and beast contests and one of Rome's most famous monuments; the Pantheon (exterior), the best-preserved ancient Roman building, over 2,000 years old, where Raphael and Italian kings rest; the Spanish Steps, made famous by the film Roman Holiday — 138 steps, the widest staircase in Europe; and the Trevi Fountain (exterior), the "wishing fountain" depicting the sea god Neptune, where it is said that if you toss a coin over your shoulder into the water your dream will come true. There is then free time, and around 16:30 we transfer to the hotel. Note: because of building conservation in the ancient city, vehicles are banned and most areas are pedestrian streets, so Rome is toured on foot — about 5-6 km of walking. Overnight: Sheraton Roma (Medici) or Hotel Mantegna, or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后在导游带领下徒步游览世界著名历史文化名城罗马，这里是古罗马帝国的发祥地，被称为“永恒之城”。参观古都遗址上矗立着的斗兽场（外观）——古罗马专供观看斗兽或角斗的场所、罗马较著名的历史遗迹；万神殿（外观）——古罗马保存完好的建筑，距今已有2000多年历史，拉斐尔及意大利国王长眠于此；游览西班牙广场——因电影《罗马假日》而闻名，西班牙台阶共138级，是欧洲最宽的台阶；以及特莱维喷泉（许愿池）（外观）——以海神尼普顿为题材，相传背对喷泉从肩上投出一枚硬币若能投进水中便可梦想成真。之后自由活动，16点30左右前往酒店。备注：由于罗马古城建筑保护，禁止车辆行驶，大多数区域为步行街区，当天徒步参观罗马，步行行程约为5-6公里。夜宿：罗马梅第奇喜来登酒店或曼特尼亚酒店，或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Rome to Naples/Sorrento to Capri to Sorrento — island of Capri & the Blue Grotto, Gardens of Augustus
timeline.title_zh: 罗马—那不勒斯/索伦托—卡普里岛—索伦托——地中海天堂岛卡普里环岛探秘蓝洞、奥古斯都花园
timeline.description_en: After breakfast we travel to Naples/Sorrento and take a ferry to the port of Capri. During the day you may, on your own, stroll along the shore and visit the Blue Grotto, take a boat around the island to explore the Blue Grotto, or go up into Capri town to visit the Gardens of Augustus overlooking the whole bay; then return by ferry to Sorrento and check in to the hotel. Capri has been a famous resort since ancient Roman times — Emperor Augustus so loved it that he traded four times Ischia's worth for the island as his summer retreat. The Blue Grotto, hailed as one of the world's seven wonders, has a tiny cave mouth reachable only by small boat, where light entering and reflecting off the seabed turns the water and even the rocks brilliant blue. Note: activities on Capri are free time with no transport included; the recommended route from the main port to Capri old town to the Gardens of Augustus is about 1.3 km of mountain road past three key sights, with funicular and taxis available at extra cost. The Blue Grotto is a natural attraction and may be closed by the local marine authority due to high tide, waves or other factors; the Blue Grotto fee is not included, and besides the boatman's fee a 2-5 euro tip is customary. Overnight: a coastal hotel in Sorrento or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往那不勒斯/索伦托乘坐渡船到达卡普里岛港口。当天可自行前往海边漫步后前往蓝洞参观，或自行乘船环岛探秘蓝洞，或自行前往卡普里城中游览奥古斯都花园、俯瞰整个海湾；之后坐渡船返回索伦托码头，前往酒店入住。卡普里岛自古罗马时期起就是著名的旅游疗养胜地，奥古斯都大帝曾不惜以4倍的伊斯基亚岛换取此岛作为避暑之地。蓝洞被誉为世界七大奇景之一，洞口很小只能乘小船进入，由于洞口的特殊结构，阳光进入并从水底反射，使洞内海水一片晶蓝，连岩石也变成蓝色。备注：卡普里岛登岛后自由活动，不含任何交通费用，推荐路线为大港—卡普里古城—奥古斯都花园，单程约1.3公里山路，途经三个重要景点，沿途有缆车和出租车需额外付费。蓝洞属于自然景观，如遇涨潮、风浪或其他因素当地海洋气象机构宣布关闭，则无法入内游览；蓝洞游览费用不包含在团内，除蓝洞人力船工费用外，请按当地习俗支付2-5欧元的小费。夜宿：索伦托海岸酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Sorrento to Amalfi to Positano to Sorrento — Amalfi Coast boat day trip, Positano & Amalfi
timeline.title_zh: 索伦托—阿马尔菲—波西塔诺—索伦托——阿马尔菲出海环游，感受波西塔诺的柠檬香
timeline.description_en: After breakfast you set out on a charming boat day trip to explore the treasures of the Amalfi Coast. You sail to Positano to discover the enchanting cliffside village, then continue by boat to Amalfi to take in the panorama of the Amalfi Coast town, before sailing back and returning to the hotel.
