The Amalfi Coast is a UNESCO World Heritage Site, named by National Geographic among the 51 most beautiful places to see in a lifetime, with a winding coastline, dramatic cliffs and hidden medieval fishing towns such as Amalfi, Positano, Ravello and Maiori. Note: if extreme weather at sea occurs, for guest safety the boat company will cancel the sea trip to Positano and Amalfi; we will then arrange a coach visit to Sorrento old town that day, Positano and Amalfi cannot be visited, and the boat fee will be refunded to guests. Overnight: a coastal hotel in Sorrento or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后踏上迷人的游船一日游，探索阿马尔菲海岸的宝藏。乘船前往波西塔诺，探索迷人的悬崖村庄，然后乘船前往阿马尔菲，欣赏阿马尔菲海岸小镇全景，之后乘船返回入住酒店。阿马尔菲海岸是世界文化遗产，被美国《国家地理》杂志评为一生中必须去的51个美丽地方之一，海岸线蜿蜒、悬崖峭壁壮观，隐藏着阿马尔菲、波西塔诺、拉韦洛和马伊奥里等中世纪小镇。备注：如遇海上极端天气情况，出于游客安全考虑，游船公司取消出海游览波西塔诺和阿马尔菲活动，我社将安排当天乘坐大巴车参观索伦托老城，无法参观波西塔诺和阿马尔菲，出海游船费用将退还给游客。夜宿：索伦托海岸酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Sorrento to Pompeii to Naples to Rome — Pompeii ruins, Naples old town, Royal Palace (exterior) & Castel Nuovo (exterior), tour ends in Rome
timeline.title_zh: 索伦托—庞贝—那不勒斯—罗马——“解封”历史遗迹寻找消失的庞贝文明，行程在罗马结束
timeline.description_en: After breakfast we travel to Pompeii to explore the ruins of the ancient city and learn about the lost Pompeian civilization, buried in an instant by ash and lava when Vesuvius erupted in 79 AD and only rediscovered after more than a thousand years. You will see the Amphitheatre, built around the 1st century BC, holding nearly 20,000 people and the oldest of the Roman amphitheatres; the city itself, where plaster casts of victims reveal the disaster's tragic scenes; the Temple of Apollo and the central Forum, the former political, economic and religious heart with brick column bases, the Temple of Apollo with its 48 well-preserved Corinthian columns, and a view toward Mount Vesuvius. We then go to Naples to tour the old town — Naples is the birthplace of pizza and of the songs O Sole Mio and Torna a Surriento — including the Royal Palace of Naples (exterior), a lavish four-dynasty palace, and Castel Nuovo (exterior), also called the Angevin Castle. In the afternoon we head to Rome, where this wonderful itinerary comes to an end.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往庞贝，探索庞贝古城遗址，了解曾经的庞贝文明；公元79年维苏威火山爆发，火山灰与岩浆瞬间掩埋古城，历经一千多年后方得重见天日。参观位于古城最东端、建于约公元前1世纪、可容纳近2万人的露天剧场（古罗马圆形剧场中最古老的一个）；庞贝古城遗址（考古学家将遇难者空壳注入石膏做成铸像，向世人展示当时惨状）；以及阿波罗神庙与阿波罗神殿中心广场（公共广场，昔日庞贝的政治、经济、宗教中心，神殿内48根科林斯式圆柱保存完好，可眺望维苏威火山）。之后前往那不勒斯游览那不勒斯老城——这里是披萨的起源地，也是歌曲《我的太阳》《重归苏莲托》的诞生地——参观那不勒斯皇宫（外观，历经四个朝代、内部十分奢华）和新堡（外观，又名安茹城堡）。下午前往罗马，之后在罗马结束美好行程。

meeting_en: Milan city centre — meet the guide in central Milan on Day 1 before hotel check-in. The tour ends in Rome.
meeting_zh: 米兰市区——第1天在米兰市区与导游集合后入住酒店。行程于罗马结束。

faqs.question_en: Where and when do we meet and disperse?
faqs.question_zh: 集合及集散地点和方法？
faqs.answer_en: Meet on Day 1 between 18:00-19:00 in central Milan; disperse on Day 9 around 19:00 at Roma Tiburtina railway station (reference times and places — the actual departure time is per the final departure notice). You may join the group in Milan on the day of departure, but you will then be unable to see Milan's city sights and no fee is refundable. We do not recommend booking a flight out of Rome on the evening of the last day.
faqs.answer_zh: 行程第1天18:00-19:00在米兰市区集合；行程第9天19:00左右在Roma Tiburtina火车站解散（参考时间及地点，实际出发时间以出团通知书为准）。本产品参团当天可在米兰上团，但米兰市区景点会无法游览，并无费用可退！不推荐预订当天晚上的航班离开罗马。

faqs.question_en: Will the coach travel time on the route be very long?
faqs.question_zh: 行程路线乘坐大巴时间会不会很久？
faqs.answer_en: This product is planned for an average of about 3-4 hours of travel time per day. Road traffic conditions are complex — congestion in city areas or other factors can increase driving time.
faqs.answer_zh: 该产品行程计划平均时间为每日3-4小时的行程时间。公路交通情况复杂，特别是市区内容易发生堵车或其它因素导致行车时间增加。

faqs.question_en: Can I choose to tour the Cinque Terre by boat?
faqs.question_zh: 我是否可以选择乘船游览五渔村？
faqs.answer_en: Because boat tours are weather-dependent, this product does not include a Cinque Terre boat ticket, but you may opt for the boat tour. However, the train ticket fee cannot be refunded or exchanged, and you would need to buy the boat ticket yourself, about 40 euros.
faqs.answer_zh: 由于乘船游览受气候影响，该产品并非包含五渔村船票，但是可以选择乘船游览，但无法退换火车票的费用，并且需要自行购买船票，约40欧元。

faqs.question_en: Can we tour central Rome by vehicle?
faqs.question_zh: 罗马市中心我们是否可以乘车游览？
faqs.answer_en: Because Rome's sights are very concentrated and all in pedestrian zones, we cannot arrange a tourist coach; central Rome's sights must be toured on foot.
faqs.answer_zh: 由于罗马各个景点非常集中，并且都是步行街区，因此我社无法安排旅游大巴，罗马市中心景点需要徒步游览。

faqs.question_en: Can we choose different menus and dishes for our dinners as we like?
faqs.question_zh: 我们的晚餐是否能根据喜好选择不同的菜单和菜品？
faqs.answer_en: The dining recommended in the itinerary is all suggested local specialty meals and is not included in the price — for example Venice's famous black cuttlefish-ink pasta or Tuscan steak. You cannot select other dishes; if a recommended dish is not your first choice, you may choose other dining on your own.
faqs.answer_zh: 行程内推荐的餐饮全部为推荐当地特色餐，费用并未包含，比如威尼斯较著名的黑墨鱼面、托斯卡纳的牛排等。无法选择其它菜式，如果菜品并非您的首选，可以自行选择其他餐饮。

faqs.question_en: I get seasick — can I still join the Sorrento island-hopping tour of the four towns?
faqs.question_zh: 我晕船是否能参加索伦托的跳岛游览四大城市？
faqs.answer_en: First, the Mediterranean is an inland sea with relatively few waves, and the vessels are fairly large, so the chance of seasickness is low. Second, on the island-hopping tour the boat is only a means of transport, not a sightseeing vessel; each leg averages 40 minutes to 1 hour, after which you land to sightsee — many included sights such as Capri, Positano and Amalfi cannot be reached by vehicle. Also, the Sorrento seaside hotel is surrounded by sea on three sides with a private beach and private pier, two restaurants of different styles and a renowned marine spa center, so if you skip the island-hopping that day you can still enjoy the Bay of Naples views and food at the hotel.
faqs.answer_zh: 首先，地中海为内海，相对风浪比较少，加之船体又比较大，因此晕船的概率比较低；其次，跳岛游览中船为交通工具，并非游览工具，平均每段行程为40分钟到1小时，随后即可登陆游览，行程中包含的许多景点如卡普里、波西塔诺、阿马尔菲等都是车辆无法到达的景点；再次，索伦托海滨酒店三面环海，拥有私人沙滩和私家码头、两个不同风格的餐厅和一间著名的海洋Spa中心，如果当天跳岛活动取消，也可以在酒店内享受那不勒斯湾的美景和美食。

faqs.question_en: What happens if extreme weather cancels the boat trip to Positano and Amalfi?
faqs.question_zh: 如遇极端天气情况，游船出海取消参观波西塔诺和阿马尔菲怎么办？
faqs.answer_en: If extreme weather at sea occurs, for guest safety the boat company will cancel the sea trip to Positano and Amalfi; we will then arrange a visit to Sorrento old town that day, Positano and Amalfi cannot be visited, and the sea-cruise fee will be refunded to guests.
faqs.answer_zh: 如遇海上极端天气情况，出于游客安全考虑，游船公司取消出海游览波西塔诺和阿马尔菲活动，我社将安排当天参观索伦托老城，无法参观波西塔诺和阿马尔菲，出海游船费用将退还给游客。

faqs.question_en: Do I need a visa?
faqs.question_zh: 是否需要签证？
faqs.answer_en: This product does not include visa fees; if you need a visa please choose a Schengen-visa product. It requires a Schengen visa (single or multiple entry). After booking we provide free of charge all the materials needed to apply for the Schengen visa, and if you commission us to handle the Schengen visa we will purchase Schengen travel insurance meeting the visa requirements (if you do not commission us, you must buy travel insurance and handle claims yourself). Your passport must be valid for at least 6 months from the date of departure, or customs may refuse entry. Visa fees, visa service fees, Schengen insurance fees and visa-center appointment fees are all non-refundable and non-transferable, even if the product is changed or cancelled. "Visa-worry-free" guarantee: if you sign your travel contract with us at least 61 days before departure and have not obtained the visa within 45 days before departure, we bear all losses and immediately refund your full travel cost; guests not meeting this clause who fail to obtain the visa are refunded per the change-and-cancellation terms. A visa refusal must be reported to us within 48 hours with the consulate's refusal letter, any supplementary/amended materials submitted within five days, and you may not unilaterally waive the right of "visa appeal".
faqs.answer_zh: 本产品不包含签证费用，如您需要办理签证请选择申根签证产品。本产品需要申根签证（单次或多次入境）。预订后免费提供办理申根签证的全部材料；如委托我社办理申根签证，我社会为您购买符合申根签证要求的申根旅游保险（若未委托我社办理，需自行购买旅游保险并自行负责理赔）。护照有效期需在离境之日起至少还有六个月有效期，否则海关有权拒绝入境。签证费、签证服务费、申根保险费、签证中心预约费均不可退款，也无法更改使用者，即使产品退改签也无法退款。保签无忧：游客在出发日前61天与我社签约，如在出发前45天内未获取签证，我社承担所有损失并立即退还全部旅游费用；不符合该条款的游客如未正常获取签证，将按“退改与取消条款”退费。如遇拒签需在48小时内通知我社并出具使领馆拒签函，如需补充或更改材料需在五天内提交，且不得单方面放弃“签证抗辩”权利。

faqs.question_en: Booking, changes & cancellation
faqs.question_zh: 预订、变更与取消须知
faqs.answer_en: Free, no-reason cancellation is available up to 30 days before departure (excluding the 30th day) by either the agency or the traveler. This is a recurring/circular departure: other guests join and leave at different points, so start/end cities and prices vary by where you booked. Because flights, traffic, ferry cancellations and strikes often shift the schedule and visit order, you must arrive at the meeting point one day before the group starts and leave one day after it ends, allowing reasonable connection time (same-airport transfers at least 5 hours, different-airport same-city transfers at least 7 hours; reasonable meet/disperse window 07:00-21:00) — losses from not doing so are borne by the traveler. Group declared formed at 10 people; if 10 is not reached by 30 days before departure (or 14 days for the minimum group size), either side may cancel and you may switch products or be refunded. Change fees follow each carrier's terms (hotel name change 6-18 euros, air name change 100-120 euros per leg, train/cruise 35-180 euros each); multi-leg/round-trip tickets must be used in order. Room types: a single traveler pays a single-room supplement (refunded pro-rata if successfully twin-shared); two travelers default to a standard twin (bed type assigned by hotel, not selectable); a triple family room is for two parents plus one minor with bed type per hotel. Listed hotels are preferred; if full, equivalent same-star hotels are substituted without separate notice. All pricing is in EUR at time of booking; if you pay in CNY, the amount is the real-time CNY figure auto-calculated from Bank of China's "euro selling price" on the day of payment (refunds likewise use the day's rate, and any exchange-rate difference or bank handling fees are borne by the traveler). Key contingencies: for groups of 8 or fewer the trip becomes a small group with a business van + driver-guide; in peak season Pompeii may cap group numbers (a 6-euro docent fee refunded if changed to individual tickets, or admission + docent fee refunded and changed to an exterior visit if entry is impossible); if bad weather/rail strike blocks the Cinque Terre it switches to a coach/coastal tour; the Capri Blue Grotto may be closed by the marine authority (fee not included, 2-5 euro boatman tip customary); and extreme sea weather may cancel the Positano/Amalfi cruise (replaced by Sorrento old town, cruise fee refunded).
faqs.answer_zh: 出发前30天（不含第30天）旅行社和旅行者均有权申请无理由取消。本产品为循环套发团，途中会有其他游客在不同地点上下团，开始和结束的城市不同、价格不同，请按自己报名的目的地开始和结束行程。由于航变、交通拥堵、渡轮取消、罢工等常导致行程时间和顺序调整，要求旅行者在参团日前一天抵达集合地、离团日后一天离开集散地并预留合理衔接时间（同机场转机至少5小时、同城不同机场至少7小时，合理集散时段07:00至21:00），未遵守由此造成的损失由旅行者自行承担。本产品成团人数为10人；若出发前30天（最低成团14天）未达成团人数，双方均可解约，可改选其他产品或退费。变更费用参照各承运方条款（酒店更名6-18欧、航空每程100-120欧、火车及游轮每张35-180欧），往返多程/联程须按顺序使用。房型：单人报名含单人房差（成功拼房按比例退还）；两人默认标准双人间（床型由酒店安排不可选）；三人家庭间默认两位父母与一位未成年儿童入住、床型由酒店安排。行程内所列酒店为优先入住，如订满则换为相同星级的相近酒店，恕不另行通知。所有定价以欧元为预订计价单位，如选择人民币支付，则以当天支付时本网站依据中国银行实时“欧元卖出价”自动计算的人民币实时价格为准（退款同样适用申请当日汇率，汇率差异或银行手续费由旅行者承担）。重要应变：报名8人及以下自动改为小团（商务旅行车+司机兼导游）；旺季庞贝可能对团队限流（改散拼门票退6欧讲解费，无法入内则退门票+讲解费改为外观游览）；如恶劣天气或铁路罢工无法游览五渔村，改为乘大巴或其它形式游览海岸线城市；卡普里蓝洞可能被海洋气象机构宣布关闭（费用不含、船工小费2-5欧）；海上极端天气可能取消波西塔诺和阿马尔菲出海（改为参观索伦托老城，出海费用退还）。

faqs.question_en: Health & safety requirements
faqs.question_zh: 健康与安全须知
faqs.answer_en: To ensure a safe trip, please have a necessary medical check before departure and do NOT book if you have any of the following: infectious diseases (e.g. active tuberculosis, typhoid); cardiovascular disease (e.g. severe hypertension, cardiac insufficiency, myocardial ischemia, myocardial infarction); cerebrovascular disease (e.g. cerebral embolism, cerebral hemorrhage, brain tumor); respiratory disease (e.g. emphysema, cor pulmonale); psychiatric conditions (e.g. epilepsy and various mental illnesses); severe anemia (hemoglobin below 50 g/L); or recovery from major/medium surgery. Pregnancy: at 35 weeks or more you cannot join under any circumstances; at 28 weeks or more you must provide a doctor's exam report within 7 days plus the attending physician's consent; under 28 weeks book with caution, sign the agency's disclaimer, and you cannot take part in adventure, skiing, sea, high-altitude or outdoor activities. Disabled travelers must provide a doctor's exam report within 7 days plus the physician's consent, be accompanied by an immediate family member, and apply at least 61 days ahead for reserved space and special facilities. Elderly: travelers over 70 need a health certificate and physical-exam report and an immediate family escort (or must sign the disclaimer); this trip is long and requires a degree of walking ability and stamina, so those not physically fit should book carefully, and adventure/ski/sea/high-altitude/outdoor items require the attending physician's consent; please apply at least 61 days ahead for age-friendly service and facilities. Minors (under 18) must be accompanied by an immediate relative or guardian; some sights have special rules for under-18, under-12 or under-6; for infants under 6 or children under 30 kg confirm a safe child seat with us in advance (otherwise provide an EU-compliant seat yourself); an unaccompanied minor needs a parental authorization letter; this product does not accept infants under 2 years old. Per Article 15 of the Tourism Law (and the 2025 revision of the Infectious Disease Prevention Law), travelers must truthfully declare health information relevant to the trip (pregnancy, lactation, chronic disease, infectious-disease history, suspected symptoms, recent travel to epidemic areas); concealment causing harm or transmission risk makes the traveler liable for their own losses and may incur civil compensation and administrative penalties, medical/quarantine costs, and the agency may terminate the contract without refund.
faqs.answer_zh: 为确保旅游顺利、防止旅途中发生意外，请在出行前做一次必要的身体检查，如存在以下情况请勿报名：传染性疾病患者（如活动期肺结核、伤寒等）；心血管疾病患者（如严重高血压、心功能不全、心肌缺氧、心肌梗塞等）；脑血管疾病患者（如脑栓塞、脑出血、脑肿瘤等）；呼吸系统疾病患者（如肺气肿、肺心病等）；精神病患者（如癫痫及各种精神病）；严重贫血患者（血红蛋白水平在50克/升以下）；大中型手术恢复期患者。孕妇：妊娠35周及以上任何情况都无法参团；妊娠28周及以上需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书；妊娠28周以下请慎重报名，需签署旅行社免责声明书，且行程内探险、滑雪、出海、高空、户外等项目均无法参加。残疾人：需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书，需直系家属陪同，并提前至少61天申请预留位置及专用配套设施。老年旅游者：70周岁以上需提供健康证明、体检报告并由直系家属陪同（否则需签署免责声明书）；本行程较长，需要一定步行能力和体力，体力不支者请慎重报名，涉及探险、滑雪、出海、高空、户外等项目需持主治医师同意书；需提前至少61天申请适老化服务及专属设施。未成年人（未满18周岁）须由直系亲属或监护人陪同；部分景点对未满18/12/6周岁有特殊限定；如有6岁以下婴儿或30公斤以下儿童请提前确认安全座椅（未确认需自行携带符合欧盟标准的座椅）；无父母陪同的未成年人须持父母授权书；本产品不接受2周岁以下婴儿参团。根据《旅游法》第15条及《传染病防治法（2025修订）》，旅游者需如实告知与旅游活动相关的个人健康信息（包括妊娠期、哺乳期、慢性病、传染病史、疑似症状或近期疫区旅居史），若因隐瞒导致人身损害或传播风险，需自行承担责任，可能面临民事赔偿及行政处罚、医疗隔离费用，旅行社可解除合同且不退还费用。

title_en: Grand Italy South & Sicily: 12-Day Venice to Palermo Small-Group Tour
title_zh: 意大利南北两岛纵贯12天小团游：威尼斯到巴勒莫
short_en: A 12-day one-way deep dive across Italy from romantic Venice to Sicily's Palermo, with Tuscany 5-star stays, the Amalfi Coast, Pompeii and Mount Etna.
short_zh: 12天单程纵贯意大利，从浪漫水城威尼斯一路畅游至西西里巴勒莫，入住托斯卡纳五星酒店，遍览阿马尔菲海岸、庞贝古城与埃特纳火山。
desc_en: This 12-day one-way journey traces Italy from north to south and across two islands, pairing Renaissance art cities with the Mediterranean's most dramatic coastlines. Begin in romantic Venice and Tuscany, take in Florence and eternal Rome, then sweep down the Sorrento Peninsula, Amalfi Coast and Puglia's fairy-tale trulli towns. A ferry crossing brings you to Sicily for Mount Etna, Taormina, Syracuse, the Valley of the Temples and finally Palermo. With scenic-train and ferry rides, two nights in a 5-star Tuscan estate and seaside 4-star hotels, it is a slow, in-depth route that maximises sightseeing time.
desc_zh: 这条12天单程线路横跨意大利南北、纵览三海两岛，将文艺复兴艺术之都与地中海最壮丽的海岸线串联在一起。行程从浪漫的威尼斯与托斯卡纳启程，途经文艺复兴发源地佛罗伦萨与永恒之城罗马，随后南下索伦托半岛、阿马尔菲海岸与普利亚童话般的特鲁利蘑菇屋小镇。跨海渡轮带您登上西西里岛，探访埃特纳火山、陶尔米纳、锡拉库萨、神殿之谷,最终抵达巴勒莫。沿途搭乘景观列车与渡轮,入住托斯卡纳五星庄园酒店及海滨四星酒店,单程深度暢游,大幅增加游览时间。

highlights.en: Romantic Venice: St Mark's Square and Basilica, the Bridge of Sighs and winding canals
highlights.zh: 浪漫水城威尼斯：圣马可广场与大教堂、叹息桥与蜿蜒水巷

highlights.en: Two nights in a 5-star Tuscan estate SPA hotel in the wellness town of Montecatini
highlights.zh: 连住两晚托斯卡纳五星庄园SPA酒店，坐落于康养度假胜地蒙特卡蒂尼

highlights.en: Scenic train along the Cinque Terre cliffside fishing villages, plus the Leaning Tower of Pisa
highlights.zh: 搭乘景观列车饱览五渔村悬崖渔村，并游览比萨斜塔

highlights.en: Florence and eternal Rome: the Duomo, Colosseum, Pantheon and Trevi Fountain
highlights.zh: 佛罗伦萨与永恒之城罗马：圣母百花大教堂、斗兽场、万神殿与特莱维喷泉

highlights.en: Amalfi Coast cruise to cliffside Positano, plus Pompeii and the island of Capri
highlights.zh: 阿马尔菲海岸游船前往悬崖小镇波西塔诺，并探访庞贝古城与卡普里岛

highlights.en: Puglia's UNESCO trulli town of Alberobello and the cave city of Matera
highlights.zh: 普利亚世界遗产蘑菇屋小镇阿尔贝罗贝洛与千年石窟之城马泰拉

highlights.en: Sicily in depth: Mount Etna, Taormina, Syracuse and the Valley of the Temples
highlights.zh: 深度畅游西西里：埃特纳火山、陶尔米纳、锡拉库萨与神殿之谷

highlights.en: All attractions and taxes included, no forced shopping, all-inclusive one-way deep route
highlights.zh: 门票税费全含、无强制购物、单程深度线路、一价全含

includes.en: Hotels: 2 nights at 5-star hotels plus 9 nights at comfortable 4-star hotels, 11 nights' accommodation in total.
includes.zh: 【酒店】五星酒店2晚，舒适型四星级酒店9晚，共计11晚住宿。

includes.en: Meals: 11 breakfasts (hotel breakfast or another form of breakfast).
includes.zh: 【餐饮】酒店内早餐或其他形式的早餐11餐。

includes.en: Taxes and fees: tourist city tax, city-entry fees, residence tax, road and bridge tolls, island-landing fees and all other taxes and fees within the itinerary.
includes.zh: 【税费】游客城市税、进城费、居住税、路桥费、登岛费等行程内的所有税费。

includes.en: Transport: tourist coach or business travel vehicle.
includes.zh: 【交通】旅游巴士或者商务旅行车。

includes.en: Guide: professional driver + Chinese-speaking guide, or a Chinese-speaking driver-guide throughout (note: for groups of 8 or fewer, a business travel vehicle + Chinese-speaking driver-guide is arranged to lead the whole city itinerary).
includes.zh: 【导游】职业司机+中文导游或者全程中文司机兼导游（备注：8人及以下则安排为商务旅行车+中文司机兼导游，届时将有司兼导带领游览全部城市行程）。

includes.en: Luggage: 1 piece of checked luggage up to 23 kg and 1 piece of hand luggage.
includes.zh: 【行李】1件23公斤行李及1件随身行李。

includes.en: Activities and tickets: Venice island boat ticket, Cinque Terre scenic train, Colosseum, Pantheon, ancient city of Pompeii, Capri round-trip ferry, Salerno-Positano round-trip boat ticket, Castello Maniace, Taormina Greek Theatre, and the Valley of the Temples.
includes.zh: 【活动及门票】威尼斯上岛船票、五渔村景观列车、罗马斗兽场、万神殿、庞贝古城、卡普里岛往返渡轮、萨勒诺往返波西塔诺船票、马尼亚切城堡、陶尔米纳圆形剧场、神庙之谷。

excludes.en: Passport: personal passport fees.
excludes.zh: 护照：个人护照费用。

excludes.en: Visa: the tourist visa fees required for the countries listed in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 签证：行程中所列旅游国家所需的观光签证费用。

excludes.en: Insurance: travel insurance fees (if the itinerary involves high-risk sports, please verify whether your travel insurance covers that activity).
excludes.zh: 保险：旅游保险费用（如行程内涉及到高风险运动，请核实旅游保险是否包含该项运动）。

excludes.en: Tips: tips for the guide and driver totaling 10 euros per person per day, the same price for adults and children.
excludes.zh: 小费：游客支付导游和司机小费一共10欧/人/天，大小同价。

excludes.en: Meals: apart from the specialty meals included in the itinerary, lunch and dinner main meals are not included.
excludes.zh: 餐饮：除行程内包含的特色餐外，行程中不包含午、晚正餐费用。

excludes.en: Tickets: attractions whose admission is not stated as included (including but not limited to sights marked 'exterior', and all 'recommended', 'optional', 'experience' and other items not stated as included); if you wish to visit them, please pay on your own.
excludes.zh: 门票：行程中未注明费用包含的景点（包括但不仅限于行程中注明“外观”的景点，以及“推荐”“可选”“体验”等所有未提及费用包含的项目，如游客需要参观，敬请自理）。

excludes.en: Extended stay: any extra accommodation, transport and sightseeing fees added outside the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 延长住宿：行程外额外延长的住宿、交通、观光费用。

excludes.en: Personal expenses: such as drinks and alcohol, taxis, phone charges and other personal spending.
excludes.zh: 私人消费：如饮料酒类、出租车、电话费等个人消费。

excludes.en: Other transport: transport not mentioned in the inclusions beyond the included business travel vehicle or minibus, such as the Venice gondola and the sightseeing trains or electric taxis in vehicle-restricted zones, to be paid on your own.
excludes.zh: 其他交通：除包含商务旅行车或者中巴之外，费用包含中未提及的其他交通费用，如威尼斯贡多拉，以及车辆限行区的观光火车、电瓶出租车等费用敬请自理。

excludes.en: Free activities: guests' own night sightseeing and the recommended items in the itinerary, plus the transport, meals, tickets, shopping and other costs they generate.
excludes.zh: 自由活动：游客夜间自行游览及行程中的推荐项目，以及产生的交通、餐饮、门票、购物等费用。

excludes.en: Experience activities: the various travel experience activities not included in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 体验活动：行程中没有包含的各项旅游体验活动。

excludes.en: Other fees: any fees not mentioned in the inclusions. In cases of force majeure such as natural disaster, war or strike, or special situations such as transport delays, flight cancellations or schedule changes, embassy visa delays, or insufficient group numbers, or extra fees arising from causes other than our company, we reserve the right to charge a price difference.
excludes.zh: 其他费用：费用包含中未提及的费用。如因天灾、战争、罢工等不可抗力原因，及因交通延阻、航班取消或更改时间、使馆延误出签证、人数不足等特殊情况或其他非我公司原因所引致的额外费用（如在外延期签证费、住、食及交通费、国家航空运价调整等），我公司有权追加差价。

timeline.title_en: Venice - Tuscany (romantic Venice on gentle waters, overnight at a 5-star Tuscan resort)
timeline.title_zh: 威尼斯 - 托斯卡纳（温柔碧波上浪漫的威尼斯，入住托斯卡纳五星酒店）
timeline.description_en: In the morning drive out to tour the water city of Venice, viewing St. Mark's Basilica (exterior), St. Mark's Square, the Bridge of Sighs (exterior) and the magnificent Doge's Palace (exterior); these beautiful buildings raised on water, together with the winding canals, leave Venice's romance lingering long in the memory. For lunch, the local Venetian specialty of squid-ink pasta is recommended. Venice, one of the great centers of the Renaissance, is made up of 118 islands linked by 177 canals and 401 bridges, earning it the names 'city on water', 'city of a hundred isles' and 'city of bridges'. Afterwards transfer to Tuscany to check in. Overnight: Tuscan-estate SPA hotel or an equivalent 5-star hotel, located in Montecatini, Tuscany's famous wellness resort town, with a spa area of two pools (indoor and outdoor), a sauna with forest views, and a 40,000-square-meter private park.
timeline.description_zh: 上午乘车出发游览水城威尼斯，参观圣马可大教堂（外观）、圣马可广场、叹息桥（外观）以及华丽的总督宫（外观）；这些建造在水上的美丽建筑与蜿蜒的水巷一起，让威尼斯的浪漫风情久久挥之不去。午餐推荐品尝威尼斯特色餐墨鱼面。威尼斯作为文艺复兴时期的重镇之一，由118个小岛组成，并以177条水道、401座桥梁连成一体，有“水上都市”“百岛城”“桥城”之称。之后前往托斯卡纳入住酒店。夜宿：托斯卡纳庄园SPA酒店或同等5星级酒店，位于托斯卡纳著名的康养度假地蒙特卡蒂尼，水疗区设有室内、室外2个泳池，桑拿浴室享有独特森林景观，并拥有占地40,000平方米的私人公园。

timeline.title_en: Tuscany - Cinque Terre - Pisa - Tuscany (ride the scenic train and admire the Cinque Terre)
timeline.title_zh: 托斯卡纳 - 五渔村 - 比萨 - 托斯卡纳（乘坐景观列车，鉴赏五渔村美景）
timeline.description_en: In the morning travel to the Cinque Terre, following the Ligurian coastline to visit the beautiful fishing villages clinging to the cliffs. The Cinque Terre, on the coast of La Spezia province in Liguria, is the collective name for the five clifftop villages of Monterosso al Mare, Vernazza, Corniglia, Manarola and Riomaggiore, linked by a famous 15-20 km coastal walking trail (a UNESCO World Heritage Site since 1997). In the afternoon go on to Pisa to see the Leaning Tower of Pisa (exterior) and the Piazza dei Miracoli (Square of Miracles) at the heart of Pisa's historic and cultural center, where Galileo is said to have performed his free-fall experiment in 1590. Then transfer to the hotel. Overnight: Tuscan-estate SPA hotel or an equivalent 5-star hotel. Note: if bad weather or a railway strike prevents the Cinque Terre visit, the itinerary will automatically change to touring the coastal towns by coach or other means.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往游览五渔村，沿利古里亚海岸线游览悬崖上的美丽渔村。五渔村位于意大利利古里亚大区拉斯佩齐亚省海沿岸，是蒙特罗索、韦尔纳扎、科尔尼利亚、马纳罗拉及里奥马焦雷这五个悬崖边村镇的统称，串联五村的徒步线路约15-20公里，1997年被联合国教科文组织列入世界文化遗产名录。下午前往比萨，游览比萨斜塔（外观）和比萨历史文化中心的奇迹广场（Piazza dei Miracoli），相传公元1590年伽利略曾在比萨斜塔上做了自由落体实验。之后前往入住酒店。夜宿：托斯卡纳庄园SPA酒店或同等5星级酒店。备注：如遇恶劣天气或铁路公司罢工等因素导致无法游览五渔村，行程将自动更改为乘坐大巴车或其它形式游览海岸线城市。

timeline.title_en: Tuscany - Florence - Rome (land of poetry and the soul of the Renaissance, an art journey)
timeline.title_zh: 托斯卡纳 - 佛罗伦萨 - 罗马（诗歌之地，文艺复兴之魂，享受艺术之旅）
timeline.description_en: In the morning head to Florence, the birthplace of the Renaissance, to visit the world's third-largest church, the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore (the Duomo, whose white, red and green marble facade embodies Renaissance classicism); the Piazza della Signoria (an open-air sculpture museum with the Palazzo Vecchio, a copy of Michelangelo's David and the Fountain of Neptune); the Ponte Vecchio (the Old Bridge over the Arno, built in 1345); and the Piazza Santa Croce with the Basilica of Santa Croce (exterior), the Gothic church where Michelangelo and Galileo rest. In the afternoon continue to Rome to check in. Overnight: Rome riverside palace hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel, next to Villa Borghese, within walking distance of the ancient Roman city-center sights, furnished with Italian classical antique decor and offering a large buffet breakfast.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往文艺复兴的发源地佛罗伦萨，参观世界第三大教堂圣母百花大教堂（使用白、红、绿三色花岗岩贴面，将文艺复兴时代推崇的古典与优雅诠释得淋漓尽致）、市政广场（露天雕塑博物馆，坐落着维琪奥宫、米开朗基罗《大卫》复制品及海神喷泉）、老桥（建于1345年阿诺河上的维奇奥桥）以及圣十字广场和圣十字教堂（外观，米开朗基罗与伽利略安息的哥特式教堂）。下午前往罗马入住酒店。夜宿：罗马河畔宫殿酒店或同等4星级酒店，比邻波格赛公园，方便步行游览古罗马市中心各景点，酒店采用意大利古典设计并配置古董家具，每天提供大型自助早餐。

timeline.title_en: Rome - Sorrento Peninsula (relive the glory of the 'city of cities', the ancient Roman Empire)
timeline.title_zh: 罗马 - 索伦托半岛（重温“万城之城”古罗马帝国的辉煌）
timeline.description_en: Spend the morning touring the world-famous historic city of Rome, birthplace of the ancient Roman Empire and known as the 'Eternal City'. Visit the Colosseum (the grand amphitheater built to entertain returning generals and praise the empire), the Pantheon (a 2,000-year-old temple to the gods, resting place of Raphael and Italian kings, praised by Michelangelo as 'the design of angels'), the Spanish Steps (Piazza di Spagna, famous from 'Roman Holiday', with 138 steps, the widest in Europe), and the Trevi Fountain (exterior; from 2025 Rome may charge an estimated 2-euro photo fee, payable by guests if the bylaw passes). Then transfer to the Sorrento peninsula to check in. Note: because Rome's ancient center protects its buildings and bans vehicles, the day is walked on foot, about 5-6 km. Overnight: Sorrento coast hotel or Salerno Novotel, or an equivalent 4-star hotel, set above the Bay of Sorrento and Naples with its own private beach and pier.
timeline.description_zh: 上午开始游览世界著名的历史文化名城罗马，这里是古罗马帝国的发祥地，因历史悠久被称为“永恒之城”。参观古罗马都城遗址上矗立的斗兽场（古罗马为取悦凯旋将士、赞美帝国而建的角斗场，以庞大雄伟著称）、万神殿（距今2000多年，拉斐尔及意大利国王长眠于此，被米开朗基罗赞为“天使的设计”），游览西班牙广场（电影《罗马假日》取景地，西班牙台阶共138级，为欧洲最宽的台阶）和特莱维喷泉（外观，又称“许愿池”；自2025年起罗马市政厅计划收取预计2欧元的拍照费用，如法案通过则需游客自理）。之后前往索伦托半岛入住酒店。备注：由于罗马古城建筑保护、禁止车辆行驶，当天徒步参观罗马，步行行程约为5-6公里。夜宿：索伦托海岸酒店或萨勒诺诺富特酒店或同等4星级酒店，三面环绕索伦托那不勒斯海湾海景，拥有私人沙滩和私家码头。

timeline.title_en: Sorrento - Pompeii - Capri - Sorrento Peninsula (unseal ancient Pompeii, explore the Mediterranean paradise of Capri and the Blue Grotto)
timeline.title_zh: 索伦托 - 庞贝 - 卡普里岛 - 索伦托半岛（解封历史遗迹庞贝，探秘地中海天堂岛卡普里岛、蓝洞）
timeline.description_en: Early in the morning go to Pompeii to explore the ruins of the ancient city buried by the eruption of Mt. Vesuvius, including the Temple of Apollo and the central Forum (the old political, economic and religious heart, with brick column bases, 48 well-preserved Corinthian columns and a Temple of Jupiter facing Vesuvius), as well as the haunting plaster casts of victims. Then go to Sorrento, the 'lemon town' built on seaside cliffs, before taking the ferry to Capri. On the island you have free time to walk along the shore and visit the Blue Grotto, or take a boat around the island, or visit the Gardens of Augustus (exterior) overlooking the whole bay; then ferry back to Sorrento harbor and drive to the hotel. Note 1: free activity on Capri does not include any transport fees; the recommended one-way route Marina Grande - Capri old town - Gardens of Augustus is about 1.3 km of hill path, with paid funicular and taxis available. Note 2: the Blue Grotto is a natural site that may be closed at high tide, in rough seas or other conditions; its tour fee is NOT included, and beyond the boatman's fee a 2-5 euro tip is customary. Overnight: Sorrento coast hotel or Salerno Novotel, or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早晨前往庞贝，探索因维苏威火山爆发而毁于一旦的庞贝古城遗址，包括阿波罗神庙、中心广场（曾是庞贝政治、经济、宗教中心，会堂残留砖砌圆柱底座，阿波罗神殿内48根科林斯式圆柱保存完好，北侧丘比特神殿背对维苏威火山）以及触目惊心的火山灰遇难者石膏铸像。随后前往索伦托，漫步这座筑于海滨峭壁上的“柠檬小镇”；之后在索伦托坐渡船前往卡普里岛。当天可自行前往海边漫步后游览蓝洞，或自行乘船环岛探秘蓝洞，或自行前往卡普里城中游览奥古斯都花园（外观），俯瞰整个海湾；之后坐渡船抵达索伦托码头，乘车返回酒店。备注1：卡普里岛登岛后自由活动，不含任何交通费用，推荐路线为大港-卡普里古城-奥古斯都花园，单程约1.3公里山路，沿途有缆车和出租车需额外付费。备注2：蓝洞属于自然景观，如遇涨潮、风浪或其他因素被当地海洋气象机构宣布关闭则无法入内；蓝洞游览费用不包括在团内，除人力船工费外，请按当地习俗支付2-5欧元小费。夜宿：索伦托海岸酒店或萨勒诺诺富特酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Sorrento Peninsula - Positano - Salerno - Bari (a Mediterranean canvas, the scent of Positano lemons)
timeline.title_zh: 索伦托半岛 - 波西塔诺 - 萨勒诺 - 巴里（地中海风情画卷，感受波西塔诺的柠檬香）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast set off on a charming boat day-trip, sailing to Positano, the colorful clifftop town that is the most enchanting jewel of southern Italy's Amalfi Coast, where layered houses in pink, yellow and blue weave a brilliant Mediterranean picture and the air carries the scent of lemons and sea breeze. The Amalfi Coast, named one of the 50 places to see in a lifetime and a UNESCO World Heritage Site, links medieval towns such as Amalfi, Positano and Ravello. Then sail back to Salerno, a city of history and beauty with ancient churches, a Norman castle and a picturesque seafront, before driving to Bari to check in. Note: if extreme sea weather forces the boat company to cancel the Positano cruise, we will instead visit Salerno by coach (Positano not visited) and refund the cruise fee. Overnight: Mercure Bari hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel, set in an old park near 'Old Bari', the Petruzzelli Theatre and the seafront promenade, with an outdoor pool and Puglia-style restaurant.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后踏上迷人游船一日游，乘船前往波西塔诺，探索这座悬崖上的彩色小镇——意大利南部阿马尔菲海岸最迷人的海岸明珠。层叠房屋沿山而建，粉橙、明黄、湛蓝交织成绚丽的地中海画卷，空气中弥漫着柠檬与海风的清香。阿马尔菲海岸被评为一生最值得去的50个地方之一，也是联合国教科文组织世界遗产，沿岸散落着阿马尔菲、波西塔诺、拉韦洛等如诗如画的中世纪小镇。随后乘船返回萨勒诺，这是一座集历史底蕴与美景于一身的城市，拥有古老教堂、诺曼城堡和风景如画的海滨。之后前往巴里入住酒店。备注：如遇海上极端天气，出于安全考虑游船公司取消出海游览波西塔诺活动，我社将安排当天乘坐大巴车参观萨勒诺，无法参观波西塔诺，出海游船费用将退还给游客。夜宿：巴里美居酒店或同等4星级酒店，坐落于古老公园中，毗邻“老巴里”、Petruzzelli剧院与滨海长廊，配有大型室外泳池及健身中心，餐厅供应普利亚风味美食。

timeline.title_en: Bari - Polignano a Mare - Alberobello - Matera (white clifftop town and the World Heritage Trulli mushroom houses)
timeline.title_zh: 巴里 - 滨海波利尼亚诺 - 阿尔贝罗贝洛 - 马泰拉（白色悬崖小镇，世界文化遗产特鲁洛蘑菇屋）
timeline.description_en: In the morning tour Bari, the capital of Puglia, a city blending faith, history and port culture: visit the Basilica di San Nicola (exterior), an 11th-century Romanesque church revered by both Catholics and Orthodox, and stroll the stone lanes of the old town (Bari Vecchia). Then drive to Polignano a Mare, a stunning town built on cliffs facing the turquoise Adriatic, famous for the Lama Monachile cove with its stone arch bridge and sea caves, and known as Puglia's 'town of poetry'. In the afternoon enter the fairy-tale world of Alberobello to walk among the UNESCO-listed Trulli stone houses, the white-walled cone-roofed dwellings dating back to the 14th century (World Heritage since 1996); guests stay in a genuine Trullo mushroom house in the town center for a quiet night in a century-old building. Then transfer to Matera. Overnight: Matera UNA hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel, set in a 5-hectare park on the Lucanian hills with indoor and outdoor pools, a spa area and 5 restaurants.
timeline.description_zh: 上午安排于巴里市区游览这座融合信仰、历史与港口文化的城市，参观圣尼古拉大教堂（外观，11世纪罗马式教堂，是天主教与东正教共同朝圣之地），并漫步老城区（Bari Vecchia）狭窄曲折的石板街巷。随后驱车前往滨海波利尼亚诺（Polignano a Mare）——一座依悬崖而建、面对碧蓝亚得里亚海的绝美小镇，最著名的景观是拉马莫纳基莱海湾（Lama Monachile），连接石拱桥与天然岩洞，被誉为普利亚的“诗意之镇”。下午进入童话世界般的阿尔贝罗贝洛，漫步于联合国教科文组织认证的Trulli石屋村落之间，这些白墙灰顶圆锥形石屋最早可追溯至14世纪，1996年被列为世界文化遗产；您将在镇中心入住真正的Trullo蘑菇屋，体验百年建筑中的静谧夜晚。之后前往马泰拉入住酒店。夜宿：马泰拉UNA酒店或同级4星级酒店，坐落于卢卡尼亚山丘上占地5公顷的公园内，设有室内外泳池、SPA区域及5间不同风味的餐厅。

timeline.title_en: Matera - Cosenza - Messina - Catania (Matera's thousand-year cave dreamscape at twilight)
timeline.title_zh: 马泰拉 - 科森扎 - 墨西拿 - 卡塔尼亚（遇见华灯初上的马泰拉千年石窟梦境）
timeline.description_en: In the morning explore Matera, the 'city of stone' famous for its cave dwellings carved into limestone over thousands of years of human habitation. Delve into the Sassi old town (Sasso Caveoso and Sasso Barisano), one of the oldest inhabited places on Earth, winding among stone stairways, cave churches and old monasteries; the Sassi were listed as a UNESCO World Heritage Site in 1993. Then go to Cosenza in Calabria to tour its old town, a city rooted in ancient Greek times with the spectacular Norman-Swabian castle overlooking the valley. Take the San Giovanni-Messina ferry across to Sicily, enjoying Mediterranean views, and visit Messina's old town (noted for its cathedral astronomical clock and Orion Fountain). Then continue to Catania to check in. Overnight: Catania Four Points by Sheraton hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel, on the Mediterranean coast with panoramic views of Mt. Etna and the Ionian Sea, with a garden-ringed outdoor pool and Sicilian cuisine.
timeline.description_zh: 上午参观拥有数千年人类居住史的马泰拉——这座“石头之城”以其凿于石灰岩中的洞穴建筑群闻名。您将深入探索马泰拉的“Sassi”老城区（分为Sasso Caveoso和Sasso Barisano两个区域），穿梭于石砌阶梯、洞穴教堂与古修道院之间，这里是地球上最古老的居住地之一，1993年被联合国教科文组织列为世界文化遗产。随后前往意大利卡拉布里亚的科森扎，参观科森扎老城（历史根植于古希腊时代，壮观的诺曼-斯韦沃城堡俯瞰全城）。随后乘坐圣乔瓦尼-墨西拿渡轮，沿途欣赏地中海西西里美景，参观墨西拿老城（以大教堂的天文钟和猎户座喷泉著称）。之后前往卡塔尼亚入住酒店。夜宿：卡塔尼亚福朋喜来登酒店或同级4星级酒店，坐落于地中海海岸线旁，享有埃特纳火山和爱奥尼亚海的全景，户外泳池被花园环绕，餐厅供应地道西西里美食。

timeline.title_en: Catania - Taormina - Mt. Etna - Catania (Mediterranean views from the cliff edge, trekking an active volcano amid its roar)
timeline.title_zh: 卡塔尼亚 - 陶尔米纳 - 埃特纳火山 - 卡塔尼亚（悬崖之巅瞰地中海美景，轰鸣声中徒步活火山）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast head to the UNESCO Natural Heritage site of Mt. Etna (3,323 m, one of the world's most active volcanoes), where you may freely visit the surrounding volcanic landscape or take the optional cable car toward the summit. Then go to the hill town of Taormina to see Piazza IX Aprile (typical Sicilian square with black-and-white paving and views of the Ionian Sea and Etna) and the Greek Theatre (a U-shaped theater from the 3rd century BC, Sicily's second largest, host of the Taormina arts festival). Return to the hotel that evening. Note: the product does NOT include the Etna summit cable car; if volcanic ash, weather, maintenance or safety conditions prevent it, the cable car will not run and the summit cannot be reached; in summer Etna is usually toured in the morning and Taormina in the afternoon, reversed in winter. An optional Etna adventure (cable car + 4x4 + short trek, 100 euros/person) ascends to 2,500 m by cable car, 2,800 m by 4x4, then walks to 3,000 m to view the summit and Barbagallo side craters; it is a high-risk activity (ages 5-65, weight 25-95 kg, good health required). Overnight: Catania Four Points by Sheraton hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往世界自然遗产埃特纳火山（海拔3323米，是世界上最活跃的火山之一），您可选择自由参观周围的火山景观，或自费乘坐缆车前往火山山顶。随后前往陶尔米纳小镇，游览四月九日广场（典型西西里风格广场，黑白地砖，可远眺爱奥尼亚海与埃特纳火山）、希腊露天圆形剧场（建于公元前3世纪的U形剧院，是西西里仅次于锡拉库扎的第二大剧院，夏季为陶尔米纳艺术节举办场所）；当晚返回酒店。备注：本产品不包含埃特纳火山登顶缆车费用，如遇火山灰尘、天气、设施检修及其他因素无法保证安全条件，缆车将无法运行，届时无法登顶；通常夏季上午游览火山、下午前往陶镇，冬季则反之。推荐项目：埃特纳火山探险（缆车+四驱车+短途徒步，价格100欧/人），先乘缆车上升至2500米，再乘四驱车至2800米，然后步行至3000米观察顶部火山口及Barbagallo侧面火山口；此为高风险项目，参加年龄要求5-65周岁、体重25-95公斤、身体健康。夜宿：卡塔尼亚福朋喜来登酒店或同级4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Catania - Syracuse - Catania (the thousand-year nymph spring, walking through Sicily's beautiful legend)
timeline.title_zh: 卡塔尼亚 - 锡拉库扎 - 卡塔尼亚（锡镇千年林仙泉，漫步西西里美丽传说）
timeline.description_en: In the morning head to Syracuse, the town where 'Malena' was filmed and the home of the great Greek philosopher, mathematician and physicist Archimedes. Tour Castello Maniace (the island's finest castle, a Byzantine fortress with walls once 18 m high and 3.5 m thick), the Fountain of Arethusa (the freshwater 'nymph spring' from Greek myth, now home to ducks, mullet and papyrus), Ortygia island (described by Cicero as 'the greatest and most beautiful Greek city', with the Temple of Apollo, the Athena temple turned cathedral and a Greek theatre), and the Cathedral Square of Ortygia (its Baroque facade conceals the 5th-century BC Doric Athena temple; a square often seen in 'Malena'). Then return to Catania for free sightseeing, with its elegant buildings, broad avenues and the sparkling Ionian Sea. An optional Syracuse private boat tour (30 euros/person, from 6 people, about 1 hour) circles Ortygia and explores sea caves; it is a high-risk activity (ages 6-65, weight 15-95 kg, good health). Overnight: Catania Four Points by Sheraton hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往拍摄《西西里岛的美丽传说》的小城锡拉库扎，这里也是伟大的希腊哲学家、数学家、物理学家阿基米德的故乡。游览马尼亚切城堡（岛上最美的腓特烈城堡，拜占庭时期防御工事，原先墙高18米、厚3.5米）、林仙泉（阿勒图萨噴泉，源自希腊神话的淡水泉眼，如今是野鸭、胭脂鱼和纸莎草的安身之地）、奥提伽岛（曾被西塞罗描述为“希腊最伟大、最美丽的城市”，留有阿波罗神庙遗址、改造成大教堂的雅典娜神庙及希腊剧场）以及奥提伽大教堂广场（华丽巴洛克式外观掩盖了公元前5世纪的雅典娜神庙多利克柱式，是电影《西西里岛的美丽传说》中常出现的广场）。之后返回卡塔尼亚自由游览，典雅的建筑、宽广的大道与碧波粼粼的爱奥尼亚海让这座城市别有韵味。推荐项目：锡拉库扎出海包船游（价格30欧/人，6人起发，约1小时），主要项目包含奥提伽岛深度游览与海蚀洞探索，此为高风险项目，年龄要求6-65周岁、体重15-95公斤、身体健康。夜宿：卡塔尼亚福朋喜来登酒店或同级4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Catania - Agrigento - Cefalu - Palermo (the magnificent Valley of the Temples and the white rocks of a paradise town)
timeline.title_zh: 卡塔尼亚 - 阿格里真托 - 切法卢 - 巴勒莫（壮丽辉煌神殿之谷与天堂小镇的白色岩石相伴）
timeline.description_en: In the morning travel to the ancient Greek town of Agrigento to tour its old town (perched on a high hill overlooking the fields and the Mediterranean, founded as Akragas in the 6th century BC) and the World Heritage Valley of the Temples, where Doric temples such as the Temple of Concordia (the best preserved), the Temple of Hera, the Temple of Olympian Zeus and the Temple of Hercules, built from the 5th to 3rd centuries BC, have stood for over two thousand years above the blue sea. Then continue to Cefalu, a seaside town in northern Sicily beneath the cliffs of La Rocca, a filming location for 'Cinema Paradiso' whose Greek name means 'head'. Afterwards drive to Palermo to check in. Overnight: NH Palermo hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel, on the seafront overlooking the Bay of Palermo next to the botanical garden, an elegantly restored 19th-century building within walking distance of historic monuments and the Teatro Massimo.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往古希腊小镇阿格里真托，游览阿格里真托老城（坐落在高耸山丘上，可俯瞰田野与地中海，公元前6世纪建城时称为阿克拉加斯）以及世界遗产神殿之谷，山脊上保留了赫拉神庙、康科尔迪亚神庙（保留最完整的一座）、宙斯神庙和赫拉克勒斯神庙等多座希腊式神庙，始建于公元前5世纪，两千年来一直俯瞰碧蓝大海。随后前往切法卢，这是西西里岛正北部的一座海滨小镇，坐落于洛卡山的悬崖峭壁之下，也是《天堂电影院》的取景地，其名字源自希腊语“头”。之后前往巴勒莫入住酒店。夜宿：NH巴勒莫酒店或同级4星级酒店，位于海滨、俯瞰美丽的巴勒莫湾，毗邻植物园，由一栋优雅的19世纪建筑改造而成，步行即可抵达众多历史古迹与马西莫剧院。

timeline.title_en: Palermo (open-air museum where Byzantine, Arab and Norman civilizations converse amid the bustle of the markets)
timeline.title_zh: 巴勒莫（拜占庭、阿拉伯、诺曼文明在市集喧哗中对话的露天博物馆）
timeline.description_en: In the morning freely explore Palermo's old town: visit the atmospheric old fish market, the famous Quattro Canti (Four Corners), the 1,200-year-old Palazzo dei Normanni (Norman Palace, exterior) and the renowned Teatro Massimo (exterior). The Palermo Cathedral (begun in 1184) blends Gothic, Catalan and Moorish styles and houses the Norman royal tombs. Quattro Canti, the 'heart of Palermo', is a Baroque crossroads where four facades are adorned with fountains and statues symbolizing the seasons, Sicily's patron saints and Spanish kings. The Teatro Massimo, one of Europe's great opera houses (built from 1875, holding nearly 1,400), gained fame from 'The Godfather Part III'. Important notes: the day does NOT include the flight from Palermo back to your home city (buy it yourself; no guide on board); one group airport transfer is arranged at 16:00 local time. Palermo's old-town sights lie within a vehicle-restricted zone (ZTL), so the day is walked on foot, about 3-4 km; please wear comfortable shoes. The guide then sees you off to the airport according to flight time, ending the wonderful journey.
timeline.description_zh: 上午自由游览巴勒莫老城区：拜访具有人文气息的老城鱼市，游览著名的四角广场、1200年历史的诺曼皇宫（外观）以及欧洲著名的马西莫剧院（外观）等景点。巴勒莫大教堂始建于1184年，融合哥特式、加泰罗尼亚及穆斯林等多种建筑风格，是诺曼皇室墓地所在。四角广场被誉为“巴勒莫的心脏”，是巴洛克艺术交汇点，四面对称立面的每一角都装饰着喷泉与雕像，象征四季更替、四位西西里守护圣人及四位西班牙国王。马西莫剧院是意大利和欧洲著名的剧院之一（建设始于1875年，可容纳近1400名观众），因在电影《教父3》中露面而更加知名。重要提示：当天行程不含巴勒莫返回所在城市的机票，请自行购买，航班上无导游陪同；当天我社统一安排一次送机，为当地时间下午16:00。巴勒莫老城区主要景点均位于车辆禁行区（ZTL）内，当天为步行游览，往返步行行程约3-4公里，请穿着轻便舒适。随后导游根据航班时间送机，结束美好行程。

meeting_en: Tour departs from Venice, Italy. Itinerary follows option A (start Venice, end Palermo); the reverse option B starts in Palermo and ends in Venice.
meeting_zh: 行程从意大利威尼斯出发。本行程为A线（去程威尼斯、回程巴勒莫结束）；B线为去程巴勒莫、回程威尼斯结束。

faqs.question_en: Where and how do we meet and disperse?
faqs.question_zh: 集合及集散地点和方法？
faqs.answer_en: Route A (start Venice, end Palermo): Day 1 meet at 09:00 in front of the designated hotel in Mestre; Day 12 does NOT include the flight from Palermo to your home city (buy it yourself, no guide on board), and one group airport transfer is arranged at 16:00 local time. Route B (start Palermo, end Venice): Day 1 does NOT include the flight to Palermo (buy it yourself); one group airport pickup is arranged at 12:00 noon local time; Day 12 disperses at about 18:00 in front of the designated hotel in Mestre. All times and places are for reference; the actual departure time follows the final group notice.
faqs.answer_zh: A线路（威尼斯出发、巴勒莫结束）：行程第1天早晨09:00在梅斯特指定酒店门口集合；第12天不含巴勒莫飞往所在城市的机票，请自行购买，航班上无导游陪同，当天我社统一安排一次送机，为当地时间下午16:00。B线路（巴勒莫出发、威尼斯结束）：第1天不含飞往巴勒莫的机票，请自行购买，当天统一安排一次接机，为当地时间中午12:00；第12天约18:00游览结束后在梅斯特指定酒店门口集散。以上时间地点为参考，实际出发时间以出团通知书为准。

faqs.question_en: Why is central Rome toured on foot?
faqs.question_zh: 罗马市中心为什么要徒步游览？
faqs.answer_en: Rome's sights are concentrated within the ancient historic-protected zone where vehicles are restricted. On the day you walk from the hotel to Santa Maria Maggiore (5-10 min), the Colosseum (10-15 min), the Mouth of Truth (20-25 min), the Trevi Fountain (15-20 min) and the Spanish Steps (5-10 min). Skipping the Mouth of Truth saves about 35 minutes of walking (about 2 km).
faqs.answer_zh: 由于罗马的景点比较集中，几乎所有景点都位于罗马古城区（历史保护区车辆限行）。当天从酒店步行前往圣母大殿（步行5到10分钟）、斗兽场（步行10到15分钟）、真理之口（步行20到25分钟）、许愿池（步行15到20分钟）、西班牙广场（步行5到10分钟）；如不游览真理之口可减少约35分钟（约2公里）的步行时间。

faqs.question_en: I get seasick - can I join the Sorrento island-hopping to the four cities?
faqs.question_zh: 我晕船是否能参加索伦托的跳岛游览四大城市？
faqs.answer_en: First, the Mediterranean is an inland sea with relatively few waves, and the boats are fairly large, so the chance of seasickness is low. Second, on the island-hopping tour the boat is only a means of transport, not a sightseeing vehicle; each leg averages 40 minutes to 1 hour, after which you land and tour. Many included sights, such as Capri, Positano and Amalfi, are places vehicles cannot reach or cannot reach easily.
faqs.answer_zh: 首先，地中海为内海，相对风浪较少，加之船体较大，因此晕船概率较低。其次，跳岛游览中船为交通工具，并非游览工具，平均每段行程为40分钟到1小时，随后即可登陆游览；行程中包含的许多景点，如卡普里、波西塔诺、阿马尔菲等，都是车辆无法到达或不便到达的景点。

faqs.question_en: Is Mt. Etna safe? If I don't take the cable car, how do I tour it?
faqs.question_zh: 埃特纳火山是否安全？如果不乘坐缆车，我该如何游览？
faqs.answer_en: The group goes to the Etna crater area (the valley), the base camp for visiting Etna, where you can see flowing lava fields and scorched volcanic rocks and hear the rumbling of the earth, while still at a safe distance from the eruption vent. There are shops, restaurants and many activities here, and many visitors enjoy the very safe 'dead volcano' trek. To reach the active volcano, the lava flows and the interior of lava tunnels, you MUST take the cable car with a professional volcano-trek guide - there is no other option.
faqs.answer_zh: 旅游团将前往埃特纳火山口（山谷），这里是游览埃特纳的大本营，随后可以看到遍地熔浆流及烧焦的火山石，听到轰隆作响的火山地动雷鸣声，但这里距离火山喷发口仍有安全距离；此处商店、餐厅及各类活动繁多，许多游客在这里体验“死”火山徒步，是一种非常安全的游览活动。如希望前往活火山及熔岩流、熔岩通道内部，必须乘坐缆车并在专业火山徒步向导带领下进行，没有其他选项。

faqs.question_en: What is the 'Captain Mike' boat trip?
faqs.question_zh: “麦克船长”出海是什么活动？
faqs.answer_en: It is Ortygia island's most famous round-island boat trip: 6-10 guests ride the 'Captain Mike' (a brand name) around the island to explore sea caves, snorkel in calm water near 'King Kong Reef' if weather allows, and taste the freshwater of the Arethusa spring. However, because of the boat's clearance under bridges and through the town, this activity requires very calm seas.
faqs.answer_zh: 这是奥提伽岛最著名的出海环游活动，6-10位游客乘坐“麦克船长”（商品名称）环岛游览，前往海蚀洞探险，如天气条件允许，将在“金刚礁”附近平稳海域浮潜，并品尝林仙泉的淡水等。但由于船体通过性（桥梁及城区）的原因，该活动需要海面非常平静。

faqs.question_en: How should I tour Capri, and why can't entry to the Blue Grotto be guaranteed?
faqs.question_zh: 卡普里岛我应该怎么游览？为什么不能保障进入蓝洞？
faqs.answer_en: Because the Blue Grotto's entrance is very low, it cannot be entered at high tide, especially in autumn and winter; in summer the grotto may also be severely congested and inaccessible. When that happens, you will instead visit Marina Grande harbor, the old town and the Gardens of Augustus.
faqs.answer_zh: 由于蓝洞入口比较低，潮水高时蓝洞将无法入内，特别是在秋冬季节；同时夏季可能遇到蓝洞严重堵塞，也无法入内游览。届时将改为游览大港码头、古城和奥古斯都花园。

faqs.question_en: Do I need a visa?
faqs.question_zh: 是否需要签证？
faqs.answer_en: This product does NOT include visa fees; you need a Schengen visa (single or multiple entry). If you need the visa handled, choose a Schengen-visa product. After booking we provide free of charge all materials for the Schengen visa application (see the detailed materials checklist). 'Worry-free visa guarantee': if you sign the contract at least 61 days before departure and have not obtained the visa within 45 days before departure, we bear all losses and immediately refund the full travel fee; guests who do not meet this clause and fail to obtain a visa are refunded per the 'change and cancellation' terms. In case of refusal, notify us within 48 hours with the consulate's refusal letter; any supplementary materials must be submitted within 5 days. We also buy Schengen-compliant travel insurance for guests whose visa we handle. Your passport must be valid for at least 6 months from the departure date or customs may deny entry. Visa fees, visa service fees, Schengen insurance fees and visa-center appointment fees are all non-refundable and non-transferable, even if the product is changed or cancelled.
faqs.answer_zh: 本产品不包含签证费用，需要申根签证（单次或多次入境）；如需办理签证请选择申根签证产品。预订后免费提供办理申根签证的全部材料（参考详细材料清单）。保签无忧：游客在出发日前61天与我社签约，如在出发前45天内未获取签证，我社承担所有损失并立即退还全部旅游费用；不符合该条款且未正常获签者，按“退改与取消条款”退费。如遇拒签需在48小时内通知我社并出具使领馆拒签函，如需补充或更改材料须在5天内提交。委托我社办理申根签证的游客，我社为其购买符合要求的申根旅游保险。护照有效期需在离境之日起至少还有六个月，否则海关有权拒绝入境。签证费、签证服务费、申根保险费、签证中心预约费均不可退款，也无法更改使用者，即使产品退改签也无法退款。

faqs.question_en: Booking, changes and cancellation notes
faqs.question_zh: 预订、变更与取消须知
faqs.answer_en: Both the agency and traveler may cancel without reason up to 30 days before departure (the 30th day excluded). Voluntarily giving up included items mid-trip, leaving the group early, or unused hotels/items are non-refundable. Pricing is in EUR; if you pay in CNY, the Bank of China real-time 'EUR selling rate' on the day of payment applies (refunds likewise use the day's rate; bank fees borne by the traveler). Pay promptly to avoid CNY price rises from rate swings. This is a join-in group; the announced max headcount is the per-day average upper limit; the group is confirmed (成团) at 10 people, and below 10 people we may cancel; below 10, self-paid activities may also be cancelled and turned into free time. Because flight changes, traffic jams, ferry cancellations, strikes and itinerary re-ordering are common, the visiting order and times often shift (not a breach of contract). Travelers must arrive ONE day before the group start and leave ONE day after the group end, allowing reasonable flight connection time (at least 5 hours for same-airport transfers, 7 hours for different airports in the same city); the reasonable meet/disperse window is 07:00-21:00. Room types: single travelers pay a single-supplement deposit by default (refunded pro-rata if shared); a standard double's bed type is set by the hotel and cannot be chosen; triple family rooms default to two parents + one minor with hotel-set beds. European hotels are all non-smoking, no cooking in rooms, no free toiletries or boiled water, check-in 14:00 and check-out 11:00, and air-conditioning is not a standard fixture. Listed hotel names are priority hotels; if full, a similar same-star hotel is substituted without separate notice. Where the itinerary order conflicts with the group notice, the group notice prevails; where the group notice conflicts with the guide's on-site notice, the guide's notice prevails.
faqs.answer_zh: 出发前30天（不含第30天）旅行社和旅行者均可无理由取消。行程中自愿放弃费用包含的项目、自愿中途离团，或未入住的酒店、未参加的项目费用均无法退款。所有定价以欧元为计价单位，如选择人民币支付，则以当天支付时本网站依据中国银行实时外汇牌价中“欧元卖出价”自动计算的人民币实时价格为准（退款同样适用申请当日即时汇率，汇率差异及银行手续费由旅行者承担）；请及时支付以避免汇率变动导致人民币价格上涨。本产品为散客拼团，披露的最多参团人数为每天人数上限；本产品宣布成团人数为10人，未达10人旅行社有权取消旅游团；团内自费活动未达10人也可能取消并改为“自由活动”。由于航变频繁、交通拥堵、渡轮取消、罢工游行及行程顺序调整，游览先后顺序与时间经常调整（不视为违约）。本产品要求旅游者在旅游团开始前一天到达集合地、结束后一天离开集散地，并预留合理航班衔接时间（同机场转机至少5小时，同城不同机场至少7小时），合理集合集散时间段为07:00至21:00。房型说明：单人报名默认含单人房差押金（成功拼房后按比例退还）；标准双人间床型由酒店安排不可指定；三人家庭间默认两位父母与一位未成年儿童入住、床型由酒店安排。欧洲酒店全部禁烟、禁止在房间内做饭、不提供一次性洗漱用品及免费开水，入住时间14:00、退房时间11:00，且空调并非酒店标准设施。行程内列明酒店为优先入住酒店，如订满则更换为相近条件、相同星级酒店，不再另行通知。如行程单前后顺序与出团通知书冲突，以出团通知书为准；如出团通知书与导游现场通知冲突，以导游现场通知为准。

faqs.question_en: Health and safety requirements
faqs.question_zh: 健康与安全须知
faqs.answer_en: To ensure a safe trip, please have a physical check before departure and do NOT book if you have: infectious diseases (e.g. active tuberculosis, typhoid); cardiovascular disease (e.g. severe hypertension, heart insufficiency, myocardial ischemia, myocardial infarction); cerebrovascular disease (e.g. cerebral embolism, hemorrhage, brain tumor); respiratory disease (e.g. emphysema, cor pulmonale); psychiatric illness (e.g. epilepsy and various mental illnesses); severe anemia (hemoglobin below 50 g/L); or are recovering from major surgery. Pregnancy: at 35 weeks or more you cannot join under any circumstances; at 28 weeks or more you must provide a doctor's report within 7 days plus the attending physician's consent; under 28 weeks please book with caution, sign a liability waiver, and you cannot join adventure, skiing, boating, high-altitude or outdoor items. Disabled travelers need a doctor's report within 7 days plus consent, must be accompanied by an immediate family member, and must request reserved places and facilities at least 61 days ahead. Travelers over 70 need a health certificate and physical report, an accompanying family member (or a signed waiver), good walking ability and stamina (this is a long itinerary), and a physician's consent for any adventure/skiing/boating/high-altitude/outdoor items, plus elderly-care facilities requested at least 61 days ahead. Minors (under 18) must be accompanied by an immediate relative or guardian; some sights have special rules for those under 18/12/6; infants/children under 30 kg need a confirmed EU-standard child seat; minors traveling without parents need parental authorization; infants under 2 years are not accepted. Per Article 15 of the Tourism Law, travelers must truthfully declare health information relevant to the trip (pregnancy, lactation, chronic disease, infectious-disease history, suspected symptoms, recent epidemic-area travel) and follow safety warnings; concealment that causes harm makes the traveler liable and may incur civil and administrative penalties, and the agency may terminate the contract without refund.
faqs.answer_zh: 为确保顺利出行、防止旅途中发生人身意外，请在出行前做必要的身体检查，如存在以下情况请勿报名：传染性疾病患者（如活动期肺结核、伤寒等）；心血管疾病患者（如严重高血压、心功能不全、心肌缺氧、心肌梗塞等）；脑血管疾病患者（如脑栓塞、脑出血、脑肿瘤等）；呼吸系统疾病患者（如肺气肿、肺心病等）；精神病患者（如癫痫及各种精神病人）；严重贫血病患者（血红蛋白量在50克/升以下）；大中型手术恢复期病患者。孕妇：处于妊娠第35周及以上的任何情况下都无法参团；第28周及以上需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书；第28周以下请慎重报名，需签署旅行社免责声明书，且无法参加探险、滑雪、出海、高空、户外等项目。残疾人：需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书，需直系家属陪同，并需至少提前61天申请预留位置及专用配套设施。老年旅游者：70周岁以上需提供健康证明、体检报告并需直系家属陪同（否则需签署免责声明书）；因行程较长，需要一定步行能力与体力，体力不支者请慎重报名；涉及探险、滑雪、出海、高空、户外等项目需持主治医师同意书；需至少提前61天申请适老化服务及专属设施。未成年旅游者（未满18周岁）需由直系亲属或监护人陪同，部分项目对未满18/12/6周岁有特殊限定；如有6岁以下婴儿或30公斤以下儿童需提前确认安全儿童座椅（否则需自备符合欧盟制式座椅）；无父母陪同的未成年人需持父母授权书；本产品不接受2周岁以下婴儿参团。根据《旅游法》第15条，旅游者需如实告知与旅游活动相关的个人健康信息（包括妊娠期、哺乳期、慢性病、传染病史、疑似症状或近期疫区旅居史）并遵守安全警示规定；如因隐瞒健康信息导致人身损害或传播风险，需自行承担相应责任，可能面临民事赔偿及行政处罚，旅行社可解除合同且不退还费用。

title_en: France, Italy & Switzerland 10-Day One-Way Tour (Rome to Paris)
title_zh: 法意瑞10天跟团游（罗马至巴黎单程深度线）
short_en: A 10-day one-way escorted journey from Rome to Paris through Tuscany, the Italian lakes, the Swiss Alps and the French capital — travelling by coach and scenic rail, with 4-star hotels all included.
short_zh: 10天单程跟团之旅，从罗马一路深玩至巴黎，纵贯托斯卡纳、意大利名城、瑞士阿尔卑斯与法兰西首都，全程大巴与景观列车出行，四星酒店一价全含。
desc_en: This 10-day one-way tour traces a deep route from Rome to Paris, crossing Italy, Switzerland and France without backtracking. You roam the medieval art towns of Tuscany — Pienza, Siena, Pisa and Florence — ride the scenic train through the cliffside fishing villages of Cinque Terre, drift through romantic Venice, then climb into the Swiss Alps via Zurich, Lucerne, Interlaken and the Jungfrau region around Lake Thun and Lake Brienz. The journey ends in Paris with an in-depth Louvre tour led by a French national museum guide, a Seine river cruise, and a visit to the Palace of Versailles. With one city explored each day in Italy, all four Swiss language regions crossed, branded 4-star hotels and all taxes included, it is an efficient, all-inclusive grand tour of three countries.
desc_zh: 这条10天单程线路从罗马深度玩到巴黎，贯穿意大利、瑞士与法国，全程不走回头路。你将漫游托斯卡纳的中世纪艺术古城——皮恩扎、锡耶纳、比萨与佛罗伦萨，乘景观列车探访悬崖上的五渔村，畅游浪漫水城威尼斯，再翻越阿尔卑斯山进入瑞士，途经苏黎世、卢塞恩、因特拉肯及图恩湖与布里恩茨湖之间的少女峰地区。旅程在巴黎收尾，由法兰西国家博物馆讲解师带领深度参观卢浮宫，乘塞纳河游船，并游览凡尔赛宫。意大利每天一城、瑞士四大语区贯穿、品牌四星酒店加税费全含，是一趟高效又省心的三国深度大环线。

highlights.en: One-way deep route from Rome to Paris — no backtracking, less coach time, more sightseeing
highlights.zh: 罗马至巴黎单程深度线，不走回头路，大幅缩短大巴里程，看得更多

highlights.en: Medieval Tuscan art towns: Pienza, Siena, Pisa and Renaissance Florence
highlights.zh: 托斯卡纳中世纪艺术古城：皮恩扎、锡耶纳、比萨与文艺复兴之都佛罗伦萨

highlights.en: Scenic train through the cliffside fishing villages of Cinque Terre
highlights.zh: 乘景观列车探访悬崖上的五渔村

highlights.en: Romantic Venice — St Mark's Square, the Bridge of Sighs and the canals
highlights.zh: 浪漫水城威尼斯——圣马可广场、叹息桥与水巷风情

highlights.en: Swiss Alps highlights: Zurich, Lucerne, Interlaken and the Jungfrau region
highlights.zh: 瑞士阿尔卑斯精华：苏黎世、卢塞恩、因特拉肯与少女峰地区

highlights.en: In-depth Louvre tour led by a French national museum guide, plus a Seine river cruise
highlights.zh: 法兰西国家博物馆讲解师深度讲解卢浮宫，并乘塞纳河游船

highlights.en: City-centre 4-star hotels, all listed attractions and all taxes included — no forced shopping
highlights.zh: 市中心四星品牌酒店、所列景点与各项税费全含，绝无强制购物

highlights.en: Visit the Palace of Versailles and stroll Paris's Boulevard Haussmann fashion district
highlights.zh: 游览凡尔赛宫，漫步巴黎奥斯曼大街时尚街区

includes.en: Hotels: 9 nights in 4-star hotels.
includes.zh: 【酒店】：四星级酒店9晚。

includes.en: Meals: in-hotel breakfast or meals in other forms, 9 meals in total.
includes.zh: 【餐饮】：酒店内早餐或其他形式餐饮共计9餐。

includes.en: Taxes & fees: all taxes within the itinerary, including city tourist tax, city-entry fees, residence tax, road/bridge tolls, island-landing fees, etc.
includes.zh: 【税费】：游客城市税、进城费、居住税、路桥费、登岛费等行程内的所有税费。

includes.en: Transport: tour coach or business travel van.
includes.zh: 【交通】：旅游巴士或者商务旅行车。

includes.en: Guide: professional driver + Chinese-speaking guide, or a Chinese-speaking driver-guide throughout (note: for groups of 8 or fewer, a business travel van + Chinese-speaking driver-guide is arranged).
includes.zh: 【导游】：职业司机+中文导游或者全程中文司机兼导游（备注：8人及以下则安排为商务旅行车+中文司机兼导游）。

includes.en: Luggage: 1 piece of checked luggage up to 23 kg plus 1 carry-on.
includes.zh: 【行李】：1件23公斤行李及1件随身行李。

includes.en: Activities & tickets: Venice island ferry, Cinque Terre scenic train, Seine River cruise, Louvre ticket (including a national-museum lecturer), and Versailles ticket (including a national-museum lecturer).
includes.zh: 【活动及门票】：威尼斯登岛轮渡、五渔村景观列车、塞纳河游船、卢浮宫门票（含国家馆讲解师）、凡尔赛门票（含国家馆讲解师）。

excludes.en: Passport: personal passport fees.
excludes.zh: 护照：个人护照费用。

excludes.en: Visa: the tourist visa fees required for the countries listed in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 签证：行程中所列旅游国家所需的观光签证费用。

excludes.en: Insurance: travel insurance fees (if the itinerary involves high-risk sports, please confirm whether your travel insurance covers them).
excludes.zh: 保险：旅游保险费用（如行程内涉及到高风险运动，请核实旅游保险是否包含该项运动）。

excludes.en: Tips: gratuities for the guide and driver totalling 10 euros per person per day, same price for adults and children.
excludes.zh: 小费：游客支付导游和司机小费一共10欧/人/天，大小同价。

excludes.en: Meals: lunches and dinners (main meals) are not included in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 餐饮：行程内不包含午、晚正餐费用。

excludes.en: Tickets: attractions not marked as fee-included in the itinerary (including but not limited to all sights marked "exterior", and all "recommended", "optional", "experience" items not stated as included); please pay for these yourself if you wish to visit.
excludes.zh: 门票：行程中未注明费用包含的景点（包括但不仅限于行程中注明“外观”的景点，以及“推荐”“可选”“体验”等所有未提及费用包含的项目，如游客需要参观，敬请自理）。

excludes.en: Extended stay: any extra accommodation, transport and sightseeing costs outside the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 延长住宿：行程外额外延长的住宿、交通、观光费用。

excludes.en: Personal spending: such as drinks/alcohol, taxis, phone charges and other personal expenses.
excludes.zh: 私人消费：如饮料酒类、出租车、电话费等个人消费。

excludes.en: Other transport: transport costs not mentioned as included beyond the business van or minibus, such as the Venice gondola and the sightseeing trains / electric taxis in traffic-restricted zones; please pay for these yourself.
excludes.zh: 其他交通：除包含商务旅行车或者中巴之外，费用包含中未提及的其他交通费用，如威尼斯贡多拉，以及车辆限行区的观光火车、电瓶出租车等费用敬请自理。

excludes.en: Free activities: guests' own night-time sightseeing and the recommended optional items, plus any transport, dining, tickets and shopping they generate.
excludes.zh: 自由活动：游客夜间自行游览及行程中的推荐项目，以及产生的交通、餐饮、门票、购物等费用。

excludes.en: Experience activities: any travel experience activities in the itinerary that are not included.
excludes.zh: 体验活动：行程中没有包含的各项旅游体验活动。

excludes.en: Other costs: anything not mentioned in the inclusions. In cases of force majeure (natural disaster, war, strike, etc.) or special situations such as traffic delays, flight cancellations/rescheduling, visa delays by embassies, insufficient group numbers, or other causes not attributable to our company, resulting in extra costs (e.g. overseas visa-extension fees, accommodation, food and transport, airline fare adjustments), our company reserves the right to charge the difference.
excludes.zh: 其他费用：费用包含中未提及的费用。如因天灾、战争、罢工等不可抗力的原因，及因交通延阻、航班取消或更改时间、使馆延误出签证、人数不足等特殊情况或其他非我公司原因所引致的额外费用（如在外延期签证费、住、食及交通费、国家航空运价调整等），我公司有权追加差价。

timeline.title_en: Rome - Pienza - Siena (medieval art treasure Siena, the cypress lane of Val d'Orcia)
timeline.title_zh: 罗马 - 皮恩扎 - 锡耶纳（中世纪艺术瑰宝锡耶纳，邂逅奥尔恰谷丝柏树小径）
timeline.description_en: Meet in Rome in the morning and set out for the old town of Pienza, stopping along the way to take free photos on the famous cypress lane winding through the Tuscan countryside. In Pienza, a UNESCO World Heritage Renaissance "ideal town" founded by Pope Pius II, visit Piazza Pio II and Pienza Cathedral (exterior). After lunch continue to Siena to see Siena Cathedral (exterior), the shell-shaped Piazza del Campo, the Palazzo Pubblico / town hall (exterior) and the Torre del Mangia (exterior), wandering its medieval stone lanes. The day also takes in the postcard scenery of the World Heritage Val d'Orcia. Overnight at the Four Points by Sheraton Siena or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午在罗马集合，出发前往皮恩扎古城，途中在著名的丝柏树小径自由拍照——蜿蜒于托斯卡纳乡间、两旁种满意大利柏树的乡村道路。皮恩扎是教皇庇护二世创立的文艺复兴时期“理想小镇”，1996年列入联合国世界遗产名录，游览二世广场（Piazza Pio II）与皮恩扎大教堂（外观）。午餐后前往锡耶纳，游览锡耶纳大教堂（外观）、形似贝壳的田野广场、锡耶纳市政厅（外观）及曼吉亚塔楼（外观），穿行于古老的石板小巷之间。当天还可饱览世界遗产奥尔恰谷的明信片般田园美景。夜宿锡耶纳福朋喜来登酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Siena - Pisa - Cinque Terre - Florence (scenic train through Cinque Terre, the Ligurian seaside villages)
timeline.title_zh: 锡耶纳 - 比萨 - 五渔村 - 佛罗伦萨（景观列车游览五渔村，畅游利古里亚海景城镇）
timeline.description_en: In the morning travel to Pisa to see the Leaning Tower of Pisa (exterior) and the Piazza dei Miracoli (Square of Miracles), the walled heart of the historic centre with the cathedral, baptistery, leaning bell tower and camposanto. Then head to the Cinque Terre, riding the scenic train along the Ligurian coast to admire the cliff-top fishing villages of Monterosso, Vernazza, Corniglia, Manarola and Riomaggiore, strolling through their colourful lanes. If bad weather or a railway strike makes the Cinque Terre inaccessible, the itinerary automatically switches to viewing the coastal towns by coach or another means. Overnight at the Hilton Florence Metropole or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往比萨，游览比萨斜塔（外观）和比萨历史文化中心的奇迹广场（Piazza dei Miracoli），这片围墙环绕的区域内有比萨主教座堂、洗礼堂、斜塔（钟楼）和墓园。随后前往五渔村，乘坐景观列车沿利古里亚海岸线，游览蒙特罗索、韦尔纳扎、科尔尼利亚、马纳罗拉与里奥马焦雷这五座悬崖边上的美丽渔村，漫步于色彩斑斓的小巷。备注：如遇恶劣天气或铁路公司罢工等因素导致无法游览五渔村，行程将自动更改为乘坐大巴车或其它形式游览海岸线城市。夜宿佛罗伦萨希尔顿大都会酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Florence - Venice (city of poetry, soul of the Renaissance - an art lover's journey)
timeline.title_zh: 佛罗伦萨 - 威尼斯（诗歌之地，文艺复兴之魂，享受艺术之旅）
timeline.description_en: In the morning explore Florence, birthplace of the Renaissance: visit the world's third-largest church, the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore / Florence Cathedral (exterior), Piazza della Signoria (the open-air sculpture gallery with the Palazzo Vecchio, a copy of Michelangelo's David and the Fountain of Neptune), the Ponte Vecchio (Old Bridge) over the Arno, and Piazza Santa Croce with the Basilica of Santa Croce (exterior), burial place of Michelangelo and Galileo. Afterwards transfer to Venice to check in. Overnight at the voco Venice or Hilton Venice Ambassador, or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往文艺复兴发源地佛罗伦萨，参观世界第三大教堂——圣母百花大教堂（外观）、市政广场（露天雕塑博物馆，坐落着维琪奥旧宫、米开朗基罗《大卫》雕像复制品及海神喷泉）、阿诺河上的老桥（维奇奥桥），以及圣十字广场和安葬着米开朗基罗、伽利略的圣十字大教堂（外观）。之后前往威尼斯入住酒店。夜宿威尼斯洲际VOCO酒店或希尔顿大使酒店，或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Venice - Milan (gliding through romantic Venice on gentle waters)
timeline.title_zh: 威尼斯 - 米兰（游览温柔碧波上浪漫的威尼斯）
timeline.description_en: In the morning visit St Mark's Basilica (exterior), St Mark's Square - which Napoleon called "the finest drawing room in Europe", the Bridge of Sighs (exterior) and the magnificent Doge's Palace (exterior); these water-borne buildings and winding canals give Venice, the "Pearl of the Adriatic" built across 118 islands, its lingering romance. Afterwards travel to the fashion capital of Milan. Overnight at the Royal Garden Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午参观圣马可大教堂（外观）、被拿破仑称作“欧洲最美丽客厅”的圣马可广场、叹息桥（外观）以及华丽的总督宫（外观）。这些建在水上的美丽建筑与蜿蜒的水巷，让由118个小岛组成、有“亚得里亚海明珠”之称的威尼斯浪漫风情久久挥之不去。之后前往时尚之都米兰。夜宿皇家花园酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Milan - Zurich (along the Alps, from the fashion capital to the financial capital)
timeline.title_zh: 米兰 - 苏黎世（沿阿尔卑斯山脉，从时尚之都游览金融之都）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, freely visit Milan's landmark Gothic cathedral, the Duomo di Milano (exterior), and one of Europe's most beautiful shopping arcades, the Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II. In the afternoon head to Zurich to see Grossmünster / Zurich Cathedral (exterior), Lake Zurich and the luxury shopping street Bahnhofstrasse, and to stroll along the banks of the Limmat River. Zurich's old town - including the Lindenhof park and the twin-towered Grossmünster - is the filming location of the Korean drama "Crash Landing on You". Overnight at the H+ Hotel Zürich (Limmattal) or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，自由参观米兰的标志性哥特式建筑米兰大教堂（外观），以及欧洲最漂亮的商业拱廊之一——埃马努埃莱二世长廊。下午前往苏黎世，游览苏黎世大教堂（外观）、苏黎世湖与奢侈品购物大道班霍夫大街，并漫步利马特河边。苏黎世老城——包括林登霍夫公园和双塔的苏黎世大教堂——正是韩剧《爱的迫降》的取景地。夜宿苏黎世利马塔尔哈利之家酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Zurich - Lucerne - Interlaken (the idyllic village of Lungern, Switzerland's lakes and mountains at their finest)
timeline.title_zh: 苏黎世 - 卢塞恩 - 因特拉肯（世外桃源龙疆镇，瑞士湖光山色代表作）
timeline.description_en: In the morning travel to Lucerne to enjoy the lakes-and-mountains scenery of Lake Lucerne, hear the Lion Monument tell the story of Swiss loyalty (a dying lion carved into the rock in 1821 to honour the Swiss Guards who died defending Louis XVI), and see the Chapel Bridge and the octagonal water tower. Then continue to the village of Lungern to admire Lake Lungern and the village scenery - a filming location for the happy ending of "Crash Landing on You". In the afternoon head to Interlaken, the town at the foot of Europe's roof, the Jungfrau. Overnight at the Solis Hotel Sigriswil (alpine lake-view hotel) or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午出发前往卢塞恩，游览卢塞恩湖的湖光山色，聆听狮子纪念碑讲述瑞士人忠贞坚毅的那段历史（1821年雕刻于天然岩石上的濒死雄狮，纪念1792年为保护路易十六而战死的786名瑞士雇佣兵），并游览卡贝尔廊桥和八角形水塔等景点。之后前往龙疆小镇，游览龙疆湖及小镇风光——这里是《爱的迫降》大团圆结局的取景地。下午前往欧洲屋脊“少女峰”山脚下的小镇因特拉肯。夜宿锡格里斯维尔雪山湖景酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Interlaken - Jungfrau - Geneva (between Switzerland's "two lakes", panoramic views of the Jungfrau)
timeline.title_zh: 因特拉肯 - 少女峰 - 日内瓦（行瑞士“两湖”之间，赏“少女峰”全景）
timeline.description_en: Interlaken sits between Lake Brienz and Lake Thun, known as "the left and right eyes of God". Today you choose ONE of three options (you may not combine two): a coach tour of the Jungfrau region (included), visiting the classic "Dream Slope" at Grindelwald with the guide; OR self-paid Jungfrau panoramic cableway to the summit (230 euros) - Top of Europe, Europe's highest railway station, via Grindelwald and the Eiger Glacier to the Sphinx Observatory and the Aletsch Glacier; OR the self-paid First-Grindelwald aerial gondola round trip (70 euros) to walk the famous First Cliff Walk. Those not taking the paid options can freely explore Höheweg street, the Höhematte green and the peaceful village. Afterwards check in near Geneva. Overnight at the Novotel Geneve Centre Gare (Annemasse) or Crowne Plaza, or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午游览有上帝左眼与右眼之称、坐落于布里恩茨湖与图恩湖之间的因特拉肯。当天三选一（不可同时选择两项）：项目一，跟随导游乘车游览少女峰地区（费用包含），前往格林德尔瓦尔德经典的“梦幻山坡”；项目二，少女峰全景缆车登顶（230欧元），先后换乘三种交通经格林德尔瓦尔德、艾格冰川抵达少女峰登顶——欧洲最高的火车站Top of Europe，登“斯芬克斯观景台”俯瞰阿莱奇冰川；项目三，菲斯特-格林德尔瓦尔德空中贡多拉往返票（70欧元），直达菲斯特峰顶游览著名的悬崖天梭巅峰栈道。不参加自费项目者可自由游览何维克街、荷黑马特绿地及宁静村庄。随后入住安纳马斯日内瓦港诺富特酒店或皇冠假日酒店，或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Geneva - Paris (a walk along Lake Geneva, crossing the old town by the flower bridge)
timeline.title_zh: 日内瓦 - 巴黎（漫步日内瓦湖畔，看花桥横渡古城区）
timeline.description_en: In the morning explore the "Flower Bridge" district beside the hotel, where Geneva's local food and specialty shops gather, then visit Geneva's old town, the Lake Geneva waterfront, the Flower Clock and the Jet d'Eau (the great fountain that shoots a 140-metre column of water over the lake). The whole Lake Geneva region is a World Heritage area of well-preserved medieval towns straddling Switzerland and France. In the afternoon drive back to Paris. Overnight at the Mercure or Novotel Paris hotel, or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午游览位于酒店旁的“花桥”区域，这里云集日内瓦各种当地美食和特色商店，参观日内瓦老城、日内瓦湖区、花钟和大喷泉（大喷泉宛若鲸鱼喷出的水柱，高140米，从市中心很远便可看见）。整个日内瓦湖区横跨瑞士和法国，被列为世界遗产，是保存完好的中世纪小城聚集地。下午乘车返回巴黎。夜宿巴黎美居酒店或诺富特酒店，或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Paris - Louvre - Paris (understanding the origin of art at the Louvre, falling for salon culture)
timeline.title_zh: 巴黎 - 卢浮宫 - 巴黎（深度理解艺术的起源——卢浮宫，爱上沙龙文化）
timeline.description_en: In the morning visit the Louvre, France's pride, with a curated in-depth themed commentary by a national-museum lecturer (the tour includes the standard individual entry ticket, without a Chinese audio guide). In the afternoon see Notre-Dame de Paris, the Île de la Cité, the Eiffel Tower (exterior) and the Champ de Mars, then take a Seine River cruise (the famous glass-roofed "bateaux mouches", a 3.2 km / roughly 1-hour route) passing Les Invalides (exterior), the Grand and Petit Palais (exterior), Place de la Concorde and more, spending the whole day among central Paris landmarks. Note: in peak season the Louvre may restrict guide commentary inside; if so, 10 euros per person of the in-museum commentary fee is refunded. Overnight at the Mercure or Novotel Paris hotel, or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午参观法兰西引以为傲的卢浮宫博物馆，由法兰西国家馆讲解师精选主题深度讲解（行程包含普通散客门票，不含中文讲解器）。下午前往游览巴黎圣母院、西岱岛、埃菲尔铁塔（外观）及战神广场，之后乘坐塞纳河游船（著名的透明船舱“苍蝇船”，3.2公里约1小时航程）游览荣军院（外观）、大小皇宫（外观）、协和广场等地，全天游览巴黎市中心景点。备注：由于卢浮宫限流、旺季尤其限制讲解员在馆内讲解，届时将退还馆内讲解费10欧元/每位游客。夜宿巴黎美居酒店或诺富特酒店，或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Paris - Versailles - Paris (the Baroque treasure of the Palace of Versailles, fashion and art pioneer)
timeline.title_zh: 巴黎 - 凡尔赛 - 巴黎（巴洛克艺术瑰宝凡尔赛宫，时尚艺术先锋）
timeline.description_en: In the morning head to Paris's fashion heart along Boulevard Haussmann and Rue Royale, freely visiting the Palais Garnier / Paris Opera (exterior) and the fashion districts of the Printemps and Galeries Lafayette department stores. In the afternoon travel to the Palace of Versailles in the southwestern suburbs of Paris for a tour of the palace, that magnificent monument of France's absolutist age and former seat of the royal court and government. The trip ends back in Paris at Place d'Italie. No hotel is provided on this final day.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往巴黎时尚中心奥斯曼大街和皇家大道，自由参观巴黎歌剧院（外观）及春天百货、巴黎老佛爷等时尚街区。下午前往位于巴黎西南部郊区的凡尔赛宫，游览凡尔赛宫——这座法国封建统治时期华丽的纪念碑，曾是法兰西宫廷与国家行政中心。之后返回巴黎意大利广场结束美好行程。当天无酒店住宿。

meeting_en: Rome — group meets in central Rome on the morning of Day 1 before departing for Pienza.
meeting_zh: 罗马——第1天上午在罗马市区集合，随后出发前往皮恩扎。

faqs.question_en: Where and when do we meet and disperse?
faqs.question_zh: 集合及集散地点和时间是怎样的？
faqs.answer_en: Itinerary A meets at 08:30 on Day 1 in front of Roma Tiburtina railway station, and disperses on Day 10 at around 18:30 at Place d'Italie in Paris. These times and places are for reference; the actual departure time is as stated in the tour confirmation letter. We do not recommend booking a flight that lands in Rome on the meeting day or one that leaves Paris on the final day.
faqs.answer_zh: 行程A第1天08:30在Roma Tiburtina（罗马提布提纳）火车站门口集合，第10天18:30左右在巴黎意大利广场解散。参考时间及地点，实际出发时间以出团通知书为准。不推荐预订当天落地罗马的航班，也不推荐预订结束当天离开巴黎的航班。

faqs.question_en: Are the coach transfers very long?
faqs.question_zh: 行程路线乘坐大巴时间会不会很久？
faqs.answer_en: Only the Geneva-Paris leg is long, about 6 hours 45 minutes; all other planned drives are around 3-4 hours. Road conditions can be complex - city traffic jams or other factors may lengthen the driving time.
faqs.answer_zh: 该产品仅日内瓦至巴黎段约为6小时45分，其余计划行程的行车时间均为3-4小时左右。公路交通情况复杂，特别是市区内容易发生堵车或其它因素导致行车时间增加。

faqs.question_en: Can I go up to the Jungfrau summit?
faqs.question_zh: 产品是否可以游览少女峰登顶？
faqs.answer_en: Yes, but it is not included in the price. If you wish to do it, we recommend booking in advance. The available experience time is limited and may conflict with the original itinerary, which could affect the rest of the schedule and other experiences.
faqs.answer_zh: 可以游览，但费用不包含。如需参加建议提前预订。可选的体验时间受限，可能跟原行程安排产生冲突，导致影响其他行程和体验的安排。

faqs.question_en: Can I do the First (Top of Adventure) experience in Switzerland?
faqs.question_zh: 我是否能游览菲斯特瑞士空天探险活动（First Top of Adventure）？
faqs.answer_en: Yes, but it is not included in the price. If you wish to take part, we recommend booking in advance.
faqs.answer_zh: 可以游览，但费用不包含。如需参加建议提前预订。

faqs.question_en: What adventure activities are there at First?
faqs.question_zh: 菲斯特都有什么探险活动？
faqs.answer_en: First's mountain adventure park has many thrilling high-altitude activities, mainly the Aerial gondola, the First Cliff Walk, the First Flyer (zipline) and the First Glider. They can be bought on the spot depending on that day's queue and weather conditions.
faqs.answer_zh: 菲斯特空天探险有很多惊险刺激的高山活动，主要项目有：空中贡多拉（Aerial gondola）、悬崖天梭巅峰栈道（First Cliff Walk）、高空飞索（First Flyer）、神鹰飞梭（First Glider）。可根据当天排队时间及天气情况现场购买。

faqs.question_en: Can I do both the Jungfrau train and the First adventure on the same day?
faqs.question_zh: 我是否能同时选择少女峰观光列车和菲斯特空天探险两个项目？
faqs.answer_en: No. There are only 5-6 hours of free time in Interlaken that day. The Jungfrau visit is recommended to take 4-5 hours, while First takes 3-4 hours, so the two cannot both fit.
faqs.answer_zh: 不可以。当天在因特拉肯仅有5-6小时自由活动时间，推荐游览少女峰的时间为4到5小时，而菲斯特需要3-4个小时，因此无法同时选择两项。

faqs.question_en: Can I tour the Cinque Terre by boat?
faqs.question_zh: 我是否可以选择乘船游览五渔村？
faqs.answer_en: Because boat trips are weather-dependent, the product does not include a Cinque Terre boat ticket; however, you may choose to go by boat. In that case the train-ticket cost cannot be refunded or exchanged, and you must buy the boat ticket yourself, costing about 35 euros.
faqs.answer_zh: 由于乘船游览受气候影响，该产品并不包含五渔村船票，但可以选择乘船游览。届时无法退换火车票的费用，并且需要自行购买船票，约35欧元。

faqs.question_en: Can we choose different menus and dishes for our dinners?
faqs.question_zh: 我们的晚餐是否能根据喜好选择不同的菜单和菜品？
faqs.answer_en: The dining mentioned in the itinerary is all recommended local specialty food and is not included in the price - for example Venice's famous black squid-ink pasta or the Tuscan steak. You cannot order other dishes from us; if a dish is not your first choice, you are free to find other dining yourself.
faqs.answer_zh: 行程内推荐的餐饮全部为推荐当地特色餐，费用并未包含，比如威尼斯著名的黑墨鱼面、托斯卡纳的牛排等。无法选择其它菜式，如果菜品并非您的首选，可以自行选择其他餐饮。

faqs.question_en: Do I need a visa?
faqs.question_zh: 是否需要签证？
faqs.answer_en: Yes. This product requires a Schengen visa (single or multiple entry) and the visa fee is NOT included - if you need a visa, please choose a Schengen-visa product. After booking we provide, free of charge, all materials needed for the Schengen visa application; if you commission us to handle the visa we also buy you a Schengen-compliant travel insurance, otherwise you must arrange your own insurance and claims. "Visa-secured" guarantee: if you sign with us at least 61 days before departure and have not obtained the visa within 45 days before departure, we bear all losses and immediately refund your full tour cost. Your passport must be valid for at least 6 months from the date of departure, or customs may refuse entry. Visa fees, visa service fees, Schengen insurance fees and visa-centre appointment fees are all non-refundable and non-transferable, even if the product is changed or cancelled.
faqs.answer_zh: 需要。本产品需要申根签证（单次或多次入境），且不包含签证费用——如需办理签证请选择申根签证产品。预订后免费提供办理申根签证的全部材料；如委托我社办理签证，我社会为您购买符合申根签证要求的申根旅游保险，否则需自行购买旅游保险并自行负责理赔。保签无忧：游客在出发日前61天与我社签约的旅游产品，如在出发前45天内未获取签证，我社承担所有损失，立即退还全部旅游费用。护照有效期需在离境之日起至少还有六个月，否则海关有权拒绝入境。签证费、签证服务费、申根保险费、签证中心预约费均不可退款，也无法更改使用者，即使产品退改签，签证费用也无法退款。

faqs.question_en: Booking, changes & cancellation
faqs.question_zh: 预订、变更与取消须知
faqs.answer_en: Free, no-reason cancellation is allowed by both the agency and the traveller up to 30 days before departure (not including the 30th day). This is a recurring shuttle group: other guests join and leave at different points, with different start/end cities and prices, so book according to your own start/end destination. Group size is 10 people to confirm departure; for 8 or fewer the group becomes a small group with a business van + driver-guide. Booking is recommended at least 14 days ahead, with a second confirmation by the operator within at most 48 hours (otherwise the order is auto-refunded) - do not book connecting flights/hotels before the itinerary is confirmed. Room types: two people booking together default to a standard twin/double (bed type assigned by the hotel, not selectable); solo travellers pay a single-room supplement deposit (refunded pro-rata if successfully matched for room-sharing); a triple/family room defaults to two parents plus one minor with bed types not selectable. European hotels are non-smoking, check-in 14:00 / check-out 11:00, and air-conditioning is not a standard feature. Pricing is quoted in EUR; if you pay in CNY the rate is the Bank of China "euro sell" real-time rate on the day of payment, and refunds likewise use the same-day rate. Because of frequent flight changes, traffic, ferry cancellations and strikes, the order and timing of sights may be adjusted - you must arrive at the meeting point one day before the group starts and leave the dispersal point one day after it ends. Itinerary contingencies: if a railway strike or bad weather blocks the Cinque Terre, it switches to coach/other coastal-town viewing; if the Louvre limits tour groups in peak season, the 10-euro in-museum commentary fee is refunded (or ticket + fee refunded and changed to an exterior visit); and at Versailles, when there are fewer than 3 people an audio guide replaces the official lecturer.
faqs.answer_zh: 出发前30天（不含第30天），旅行社和旅行者均有权申请无理由取消。本产品为循环套发团，沿途会有其他游客在不同地点上下团，开始和结束的城市不同、价格不同，请按自己报名的目的地起止行程。成团人数为10人；如报名8人及以下则自动改为小团，安排商务旅行车+司机兼导游。建议至少提前14天预订，支付后需等待组团社在最多48小时内二次确认（超48小时未确认则自动退款），未确认行程前请勿预订衔接机票及酒店。房型：两人同时报名默认标准双人间（床型由酒店安排，不可选）；单人报名默认含单人房差押金（成功拼房后按比例退还）；三人家庭间默认两位父母与一位未成年儿童入住，床型不可选。欧洲酒店全面禁烟，入住14:00、退房11:00，空调并非标准设施。所有定价以欧元计价，如选择人民币支付则按当天中国银行实时“欧元卖出价”自动计算，退款同样按申请当日即时汇率。由于航变、交通、渡轮取消、罢工频繁，景点的先后顺序和时间可能调整，需在参团前一天到达集合地、离团后一天离开集散地。行程应急：如遇罢工或恶劣天气无法游览五渔村，则改为大巴或其它形式游览海岸线城市；如卢浮宫旺季对旅游团限流，则退还每位10欧元讲解费（无法入内则退门票+讲解费并改为外观游览）；凡尔赛不足3人时由讲解器替代官导讲解。

faqs.question_en: Health & safety requirements
faqs.question_zh: 健康与安全须知
faqs.answer_en: To ensure a safe trip, please have a basic health check before departure and DO NOT join if you have any of the following: infectious diseases (e.g. active tuberculosis, typhoid); cardiovascular disease (severe hypertension, heart insufficiency, myocardial ischaemia, myocardial infarction); cerebrovascular disease (embolism, haemorrhage, brain tumour); respiratory disease (emphysema, cor pulmonale); psychiatric illness (epilepsy and all psychoses); severe anaemia (haemoglobin below 50 g/L); or recovery from major/medium surgery. Pregnancy: at 35 weeks or more you cannot join under any circumstances; at 28 weeks or more you must provide a doctor's check-up report within 7 days plus the attending doctor's consent; below 28 weeks please book with caution, sign a liability waiver, and you cannot take part in any adventure, skiing, sea, high-altitude or outdoor items. Travellers with disabilities need a 7-day medical report + attending doctor's consent, an immediate family escort, and at least 61 days' advance request for reserved space and facilities. Elderly (70+): need a health certificate and physical-exam report, an immediate family escort (or sign a waiver), good walking ability and stamina (this is a long itinerary), and a doctor's consent for any adventure/ski/sea/high-altitude items. Minors (under 18) must be accompanied by an immediate relative or guardian; some sights have special rules for under-18/12/6; infants under 6 or children under 30 kg need a confirmed EU-standard child safety seat; unaccompanied under-18s need parental authorisation; infants under 2 are not accepted. The paid paragliding option is high-risk (age 10-65, weight 10-95 kg, in good health - those with chronic illness, hypertension, heart disease or pregnancy may not join). Under China's Tourism Law Article 15, travellers must truthfully declare health information relevant to the trip (pregnancy, lactation, chronic disease, infectious-disease history, suspected symptoms or recent travel to epidemic areas); concealment that causes harm makes the traveller liable.
