faqs.answer_zh: 为确保旅游安全，出行前请做一次必要的身体检查，如存在下列情况请勿报名：传染性疾病患者（如活动期肺结核、伤寒等）；心血管疾病患者（如严重高血压、心功能不全、心肌缺氧、心肌梗塞）；脑血管疾病患者（如脑栓塞、脑出血、脑肿瘤）；呼吸系统疾病患者（如肺气肿、肺心病）；精神病患者（如癫痫及各种精神病）；严重贫血（血红蛋白50克/升以下）；大中型手术恢复期患者。孕妇：妊娠35周及以上任何情况下都无法参团；28周及以上需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书；28周以下请慎重报名，需签署旅行社免责声明书，且无法参加探险、滑雪、出海、高空、户外等项目。残疾人：需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书、需直系家属陪同、提前至少61天申请预留位置及专用设施。老年旅游者（70周岁以上）：需提供健康证明、体检报告、直系家属陪同（否则需签免责书），本行程较长、需要一定步行能力和体力，体力不支者请慎重报名，涉及探险/滑雪/出海/高空等项目需持主治医师同意书。未成年人（未满18周岁）须由直系亲属或监护人陪同，部分景点对未满18/12/6周岁有特殊限定；6岁以下婴儿或30公斤以下儿童需提前确认符合欧盟标准的安全座椅；无父母陪同的未成年人须持父母授权书；本产品不接受2周岁以下婴儿参团。自费的滑翔伞为高风险项目（年龄10-65岁、体重10-95公斤、身体健康，基础疾病、高血压、心脏病、孕妇等禁止参与）。根据《旅游法》第15条，旅游者需如实告知与旅游活动相关的个人健康信息（包括妊娠期、哺乳期、慢性病、传染病史、疑似症状或近期疫区旅居史），若因隐瞒导致人身损害或财产损失，旅游者需自行承担责任。

title_en: France, Italy & Switzerland 11-Day Tour (One-Way: Rome to Paris)
title_zh: 法意瑞11天跟团游（罗马至巴黎单程深度线）
short_en: An 11-day one-way escorted journey from Rome to Paris through Italy's Renaissance cities, the Swiss Alps and France's grand capital.
short_zh: 11天罗马至巴黎单程跟团深度游，串联意大利文艺复兴名城、瑞士阿尔卑斯湖光山色与法兰西艺术之都。
desc_en: This 11-day one-way tour runs deep from Rome all the way to Paris, so you cover real ground instead of doubling back. In Italy you visit a different city almost every day — Rome, the Val d'Orcia and Siena, Pisa and the cliff-top fishing villages of Cinque Terre, Florence, Venice and Milan. Crossing the Alps you reach Zurich, Lucerne, Interlaken at the foot of the Jungfrau, and lakeside Geneva, before finishing in Paris with the Louvre, a Seine cruise and the Palace of Versailles. Five guided history walks, four city strolls and a national-museum guide bring the route's art and heritage to life.
desc_zh: 这条11天单程线路从罗马一路深入直抵巴黎，单向行程大幅减少大巴折返里程。意大利段几乎每天一座城市——罗马、奥尔恰谷与锡耶纳、比萨与悬崖上的五渔村、佛罗伦萨、威尼斯、米兰；翻越阿尔卑斯山后抵达苏黎世、卢塞恩、少女峰脚下的因特拉肯及湖畔日内瓦，最终在巴黎以卢浮宫、塞纳河游船和凡尔赛宫收尾。全程5场深度历史讲解、4场城市漫步与国家博物馆讲解师，带你读懂沿途艺术与人文。

highlights.en: One-way deep route from Rome to Paris — no backtracking, far less coach mileage
highlights.zh: 罗马至巴黎单程深度线，无折返，大幅降低大巴行车里程

highlights.en: A different Italian city almost every day: Rome, Siena, Pisa, Cinque Terre, Florence, Venice, Milan
highlights.zh: 意大利每天一座城市：罗马、锡耶纳、比萨、五渔村、佛罗伦萨、威尼斯、米兰

highlights.en: Scenic train ride through Cinque Terre's cliff-top fishing villages along the Ligurian coast
highlights.zh: 乘景观列车游览利古里亚海岸悬崖上的五渔村

highlights.en: Cross all four Swiss language regions — Zurich, Lucerne, Interlaken and Geneva
highlights.zh: 贯穿瑞士四大语区深度游——苏黎世、卢塞恩、因特拉肯与日内瓦

highlights.en: Two glittering Alpine lakes at Interlaken with optional Jungfrau 'Top of Europe' ascent
highlights.zh: 因特拉肯两湖之间，可自费登顶少女峰“欧洲之巅”

highlights.en: In-depth Louvre tour with a French national-museum guide, plus a Seine river cruise
highlights.zh: 卢浮宫由法兰西国家馆讲解师深度讲解，并乘塞纳河游船游览巴黎

highlights.en: Baroque masterpiece: a visit to the Palace of Versailles
highlights.zh: 参观巴洛克艺术瑰宝凡尔赛宫

highlights.en: Centrally located 4-star hotels and all-inclusive pricing with no forced shopping
highlights.zh: 城区4星级精品酒店，全包价格，无强制购物

includes.en: Hotels: 10 nights in 4-star hotels.
includes.zh: 【酒店】：四星级酒店10晚。

includes.en: Meals: 10 meals in total - breakfast at the hotel or in other forms.
includes.zh: 【餐饮】：酒店内早餐或其他形式餐饮共计10餐。

includes.en: Taxes & fees: all in-itinerary taxes and fees including city/tourist tax, entry tax, residence tax, road/bridge tolls, island-landing fees, etc.
includes.zh: 【税费】：游客城市税、进城费、居住税、路桥费、登岛费等行程内的所有税费。

includes.en: Transport: tourist coach or business travel vehicle.
includes.zh: 【交通】：旅游巴士或者商务旅行车。

includes.en: Guide: professional driver + Chinese-speaking guide, or a Chinese-speaking driver-guide throughout (note: for 8 guests or fewer, a business travel vehicle + Chinese-speaking driver-guide is arranged).
includes.zh: 【导游】：职业司机+中文导游或者全程中文司机兼导游（备注：8人及以下则安排为商务旅行车+中文司机兼导游）。

includes.en: Luggage: 1 checked bag of 23 kg plus 1 piece of hand luggage.
includes.zh: 【行李】：1件23公斤行李及1件随身行李。

includes.en: Activities & tickets: Venice island-landing ferry, Cinque Terre scenic train, Seine River cruise, Louvre admission (including national-museum docent), Versailles admission (including national-museum docent).
includes.zh: 【活动及门票】：威尼斯登岛轮渡、五渔村景观列车、塞纳河游船、卢浮宫门票（含国家馆讲解师）、凡尔赛门票（含国家馆讲解师）。

excludes.en: Passport: cost of your personal passport.
excludes.zh: 护照：个人护照费用。

excludes.en: Visa: the tourist visa fees required for the countries on the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 签证：行程中所列旅游国家所需的观光签证费用。

excludes.en: Insurance: travel insurance fees (if the itinerary involves high-risk sports, please verify whether your travel insurance covers them).
excludes.zh: 保险：旅游保险费用（如行程内涉及到高风险运动，请核实旅游保险是否包含该项运动）。

excludes.en: Tips: guests pay tips to the guide and driver totaling 10 EUR per person per day, same rate for adults and children.
excludes.zh: 小费：游客支付导游和司机小费一共10欧/人/天，大小同价。

excludes.en: Meals: lunches and dinners are not included.
excludes.zh: 餐饮：行程内不包含午、晚正餐费用。

excludes.en: Admissions: any sights not explicitly listed as included - including but not limited to sights marked "(exterior)", and all "recommended"/"optional"/"experience" items not stated as included; if you wish to visit them, please cover the cost yourself.
excludes.zh: 门票：行程中未注明费用包含的景点（包括但不仅限于行程中注明“外观”的景点，以及“推荐”、“可选”、“体验”等所有未提及费用包含的项目，如游客需要参观，敬请自理）。

excludes.en: Extended stay: any extra accommodation, transport or sightseeing outside the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 延长住宿：行程外额外延长的住宿、交通、观光费用。

excludes.en: Personal spending: drinks/alcohol, taxis, phone charges and other personal expenses.
excludes.zh: 私人消费：如饮料酒类、出租车、电话费等个人消费。

excludes.en: Other transport: transport not mentioned in the inclusions beyond the included business vehicle or minibus - e.g. the Venice gondola, and the sightseeing trains or electric taxis in vehicle-restricted zones - is at your own expense.
excludes.zh: 其他交通：除包含商务旅行车或者中巴之外，费用包含中未提及的其他交通费用，如威尼斯贡多拉，以及车辆限行区的观光火车、电瓶出租车等费用敬请自理。

excludes.en: Free activities: guests' own nighttime sightseeing and the itinerary's recommended options, plus the transport, meals, admissions, shopping and other costs they incur.
excludes.zh: 自由活动：游客夜间自行游览及行程中的推荐项目，以及产生的交通、餐饮、门票、购物等费用。

excludes.en: Experience activities: any travel-experience activities in the itinerary that are not included.
excludes.zh: 体验活动：行程中没有包含的各项旅游体验活动。

excludes.en: Other costs: anything not mentioned in the inclusions. For extra costs caused by force majeure (natural disaster, war, strike, etc.), transport delays, flight cancellation/rescheduling, embassy visa delays, insufficient group numbers, or other circumstances not attributable to us (e.g. overseas visa-extension fees, accommodation, meals, transport, national airfare adjustments), we reserve the right to charge the price difference.
excludes.zh: 其他费用：费用包含中未提及的费用。如因天灾、战争、罢工等不可抗力原因，及因交通延阻、航班取消或更改时间、使馆延误出签证、人数不足等特殊情况或其他非我公司原因所引致的额外费用（如在外延期签证费、住、食及交通费、国家航空运价调整等），我公司有权追加差价。

timeline.title_en: Rome - Glory of the Eternal City
timeline.title_zh: 罗马——重温“万城之城”古罗马帝国的辉煌
timeline.description_en: Meet in the morning and set off on a walking tour of Rome with your guide, exploring the historic and cultural heart of the ancient Roman Empire, the city known as the "Eternal City." You will see the Colosseum (exterior) and the Pantheon (exterior), then stroll through Piazza di Spagna (Spanish Steps) and the Trevi Fountain (exterior). Because Rome's old town is protected and largely vehicle-free, the day is covered on foot (about 5-6 km), as all the city-center sights lie within the ancient core. Afterward enjoy free time before checking in. Overnight at the Sheraton Roma Medici / Hotel Mantegna or a similar 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午集合，在导游带领下徒步游览世界著名的历史文化名城罗马，这里是古罗马帝国的发祥地，因历史悠久而被称为“永恒之城”。参观罗马斗兽场（外观）、万神殿（外观），并游览西班牙广场和特莱维喷泉（许愿池，外观）。由于罗马古城建筑受保护、大多为步行街区，且市区景点都集中在古罗马城内，当天全程徒步游览，步行约5-6公里。之后自由活动，再入住酒店。夜宿：罗马梅第奇喜来登酒店或曼特尼亚酒店，或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Rome - Pienza - Siena (Val d'Orcia cypress lane & medieval Siena)
timeline.title_zh: 罗马-皮恩扎-锡耶纳（中世纪艺术瑰宝锡耶纳，邂逅奥尔恰谷丝柏树小径）
timeline.description_en: Depart Rome in the morning for the medieval hill town of Pienza. Stop along the way for free photos at the famous cypress-tree lane, then tour Piazza Pio II and Pienza Cathedral (exterior). Continue to Siena, where you visit Siena Cathedral (exterior), the shell-shaped Piazza del Campo, the Palazzo Pubblico (town hall, exterior) and the 102 m Torre del Mangia (exterior). From Pienza's walls you can look out over the UNESCO World Heritage Val d'Orcia, the postcard landscape of rolling Tuscan hills dotted with cypresses and vineyards. Overnight at the Four Points by Sheraton Siena or a similar 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午从罗马出发前往皮恩扎古城，途中在丝柏树小径自由拍照，之后游览皮恩扎二世广场、皮恩扎大教堂（外观）等景点。随后前往锡耶纳，游览锡耶纳大教堂（外观）、形似贝壳的田野广场、锡耶纳市政厅（外观）以及高102米的曼吉亚塔楼（外观）。在皮恩扎古城墙上可俯瞰联合国世界遗产奥尔恰山谷（Val d'Orcia）——蓝天白云、连绵起伏的丘陵点缀着成排的丝柏树与葡萄藤，正是托斯卡纳田园风光的经典写照。夜宿：锡耶纳福朋喜来登酒店，或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Siena - Pisa - Cinque Terre - Florence (cliffside fishing villages on the Ligurian coast)
timeline.title_zh: 锡耶纳-比萨-五渔村-佛罗伦萨（景观列车游览五渔村，游利古里亚海景城镇）
timeline.description_en: In the morning head to Pisa to see the Leaning Tower of Pisa (exterior) and the Piazza dei Miracoli (Square of Miracles) at the heart of Pisa's historic center, whose ensemble of cathedral, baptistery, tower and cemetery is a UNESCO World Heritage Site. Then travel to the Cinque Terre, the five colorful cliffside villages strung along the Ligurian coastline (Monterosso, Vernazza, Corniglia, Manarola and Riomaggiore), explored via the scenic train. Note: if bad weather or a rail strike prevents visiting the Cinque Terre, the itinerary automatically switches to touring the coastal towns by coach or other means. Overnight at the Hilton Florence Metropole or a similar 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往比萨，游览比萨斜塔（外观）和位于比萨历史文化中心的奇迹广场（Piazza dei Miracoli）——广场上的大教堂、洗礼堂、斜塔（钟楼）与墓园被列为世界遗产。随后前往五渔村，沿利古里亚海岸线游览蒙特罗索、韦尔纳扎、科尔尼利亚、马纳罗拉、里奥马焦雷这五个悬崖边上五彩斑斓的美丽渔村，乘坐景观列车串联游览。备注：如遇恶劣天气或铁路公司罢工等因素导致无法游览五渔村，行程将自动更改为乘坐大巴车或其它形式游览海岸线城市。夜宿：佛罗伦萨希尔顿大都会酒店，或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Florence - Venice (heart of the Renaissance)
timeline.title_zh: 佛罗伦萨-威尼斯（诗歌之地，文艺复兴之魂的艺术之旅）
timeline.description_en: In the morning explore Florence, the birthplace of the Renaissance: visit the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore (the third-largest church in the world; exterior), the Piazza della Signoria with its open-air sculptures and a replica of Michelangelo's David, the Ponte Vecchio (Old Bridge) over the Arno, and the Piazza Santa Croce with the Basilica of Santa Croce (exterior), resting place of Michelangelo and Galileo. Afterward travel to Venice and check in. Overnight at the voco Venice / Hilton Garden Inn Venice (Ambassador) or a similar 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往文艺复兴发源地佛罗伦萨，参观世界第三大教堂——圣母百花大教堂（外观）、市政广场（露天雕塑博物馆，立有米开朗基罗《大卫》复制品和海神喷泉）、横跨阿诺河的维奇奥桥（老桥），以及圣十字广场和米开朗基罗、伽利略安息之地的圣十字大教堂（外观）。之后前往威尼斯入住酒店。夜宿：威尼斯洲际VOCO酒店或希尔顿大使酒店，或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Venice - Milan (romantic city on the water)
timeline.title_zh: 威尼斯-米兰（游览温柔碧波上浪漫的威尼斯）
timeline.description_en: In the morning tour Venice: St Mark's Basilica (exterior), St Mark's Square (Piazza San Marco, called by Napoleon "the most beautiful drawing room in Europe"), the Bridge of Sighs (exterior) and the magnificent Doge's Palace (exterior). These beautiful buildings rising from the water, together with the winding canals, give Venice its lingering romance. Afterward travel to the fashion capital, Milan. Overnight at the Royal Garden Hotel or a similar 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午参观圣马可大教堂（外观）、圣马可广场（曾被拿破仑称作“欧洲美丽的客厅”）、叹息桥（外观）以及华丽的总督宫（外观）。这些建造在水上的美丽建筑与蜿蜒的水巷一起，让威尼斯的浪漫风情久久挥之不去。之后前往时尚之都米兰。夜宿：皇家花园酒店，或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Milan - Zurich (along the Alps, from fashion capital to financial capital)
timeline.title_zh: 米兰-苏黎世（沿阿尔卑斯山脉，从时尚之都游览金融之都）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, freely visit Milan's landmark Duomo (Milan Cathedral, exterior) and the Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II, one of Europe's most beautiful shopping arcades. In the afternoon travel to Zurich and tour the Grossmünster (Zurich's Great Minster, exterior), Lake Zurich, the luxury Bahnhofstrasse, and stroll along the Limmat River. Overnight at the H+ Hotel Zurich (Limmattal) or a similar 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，自由参观米兰的标志性建筑米兰大教堂（外观）和欧洲漂亮的商业拱廊之一——埃马努埃莱二世长廊。下午前往苏黎世，游览苏黎世大教堂（外观）、苏黎世湖、班霍夫大街（车站大街），并漫步利马特河边。夜宿：苏黎世利马塔尔哈利之家酒店，或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Zurich - Lucerne - Interlaken (the idyllic Lungern village & Swiss lakes and mountains)
timeline.title_zh: 苏黎世-卢塞恩-因特拉肯（世外桃源龙疆镇，瑞士湖光山色代表作）
timeline.description_en: In the morning travel to Lucerne to enjoy the lake-and-mountain scenery of Lake Lucerne, see the Lion Monument that commemorates Switzerland's loyal Swiss Guards, and visit the Chapel Bridge (Kapellbrücke) and the octagonal Water Tower. Then continue to the idyllic village of Lungern to take in the Lungern lake and village views. In the afternoon proceed to Interlaken, the town at the foot of the "Top of Europe" Jungfrau. Overnight at the Solis Sigriswil (alpine lake-view hotel in Sigriswil) or a similar 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午出发前往卢塞恩，游览卢塞恩湖的湖光山色，在狮子纪念碑前聆听瑞士雇佣兵忠贞坚毅的历史，并游览卡贝尔廊桥和八角形水塔等景点；之后前往龙疆小镇，游览龙疆湖及小镇风光；下午前往欧洲屋脊“少女峰”山脚下的小镇因特拉肯。夜宿：锡格里斯维尔雪山湖景酒店，或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Interlaken - Jungfrau - Geneva (between Switzerland's two lakes, panoramas of the Jungfrau)
timeline.title_zh: 因特拉肯-少女峰-日内瓦（行瑞士“两湖”之间，赏“少女峰”全景）
timeline.description_en: Spend the morning in Interlaken, set between Lake Brienz and Lake Thun ("the left and right eyes of God"). You may freely explore Höheweg street and the green Höhematte and the quiet villages; or choose (at your own expense) the Jungfrau panorama cable cars to the "Top of Europe" - Europe's highest railway station - and the Sphinx Observatory and Aletsch Glacier; or choose (at your own expense) Grindelwald-First with the First Cliff Walk. Only one of these three options may be chosen. Afterward check in near Geneva. Overnight at the Novotel Annemasse Genève Port / Crowne Plaza or a similar 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午游览位于布里恩茨湖和图恩湖（有“上帝左眼与右眼”之称）之间的因特拉肯，可选自由游览何维克街、荷黑马特绿地及宁静村庄；或自费选择少女峰全景缆车登顶——Top of Europe欧洲较高的火车站，前往“斯芬克斯观景台”及阿莱奇冰川；或自费前往瑞士高山探险小镇菲斯特，游览悬崖天梭巅峰栈道。以上三项仅可三选一，不可同时选择两项。随后入住安纳马斯日内瓦港诺富特酒店。夜宿：安娜玛斯日内瓦港诺富特酒店或皇冠假日酒店，或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Geneva - Paris (strolling Lake Geneva and the old town)
timeline.title_zh: 日内瓦-巴黎（漫步日内瓦湖畔，看花桥横渡古城区）
timeline.description_en: In the morning explore the "Flower Bridge" (Pont des Bergues) area beside the hotel, gathering Geneva's local foods and specialty shops, then visit Geneva's Old Town, the Lake Geneva (Lac Léman) waterfront, the Flower Clock and the Jet d'Eau (the great fountain, 140 m high). The whole lake region, straddling Switzerland and France, is a UNESCO World Heritage area of well-preserved medieval towns. In the afternoon travel by coach back to Paris. Overnight at the Mercure / Novotel Paris or a similar 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午游览位于酒店旁的“花桥”区域，这里云集日内瓦各种当地美食和特色商店，参观日内瓦老城、日内瓦湖区、花钟和大喷泉（高140米）等景点。整个横跨瑞士与法国的日内瓦湖区被列为世界遗产，沿途保存完好的中世纪小城风光秀丽。下午乘车返回巴黎。夜宿：巴黎美居酒店或诺富特酒店，或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Paris - Louvre - Paris (the origins of art at the Louvre & Seine cruise)
timeline.title_zh: 巴黎-卢浮宫-巴黎（深度理解艺术的起源——卢浮宫，爱上沙龙文化）
timeline.description_en: In the morning visit the Louvre Museum, with an in-depth themed presentation by a French national-museum docent. In the afternoon tour Notre-Dame de Paris, the Île de la Cité, the Eiffel Tower (exterior) and the Champ de Mars, then take a Seine River cruise (the famous "bateaux mouches" with glass cabins, about 3.2 km / 1 hour) passing Les Invalides (exterior), the Grand and Petit Palais (exterior), Place de la Concorde and more, spending the whole day among central Paris landmarks. Note: in peak season the Louvre may limit groups; if in-gallery guiding is restricted, a 10 EUR per-guest guiding fee is refunded. Overnight at the Mercure / Novotel Paris or a similar 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午参观法兰西引以为傲的卢浮宫博物馆，由法兰西国家馆讲解师精选主题深度讲解。下午前往游览巴黎圣母院、西岱岛、埃菲尔铁塔（外观）以及战神广场，之后乘坐塞纳河游船（著名的透明船舱“苍蝇船”，约3.2公里、约1小时）游览荣军院（外观）、大小皇宫（外观）、协和广场等地，全天游览巴黎市中心景点。备注：由于卢浮宫限流，特别是旺季限制讲解员在馆内讲解，届时将退还馆内讲解费10欧元/每位游客。夜宿：巴黎美居酒店或诺富特酒店，或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Paris - Versailles - Paris (the Baroque jewel of the Palace of Versailles)
timeline.title_zh: 巴黎-凡尔赛-巴黎（巴洛克艺术瑰宝凡尔赛宫，时尚艺术先锋）
timeline.description_en: In the morning head to Paris's fashion hub on Boulevard Haussmann and Rue Royale, with free time to see the Opéra Garnier (Paris Opera House, exterior) and the fashion districts of Printemps and Galeries Lafayette. In the afternoon travel to the Palace of Versailles in Paris's southwestern suburbs for a tour of the palace, then return to Place d'Italie in Paris where the tour concludes. There is no hotel on this final day. The tour disperses around 18:30 at Place d'Italie - it is not recommended to book a flight departing Paris the same day.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往巴黎时尚中心奥斯曼大街和皇家大道，自由参观巴黎歌剧院（外观）及春天百货、巴黎老佛爷等时尚街区。下午前往位于巴黎西南部郊区的凡尔赛宫，游览凡尔赛宫；返回巴黎意大利广场结束美好行程。当天无酒店住宿。行程于18:30左右在巴黎意大利广场解散，不推荐预订结束当天离开巴黎的航班。

meeting_en: Rome, Italy — group meets in the morning in central Rome; tour ends in Paris (one-way route).
meeting_zh: 意大利罗马——上午于罗马市区集合；行程在巴黎结束（单程线路）。

faqs.question_en: Where and when do we meet and disperse?
faqs.question_zh: 集合及集散地点和方法是怎样的？
faqs.answer_en: Two departure options. Route A: Day 1 meet at 09:00 at Roma Tiburtina railway station; Day 11 disperse around 18:30 at Place d'Italie in Paris. You may book a flight arriving in Rome on the same day, but boarding after 14:00 means the Rome city sights cannot be visited, with no refund - and a same-day departure flight from Paris is not recommended. Route B: Day 1 meet around 18:30 at Roma Tiburtina station; Day 11 disperse around 18:30 at Place d'Italie. You may book a same-day arrival into Rome; a same-day departure from Paris is not recommended. Times and places are for reference - the actual departure time follows the official departure notice.
faqs.answer_zh: 有两种出发选择。行程A：第1天09:00在Roma Tiburtina（罗马提布尔蒂纳）火车站集合，第11天18:30左右在巴黎意大利广场解散；可预定参团当天抵达罗马的航班，但14:00之后上团则罗马市区景点会无法游览，并无费用可退，不推荐结束当天离开巴黎的航班。行程B：第1天18:30左右在Roma Tiburtina火车站集合，第11天18:30左右在巴黎意大利广场解散；可预定参团当天抵达罗马的航班，不推荐结束当天离开巴黎的航班。以上为参考时间及地点，实际出发时间以出团通知书为准。

faqs.question_en: Will the coach journeys be very long?
faqs.question_zh: 行程路线乘坐大巴时间会不会很久？
faqs.answer_en: Only the Geneva-Paris leg is long, about 6 hours 45 minutes; all other planned legs are roughly 3-4 hours of driving. Note that road conditions are complex, and city traffic jams or other factors may increase travel time.
faqs.answer_zh: 该产品仅日内瓦至巴黎段约为6小时45分，其余计划行程均为3-4小时左右的行车时间。公路交通情况复杂，特别是市区内容易发生堵车或其它因素导致行车时间增加。

faqs.question_en: Can the product include going to the top of the Jungfrau?
faqs.question_zh: 产品是否可以游览少女峰登顶？
faqs.answer_en: Yes, you may do it, but the cost is not included. If you wish to take part, we recommend booking in advance. The available time for this option is limited and may conflict with the original itinerary, affecting the arrangement of other sights and experiences.
faqs.answer_zh: 可以游览，但费用不包含。如需参加建议提前预定。可选的体验时间受限，可能跟原行程安排产生冲突，导致影响其他行程和体验的安排。

faqs.question_en: Can I visit the First Top of Adventure in Switzerland?
faqs.question_zh: 我是否能游览菲斯特瑞士空天探险活动（First Top of Adventure）？
faqs.answer_en: Yes, you may visit it, but the cost is not included. If you wish to take part, we recommend booking in advance.
faqs.answer_zh: 可以游览，但费用不包含。如需参加建议提前预定。

faqs.question_en: What adventure activities are there at First (Grindelwald-First)?
faqs.question_zh: 菲斯特都有什么探险活动？
faqs.answer_en: First's adventure park has many thrilling high-mountain activities. The main ones are: the Aerial Gondola, the First Cliff Walk, the First Flyer (zip line) and the First Glider. These can be purchased on the spot depending on the day's queue times and weather.
faqs.answer_zh: 菲斯特空天探险有很多惊险刺激的高山活动，主要项目有：空中贡多拉（Aerial gondola）、悬崖天梭巅峰栈道（First Cliff Walk）、高空飞索（First Flyer）、神鹰飞梭（First Glider）。可根据当天排队时间及天气情况现场购买。

faqs.question_en: Can I choose both the Jungfrau sightseeing train and the First adventure activities?
faqs.question_zh: 我是否能同时选择少女峰观光列车和菲斯特空天探险两个项目？
faqs.answer_en: No. There are only 5-6 hours of free time in Interlaken that day. The Jungfrau is recommended to take 4-5 hours, and First needs 3-4 hours, so the two cannot both be done.
faqs.answer_zh: 不可以。当天在因特拉肯仅有5-6小时自由活动时间，推荐游览少女峰时间为4到5小时，菲斯特需要3-4个小时，二者无法同时选择。

faqs.question_en: Can I visit the Cinque Terre by boat?
faqs.question_zh: 我是否可以选择乘船游览五渔村？
faqs.answer_en: Because boat tours are affected by weather, this product does not include Cinque Terre boat tickets. You may choose to tour by boat, but the train-ticket cost cannot be refunded/exchanged, and you must buy the boat ticket yourself (about 35 EUR).
faqs.answer_zh: 由于乘船游览受气候影响，该产品并非包含五渔村船票，但可以选择乘船游览，只是无法退换火车票的费用，并且需要自行购买船票，约35欧元。

faqs.question_en: Can we tour central Rome by coach?
faqs.question_zh: 罗马市中心我们是否可以乘车游览？
faqs.answer_en: No. Because Rome's sights are very concentrated and the area is pedestrian-only, we cannot arrange a tourist coach - the central Rome sights are visited on foot.
faqs.answer_zh: 由于罗马各个景点非常集中，并且都是步行街区，因此我社无法安排旅游大巴，罗马市中心景点需要徒步游览。

faqs.question_en: Can we choose different dishes for dinner according to our taste?
faqs.question_zh: 我们的晚餐是否能根据喜欢选择不同的菜单和菜品？
faqs.answer_en: The meals recommended in the itinerary are all recommended local specialties and are not included in the price - for example Venice's famous squid-ink pasta or the Tuscan steak. You cannot choose a different set menu; if the dish is not your first choice, you are free to choose other dining options yourself.
faqs.answer_zh: 行程内推荐的餐饮全部为推荐当地特色餐，费用并未包含，比如威尼斯著名的黑墨鱼面、托斯卡纳的牛排等。无法选择其它菜式，如果菜品并非您的首选，可以自行选择其他餐饮。

faqs.question_en: Are there optional self-paid items, and what should I know about the Louvre, Versailles and the Cinque Terre?
faqs.question_zh: 有哪些自费项目，以及卢浮宫、凡尔赛和五渔村有哪些注意事项？
faqs.answer_en: For groups of 8 or fewer the tour automatically becomes a small group with a business vehicle + driver-guide. In peak season the Louvre may limit groups: if changed to individual tickets, a 10 EUR Louvre guiding fee is refunded per person; if entry is impossible, the admission + guiding fee is refunded and it becomes an exterior visit. For Versailles, when there are fewer than 3 people an audio guide replaces the official docent. For the Cinque Terre, due to time and personal stamina you visit only some of the villages as arranged by the guide; if bad weather or a rail strike prevents the visit, it switches to a coach or other means along the coast. The optional paragliding is a high-risk activity (risks of weightlessness, impact, weather): ages 10-65, weight 10-95 kg, in good health (those with underlying disease, hypertension, heart disease, or pregnant women are forbidden); you must follow the instructor and rules - ordinary travel insurance does not cover high-risk activities. This is a continuously circulating group: other guests board and leave at different points, so begin and end according to your own registered destination.
faqs.answer_zh: 报名人数为8人及以下时，本团自动改为小团，安排商务旅行车+司机兼导游。卢浮宫在旺季可能针对旅游团限流：如改为散拼门票，则退还每位卢浮宫10欧元讲解费；如无法入内则退还景点门票+讲解费，并改为外观游览。凡尔赛不足3人时由讲解器替代官导讲解。五渔村因时间和个人体力原因，选择其中个别村子游览，具体以导游安排为准；如遇恶劣天气或铁路罢工等无法游览，则改为乘大巴或其它形式游览海岸线城市。本产品自费项目滑翔伞为高风险项目（可能存在失重、撞击、天气影响等），参加年龄要求10-65周岁、体重10-95公斤、身体健康（基础疾病、高血压、心脏病、孕妇等禁止参与），必须听从教练指挥、遵守安全规范，普通旅游保险不包含高风险项目。本产品为循环套发团，会有其他游客在不同地点上下团，请根据自己报名的目的地开始和结束行程。

faqs.question_en: Do I need a visa?
faqs.question_zh: 是否需要签证？
faqs.answer_en: Yes. This product does not include visa fees; it requires a Schengen visa (single or multiple entry) - if you need a visa, please choose a Schengen-visa product. After booking we provide all the materials for the Schengen visa application free of charge (see the detailed materials list). When you entrust us to handle the Schengen visa, we purchase Schengen travel insurance meeting the visa requirements; if you do not, you must buy your own insurance and handle claims yourself. Your passport must be valid for at least 6 months from the date of departure, or customs may refuse entry. Visa fees, visa service fees, Schengen insurance fees and visa-center appointment fees are all non-refundable and non-transferable - even if the product is refunded/changed, the visa costs cannot be refunded. "Visa-worry-free": for products signed with us at least 61 days before departure, if the visa is not obtained within 45 days before departure, we bear all losses and immediately refund all travel fees; guests not meeting this clause who fail to obtain a visa are refunded per the change-and-cancellation terms. A refusal must be reported to us within 48 hours with the consulate's refusal letter; any supplementary/changed materials must be submitted within five days, and you may not unilaterally waive the "visa defense" right.
faqs.answer_zh: 需要。本产品不包含签证费用，需要申根签证（单次或多次入境）——如需办理签证请选择申根签证产品。预订后免费提供办理申根签证的全部材料（参考详细材料清单）。如委托我社办理申根签证，我社为您购买符合申根签证要求的申根旅游保险；若未委托办理，需自行购买旅游保险并自行负责理赔。护照有效期需在离境之日起至少还有六个月，否则海关有权拒绝入境。签证费、签证服务费、申根保险费、签证中心预约费均不可退款、不可更改使用者，即使产品退改签，签证费用也无法退款。“保签无忧”：出发日前61天与我社签约的旅游产品，如在出发前45天内未获取签证，我社承担所有损失，立即退还全部旅游费用；不符合该条款的游客如未正常获取签证，按“退改与取消条款”退费。如遇拒签需在48小时内通知我社并出具使领馆拒签函，如需补充或更改材料须在五天内提交，且不得单方面放弃“签证抗辩”权利。

faqs.question_en: Booking, changes & cancellation
faqs.question_zh: 预订、变更与取消须知
faqs.answer_en: Free, no-reason cancellation is available up to 30 days before departure (the 30th day not included). Because flights, traffic, ferry cancellations and strikes can shift the order and timing of the itinerary, you must arrive at the meeting point one day before the tour starts and leave the dispersal point one day after it ends, leaving reasonable flight-connection time (at least 5 hours for transfers at the same airport, 7 hours for different airports in the same city; reasonable meet/disperse window is 07:00-21:00). This is a shared/join-in group (拼团); the group is declared confirmed (成团) at 10 people, and if 10 are not reached by 30 days before departure either side may cancel without penalty. Two people booking together default to a standard twin/double (bed type assigned by the hotel, not selectable); solo travelers pay a single-room supplement unless successfully sharing; a triple/family room is for two parents + one minor child with bed type assigned by the hotel. European hotels are non-smoking, do not provide free boiled water or disposable toiletries, and use 14:00 check-in / 11:00 check-out. All pricing is in EUR at the time of booking; if you pay in CNY, the amount is the real-time CNY value auto-calculated from the Bank of China "EUR sell" rate on the day of payment, and any exchange-rate difference or bank fees on refunds are borne by the traveler. Listed hotel names are preferred hotels and may be replaced by similar same-star hotels without separate notice. Refunds for part-cancellation, transport name-changes (hotel 6-18 EUR, air 100-120 EUR per leg, train/ferry 35-180 EUR per ticket) and itinerary changes follow the official Change & Cancellation Terms.
faqs.answer_zh: 出发前30天（不含第30天）可申请无理由免费取消。由于航变、交通拥堵、渡轮取消、罢工等可能调整行程时间及先后顺序，本产品要求旅游者在旅游团开始前一天到达集合地、结束后一天离开集散地，并预留合理航班衔接时间（同一机场转机至少5小时、同城不同机场至少7小时；合理集合集散时段为07:00至21:00）。本产品为散客拼团，成团人数为10人，行程开始前30天（不含第30天）未达到成团人数的，游客和我社均有权解除合同，宣布成团前双方均不承担违约责任。两人同时报名默认入住标准双人间（床型由酒店安排不可选）；单人报名默认含单人房差，拼房成功后按比例退款；三人家庭间默认为两位父母与一位未成年儿童入住，床型由酒店安排。欧洲酒店全面禁烟、不提供免费开水及一次性洗漱用品，入住14:00、退房11:00。所有定价以欧元为预订计价单位，如选择人民币支付，则以当天支付时本网站依据中国银行实时“欧元卖出价”自动计算的人民币价格为准，退款时的汇率差异或银行手续费由旅行者承担。行程内所列酒店名称为优先入住酒店，如订满则更换为相近条件、相同星级的酒店，恕不另行通知。部分退团、交通更名费（酒店6-18欧、航空每程100-120欧、火车及游轮每张35-180欧）及更改行程等退费均按《更改与取消条例条款》执行。

faqs.question_en: Health & safety requirements
faqs.question_zh: 健康与安全须知
faqs.answer_en: Please have a health check before departure and do NOT book if you have: infectious diseases (e.g. active tuberculosis, typhoid); cardiovascular disease (severe hypertension, heart insufficiency, myocardial ischemia/infarction); cerebrovascular disease (embolism, hemorrhage, brain tumor); respiratory disease (emphysema, cor pulmonale); psychiatric conditions (epilepsy and other mental illness); severe anemia (hemoglobin below 50 g/L); or recovery from major/medium surgery. Pregnancy: at 35 weeks or more you cannot join under any circumstances; at 28 weeks or more you must provide a doctor's exam report (within 7 days) and a physician's consent letter; under 28 weeks please register with caution, sign a liability waiver, and you cannot take part in adventure/skiing/sea/aerial/outdoor items. Disabled travelers need a recent (within 7 days) medical report + physician's consent, an immediate-family escort, and must apply at least 61 days ahead for reserved facilities. Travelers over 70 need a health certificate, medical report and family escort (or sign a waiver); this is a long itinerary requiring good walking ability and stamina. Minors (under 18) must be accompanied by an immediate relative/guardian; some sights have rules for under-18/12/6; for infants under 6 or children under 30 kg please confirm a safety child seat in advance; an under-18 traveling without parents needs parental authorization. Infants under 2 are not accepted. Per Article 15 of the Tourism Law, travelers must truthfully declare health information relevant to the trip (pregnancy, lactation, chronic disease, infectious-disease history, suspected symptoms or recent travel to epidemic areas) and follow safety warnings; concealment causing harm or loss makes the traveler liable, and may allow contract termination without refund.
faqs.answer_zh: 为确保旅游顺利、防止旅途中发生人身意外，请在出行前做一次必要的身体检查。如存在下列情况请勿报名：传染性疾病（如活动期肺结核、伤寒）；心血管疾病（严重高血压、心功能不全、心肌缺氧、心肌梗塞）；脑血管疾病（脑栓塞、脑出血、脑肿瘤）；呼吸系统疾病（肺气肿、肺心病）；精神病（癫痫及各种精神病）；严重贫血（血红蛋白50克/升以下）；大中型手术恢复期。孕妇：妊娠35周及以上任何情况下都无法参团；28周及以上需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书；28周以下请慎重报名，需签署旅行社免责声明书，且无法参加探险、滑雪、出海、高空、户外等项目。残疾人需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书、需直系家属陪同、并提前至少61天申请预留位置及专用设施。70周岁以上老年人需提供健康证明、体检报告并由直系家属陪同（否则需签署免责声明书）；本行程较长，需要一定步行能力和体力，体力不支者请慎重报名。未成年人（未满18周岁）需由直系亲属或监护人陪同，部分景点对未满18/12/6周岁有特殊限定；6岁以下婴儿或30公斤以下儿童请提前确认安全儿童座椅；无父母陪同的未成年人需持父母授权书。本产品不接受2周岁以下婴儿参团。根据《旅游法》第15条，旅游者须如实告知与旅游活动相关的个人健康信息（妊娠期、哺乳期、慢性病、传染病史、疑似症状或近期疫区旅居史）并遵守安全警示规定，若因隐瞒导致人身损害或财产损失，旅游者需自行承担责任，旅行社可解除合同且不退还费用。

title_en: Italy in Depth: Rome to Venice 5-Day Small-Group Tour
title_zh: 意大利深度5天小团游（罗马至威尼斯）
short_en: A 5-day one-way journey from the Eternal City of Rome through Tuscany and the Cinque Terre to romantic Venice, with no backtracking.
short_zh: 5天单程深度之旅，从永恒之城罗马一路经托斯卡纳、五渔村抵达浪漫水城威尼斯，全程不走回头路。
desc_en: Travel one-way through the heart of Italy on this 5-day small-group tour, starting in the Eternal City of Rome and ending in romantic Venice. The route threads together Italy's classic highlights: ancient Roman ruins, the medieval art treasure of Siena and the Val d'Orcia, the cliffside fishing villages of the Cinque Terre reached by scenic train, the Renaissance splendour of Florence, and the waterways of Venice. Designed as a single deep route with no backtracking, the trip blends history, art and Mediterranean coastline, with nights in city-centre 4-star hotels throughout.
desc_zh: 这趟5天小团之旅以单程方式深入意大利腹地，从永恒之城罗马出发，最终抵达浪漫水城威尼斯。行程串联意大利经典亮点：古罗马遗迹、中世纪艺术瑰宝锡耶纳与奥尔恰谷、乘景观列车前往的悬崖渔村五渔村、文艺复兴瑰宝佛罗伦萨，以及威尼斯纵横的水巷。行程设计为单程深度游览，不走回头路，融合历史、艺术与地中海海岸风光，全程入住城市四星级酒店。

highlights.en: Explore Rome, the "Eternal City" and cradle of the ancient Roman Empire, on foot
highlights.zh: 徒步深度探访“永恒之城”罗马，古罗马帝国的发祥地

highlights.en: See the Colosseum, Pantheon, Spanish Steps and Trevi Fountain in Rome
highlights.zh: 游览罗马斗兽场、万神殿、西班牙广场与特莱维喷泉

highlights.en: Discover medieval Siena and the UNESCO Val d'Orcia, with cypress-lined lanes of Tuscany
highlights.zh: 探访中世纪古城锡耶纳与世界遗产奥尔恰谷，邂逅托斯卡纳绝美丝柏小径

highlights.en: Ride the scenic train through the cliffside fishing villages of the Cinque Terre
highlights.zh: 乘坐景观列车游览悬崖上的五渔村

highlights.en: Soak up Renaissance Florence: the Duomo, Ponte Vecchio and Piazza della Signoria
highlights.zh: 在文艺复兴之都佛罗伦萨欣赏圣母百花大教堂、老桥与市政广场

highlights.en: Wander romantic Venice: St Mark's Square, the Bridge of Sighs and the Doge's Palace
highlights.zh: 漫步浪漫威尼斯：圣马可广场、叹息桥与总督宫

highlights.en: One-way deep route with no backtracking, plus city-centre 4-star hotels throughout
highlights.zh: 单程深度路线不走回头路，全程入住城市四星级酒店

highlights.en: Chinese-speaking guide-driver, intercity transport and key attraction tickets all included
highlights.zh: 全程中文司导、城际交通与重点景点门票全含

includes.en: Hotels: 4 nights in 4-star hotels.
includes.zh: 【酒店】：四星级酒店4晚。

includes.en: Meals: in-hotel breakfast or meals in other forms, 4 meals in total.
includes.zh: 【餐饮】：酒店内早餐或其他形式餐饮共计4餐。

includes.en: Execution fees: in-itinerary execution costs such as city tourist tax, city-entry fees, residence tax, road/bridge tolls, parking and fuel fees, and driver-guide meal allowances.
includes.zh: 【执行】：游客城市税、进城费、居住税、过路过桥费、停车燃油费、司导餐补等行程内执行费用。

includes.en: Transport: tour coach or business travel van.
includes.zh: 【交通】：旅游巴士或者商务旅行车。

includes.en: Guide: professional driver + Chinese-speaking guide, or a Chinese-speaking driver-guide throughout (note: for groups of 8 or fewer, a business travel van + Chinese-speaking driver-guide is arranged, and this driver-guide leads the sightseeing in all cities).
includes.zh: 【导游】：职业司机+中文导游或者全程中文司机兼导游（备注：8人及以下则安排为商务旅行车+中文司机兼导游，届时将有司兼导带领游览全部城市行程）。

includes.en: Luggage: 1 piece of checked luggage up to 23 kg plus 1 carry-on.
includes.zh: 【行李】：1件23公斤行李及1件随身行李。

includes.en: Tickets: the Cinque Terre scenic train and the Venice island ferry.
includes.zh: 【门票】：五渔村小火车、威尼斯登岛轮渡。

excludes.en: Passport: personal passport fees.
excludes.zh: 护照：个人护照费用。

excludes.en: Visa: the tourist visa fees required for the countries listed in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 签证：行程中所列旅游国家所需的观光签证费用。

excludes.en: Insurance: travel insurance fees (if the itinerary involves high-risk sports, please confirm whether your travel insurance covers them).
excludes.zh: 保险：旅游保险费用（如行程内涉及到高风险运动，请核实旅游保险是否包含该项运动）。

excludes.en: Tips: gratuities for the guide and driver totalling 10 euros per person per day, same price for adults and children.
excludes.zh: 小费：游客支付导游和司机小费一共10欧/人/天，大小同价。

excludes.en: Meals: lunches and dinners (main meals) are not included in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 餐饮：行程中不包含午、晚正餐费用。

excludes.en: Tickets: attractions not stated as fee-included in the itinerary (including but not limited to all sights marked "exterior", and all "recommended", "optional", "experience" and other items not mentioned as included); please pay for these yourself if you wish to visit.
excludes.zh: 门票：行程中未注明费用包含的景点（包括但不仅限于行程中注明“外观”的景点，以及“推荐”“可选”“体验”等所有未提及费用包含的项目，如游客需要参观，敬请自理）。

excludes.en: Extended stay: any extra accommodation, transport and sightseeing costs beyond the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 延长住宿：行程外额外延长的住宿、交通、观光费用。

excludes.en: Personal spending: such as drinks/alcohol, taxis, phone charges and other personal expenses.
excludes.zh: 私人消费：如饮料酒类、出租车、电话费等个人消费。

excludes.en: Other transport: transport costs not mentioned as included beyond the business van or minibus, such as the Venice gondola and the sightseeing trains / electric taxis in traffic-restricted zones; please pay for these yourself.
excludes.zh: 其他交通：除包含商务旅行车或者中巴之外，费用包含中未提及的其他交通费用，如威尼斯贡多拉，以及车辆限行区的观光火车、电瓶出租车等费用敬请自理。

excludes.en: Free activities: guests' own night-time sightseeing and the recommended items in the itinerary, plus any transport, dining, tickets and shopping they generate.
excludes.zh: 自由活动：游客夜间自行游览及行程中的推荐项目，以及产生的交通、餐饮、门票、购物等费用。

excludes.en: Experience activities: any travel experience activities not included in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 体验活动：行程中的没有包含的各项旅游体验活动。

excludes.en: Other costs: anything not mentioned in the inclusions. In cases of force majeure (natural disaster, war, strike, etc.) or special situations such as traffic delays, flight cancellations/rescheduling, visa delays by embassies, insufficient group numbers, or other causes not attributable to our company, resulting in extra costs (e.g. overseas visa-extension fees, accommodation, food and transport, national airline fare adjustments), our company reserves the right to charge the difference.
excludes.zh: 其他费用：费用包含中未提及的费用。如因天灾、战争、罢工等不可抗力的原因，及因交通延阻、航班取消或更改时间、使馆延误出签证、人数不足等特殊情况或其他非我公司原因所引致的额外费用（如在外延期签证费、住、食及交通费、国家航空运价调整等），我公司有权追加差价。

timeline.title_en: Rome - Rome (revisiting the glory of the ancient Roman Empire, the "city of cities")
timeline.title_zh: 罗马 - 罗马（重温“万城之城”古罗马帝国的辉煌）
timeline.description_en: After meeting in the morning, take a guided walking tour of Rome, the famous historical and cultural city known as the "Eternal City" and the birthplace of the ancient Roman Empire. See the Colosseum (exterior), the great amphitheatre at the heart of Rome and one of its most famous ancient relics, and the Pantheon (exterior), a superbly preserved 2,000-year-old temple to the Olympian gods that Michelangelo praised as "angelic design". Then visit the Spanish Steps - the 138-step Piazza di Spagna made famous by the film Roman Holiday, Europe's widest staircase - and the Trevi Fountain (exterior), the "Fountain of the Maidens" where tossing a coin over your shoulder is said to make wishes come true. The rest of the day is free, after which you transfer to the hotel. Note: because of Rome's old-town conservation, vehicles are banned and most areas are pedestrian zones, so this is a walking day of about 5-6 km. Overnight at the Sheraton Roma (Medici) or the Mantegna Hotel, or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午集合后在导游的带领下徒步游览世界著名的历史文化名城罗马，这里是古罗马帝国的发祥地，因历史悠久而被称为“永恒之城”。参观矗立于罗马古都遗址上的斗兽场（外观）——位于罗马中心、以庞大雄伟著称的古罗马帝国斗兽角斗场，是罗马著名的历史遗迹；以及万神殿（外观）——距今2000多年、保存完好的古罗马建筑典范，拉斐尔等长眠于此，被米开朗基罗赞叹为“天使的设计”。随后游览西班牙广场——电影《罗马假日》取景地，整座广场的西班牙台阶共138级，是欧洲较宽的台阶；以及特莱维喷泉（许愿池）（外观）——又称“少女喷泉”，据说背对喷泉、从肩上投出一枚硬币若投进水中便能梦想成真。之后自由活动，后前往入住酒店。备注：由于罗马古城建筑保护，禁止车辆行驶，大多数区域为步行街区，当天徒步参观罗马，步行行程约为5-6公里。夜宿罗马梅第奇喜来登酒店或曼特尼亚酒店，或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Rome - Pienza - Siena (medieval art treasure Siena, the cypress lane of Val d'Orcia)
timeline.title_zh: 罗马 - 皮恩扎古城 - 锡耶纳（中世纪艺术瑰宝锡耶纳，邂逅奥尔恰谷丝柏树小径）
timeline.description_en: In the morning set out from Rome for the old town of Pienza, stopping along the way to take free photos on the famous cypress lane winding through the Tuscan countryside. In Pienza - the hill town in southern Tuscany where Pope Pius II was born, rebuilt by him in 1459 as a model "ideal city" - visit Piazza Pio II and Pienza Cathedral (exterior), where you can look out over the World Heritage Val d'Orcia from the town walls. After lunch continue to Siena to see Siena Cathedral (exterior), the shell-shaped Piazza del Campo, the Palazzo Pubblico / town hall (exterior, housing the civic museum and the Lorenzetti frescoes of Good and Bad Government) and the Torre del Mangia (exterior), Siena's tallest building at 102 m, wandering its medieval stone lanes. Overnight at the Four Points by Sheraton Siena or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午从罗马出发前往皮恩扎古城游览，途中在著名的丝柏树小径自由拍照——蜿蜒于托斯卡纳乡间、两旁种满意大利柏树的乡村道路。皮恩扎是教皇皮乌斯二世的出生地，1459年由他主持重建，被视为“理想城市”的典范，可从城墙上俯瞰世界遗产奥尔恰山谷的景致；游览二世广场、皮恩扎大教堂（外观）等景点。午餐后出发前往锡耶纳，游览锡耶纳大教堂（外观）、形似贝壳的田野广场、锡耶纳市政厅（外观，内设市立博物馆，藏有洛伦泽蒂《好政府寓意》与《坏政府寓意》壁画）以及曼吉亚塔楼（外观）——垂直高度达102米、锡耶纳至高的建筑，穿行于古老纵横的石板小巷之间。夜宿锡耶纳福朋喜来登酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Siena - Pisa - Cinque Terre - Florence (scenic train through Cinque Terre, the Ligurian seaside villages)
timeline.title_zh: 锡耶纳 - 比萨 - 五渔村 - 佛罗伦萨（景观列车游览五渔村，畅游利古里亚海景城镇）
timeline.description_en: In the morning travel to Pisa to see the Leaning Tower of Pisa (exterior) and the Piazza dei Miracoli (Square of Miracles), the walled heart of the historic centre that holds four great monuments - the cathedral, the leaning bell tower, the baptistery and the camposanto - all inscribed as World Heritage in 1987. Then head to the Cinque Terre along the Ligurian coast to visit the beautiful cliff-top fishing villages of Monterosso al Mare, Vernazza, Corniglia, Manarola and Riomaggiore, strolling through their colourful lanes. Note: if bad weather or a railway-company strike makes the Cinque Terre inaccessible, the itinerary automatically switches to viewing the coastal towns by coach or another means. Overnight at the Hilton Florence Metropole or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往比萨，游览比萨斜塔（外观）和比萨历史文化中心的奇迹广场（Piazza dei Miracoli）——这片围墙环绕的区域是比萨城的中心，广场上有比萨主教座堂、比萨斜塔（钟楼）、圣乔瓦尼洗礼堂、比萨墓园四大建筑，1987年被列为世界遗产。前往游览五渔村，沿利古里亚海岸线，游览蒙特罗索、韦尔纳扎、科尔尼利亚、马纳罗拉与里奥马焦雷这五座悬崖上美丽的渔村，漫步于渔村的色彩斑斓小巷之间。备注：如遇恶劣天气或者铁路公司罢工等因素导致无法游览五渔村，行程将自动更改为乘坐大巴车或其它形式游览海岸线城市。夜宿佛罗伦萨希尔顿大都会酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Florence - Venice (city of poetry, soul of the Renaissance - an art lover's journey)
timeline.title_zh: 佛罗伦萨 - 威尼斯（诗歌之地，文艺复兴之魂，享受艺术之旅）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast explore Florence, birthplace of the Renaissance: visit the world's third-largest church, the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore / Florence Cathedral, whose iconic red dome and white-green-pink marble facade dominate the skyline (the itinerary text lists it as exterior, while the sight note says entry is by queue, so please follow the on-site arrangement). See the Ponte Vecchio (Old Bridge) over the Arno, built in 1345 and where Dante is said to have met Beatrice; Piazza della Signoria, the open-air sculpture gallery with the Palazzo Vecchio, a copy of Michelangelo's David and the Fountain of Neptune, ringed by the Uffizi and the Loggia dei Lanzi; and Piazza Santa Croce with the Gothic Basilica of Santa Croce (exterior), the burial place of Michelangelo and Galileo. Afterwards transfer to Venice to check in. Overnight at the voco Venice or Hilton Venice Ambassador, or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后游览文艺复兴发源地佛罗伦萨，参观世界第三大教堂——圣母百花大教堂，其标志性的红色穹顶与白、绿、粉三色大理石外立面主宰着城市天际线（行程概述标注为外观，景点说明则注明“需排队进入”，请以现场实际安排为准）。游览阿诺河上、建于1345年、相传但丁在此邂逅少女比阿特丽切的维奇奥老桥；市政广场——露天雕塑博物馆，坐落着维琪奥旧宫、米开朗基罗《大卫》雕像复制品及海神喷泉，周围环绕乌菲兹美术馆与佣兵凉亭；以及圣十字广场和安葬着米开朗基罗、伽利略的哥特式圣十字大教堂（外观）。之后前往威尼斯入住酒店。夜宿威尼斯洲际VOCO酒店或希尔顿大使酒店，或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Venice (gliding through romantic Venice on gentle waters)
timeline.title_zh: 威尼斯（游览温柔碧波上浪漫的威尼斯）
timeline.description_en: In the morning visit St Mark's Basilica (exterior), first built in 829 and rebuilt in 1043-1071, once one of medieval Europe's greatest churches and a masterpiece of Venetian architecture; St Mark's Square, which Napoleon called "the finest drawing room in Europe"; the Bridge of Sighs (exterior), the enclosed bridge by which condemned prisoners once crossed from the Doge's Palace to the dungeons, catching their last glimpse of the sky through its small windows; and the magnificent Doge's Palace (exterior), the museum on St Mark's Square holding Venice's past glory, frescoes and medieval arms. These water-borne buildings and winding canals give Venice, the "Pearl of the Adriatic" of 118 islands linked by 177 waterways and 401 bridges, its lingering romance. The group then disperses at Venice Mestre. No hotel is provided on this final day.
timeline.description_zh: 上午参观圣马可大教堂（外观）——始建于公元829年、重建于1043至1071年，曾是中世纪欧洲较大的教堂，是威尼斯建筑艺术的经典之作；圣马可广场——被拿破仑称作“欧洲美丽的客厅”；叹息桥（外观）——古代由法院向监狱押送死囚的必经之路，重罪犯经过这座密不透气的桥时只能透过小窗看看蓝天；以及华丽的总督宫（外观）——位于圣马可广场的博物馆，珍藏壁画与中世纪兵器，威尼斯过去的辉煌尽在于此。这些建造在水上的美丽建筑和蜿蜒的水巷，让由118个小岛组成、以177条水道和401座桥梁连成一体、有“亚得里亚海明珠”之称的威尼斯浪漫风情久久挥之不去。之后在威尼斯梅斯特散团。当天无酒店住宿。

meeting_en: Rome city centre; group meets in the morning of Day 1 for a walking tour of central Rome.
meeting_zh: 罗马市中心；第1天上午集合，徒步游览罗马古城。

faqs.question_en: Where and when do we meet and disperse (Itinerary A and Itinerary B)?
faqs.question_zh: 集合及集散地点和方法是怎样的（行程A与行程B）？
faqs.answer_en: Itinerary A meets at 09:00 on Day 1 at Roma Tiburtina railway station, and disperses on Day 5 at around 14:00 at Venice Mestre. You may book a flight that lands in Rome on the meeting day, but arriving after 14:00 means there will be no sights left to visit and no refund; on the final day you may book an evening flight out of Venice. Itinerary B meets at around 18:30 on Day 1 in front of Roma Tiburtina railway station, and disperses on Day 5 at around 14:00 at Venice Mestre; you may book a flight landing in Rome on the meeting day, and an evening flight out of Venice on the final day. These times and places are for reference; the actual departure time is as stated in the tour confirmation letter.
faqs.answer_zh: 行程A第1天09:00在Roma Tiburtina（罗马提布提纳）火车站集合，第5天14:00左右在威尼斯梅斯特散团。可预订当天抵达罗马的航班，但14:00之后抵达罗马会导致无景点可参观，且无费用可退；结束当天可预订晚上的航班离开威尼斯。行程B第1天18:30左右在Roma Tiburtina火车站门口集合，第5天14:00左右在威尼斯梅斯特散团；可预订当天抵达罗马的航班，结束当天可预订晚上的航班离开威尼斯。以上为参考时间及地点，实际出发时间以出团通知书为准。

faqs.question_en: Can I tour the Cinque Terre by boat?
faqs.question_zh: 我是否可以选择乘船游览五渔村？
faqs.answer_en: Because boat trips are weather-dependent, the product does not include a Cinque Terre boat ticket; however, you may choose to go by boat. In that case the train-ticket cost cannot be refunded or exchanged, and you must buy the boat ticket yourself, costing about 35 euros.
faqs.answer_zh: 由于乘船游览受气候影响，该产品并非包含五渔村船票，但是可以选择乘船游览，但无法退换火车票的费用，并且需要自行购买船票，约35欧元。

faqs.question_en: Can we tour central Rome by vehicle?
faqs.question_zh: 罗马市中心，我们是否可以乘车游览？
faqs.answer_en: No. Because Rome's various sights are very close together and are all pedestrian zones, the sights in central Rome must be toured on foot.
faqs.answer_zh: 不可以。由于罗马各个景点非常集中，并且都是步行街区，因此罗马市中心景点需要徒步游览。

faqs.question_en: Can we choose different menus and dishes for our dinners?
faqs.question_zh: 我们的晚餐是否能根据喜好选择不同的菜单和菜品？
faqs.answer_en: The dining recommended in the itinerary is all recommended local specialty food and is not included in the price - for example Venice's famous black squid-ink pasta or the Tuscan steak. You cannot order other dishes from us; if a dish is not your first choice, you are free to find other dining yourself.
faqs.answer_zh: 行程内推荐的餐饮全部为推荐当地特色餐，费用并未包含，比如威尼斯较著名的黑墨鱼面、托斯卡纳的牛排等。无法选择其它菜式，如果菜品并非您的首选，可以自行选择其他餐饮。

faqs.question_en: Do I need a visa?
faqs.question_zh: 是否需要签证？
faqs.answer_en: Yes. This product requires a Schengen visa (single or multiple entry) and the visa fee is NOT included - if you need a visa, please choose a Schengen-visa product. After booking we provide, free of charge, all materials needed for the Schengen visa application; if you commission us to handle the visa we also buy you a Schengen-compliant travel insurance, otherwise you must arrange your own insurance and claims. "Visa-secured" guarantee: if you sign with us at least 61 days before departure and have not obtained the visa within 45 days before departure, we bear all losses and immediately refund your full tour cost (travellers who do not meet this clause and fail to obtain the visa are refunded per the change & cancellation terms). A visa refusal must be reported to us within 48 hours with the consulate's refusal letter; any supplementary or amended materials must be submitted within five days, and you may not unilaterally waive the right to "visa defence". Your passport must be valid for at least 6 months from the date of departure, or customs may refuse entry. Visa fees, visa service fees, Schengen insurance fees and visa-centre appointment fees are all non-refundable and non-transferable, even if the product is changed or cancelled.
faqs.answer_zh: 需要。本产品需要申根签证（单次或多次入境），且不包含签证费用——如需办理签证请选择申根签证产品。预订后免费提供办理申根签证的全部材料；如委托我社办理签证，我社会为您购买符合申根签证要求的申根旅游保险，否则需自行购买旅游保险并自行负责理赔。保签无忧：游客在出发日前61天与我社签约的旅游产品，如在出发前45天内未获取签证，我社承担所有损失，立即退还游客全部旅游费用（不符合该条款且未正常获签的游客，按“退改与取消条款”退费）。如遇拒签需在48小时内通知我社，并出具使领馆拒签函；如需补充或更改材料需在五天内提交，且不得单方面放弃“签证抗辩”权利。护照有效期需在离境之日起至少还有六个月，否则海关有权拒绝入境。签证费、签证服务费、申根保险费、签证中心预约费均不可退款，也无法更改使用者，即使产品退改签，签证费用也无法退款。

faqs.question_en: Booking, changes & cancellation
faqs.question_zh: 预订、变更与取消须知
faqs.answer_en: Free, no-reason cancellation is allowed by both the agency and the traveller up to 30 days before departure (not including the 30th day). This is a recurring shuttle group: other guests join and leave at different points, with different start/end cities and prices, so book according to your own start/end destination. Group size is 10 people to confirm departure; for 8 or fewer the group becomes a small group with a business van + Chinese-speaking driver-guide who leads all the city sightseeing. At the Cinque Terre, owing to time and personal stamina, the guide may pick certain villages to visit; if a strike or bad weather blocks the Cinque Terre, it switches to coach or other coastal-town viewing. Booking is recommended at least 14 days ahead, with a second confirmation by the operator within at most 48 hours (otherwise the order is auto-refunded) - do not book connecting flights/hotels before the itinerary is confirmed. Room types: two people booking together default to a standard twin/double (bed type assigned by the hotel, not selectable); solo travellers pay a single-room supplement deposit (refunded pro-rata if successfully matched for room-sharing); a triple/family room defaults to two parents plus one minor with bed types not selectable. European hotels are all non-smoking, check-in 14:00 / check-out 11:00, and air-conditioning is not a standard feature. Pricing is quoted in EUR; if you pay in CNY the rate is the Bank of China "euro sell" real-time rate on the day of payment, and refunds likewise use the same-day rate (any rate differences or bank fees are borne by the traveller). Because of frequent flight changes, traffic, ferry cancellations, strikes and route optimisation, the order and timing of sights may be adjusted - you must arrive at the meeting point one day before the group starts and leave the dispersal point one day after it ends, allowing at least 5 hours for connections at the same airport and 7 hours between different airports in the same city.
faqs.answer_zh: 出发前30天（不含第30天），旅行社和旅行者均有权申请无理由取消。本产品为循环套发团，沿途会有其他游客在不同地点上下团，开始和结束的城市不同、价格不同，请按自己报名的目的地起止行程。成团人数为10人；如报名8人及以下则自动改为小团，安排商务旅行车+中文司机兼导游，由其带领全部城市游览。五渔村由于时间和个人体力原因，可能由导游安排选择其中个别村子游览；如遇罢工或恶劣天气无法游览五渔村，则改为大巴或其它形式游览海岸线城市。建议至少提前14天预订，支付后需等待组团社在最多48小时内二次确认（超48小时未确认则自动退款），未确认行程前请勿预订衔接机票及酒店。房型：两人同时报名默认标准双人间（床型由酒店安排、不可选）；单人报名默认含单人房差押金（成功拼房后按比例退还）；三人家庭间默认两位父母与一位未成年儿童入住，床型不可选。欧洲酒店全面禁烟，入住14:00、退房11:00，空调并非标准设施。所有定价以欧元计价，如选择人民币支付则按当天中国银行实时“欧元卖出价”自动计算，退款同样按申请当日即时汇率（汇率差异或银行手续费由旅行者承担）。由于航变、交通、渡轮取消、罢工频繁及行程顺序优化，景点的先后顺序和时间可能调整，需在参团前一天到达集合地、离团后一天离开集散地，同一机场转机至少预留5小时、同城不同机场转机至少预留7小时。

faqs.question_en: Health & safety requirements
faqs.question_zh: 健康与安全须知
faqs.answer_en: To ensure a safe trip, please have a basic health check before departure and DO NOT join if you have any of the following: infectious diseases (e.g. active tuberculosis, typhoid); cardiovascular disease (severe hypertension, heart insufficiency, myocardial ischaemia, myocardial infarction); cerebrovascular disease (embolism, haemorrhage, brain tumour); respiratory disease (emphysema, cor pulmonale); psychiatric illness (epilepsy and all psychoses); severe anaemia (haemoglobin below 50 g/L); or recovery from major/medium surgery. Pregnancy: at 35 weeks or more you cannot join under any circumstances; at 28 weeks or more you must provide a doctor's check-up report within 7 days plus the attending doctor's consent; below 28 weeks please book with caution, sign a liability waiver, and you cannot take part in any adventure, skiing, sea, high-altitude or outdoor items. Travellers with disabilities need a 7-day medical report + attending doctor's consent, an immediate family escort, and at least 61 days' advance request for reserved space and facilities. Elderly (70+): need a health certificate and physical-exam report and an immediate family escort (or sign a waiver); as this is a long itinerary that demands good walking ability and stamina, those not physically up to it should book with caution, and a doctor's consent is required for any adventure/ski/sea/high-altitude/outdoor items, with at least 61 days' advance request for age-friendly services and facilities. Minors (under 18) must be accompanied by an immediate relative or guardian; some sights have special rules for under-18/12/6; infants under 6 or children under 30 kg need a confirmed EU-standard child safety seat; unaccompanied under-18s need parental authorisation (a letter from the other parent if only one accompanies, or both parents' guardian authorisation if travelling with other relatives/friends); infants under 2 are not accepted. Under China's Tourism Law Article 15 (and the Infectious Disease Prevention Law, 2025 revision), travellers must truthfully declare health information relevant to the trip (pregnancy, lactation, chronic disease, infectious-disease history, suspected symptoms or recent travel to epidemic areas) and follow safety warnings; concealment that causes harm or transmission risk makes the traveller liable for damages and any administrative penalties.
faqs.answer_zh: 为确保旅游顺利出行、防止旅途中发生人身意外伤害，出行前请做一次必要的身体检查，如存在下列情况请勿报名：传染性疾病患者（如活动期肺结核、伤寒等）；心血管疾病患者（如严重高血压、心功能不全、心肌缺氧、心肌梗塞）；脑血管疾病患者（如脑栓塞、脑出血、脑肿瘤）；呼吸系统疾病患者（如肺气肿、肺心病）；精神病患者（如癫痫及各种精神病）；严重贫血（血红蛋白50克/升以下）；大中型手术恢复期患者。孕妇：妊娠35周及以上任何情况下都无法参团；28周及以上需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书；28周以下请慎重报名，需签署旅行社免责声明书，且无法参加探险、滑雪、出海、高空、户外等项目。残疾人：需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书、需直系家属陪同、提前至少61天申请预留位置及专用配套设施。老年旅游者（70周岁以上）：需提供健康证明、体检报告、直系家属陪同（否则需签免责书）；本行程较长、需要一定步行能力和体力，体力不支者请慎重报名，涉及探险/滑雪/出海/高空/户外等项目需持主治医师同意书，并提前至少61天申请适老化服务规范及专属设施。未成年人（未满18周岁）须由直系亲属或监护人陪同；部分景点对未满18/12/6周岁有特殊限定；6岁以下婴儿或30公斤以下儿童需提前确认符合欧盟标准的安全座椅；无父母陪同的未成年人须持父母授权书（仅一方陪同需持另一方书面授权书，与其他亲属、朋友同行需持父母双方监护人授权书）；本产品不接受2周岁以下婴儿参团。根据《旅游法》第15条及《传染病防治法（2025修订）》，旅游者需如实告知与旅游活动相关的个人健康信息（包括妊娠期、哺乳期、慢性病、传染病史、疑似症状或近期疫区旅居史），并遵守安全警示规定，若因隐瞒导致人身损害、财产损失或传播风险，旅游者需自行承担赔偿及行政处罚责任。

title_en: Classic Italy in 6 Days: Rome to Milan One-Way Deep Tour
title_zh: 意大利经典6天深度游：罗马至米兰单程之旅
short_en: A 6-day one-way journey from Rome to Milan through Tuscany, Cinque Terre, Florence and Venice, travelling by coach and scenic rail with city-centre 4-star hotels included.
short_zh: 6天单程深度游，从罗马一路向北穿越托斯卡纳、五渔村、佛罗伦萨与威尼斯直抵米兰，全程巴士搭配景观列车，含市中心四星酒店。
desc_en: This 6-day small-group tour traces Italy from south to north without backtracking, starting in the Eternal City of Rome and ending in fashion-capital Milan. Walk the ancient heart of Rome, photograph the cypress lanes of the Val d'Orcia and medieval Siena, ride the scenic train through the cliffside fishing villages of Cinque Terre, and immerse yourself in Renaissance Florence and romantic, canal-laced Venice. With intercity transport, listed attractions, daily breakfast and central 4-star hotels all included, it is a relaxed yet richly detailed introduction to classic Italy.
desc_zh: 这条6天精品小团行程自南向北贯穿意大利、全程不走回头路，从永恒之城罗马出发，到时尚之都米兰结束。漫步古罗马城区，在奥尔恰谷的丝柏小径与中世纪古城锡耶纳取景，乘景观列车游览悬崖渔村五渔村，再沉浸于文艺复兴名城佛罗伦萨与碧波荡漾的水城威尼斯。城际交通、列出景点、每日早餐及市中心四星酒店全部包含，是一次轻松而细致深入的意大利经典之旅。

highlights.en: Walking tour of ancient Rome: Colosseum, Pantheon, Spanish Steps and Trevi Fountain
highlights.zh: 徒步深度游览古罗马：斗兽场、万神殿、西班牙广场与特莱维喷泉

highlights.en: Renaissance treasure-house Florence and Venice, the romantic 'Pearl of the Adriatic'
highlights.zh: 文艺复兴宝库佛罗伦萨与浪漫水城威尼斯——亚得里亚海明珠

highlights.en: Scenic train ride through the cliffside fishing villages of Cinque Terre
highlights.zh: 乘景观列车游览悬崖渔村五渔村

highlights.en: Medieval Siena and the World Heritage Val d'Orcia cypress lanes around Pienza
highlights.zh: 中世纪古城锡耶纳与世界遗产奥尔恰谷皮恩扎丝柏小径

highlights.en: One-way deep route from Rome to Milan with no backtracking
highlights.zh: 罗马至米兰单程深度路线，不走回头路

highlights.en: Intercity coach transfers and scenic rail included; central 4-star hotels every night
highlights.zh: 含城际巴士接送及景观列车；每晚入住市中心四星酒店

highlights.en: All listed attractions included, with no forced shopping stops
highlights.zh: 所有列出景点全含，绝无强制购物

highlights.en: Licensed Chinese-speaking guide-driver and all-inclusive pricing
highlights.zh: 持证中文司机兼导游，一价全含

includes.en: Hotels: 5 nights in 4-star hotels.
includes.zh: 【酒店】：四星级酒店5晚。

includes.en: Meals: 5 meals total, breakfast in the hotel or other forms of dining.
includes.zh: 【餐饮】：酒店内早餐或其他形式餐饮共计5餐。

includes.en: Operating costs: tourist city tax, city-entry fees, residence tax, road and bridge tolls, parking and fuel charges, driver/guide meal allowances and other operating costs within the itinerary.
includes.zh: 【执行】：游客城市税、进城费、居住税、过路过桥费、停车燃油费、司导餐补等行程内执行费用。

includes.en: Transport: tour coach or business travel van.
includes.zh: 【交通】：旅游巴士或者商务旅行车。

includes.en: Guide: professional driver plus Chinese-speaking guide, or a Chinese-speaking driver-guide throughout (note: for groups of 8 or fewer, a business travel van plus a Chinese-speaking driver-guide is arranged, and the driver-guide leads the whole city itinerary).
includes.zh: 【导游】：职业司机+中文导游或者全程中文司机兼导游（备注：8人及以下则安排为商务旅行车+中文司机兼导游，届时将有司兼导带领游览全部城市行程）。

includes.en: Luggage: one 23 kg checked bag plus one carry-on bag.
includes.zh: 【行李】：1件23公斤行李及1件随身行李。

includes.en: Tickets: the Cinque Terre scenic train and the Venice island ferry.
includes.zh: 【门票】：五渔村小火车、威尼斯登岛轮渡。

excludes.en: Passport: personal passport fees.
excludes.zh: 护照：个人护照费用。

excludes.en: Visa: the tourist visa fees required for the countries listed in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 签证：行程中所列旅游国家所需的观光签证费用。

excludes.en: Insurance: travel insurance fees (if the itinerary involves high-risk sports, please verify whether the travel insurance covers that activity).
excludes.zh: 保险：旅游保险费用（如行程内涉及到高风险运动，请核实旅游保险是否包含该项运动）。

excludes.en: Tips: a total of EUR 10 per person per day in tips for the guide and driver, the same price for adults and children.
excludes.zh: 小费：游客支付导游和司机小费一共10欧/人/天，大小同价。

excludes.en: Meals: lunches and dinners are not included in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 餐饮：行程中不包含午、晚正餐费用。

excludes.en: Tickets: attractions not noted as included (including but not limited to sights marked "exterior" in the itinerary, plus all "recommended", "optional", "experience" and any other items not stated as included; if you wish to enter, please pay on your own).
excludes.zh: 门票：行程中未注明费用包含的景点（包括但不仅限于行程中注明“外观”的景点，“推荐”、“可选”、“体验”等等所有未提及费用包含的项目，如游客需要参观，敬请自理）。

excludes.en: Extended stays: accommodation, transport and sightseeing costs for any extension beyond the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 延长住宿：行程外额外延长的住宿、交通、观光费用。

excludes.en: Personal spending: drinks and alcohol, taxis, phone charges and other personal expenses.
excludes.zh: 私人消费：如饮料酒类、出租车、电话费等个人消费。

excludes.en: Other transport: transport other than the included business travel van or minibus and not mentioned in the inclusions, such as the Venice gondola, and the sightseeing trains, electric carts, etc. used in vehicle-restricted zones, all at your own expense.
excludes.zh: 其他交通：除包含商务旅行车或者中巴之外，费用包含中未提及的其他交通费用，如威尼斯贡多拉，以及车辆限行区的观光火车、电瓶出租车等费用敬请自理。

excludes.en: Free activities: tourists' own evening sightseeing and recommended items in the itinerary, plus any transport, dining, tickets, shopping and other costs incurred.
excludes.zh: 自由活动：游客夜间自行游览及行程中的推荐项目，以及产生的交通、餐饮、门票、购物等费用。

excludes.en: Experience activities: any travel-experience activities not included in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 体验活动：行程中没有包含的各项旅游体验活动。

excludes.en: Other costs: any costs not mentioned in the inclusions. Due to force majeure such as natural disasters, war or strikes, and special circumstances such as transport delays, flight cancellations or schedule changes, embassy visa delays, insufficient group size, or other reasons not attributable to our company, our company reserves the right to charge a price difference (e.g. visa-extension fees abroad, accommodation, meals and transport, national airfare adjustments, etc.).
excludes.zh: 其他费用：费用包含中未提及的费用。如因天灾、战争、罢工等不可抗力的原因，及因交通延阻、航班取消或更改时间、使馆延误出签证、人数不足等特殊情况或其他非我公司原因所引致的额外费用（如在外延期签证费、住、食及交通费、国家航空运价调整等），我公司有权追加差价。

timeline.title_en: Rome - Rome (Revisiting the glory of the ancient Roman Empire, the "city of cities")
timeline.title_zh: 罗马 - 罗马（重温“万城之城”古罗马帝国的辉煌）
timeline.description_en: After meeting up in the morning, your guide leads a walking tour of Rome, the world-famous historic and cultural city that was the birthplace of the ancient Roman Empire and is known as the "Eternal City". You will see the Colosseum (exterior) and the Pantheon (exterior) standing on the ruins of the ancient Roman capital, and visit the Spanish Steps (Piazza di Spagna) and the Trevi Fountain (exterior). Afterwards there is free time before transferring to your hotel. Note: because of heritage protection in Rome's old city, vehicles are banned and most areas are pedestrian zones; since all the city-center sights lie within the ancient city, the day is explored entirely on foot, walking roughly 5-6 km. Overnight: Sheraton Roma (Sheraton Medici) Hotel or Mantegna Hotel, or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午集合后，在导游带领下徒步游览世界著名的历史文化名城罗马。这里是古罗马帝国的发祥地，因历史悠久而被称为“永恒之城”。参观矗立在古罗马都城遗址上的斗兽场（外观）、万神殿（外观），并游览西班牙广场和特莱维喷泉（外观）。之后自由活动，随后前往入住酒店。备注：由于罗马古城建筑保护，禁止车辆行驶，大多数区域为步行街区；罗马市区内的所有景点都在古罗马城内，当天徒步参观罗马，步行行程约为5-6公里。夜宿：罗马梅第奇喜来登酒店或曼特尼亚酒店，或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Rome - Pienza old town - Siena (Siena, a medieval art treasure; the cypress lane of the Val d'Orcia)
timeline.title_zh: 罗马 - 皮恩扎古城 - 锡耶纳（中世纪艺术瑰宝锡耶纳，遇奥尔恰谷丝柏树小径）
timeline.description_en: In the morning you depart Rome for the old town of Pienza, stopping along the way at the cypress lane for free photo time. In Pienza you visit Piazza Pio II and Pienza Cathedral (exterior) and other sights, with views over the UNESCO World Heritage Val d'Orcia from the town walls. After lunch you continue to Siena, touring Siena Cathedral (exterior), Piazza del Campo, the Siena Town Hall (Palazzo Pubblico, exterior) and the Torre del Mangia (exterior, Italy's second-tallest tower at about 102 m). Afterwards you check in to your hotel. Overnight: Four Points by Sheraton Siena, or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午从罗马出发前往皮恩扎古城游览，途中在丝柏树小径自由拍照，之后游览二世广场、皮恩扎大教堂（外观）等景点，并可从城墙上俯瞰世界遗产奥尔恰山谷（Val d'Orcia）的景致。午餐后出发前往锡耶纳，游览锡耶纳大教堂（外观）、田野广场（贝壳广场）、锡耶纳市政厅（外观）、曼吉亚塔楼（外观，意大利第二高塔楼，垂直高度约102米）等景点，之后入住酒店。夜宿：锡耶纳福朋喜来登酒店，或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Siena - Pisa - Cinque Terre - Florence (Touring the Cinque Terre by scenic train; seaside towns of the Ligurian coast)
timeline.title_zh: 锡耶纳 - 比萨 - 五渔村 - 佛罗伦萨（景观列车游览五渔村，游利古里亚海景城镇）
timeline.description_en: In the morning you head to Pisa to see the Leaning Tower of Pisa (exterior) and the Piazza dei Miracoli (Square of Miracles) at the historic and cultural heart of the city, a UNESCO World Heritage site whose walled square holds the cathedral, the leaning bell tower, the Baptistery of St. John and the cemetery. You then travel to the Cinque Terre, riding along the Ligurian coastline to visit the beautiful cliffside fishing villages (Monterosso al Mare, Vernazza, Corniglia, Manarola and Riomaggiore), then check in to your hotel. Note: if bad weather or a railway strike makes the Cinque Terre inaccessible, the program automatically changes to touring the coastal towns by coach or other means. Overnight: Hilton Florence Metropole, or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往比萨，游览比萨斜塔（外观）和比萨历史文化中心的奇迹广场。奇迹广场为世界遗产，围墙内有比萨主教座堂、比萨斜塔（钟楼）、圣乔瓦尼洗礼堂和比萨墓园四大建筑。之后前往游览五渔村，沿利古里亚海岸线游览蒙特罗索、韦尔纳扎、科尔尼利亚、马纳罗拉及里奥马焦雷这五个悬崖上的美丽渔村，之后入住酒店。备注：如遇恶劣天气或铁路公司罢工等因素导致无法游览五渔村，行程将自动更改为乘坐大巴车或其它形式游览海岸线城市。夜宿：佛罗伦萨希尔顿大都会酒店，或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Florence - Venice (Land of poetry; the soul of the Renaissance, enjoying a journey of art)
timeline.title_zh: 佛罗伦萨 - 威尼斯（诗歌之地，文艺复兴之魂，享受艺术之旅）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast you tour Florence, the cradle of the Renaissance, visiting the world's third-largest cathedral, the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore (the Duomo, viewed up close), the Piazza della Signoria, the Ponte Vecchio (old bridge, built in 1345), and the Piazza Santa Croce with the Basilica of Santa Croce (exterior), the Gothic church that is the resting place of Michelangelo and Galileo. The Piazza della Signoria is an open-air sculpture museum with the Palazzo Vecchio, a copy of Michelangelo's David and the Fountain of Neptune, ringed by the Uffizi Gallery, the Loggia dei Lanzi and many cafes. Afterwards you transfer to Venice and check in to your hotel. Overnight: voco Venice (InterContinental) or Hilton Garden Inn Venice (Ambasciatori), or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后游览文艺复兴发源地佛罗伦萨，参观世界第三大教堂——圣母百花大教堂（近距离观赏其白、绿、粉三色大理石外立面）、市政广场、老桥（维奇奥桥，建于1345年），以及圣十字广场和圣十字教堂（外观，米开朗基罗和伽利略的安息地）。市政广场素有露天雕塑博物馆之誉，广场上坐落着维琪奥宫（旧宫）、米开朗基罗《大卫》雕塑的复制品以及海神喷泉，周围环绕着乌菲兹美术馆、佣兵凉亭和众多咖啡厅。之后前往威尼斯入住酒店。夜宿：威尼斯洲际voco酒店或希尔顿大使酒店，或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Venice - Milan (Touring romantic Venice on its gentle blue-green waters)
timeline.title_zh: 威尼斯 - 米兰（游览温柔碧波上浪漫的威尼斯）
timeline.description_en: In the morning you visit St. Mark's Basilica (exterior), St. Mark's Square (Piazza San Marco, once called by Napoleon "the most beautiful drawing room in Europe"), the Bridge of Sighs (exterior, the route by which condemned prisoners were once led from the law court to the prison) and the magnificent Doge's Palace (exterior). These beautiful buildings rising from the water, together with the winding canals, give Venice its unforgettable romance. Afterwards you head to Milan, the capital of fashion. Overnight: Royal Garden Hotel, or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午参观圣马可大教堂（外观）、圣马可广场（曾被拿破仑称作“欧洲美丽的客厅”）、叹息桥（外观，古代由法院向监狱押送死囚的必经之路）以及华丽的总督宫（外观）。这些建造在水上的美丽建筑和蜿蜒的水巷一起，让威尼斯的浪漫风情久久挥之不去。之后前往时尚之都米兰。夜宿：皇家花园酒店，或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Milan (Italy's capital of fashion)
timeline.title_zh: 米兰（意大利时尚之都）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast you freely visit Milan's landmark, the Milan Cathedral (Duomo, exterior) - a Gothic masterpiece begun in 1386 that took some 500 years to complete, famous for its hundreds of marble spires soaring skyward and thousands of statues on its white marble facade - and one of Europe's most beautiful shopping arcades, the Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II. Afterwards the wonderful itinerary comes to an end. The group disperses in central Milan around midday. No hotel is provided on the final night.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，自由参观米兰的标志性建筑米兰大教堂（外观）——这座哥特式建筑始建于1386年，历经约500年才完工，以数以百计耸入云霄的尖塔和白色大理石外墙上的数千座雕像闻名于世；以及欧洲漂亮的商业拱廊之一埃马努埃莱二世长廊。之后结束美好行程。行程于中午前后在米兰市区解散。当天不含酒店。

meeting_en: Rome — meet in the morning in central Rome; the day-1 city tour is on foot (old city is pedestrian-only).
meeting_zh: 罗马——上午于罗马市区集合；第一天为徒步城市游览（古城为步行区）。

faqs.question_en: Where and when does the group meet and disperse?
faqs.question_zh: 集合及集散地点和方法是什么？
faqs.answer_en: There are two departure options. Itinerary A: meet on Day 1 at 09:00 at the entrance of Roma Tiburtina railway station; the group disperses around 12:00 on Day 6 in central Milan. You may book a flight arriving in Rome that same day, but arrivals after 14:00 mean you miss the Rome sightseeing with no refund; you may book an evening flight out of Milan on the final day. Itinerary B: meet on Day 1 at around 18:30 at the entrance of Roma Tiburtina station; the group disperses around 12:00 on Day 6 in central Milan, and you may book a same-day arrival into Rome and an evening departure from Milan. All times and places are for reference; the actual departure follows the final group-departure notice.
faqs.answer_zh: 有两种出发方案。行程A：第1天09:00在Roma Tiburtina（罗马蒂布尔蒂纳）火车站门口集合，第6天12:00左右在米兰市区解散；可预订当天抵达罗马的航班，但14:00之后抵达将导致罗马无景点参观，无费用可退，结束当天可预订晚上的航班离开米兰。行程B：第1天18:30左右在Roma Tiburtina火车站门口集合，第6天12:00左右在米兰市区解散，可预订当天抵达罗马的航班，结束当天可预订晚上的航班离开米兰。以上时间及地点仅供参考，实际出发时间以出团通知书为准。

faqs.question_en: Can I choose to tour the Cinque Terre by boat?
faqs.question_zh: 我是否可以选择乘船游览五渔村？
faqs.answer_en: Because boat trips are weather-dependent, this product does not include a Cinque Terre boat ticket. You may choose to tour by boat, but the train-ticket cost cannot be refunded or exchanged, and you will need to buy the boat ticket yourself, at about EUR 35.
faqs.answer_zh: 由于乘船游览受气候影响，该产品并不包含五渔村船票，但可以选择乘船游览，只是无法退换火车票的费用，并且需要自行购买船票，约35欧元。

faqs.question_en: In central Rome, can we tour by vehicle?
faqs.question_zh: 罗马市中心，我们是否可以乘车游览？
faqs.answer_en: Because Rome's various sights are very concentrated and all in pedestrian zones, the city-center sights must be toured on foot.
faqs.answer_zh: 由于罗马各个景点非常集中，并且都是步行街区，因此罗马市中心景点需要徒步游览。

faqs.question_en: Can we choose different menus and dishes for dinner according to our preferences?
faqs.question_zh: 我们的晚餐是否能根据喜欢选择不同的菜单和菜品？
faqs.answer_en: The dining recommended within the itinerary is all recommended local specialty meals and the cost is not included - for example, Venice's famous squid-ink (black) pasta and Tuscany's steak. You cannot choose other dishes; if a recommended dish is not your first choice, you are free to choose other dining on your own.
faqs.answer_zh: 行程内推荐的餐饮全部为推荐当地特色餐，费用并未包含，比如威尼斯较著名的黑墨鱼面、托斯卡纳的牛排等。无法选择其它的菜式，如果菜品并非您的首选，可以自行选择其他餐饮。

faqs.question_en: Do I need a visa?
faqs.question_zh: 是否需要签证？
faqs.answer_en: Yes. This product does not include visa fees; you need a Schengen visa (single or multiple entry), so please choose a Schengen-visa product if you need one. After booking we provide free of charge all the materials needed to apply for the Schengen visa, and if you entrust us, we will buy you Schengen travel insurance that meets the visa requirements. Your passport must be valid for at least six months from the date of departure, or customs may refuse entry. Visa fees, visa service fees, Schengen insurance fees and visa-center appointment fees are all non-refundable and cannot be transferred to another user, even if the product is changed or cancelled. "Visa-worry-free" guarantee: if you sign a contract with us at least 61 days before departure and have not obtained the visa within 45 days before departure, we bear all losses and immediately refund your full travel cost; tourists who do not meet this clause and fail to obtain the visa are refunded under the change-and-cancellation terms. In case of a visa refusal you must notify us within 48 hours and provide the consulate's refusal letter.
faqs.answer_zh: 需要。本产品不包含签证费用，需要申根签证（单次或多次入境），如需办理请选择申根签证产品。预订后免费提供办理申根签证的全部材料；如委托我社办理，我社将为您购买符合申根签证要求的申根旅游保险。护照有效期需在离境之日起至少还有六个月，否则海关有权拒绝入境。签证费、签证服务费、申根保险费、签证中心预约费均不可退款，也无法更改使用者，即使产品退改签，签证费用亦无法退款。保签无忧：游客在出发日前61天与我社签约的旅游产品，如在出发前45天内未获取签证，我社承担所有损失并立即退还游客全部旅游费用；不符合该条款的游客如未正常获取签证，将按照“退改与取消条款”进行退费。如遇拒签需在48小时内通知我社，并出具使领馆的拒签函。

faqs.question_en: Booking, changes and cancellation
faqs.question_zh: 预订、变更与取消须知
faqs.answer_en: Free cancellation: both the travel agency and the traveler may cancel without cause more than 30 days before departure (the 30th day not included). Group size: this is a recurring shared-coach (join-in) tour; with 8 or fewer participants it automatically becomes a small group using a business travel van with a Chinese-speaking driver-guide; the announced shared-tour group size is 10 people, and if the minimum is not reached by 30 days before departure either side may cancel without liability (and if not reached by 14 days before, you may switch products or get a refund). Arrive one day early / leave one day late: because of frequent flight, traffic, ferry, strike and order-adjustment factors, you must arrive at the meeting point at least one day before the tour and leave the dispersal point one day after, allowing reasonable connection time (at least 5 hours for same-airport transfers, 7 hours for different airports in the same city; reasonable meet/disperse window is 07:00-21:00). Rooms: two people booking together default to a standard twin/double (bed type assigned by the hotel, not selectable); solo travelers pay a single-room supplement unless successfully sharing; triple/family rooms are for two parents plus one minor with bed type assigned by the hotel. European hotels are all non-smoking, check-in 14:00 and check-out 11:00, and air conditioning is not a standard facility. Listed hotel names are preferred; if full, an equivalent same-star hotel is substituted without separate notice. Pricing: all prices are quoted in EUR; if you pay in CNY, the amount is the real-time CNY price calculated from Bank of China's "EUR selling price" on the day of payment, and the same rate applies to refunds (any exchange-rate difference or bank fees are borne by the traveler). Itinerary contingency: the order of sights may be adjusted for flights/strikes/traffic without being a breach; if the Cinque Terre cannot be visited due to weather or a rail strike, it is replaced by a coach or other tour of the coastal towns; the start/end cities and prices differ per traveler since it is a recurring shared tour, so follow your own booked start and end points.
faqs.answer_zh: 免费取消：出发前30天（不含第30天）旅行社和旅行者均有权申请无理由取消。成团人数：本产品为散客拼团的循环套发团，报名人数为8人及以下时自动改为小团，安排商务旅行车+中文司机兼导游；本产品宣布拼团成团的人数为10人，行程开始前30天（不含第30天）未达到成团人数的，双方均可解除合同且不承担违约责任（如发团前14天仍未达到最低成团人数，可改选其他组团方式、产品或退还旅游费用）。提前一天到达、推后一天离开：由于航班、交通、渡轮、罢工及顺序调整等因素，旅游者须在旅游团开始前一天到达集合地、结束后一天离开集散地，并预留合理航班衔接时间（同机场转机至少5小时，同城不同机场至少7小时，合理集散时间段为07:00至21:00）。房型：两人同时报名默认入住标准双人间（床型由酒店安排，不可选）；单人报名默认含单人房差，拼房成功后按比例退还；三人家庭间默认为两位父母与一位未成年儿童入住，床型由酒店安排。欧洲酒店均禁烟，入住时间14:00、退房时间11:00，且空调并非标准设施。行程内列明的酒店名称为优先入住酒店，如订满则更换为相同星级的相近酒店，恕不另行通知。价格：所有定价以欧元为预订计价单位，如选择人民币支付，则以当天支付时本网站依据中国银行实时“欧元卖出价”自动计算出的人民币价格为准，退款同样适用申请退款当日即时汇率（汇率差异或银行手续费由旅行者承担）。行程应急：行程先后顺序可能因航班、罢工、交通等调整，不视为违约；如遇恶劣天气或铁路罢工无法游览五漁村，行程自动更改为乘坐大巴或其它形式游览海岸线城市；本产品为循环套发团，不同游客的开始与结束城市及价格不同，敬请根据自己报名的目的地开始和结束行程。

faqs.question_en: Health and safety requirements
faqs.question_zh: 健康与安全须知
faqs.answer_en: To ensure a safe trip and prevent personal-injury accidents, please have a necessary medical check before departure and do not book if you have any of the following: infectious diseases (e.g. active tuberculosis, typhoid); cardiovascular disease (e.g. severe hypertension, heart failure, myocardial ischemia, myocardial infarction); cerebrovascular disease (e.g. cerebral embolism, cerebral hemorrhage, brain tumor); respiratory disease (e.g. emphysema, cor pulmonale); psychiatric illness (e.g. epilepsy and various mental illnesses); severe anemia (hemoglobin below 50 g/L); or recovery from major/medium surgery. Pregnancy: at 35 weeks or more you cannot join under any circumstances; at 28 weeks or more you must provide a doctor's exam report from within 7 days plus the attending physician's consent letter; under 28 weeks please book with caution, sign the agency's liability waiver, and you cannot join adventure/skiing/sailing/high-altitude/outdoor activities. Seniors: travelers over 70 must provide a health certificate and medical report and be accompanied by an immediate family member (or sign the liability waiver), need adequate walking ability and stamina for this long itinerary, and must apply at least 61 days in advance for elder-friendly services. Minors: those under 18 must be accompanied by an immediate relative or guardian, an unaccompanied minor needs a parental authorization letter (or one from the non-accompanying parent), some sights have special rules for under-18/12/6, child safety seats for infants under 6 or children under 30 kg must be confirmed in advance, and infants under 2 years are not accepted on this product. Persons with disabilities must provide a doctor's report from within 7 days plus consent letter, be accompanied by an immediate family member, and apply at least 61 days in advance. Per Article 15 of the Tourism Law, travelers must truthfully declare health information relevant to the trip (pregnancy, lactation, chronic diseases, infectious-disease history, suspected symptoms or recent travel in epidemic areas); concealment causing harm or loss is the traveler's own responsibility.
faqs.answer_zh: 为确保旅游顺利出行、防止旅途中发生人身意外伤害事故，请在出行前做一次必要的身体检查，如存在以下情况请勿报名：传染性疾病患者（如活动期肺结核、伤寒等）；心血管疾病患者（如严重高血压、心功能不全、心肌缺氧、心肌梗塞等）；脑血管疾病患者（如脑栓塞、脑出血、脑肿瘤等）；呼吸系统疾病患者（如肺气肿、肺心病等）；精神病患者（如癫痫及各种精神病）；严重贫血患者（血红蛋白低于50克/升）；大中型手术恢复期患者。孕妇：妊娠35周及以上任何情况下都无法参团；妊娠28周及以上需提供7日内的医生检查报告及主治医生同意书；妊娠28周以下请慎重报名，需签署旅行社免责声明书，且无法参加探险、滑雪、出海、高空、户外等项目。老年旅游者：70周岁以上需提供健康证明、体检报告并由直系家属陪同（否则需签署免责声明书），本行程较长、对步行能力和体力要求较高，体力不支者请慎重报名，并需提前至少61天申请适老化服务。未成年人：未满18周岁须由直系亲属或监护人陪同，无父母陪同需持父母授权书（仅一方陪同需另一方书面授权书），部分景点对未满18/12/6周岁有特殊限定，6岁以下婴儿或30公斤以下儿童需提前确认安全座椅，本产品不接受2周岁以下婴儿参团。残疾人需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书、由直系家属陪同并提前至少61天申请。根据《旅游法》第15条，旅游者需如实告知与旅游活动相关的个人健康信息（包括妊娠期、哺乳期、慢性病、传染病史、疑似症状或近期疫区旅居史）并遵守安全警示规定，若因隐瞒健康信息导致人身损害或财产损失，旅游者需自行承担责任。

title_en: Italy in Depth: 12-Day Grand Tour from Rome (Tuscany, Dolomites & the Amalfi Coast)
title_zh: 意大利深度环游12日小团（罗马往返·托斯卡纳·多洛米蒂·阿马尔菲海岸）
short_en: A 12-day round-trip from Rome circling three seas and the Dolomites — Tuscany, Cinque Terre, Venice, Puglia, Matera, Positano and Capri.
short_zh: 12天罗马往返深度环线，串起三海一山——托斯卡纳、五渔村、威尼斯、普利亚、马泰拉、波西塔诺与卡普里岛。
desc_en: This 12-day small-group journey traces a complete loop of the Italian mainland from Rome, weaving together the Adriatic, Tyrrhenian and Ligurian seas with the soaring peaks of the Dolomites. From the eternal monuments of Rome you roll through the cypress-lined hills of Tuscany's Val d'Orcia and Renaissance Florence, on to fashionable Milan, Lake Garda and the alpine cable cars of Seceda, then romantic Venice. The route then heads deep into the sun-soaked south — Puglia's white trulli town of Alberobello, the cave dwellings of Matera, the lemon-scented cliffs of Positano and the Blue Grotto of Capri — before closing the circle through Pompeii and Naples back to Rome.
desc_zh: 这趟12天的精品小团从罗马出发，完成意大利大陆的一次完整环线，串联亚得里亚海、第勒尼安海、利古里亚海与多洛米蒂山。从罗马的永恒古迹启程，穿越托斯卡纳奥尔恰谷绵延的丝柏树丘陵与文艺复兴之城佛罗伦萨，再到时尚之都米兰、加尔达湖与多洛米蒂的刀锋山缆车，随后抵达浪漫水城威尼斯。行程接着深入阳光灿烂的南意——普利亚的白色蘑菇屋小镇阿尔贝罗贝洛、千年石窟古城马泰拉、檸檬飘香的波西塔诺悬崖小镇与卡普里岛蓝洞——最后经庞贝、那不勒斯返回罗马，画上完美句点。

highlights.en: Round-trip Italian grand loop: three seas (Adriatic, Tyrrhenian, Ligurian) plus the Dolomites in one deep route
highlights.zh: 罗马往返意大利大环线：一次行程畅游三海（亚得里亚海、第勒尼安海、利古里亚海）一山（多洛米蒂）

highlights.en: Tuscany's UNESCO Val d'Orcia, Pienza and Renaissance Florence with the Duomo and Ponte Vecchio
highlights.zh: 世界遗产托斯卡纳奥尔恰谷、皮恩扎古城，文艺复兴名城佛罗伦萨圣母百花大教堂与维奇奥桥

highlights.en: Dolomites by cable car — ride up Seceda (or Alpe di Siusi) over jagged peaks and alpine meadows
highlights.zh: 缆车直上多洛米蒂——登顶刀锋山（或休斯高原），俯瞰锯齿峰群与高山草甸

highlights.en: Cinque Terre scenic train along the Ligurian cliffs and a Capri ferry to the Blue Grotto
highlights.zh: 五漁村景观列车沿利古里亚海崖行驶，卡普里岛渡船探秘蓝洞

highlights.en: Southern gems: Alberobello's trulli, Matera's Sassi cave town and a Positano boat cruise on the Amalfi Coast
highlights.zh: 南意精华：阿尔贝罗贝洛蘑菇屋、马泰拉Sassi石窟老城、阿马尔菲海岸波西塔诺出海游船

highlights.en: All flagship attractions included — Colosseum, Pantheon, Milan Cathedral, Pompeii and every listed entry and ferry
highlights.zh: 所有重点景点门票全含——罗马斗兽场、万神殿、米兰大教堂、庞贝古城及行程内所有门票与渡船

highlights.en: City-centre 4-star hotels (plus a 5-star Tuscan spa night) and a Mandarin-speaking guide-driver throughout
highlights.zh: 全程市中心四星酒店（含托斯卡纳五星SPA酒店1晚），中文司机兼导游贴心带领

highlights.en: All-inclusive small-group pricing (6-15 travellers) with daily breakfasts, taxes and no forced shopping
highlights.zh: 6-15人精品小团全包价，含每日早餐与各项税费，绝无强制购物

includes.en: Hotels: 1 night in a 5-star hotel, 2 nights in 4-star hotels in Sorrento, and 8 nights in comfort 4-star hotels — 11 hotel nights in total.
includes.zh: 【酒店】：五星酒店1晚，索伦托四星酒店2晚，舒适型四星级酒店8晚，共11晚酒店。

includes.en: Meals: 11 breakfasts, either in-hotel breakfast or breakfast in another form.
includes.zh: 【餐饮】：酒店内早餐或其他形式的早餐11餐。

includes.en: Taxes: all taxes within the itinerary, including tourist city tax, city-entry fees, residence/occupancy tax, road and bridge tolls, island-landing fees, etc.
includes.zh: 【税费】：游客城市税、进城费、居住税、路桥费、登岛费等行程内的所有税费。

includes.en: Transport: business travel vehicle or tour coach.
includes.zh: 【交通】：商务旅行车或者旅游巴士。

includes.en: Guide: professional driver + Chinese-speaking guide, or a Chinese-speaking driver-guide throughout (note: for groups of 8 or fewer, a business vehicle + Chinese-speaking driver-guide is arranged, who leads the full city itinerary).
includes.zh: 【导游】：职业司机+中文导游或者全程中文司机兼导游（备注：8人及以下则安排为商务旅行车+中文司机兼导游，届时将有司兼导带领游览全部城市行程）。

includes.en: Baggage: 1 piece of checked luggage up to 23 kg and 1 piece of hand luggage.
includes.zh: 【行李】：1件23公斤行李及1件随身行李。

includes.en: Activities & tickets: Colosseum, Pantheon, Pompeii, Milan Cathedral, Seceda cable car, Cinque Terre scenic train, Venice island ferry, Salerno–Positano round-trip boat, and Sorrento–Capri round-trip ferry.
includes.zh: 【活动及门票】：罗马斗兽场、万神殿、庞贝古城、米兰大教堂、刀锋山缆车、五渔村景观列车、威尼斯登岛轮渡、萨勒诺往返波西塔诺出海轮渡、索伦托–卡普里岛往返渡船。

excludes.en: Passport: personal passport fees.
excludes.zh: 护照：个人护照费用。

excludes.en: Visa: tourist visa fees for the countries listed in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 签证：行程中所列旅游国家所需的观光签证费用。

excludes.en: Insurance: travel insurance fees (if the itinerary involves high-risk sports, please verify whether your travel insurance covers that activity).
excludes.zh: 保险：旅游保险费用；（如行程内涉及到高风险运动，请核实旅游保险是否包含该项运动）。
