excludes.en: Tips: guests pay the guide and driver a total tip of EUR 10 per person per day, the same rate for adults and children.
excludes.zh: 小费：游客支付导游和司机小费一共10欧/人/天，大小同价。

excludes.en: Meals: apart from the specialty meals included in the itinerary, lunches and dinners are not included.
excludes.zh: 餐饮：除行程内包含的特色餐外，行程中不包含午、晚正餐费用。

excludes.en: Admission: attractions not noted as fee-included (including but not limited to sights marked "exterior", and all "recommended", "optional", "experience" items, etc.); if a guest wishes to visit, this is at their own expense.
excludes.zh: 门票：行程中未注明费用包含的景点（包括但不仅限于行程中注明“外观”的景点，“推荐”、“可选”、“体验”等等所有未提及费用包含的项目，如游客需要参观，敬请自理）。

excludes.en: Extended stays: any extra accommodation, transport or sightseeing beyond the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 延长住宿：行程外额外延长的住宿、交通、观光费用。

excludes.en: Personal spending: drinks/alcohol, taxis, phone charges and other personal expenses.
excludes.zh: 私人消费：如饮料酒类、出租车、电话费等个人消费。

excludes.en: Other transport: transport not mentioned in the inclusions beyond the business vehicle/minibus, such as Venice gondolas and the sightseeing trains, electric taxis, etc. in vehicle-restricted zones — at your own expense.
excludes.zh: 其他交通：除包含商务旅行车或者中巴之外，费用包含中未提及的其他交通费用，如威尼斯贡多拉，以及车辆限行区的观光火车、电瓶出租车等费用敬请自理。

excludes.en: Free-time activities: guests' own evening sightseeing and recommended items during the trip, plus any transport, meals, admission and shopping they incur.
excludes.zh: 自由活动：游客夜间自行游览及行程中的推荐项目，以及产生的交通、餐饮、门票、购物等费用。

excludes.en: Experience activities: any travel experience activities not included in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 体验活动：行程中的没有包含的各项旅游体验活动。

excludes.en: Other fees: any fees not mentioned in the inclusions. Due to force majeure (natural disasters, war, strikes), traffic delays, flight cancellations/reschedules, embassy visa delays, insufficient group numbers and similar special circumstances, or extra costs not caused by our company (e.g. overseas visa-extension fees, accommodation/meals/transport, national airfare adjustments), our company reserves the right to charge the price difference.
excludes.zh: 其他费用：费用包含中未提及的费用。如因天灾、战争、罢工等不可抗力的原因，及因交通延阻、航班取消或更改时间、使馆延误出签证、人数不足等特殊情况或其他非我公司原因所引致的额外费（如在外延期签证费、住、食及交通费、国家航空运价调整等），我公司有权追加差价。

timeline.title_en: Rome – Rome: the glory of the ancient Roman Empire
timeline.title_zh: 罗马 – 罗马：重温“万城之城”古罗马帝国的辉煌
timeline.description_en: The morning begins with a tour of Rome, the cradle of the ancient Roman Empire and the famed "Eternal City". You visit the standing ruins of the old imperial capital — the Colosseum (about 1 hour) and the Pantheon (about 30 minutes), the still-intact 2,000-year-old temple Michelangelo called "the design of angels" — then stroll the Spanish Square with its 138-step Spanish Steps (about 20 minutes) and view the Trevi Fountain (exterior, about 15 minutes). Note that the Pantheon is a religious site, so no bare shoulders/backs, no shorts or short skirts (must cover the knees), and no food or drink inside. The historic centre lies within Rome's vehicle-restricted zone (ZTL), so the day is a walking tour of roughly 5 km round trip — wear light, comfortable shoes. Overnight at the Sheraton Roma Hotel or Hotel Mantegna, or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午开始游览罗马，这里是古罗马帝国的发祥地，被称为“永恒之城”。参观矗立在古罗马旧都遗址上的斗兽场（约1小时）与万神殿（约30分钟）——这座保存完好、距今2000多年的神殿被米开朗基罗赞叹为“天使的设计”；随后游览拥有138级台阶（欧洲最宽台阶）的西班牙广场（约20分钟），并外观特莱维喷泉（许愿池，约15分钟）。注意：万神殿属于宗教场所，入内不可露肩露背、不可穿短裤短裙（须盖过膝盖），不可携带饮食进入。罗马古城区位于车辆禁行区（ZTL），当天为步行游览，往返约5公里，请穿着轻便舒适。夜宿罗马梅第奇喜来登酒店或曼特尼亚酒店，或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Rome – Pienza – Siena: Tuscan hill towns and the cypress lanes of Val d'Orcia
timeline.title_zh: 罗马 – 皮恩扎 – 锡耶纳：托斯卡纳丘陵小镇，奥尔恰谷丝柏树小径
timeline.description_en: Departing Rome in the morning, you head to the medieval hill town of Pienza, stopping along the way at the famous cypress lanes for free photos. In Pienza — birthplace of Pope Pius II and a Renaissance "ideal city" — you visit Piazza Pio II and view Pienza Cathedral (exterior), with sweeping views over the UNESCO World Heritage Val d'Orcia from the town walls. The day continues to Siena, a perfectly preserved medieval city, where you see Siena Cathedral (exterior), the shell-shaped Piazza del Campo, the Palazzo Pubblico (city hall, exterior) and the 102-metre Torre del Mangia (exterior), Italy's second-tallest tower. Don't miss Siena's almond treats — ricciarelli, panforte, pan pepato and cavallucci. Overnight at the Four Points by Sheraton Siena or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午从罗马出发前往中世纪山顶古城皮恩扎，途中在著名的丝柏树小径自由拍照。皮恩扎是教皇皮乌斯二世的出生地、文艺复兴“理想城市”的典范，在此游览二世广场、外观皮恩扎大教堂，并可从城墙上俯瞰世界文化遗产奥尔恰山谷（Val d'Orcia）的田园美景。随后前往保存完好的中世纪古城锡耶纳，游览外观锡耶纳大教堂、形似贝壳的田野广场（坎波广场）、外观锡耶纳市政厅，以及高102米、意大利第二高的曼吉亚塔楼（外观）。别忘了品尝当地特色甜点——杏仁软饼ricciarelli、果仁馅饼panforte、胡椒香料果仁糕pan pepato、核桃饼cavallucci。夜宿锡耶纳福朋喜来登酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Siena – Florence – Tuscany: a feast of the Renaissance treasure house
timeline.title_zh: 锡耶纳 – 佛罗伦萨 – 托斯卡纳：文艺复兴宝库的历史盛宴
timeline.description_en: In the morning you travel to Florence, the birthplace of the Renaissance, to visit the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore — the world's third-largest church — whose white, green and pink marble façade glows like a giant geometric mosaic (entry requires queuing; about 30 minutes). You then explore the open-air sculpture gallery of Piazza della Signoria, with its Neptune Fountain and the replica of Michelangelo's David before the city hall; the Ponte Vecchio ("Old Bridge") of 1345 over the Arno where, legend says, Dante first met Beatrice; and Piazza Santa Croce with the Basilica of Santa Croce (exterior), resting place of Michelangelo and Galileo. Afterwards you transfer to the famed spa town of Montecatini in Tuscany. Overnight at the Montecatini SPA Hotel or an equivalent 5-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往文艺复兴发源地佛罗伦萨，参观世界第三大教堂——圣母百花大教堂（需排队进入，约30分钟），其白、绿、粉三色大理石外立面如同巨型几何拼花地毯，光彩夺目。随后游览宛如露天雕塑美术馆的领主广场（广场有海神喷泉及米开朗基罗《大卫》复制品立于市政厅门前），以及横跨阿诺河、建于1345年的维奇奥桥（老桥，相传但丁在此邂逅比阿特丽丝），并游览聖十字广场及外观聖十字大教堂（米开朗基罗与伽利略的安息地）。之后前往托斯卡纳著名康养度假地蒙特卡蒂尼入住。夜宿托斯卡纳蒙特卡蒂尼SPA酒店或同等5星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Tuscany – Pisa – Cinque Terre – Milan: scenic-train Cinque Terre and the Ligurian coast
timeline.title_zh: 托斯卡纳 – 比萨 – 五渔村 – 米兰：景观列车游览五渔村，游利古里亚海景城镇
timeline.description_en: The morning takes you to Pisa to view the Leaning Tower (exterior, about 30 minutes) and the walled Piazza dei Miracoli (Square of Miracles, a UNESCO World Heritage Site, about 30 minutes), home to the cathedral, baptistery, leaning bell tower and cemetery. You then visit the Cinque Terre — the five cliff-side fishing villages of Monterosso al Mare, Vernazza, Corniglia, Manarola and Riomaggiore strung along the Ligurian coast (about 3 hours) — exploring the colourful villages by scenic train and on foot. If severe weather or a rail strike makes the Cinque Terre inaccessible, the day is automatically changed to touring coastal towns by coach or other means. Afterwards you transfer to Milan. Overnight at the UNA or Best Western Hotel Milan, or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往比萨，外观游览比萨斜塔（约30分钟）和被围墙环绕的奇迹广场（Piazza dei Miracoli，世界遗产，约30分钟）——广场上有大教堂、洗礼堂、斜塔（钟楼）与墓园。随后游览五渔村（约3小时）：沿利古里亚海岸线分布的蒙特罗索、韦尔纳扎、科尔尼利亚、马纳罗拉及里奥马焦雷五个悬崖渔村，乘景观小火车并徒步探索这些五彩斑斓的村镇。备注：如遇恶劣天气或铁路罢工等导致无法游览五渔村，行程将自动改为乘坐大巴或其它形式游览海岸线城市。之后前往米兰入住。夜宿米兰UNA/BW酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Milan – Lake Garda – Trento: Gothic cathedral masterpiece and the beauty of Lake Garda
timeline.title_zh: 米兰 – 加尔达湖 – 特伦托：瞻仰哥特教堂的杰作，欣赏加尔达湖的旖旎风光
timeline.description_en: In the morning you tour the fashion capital Milan, viewing the Sforza Castle (exterior, about 30 minutes), then visiting the Gothic Milan Cathedral (Duomo, begun 1386, about 1 hour) with its forest of marble spires and thousands of statues, and strolling the 19th-century glass-vaulted Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II (about 40 minutes), one of the world's oldest shopping arcades, home to Prada and Gucci flagships and historic cafés such as Caffè Biffi and Savini. In the afternoon you continue to Lake Garda to enjoy the lake-and-mountain scenery at the foot of the Alps (about 1 hour), then transfer to Trento. Overnight at the NH Trento Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel, a Renzo Piano-designed green hotel in the Le Albere district.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往时尚之都米兰，外观参观斯福尔扎城堡（约30分钟）；随后游览始建于1386年、历经五百年建成的哥特式米兰大教堂（约1小时，数百座尖塔耸入云霄、白色大理石外墙雕刻数千座雕像），并漫步19世纪修建的玻璃拱顶埃马努埃莱二世长廊（约40分钟）——世界上最古老的购物中心之一，汇聚Prada、Gucci旗舰店与Caffè Biffi、Savini Milano等老字号咖啡馆。下午前往加尔达湖，欣赏阿尔卑斯山脚下的湖光山色（约1小时），之后前往特伦托入住。夜宿NH特伦托酒店或同等4星级酒店——这是一家由意大利建筑大师Renzo Piano设计、位于阿尔达通科学文化区（Le Albere）的绿色酒店。

timeline.title_en: Trento – Bolzano – Ortisei – Val di Funes – Trento: cable car to Seceda, alpine meadows of Alpe di Siusi
timeline.title_zh: 特伦托 – 博尔扎诺 – 奥蒂塞伊 – 富内斯山谷 – 特伦托：缆车直达刀锋山，休斯高原欣赏草甸山谷
timeline.description_en: The morning is spent strolling the old town of Bolzano (about 1 hour), capital of South Tyrol, with its medieval cobbled streets and Piazza Walther blending Italian and Austrian culture. You then go to the elegant town of Ortisei (about 1 hour) in Val Gardena, and either ride the cable car up to Seceda (cable car included, about 2 hours) to look out over the Dolomites' jagged ridges and high meadows, OR visit the rolling alpine meadows of Alpe di Siusi (cable car is optional, paid separately, not included) — only one of the two can be done due to time. Afterwards you head to Val di Funes to photograph (exterior) the St. John's Church / "Lonely Church" of Santa Maddalena, a 1744 Baroque chapel set against the saw-toothed Geisler peaks. Note: the Seceda summer cable car officially operates 22 May – 2 Nov 2026 and the Alpe di Siusi cable car 1 May – 2 Nov; if Seceda is closed or its operation is adjusted, the day switches to Alpe di Siusi, and extreme weather/maintenance may suspend the cable cars (cable-car fees are then refunded). Overnight at the NH Trento Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午在南蒂罗尔省首府博尔扎诺老城漫步（约1小时），欣赏融合意大利与奥地利风情的中世纪鹅卵石街道与城市中心瓦尔特广场。随后前往加尔代纳山谷（Val Gardena）中典雅的奥蒂塞伊小镇（约1小时），可乘缆车登顶刀锋山（Seceda，缆车包含，约2小时）俯瞰多洛米蒂锯齿状峰群与高山草甸，或前往休斯高原（Alpe di Siusi）欣赏波浪般起伏的高山草原风光（休斯高原缆车为可选体验项目，需另行购票，费用不含）——受当日行程时间限制，两处仅可择一参观。之后前往富内斯山谷，外观打卡圣马达莱娜村的圣约翰教堂（孤独教堂，1744年巴洛克风格，背靠锯齿状盖斯勒峰）。提示：刀锋山夏季缆车官方运营时间为2026年5月22日–11月2日，休斯高原缆车为5月1日–11月2日；若刀锋山缆车未开放或临时调整，将改为游览休斯高原（含缆车），极端天气或检修时缆车将暂停并退还缆车费用，实际以景区官方最新公告为准。夜宿NH特伦托酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Trento – Venice – Rimini: romantic Venice on the gentle waters
timeline.title_zh: 特伦托 – 威尼斯 – 里米尼：游览温柔碧波上浪漫的威尼斯
timeline.description_en: In the morning you travel to the water city of Venice, built on 118 islands and linked by 177 canals and 401 bridges. Here you see St. Mark's Basilica (exterior, about 20 minutes), the Byzantine church famed for its five onion domes and golden mosaics; St. Mark's Square (about 30 minutes), the rectangular heart of the city framed by Renaissance buildings; the Bridge of Sighs (exterior, about 15 minutes), once the route condemned prisoners took to the dungeons; and the magnificent pink-marble Gothic Doge's Palace (exterior, about 20 minutes). Afterwards you transfer to Rimini, where the evening is free to enjoy the lively town centre and sample local cuisine. Overnight at the Grand Hotel / Fellini Parco hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel by the Adriatic beach.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往水城威尼斯——由118个小岛、177条水道与401座桥梁连成一体。参观外观聖马可大教堂（拜占庭风格，以五座洋葱形圆顶和金色马赛克闻名，约20分钟）、由文艺复兴精美建筑围合的长方形聖马可广场（约30分钟）、外观叹息桥（古代押送死囚前往监狱的必经之路，约15分钟），以及华丽的粉色大理石哥特式总督府（外观，约20分钟）。之后前往里米尼入住，晚上自由游览里米尼市区，融入当地热闹的夜生活并品尝当地美食。夜宿费里尼帕尔科住宅酒店或同等4星级酒店——酒店紧邻费德里科·费里尼公园，距亚得里亚海海滩数步之遥。

timeline.title_en: Rimini – Pescara – Bari: Adriatic food paradise Pescara and the four ancient cultures of Puglia
timeline.title_zh: 里米尼 – 佩斯卡拉 – 巴里：亚得里亚海美食天堂佩斯卡拉，普利亚截然不同的四种古老文明
timeline.description_en: In the morning you head south along the coast from Rimini, passing through Pescara in the Abruzzo region (about 1 hour) — a sun-soaked seaside town renowned for its seafood restaurants, where you can try clam pasta with olive oil and lemon or charcoal-grilled sea bass paired with local Montepulciano wine. In the afternoon you arrive in Bari, capital of Puglia, to check in and freely explore: view the Basilica of San Nicola (exterior) — an 11th-century Romanesque church and shared Catholic-Orthodox pilgrimage site — or wander the narrow whitewashed lanes of Bari Vecchia (old town, about 2 hours) and its shopping streets to soak up the relaxed feel of southern Italy. Overnight at the Mercure Bari Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早晨从里米尼沿海南下，途经阿布鲁佐大区的佩斯卡拉（约1小时）——这是一座充满地中海风情的海滨小城，海鲜餐厅绝不能错过，可品尝淋上橄榄油和柠檬汁的蛤蜊意面或炭烤海鲈鱼，搭配本地特产的蒙特普尔恰诺葡萄酒。午后前往普利亚大区首府巴里入住，自由参观外观聖尼古拉大教堂（11世纪罗马式教堂，天主教与东正教共同朝圣之地），或漫步老城区（Bari Vecchia）狭窄曲折的白石巷弄与购物步行街，感受南意的松弛感（约2小时）。夜宿巴里美居酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Bari – Polignano a Mare – Alberobello – Matera: the thousand-year cave dreamscape of Matera at dusk
timeline.title_zh: 巴里 – 滨海波利尼亚诺 – 阿尔贝罗贝洛 – 马泰拉：遇见华灯初上的马泰拉千年石窟梦境
timeline.description_en: Departing Bari in the morning, you go to the clifftop town of Polignano a Mare (about 1.5 hours), the "Mediterranean balcony of Puglia", famous for the deep-cut Lama Monachile cove with its stone arch bridge and natural caves, and for the poems written on its walls and steps. Next is the fairytale white-stone town of Alberobello (about 1 hour), a UNESCO World Heritage Site since 1996, with its rows of trulli — cone-roofed dry-stone houses built without mortar. In the afternoon you reach the stone city of Matera, one of the oldest continuously inhabited places on Earth, to explore the Sassi old town (about 2 hours) carved from natural rock and divided into Sasso Caveoso and Sasso Barisano, with its cave restaurants serving handmade orecchiette, goat cheese and local Aglianico wine. Overnight at the UNA Hotel Matera or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午从巴里出发，前往悬崖小镇滨海波利尼亚诺（约1小时30分钟）——被誉为“普利亚的地中海阳台”，最著名的景观是深切的Lama Monachile海湾（连接石拱桥与天然岩洞），镇内墙上、门前、台阶上写满诗句，故有“诗意之镇”之称。随后前往童话白石小镇阿尔贝罗贝洛（约1小时）——1996年列入世界文化遗产，以成片的特鲁利（Trulli，圆锥形屋顶的干式石砌石屋，不用水泥黏合）闻名。下午抵达石头古城马泰拉，探索由天然岩石雕凿而成、自古便有人居住（地球上最古老居住地之一）的Sassi老城区（约2小时，分为Sasso Caveoso与Sasso Barisano两区），区内特色洞穴餐厅常见手工意面（如Orecchiette）、山羊乳酪与地区葡萄酒（如Aglianico）。夜宿马泰拉UNA酒店或同级4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Matera – Salerno – Positano – Sorrento Peninsula: a Mediterranean canvas and the lemon scent of Positano
timeline.title_zh: 马泰拉 – 萨勒诺 – 波西塔诺 – 索伦托半岛：地中海风情画卷，感受波西塔诺的柠檬香
timeline.description_en: In the morning you travel to Salerno (about 30 minutes) — a historic city of ancient churches, a Norman castle and picturesque seafront on the Amalfi Coast — and board a boat to cruise to Positano (about 2.5 hours), the colourful cliff-side town stacked with pink-orange, yellow and blue houses where the air carries the scent of lemons and sea breeze. The boat passes the UNESCO-listed Amalfi Coast (viewed from the boat, about 15 minutes), one of the world's most enchanting coastlines. You then sail back to Salerno and transfer to Sorrento. Note: if extreme sea conditions cause the boat company to cancel the Positano sailing, the day is rearranged to visit Salerno or Sorrento old town by coach (Positano cannot be visited) and the boat fee is refunded. Overnight at the Sorrento Coast Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel, with private beach and pier overlooking the Bay of Naples.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往萨勒诺（约30分钟）——一座集古老教堂、诺曼城堡与风景如画海滨于一身、位于阿马尔菲海岸的历史名城，随后乘船游览波西塔诺（约2小时30分钟），探索这座悬崖上的彩色小镇：层叠的粉橙、明黄、湛蓝房屋沿山而建，空气中弥漫着柠檬与海风的清香。途中可乘船远观联合国教科文组织世界遗产阿马尔菲海岸（船观，约15分钟）——那不勒斯乃至全世界最迷人的海岸线之一。之后乘船返回萨勒诺，前往索伦托入住。备注：如遇海上极端天气，出于游客安全考虑游船公司取消出海游览波西塔诺活动，我社将安排当天乘车参观萨勒诺或索伦托老城（无法参观波西塔诺），出海游船费用将退还给游客。夜宿索伦托海岸酒店或同等4星级酒店——酒店三面环海，拥有私人沙滩与私家码头，可眺望索伦托那不勒斯海湾。

timeline.title_en: Sorrento Peninsula – Capri – Sorrento Peninsula: Mediterranean paradise island Capri and the Blue Grotto
timeline.title_zh: 索伦托半岛 – 卡普里岛 – 索伦托半岛：地中海天堂岛——卡普里岛，探秘蓝洞
timeline.description_en: In the morning you stroll the clifftop seaside town of Sorrento, then take the ferry to Capri (about 3 hours on the island), a celebrated resort island since Roman times when Emperor Augustus chose it as his summer retreat. On the island you have free time to either walk the seafront and visit the Blue Grotto, cruise around the island to explore the Blue Grotto (self-paid), or head up to Capri town to view the Gardens of Augustus (exterior, about 30 minutes) overlooking the bay. Note: activity on Capri is free and includes no transport — the recommended route from the Marina Grande to Capri town to the Gardens of Augustus is about 1.3 km of mountain road past three key sights, with paid funicular and taxis available; the Blue Grotto is a natural site that may be closed by high tide, waves or weather, its entry fee is not included, and per local custom a tip of EUR 2–5 (beyond the boatman's fee) is expected. Afterwards you ferry back to Sorrento and return to the hotel. Overnight at the Sorrento Coast Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午漫步建于海滨峭壁上的索伦托小城，之后在索伦托乘渡船前往卡普里岛（岛上约3小时）——自古罗马时期起即为著名的旅游疗养胜地，奥古斯都大帝曾以其优美环境而钟爱此岛作为避暑之地。登岛后可自行前往海边漫步后游览蓝洞，或自行乘船环岛探秘蓝洞（自费），或自行前往卡普里城中游览外观奥古斯都花园（约30分钟）俯瞰整个海湾。重要提示：卡普里岛登岛后自由活动，不含任何交通费用，推荐路线为大港–卡普里古城–奥古斯都花园（单程约1.3公里山路，途径三个重要景点），沿途有缆车和出租车需额外付费；蓝洞属自然景观，如遇涨潮、风浪或当地海洋气象机构宣布关闭则无法入内，蓝洞游览费用不含在团费内，按当地习俗除人力船工费外请支付2–5欧元小费。之后乘渡船返回索伦托码头，乘车返回酒店。夜宿索伦托海岸酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Sorrento – Pompeii – Naples – Rome: unsealing the ruins, in search of the lost civilization of Pompeii
timeline.title_zh: 索伦托 – 庞贝 – 那不勒斯 – 罗马：“解封”历史遗迹，寻找消失的庞贝文明
timeline.description_en: After breakfast you travel to Pompeii to explore the ruins of the ancient city buried by the eruption of Mount Vesuvius — including the Temple of Apollo (about 15 minutes) and the central Forum (about 30 minutes), once Pompeii's political, economic and religious heart, with its surviving Corinthian columns and the haunting plaster casts of victims (about 1.5 hours total). You then visit the old town of Naples (about 1.5 hours), birthplace of pizza and of the songs "O Sole Mio" and "Torna a Surriento", viewing the Royal Palace of Naples (exterior, about 20 minutes) and the Castel Nuovo (New Castle / Angevin castle, exterior, about 20 minutes). In the afternoon you transfer back to Rome, where the journey ends. No hotel is provided on this final day.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往庞贝，探索因公元79年维苏威火山爆发而被火山灰掩埋的庞贝古城遗址，了解曾经的庞贝文明——包括阿波罗神庙（约15分钟）及中心广场（公共广场，约30分钟，昔日庞贝的政治、经济、宗教中心，残留科林斯式圆柱与触目惊心的遇难者石膏铸像），整体游览约1.5小时。之后前往那不勒斯游览老城（约1.5小时）——披萨的起源地，也是《我的太阳》《重归苏莲托》的诞生地，参观外观那不勒斯皇宫（约20分钟）与外观新堡（安茹城堡，约20分钟）。下午前往罗马，结束愉快旅程。当天无酒店住宿。

meeting_en: Tour begins and ends in Rome, Italy. Day 1 sightseeing starts in central Rome (a vehicle-restricted ZTL walking zone); the tour concludes back in Rome on Day 12.
meeting_zh: 行程在意大利罗马出发并返回。第1天于罗马市中心开始游览（古城为车辆禁行ZTL步行区），第12天返回罗马结束行程。

faqs.question_en: What are the meeting and dispersal points, times and methods?
faqs.question_zh: 集合及集散地点和方法是怎样的？
faqs.answer_en: There are two route directions. Route A (Rome at the start — Rome toured on Day 1): meet at 09:00 on Day 1 at the Villa Borghese / Washington bus stop in Rome; dispersal around 17:30 on Day 12 at Roma Tiburtina railway station (Piazzale della Stazione Tiburtina, 00162 Roma RM). Route A does NOT recommend a flight leaving Rome on the final day; you may join in Rome on the start day but would miss the Rome city sights with no refund. Route B (Rome at the end — Rome toured on the last day): on Day 1 meet/disperse at 09:00 at Roma Tiburtina station; on Day 12 disperse around 16:30 near Piazza del Popolo (Piazzale Flaminio, 00187 Roma RM) or around 17:00 at Roma Tiburtina station. Route B does NOT recommend a flight landing in Rome on the morning of the start day; you may book an evening flight out of Rome on the final day. Times and places are for reference — the actual departure follows the group notice.
faqs.answer_zh: 本产品分两个出发方向。A线路（罗马出发，第1天游览罗马）：行程第1天09:00在罗马华盛顿大街巴士停靠站（Villa Borghese/Washington）集合；第12天下午17:30左右在Roma Tiburtina火车站集散（地址：Piazzale della Stazione Tiburtina, 00162 Roma RM, 意大利）。A线路不推荐结束当天离开罗马的航班；参团当天可在罗马上团，但罗马市区景点会无法游览，并无费用可退。B线路（罗马出发，最后一天游览罗马）：第1天09:00在Roma Tiburtina火车站集散；第12天16:30左右在人民广场附近解散（Piazzale Flaminio, 00187 Roma RM），17:00左右在Roma Tiburtina火车站解散。B线路不推荐参团当天早上降落罗马的航班，结束当天可预定晚上的航班离开罗马。参考时间及地点以出团通知书为准。

faqs.question_en: What is the difference between Route A and Route B departing from Rome?
faqs.question_zh: 罗马出发的A路线和B线路有什么不同？
faqs.answer_en: It is a loop with completely identical sights and inclusions — only the order of touring differs: Route A tours Rome on Day 1, while Route B tours Rome on the last day.
faqs.answer_zh: 环线路线完全相同，包含项目也完全相同，但游览顺序不同：A线路行程第一天游览罗马，B线路行程最后一天游览罗马。

faqs.question_en: Why is central Rome explored on foot?
faqs.question_zh: 罗马市中心为什么要徒步游览？
faqs.answer_en: Rome's sights are concentrated in the historic centre, which is a vehicle-restricted heritage-protection zone. On the day you walk from the hotel to Santa Maria Maggiore (5–10 min), the Colosseum (10–15 min), the Mouth of Truth (20–25 min), the Trevi Fountain (15–20 min) and Piazza di Spagna (5–10 min). Skipping the Mouth of Truth can save about 35 minutes of walking (about 2 km).
faqs.answer_zh: 由于罗马的景点比较集中，几乎所有景点都位于罗马古城区（历史保护区车辆限行）。当天从酒店步行前往聖母大殿（步行5到10分钟）、斗兽场（10到15分钟）、真理之口（20到25分钟）、许愿池（15到20分钟）、西班牙广场（5到10分钟）；如果不游览真理之口可减少约35分钟步行时间（约2公里）。

faqs.question_en: Can both the Seceda and Alpe di Siusi cable cars be ridden on the same day?
faqs.question_zh: 刀锋山和休斯高原缆车当天是否都可乘坐游览？
faqs.answer_en: On that day, the round-trip Seceda cable car is already included. The Alpe di Siusi cable car is an optional experience at your own expense. Due to the day's time limit, only one of the two can be visited. If the Seceda cable car is temporarily closed for operational reasons, the day is uniformly changed to Alpe di Siusi (cable car included). Actual operation follows the resort's latest official notice.
faqs.answer_zh: 行程当日，我社已包含刀锋山往返缆车费用。休斯高原缆车为可选体验项目，相关费用需您自理。受当日行程时间限制，两个景点仅可择一参观。若刀锋山缆车因运营安排临时关闭，将统一调整为游览休斯高原（含缆车），实际运营情况以景区官方最新通知为准。

faqs.question_en: Do I need a visa?
faqs.question_zh: 是否需要签证？
faqs.answer_en: Yes. This product does NOT include visa fees — if you need a visa, please choose a Schengen visa product. A Schengen visa (single- or multiple-entry) is required. "Worry-free visa" guarantee: for guests who sign with us at least 61 days before departure, if a visa is not obtained within 45 days of departure, we bear all losses and immediately refund the full travel fee; guests who do not qualify and fail to obtain a visa are refunded per the change/cancellation terms. A refusal must be reported to us within 48 hours with the consulate's refusal letter, supplementary/changed materials submitted within 5 days, and the guest may not unilaterally waive the right of "visa defence". We can buy a Schengen-compliant travel insurance for guests who entrust us with the visa; otherwise buy your own. After booking, we provide the full set of Schengen visa application materials. Your passport must be valid for at least 6 months from the date of departure, or customs may refuse entry. Visa fees, visa service fees, Schengen insurance fees and visa-centre appointment fees are all non-refundable and non-transferable, even if the product is changed or cancelled.
faqs.answer_zh: 需要。本产品不包含签证费用，如需办理请选择申根签证产品。本产品需要申根签证（单次或多次入境）。保签无忧：游客在出发日前61天与我社签约的旅游产品，如在出发前45天内未获取签证，我社承担所有损失，立即退还游客全部旅游费用；不符合该条款的游客如未正常获取签证，将按照“退改与取消条款”进行退费。如遇拒签需在48小时内通知我社并出具使领馆拒签函，如需补充或更改材料需在五天内提交，且不得单方面放弃“签证抗辩”权利。如委托我社办理申根签证，我社为您购买符合申根要求的申根旅游保险；若未委托办理，需自行购买保险及负责理赔。预订后免费提供办理申根签证的全部材料。护照有效期需在离境之日起至少还有六个月有效期，否则海关有权拒绝入境。签证费、签证服务费、申根保险费、签证中心预约费均不可退款，也无法更改使用者，即使产品退改签亦不可退款。

faqs.question_en: Booking, changes & cancellation
faqs.question_zh: 预订、变更与取消须知
faqs.answer_en: Free cancellation: up to 30 days before departure (excluding the 30th day) both the agency and the traveller may cancel without reason; after the group is confirmed, cancelling carries liability per the change/cancellation terms. Because flights, traffic, ferries and strikes often shift the order and timing, you must arrive at the meeting point one day before the tour start and leave one day after the tour ends, with ample flight-connection buffer (same airport ≥5 hrs, different airports in the same city ≥7 hrs; reasonable meet/disperse window 07:00–21:00); losses from not doing so are the traveller's own. Payment does not equal confirmation — book at least 14 days ahead; orders need a second confirmation within 48 hours or are auto-refunded. Rooms: two people booking together default to a standard double (bed type — twin or king — assigned by the hotel, not selectable); solo travellers pay a single-room supplement deposit (refunded pro-rata if shared); a triple/family room defaults to two parents + one minor child with bed type not selectable. European hotels are all non-smoking, no cooking in rooms, no free toiletries or free hot water, check-in 14:00 / check-out 11:00, and air-conditioning is not a standard fitting. Listed hotel names are preferred; if full, an equivalent same-star hotel is substituted without separate notice. Group size: this is a shared (join-in) group that may share vehicles with other agencies' guests; the minimum group size to confirm departure is 10 people, and if 10 is not reached 30 days before departure either side may cancel. Pricing: all prices are quoted in EUR at booking; if you pay in CNY, the amount is the real-time CNY price auto-calculated from the Bank of China "EUR sell" rate on the day of payment (refunds likewise use the rate on the refund day, and any rate difference or bank fees are borne by the traveller). Itinerary contingencies: order and timing may be adjusted (and a coach may replace high-speed rail) without it being a breach; if force majeure or weather closes a sight, we may cancel/swap it or refund the ticket price per the product (not the gate price). The whole trip has no shopping stops and no tour-leader service (local guides only); optional self-paid items may be recommended on the ground with no forced consumption.
faqs.answer_zh: 免费取消：出发前30天（不含第30天）旅行社和旅行者均有权申请无理由取消；宣布成团后取消按《更改与取消条例条款》承担违约责任。由于航变、交通拥堵、渡轮取消、罢工游行等常导致顺序及时间调整，本产品要求旅游者在旅游团开始前一天到达集合地、结束后一天离开集散地，并预留合理航班衔接时间（同机场转机≥5小时、同城不同机场≥7小时；合理集合集散时段07:00–21:00），未遵守导致的损失由旅行者自行承担。所有订单支付不等于确认行程，建议提前至少14天预订，且最多48小时二次确认，超48小时未确认默认自动退款。房型：两人同时报名默认入住标准双人间（大床或双床由酒店安排不可选）；单人报名默认含单人房差押金（拼房成功后按比例退款）；三人家庭间默认两位父母与一位未成年儿童入住，床型不可选。欧洲酒店全部禁烟、禁止房内做饭、不提供一次性洗漱用品及免费开水，入住14:00、退房11:00，且空调并非酒店标准设施。行程内列明酒店名称为优先入住酒店，如订满则换为同星级相近酒店，不再另行通知。成团：本产品为散客拼团，可能与其他旅行社客人合并用车，成团人数为10人，出发前30天未达成团人数双方均可解除合同。价格：所有定价以欧元为计价单位，如选择人民币支付，则以当天支付时依据中国银行实时“欧元卖出价”自动计算的人民币价格为准（退款同样适用申请当日汇率，汇率差异或银行手续费由旅行者承担）。行程应变：先后顺序及时间可能调整（并可能用大巴车代替高铁），不视为旅行社违约；如遇不可抗力或天气导致景点无法游览，我社可取消/更换或按产品门票价退费（不以景区挂牌价为准）。全程不含购物店行程，且不提供领队服务（由当地导游服务），当地可能推荐自费项目，绝无强制消费。

faqs.question_en: Health & safety requirements
faqs.question_zh: 健康与安全须知
faqs.answer_en: For your safety, please have a health check before travelling and do NOT join if you have: infectious diseases (e.g. active tuberculosis, typhoid); cardiovascular disease (e.g. severe hypertension, heart insufficiency, myocardial ischemia/infarction); cerebrovascular disease (e.g. embolism, hemorrhage, brain tumour); respiratory disease (e.g. emphysema, cor pulmonale); psychiatric conditions (e.g. epilepsy or any mental illness); severe anemia (hemoglobin below 50 g/L); or are recovering from major surgery. Pregnancy: from week 35 you cannot join under any circumstances; from week 28 you need a doctor's exam report within 7 days plus the attending doctor's consent; under week 28 join with caution, sign a liability waiver, and you cannot do any adventure/skiing/boating/aerial/outdoor activities. Disabled travellers need a 7-day medical report and doctor's consent, an immediate-family companion, and must apply at least 61 days ahead for a reserved place and facilities. Elderly travellers over 70 need a health certificate and medical report and a family companion (or sign a liability waiver); this is a long, walking-intensive trip requiring good fitness; high-risk activities need the attending doctor's consent; apply at least 61 days ahead for elderly-friendly services. Minors (under 18) must be accompanied by an immediate relative/guardian; some sights have restrictions for under-18/12/6; for infants under 6 or children under 30 kg confirm a safety seat in advance; an unaccompanied minor needs a parental authorization letter (both parents' if travelling with non-parents); infants under 2 are not accepted. Per Article 15 of the Tourism Law and the Infectious Disease Prevention Law (2025 revision), travellers must truthfully declare health information relevant to the trip (pregnancy, lactation, chronic disease, infectious disease history, suspected symptoms, recent travel to epidemic areas) and follow safety warnings; concealment leading to harm or transmission means the traveller bears the resulting liability, medical/quarantine costs and compensation, and the agency may terminate the contract without refund.
faqs.answer_zh: 为确保顺利出行、防止旅途中发生人身意外，请出行前做一次必要的身体检查，如存在以下情况请勿报名：传染性疾病患者（如活动期肺结核、伤寒）；心血管疾病患者（如严重高血压、心功能不全、心肌缺氧、心肌梗塞）；脑血管疾病患者（如脑栓塞、脑出血、脑肿瘤）；呼吸系统疾病患者（如肺气肿、肺心病）；精神病患者（如癫痫及各种精神病）；严重贫血患者（血红蛋白50克/升以下）；大中型手术恢复期病患者。孕妇：妊娠35周及以上任何情况都无法参团；28周及以上需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书；28周以下请慎重报名，需签署旅行社免责声明书，且行程内探险、滑雪、出海、高空、户外等项目均无法参加。残疾人需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书、需直系家属陪同、并提前至少61天申请预留位置及专用设施。70周岁以上老年人需提供健康证明、体检报告并由直系家属陪同（否则需签署免责声明书）；本次行程较长、需一定步行能力，体力不支者请慎重报名；高风险项目需持主治医师同意书；并提前至少61天申请适老化服务及设施。未成年人（未满18周岁）需由直系亲属或监护人陪同，部分景点对未满18/12/6周岁有特殊限定；如有6岁以下婴儿或30公斤以下儿童请提前确认安全座椅；无父母陪同的18岁以下未成年人须持父母授权书（与非父母同行需双方监护人授权书）；不接受2周岁以下婴儿参团。根据《旅游法》第15条及《传染病防治法（2025修订）》，旅游者需如实告知与旅游活动相关的个人健康信息（包括妊娠期、哺乳期、慢性病、传染病史、疑似症状或近期疫区旅居史）并遵守安全警示规定，若因隐瞒导致人身损害或传播风险，需自行承担相应责任、医疗隔离费用及赔偿，旅行社可解除合同且不退还费用。

title_en: Italy Panorama: 8-Day Tour from Rome to Venice
title_zh: 意大利全景8天跟团游（罗马进威尼斯出）
short_en: An 8-day one-way Italy journey from Rome to Venice via Capri, the Amalfi Coast, Pompeii, Tuscany, Cinque Terre and Florence.
short_zh: 8天意大利单程深度游，从罗马一路玩到威尼斯，途经卡普里岛、阿马尔菲海岸、庞贝、托斯卡纳、五渔村与佛罗伦萨。
desc_en: Travel one-way across Italy from the Eternal City of Rome to the romantic canals of Venice on this 8-day small-group tour. Discover the Mediterranean paradise of Capri and its Blue Grotto, cruise the dramatic Amalfi Coast past Positano, walk the ruins of Pompeii, and lose yourself in medieval Siena, the Val d'Orcia, the cliffside villages of Cinque Terre and Renaissance Florence. With city-centre 4-star hotels, included attractions and ferries, and a Chinese-speaking guide-driver throughout, this deep one-way route keeps daily driving short and the sightseeing rich.
desc_zh: 8天单程深度游，从永恒之城罗马一路向北直抵浪漫水城威尼斯。探访地中海天堂卡普里岛与神秘蓝洞，乘船环游壮美的阿马尔菲海岸与悬崖小镇波西塔诺，走进沉睡千年的庞贝古城，徜徉于中世纪古城锡耶纳、奥尔恰谷、悬崖渔村五渔村以及文艺复兴之都佛罗伦萨。全程入住市中心四星级酒店，门票与海上渡轮全含，配中文司机兼导游，单程深度路线大幅缩短行车里程，让游览更从容、更尽兴。

highlights.en: Explore Rome, the "Eternal City" and cradle of the Roman Empire, on a guided walk
highlights.zh: 徒步深度探访古罗马帝国发祥地、永恒之城罗马

highlights.en: Discover Capri's world-famous Blue Grotto, one of the world's natural wonders
highlights.zh: 探秘卡普里岛蓝色奇观蓝洞，世界自然奇景之一

highlights.en: Cruise the Amalfi Coast and the cliffside village of Positano
highlights.zh: 出海环游世界遗产阿马尔菲海岸与悬崖小镇波西塔诺

highlights.en: Walk the ruins of Pompeii, the city buried by Vesuvius
highlights.zh: 走进被维苏威火山掩埋的庞贝古城遗址

highlights.en: Medieval Siena and the UNESCO landscapes of the Val d'Orcia and Pienza
highlights.zh: 中世纪艺术瑰宝锡耶纳与世界遗产奥尔恰谷、皮恩扎

highlights.en: Ride the scenic train through the colourful villages of Cinque Terre
highlights.zh: 乘景观列车游览五彩斑斓的悬崖渔村五渔村

highlights.en: Renaissance Florence and the romantic canals of Venice
highlights.zh: 文艺复兴之都佛罗伦萨与浪漫水城威尼斯

highlights.en: All-inclusive pricing: city-centre 4-star hotels, ferries, attractions and taxes, no forced shopping
highlights.zh: 税费全含、绝无强制购物：市中心四星级酒店、海上渡轮、门票及各项税费全含

includes.en: Hotels: 7 nights in 4-star hotels.
includes.zh: 【酒店】：四星级酒店7晚。

includes.en: Meals: 7 meals in total — in-hotel breakfasts or meals in other forms.
includes.zh: 【餐饮】：酒店内早餐或其他形式餐饮共计7餐。

includes.en: Taxes & fees: all taxes within the itinerary — tourist city tax, town-entry fees, residence tax, road & bridge tolls, island-landing fees, etc.
includes.zh: 【税费】：游客城市税、进城费、居住税、路桥费、登岛费等行程内的所有税费。

includes.en: Transport: tourist coach or business travel vehicle.
includes.zh: 【交通】：旅游巴士或者商务旅行车。

includes.en: Guide: professional driver + Chinese-speaking guide, or a Chinese-speaking driver-guide throughout (note: for groups of 8 or fewer, a business travel vehicle + Chinese-speaking driver-guide is arranged, who leads the tour of all cities).
includes.zh: 【导游】：职业司机+中文导游，或全程中文司机兼导游（备注：8人及以下则安排为商务旅行车+中文司机兼导游，届时将由司兼导带领游览全部城市行程）。

includes.en: Luggage: one 23 kg checked bag plus one carry-on.
includes.zh: 【行李】：1件23公斤行李及1件随身行李。

includes.en: Activities & tickets: the Sorrento–Amalfi boat tour, round-trip Capri ferry, Venice island ferry, Cinque Terre scenic train, and Pompeii admission (including a national-pavilion guide/lecturer).
includes.zh: 【活动及门票】：索伦托阿马尔菲出海环游、卡普里岛往返渡船、威尼斯登岛轮渡、五渔村景观列车、庞贝古城门票（含国家馆讲解师）。

excludes.en: Passport: personal passport fees.
excludes.zh: 护照：个人护照费用。

excludes.en: Visa: the tourist visa fees required for the destination countries listed in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 签证：行程中所列旅游国家所需的观光签证费用。

excludes.en: Insurance: travel insurance (if the itinerary involves high-risk sports, please verify whether your travel insurance covers them).
excludes.zh: 保险：旅游保险费用（如行程内涉及高风险运动，请核实旅游保险是否包含该项运动）。

excludes.en: Tips: tips for the guide and driver totaling 10 EUR per person per day, same rate for adults and children.
excludes.zh: 小费：游客支付导游和司机小费一共10欧/人/天，大小同价。

excludes.en: Meals: lunches and dinners (proper meals) are not included.
excludes.zh: 餐饮：行程内不包含午、晚正餐费用。

excludes.en: Admission: sights not marked as fee-included (including but not limited to those marked "exterior," plus all "recommended," "optional," "experience" and other items where inclusion is not stated — if you wish to enter, please pay on your own).
excludes.zh: 门票：行程中未注明费用包含的景点（包括但不仅限于行程中注明"外观"的景点，以及"推荐""可选""体验"等所有未提及费用包含的项目，如需参观敬请自理）。

excludes.en: Extended stays: any extra accommodation, transport or sightseeing beyond the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 延长住宿：行程外额外延长的住宿、交通、观光费用。

excludes.en: Personal spending: drinks/alcohol, taxis, phone charges and other personal expenses.
excludes.zh: 私人消费：如饮料酒类、出租车、电话费等个人消费。

excludes.en: Other transport: transport not covered beyond the included business vehicle or coach and not mentioned in the inclusions — e.g. Venice gondolas, and sightseeing trains, electric taxis, etc. in vehicle-restricted zones, all at your own expense.
excludes.zh: 其他交通：除包含商务旅行车或中巴之外、费用包含中未提及的其他交通费用，如威尼斯贡多拉，以及车辆限行区的观光火车、电瓶出租车等费用敬请自理。

excludes.en: Free-time activities: guests' own evening outings and recommended items during the trip, and any transport, meals, admission or shopping they incur.
excludes.zh: 自由活动：游客夜间自行游览及行程中的推荐项目，以及由此产生的交通、餐饮、门票、购物等费用。

excludes.en: Experience activities: any travel experience activities not included in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 体验活动：行程中没有包含的各项旅游体验活动。

excludes.en: Other fees: anything not mentioned in the inclusions. In cases of force majeure (natural disaster, war, strike, etc.) or extra costs from transport delays, flight cancellations/reschedules, embassy visa delays, insufficient group size, or other situations not caused by our company (e.g. overseas visa-extension, board, lodging and transport fees, national airfare adjustments), our company reserves the right to charge the price difference.
excludes.zh: 其他费用：费用包含中未提及的费用。如因天灾、战争、罢工等不可抗力原因，及因交通延阻、航班取消或更改时间、使馆延误出签证、人数不足等特殊情况或其他非我公司原因所引致的额外费用（如在外延期签证费、住食及交通费、国家航空运价调整等），我公司有权追加差价。

timeline.title_en: Rome — Reliving the Glory of the Ancient Roman Empire, the "City of All Cities"
timeline.title_zh: 罗马【重温"万城之城"古罗马帝国的辉煌】
timeline.description_en: Meet in the morning and, led by your guide, set off on a walking tour of the world-famous historic city of Rome, the birthplace of the ancient Roman Empire, known for its long history as the "Eternal City." Visit the landmarks rising over the ruins of the ancient capital: the Colosseum (exterior) and the Pantheon (exterior), then stroll through the Spanish Square (Piazza di Spagna) and the Trevi Fountain (exterior). Afterwards enjoy free time before checking into the hotel to rest. Note: because of heritage protection in Rome's old city, vehicles are banned and most areas are pedestrian zones — all the sights lie within the ancient city, so the day is on foot, covering roughly 5–6 km. Overnight: Sheraton Roma / Hotel Mantegna, or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午集合，在导游的带领下徒步游览世界著名的历史文化名城罗马，这里是古罗马帝国的发祥地，因历史悠久而被称为"永恒之城"。参观矗立在罗马古都遗址上的斗兽场（外观）、万神殿（外观），并游览西班牙广场和特莱维喷泉（外观）。之后自由活动，入住酒店休息。备注：由于罗马古城建筑保护，禁止车辆行驶，大多数区域为步行街区，而罗马市区内的所有景点都在古罗马城内，当天徒步参观罗马，步行行程约为5-6公里。夜宿：罗马梅第奇喜来登酒店或曼特尼亚酒店，或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Rome – Naples/Sorrento – Capri – Sorrento (Step into the Mediterranean Paradise of Capri and explore the Blue Grotto)
timeline.title_zh: 罗马-那不勒斯/索伦托-卡普里岛-索伦托【走进地中海天堂—卡普里岛，探秘蓝洞】
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, travel to Naples/Sorrento and take a ferry to the port of Capri Island. On Capri you have free time (no transport included): you may stroll along the seaside and then visit the Blue Grotto, take a boat around the island to explore the Blue Grotto on your own, or head into Capri town to see the Gardens of Augustus (exterior) and overlook the whole bay. Then take the ferry back to Sorrento and check in. Note: after landing on Capri, activity is free and unguided; the recommended route Marina Grande – Capri old town – Gardens of Augustus is about 1.3 km of hill path passing three key sights, with funiculars and taxis available for an extra fee. The Blue Grotto is a natural site and cannot be visited if the local marine authority closes it due to high tide, wind or waves; the Blue Grotto fee is not included, and besides the boatman's fee a 2–5 EUR tip is customary. Overnight: a Sorrento coast hotel or equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，前往那不勒斯/索伦托乘坐渡船到达卡普里岛港口。当天可自行前往海边漫步后前往蓝洞参观，或自行乘船环岛探秘蓝洞，或自行前往卡普里城中游览奥古斯都花园（外观），俯瞰整个海湾；之后坐渡船返回索伦托码头，前往酒店入住。备注：卡普里岛登岛后自由活动，不含任何交通费用，推荐路线为大港—卡普里古城—奥古斯都花园，单程约1.3公里的山路，途经三个重要景点，沿途有缆车和出租车，需要额外付费。卡普里的蓝洞属于自然景观，如遇涨潮、风浪或其他因素被当地海洋气象机构宣布关闭，则无法入内游览；蓝洞游览费用不包含在旅游团内，除蓝洞人力船工费用外，请按当地习俗支付2-5欧元小费。夜宿：索伦托海岸酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Sorrento – Amalfi – Positano – Sorrento (Cruise the Amalfi Coast and breathe in Positano's lemon scent)
timeline.title_zh: 索伦托-阿马尔菲-波西塔诺-索伦托【阿马尔菲出海环游，感受波西塔诺的柠檬香】
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, set off on a charming boat day-trip to discover the treasures of the Amalfi Coast. Cruise to Positano to explore the enchanting cliffside village, then sail on to Amalfi to take in the panorama of the Amalfi Coast town, before returning by boat and checking into the hotel. Note: in case of extreme sea weather, for guest safety the boat company cancels the outing to Positano and Amalfi; we will instead arrange a coach tour of Sorrento old town that day (Positano and Amalfi cannot be visited) and the boat fee will be refunded to guests. Overnight: a Sorrento coast hotel or equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，踏上迷人的游船一日游，探索阿马尔菲海岸的宝藏。乘船前往波西塔诺，探索迷人的悬崖村庄，然后乘船前往阿马尔菲，欣赏阿马尔菲海岸小镇全景；之后乘船返回，入住酒店。备注：如遇海上极端天气，出于游客安全考虑，游船公司取消出海游览波西塔诺和阿马尔菲的活动，我社将安排当天乘坐大巴车参观索伦托老城，无法参观波西塔诺和阿马尔菲，出海游船费用将退还给游客。夜宿：索伦托海岸酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Sorrento – Pompeii – Naples – Rome ("Unsealing" history at Pompeii, the lost Roman city)
timeline.title_zh: 索伦托-庞贝-那不勒斯-罗马【"解封"历史遗迹，寻找消失的庞贝文明】
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, travel to Pompeii to explore the ruins of the ancient city and learn about its lost civilization, seeing sights such as the open-air Amphitheatre, the Temple of Apollo and the central Forum (Temple of Apollo / Forum square). Then continue to Naples for a tour of the old town, the Royal Palace of Naples (exterior) and the New Castle / Castel Nuovo (exterior). In the afternoon head to Rome and check in. Note: in peak season Pompeii may impose group limits — if it changes to individual tickets, the 6 EUR guiding fee is refunded per person; if entry is impossible, the ticket plus guiding fee are refunded and it becomes an exterior visit. Overnight: Sheraton Roma / Hotel Mantegna, or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，前往庞贝，探索庞贝古城遗址，了解曾经的庞贝文明，游览露天剧场、阿波罗神庙以及中心广场（公共广场）等遗迹。之后前往那不勒斯游览那不勒斯老城、那不勒斯皇宫（外观）、新堡（外观）。下午前往罗马，入住酒店。备注：庞贝古城在旅游旺季可能针对旅游团限流，如改为散拼门票，则退还每位6欧元讲解费；如无法入内，则退还景点门票及讲解费，改为外观游览。夜宿：罗马梅第奇喜来登酒店或曼特尼亚酒店，或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Rome – Pienza – Siena (Siena, a medieval art treasure, and the cypress lane of the Val d'Orcia)
timeline.title_zh: 罗马-皮恩扎-锡耶纳【中世纪艺术瑰宝—锡耶纳，遇奥尔恰谷丝柏树小径】
timeline.description_en: In the morning depart Rome for the old town of Pienza, stopping for free photos along the cypress lane en route. Tour Pienza's Piazza Pio II and Pienza Cathedral (exterior), then continue to Siena to see Siena Cathedral (exterior), the Piazza del Campo (Campo Square), Siena Town Hall (Palazzo Pubblico, exterior) and the Torre del Mangia (exterior). From Pienza's walls you can look out over the UNESCO World Heritage Val d'Orcia. Overnight: Four Points by Sheraton Siena, or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午从罗马出发前往皮恩扎古城游览，途中在丝柏树小径自由拍照，之后游览皮恩扎二世广场、皮恩扎大教堂（外观）等景点；出发前往锡耶纳，游览锡耶纳大教堂（外观）、田野广场、锡耶纳市政厅（外观）、曼吉亚塔楼（外观）等景点。可从皮恩扎城墙上俯瞰世界遗产"奥尔恰山谷（Val d'Orcia）"的景致。夜宿：锡耶纳福朋喜来登酒店，或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Siena – Pisa – Cinque Terre – Florence (Visit the Cinque Terre by scenic train and the Ligurian seaside towns)
timeline.title_zh: 锡耶纳-比萨-五渔村-佛罗伦萨【景观列车游览五渔村，游利古里亚海景城镇】
timeline.description_en: In the morning travel to Pisa to see the Leaning Tower of Pisa (exterior) and the Piazza dei Miracoli (Square of Miracles), Pisa's historic and cultural heart — the walled square holding the cathedral, leaning bell tower, baptistery and cemetery, a UNESCO World Heritage Site. Then visit the Cinque Terre, the five clifftop fishing villages strung along the Ligurian coast — Monterosso al Mare, Vernazza, Corniglia, Manarola and Riomaggiore — before checking into the hotel. Note: if bad weather or a railway strike prevents the Cinque Terre visit, the itinerary automatically switches to a coach or other means to tour the coastal towns. Overnight: Hilton Florence Metropole, or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往比萨，游览比萨斜塔（外观）和比萨历史文化中心的奇迹广场（Piazza dei Miracoli）——这片围墙围合的区域内有比萨主教座堂、比萨斜塔（钟楼）、圣乔瓦尼洗礼堂和比萨墓园，被列为世界遗产。前往游览五渔村，沿利古里亚海岸线游览悬崖上的美丽渔村——蒙特罗索、韦尔纳扎、科尔尼利亚、马纳罗拉及里奥马焦雷五个村镇；之后入住酒店。备注：如遇恶劣天气或铁路公司罢工等因素导致无法游览五渔村，行程将自动改为乘坐大巴车或其它形式游览海岸线城市。夜宿：佛罗伦萨希尔顿大都会酒店，或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Florence – Venice (Land of poetry and the soul of the Renaissance — an artistic journey)
timeline.title_zh: 佛罗伦萨-威尼斯【诗歌之地，文艺复兴之魂，享受艺术之旅】
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, explore Florence, cradle of the Renaissance: visit the world's third-largest church, the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore / Duomo (exterior, queue to enter), the Piazza della Signoria (with the copy of Michelangelo's David and the Fountain of Neptune), the Ponte Vecchio (Old Bridge over the Arno, built in 1345, where Dante is said to have met Beatrice), and the Piazza Santa Croce with the Basilica of Santa Croce (exterior), resting place of Michelangelo and Galileo. Then travel to Venice and check into the hotel. Overnight: voco Venice / Hilton Garden Inn Venice Mestre San Giuliano (Hilton Ambassador), or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后游览文艺复兴发源地佛罗伦萨，参观世界第三大教堂——圣母百花大教堂（外观，需排队进入）、市政广场（设有米开朗基罗《大卫》复制品及海神喷泉）、维奇奥桥（老桥，建于1345年，相传但丁曾在此邂逅比阿特丽丝），以及圣十字广场和圣十字教堂（外观，米开朗基罗与伽利略长眠于此）。之后前往威尼斯入住酒店。夜宿：威尼斯洲际VOCO酒店或希尔顿大使酒店，或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Venice (Tour romantic Venice on its gentle blue waters)
timeline.title_zh: 威尼斯【游览温柔碧波上浪漫的威尼斯】
timeline.description_en: In the morning visit St. Mark's Basilica (exterior), St. Mark's Square (Piazza San Marco, called by Napoleon "the most beautiful drawing room in Europe"), the Bridge of Sighs (exterior) and the magnificent Doge's Palace (Palazzo Ducale, exterior) — these beautiful structures built on water, together with the winding canals, leave Venice's romance lingering long in memory. The group then disbands in Mestre. Note: no hotel is included tonight (no overnight accommodation on Day 8). You may book a flight departing Venice after 17:00; if the island sights then cannot be visited, no fee is refundable.
timeline.description_zh: 上午参观圣马可大教堂（外观）、圣马可广场（曾被拿破仑称作"欧洲最美丽的客厅"）、叹息桥（外观）以及华丽的总督宫（外观）。这些建造在水上的美丽建筑和蜿蜒的水巷，让威尼斯的浪漫风情久久挥之不去。之后在梅斯特散团。备注：当天不含酒店住宿；可预订当天17:00以后离开威尼斯的航班，如威尼斯岛上景点因此无法游览，并无费用可退。

meeting_en: Rome, Italy — group meets in the morning to begin the guided walking tour of the city centre.
meeting_zh: 意大利罗马——上午集合，开始罗马市中心徒步导览。

faqs.question_en: Where and how do we meet and disband?
faqs.question_zh: 集合及集散地点和方法是怎样的？
faqs.answer_en: Day 1 meeting: 09:00 at Roma Tiburtina railway station. Day 8 disbanding: around 14:00 in Venice (Mestre). These are reference times and places; actual departure follows the final tour notice. You may book a flight arriving in Rome the same day, but if you join after 14:00 the Rome city sights cannot be toured, with no refund. You may book a flight leaving Venice after 17:00 on the final day, but if the Venice island sights then cannot be visited, no fee is refundable.
faqs.answer_zh: 行程第1天09:00在Roma Tiburtina（罗马提布提那）火车站集合；第8天14:00左右在威尼斯梅斯特散团（参考时间及地点，实际出发时间以出团通知书为准）。本产品可预订当天抵达罗马的航班，但14:00之后上团，罗马市区景点将无法游览，并无费用可退！可预订结束当天下午17:00以后离开威尼斯的航班，如威尼斯岛上景点因此无法游览，并无费用可退！

faqs.question_en: Will the coach travel times along the route be very long?
faqs.question_zh: 行程路线乘坐大巴的时间会不会很久？
faqs.answer_en: The product is planned for an average of about 3–4 hours of travel per day. Road traffic conditions are complex, and especially within cities, congestion or other factors can increase driving time.
faqs.answer_zh: 该产品行程计划平均时间为每日3-4小时的行车时间。公路交通情况复杂，特别是市区内容易发生堵车或其它因素导致行车时间增加。

faqs.question_en: Can I choose to visit the Cinque Terre by boat?
faqs.question_zh: 我是否可以选择乘船游览五渔村？
faqs.answer_en: Because boat tours are weather-dependent, the product does not include the Cinque Terre boat ticket. You may choose to go by boat, but the train fare cannot be refunded or exchanged, and you must buy the boat ticket yourself — about 35 EUR.
faqs.answer_zh: 由于乘船游览受气候影响，该产品并不包含五渔村船票，但您可以选择乘船游览，只是无法退换火车票的费用，并且需要自行购买船票，约35欧元。

faqs.question_en: Can we tour central Rome by vehicle?
faqs.question_zh: 罗马市中心我们是否可以乘车游览？
faqs.answer_en: Because Rome's sights are very concentrated and are all in pedestrian zones, the city-center sights must be toured on foot.
faqs.answer_zh: 由于罗马各个景点非常集中，并且都是步行街区，因此罗马市中心景点需要徒步游览。

faqs.question_en: Can we choose different dinner menus and dishes to our taste?
faqs.question_zh: 我们的晚餐能否根据喜好选择不同的菜单和菜品？
faqs.answer_en: The dining recommended in the itinerary is all local specialty fare and is not included in the price — for example Venice's famous squid-ink (black) pasta and Tuscan steak. If the dishes are not your preference, you are free to choose other dining yourself.
faqs.answer_zh: 行程内推荐的餐饮全部为当地特色餐，费用并未包含，比如威尼斯著名的黑墨鱼面、托斯卡纳的牛排等。如果菜品并非您的首选，可以自行选择其他餐饮。

faqs.question_en: I get seasick — can I still join the Sorrento island-hopping tour of the four towns?
faqs.question_zh: 我晕船，是否能参加索伦托的跳岛游览四大城市？
faqs.answer_en: First, the Mediterranean is an inland sea with relatively few waves, and the vessels are fairly large, so the chance of seasickness is low. Second, on the island-hopping the boat is a means of transport, not the attraction; each leg averages 40 minutes to 1 hour, after which you land and tour — and many included sights such as Capri, Positano and Amalfi cannot be reached by car. Also, the Sorrento seaside hotel is surrounded by sea on three sides with a private beach and private dock, two restaurants of different styles and a famous marine spa, so on an island-hopping day you can also enjoy the views and food of the Bay of Naples at the hotel.
faqs.answer_zh: 首先，地中海为内海，相对风浪较少，加之船体又比较大，因此晕船的概率较低；其次，跳岛游览中船为交通工具，并非游览工具，平均每段行程为40分钟到1小时，随后即可登陆游览，行程中包含的许多景点如卡普里、波西塔诺、阿马尔菲等都是车辆无法到达的景点；再次，索伦托海滨酒店三面环海，拥有私人沙滩和私家码头、两个不同风格的餐厅和一间著名的海洋Spa中心，如当天为跳岛活动，您也可以在酒店内享受那不勒斯湾的美景和美食。

faqs.question_en: What happens in extreme weather when the boat outing to Positano and Amalfi is cancelled?
faqs.question_zh: 如遇极端天气，游船出海取消参观波西塔诺和阿马尔菲怎么办？
faqs.answer_en: In case of extreme sea weather, for guest safety the boat company cancels the outing to Positano and Amalfi. We will instead arrange a visit to Sorrento old town that day; Positano and Amalfi cannot be visited, and the boat fee will be refunded to guests.
faqs.answer_zh: 如遇海上极端天气，出于游客安全考虑，游船公司取消出海游览波西塔诺和阿马尔菲的活动，我社将安排当天参观索伦托老城，无法参观波西塔诺和阿马尔菲，出海游船费用将退还给游客。

faqs.question_en: Do I need a visa?
faqs.question_zh: 是否需要签证？
faqs.answer_en: Yes. This product does NOT include the visa fee; you need a Schengen visa (single or multiple entry) — if you need it arranged, choose a Schengen-visa product. After booking, we provide all materials for the Schengen visa application free of charge, and we purchase Schengen-compliant travel insurance for guests whose visa we handle (otherwise you buy your own insurance and handle claims yourself). Your passport must be valid for at least six months from the date of departure, or customs may refuse entry. "Visa-worry-free" guarantee: for guests who sign with us at least 61 days before departure, if the visa is not obtained within 45 days before departure we bear all losses and immediately refund the full travel fee; guests who do not meet this clause and fail to obtain a visa are refunded per the change-and-cancellation terms. A refusal must be reported within 48 hours with the consulate's refusal letter. Note: visa fees, visa service fees, Schengen insurance fees and visa-center appointment fees are all non-refundable and non-transferable, even if the product is changed or cancelled.
faqs.answer_zh: 需要。本产品不包含签证费用，需办理申根签证（单次或多次入境），如需办理请选择申根签证产品。预订后我社免费提供办理申根签证的全部材料；如委托我社办理申根签证，我社为您购买符合申根要求的申根旅游保险，若未委托办理，需自行购买旅游保险并自行负责理赔。护照有效期需在离境之日起至少还有六个月，否则海关有权拒绝入境。保签无忧：游客在出发日前61天与我社签约的旅游产品，如在出发前45天内未获取签证，我社承担所有损失，立即退还全部旅游费用；不符合该条款的游客如未正常获取签证，将按"退改与取消条款"退费。如遇拒签需在48小时内通知我社并出具使领馆拒签函。签证费、签证服务费、申根保险费、签证中心预约费均不可退款，也无法更改使用者，即使产品退改签亦不可退。

faqs.question_en: Booking, changes & cancellation
faqs.question_zh: 预订、变更与取消须知
faqs.answer_en: Free no-reason cancellation: both the agency and traveler may cancel without reason up to 30 days before departure (the 30th day not included). Group size & vehicle: for 8 or fewer travelers, the group automatically becomes a small group with a business vehicle + driver-guide. This is a shared/join group; the group is declared formed at 10 people — if fewer than 10 by 30 days (or 14 days) before departure, either party may withdraw and other arrangements/refund options apply. Arrival/departure buffer: because of frequent flight changes, traffic congestion, ferry cancellations, strikes and itinerary reordering, travelers must arrive at the meeting point one day before the tour starts and leave the dispersal point one day after it ends, allowing reasonable flight connection time (at least 5 hours for transfers at the same airport, 7 hours for different airports in the same city); losses from not doing so are the traveler's own. Rooms: two people booking together default to a standard double (bed type — one large bed or twin — assigned by the hotel, not selectable); single travelers pay a single-room supplement unless successfully matched for room-sharing; triple/family rooms are for two parents + one minor with bed types assigned by the hotel; all European hotels are non-smoking, check-in 14:00 / check-out 11:00, and air-conditioning is not a standard feature. Listed hotels are the preferred ones; if full, an equivalent same-star hotel is substituted without separate notice. Pricing: all prices are quoted in EUR at booking; if you pay in CNY, the amount is the real-time CNY value auto-calculated from the Bank of China "EUR selling price" on the day of payment (refunds likewise use the day-of rate, and any exchange-rate difference or bank fees are borne by the traveler). Order must be paid promptly and re-confirmed by the operator within 48 hours; payment does not equal confirmation, so do not book connecting flights/hotels before confirmation. Key contingencies: Pompeii may impose group limits in peak season (refund of the 6 EUR guiding fee, or ticket+fee if entry is impossible); bad weather or a rail strike switches the Cinque Terre to a coach/other coastal tour; the Blue Grotto may close due to tide/wind/waves; and extreme sea weather may cancel the Positano/Amalfi boat outing (replaced by Sorrento old town, boat fee refunded).
faqs.answer_zh: 免费取消：跟团游产品出发前30天（不含第30天），旅行社和旅行者均有权申请无理由取消。成团与车辆：报名8人及以下将自动改为小团，安排商务旅行车+司机兼导游；本产品为散客拼团，成团人数为10人，如出发前30天（或发团前14天）仍未达到成团人数，双方均可解除合同并可选择其他组团方式或退款。抵离缓冲：因航变频繁、交通拥堵、渡轮取消、罢工游行及行程顺序调整，要求旅行者在旅游团开始前一天到达集合地、结束后一天离开集散地，并预留合理航班衔接时间（同机场转机至少5小时，同城不同机场至少7小时），未遵守由此产生的损失由旅行者自行承担。房型：两人同时报名默认入住标准双人间（大床或双床由酒店安排，不可指定）；单人报名默认含单房差，拼房成功按比例退还；三人家庭间默认两位父母与一位未成年儿童入住，床型由酒店安排；欧洲酒店全部禁烟，入住14:00、退房11:00，空调并非标准设施；行程内列明酒店为优先入住酒店，如订满则更换相同星级相近条件酒店，不再另行通知。价格：所有定价以欧元为预订计价单位，如选择人民币支付，则以当天支付时按中国银行实时外汇牌价"欧元卖出价"自动计算的人民币实时价格为准（退款同样适用申请当日即时汇率，汇差及银行手续费由旅行者承担）。订单需及时支付，支付后需等组团社在48小时内二次确认，支付不等于确认行程，未确认前请勿预订衔接机票及酒店。重要应变：庞贝旺季可能限流（退6欧讲解费，无法入内则退门票+讲解费）；恶劣天气或铁路罢工时五渔村改为大巴等方式游览海岸城镇；蓝洞遇涨潮/风浪可能关闭；海上极端天气可能取消波西塔诺/阿马尔菲出海（改为索伦托老城，退还游船费）。

faqs.question_en: Health & safety requirements
faqs.question_zh: 健康与安全须知
faqs.answer_en: To ensure a safe trip, please have a health check before travel and do NOT enroll if you have any of the following: infectious diseases (e.g. active tuberculosis, typhoid); cardiovascular disease (e.g. severe hypertension, cardiac insufficiency, myocardial ischemia/infarction); cerebrovascular disease (e.g. cerebral embolism, hemorrhage, brain tumor); respiratory disease (e.g. emphysema, cor pulmonale); psychiatric conditions (e.g. epilepsy and various mental illnesses); severe anemia (hemoglobin below 50 g/L); or recovery from major/medium surgery. Pregnancy: at 35 weeks or more you may NOT join under any circumstances; at 28 weeks or more you must provide a doctor's exam report within 7 days plus the attending physician's consent; under 28 weeks please enroll with caution, sign the agency's disclaimer, and you cannot take part in adventure, skiing, sea-going, high-altitude or outdoor activities. Disabled travelers need a 7-day medical report + physician's consent, a direct-family escort, and at least 61 days' advance request for facilities. Seniors over 70 need a health certificate and physical exam report and a direct-family escort (or sign the disclaimer); the trip is long and requires reasonable walking ability and good stamina, so those not fit should enroll with caution. Minors (under 18) must be accompanied by a direct relative or guardian; some sights have special rules for under-18/under-12/under-6; infants under 2 are NOT accepted; child safety seats must be confirmed in advance for infants under 6 or children under 30 kg. Per Article 15 of the Tourism Law, travelers must truthfully declare health information relevant to the trip (including pregnancy, lactation, chronic illness, infectious-disease history, suspected symptoms or recent travel to epidemic areas) and observe safety warnings; concealment that causes harm or transmission risk makes the traveler liable for their own losses and potentially for civil and administrative penalties, medical/quarantine costs, and compensation to others, and the agency may terminate the contract without refund.
faqs.answer_zh: 为确保旅游顺利出行、防止旅途中发生人身意外，请出行前做一次必要的身体检查，如存在下列情况请勿报名：传染性疾病患者（如活动期肺结核、伤寒等）；心血管疾病患者（如严重高血压、心功能不全、心肌缺氧、心肌梗塞等）；脑血管疾病患者（如脑栓塞、脑出血、脑肿瘤等）；呼吸系统疾病患者（如肺气肿、肺心病等）；精神病患者（如癫痫及各种精神病）；严重贫血患者（血红蛋白水平在50克/升以下）；大中型手术恢复期患者。孕妇：妊娠35周及以上任何情况下都无法参团；28周及以上需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书；28周以下请慎重报名，需签署旅行社免责声明书，且无法参加探险、滑雪、出海、高空、户外等项目。残疾人：需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书、需直系家属陪同，并提前至少61天申请预留位置及专用配套设施。老年人：70周岁以上出游需提供健康证明、体检报告并由直系家属陪同（否则需签署免责声明书）；因本次行程较长、对步行能力和体力要求较高，体力不支者请慎重报名。未成年人（未满18周岁）须由直系亲属或监护人陪同；部分景点对未满18/12/6周岁有特殊限定；不接受2周岁以下婴儿参团；如有6岁以下婴儿或30公斤以下儿童，请提前确认安全儿童座椅。根据《旅游法》第15条，旅游者需如实告知与旅游活动相关的个人健康信息（包括妊娠期、哺乳期、慢性病、传染病史、疑似症状或近期疫区旅居史）并遵守安全警示规定，若因隐瞒导致人身损害或传播风险，旅游者需自行承担相应责任，并可能面临民事赔偿及行政处罚、自行承担医疗隔离费用，旅行社可解除合同且不退还费用。

title_en: Italy Grand Tour: Rome to Milan, 9 Days
title_zh: 意大利全景9天跟团游（罗马进米兰出）
short_en: A one-way 9-day journey from Rome to Milan through the Amalfi Coast, Capri, Pompeii, Tuscany, the Cinque Terre, Florence and Venice.
short_zh: 罗马进、米兰出的9天单程深度游，串联阿马尔菲海岸、卡普里岛、庞贝、托斯卡纳、五渔村、佛罗伦萨与威尼斯。
desc_en: Travel the length of Italy in one seamless direction, from the eternal city of Rome up to fashion-capital Milan. This 9-day escorted tour pairs the southern coast's Capri Blue Grotto, the Amalfi clifftop villages and the buried city of Pompeii with the Renaissance heartlands of Tuscany, the cliffside Cinque Terre fishing villages, Florence and the canals of Venice. With one city per day, a one-way deep route that minimises backtracking, brand 4-star hotels and city walks led by officially-licensed guides, it delivers Italy's greatest hits without the rush.
desc_zh: 沿着意大利国土单程北上，从永恒之城罗马一路抵达时尚之都米兰。这趟9天跟团游将南部海岸的卡普里岛蓝洞、阿马尔菲悬崖小镇与被火山掩埋的庞贝古城，与托斯卡纳的文艺复兴腹地、悬崖上的五渔村、佛罗伦萨以及威尼斯水城串联在一起。每天一座城市，单程深度路线大幅减少回头路，搭配品牌四星酒店与官方认证导游带领的城市漫步，让您从容饱览意大利精华。

highlights.en: Explore Rome on foot — Colosseum, Pantheon, Spanish Steps and the Trevi Fountain
highlights.zh: 徒步深度游览罗马——斗兽场、万神殿、西班牙广场与特莱维喷泉

highlights.en: Capri island and the world-famous Blue Grotto in the Mediterranean
highlights.zh: 地中海明珠卡普里岛，探秘世界奇景蓝洞

highlights.en: Amalfi Coast boat cruise to clifftop Positano and Amalfi
highlights.zh: 阿马尔菲海岸出海游船，停靠悬崖小镇波西塔诺与阿马尔菲

highlights.en: Pompeii archaeological site with included entry and expert guide
highlights.zh: 庞贝古城遗址，含门票及国家馆讲解师

highlights.en: Tuscany's Val d'Orcia cypress lanes, Pienza and medieval Siena
highlights.zh: 托斯卡纳奥尔恰谷绝美田园、皮恩扎与中世纪古城锡耶纳

highlights.en: Cinque Terre by scenic train along the Ligurian coast, plus the Leaning Tower of Pisa
highlights.zh: 搭乘景观列车游利古里亚海岸五渔村，途经比萨斜塔

highlights.en: Florence, cradle of the Renaissance, and the romantic canals of Venice
highlights.zh: 文艺复兴摇篮佛罗伦萨，以及浪漫的威尼斯水城

highlights.en: All-inclusive one-way route: flights & rail you arrange, but all listed attractions, ferries and taxes are included — no forced shopping
highlights.zh: 全含单程路线：行程内所有景点门票、出海轮渡及税费全包，绝无强制购物

includes.en: Hotels: 8 nights in 4-star hotels.
includes.zh: 【酒店】：四星级酒店8晚。

includes.en: Meals: 8 meals in total, breakfast in the hotel or meals in other forms.
includes.zh: 【餐饮】：酒店内早餐或其他形式餐饮共计8餐。

includes.en: Taxes and fees: all taxes within the itinerary, including city/tourist tax, town-entry fees, residence tax, road/bridge tolls and island-landing fees.
includes.zh: 【税费】：游客城市税、进城费、居住税、路桥费、登岛费等行程内的所有税费。

includes.en: Transport: tourist coach or business travel van.
includes.zh: 【交通】：旅游巴士或者商务旅行车。

includes.en: Guide: professional driver plus Chinese-speaking guide, or a Chinese-speaking driver-guide throughout (note: for groups of 8 or fewer, a business travel van with a Chinese-speaking driver-guide is arranged, who leads the touring of all cities).
includes.zh: 【导游】：职业司机+中文导游，或者全程中文司机兼导游（备注：8人及以下则安排为商务旅行车+中文司机兼导游，届时将由司兼导带领游览全部城市行程）。

includes.en: Baggage: 1 piece of checked luggage up to 23 kg plus 1 carry-on.
includes.zh: 【行李】：1件23公斤行李及1件随身行李。

includes.en: Activities and admissions: Sorrento–Amalfi boat tour, round-trip ferry to Capri Island, Venice island ferry, Cinque Terre scenic train, and Pompeii ancient city admission (including a national-park interpreter/guide).
includes.zh: 【活动及门票】：索伦托阿马尔菲出海环游、卡普里岛往返渡船、威尼斯登岛轮渡、五渔村景观列车、庞贝古城门票（含国家馆讲解师）。

excludes.en: Passport: personal passport fees.
excludes.zh: 护照：个人护照费用。

excludes.en: Visa: tourist/sightseeing visa fees for the countries listed in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 签证：行程中所列旅游国家所需的观光签证费用。

excludes.en: Insurance: travel insurance (if the itinerary involves high-risk sports, please verify whether your travel insurance covers them).
excludes.zh: 保险：旅游保险费用（如行程内涉及到高风险运动，请核实旅游保险是否包含该项运动）。

excludes.en: Tips: gratuities to the guide and driver totalling 10 EUR per person per day, same rate for adults and children.
excludes.zh: 小费：游客支付导游和司机小费一共10欧/人/天，大小同价。

excludes.en: Meals: lunches and dinners are not included.
excludes.zh: 餐饮：行程内不包含午、晚正餐费用。

excludes.en: Admissions: sights not marked as fee-included (including but not limited to those marked "exterior," plus any "recommended," "optional," "experience" or other items where inclusion is not stated; if you wish to enter, please pay on your own).
excludes.zh: 门票：行程中未注明费用包含的景点（包括但不仅限于行程中注明“外观”的景点，以及“推荐”“可选”“体验”等所有未提及费用包含的项目，如游客需要参观，敬请自理）。

excludes.en: Extended stays: accommodation, transport and sightseeing beyond the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 延长住宿：行程外额外延长的住宿、交通、观光费用。

excludes.en: Personal spending: such as drinks and alcohol, taxis, phone charges and other personal expenses.
excludes.zh: 私人消费：如饮料酒类、出租车、电话费等个人消费。

excludes.en: Other transport: any transport not mentioned in "fee-included" beyond the business travel van or minibus, such as the Venice gondola, and the sightseeing trains or electric taxis in vehicle-restricted zones, all at your own expense.
excludes.zh: 其他交通：除包含商务旅行车或者中巴之外，费用包含中未提及的其他交通费用，如威尼斯贡多拉，以及车辆限行区的观光火车、电瓶出租车等费用敬请自理。

excludes.en: Free-time activities: guests' independent evening touring and any recommended items during the trip, plus the resulting transport, meals, admissions and shopping costs.
excludes.zh: 自由活动：游客夜间自行游览及行程中的推荐项目，以及产生的交通、餐饮、门票、购物等费用。

excludes.en: Experience activities: various travel experience activities not included in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 体验活动：行程中没有包含的各项旅游体验活动。

excludes.en: Other costs: any expense not mentioned under fee-included. Where force majeure (natural disasters, war, strikes, etc.) or special situations (traffic delays, flight cancellations/rescheduling, embassy visa delays, insufficient group numbers, etc.) or causes not attributable to the operator generate extra costs (e.g. overseas visa-extension fees, accommodation/meals/transport, national airfare adjustments), the operator reserves the right to charge the price difference.
excludes.zh: 其他费用：费用包含中未提及的费用。如因天灾、战争、罢工等不可抗力的原因，及因交通延阻、航班取消或更改时间、使馆延误出签证、人数不足等特殊情况或其他非我公司原因所导致的额外费用（如在外延期签证费、住、食及交通费、国家航空运价调整等），我公司有权追加差价。

timeline.title_en: Rome — Heart of the Eternal City
timeline.title_zh: 罗马——重温“万城之城”古罗马帝国的辉煌
timeline.description_en: The group meets in the morning and, led by the guide, sets off on a walking tour of Rome, the cradle of the ancient Roman Empire and the city long known as the "Eternal City." You will see the Colosseum (exterior) and the Pantheon (exterior) rising from the ruins of the old imperial capital, then visit the Spanish Steps and the Trevi Fountain (exterior). Because vehicles are banned within the protected ancient city and most areas are pedestrian-only zones, the day is entirely on foot, covering roughly 5–6 km, with all the central sights clustered inside the old Roman city. Free time follows before checking in to the hotel to rest. Overnight at the Sheraton Roma Hotel / Hotel Mantegna or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午集合，在导游的带领下徒步游览世界著名的历史文化名城罗马，这里是古罗马帝国的发祥地，因历史悠久而被称为“永恒之城”。参观矗立在古罗马都城遗址上的斗兽场（外观）、万神殿（外观），并游览西班牙广场和特莱维喷泉（许愿池，外观）。由于罗马古城建筑受保护，禁止车辆行驶，大多数区域为步行街区，市区内所有景点都在古罗马城内，当天全程徒步参观，步行约5—6公里。之后自由活动，入住酒店休息。夜宿：罗马梅第奇喜来登酒店或曼特尼亚酒店，或同等四星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Rome – Naples/Sorrento – Capri Island – Sorrento
timeline.title_zh: 罗马—那不勒斯/索伦托—卡普里岛—索伦托
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, transfer to Naples/Sorrento and take a ferry to the port of Capri, a Mediterranean paradise. On the island you have free time: stroll along the seafront and visit the Blue Grotto, take a boat to circle the island and explore the grotto on your own, or head up into Capri town to see the Gardens of Augustus (exterior) overlooking the whole bay. There is no transport included on the island; the recommended route from the main port to Capri old town to the Gardens of Augustus is about 1.3 km of hill road passing three key sights, with funicular and taxis available at extra cost. The Blue Grotto is a natural wonder and may be closed by the local maritime authority during high tide, swell or other conditions; its visit fee is not included, and beyond the boatman's fee a 2–5 EUR tip is customary. Take the ferry back to Sorrento pier and check in. Overnight at a Sorrento coast hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，前往那不勒斯/索伦托，乘坐渡船抵达地中海天堂卡普里岛港口。登岛后自由活动：可沿海边漫步后前往藍洞参观，或自行乘船环岛探秘藍洞，或自行前往卡普里城中游览奥古斯都花园（外观），俯瞰整个海湾。岛上不含任何交通费用，推荐路线为大港—卡普里古城—奥古斯都花园，单程约1.3公里山路，途经三个重要景点，沿途有缆车和出租车，需额外付费。卡普里藍洞属自然景观，如遇涨潮、风浪或当地海洋气象机构宣布关闭则无法入内，藍洞游览费用不包含在团费内，除藍洞船工费外，请按当地习俗支付2—5欧元小费。之后乘渡船返回索伦托码头，入住酒店。夜宿：索伦托海岸酒店或同等四星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Sorrento – Amalfi – Positano – Sorrento
timeline.title_zh: 索伦托—阿马尔菲—波西塔诺—索伦托
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, embark on a charming full-day boat tour to discover the treasures of the Amalfi Coast, a UNESCO World Heritage site and one of National Geographic's 51 places of a lifetime. Sail to Positano to explore the enchanting cliffside village, then continue by boat to Amalfi and take in the panorama of the coastal town. Cruise back afterwards and return to the hotel. Note: in case of extreme weather at sea, the boat company may cancel the Positano and Amalfi outing for safety; the operator will instead arrange a coach tour of Sorrento's old town that day (without visiting Positano or Amalfi), and the boat-tour fee will be refunded. Overnight at a Sorrento coast hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，踏上迷人的游船一日游，探索阿马尔菲海岸的宝藏——这里是世界文化遗产，被美国《国家地理》杂志评为一生必去的51个美丽地方之一。乘船前往波西塔诺，探索迷人的悬崖村庄，再乘船前往阿马尔菲，欣赏阿马尔菲海岸小镇的全景，之后乘船返回，入住酒店。备注：如遇海上极端天气，出于游客安全考虑，游船公司将取消出海游览波西塔诺和阿马尔菲，旅行社将安排当天乘坐大巴参观索伦托老城，无法参观波西塔诺和阿马尔菲，出海游船费用将退还给游客。夜宿：索伦托海岸酒店或同等四星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Sorrento – Pompeii – Naples – Rome
timeline.title_zh: 索伦托—庞贝—那不勒斯—罗马
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, head to Pompeii to explore the ruins of the ancient city buried by the eruption of Mount Vesuvius and discover the lost Pompeian civilization, visiting the open-air amphitheatre, the city ruins with their haunting plaster casts of victims, the Temple of Apollo and the Forum (Temple of Apollo central square). Then travel to Naples to tour the old town, with the Royal Palace of Naples (exterior) and the Castel Nuovo / New Castle (exterior). In the afternoon transfer to Rome and check in. Overnight at the Sheraton Roma Hotel / Hotel Mantegna or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，前往庞贝，探索因维苏威火山爆发而被掩埋的庞贝古城遗址，了解曾经的庞贝文明，参观古城东端的露天剧场、保留着触目惊心遇难者铸像的庞贝古城遗址、阿波罗神庙以及中心广场（阿波罗神殿中心广场）。之后前往那不勒斯游览那不勒斯老城、那不勒斯皇宫（外观）、新堡（安茹城堡，外观）。下午前往罗马，入住酒店。夜宿：罗马梅第奇喜来登酒店或曼特尼亚酒店，或同等四星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Rome – Pienza – Siena
timeline.title_zh: 罗马—皮恩扎—锡耶纳
timeline.description_en: In the morning depart Rome for the medieval town of Pienza in Tuscany's Val d'Orcia, stopping along the way to photograph the famous Cypress Lane, the winding country road lined with Italian cypresses. Visit Pius II Square and Pienza Cathedral (exterior), where you can look out from the town walls over the World Heritage Val d'Orcia. Then continue to Siena, a treasure-house of medieval art, to see Siena Cathedral (exterior), Piazza del Campo (the shell-shaped main square), the Siena town hall / Palazzo Pubblico (exterior) and the Torre del Mangia (exterior), the 102 m bell tower that is the city's tallest building. Overnight at the Four Points by Sheraton Siena or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午从罗马出发前往托斯卡纳奥尔恰山谷中的中世纪古城皮恩扎，途中在絲柏树小径（两旁种满意大利柏树的乡村道路）自由拍照，之后游览皮恩扎二世广场、皮恩扎大教堂（外观）等景点，并可从城墙俯瞰世界遗产奥尔恰山谷的景致。随后前往中世纪艺术瑰宝锡耶纳，游览锡耶纳大教堂（外观）、田野广场（因形似贝壳又称贝壳广场）、锡耶纳市政厅（外观）以及曼吉亚塔楼（外观，垂直高度102米，是锡耶纳最高建筑）等景点。夜宿：锡耶纳福朋喜来登酒店，或同等四星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Siena – Pisa – Cinque Terre – Florence
timeline.title_zh: 锡耶纳—比萨—五渔村—佛罗伦萨
timeline.description_en: In the morning travel to Pisa to see the Leaning Tower of Pisa (exterior) and the Piazza dei Miracoli (Square of Miracles) at the city's historic-cultural heart, the walled World Heritage square that holds the cathedral, baptistery, leaning bell tower and cemetery. Then visit the Cinque Terre along the Ligurian coastline, taking the scenic train to explore the beautiful cliffside fishing villages of Monterosso al Mare, Vernazza, Corniglia, Manarola and Riomaggiore. Note: if bad weather or a railway strike makes the Cinque Terre inaccessible, the itinerary automatically switches to a coach or other means to tour the coastal towns. Afterwards check in. Overnight at the Hilton Florence Metropole or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往比萨，游览比萨斜塔（外观）和位于比萨历史文化中心的奇迹广场（Piazza dei Miracoli，又名主教座堂广场）——这片围墙环绕的世界遗产区域内有比萨主教座堂、比萨斜塔（钟楼）、圣乔瓦尼洗礼堂和比萨墓园。之后前往游览五渔村，沿利古里亚海岸线乘景观列车游览悬崖上美丽的渔村——蒙特罗索、韦尔纳扎、科尔尼利亚、马纳罗拉及里奥马焦雷五个村镇。备注：如遇恶劣天气或铁路公司罢工等因素导致无法游览五渔村，行程将自动更改为乘坐大巴车或其它形式游览海岸线城市。之后入住酒店。夜宿：佛罗伦萨希尔顿大都会酒店，或同等四星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Florence – Venice
timeline.title_zh: 佛罗伦萨—威尼斯
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, explore Florence, the birthplace of the Renaissance, visiting the world's third-largest church, the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore / Duomo (exterior), the Piazza della Signoria with its open-air sculptures, the Ponte Vecchio (Old Bridge) over the Arno, and the Piazza Santa Croce with the Basilica of Santa Croce (exterior), the Gothic church where Michelangelo and Galileo are laid to rest. Then transfer to Venice and check in. Note: entering the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore involves queuing. Overnight at the voco Venice (InterContinental) or the Hilton Garden Inn Venice Mestre San Giuliano (Ambassador) or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后游览文艺复兴发源地佛罗伦萨，参观世界第三大教堂——圣母百花大教堂（外观，进入需排队）、市政广场（坐落着维琪奥旧宫、米开朗基罗《大卫》雕塑复制品及海神喷泉）、阿诺河上的老桥（维奇奥桥），以及圣十字广场和圣十字教堂（外观，米开朗基罗和伽利略的安息地）。之后前往威尼斯入住酒店。夜宿：威尼斯洲际VOCO酒店或希尔顿大使酒店，或同等四星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Venice – Milan
timeline.title_zh: 威尼斯—米兰
timeline.description_en: In the morning visit St. Mark's Basilica (exterior), St. Mark's Square (which Napoleon called "the finest drawing room in Europe"), the Bridge of Sighs (exterior) and the magnificent Doge's Palace (exterior); these beautiful buildings raised on the water, together with the winding canals, leave Venice's romance lingering long after. Afterwards travel to the fashion capital of Milan. Overnight at the Royal Garden Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午参观圣马可大教堂（外观）、圣马可广场（曾被拿破仑称作“欧洲最美丽的客厅”）、叹息桥（外观）以及华丽的总督宫（外观）——这些建造在水上的美丽建筑与蜿蜒水巷一起，让威尼斯的浪漫风情久久揮之不去。之后前往时尚之都米兰。夜宿：皇家花园酒店，或同等四星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Milan — Italy's Fashion Capital (Departure)
timeline.title_zh: 米兰——意大利时尚之都（行程结束）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, enjoy free time to visit Milan's landmark, the Milan Cathedral / Duomo (exterior), the Gothic masterpiece begun in 1386 that took 500 years to complete, with hundreds of spires soaring skyward and thousands of statues on its white marble facade, and the Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II, one of Europe's most beautiful shopping arcades. The wonderful journey then concludes. No hotel tonight; the group disperses around midday in central Milan.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，自由参观米兰的标志性建筑米兰大教堂（外观，始建于1386年，历经500年才完工，数以百计的尖塔耸入云霄，白色大理石外墙上雕刻着数千座雕像），以及欧洲最漂亮的商业拱廊之一埃马努埃莱二世长廊，然后结束美好行程。今日无酒店，约中午在米兰市区解散。

meeting_en: Rome — the group meets in central Rome on the morning of Day 1 for the walking tour; the tour ends in Milan.
meeting_zh: 罗马——第1天上午在罗马市区集合开始徒步游览，行程于米兰结束。

faqs.question_en: Where and when do we meet and disperse?
faqs.question_zh: 集合及集散地点和方法是什么？
faqs.answer_en: The group meets at 09:00 on Day 1 at Roma Tiburtina railway station, and disperses around 12:00 on Day 9 in central Milan (times/locations are for reference; the final departure time follows the trip-confirmation notice). You may book a flight arriving in Rome on Day 1, but if you arrive after 14:00 the Rome city sights cannot be visited and no refund is given. You may book a flight leaving Milan after 17:00 on the final afternoon; if you then miss the Milan city sights there is likewise no refund.
faqs.answer_zh: 行程第1天09:00在Roma Tiburtina（罗马提布尔蒂纳）火车站集合，第9天12:00左右在米兰市区解散（参考时间及地点，实际出发时间以出团通知书为准）。可预订当天抵达罗马的航班，但14:00之后上团则罗马市区景点会无法游览，并无费用可退！可预订结束当天下午17:00以后的航班离开米兰，如因此米兰市区景点无法游览，并无费用可退！

faqs.question_en: Will there be a lot of time on the coach?
faqs.question_zh: 行程路线乘坐大巴时间会不会很久？
faqs.answer_en: The itinerary is planned for an average of about 3–4 hours of travel time per day. Road traffic can be complex, and city-centre congestion or other factors may increase driving time.
faqs.answer_zh: 该产品行程计划平均时间为每日3—4小时的行程时间。公路交通情况复杂，特别是市区内容易发生堵车或其它因素导致行车时间增加。

faqs.question_en: Can I choose to tour the Cinque Terre by boat?
faqs.question_zh: 我是否可以选择乘船游览五渔村？
faqs.answer_en: Because boat tours are weather-dependent, this product does not include a Cinque Terre boat ticket. You may opt to tour by boat, but the train-ticket cost cannot be refunded or exchanged, and you must buy the boat ticket yourself, about 35 EUR.
faqs.answer_zh: 由于乘船游览受气候影响，该产品并不包含五渔村船票，但是可以选择乘船游览，只是无法退换火车票的费用，并且需要自行购买船票，约35欧元。

faqs.question_en: Can we tour the centre of Rome by vehicle?
faqs.question_zh: 罗马市中心，我们是否可以乘车游览？
faqs.answer_en: Because Rome's sights are very concentrated and located in pedestrian-only zones, the city-centre sights of Rome must be visited on foot.
faqs.answer_zh: 由于罗马各个景点非常集中，并且都是步行街区，因此罗马市中心景点需要徒步游览。

faqs.question_en: Can we choose different menus and dishes for our dinners?
faqs.question_zh: 我们的晚餐是否能根据喜好选择不同的菜单和菜品？
faqs.answer_en: All the dining recommended in the itinerary consists of local specialty meals, and the cost is not included — for example Venice's famous black squid-ink pasta or Tuscan steak. If a dish is not your first choice, you are free to choose other dining.
faqs.answer_zh: 行程内推荐的餐饮全部为当地特色餐，费用并未包含，比如威尼斯著名的黑墨鱼面、托斯卡纳的牛排等。如果菜品并非您的首选，可以自行选择其他餐饮！

faqs.question_en: I get seasick — can I still join the Sorrento island-hopping to the four towns?
faqs.question_zh: 我晕船是否能参加索伦托的跳岛游览四大城市？
faqs.answer_en: First, the Mediterranean is an inland sea with relatively little swell, and the boats are large, so seasickness is unlikely. Second, on the island-hopping the boat is transport rather than a sightseeing platform: each leg averages 40 minutes to 1 hour, after which you land and tour, and many included sights such as Capri, Positano and Amalfi cannot be reached, or cannot be reached easily, by road. Should the boat outing to Positano and Amalfi be cancelled due to extreme weather at sea, the operator arranges a visit to Sorrento's old town that day and refunds the boat-tour fee; and since the Sorrento seaside hotel is surrounded by sea on three sides with a private beach, private dock, two restaurants and a renowned marine spa, on an island-hopping day you can also enjoy the Bay of Naples views and food at the hotel.
faqs.answer_zh: 首先，地中海为内海，相对风浪比较少，加之船体又比较大，因此晕船的概率较低；其次，跳岛游览中船为交通工具，并非游览工具，平均每段行程为40分钟到1小时，随后即可登陆游览，行程中包含的许多景点如卡普里、波西塔诺、阿马尔菲等都是车辆无法到达或不便到达的景点。如遇海上极端天气，游船公司取消出海游览波西塔诺和阿马尔菲，旅行社将安排当天参观索伦托老城，并退还出海游船费用；且索伦托海滨酒店三面环海，拥有私人沙滩和私家码头、两间不同风格的餐厅和一间著名的海洋SPA中心，如当天为跳岛活动，也可在酒店内享受那不勒斯湾的美景与美食。

faqs.question_en: What happens to Positano and Amalfi in extreme weather?
faqs.question_zh: 如遇极端天气，出海取消波西塔诺和阿马尔菲怎么办？
faqs.answer_en: If extreme weather occurs at sea, the boat company cancels the Positano and Amalfi outing for guest safety. The operator will instead arrange a visit to Sorrento's old town that day; Positano and Amalfi cannot be visited, and the boat-tour fee will be refunded to guests.
faqs.answer_zh: 如遇海上极端天气情况，出于游客安全考虑，游船公司取消出海游览波西塔诺和阿马尔菲活动，我社将安排当天参观索伦托老城，无法参观波西塔诺和阿马尔菲，出海游船费用将退还给游客。

faqs.question_en: Do I need a visa?
faqs.question_zh: 是否需要签证？
faqs.answer_en: Yes. This product does not include visa fees; if you need a visa, please choose a Schengen-visa product. It requires a Schengen visa (single or multiple entry). "Visa-worry-free" guarantee: if you sign with us 61+ days before departure and have not obtained the visa within 45 days before departure, the operator bears all losses and immediately refunds your full travel cost (cases not meeting this clause follow the standard change/cancellation terms; in case of refusal, notify us within 48 hours with the consulate's refusal letter, submit any supplementary/amended materials within 5 days, and do not unilaterally waive the right of "visa appeal"). Once booked, we provide all Schengen-visa application materials free of charge, and arrange a compliant Schengen travel insurance if you entrust the visa to us. Your passport must be valid for at least 6 months from the date of departure, or customs may refuse entry. Visa fees, visa service fees, Schengen insurance fees and visa-centre appointment fees are all non-refundable and non-transferable, even if the product is changed or cancelled.
faqs.answer_zh: 需要。本产品不包含签证费用，如您需要办理签证请选择申根签证产品。本产品需要申根签证（单次或多次入境）。保签无忧：游客在出发日前61天与我社签约的旅游产品，如在出发前45天内未获取签证，我社承担所有损失，立即退还游客全部旅游费用（不符合该条款的游客如未正常获取签证，将按“退改与取消条款”退费；如遇拒签需在48小时内通知我社并出具使领馆拒签函，需补充或更改材料的须在五天内提交，且不得单方面放弃“签证抗辩”权利）。预订后免费提供办理申根签证的全部材料；如委托我社办理申根签证，我社为您购买符合申根要求的申根旅游保险，若未委托则需自行购买保险并负责理赔。护照有效期需在离境之日起至少还有六个月，否则海关有权拒绝入境。签证费、签证服务费、申根保险费、签证中心预约费均不可退款，也无法更改使用者，即使产品退改签，签证费用也无法退款。

faqs.question_en: Booking, changes & cancellation
faqs.question_zh: 预订、变更与取消须知
faqs.answer_en: Free cancellation: both the agency and the traveller may cancel without reason up to 30 days before departure (excluding the 30th day). Group size: this is a shared/join-in group with a minimum group-formation size of 10 people; if fewer than 10 sign up, the operator may cancel the group, and group-internal optional activities also require 10 people. For groups of 8 or fewer the trip automatically becomes a small group using a business van with a Chinese-speaking driver-guide. Arrival/departure: because flight changes, traffic, ferry cancellations, strikes and reordering of the itinerary are common, travellers must arrive at the meeting point one day before the trip starts and leave the dispersal point one day after it ends, allowing reasonable connection time (≥5 hours for same-airport transfers, ≥7 hours for different airports in the same city; reasonable meet/disperse window 07:00–21:00). Rooms: two people booking together default to a standard double (bed type assigned by the hotel, not selectable); single travellers pay a single-room supplement unless successfully matched for room-sharing; triple/family rooms are for two parents plus one minor with bed type assigned by the hotel. Itinerary contingencies: in peak season Pompeii may cap group numbers — if changed to individual tickets, 6 EUR per person of interpreter fee is refunded, and if entry is impossible the admission plus interpreter fee is refunded and it becomes an exterior visit; if bad weather or a rail strike blocks the Cinque Terre, it switches to a coach/other coastal touring; the Blue Grotto may close in high tide/swell (not included, 2–5 EUR boatman tip customary); and if extreme sea weather cancels the Positano/Amalfi boat outing, a Sorrento old-town coach tour replaces it and the boat fee is refunded. This is a rolling/circular departure product where other guests board and leave at different points, so the start/end cities and prices differ — book according to your own start and end points. Pricing is quoted in EUR; if you pay in CNY, the amount is calculated in real time from the Bank of China "EUR sell" rate on the day of payment, and the same applies to refunds (any exchange-rate difference or bank fees are borne by the traveller). Pay promptly after booking to avoid exchange-rate increases; payment does not equal confirmation — orders await a second confirmation within 48 hours, after which an unconfirmed order is auto-refunded, so do not book connecting flights/hotels before confirmation.
