faqs.answer_zh: 免费取消：出发前30天（不含第30天）旅行社和旅行者均有权无理由取消。成团人数：本产品为散客拼团，成团人数为10人，未达10人旅行社有权取消旅游团，团内自费活动同样需达10人；如报名人数为8人及以下，本团自动更改为小团，安排商务旅行车+司机兼导游。到达/离开：由于航变频繁、交通拥堵、渡轮取消、罢工游行或行程顺序调整较为常见，旅行者须在参团日期前一天到达集合地，离团日期后一天离开集散地，并预留合理衔接时间（同机场转机至少5小时，同城不同机场至少7小时；合理集散时段07:00—21:00）。房型：两人同时报名默认入住标准双人间（床型由酒店安排不可选）；单人报名默认含单人房差，未成功拼房需缴单人房差；三人/家庭间默认为两位父母与一位未成年儿童入住，床型由酒店安排。行程应变：旅游旺季庞贝古城可能对旅游团限流，如改为散拼门票则退还每位6欧元讲解费，如无法入内则退还门票+讲解费并改为外观游览；如遇恶劣天气或铁路罢工无法游览五渔村，则改为大巴或其它形式游览海岸线城市；卡普里藍洞如遇涨潮、风浪等关闭则无法入内（费用不含，船工费外另付2—5欧元小费）；如遇海上极端天气取消波西塔诺和阿马尔菲出海，则改为大巴参观索伦托老城并退还游船费用。本产品为循环套发团，沿途有其他游客在不同地点上下团，开始和结束城市不同、价格不同，请根据个人报名的目的地开始和结束行程。价格以欧元计价，如选择人民币支付，以当天支付时本网站依据中国银行实时“欧元卖出价”自动计算的人民币价格为准，退款同样适用申请当日即时汇率，汇率差异或银行手续费由旅行者承担。预订后请及时支付以避免汇率上涨；支付不等于确认行程，订单需在48小时内二次确认，超时未确认则自动退款，未确认前请勿预订衔接机票及酒店。

faqs.question_en: Health & safety requirements
faqs.question_zh: 健康与安全须知
faqs.answer_en: To ensure a safe trip, please have a medical check-up before travelling and do not enrol if you have: infectious diseases (e.g. active tuberculosis, typhoid); cardiovascular disease (e.g. severe hypertension, heart failure, myocardial ischaemia, myocardial infarction); cerebrovascular disease (e.g. embolism, haemorrhage, tumour); respiratory disease (e.g. emphysema, cor pulmonale); psychiatric illness including epilepsy; severe anaemia (haemoglobin below 50 g/L); or are recovering from major/medium surgery. Pregnancy: at 35 weeks or more you may not join under any circumstances; at 28 weeks or more you must provide a doctor's exam report from within 7 days plus the attending physician's consent; under 28 weeks please enrol with caution, sign the agency's liability waiver, and you cannot join any adventure, skiing, sea-going, high-altitude or outdoor items. Travellers with disabilities need a doctor's report from within 7 days plus consent, an accompanying immediate family member, and must apply at least 61 days in advance for a reserved place and dedicated facilities. Seniors: travellers over 70 need a health certificate and exam report and an accompanying immediate family member (or sign the waiver), should enrol cautiously as the trip is long and physically demanding, need the attending physician's consent for any adventure/skiing/sea/high-altitude/outdoor items, and must apply at least 61 days ahead for age-friendly services. Minors: those under 18 must be accompanied by an immediate relative or guardian (with parental authorisation if travelling without parents, or the other parent's written authorisation if with only one parent); some sights have special rules for under-18/under-12/under-6; infants under 30 kg or under 6 need a confirmed EU-standard safety seat (otherwise bring your own); infants under 2 years are not accepted. Per Article 15 of the Tourism Law (and the Infectious Disease Prevention Law, 2025 revision), travellers must truthfully disclose health information relevant to the trip (pregnancy, lactation, chronic illness, infectious-disease history, suspected symptoms or recent travel to epidemic areas) and follow safety warnings; concealment that causes harm or spreads disease makes the traveller liable for the resulting damages, medical/quarantine costs and other guests' and the agency's losses, and the agency may terminate the contract without refund.
faqs.answer_zh: 为确保旅游顺利出行、防止旅途中发生人身意外伤害，请在出行前做一次必要的身体检查；如存在以下情况请勿报名：传染性疾病患者（如活动期肺结核、伤寒）；心血管疾病患者（如严重高血压、心功能不全、心肌缺氧、心肌梗塞）；脑血管疾病患者（如脑栓塞、脑出血、脑肿瘤）；呼吸系统疾病患者（如肺气肿、肺心病）；精神病患者（如癫痫及各种精神病）；严重贫血患者（血红蛋白量在50克/升以下）；大中型手术恢复期患者。孕妇：妊娠第35周及以上任何情况下都无法参团；第28周及以上需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书；第28周以下请慎重报名，需签署旅行社免责声明书，且行程内探险、滑雪、出海、高空、户外等项目均无法参加。残疾人：需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书、需直系家属陪同，并提前至少61天申请预留位置及专用配套设施。老年旅游者：70周岁以上需提供健康证明、体检报告及直系家属陪同（否则需签署免责声明书）；因行程较长、对体力要求较高，体力不支者请慎重报名；涉及探险、滑雪、出海、高空、户外等项目需持主治医师同意书；需提前至少61天申请适老化服务及专属设施。未成年人：未满18周岁需由直系亲属或监护人陪同（无父母陪同需父母授权书，仅一方陪同需另一方书面授权）；部分景点对未满18/12/6周岁有特殊限定；6岁以下或30公斤以下儿童需提前确认符合欧盟标准的安全座椅，否则需自行携带；不接受2周岁以下婴儿参团。根据《旅游法》第15条及《传染病防治法（2025修订）》，旅游者需如实告知与旅游活动相关的个人健康信息（包括妊娠期、哺乳期、慢性病、传染病史、疑似症状或近期疫区旅居史）并遵守安全警示规定；若因隐瞒导致人身损害或传播风险，旅游者需自行承担相应医疗、隔离费用及赔偿责任，旅行社可解除合同且不退还费用。

title_en: France, Italy & Switzerland in Depth: 14-Day Small-Group Tour (Rome to Paris)
title_zh: 法意瑞深度14天精品小团游（罗马至巴黎）
short_en: A one-way 14-day small-group journey from Rome to Paris across the Amalfi Coast, Tuscany, Venice, the Swiss Alps and Burgundy — all-inclusive pricing.
short_zh: 14天罗马至巴黎单程深度小团，畅游阿马尔菲海岸、托斯卡纳、威尼斯、瑞士阿尔卑斯与勃艮第，一价全含。
desc_en: This 14-day small-group tour traces a single deep one-way route from Rome to Paris through three of Europe's most beloved countries. Begin on Italy's sun-drenched south with the Amalfi Coast, Capri's Blue Grotto and Sorrento, then wind through medieval Tuscany, Florence, Cinque Terre and Venice. Cross the Alps into Switzerland for the GoldenPass scenic railway, the Jungfrau region and the Lake Geneva shoreline, before finishing in France with Burgundy's wine country, Versailles and the Louvre. With city-centre hotels, scenic rail, included attractions and an all-inclusive price, it's an unhurried, culture-rich grand tour.
desc_zh: 这条14天精品小团沿单程深度路线，从罗马一路畅游至巴黎，串联欧洲三大经典国度。旅程始于阳光灿烂的意大利南部——阿马尔菲海岸、卡普里岛蓝洞与索伦托，随后穿越中世纪托斯卡纳、佛罗伦萨、五渔村与威尼斯。翻越阿尔卑斯进入瑞士，乘金色山口观光列车，畅游少女峰地区与日内瓦湖岸；最后抵达法国，品味勃艮第酒乡，深度游览凡尔赛宫与卢浮宫。全程市中心酒店、观光列车、门票全含，一价全含，从容而充满文化底蕴。

highlights.en: Amalfi Coast boat cruise to Positano and Amalfi, plus Capri island and its famed Blue Grotto
highlights.zh: 乘船环游阿马尔菲海岸，探访波西塔诺与阿马尔菲，畅游卡普里岛及著名蓝洞

highlights.en: Medieval Tuscany: Pienza, Siena, San Gimignano's towers, Florence and the Cinque Terre scenic train
highlights.zh: 中世纪托斯卡纳：皮恩扎、锡耶纳、圣吉米尼亚诺塔楼、佛罗伦萨与五渔村观光小火车

highlights.en: Venice's St Mark's Square and Grand Canal, then fashion-capital Milan and its Duomo
highlights.zh: 威尼斯圣马可广场与大运河，再到时尚之都米兰及其大教堂

highlights.en: GoldenPass scenic railway through the Swiss Alps and the Jungfrau region
highlights.zh: 乘坐金色山口观光列车穿越瑞士阿尔卑斯，畅游少女峰地区

highlights.en: Lake Geneva shoreline, Lausanne, Montreux and the Chillon Castle, with a 5-star Relais & Chateaux château stay
highlights.zh: 日内瓦湖岸、洛桑、蒙特勒与西庸城堡，入住5星罗莱夏朵古堡酒店

highlights.en: Burgundy wine route with a vineyard estate visit and tasting near Dijon
highlights.zh: 勃艮第红酒之路，参观第戎附近名庄酒窖并品鉴美酒

highlights.en: Two deep days in Paris with national-museum guides at Versailles and the Louvre
highlights.zh: 巴黎两天深度行程，法兰西国家博物馆讲解师深度讲解凡尔赛宫与卢浮宫

highlights.en: All-inclusive small-group format: flights & scenic rail, city-centre 4-star hotels, all listed attractions, no forced shopping
highlights.zh: 一价全含精品小团：含机票与观光列车、市中心四星酒店、全部所列景点门票、无强制购物

includes.en: Hotels: 1 night in a 5-star hotel and 12 nights in star-rated hotels.
includes.zh: 【酒店】：五星级酒店1晚及星级酒店12晚。

includes.en: Meals: 13 buffet breakfasts (or breakfast in another form) served in the hotels.
includes.zh: 【餐饮】：酒店内自助早餐或其他形式早餐共计13餐。

includes.en: Taxes & fees: tourist city tax, entry-into-city fees, residence tax, the Venice island-landing fee, driver/guide meal allowances and various travel taxes and other fees executed within the itinerary.
includes.zh: 【税费】：游客城市税、进城费、居住税、威尼斯登岛费、司导餐补及各类旅游税等行程内执行费用。

includes.en: Transport: a 7-9 seat business travel vehicle.
includes.zh: 【交通】：7-9座商务旅行车。

includes.en: Guide: a Chinese-speaking driver-guide throughout the trip.
includes.zh: 【导游】：全程中文司机兼导游。

includes.en: Luggage: one 23 kg checked bag and one carry-on bag.
includes.zh: 【行李】：1件23公斤行李及1件随身行李。

includes.en: Admissions: first-entry tickets and official guiding for the Louvre; first-entry tickets and official guiding for the Palace of Versailles; the Seine river cruise; the Burgundy winery visit and wine tasting; the GoldenPass train; the Cinque Terre train; the Venice canal island ferry; the Sorrento-Amalfi boat cruise; and the Capri round-trip ferry.
includes.zh: 【门票】：卢浮宫首道门票及官导讲解、凡尔赛宫首道门票及官导讲解、塞纳河游船、勃艮第酒庄参观及品酒费用、金色山口列车、五渔村小火车、威尼斯运河上岛渡轮、索伦托阿马尔菲出海环游、卡普里岛往返渡船。

excludes.en: Passport: the cost of your personal passport.
excludes.zh: 护照：个人护照费用。

excludes.en: Visa: the tourist visa fees for the countries listed in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 签证：行程中所列旅游国家所需的观光签证费用。

excludes.en: Insurance: travel insurance (if the itinerary involves high-risk sports, please confirm whether your travel insurance covers that activity).
excludes.zh: 保险：旅游保险费用（如行程内涉及到高风险运动，请核实旅游保险是否包含该项运动）。

excludes.en: Tips: guide and driver gratuities totalling EUR 10 per person per day, the same rate for adults and children.
excludes.zh: 小费：游客支付导游和司机小费一共10欧/人/天，大小同价。

excludes.en: Meals: apart from the special meals included in the itinerary, lunches and dinners are not included.
excludes.zh: 餐饮：除行程内包含的特色餐外，行程中不包含午、晚正餐费用。

excludes.en: Admissions: any sight not marked as included (including but not limited to sights noted as "exterior," and all "recommended," "optional," "experience" and other items not stated as included); please pay on your own if you wish to enter.
excludes.zh: 门票：行程中未注明费用包含的景点（包括但不仅限于行程中注明"外观"的景点，"推荐""可选""体验"等所有未提及费用包含的项目，如需参观敬请自理）。

excludes.en: Extended stays: any accommodation, transport or sightseeing extended beyond the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 延长住宿：行程外额外延长的住宿、交通、观光费用。

excludes.en: Personal spending: drinks and alcohol, taxis, phone charges and other personal expenses.
excludes.zh: 私人消费：如饮料酒类、出租车、电话费等个人消费。

excludes.en: Other transport: any transport not mentioned in the inclusions beyond the business vehicle or minibus, such as the Venice gondola and, in vehicle-restricted zones, sightseeing trains and electric taxis, all at your own expense.
excludes.zh: 其他交通：除包含商务旅行车或中巴之外，费用包含中未提及的其他交通费用，如威尼斯贡多拉，以及车辆限行区的观光火车、电瓶出租车等费用敬请自理。

excludes.en: Free time: guests' own night-time touring and the itinerary's recommended projects, plus any transport, meals, admissions and shopping arising from them.
excludes.zh: 自由活动：游客夜间自行游览及行程中的推荐项目，以及产生的交通、餐饮、门票、购物等费用。

excludes.en: Experience activities: any tourist experience activities not included in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 体验活动：行程中没有包含的各项旅游体验活动。

excludes.en: Other costs: any fee not mentioned in the inclusions. In cases of force majeure such as natural disaster, war or strike, or special situations such as transport delays, flight cancellations/rescheduling, embassy visa delays or insufficient numbers, or other extra costs not caused by our company (e.g. overseas visa-extension fees, board, lodging and transport, national airfare adjustments), our company reserves the right to charge the price difference.
excludes.zh: 其他费用：费用包含中未提及的费用。如因天灾、战争、罢工等不可抗力原因，及因交通延阻、航班取消或更改时间、使馆延误出签、人数不足等特殊情况或其他非我公司原因所引致的额外费用（如在外延期签证费、住食及交通费、国家航空运价调整等），我公司有权追加差价。

timeline.title_en: Rome - Sorrento: A Deep Walking Tour of the "City of Cities," the Glory of Ancient Rome
timeline.title_zh: 罗马 - 索伦托：徒步深度游览"万城之城"古罗马帝国的辉煌
timeline.description_en: After meeting up in the morning, set out on foot through the ruins of the ancient Roman capital. View the Colosseum (exterior), once built to honour triumphant generals and the glory of the empire and still standing as Rome's most famous monument, and the Pantheon (exterior), a 2,000-year-old marvel praised by Michelangelo as an "angel's design" and the resting place of Raphael. Stroll the Spanish Square, made famous by the film Roman Holiday, with its 138-step Spanish Steps, the widest staircase in Europe, and visit the Trevi Fountain (exterior), the "wishing well" where tossing a coin over your shoulder is said to make dreams come true. All these sights lie within Rome's vehicle-restricted zone (ZTL), so the day is fully on foot, about 5 km round-trip; wear light, comfortable clothing. In the afternoon transfer to Sorrento for hotel check-in. Overnight: Sorrento Coast Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel, a seafront property with private beach, private pier and views over the Gulf of Naples.
timeline.description_zh: 上午集合后，徒步穿行古罗马都城遗址。参观斗兽场（外观）——古罗马帝国为取悦凯旋将士、赞美伟大帝国而建，是罗马最著名的历史遗迹；万神殿（外观）——距今2000多年、被米开朗基罗赞叹为"天使的设计"的古罗马建筑典范，拉斐尔长眠于此。游览因电影《罗马假日》而闻名的西班牙广场，西班牙台阶共138级，是欧洲最宽的台阶；并前往特莱维喷泉（许愿池，外观），相传背对喷泉从肩上投币入水即可梦想成真。罗马古城区主要景点均在车辆禁行区（ZTL）内，当天全程步行游览，往返约5公里，请穿着轻便舒适。下午前往索伦托入住酒店。夜宿：索伦托海岸酒店或同等4星级酒店——三面环海、拥有私人沙滩与私家码头，可俯瞰索伦托那不勒斯海湾景观。

timeline.title_en: Sorrento - Positano - Amalfi - Sorrento: A Boat Cruise Along the Amalfi Coast in the Scent of Lemons
timeline.title_zh: 索伦托 - 波西塔诺 - 阿马尔菲 - 索伦托：阿马尔菲出海环游，感受海风吹拂的柠檬香
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, board a charming cruise boat for a full-day exploration of the treasures of the Amalfi Coast, a UNESCO World Heritage site and one of National Geographic's 51 must-see beautiful places. Sail to Positano, a dreamlike clifftop village backing onto the mountains and facing the sea (about 2 hours), then cruise on to Amalfi to take in the panorama of the coastal town, half sea and half sheer cliff, with winding mountain roads and scattered villas above (about 2 hours). Afterwards cruise back to the hotel. Note: in case of extreme sea conditions, the boat company may cancel the outing to Positano and Amalfi for safety; the agency will instead arrange a coach tour of Sorrento old town that day, and the cruise fee will be refunded. Overnight: Sorrento Coast Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，登上迷人的游船，开启探索阿马尔菲海岸宝藏的一日游。阿马尔菲海岸是世界文化遗产，曾被美国《国家地理》评为一生必去的51个美丽地方之一。先乘船前往波西塔诺——背山面海、如梦如幻的悬崖村庄（约2小时），再乘船前往阿马尔菲，欣赏小镇全景：一半是大海，一半是绝壁，绝壁上是蜿蜒盘山公路与错落别墅（约2小时）。之后乘船返回酒店。备注：如遇海上极端天气，出于安全考虑游船公司将取消波西塔诺与阿马尔菲出海活动，我社改安排当天乘大巴游览索伦托老城，无法游览波西塔诺与阿马尔菲，出海游船费用将退还游客。夜宿：索伦托海岸酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Sorrento - Naples - Capri - Naples - Rome: Into the Mediterranean Paradise of Capri and the Mystery of the Blue Grotto
timeline.title_zh: 索伦托 - 那不勒斯 - 卡普里岛 - 那不勒斯 - 罗马：走进地中海天堂卡普里岛，探秘蓝洞
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, drive to Naples and take a ferry to the port of Capri. On the island you have free time (no transport included): walk along the seafront and visit the Blue Grotto, or take a boat to circle the island in search of the grotto, or head up to Capri town to overlook the whole bay from the Gardens of Augustus (exterior). The recommended route runs from the main harbour to Capri old town to the Gardens of Augustus, about 1.3 km of mountain road passing three key sights, with paid cable car and taxi options along the way. Note: the Blue Grotto is a natural site and may be closed by the local maritime authority due to high tide, wind or waves; admission to the Blue Grotto is not included, and besides the boatman's fee a tip of EUR 2-5 is customary. Afterwards ferry back to Naples and transfer to Rome for check-in. Overnight: Rome Riverside Palace Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel, next to Villa Borghese, within walking distance of the city's historic sights.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往那不勒斯，乘渡船抵达卡普里岛港口。登岛后自由活动（不含任何交通费用）：可自行海边漫步后前往蓝洞，或自行乘船环岛探秘蓝洞，或自行前往卡普里城游览奥古斯都花园（外观），俯瞰整个海湾。推荐路线为大港—卡普里古城—奥古斯都花园，单程约1.3公里山路，途径三个重要景点，沿途有需额外付费的缆车与出租车。备注：蓝洞属自然景观，如遇涨潮、风浪或当地海洋气象机构宣布关闭则无法入内；蓝洞游览费用不包含在团费内，除人力船工费外，按当地习俗请支付2-5欧元小费。之后乘渡船返回那不勒斯，随后前往罗马入住酒店。夜宿：罗马河畔宫殿酒店或同等4星级酒店——比邻波格赛公园，步行可达古罗马市中心各景点，采用意大利古典设计与古董家具。

timeline.title_en: Rome - Pienza - Siena - San Gimignano - Florence: Cypress Lanes of the Val d'Orcia and the Medieval Town of a Thousand Towers
timeline.title_zh: 罗马 - 皮恩扎 - 锡耶纳 - 圣吉米尼亚诺 - 佛罗伦萨：奥尔恰谷丝柏树小径，中世纪万塔古城
timeline.description_en: Drive to Pienza to walk the cypress lane and the old town, viewing Pienza Cathedral (exterior); Pienza was rebuilt in 1459 as the "ideal city" by Pope Pius II and lets you look out over the World Heritage Val d'Orcia from its walls. Continue to Siena to explore the medieval old town, Siena Cathedral (exterior), the shell-shaped Piazza del Campo (one of Europe's finest surviving medieval squares), the Town Hall (exterior) and the Torre del Mangia (exterior); the city hall museum holds Sienese-school paintings including Lorenzetti's Allegory of Good and Bad Government. Then visit the hill town of San Gimignano, the "Medieval Manhattan" famed for its preserved towers, viewing the Torre Grossa (exterior, 54 m, the town's tallest tower), the Town Hall (exterior) and the Piazza della Cisterna (well square), where you can also taste the award-winning Gelateria Dondoli gelato and local Vernaccia white wine. Overnight: Florence Tuscan Villa Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel, an 18th-century Tuscan villa with antique furnishings, parkland of centuries-old olive trees, an outdoor pool and gym.
timeline.description_zh: 前往皮恩扎，游览丝柏小径与皮恩扎古城，外观皮恩扎大教堂。皮恩扎是教皇皮乌斯二世于1459年主持重建的"理想城市"典范，可从城墙上俯瞰世界遗产奥尔恰山谷。随后前往锡耶纳，游览中世纪古城、锡耶纳大教堂（外观）、形似贝壳的田野广场（欧洲现存最美的中世纪广场之一）、市政厅（外观）与曼吉亚塔楼（外观）；市政厅内市立博物馆藏有锡耶纳画派作品，包括洛伦泽蒂的《好政府与坏政府寓意》。之后前往圣吉米尼亚诺小镇——以保存完好的中世纪塔楼闻名、有"中世纪曼哈顿"之称，外观格罗萨塔楼（高54米、全镇最高）、市政厅（外观）及水井广场，并可品尝屡获世界冠军的Dondoli冰淇淋与当地Vernaccia白葡萄酒。夜宿：佛罗伦萨托斯卡纳别墅酒店或同等4星级酒店——18世纪托斯卡纳风格别墅，配仿古家具，拥有百年橄榄树公园、室外泳池与健身房。

timeline.title_en: Florence - Cinque Terre - Pisa - Florence: The Cinque Terre Scenic Train and the Beauty of the Ligurian Coast
timeline.title_zh: 佛罗伦萨 - 五渔村 - 比萨 - 佛罗伦萨：乘坐五渔村景观火车，赏利古里亚湾美景
timeline.description_en: In the morning set out for the Cinque Terre, the five cliffside fishing villages of Monterosso al Mare, Vernazza, Corniglia, Manarola and Riomaggiore strung along the Ligurian coast, a UNESCO World Heritage site since 1997, exploring the colourful villages perched on the cliffs (about 2 hours). In the afternoon drive to Pisa to visit the Leaning Tower of Pisa (exterior) and the walled Piazza dei Miracoli (Square of Miracles), home to the cathedral, the Leaning Tower bell tower, the baptistery and the cemetery, all listed as World Heritage in 1987. Note: if bad weather or a railway strike prevents the Cinque Terre visit, the itinerary will automatically switch to viewing the coastal towns by coach or other means. Overnight: Florence Tuscan Villa Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午出发前往五渔村，沿利古里亚海岸线游览悬崖上的美丽渔村。五渔村是蒙特罗索、韦尔纳扎、科尔尼利亚、马纳罗拉及里奥马焦雷五个悬崖边村镇的统称，1997年被联合国教科文组织列入世界文化遗产（约2小时）。下午前往比萨，游览比萨斜塔（外观）与比萨历史文化中心的奇迹广场——广场上有比萨主教座堂、比萨斜塔（钟楼）、圣乔瓦尼洗礼堂和墓园四大建筑，1987年整体列入世界遗产。备注：如遇恶劣天气或铁路公司罢工等因素导致无法游览五渔村，行程将自动更改为乘坐大巴车或其它形式游览海岸线城市。夜宿：佛罗伦萨托斯卡纳别墅酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Florence - Venice: Land of Poetry and the Soul of the Renaissance
timeline.title_zh: 佛罗伦萨 - 威尼斯：诗歌之地，文艺复兴之魂，享受艺术之旅
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, tour Florence, birthplace of the Renaissance. Visit Santa Maria del Fiore, the Cathedral of Florence (queue to enter), whose iconic red dome dominates the skyline and whose facade is a geometric tapestry of white, green and pink marble; the Piazza della Signoria, an open-air sculpture museum with the Palazzo Vecchio, a copy of Michelangelo's David and the Fountain of Neptune; the Ponte Vecchio over the Arno (built 1345), where Dante is said to have met Beatrice; and Piazzale Michelangelo to the south-east, where another copy of David stands and the whole city, including the cathedral, Giotto's bell tower and the old bridge, spreads out below. Afterwards transfer to Venice for hotel check-in. Overnight: Venice voco / Four Points by Sheraton or an equivalent 4-star hotel, a newly refurbished property with modern design, a gym and the Ludico Venice restaurant.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后游览文艺复兴发源地佛罗伦萨。参观世界第三大教堂——圣母百花大教堂（需排队进入），其标志性红色穹顶主宰城市天际线，外立面由白、绿、粉三色大理石组成几何图案；市政广场，享有露天雕塑博物馆之誉，坐落着维琪奥宫（旧宫）、米开朗基罗《大卫》复制品与海神喷泉；阿诺河上的维奇奥桥（老桥，建于1345年），相传但丁在此邂逅少女比阿特丽丝；以及位于城东南、可俯瞰全城的米开朗基罗广场，广场中央安放《大卫》复制品，圣母百花大教堂、乔托钟楼、老桥尽收眼底。随后前往威尼斯入住酒店。夜宿：威尼斯洲际VOCO酒店或威尼斯福朋喜来登酒店或同等4星级酒店——新装修、现代设计，设健身房及供应意式与国际美食的Ludico Venice餐厅。

timeline.title_en: Venice - Milan: Venice on Its Gentle Waves
timeline.title_zh: 威尼斯 - 米兰：温柔碧波上的威尼斯
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, freely explore Venice, the "Pearl of the Adriatic," built on 118 islands linked by 177 waterways and 401 bridges. Visit St Mark's Basilica (exterior), one of the most renowned cathedrals in the Christian world; St Mark's Square, the rectangular heart of the city (about 170 m long) ringed by Renaissance buildings including the Doge's Palace, the basilica and the campanile; the Bridge of Sighs (exterior), the early-Baroque covered bridge once used to lead condemned prisoners from the courts to the prison; and the magnificent Doge's Palace (exterior), the museum that holds Venice's past glory with frescoes and medieval arms. In the afternoon transfer to Milan for check-in. Overnight: Milan central UNA / BW Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel, in the city centre about 10 minutes from the Duomo and minutes from the metro and shopping streets.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后自由参观威尼斯——这座"亚得里亚海明珠"由118个小岛组成，以177条水道、401座桥梁连成一体。参观圣马可大教堂（外观），基督教世界最负盛名的大教堂之一；圣马可广场，威尼斯长方形的中心广场（长约170米），四周环绕公爵府、圣马可大教堂、钟楼等文艺复兴时期建筑；叹息桥（外观），早期巴洛克式封闭廊桥，古代由法院向监狱押送死囚的必经之路；以及华丽的总督宫（外观），收藏壁画与中世纪兵器、承载威尼斯昔日辉煌的博物馆。下午前往米兰入住酒店。夜宿：米兰中心UNA/BW酒店或同等4星级酒店——位于市中心，距米兰大教堂约10分钟车程，距地铁站及购物街仅几分钟。

timeline.title_en: Milan - Zurich: Along the Alps from the Capital of Fashion to the Capital of Finance
timeline.title_zh: 米兰 - 苏黎世：沿阿尔卑斯山脉，从时尚之都游览到金融之都
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, freely visit Milan's landmark Duomo (exterior), a Gothic masterpiece begun in 1386 and largely finished only after 500 years, its white marble facade carrying thousands of statues and spires, and the Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II, one of the world's oldest shopping arcades, a glass-vaulted cathedral of architecture and luxury (Prada, Gucci) where you can pause for an espresso or tiramisu at historic cafes such as Caffe Biffi or Savini. Then drive to the Swiss financial metropolis of Zurich, visiting the Old Town with its famous lanes (Bahnhofstrasse, Rennweg, Niederdorf, Augustine Lane), Lake Zurich, Lindenhof Park on its linden-covered hilltop overlooking the Limmat, and a stroll along the Limmat River. Overnight: Crowne Plaza Zurich or an equivalent 4-star hotel, in the city's lively commercial district within walking distance of shops, bars and restaurants.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后自由参观米兰标志性建筑米兰主教堂（外观）——始建于1386年、历经约500年方基本完工的哥特式建筑，白色大理石外墙雕刻着数千座雕像与尖塔；以及欧洲漂亮的商业拱廊之一——埃马努埃莱二世拱廊，这座19世纪十字形玻璃拱顶长廊是世界最古老的购物中心之一，汇聚Prada、Gucci等品牌，可在Caffè Biffi或Savini Milano等老字号咖啡馆品一杯浓缩咖啡或提拉米苏。随后前往瑞士金融大都会苏黎世，参观苏黎世老城（班霍夫大街、伦韦格街、尼德道尔夫、圣奥古斯丁巷等著名街巷）、苏黎世湖、坐落于菩提树小山丘上、可眺望利马特河的林登霍夫公园，并漫步利马特河边。夜宿：苏黎世皇冠假日酒店或同等4星级酒店——位于热闹商业街区，步行可达商店、酒吧与餐馆。

timeline.title_en: Zurich - Lucerne - Lungern - Interlaken: The GoldenPass Line Across Switzerland's Picture-Perfect Scenery
timeline.title_zh: 苏黎世 - 卢塞恩 - 龙疆 - 因特拉肯：乘坐金色山口列车，尽览瑞士如画风景
timeline.description_en: In the morning, take in the lakes and mountains of Lake Lucerne: hear the story of Swiss loyalty at the Lion Monument and see the Chapel Bridge (Kapellbrücke) and the octagonal water tower. Then board the GoldenPass panoramic train to Lungern, an hour-long ride climbing through the mountains with beautiful views, to enjoy Lake Lungern and the town. Continue to the town of Interlaken, set between Lake Thun and Lake Brienz, with free time on Höheweg and the Höhematte green, a tranquil village blending people and nature. (An optional Interlaken paragliding experience from the Beatenberg 1558 base is available for EUR 220; a high-risk activity with age 10-65 and weight 10-95 kg requirements, not covered by ordinary travel insurance.) Overnight: Meiringen Park Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel, an 1880 Art Nouveau property famed for its Sherlock Holmes connection, with a Belle Epoque breakfast room, conservatory and English/Irish bar.
timeline.description_zh: 上午出发游览卢塞恩湖的湖光山色，在狮子纪念碑聆听瑞士人忠贞坚毅的历史，并游览卡贝尔廊桥与八角形水塔等景点。之后乘坐金色山口观光列车前往龙疆，约1小时车程穿山越岭、一路欣赏美景，游览龙疆湖及小镇风光。随后前往因特拉肯小镇——位于图恩湖与布里恩茨湖之间，自由游览何维克街、荷黑马特绿地广场，宁静村庄点缀于山水之间。（可自费体验因特拉肯高空滑翔伞，从贝阿滕贝格1558滑翔伞基地出发，费用220欧元；属高风险项目，要求年龄10-65周岁、体重10-95公斤，普通旅游保险不含此类项目。）夜宿：迈林根自然公园酒店或同等4星级酒店——这家建于1880年的新艺术风格酒店因与夏洛克·福尔摩斯的渊源而闻名，拥有美好年代风格早餐室、温室及英式/爱尔兰式酒吧。

timeline.title_en: Interlaken - Jungfrau Region - Interlaken: The Sublime Scenery of the "Jungfrau" and Its Mountain Villages
timeline.title_zh: 因特拉肯 - 少女峰地区 - 因特拉肯：游览"少女峰"地区唯美风光和山间小镇
timeline.description_en: In the morning head into the Jungfrau region. Three options are offered (only one may be chosen). Option 1 (included): the guide drives you to Wilderswil for the red Swiss train photo spot, to Grindelwald for the classic "dream slope" mountain view, and to Lauterbrunnen to view the Jungfrau and Eiger glacier from afar; the afternoon then visits the Giessbach scenic area and Lake Brienz. Option 2 (EUR 230): the Jungfrau panorama ascent to the Top of Europe, via cog train, gondola and lift, passing Grindelwald and the Eiger glacier up to the Sphinx Observatory overlooking the snow-capped Jungfrau and the vast Aletsch Glacier, returning via Lauterbrunnen's waterfalls. Option 3 (EUR 70): the First-Grindelwald aerial gondola round-trip up to First peak for the First Cliff Walk and thrilling activities such as the First Flyer zip-line and the eagle-flight ride. The Jungfrau (4,158 m) summit visit is at your own expense; Grindelwald sits beneath the Eiger and Lauterbrunnen is the "waterfall town" with over 70 falls including Staubbach. Overnight: Meiringen Park Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午出发前往少女峰地区，提供以下三个推荐项目，仅可三选一。项目一（费用包含）：跟随导游乘车依次游览维尔德斯维尔的网红红色火车站、格林德尔瓦尔德经典瑞士山景"梦幻山坡"、勞特布龙嫩远观少女峰及艾格冰川，当天下午游览吉斯巴赫风景区及布里恩茨湖畔。项目二（230欧元）：少女峰全景缆车登顶——先后换乘齿轮火车、空天缆车、红色全景列车、垂直天梯等不同交通，依次经格林德尔瓦尔德、艾格冰川登顶"欧洲之巅"，于斯芬克斯观景台俯瞰白雪皑皑的少女峰与阿莱奇冰川，游览水晶宫、高原观景台、冰宫等6个经典景点，返程途经勞特布龙嫩瀑布群。项目三（70欧元）：菲斯特-格林德尔瓦尔德空中贡多拉往返票，直达菲斯特峰巅游览悬崖天梭巅峰栈道First Cliff Walk，并可选高空飞索、神鹰飞行等惊险活动。少女峰（海拔4158米，2001年列为世界自然遗产）登顶为自费；格林德尔瓦尔德位于艾格峰北麓，勞特布龙嫩是拥有70多个瀑布（含施陶河瀑布）的"瀑布镇"。夜宿：迈林根自然公园酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Interlaken - Montreux - Vevey - Lausanne - Poligny: World Heritage Nature and the Lake Geneva Shoreline
timeline.title_zh: 因特拉肯 - 蒙特勒 - 沃韦 - 洛桑 - 波尔莱斯内：人类自然遗产，日内瓦环湖风景线
timeline.description_en: In the morning drive to flower-filled Lausanne, freely visiting the Olympic Park (Lausanne is the Olympic capital, home of the IOC and the Olympic Museum founded 1993 on the lakeshore) and pausing at the Ouchy waterfront lined with cafes, restaurants and hotels. Then enjoy the most spectacular stretch: the fairy-tale drive around Lake Geneva (Lake Léman), passing the rolling Lavaux vineyard terraces, a World Heritage site of 800 years standing. In the afternoon admire the Château de Chillon (exterior) reflected in the lake at the foot of the Alps, the iconic Swiss "floating" medieval castle made famous by Byron's The Prisoner of Chillon. Then transfer to Poligny to check in at the Relais & Châteaux castle hotel. Overnight: Relais & Châteaux castle hotel or an equivalent 5-star hotel, an 18th-century chateau set in parkland with a 2-Michelin-star restaurant by chef Steven Naessens and a Caudalie spa.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往四季布满鲜花的洛桑，自由游览奥林匹克公园（洛桑是奥林匹克之都，国际奥委会与1993年建于湖畔的奥林匹克博物馆均在此），并停留于沿岸布满咖啡厅、餐厅与酒店的乌希码头。之后迎来最精彩的环日内瓦湖（莱蒙湖）景观之路，途经绵延的拉沃葡萄园梯田——已有800年历史、被列入世界文化遗产的瑞士著名葡萄酒产地。下午欣赏蒙特勒的西庸城堡（外观），它孤独地倒影于阿尔卑斯山脚下的日内瓦湖中，是瑞士标志性的中世纪"水上漂"城堡，因拜伦的《西庸的囚徒》而声名远扬。随后前往波尔莱斯内入住罗莱夏朵城堡酒店。夜宿：罗莱夏朵城堡酒店或同等5星级酒店——18世纪古堡坐落于茹安公园中，设有米其林2星餐厅（主厨Steven Naessens）及Caudalie欧缇丽水疗中心。

timeline.title_en: Dijon - Paris: Burgundy, the Capital of French Scenery and Gastronomy
timeline.title_zh: 第戎 - 巴黎：法兰西美景、美食之都勃艮第
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, drive to Dijon, the home of red wine, snails, rose mustard and Charolais cattle. Visit Dijon old town, the 11th-15th-century capital of the Duchy of Burgundy still scattered with palaces, churches and timber-framed houses; Dijon's Church of Notre-Dame, built in the 13th century with gargoyles and a 14th-century clock; and the Palace of the Dukes of Burgundy (exterior). After lunch, head into the Burgundy wine region (the Côte de Nuits and Golden Slope), one of France's oldest, to visit a winery's courtyard, production workshop, vineyards and cellars, with a professional sommelier providing wine service and an in-depth introduction (tasting 3-5 reds and whites). Then return to Paris for check-in. Overnight: Paris Mercure / Novotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel, at the bustling Place d'Italie commercial centre, next to two of Paris's food districts.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往红酒、蜗牛、玫瑰芥末及白牛的原产地第戎。参观第戎老城——11至15世纪曾是勃艮第公国首府，老城区至今散布着豪华宫殿、庄严教堂与古朴的木框架房屋；第戎圣母院——建于13世纪，门面饰有兽形假排水口，并有一座14世纪报时钟；以及勃艮第公爵馆（外观）。午餐后前往勃艮第大区葡萄产区——法国古老的葡萄酒产区之一，参观酒庄的庭院、生产工坊、葡萄园及酒窖，由酒庄专业侍酒师负责侍酒服务与深度讲解，浅尝三到五杯红酒及白酒。返回巴黎后入住酒店。夜宿：巴黎美居酒店或诺富特酒店或同等4星级酒店——位于繁华商业中心意大利广场，毗邻巴黎两大美食街区。

timeline.title_en: Paris - Versailles - Paris: An In-Depth National-Museum Guided Tour of the Baroque Treasures of the Palace of Versailles
timeline.title_zh: 巴黎 - 凡尔赛 - 巴黎：国家馆讲解员深度讲解凡尔赛宫殿巴洛克艺术瑰宝
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, drive to the Palace of Versailles in the south-western suburbs of Paris and tour the palace, a Baroque masterpiece and the starting point of Rococo art begun in the era of the Sun King, Louis XIV, who mobilised over 30,000 workers, architects and engineers to build it. In the afternoon, return to central Paris and head to the fashion district of Boulevard Haussmann and Rue Royale, with free time around the Palais Garnier opera house (exterior, designed by Charles Garnier in 1861), Printemps and Galeries Lafayette department stores. (Note: with fewer than 3 guests Versailles has no official guide and an audio device is used instead.) Overnight: Paris Mercure / Novotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往位于巴黎西南部郊区的凡尔赛宫，游览凡尔赛宫——自太阳王路易十四时代开始修建，是巴洛克的登峰之作、也是洛可可艺术的起点，当年路易十四共动用三万余名工人、建筑师与工程师建造。下午返回巴黎市区，前往时尚中心奥斯曼大街与皇家大道，自由参观巴黎歌剧院（外观，由查尔斯·加尼叶于1861年设计）及春天百货、巴黎老佛爷等时尚街区。（备注：凡尔赛不足3人无官导讲解，由讲解器代替。）夜宿：巴黎美居酒店或诺富特酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Paris - Louvre - Paris: A Louvre Docent Explores the Origins of French Art and a Love of Salon Culture
timeline.title_zh: 巴黎 - 卢浮宫 - 巴黎：卢浮宫讲解师探讨法兰西艺术起源，爱上沙龙文化
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, visit the Louvre, one of the world's oldest museums and a treasure house holding over 400,000 works (about 35,000 on long-term display), entered through I.M. Pei's glass pyramid; a French national-museum docent gives a curated, in-depth themed tour (the itinerary includes standard general-admission tickets, with no Chinese audio guide). Then tour central Paris all day: Notre-Dame Cathedral and the Île de la Cité (the island without which there would be no Paris), the Eiffel Tower (exterior) and the Champ de Mars. Afterwards take a Seine river cruise in a glass-roofed bateau-mouche (about 3.2 km / 1 hour) past Notre-Dame, the Grand and Petit Palais (exterior), Pont Alexandre III, the Louvre and more, viewing Les Invalides (exterior) and Place de la Concorde from the water. The tour ends at the beautiful Place d'Italie in Paris. No accommodation tonight.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后参观法兰西引以为傲的卢浮宫博物馆——世界最古老的博物馆之一，珍藏40余万件艺术珍品（长期展出约3.5万件），由华裔建筑大师贝聿铭设计的玻璃金字塔为入口；届时由法兰西国家馆讲解师精选主题深度讲解（行程包含普通散客门票，无中文讲解器）。随后全天游览巴黎市中心景点：巴黎圣母院、西岱岛（没有西岱岛就没有今天的巴黎）、埃菲尔铁塔（外观）以及战神广场。之后乘坐透明船舱的"苍蝇船"塞纳河游船（约3.2公里、约1小时），途经巴黎圣母院、大小皇宫（外观）、亚历山大三世大桥、卢浮宫等地，在塞纳河面上参观荣军院（外观）、协和广场等景点。最后在美丽的巴黎意大利广场结束行程。当天无住宿。

meeting_en: Rome, Italy — group meets in central Rome on the morning of Day 1.
meeting_zh: 意大利罗马 — 第一天上午在罗马市区集合。

faqs.question_en: What are the meeting and dispersal points and times?
faqs.question_zh: 集合及集散地点和方法是怎样的？
faqs.answer_en: The tour starts in Rome and ends in Paris. On Day 1 the group meets at 08:30 at the entrance of a hotel near Roma Termini (Rome central station). On Day 14 the group disperses around 18:00 at Place d'Italie in central Paris. These times and places are for reference; the actual departure time follows the tour-departure notice.
faqs.answer_zh: 罗马出发、巴黎结束。行程第一天08:30在罗马中央火车站附近某酒店门口集合；行程第14天18:00左右在巴黎市区意大利广场解散。以上为参考时间及地点，实际出发时间以出团通知书为准。

faqs.question_en: Can I do the Interlaken paragliding activity?
faqs.question_zh: 我是否可以体验因特拉肯滑翔伞活动？
faqs.answer_en: It is not included. If you wish to add Interlaken paragliding, please consider it carefully: it is a special extreme sport not covered by ordinary travel insurance. The guide will take you to the paragliding transfer point (luggage can be left on the vehicle), and after the activity you land at the city-centre square to rejoin the group.
faqs.answer_zh: 不包含。如希望额外游览因特拉肯滑翔伞，请慎重考虑：滑翔伞属独特极限运动，普通旅游保险并不包含。导游负责将客人送至滑翔伞活动的接驳处（行李可寄存在车上），游客参加完项目后随滑翔伞降落到市中心广场集合。

faqs.question_en: Can we visit the Jungfrau panorama summit cable car and the Sphinx Observatory?
faqs.question_zh: 我们是否可以游览少女峰全景缆车登顶及"斯芬克斯观景台"？
faqs.answer_en: It is not included. If you wish to add the Jungfrau summit, you can visit it on your own from Interlaken Ost (East) station.
faqs.answer_zh: 不包含。如希望额外增加游览少女峰，可以在因特拉肯东站自行游览少女峰。

faqs.question_en: Can we visit the First cliff walk in the Jungfrau region?
faqs.question_zh: 我们是否可以游览少女峰的菲斯特栈道？
faqs.answer_en: It is not included. If you wish to visit the First cliff walk and the mountaintop zip-line and other outdoor activities, you can go with the guide to Grindelwald and then freely explore Grindelwald BGF - First Top of Adventure (total touring time about 5 hours), afterwards rejoining the guide at Interlaken Ost station.
faqs.answer_zh: 不包含。如希望游览少女峰菲斯特悬崖栈道及山顶空中飞索等户外活动，可跟随导游前往格林德尔瓦尔德，随后自由游览 Grindelwald BGF – First Top of Adventure，全程游览时间约5小时，随后在因特拉肯东站下车与导游再次汇集。

faqs.question_en: Can the Jungfrau scenic train and the Sphinx Observatory be combined with the other Jungfrau-region sights?
faqs.question_zh: 少女峰观光列车及"斯芬克斯观景台"是否可以和少女峰地区的景点同时参加？
faqs.answer_en: Our agency organises all guests to visit the red Swiss train at Wilderswil, the fairy-tale scenery of Lauterbrunnen and then Grindelwald at the foot of the Jungfrau. If you choose the scenic train, it conflicts with the "dream slope" and the "red train station," so they cannot be seen at the same time.
faqs.answer_zh: 我社组织所有游客游览维尔德斯维尔的红色瑞士火车、勞特布龙嫩的瑞士童话风景，随后来到少女峰脚下的格林德尔瓦尔德。如果选择观光列车，则与"梦幻山坡""红色火车站"有冲突，不可以同时看到。

faqs.question_en: Does the Jungfrau scenic train conflict with paragliding, the Brienz cog railway or the Interlaken cruise?
faqs.question_zh: 少女峰观光列车是否和滑翔伞、布里恩茨齿轮火车、因特拉肯游船有冲突？
faqs.answer_en: If you take the Jungfrau scenic train in the morning there is no conflict; however, if you choose to ride it from afternoon to evening, you may not be able to experience all of the Giessbach attractions.
faqs.answer_zh: 如上午乘坐少女峰观光列车没有冲突；但如果选择下午到晚间乘坐，则有可能无法体验到吉斯巴赫的全部项目。

faqs.question_en: What is the best plan for visiting the Jungfrau region?
faqs.question_zh: 少女峰地区最佳游览方案是什么？
faqs.answer_en: There are four options. A (Wellness): a full free day at the Giessbach scenic area, including the Giessbach Falls, Lake Brienz shore, Interlaken cruise, Brienz Rothorn cable car and Giessbach cog railway tickets (included April-October; not available in winter due to maintenance; the Brienz Rothorn cable car opened 8 June 2024). B (Easy plan): follow the guide to Wilderswil's red Swiss train, Lauterbrunnen's fairy-tale scenery and Grindelwald, then visit the Giessbach scenic area and Lake Brienz in the afternoon (included). C (Special-forces): take the Jungfrau scenic train to the Sphinx Observatory, then visit Giessbach. D (Extreme): visit the First cliff walk, the mountaintop zip-line and Interlaken paragliding all at once (not included).
faqs.answer_zh: 共有四种方案。A养生游：全天自由游览吉斯巴赫风景区，含吉斯巴赫瀑布、布里恩茨湖畔、因特拉肯游船、布里恩茨洪峰缆车、吉斯巴赫齿轮火车等门票（每年4月到10月份包含，冬季设备维护无法游览，布里恩茨洪峰缆车2024年6月8日开放）。B懒人包：跟随导游依次游览维尔德斯维尔红色瑞士火车、勞特布龙嫩童话风景、格林德尔瓦尔德，当天下午游览吉斯巴赫风景区及布里恩茨湖畔（费用包含）。C特种兵：乘坐少女峰景观列车游览斯芬克斯观景台，随后游览吉斯巴赫风景区。D极限游：同时游览菲斯特悬崖步道、山顶空中飞索及因特拉肯滑翔伞（费用不包含）。

faqs.question_en: Can we visit the town of Lungern?
faqs.question_zh: 是否可以游览龙疆小镇？
faqs.answer_en: You can visit the town of Lungern with the guide, but this conflicts with the GoldenPass train, so you would not be able to experience the GoldenPass train.
faqs.answer_zh: 可以跟随导游游览龙疆小镇，但与金色山口列车冲突，因此无法体验金色山口列车。

faqs.question_en: Can you help book the Maison Jeunet Michelin-starred restaurant?
faqs.question_zh: 是否可以协助预定 Maison Jeunet 米其林星级餐厅？
faqs.answer_en: On Route B (Rome start, Paris end) we recommend booking dinner at Maison Jeunet (2 Michelin stars), the chef's 8-course tasting dinner at EUR 195 (excluding drinks). On Route A (Paris start, Rome end) you may book lunch at Maison Jeunet, the chef's 4-course recommended lunch, with a 3-course set at EUR 85 (excluding drinks). Because of the Relais & Châteaux brand's special booking method, we send a booking link that the guest must confirm in person and guarantee with a credit card.
faqs.answer_zh: B路线（罗马出发、巴黎结束）推荐预定 Maison Jeunet（米其林两星级）餐厅晚餐，主厨推荐8道式晚餐195欧元（不含酒水）。A路线（巴黎出发、罗马结束）可选预定 Maison Jeunet 午餐，主厨推荐4道式午餐，三道式套餐85欧（不含酒水）。由于罗莱夏朵品牌的特殊预定方式，我社发送预定链接，需游客本人确认预定，并提供信用卡担保。

faqs.question_en: Can I book airport transfers?
faqs.question_zh: 是否可以预定机场接送服务？
faqs.answer_en: Yes. Please select the airport transfer for the city you need within the fee options, and note your arriving flight number in the order.
faqs.answer_zh: 可以预定。请在费用选项内选择所需城市的机场接送服务，并在订单内备注到达的航班号。

faqs.question_en: Can I book hotels before the tour starts and after it ends?
faqs.question_zh: 是否可以预定开始前的酒店和行程后的酒店？
faqs.answer_en: The itinerary does not require early arrival; it dovetails seamlessly with the Paris and Rome return flight times. If there is a delay, the airport-transfer driver can help guests join the group directly in the departure city.
faqs.answer_zh: 行程不要求提前到达，行程无缝衔接巴黎及罗马的往返航班时间；如遇晚点，接送机的司机可协助游客在出发地所在城市直接参团。

faqs.question_en: I get seasick - can I still join the Sorrento island-hopping tour of the four towns?
faqs.question_zh: 我晕船是否能参加索伦托的跳岛游览四大城市？
faqs.answer_en: First, the Mediterranean is an inland sea with relatively few waves, and the boats are large, so the chance of seasickness is low. Second, on the island-hopping tour the boat is transport rather than the sightseeing object: each leg averages 40 minutes to 1 hour, after which you disembark to tour; many included sights such as Capri, Positano and Amalfi cannot be reached, or cannot easily be reached, by vehicle. Note: in case of extreme sea conditions the cruise company cancels the Positano and Amalfi outing for safety, and the agency arranges a visit to Sorrento old town instead; the cruise fee is then refunded. The Sorrento seafront hotel is surrounded on three sides by sea, with a private beach, private pier, two restaurants and a famous marine spa, so on an island-hopping day you can also enjoy the Gulf of Naples views and food at the hotel.
faqs.answer_zh: 首先，地中海为内海，相对风浪较少，加之船体较大，因此晕船概率较低。其次，跳岛游中船为交通工具而非游览工具，平均每段40分钟到1小时，随后即可登陆游览；行程中包含的许多景点如卡普里、波西塔诺、阿马尔菲等都是车辆无法到达或不便到达的景点。备注：如遇海上极端天气，出于安全考虑游船公司取消波西塔诺与阿马尔菲出海，我社改安排参观索伦托老城，出海游船费用将退还游客。索伦托海滨酒店三面环海，拥有私人沙滩、私家码头、两间不同风格餐厅及一间著名的海洋Spa中心，如当天为跳岛活动，也可在酒店内享受那不勒斯湾的美景与美食。

faqs.question_en: Do I need a visa?
faqs.question_zh: 是否需要签证？
faqs.answer_en: Yes. This product does not include visa fees; it requires a Schengen visa (single or multiple entry) - if you need visa processing please choose a Schengen-visa product. After booking we provide all the materials for the Schengen visa application free of charge, and if you commission us to handle the visa we will purchase the Schengen travel insurance that meets the visa requirements (otherwise you must buy your own travel insurance and handle claims yourself). Your passport must be valid for at least six months from the date of departure or customs may refuse entry. Visa fees, visa service fees, Schengen insurance fees and visa-centre appointment fees are all non-refundable and non-transferable, even if the product is changed or cancelled. "Visa-worry-free" guarantee: if you sign with us 61 days before departure and have not obtained the visa within 45 days before departure, we bear all losses and immediately refund the full tour fee; if you do not meet this clause and fail to obtain the visa, refunds follow the change & cancellation terms. In case of a visa refusal, notify us within 48 hours with the consulate's refusal letter, submit any supplementary/changed materials within five days, and do not unilaterally waive the "visa defence" right.
faqs.answer_zh: 需要。本产品不含签证费用，需办理申根签证（单次或多次入境），如需办理请选择申根签证产品。预定后我社免费提供办理申根签证的全部材料；若委托我社办理签证，我社会为您购买符合申根要求的申根旅游保险（若未委托办理，则需自行购买旅游保险及自行负责理赔）。护照有效期需在离境之日起至少还有六个月，否则海关有权拒绝入境。签证费、签证服务费、申根保险费、签证中心预约费均不可退款，也无法更改使用者，即使产品退改签亦然。"保签无忧"：在出发日前61天与我社签约，如在出发前45天内未获取签证，我社承担所有损失并立即退还全部旅游费用；不符合该条款而未正常获签的，按"退改与取消条款"退费。如遇拒签需在48小时内通知我社并出具使领馆拒签函，需补充或更改材料的在五天内提交，且不得单方面放弃"签证抗辩"权利。

faqs.question_en: Booking, changes & cancellation
faqs.question_zh: 预订、变更与取消须知
faqs.answer_en: Free no-reason cancellation is allowed by both the agency and the traveller up to 30 days before departure (not including the 30th day); after that, the change & cancellation terms apply. Because flights, traffic, ferries, strikes and order optimisation often shift the timing and sequence of the itinerary, travellers must arrive at the meeting point one day before the tour starts and leave one day after it ends, allowing reasonable flight-connection time (at least 5 hours for connections at the same airport, 7 hours for different airports in the same city); losses from not doing so are borne by the traveller. The Louvre is name-registered, so enter the correct name when booking; due to Louvre flow limits, especially in peak season when in-museum guiding is restricted, the EUR 20-per-guest in-museum guiding fee is refunded, and with fewer than 3 guests Versailles has no official guide (an audio device is used). Spring-summer-autumn departures include the Brienz cog railway and Interlaken cruise (experience window 3 April-10 October 2026); when these cannot run they are replaced by a Lucerne cruise. The Lucerne-Lungern leg of the GoldenPass train has no guide on board. Rooms: solo travellers pay a single-room supplement deposit (refunded pro-rata if successfully matched for sharing); two people booking together get a standard double (bed type assigned by the hotel, not selectable); three people get a family room (two parents + one minor). All European hotels are non-smoking, check-in 14:00 / check-out 11:00, and air-conditioning is not a standard feature. Pricing is in EUR at booking; if you pay in CNY, the day-of CNY amount is auto-calculated from the Bank of China "EUR sell" rate; refunds also use the day-of rate, and any exchange-rate difference or bank fees are borne by the traveller. The group forms (成团) at 10 people; if 10 are not reached 30 days before departure, both sides may cancel. The Blue Grotto and Cinque Terre may be unavailable in bad weather/closure, with the cruise/itinerary adjusted accordingly.
faqs.answer_zh: 出发前30天（不含第30天）旅行社与旅行者均有权申请无理由取消，之后按"更改与取消条款"执行。由于航变频繁、交通拥堵、渡轮取消、罢工游行或顺序调整，行程时间及游览先后顺序常有调整，本产品要求旅游者在出发前一天到达集合地、结束后一天离开集散地，并预留合理航班衔接时间（同机场转机至少5小时，同城不同机场至少7小时），未遵守所致损失由旅行者自担。卢浮宫为实名制，报名请填写正确名字；因卢浮宫限流（旺季限制馆内讲解），届时退还馆内讲解费20欧元/每位游客，凡尔赛不足3人无官导讲解，由讲解器代替。每年春夏秋季产品含布里恩茨齿轮小火车和因特拉肯游轮（体验时间2026年4月3日-10月11日），无法体验期间替换为卢塞恩游船；金色山口列车卢塞恩-龙疆段车上无导游陪同。房型：单人报名默认含单人房差押金（成功拼房后按比例退款）；两人同时报名默认标准双人间（床型由酒店安排不可选）；三人默认家庭间（两位父母与一位未成年儿童）。欧洲所有酒店禁烟，入住14:00、退房11:00，空调并非酒店标准设施。定价以欧元为计价单位，如选择人民币支付，按当天中国银行"欧元卖出价"自动计算的实时人民币价格为准，退款同样适用当日汇率，汇率差异及银行手续费由旅行者承担。本产品成团人数为10人，出发前30天未达成团人数，双方均可解除合同。蓝洞、五渔村如遇恶劣天气或关闭可能无法游览，届时游船/行程相应调整。

faqs.question_en: Health & safety requirements
faqs.question_zh: 健康与安全须知
faqs.answer_en: For your safety, please have a medical check before travelling and do NOT enrol if you have: infectious diseases (e.g. active tuberculosis, typhoid); cardiovascular disease (severe hypertension, heart failure, myocardial ischaemia, myocardial infarction); cerebrovascular disease (cerebral embolism, cerebral haemorrhage, brain tumour); respiratory disease (emphysema, cor pulmonale); psychiatric illness (epilepsy and any psychiatric condition); severe anaemia (haemoglobin below 50 g/L); or recovery from major/medium surgery. Pregnancy: not permitted to join at all at 35 weeks or more; at 28 weeks or more a doctor's report within 7 days plus the attending physician's consent letter is required; under 28 weeks please enrol with caution, sign the agency's disclaimer, and you cannot join any adventure, ski, sea, high-altitude or outdoor activities. Travellers with disabilities must provide a 7-day medical report and physician's consent, be accompanied by a direct family member, and apply at least 61 days in advance for reserved places and facilities. Elderly travellers over 70 must provide a health certificate and medical report and be accompanied by a direct family member (or sign the disclaimer); the trip is long and requires good walking ability and stamina, and activities such as adventure, ski, sea, high-altitude or outdoor require the attending physician's consent letter. Minors (under 18) must be accompanied by a direct relative or guardian; if travelling without parents an authorisation letter is required (both parents' letters if not with a parent); infants under 2 are not accepted, and child safety seats must be confirmed in advance for babies under 6 / children under 30 kg. Under China's Tourism Law Article 15, travellers must truthfully declare health information relevant to the tour (including pregnancy, lactation, chronic and infectious diseases, suspected symptoms or recent epidemic-area travel) and follow safety warnings; concealment that causes harm makes the traveller liable.
faqs.answer_zh: 为确保安全出行，请出行前做必要的身体检查，如有下列情况请勿报名：传染性疾病（如活动期肺结核、伤寒）、心血管疾病（严重高血压、心功能不全、心肌缺氧、心肌梗塞）、脑血管疾病（脑栓塞、脑出血、脑肿瘤）、呼吸系统疾病（肺气肿、肺心病）、精神病（癫痫及各类精神病）、严重贫血（血红蛋白50克/升以下）、大中型手术恢复期。孕妇：妊娠35周及以上任何情况均不可参团；28周及以上需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书；28周以下请慎重报名，需签署旅行社免责声明书，且无法参加探险、滑雪、出海、高空、户外等项目。残疾人：需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书，需直系家属陪同，并提前至少61天申请预留位置及专用配套设施。老年旅游者：70周岁以上需提供健康证明、体检报告并由直系家属陪同（否则需签署免责声明书）；本行程较长，需有一定步行能力及体力，体力不支者请慎重报名；涉及探险、滑雪、出海、高空、户外等项目需持主治医师同意书。未成年人（未满18周岁）需由直系亲属或监护人陪同，无父母陪同须持父母授权书（仅一方陪同需另一方书面授权）；不接受2周岁以下婴儿参团；如有6岁以下婴儿或30公斤以下儿童，请提前确认安全儿童座椅。根据《旅游法》第15条，旅游者需如实告知与旅游活动相关的个人健康信息（包括妊娠期、哺乳期、慢性病、传染病史、疑似症状或近期疫区旅居史）并遵守安全警示规定，因隐瞒导致人身或财产损害的，由旅游者自行承担责任。

title_en: Italy in Depth: Dolomites, Puglia & the Amalfi Coast — 9-Day Small-Group Tour (Milan to Rome)
title_zh: 意大利深度9天精品小团：多洛米蒂、普利亚与阿马尔菲海岸（米兰进 罗马出）
short_en: A 9-day one-way journey down Italy from the Dolomite peaks to Venice, Puglia's trulli, the Amalfi Coast and ancient Rome — private coach transport and 4-star hotels all included.
short_zh: 9天单程纵贯意大利：从多洛米蒂雪峰到水城威尼斯，再到普利亚蘑菇屋、阿马尔菲海岸与永恒之城罗马，全程旅游巴士与四星酒店全含。
desc_en: This 9-day small-group tour traces Italy from north to south, weaving together mountains, sea and centuries of history. Begin in fashionable Milan and the Alpine peaks of the Dolomites, glide through romantic Venice, then head down the Adriatic to Puglia's fairy-tale trulli of Alberobello and the ancient cave city of Matera. The journey climaxes along the Amalfi Coast at Positano, Capri's Blue Grotto and the buried city of Pompeii, before finishing in eternal Rome. With city-centre 4-star hotels, a licensed Chinese-speaking guide and key attractions included, it is an unhurried, all-inclusive way to see Italy's classic and lesser-known gems.
desc_zh: 这趟9天精品小团从北到南纵贯意大利，将雪山、海岸与千年历史串联成一线。从时尚之都米兰与阿尔卑斯山脚下的多洛米蒂峰群出发，途经浪漫水城威尼斯，沿亚得里亚海南下，探访普利亚大区童话般的阿尔贝罗贝洛蘑菇屋与千年石头古城马泰拉。行程在阿马尔菲海岸的波西塔诺、卡普里岛蓝洞与火山掩埋的庞贝古城达到高潮，最终抵达永恒之城罗马。全程精选市中心四星酒店、专业中文导游、主要景点门票全含，是一种从容、一价全含的深度玩法，兼顾经典与小众风光。

highlights.en: One-way deep route the length of Italy — Dolomite mountains, Adriatic and Tyrrhenian seas in one trip
highlights.zh: 单程纵贯意大利南北精华，一次看尽多洛米蒂雪山与亚得里亚海、第勒尼安海

highlights.en: Cable car to Seceda / Alpe di Siusi above the Dolomite peaks, plus the iconic St. John church in Val di Funes
highlights.zh: 缆车直登刀锋山/休斯高原，俯瞰多洛米蒂峰群，外观打卡富内斯山谷孤独教堂

highlights.en: Romantic Venice — St. Mark's Square, the Bridge of Sighs and the Doge's Palace
highlights.zh: 浪漫水城威尼斯——圣马可广场、叹息桥与总督宫

highlights.en: UNESCO trulli of Alberobello and the millennia-old cave city of Matera
highlights.zh: 世界文化遗产阿尔贝罗贝洛蘑菇屋与千年石头古城马泰拉

highlights.en: Amalfi Coast by boat to clifftop Positano, plus Capri island and its famed Blue Grotto
highlights.zh: 乘船游阿马尔菲海岸悬崖小镇波西塔诺，畅游卡普里岛与著名蓝洞

highlights.en: The buried Roman city of Pompeii and Rome's Colosseum and Pantheon
highlights.zh: 火山掩埋的庞贝古城，以及罗马斗兽场与万神殿

highlights.en: City-centre 4-star hotels, including two nights at a Sorrento seafront resort
highlights.zh: 全程精选市中心四星酒店，连住两晚索伦托海滨景观酒店

highlights.en: All-inclusive pricing, professional Chinese-speaking guide and no forced shopping
highlights.zh: 精选项目一价全含，专业中文导游，全程无强制购物

includes.en: Hotels: carefully selected comfort 4-star hotels throughout, 8 nights in total.
includes.zh: 【酒店】：全程精选舒适型四星级酒店，共8晚酒店。

includes.en: Meals: 8 breakfasts (in-hotel breakfast or breakfast in another form).
includes.zh: 【餐饮】：酒店内早餐或其他形式的早餐8餐。

includes.en: Taxes & fees: all taxes within the itinerary, including tourist city tax, city-entry fees, residence tax, road/bridge tolls, island-landing fees, etc.
includes.zh: 【税费】：游客城市税、进城费、居住税、路桥费、登岛费等行程内的所有税费。

includes.en: Transport: business travel car or tour coach.
includes.zh: 【交通】：商务旅行车或旅游巴士。

includes.en: Guide: professional driver plus Chinese-speaking guide, or a Chinese-speaking driver-guide throughout (note: for groups of 8 or fewer, a business travel car plus a Chinese-speaking driver-guide is arranged, who will lead the full city itinerary).
includes.zh: 【导游】：职业司机＋中文导游，或全程中文司机兼导游（备注：8人及以下则安排为商务旅行车＋中文司机兼导游，届时将由司兼导带领游览全部城市行程）。

includes.en: Luggage: 1 piece of checked luggage up to 23 kg plus 1 piece of carry-on luggage.
includes.zh: 【行李】：1件23公斤行李及1件随身行李。

includes.en: Activities & tickets: Rome Colosseum, Pantheon, Pompeii, Milan Cathedral, Seceda cable car, Venice island ferry, Salerno–Positano round-trip boat, and Sorrento–Capri round-trip ferry.
includes.zh: 【活动及门票】：罗马斗兽场、万神殿、庞贝古城、米兰大教堂、刀锋山缆车、威尼斯登岛轮渡、萨勒诺往返波西塔诺出海轮渡、索伦托—卡普里岛往返渡船。

excludes.en: Passport: personal passport costs.
excludes.zh: 护照：个人护照费用。

excludes.en: Visa: the tourist visa fees required for the countries listed in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 签证：行程中所列旅游国家所需的观光签证费用。

excludes.en: Insurance: travel insurance (if the itinerary involves high-risk sports, please confirm whether your travel insurance covers them).
excludes.zh: 保险：旅游保险费用（如行程内涉及高风险运动，请核实旅游保险是否包含该项运动）。

excludes.en: Tips: guide and driver tips totalling 10 EUR per person per day, same rate for adults and children.
excludes.zh: 小费：游客支付导游和司机小费一共10欧/人/天，大小同价。

excludes.en: Meals: apart from any special meals included in the itinerary, lunches and dinners are not included.
excludes.zh: 餐饮：除行程内包含的特色餐外，行程中不包含午、晚正餐费用。

excludes.en: Tickets: sights not marked as included (including but not limited to all sights marked "exterior," "recommended," "optional," "experience," etc., and any item not stated as included); pay on your own if you wish to enter.
excludes.zh: 门票：行程中未注明费用包含的景点（包括但不仅限于行程中注明“外观”的景点，以及“推荐”“可选”“体验”等所有未提及费用包含的项目，如游客需要参观，敬请自理）。

excludes.en: Extended stays: any additional accommodation, transport or sightseeing outside the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 延长住宿：行程外额外延长的住宿、交通、观光费用。

excludes.en: Personal expenses: such as drinks/alcohol, taxis, phone charges and other personal spending.
excludes.zh: 私人消费：如饮料酒类、出租车、电话费等个人消费。

excludes.en: Other transport: transport not mentioned as included beyond the business car or minibus — e.g. Venice gondola, and the sightseeing trains, electric taxis, etc. used in vehicle-restricted zones — is at your own expense.
excludes.zh: 其他交通：除包含商务旅行车或中巴之外，费用包含中未提及的其他交通费用，如威尼斯贡多拉，以及车辆限行区的观光火车、电瓶出租车等费用敬请自理。

excludes.en: Free-time activities: night sightseeing on your own and recommended items in the itinerary, plus any resulting transport, dining, tickets, shopping, etc.
excludes.zh: 自由活动：游客夜间自行游览及行程中的推荐项目，以及产生的交通、餐饮、门票、购物等费用。

excludes.en: Experience activities: any travel-experience activities in the itinerary that are not included.
excludes.zh: 体验活动：行程中没有包含的各项旅游体验活动。

excludes.en: Other costs: anything not mentioned under inclusions. In cases of force majeure (natural disasters, war, strikes, etc.) or special circumstances such as traffic delays, flight cancellations/reschedules, embassy visa delays, insufficient group size, or other causes not attributable to us, the company reserves the right to charge the price difference for extra costs incurred (e.g. overseas visa-extension fees, accommodation, food and transport, national airfare adjustments, etc.).
excludes.zh: 其他费用：费用包含中未提及的费用。如因天灾、战争、罢工等不可抗力原因，及因交通延阻、航班取消或更改时间、使馆延误出签证、人数不足等特殊情况或其他非我公司原因所致的额外费用（如在外延期签证费、住食及交通费、国家航空运价调整等），我公司有权追加差价。

timeline.title_en: Milan – Lake Garda – Trento
timeline.title_zh: 米兰 – 加尔达湖 – 特伦托
timeline.description_en: The tour begins in the fashion capital of Milan, where you view Sforzesco Castle (exterior), a 14th-century fortress that was the seat of the Sforza family and now houses the city's museums. You then visit the Milan Cathedral (Duomo), a magnificent Gothic masterpiece begun in 1386 and finished after some 500 years, with hundreds of spires and a white marble facade carved with thousands of statues, and stroll through the Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II, the 19th-century glass-vaulted arcade lined with luxury flagships and historic cafes. In the afternoon you head to Lake Garda to enjoy the lake-and-mountain scenery at the foot of the Alps, before continuing to Trento for the night. Overnight at NH Trento or a comparable 4-star hotel, a green design hotel by Renzo Piano in the modern Le Albere district near the MUSE science museum.
timeline.description_zh: 行程从时尚之都米兰开始，参观斯福尔扎城堡（外观）——这座建于14世纪的城堡曾是斯福尔扎家族的住所，如今辟为米兰市的博物馆。随后游览米兰大教堂（Duomo），这座始建于1386年、历经约500年才完工的哥特式杰作拥有数以百计直插云霄的尖塔，白色大理石外墙上雕刻着数千座雕像；再漫步19世纪修建的玻璃拱顶埃马努埃莱二世长廊，这里汇聚了众多奢侈品旗舰店与老字号咖啡馆。下午前往加尔达湖，欣赏阿尔卑斯山脚下的湖光山色，之后前往特伦托入住酒店。夜宿NH特伦托酒店或同等4星级酒店——这是一家由意大利建筑大师Renzo Piano设计、位于现代感十足的阿尔达通科学文化区（Le Albere）、毗邻MUSE科学博物馆的绿色设计酒店。

timeline.title_en: Trento – Bolzano – Ortisei – Funes Valley – Trento (Dolomites cable cars)
timeline.title_zh: 特伦托 – 博尔扎诺 – 奥蒂塞伊 – 富内斯山谷 – 特伦托（多洛米蒂缆车）
timeline.description_en: In the morning you stroll the medieval old town of Bolzano (Bozen), capital of South Tyrol, with its Gothic and Renaissance architecture and the central Walther Square, a city that blends Italian and Austrian culture. You then drive to the alpine town of Ortisei, where you may take the cable car up to Seceda to look out over the jagged peaks of the Dolomites, or head to the Alpe di Siusi high-altitude meadows for rolling alpine-pasture scenery (the two are an either/or choice on the day). Afterwards you continue to the Funes Valley to photograph the Church of St. John (the "Lonely Church" / Santa Maddalena, exterior), a small 1744 Baroque chapel set against the saw-toothed Geisler peaks, before returning to the hotel. Overnight at NH Trento or a comparable 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往南蒂罗尔省首府博尔扎诺（Bolzano），漫步保存完好的中世纪老城，欣赏哥特式与文艺复兴风格建筑，在城市心脏瓦尔特广场感受意大利与奥地利文化的交融。随后前往奥蒂塞伊小镇，可乘缆车登顶刀锋山（Seceda）俯瞰锯齿状的多洛米蒂峰群，或前往休斯山（Alpe di Siusi）高原草甸欣赏起伏的高山草原风光（当天两处二选一）。之后前往富内斯山谷，外观打卡圣马达莱娜村的圣约翰教堂（孤独教堂，外观）——这座建于1744年的巴洛克风格小木堂背靠锯齿状的盖斯勒峰，遊览结束后返回酒店。夜宿NH特伦托酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Trento – Venice – Rimini
timeline.title_zh: 特伦托 – 威尼斯 – 里米尼
timeline.description_en: In the morning you travel to the water city of Venice, where you take in St. Mark's Square (Piazza San Marco), the rectangular heart of the city framed by Renaissance buildings; St. Mark's Basilica (exterior), the lavish Byzantine church famed for its five onion domes and golden mosaics; the elegant pink-marble Gothic Doge's Palace (exterior); and the Bridge of Sighs (exterior), the enclosed bridge over which condemned prisoners were once led to the dungeons. You then continue to Rimini to check in, with the evening free to explore the town and sample local food and nightlife. Overnight at Hotel Fellini Parco or a comparable 4-star hotel, set beside Federico Fellini Park, a few steps from the Adriatic beach with its own private beach and the "La Dolce Vita" spa.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往水城威尼斯，到达后游览圣马可广场（Piazza San Marco）——这座由文艺复兴建筑环绕的长方形广场是威尼斯的中心；参观聖马可大教堂（外观），这座拜占庭风格的华丽教堂以五座洋葱形圆顶与金色马赛克装饰闻名；游览粉色大理石打造的哥特式总督府（外观）；以及叹息桥（外观）——昔日由法院向监狱押送死囚的必经之路。之后前往里米尼入住酒店，晚上自由游览市区，融入当地热闹的夜生活并品尝当地美食。夜宿费里尼帕尔科酒店或同等4星级酒店——酒店坐落于费德里科·费里尼公园旁，距亚得里亚海海滩仅数步之遥，拥有私人海滩与“La Dolce Vita”水疗中心。

timeline.title_en: Rimini – Pescara – Bari
timeline.title_zh: 里米尼 – 佩斯卡拉 – 巴里
timeline.description_en: In the morning you head south along the coast from Rimini, passing through Pescara in the Abruzzo region, a Mediterranean seaside town known for its seafood restaurants serving the day's fresh catch, clam pasta and grilled sea bass paired with local Montepulciano wine. In the afternoon you arrive in Bari, capital of the Puglia region, and check in. You are free to visit the Basilica di San Nicola (exterior) — the 11th-century Romanesque church holding the relics of St. Nicholas (the original Santa Claus) and a shared pilgrimage site for Catholics and Orthodox alike — or wander the stone-paved lanes and shopping streets of the old town (Bari Vecchia) to soak up the relaxed feel of southern Italy. Overnight at Mercure Bari or a comparable 4-star hotel, set in an old park near "Old Bari," the Petruzzelli Theatre and the seafront promenade.
timeline.description_zh: 早晨从里米尼沿海南下，途经阿布鲁佐大区的佩斯卡拉——这是一座充满地中海风情的海滨小城，以海鲜餐厅闻名，可品尝当天捕捞的鲜鱼、淋上橄榄油与柠檬汁的蛤蜊意面或炭烤海鲈鱼，搭配本地蒙特普尔恰诺葡萄酒。午后前往普利亚大区首府巴里入住酒店，自由参观圣尼古拉大教堂（外观）——这座11世纪的罗马式教堂安葬着圣尼古拉斯（圣诞老人的原型）的圣遗体，是天主教与东正教共同的朝圣之地；或漫步老城区（Bari Vecchia）的石板街巷与购物步行街，感受南意的松弛感。夜宿巴里美居酒店或同等4星级酒店——酒店坐落在古老的公园中，毗邻“老巴里”、Petruzzelli剧院与滨海长廊。

timeline.title_en: Bari – Polignano a Mare – Alberobello – Matera
timeline.title_zh: 巴里 – 滨海波利尼亚诺 – 阿尔贝罗贝洛 – 马泰拉
timeline.description_en: In the morning you set out from Bari for the cliff-top town of Polignano a Mare, known as "Puglia's balcony on the Mediterranean," with white houses clinging to the rock above the deep blue Adriatic and the famous Lama Monachile cove. You then continue to the fairy-tale white-stone town of Alberobello, a UNESCO World Heritage Site since 1996, famed for its Trulli — conical-roofed dry-stone houses dating back centuries — where you can wander freely and photograph the rows of trulli against the sunset. In the afternoon you reach the ancient stone city of Matera to explore the Sassi (Sasso Caveoso and Sasso Barisano), one of the oldest continuously inhabited settlements on earth, carved from natural rock. Overnight at UNA Hotel Matera or a comparable 4-star hotel, set in a 5-hectare park on the Lucanian hills with indoor/outdoor pools, a spa and five restaurants.
timeline.description_zh: 上午从巴里出发，前往悬崖小镇滨海波利尼亚诺——这座被誉为“普利亚的地中海阳台”的小镇白色房屋依岩壁而建，俯瞰湛蓝的亚得里亚海，最著名的景观是深切的拉马莫纳基莱（Lama Monachile）海湾。随后前往童话般的白石小镇阿尔贝罗贝洛——这里以独特的特鲁利（Trulli）蘑菇屋闻名，1996年被联合国教科文组织列为世界文化遗产，可自由漫步并拍摄成排石屋与晚霞交映的画面。下午抵达石头古城马泰拉，探索由天然岩石雕凿而成、地球上最古老居住地之一的“Sassi”老城区（分为Sasso Caveoso与Sasso Barisano两区），深度漫步普利亚经典风光。夜宿马泰拉UNA酒店或同级4星级酒店——酒店坐落于卢卡尼亚山丘上占地5公顷的公园内，设有室内外泳池、SPA区域及5间餐厅。

timeline.title_en: Matera – Salerno – Positano – Sorrento (Amalfi Coast by boat)
timeline.title_zh: 马泰拉 – 萨勒诺 – 波西塔诺 – 索伦托（乘船游阿马尔菲海岸）
timeline.description_en: In the morning you travel to Salerno and board a boat to Positano, the colourful cliff-side town on the Amalfi Coast where pink, yellow and blue houses tumble down the mountainside above golden beaches scented with lemons and sea breeze. The cruise passes Amalfi, one of southern Italy's most enchanting coastal gems and a UNESCO World Heritage area, once the capital of the powerful Maritime Republic of Amalfi. After strolling Positano's lanes you take the boat back to Salerno and continue to Sorrento to check in. Overnight at a Sorrento coast hotel or a comparable 4-star hotel, with views over the Bay of Sorrento/Naples, a private beach, a private pier and a marine spa. Note: if extreme weather closes the sea, the Positano boat trip is cancelled for safety and replaced by a coach visit to the old town of Salerno or Sorrento (Positano cannot then be visited); the boat fare is refunded.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往萨勒诺，乘船游览波西塔诺——这座坐落在阿马尔菲海岸峭壁上的彩色小镇，层叠的粉橙、明黄、湛蓝房屋沿山而建，俯瞰金色沙滩，空气中弥漫着柠檬与海风的清香。航程途经意大利南部最迷人的海岸明珠之一阿马尔菲（船观）——这片被列入联合国教科文组织世界遗产的海岸曾是强大的阿马尔菲航海共和国的首都。漫步波西塔诺后乘船返回萨勒诺，前往索伦托入住酒店。夜宿索伦托海岸酒店或同等4星级酒店——酒店三面环绕索伦托/那不勒斯海湾景观，拥有私人沙滩、私家码头与海洋SPA中心。备注：如遇海上极端天气，出于安全考虑游船公司将取消出海游览波西塔诺，改为当天乘车参观萨勒诺或索伦托老城（届时无法参观波西塔诺），出海游船费用将退还给游客。

timeline.title_en: Sorrento – Capri – Sorrento (the Blue Grotto)
timeline.title_zh: 索伦托 – 卡普里岛 – 索伦托（探秘蓝洞）
timeline.description_en: In the morning you stroll the cliff-top town of Sorrento, then take the ferry across to the island of Capri. On the island the day is free: you may walk along the shore and visit the Blue Grotto, take a small boat around the island to explore the grotto, or head into Capri town to see the Gardens of Augustus (exterior) overlooking the whole bay. The Blue Grotto — one of the world's seven wonders — is a sea cave whose tiny entrance can only be entered by small rowing boat, where light reflecting through the water turns the cave a luminous blue. Afterwards you take the ferry back to Sorrento's pier and return to the hotel. Overnight at a Sorrento coast hotel or a comparable 4-star hotel. Note: the recommended walking route is Marina Grande – Capri old town – Gardens of Augustus (about 1.3 km of hill road, with funicular and taxis available for an extra fee); the Blue Grotto is a natural site that may close due to high tide, waves or weather, its fee is not included, and a 2–5 EUR tip to the boatman is customary on top of the rowing fee.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往索伦托，漫步筑于海滨峭壁上的小城；之后在索伦托乘渡船前往卡普里岛。当天登岛后自由活动：可自行前往海边漫步后游览蓝洞，或自行乘船环岛探秘蓝洞，或自行前往卡普里城中游览奥古斯都花园（外观），俯瞰整个海湾。蓝洞被誉为世界七大奇景之一，洞口很小、只能乘小船进入，由于洞口的特殊结构，阳光经海水反射使洞内海水与岩石呈现一片晶蓝。之后乘渡船返回索伦托码头，乘车返回酒店。夜宿索伦托海岸酒店或同等4星级酒店。重要提示：登岛后推荐路线为大港—卡普里古城—奥古斯都花园，单程约1.3公里山路，沿途有缆车和出租车需额外付费；蓝洞属自然景观，如遇涨潮、风浪或当地海洋气象机构宣布关闭则无法入内，蓝洞游览费用不含在团费内，按当地习俗除人力船工费外还请支付2-5欧元小费。

timeline.title_en: Sorrento – Pompeii – Naples – Rome
timeline.title_zh: 索伦托 – 庞贝 – 那不勒斯 – 罗马
timeline.description_en: After breakfast you head to Pompeii to explore the ruins of the ancient city — a thriving Roman town buried by the eruption of Mount Vesuvius in AD 79 and rediscovered over a thousand years later, where you can see the Forum, the Temple of Apollo with its preserved Corinthian columns, and the plaster casts made of victims trapped in the ash. You then continue to Naples to tour the old town and view the Royal Palace of Naples (exterior) and the Castel Nuovo (New Castle, exterior). Naples — birthplace of pizza and of the songs "'O Sole Mio" and "Torna a Surriento," capital of Campania and overlooked by Mount Vesuvius — is one of Italy's most populous and characterful cities. In the afternoon you travel to Rome to check in. Overnight at the Sheraton Roma Hotel (Medici) or Hotel Mantegna or a comparable 4-star hotel, set among landscaped gardens with a golf course and outdoor pool.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往庞贝，探索庞贝古城遗址——这座古罗马城镇于公元79年因维苏威火山爆发被火山灰瞬间掩埋，一千多年后才重见天日，可参观中心广场、保留48根科林斯式圆柱的阿波罗神殿，以及由火山灰中遇难者遗骸浇铸而成、令人触目惊心的石膏铸像。之后前往那不勒斯游览老城，参观那不勒斯皇宫（外观）与新堡（外观）。那不勒斯是披萨的起源地，也是《我的太阳》《重归苏莲托》的诞生地，作为坎帕尼亚大区首府、背靠维苏威火山，是意大利人口最多、最具个性的城市之一。下午前往罗马入住酒店。夜宿罗马梅第奇喜来登酒店或曼特尼亚酒店或同等4星级酒店——酒店环绕园景花园，设有高尔夫球场与室外游泳池。

timeline.title_en: Rome (the Eternal City) – tour ends
timeline.title_zh: 罗马（永恒之城）– 行程结束
timeline.description_en: In the morning you tour the famous historic city of Rome, birthplace of the Roman Empire and known as the "Eternal City." You visit the Colosseum, the vast amphitheatre built to host gladiatorial contests and one of Rome's most iconic ruins, and the Pantheon, the remarkably preserved 2,000-year-old temple admired by Michelangelo as "the design of angels" (modest dress required to enter; no shoulders or knees exposed, no food or drink). You then explore the Spanish Steps — made famous by the film Roman Holiday and, with 138 steps, the widest staircase in Europe — and the Trevi Fountain (exterior), the grand "wishing fountain" where tradition says a coin tossed over your shoulder makes your dream come true. The Rome old town sights all lie within the vehicle-restricted ZTL zone, so the day is covered on foot (round-trip walking of about 5 km; please wear comfortable shoes). There is no hotel on this final day; dispersal is around 17:30 at Roma Tiburtina station.
timeline.description_zh: 上午开始游览世界著名的历史文化名城罗马——这里是古罗马帝国的发祥地，因历史悠久被称为“永恒之城”。参观斗兽场——这座以庞大雄伟著称的古罗马竞技场是当时供观看斗兽与角斗的场所，也是罗马最著名的历史遗迹；以及万神殿——这座保存完好、距今2000多年的古罗马建筑被米开朗基罗赞叹为“天使的设计”（因属宗教场所，入内需着装得体，不可露肩露背、短裤短裙须盖过膝盖，且不可携带饮食）。随后游览西班牙广场——因电影《罗马假日》而闻名，其138级台阶是欧洲最宽的台阶；以及特莱维喷泉（外观，又称“许愿池”），相传背对喷泉从肩上投币入水便能梦想成真。罗马古城区主要景点均位于车辆禁行区（ZTL）内，当天为步行游览，往返步行约5公里，请穿着轻便舒适。当天无酒店住宿，约下午17:30在Roma Tiburtina火车站集散。

meeting_en: Milan, Italy — tour departs from Milan and ends in Rome (one-way route).
meeting_zh: 意大利米兰——行程从米兰出发，于罗马结束（单程线路）。

faqs.question_en: Where and how do we meet and disperse?
faqs.question_zh: 集合及集散的地点和方式是怎样的？
faqs.answer_en: Meeting: 9:00 on the morning of Day 1 at the tour-coach parking station of Sforzesco Castle in Milan (Castello-Sforzesco Parcheggio bus turistici Lanza, 20121 Milano MI). Dispersal: around 17:30 on Day 9 at Roma Tiburtina station (Piazzale della Stazione Tiburtina, 00162 Roma RM). These times/places are for reference — the actual departure follows the tour confirmation letter, so do not book connecting hotels before you receive it. We do NOT recommend a flight that leaves Rome on the final day. You may join in Milan as late as 13:00 on Day 1, but you will then miss the Milan city sights with no refund.
faqs.answer_zh: 集合：行程第1天早上9:00在米兰斯福尔扎城堡旅游大巴停车站集合（地址：Castello-Sforzesco Parcheggio bus turistici Lanza, 20121 Milano MI）。集散：行程第9天下午17:30左右在Roma Tiburtina火车站集散（地址：Piazzale della Stazione Tiburtina, 00162 Roma RM）。以上时间地点仅供参考，实际出发时间以出团通知书为准，未获取出团通知书请勿预订衔接酒店。本产品不推荐结束当天离开罗马的航班！参团当天最晚13:00前可在米兰上团，但届时米兰市区景点将无法游览，且无费用可退。

faqs.question_en: Are the daily coach-travel times very long?
faqs.question_zh: 行程路线乘坐大巴的时间会不会很久？
faqs.answer_en: The itinerary is planned around an average of 3–4 hours of travel time per day. Road conditions can be complex — congestion or other factors, especially within cities, may increase driving time.
faqs.answer_zh: 该产品行程计划平均每日约3-4小时的行程时间。公路交通情况复杂，特别是市区内容易发生堵车或其他因素导致行车时间增加。

faqs.question_en: Can we ride both the Seceda and the Alpe di Siusi cable cars on the same day?
faqs.question_zh: 刀锋山和休斯高原缆车当天是否都能乘坐游览？
faqs.answer_en: The Seceda round-trip cable car is already included on that day. The Alpe di Siusi (Siusi/Seiser Alm) cable car is an optional experience at your own expense. Because of the limited time on the day, you can only visit ONE of the two. If the Seceda cable car is temporarily closed for operational reasons, the day is uniformly switched to visiting Alpe di Siusi (cable car included); actual operation follows the resort's latest official notice.
faqs.answer_zh: 行程当日我社已包含刀锋山往返缆车费用。休斯高原缆车为可选体验项目，相关费用需您自理。受当日行程时间限制，两个景点仅可择一参观。若刀锋山缆车因运营安排临时关闭，将统一调整为游览休斯高原（含缆车），实际运营情况以景区官方最新通知为准。

faqs.question_en: In central Rome, can we tour by vehicle?
faqs.question_zh: 在罗马市中心，我们可以乘车游览吗？
faqs.answer_en: No. Rome's sights are very concentrated and are all pedestrian zones, so we cannot arrange a tour coach — central Rome sights must be visited on foot.
faqs.answer_zh: 不可以。由于罗马各个景点非常集中，并且都是步行街区，因此我社无法安排旅游大巴，罗马市中心景点需要徒步游览。

faqs.question_en: Do I need a visa?
faqs.question_zh: 是否需要签证？
faqs.answer_en: Yes. This product does NOT include the visa fee; a Schengen visa (single or multiple entry) is required — if you need one, please choose a Schengen-visa product. After booking we provide, free of charge, all the materials needed to apply for the Schengen visa, and if you commission us to handle the visa we will buy Schengen-compliant travel insurance for you (otherwise you must arrange your own insurance and claims). Your passport must be valid for at least six months from the date of departure, or customs may refuse entry. Visa fees, visa service fees, Schengen insurance fees and visa-centre appointment fees are all non-refundable and non-transferable, even if the product is changed or cancelled. "Worry-free visa guarantee": for travellers who sign with us at least 61 days before departure, if the visa is not obtained within 45 days before departure we bear all losses and immediately refund the full tour cost; travellers who do not meet this clause and fail to obtain a visa are refunded per the change-and-cancellation terms. In case of refusal, notify us within 48 hours with the consulate's refusal letter, submit any supplementary/amended materials within five days, and do not unilaterally waive the right of "visa defence."
faqs.answer_zh: 需要。本产品不包含签证费用，需办理申根签证（单次或多次入境），如需办理请选择申根签证产品。预订后我社免费提供办理申根签证的全部材料；若委托我社办理签证，我社将为您购买符合申根要求的申根旅游保险，若未委托我社办理，则需自行购买旅游保险并自行负责理赔。护照有效期需在离境之日起至少还有六个月，否则海关有权拒绝入境。签证费、签证服务费、申根保险费、签证中心预约费均不可退款，也无法更改使用者，即使产品退改签亦不可退。保签无忧：游客在出发日前61天与我社签约的旅游产品，如在出发前45天内未获取签证，我社承担所有损失并立即退还全部旅游费用；不符合该条款的游客如未正常获取签证，将按“退改与取消条款”退费。如遇拒签需在48小时内通知我社并出具使领馆拒签函，如需补充或更改材料需在五天内提交，且不得单方面放弃“签证抗辩”权利。

faqs.question_en: Booking, changes & cancellation
faqs.question_zh: 预订、变更与取消须知
faqs.answer_en: Free cancellation: up to 30 days before departure (not including the 30th day) both the agency and the traveller may cancel without cause. After booking, costs already incurred for items not used, voluntarily skipped, or for early departure are non-refundable, and partial-group reductions are re-priced (group/multi-share rates no longer apply). This product is a shared/join-in group; the minimum group size to confirm departure is 10 people — if it is not reached 30 days before departure either side may cancel without liability. Because flights, congestion, ferry cancellations, strikes and itinerary re-sequencing are common, you must arrive at the meeting point one day before the tour starts and leave the dispersal point one day after it ends, with reasonable flight-connection buffers (at least 5 hours for a same-airport transfer, 7 hours for a different-airport transfer in the same city; reasonable meet/disperse window 07:00–21:00). The agency may adjust the order of dates/sights without this counting as breach, as long as the route and sights are unchanged. Rooms: a single traveller pays a single-room supplement by default; standard double = one big bed or two beds (bed type assigned by the hotel, not selectable); triple/family rooms vary in bed configuration. Pricing is quoted in EUR; if you pay in CNY, the amount is the real-time CNY value auto-calculated from the Bank of China "EUR selling price" at the moment of payment, and the same applies to refunds (exchange-rate differences and bank fees are borne by the traveller). Note also: the Seceda/Alpe di Siusi cable cars are weather/maintenance dependent (fare refunded if not operating), the Positano boat may be replaced by a coach in extreme sea weather (boat fare refunded), and the Capri Blue Grotto may close due to tide/waves and its fee is not included.
faqs.answer_zh: 免费取消：出发前30天（不含第30天）旅行社与旅行者均可无理由取消。报名后，因游客自身原因无法参加部分项目、自愿放弃费用包含的项目或中途离团，已产生的费用及未入住酒店均无法退款；如减少人数，则按调整后的房型与单价重新核算（不再适用多人间价格）。本产品为散客拼团，成团人数为10人，行程开始前30天（不含第30天）未达成团人数，双方均可解除合同。由于航变频繁、交通拥堵、渡轮取消、罢工游行或行程前后顺序调整较常见，旅行者须在旅游团开始前一天到达集合地、结束后一天离开集散地，并预留合理的航班衔接时间（同一机场转机至少5小时，同城不同机场转机至少7小时，合理集合集散时间段为07:00至21:00）。在不改变路线及景点的前提下，旅行社调整游览日期、时间及先后顺序不视为违约。房型：单人报名默认含单人房差；标准双人间为大床房或双床房（床型由酒店安排不可选）；三人/家庭间床型由酒店安排不可选。所有定价以欧元为计价单位，如选择人民币支付，则以当天支付时本网站依据中国银行实时“欧元卖出价”自动计算的人民币实时价格为准，退款同样适用申请退款当日即时汇率，汇率差异及银行手续费由旅行者承担。此外：刀锋山/休斯缆车受天气与检修影响（停运则退还缆车费用），波西塔诺出海如遇海上极端天气将改为乘车（退还出海游船费用），卡普里蓝洞可能因涨潮风浪关闭且费用不含在团费内。

faqs.question_en: Health & safety requirements
faqs.question_zh: 健康与安全须知
faqs.answer_en: For your safety, please have a health check before travelling and do NOT sign up if you have: infectious diseases (e.g. active tuberculosis, typhoid); cardiovascular disease (severe hypertension, heart failure, myocardial ischaemia/infarction); cerebrovascular disease (stroke, cerebral haemorrhage, brain tumour); respiratory disease (emphysema, cor pulmonale); psychiatric conditions (epilepsy and other mental illness); severe anaemia (haemoglobin below 50 g/L); or recovery from major/medium surgery. Pregnancy: at 35 weeks or more you cannot join under any circumstances; at 28 weeks or more you must provide a doctor's report (within 7 days) and an attending physician's consent; under 28 weeks please consider carefully, sign a liability waiver, and you cannot join adventure/ski/sea/high-altitude/outdoor items. Disabled travellers need a 7-day medical report and physician's consent, an immediate-family companion, and to request reserved space/facilities at least 61 days ahead. Travellers over 70 need a health certificate, medical report and immediate-family companion (otherwise a liability waiver); this is a long, physically demanding tour requiring a good walking ability. Minors (under 18) must be accompanied by an immediate relative or guardian; an under-18 travelling without both parents needs parental authorisation; infants under 2 are not accepted; child seats for infants under 6 or children under 30 kg must be confirmed in advance. Under Article 15 of the Tourism Law, travellers must truthfully declare health information relevant to the trip (pregnancy, lactation, chronic illness, infectious-disease history, suspected symptoms, recent travel to epidemic areas, etc.) and follow safety warnings; concealment that causes harm or transmission risk may lead to civil/administrative liability borne by the traveller.
faqs.answer_zh: 为确保顺利出行、防止旅途中发生人身意外，请在出行前做必要的身体检查，如存在以下情况请勿报名：传染性疾病患者（如活动期肺结核、伤寒）；心血管疾病患者（如严重高血压、心功能不全、心肌缺氧、心肌梗塞）；脑血管疾病患者（如脑栓塞、脑出血、脑肿瘤）；呼吸系统疾病患者（如肺气肿、肺心病）；精神病患者（如癫痫及各种精神病）；严重贫血患者（血红蛋白水平低于50克/升）；大中型手术恢复期患者。孕妇：妊娠35周及以上任何情况下都无法参团；28周及以上需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书；28周以下请慎重报名，需签署旅行社免责声明书，且无法参加探险、滑雪、出海、高空、户外等项目。残疾人需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书、需直系家属陪同，并至少提前61天申请预留位置及专用配套设施。70周岁以上老年人需提供健康证明、体检报告并由直系家属陪同（否则需签署免责声明书）；本次行程较长、对步行能力与体力要求较高，体力不支者请慎重报名。未成年人（未满18岁）须由直系亲属或监护人陪同；无父母陪同的未成年人须持父母授权书；不接受2周岁以下婴儿参团；6岁以下婴儿或30公斤以下儿童的安全座椅需提前与我社确认。根据《旅游法》第15条，旅游者须如实告知与旅游活动相关的个人健康信息（含妊娠期、哺乳期、慢性病、传染病史、疑似症状或近期疫区旅居史等）并遵守安全警示规定，若因隐瞒导致人身损害或传播风险，须自行承担相应责任。

title_en: Italy in Depth: 12-Day Grand Loop from Milan (Dolomites, Apulia & Amalfi)
title_zh: 意大利深度12日精品小团（米兰往返·多洛米蒂+普利亚+阿马尔菲）
short_en: A 12-day loop from Milan across three seas and the Dolomites — Venice, Apulia, the Amalfi Coast, Capri, Rome, Tuscany and Cinque Terre, all-inclusive.
short_zh: 从米兰出发的12日环意精品小团，跨越三海一山，畅游威尼斯、普利亚、阿马尔菲海岸、卡普里岛、罗马、托斯卡纳与五渔村，一价全含。
desc_en: This 12-day small-group journey makes a complete loop from Milan, tracing three seas and the Dolomites — the Adriatic, the Tyrrhenian, the Ligurian and the alpine peaks. From fashionable Milan and Lake Garda you climb into the Dolomites at Trento, glide through romantic Venice, then head south along the Adriatic to Apulia's trulli villages and the ancient cave city of Matera. The route continues to the Amalfi Coast, Positano, Capri's Blue Grotto, Pompeii and eternal Rome, before finishing through the Tuscan hills of Val d'Orcia, Siena, Renaissance Florence and the cliff-side fishing villages of Cinque Terre. With city-centre 4-star and seafront hotels, a Chinese-speaking guide-driver and all listed attractions included, it is a relaxed yet deep exploration of Italy from north to south.
desc_zh: 这是一条从米兰出发、完整环游意大利的12日精品小团线路，跨越亚得里亚海、第勒尼安海、利古里亚海与多洛米蒂山，尽览意大利三海一山的风光。从时尚之都米兰与加尔达湖启程，在特伦托登临多洛米蒂群峰，畅游浪漫水城威尼斯，再沿亚得里亚海一路南下，探访普利亚的蘑菇屋小镇与千年石头古城马泰拉。行程随后抵达阿马尔菲海岸、波西塔诺、卡普里岛蓝洞、庞贝古城与永恒之城罗马，最后穿越托斯卡纳奥尔恰谷、锡耶纳、文艺复兴名城佛罗伦萨，并以悬崖上的五渔村收尾。全程入住市中心四星及海景酒店，中文司机兼导游随行，景点门票一价全含，让您从北到南轻松深度领略意大利之美。

highlights.en: Grand loop touching three seas and the Dolomites — Adriatic, Tyrrhenian, Ligurian and the alpine peaks
highlights.zh: 环游三海一山：亚得里亚海、第勒尼安海、利古里亚海与多洛米蒂山

highlights.en: Dolomites scenery from Trento: cable car up Seceda / Alpe di Siusi and the lone church of Val di Funes
highlights.zh: 特伦托深入多洛米蒂：缆车登刀锋山/休斯高原，打卡富内斯山谷孤独教堂

highlights.en: Apulia's fairytale white-stone Alberobello trulli and the cave dwellings of Matera, both UNESCO sites
highlights.zh: 普利亚童话白石小镇阿尔贝罗贝洛蘑菇屋与世界遗产马泰拉石头古城

highlights.en: Amalfi Coast by boat to Positano, plus Capri island and the legendary Blue Grotto
highlights.zh: 乘船游阿马尔菲海岸与波西塔诺，登卡普里岛探秘传奇蓝洞

highlights.en: Pompeii's buried Roman city and the great monuments of eternal Rome — Colosseum and Pantheon included
highlights.zh: 探访沉睡千年的庞贝古城，畅游永恒之城罗马，含斗兽场与万神殿门票

highlights.en: Tuscany's Val d'Orcia hills, Siena and Renaissance Florence, with a 5-star Tuscan estate-spa hotel
highlights.zh: 托斯卡纳奥尔恰谷、锡耶纳与文艺复兴佛罗伦萨，入住托斯卡纳五星庄园SPA酒店

highlights.en: Scenic train along the Ligurian coast to the cliff-top fishing villages of Cinque Terre
highlights.zh: 搭乘景观列车沿利古里亚海岸畅游悬崖渔村五渔村

highlights.en: Relaxed small group with city-centre 4-star & seafront hotels, Chinese-speaking guide-driver and all-inclusive pricing — no forced shopping
highlights.zh: 享乐小团，市中心四星及海景酒店，中文司机兼导游，一价全含，无强制购物

includes.en: Hotels: 1 night in a 5-star hotel, 2 nights in a Sorrento sea-view hotel, and 8 nights in comfortable 4-star hotels.
includes.zh: 【酒店】：五星酒店1晚，索伦托景观酒店2晚，舒适型四星级酒店8晚。

includes.en: Meals: 11 breakfasts (in-hotel breakfast or other form of breakfast).
includes.zh: 【餐饮】：酒店内早餐或其他形式的早餐11餐。

includes.en: Taxes & fees: all taxes within the itinerary, including the tourist city tax, city-entry fee, residence tax, road/bridge tolls and island-landing fees.
includes.zh: 【税费】：游客城市税、进城费、居住税、路桥费、登岛费等行程内的所有税费。

includes.en: Transport: tour bus or business travel vehicle.
includes.zh: 【交通】：旅游巴士或者商务旅行车。

includes.en: Guide: professional driver + Chinese-speaking guide, or a Chinese-speaking driver-guide throughout (note: for 8 people or fewer, a business travel vehicle + Chinese-speaking driver-guide is arranged, who will lead the full city itinerary).
includes.zh: 【导游】：职业司机+中文导游或者全程中文司机兼导游（备注：8人及以下则安排为商务旅行车+中文司机兼导游，届时将由司兼导带领游览全部城市行程）。

includes.en: Luggage: one 23 kg checked bag plus one carry-on bag.
includes.zh: 【行李】：1件23公斤行李及1件随身行李。

includes.en: Activities & tickets: Rome Colosseum, Pantheon, Pompeii, Milan Cathedral, Venice island ferry, the Salerno–Positano round-trip cruise, the Sorrento–Capri round-trip ferry, the Cinque Terre scenic train, and the Seceda cable car.
includes.zh: 【活动及门票】：罗马斗兽场、万神殿、庞贝古城、米兰大教堂、威尼斯登岛轮渡、萨勒诺往返波西塔诺出海轮渡、索伦托-卡普里岛往返渡船、五渔村景观列车、刀锋山缆车。

excludes.en: Passport: personal passport fees.
excludes.zh: 护照：个人护照费用。

excludes.en: Visa: the tourist visa fees required for the countries on the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 签证：行程中所列旅游国家所需的观光签证费用。

excludes.en: Insurance: travel insurance (if the itinerary involves high-risk sports, please verify whether your travel insurance covers them).
excludes.zh: 保险：旅游保险费用（如行程内涉及到高风险运动，请核实旅游保险是否包含该项运动）。

excludes.en: Tips: guide and driver tips of 10 euros per person per day in total, the same rate for adults and children.
excludes.zh: 小费：游客支付导游和司机小费一共10欧/人/天，大小同价。

excludes.en: Meals: apart from the special meals included in the itinerary, lunches and dinners are not included.
excludes.zh: 餐饮：除行程内包含的特色餐外，行程中不包含午、晚正餐费用。

excludes.en: Admissions: sights not marked as fee-included in the itinerary (including but not limited to sights marked "exterior", "recommended", "optional", "experience", etc. and any item not stated as included) — if you wish to visit, please pay on your own.
excludes.zh: 门票：行程中未注明费用包含的景点（包括但不仅限于行程中注明“外观”的景点，“推荐”、“可选”、“体验”等等所有未提及费用包含的项目，如游客需要参观，敬请自理）。

excludes.en: Extended stays: any extra accommodation, transport or sightseeing beyond the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 延长住宿：行程外额外延长的住宿、交通、观光费用。

excludes.en: Personal spending: such as drinks and alcohol, taxis, phone charges and other personal expenses.
excludes.zh: 私人消费：如饮料酒类、出租车、电话费等个人消费。

excludes.en: Other transport: transport not mentioned in the inclusions beyond the business vehicle or minibus, e.g. the Venice gondola and, within vehicle-restricted zones, sightseeing trains and electric taxis — please cover these yourself.
excludes.zh: 其他交通：除包含商务旅行车或者中巴之外，费用包含中未提及的其他交通费用，如威尼斯贡多拉，以及车辆限行区的观光火车、电瓶出租车等费用敬请自理。

excludes.en: Free activities: nighttime self-guided sightseeing and recommended projects in the itinerary, and any transport, meals, admissions or shopping they incur.
excludes.zh: 自由活动：游客夜间自行游览及行程中的推荐项目，以及产生的交通、餐饮、门票、购物等费用。

excludes.en: Experience activities: any travel experience activities not included in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 体验活动：行程中的没有包含的各项旅游体验活动。

excludes.en: Other costs: any fees not mentioned in the inclusions. In cases of force majeure (natural disaster, war, strikes, etc.) or special situations such as traffic delays, flight cancellations or time changes, visa delays at consulates, or insufficient group numbers — or other extra costs not caused by our company (e.g. overseas visa-extension fees, accommodation, food and transport, national airfare adjustments) — our company reserves the right to charge the additional difference.
excludes.zh: 其他费用：费用包含中未提及的费用。如因天灾、战争、罢工等不可抗力的原因，及因交通延阻、航班取消或更改时间、使馆延误出签证、人数不足等特殊情况或其他非我公司原因所引致的额外费（如在外延期签证费、住、食及交通费、国家航空运价调整等），我公司有权追加差价。
