timeline.title_en: Milan – Lake Garda – Trento
timeline.title_zh: 米兰 – 加尔达湖 – 特伦托
timeline.description_en: In the morning, head to the fashion capital of Milan to see Sforza Castle (exterior), then tour the Milan Cathedral (Duomo), a magnificent Gothic structure begun in 1386 that took 500 years to complete, with hundreds of spires and thousands of marble statues. Stroll through the Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II, the 19th-century cross-shaped glass-vaulted arcade that is one of the world's oldest shopping centers. In the afternoon continue to Lake Garda to enjoy the lake-and-mountain scenery at the foot of the Alps, then drive to Trento for the overnight stay. Overnight at NH Trento Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel, set in Trento's modern Le Albere science and culture district and designed by architect Renzo Piano.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往时尚之都米兰，参观斯福尔扎城堡（外观），随后游览米兰大教堂——这座始建于1386年、历经500年才完工的宏伟哥特式建筑，数百座尖塔耸入云霄，白色大理石外墙上雕刻着数千座雕像；并漫步埃马努埃莱二世长廊，这条19世纪修建的十字形玻璃拱顶长廊是世界上最古老的购物中心之一。下午前往加尔达湖，欣赏阿尔卑斯山脚下的湖光山色，之后前往特伦托入住酒店。夜宿NH特伦托酒店或同等4星级酒店，酒店坐落在特伦托现代感十足的阿尔达通科学文化区（Le Albere），由意大利建筑大师Renzo Piano设计。

timeline.title_en: Trento – Bolzano – Ortisei – Funes Valley – Trento
timeline.title_zh: 特伦托 – 博尔扎诺 – 奥蒂塞伊 – 富内斯山谷 – 特伦托
timeline.description_en: In the morning stroll the old-town lanes of Bolzano, capital of South Tyrol, where Italian and Austrian cultures blend among cobbled streets and Gothic and Renaissance buildings around Walther Square. Then continue to the town of Ortisei, where you can ride the cable car up to Seceda (cable car included) to overlook the jagged Dolomite peaks and high alpine meadows, or instead visit the Alpe di Siusi (Seiser Alm) high-plateau meadows for rolling grassland views. Because of time, only one of the two can be visited that day, and the Siusi cable car is an optional extra at your own cost. Afterwards drive to the Funes Valley for a photo stop at the Church of St. John in Ranui / Santa Maddalena village (the "lonely church", exterior) set against the Geisler peaks, then return to the hotel. Overnight at NH Trento Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往博尔扎诺老城漫步于老城街巷——博尔扎诺是意大利南蒂罗尔省的首府，融合意大利与奥地利文化，可在瓦尔特广场周围欣赏哥特式与文艺复兴风格建筑。随后前往奥蒂塞伊小镇，可乘缆车登顶刀锋山（缆车包含）俯瞰多洛米蒂峰群锯齿状山脊与高山草甸，或前往休斯山高原草甸（Alpe di Siusi）欣赏起伏的高山草原风光；因时间原因当天二者只能选其一，且休斯高原缆车属于可选体验项目，需另行购票、费用不含。之后前往富内斯山谷，外观打卡圣马达莱娜村的圣约翰教堂（孤独教堂，外观），背靠盖斯勒峰，游览结束后返回酒店。夜宿NH特伦托酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Trento – Venice – Rimini
timeline.title_zh: 特伦托 – 威尼斯 – 里米尼
timeline.description_en: In the morning travel to the water city of Venice. On arrival visit St. Mark's Basilica (exterior), the Byzantine church famous for its five onion domes and golden mosaics, along with St. Mark's Square — the rectangular heart of the city ringed by Renaissance buildings — the Bridge of Sighs (exterior), once the route by which condemned prisoners were led to the dungeons, and the ornate Doge's Palace (exterior), the pink-marble Gothic seat of the former Venetian Republic. Afterwards continue to Rimini to check in, with a free evening to explore the city, soak up the lively local nightlife and sample local cuisine. Overnight at Hotel Fellini Parco or an equivalent 4-star hotel, in the heart of Rimini beside Parco Federico Fellini and just steps from the Adriatic beach.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往水城威尼斯，到达后参观圣马可大教堂（外观）——这座拜占庭风格教堂以五座洋葱形圆顶和金色马赛克装饰闻名；游览圣马可广场，这片由文艺复兴建筑环绕的长方形广场是威尼斯的政治、宗教与节庆中心；参观叹息桥（外观），古代由法院向监狱押送死囚的必经之路；以及华丽的总督宫（外观），昔日威尼斯共和国总督官邸，粉色大理石打造的哥特式建筑。之后前往里米尼入住酒店，晚上自由游览里米尼市区，融入当地热闹的夜生活，品尝当地美食。夜宿费里尼帕尔科酒店或同等4星级酒店，酒店坐落于里米尼心脏地带，毗邻费德里科·费里尼公园，距亚得里亚海海滩仅数步之遥。

timeline.title_en: Rimini – Pescara – Bari
timeline.title_zh: 里米尼 – 佩斯卡拉 – 巴里
timeline.description_en: In the morning head south along the coast from Rimini, passing through Pescara in the Abruzzo region — a sun-and-sea Mediterranean town famed for its seafood restaurants serving the day's catch, clam pasta and grilled sea bass paired with local Montepulciano wine. In the afternoon arrive in Bari, capital of Puglia, to check in, then freely visit the Basilica of San Nicola (exterior) — the 11th-century Romanesque church and shared pilgrimage site of Catholics and Orthodox Christians, built to honor St. Nicholas (the original Santa Claus) — or stroll the stone-paved lanes and shopping street of Bari Vecchia (the old town) to feel the relaxed pace of southern Italy. Overnight at Mercure Bari or an equivalent 4-star hotel, set in an old park near "old Bari", the Petruzzelli Theatre and the seafront promenade.
timeline.description_zh: 早晨从里米尼沿海南下，途经阿布鲁佐大区的佩斯卡拉——一座充满地中海风情的海滨小城，海鲜餐厅绝不能错过，可品尝当天捕捞的鲜鱼、淋上橄榄油柠檬汁的蛤蜊意面或炭烤海鲈鱼，搭配本地特产的蒙特普尔恰诺葡萄酒。午后前往普利亚大区首府巴里入住，自由参观圣尼古拉大教堂（外观）——这座11世纪罗马式教堂是天主教与东正教共同朝圣之地，为纪念圣尼古拉斯（圣诞老人的原型）而建；或漫步老城区（Bari Vecchia）狭窄曲折的石板街巷与购物步行街，感受南意的松弛感。夜宿巴里美居酒店或同等4星级酒店，酒店坐落在古老的公园中，毗邻“老巴里”、Petruzzelli剧院与滨海长廊。

timeline.title_en: Bari – Polignano a Mare – Alberobello – Matera
timeline.title_zh: 巴里 – 滨海波利尼亚诺 – 阿尔贝罗贝洛 – 马泰拉
timeline.description_en: Depart Bari in the morning for the clifftop town of Polignano a Mare, the "Mediterranean balcony of Puglia", where white houses cling to the rock above the blue Adriatic and the famous Lama Monachile cove cuts a deep gorge spanned by a stone bridge. Then continue to the fairytale white-stone town of Alberobello, a UNESCO World Heritage Site since 1996, renowned for its trulli — white-walled, conical grey-roofed dry-stone dwellings dating back to the 14th century. In the afternoon arrive at the ancient stone city of Matera and explore its Sassi old town (Sasso Caveoso and Sasso Barisano), among the oldest continuously inhabited settlements on Earth, carved directly from natural rock. Overnight at UNA Hotel Matera or an equivalent 4-star hotel, set in a 5-hectare park on the Lucanian hills with indoor/outdoor pools, a spa area and five restaurants.
timeline.description_zh: 上午从巴里出发，前往悬崖小镇滨海波利尼亚诺——被誉为“普利亚的地中海阳台”，白色房屋依岩壁而建，俯瞰湛蓝的亚得里亚海，最著名的景观是波利尼亚诺阿马雷海湾（Lama Monachile），一道深切的岩峡口连接着石拱桥与天然岩洞。随后前往童话白石小镇阿尔贝罗贝洛，以独特的特鲁利（Trulli）建筑闻名于世——白墙、灰色圆锥形屋顶的干式石砌石屋最早可追溯至14世纪，1996年被联合国教科文组织列为世界文化遗产。下午抵达石头古城马泰拉，探索其“Sassi”老城区（分为Sasso Caveoso与Sasso Barisano），由天然岩石雕凿而成，是地球上最古老的居住地之一。夜宿马泰拉UNA酒店或同级4星级酒店，酒店坐落于卢卡尼亚山丘上占地5公顷的公园内，设有室内外泳池、SPA区域及5间餐厅。

timeline.title_en: Matera – Salerno – Positano – Sorrento
timeline.title_zh: 马泰拉 – 萨勒诺 – 波西塔诺 – 索伦托
timeline.description_en: In the morning travel to Salerno and board a boat to explore Positano, the colorful clifftop town of the Amalfi Coast, with layered pink, yellow and blue houses tumbling down to a golden beach. The cruise passes Amalfi, southern Italy's most charming coastal gem (viewed from the boat). Wander the blue sea, white sand and romantic lanes, then take the boat back to Salerno and continue to Sorrento to check in. Note: in the event of extreme sea conditions the boat company may cancel the Positano cruise for safety; in that case the day is arranged as a coach visit to the old towns of Salerno or Sorrento, Positano and Amalfi cannot be visited, and the cruise fee is refunded. Overnight at a Sorrento Coast hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel, surrounded on three sides by sea views over the Bay of Naples, with a private beach and pier.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往萨勒诺，乘船游览波西塔诺，探索阿马尔菲海岸悬崖上的彩色小镇——粉橙、明黄、湛蓝的层叠房屋沿山而建直至金色沙滩，途经意大利南部最迷人的海岸明珠阿马尔菲（船观）。漫步蓝海、白沙与浪漫街巷，随后乘船返回萨勒诺，前往索伦托入住酒店。备注：如遇海上极端天气情况，出于游客安全考虑，游船公司取消出海游览波西塔诺活动，我社将安排当天乘车参观萨勒诺或索伦托老城，无法参观波西塔诺与阿马尔菲，出海游船费用将退还给游客。夜宿索伦托海岸酒店或同等4星级酒店，酒店三面环绕索伦托那不勒斯海湾景观，拥有私人沙滩和私家码头。

timeline.title_en: Sorrento – Capri – Sorrento
timeline.title_zh: 索伦托 – 卡普里岛 – 索伦托
timeline.description_en: In the morning stroll Sorrento, the little town built on the seaside cliffs, then take the ferry from Sorrento to the island of Capri. On the island you are free: walk along the shore and visit the Blue Grotto (at your own expense), take a boat around the island to discover the grotto, or head into Capri town to see the Gardens of Augustus (exterior) overlooking the whole bay. Note: activity on Capri is free with no transport included — the recommended route from the marina to Capri old town to the Gardens of Augustus is about 1.3 km of mountain road past three key sights, with funicular and taxis available at extra cost. The Blue Grotto is a natural wonder that cannot be entered during high tide, swells or when local authorities close it; entry is not included, and beyond the boatman's fee a 2–5 euro tip is customary. Afterwards take the ferry back to Sorrento and drive to the hotel. Overnight at a Sorrento Coast hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往索伦托，漫步筑于海滨峭壁上的小城；之后在索伦托坐渡船前往卡普里岛。当天可自行前往海边漫步后游览藍洞（自费），或自行乘船环岛探秘蓝洞，或自行前往卡普里城中游览奥古斯都花园（外观），俯瞰整个海湾；之后坐渡船抵达索伦托码头，乘车返回酒店。重要提示：卡普里岛登岛后为自由活动，不含任何交通费用，推荐路线为大港-卡普里古城-奥古斯都花园单程约1.3公里的山路，途经三个重要景点，沿途有缆车和出租车需额外付费。卡普里的蓝洞属于自然景观，如遇涨潮、风浪或当地海洋气象机构宣布关闭则无法入内游览；蓝洞游览费用不包含在旅游团内，除蓝洞人力船工费用外，请按当地习俗支付2-5欧元小费。夜宿索伦托海岸酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Sorrento – Pompeii – Naples – Rome
timeline.title_zh: 索伦托 – 庞贝 – 那不勒斯 – 罗马
timeline.description_en: After breakfast head to Pompeii to explore the ruins of the ancient city — once the second-largest city of Rome, buried by the eruption of Mount Vesuvius and rediscovered after more than a thousand years — including the Temple of Apollo and the Forum (central square) with its 48 well-preserved Corinthian columns and plaster casts of the victims. Then visit Naples, touring the old town, the Royal Palace of Naples (exterior) and the Castel Nuovo / New Castle (exterior). In the afternoon continue to Rome to check in. Overnight at Sheraton Roma Hotel (Parco de' Medici) or Hotel Mantegna or an equivalent 4-star hotel, surrounded by landscaped gardens, a golf course and an outdoor pool.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往庞贝，探索庞贝古城遗址，了解曾经的庞贝文明——这座背山面海的城镇因维苏威火山爆发而被火山灰掩埋、历经千年才重见天日，可参观阿波罗神庙与中心广场（公共广场），广场对面的阿波罗神殿保存着48根完好的科林斯式圆柱，以及遇难者的石膏铸像。之后前往那不勒斯游览那不勒斯老城、那不勒斯皇宫（外观）与新堡（安茹城堡，外观）。下午前往罗马入住酒店。夜宿罗马梅第奇喜来登酒店或曼特尼亚酒店或同等4星级酒店，酒店周围环绕着园景花园、高尔夫球场和室外游泳池。

timeline.title_en: Rome (the Eternal City)
timeline.title_zh: 罗马（永恒之城）
timeline.description_en: Begin the day touring Rome, the birthplace of the Roman Empire and the "Eternal City". Visit the Colosseum, the grand amphitheater built to entertain the empire and one of Rome's most famous monuments, and the Pantheon, the best-preserved ancient Roman building, over 2,000 years old, where artists such as Raphael are buried (note: as a place of worship, modest dress covering shoulders and knees is required and no food or drink is allowed inside). Then visit the Spanish Steps, made famous by the film "Roman Holiday", and the Trevi Fountain (exterior), the "wishing fountain" themed on the sea-god Neptune. The rest of the day is free to explore central Rome. Note: the main sights of old Rome lie within the vehicle-restricted zone (ZTL), so the day is on foot with a round trip of about 5 km — please wear comfortable shoes. Overnight at Sheraton Roma Hotel (Parco de' Medici) or Hotel Mantegna or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午开始游览世界著名的历史文化名城罗马，这里是古罗马帝国的发祥地，因历史悠久被称为“永恒之城”。参观矗立于古罗马遗址上的斗兽场——古罗马最著名的历史遗迹之一，以庞大、雄伟、壮观著称；以及万神殿——古罗马保存最完好的建筑，距今已有2000多年历史，拉斐尔等名人长眠于此（提示：万神殿属于宗教场所，入内须着装不露肩露背、需盖过膝盖，不可携带饮食）。之后游览西班牙广场，因电影《罗马假日》而广为人知，以及特莱维喷泉（许愿池，外观），以海神尼普顿为题材，气势磅礴。之后自由参观罗马市区。提示：罗马古城区内主要景点均在车辆禁行区（ZTL）内，当天为步行游览，往返约5公里，请穿着轻便舒适。夜宿罗马梅第奇喜来登酒店或曼特尼亚酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Rome – Pienza – Siena
timeline.title_zh: 罗马 – 皮恩扎 – 锡耶纳
timeline.description_en: In the morning depart Rome for the old town of Pienza, with a free photo stop on the way at the famous cypress-lined country lane, a symbol of the Tuscan countryside. In Pienza — birthplace of Pope Pius II and a model "ideal city" rebuilt in 1459 — visit Pius II Square and Pienza Cathedral (exterior), with views from the city walls over the UNESCO World Heritage Val d'Orcia. Then continue to Siena, the medieval city frozen since the 14th century, to see Siena Cathedral (exterior), Piazza del Campo (the shell-shaped Field Square), Siena's town hall / Palazzo Pubblico (exterior) and the Torre del Mangia tower (exterior), Italy's second-tallest tower at 102 m. Overnight at Four Points by Sheraton Siena or an equivalent 4-star hotel, set on a quiet hilltop surrounded by olive trees and gardens, with an outdoor pool, gym and sauna.
timeline.description_zh: 上午从罗马出发前往皮恩扎古城游览，途中在丝柏树小径自由拍照——这条两旁种满意大利柏树的乡村道路是托斯卡纳田园风光的象征之一。皮恩扎是教皇皮乌斯二世的出生地，他于1459年主持重建并被视为“理想城市”的典范，可游览二世广场、皮恩扎大教堂（外观），并从城墙上俯瞰世界遗产奥尔恰山谷（Val d'Orcia）的景致。之后出发前往锡耶纳，这座自14世纪起仿佛时间停滞的中世纪古城，游览锡耶纳大教堂（外观）、田野广场（因形似贝壳又称贝壳广场）、锡耶纳市政厅（外观）与曼吉亚塔楼（外观，垂直高度达102米，是意大利第二高的塔楼）等景点。夜宿锡耶纳福朋喜来登酒店或同等4星级酒店，酒店位于安静的山顶，周围环绕着橄榄树和花园，配有室外泳池、健身中心与桑拿浴室。

timeline.title_en: Siena – Florence – Tuscany
timeline.title_zh: 锡耶纳 – 佛罗伦萨 – 托斯卡纳
timeline.description_en: In the morning head to Florence, birthplace of the Renaissance. Visit the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore (the third-largest church in the world), whose iconic red dome and white-green-pink marble facade dominate the skyline; Piazza della Signoria, an open-air sculpture gallery with the Neptune Fountain and a replica of Michelangelo's David before the town hall; the Ponte Vecchio (Old Bridge) over the Arno, built in 1345; and Piazza Santa Croce with the Basilica of Santa Croce (exterior), the Gothic resting place of Michelangelo and Galileo. Afterwards continue to a 5-star hotel in the Tuscany region to check in. Overnight at the Tuscany Montecatini Manor Spa Hotel or an equivalent 5-star hotel, in the renowned wellness resort of Montecatini, with two pools (indoor and outdoor), a forest-view sauna and a 40,000-square-meter private park.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往文艺复兴发源地佛罗伦萨，参观世界第三大教堂——圣母百花大教堂，其标志性红色穹顶与白、绿、粉三色大理石外立面主宰着城市天际线；领主广场，如一座露天的雕塑美术馆，广场中央有海神喷泉，市政厅门前立有米开朗基罗《大卫》复制品；维奇奥桥（老桥），建于1345年、横跨阿诺河，是欧洲较早的大跨度圆弧拱桥；以及圣十字广场和圣十字教堂（外观），这座哥特式建筑是米开朗基罗和伽利略的安息地。之后前往托斯卡纳地区五星酒店入住。夜宿托斯卡纳蒙特卡蒂尼庄园SPA酒店或同等5星级酒店，酒店位于著名康养度假地蒙特卡蒂尼，设有室内外2个泳池、享有森林景观的桑拿浴室，以及占地40,000平方米的私人公园。

timeline.title_en: Tuscany – Pisa – Cinque Terre – Milan
timeline.title_zh: 托斯卡纳 – 比萨 – 五渔村 – 米兰
timeline.description_en: In the morning head to Pisa to see the Leaning Tower of Pisa (exterior) and the Piazza dei Miracoli (Square of Miracles) at the heart of Pisa's historic center, a UNESCO World Heritage Site whose four great buildings are the cathedral, the leaning bell tower, the baptistery and the cemetery. Then visit the Cinque Terre, the five clifftop fishing villages — Monterosso al Mare, Vernazza, Corniglia, Manarola and Riomaggiore — strung along the Ligurian coast and listed as a UNESCO World Heritage Site in 1997, exploring the beautiful villages along the coastline. Afterwards drive to Milan, where the wonderful itinerary concludes. Note: if bad weather or a railway strike makes the Cinque Terre inaccessible, the itinerary automatically changes to touring the coastal towns by coach or other means. No accommodation on this day.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往比萨，游览比萨斜塔（外观）和比萨历史文化中心的奇迹广场（Piazza dei Miracoli）——这片被城墙包围的区域是世界遗产，广场上有四大建筑：比萨主教座堂、比萨斜塔（钟楼）、圣乔瓦尼洗礼堂与比萨墓园。随后前往五渔村，沿利古里亚海岸线游览悬崖上的美丽渔村——蒙特罗索、韦尔纳扎、科尔尼利亚、马纳罗拉及里奥马焦雷这五个村镇的统称，1997年被联合国教科文组织列入世界文化遗产名录。之后前往米兰，结束美好行程。备注：如遇恶劣天气或铁路公司罢工等因素导致无法游览五渔村，行程将自动更改为乘坐大巴车或其它形式游览海岸线城市。当天无住宿。

meeting_en: Milan, Italy — tour departs from and returns to Milan; pick-up details confirmed before departure.
meeting_zh: 意大利米兰——行程从米兰出发并返回米兰，集合接送细节于出发前确认。

faqs.question_en: Where and when do we meet and disperse?
faqs.question_zh: 集合及集散地点和方法？
faqs.answer_en: Meeting: 9:00 a.m. on Day 1 at the tourist-coach parking station of Sforza Castle in Milan (Castello Sforzesco, Parcheggio bus turistici, Lanza, 20121 Milano MI, Italie). Dispersal: the itinerary ends in Milan around 19:30 on the last day. These times and places are for reference; the actual departure time follows the tour-departure notice — do not book connecting hotels before you receive it. This product does not recommend a flight that leaves Milan on the final day. On the meeting day you may join the group in Milan by 13:00 at the latest, but you will then miss the Milan city sights with no refund available.
faqs.answer_zh: 集合：行程第1天早上9:00在米兰斯福尔扎城堡旅游大巴停车站集合（Castello-Sforzesco Parcheggio bus turistici Lanza 20121 Milano MI, Italie）。集散：行程最后一天，19:30左右在米兰结束行程。以上为参考时间及地点，实际出发时间以出团通知书为准，未获取出团通知书请勿预订衔接酒店。本产品不推荐结束当天离开米兰的航班！参团当天最晚13:00前可在米兰上团，但米兰市区景点将无法游览，并无费用可退。

faqs.question_en: How does the Rome-departure (Route A) differ from the Milan-departure route?
faqs.question_zh: 罗马出发的A路线和米兰出发的路线有什么不同？
faqs.answer_en: The loop routes cover exactly the same projects with identical included items, only the order of visiting differs. The difference is in accommodation: the Milan-departure tour includes two nights of hotel in Rome, while the Rome-departure tour includes one night in Rome and one night in Milan.
faqs.answer_zh: 环线路线项目完全相同，包含项目也完全相同，只是游览顺序不同。但米兰出发的旅游团包含两晚罗马的酒店住宿，罗马出发的旅游团包含1晚罗马和1晚米兰的酒店住宿。

faqs.question_en: Any recommended hotel before or after the tour?
faqs.question_zh: 推荐团前和团后入住酒店？
faqs.answer_en: For stays before or after the tour in Milan, we recommend booking the UNA Hotels Scandinavia Milano.
faqs.answer_zh: 米兰团前或团后的旅游团推荐预订UNA Hotels Scandinavia Milano酒店。

faqs.question_en: Can both the Seceda and Alpe di Siusi cable cars be ridden on the same day?
faqs.question_zh: 刀锋山和休斯高原缆车当天是否都可乘坐游览？
faqs.answer_en: The tour includes the round-trip Seceda cable car on that day. If you wish to ride the cable car up to the Alpe di Siusi (Siusi plateau), you must buy the ticket yourself, and because of time only one of the two sights can be visited that day. If the Seceda cable car is closed, it is replaced by the Alpe di Siusi cable car, subject to the official notice.
faqs.answer_zh: 行程当天我社包含刀锋山往返缆车，如您需要乘坐缆车游览休斯高原请自行购票；因为时间原因当天只能参观其中一个景点（如遇刀锋山缆车关闭则更换为休斯高原缆车，具体以官方通知为准）。

faqs.question_en: What happens if extreme weather cancels the Positano cruise?
faqs.question_zh: 如遇极端天气情况，游船出海取消参观波西塔诺怎么办？
faqs.answer_en: In the event of extreme sea conditions, the boat company cancels the Positano cruise for passengers' safety, and we will instead arrange a visit to the old town of Sorrento that day — Positano and Amalfi cannot be visited, and the cruise fee is refunded to guests. Note too that the Sorrento seaside hotel is surrounded on three sides by sea with a private beach and pier, two restaurants of different styles and a renowned marine spa, so even when the island-hopping is cancelled you can still enjoy the Bay of Naples views and cuisine at the hotel.
faqs.answer_zh: 如遇海上极端天气情况，出于游客安全考虑，游船公司取消出海游览波西塔诺活动，我社将安排当天参观索伦托老城，无法参观波西塔诺和阿马尔菲，出海游船费用将退还给游客。另外，索伦托海滨酒店三面环海，拥有私人沙滩和私家码头、两个不同风格的餐厅和一间著名的海洋Spa中心，如当天跳岛活动取消，也可在酒店内享受那不勒斯湾的美景和美食。

faqs.question_en: Do I need a visa?
faqs.question_zh: 是否需要签证？
faqs.answer_en: This product does not include visa fees. It requires a Schengen visa (single or multiple entry); if you need a visa, please choose a Schengen-visa product. After booking we provide, free of charge, all the materials needed to apply for the Schengen visa, and if you commission us to handle your Schengen visa we will also purchase Schengen travel insurance that meets the visa requirements. Your passport must be valid for at least six months from the departure date, or customs may refuse entry. Visa fees, visa service fees, Schengen insurance fees and visa-center appointment fees are all non-refundable and non-transferable, even if the product itinerary is changed or cancelled. Guaranteed-visa assurance: if you sign with us at least 61 days before departure and have not obtained the visa within 45 days before departure, we bear all losses and immediately refund the full tour cost; guests who do not meet this clause and fail to obtain a visa are refunded per the change-and-cancellation terms. If you are refused, you must notify us within 48 hours and provide the consulate's refusal letter; any supplementary or amended materials must be submitted within five days, and you may not unilaterally waive the right to a "visa appeal".
faqs.answer_zh: 本产品不包含签证费用，需要申根签证（单次或多次入境）；如您需要办理签证，请选择申根签证产品。预订后免费提供办理申根签证的全部材料；如委托我社办理申根签证，我社将为您购买符合申根签证要求的申根旅游保险。护照有效期需在离境之日起至少还有六个月，否则海关有权拒绝入境。签证费、签证服务费、申根保险费、签证中心预约费均不可退款，也无法更改使用者，即使产品退改签，签证费用亦无法退款。保签无忧：游客在出发日前61天与我社签约的旅游产品，如在出发前45天内未获取签证，我社承担所有损失，立即退还游客全部旅游费用；不符合该条款的游客如未正常获取签证，将按照“退改与取消条款”进行退费。如遇拒签需在48小时内通知我社并出具使领馆拒签函，如需补充或更改材料需在五天内提交，且不得单方面放弃“签证抗辩”权利。

faqs.question_en: Booking, changes & cancellation
faqs.question_zh: 预订、变更与取消须知
faqs.answer_en: Free no-reason cancellation: both the agency and the traveler may apply for no-reason cancellation more than 30 days before departure (not including the 30th day); the group is announced as confirmed once the minimum size of 10 people is reached, and after that, cancellation follows the change-and-cancellation terms. Because flights, traffic, ferries and strikes often cause the itinerary's timing and order to shift, travelers are required to arrive at the meeting point one day before the tour starts and leave one day after it ends, allowing reasonable connection time (at least 5 hours for transfers within the same airport, 7 hours between different airports in the same city); the reasonable meeting/dispersal window is 07:00–21:00. Rooms: single travelers pay a single-supplement deposit by default; a standard double is assigned automatically for two people booking together, with bed type (one large bed or twin beds) decided by the hotel and not selectable; the three-person family room defaults to two parents plus one minor and bed type is not selectable. The named hotels are preferred; if full, an equivalent same-star hotel is substituted without separate notice. All pricing is in euros at the time of booking — if you pay in RMB, the amount is the real-time RMB figure auto-calculated on the day of payment using Bank of China's "euro selling price"; refunds use the exchange rate on the refund-application day, and any rate differences or bank fees are borne by the traveler. Key itinerary contingencies: the Positano cruise may be replaced by a Sorrento/Salerno old-town coach visit (cruise fee refunded) in extreme sea weather; only one of Seceda/Alpe di Siusi can be visited per day; and the Cinque Terre may be replaced by a coach tour of coastal towns in bad weather or a rail strike.
faqs.answer_zh: 免费取消：出发前30天（不含第30天）旅行社和旅行者均有权申请无理由取消；本产品成团人数为10人，达到成团人数立即宣布成团，成团后任何一方解除合同按《更改与取消条例条款》承担违约责任。由于航变、交通拥堵、渡轮取消、罢工游行或行程前后顺序调整，行程时间及游览顺序常有变动，本产品要求旅游者在旅游团开始前一天到达集合地、结束后一天离开集散地，并预留合理衔接时间（同一机场转机至少5小时，相同城市不同机场至少7小时），合理集合集散时段为07:00至21:00。房型：单人报名默认包含单人房差押金；两人同时报名默认入住标准双人间，床型由酒店安排（可能大床房或双床房）不可指定；三人家庭间默认为两位父母与一位未成年儿童，床型不可选。行程内列明的酒店为优先入住酒店，如订满或无法使用则换为相同星级的相近酒店，不再另行通知。所有定价以欧元为计价单位，如选择人民币支付，则以当天支付时本网站依据中国银行实时“欧元卖出价”自动计算的人民币实时价格为准；退款同样适用申请退款当日即时汇率，汇率差异或银行手续费由旅行者承担。关键行程应变：如遇海上极端天气，波西塔诺出海游可改为乘车参观索伦托/萨勒诺老城（游船费退还）；刀锋山与休斯高原当天只能二选一；如遇恶劣天气或铁路罢工，五渔村可改为乘大巴游览海岸线城市。

faqs.question_en: Health & safety requirements
faqs.question_zh: 健康与安全须知
faqs.answer_en: To ensure a safe trip, please have a physical check-up before departure and do NOT sign up if you have any of the following: infectious diseases (e.g. active tuberculosis, typhoid); cardiovascular disease (severe hypertension, heart failure, myocardial ischemia or infarction); cerebrovascular disease (cerebral embolism, hemorrhage, tumor); respiratory disease (emphysema, cor pulmonale); psychiatric conditions (epilepsy and various mental illnesses); severe anemia (hemoglobin below 50 g/L); or recovery from major surgery. Pregnancy: travelers at 35 weeks or beyond cannot join under any circumstances; at 28 weeks or beyond a doctor's exam report (within 7 days) and attending physician's consent are required; under 28 weeks please consider carefully, sign the agency's disclaimer, and note that adventure, skiing, sea, high-altitude and outdoor items cannot be joined. Persons with disabilities need a recent medical report and physician's consent, a direct-family companion, and at least 61 days' advance request for a reserved place and facilities. Elderly travelers over 70 need a health certificate, physical exam and a direct-family companion (or must sign the disclaimer); the tour is long and physically demanding, so those of limited stamina should consider carefully. Minors (under 18) must be accompanied by a direct relative or guardian; some sights have special rules for those under 18, 12 or 6; infants under 2 years old are not accepted; and unaccompanied minors need parental authorization letters. Per Article 15 of the Tourism Law, travelers must truthfully declare health information relevant to the trip (including pregnancy, lactation, chronic illness, infectious-disease history, suspected symptoms or recent travel to epidemic areas) and follow safety warnings; concealing such information that causes harm makes the traveler liable, and concealing an infectious disease may lead to civil and administrative penalties, contract termination without refund, and compensation for other travelers' and the agency's losses.
faqs.answer_zh: 为确保旅游顺利、防止旅途中发生人身意外伤害，请出行前做必要的身体检查，如存在以下情况请勿报名：传染性疾病患者（如活动期肺结核、伤寒）；心血管疾病患者（如严重高血压、心功能不全、心肌缺氧、心肌梗塞）；脑血管疾病患者（如脑栓塞、脑出血、脑肿瘤）；呼吸系统疾病患者（如肺气肿、肺心病）；精神病患者（如癫痫及各种精神病）；严重贫血患者（血红蛋白水平在50克/升以下）；大中型手术恢复期病患者。孕妇：妊娠第35周及以上任何情况下都无法参团；第28周及以上需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书；第28周以下请慎重报名，需签署旅行社免责声明书，且行程内涉及探险、滑雪、出海、高空、户外等项目均无法参加。残疾人需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书、需直系家属陪同，并至少提前61天申请预留位置及专用设施。70周岁以上老年人需提供健康证明、体检报告并由直系家属陪同（否则需签署免责声明书）；本次行程较长，对步行能力与体力要求较高，体力不支者请慎重报名。未成年人（未满18周岁）需由直系亲属或监护人陪同，部分景点对未满18/12/6周岁有特殊限定，本产品不接受2周岁以下婴儿参团，无父母陪同的未成年人须持父母授权书。根据《旅游法》第15条及《传染病防治法》，旅游者需如实告知与旅游活动相关的个人健康信息（含妊娠期、哺乳期、慢性病、传染病史、疑似症状或近期疫区旅居史）并遵守安全警示规定；若隐瞒健康信息导致损害，旅游者需自行承担责任，隐瞒传染病情况可能面临民事赔偿及行政处罚，旅行社可解除合同且不退费，旅游者还需赔偿其他游客及旅行社的损失。

title_en: 9-Day Southern Italy & Sicily: Rome to Palermo Small-Group Tour
title_zh: 意大利南部与西西里9天精品小团（罗马至巴勒莫）
short_en: A 9-day one-way journey from Rome across the Amalfi Coast and Sicily to Palermo, with Pompeii, Capri, Mount Etna and the Valley of the Temples.
short_zh: 9天单程深度游，从罗马出发，途经阿马尔菲海岸与西西里岛直达巴勒莫，遍览庞贝、卡普里、埃特纳火山与神殿之谷。
desc_en: This 9-day one-way tour traces Italy from Rome down through the Sorrento Peninsula and the Amalfi Coast, then crosses by ferry to Sicily and ends in Palermo. Along the way you explore the ruins of ancient Rome, the buried city of Pompeii, the Blue Grotto of Capri, the clifftop village of Positano, the trulli of Alberobello and the cave city of Matera, before discovering Sicily's Mount Etna, Taormina, Syracuse and the Valley of the Temples. With seaside four-star hotels and a deep single-direction route, it minimises driving time and maximises sightseeing across southern Italy's two coasts and two islands.
desc_zh: 这条9天单程线路从罗马出发，一路向南穿越索伦托半岛与阿马尔菲海岸，再乘渡轮跨海登陆西西里岛，终点抵达巴勒莫。沿途探访古罗马遗址、被火山掩埋的庞贝古城、卡普里岛蓝洞、悬崖小镇波西塔诺、阿尔贝罗贝洛的特鲁利石屋以及马泰拉石窟古城，随后深度游览西西里的埃特纳火山、陶尔米纳、锡拉库萨与神殿之谷。全程入住海滨四星酒店，单程深度路线减少行车时间、增加游览时长，横跨意大利南部三海两岛。

highlights.en: Ancient Rome: the Colosseum, Pantheon, Spanish Steps and Trevi Fountain
highlights.zh: 古罗马精华：斗兽场、万神殿、西班牙广场与特莱维喷泉

highlights.en: Pompeii ruins and the Blue Grotto of Capri across the Bay of Naples
highlights.zh: 那不勒斯湾畔的庞贝古城遗址与卡普里岛蓝洞

highlights.en: Amalfi Coast cruise to the clifftop village of Positano
highlights.zh: 阿马尔菲海岸游船，前往悬崖彩色小镇波西塔诺

highlights.en: UNESCO trulli stone houses of Alberobello and the cave city of Matera
highlights.zh: 联合国教科文遗产阿尔贝罗贝洛特鲁利石屋与马泰拉石窟古城

highlights.en: Sicily's Mount Etna, hilltop Taormina and ancient Syracuse
highlights.zh: 西西里埃特纳火山、悬崖小镇陶尔米纳与古城锡拉库萨

highlights.en: Valley of the Temples in Agrigento and historic Palermo
highlights.zh: 阿格里真托神殿之谷与历史名城巴勒莫

highlights.en: Ferry crossing to Sicily included; one-way deep route saves driving time
highlights.zh: 含跨海渡轮登陆西西里，单程深度路线节省行车时间

highlights.en: City-centre and seaside four-star hotels with no forced shopping stops
highlights.zh: 全程入住市中心及海滨四星酒店，绝无强制购物

includes.en: Hotels: 8 nights in comfortable 4-star hotels.
includes.zh: 【酒店】：舒适型四星级酒店8晚。

includes.en: Meals: 8 breakfasts (hotel breakfast or breakfast in another form).
includes.zh: 【餐饮】：酒店内早餐或其他形式的早餐8餐。

includes.en: Taxes and fees: all in-itinerary taxes and charges including city/tourist tax, town-entry fee, residence tax, road and bridge tolls, and island-landing fees.
includes.zh: 【税费】：游客城市税、进城费、居住税、路桥费、登岛费等行程内的所有税费。

includes.en: Transport: tour coach or business/travel van.
includes.zh: 【交通】：旅游巴士或者商务旅行车。

includes.en: Guide: professional driver + Chinese-speaking guide, or a Chinese-speaking driver-guide throughout (note: for groups of 8 or fewer, a business van + Chinese-speaking driver-guide leads the entire city itinerary).
includes.zh: 【导游】：职业司机+中文导游或者全程中文司机兼导游（备注：8人及以下则安排为商务旅行车+中文司机兼导游，届时将有司兼导带领游览全部城市行程）。

includes.en: Baggage: 1 piece of checked luggage up to 23 kg and 1 piece of carry-on luggage.
includes.zh: 【行李】：1件23公斤行李及1件随身行李。

includes.en: Activities and tickets: Colosseum, Pantheon, Pompeii, round-trip ferry to Capri, round-trip boat Salerno-Positano, Maniace Castle, Taormina amphitheatre, Valley of the Temples.
includes.zh: 【活动及门票】：罗马斗兽场、万神殿、庞贝古城、卡普里岛往返渡轮、萨勒诺往返波西塔诺船票、马尼亚切城堡、陶尔米纳圆形剧场、神殿之谷。

excludes.en: Passport: personal passport fees.
excludes.zh: 护照：个人护照费用。

excludes.en: Visa: the tourist visa fees required for the countries on the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 签证：行程中所列旅游国家所需的观光签证费用。

excludes.en: Insurance: travel insurance fees (if the itinerary involves high-risk activities, please confirm whether your travel insurance covers that activity).
excludes.zh: 保险：旅游保险费用（如行程内涉及到高风险运动，请核实旅游保险是否包含该项运动）。

excludes.en: Tips: guide and driver tips totaling 10 EUR per person per day, same rate for adults and children.
excludes.zh: 小费：游客支付导游和司机小费一共10欧/人/天，大小同价。

excludes.en: Meals: apart from the specialty meals included in the itinerary, lunches and dinners are not included.
excludes.zh: 餐饮：除行程内包含的特色餐外，行程中不包含午、晚正餐费用。

excludes.en: Tickets: sights for which fees are not stated as included (including but not limited to "exterior" sights, and all "recommended", "optional" and "experience" items not stated as included); please pay on your own if you wish to visit.
excludes.zh: 门票：行程中未注明费用包含的景点（包括但不仅限于行程中注明“外观”的景点，以及“推荐”“可选”“体验”等所有未提及费用包含的项目，如游客需要参观，敬请自理）。

excludes.en: Extended accommodation: any accommodation, transport or sightseeing extended beyond the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 延长住宿：行程外额外延长的住宿、交通、观光费用。

excludes.en: Personal spending: such as drinks/alcohol, taxis, phone charges and other personal expenses.
excludes.zh: 私人消费：如饮料酒类、出租车、电话费等个人消费。

excludes.en: Other transport: transport beyond the included business van or minibus and not mentioned in the inclusions, e.g. Venice gondolas, and sightseeing trains, electric taxis etc. in vehicle-restricted zones, all at your own expense.
excludes.zh: 其他交通：除包含商务旅行车或者中巴之外，费用包含中未提及的其他交通费用，如威尼斯贡多拉，以及车辆限行区的观光火车、电瓶出租车等费用敬请自理。

excludes.en: Free time: night-time self-touring and recommended items during the itinerary, and the resulting transport, meals, tickets, shopping and other expenses.
excludes.zh: 自由活动：游客夜间自行游览及行程中的推荐项目，以及产生的交通、餐饮、门票、购物等费用。

excludes.en: Experience activities: any tourist experience activities not included in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 体验活动：行程中没有包含的各项旅游体验活动。

excludes.en: Other costs: any fees not mentioned in the inclusions. For extra costs caused by force majeure (natural disaster, war, strikes etc.), transport delays, flight cancellation or rescheduling, embassy visa delays, insufficient numbers or other special circumstances not attributable to us (e.g. overseas visa extension, board, lodging and transport, national airfare adjustments), we reserve the right to charge the difference.
excludes.zh: 其他费用：费用包含中未提及的费用。如因天灾、战争、罢工等不可抗力，及因交通延阻、航班取消或更改时间、使馆延误出签证、人数不足等特殊情况或其他非我公司原因所导致的额外费用（如在外延期签证费、住、食及交通费、国家航空运价调整等），我公司有权追加差价。

timeline.title_en: Rome - Sorrento Peninsula: Reliving the Glory of the Eternal City
timeline.title_zh: 罗马 - 索伦托半岛：重温“万城之城”古罗马帝国的辉煌
timeline.description_en: The morning begins with a tour of Rome, the world-famous historic and cultural city that was the birthplace of the Roman Empire and is known as the Eternal City. You will see the Colosseum (about 1 hour) and the Pantheon (about 30 minutes) standing on the ruins of ancient Rome, then visit the Spanish Steps (about 20 minutes) and the Trevi Fountain (exterior, about 15 minutes). Because vehicles are banned within Rome's protected old city and most areas are pedestrian zones, the day's sightseeing is done on foot, covering roughly 5-6 km. Afterwards you transfer to the Sorrento Peninsula to check in. Overnight at the Sorrento Coast hotel, the Novotel Salerno, or an equivalent 4-star hotel with sea views over the Bay of Sorrento and Naples, a private beach and marina.
timeline.description_zh: 上午开始游览世界著名的历史文化名城罗马，这里是古罗马帝国的发祥地，因历史悠久而被称为“永恒之城”。参观矗立在古罗马遗址上的斗兽场（约1小时）和万神殿（约30分钟），随后游览西班牙广场（约20分钟）和特莱维喷泉（外观，约15分钟）。由于罗马古城建筑保护，禁止车辆行驶，大多数区域为步行街区，当天徒步参观罗马，步行行程约为5-6公里。之后前往索伦托半岛入住酒店。夜宿索伦托海岸酒店或萨勒诺诺富特酒店或同等4星级酒店，酒店拥有壮丽的索伦托那不勒斯海湾景观、私人沙滩与私家码头。

timeline.title_en: Sorrento - Pompeii - Capri - Sorrento Peninsula: Ancient Ruins and the Blue Grotto
timeline.title_zh: 索伦托 - 庞贝 - 卡普里岛 - 索伦托半岛：历史遗迹庞贝、地中海天堂岛卡普里与蓝洞
timeline.description_en: In the morning you head to Pompeii to explore the ancient city ruins (about 2 hours), including the Temple of Apollo and the Forum with its well-preserved Corinthian columns and views toward Mount Vesuvius. You then visit Sorrento, the cliff-top "Lemon Town" overlooking the Bay of Naples (about 1 hour), before taking a ferry to Capri (about 3 hours on the island). On Capri you may walk the seafront to the Blue Grotto, take a boat to view it (self-pay, about 35 minutes), or stroll into Capri town to the Gardens of Augustus (exterior, about 30 minutes) for views over the bay; then ferry back to Sorrento and drive to the hotel. Note: activity on Capri is free time with no transport included (recommended 1.3 km hillside route Marina Grande - Capri old town - Gardens of Augustus); the Blue Grotto is a natural site that may close due to high tide, waves or weather, its fee is not included, and a 2-5 EUR tip to the boatmen is customary. Overnight at the Sorrento Coast hotel, the Novotel Salerno, or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早晨前往庞贝，探索庞贝古城遗址（约2小时），包括阿波罗神庙及保存完好的科林斯式圆柱中心广场，并可眺望维苏威火山。随后游览建于海滨峭壁之上的“柠檬小镇”索伦托（约1小时），之后在索伦托乘渡船前往卡普里岛（岛上约3小时）。在卡普里可自行前往海边漫步后游览蓝洞、自行乘船环岛探秘蓝洞（自费，约35分钟），或自行前往卡普里城中游览奥古斯都花园（外观，约30分钟），俯瞰整个海湾；之后乘渡船返回索伦托码头，乘车返回酒店。备注：卡普里登岛后为自由活动，不含任何交通费用（推荐大港—卡普里古城—奥古斯都花园约1.3公里山路）；蓝洞属于自然景观，如遇涨潮、风浪或天气因素可能关闭无法入内，蓝洞费用不含，并请按当地习俗向船工支付2-5欧元小费。夜宿索伦托海岸酒店或萨勒诺诺富特酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Sorrento Peninsula - Positano - Salerno - Bari: A Mediterranean Canvas and the Scent of Lemons
timeline.title_zh: 索伦托半岛 - 波西塔诺 - 萨勒诺 - 巴里：地中海风情画卷，感受波西塔诺的柠檬香
timeline.description_en: After breakfast you set off on a charming boat day-trip, sailing to Positano (about 2.5 hours), the colorful cliff-side town that is the most enchanting pearl of southern Italy's Amalfi Coast, with terraced houses, blue sea, white sand and romantic lanes. Along the way you take in the Amalfi Coast (about 15 minutes), a UNESCO World Heritage site rated among the 50 most beautiful places in the world. You then sail back to Salerno (about 40 minutes), a city of historic churches, a Norman castle and a picturesque seafront where you can sample local Campania seafood cuisine, before driving to Bari to check in. Note: in extreme sea-weather the boat company may cancel the Positano cruise for safety; in that case the group will visit Salerno by coach, Positano and Amalfi cannot be visited, and the boat fee is refunded. Overnight at the Mercure Bari or an equivalent 4-star hotel, set in an old park near "Old Bari", the Petruzzelli Theatre and the seafront promenade.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后踏上迷人的游船一日游，乘船前往波西塔诺（约2小时30分钟），探索这座建于悬崖之上、色彩斑斓的小镇，是意大利南部阿马尔菲海岸最迷人的海岸明珠，蓝海、白沙与浪漫街巷构成令人难忘的地中海风情画卷。沿途欣赏阿马尔菲海岸（约15分钟），它被誉为一生中最值得去的50个地方之一，并被列入联合国教科文组织世界遗产。随后乘船返回萨勒诺（约40分钟），这座城市拥有古老教堂、诺曼城堡和风景如画的海滨，可品尝以新鲜海鲜为特色的坎帕尼亚当地美食，之后前往巴里入住酒店。备注：如遇海上极端天气，游船公司出于安全考虑取消波西塔诺出海游览，我社将安排当天乘车参观萨勒诺，无法参观波西塔诺和阿马尔菲，出海游船费用将退还游客。夜宿巴里美居酒店或同等4星级酒店，酒店坐落在古老公园中，毗邻“老巴里”、Petruzzelli剧院与滨海长廊。

timeline.title_en: Bari - Polignano a Mare - Alberobello - Matera: White Cliff Towns and the Trulli Mushroom Houses
timeline.title_zh: 巴里 - 滨海波利尼亚诺 - 阿尔贝罗贝洛 - 马泰拉：白色悬崖小镇与世界文化遗产特鲁洛蘑菇屋
timeline.description_en: The morning is spent in Bari (about 2 hours), a city blending faith, history and port culture: you see the Basilica di San Nicola (exterior), an 11th-century Romanesque church revered by both Catholics and Orthodox Christians, and wander the stone lanes of Bari Vecchia (the old town). You then drive to Polignano a Mare (about 1.5 hours), a stunning cliff-built town facing the blue Adriatic, famous for the Lama Monachile cove with its stone arch bridge and sea cave, and known as the "poetic town" for verses written on its walls and steps. In the afternoon you enter the fairy-tale town of Alberobello (about 1.5 hours) to walk among the UNESCO-listed Trulli stone houses, the cone-roofed dry-stone dwellings dating from the 14th century and listed as World Heritage in 1996. Overnight at the UNA Hotel Matera or an equivalent 4-star hotel, set in a 5-hectare park on the Lucanian hills with indoor and outdoor pools and a spa.
timeline.description_zh: 上午在巴里市区游览这座融合信仰、历史与港口文化的城市（约2小时），参观圣尼古拉大教堂（外观），这座11世纪的罗马式教堂是天主教与东正教共同朝圣之地，并漫步于老城区（巴里老城）石板街巷之间。随后驱车前往滨海波利尼亚诺（约1小时30分钟），一座依悬崖而建、面对碧蓝亚得里亚海的绝美小镇，最著名的是拉马莫纳基莱（Lama Monachile）海湾，连接着石拱桥与天然岩洞，小镇墙上、台阶上写满诗句，享有“诗意之镇”之称。下午进入童话世界般的阿尔贝罗贝洛（约1小时30分钟），漫步于联合国教科文组织认证的特鲁利（Trulli）石屋村落之间，这些白墙灰色圆锥顶石屋最早可追溯至14世纪，1996年被列为世界文化遗产。夜宿马泰拉UNA酒店或同级4星级酒店，酒店坐落于卢卡尼亚山丘上占地5公顷的公园内，设有室内外泳池及SPA区域。

timeline.title_en: Matera - Cosenza - Messina - Catania: The Thousand-Year Cave City of Matera at Dusk
timeline.title_zh: 马泰拉 - 科森扎 - 墨西拿 - 卡塔尼亚：遇见花灯初上的马泰拉千年石窟梦境
timeline.description_en: In the morning you tour Matera (about 2 hours), the "City of Stone" famous for its cave dwellings carved into the limestone. You explore the Sassi di Matera old town, threading between stone stairways, cave churches and ancient monasteries across the Sasso Caveoso and Sasso Barisano districts, one of the oldest continuously inhabited places on Earth and a UNESCO World Heritage site since 1993. You then travel to Cosenza in Calabria to visit its old town (about 1 hour), with its Norman-Swabian castle, before boarding the San Giovanni-Messina ferry across to Sicily, enjoying Mediterranean views en route, and visiting the old town of Messina (about 30 minutes) with its cathedral astronomical clock and Orion Fountain. Afterwards you drive to Catania to check in. Overnight at the Four Points by Sheraton Catania or an equivalent 4-star hotel, on the Mediterranean coast with panoramic views of Mount Etna and the Ionian Sea, a garden-surrounded outdoor pool and Sicilian cuisine.
timeline.description_zh: 上午参观拥有数千年人类居住史的马泰拉（约2小时），这座“石头之城”以其凿于石灰岩中的洞穴建筑群闻名。深入探索马泰拉的“萨西（Sassi）”老城区，穿梭于石砌阶梯、洞穴教堂与古修道院之间，分为萨索卡韦奥索（Sasso Caveoso）和萨索巴里萨诺（Sasso Barisano）两个区域，是地球上最古老的居住地之一，1993年被联合国教科文组织列为世界文化遗产。随后前往卡拉布里亚的科森扎，参观科森扎老城（约1小时），可见诺曼-斯韦沃城堡，之后乘坐圣乔瓦尼—墨西拿渡轮渡海至西西里，沿途欣赏地中海美景，并参观墨西拿老城（约30分钟），尤其是大教堂的天文钟和猎户座喷泉。之后前往卡塔尼亚入住酒店。夜宿卡塔尼亚福朋喜来登酒店或同级4星级酒店，酒店坐落于地中海海岸线旁，享有埃特纳火山和爱奥尼亚海全景，设有花园环绕的户外泳池并供应西西里美食。

timeline.title_en: Catania - Taormina - Mount Etna - Catania: Cliff-top Mediterranean Views and Hiking an Active Volcano
timeline.title_zh: 卡塔尼亚 - 陶尔米纳 - 埃特纳火山 - 卡塔尼亚：悬崖之巅瞰地中海美景，轰鸣声中徒步活火山
timeline.description_en: After breakfast you head to Mount Etna (about 2.5 hours), a UNESCO World Natural Heritage site and one of the world's most active volcanoes (3,323 m), where you can freely explore the surrounding volcanic landscape of lava flows and scorched volcanic rock, or take the cable car to the summit at your own expense. You then visit the hilltop town of Taormina (about 1 hour), seeing Piazza IX Aprile (April 9 Square, about 20 minutes) with its black-and-white tiles and views of the Ionian Sea, and the Greek Theatre (about 30 minutes), a 3rd-century BC U-shaped theatre suspended between sea and sky and the venue of the Taormina arts festival. An optional Etna adventure (cable car + 4x4 + short hike, 100 EUR/person) ascends to about 3,000 m near the summit craters and recent lava flows. Note: the summit cable car fee is not included and may not operate due to ash, weather or maintenance; in summer Etna is usually morning and Taormina afternoon, in winter the order reverses. This is a high-risk activity (age 5-65, weight 25-95 kg, good health required). Overnight at the Four Points by Sheraton Catania or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往世界自然遗产埃特纳火山（约2小时30分钟），这是世界上最活跃的火山之一（海拔3323米）。您可选择自由参观周围遍地熔浆流与烧焦火山石的火山景观，或自费乘坐缆车前往埃特纳火山山顶。随后前往陶尔米纳小镇（约1小时），游览四月九日广场（约20分钟，独具特色的黑白地砖，远眺爱奥尼亚海）与希腊露天圆形剧场（约30分钟，建于公元前3世纪、悬浮于海天之间的U形剧院，夏季为陶尔米纳艺术节举办地）。可参加自费的埃特纳火山探险（缆车+四驱车+短途徒步，价格100欧/人），登至约3000米近距离观察顶部火山口及近期熔岩流。备注：本产品不含埃特纳火山登顶缆车费用，如遇火山灰尘、天气、设施检修等因素缆车将无法运行而无法登顶；通常夏季上午游火山、下午游陶镇，冬季顺序相反。该项目为高风险活动（年龄5-65周岁、体重25-95公斤、身体健康者方可参加）。夜宿卡塔尼亚福朋喜来登酒店或同级4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Catania - Syracuse - Catania: The Thousand-Year Fountain of Arethusa and Sicilian Legends
timeline.title_zh: 卡塔尼亚 - 锡拉库萨 - 卡塔尼亚：锡镇千年林仙泉，漫步西西里美丽传说
timeline.description_en: In the morning you head to Syracuse, the town where Malena (the film "Malena / Sicilian Legend") was shot and the hometown of the Greek philosopher and mathematician Archimedes. You visit the Castello Maniace (Maniace Castle, about 50 minutes), the island's finest Frederician castle with walls once 18 m high; the Fountain of Arethusa / Spring of the Wood Nymph (about 20 minutes), a freshwater spring tied to the myth of the nymph Arethusa; the island of Ortygia (about 30 minutes), described by Cicero as the greatest and most beautiful Greek city, with the Temple of Apollo ruins and the Greek theatre; and the Ortygia Cathedral Square (about 30 minutes), a Baroque facade concealing the ancient Temple of Athena. An optional Syracuse boat charter (30 EUR/person, from 6 people, about 1 hour) circles Ortygia and explores sea caves. You then return to Catania (about 15 minutes) for free sightseeing of its elegant architecture, broad avenues and the Ionian seafront. Overnight at the Four Points by Sheraton Catania or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往拍摄《西西里岛的美丽传说》的小城锡拉库萨，这里也是伟大的希腊哲学家、数学家、物理学家阿基米德的故乡。游览马尼亚切城堡（约50分钟，岛上最美的腓特烈城堡，原先墙高18米）、阿勒图萨喷泉（林仙泉，约20分钟，与林中仙女Aretusa神话相关的淡水泉眼）、奥尔提伽岛（约30分钟，曾被西塞罗描述为“希腊最伟大、最美丽的城市”，留有阿波罗神庙遗址与希腊剧场）以及奥提伽大教堂广场（约30分钟，华丽巴洛克外观掩盖着昔日的雅典娜神庙）。可参加自费的锡拉库萨出海包船游（价格30欧/人，6人起发，约1小时），绕奥提伽岛环行并探索海蚀洞。之后返回卡塔尼亚（约15分钟）自由游览，典雅的建筑、宽广的大道与碧波粼粼的爱奥尼亚海让这座城市别有一番风味。夜宿卡塔尼亚福朋喜来登酒店或同级4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Catania - Agrigento - Cefalu - Palermo: The Magnificent Valley of the Temples and a White-Rock Paradise Town
timeline.title_zh: 卡塔尼亚 - 阿格里真托 - 切法卢 - 巴勒莫：壮丽辉煌神殿之谷与天堂小镇的白色岩石相伴
timeline.description_en: In the morning you head to the ancient Greek town of Agrigento, touring the Agrigento old town (about 30 minutes), perched on a high hill overlooking the fields and the Mediterranean and rooted in the 6th-century-BC city of Akragas. You then visit the World Heritage Valley of the Temples (about 1.5 hours), about 2 km from town, one of the most important archaeological sites in the world since 1998, where Doric temples including the well-preserved Temple of Concordia have stood for over two thousand years on a green ridge above the blue sea. Afterwards you drive to Cefalu (about 1.5 hours), a seaside town beneath the cliffs of La Rocca and a filming location of "Cinema Paradiso", founded by the ancient Greeks. You then continue to Palermo to check in. Overnight at the NH Palermo or an equivalent 4-star hotel, on the seafront overlooking Palermo Bay near the botanical garden and the Massimo Theatre, set in an elegant restored 19th-century building.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往古希腊小镇阿格里真托，游览阿格里真托老城（约30分钟），老城坐落在高耸山丘上，可俯瞰周围田野和地中海，其历史可追溯到公元前6世纪的阿克拉加斯（Akragas）。随后前往世界遗产神殿之谷（约1小时30分钟），距阿格里真托城镇约2公里，是自1998年来世界最重要的考古遗址之一，山脊上保留着始建于公元前五世纪的希腊式神庙，包括保存最完整的康科尔迪亚神庙，两千年来一直屹立于碧海与苍穹之间。之后前往切法卢（约1小时30分钟），这座位于西西里岛正北的海滨小镇坐落于洛卡山的悬崖峭壁之下，也是电影《天堂电影院》的取景地，由古希腊人建立。之后前往巴勒莫入住酒店。夜宿NH巴勒莫酒店或同级4星级酒店，酒店位于海滨、俯瞰巴勒莫湾，毗邻植物园与马西莫剧院，由一栋优雅的19世纪建筑改造而成。

timeline.title_en: Palermo: Strolling the Mediterranean Coast, History and Cuisine in Palermo
timeline.title_zh: 巴勒莫：漫步地中海岸，历史与美食共舞巴勒莫时光
timeline.description_en: In the morning you freely explore the old town of Palermo, visiting the atmospheric old fish market, the Quattro Canti (Four Corners square), the Palermo Cathedral (founded in 1184, blending Norman, Gothic and Spanish styles), the 1,200-year-old Norman Palace (exterior), and the famous Massimo Theatre (exterior), one of Europe's great opera houses known internationally from "The Godfather Part III". You can also see the Ballaro open-air market and the UNESCO World Heritage Church of Santa Maria dell'Ammiraglio (Martorana). The old town's main sights lie within a vehicle-restricted zone (ZTL), so the day is on foot, covering roughly 3-4 km, please wear light comfortable shoes. The flight back from Palermo to your home city is not included, please book it yourself with no guide on board; the operator arranges a single airport transfer at 16:00 local time, ending this wonderful journey.
timeline.description_zh: 上午自由游览巴勒莫老城区，拜访具有人文气息的老城鱼市，游览著名的四角广场、巴勒莫大教堂（始建于1184年，融合诺曼、哥特与西班牙等多种风格）、1200年的诺曼皇宫（外观）以及欧洲著名的马西莫剧院（外观，因电影《教父3》而享誉国际）等景点，还可游览巴拉洛露天市集与作为世界文化遗产的海军元帅圣母教堂。巴勒莫老城区主要景点均位于车辆禁行区（ZTL）内，当天为步行游览，往返步行行程约3-4公里，请穿着轻便舒适。当天行程不含巴勒莫返回所在城市的机票，请根据个人时间自行购买，航班上无导游陪同；我社统一安排一次送机，为当地时间下午16:00，结束美好行程。

meeting_en: Rome, Italy. The tour begins in Rome on Day 1; international flights to Rome are not included and the return flight departs from Palermo.
meeting_zh: 意大利罗马。行程第1天于罗马开始；国际机票不含，且返程由巴勒莫出发。

faqs.question_en: Where and how do we meet and disperse?
faqs.question_zh: 集合及集散地点和方法是什么？
faqs.answer_en: Route A (start Rome, end Palermo): Day 1 meet at 09:00 outside the Adesso Hotel by Roma Tiburtina railway station (Via Guido Mazzoni, 18-28, 00162 Roma RM, Italy); Day 9 the flight from Palermo to your home city is not included (book it yourself, no guide on board) and we arrange one airport transfer at 16:00 local time. You can join at Rome up to 13:00 at the latest on day 1, but you will then miss the Rome city sights with no refund. Route B (start Palermo, end Rome): Day 1 the flight to Palermo is not included (book it yourself), with one airport pick-up arranged at 12:00 local time; Day 9 disperses around 16:30 near Piazza del Popolo (Piazzale Flaminio, 00187 Roma RM) and around 17:00 at Roma Tiburtina station. Times and places are for reference; the actual departure follows the tour notice.
faqs.answer_zh: A线路（罗马出发、巴勒莫结束）：第1天09:00在Adesso Hotel（Roma Tiburtina火车站）门口集合，酒店地址Via Guido Mazzoni, 18-28, 00162 Roma RM, Italy；第9天不含巴勒莫飞往所在城市的机票（请自行购买，航班上无导游陪同），我社统一安排一次送机，为当地时间下午16:00。参团当天最晚13:00前可在罗马上团，但罗马市区景点将无法游览，且无费用可退。B线路（巴勒莫出发、罗马结束）：第1天不含飞往巴勒莫的机票（请自行购买），我社统一安排一次接机，为当地时间中午12:00；第9天约16:30在人民广场附近解散（Piazzale Flaminio, 00187 Roma RM），约17:00在Roma Tiburtina火车站解散。以上时间地点仅供参考，实际以出团通知书为准。

faqs.question_en: Why is sightseeing in central Rome done on foot?
faqs.question_zh: 罗马市中心为什么要徒步游览？
faqs.answer_en: Rome's sights are clustered together and almost all sit within the old-city historic protection zone where vehicles are restricted. On the day you walk from the hotel to Santa Maria Maggiore (5-10 min), the Colosseum (10-15 min), the Mouth of Truth (20-25 min), the Trevi Fountain (15-20 min) and the Spanish Steps (5-10 min). Skipping the Mouth of Truth saves about 35 minutes of walking (roughly 2 km).
faqs.answer_zh: 罗马的景点比较集中，几乎所有景点都位于罗马古城区（历史保护区车辆限行）。当天从酒店步行前往圣母大殿（步行5到10分钟）、斗兽场（步行10到15分钟）、真理之口（步行20到25分钟）、许愿池（步行15到20分钟）、西班牙广场（步行5到10分钟）；如果不游览真理之口可减少约35分钟的步行时间（约2公里）。

faqs.question_en: I get seasick - can I still do the Sorrento island-hopping tour of the four towns?
faqs.question_zh: 我晕船是否能参加索伦托的跳岛游览四大城市？
faqs.answer_en: Yes, the chance of seasickness is low. The Mediterranean is an inland sea with relatively few waves, and the vessels are fairly large. Also, on the island-hopping the boat is a means of transport rather than a sightseeing platform - each leg averages 40 minutes to 1 hour, after which you disembark to tour. Many of the included sights, such as Capri, Positano and Amalfi, cannot be reached by car or are difficult to reach by car.
faqs.answer_zh: 晕船概率比较低。地中海为内海，相对风浪较少，加之船体较大；其次，跳岛游览中船为交通工具而非游览工具，平均每段行程为40分钟到1小时，随后即可登陆游览。行程中包含的许多景点，如卡普里、波西塔诺、阿马尔菲等，都是车辆无法到达或不便到达的景点。

faqs.question_en: Is Mount Etna safe? If I don't take the cable car, how do I tour it?
faqs.question_zh: 埃特纳火山是否安全？如果不乘坐缆车，我该如何游览？
faqs.answer_en: The group goes to the Etna crater area (the valley), the base camp for visiting Etna, where you see lava flows and scorched volcanic rock everywhere and hear the rumbling of the volcano - but this is still a safe distance from the eruption vent, with many shops, restaurants and activities. Hiking this "dead" volcano here is a very safe activity. If you wish to reach the active craters, lava flows and the inside of lava tubes, you must take the cable car and be led by a professional volcano-hiking guide; there is no other option.
faqs.answer_zh: 旅游团将前往埃特纳火山口（山谷），这里是游览埃特纳的大本营，随后可看到遍地熔浆流及烧焦的火山石、听到轰隆作响的火山地动声，但此处距离火山喷发口仍有安全距离，商店、餐厅及各种活动繁多，许多游客在这里体验“死”火山徒步，是一种非常安全的游览活动。如希望前往活火山及熔岩流、熔岩通道内部，必须乘坐缆车在专业火山徒步向导带领下进行，没有其他选项。

faqs.question_en: What is the "Captain Mike" boat outing?
faqs.question_zh: “麦克船长”出海是什么活动？
faqs.answer_en: It is Ortygia's most famous round-island sea outing: 6-10 guests ride the "Captain Mike" (a product name) to circle the island, explore sea caves, and if weather permits do some snorkeling in the calm water near "King Kong Reef" and taste the freshwater of the spring. Because the boat must pass under bridges and through the city area, the activity requires a very calm sea.
faqs.answer_zh: “麦克船长”是奥提伽岛最著名的出海环游活动，6-10位游客乘坐“麦克船长”（商品名称）环岛游览，前往海蚀洞探险，如天气条件允许将在“金刚礁”附近平稳海域浮潜、品尝林仙泉的淡水等。但由于船体通过性（需经过桥梁及城区）的原因，该活动需要海面非常平静。

faqs.question_en: How should I tour Capri, and why can't entry to the Blue Grotto be guaranteed?
faqs.question_zh: 卡普里岛我应该怎么游览？为什么不能保障进入蓝洞？
faqs.answer_en: Because the Blue Grotto's entrance is very low, it cannot be entered at high tide, especially in autumn and winter; in summer it may also be too crowded to enter. When the Blue Grotto is unavailable, you will instead tour Marina Grande, the old town and the Gardens of Augustus.
faqs.answer_zh: 由于蓝洞入口比较低，潮水高的时候无法入内，特别是在秋冬季节；同时夏季可能遇到蓝洞严重堵塞也无法入内游览。届时将改为游览大港码头、古城和奥古斯都花园。

faqs.question_en: Do I need a visa?
faqs.question_zh: 是否需要签证？
faqs.answer_en: Yes. This product does not include visa fees; you need a Schengen visa (single or multiple entry) - if you need one, please choose a Schengen-visa product. After booking we provide all the materials needed to apply for the Schengen visa free of charge (see the detailed materials list). "Visa-worry-free" guarantee: if you sign the contract 61+ days before departure and have not obtained the visa within 45 days before departure, we bear all losses and immediately refund your full travel cost; if you do not qualify and fail to obtain the visa normally, refunds follow the change-and-cancellation terms. A rejection must be reported to us within 48 hours with the consulate's rejection letter; supplementary/changed materials must be submitted within 5 days and you may not unilaterally waive the right to appeal the visa. If you commission us to handle the Schengen visa we also buy compliant Schengen travel insurance for you; otherwise you must arrange insurance and claims yourself. Your passport must be valid for at least 6 months from the departure date or customs may refuse entry. Visa fees, visa service fees, Schengen insurance fees and visa-center appointment fees are all non-refundable and cannot be transferred, even if the product is changed or cancelled.
faqs.answer_zh: 需要。本产品不含签证费用，需要申根签证（单次或多次入境），如需办理请选择申根签证产品。预订后免费提供办理申根签证的全部材料（参考详细材料清单）。保签无忧：游客在出发日前61天与我社签约，如在出发前45天内未获取签证，我社承担所有损失，立即退还全部旅游费用；不符合该条款的游客如未正常获取签证，将按“退改与取消条款”退费。如遇拒签需在48小时内通知我社并出具使领馆拒签函，补充或更改材料需在5天内提交，且不得单方面放弃“签证抗辩”权利。如委托我社办理申根签证，我社为您购买符合要求的申根旅游保险；若未委托办理，需自行购买保险及负责理赔。护照有效期需在离境之日起至少还有六个月，否则海关有权拒绝入境。签证费、签证服务费、申根保险费、签证中心预约费均不可退款，也无法更改使用者，即使产品退改签也无法退款。

faqs.question_en: Booking, changes and cancellation
faqs.question_zh: 预订、变更与取消须知
faqs.answer_en: Free cancellation: both the agency and traveler may cancel without reason more than 30 days before departure (the 30th day not included). Connection requirements: due to frequent flight changes, traffic, ferry cancellations, strikes and order adjustments, this product requires you to arrive at the meeting point one day before the tour starts and leave one day after it ends, with reasonable flight buffers (at least 5 hours for same-airport transfers, 7 hours for different airports in the same city); losses from not doing so are borne by the traveler. Booking: pay promptly; book at least 14 days ahead; orders need a second confirmation within 48 hours or they auto-refund - do not book connecting flights/hotels before confirmation. Group size: this is a shared/join-in group tour and is declared formed at 10 people; if it is not reached 30 days before departure either side may cancel, and at less than 10 people the agency may cancel the tour or downgrade an optional activity to "free time". Rooms: standard double (bed type assigned by hotel, not selectable - may be one large bed or twin); triple family room (two parents + one minor, bed type not selectable); single travelers default to paying the single-room supplement unless they request room-sharing. European hotels are all non-smoking, no cooking in rooms, check-in 14:00 / check-out 11:00, and air-conditioning is not a standard fixture. Pricing: all prices are quoted in EUR at the time of booking; if you pay in CNY, the rate is the Bank of China real-time "EUR selling price" on the day of payment, and refunds likewise use the same-day rate (bank fees borne by the traveler). Itinerary contingencies: the order and timing of sights may be adjusted (without changing the route/sights this is not a breach); if a boat trip (e.g. Positano) is cancelled for sea weather the group switches to a coach visit of Salerno and the boat fee is refunded; if the Blue Grotto or Etna cable car cannot operate, those are visited differently or not at all. No leader is provided for the whole trip - a local guide serves on the ground; there are optional self-pay items but no forced shopping.
faqs.answer_zh: 免费取消：出发前30天（不含第30天）旅行社和旅行者均可无理由取消。衔接要求：由于航变频繁、交通拥堵、渡轮取消、罢工游行及顺序调整，本产品要求旅游者在旅游团开始前一天到达集合地、结束后一天离开集散地，并预留合理航班衔接时间（同一机场转机至少5小时、相同城市不同机场至少7小时），未遵守导致的损失由旅行者自行承担。预订：请及时支付，建议提前至少14天预订，订单需在48小时内二次确认，超时则自动退款，未获确认前请勿预订衔接机票及酒店。成团：本产品为散客拼团，成团人数为10人；行程前30天未达成团人数双方均可解除合同，团队或自费活动不足10人时旅行社有权取消旅游团或将自费活动改为“自由活动”。房型：标准双人间（床型由酒店安排不可选，可能为大床或双床）；三人家庭间（默认两位父母与一位未成年儿童，床型不可选）；单人报名默认包含单人房差，除非备注要求拼房。欧洲酒店均禁烟、禁止房内做饭，入住14:00、退房11:00，且空调并非标准设施。价格：所有定价以欧元为预订计价单位，如选择人民币支付则以付款当日中国银行实时“欧元卖出价”自动计算，退款同样适用申请当日汇率，银行手续费由旅行者承担。行程应变：景点先后顺序及时间可能调整（不改变路线及景点不视为违约）；如波西塔诺等出海因海况取消，则改乘车参观萨勒诺并退还游船费用；如蓝洞或埃特纳缆车无法运行，则改为其他方式游览或无法登顶。全程不含领队，由当地导游提供服务；设有自费项目但绝无强制消费。

faqs.question_en: Health and safety requirements
faqs.question_zh: 健康与安全须知
faqs.answer_en: For your safety, please have a health check before departure and do NOT book if you have: an infectious disease (e.g. active tuberculosis, typhoid); cardiovascular disease (e.g. severe hypertension, heart failure, myocardial ischemia/infarction); cerebrovascular disease (e.g. cerebral embolism, hemorrhage, tumor); respiratory disease (e.g. emphysema, cor pulmonale); a psychiatric condition or epilepsy; severe anemia (hemoglobin below 50 g/L); or are recovering from major/medium surgery. Pregnancy: no participation at all at 35+ weeks; at 28+ weeks a doctor's report (within 7 days) and physician consent are required; under 28 weeks book with caution, sign a liability waiver, and you cannot join any adventure, skiing, sea, high-altitude or outdoor items. Travelers with disabilities need a doctor's report (within 7 days) and physician consent, a direct family escort, and must apply at least 61 days ahead for reserved space and facilities. Elderly: travelers over 70 need a health certificate, physical exam report and direct family escort (or sign a waiver), need adequate walking ability and stamina (this is a long itinerary), need a physician consent letter for adventure/sea/outdoor items, and must apply at least 61 days ahead for elderly-friendly services. Minors: under-18s must be accompanied by a direct relative or guardian; under-18 traveling abroad without parents need a parental authorization letter (both parents' if not with a parent); infants under 2 are not accepted; some sights have special rules for under-18/12/6, and children under 6 or under 30 kg should confirm a safe child seat in advance. Per Article 15 of the Tourism Law, travelers must truthfully declare health information relevant to the trip (pregnancy, lactation, chronic and infectious diseases, suspected symptoms, recent epidemic-area travel) and follow safety warnings; concealment that causes harm or transmission risk makes the traveler liable for damages and may lead to contract termination without refund.
faqs.answer_zh: 为确保安全出行，请于出行前做必要的身体检查，如有下列情况请勿报名：传染性疾病（如活动期肺结核、伤寒）；心血管疾病（如严重高血压、心功能不全、心肌缺氧、心肌梗塞）；脑血管疾病（如脑栓塞、脑出血、脑肿瘤）；呼吸系统疾病（如肺气肿、肺心病）；精神病及癫痫；严重贫血（血红蛋白50克/升以下）；大中型手术恢复期患者。孕妇：妊娠35周及以上任何情况下都无法参团；28周及以上需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书；28周以下请慎重报名，需签署旅行社免责声明书，且无法参加探险、滑雪、出海、高空、户外等项目。残疾人：需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书、需直系家属陪同，并需提前至少61天申请预留位置及专用设施。老年人：70周岁以上需提供健康证明、体检报告并需直系家属陪同（否则需签免责声明书），因本行程较长需有一定步行能力与体力，涉及探险、出海、高空、户外等项目需持主治医师同意书，并需提前至少61天申请适老化服务及设施。未成年人：未满18周岁需由直系亲属或监护人陪同，无父母陪同出境须持父母授权书（仅一方陪同需另一方书面授权），不接受2周岁以下婴儿参团，部分景点对未满18/12/6周岁有特殊限定，6岁以下或30公斤以下儿童请提前确认安全座椅。根据《旅游法》第15条，旅游者需如实告知与旅游活动相关的个人健康信息（包括妊娠期、哺乳期、慢性病、传染病史、疑似症状或近期疫区旅居史）并遵守安全警示，若因隐瞒导致人身损害或传播风险，需自行承担责任，旅行社可解除合同且不退费。

title_en: Italy in Depth: 13-Day North-to-South & Sicily Small-Group Tour
title_zh: 意大利纵贯南北及西西里13天享乐小团
short_en: A one-way 13-day journey across Italy from Milan to Palermo, threading Venice, Tuscany, the Amalfi Coast and five days deep in Sicily.
short_zh: 13天单程纵贯意大利，从米兰一路深入巴勒莫，串联威尼斯、托斯卡纳、阿马尔菲海岸，并深度畅游西西里五天。
desc_en: This 13-day small-group tour runs one-way from Milan to Palermo, crossing Italy from the northern lakes to the Mediterranean south and on to Sicily so you cover three seas and two islands without ever doubling back. You will see Milan Cathedral, the canals of Venice, Cinque Terre and the Leaning Tower of Pisa, Renaissance Florence and eternal Rome, then the Sorrento Peninsula, Pompeii, Capri and the lemon-scented cliffs of Positano. The Adriatic stretch brings Polignano a Mare, the Trulli of Alberobello and the cave city of Matera before a full five days exploring Sicily, from Mount Etna and Taormina to Syracuse, the Valley of the Temples and Palermo. Highlights include two nights in a five-star Tuscan estate spa and seaside stays in Sorrento and Sicily.
desc_zh: 这条13天享乐小团采用单程线路，从米兰一路向南直抵巴勒莫，横跨意大利从北部湖区到地中海南部再到西西里岛，三海两岛一线贯通，全程不走回头路。沿途游览米兰大教堂、水城威尼斯、五渔村与比萨斜塔、文艺复兴名城佛罗伦萨与永恒之城罗马，再到索伦托半岛、庞贝古城、卡普里岛与檸檬飘香的悬崖小镇波西塔诺。亚得里亚海段串联滨海波利尼亚诺、阿尔贝罗贝洛的特鲁利蘑菇屋与石头之城马泰拉，随后用整整五天深度环游西西里岛——埃特纳火山、陶尔米纳、锡拉库萨、神殿之谷直到巴勒莫。行程特别安排托斯卡纳五星庄园SPA酒店连住两晚，以及索伦托与西西里海滨酒店连续入住。

highlights.en: One-way deep route across Italy and Sicily — three seas, two islands, no backtracking
highlights.zh: 单程深度线路纵贯意大利与西西里——三海两岛，全程不走回头路

highlights.en: Five full days exploring Sicily: Etna, Taormina, Syracuse, Valley of the Temples and Palermo
highlights.zh: 西西里环岛深度五天：埃特纳火山、陶尔米纳、锡拉库萨、神殿之谷与巴勒莫

highlights.en: Milan Cathedral, the canals of Venice and Renaissance Florence's Duomo
highlights.zh: 米兰大教堂、威尼斯水巷与佛罗伦萨文艺复兴圣母百花大教堂

highlights.en: Rome's Colosseum and Pantheon, the Sorrento Peninsula, Pompeii and Capri
highlights.zh: 罗马斗兽场与万神殿、索伦托半岛、庞贝古城与卡普里岛

highlights.en: Cinque Terre scenic train, Leaning Tower of Pisa and cliffside Positano by boat
highlights.zh: 五渔村景观列车、比萨斜塔与乘船游览悬崖小镇波西塔诺

highlights.en: Two nights in a five-star Tuscan estate spa plus seaside hotels in Sorrento and Sicily
highlights.zh: 托斯卡纳五星庄园SPA酒店连住两晚，索伦托与西西里海滨酒店连续入住

highlights.en: UNESCO sites: Alberobello's Trulli and the cave dwellings of Matera
highlights.zh: 联合国教科文世界遗产：阿尔贝罗贝洛特鲁利石屋与马泰拉石窟老城

highlights.en: Flights & ferries, attraction entries and a Chinese-speaking guide included — no forced shopping
highlights.zh: 含机票、渡轮、景点门票及中文导游，无强制购物

includes.en: Hotels: 2 nights in 5-star hotels plus 10 nights in comfortable 4-star hotels, 12 nights' accommodation in total.
includes.zh: 【酒店】：五星级酒店2晚，舒适型四星级酒店10晚，共计12晚住宿。

includes.en: Meals: 12 breakfasts (in-hotel breakfast or breakfast in another form).
includes.zh: 【餐饮】：酒店内早餐或其他形式的早餐12餐。

includes.en: Taxes & fees: all taxes within the itinerary, including city/tourist tax, city-entry fees, residence tax, road and bridge tolls, island-landing fees, etc.
includes.zh: 【税费】：游客城市税、进城费、居住税、路桥费、登岛费等行程内的所有税费。

includes.en: Transport: tourist coach or business travel vehicle.
includes.zh: 【交通】：旅游巴士或者商务旅行车。

includes.en: Guide: professional driver + Chinese-speaking guide, or a Chinese-speaking driver-guide throughout (note: for groups of 8 or fewer, a business travel vehicle + Chinese-speaking driver-guide is arranged, who will lead the tour through all the cities).
includes.zh: 【导游】：职业司机+中文导游或者全程中文司机兼导游（备注：8人及以下则安排为商务旅行车+中文司机兼导游，届时将有司兼导带领游览全部城市行程）。

includes.en: Luggage: 1 piece of checked luggage up to 23 kg plus 1 carry-on bag.
includes.zh: 【行李】：1件23公斤行李及1件随身行李。

includes.en: Activities & tickets: Milan Cathedral; Venice island boat ticket; Cinque Terre scenic train; Rome Colosseum; Pantheon; Pompeii ancient city; Capri round-trip ferry; Salerno-Positano round-trip boat ticket; Castello Maniace; Taormina Greek Theatre; Valley of the Temples.
includes.zh: 【活动及门票】：米兰大教堂、威尼斯上岛船票、五渔村景观列车、罗马斗兽场、万神殿、庞贝古城、卡普里岛往返渡轮、萨勒诺往返波西塔诺船票、马尼亚切城堡、陶尔米纳圆形剧场、神庙之谷。

excludes.en: Passport: the cost of your personal passport.
excludes.zh: 护照：个人护照费用。

excludes.en: Visa: the tourist visa fees required for the countries listed in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 签证：行程中所列旅游国家所需的观光签证费用。

excludes.en: Insurance: travel insurance fees (if the itinerary involves high-risk activities, please verify whether your travel insurance covers that activity).
excludes.zh: 保险：旅游保险费用（如行程内涉及到高风险运动，请核实旅游保险是否包含该项运动）。

excludes.en: Tips: traveler-paid tips for the guide and driver totaling 10 EUR per person per day, same rate for adults and children.
excludes.zh: 小费：游客支付导游和司机小费一共10欧/人/天，大小同价。

excludes.en: Meals: apart from the special meals included in the itinerary, lunch and dinner are not included.
excludes.zh: 餐饮：除行程内包含的特色餐外，行程中不包含午、晚正餐费用。

excludes.en: Tickets: attractions not noted as fee-included in the itinerary (including but not limited to sights marked "exterior," and all "recommended," "optional," "experience" and other items where fee inclusion is not mentioned; if you wish to visit, please pay on your own).
excludes.zh: 门票：行程中未注明费用包含的景点（包括但不仅限于行程中注明"外观"的景点，以及"推荐"、"可选"、"体验"等所有未提及费用包含的项目，如游客需要参观，敬请自理）。

excludes.en: Extended stay: any accommodation, transport or sightseeing costs for stays extended beyond the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 延长住宿：行程外额外延长的住宿、交通、观光费用。

excludes.en: Personal spending: such as drinks and alcohol, taxis, phone charges and other personal expenses.
excludes.zh: 私人消费：如饮料酒类、出租车、电话费等个人消费。

excludes.en: Other transport: transport beyond the included business vehicle or minibus that is not mentioned in the inclusions, such as Venice gondolas and the tourist trains / electric taxis used in vehicle-restricted zones, payable on your own.
excludes.zh: 其他交通：除包含商务旅行车或者中巴之外，费用包含中未提及的其他交通费用，如威尼斯贡多拉，以及车辆限行区的观光火车、电瓶出租车等费用敬请自理。

excludes.en: Free activities: independent sightseeing in the evenings and recommended optional programs during the itinerary, and any transport, dining, tickets, shopping and other costs they incur.
excludes.zh: 自由活动：游客夜间自行游览及行程中的推荐项目，以及产生的交通、餐饮、门票、购物等费用。

excludes.en: Experience activities: the various travel experience activities not included in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 体验活动：行程中没有包含的各项旅游体验活动。

excludes.en: Other costs: costs not mentioned in the inclusions. In cases of force majeure such as natural disasters, war or strikes, or due to transport delays, flight cancellations or time changes, embassy visa delays, insufficient group numbers and other special circumstances or causes outside our control, the company reserves the right to charge the additional price difference (e.g. overseas visa-extension fees, accommodation, meals and transport, national airline fare adjustments, etc.).
excludes.zh: 其他费用：费用包含中未提及的费用。如因天灾、战争、罢工等不可抗力的原因，及因交通延阻、航班取消或更改时间、使馆延误出签证、人数不足等特殊情况或其他非我公司原因所引致的额外费用（如在外延期签证费、住、食及交通费、国家航空运价调整等），我公司有权追加差价。

timeline.title_en: Milan - Venice (Gothic cathedral masterpiece & the rise and fall of Milan)
timeline.title_zh: 米兰-威尼斯（瞻仰哥特教堂的杰作，了解米兰的盛衰历史）
timeline.description_en: Meet in the morning and drive into Milan, a northern Italian city that blends classical elegance with a modern rhythm. Visit Sforza Castle (exterior), then tour the Milan Cathedral (Duomo) and stroll through the historic Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II, experiencing the luxury and culture beneath its glass dome. The Duomo took over 500 years to build, begun in 1386, famed for its many exquisite carvings and Gothic spires, with Baroque ornamentation layered over its Gothic frame. The Galleria is a grand shopping arcade lined with high-end boutiques such as Prada, cafes and restaurants, where most visitors come simply to admire the window displays. Afterwards transfer to Venice and check in. Overnight: Voco Venezia (InterContinental) or a comparable 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午集合，乘车进入这座融合古典气质与现代节奏的北意城市米兰。先前往斯福尔扎城堡（外观），随后参观米兰大教堂（Duomo），并漫步于历史悠久的埃马努埃莱二世长廊，体验玻璃穹顶下的奢华与文化。米兰大教堂始建于1386年，历经500余年才建成，以众多精美雕刻与哥特式塔尖闻名于世，哥特式尖塔搭配巴洛克风格雕饰，极尽奢华。埃马努埃莱二世长廊是华丽的购物商场，云集Prada等高级精品店、餐馆与咖啡厅，多数游客来此只为欣赏天天更新的橱窗。之后前往威尼斯入住酒店。夜宿：威尼斯洲际VOCO酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Venice - Tuscany (romantic Venice on gentle waves, staying at a 5-star Tuscan estate)
timeline.title_zh: 威尼斯-托斯卡纳（温柔碧波上浪漫的威尼斯，入住托斯卡纳五星酒店）
timeline.description_en: Set out in the morning to explore the water city of Venice, made up of 118 islands linked by 177 canals and 401 bridges. Visit St. Mark's Basilica (exterior), St. Mark's Square, the Bridge of Sighs (exterior) and the magnificent Doge's Palace (exterior); these buildings rising from the water, with their winding canals, give Venice a romance that lingers. St. Mark's Square was called by Napoleon "the most beautiful drawing room in Europe." The Bridge of Sighs once carried condemned prisoners from the courts to the dungeons, who could glimpse the sky only through its small windows. For lunch the local Venetian specialty squid-ink pasta is recommended. Afterwards transfer to the Tuscany region. Overnight: a Tuscan-estate SPA hotel in Montecatini or a comparable 5-star hotel, set in a 40,000-square-meter private park with indoor and outdoor pools and a forest-view sauna.
timeline.description_zh: 上午出发游览水城威尼斯，这座由118个小岛组成、以177条水道和401座桥梁连成一体的城市。参观圣马可大教堂（外观）、圣马可广场、叹息桥（外观）以及华丽的总督宫（外观），这些建在水上的美丽建筑与蜿蜒的水巷一起，让威尼斯的浪漫风情久久难忘。圣马可广场曾被拿破仑称作"欧洲最美丽的客厅"；叹息桥是古代押送死囚由法院前往监狱的必经之路，犯人途经时只能透过小窗看一眼蓝天。午餐推荐品尝威尼斯特色墨鱼面。之后前往托斯卡纳地区。夜宿：位于蒙特卡蒂尼的托斯卡纳庄园SPA酒店或同等5星级酒店，酒店坐落于4万平方米私人公园内，设室内外泳池与森林景观桑拿。

timeline.title_en: Tuscany - Cinque Terre - Pisa - Tuscany (scenic train ride to admire the Cinque Terre)
timeline.title_zh: 托斯卡纳-五渔村-比萨-托斯卡纳（乘坐景观列车，鉴赏五渔村美景）
timeline.description_en: In the morning visit the Cinque Terre, touring the beautiful cliffside fishing villages along the Ligurian coast. The Cinque Terre is the collective name for five clifftop villages in the La Spezia province of Liguria: Monterosso al Mare, Vernazza, Corniglia, Manarola and Riomaggiore, linked by a roughly 15-20 km coastal hiking trail (about 5 hours) that is among the world's most beautiful, listed as a UNESCO World Heritage Site in 1997. In the afternoon head to Pisa to see the Leaning Tower of Pisa (exterior) and the Piazza dei Miracoli (Square of Miracles) at the historic and cultural heart of the city, where four great monuments stand. Note: if bad weather or a rail strike prevents visiting the Cinque Terre, the itinerary automatically switches to touring coastal towns by coach or other means. Overnight: the Tuscan-estate SPA hotel in Montecatini or a comparable 5-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往游览五渔村，沿利古里亚海岸线游览悬崖上的美丽渔村。五渔村位于利古里亚大区拉斯佩齐亚省海岸，是蒙特罗索、韦尔纳扎、科尔尼利亚、马纳罗拉及里奥马焦雷这五个悬崖边村镇的统称，串联五村的徒步线路约15-20公里、需5小时左右，是世界上最美的徒步路线之一，1997年被联合国教科文组织列入世界文化遗产名录。下午前往比萨，游览比萨斜塔（外观）和位于历史文化中心的奇迹广场（Piazza dei Miracoli），广场上矗立着大教堂、斜塔（钟楼）、洗礼堂与墓园四大建筑。备注：如遇恶劣天气或铁路罢工等因素无法游览五渔村，行程将自动改为乘坐大巴或其他形式游览海岸线城市。夜宿：蒙特卡蒂尼的托斯卡纳庄园SPA酒店或同等5星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Tuscany - Florence - Rome (land of poetry, soul of the Renaissance, a journey through art)
timeline.title_zh: 托斯卡纳-佛罗伦萨-罗马（诗歌之地，文艺复兴之魂，享受艺术之旅）
timeline.description_en: In the morning go to Florence, birthplace of the Renaissance, to visit the world's third-largest church, the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore (the "Duomo of Florence"), faced in white, red and green granite. Continue to the Piazza della Signoria, an open-air sculpture museum holding the Palazzo Vecchio, a replica of Michelangelo's David and the Fountain of Neptune; the Ponte Vecchio (Old Bridge) over the Arno, built in 1345 and one of Europe's earliest large-span arched bridges; and Piazza Santa Croce with the Basilica of Santa Croce (exterior), the Gothic resting place of Michelangelo and Galileo. In the afternoon transfer to Rome and check in. Overnight: Palazzo Naiadi / a riverside palace hotel near the Borghese gardens, or a comparable 4-star hotel, with a large self-service breakfast including house-made pastries, fresh fruit, meats and cheeses.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往文艺复兴发源地佛罗伦萨，参观世界第三大教堂——以白、红、绿三色花岗岩贴面的圣母百花大教堂；游览有露天雕塑博物馆之称的市政广场，广场上坐落着维琪奥宫（旧宫）、米开朗基罗《大卫》雕像复制品及海神喷泉；以及阿诺河上建于1345年、为欧洲较早大跨度圆弧拱桥之一的维奇奥桥（老桥）；还有圣十字广场与圣十字教堂（外观）——这座哥特式建筑是米开朗基罗和伽利略的安息地。下午前往罗马入住酒店。夜宿：比邻波格赛公园的罗马河畔宫殿酒店或同等4星级酒店，每日提供含自制糕点、新鲜水果、肉类与奶酪的大型自助早餐。

timeline.title_en: Rome - Sorrento Peninsula (reliving the glory of the "city of cities," the Roman Empire)
timeline.title_zh: 罗马-索伦托半岛（重温"万城之城"古罗马帝国的辉煌）
timeline.description_en: Begin the day touring the famous historic city of Rome, the "Eternal City" and cradle of the Roman Empire. Visit the Colosseum and the Pantheon standing on the ruins of ancient Rome, and tour the Spanish Steps (Piazza di Spagna) and the Trevi Fountain (exterior). The Pantheon is over 2,000 years old, the resting place of Raphael and Italian kings, praised by Michelangelo as "the design of angels"; the Spanish Steps, made famous by Roman Holiday, are Europe's widest staircase with 138 steps; the Trevi Fountain is the "wishing fountain." Note: because of historic-site protection, much of central Rome is vehicle-restricted pedestrian zones, so this day is walked on foot, about 5-6 km. Also note from 2025 Rome plans to charge a photo fee (estimated ~2 EUR) at the Trevi Fountain if the bill passes, payable by the traveler. Afterwards transfer to the Sorrento Peninsula. Overnight: a Sorrento coast hotel or the Salerno Novotel, or a comparable 4-star hotel, with sea views over the Gulf of Sorrento-Naples, a private beach and a private pier.
timeline.description_zh: 上午开始游览世界著名历史文化名城罗马，这里是古罗马帝国发祥地，因历史悠久被称为"永恒之城"。参观矗立在古罗马遗址上的斗兽场、万神殿，游览西班牙广场和特莱维喷泉（外观）。万神殿距今已有2000多年历史，是拉斐尔及多位意大利国王的长眠之地，被米开朗基罗赞为"天使的设计"；西班牙广场因电影《罗马假日》闻名，西班牙台阶共138级，是欧洲最宽的台阶；特莱维喷泉又称"许愿池"。备注：因古城建筑保护，罗马市区多为车辆禁行的步行街区，景点均在古城内，当天徒步参观约5-6公里。另注：自2025年起罗马市政厅计划在许愿池收取拍照费用，如该法案通过，游客需自行支付预计约2欧元的参观拍照费。之后前往索伦托半岛。夜宿：索伦托海岸酒店或萨勒诺诺富特酒店，或同等4星级酒店，享有索伦托-那不勒斯海湾景观，拥有私人沙滩与私家码头。

timeline.title_en: Sorrento - Pompeii - Capri - Sorrento Peninsula (the ruins of Pompeii; the Mediterranean paradise of Capri & the Blue Grotto)
timeline.title_zh: 索伦托-庞贝-卡普里岛-索伦托半岛（历史遗迹庞贝；探秘地中海天堂岛卡普里岛、蓝洞）
timeline.description_en: In the early morning go to Pompeii to explore the ruins of the ancient city, buried by the eruption of Mount Vesuvius and so preserving the life of the Pompeians from over 2,000 years ago, including the plaster casts of victims, the Temple of Apollo and the central Forum. Then continue to Sorrento, the clifftop "lemon town" overlooking the Bay of Naples, Vesuvius and Capri. From Sorrento take a ferry to the island of Capri. On the island you may at your own arrangement walk along the shore and visit the Blue Grotto, take a boat around the island to see the Blue Grotto, or visit the Gardens of Augustus (exterior) in Capri town overlooking the whole bay; then ferry back to Sorrento and return to the hotel by coach. Note: on Capri activity is free and independent with no transport included; the recommended route is Marina Grande - Capri old town - Gardens of Augustus (about 1.3 km of mountain road, with paid funicular/taxi options). The Blue Grotto is a natural site that may close due to high tide, wind or waves; its visit is NOT included, and besides the boatman's fee a 2-5 EUR tip is customary. Overnight: a Sorrento coast hotel or the Salerno Novotel, or a comparable 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 清晨前往庞贝，探索庞贝古城遗址，了解曾经的庞贝文明。古城因维苏威火山爆发被火山灰掩埋，却完整保留了两千多年前的生活场景，包括遇难者石膏铸像、阿波罗神庙及中心广场（公共广场）。随后前往索伦托，漫步这座筑于海滨峭壁上、可俯瞰那不勒斯湾、维苏威火山与卡普里岛的"柠檬小镇"。之后在索伦托乘渡船前往卡普里岛。登岛后可自行前往海边漫步后游览蓝洞，或自行乘船环岛探秘蓝洞，或自行前往卡普里城中游览奥古斯都花园（外观），俯瞰整个海湾；之后乘渡船返回索伦托码头，乘车返回酒店。备注：1、卡普里岛登岛后自由活动，不含任何交通费用，推荐路线为大港—卡普里古城—奥古斯都花园（单程约1.3公里山路，沿途有需额外付费的缆车和出租车）。2、蓝洞属自然景观，如遇涨潮、风浪等被当地海洋气象机构宣布关闭则无法入内；蓝洞游览费用不含在团费内，除人力船工费外，请按当地习俗支付2-5欧元小费。夜宿：索伦托海岸酒店或萨勒诺诺富特酒店，或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Sorrento Peninsula - Salerno - Positano - Bari (a Mediterranean canvas, the lemon scent of Positano)
timeline.title_zh: 索伦托半岛-萨勒诺-波西塔诺-巴里（地中海风情画卷，感受波西塔诺的柠檬香）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast head to the port of Salerno and take a boat to Positano, exploring the colorful cliffside town that is the most charming pearl of southern Italy's coast, where layered houses in pink-orange, bright yellow and azure climb the hillside above blue sea and white sand. Positano sits on the Amalfi Coast, hailed as one of Europe's most beautiful coastlines and a UNESCO World Heritage Site, dotted with picturesque towns such as Amalfi, Positano, Ravello and Maiori. After returning by boat to Salerno, a city of historic depth with old churches, a Norman castle and a scenic seafront, continue to Bari and check in. Note: if extreme sea weather forces the boat company to cancel the Positano sailing for safety, we will instead arrange a coach visit to Salerno that day, Positano cannot be visited, and the boat fee will be refunded. Overnight: Mercure Bari or a comparable 4-star hotel, set in an old park near "Old Bari," the Petruzzelli Theatre and the seafront promenade, with a large outdoor pool and a fitness center.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往萨勒诺码头，乘船前往波西塔诺，探索这座悬崖上的彩色小镇——意大利南部最迷人的海岸明珠，层叠的房屋沿山而建，粉橙、明黄、湛蓝交织成绚丽的地中海画卷。波西塔诺位于阿马尔菲海岸，该海岸被誉为欧洲最美海岸线之一并列入联合国教科文组织世界遗产，沿线散落着阿马尔菲、波西塔诺、拉韦洛、马尼等如画小镇。随后乘船返回萨勒诺——这座集历史底蕴与美景于一身、拥有古老教堂、诺曼城堡与海滨风光的城市，之后前往巴里入住酒店。备注：如遇海上极端天气，出于游客安全考虑，游船公司取消出海游览波西塔诺活动，我社将安排当天乘车参观萨勒诺，无法参观波西塔诺，出海游船费用将退还给游客。夜宿：巴里美居酒店或同等4星级酒店，酒店坐落于古老公园中，毗邻"老巴里"、Petruzzelli剧院与滨海长廊，配有大型室外泳池及健身中心。

timeline.title_en: Bari - Polignano a Mare - Alberobello - Matera (white cliff town, the UNESCO Trulli "mushroom houses")
timeline.title_zh: 巴里-滨海波利尼亚诺-阿尔贝罗贝洛-马泰拉（白色悬崖小镇，世界文化遗产特鲁洛蘑菇屋）
timeline.description_en: In the morning tour the city of Bari, capital of Puglia, blending faith, history and port culture: visit the Basilica di San Nicola (exterior), an 11th-century Romanesque church and a shared pilgrimage site for Catholics and Orthodox, and stroll the stone-paved lanes of Bari Vecchia (the old town). Then drive to Polignano a Mare, a stunning town built on cliffs facing a turquoise bay, where white houses, an arched bridge and a sea cave frame the famous Lama Monachile cove, the "Mediterranean balcony of Puglia." In the afternoon enter the fairy-tale town of Alberobello and stroll among the UNESCO-listed Trulli stone houses, conical-roofed dry-stone dwellings dating back as early as the 14th century, listed as a UNESCO World Heritage Site in 1996. You will stay in a genuine Trullo in the town center for a quiet night in a centuries-old building. Afterwards transfer to Matera. Overnight: UNA Hotel Matera or a comparable 4-star hotel, set in a 5-hectare park on the Lucanian hills with indoor/outdoor pools, a spa and 5 restaurants.
timeline.description_zh: 上午在巴里市区游览这座融合信仰、历史与港口文化的普利亚大区首府，参观圣尼古拉大教堂（外观）——这座11世纪罗马式教堂是天主教与东正教共同朝圣之地，并漫步于老城区（Bari Vecchia）狭窄曲折的石板街巷。随后驱车前往滨海波利尼亚诺（Polignano a Mare）——一座依悬崖而建、面对碧蓝海湾的绝美小镇，白墙石屋、拱桥与海洞构成著名的波利尼亚诺阿马雷海湾（Lama Monachile）景致，被誉为"普利亚的地中海阳台"。下午进入童话世界般的阿尔贝罗贝洛，漫步于联合国教科文组织认证的Trulli石屋村落之间，这些白墙灰色圆锥顶的干式石砌石屋最早可追溯至14世纪，1996年被列为世界文化遗产。您将在镇中心区域入住真正的Trullo蘑菇屋，体验百年建筑中的静谧夜晚。之后前往马泰拉入住酒店。夜宿：马泰拉UNA酒店或同级4星级酒店，酒店坐落于卢卡尼亚山丘上占地5公顷的公园内，设室内外泳池、SPA区及5间餐厅。

timeline.title_en: Matera - Cosenza - Messina - Catania (the millennia-old cave dreamscape of Matera at dusk)
timeline.title_zh: 马泰拉-科森扎-墨西拿-卡塔尼亚（遇见华灯初上的马泰拉千年石窟梦境）
timeline.description_en: In the morning explore Matera, the "city of stone" with thousands of years of human habitation, famed for its Sassi cave dwellings carved into the limestone. Wander the Sassi old town among stone stairways, cave churches and ancient monasteries, divided into the Sasso Caveoso and Sasso Barisano districts, one of the oldest continuously inhabited places on earth and a UNESCO World Heritage Site since 1993. Then continue to Cosenza in Calabria to visit its old town, with narrow streets, cafes and the Norman-Swabian castle overlooking the city. Afterwards take the San Giovanni-Messina ferry, enjoying Mediterranean and Sicilian views en route, and visit the old town of Messina, known for its cathedral astronomical clock and Orion fountain. Then transfer to Catania and check in. Overnight: Four Points by Sheraton Catania or a comparable 4-star hotel, on the Mediterranean coast with panoramic views of Mount Etna and the Ionian Sea, a garden-ringed outdoor pool and a rooftop bar.
timeline.description_zh: 上午参观拥有数千年人类居住史的马泰拉——这座"石头之城"以凿于石灰岩中的洞穴建筑群（Sassi）闻名于世。深入探索马泰拉的Sassi老城区，穿梭于石砌阶梯、洞穴教堂与古修道院之间，老城分为Sasso Caveoso和Sasso Barisano两个区域，是地球上最古老的居住地之一，1993年被联合国教科文组织列为世界文化遗产。随后前往意大利科森扎，参观以狭窄街巷、露天咖啡馆和俯瞰全城的诺曼-斯韦沃城堡著称的科森扎老城。随后乘坐圣乔瓦尼-墨西拿渡轮，沿途欣赏地中海与西西里美景，参观以大教堂天文钟和猎户座喷泉闻名的墨西拿老城。之后前往卡塔尼亚入住酒店。夜宿：卡塔尼亚福朋喜来登酒店或同级4星级酒店，酒店坐落于地中海海岸线旁，享有埃特纳火山和爱奥尼亚海全景，设花园环绕的户外泳池与露台酒吧。

timeline.title_en: Catania - Taormina - Mount Etna - Catania (Mediterranean views from a clifftop; hiking an active volcano amid its roar)
timeline.title_zh: 卡塔尼亚-陶尔米纳-埃特纳火山-卡塔尼亚（悬崖之巅瞰地中海美景，轰鸣声中徒步活火山）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast head to the UNESCO Natural Heritage site of Mount Etna (3,323 m), one of the world's most active volcanoes. You may freely explore the surrounding volcanic landscape or, at your own expense, take the cable car toward the summit. Then go to the town of Taormina to see Piazza IX Aprile, with its black-and-white tiles and views of the Ionian Sea and Etna, and the Greek Theatre, a U-shaped theatre built in the 3rd century BC suspended between sea and sky. Return to the hotel that evening. Note: if volcanic ash, weather, maintenance or other factors make safe conditions impossible, the cable car will not run and the summit cannot be reached; the summit cable car is NOT included. Guides may adjust the order by season (typically summer: Etna in the morning, Taormina afternoon; winter reversed). An optional Etna adventure (cable car + 4x4 + short hike, ~100 EUR/person) is offered as a high-risk activity with age 5-65 and weight 25-95 kg requirements. Overnight: Four Points by Sheraton Catania or a comparable 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往世界自然遗产埃特纳火山（海拔3323米），它是世界上最活跃的火山之一。您可选择自由参观周围的火山景观，或自费乘坐缆车前往埃特纳火山山顶。随后前往陶尔米纳小镇，游览以黑白地砖著称、可远眺爱奥尼亚海与埃特纳火山的四月九日广场，以及建于公元前3世纪、悬浮于海天之间的U形希腊露天圆形剧场。当晚返回酒店。备注：如遇火山灰尘、天气、设施检修及其他因素无法保证安全条件，缆车将无法运行，届时无法登顶埃特纳火山，本产品不包含埃特纳火山登顶缆车费用。导游会视气温调整行程，通常夏季上午游览火山、下午前往陶镇，冬季上午陶镇、下午火山。另有自费推荐项目"埃特纳火山探险——缆车+四驱车+短途徒步"（价格100欧/人），为高风险项目，参加年龄要求5-65周岁、体重25-95公斤，需身体健康。夜宿：卡塔尼亚福朋喜来登酒店或同级4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Catania - Syracuse - Catania (Syracuse's thousand-year nymph spring, a stroll through Sicily's beautiful legend)
timeline.title_zh: 卡塔尼亚-锡拉库萨-卡塔尼亚（锡镇千年林仙泉，漫步西西里美丽传说）
timeline.description_en: In the morning visit Syracuse, the town where Malena (Sicilian: La Leggenda della bellezza) was filmed and the hometown of the great Greek philosopher and mathematician Archimedes.
