Tour the Castello Maniace, the island's finest Frederician castle once with 18 m walls; the Fountain of Arethusa (the nymph spring), a freshwater spring now home to wild ducks, fish and papyrus; Ortygia island, described by Cicero as "the greatest and most beautiful city of Greece," rich in ancient Greek architecture; and the Piazza del Duomo of Ortygia, where the cathedral was converted from a temple of Athena and which features in the film. Then return to Catania for free time to enjoy this second-largest Sicilian city at the foot of Etna, with its elegant architecture, broad avenues and the sparkling Ionian Sea. An optional Syracuse private-boat tour (~30 EUR/person, min. 6 people, ~1 hour) around Ortygia and the sea caves is offered as a high-risk activity. Overnight: Four Points by Sheraton Catania or a comparable 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往拍摄《西西里岛的美丽传说》的小城锡拉库萨，这里也是伟大的希腊哲学家、数学家、物理学家阿基米德的故乡。游览岛上最美的腓特烈城堡马尼亚切城堡（原墙高18米）；阿勒图萨喷泉（林仙泉）——如今是野鸭、胭脂鱼与纸莎草栖息的淡水泉眼；被西塞罗称为"希腊最伟大、最美丽的城市"、留有众多古希腊建筑的奥提伽岛；以及由雅典娜神庙改建、电影中女主角常出现的奥提伽大教堂广场。之后返回卡塔尼亚自由游览，这座坐落于埃特纳火山脚下的西西里第二大城市，拥有典雅的建筑、宽广的大道和碧波粼粼的爱奥尼亚海。另有自费推荐项目"锡拉库萨出海包船游"（价格30欧/人，6人起发，约1小时），含奥提伽岛环游与海蚀洞探索，为高风险项目。夜宿：卡塔尼亚福朋喜来登酒店或同级4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Catania - Agrigento - Cefalu - Palermo (the magnificent Valley of the Temples & the white rock of a heavenly town)
timeline.title_zh: 卡塔尼亚-阿格里真托-切法卢-巴勒莫（壮丽辉煌神殿之谷与天堂小镇的白色岩石相伴）
timeline.description_en: In the morning go to the ancient Greek town of Agrigento, touring the old town set on a high hill overlooking the fields and the Mediterranean, founded in the 6th century BC as Akragas. Then visit the UNESCO World Heritage Valley of the Temples, 2 km from town, one of the world's most important archaeological sites since 1998, where Doric temples built from the 5th century BC, including the well-preserved Temple of Concordia, have stood for two thousand years on a green ridge above the blue sea. Continue to Cefalu, a seaside town in northern Sicily beneath the cliffs of La Rocca, a filming location of Cinema Paradiso whose Greek name means "head." Then transfer to Palermo and check in. Overnight: NH Palermo or a comparable 4-star hotel, on the seafront overlooking the Bay of Palermo near the botanical garden, converted from an elegant 19th-century building, within walking distance of historic sites, shopping and the Teatro Massimo.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往古希腊小镇阿格里真托，游览坐落于高耸山丘、可俯瞰周围田野与地中海的老城——这座城市公元前6世纪建立时称为阿克拉加斯（Akragas）。随后前往距镇2公里、自1998年以来世界最重要的考古遗址之一、联合国教科文组织世界遗产神殿之谷，山脊上保留着始建于公元前5世纪的希腊式神庙群（含保存最完整的康科尔迪亚神庙），两千年来屹立于翠绿山峦与碧蓝大海之间。之后前往切法卢——位于西西里岛正北、坐落于洛卡山悬崖峭壁之下的海滨小镇，也是《天堂电影院》的取景地，其希腊语名意为"头"。之后前往巴勒莫入住酒店。夜宿：NH巴勒莫酒店或同级4星级酒店，酒店位于海滨、俯瞰巴勒莫湾、毗邻植物园，由优雅的19世纪建筑改造而成，步行可达众多历史古迹、购物区与马西莫剧院。

timeline.title_en: Palermo (an open-air museum where Byzantine, Arab and Norman civilizations converse amid the bustle of the markets)
timeline.title_zh: 巴勒莫（拜占庭、阿拉伯、诺曼文明在市集喧哗中对话的露天博物馆）
timeline.description_en: In the morning freely explore Palermo's old town: visit the atmospheric old-town fish market, the famous Quattro Canti (Four Corners), the 1,200-year-old Norman Palace (exterior), the renowned Teatro Massimo (exterior) and other sights, plus Palermo Cathedral (begun 1184, blending Gothic, Spanish and Norman styles), the Ballaro open-air market full of local street food, and the UNESCO-listed Church of Santa Maria dell'Ammiraglio (Martorana) on Piazza Bellini. The Quattro Canti, the "heart of Palermo," is the Baroque junction of the city's two main streets, each corner adorned with fountains and statues; the Teatro Massimo, built from 1875 in neoclassical style, is one of Europe's most famous theatres, internationally known from The Godfather Part III. According to flight times, the guide will arrange a single group transfer to the airport at 16:00 local time, ending the tour. Note: this day does NOT include the flight from Palermo to your onward city; main old-town sights lie within the vehicle-restricted ZTL zone, so the day is walked on foot (about 3-4 km), please wear light, comfortable clothing.
timeline.description_zh: 上午自由游览巴勒莫老城区，带着好奇心拜访具有人文气息的老城鱼市，游览著名的四角广场、有1200年历史的诺曼皇宫（外观）、欧洲著名的马西莫剧院（外观）等景点，以及巴勒莫大教堂（始建于1184年，融合哥特、西班牙与诺曼风格）、充满地道小吃的巴拉洛露天市集，和位于贝里尼广场、被列为世界文化遗产的海军元帅圣母教堂。四角广场是巴勒莫的心脏，为城市南北、东西两条主街的巴洛克式交汇点，每一角都装饰着喷泉与雕像；马西莫剧院建设始于1875年，采用新古典主义风格，是意大利与欧洲著名剧院之一，并因电影《教父3》而国际知名。随后根据航班时间，我社统一安排一次送机，为当地时间下午16:00，结束美好行程。重要提示：当天不含巴勒莫飞往所在城市的机票，请自行购买；巴勒莫老城主要景点均位于车辆禁行区（ZTL）内，当天为步行游览，往返步行约3-4公里，请穿着轻便舒适。

meeting_en: Milan, Italy — group meets in the morning of Day 1 in the city centre for the coach tour.
meeting_zh: 意大利米兰——第1天上午于米兰市区集合，乘车开始行程。

faqs.question_en: Where and how do we meet and disperse?
faqs.question_zh: 集合及集散地点和方法是怎样的？
faqs.answer_en: Route A (start in Milan, end in Palermo): Day 1, meet at 09:00 at the car park in front of Sforza Castle (Foro Buonaparte, 20121 Milano MI, Italy). Day 13, the flight from Palermo to your onward city is not included, please buy it yourself (no guide on the flight); we arrange a single group airport transfer at 16:00 local time. Route B (start in Palermo, end in Milan): Day 1, the flight from your city to Palermo is not included, please buy it yourself (no guide on the flight); we arrange a single group airport pickup at 12:00 local time. Day 13, the tour ends in central Milan. All times/places are for reference; the actual departure time follows the final group notice.
faqs.answer_zh: A线路（米兰出发、巴勒莫结束）：第1天早上09:00在斯福扎城堡门口停车场集合，地址Foro Buonaparte, 20121 Milano MI, 意大利；第13天不含巴勒莫飞往所在城市的机票，请自行购买（航班上无导游陪同），当天我社统一安排一次送机，为当地时间下午16:00。B线路（巴勒莫出发、米兰结束）：第1天不含所在城市飞往巴勒莫的机票，请自行购买（航班上无导游陪同），当天我社统一安排一次接机，为当地时间中午12:00；第13天米兰市区结束行程。以上时间地点仅供参考，实际出发时间以出团通知书为准。

faqs.question_en: Why is central Rome toured on foot?
faqs.question_zh: 罗马市中心为什么要徒步游览？
faqs.answer_en: Rome's sights are concentrated and almost all lie within the historic protected zone where vehicles are restricted. On the day you walk from the hotel to Santa Maria Maggiore (5-10 min), the Colosseum (10-15 min), the Mouth of Truth (20-25 min), the Trevi Fountain (15-20 min) and the Spanish Steps (5-10 min). Skipping the Mouth of Truth saves about 35 minutes of walking (about 2 km).
faqs.answer_zh: 由于罗马景点比较集中，几乎所有景点都位于罗马古城区（历史保护区车辆限行）。当天从酒店步行前往圣母大殿（步行5-10分钟）、斗兽场（10-15分钟）、真理之口（20-25分钟）、许愿池（15-20分钟）、西班牙广场（5-10分钟）；如不游览真理之口可减少约35分钟步行时间（约2公里）。

faqs.question_en: I get seasick - can I still join the Sorrento island-hopping tour of the four towns?
faqs.question_zh: 我晕船，是否能参加索伦托的跳岛游览四大城市？
faqs.answer_en: Yes. First, the Mediterranean is an inland sea with relatively little wind and waves, and the boats are fairly large, so seasickness is unlikely. Second, on the island-hopping the boat is only a means of transport, not the sightseeing itself; each leg averages 40 minutes to 1 hour, after which you disembark to tour. Many included sights, such as Capri, Positano and Amalfi, cannot be reached by car or are inconvenient to reach by car.
faqs.answer_zh: 可以。首先，地中海为内海，相对风浪较少，加之船体较大，因此晕船概率较低；其次，跳岛游览中船只是交通工具，并非游览工具，平均每段行程为40分钟到1小时，随后即可登陆游览，行程中包含的许多景点（如卡普里、波西塔诺、阿马尔菲等）都是车辆无法到达或不便到达的景点。

faqs.question_en: Is Mount Etna safe, and how do I visit it if I don't take the cable car?
faqs.question_zh: 埃特纳火山是否安全？如果不乘坐缆车，我该如何游览？
faqs.answer_en: The group goes to the Etna crater area (the valley), the base camp for visiting Etna, where you can see lava flows and scorched volcanic rock everywhere and hear the rumbling of the volcano - but this point is still a safe distance from the eruption vent, with many shops, restaurants and activities. Many visitors do a "dead-volcano" hike here, which is a very safe activity. If you wish to go to the active volcano, lava flows and the interior of the lava tunnels, you must take the cable car under the lead of a professional volcano-hiking guide; there is no other option.
faqs.answer_zh: 旅游团将前往埃特纳火山口（山谷），这里是游览埃特纳的大本营，随后可以看到遍地熔浆流及烧焦的火山石，听到轰隆作响的火山地动雷鸣声，但这里距离火山喷发口还有安全距离，商店、餐厅及各种活动繁多，许多游客在此体验"死"火山徒步，是非常安全的游览活动；如希望前往活火山及熔岩流、熔岩通道内部，必须乘坐缆车在专业火山徒步向导带领下前往，没有其他选项。

faqs.question_en: What is the "Captain Mike" boat tour?
faqs.question_zh: "麦克船长"出海是什么活动？
faqs.answer_en: It is Ortygia island's most famous round-island boat outing: 6-10 travelers ride the "Captain Mike" (a trade name) around the island, going to explore sea caves, and weather permitting, snorkeling in the calm waters near "King Kong Rock" and tasting the freshwater of the nymph spring. However, because of the boat's ability to pass under bridges and through the city, this activity requires very calm seas.
faqs.answer_zh: 这是奥提伽岛最著名的出海环游活动，6-10位游客乘坐"麦克船长"（商品名称）环岛游览，前往海蚀洞探险，如天气条件允许，将在"金刚礁"附近平稳海域浮潜、品尝林仙泉的淡水等。但由于船体通过性（桥梁及城区）的原因，该活动需要海面非常平静。

faqs.question_en: How should I visit Capri, and why can't entry to the Blue Grotto be guaranteed?
faqs.question_zh: 卡普里岛我应该怎么游览？为什么不能保障进入蓝洞？
faqs.answer_en: Because the entrance to the Blue Grotto is quite low, at high tide the grotto cannot be entered, especially in autumn and winter; in summer the grotto may also be severely congested and inaccessible. In those cases you will instead tour Marina Grande, the old town and the Gardens of Augustus.
faqs.answer_zh: 由于蓝洞入口比较低，潮水高的时候蓝洞将无法入内，特别是在秋冬季节；同时夏季可能遇到蓝洞严重堵塞，也无法入内游览。届时将改为游览大港码头、古城和奥古斯都花园。

faqs.question_en: Do I need a visa?
faqs.question_zh: 是否需要签证？
faqs.answer_en: Yes. This product requires a Schengen visa (single- or multiple-entry) and the visa fee is NOT included; if you need a visa, please choose a Schengen-visa product. After booking we provide all materials for applying for the Schengen visa free of charge (see the detailed materials list). Your passport must be valid for at least 6 months from the date of departure, or customs may refuse entry. "Visa-guarantee" assurance: for travelers who sign with us 61 days or more before departure, if no visa is obtained within 45 days before departure, we bear all losses and immediately refund the full travel cost; travelers who do not meet this clause and fail to obtain a visa are refunded per the change-and-cancellation terms. If refused, notify us within 48 hours with the consulate's refusal letter, and submit any supplementary/changed materials within 5 days. If you commission us to handle the Schengen visa, we purchase compliant Schengen travel insurance for you. The visa fee, visa service fee, Schengen insurance fee and visa-center appointment fee are all non-refundable and non-transferable, even if the product is changed or cancelled.
faqs.answer_zh: 需要。本产品需要申根签证（单次或多次入境），且不包含签证费用；如需办理签证，请选择申根签证产品。预订后免费提供办理申根签证的全部材料（参考详细材料清单）。护照有效期需在离境之日起至少还有六个月，否则海关有权拒绝入境。保签无忧：游客在出发日前61天与我社签约的旅游产品，如在出发前45天内未获取签证，我社承担所有损失，立即退还全部旅游费用；不符合该条款的游客如未正常获取签证，将按"退改与取消条款"退费。如遇拒签需在48小时内通知我社并出具使领馆拒签函，如需补充或更改材料需在五天内提交。如委托我社办理申根签证，我社为您购买符合要求的申根旅游保险。签证费、签证服务费、申根保险费、签证中心预约费均不可退款，也无法更改使用者，即使产品退改签，签证费用亦无法退款。

faqs.question_en: Booking, changes & cancellation
faqs.question_zh: 预订、变更与取消须知
faqs.answer_en: Free no-reason cancellation is available up to 30 days before departure (the 30th day excluded). Because flights change often and ferries can be cancelled or strikes occur, the order of the itinerary may be adjusted without being a breach of contract; travelers must arrive at the meeting point at least one day before the group date and leave the dispersal point at least one day after, allowing buffer time (allow at least 5 hours for connections at the same airport, 7 hours between different airports in the same city; reasonable meet/disperse window is 07:00-21:00). This is a shared join-in group; the group size to confirm departure is 10 people, and either party may cancel the contract if 10 are not reached by 30 days before departure (the 30th day excluded). Room types: single travelers default to a single-room supplement deposit (refunded pro-rata if shared); a standard double is auto-assigned for two bookings with bed type (one large or twin) decided by the hotel and not selectable; a triple/family room defaults to two parents + one minor with bed type set by the hotel. European hotels are all non-smoking, no cooking in rooms, check-in 14:00 / check-out 11:00, and air-conditioning is not a standard feature. Listed hotel names are priority hotels; if full, a comparable same-star hotel is substituted without separate notice. Pricing is in EUR at time of booking; if you pay in CNY, the price is the real-time CNY converted that day from the Bank of China "EUR sell" rate, and the same applies to refunds (the traveler bears any exchange differences and bank fees).
faqs.answer_zh: 出发前30天（不含第30天）可无理由免费取消。由于航变频繁、渡轮可能取消或发生罢工，行程先后顺序可能调整，在不改变路线及景点的情况下不视为旅行社违约；旅游者须在参团日期前一天到达集合地，并在离团日期后一天离开集散地，预留充足缓冲时间（同一机场转机至少预留5小时，同城不同机场至少7小时；合理集合集散时间段为07:00至21:00）。本产品为散客拼团，宣布成团人数为10人，行程开始前30天（不含第30天）未达成团人数的，游客和我社均有权解除合同。房型：单人报名默认含单人房差押金（拼房成功按实际比例退款）；两人报名默认入住标准双人间，床型由酒店安排不可选（大床或双床）；三人家庭间默认为两位父母与一位未成年儿童入住，床型由酒店安排不可选。欧洲所有酒店禁烟、禁止房内做饭，入住14:00、退房11:00，且空调并非酒店标准设施。行程内列明酒店为优先入住酒店，如订满将更换为相同星级的相近酒店且不另行通知。所有定价以欧元为预订计价单位，如选择人民币支付，则以当天本网站依据中国银行实时"欧元卖出价"自动计算的人民币实时价格为准，退款同样适用申请当日即时汇率，汇率差异或银行手续费由旅行者承担。

faqs.question_en: Health & safety requirements
faqs.question_zh: 健康与安全须知
faqs.answer_en: For your safety, please have a physical check before departure and DO NOT sign up if you have: infectious diseases (e.g. active tuberculosis, typhoid); cardiovascular disease (e.g. severe hypertension, heart insufficiency, myocardial ischemia/infarction); cerebrovascular disease (e.g. embolism, hemorrhage, brain tumor); respiratory disease (e.g. emphysema, cor pulmonale); mental illness/epilepsy; severe anemia (hemoglobin below 50 g/L); or recovery from major/moderate surgery. Pregnancy: at 35 weeks or more you cannot join under any circumstances; at 28 weeks or more you must provide a doctor's report within 7 days and the attending physician's consent; under 28 weeks please book with caution, sign a liability waiver, and you cannot join adventure, skiing, sea, high-altitude or outdoor activities. Disabled travelers need a doctor's report within 7 days plus physician consent, an immediate-family companion, and at least 61 days' advance request for facilities. Elderly travelers over 70 need a health certificate, medical report and an immediate-family companion (or a signed waiver); the trip is long and physically demanding, so those with limited stamina should book with caution. Minors (under 18) must be accompanied by an immediate relative or guardian; this product does not accept infants under 2; an unaccompanied minor needs a parental authorization letter (both parents' authorization if travelling with non-parents). Per Article 15 of the Tourism Law, travelers must truthfully disclose health information relevant to the trip (including pregnancy, lactation, chronic and infectious conditions, suspected symptoms or recent epidemic-area travel) and obey safety warnings; concealment that causes harm makes the traveler liable.
faqs.answer_zh: 为确保安全，请于出行前做一次身体检查，如存在以下情况请勿报名：传染性疾病患者（如活动期肺结核、伤寒等）；心血管疾病患者（如严重高血压、心功能不全、心肌缺氧、心肌梗塞等）；脑血管疾病患者（如脑栓塞、脑出血、脑肿瘤等）；呼吸系统疾病患者（如肺气肿、肺心病等）；精神病及癫痫患者；严重贫血者（血红蛋白50克/升以下）；大中型手术恢复期患者。孕妇：妊娠35周及以上任何情况下都无法参团；28周及以上需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书；28周以下请慎重报名，需签署旅行社免责声明书，且无法参加探险、滑雪、出海、高空、户外等项目。残疾人需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书、需直系家属陪同，并提前至少61天申请预留位置及专用设施。70周岁以上老年人需提供健康证明、体检报告并由直系家属陪同（如无法提供则需签署免责声明书）；因行程较长、对体力要求较高，体力不支者请慎重报名。未成年人（未满18周岁）须由直系亲属或监护人陪同，本产品不接受2周岁以下婴儿参团；无父母陪同的未成年人须持父母授权书（如仅一方陪同需另一方书面授权）。根据《旅游法》第15条，旅游者须如实告知与旅游活动相关的个人健康信息（包括妊娠期、哺乳期、慢性病、传染病史、疑似症状或近期疫区旅居史）并遵守安全警示规定，如因隐瞒健康信息导致人身损害或财产损失，旅游者需自行承担责任。

title_en: France, Italy & Switzerland In-Depth: 12-Day Rome-to-Paris Small-Group Tour
title_zh: 法意瑞深度12天精品小团游（罗马至巴黎）
short_en: A 12-day one-way journey from Rome to Paris through Tuscany, Cinque Terre, Venice, the Swiss Alps and Burgundy, in a 4-8 person small group.
short_zh: 12天单程深度之旅，从罗马一路玩到巴黎，途经托斯卡纳、五渔村、威尼斯、瑞士阿尔卑斯与勃艮第，4-8人精品小团。
desc_en: This in-depth 12-day small-group tour traces a one-way deep route from Rome to Paris across three countries. You begin in the Eternal City, wind through Tuscany's hill towns, the cliffside villages of Cinque Terre, Renaissance Florence and romantic Venice, cross the Alps via Milan to Zurich, then ride the GoldenPass panoramic train into the Swiss Lake District around Interlaken and the Jungfrau. The journey continues along Lake Geneva to a five-star Relais & Chateaux chateau, through the wine country of Burgundy and Dijon, finishing with Versailles, the Louvre and the great sights of Paris. City-centre 4-star hotels, included intercity transport and scenic rail, and expert museum guides make this a relaxed, all-inclusive way to see Europe's classic triangle.
desc_zh: 这是一条单程深度路线的12天精品小团之旅，横跨意法瑞三国，从罗马一路畅游至巴黎。行程从永恒之城罗马启程，穿越托斯卡纳山城、五渔村悬崖渔村、文艺复兴名城佛罗伦萨与浪漫水城威尼斯，再翻越阿尔卑斯经米兰抵达苏黎世，乘坐金色山口全景列车进入因特拉肯与少女峰所在的瑞士湖区；随后沿日内瓦湖一路前行，入住五星罗莱夏朵古堡酒店，途经勃艮第葡萄酒乡与第戎，最后以凡尔赛宫、卢浮宫与巴黎经典景点收尾。市中心四星酒店、含城际交通与景观火车、专业博物馆讲解，让这趟欧洲经典三国之旅轻松而一价全包。

highlights.en: One-way deep route: Rome to Paris across Italy, Switzerland and France, no backtracking
highlights.zh: 单程深度路线：罗马至巴黎，串联意法瑞三国，绝不走回头路

highlights.en: Ride the GoldenPass panoramic train through the Swiss Alps from Lucerne to Lungern
highlights.zh: 乘坐金色山口全景列车，从卢塞恩到龙疆饱览瑞士阿尔卑斯美景

highlights.en: Tuscany hill towns, Cinque Terre cliffside villages and the medieval towers of San Gimignano
highlights.zh: 托斯卡纳山城、五渔村悬崖渔村与圣吉米尼亚诺中世纪万塔古城

highlights.en: Renaissance Florence, romantic Venice and the fashion capital of Milan
highlights.zh: 文艺复兴佛罗伦萨、浪漫水城威尼斯与时尚之都米兰

highlights.en: Interlaken, Jungfrau region and a stay at the lakeside Giessbach historic hotel (Crash Landing on You filming location)
highlights.zh: 因特拉肯、少女峰地区，入住湖畔吉斯巴赫历史酒店（《爱的迫降》取景地）

highlights.en: A night in a five-star Relais & Chateaux chateau, plus a Burgundy winery visit and tasting
highlights.zh: 入住五星罗莱夏朵古堡酒店一晚，并参观勃艮第酒庄含品酒讲解

highlights.en: Versailles and the Louvre with expert national-museum guides, plus a Seine river cruise
highlights.zh: 凡尔赛宫与卢浮宫由专业国家馆讲解师深度讲解，并含塞纳河游船

highlights.en: City-centre 4-star hotels, included flights & scenic rail, all attractions and no forced shopping
highlights.zh: 市中心四星酒店，含机票与景观火车、所有景点门票，无强制购物

includes.en: Hotels: 1 night in a 5-star hotel plus 10 nights in comfort-class 4-star hotels — 11 nights of accommodation in total.
includes.zh: 【酒店】五星级酒店1晚及舒适型四星级酒店10晚，共计11晚住宿。

includes.en: Meals: 11 breakfasts in total — buffet breakfast at the hotel or breakfast in another form.
includes.zh: 【餐饮】酒店内自助早餐或其他形式早餐共计11餐。

includes.en: Taxes & fees: tourist city tax, town-entry fees, residence tax, the Venice island-landing fee, driver-guide meal allowances and all other travel taxes and fees incurred within the itinerary.
includes.zh: 【税费】游客城市税、进城费、居住税、威尼斯登岛费、司导餐补及各类旅游税等行程内执行费用。

includes.en: Transport: a 7–9 seat business travel van.
includes.zh: 【交通】7-9座商务旅行车。

includes.en: Guide: a Chinese-speaking driver-cum-guide throughout the trip.
includes.zh: 【导游】全程中文司机兼导游。

includes.en: Baggage: one 23 kg checked bag plus one carry-on item.
includes.zh: 【行李】1件23公斤行李及1件随身行李。

includes.en: Tickets: Burgundy winery visit and wine tasting, the GoldenPass train, the Cinque Terre train, the Venice lagoon ferry to the island, the Sorrento–Amalfi sea cruise, and the Sorrento–Capri return ferry.
includes.zh: 【门票】勃艮第酒庄参观及品酒费用、金色山口列车、五渔村小火车、威尼斯运河上岛渡轮、索伦托阿马尔菲出海环游、索伦托卡布里岛往返渡船。

excludes.en: Passport: the cost of your personal passport.
excludes.zh: 护照：个人护照费用。

excludes.en: Visa: the tourist visa fees for the countries listed in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 签证：行程中所列旅游国家所需的观光签证费用。

excludes.en: Insurance: travel insurance (if the itinerary involves high-risk sports, please verify whether your travel insurance covers them).
excludes.zh: 保险：旅游保险费用（如行程涉及高风险运动，请核实旅游保险是否包含）。

excludes.en: Tips: gratuities for the guide and driver totaling EUR 10 per person per day, charged the same for adults and children.
excludes.zh: 小费：游客支付导游和司机小费一共10欧/人/天，大小同价。

excludes.en: Meals: apart from the specialty meals included in the itinerary, lunches and dinners are not included.
excludes.zh: 餐饮：除行程内包含的特色餐外，行程中不包含午、晚正餐费用。

excludes.en: Admission: tickets for sights not explicitly marked as included (including but not limited to anything marked "exterior", "recommended", "optional", "experience" or any item not stated as included).
excludes.zh: 门票：行程中未注明费用包含的景点（包括但不仅限于注明“外观”“推荐”“可选”“体验”等所有未提及费用包含的项目）。

excludes.en: Extended stays: any extra accommodation, transport or sightseeing beyond the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 延长住宿：行程外额外延长的住宿、交通、观光费用。

excludes.en: Personal spending: drinks and alcohol, taxis, phone charges and other personal expenses.
excludes.zh: 私人消费：饮料酒类、出租车、电话费等个人消费。

excludes.en: Other transport: transport other than the business van or minibus, such as the Venice gondola, sightseeing trains in vehicle-restricted zones, and electric rental cars.
excludes.zh: 其他交通：商务旅行车或中巴之外的其他交通费用，如威尼斯贡多拉、车辆限行区的观光火车、电瓶出租车等。

excludes.en: Free-time activities: transport, meals, admission and shopping arising from evening self-guided touring and recommended optional activities.
excludes.zh: 自由活动：夜间自行游览及推荐项目产生的交通、餐饮、门票、购物费用。

excludes.en: Experience activities: any travel experience activities not included in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 体验活动：行程中未包含的各项旅游体验活动。

excludes.en: Other costs: any costs not mentioned in the inclusions, and extra costs arising from force majeure.
excludes.zh: 其他费用：费用包含中未提及的费用，及不可抗力导致的额外费用。

timeline.title_en: Rome — the Eternal City
timeline.title_zh: 罗马——重温“万城之城”古罗马帝国的辉煌
timeline.description_en: After meeting up, explore Rome, the historic and cultural capital known as the "Eternal City" and the birthplace of the ancient Roman Empire. View the Colosseum (exterior) and the Pantheon (exterior), then stroll through the Spanish Steps (Piazza di Spagna) and the Trevi Fountain (exterior). From 14:00 you may check in to the hotel with your booking confirmation, or leave your luggage at the front desk beforehand. Note that the main sights of Rome's old town lie within the vehicle-restricted ZTL zone, so the day is on foot — about 5 km round trip — please wear comfortable shoes. Overnight: Rome riverside palace hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 当天集合后游览世界著名的历史文化名城罗马，这里是古罗马帝国的发祥地，因历史悠久而被称为“永恒之城”。参观矗立在古罗马都城遗址上的斗兽场（外观）、万神殿（外观），并游览西班牙广场和特莱维喷泉（许愿池，外观）。当天14点后可凭订单自行入住酒店，或提前将行李寄存在酒店前台。罗马古城区内的主要景点均位于车辆禁行区（ZTL）内，当天为步行游览，往返约5公里，请穿着轻便舒适。夜宿：罗马河畔宫殿酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Rome → Pienza → Siena → San Gimignano → Florence
timeline.title_zh: 罗马→皮恩扎→锡耶纳→圣吉米尼亚诺→佛罗伦萨
timeline.description_en: In the morning head to Pienza to walk the cypress lane and explore the old town and Pienza Cathedral (exterior), the Renaissance "ideal city" built by Pope Pius II overlooking the UNESCO-listed Val d'Orcia. Continue to Siena to wander the medieval old town, viewing Siena Cathedral (exterior), the shell-shaped Piazza del Campo, the Town Hall (exterior) and the Torre del Mangia (exterior). Then visit the hilltop town of San Gimignano — the "Medieval Manhattan" — to see the Torre Grossa (exterior), its Town Hall (exterior) and the triangular Piazza della Cisterna (Well Square). Overnight: Florence Tuscan villa hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往皮恩扎，游览丝柏小路和皮恩扎古城、皮恩扎大教堂（外观）等景点——这座由教皇皮乌斯二世主持重建的“理想城市”典范，可从城墙上俯瞰世界遗产奥尔恰山谷（Val d'Orcia）。随后前往锡耶纳，游览锡耶纳古城、锡耶纳大教堂（外观）、形似贝壳的田野广场、市政厅（外观）及曼吉亚塔楼（外观）。之后前往圣吉米尼亚诺小镇，外观格罗萨塔楼、市政厅（外观）和水井广场——这座以保存完好的中世纪塔楼闻名的山城，被誉为“中世纪曼哈顿”。夜宿：佛罗伦萨托斯卡纳别墅酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Florence → Cinque Terre → Pisa → Florence
timeline.title_zh: 佛罗伦萨→五渔村→比萨→佛罗伦萨
timeline.description_en: Set off in the morning for Pisa to see the Leaning Tower of Pisa (exterior) and the UNESCO-listed Piazza dei Miracoli (Square of Miracles), home to the cathedral, baptistery, leaning bell tower and cemetery. Then travel to the Cinque Terre along the Ligurian coast to admire the five clifftop fishing villages — Monterosso al Mare, Vernazza, Corniglia, Manarola and Riomaggiore — riding the scenic train that links them. Return to Florence for the night. Note: if bad weather or a rail strike makes the Cinque Terre inaccessible, the day automatically switches to a coach or other means of touring the coastal towns. Overnight: Florence Tuscan villa hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午出发前往比萨，游览比萨斜塔（外观）和比萨历史文化中心的奇迹广场（Piazza dei Miracoli）——这片被列入世界遗产的区域汇集了比萨主教座堂、洗礼堂、斜塔（钟楼）和墓园。随后前往五渔村，沿利古里亚海岸线游览悬崖上的五座美丽渔村——蒙特罗索、韦尔纳扎、科尔尼利亚、马纳罗拉及里奥马焦雷，并乘坐串联五村的景观小火车。之后返回佛罗伦萨入住。备注：如遇恶劣天气或铁路公司罢工等因素导致无法游览五渔村，行程将自动更改为乘坐大巴车或其它形式游览海岸线城市。夜宿：佛罗伦萨托斯卡纳别墅酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Florence → Venice
timeline.title_zh: 佛罗伦萨→威尼斯
timeline.description_en: Spend the morning in Florence, the cradle of the Renaissance: visit the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore (the world's third-largest church, entered by queue), the Piazza della Signoria with its open-air sculptures, and the Ponte Vecchio (Old Bridge) over the Arno. Climb to Piazzale Michelangelo for a panoramic view of the whole city glowing in the sunlight. In the afternoon depart for Venice. Overnight: Venice voco / Venice Four Points by Sheraton or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午出发游览文艺复兴发源地佛罗伦萨，参观世界第三大教堂——圣母百花大教堂（需排队进入）、有露天雕塑博物馆之称的市政广场，以及阿诺河上的维奇奥桥（老桥）。登上城东南的米开朗基罗广场，居高俯瞰，全城风景尽收眼底，在阳光笼罩下焕发出不同的光彩。下午出发前往威尼斯。夜宿：威尼斯洲际voco酒店或威尼斯福朋喜来登酒店，或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Venice → Milan
timeline.title_zh: 威尼斯→米兰
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, explore Venice freely: St. Mark's Basilica (exterior), St. Mark's Square, the Bridge of Sighs (exterior) and the magnificent Doge's Palace (exterior). These beautiful buildings rising from the water, threaded together by winding canals, make Venice's romance linger long in memory. In the afternoon travel to Milan and check in. Overnight: UNA Hotel Milan or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，自由参观圣马可大教堂（外观）、圣马可广场、叹息桥（外观）和华丽的总督宫（外观）。这些建造在水上的美丽建筑与蜿蜒的水巷一起，让威尼斯的浪漫风情久久挥之不去。下午前往米兰入住酒店。夜宿：米兰UNA酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Milan → Zurich
timeline.title_zh: 米兰→苏黎世
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, freely visit Milan's landmark Duomo (exterior) and the Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II, one of Europe's most beautiful shopping arcades. In the afternoon travel along the Alps to Zurich, the financial capital, and explore the Old Town, Lake Zurich, the Lindenhof hill park and a stroll along the Limmat river, plus a view of Zurich's Grossmünster cathedral (exterior). Overnight: Crowne Plaza Zurich or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，自由参观米兰的标志性建筑米兰主教堂（外观）和欧洲漂亮的商业拱廊之一——埃马努埃莱二世长廊。下午沿阿尔卑斯山脉前往金融之都苏黎世，参观苏黎世老城、苏黎世湖、林登霍夫公园，并漫步利马特河边，外观苏黎世大教堂。夜宿：苏黎世皇冠假日酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Zurich → Lucerne → Lungern → Interlaken (GoldenPass scenic train)
timeline.title_zh: 苏黎世→卢塞恩→龙疆→因特拉肯（金色山口列车）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, drive to Lucerne to enjoy Lake Lucerne's scenery, the Lion Monument that tells of the Swiss Guards' loyalty, the Chapel Bridge (Kapellbrücke) and the octagonal water tower. Then board Switzerland's classic GoldenPass panoramic train (the Lucerne–Lungern Express) to Lungern, taking in the country's beautiful scenery before exploring the village of Lungern. Continue to Interlaken to wander Höheweg street and the Höhematte park, where tranquil villages nestle among greenery between mountain and water. Overnight: Grand Hotel Giessbach (the "music academy" of Crash Landing on You) or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，前往卢塞恩，游览卢塞恩湖的湖光山色，在狮子纪念碑前聆听瑞士人忠贞坚毅的那段历史，并欣赏卡贝尔廊桥和八角形水塔等景点。之后乘坐瑞士经典的景观列车“金色山口”（卢塞恩—龙疆段）前往龙疆，沿途欣赏瑞士的秀美景色，并游览龙疆小镇。随后前往因特拉肯，自由游览何维克街和荷黑马特，宁静的村庄绿树掩映、点缀于山水之间，人与自然浑然一体。夜宿：吉斯巴赫酒店（《爱的迫降》“巴赫音乐学院”取景地）或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Interlaken → Jungfrau region → Interlaken
timeline.title_zh: 因特拉肯→少女峰地区→因特拉肯
timeline.description_en: In the morning head into the Jungfrau region. You may ride with the group to see the red Swiss train at Wilderswil, the fairytale scenery of Lauterbrunnen, and Grindelwald at the foot of the Jungfrau; or, at your own expense, take Europe's highest railway via Grindelwald and Kleine Scheidegg up to the Jungfrau, ascending the Sphinx Observatory to look out over the snow-capped peak and the Aletsch Glacier, Europe's largest, before passing Lauterbrunnen with its alpine scenery and waterfalls. Overnight: Grand Hotel Giessbach or an equivalent 4-star hotel; Giessbach offers base room types, randomly assigned with no guarantee of size, view or aspect.
timeline.description_zh: 上午出发前往少女峰地区，可选择随车前往维尔德斯维尔观赏红色瑞士火车、劳特布龙嫩的瑞士童话风景，随后来到少女峰脚下的格林德尔瓦尔德；或者自费乘坐欧洲海拔较高的铁路，途经滑雪远足圣地格林德尔瓦尔德，再由小夏戴客（Kleine Scheidegg）登上迷人的少女峰，前往“斯芬克斯观景台”俯瞰白雪皑皑的少女峰和欧洲较大较长的“阿莱奇冰川”（Aletsch），之后途经劳特布龙嫩，欣赏美丽的高山风光和瀑布群。夜宿：吉斯巴赫酒店（巴赫音乐学院）或同等4星级酒店；吉斯巴赫房型为基础房型，不指定大小、风景和朝向，均为随机分配。

timeline.title_en: Interlaken → Montreux → Vevey → Lausanne → Port (5-star Relais & Châteaux castle)
timeline.title_zh: 因特拉肯→蒙特勒→沃韦→洛桑→波尔莱斯内（入住五星罗莱夏朵古堡酒店）
timeline.description_en: In the morning go to Montreux to see the Château de Chillon (exterior) reflected on Lake Geneva, then enjoy the storybook scenic drive around Lake Geneva. Continue to Lausanne, passing the UNESCO World Heritage Lavaux vineyard terraces, stopping at the Ouchy waterfront lined with cafés and restaurants, and freely visiting the Olympic Park (Lausanne is the Olympic capital, home to the IOC and Olympic Museum). Then head to Port for the night. Overnight: Relais & Châteaux castle hotel or an equivalent 5-star hotel; base room types are randomly assigned with no guarantee of size, view or aspect.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往蒙特勒，欣赏倒影在湖水中的西庸城堡（外观）；之后迎来最精彩的环日内瓦湖、宛如童话仙境的瑞士景观之途。前往洛桑，途经绵延的拉沃葡萄园梯田——这不仅是美丽风景更是珍贵的世界文化遗产；在乌希码头停留，沿岸布满咖啡厅、餐厅和酒店，并自由游览奥林匹克公园（洛桑为奥林匹克之都，国际奥委会与奥林匹克博物馆均在此）。之后前往波尔莱斯内入住五星罗莱夏朵城堡酒店。夜宿：罗莱夏朵城堡酒店或同等5星级酒店；为基础房型，不指定大小、风景和朝向，均为随机分配。

timeline.title_en: Port → Dijon → Paris (Burgundy wine country)
timeline.title_zh: 波尔莱斯内→第戎→巴黎（勃艮第美景美食之都）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, travel to Dijon — the home of wine, snails, rose mustard and white Charolais cattle — to visit the old town and the Church of Notre-Dame de Dijon. After lunch, head into the Burgundy wine region to tour a winery's courtyard, production workshop, vineyards and cellars, with a professional sommelier providing the tasting and in-depth commentary. Then continue to Paris. Overnight: Mercure / Novotel Paris or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，前往红酒、蜗牛、玫瑰芥末及白牛的原产地第戎，参观第戎老城和第戎圣母院。午餐后前往勃艮第大区葡萄产区，参观勃艮第酒庄的庭院、生产工坊、葡萄园及酒窖，由酒庄专业侍酒师负责侍酒服务和深度讲解。随后前往巴黎市区美居或诺富特酒店。夜宿：巴黎美居或诺富特酒店，或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Paris → Versailles → Paris
timeline.title_zh: 巴黎→凡尔赛→巴黎
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, travel to the Palace of Versailles in Paris's southwestern suburbs for a guided tour of this masterpiece of Baroque and the starting point of Rococo art. In the afternoon return to central Paris and head to the fashion district along Boulevard Haussmann and Rue Royale, with free time around the Paris Opera (exterior), Printemps and Galeries Lafayette department stores. Overnight: Mercure / Novotel Paris or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往位于巴黎西南部郊区的凡尔赛宫，由讲解员深度讲解游览凡尔赛宫——这座巴洛克的登峰之作、洛可可艺术的起点。下午返回巴黎市区，随后前往巴黎时尚中心奥斯曼大街和皇家大道，自由参观巴黎歌剧院（外观）及春天百货、巴黎老佛爷等时尚街区。夜宿：巴黎美居或诺富特酒店，或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Paris → Louvre → Paris (tour ends)
timeline.title_zh: 巴黎→卢浮宫→巴黎（行程结束）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, visit the Louvre, one of the world's oldest museums, with a curated themed commentary by a French national-museum guide. Then tour Notre-Dame de Paris, the Île de la Cité, the Eiffel Tower (exterior) and the Champ de Mars, followed by a Seine river cruise passing Les Invalides (exterior), the Grand and Petit Palais (exterior), Place de la Concorde and other sights. After a full day of central-Paris sightseeing, the tour ends at the beautiful Place d'Italie in Paris (around 18:00). Overnight: none.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后参观法兰西引以为傲的卢浮宫博物馆，届时由法兰西国家馆讲解师精选主题深度讲解。随后游览巴黎圣母院、西岱岛、埃菲尔铁塔（外观）以及战神广场，之后乘坐塞纳河游船游览荣军院（外观）、大小皇宫（外观）、协和广场等地。全天游览巴黎市中心景点，最后在美丽的巴黎意大利广场结束行程（约18:00）。夜宿：无。

meeting_en: Rome, Italy. Group meets in Rome on Day 1; hotel self check-in from 14:00. International flights into Rome and out of Paris are not included.
meeting_zh: 意大利罗马。第1天在罗马集合，14点后可自行入住酒店。往返国际机票（抵达罗马、离开巴黎）不含。

faqs.question_en: Where and when do we meet and disperse?
faqs.question_zh: 集合及集散地点？
faqs.answer_en: The tour starts in Rome and ends in Paris. On Day 1 at 09:00 we meet at the Rome hotel where you stay that night (check-in from 14:00; luggage can be stored beforehand). On Day 12 at around 18:00 the group disperses at Place d'Italie in central Paris. Flights departing Paris on the final day are not recommended.
faqs.answer_zh: 罗马出发、巴黎结束。第1天09:00在罗马当晚入住酒店集合（14:00办理入住，可寄存行李）。第12天约18:00在巴黎市区意大利广场解散。不推荐结束当天离开巴黎的航班。

faqs.question_en: Can I do the Interlaken paragliding?
faqs.question_zh: 是否可体验因特拉肯滑翔伞？
faqs.answer_en: It is not included. Paragliding is an extreme sport not covered by ordinary travel insurance; the guide handles the shuttle transfer and guests join at their own expense.
faqs.answer_zh: 不包含。滑翔伞属极限运动，普通旅游保险不含；导游负责接驳，游客自费参加。

faqs.question_en: Can I take the Jungfrau panoramic cable car to the top and visit the Sphinx Observatory?
faqs.question_zh: 是否可游览少女峰全景缆车登顶及“斯芬克斯观景台”？
faqs.answer_en: Not included; you can make your own way there from Interlaken Ost (East) station.
faqs.answer_zh: 不包含；可在因特拉肯东站自行前往游览。

faqs.question_en: Can I do the Jungfrau / First clifftop trail?
faqs.question_zh: 是否可游览少女峰菲斯特栈道？
faqs.answer_en: Not included; you can follow the guide to Grindelwald and then freely explore First on your own (about 5 hours), before meeting the guide again at Interlaken Ost (East) station.
faqs.answer_zh: 不包含；可跟随导游前往格林德尔瓦尔德后自由游览First（约5小时），再到因特拉肯东站与导游汇合。

faqs.question_en: Can the Jungfrau scenic train and the Jungfrau-region sights be done together?
faqs.question_zh: 少女峰观光列车与少女峰地区景点能否同时参加？
faqs.answer_en: No. The scenic train conflicts with the "dreamy hillside" and the "red train station" sights, so they cannot be visited on the same day.
faqs.answer_zh: 观光列车与“梦幻山坡”“红色火车站”有冲突，不能同时游览。

faqs.question_en: Does the Jungfrau scenic train clash with paragliding / the Brienz cog railway / the Interlaken lake cruise?
faqs.question_zh: 少女峰观光列车与滑翔伞/布里恩茨齿轮火车/因特拉肯游船是否冲突？
faqs.answer_en: Taking the train in the morning causes no clash; taking it from the afternoon into the evening may mean you cannot do all of the Giessbach activities.
faqs.answer_zh: 上午乘坐无冲突；下午至晚间乘坐可能无法体验吉斯巴赫全部项目。

faqs.question_en: What is the best plan for the Jungfrau region?
faqs.question_zh: 少女峰地区最佳方案？
faqs.answer_en: Plan A — Relaxation tour: spend the whole day at the Giessbach scenic area (waterfall, lakeside, boat cruise, cog railway; available April–October). Plan B — Easy package: tour with the guide (included in the price). Plan C — Hardcore: Jungfrau scenic train plus Giessbach. Plan D — Extreme: First clifftop trail, zip-line and paragliding (not included in the price).
faqs.answer_zh: A养生游（全天吉斯巴赫风景区，含瀑布/湖畔/游船/齿轮火车，4-10月）；B懒人包（跟随导游游览，费用包含）；C特种兵（少女峰景观列车+吉斯巴赫）；D极限游（菲斯特栈道+飞索+滑翔伞，费用不含）。

faqs.question_en: Can I visit the village of Lungern?
faqs.question_zh: 是否可游览龙疆小镇？
faqs.answer_en: Yes, but it conflicts with the GoldenPass scenic train — you can only choose one of the two.
faqs.answer_zh: 可，但与金色山口列车冲突，二选一。

faqs.question_en: Can you help book the Maison Jeunet Michelin restaurant?
faqs.question_zh: 可否协助预订 Maison Jeunet 米其林餐厅？
faqs.answer_en: Yes. On the Plan B route a dinner is recommended (8-course menu, EUR 195, drinks not included); on the Plan A route lunch is an option (from EUR 85). You must confirm the booking yourself and provide a credit card as guarantee.
faqs.answer_zh: 可。B线推荐晚餐（8道式195欧，不含酒水）；A线可选午餐（85欧起）。需本人确认预订并提供信用卡担保。

faqs.question_en: Can I book airport transfers?
faqs.question_zh: 可否预订机场接送？
faqs.answer_en: Yes. Select the airport transfer for the relevant city among the cost options, and note your flight number in the order remarks.
faqs.answer_zh: 可，在费用选项中选择对应城市机场接送，并在订单备注航班号。

faqs.question_en: Can I book hotels before or after the tour?
faqs.question_zh: 可否预订行程前后的酒店？
faqs.answer_en: The itinerary does not require early arrival and connects seamlessly with Paris/Rome return flights. If your flight is delayed, the transfer driver can help you join the group directly in the departure city.
faqs.answer_zh: 行程不要求提前到达，无缝衔接巴黎/罗马往返航班；如晚点，接送机司机可协助在出发城市直接参团。

faqs.question_en: Do I need a visa?
faqs.question_zh: 是否需要签证？
faqs.answer_en: Yes. This product does not include the visa fee; you arrange a Schengen visa yourself (single or multiple entry). After booking, we provide the full checklist of materials for the Schengen visa application free of charge. Your passport must be valid for at least 6 months from the date of departure. Visa fees, visa service fees, Schengen insurance fees and visa-center appointment fees are all non-refundable. Under the "Visa Worry-Free" guarantee: if you sign the contract at least 61 days before departure and do not obtain the visa within 45 days before departure, the travel fee is refunded in full (see the terms for details).
faqs.answer_zh: 需要。本产品不含签证费用，需自行办理申根签证（单次或多次入境）。预订后免费提供办理申根签证的全部材料清单。护照有效期需在离境之日起至少6个月。签证费、签证服务费、申根保险费、签证中心预约费均不可退款。“保签无忧”：出发前61天签约，若出发前45天内未获签证，全额退还旅游费用（详见条款）。

faqs.question_en: Booking, changes & cancellation notes
faqs.question_zh: 预订、变更与取消须知
faqs.answer_en: Free cancellation is available up to 30 days before departure. You are asked to arrive at the meeting point one day before the tour starts and leave one day after it ends, allowing reasonable time to connect flights. A group forms once 10 travelers join; either side may withdraw if the group is not filled 30 days before departure. Base room types are randomly assigned; solo travelers pay a single-supplement deposit by default (refunded pro rata if a roommate is matched). European hotels are non-smoking, check-in 14:00 / check-out 11:00, and most have no air-conditioning. Pricing is in EUR; payment in CNY is settled at the Bank of China EUR selling rate on the day of payment, adjusted in real time with exchange-rate fluctuations. Key itinerary notes: the Louvre is name-registered and capacity-limited (if access is limited the EUR 20 in-museum commentary fee is refunded; for Versailles, groups under 3 use an audio guide instead of a live guide); in spring/summer/autumn (2026/4/3–10/11) the trip includes the Giessbach cog railway and the Interlaken lake cruise, otherwise these are replaced by a Lake Lucerne cruise; the GoldenPass train's Lucerne–Lungern leg has no guide accompaniment; the Cinque Terre may be limited to a single village or switched to coach depending on time/weather/strikes; Capri's Blue Grotto may close depending on tides/weather (the Blue Grotto fee is not included; a tip of EUR 2–5 applies per local custom); in extreme sea conditions the Positano/Amalfi sea cruise is cancelled and refunded; paragliding is a high-risk, self-paid activity.
faqs.answer_zh: 出发前30天可无理由取消。要求旅游者于开团前一天抵达集合地、结束后一天离开，并预留合理的航班衔接时间。拼团成团人数为10人；开团前30天未成团，双方均可解约。酒店为基础房型随机分配；单人报名默认含单房差押金，拼房成功后按比例退还。欧洲酒店禁烟，入住14:00/退房11:00，多数无空调。以欧元计价，人民币按支付当日中行欧元卖出价结算，汇率波动即时调整。重要行程提示：卢浮宫实名制并限流（限流时退还馆内讲解费20欧/人；凡尔赛不足3人由讲解器代替官导）；春夏秋季（2026/4/3–10/11）含吉斯巴赫齿轮火车与因特拉肯游船，其余期间替换为卢塞恩湖游船；金色山口列车卢塞恩-龙疆段无导游陪同；五渔村视时间/天气/罢工可能仅游览个别村或改为大巴；卡布里藍洞视潮汐/天气可能关闭（藍洞费用不含，按当地习俗付2-5欧小费）；海上极端天气时取消波西塔诺/阿马尔菲出海并退费；滑翔伞为高风险自费项目。

faqs.question_en: Health & safety requirements
faqs.question_zh: 健康与安全须知
faqs.answer_en: Please have a necessary medical check-up before travel. Do not sign up if you have any of the following: infectious diseases; serious cardiovascular/cerebrovascular or respiratory disease; mental illness; severe anemia; or recovery from major/medium surgery. Pregnancy: travelers at 35 weeks or more may not join; at 28 weeks or more a doctor's certificate and consent form are required; under 28 weeks a waiver must be signed and adventure/skiing/sea-cruise/high-altitude/outdoor activities are not allowed. Travelers with disabilities need a doctor's certificate, an accompanying immediate family member, and must apply at least 61 days in advance. Travelers over 70 need a health certificate and family escort, and the long itinerary requires a degree of walking ability. Minors (under 18) must be accompanied by an immediate relative/guardian; without parents present an authorization letter is required. Infants under 2 are not accepted. Children under 6 or under 30 kg must have a confirmed child safety seat. Under Article 15 of the Tourism Law, travelers must truthfully declare their health information and observe all safety warnings.
faqs.answer_zh: 出行前请做必要体检。下列情况请勿报名：传染病、严重心脑血管/呼吸系统疾病、精神病、严重贫血、大中型手术恢复期。孕妇：≥35周不可参团，≥28周需医生证明及同意书，<28周需签免责书且不可参加探险/滑雪/出海/高空/户外项目。残疾人需医生证明、直系家属陪同并提前61天申请。70岁以上需健康证明、家属陪同，行程较长需一定步行能力。未成年（<18）须直系亲属/监护人陪同，无父母陪同需授权书；不接受2周岁以下婴儿；6岁以下或<30公斤儿童需确认安全座椅。依《旅游法》第15条，旅游者须如实告知健康信息并遵守安全警示。

title_en: Italy in 6 Days: Tuscany, Cinque Terre & the Dolomites Small-Group Tour
title_zh: 意大利6天享乐小团：托斯卡纳、五渔村与多洛米蒂
short_en: A 6-day one-way small-group journey from Rome to Milan through Tuscany's cypress hills, the Cinque Terre, Florence, Venice and the Dolomites.
short_zh: 6天单程小团，从罗马一路畅游至米兰，串联托斯卡纳柏树田园、五渔村、佛罗伦萨、威尼斯与多洛米蒂山。
desc_en: This 6-day small-group tour traces a relaxed one-way route from Rome up to Milan, blending Tuscany's golden countryside with art cities and Alpine drama. Wander the medieval lanes of Pienza and Siena, ride the scenic train through the cliffside villages of the Cinque Terre, marvel at the Leaning Tower of Pisa, soak up Renaissance Florence and romantic Venice, then climb by cable car into the Dolomites before ending beside Lake Garda and at Milan's Gothic cathedral. With two nights in a five-star Tuscan spa hotel and three nights in city-centre four-star hotels, it pairs iconic sights with comfortable, unhurried pacing.
desc_zh: 这条6天小团线路以舒适的单程方式从罗马一路向北抵达米兰，把托斯卡纳的金色田园、艺术名城与阿尔卑斯山的壮丽风光融为一体。漫步皮恩扎与锡耶纳的中世纪街巷，乘景观列车穿行五渔村悬崖上的彩色渔村，仰望比萨斜塔，沉浸于文艺复兴之都佛罗伦萨与浪漫水城威尼斯，再乘缆车登上多洛米蒂山，最后在加尔达湖畔与米兰哥特式大教堂前结束旅程。两晚入住五星托斯卡纳SPA酒店、三晚入住市中心四星酒店，经典景点与从容节奏兼得。

highlights.en: Photograph Tuscany's iconic cypress-lined lanes and the UNESCO Val d'Orcia from the walls of medieval Pienza
highlights.zh: 在中世纪古城皮恩扎城墙俯瞰世界遗产奥尔恰谷，拍摄托斯卡纳标志性的柏树小径

highlights.en: Ride the scenic coastal train through the cliffside fairy-tale villages of the Cinque Terre
highlights.zh: 乘景观列车穿行五渔村，欣赏悬崖上五彩斑斓的童话渔村

highlights.en: See the Leaning Tower of Pisa and the Square of Miracles, then explore Renaissance Florence and its Duomo
highlights.zh: 打卡比萨斜塔与奇迹广场，再走进文艺复兴之都佛罗伦萨，参观圣母百花大教堂

highlights.en: Discover romantic Venice — St Mark's Square, the Bridge of Sighs and winding canals — with included island ferry
highlights.zh: 畅游浪漫水城威尼斯——圣马可广场、叹息桥与蜿蜒水巷，含威尼斯登岛轮渡

highlights.en: Ride cable cars into the Dolomites at Seceda or Alpe di Siusi for sweeping Alpine meadow and peak views
highlights.zh: 乘缆车登上多洛米蒂的刀锋山或休斯高原，饱览高山草甸与峰峦风光

highlights.en: Relax beside Lake Garda and finish at Milan's Gothic Duomo and the Vittorio Emanuele II Galleria
highlights.zh: 在加尔达湖畔小憩，于米兰大教堂与埃马努埃莱二世长廊收尾

highlights.en: Two nights in a five-star Tuscan spa hotel plus three nights in city-centre four-star hotels — no constant repacking
highlights.zh: 两晚五星托斯卡纳SPA酒店连住、三晚市中心四星酒店，省去频繁换房奔波

highlights.en: All-inclusive pricing with a 6-15 guest leisure small group, professional Chinese-speaking guide and no forced shopping
highlights.zh: 一价全含的6-15人享乐小团，专业中文导游全程讲解，绝无强制购物

includes.en: [Hotels] 5 nights of accommodation in total: 2 nights in 5-star hotels and 3 nights in comfort-class 4-star hotels.
includes.zh: 【酒店】五星酒店2晚，舒适型四星级酒店3晚，共5晚酒店。

includes.en: [Meals] 5 meals in total: hotel breakfasts or meals in other forms.
includes.zh: 【餐饮】酒店内早餐或其他形式餐饮共计5餐。

includes.en: [Taxes & fees] All taxes within the itinerary, including tourist city tax, city-entry fees, residence tax, road and bridge tolls, island-landing fees, etc.
includes.zh: 【税费】游客城市税、进城费、居住税、路桥费、登岛费等行程内的所有税费。

includes.en: [Transport] Tour coach.
includes.zh: 【交通】旅游巴士。

includes.en: [Guide] A professional driver plus a Chinese-speaking guide, or a Chinese-speaking driver-guide throughout (note: for groups of 8 or fewer, a business van plus a Chinese-speaking driver-guide is arranged, who leads the visits across all cities of the itinerary).
includes.zh: 【导游】职业司机+中文导游，或全程中文司机兼导游（备注：8人及以下则安排为商务旅行车+中文司机兼导游，届时将由司兼导带领游览全部城市行程）。

includes.en: [Luggage] One 23 kg checked bag and one carry-on bag.
includes.zh: 【行李】1件23公斤行李及1件随身行李。

includes.en: [Activities & tickets] Milan Cathedral, round-trip Seceda cable car, Cinque Terre scenic train, and the Venice island ferry.
includes.zh: 【活动及门票】米兰大教堂、刀锋山往返缆车、五渔村景观列车、威尼斯登岛轮渡。

excludes.en: Passport: personal passport fees.
excludes.zh: 护照：个人护照费用。

excludes.en: Visa: the tourist visa fees required for the destination countries listed in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 签证：行程中所列旅游国家所需的观光签证费用。

excludes.en: Insurance: travel insurance fees (if the itinerary involves high-risk sports, please verify whether your travel insurance covers that activity).
excludes.zh: 保险：旅游保险费用（如行程内涉及到高风险运动，请核实旅游保险是否包含该项运动）。

excludes.en: Tips: gratuities for the guide and driver, totalling EUR 10 per person per day, same rate for adults and children.
excludes.zh: 小费：游客支付导游和司机小费一共10欧/人/天，大小同价。

excludes.en: Meals: apart from the special meals included in the itinerary, lunches and dinners are not included.
excludes.zh: 餐饮：除行程内包含的特色餐外，行程中不包含午、晚正餐费用。

excludes.en: Admission: attractions not marked as fee-included in the itinerary (including but not limited to sights marked '(exterior)', and all 'recommended', 'optional', 'experience' and other items where inclusion is not stated; please pay on your own if you wish to enter).
excludes.zh: 门票：行程中未注明费用包含的景点（包括但不仅限于行程中注明“外观”的景点，以及“推荐”“可选”“体验”等所有未提及费用包含的项目，如游客需要参观，敬请自理）。

excludes.en: Extended stays: accommodation, transport and sightseeing costs for any extension beyond the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 延长住宿：行程外额外延长的住宿、交通、观光费用。

excludes.en: Personal spending: such as drinks and alcohol, taxis, phone charges and other personal expenses.
excludes.zh: 私人消费：如饮料酒类、出租车、电话费等个人消费。

excludes.en: Other transport: aside from the included business van or minibus, any transport not mentioned in the inclusions, such as a Venice gondola, and the sightseeing trains or electric taxis used in vehicle-restricted zones, are at your own expense.
excludes.zh: 其他交通：除包含商务旅行车或者中巴之外，费用包含中未提及的其他交通费用，如威尼斯贡多拉，以及车辆限行区的观光火车、电瓶出租车等费用敬请自理。

excludes.en: Free-time activities: guests' own evening sightseeing and recommended items during the trip, plus any transport, meals, admission and shopping costs they generate.
excludes.zh: 自由活动：游客夜间自行游览及行程中的推荐项目，以及产生的交通、餐饮、门票、购物等费用。

excludes.en: Experience activities: any travel-experience activities in the itinerary that are not included.
excludes.zh: 体验活动：行程中没有包含的各项旅游体验活动。

excludes.en: Other costs: anything not mentioned in the inclusions. If extra costs arise from force majeure such as natural disasters, war or strikes, or from special circumstances such as transport delays, flight cancellation or rescheduling, embassy visa delays or insufficient group numbers, or other causes not attributable to our company (e.g. overseas visa-extension fees, accommodation, meals and transport, national airfare adjustments), our company reserves the right to charge the difference.
excludes.zh: 其他费用：费用包含中未提及的费用。如因天灾、战争、罢工等不可抗力的原因，及因交通延阻、航班取消或更改时间、使馆延误出签证、人数不足等特殊情况或其他非我公司原因所引致的额外费（如在外延期签证费、住、食及交通费、国家航空运价调整等），我公司有权追加差价。

timeline.title_en: Rome - Pienza - Siena - Montecatini (Val d'Orcia cypress lane & medieval Siena)
timeline.title_zh: 罗马-皮恩扎-锡耶纳-蒙特卡蒂尼（奥尔恰谷丝柏树小径与中世纪锡耶纳）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast we set off into the soul of Tuscany, the cypress-lined lane (Cypress Road) where you are free to take photos of the rolling hills, vineyards and rows of Italian cypress trees that symbolize the Val d'Orcia. We then visit the hilltop old town of Pienza, the birthplace of Pope Pius II and a Renaissance 'ideal city', strolling Piazza Pio II and seeing Pienza Cathedral (exterior); from the town walls you can look out over the UNESCO World Heritage Val d'Orcia. After lunch we continue to the medieval old town of Siena to see Siena Cathedral (exterior), Piazza del Campo (the shell-shaped Field Square), Siena's Town Hall / Palazzo Pubblico (exterior) and the Torre del Mangia bell tower (exterior). We then transfer into the Tuscany region for the night. Overnight: Montecatini Terme SPA hotel in Tuscany or an equivalent 5-star hotel, set in the famous spa resort town of Montecatini with two pools (indoor and outdoor), a forest-view sauna and a 40,000-square-metre private park.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，我们出发前往托斯卡纳的灵魂——丝柏树小径自由拍照，欣赏连绵起伏的山丘、葡萄藤和成排的意大利柏树，这正是奥尔恰谷（Val d'Orcia）的经典写照。随后游览山丘上的皮恩扎古城，这里是教皇庇护二世的出生地、文艺复兴“理想城市”的典范，漫步二世广场，观赏皮恩扎大教堂（外观）；从城墙上可俯瞰世界遗产奥尔恰山谷的景致。午餐后继续前往中世纪的锡耶纳古城，游览锡耶纳大教堂（外观）、田野广场（因形似贝壳又称贝壳广场）、锡耶纳市政厅（外观）以及曼吉亚塔楼（外观）等景点。之后前往托斯卡纳大区入住酒店。夜宿：托斯卡纳蒙特卡蒂尼SPA酒店或同等5星级酒店——坐落于著名康养度假地蒙特卡蒂尼，设有室内外两个泳池、森林景观桑拿房及占地4万平方米的私人公园。

timeline.title_en: Montecatini - Cinque Terre - Pisa - Montecatini (scenic train along the five clifftop villages)
timeline.title_zh: 蒙特卡蒂尼-五渔村-比萨-蒙特卡蒂尼（景观列车游览悬崖上的五彩童话五渔村）
timeline.description_en: In the morning we head to La Spezia to visit Cinque Terre, riding the scenic train along the Ligurian coastline to admire the beautiful fishing villages perched on the cliffs above the Mediterranean. Cinque Terre is the collective name for the five clifftop villages of Monterosso al Mare, Vernazza, Corniglia, Manarola and Riomaggiore, listed as a UNESCO World Heritage Site in 1997. In the afternoon we continue to Pisa to see the Leaning Tower of Pisa (exterior) and the Piazza dei Miracoli (Square of Miracles) at the heart of the city's historic centre, with its cathedral, baptistery, bell tower and cemetery. We then transfer back into the Tuscany region for the night. Note: if bad weather or a railway strike makes Cinque Terre impossible to visit, the itinerary automatically changes to touring the coastal towns by coach or other means. Overnight: Montecatini Terme SPA hotel in Tuscany or an equivalent 5-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午出发前往拉斯佩齐亚游览五渔村，沿利古里亚海岸线乘坐景观小火车，欣赏悬崖之上的美丽渔村。五渔村是蒙特罗索、韦尔纳扎、科尔尼利亚、马纳罗拉及里奥马焦雷这五个悬崖边村镇的统称，1997年被联合国教科文组织列入世界文化遗产名录。下午前往比萨，游览比萨斜塔（外观）和比萨历史文化中心的奇迹广场（Piazza dei Miracoli），广场上汇集主教座堂、洗礼堂、钟楼（斜塔）与墓园四大建筑。之后前往托斯卡纳大区入住酒店。备注：如遇恶劣天气或铁路公司罢工等因素导致无法游览五渔村，行程将自动更改为乘坐大巴或其它形式游览海岸线城市。夜宿：托斯卡纳蒙特卡蒂尼SPA酒店或同等5星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Montecatini - Florence - Venice (the cradle of the Renaissance)
timeline.title_zh: 蒙特卡蒂尼-佛罗伦萨-威尼斯（文艺复兴的发源地，艺术之旅）
timeline.description_en: In the morning we set out for Florence, the birthplace of the Renaissance, to tour the old city's landmarks: the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore (Florence Cathedral, the world's third-largest cathedral, entry requires queuing), the Piazza della Signoria, the Ponte Vecchio (Old Bridge over the Arno, built in 1345, where Dante is said to have met Beatrice), and the Piazza Santa Croce with the Basilica of Santa Croce (exterior), the Gothic church that is the resting place of Michelangelo and Galileo. The Piazza della Signoria is an open-air sculpture museum holding the Palazzo Vecchio, a copy of Michelangelo's David and the Fountain of Neptune. We then transfer to Venice to check in. Overnight: voco Venice / Hilton Garden Inn Venice or an equivalent 4-star hotel, a stylish, newly renovated property with a fitness room, lounge bar and the Ludico Venice restaurant serving Italian cuisine.
timeline.description_zh: 上午出发前往文艺复兴的发源地佛罗伦萨，参观老城景点：世界第三大教堂——圣母百花大教堂（需排队进入）、市政广场、维奇奥桥（老桥，建于1345年，相传但丁在此邂逅少女比阿特丽切），以及圣十字广场和圣十字大教堂（外观），这座哥特式教堂是米开朗基罗和伽利略的安息地。市政广场素有露天雕塑博物馆之称，坐落着维琪奥宫（旧宫）、米开朗基罗《大卫》雕像复制品及海神喷泉。之后前往威尼斯入住酒店。夜宿：威尼斯洲际VOCO酒店或希尔顿大使酒店或同等4星级酒店——这是威尼斯新装修的酒店之一，地理位置优越，设有健身房、酒廊酒吧，酒店的Ludico Venice餐厅供应意大利佳肴。

timeline.title_en: Venice - Trento (winding canals & romantic Venice)
timeline.title_zh: 威尼斯-特伦托（漫步蜿蜒水巷，邂逅浪漫威尼斯）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast we head to the water city of Venice, built across 118 islands and linked by 177 canals and 401 bridges. On arrival we visit St Mark's Basilica (exterior), founded in 829 AD, St Mark's Square (which Napoleon called 'the most beautiful drawing room in Europe'), the Bridge of Sighs (exterior, the route along which condemned prisoners were once led to the dungeons), and the magnificent Doge's Palace (exterior). Here you can also try Venice's signature multi-course squid-ink pasta meal (at your own expense). We then transfer to Trento to check in. Overnight: NH Trento or an equivalent 4-star hotel, a green, sustainable hotel designed by the Italian master architect Renzo Piano in Trento's modern Le Albere science-and-culture district, a short walk from the MUSE science museum and within easy reach of Trento's old town and cathedral along the Adige river.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后出发前往水城威尼斯，这座城市由118个小岛组成，以177条水道、401座桥梁连成一体。抵达后参观圣马可大教堂（外观，始建于公元829年）、圣马可广场（拿破仑称之为“欧洲最美丽的客厅”）、叹息桥（外观，古代由法院向监狱押送死囚的必经之路）以及华丽的总督宫（外观）。在这里您还可以品尝威尼斯特色的墨鱼面三道式大餐（自理）。随后前往特伦托入住酒店。夜宿：NH特伦托酒店或同等4星级酒店——坐落于特伦托现代感十足的阿尔贝雷（Le Albere）科学文化区，由意大利建筑大师Renzo Piano设计的绿色环保酒店，几步之遥即是特伦托科学博物馆MUSE，沿阿迪杰河散步可轻松抵达特伦托老城区和特伦托大教堂。

timeline.title_en: Trento - Bolzano - Ortisei - Funes Valley - Trento (cable car to Seceda & the Alpe di Siusi meadows)
timeline.title_zh: 特伦托-博尔扎诺-奥蒂塞伊-富内斯山谷-特伦托（缆车直达刀锋山，休斯高原欣赏草甸山谷）
timeline.description_en: In the morning we stroll the old town lanes of Bolzano, capital of South Tyrol, with its well-preserved medieval centre, Gothic and Renaissance architecture and the central Piazza Walther. We then continue to the elegant town of Ortisei in the Val Gardena, a Dolomites centre of art and woodcarving. From here you can take the cable car up to Seceda (the round-trip Seceda cable car is included) to overlook the jagged peaks of the Dolomites, or instead head up to the Alpe di Siusi high plateau to enjoy its rolling alpine meadows (the Alpe di Siusi cable car is an optional, ticketed extra not included in the tour). Due to time constraints, only one of the two can be visited that day; if the Seceda cable car is closed for operational reasons, the visit is switched to the Alpe di Siusi (cable car included). We then go to the Funes Valley and the village of Santa Maddalena, photographing the Church of St John in Ranui (the 'lonely church', a small Baroque chapel built in 1744 set against the jagged Geisler peaks) from the exterior. We then return to the hotel. If a cable car cannot run due to extreme weather or maintenance, its fee is refunded to guests. Overnight: NH Trento or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往博尔扎诺老城，漫步于保存完好的中世纪老城街巷，欣赏哥特式与文艺复兴风格建筑，市中心的瓦尔特广场是城市的心脏。随后前往加尔代纳山谷中典雅的奥蒂塞伊小镇，这里是多洛米蒂著名的艺术与手工艺中心。可乘缆车登顶刀锋山（Seceda，含往返缆车）俯瞰多洛米蒂峰群锯齿状的壮丽山景，或前往休斯山高原草甸欣赏高山草原风光（休斯高原缆车为可选体验项目，需另行购票，费用不包含在行程内）。受当日行程时间限制，两处仅可择一参观；若刀锋山缆车因运营安排临时关闭，将统一调整为游览休斯高原（含缆车）。之后前往富内斯山谷，抵达圣马达莱娜村后外观打卡圣约翰小教堂（孤独教堂，一座建于1744年的巴洛克风格小教堂，背靠锯齿状的盖斯勒峰群），游览结束后返回酒店。如缆车因极端天气或例行检修无法乘坐，缆车费用将退还给游客。夜宿：NH特伦托酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Trento - Lake Garda - Milan (Gothic masterpiece cathedral & lakeside scenery)
timeline.title_zh: 特伦托-加尔达湖-米兰（瞻仰哥特教堂杰作，欣赏加尔达湖旖旎风光）
timeline.description_en: In the morning we head to Lake Garda (Lago di Garda), the lake set between the mighty Alps and the fertile Po Valley that spans the Lombardy, Veneto and Trentino-Alto Adige regions, to enjoy the lake-and-mountain scenery at the foot of the Alps. In the afternoon we tour Milan, the northern Italian city that blends classical elegance with modern energy: we see Sforza Castle (exterior), the 14th-century fortress that became the residence of the Sforza family and is now a city museum complex, then visit the Gothic masterpiece of Milan Cathedral (the Duomo, begun in 1386 and taking 500 years to complete, with hundreds of spires and thousands of marble statues), and stroll the Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II shopping arcade to take in Milan's refinement and luxury. The pleasant journey then ends. No hotel accommodation on this final day.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往加尔达湖（Lago di Garda），欣赏阿尔卑斯山脚下的湖光山色；加尔达湖坐落在雄伟的阿尔卑斯山和肥沃的波河谷之间，横跨伦巴第、威尼托与特伦蒂诺-上阿迪杰三个大区，是欧洲最美的湖泊之一。下午游览兼具古典气质与现代活力的北意名城米兰，参观斯福尔扎城堡（外观，14世纪由斯福尔扎伯爵兴建、后成为家族住所，现辟为博物馆群）；随后游览哥特式杰作米兰大教堂（始建于1386年，历时500年建成，数以百计的尖塔耸入云霄，白色大理石外墙雕刻着数千座雕像），漫步埃马努埃莱二世长廊，感受米兰的精致与奢华。最后结束愉快的旅行。当天无酒店住宿。

meeting_en: Tour departs from Rome, Italy. The journey is one-way and ends in Milan.
meeting_zh: 行程从意大利罗马出发，单程游览，最终于米兰结束。

faqs.question_en: Where and how do we meet and disperse?
faqs.question_zh: 集合及集散地点和方法是怎样的？
faqs.answer_en: The tour departs from Rome and ends in Milan. On Day 1 the group meets at 09:00 at Roma Tiburtina railway station or the lobby of the designated hotel. On Day 6 the group disperses around 17:30 in central Milan, and then again around 18:00 at Milan Malpensa Airport (MXP). These times and places are for reference; the actual departure time follows the final tour notice. We do not recommend booking a flight that arrives in Rome on the same day as the start; on the last day you may book an evening flight out of Milan.
faqs.answer_zh: 罗马出发，米兰结束。行程第1天09:00在Roma Tiburtina火车站/指定酒店大厅集合。行程第6天17:30左右在米兰市区解散，随后18:00左右在米兰马尔彭萨机场（MXP）解散。以上为参考时间及地点，实际出发时间以出团通知书为准。本产品不推荐预订当天抵达罗马的航班，结束当天可预订晚上离开米兰的航班。

faqs.question_en: Are the coach-travel times each day very long?
faqs.question_zh: 行程路线乘坐大巴时间会不会很久？
faqs.answer_en: This product is planned for an average of about 3-4 hours of travel time per day. Road traffic conditions are complex, especially within cities where congestion or other factors can increase driving time.
faqs.answer_zh: 该产品行程计划平均时间为每日3-4小时的行程时间。公路交通情况复杂，特别是市区内容易发生堵车或其它因素导致行车时间增加。

faqs.question_en: Can both the Seceda and the Alpe di Siusi cable cars be ridden on the same day?
faqs.question_zh: 刀锋山和休斯高原缆车当天是否都可乘坐游览？
faqs.answer_en: On the relevant day, the round-trip Seceda cable car fee is already included. The Alpe di Siusi cable car is an optional experience and its cost is at your own expense. Due to the time available that day, only one of the two sights can be visited. If the Seceda cable car is temporarily closed for operational reasons, the visit is uniformly switched to the Alpe di Siusi (cable car included); actual operating status follows the latest official notice from the scenic area.
faqs.answer_zh: 行程当日，我社已包含刀锋山往返缆车费用。休斯高原缆车为可选体验项目，相关费用需您自理。受当日行程时间限制，两个景点仅可择一参观。若刀锋山缆车因运营安排临时关闭，将统一调整为游览休斯高原（含缆车），实际运营情况以景区官方最新通知为准。

faqs.question_en: Can I choose to tour Cinque Terre by boat?
faqs.question_zh: 我是否可以选择乘船游览五渔村？
faqs.answer_en: Because boat tours are weather-dependent, this product does not include a Cinque Terre boat ticket. You may choose to tour by boat, but the train-ticket cost cannot be refunded or exchanged, and you must buy the boat ticket yourself, costing about EUR 40.
faqs.answer_zh: 由于乘船游览受气候影响，该产品并非包含五渔村船票，但是可以选择乘船游览，不过无法退换火车票的费用，并且需要自行购买船票，约40欧元。

faqs.question_en: Can we choose different menus and dishes for our dinners?
faqs.question_zh: 我们的晚餐是否能根据喜好选择不同的菜单和菜品？
faqs.answer_en: The dining recommended in the itinerary is all recommended local specialty meals, and the cost is not included, for example Venice's well-known black squid-ink pasta and Tuscany's steak. You cannot pick other dishes; if a recommended dish is not your first choice, you are free to choose other dining on your own.
faqs.answer_zh: 行程内推荐的餐饮全部为推荐当地特色餐，费用并未包含，比如威尼斯较著名的黑墨鱼面、托斯卡纳的牛排等。无法选择其它菜式，如果菜品并非您的首选，可以自行选择其他餐饮。

faqs.question_en: Do I need a visa?
faqs.question_zh: 是否需要签证？
faqs.answer_en: Yes. This product does not include any visa fee; you need a Schengen visa (single or multiple entry). If you need to arrange it, please choose a Schengen-visa product. After booking, we provide free of charge all materials needed to apply for the Schengen visa (refer to the detailed materials checklist). Your passport must be valid for at least six months from the date of departure, otherwise customs may refuse entry. The visa fee, visa service fee, Schengen insurance fee and visa-centre appointment fee are all non-refundable and non-transferable, even if the product itself is changed or cancelled. 'Visa worry-free' guarantee: for guests who sign a contract with us at least 61 days before departure, if the visa is not obtained within 45 days before departure, we bear all losses and immediately refund the full travel cost; guests who do not meet this clause and fail to obtain the visa are refunded per the change-and-cancellation terms. In case of refusal, you must notify us within 48 hours and provide the consulate's rejection letter; any supplementary or amended materials must be submitted within five days, and you may not unilaterally waive the 'visa defence' right.
faqs.answer_zh: 需要。本产品不包含签证费用，需办理申根签证（单次或多次入境）；如需办理请选择申根签证产品。预订后我社免费提供办理申根签证的全部材料（参考详细材料清单）。护照有效期需在离境之日起至少还有六个月，否则海关有权拒绝入境。签证费、签证服务费、申根保险费、签证中心预约费均不可退款，也无法更改使用者，即使产品退改签，签证费用也无法退款。保签无忧：游客在出发日前61天与我社签约的旅游产品，如在出发前45天内未获取签证，我社承担所有损失，立即退还全部旅游费用；不符合该条款的游客如未正常获取签证，将按照退改与取消条款退费。如遇拒签需在48小时内通知我社并出具使领馆拒签函，如需补充或更改材料须在五天内提交，且不得单方面放弃“签证抗辩”权利。

faqs.question_en: Booking, changes & cancellation
faqs.question_zh: 预订、变更与取消须知
faqs.answer_en: This is a circulating set-departure, shared (join-in) group tour confirmed on a minimum-group basis of 10 people; if the group is not reached by 30 days before departure (not including the 30th day), either side may terminate. Both the agency and the traveller may apply for a no-reason cancellation before that 30-day point; refunds follow the change-and-cancellation terms. Because flight, traffic, ferry, strike and sequencing factors often shift the itinerary, you must arrive at the meeting point one day before the tour starts and leave the dispersal point one day after it ends, allowing reasonable connection time (at least 5 hours for a same-airport transfer, 7 hours for different airports in the same city; reasonable meet/disperse window 07:00-21:00) — losses from not doing so are borne by the traveller. As a circulating tour, other guests join and leave at different points, so start/end cities and prices vary by booking. Room types: two people booking together default to a standard double with bed type (twin or king) assigned by the hotel and not selectable; three-person family rooms (two parents + one minor) have bed types assigned by the hotel; solo bookings include a single-supplement deposit by default. All hotels are non-smoking, no cooking in rooms, no free toiletries or free boiled water, check-in 14:00 / check-out 11:00, and air conditioning is not a standard fitting in European hotels. Listed hotels are preferred; if unavailable they may be replaced by a hotel of similar standard and the same star rating without separate notice. All pricing is quoted in EUR at the time of booking; if you pay in CNY, the amount is the real-time CNY figure calculated from the Bank of China 'euro selling rate' on the day of payment, and the same applies to refunds. Recommended to book at least 14 days in advance, with second confirmation within 48 hours (auto-refund if unconfirmed). Contingencies: if bad weather or a rail strike prevents the Cinque Terre visit, it switches to touring the coastal cities by coach or other means; the Seceda/Alpe di Siusi cable cars may suspend operation for extreme weather or maintenance, in which case they cannot be ridden and the cable-car fee is refunded.
faqs.answer_zh: 本产品为循环套发的散客拼团产品，成团人数为10人，行程开始前30天（不含第30天）未达到成团人数的，游客和我社均有权解除合同。在该30天节点之前，旅行社和旅行者均可申请无理由取消，退费按《更改与取消条例条款》执行。由于航变、交通拥堵、渡轮取消、罢工游行或行程顺序调整经常导致时间及游览顺序变动，本产品要求旅行者在旅游团开始前一天到达集合地、结束后一天离开集散地，并预留合理衔接时间（同一机场转机至少5小时、同城不同机场至少7小时，合理集散时间段为07:00至21:00），未遵守此条款导致的损失由旅行者自行承担。本产品为循环套发团，途中会有其他游客在不同地点上下团，开始与结束城市不同、价格不同，请按个人报名的目的地开始和结束行程。房型：两人同时报名默认标准双人间，床型（大床或双床）由酒店安排不可指定；三人家庭间默认两位父母与一位未成年儿童入住，床型由酒店安排；单人报名默认含单人房差押金。欧洲酒店全部禁烟、禁止在房间内做饭、不提供一次性洗漱用品及免费开水，入住时间14:00、退房11:00，且空调并非欧洲酒店的标准设施。行程内列明酒店为优先入住酒店，如订满或无法使用，将更换为相近条件、相同星级的酒店，恕不另行通知。所有定价以欧元为预订时计价单位，如选择人民币支付，则以付款当天中国银行实时外汇牌价“欧元卖出价”自动计算的人民币实时价格为准，退款同样适用即时汇率。建议提前至少14天预订，并在48小时内二次确认（超时未确认默认自动退款）。应急说明：如遇恶劣天气或铁路罢工无法游览五渔村，将改为乘大巴或其它形式游览海岸线城市；刀锋山或休斯山缆车如遇极端天气或例行检修将暂停营运，届时无法乘坐，缆车费用退还给游客。

faqs.question_en: Health & safety requirements
faqs.question_zh: 健康与安全须知
faqs.answer_en: To ensure a smooth, safe trip, please have a necessary medical check-up before departure and do NOT book if you have any of the following: infectious diseases (e.g. active tuberculosis, typhoid); cardiovascular disease (e.g. severe hypertension, cardiac insufficiency, myocardial ischemia, myocardial infarction); cerebrovascular disease (e.g. cerebral embolism, cerebral haemorrhage, brain tumour); respiratory disease (e.g. emphysema, cor pulmonale); mental illness (e.g. epilepsy and various psychiatric conditions); severe anaemia (haemoglobin below 50 g/L); or recovery from a major/medium operation. Pregnancy: women at 35 weeks or more may not join under any circumstances; at 28 weeks or more, a doctor's check-up report within the last 7 days and an attending physician's consent letter are required; under 28 weeks, please book with caution, sign the agency's liability waiver, and note that adventure, skiing, sea-going, high-altitude and outdoor items cannot be joined. Travellers with disabilities need a 7-day medical report plus physician consent, an accompanying immediate family member, and at least 61 days' advance request for reserved space and facilities. Elderly travellers over 70 need a health certificate, medical report and an accompanying immediate family member (or must sign the waiver); this is a long itinerary requiring a degree of walking ability, so those with insufficient stamina should book with caution. Minors under 18 must be accompanied by an immediate relative or guardian; some sights have special rules for those under 18/12/6; infants under 2 are not accepted; child seats should be confirmed in advance for infants under 6 or children under 30 kg. Per Article 15 of the Tourism Law (and the 2025 Infectious Disease Prevention Law), travellers must truthfully declare health information relevant to the trip — including pregnancy, breastfeeding, chronic illness, infectious-disease history, suspected symptoms or recent travel to an epidemic area — and follow safety warnings; those who conceal such information bear liability for any resulting harm, and the agency may terminate the contract without refund.
faqs.answer_zh: 为确保旅游顺利、防止旅途中发生人身意外伤害，请在出行前做一次必要的身体检查，如存在下列情况请勿报名：传染性疾病患者（如活动期肺结核、伤寒等）；心血管疾病患者（如严重高血压、心功能不全、心肌缺氧、心肌梗塞等）；脑血管疾病患者（如脑栓塞、脑出血、脑肿瘤等）；呼吸系统疾病患者（如肺气肿、肺心病等）；精神病患者（如癫痫及各种精神病）；严重贫血患者（血红蛋白低于50克/升）；大中型手术恢复期病患者。孕妇：妊娠第35周及以上在任何情况下都无法参团；第28周及以上需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书；第28周以下请慎重报名，需签署旅行社免责声明书，且无法参加探险、滑雪、出海、高空、户外等项目。残疾人需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书、需直系家属陪同，并至少提前61天申请预留位置及专用配套设施。70周岁以上老年人出游需提供健康证明、体检报告并由直系家属陪同（否则需签署免责声明书）；本行程较长，需要一定步行能力，体力不支者请慎重报名。未成年人（未满18周岁）需由直系亲属或监护人陪同，部分景点对未满18/12/6周岁有特殊限定；不接受2周岁以下婴儿参团；6岁以下婴儿或30公斤以下儿童请提前确认安全儿童座椅。根据《旅游法》第15条及《传染病防治法（2025修订）》，旅游者需如实告知与旅游活动相关的个人健康信息（包括妊娠期、哺乳期、慢性病、传染病史、疑似症状或近期疫区旅居史）并遵守安全警示，若因隐瞒导致人身损害或传播风险，需自行承担相应责任，旅行社可解除合同且不退还费用。

title_en: Italy in Depth: Dolomites & 4 Classic Cities, 7-Day Small-Group Tour (Milan to Rome)
title_zh: 意大利深度7天享乐小团：多洛米蒂+四大名城（米兰至罗马）
short_en: A 7-day one-way journey from Milan to Rome through the Dolomites, Venice, Tuscany, Cinque Terre and the Eternal City, in a luxury small group.
short_zh: 7天单程深度游，从米兰直达罗马，穿越多洛米蒂、威尼斯、托斯卡纳、五渔村与永恒之城，轻奢小团沉浸体验。
desc_en: Travel one-way from Milan to Rome on a 7-day boutique small-group tour that links the dramatic peaks of the Dolomites with Italy's greatest art cities. Ride cable cars over Seceda, drift past Lake Garda, glide through canal-laced Venice, soak up Renaissance Florence, ride the scenic train along the cliffside Cinque Terre, and walk medieval Siena and Pienza before reaching ancient Rome. With city-centre 4 and 5-star hotels, a Chinese-speaking guide-driver, and all listed attractions and taxes included, it is a seamless, all-inclusive way to experience the best of northern and central Italy.
desc_zh: 7天精品小团单程之旅，从米兰一路深入罗马，将多洛米蒂的壮丽峰群与意大利顶级艺术名城串联在一起。乘缆车登顶刀锋山，途经加尔达湖，漫游水城威尼斯，沉浸文艺复兴之都佛罗伦萨，搭乘景观列车饱览悬崖上的五渔村，再走访中世纪古城锡耶纳与皮恩扎，最终抵达古罗马帝国发祥地永恒之城。全程入住市中心四五星酒店，配中文司机兼导游，含所列景点门票与各项税费，一价全含，省心畅游。

highlights.en: One-way deep route from Milan to Rome covering the Dolomites and four classic Italian cities
highlights.zh: 米兰到罗马单程深度路线，串联多洛米蒂与四大经典名城

highlights.en: Ride the Seceda cable car over the jagged peaks and alpine meadows of the Dolomites
highlights.zh: 乘刀锋山（Seceda）缆车，俯瞰多洛米蒂锯齿状峰群与高山草甸

highlights.en: Explore romantic Venice — St Mark's Square, the Bridge of Sighs and winding canals
highlights.zh: 游览浪漫水城威尼斯，圣马可广场、叹息桥与蜿蜒水巷

highlights.en: Soak up Renaissance Florence: the Duomo (Santa Maria del Fiore), Ponte Vecchio and Piazza della Signoria
highlights.zh: 沉浸文艺复兴之都佛罗伦萨：圣母百花大教堂、老桥与市政广场

highlights.en: Scenic train ride along the colourful cliffside villages of the Cinque Terre, plus the Leaning Tower of Pisa
highlights.zh: 搭乘景观列车游览悬崖上五彩的五渔村，并打卡比萨斜塔

highlights.en: Medieval gems Siena and Pienza with the cypress-lined views of the Val d'Orcia
highlights.zh: 中世纪古城锡耶纳与皮恩扎，邂逅奥尔恰谷绝美绝柏树小径

highlights.en: Flights-free intercity transport, city-centre 4 & 5-star hotels, all listed attractions and taxes included — no forced shopping
highlights.zh: 城际交通、市中心四五星酒店、所列景点门票及各项税费全含，绝无强制购物

highlights.en: Luxury small group with a Chinese-speaking guide-driver for a relaxed, immersive pace
highlights.zh: 轻奢小团配中文司机兼导游，节奏舒适，深度沉浸体验

includes.en: Hotels: 2 nights in 5-star hotels plus 4 nights in comfortable 4-star hotels, 6 nights total.
includes.zh: 【酒店】：五星酒店2晚，舒适型四星级酒店4晚，共6晚酒店。

includes.en: Meals: 6 meals total — in-hotel breakfasts or meals in other forms.
includes.zh: 【餐饮】：酒店内早餐或其他形式餐饮共计6餐。

includes.en: Taxes & fees: all itinerary taxes including city/tourist tax, city-entry fees, residence tax, road/bridge tolls, island-landing fees, etc.
includes.zh: 【税费】：游客城市税，进城费，居住税，路桥费，登岛费等行程内的所有税费。

includes.en: Transport: tour coach.
includes.zh: 【交通】：旅游巴士。

includes.en: Guide: professional driver plus Chinese-speaking guide, or a Chinese-speaking driver-guide throughout (note: for groups of 8 or fewer, a business van with a Chinese-speaking driver-guide is arranged, who leads the touring of all cities).
includes.zh: 【导游】：职业司机+中文导游或者全程中文司机兼导游（备注：8人及以下则安排为商务旅行车+中文司机兼导游，届时将有司兼导带领游览全部城市行程）。

includes.en: Luggage: 1 piece of checked luggage up to 23 kg plus 1 piece of carry-on luggage.
includes.zh: 【行李】：1件23公斤行李及1件随身行李。

includes.en: Activities & tickets: Milan Cathedral, Rome Pantheon, Seceda round-trip cable car, Cinque Terre scenic train, and the Venice island ferry.
includes.zh: 【活动及门票】：米兰大教堂、罗马万神殿、刀锋山往返缆车、五漁村景观列车、威尼斯登岛轮渡。

excludes.en: Passport: personal passport costs.
excludes.zh: 护照：个人护照费用。

excludes.en: Visa: the tourist visa fees required for the countries listed in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 签证：行程中所列旅游国家所需的观光签证费用。

excludes.en: Insurance: travel insurance fees (if the itinerary involves high-risk sports, please verify whether the travel insurance covers them).
excludes.zh: 保险：旅游保险费用（如行程内涉及到高风险运动，请核实旅游保险是否包含该项运动）。

excludes.en: Tips: gratuities to the guide and driver totaling EUR 10 per person per day, same rate for adults and children.
excludes.zh: 小费：游客支付导游和司机小费一共10欧/人/天，大小同价。

excludes.en: Meals: apart from the specialty meals included in the itinerary, lunches and dinners are not included.
excludes.zh: 餐饮：除行程内包含的特色餐外，行程中不包含午、晚正餐费用。

excludes.en: Tickets: any sights not marked as fee-included (including but not limited to sights marked "exterior," and all "recommended," "optional," "experience" items not stated as included) — please pay on your own if you wish to enter.
excludes.zh: 门票：行程中未注明费用包含的景点（包括但不仅限于行程中注明外观的景点，以及推荐、可选、体验等等所有未提及费用包含的项目，如游客需要参观，敬请自理）。

excludes.en: Extended stays: lodging, transport and sightseeing beyond the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 延长住宿：行程外额外延长的住宿、交通、观光费用。

excludes.en: Personal expenses: drinks/alcohol, taxis, phone calls and other personal spending.
excludes.zh: 私人消费：如饮料酒类、出租车、电话费等个人消费。

excludes.en: Other transport: transport not mentioned in the inclusions beyond the included business van or minibus — e.g. the Venice gondola, and tourist trains or electric/golf-cart taxis in vehicle-restricted zones — at your own expense.
excludes.zh: 其他交通：除包含商务旅行车或者中巴之外，费用包含中未提及的其他交通费用，如威尼斯贡多拉，以及车辆限行区的观光火车、电瓶出租车等费用敬请自理。

excludes.en: Free activities: nighttime self-touring and recommended items during the trip, and any transport, meals, tickets and shopping costs they incur.
excludes.zh: 自由活动：游客夜间自行游览及行程中的推荐项目，以及产生的交通、餐饮、门票、购物等费用。

excludes.en: Experience activities: any travel experience activities not included in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 体验活动：行程中没有包含的各项旅游体验活动。

excludes.en: Other costs: anything not mentioned in the inclusions. Where force majeure (natural disaster, war, strike), traffic delays, flight cancellations/reschedules, embassy visa delays, insufficient group numbers or other special circumstances or causes not attributable to us lead to extra costs (e.g. overseas visa-extension fees, lodging/meals/transport, national airfare adjustments), we reserve the right to charge the difference.
excludes.zh: 其他费用：费用包含中未提及的费用。如因天灾、战争、罢工等不可抗力的原因，及因交通延阻、航班取消或更改时间、使馆延误出签证、人数不足等特殊情况或其他非我公司原因所引致的额外费（如在外延期签证费、住、食及交通费、国家航空运价调整等），我公司有权追加差价。

timeline.title_en: Milan – Lake Garda – Trento (Gothic cathedral masterpiece & Lake Garda scenery)
timeline.title_zh: 米兰 - 加尔达湖 - 特伦托（瞻仰哥特教堂的杰作，欣赏加尔达湖的旖旎风光）
timeline.description_en: In the morning head to Milan, the northern Italian city that blends classical elegance with modern energy, and view Sforza Castle (exterior), one of Milan's most important buildings and a witness to its history. Then visit the Gothic masterpiece Milan Cathedral (Duomo), begun in 1386 and built over 500 years, with hundreds of spires and thousands of marble statues, and stroll through the lavish Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II shopping arcade with its century-old shops and top luxury boutiques. In the afternoon continue to Lake Garda to enjoy the lake and mountain scenery at the foot of the Alps, this sapphire-clear lake set between the Alps and the Po Valley. Finally drive to Trento to check in. Overnight: NH Trento Hotel or similar 4-star hotel, a green design hotel by architect Renzo Piano in Trento's modern Le Albere science and culture district, a short walk from the MUSE science museum and the old town.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往兼具古典气质与现代活力的北意名城米兰，参观斯福尔扎城堡（外观），它是米兰最重要的建筑之一，也是米兰沧桑历史的见证；随后游览哥特式杰作米兰大教堂（Duomo），它始建于1386年，历经500年才完工，数以百计的尖塔耸入云霄，白色大理石外墙上雕刻着数千座雕像，并漫步埃马努埃莱二世长廊，这座华丽的购物拱廊汇聚了百年老店与顶奢品牌。下午前往加尔达湖，欣赏阿尔卑斯山脚下的湖光山色，这座坐落在阿尔卑斯山与波河谷之间的湖泊宛如一颗温润澄澈的蓝宝石。之后前往特伦托入住酒店。夜宿：NH特伦托酒店或同等4星级酒店，酒店坐落在特伦托现代感十足的阿尔达通科学文化区（Le Albere），由意大利建筑大师Renzo Piano设计，距特伦托科学博物馆MUSE及老城区仅几步之遥。

timeline.title_en: Trento – Bolzano – Ortisei – Funes Valley – Trento (cable car to Seceda, meadows of Alpe di Siusi)
timeline.title_zh: 特伦托 - 博尔扎诺 - 奥蒂塞伊 - 富内斯山谷 - 特伦托（缆车直达刀锋山，休斯高原欣赏草甸山谷）
timeline.description_en: In the morning travel to Bolzano, capital of South Tyrol, and stroll its well-preserved medieval old town and cobblestone streets around Piazza Walther, where Italian and Austrian cultures blend. Then continue to the elegant town of Ortisei in Val Gardena, known for its woodcarving craft and painted houses; from here take the cable car up to Seceda (round-trip cable car included) to overlook the jagged Dolomite peaks and high-alpine meadows, or instead visit the rolling Alpe di Siusi (Seiser Alm) high-mountain meadows (the Alpe di Siusi cable car is an optional, separately-ticketed experience not included in the tour; due to time only one of the two can be visited). Afterwards drive to the Funes Valley and the village of Santa Maddalena to photograph the exterior of the Church of St. John (the "lonely church"), a small 1744 Baroque chapel set against the Geisler peaks, and the Santa Maddalena church (exterior), before returning to the hotel. Overnight: NH Trento Hotel or similar 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往南蒂罗尔省首府博尔扎诺，漫步保存完好的中世纪老城区和瓦尔特广场周围的鹅卵石街道，感受意大利与奥地利文化的交融。随后前往加尔代纳山谷中的典雅小镇奥蒂塞伊，这里以传统木雕工艺和彩绘房舍闻名；从奥蒂塞伊可乘缆车登顶刀锋山（Seceda，含往返缆车），俯瞰多洛米蒂锯齿状峰群和高山草甸，或前往休斯山高原（Alpe di Siusi）欣赏如波浪般起伏的高山草甸风光（休斯高原缆车属可选体验项目，需另行购票，费用不包含在行程内；受当日行程时间限制，两处仅可择一参观）。之后前往富内斯山谷，抵达圣马达莱娜村后，外观打卡圣约翰小教堂（孤独教堂），这座建于1744年的巴洛克风格木质小教堂背靠蓋斯勒峰，以及圣玛达莱娜教堂（外观），游览结束后返回酒店。夜宿：NH特伦托酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Trento – Venice (romantic Venice on gentle blue waters)
timeline.title_zh: 特伦托 - 威尼斯（游览温柔碧波上浪漫的威尼斯）
timeline.description_en: In the morning set off for the water city of Venice, made up of 118 islands linked by 177 canals and 401 bridges. On arrival visit St. Mark's Basilica (exterior), begun in 829 AD and rebuilt in 1043–1071, a treasury of Venetian art; St. Mark's Square, which Napoleon called "the most beautiful drawing room in Europe"; the Bridge of Sighs (exterior), the early-Baroque covered bridge once used to march condemned prisoners to the dungeons; and the magnificent Doge's Palace (exterior). These beautiful buildings rising from the water, together with the winding canals, give Venice its lingering romance. Here you can also try Venice's signature squid-ink pasta three-course meal (at your own expense). Overnight: voco Venice (InterContinental) or Hilton Garden / Ambassador hotel, or similar 4-star hotel, a newly renovated hotel with stylish modern design and the Ludico Venice restaurant serving Italian cuisine.
timeline.description_zh: 上午出发前往水城威尼斯，这座城市由118个小岛组成，以177条水道、401座桥梁连成一体，素有水上都市之称。到达后参观圣马可大教堂（外观），它始建于公元829年，重建于1043至1071年，是一座收藏丰富艺术品的宝库；圣马可广场，曾被拿破仑称作欧洲最美丽的客厅；叹息桥（外观），这是古代由法院向监狱押送死囚的必经之路，属早期巴洛克式风格；以及华丽的总督宫（外观）。这些建造在水上的美丽建筑和蜿蜒的水巷一起，让威尼斯的浪漫风情久久挥之不去。在这里您还可以品尝到威尼斯特色大餐墨鱼面三道式（自理）。夜宿：威尼斯洲际voco酒店或希尔顿大使酒店或同等4星级酒店，这是威尼斯新装修的酒店之一，拥有时尚的现代设计，酒店的Ludico Venice餐厅供应意大利佳肴。

timeline.title_en: Venice – Tuscany (land of poetry, soul of the Renaissance in Florence)
timeline.title_zh: 威尼斯 - 托斯卡纳（诗歌之地，文艺复兴之魂，享受艺术之旅）
timeline.description_en: In the morning depart for Florence, birthplace of the Renaissance, and tour the old city's landmarks: the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore (the world's third-largest church, which requires queuing to enter), a beautiful church faced in white, red and green marble that took 175 years to build; Piazza della Signoria, an open-air sculpture museum and the city's centuries-old political heart, with the Palazzo Vecchio, a copy of Michelangelo's David and the Neptune Fountain; the Ponte Vecchio (Old Bridge) over the Arno, built in 1345, where Dante is said to have met Beatrice; and Piazza Santa Croce with the Basilica of Santa Croce (exterior), the Gothic resting place of Michelangelo and Galileo. Afterwards check in to the hotel. Overnight: a Montecatini spa hotel in Tuscany or similar 5-star hotel, set in the famous Tuscan wellness resort of Montecatini, with two pools (indoor and outdoor), sauna and a 40,000 sqm private park adjoining the Terme Tettuccio park.
timeline.description_zh: 上午出发前往文艺复兴的发源地佛罗伦萨，参观佛罗伦萨老城景点：世界第三大教堂圣母百花大教堂（需排队进入），这座使用白、红、绿三色花岗岩贴面的美丽教堂花了175年时间才建成；市政广场，有露天雕塑博物馆的美誉，是该城数个世纪以来政治生活中心，广场上坐落着维琪奥宫（旧宫）、米开朗基罗《大卫》的复制品以及海神喷泉；老桥（维奇奥桥），位于阿诺河上，建于1345年，据说但丁在这里邂逅了少女比阿特丽丝；以及圣十字广场和圣十字教堂（外观），这座哥特式建筑是米开朗基罗和伽利略等名人的安息地。之后入住酒店。夜宿：托斯卡纳蒙特卡蒂尼SPA酒店或同等5星级酒店，酒店位于托斯卡纳著名的康养旅游度假地蒙特卡蒂尼，水疗区设有室内外2个泳池及桑拿，私人公园占地40,000平方米，是Terme Tettuccio公园的自然延续。

timeline.title_en: Tuscany – Cinque Terre – Pisa – Tuscany (scenic train to the cliffside fairytale villages of Cinque Terre)
timeline.title_zh: 托斯卡纳 - 五渔村 - 比萨 - 托斯卡纳（景观列车游览悬崖上的五彩童话五渔村）
timeline.description_en: In the morning set off for Cinque Terre, the five cliffside fishing villages strung along the Ligurian coast — Monterosso al Mare, Vernazza, Corniglia, Manarola and Riomaggiore — linked by a famous coastal hiking trail and a UNESCO World Heritage Site since 1997; ride the scenic train (included) between the colorful villages above the Mediterranean. In the afternoon continue to Pisa to see the Leaning Tower of Pisa (exterior), the freestanding bell tower where Galileo is said to have performed his free-fall experiment in 1590, and the walled Piazza dei Miracoli (Square of Miracles), which holds the cathedral, baptistery, leaning tower and cemetery. Afterwards drive back to the Tuscany region to check in. Overnight: a Montecatini spa hotel in Tuscany or similar 5-star hotel. Note: if bad weather or a railway strike prevents visiting Cinque Terre, the itinerary will automatically switch to touring the coastal towns by coach or other means.
