timeline.description_zh: 上午出发前往游览五漁村，沿利古里亚海岸线游览悬崖上的美丽渔村，五漁村是蒙特罗索、韦尔纳扎、科尔尼利亚、马纳罗拉及里奥马焦雷这五个悬崖边村镇的统称，1997年被联合国教科文组织列入世界文化遗产名录；这里有把五个村庄串起的世界著名徒步线路，您将乘坐景观列车（含）在五彩斑斓的渔村间穿行。下午前往比萨，游览比萨斜塔（外观），相传公元1590年伽利略曾在此做了自由落体实验，以及比萨历史文化中心的奇迹广场（Piazza dei Miracoli），广场上有比萨主教座堂、比萨斜塔、洗礼堂和墓园四大建筑。之后前往托斯卡纳大区入住酒店。夜宿：托斯卡纳蒙特卡蒂尼SPA酒店或同等5星级酒店。备注：如遇恶劣天气或铁路公司罢工等因素导致无法游览五漁村，行程将自动更改为乘坐大巴车或其它形式游览海岸线城市。

timeline.title_en: Tuscany – Siena – Pienza – Rome (medieval treasure Siena & the cypress lanes of Val d'Orcia)
timeline.title_zh: 托斯卡纳 - 锡耶纳 - 皮恩扎 - 罗马（中世纪艺术瑰宝锡耶纳，遇奥尔恰谷丝柏树小径）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast set off for the old city of Siena and tour the Siena Cathedral (exterior), Piazza del Campo (the shell-shaped square, one of Europe's largest surviving medieval squares), Siena Town Hall (exterior) and the Torre del Mangia (exterior), a 102m tower that is Italy's second-tallest. After lunch continue to the medieval town of Pienza to see Piazza Pio II and Pienza Cathedral (exterior); Pienza, birthplace of Pope Pius II and rebuilt from 1459 as an "ideal city," uniquely lets you look out from the walls over the UNESCO-listed Val d'Orcia. On the way to Rome stop for free photos at the famous cypress lane. After arriving in Rome, check in. Overnight: Sheraton Roma (Medici) or Mantegna hotel, or similar 4-star hotel, surrounded by landscaped gardens, a golf course and an outdoor pool. Note: due to building protection in Rome, vehicles are banned and most areas are pedestrian zones; this day involves about 5–6 km of walking.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后出发前往锡耶纳古城，游览锡耶纳大教堂（外观）、田野广场（因形似贝壳也叫贝壳广场，是欧洲现存最大的中世纪广场之一）、锡耶纳市政厅（外观）、曼吉亚塔楼（外观，垂直高度达102米，是意大利第二高的塔楼）等景点。午餐后前往皮恩扎古城参观游览二世广场、皮恩扎大教堂（外观）；皮恩扎是教皇皮乌斯二世的出生地，1459年起被重建为理想城市的典范，独特之处在于可以从城墙上俯瞰世界遗产奥尔恰山谷的景致。之后前往罗马，途中在著名的丝柏树小径自由拍照，抵达罗马后入住酒店。夜宿：罗马梅第奇喜来登酒店或曼特尼亚酒店或同等4星级酒店，酒店周围环绕着园景花园、高尔夫球场和室外游泳池。备注：由于罗马建筑保护，禁止车辆行驶，大多数区域为步行街区，当天步行行程约为5至6公里。

timeline.title_en: Rome (relive the glory of the eternal city and ancient Roman Empire)
timeline.title_zh: 罗马（重温万城之城古罗马帝国的辉煌）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, a guide leads a walking tour of Rome, the cradle of the ancient Roman Empire, known as the "Eternal City" for its long history. View the exterior of the Colosseum, the vast and magnificent ancient arena; visit the Pantheon (entrance included), the best-preserved ancient Roman building, over 2,000 years old, the resting place of Raphael, praised by Michelangelo as "the design of angels" (as a religious site, modest dress is required — shoulders and back covered, no shorts or short skirts above the knee, no food or drink inside). Then see the Spanish Steps, made famous by the film Roman Holiday, with Europe's widest staircase of 138 steps, and the Trevi Fountain (exterior), the grand wishing fountain where tossing a coin over your shoulder is said to make wishes come true. The tour then ends. Overnight: no hotel on this day. Note: vehicles are banned in Rome's protected old city, most areas are pedestrian zones, and this day involves about 5–6 km of walking.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，在导游的带领下徒步游览世界著名的历史文化名城罗马，这里是古罗马帝国的发祥地，因历史悠久而被称为永恒之城。参观矗立着的斗兽场（外观），它以庞大、雄伟、壮观著称于世；游览万神殿（含门票），它是古罗马保存完好的建筑，距今已有2000多年历史，艺术家拉斐尔等长眠于此，被米开朗基罗赞叹为天使的设计（因万神殿属于宗教场所，入内参观请遵守着装规定：不能露肩露背，不可穿短裤短裙，须盖过膝盖，不可携带饮食进入）。随后游览西班牙广场，它曾出现在电影《罗马假日》场景中，西班牙台阶共138级，是欧洲最宽的台阶；以及特莱维喷泉（许愿池）（外观），据说背对着喷泉从肩上投出一枚硬币，如能投进水中就能梦想成真。随后结束愉快旅程。当天无酒店住宿。备注：由于罗马古城建筑保护，禁止车辆行驶，大多数区域为步行街区，当天步行行程约为5至6公里。

meeting_en: Milan, Italy — tour departs from Milan; the journey ends in Rome (one-way route).
meeting_zh: 意大利米兰 — 行程从米兰出发，于罗马结束（单程路线）。

faqs.question_en: Where and how do we meet and disperse?
faqs.question_zh: 集合及集散地点和方法是怎样的？
faqs.answer_en: This tour departs from Milan and ends in Rome. On Day 1 the coach departs punctually at 09:00 from Milan Malpensa Airport (MXP), and meets around 10:00 at the tour-coach parking stop by Milan's Sforza Castle (address: Castello Sforzesco, Parcheggio bus turistici Lanza, 20121 Milano MI, Italy). On Day 7 the group disperses around 17:00 at Roma Tiburtina railway station. These times and places are for reference; the actual departure follows the departure notice. You may join in Milan on the tour's first day, but in that case the Milan city sights cannot be visited and no fee is refundable. We do not recommend booking a flight leaving Rome on the night of the last day.
faqs.answer_zh: 本产品米兰出发、罗马结束。行程第1天09:00在米兰马尔彭萨机场（MXP）准时发车，10:00左右在米兰斯福尔扎城堡旅游大巴停车站集合，地址：Castello Sforzesco, Parcheggio bus turistici Lanza, 20121 Milano MI, Italy。行程第7天17:00左右在Roma Tiburtina火车站解散。以上为参考时间及地点，实际出发时间以出团通知书为准。本产品参团当天可在米兰上团，但米兰市区景点会无法游览，并无费用可退！不推荐预订当天晚上的航班离开罗马。

faqs.question_en: Will the daily coach rides be very long?
faqs.question_zh: 行程路线乘坐大巴时间会不会很久？
faqs.answer_en: This product is planned for an average of about 3–4 hours of travel time per day. Road traffic can be complex — city-center congestion and other factors may increase driving time.
faqs.answer_zh: 该产品行程计划平均时间为每日3至4小时的行程时间。公路交通情况复杂，特别是市区内容易发生堵车或其它因素导致行车时间增加。

faqs.question_en: On that day, can we ride both the Seceda and the Alpe di Siusi cable cars?
faqs.question_zh: 刀锋山和休斯高原缆车当天是否都可乘坐游览？
faqs.answer_en: On that day we already include the Seceda round-trip cable car. The Alpe di Siusi (Seiser Alm) cable car is an optional experience at your own expense. Due to the day's time constraints, only one of the two sights can be visited. If the Seceda cable car is temporarily closed for operational reasons, the visit will be uniformly switched to Alpe di Siusi (cable car included). Actual operation follows the scenic area's latest official notice.
faqs.answer_zh: 行程当日，我社已包含刀锋山往返缆车费用。休斯高原缆车为可选体验项目，相关费用需您自理。受当日行程时间限制，两个景点仅可择一参观。若刀锋山缆车因运营安排临时关闭，将统一调整为游览休斯高原（含缆车），实际运营情况以景区官方最新通知为准。

faqs.question_en: Can I choose to visit Cinque Terre by boat?
faqs.question_zh: 我是否可以选择乘船游览五漁村？
faqs.answer_en: Because boat tours are weather-dependent, this product does not include a Cinque Terre boat ticket. You may choose to go by boat, but the train-ticket cost is non-refundable/non-exchangeable, and you must buy the boat ticket yourself, at about EUR 40.
faqs.answer_zh: 由于乘船游览受气候影响，该产品并非包含五漁村船票，但是可以选择乘船游览，但是无法退换火车票的费用，并且需要自行购买船票，约40欧元。

faqs.question_en: Can we tour Rome's city center by vehicle?
faqs.question_zh: 罗马市中心我们是否可以乘车游览？
faqs.answer_en: Because Rome's sights are very concentrated and are all in pedestrian zones, we cannot arrange a tour coach; the central Rome sights must be toured on foot.
faqs.answer_zh: 由于罗马各个景点非常集中，并且都是步行街区，因此我社无法安排旅游大巴，罗马市中心景点需要徒步游览。

faqs.question_en: Can we choose different menus and dishes for our dinners according to our preference?
faqs.question_zh: 我们的晚餐是否能根据喜好选择不同的菜单和菜品？
faqs.answer_en: The dining recommended in the itinerary is all local specialty fare and its cost is not included — for example Venice's famous black squid-ink pasta or Tuscany's steak. You cannot select other set dishes through us; if the dish is not your first choice, you are free to choose other dining on your own.
faqs.answer_zh: 行程内推荐的餐饮全部为推荐当地特色餐，费用并未包含，比如威尼斯较著名的黑墨鱼面、托斯卡纳的牛排等。无法选择其它的菜式，如果菜品并非您的首选，可以自行选择其他餐饮。

faqs.question_en: Do I need a visa?
faqs.question_zh: 是否需要签证？
faqs.answer_en: This product does not include visa fees. A Schengen visa (single or multiple entry) is required; if you need a visa, please choose a Schengen-visa product. After booking we provide, free of charge, all materials needed to apply for the Schengen visa (refer to the detailed materials checklist). "Visa-worry-free" guarantee: for travel products contracted with us at least 61 days before departure, if the visa is not obtained within 45 days before departure, we bear all losses and immediately refund the full travel cost; travelers who do not meet this clause and fail to obtain a visa are refunded per the change-and-cancellation terms. In case of refusal, notify us within 48 hours with the consulate's refusal letter; supplementary/changed materials must be submitted within 5 days, and you may not unilaterally waive the right of "visa defense." Your passport must be valid for at least six months from the date of departure, or customs may refuse entry. Visa fees, visa service fees, Schengen insurance fees and visa-center appointment fees are all non-refundable and the user cannot be changed, even if the product is changed or cancelled.
faqs.answer_zh: 本产品不包含签证费用，需办理申根签证（单次或多次入境），如您需要办理签证请选择申根签证产品。预订后免费提供办理申根签证的全部材料（参考详细材料清单）。保签无忧：游客在出发日前61天与我社签约的旅游产品，如在出发前45天内未获取签证，我社承担所有损失，立即退还游客全部旅游费用；不符合该条款的游客如未正常获取签证，将按照退改与取消条款进行退费。如遇拒签需在48小时内通知我社并出具使领馆的拒签函，如需补充或更改材料需在五天内提交，且不得单方面放弃签证抗辩权利。护照有效期需在离境之日起至少还有六个月，否则海关有权拒绝入境。签证费、签证服务费、申根保险费、签证中心预约费均不可退款，也无法更改使用者，即使产品退改签，签证费用亦无法退款。

faqs.question_en: Booking, changes & cancellation — what should I know?
faqs.question_zh: 预订、变更与取消须知有哪些？
faqs.answer_en: Free cancellation: both the agency and the traveler may apply for no-reason cancellation more than 30 days before departure (excluding the 30th day). Group/departure size: this is a cyclical join-in (shared) tour; minimum group size is 10 people — if not reached by 30 days before departure either party may rescind, and 10 people is also the threshold for optional paid activities. For groups of 8 or fewer, a business van plus a driver-guide is arranged. Booking: pay promptly after ordering; book at least 14 days ahead, with second confirmation within 48 hours — unconfirmed orders auto-refund after 48 hours, so do not book connecting flights/hotels before confirmation. Connections: because flight changes, congestion, ferry cancellations and strikes frequently reorder the itinerary, you must arrive at the meeting point one day before the tour starts and leave the dispersal point one day after it ends, allowing reasonable connection time (at least 5 hours for same-airport transfers, 7 hours for different airports in the same city; reasonable meet/disperse window 07:00–21:00); losses from not doing so are borne by the traveler. Rooms: two people booking together default to a standard twin (bed type assigned by the hotel, not selectable); single travelers pay a single-room supplement (refundable pro-rata if successfully matched for room-sharing); triple/family rooms default to two parents plus one minor, bed configuration not selectable. All European hotels are non-smoking, check-in 14:00 / check-out 11:00, and air-conditioning is not standard. Pricing: priced in EUR; if you pay in CNY, the amount follows the same-day Bank of China "EUR sell" rate at the moment of payment, and the same applies to refunds. Itinerary contingencies: if bad weather or a railway strike prevents the Cinque Terre visit, it switches to a coach/coastal-town tour; if extreme weather or maintenance closes the Seceda/Alpe di Siusi cable cars they cannot be ridden and the cable-car fee is refunded; this is a cyclical join-in tour where other travelers board and leave at different points, so start/end your trip according to your own booked destination.
faqs.answer_zh: 免费取消：跟团游产品出发前30天（不含第30天）旅行社和旅行者均有权申请无理由取消。成团人数：本产品为散客拼团循环套发团，成团人数为10人，行程开始前30天（不含第30天）未达到成团人数双方均可解除合同，团队自费活动同样需达到10人；如报名人数为8人及以下，安排为商务旅行车+司机兼导游。预订：支付不等于确认行程，建议提前至少14天预订，并最多48小时二次确认，超48小时未确认则自动退款，请勿在确认前预订衔接机票及酒店。衔接：由于航变、拥堵、渡轮取消、罢工等常导致行程顺序调整，旅行者须在参团前一天到达集合地、离团后一天离开集散地并预留合理衔接时间（同机场转机至少5小时、同城不同机场至少7小时，合理集散时间段为07:00至21:00），未遵守导致的损失由旅行者自行承担。房型：两人同时报名默认标准双人间（床型由酒店安排不可选）；单人报名需缴单人房差（成功拼房则按比例退还）；三人家庭间默认两位父母与一位未成年儿童，床型不可指定。欧洲酒店均禁烟，入住14:00、退房11:00，且空调并非标准设施。价格：所有定价以欧元为计价单位，如选择人民币支付，以当天支付时中国银行实时外汇牌价欧元卖出价自动计算的人民币价格为准，退款同样适用申请退款当日即时汇率。行程应变：如遇恶劣天气或铁路罢工无法游览五漁村，将改为乘大巴或其它形式游览海岸线城市；如刀锋山或休斯山缆车因极端天气或检修暂停营运将无法乘坐，缆车费用退还游客；本产品为循环套发团，途中会有其他游客在不同地点上下团，敬请根据自己报名的目的地开始和结束行程。

faqs.question_en: Health & safety requirements — who should not join?
faqs.question_zh: 健康与安全须知有哪些？
faqs.answer_en: To ensure a safe trip, please have a health check before departure and do NOT enroll if you have: infectious diseases (e.g. active tuberculosis, typhoid); cardiovascular disease (e.g. severe hypertension, heart failure, myocardial ischemia/infarction); cerebrovascular disease (e.g. embolism, hemorrhage, tumor); respiratory disease (e.g. emphysema, cor pulmonale); psychiatric illness (e.g. epilepsy or other mental illness); severe anemia (hemoglobin below 50 g/L); or recovery from major/medium surgery. Pregnancy: at 35+ weeks you cannot join under any circumstances; at 28+ weeks you must provide a doctor's exam report from within 7 days plus the attending physician's consent; under 28 weeks please enroll cautiously, sign the agency's liability waiver, and you cannot take part in any adventure/skiing/sea/high-altitude/outdoor items. Persons with disabilities must provide a recent (within 7 days) medical report and physician's consent, be accompanied by an immediate family member, and apply at least 61 days ahead for a reserved place and facilities. Elderly: travelers over 70 need a health certificate, exam report and an accompanying immediate family member (or sign the waiver); the trip is long and physically demanding, so those with limited stamina should enroll cautiously, adventure/outdoor items require a physician's consent letter, and "age-friendly" service should be requested at least 61 days ahead. Minors (under 18) must be accompanied by an immediate relative or guardian; some sights have rules for under-18/under-12/under-6; infants under 30 kg / under 6 need a confirmed safety seat (or bring an EU-compliant one); minors travelling without parents need a parental authorization letter; infants under 2 are not accepted. Per Article 15 of the Tourism Law, travelers must truthfully declare health information relevant to the trip (pregnancy, lactation, chronic and infectious diseases, suspected symptoms, recent epidemic-area travel) and follow safety warnings; concealment that causes harm or transmission risk makes the traveler liable for the resulting losses (including possible contract termination without refund).
faqs.answer_zh: 为确保旅游顺利，请出行前做一次必要的身体检查，如存在以下情况请勿报名：传染性疾病患者（如活动期肺结核、伤寒）；心血管疾病患者（如严重高血压、心功能不全、心肌缺氧、心肌梗塞）；脑血管疾病患者（如脑栓塞、脑出血、脑肿瘤）；呼吸系统疾病患者（如肺气肿、肺心病）；精神病患者（如癫痫及各种精神病）；严重贫血（血红蛋白低于50克/升）；大中型手术恢复期患者。孕妇：妊娠35周及以上任何情况下都无法参团；28周及以上需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书；28周以下请慎重报名，需签署旅行社免责声明书，且无法参加探险、滑雪、出海、高空、户外等项目。残疾人：需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书、需直系家属陪同，并至少提前61天申请预留位置及专用设施。老年旅游者：70周岁以上需提供健康证明、体检报告并由直系家属陪同（否则需签署免责声明书）；本行程较长、对体力要求较高，体力不支者请慎重报名，探险/滑雪/出海/高空/户外等项目需持主治医师同意书，并至少提前61天申请适老化服务及设施。未成年人（未满18周岁）需由直系亲属或监护人陪同，部分景点对未满18/12/6周岁有特殊限定，6岁以下或30公斤以下儿童需提前确认安全座椅（或自备符合欧盟制式的座椅），无父母陪同的未成年人需持父母授权书，本产品不接受2周岁以下婴儿参团。根据《旅游法》第15条，旅游者需如实告知与旅游活动相关的个人健康信息（包括妊娠期、哺乳期、慢性病、传染病史、疑似症状或近期疫区旅居史）并遵守安全警示规定，若因隐瞒导致人身损害或传播风险，需自行承担相应责任（可能包括旅行社解除合同且不退费）。

title_en: Italy & the Dolomites: 9-Day Small-Group Tour (Milan to Rome)
title_zh: 意大利与多洛米蒂9日享乐小团（米兰至罗马）
short_en: A 9-day small-group journey from Milan to the Amalfi Coast, blending Dolomite peaks, Venice, Tuscany, Rome and Capri.
short_zh: 9天享乐小团，从米兰一路深玩到阿马尔菲海岸，串联多洛米蒂雪峰、威尼斯、托斯卡纳、罗马与卡普里岛。
desc_en: This one-way deep-dive carries you the length of Italy in nine days, from cosmopolitan Milan and the shores of Lake Garda up to the jagged peaks of the Dolomites at Seceda, then on to romantic Venice and Renaissance Florence. You'll ride the scenic train through clifftop Cinque Terre, wander medieval Siena and the Val d'Orcia, walk the streets of eternal Rome, and finish along the Amalfi Coast with boat trips to Positano, Amalfi and the Blue Grotto of Capri. A relaxed 6-15 person small group with city-centre 4- and 5-star hotels, a Chinese-speaking guide-driver, and all core attractions and taxes included.
desc_zh: 这是一条单程深度路线，9天纵贯意大利：从时尚都会米兰与加尔达湖出发，登上多洛米蒂山脉锯齿状的刀锋山（Seceda），再前往浪漫水城威尼斯与文艺复兴之城佛罗伦萨。沿途乘坐景观列车游览悬崖上的五彩童话五渔村，漫步中世纪古城锡耶纳与奥尔恰谷，探访永恒之城罗马，最后沿阿马尔菲海岸乘船游波西塔诺、阿马尔菲与卡普里岛蓝洞。6至15人享乐小团，连住市区4至5星酒店，全程中文司机兼导游，核心景点门票与各项税费全含。

highlights.en: Ride the Seceda cable car for jagged Dolomite ridgelines and high alpine meadows (or Alpe di Siusi plateau)
highlights.zh: 乘刀锋山（Seceda）缆车饱览多洛米蒂锯齿峰群与高山草甸（或登休斯高原草甸）

highlights.en: Romantic Venice: St Mark's Square, the Bridge of Sighs and the Doge's Palace on the water
highlights.zh: 浪漫威尼斯：圣马可广场、叹息桥与水上总督宫

highlights.en: Renaissance Florence with the Duomo (Santa Maria del Fiore) and the Ponte Vecchio
highlights.zh: 文艺复兴之城佛罗伦萨：圣母百花大教堂与老桥

highlights.en: Scenic train through the clifftop fishing villages of the Cinque Terre, plus the Leaning Tower of Pisa
highlights.zh: 景观列车穿行悬崖上的五渔村，并打卡比萨斜塔与奇迹广场

highlights.en: Medieval Siena, hilltop Pienza and the cypress-lined lanes of the Val d'Orcia
highlights.zh: 中世纪古城锡耶纳、皮恩扎与奥尔恰谷的丝柏树小径

highlights.en: Rome the Eternal City: Colosseum, Pantheon (entry included), Trevi Fountain and Spanish Steps
highlights.zh: 永恒之城罗马：斗兽场、万神殿（含门票）、特莱维喷泉与西班牙广场

highlights.en: Amalfi Coast by boat to Positano and Amalfi, plus Capri island and its famed Blue Grotto
highlights.zh: 乘船游阿马尔菲海岸的波西塔诺与阿马尔菲，并环游卡普里岛探秘蓝洞

highlights.en: Relaxed 6-15 person small group, city-centre 4-5 star hotels, Chinese-speaking guide, all taxes & core tickets included
highlights.zh: 6-15人享乐小团，连住市区4-5星酒店，全程中文导游，税费与核心门票全含

includes.en: Hotels: 2 nights in 5-star hotels and 6 nights in comfortable 4-star hotels, 8 nights total.
includes.zh: 【酒店】：五星酒店2晚，舒适型四星级酒店6晚，共8晚酒店。

includes.en: Meals: 8 meals total, hotel breakfasts or other forms of dining.
includes.zh: 【餐饮】：酒店内早餐或其他形式餐饮共计8餐。

includes.en: Taxes: all in-itinerary taxes such as city/tourist tax, city-entry fees, residence tax, road and bridge tolls, island-landing fees, etc.
includes.zh: 【税费】：游客城市税、进城费、居住税、路桥费、登岛费等行程内的所有税费。

includes.en: Transport: tour coach.
includes.zh: 【交通】：旅游巴士。

includes.en: Guide: professional driver plus a Chinese-speaking guide, or a Chinese-speaking driver-guide throughout (note: for groups of 8 or fewer, a business van plus a Chinese-speaking driver-guide is arranged to lead the whole city itinerary).
includes.zh: 【导游】：职业司机+中文导游或者全程中文司机兼导游（备注：8人及以下则安排为商务旅行车+中文司机兼导游，届时将有司兼导带领游览全部城市行程）。

includes.en: Luggage: 1 piece of checked baggage up to 23 kg plus 1 carry-on.
includes.zh: 【行李】：1件23公斤行李及1件随身行李。

includes.en: Activities and tickets: Milan Cathedral, Rome Pantheon, Seceda round-trip cable car, Cinque Terre scenic train, Venice island ferry, Sorrento-Amalfi boat cruise, and Capri round-trip ferry.
includes.zh: 【活动及门票】：米兰大教堂、罗马万神殿、刀锋山往返缆车、五渔村景观列车、威尼斯登岛轮渡、索伦托阿马尔菲出海环游、卡普里岛往返渡船。

excludes.en: Passport: personal passport costs.
excludes.zh: 护照：个人护照费用。

excludes.en: Visa: tourist visa fees for the countries on the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 签证：行程中所列旅游国家所需的观光签证费用。

excludes.en: Insurance: travel insurance (if the itinerary involves high-risk sports, verify that your travel insurance covers them).
excludes.zh: 保险：旅游保险费用（如行程内涉及到高风险运动，请核实旅游保险是否包含该项运动）。

excludes.en: Tips: guide and driver tips totaling 10 euros per person per day, same rate for adults and children.
excludes.zh: 小费：游客支付导游和司机小费一共10欧/人/天，大小同价。

excludes.en: Meals: apart from the specialty meals included in the itinerary, lunch and dinner main meals are not included.
excludes.zh: 餐饮：除行程内包含的特色餐外，行程中不包含午、晚正餐费用。

excludes.en: Tickets: sights not noted as fee-included (including but not limited to those marked "exterior," "recommended," "optional," "experience," and any item not stated as included); if you wish to visit, please pay on your own.
excludes.zh: 门票：行程中未注明费用包含的景点（包括但不仅限于行程中注明"外观"的景点，"推荐""可选""体验"等等所有未提及费用包含的项目，如游客需要参观，敬请自理）。

excludes.en: Extended stays: any extra accommodation, transport or sightseeing outside the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 延长住宿：行程外额外延长的住宿、交通、观光费用。

excludes.en: Personal spending: drinks/alcohol, taxis, phone charges and other personal expenses.
excludes.zh: 私人消费：如饮料酒类、出租车、电话费等个人消费。

excludes.en: Other transport: any transport beyond the included business van or minibus and not mentioned in the inclusions, e.g. the Venice gondola, and sightseeing trains, electric taxis, etc. in vehicle-restricted zones, all at your own expense.
excludes.zh: 其他交通：除包含商务旅行车或者中巴之外，费用包含中未提及的其他交通费用，如威尼斯贡多拉，以及车辆限行区的观光火车、电瓶出租车等费用敬请自理。

excludes.en: Free time: independent evening sightseeing and recommended programs in the itinerary, and any resulting transport, dining, tickets, shopping, etc.
excludes.zh: 自由活动：游客夜间自行游览及行程中的推荐项目，以及产生的交通、餐饮、门票、购物等费用。

excludes.en: Experience activities: any travel experience activities not included in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 体验活动：行程中没有包含的各项旅游体验活动。

excludes.en: Other costs: anything not mentioned in the inclusions. For extra costs caused by force majeure (natural disasters, war, strikes, etc.) or special circumstances beyond the agency's control (transport delays, flight cancellation/rescheduling, consular visa delays, insufficient group numbers, etc.) — such as overseas visa-extension, accommodation, meal and transport fees, or airline fare adjustments — the agency reserves the right to charge the price difference.
excludes.zh: 其他费用：费用包含中未提及的费用。如因天灾、战争、罢工等不可抗力的原因，及因交通延阻、航班取消或更改时间、使馆延误出签证、人数不足等特殊情况或其他非我公司原因所引致的额外费（如在外延期签证费、住、食及交通费、国家航空运价调整等），我公司有权追加差价。

timeline.title_en: Milan - Lake Garda - Trento
timeline.title_zh: 米兰 - 加尔达湖 - 特伦托
timeline.description_en: In the morning, visit the classic-yet-vibrant northern Italian city of Milan, seeing Sforza Castle (exterior), the Gothic masterpiece of Milan Cathedral (Duomo, begun in 1386 and 500 years in the making), and strolling the Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II arcade with its Prada flagship and luxury boutiques and cafes. In the afternoon, head to Lake Garda to enjoy the lake-and-mountain scenery at the foot of the Alps, then continue to Trento to check in. Overnight at NH Trento Hotel or a comparable 4-star hotel, set in Trento's modern Le Albere science-and-culture district designed by Renzo Piano, a short walk from the MUSE science museum and the old town. Note: Rome's old town sights lie within the ZTL vehicle-restricted zone, so the Rome day is on foot (about 5 km round trip).
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往兼具古典气质与现代活力的北意名城米兰，参观斯福尔扎城堡（外观）；随后游览哥特式杰作米兰大教堂（始建于1386年，历经500年才完工），漫步埃马努埃莱二世长廊，欣赏其Prada精品店与林立的奢华餐厅、咖啡馆和商店。下午前往加尔达湖，欣赏阿尔卑斯山脚下的湖光山色，之后前往特伦托入住酒店。夜宿NH特伦托酒店或同等4星级酒店，酒店坐落在特伦托现代感十足的阿尔达通科学文化区（Le Albere），由意大利建筑大师Renzo Piano设计，步行几步即达特伦托科学博物馆MUSE与老城区。提示：罗马古城区主要景点均在车辆禁行区（ZTL）内，当天为步行游览，往返约5公里。

timeline.title_en: Trento - Bolzano - Ortisei - Val di Funes - Trento
timeline.title_zh: 特伦托 - 博尔扎诺 - 奥蒂塞伊 - 富内斯山谷 - 特伦托
timeline.description_en: In the morning, stroll the German-Austrian flavored old town of Bolzano (capital of South Tyrol) with its medieval cobbled streets and Piazza Walther. Then proceed to the town of Ortisei in Val Gardena, where you can take the cable car up to Seceda (round-trip cable car included) for the jagged Dolomite peaks and high alpine meadows, OR visit the Alpe di Siusi (Seiser Alm) high plateau for rolling grassland views (the Alpe di Siusi cable car is an optional paid experience, not included; only one of the two can be done that day). Continue to Val di Funes; at Santa Maddalena village, photograph the Church of St. Johann (the "lonely church") and St. Magdalena Church (exterior) set against the Geisler/Odle peaks, then return to the hotel. Overnight at NH Trento Hotel or a comparable 4-star hotel. Note: as the cable cars are in high alpine terrain, extreme weather or routine maintenance may suspend operation; if so the cable car cannot be used and its fee is refunded. Seceda's summer cable car officially runs 22 May - 2 Nov 2026; Alpe di Siusi runs 1 May - 2 Nov; if Seceda is not yet open or is adjusted, the visit switches to Alpe di Siusi (with cable car), subject to the resort's latest official notice.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往德奥风情浓郁的博尔扎诺（南蒂罗尔省首府）老城，漫步保存完好的中世纪鹅卵石街巷与瓦尔特广场。随后前往加尔代纳山谷中的奥蒂塞伊小镇，可乘缆车登顶刀锋山（Seceda，含往返缆车）俯瞰多洛米蒂锯齿状峰群与高山草甸，或前往休斯高原（Alpe di Siusi）欣赏波浪般起伏的高山草原风光（休斯高原缆车属可选体验项目，需另行购票、不含在内；受当日时间限制两处仅可二选一）。之后前往富内斯山谷，抵达圣马达莱娜村后外观打卡聖约翰小教堂（孤独教堂）与圣玛达莱娜教堂（外观），背靠盖斯勒（奥德尔）雪山群，游览结束后返回酒店。夜宿NH特伦托酒店或同等4星级酒店。注意：缆车位于阿尔卑斯高山区域，如遇极端天气或例行检修将暂停营运，届时缆车无法乘坐，缆车费用退还。刀锋山夏季缆车官方开放时间为2026年5月22日至11月2日，休斯高原为5月1日至11月2日；若刀锋山缆车尚未开放或临时调整，将改为游览休斯高原（含缆车），实际以景区官方公告为准。

timeline.title_en: Trento - Venice
timeline.title_zh: 特伦托 - 威尼斯
timeline.description_en: In the morning, set off for the water city of Venice. On arrival, view St. Mark's Basilica (exterior), St. Mark's Square (called by Napoleon "the most beautiful drawing room in Europe"), the Bridge of Sighs (exterior) and the magnificent Doge's Palace (exterior). These beautiful buildings rising from the water, together with the winding canals, give Venice its lingering romance. Here you can also sample Venice's signature three-course cuttlefish-ink pasta meal (at your own expense). Overnight at Venice voco hotel or Hilton Garden / Ambassador-style hotel, or a comparable 4-star hotel, one of Venice's newly renovated properties with stylish modern design, a generous breakfast, a fitness room, a lounge bar, and the Ludico Venice restaurant serving Italian cuisine.
timeline.description_zh: 上午出发前往水城威尼斯，到达后参观聖马可大教堂（外观）、聖马可广场（曾被拿破仑称作"欧洲最美丽的客厅"）、叹息桥（外观）以及华丽的总督宫（外观），这些建造在水上的美丽建筑与蜿蜒水巷一起，让威尼斯的浪漫风情久久挥之不去。在这里您还可以品尝威尼斯特色大餐墨鱼面三道式（自理）。夜宿威尼斯洲际voco酒店或希尔顿大使酒店，或同等4星级酒店；酒店为威尼斯新装修酒店之一，地理位置优越，时尚现代设计，提供丰盛早餐、健身房、酒廊酒吧及供应意大利佳肴的Ludico Venice餐厅。

timeline.title_en: Venice - Tuscany (Florence)
timeline.title_zh: 威尼斯 - 托斯卡纳（佛罗伦萨）
timeline.description_en: In the morning, depart for Florence, birthplace of the Renaissance, and visit the old-town sights: the world's third-largest cathedral, the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore (the Duomo, which requires queuing to enter), Piazza della Signoria (an open-air sculpture museum, with the Palazzo Vecchio, a replica of Michelangelo's David and the Neptune Fountain), the Ponte Vecchio (the old bridge over the Arno, built in 1345), and the Piazza Santa Croce with the Basilica of Santa Croce (exterior), resting place of Michelangelo and Galileo. Then check in to the hotel. Overnight at a Montecatini SPA hotel in Tuscany or a comparable 5-star hotel, in the renowned wellness resort town of Montecatini, with two pools (indoor and outdoor), a sauna with forest views, a private park within Terme Tettuccio, and the seasonal NO|MORE Bistrot restaurant.
timeline.description_zh: 上午出发前往文艺复兴的发源地佛罗伦萨，参观老城景点：世界第三大教堂——圣母百花大教堂（需排队进入）、市政广场（露天雕塑博物馆，坐落着维奇奥宫、米开朗基罗《大卫》复制品及海神喷泉）、老桥（建于1345年、横跨阿诺河的维奇奥桥）以及圣十字广场和圣十字教堂（外观，米开朗基罗与伽利略的安息地），之后入住酒店。夜宿托斯卡纳蒙特卡蒂尼SPA酒店或同等5星级酒店；酒店位于著名康养度假地蒙特卡蒂尼，设有室内外两个泳池、享森林景观的桑拿、Terme Tettuccio园中的私人公园，及随季节变换菜单的NO|MORE Bistrot餐厅。

timeline.title_en: Tuscany - Cinque Terre - Pisa - Tuscany
timeline.title_zh: 托斯卡纳 - 五渔村 - 比萨 - 托斯卡纳
timeline.description_en: In the morning, set off to explore the Cinque Terre, the five colorful clifftop fishing villages along the Ligurian coast (Monterosso al Mare, Vernazza, Corniglia, Manarola and Riomaggiore), a UNESCO World Heritage Site since 1997, riding the scenic coastal train between villages. In the afternoon, head to Pisa to see the Leaning Tower of Pisa (exterior) and the Piazza dei Miracoli (Square of Miracles) at the historic-cultural heart of the city, with its cathedral, baptistery, tower and cemetery. Then return to the Tuscany region to check in. Overnight at a Montecatini SPA hotel in Tuscany or a comparable 5-star hotel. Note: if bad weather or a rail strike makes the Cinque Terre inaccessible, the itinerary automatically switches to touring the coastal towns by coach or other means.
timeline.description_zh: 上午出发前往遊览五渔村，沿利古里亚海岸线游览悬崖上的五彩渔村——蒙特罗索、韦尔纳扎、科尔尼利亚、马纳罗拉及里奥马焦雷（1997年列入世界文化遗产），乘坐景观列车在各村间穿行。下午前往比萨，游览比萨斜塔（外观）和比萨历史文化中心的奇迹广场（含大教堂、洗礼堂、斜塔钟楼和墓园），之后前往托斯卡纳大区入住酒店。夜宿托斯卡纳蒙特卡蒂尼SPA酒店或同等5星级酒店。备注：如遇恶劣天气或铁路公司罢工等因素导致无法游览五渔村，行程将自动更改为乘坐大巴车或其它形式游览海岸线城市。

timeline.title_en: Tuscany - Siena - Pienza - Rome
timeline.title_zh: 托斯卡纳 - 锡耶纳 - 皮恩扎 - 罗马
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, set off for the medieval town of Siena and visit Siena Cathedral (exterior), the shell-shaped Piazza del Campo (one of the largest surviving medieval squares in Europe), the Palazzo Pubblico / town hall (exterior) and the Torre del Mangia (exterior, Siena's tallest building at 102 m). After lunch, visit the old town of Pienza, including Piazza Pio II and Pienza Cathedral (exterior); Pienza was rebuilt from 1459 by Pope Pius II as a model "ideal city," and from its walls you can look out over the UNESCO World Heritage Val d'Orcia. Then head to Rome, stopping for free photos along the famous cypress-lined country lane (Cypress Road). On arrival in Rome, check in to the hotel. Overnight at Sheraton Roma / Mantegna-style hotel in Rome or a comparable 4-star hotel, surrounded by landscaped gardens, a golf course and an outdoor pool, with rooms overlooking the garden, pool or course and several restaurants.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后出发前往锡耶纳古城，游览锡耶纳大教堂（外观）、田野广场（贝壳广场，欧洲现存最大的中世纪广场之一）、锡耶纳市政厅（外观）、曼吉亚塔楼（外观，垂直高度102米、锡耶纳最高建筑）等景点。午餐后前往皮恩扎古城参观二世广场、皮恩扎大教堂（外观）；皮恩扎由教皇皮乌斯二世于1459年主持重建，被视为"理想城市"典范，可从城墙上俯瞰世界遗产奥尔恰山谷（Val d'Orcia）。之后前往罗马，途中在絲柏树小径自由拍照，抵达罗马后入住酒店。夜宿罗马梅第奇喜来登酒店或曼特尼亚酒店，或同等4星级酒店；酒店环绕着园景花园、高尔夫球场和室外泳池，房间享有花园、泳池或球场景致，并设有多间餐厅。

timeline.title_en: Rome - Naples - Sorrento
timeline.title_zh: 罗马 - 那不勒斯 - 索伦托
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, tour the world-famous "Eternal City" of Rome on foot with the guide: see the Colosseum (exterior), the Pantheon (included; as a religious site, no bare shoulders/backs and no shorts/short skirts above the knee, no food or drink inside), the Spanish Steps and the Trevi Fountain (exterior). Note that Rome's old town bans vehicles and is largely pedestrian, so the day is on foot, about 5-6 km. Then head to Naples to tour the old town, the Royal Palace of Naples (exterior) and Castel Nuovo / New Castle (exterior), birthplace of pizza and the songs 'O Sole Mio and Torna a Surriento. After the visit, continue to Sorrento to check in. Overnight at a Sorrento coast hotel or a comparable 4-star hotel, with sweeping views over the Bay of Sorrento/Naples, a private beach and pier, two restaurants, a marine spa, and walking access to the seaside town center.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后在导游带领下徒步游览世界著名历史文化名城罗马（"永恒之城"）：参观斗兽场（外观）、万神殿（包含；因属宗教场所，入内需着装不露肩露背、不穿过膝以上短裤短裙，不可携带饮食）、西班牙广场和特莱维喷泉（许愿池，外观）。备注：因罗马古城建筑保护、禁止车辆行驶，大多数区域为步行街区，当天徒步参观约5-6公里。随后前往那不勒斯游览那不勒斯老城、那不勒斯皇宫（外观）、新堡（外观）等——这里是披萨的起源地，也是《我的太阳》《重归苏莲托》的诞生地。游览结束前往索伦托入住酒店。夜宿索伦托海岸酒店或同等4星级酒店；酒店三面环绕索伦托那不勒斯海湾景观，拥有私人沙滩和私家码头、两间风格各异的餐厅及一间海洋SPA中心，步行可达海滨小镇中心。

timeline.title_en: Sorrento - Amalfi - Positano - Sorrento
timeline.title_zh: 索伦托 - 阿马尔菲 - 波西塔诺 - 索伦托
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, embark on a charming boat day-trip to discover the treasures of the Amalfi Coast (a UNESCO World Heritage Site). Sail to the clifftop village of Positano to explore its enchanting cliffside streets, then continue by boat to Amalfi to enjoy panoramic views of the Amalfi Coast town. Afterwards, return by boat and check in to the hotel. Overnight at a Sorrento coast hotel or a comparable 4-star hotel. Note: in case of extreme sea weather, for guest safety the boat operator may cancel the Positano/Amalfi cruise, in which case the agency will arrange a coach tour of Sorrento's old town that day (Positano and Amalfi then cannot be visited), and the cruise fee is refunded to guests; in that case you can also relax at the seaside hotel and enjoy the Bay of Naples views.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后踏上迷人游船一日游，探索阿马尔菲海岸（世界文化遗产）的宝藏。乘船前往悬崖村庄波西塔诺，探索迷人的悬崖小巷，然后乘船前往阿马尔菲，欣赏阿马尔菲海岸小镇全景。之后乘船返回，入住酒店。夜宿索伦托海岸酒店或同等4星级酒店。备注：如遇海上极端天气情况，出于游客安全考虑，游船公司取消出海游览波西塔诺和阿马尔菲活动，我社将安排当天乘坐大巴车参观索伦托老城，无法参观波西塔诺和阿马尔菲，出海游船费用将退还给游客；此时也可在三面环海的酒店内享受那不勒斯湾的美景与美食。

timeline.title_en: Sorrento - Capri Island - Rome (end of tour)
timeline.title_zh: 索伦托 - 卡普里岛 - 罗马（行程结束）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, take a ferry from Naples/Sorrento to the port of Capri. Then enjoy free time on the island: stroll by the sea and visit the Blue Grotto (one of the world's seven wonders, where light entering the small cave opening turns the water a crystalline blue), take a boat to circle the island and explore the grotto, or head up to Capri town to see the Gardens of Augustus (exterior) overlooking the whole bay. Afterwards take the ferry back to Sorrento/Naples and transfer to Rome where the tour ends. Note: on Capri the time is free and no transport is included; the recommended route is Marina Grande - Capri old town - Gardens of Augustus (a roughly 1.3 km uphill walk past three key sights, with cable car and taxis available at extra cost). The Blue Grotto is a natural site and may be closed by high tide, wind, waves or local maritime authorities; the Blue Grotto visit is not included in the tour, and besides the boatmen's rowing fee you should tip 2-5 euros per local custom. No hotel is provided that day.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后从那不勒斯/索伦托乘坐渡船到达卡普里岛港口。当天为岛上自由活动：可自行前往海边漫步后前往蓝洞参观（世界七大奇景之一，阳光从小洞口进入使洞内海水一片晶蓝），或自行乘船环岛探秘蓝洞，或自行前往卡普里城中游览奥古斯都花园（外观），俯瞰整个海湾；之后坐渡船返回索伦托/那不勒斯码头，前往罗马结束行程。备注：卡普里岛登岛后自由活动、不含任何交通费用，推荐路线为大港—卡普里古城—奥古斯都花园，单程约1.3公里山路，途径三个重要景点，沿途有缆车和出租车需额外付费。蓝洞属于自然景观，如遇涨潮、风浪或当地海洋气象机构宣布关闭则无法入内游览；蓝洞游览费用不包括在旅游团内，除蓝洞人力船工费用外，请按当地习俗支付2-5欧元小费。当天无酒店住宿。

meeting_en: Tour starts in Milan (variant A, Milan to Rome). A reverse Rome-to-Milan routing (variant B) is also available; pickup details confirmed on booking.
meeting_zh: 行程于米兰出发（A线：米兰至罗马）。另设罗马出发、米兰结束的反向B线；具体接站信息以预订确认为准。

faqs.question_en: Where and when does the tour meet and disperse?
faqs.question_zh: 集合及集散地点和方法是怎样的？
faqs.answer_en: There are two route directions. Route A (start in Milan, end in Rome): Day 1 the coach departs from Milan Malpensa Airport (MXP) at 09:00, with a meeting point around 10:00 at the tour-coach parking station by Sforza Castle (Castello Sforzesco, Parcheggio bus turistici Lanza, 20121 Milano MI, Italy); Day 9 the group disperses around 18:00 at Roma Tiburtina train station. You may join in Milan on Day 1, but you will then miss the Milan city sights with no refund; an evening flight out of Rome on the last day is not recommended. Route B (start in Rome, end in Milan): Day 1 meet at 09:00 at Roma Tiburtina station / the designated hotel lobby; Day 9 disperse in central Milan around 17:30 and then around 18:00 at Milan Malpensa Airport (MXP). For Route B you may book a flight arriving in Rome that day, but arriving after 14:00 means no Rome sightseeing with no refund; an evening flight out of Milan on the last day is fine. These are reference times/places; the actual departure follows the final tour notice.
faqs.answer_zh: 本产品有两个方向。A线路（米兰出发、罗马结束）：第1天09:00在米兰马尔彭萨机场（MXP）准时发车，10:00左右在米兰斯福尔扎城堡旅游大巴停车站集合（地址：Castello Sforzesco Parcheggio bus turistici Lanza, 20121 Milano MI, Italy）；第9天18:00左右在Roma Tiburtina火车站解散。当天可在米兰上团，但米兰市区景点会无法游览且无费用可退；不推荐预订当天晚上离开罗马的航班。B线路（罗马出发、米兰结束）：第1天09:00在Roma Tiburtina火车站/指定酒店大厅集合；第9天17:30左右在米兰市区解散、随后18:00左右在米兰马尔彭萨机场（MXP）解散。可预订当天抵达罗马的航班，但14:00之后抵达将导致罗马无景点参观且无费用可退；结束当天可预订晚上离开米兰的航班。以上为参考时间及地点，实际以出团通知书为准。

faqs.question_en: Will the daily coach rides be very long?
faqs.question_zh: 行程路线乘坐大巴时间会不会很久？
faqs.answer_en: The itinerary is planned for an average of about 3-4 hours of travel time per day. Road conditions are complex, and traffic jams or other factors, especially within cities, can increase driving time.
faqs.answer_zh: 该产品行程计划平均时间为每日3-4小时的行程时间。公路交通情况复杂，特别是市区内容易发生堵车或其它因素导致行车时间增加。

faqs.question_en: Can I visit both the Seceda and the Alpe di Siusi cable cars on the same day?
faqs.question_zh: 刀锋山和休斯高原缆车当天是否都可乘坐游览？
faqs.answer_en: On that day, the agency already includes the Seceda round-trip cable car. The Alpe di Siusi (Seiser Alm) cable car is an optional experience at your own expense. Due to the day's time constraints, you can visit only one of the two. If the Seceda cable car is temporarily closed due to operational arrangements, the visit is uniformly switched to the Alpe di Siusi (cable car included). Actual operation is subject to the resort's latest official notice.
faqs.answer_zh: 行程当日我社已包含刀锋山往返缆车费用。休斯高原缆车为可选体验项目，相关费用需您自理。受当日行程时间限制，两个景点仅可择一参观。若刀锋山缆车因运营安排临时关闭，将统一调整为游览休斯高原（含缆车），实际运营情况以景区官方最新通知为准。

faqs.question_en: Can I choose to tour the Cinque Terre by boat?
faqs.question_zh: 我是否可以选择乘船游览五渔村？
faqs.answer_en: Because boat sightseeing is weather-dependent, this product does not include Cinque Terre boat tickets. You may opt to go by boat, but the train ticket cost cannot be refunded or exchanged, and you must buy the boat ticket yourself, at about 40 euros.
faqs.answer_zh: 由于乘船游览受气候影响，该产品并非包含五渔村船票，但是可以选择乘船游览，无法退换火车票的费用，并且需要自行购买船票，约40欧元。

faqs.question_en: Can we tour central Rome by vehicle?
faqs.question_zh: 罗马市中心我们是否可以乘车游览？
faqs.answer_en: Because Rome's sights are very concentrated and the area is a pedestrian zone, the agency cannot arrange a tour coach; central Rome's sights must be toured on foot.
faqs.answer_zh: 由于罗马各个景点非常集中，并且都是步行街区，因此我社无法安排旅游大巴，罗马市中心景点需要徒步游览。

faqs.question_en: Can we choose different menus and dishes for our dinners?
faqs.question_zh: 我们的晚餐是否能根据喜好选择不同的菜单和菜品？
faqs.answer_en: The dining recommended in the itinerary is all recommended local specialty meals and is not included in the price — for example Venice's famous black cuttlefish-ink pasta or Tuscany's steak. You cannot choose other dishes; if a recommended dish is not your preference, you are free to choose other dining on your own.
faqs.answer_zh: 行程内推荐的餐饮全部为推荐当地特色餐，费用并未包含，比如威尼斯著名的黑墨鱼面、托斯卡纳的牛排等。无法选择其它菜式，如果菜品并非您的首选，可以自行选择其他餐饮。

faqs.question_en: I get seasick — can I still do the Sorrento island-hopping to the four coastal towns?
faqs.question_zh: 我晕船是否能参加索伦托的跳岛游览四大城市？
faqs.answer_en: First, the Mediterranean is an inland sea with relatively few waves, and the boats are large, so seasickness is unlikely. Second, on the island-hopping the boat is a means of transport rather than a sightseeing tool — each leg averages about 40 minutes to 1 hour, after which you land and tour; many included sights such as Capri, Positano and Amalfi cannot be reached by vehicle, or not conveniently. Third, the Sorrento seaside hotel is surrounded by sea on three sides with a private beach and pier, two restaurants of different styles and a renowned marine spa, so if there is island-hopping that day you can also enjoy the Bay of Naples views and food at the hotel.
faqs.answer_zh: 首先，地中海为内海，相对风浪比较少，加之船体又比较大，因此晕船的概率比较低。其次，跳岛游览中船为交通工具、并非游览工具，平均每段行程为40分钟到1小时，随后即可登陆游览；行程中包含的许多景点，如卡普里、波西塔诺、阿马尔菲等都是车辆无法到达或不便到达的景点。再次，索伦托海滨酒店三面环海，拥有私人沙滩和私家码头、两个不同风格的餐厅和一间著名的海洋Spa中心，如果当天有跳岛活动，也可以在酒店内享受那不勒斯湾的美景和美食。

faqs.question_en: What happens if extreme weather cancels the boat trip to Positano and Amalfi?
faqs.question_zh: 如遇极端天气情况，游船出海取消参观波西塔诺和阿马尔菲怎么办？
faqs.answer_en: In case of extreme sea weather, for guest safety the boat operator cancels the cruise to Positano and Amalfi. The agency will then arrange a coach visit to Sorrento's old town that day; Positano and Amalfi cannot be visited, and the boat-cruise fee is refunded to guests.
faqs.answer_zh: 如遇海上极端天气情况，出于游客安全考虑，游船公司取消出海游览波西塔诺和阿马尔菲活动，我社将安排当天参观索伦托老城，无法参观波西塔诺和阿马尔菲，出海游船费用将退还给游客。

faqs.question_en: Do I need a visa?
faqs.question_zh: 是否需要签证？
faqs.answer_en: This product does not include visa costs. It requires a Schengen visa (single or multiple entry); if you need to apply, please choose a Schengen-visa product. "Worry-free visa" guarantee: for guests who sign a contract with us at least 61 days before departure, if no visa is obtained within 45 days before departure, we bear all losses and immediately refund the full travel fee; guests not meeting this clause who fail to obtain a visa are refunded per the change-and-cancellation terms. A refusal must be reported to us within 48 hours with the consulate's refusal letter, and any supplementary/changed materials submitted within five days, without unilaterally waiving the right of "visa defense." If you entrust us to handle the Schengen visa, we buy you Schengen-compliant travel insurance; otherwise you must buy your own. After booking we provide, free of charge, all materials needed to apply for the Schengen visa. Your passport must be valid for at least six months from the date of departure, or customs may refuse entry. Visa fees, visa service fees, Schengen insurance fees and visa-center appointment fees are all non-refundable and non-transferable, and remain non-refundable even if the product is changed or cancelled.
faqs.answer_zh: 本产品不包含签证费用，如需办理请选择申根签证产品。本产品需要申根签证（单次或多次入境）。保签无忧：游客在出发日前61天与我社签约的旅游产品，如在出发前45天内未获取签证，我社承担所有损失、立即退还游客全部旅游费用；不符合该条款的游客如未正常获取签证，将按照退改与取消条款进行退费。如遇拒签需在48小时内通知我社并出具使领馆拒签函，如需补充或更改材料须在五天内提交，且不得单方面放弃"签证抗辩"权利。如委托我社办理申根签证，我社为您购买符合申根要求的旅游保险；若未委托办理，需自行购买。预订后免费提供办理申根签证的全部材料。护照有效期需在离境之日起至少还有六个月，否则海关有权拒绝入境。签证费、签证服务费、申根保险费、签证中心预约费均不可退款、也无法更改使用者，即使产品退改签，签证费用亦无法退款。

faqs.question_en: Booking, changes and cancellation
faqs.question_zh: 预订、变更与取消须知
faqs.answer_en: Free cancellation: up to 30 days before departure (excluding the 30th day) both the agency and the traveler may cancel without cause. Group size & forming: this is a join-in (shared) tour formed at 10 people; if 30 days before departure (excluding the 30th) the minimum is not reached, either side may cancel without liability, and a self-funded activity that does not reach 10 people may also be cancelled and turned into "free time." Connections: as flight/transport/ferry changes, traffic and strikes often shift the schedule and order of sights, you must arrive at the meeting point one day before the tour starts and leave the dispersal point one day after it ends, allowing reasonable flight connection time (at least 5 hours for a transfer at the same airport, 7 hours between different airports in the same city; reasonable meet/disperse window 07:00-21:00) — losses from not doing so are the traveler's own. Rooms: two people booking together default to a standard twin/double with bed type assigned by the hotel (not selectable); solo travelers pay a single-room supplement deposit (refunded pro-rata if successfully matched for sharing); triple/family rooms default to two parents plus one minor with hotel-assigned bedding. European hotels are non-smoking, no cooking in rooms, no free toiletries or boiled water, check-in 14:00 / check-out 11:00, and air-conditioning is not standard. Listed hotel names are preferred; if full, a similar same-star hotel is substituted without separate notice. Contingencies: bad weather or rail strikes may switch the Cinque Terre to a coach/coastal tour; alpine cable cars (Seceda/Alpe di Siusi) may suspend for extreme weather or maintenance with the cable-car fee refunded; the Capri Blue Grotto may be closed by tide/wind/waves (its visit is not included; tip the boatmen 2-5 euros); extreme sea weather may cancel the Positano/Amalfi cruise (replaced by a Sorrento old-town coach visit, cruise fee refunded). This is a continuously dispatched looped group: other guests join and leave at different points, and the start/end city and price differ — book according to your own chosen start and end. Pricing: all prices are quoted in EUR at the time of booking; if you pay in CNY, the rate is the Bank of China real-time "euro selling price" auto-calculated by the site on the day of payment, and the same applies to refunds (exchange differences and bank fees are borne by the traveler).
faqs.answer_zh: 免费取消：出发前30天（不含第30天）旅行社和旅行者均有权无理由取消。成团与人数：本产品为散客拼团，成团人数为10人；行程开始前30天（不含第30天）未达到成团人数，双方均可解除合同且不承担违约责任，团内自费活动未达10人也可能取消并改为"自由活动"。航班衔接：因航变、交通拥堵、渡轮取消、罢工等常导致行程时间及游览顺序调整，旅行者须在参团日期前一天抵达集合地、离团日期后一天离开集散地，并预留合理衔接时间（同机场转机至少5小时、同城不同机场至少7小时，合理集散时段为07:00至21:00），未预留导致的损失由旅行者自行承担。房型：两人同时报名默认标准双人间，床型由酒店安排不可选；单人报名默认含单人房差押金（成功拼房后按比例退款）；三人家庭间默认两位父母与一位未成年儿童入住，床型由酒店安排。欧洲酒店全面禁烟、禁止房内做饭、不提供一次性洗漱用品及免费开水，入住14:00、退房11:00，空调并非标配。行程内所列酒店名称为优先入住，如订满则更换为相同星级的相近酒店，恕不另行通知。应急安排：恶劣天气或铁路罢工时五渔村改为大巴/海岸线游览；阿尔卑斯缆车（刀锋山/休斯高原）遇极端天气或检修可能暂停、缆车费用退还；卡普里蓝洞遇涨潮、风浪等可能关闭（其费用不含、需付船工2-5欧元小费）；海上极端天气可能取消波西塔诺/阿马尔菲出海（改为乘大巴参观索伦托老城、游船费用退还）。本产品为循环套发团，途中会有其他游客在不同地点上下团，开始与结束城市不同、价格不同，请按个人报名的目的地开始和结束行程。价格：所有定价以欧元为预订时计价单位，如选择人民币支付，则以当天支付时本网站依据中国银行实时"欧元卖出价"自动计算的人民币价格为准，退款同样适用申请当日即时汇率，汇率差异及银行手续费由旅行者承担。

faqs.question_en: Health and safety requirements
faqs.question_zh: 健康与安全须知
faqs.answer_en: For a safe trip, please have a health check before departure and do not sign up if you have: infectious diseases (e.g. active tuberculosis, typhoid); cardiovascular disease (e.g. severe hypertension, heart failure, myocardial ischemia/infarction); cerebrovascular disease (e.g. embolism, hemorrhage, brain tumor); respiratory disease (e.g. emphysema, cor pulmonale); psychiatric conditions (e.g. epilepsy, various mental illnesses); severe anemia (hemoglobin below 50 g/L); or are recovering from major/medium surgery. Pregnancy: at 35 weeks or more you cannot join under any circumstances; at 28 weeks or more you must provide a doctor's exam report from within 7 days plus the attending doctor's consent letter; under 28 weeks please sign up cautiously, sign the agency's disclaimer, and you cannot take part in adventure, skiing, sea-going, high-altitude or outdoor activities. People with disabilities: provide a doctor's report from within 7 days plus consent letter, be accompanied by an immediate family member, and apply at least 61 days ahead for a reserved place and facilities. Elderly travelers over 70: provide a health certificate and exam report and be accompanied by an immediate family member (or sign the disclaimer); the trip is long and demands a degree of walking ability and stamina; activities like adventure/skiing/sea-going/high-altitude/outdoor need the attending doctor's consent; apply at least 61 days ahead for elderly-care services. Minors (under 18): must be accompanied by an immediate relative/guardian; some sights have special limits for those under 18/12/6; for infants under 6 or children under 30 kg confirm a child safety seat in advance (or bring an EU-standard seat); an unaccompanied minor needs both parents' authorization (or the other parent's written authorization if with only one parent, or both parents' guardian authorization if with others); infants under 2 are not accepted on this tour. Per Article 15 of the Tourism Law, travelers must truthfully declare health information relevant to the activity (pregnancy, lactation, chronic illness, infectious-disease history, suspected symptoms, recent epidemic-area travel, etc.) and follow safety warnings; concealment that causes harm or spread makes the traveler liable, and the agency may terminate the contract without refund.
faqs.answer_zh: 为确保顺利出行、防止旅途中发生人身意外伤害，请出行前做一次必要的身体检查，如存在下列情况请勿报名：传染性疾病患者（如活动期肺结核、伤寒等）；心血管疾病患者（如严重高血压、心功能不全、心肌缺氧、心肌梗塞等）；脑血管疾病患者（如脑栓塞、脑出血、脑肿瘤等）；呼吸系统疾病患者（如肺气肿、肺心病等）；精神病患者（如癫痫及各种精神病）；严重贫血患者（血红蛋白水平在50克/升以下）；大中型手术恢复期病患者。孕妇：妊娠第35周及以上任何情况都无法参团；第28周及以上需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书；第28周以下请慎重报名、需签署旅行社免责声明书，且无法参加探险、滑雪、出海、高空、户外等项目。残疾人：需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书、需直系家属陪同、需提前至少61天申请预留位置及专用配套设施。70周岁以上老年人：需提供健康证明、体检报告并由直系家属陪同（否则需签署免责声明书）；本次行程较长、需要一定步行能力与体力，体力不支者请慎重报名；涉及探险、滑雪、出海、高空、户外等项目需持主治医师同意书；需提前至少61天申请适老化服务与专属设施。未成年人（未满18周岁）：须由直系亲属或监护人陪同；部分景点对未满18/12/6周岁有特殊限定；如有6岁以下婴儿或30公斤以下儿童请提前确认安全座椅（否则需自备符合欧盟制式的座椅）；无父母陪同的未成年人须持父母授权书（仅一方陪同需另一方书面授权，与其他人同行需父母双方监护人授权）；本产品不接受2周岁以下婴儿参团。根据《旅游法》第15条，旅游者需如实告知与旅游活动相关的个人健康信息（包括妊娠期、哺乳期、慢性病、传染病史、疑似症状或近期疫区旅居史等）并遵守安全警示规定，如因隐瞒导致人身损害或传播风险，旅游者需自行承担责任，旅行社可解除合同且不退还费用。

title_en: Germany, Switzerland & Austria 7-Day Alpine Tour from Frankfurt
title_zh: 德国瑞士奥地利7天跟团游（法兰克福往返）
short_en: A 7-day Alpine loop from Frankfurt through Heidelberg, Zurich, the Jungfrau region, Neuschwanstein, Innsbruck, Salzburg, Hallstatt, Munich and Nuremberg.
short_zh: 7天阿尔卑斯环线，从法兰克福出发，串联海德堡、苏黎世、少女峰地区、新天鹅堡、因斯布鲁克、萨尔茨堡、哈尔施塔特、慕尼黑与纽伦堡。
desc_en: This 7-day small-group tour traces a 360-degree loop around the Alps across Germany, Switzerland and Austria, departing and returning at Frankfurt. From romantic Heidelberg and the financial city of Zurich, you head into the heart of Switzerland — the Jungfrau region, Interlaken's two lakes, Lucerne and the legendary Glacier Express through the Devil's Bridge. The route then crosses into Bavaria and Tyrol for the fairy-tale Neuschwanstein castle, Innsbruck, Mozart's Salzburg and the storybook lakeside village of Hallstatt, before finishing with beer-hall Munich and medieval Nuremberg.
desc_zh: 这趟7天享乐小团围绕阿尔卑斯山做360度环线游览，串联德国、瑞士、奥地利三国精华，从法兰克福出发并返回。行程从浪漫的海德堡、金融之都苏黎世启程，深入瑞士腹地——少女峰地区、因特拉肯的图恩湖与布里恩茨湖、卢塞恩，以及途经天险魔鬼桥的传奇冰川列车。随后翻越进入巴伐利亚与蒂罗尔，探访童话般的新天鹅堡、因斯布鲁克、莫扎特的故乡萨尔茨堡，以及被誉为世界最美小镇的湖畔哈尔施塔特，最后以啤酒之城慕尼黑与中世纪古城纽伦堡收尾。

highlights.en: Glacier Express scenic rail through the Alps, past the Devil's Bridge and Medel ice peak
highlights.zh: 乘坐冰川列车穿越阿尔卑斯山，途经天险魔鬼桥与梅德尔冰峰

highlights.en: The Jungfrau region — Grindelwald, the two lakes of Interlaken and views of Alpine peaks
highlights.zh: 少女峰地区——格林德尔瓦尔德、因特拉肯两湖与阿尔卑斯雪山全景

highlights.en: Neuschwanstein Castle, the real-life model for the Disney fairy-tale castle
highlights.zh: 新天鹅堡——迪士尼童话城堡的原型

highlights.en: Hallstatt, the UNESCO-listed lakeside village known as the world's most beautiful town
highlights.zh: 哈尔施塔特——列入世界遗产、被誉为世界最美的湖畔小镇

highlights.en: Mozart's Salzburg and Innsbruck, the heart of the Alps with its Golden Roof
highlights.zh: 莫扎特故乡萨尔茨堡，以及拥有黄金屋顶的阿尔卑斯山心脏因斯布鲁克

highlights.en: Bavarian Munich and medieval Nuremberg, with the chance to dine at a historic beer hall
highlights.zh: 巴伐利亚慕尼黑与中世纪古城纽伦堡，可选择在百年啤酒馆品尝烤猪肘

highlights.en: Flights and intercity transport included, with flexible boarding at Frankfurt or Zurich
highlights.zh: 含机票与城际交通，可在法兰克福或苏黎世灵活上团

highlights.en: Small group of 6–15, city-centre 4-star hotels, listed sights included and no forced shopping
highlights.zh: 6–15人享乐小团，入住市中心四星酒店，含所列景点，全程无强制购物

includes.en: Hotels: 6 nights in 4-star hotels.
includes.zh: 【酒店】：6晚四星级酒店。

includes.en: Meals: 6 breakfasts in total, served as in-hotel buffet breakfast or another form of breakfast.
includes.zh: 【餐饮】：酒店内自助早餐或其他形式早餐共计6餐。

includes.en: Operating costs: tourist city tax, city-entry fees, residence tax, road and bridge tolls, parking and fuel charges, driver/guide meal allowances and other in-itinerary operating expenses.
includes.zh: 【执行】：游客城市税、进城费、居住税、过路过桥费、停车燃油费、司导餐补等行程内执行费用。

includes.en: Transport: business travel car or tour coach.
includes.zh: 【交通】：商务旅行车或者旅游巴士。

includes.en: Guide: professional coach driver or Chinese-speaking ethnic-Chinese driver-guide throughout (note: for groups under 8 people, a business car plus driver-guide; for groups over 8 people, a tour coach plus professional driver plus Chinese-speaking guide).
includes.zh: 【导游】：专业巴士司机或全程中文华人司机兼导游（注：8人以下为商务车+司机兼导游，8人以上为旅游巴士+专业司机+中文导游）。

includes.en: Baggage: one piece of checked baggage up to 23 kg plus one piece of carry-on baggage.
includes.zh: 【行李】：1件23公斤行李及1件随身行李。

includes.en: Admission tickets: Heidelberg Castle funicular and the castle, the Nuremberg Imperial Castle palace, and the first-entry ticket to Neuschwanstein Castle. (Sights marked "exterior" and any tickets or experience fees not mentioned in the inclusions are not covered and are at your own expense.)
includes.zh: 【门票】：海德堡城堡登山电车及城堡、纽伦堡国王堡城堡宫殿、新天鹅堡首道门票（标注“外观”的景点及费用包含中未提及的门票及体验费用不包含，敬请自理）。

excludes.en: Passport: personal passport fees.
excludes.zh: 护照：个人护照费用。

excludes.en: Visa: the tourist visa fees required for the countries listed in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 签证：行程中所列旅游国家所需的观光签证费用。

excludes.en: Insurance: travel insurance fees (if the itinerary involves high-risk sports, please verify whether your travel insurance covers that activity).
excludes.zh: 保险：旅游保险费用（如行程内涉及到高风险运动，请核实旅游保险是否包含该项运动）。

excludes.en: Tips: gratuities to the guide and driver totalling EUR 10 per person per day, the same rate for adults and children.
excludes.zh: 小费：游客支付导游和司机小费一共10欧/人/天，大小同价。

excludes.en: Meals: apart from the special meals included in the itinerary, lunch and dinner main meals are not included.
excludes.zh: 餐饮：除行程内包含的特色餐外，行程中不包含午、晚正餐费用。

excludes.en: Admission tickets: sights not noted as included (including but not limited to sights marked "exterior" and all "recommended", "optional", "experience" and other items not stated as included; if you wish to visit, please pay on your own).
excludes.zh: 门票：行程中未注明费用包含的景点（包括但不仅限于行程中注明“外观”的景点，“推荐”、“可选”、“体验”等等所有未提及费用包含的项目，如游客需要参观，敬请自理）。

excludes.en: Extended stays: any accommodation, transport or sightseeing costs for extensions beyond the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 延长住宿：行程外额外延长的住宿、交通、观光费用。

excludes.en: Personal spending: such as drinks and alcohol, taxis, phone charges and other personal consumption.
excludes.zh: 私人消费：如饮料酒类、出租车、电话费等个人消费。

excludes.en: Other transport: apart from the included business travel car or minibus, other transport fees not mentioned in the inclusions, such as the Venice gondola and, in vehicle-restricted zones, sightseeing trains and electric taxis, are at your own expense.
excludes.zh: 其他交通：除包含商务旅行车或者中巴之外，费用包含中未提及的其他交通费用，如威尼斯贡多拉，以及车辆限行区的观光火车、电瓶出租车等费用敬请自理。

excludes.en: Free activities: tourists' own evening sightseeing and the recommended programs in the itinerary, together with the transport, meals, tickets and shopping costs they generate.
excludes.zh: 自由活动：游客夜间自行游览及行程中的推荐项目，以及产生的交通、餐饮、门票、购物等费用。

excludes.en: Experience activities: the various travel experience activities not included in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 体验活动：行程中的没有包含的各项旅游体验活动。

excludes.en: Other costs: any costs not mentioned in the inclusions. In cases of force majeure such as natural disasters, war or strikes, or special circumstances such as traffic delays, flight cancellations or rescheduling, embassy visa delays, or insufficient group numbers, or other extra costs not caused by our company (such as overseas visa-extension fees, accommodation, meals and transport, national airline fare adjustments, etc.), our company reserves the right to charge the price difference.
excludes.zh: 其他费用：费用包含中未提及的费用。如因天灾、战争、罢工等不可抗力的原因，及因交通延阻、航班取消或更改时间、使馆延误出签证、人数不足等特殊情况或其他非我公司原因所引致的额外费（如在外延期签证费、住、食及交通费、国家航空运价调整等），我公司有权追加差价。

timeline.title_en: Frankfurt - Heidelberg - Zurich
timeline.title_zh: 法兰克福 - 海德堡 - 苏黎世
timeline.description_en: After the morning gathering, drive to the cultural and university town of Heidelberg, the very embodiment of romantic Germany, to visit Heidelberg Castle, the Old Bridge (Karl-Theodor Bridge) and Heidelberg University Square. The castle, begun in the 13th century, is famed for the Grosses Fass, the largest wine barrel in the world, while the winding, quiet lanes link the old fortress to the river in a most poetic setting. In the afternoon continue to Zurich to explore the Old Town with its craftsmen, antique dealers, bookshops and the famous Bahnhofstrasse, Rennweg and Niederdorf lanes, view the twin-towered Zurich Grossmunster (exterior), and stroll along the Limmat River beside Lake Zurich. Overnight at the Sorell Hotel Zurichberg / Hauli Haus area in Zurich or an equivalent 4-star hotel in the scenic Limmattal valley.
timeline.description_zh: 上午集合后前往文化古城和大学城、浪漫德国的缩影——海德堡，游览海德堡城堡、老桥（卡尔·特奥多尔桥）和海德堡大学广场。始建于13世纪的城堡以世界第一大葡萄酒桶（Grosses Fass）著称，曲折而幽静的小巷连通着古堡与小河，充满诗情画意。下午前往苏黎世，游览汇聚传统工匠、古董商、书店与花铺的老城区，途经著名的班霍夫大街、伦韦格街和尼德道尔夫巷，远观以罗曼式双塔闻名的苏黎世大教堂（外观），并漫步利马特河畔与苏黎世湖边。夜宿苏黎世利马塔尔哈利之家酒店或同等4星级酒店，酒店位于风景秀丽的利马塔尔中心地带。

timeline.title_en: Zurich - Jungfrau Region - Interlaken - Sarnen
timeline.title_zh: 苏黎世 - 少女峰地区 - 因特拉肯 - 萨尔嫩
timeline.description_en: In the morning head to the Jungfrau Region: visit the Alpine village of Grindelwald at the foot of the Eiger and its dreamlike hillsides, with the option to ascend the famous Jungfrau by cable car and gondola to the Sphinx observation deck, overlooking the snow-capped peak and the Aletsch Glacier (Top of Europe). There are three optional, mutually exclusive add-ons: a coach tour of the Jungfrau Region (included) taking in Wilderswil's red railway station, Grindelwald's Dreamland hillsides and views of the Jungfrau and Eiger Glacier from Lauterbrunnen; the gondola and cog-railway summit ascent of the Jungfrau (EUR 230); or the First-Grindelwald aerial gondola return ticket to the First Cliff Walk (EUR 70). Interlaken paragliding from Beatenberg (EUR 220) is also offered. Then visit Interlaken, set between Lake Thun and Lake Brienz, freely exploring Hoheweg street and the Hohematte green. Overnight at the Krone or Kreuz Hotel in Sarnen or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往少女峰地区，参观艾格峰北麓脚下的阿尔卑斯小镇格林德尔瓦尔德及其梦幻山坡；您也可选择自费乘坐缆车与齿轮火车登顶少女峰，在“斯芬克斯观景台”俯瞰白雪皑皑的少女峰与阿莱奇冰川（欧洲之巅 Top of Europe）。三个推荐项目仅可三选一：乘车游览少女峰地区（费用包含），依次游览维尔德斯维尔的网红红色火车站、格林德尔瓦尔德的梦幻山坡，并在劳特布龙嫩远观少女峰及艾格冰川；乘景观缆车及齿轮火车登顶少女峰（230欧）；或菲斯特—格林德尔瓦尔德空中贡多拉往返票前往悬崖天梯巅峰栈道 First Cliff Walk（70欧）。另设因特拉肯贝阿滕贝格高空滑翔伞（220欧）。之后游览位于图恩湖与布里恩茨湖之间的因特拉肯，自由游览何维克街与荷黑马特绿地广场。夜宿萨尔嫩皇冠酒店或克鲁兹酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Sarnen - Lucerne - Andermatt - Chur - St. Gallen
timeline.title_zh: 萨尔嫩 - 卢塞恩 - 安德马特 - 库尔 - 圣加仑
timeline.description_en: After breakfast drive to Lucerne to enjoy the lake-and-mountain scenery of Lake Lucerne, hear the story of Swiss loyalty told by the Lion Monument (the dying lion carved in 1821 commemorating the Swiss Guards who fell in 1792), and see the Chapel Bridge (Kapellbrucke, Europe's oldest covered wooden bridge, built 1332) and its octagonal Water Tower. Continue to Andermatt, the transport hub on the Reuss River beside the Devil's Bridge, where you may optionally ride the Glacier Express on its most spectacular Andermatt-Chur section (EUR 190 first class / EUR 140 second class per adult), crossing the Alpine pass, the Medel ice peak scenery and the Devil's Bridge in under three hours. If the Glacier Express is not chosen, the group travels the Chur-Andermatt route by coach. Then proceed to St. Gallen and check in; in the evening you may freely explore St. Gallen's Old Town with its Baroque cathedral and Abbey Library (a UNESCO World Heritage Site). Overnight at the Radisson Blu Hotel St. Gallen or a custom St. Gallen hotel, or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后出发前往卢塞恩，游览湖光山色的卢塞恩湖，聆听狮子纪念碑讲述瑞士人忠贞坚毅的历史（这尊垂死雄狮于1821年雕刻，纪念1792年战死的瑞士雇佣兵），并参观卡佩尔廊桥（建于1332年，欧洲最古老的木制廊桥）及八角形水塔。之后前往罗伊斯河畔、魔鬼桥所在的交通枢纽安德马特，您可选择自费乘坐“冰川列车”体验最精彩的安德马特—库尔段（成人一等190欧/二等140欧），在不到3小时内饱览阿尔卑斯山口、梅德尔冰峰景观与魔鬼桥。如未选择冰川列车，则随车游览库尔—安德马特路线。之后前往圣加仑入住，晚上可自由游览拥有巴洛克式大教堂与修道院图书馆（世界遗产）的圣加仑老城。夜宿圣加仑丽笙酒店或圣加仑定制酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: St. Gallen - Neuschwanstein Castle - Fussen - Innsbruck
timeline.title_zh: 圣加仑 - 新天鹅堡 - 菲森 - 因斯布鲁克
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, visit Neuschwanstein Castle, the late-19th-century fairy-tale castle built from 1869 for King Ludwig II of Bavaria, which served as the model for the Disney castle and is sometimes called the Cinderella Castle. Then explore the town of Fussen, the endpoint of Germany's Romantic Road at the foot of the Alps on the German-Austrian border, with its medieval lanes and Baroque and Rococo churches. In the afternoon continue to Innsbruck, the heart of the Alps, to visit the famous Golden Roof (exterior), decorated with 2,657 gilded copper tiles and built around 1500 by Emperor Maximilian I, the 800-year-old Old Town blending Gothic and Baroque styles, and Maria-Theresien-Strasse with the Anna Column. Overnight at the AC Hotel by Marriott Innsbruck or the Central Hotel, or an equivalent 4-star hotel near the Old Town.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往参观新天鹅堡，这座19世纪晚期的童话城堡建于1869年，是巴伐利亚国王路德维希二世的行宫，因迪士尼城堡以此为原型，也被称为灰姑娘城堡。之后参观菲森小镇，它是德国“浪漫之路”的终点，位于德奥边境阿尔卑斯山脚下，拥有中世纪小巷与巴洛克、洛可可风格教堂。下午前往“阿尔卑斯山心脏”因斯布鲁克，游览由神圣罗马帝国皇帝马克西米利安一世约1500年建造、装饰着2657块镀金铜瓦的著名黄金屋顶（外观）、融合哥特与巴洛克风格的800年历史老城区，以及矗立着安娜柱的玛丽亚·特蕾西亚大街。夜宿因斯布鲁克AC万豪酒店或中央酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Innsbruck - Salzburg - Hallstatt
timeline.title_zh: 因斯布鲁克 - 萨尔茨堡 - 哈尔施塔特
timeline.description_en: After breakfast head to Salzburg, the birthplace of Mozart and filming location of The Sound of Music, to visit the Baroque Old Town, Salzburg Cathedral, Getreidegasse (the famous shopping street where Mozart's Birthplace stands at No. 9, exterior), and the Mirabell Gardens, one of the film's settings and a UNESCO-protected Baroque garden. In the afternoon continue to the Austrian fairy-tale village of Hallstatt, set between the Dachstein Alps and the shimmering Lake Hallstatt and called one of the most beautiful villages in the world and the world's oldest salt town (a UNESCO World Heritage Site since 1997), to see Lake Hallstatt, the Market Square (Marktplatz) with its old houses and Protestant church spire, and the Catholic church. Overnight at the Muhle Hotel in Bad Goisern or an equivalent 4-star hotel, set in the spa park by the Ischl river.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往莫扎特故乡、《音乐之声》拍摄地——萨尔茨堡，参观巴洛克风格的老城、萨尔茨堡大教堂、糧食街（著名步行街，莫扎特故居就在此街9号，外观）以及米拉贝尔花园（电影取景地之一、受保护的巴洛克式花园）。下午前往奥地利童话小镇哈尔施塔特，它坐落在达赫斯坦阿尔卑斯山脉与波光粼粼的哈尔施塔特湖之间，被称为“世界上最美的小镇”和“世界最古老的盐都”（自1997年起列入世界遗产），游览哈尔施塔特湖、四周环绕古老房屋与新教教堂尖顶的集市广场，以及天主教堂。夜宿戈伊瑟恩磨坊酒店或同等4星酒店，酒店坐落在伊施尔河的温泉公园内。

timeline.title_en: Hallstatt - Munich
timeline.title_zh: 哈尔施塔特 - 慕尼黑
timeline.description_en: In the morning depart via the Lake Wolfgang region, the sapphire-blue lake seen in the opening of The Sound of Music (a UNESCO Natural World Heritage Site since 1997), and head to Munich, the capital of Bavaria. Explore Munich's Old Town and visit Marienplatz, the Old Town Hall and the New Town Hall, whose clock tower carillon (the Glockenspiel) is the fourth-largest puppet dance in Europe and performs daily at 11am and noon. You may also choose to dine at the famous Hofbrauhaus (HB beer hall), the 400-year-old royal brewery dating from 1589, with Bavarian costumed song-and-dance shows, creamy beer and a giant roast pork knuckle. This vibrant city is both historic and full of energy. Overnight at the Leonardo Hotel Munich or an equivalent 4-star hotel, conveniently located near the Theresienwiese Oktoberfest grounds.
timeline.description_zh: 上午出发途经圣沃尔夫冈湖区——《音乐之声》开场出现的那片宝石蓝色湖泊（1997年列入联合国世界自然遗产），前往德国巴伐利亚州首府慕尼黑。游览慕尼黑老城，参观玛丽恩广场、慕尼黑旧市政厅与新市政厅，新市政厅钟楼上的“钟鸣舞”是欧洲第四大木偶舞蹈，每天中午11点和12点表演。您也可选择到始建于1589年、有400多年历史的皇家啤酒馆“HB啤酒屋”用餐，在巴伐利亚传统服饰歌舞表演中品尝醇香啤酒与一大份德国烤猪肘。这座繁华的城市既历史悠久又充满活力。夜宿慕尼黑莱昂纳多酒店或同等级4星酒店，非常便利前往慕尼黑啤酒节场地特雷西亚草坪。

timeline.title_en: Munich - Nuremberg - Frankfurt
timeline.title_zh: 慕尼黑 - 纽伦堡 - 法兰克福
timeline.description_en: In the morning travel to Nuremberg, the medieval city where many German emperors were born and lived and once the toy-making center of Germany, steeped in history. Visit the Nuremberg Old Town, which preserves its original medieval timber-framed houses, sandstone buildings and Gothic churches, the Gothic St. Lorenz Church (built 1243-1477, renowned for its star-vaulted choir, the suspended Angelic Salutation wood carving and Adam Kraft's tabernacle), and the Imperial Castle (Kaiserburg), the city's most iconic medieval landmark on the hilltop at the north end of the Old Town, with five kilometres of walls and panoramic views over the city. In the afternoon return to Frankfurt railway station, where the wonderful journey concludes. No hotel accommodation tonight.
timeline.description_zh: 上午前往纽伦堡，这座中世纪多位德意志皇帝诞生和居住的城市，曾是德意志的玩具制造中心，充满浓厚的历史气息。游览将古老城市中心保持得原汁原味、拥有中世纪木结构房屋、砂岩建筑与哥特式教堂的纽伦堡古城，参观哥特式的圣劳伦茨教堂（建于1243至1477年，以星形圆屋顶圣坛、悬空的天使报喜木雕及亚当·克拉夫的圣体安置塔闻名），以及坐落于老城北端山头、纽伦堡最具标志性的中世纪建筑皇帝堡（城墙长五公里，可俯瞰全城）。下午返回法兰克福火车站，结束美好行程。今晚无酒店住宿。

meeting_en: Frankfurt, Germany — departs and returns to Frankfurt (flexible boarding at Frankfurt or Zurich).
meeting_zh: 德国法兰克福——法兰克福出发并返回（可在法兰克福或苏黎世灵活上团）。

faqs.question_en: Where and when do Package A and Package B meet on Day 1?
faqs.question_zh: A/B套餐第一天的集合地点和时间是什么？
faqs.answer_en: Frankfurt meeting (Day 1): 08:00 in the morning at the Burger King outside Frankfurt Central Station. Zurich meeting (Day 1): around 17:00 in the afternoon at the McDonald's outside Zurich Central Station.
faqs.answer_zh: 第一天法兰克福集合：上午08:00在法兰克福中央火车站的汉堡王（Burger King）门口集合；第一天苏黎世集合：下午17:00左右在苏黎世中央火车站的麦当劳门口集合。

faqs.question_en: Where and when does the tour disperse?
faqs.question_zh: 集散地点和时间是什么？
faqs.answer_en: Package A disperses on the last day at around 19:00 at Frankfurt railway station. Package B disperses on the last day at around 18:00 in downtown Munich.
faqs.answer_zh: A套餐最后一天下午19:00左右在法兰克福火车站解散；B套餐最后一天下午18:00左右在慕尼黑市区解散。

faqs.question_en: Does the product include the Jungfrau summit cog railway, the Interlaken paragliding and the First experience programs?
faqs.question_zh: 产品是否包含少女峰登顶齿轮火车、因特拉肯滑翔伞及菲斯特体验项目？
faqs.answer_en: No. If you wish to take part, we recommend booking in advance; the optional experience times are limited and may conflict with the original itinerary, affecting other arrangements. If you do not choose these programs, you travel by coach with the guide to visit Wilderswil, Grindelwald and Lauterbrunnen.
faqs.answer_zh: 不包含。如需参加建议提前预定，可选的体验时间受限，可能跟原行程安排产生冲突，导致影响其他行程和体验的安排。如不选择上述项目，则跟车跟导游游览维尔德斯维尔、格林德尔瓦尔德及劳特布龙嫩。

faqs.question_en: Does the guide accompany us to the Jungfrau cog railway and the First experience programs?
faqs.question_zh: 少女峰齿轮火车和菲斯特的体验项目导游会陪同我们前往吗？
faqs.answer_en: No. The guide does not accompany you; for the above programs neither the guide nor the vehicle can go along, and you can only travel there by cable car.
faqs.answer_zh: 导游不陪同，上述项目导游和车辆均不可前往，只能乘坐缆车前往。

faqs.question_en: Can I sign up for both the Jungfrau cog railway and the First cable-car experience at the same time?
faqs.question_zh: 我可以同时报名少女峰齿轮火车和菲斯特缆车的体验项目吗？
faqs.answer_en: No. Time only allows you to pick one of the two. Reaching the Jungfrau summit by cog railway or cable car takes roughly 5 hours or more round trip, and the First cable car plus its 3 experience programs also usually needs over 4 hours. Choosing the Jungfrau means you skip First by default, and choosing First means you skip the Jungfrau by default. If you choose neither, you travel by coach with the guide to visit Wilderswil, Grindelwald and Lauterbrunnen.
faqs.answer_zh: 不可以，时间上只允许二选一。少女峰登顶乘坐齿轮火车或缆车，上下山大约需要5小时甚至更久；菲斯特（First）缆车加3项体验项目通常也需要4小时以上。选择少女峰则默认不去菲斯特，选择菲斯特则默认不上少女峰；如都不选择，则默认跟车游览维尔德斯维尔、格林德尔瓦尔德及劳特布龙嫩。

faqs.question_en: What should I know about the optional Glacier Express?
faqs.question_zh: 关于自费冰川列车有什么需要注意的？
faqs.answer_en: Because Glacier Express seats are limited, especially in peak season, booking at least 30 days ahead is recommended; the optional fare (including train ticket, seat reservation and booking service) is EUR 190 first class / EUR 140 second class per adult, and EUR 130 / EUR 110 for children aged 6-15 on the Andermatt-Chur section. Per the Glacier Express rules, once booked it cannot be refunded or changed. Buying tickets yourself is not advised, as a ticket without a seat reservation may not be usable. If you do not book the Glacier Express, the group travels the Chur-Andermatt route by coach; if the optional booking ultimately fails, the fee for that optional item is refunded in full. Experience period: 2026.05.02-2026.10.10.
faqs.answer_zh: 由于冰川列车位置较少，旅游旺季尤甚，推荐至少提前30天预订；自费项目（包含火车票费、预订座位费和预订服务费）安德马特—库尔段成人一等190欧/二等140欧，6-15岁儿童一等130欧/二等110欧。根据冰川列车规定，一旦预订成功不可退改。不推荐自行购买车票，仅购票而未预约座位可能无法乘车或无法使用。如未预订冰川列车，则随车游览库尔—安德马特路线；该自费项目如最终预约失败将全额退回款项。体验时间：2026.05.02-2026.10.10。

faqs.question_en: Do I need a visa?
faqs.question_zh: 是否需要签证？
faqs.answer_en: Yes. This product does not include visa fees; it requires a Schengen visa (single or multiple entry). If you need a visa, please choose a Schengen visa product. After booking, we provide free of charge all the materials needed to apply for the Schengen visa, and if you commission us to handle the visa we also purchase the Schengen travel insurance that meets visa requirements. Your passport must be valid for at least six months from the date of departure, otherwise customs may refuse entry. Visa fees, visa service fees, Schengen insurance fees and visa-center appointment fees are all non-refundable and cannot be transferred to another user, even if the product is changed or cancelled. Visa-guarantee assurance ("bao qian wu you"): for travel products contracted with us at least 61 days before departure, if the visa is not obtained within 45 days before departure we bear all losses and immediately refund the full travel fee; travelers not meeting this clause who fail to obtain a visa are refunded per the change-and-cancellation terms. In case of refusal, notify us within 48 hours with the consulate's refusal letter, submit any supplementary or amended materials within five days, and do not unilaterally waive the right of visa appeal.
faqs.answer_zh: 需要。本产品不包含签证费用，需要申根签证（单次或多次入境）；如需办理签证请选择申根签证产品。预订后免费提供办理申根签证的全部材料，如委托我社办理签证，我社为您购买符合申根要求的申根旅游保险。护照有效期需在离境之日起至少还有六个月，否则海关有权拒绝入境。签证费、签证服务费、申根保险费、签证中心预约费均不可退款，也无法更改使用者，即使产品退改签亦无法退款。保签无忧：出发前61天与我社签约，如在出发前45天内未获取签证，我社承担所有损失并立即退还全部旅游费用；不符合该条款的游客如未获签，则按“退改与取消条款”退费。如遇拒签需在48小时内通知我社并出具使领馆拒签函，需补充或更改材料的须在五天内提交，且不得单方面放弃“签证抗辩”权利。

faqs.question_en: Booking, changes & cancellation
faqs.question_zh: 预订、变更与取消须知
faqs.answer_en: Both the agency and the traveler may cancel without reason more than 30 days before departure (not counting the 30th day); within that window the change-and-cancellation terms apply. This is a shared join-in group tour with a minimum group size of 10 people; if 10 is not reached more than 30 days before departure, either party may terminate the contract, and an optional activity may also be cancelled (turned into "free time") if it does not reach 10 people. Because flights, traffic, ferries and strikes often force the itinerary order and timing to change, travelers must arrive at the meeting point one day before the tour starts and leave the dispersal point one day after it ends, allowing reasonable connection time (5 hours for a same-airport transfer, 7 hours for different airports in the same city; reasonable meeting/dispersal window 07:00-21:00). Room types: two people booking together default to a standard twin/double (bed type assigned by the hotel, not selectable); solo travelers pay a single-room supplement deposit unless they request shared rooming; a triple family room is for two parents plus one minor with assorted bed configurations. European hotels are non-smoking, check-in 14:00 / check-out 11:00, and air-conditioning is not a standard feature. All prices are quoted in EUR at the time of booking; if you pay in CNY, the amount is the real-time CNY price auto-calculated from the Bank of China "EUR sell" rate on the day of payment, and exchange differences and bank fees on refunds are borne by the traveler. Pay your order promptly to avoid rate-driven CNY increases; orders await a second confirmation by the operating agency (auto-refunded if not confirmed within 48 hours), so book at least 14 days ahead and do not buy connecting flights/hotels before the itinerary is confirmed.
faqs.answer_zh: 跟团游产品出发前30天（不含第30天）旅行社和旅行者均可无理由取消，30天以内按《更改与取消条例条款》执行。本产品为散客拼团，成团人数为10人；出发前30天未达成团人数，双方均可解除合同，团内自费活动未达10人也可能被取消（改为“自由活动”）。由于航变、交通拥堵、渡轮取消、罢工游行等因素，行程时间及先后顺序常有调整，旅行者须在参团前一天抵达集合地、离团后一天离开集散地，并预留合理衔接时间（同机场转机至少5小时、同城不同机场至少7小时，合理集散时段07:00至21:00）。房型：两人同时报名默认入住标准双人间（床型由酒店安排不可选）；单人报名默认含单人房差押金，除非备注要求单人入住；三人家庭间默认为两位父母与一位未成年儿童，床型不可选。欧洲酒店全部禁烟，入住14:00、退房11:00，且不以空调为标准设施。所有定价以欧元为计价单位，如选择人民币支付，则以支付当日中国银行实时“欧元卖出价”自动计算的人民币价格为准，退款的汇率差异及银行手续费由旅行者承担。订单需及时支付以避免汇率上涨；支付后需等组团社二次确认（超48小时未确认默认自动退款），建议至少提前14天预订，未确认行程前请勿预订衔接机票及酒店。

faqs.question_en: Health & safety requirements
faqs.question_zh: 健康与安全须知
faqs.answer_en: For your safety, please have a health check before departure and do NOT join if you have: infectious diseases (e.g. active tuberculosis, typhoid); cardiovascular disease (e.g. severe hypertension, cardiac insufficiency, myocardial ischemia/infarction); cerebrovascular disease (e.g. embolism, hemorrhage, tumor); respiratory disease (e.g. emphysema, cor pulmonale); mental illness (e.g. epilepsy); severe anemia (hemoglobin below 50 g/L); or recovery from major/medium surgery. Pregnancy: at week 35 or beyond you cannot join under any circumstances; at week 28 or beyond you must provide a doctor's exam report within 7 days plus the attending physician's consent; under 28 weeks please book with caution, sign the agency's liability waiver, and you cannot take part in adventure, skiing, sailing, high-altitude or outdoor programs. People with disabilities must provide a 7-day medical report and physician's consent, be accompanied by an immediate family member, and apply at least 61 days ahead for a reserved place and facilities. Travelers over 70 need a health certificate, medical report and immediate-family accompaniment (or sign the liability waiver), need adequate walking ability and stamina, and need a physician's consent for adventure/ski/sea/high-altitude/outdoor programs (apply 61+ days ahead for elderly-care services). Minors under 18 must be accompanied by an immediate relative or guardian, some sights restrict those under 18/12/6, infants under 6 or children under 30 kg need a confirmed safety seat, and the product does not accept infants under 2. Per Article 15 of the Tourism Law and the Infectious Disease Prevention Law (2025 revision), travelers must truthfully declare health information relevant to the trip (including pregnancy, lactation, chronic disease, infectious-disease history, suspected symptoms or recent epidemic-area travel) and follow safety warnings; concealment causing harm makes the traveler liable, and the agency may terminate the contract without refund.
faqs.answer_zh: 为确保安全，出行前请做必要的身体检查，如有以下情况请勿报名：传染性疾病（如活动期肺结核、伤寒）；心血管疾病（如严重高血压、心功能不全、心肌缺氧、心肌梗塞）；脑血管疾病（如脑栓塞、脑出血、脑肿瘤）；呼吸系统疾病（如肺气肿、肺心病）；精神病（如癫痫）；严重贫血（血红蛋白50克/升以下）；大中型手术恢复期患者。孕妇：妊娠第35周及以上任何情况下都无法参团；第28周及以上需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书；第28周以下请慎重报名，需签署旅行社免责声明书，且无法参加探险、滑雪、出海、高空、户外等项目。残疾人需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书，需直系家属陪同，并至少提前61天申请预留位置及专用设施。70周岁以上老年人需提供健康证明、体检报告并由直系家属陪同（否则需签署免责声明书），需具备一定步行能力与体力，涉及探险、滑雪、出海、高空、户外项目需持主治医师同意书，并至少提前61天申请适老化服务。未成年人（未满18周岁）须由直系亲属或监护人陪同，部分景点对未满18/12/6周岁有特殊限定，6岁以下婴儿或30公斤以下儿童需提前确认安全座椅，本产品不接受2周岁以下婴儿参团。根据《旅游法》第15条及《传染病防治法（2025修订）》，旅游者需如实告知与旅游活动相关的个人健康信息（包括妊娠期、哺乳期、慢性病、传染病史、疑似症状或近期疫区旅居史）并遵守安全警示规定；因隐瞒导致人身损害或传播风险的，须自行承担责任，旅行社可解除合同且不退还费用。

title_en: Canary Islands 4-Island Volcanic Escape — 8-Day Small-Group Tour
title_zh: 加那利群岛四岛火山之旅 8日跟团游
short_en: Island-hop Lanzarote, Fuerteventura, Gran Canaria and Tenerife in 8 days — lava caves, Timanfaya volcanoes, Mount Teide and Atlantic whale watching.
short_zh: 8天畅游兰萨罗特、富埃特文图拉、大加那利与特内里费四岛——火山熔岩洞、蒂曼法亚火山、泰德峰雪山与大西洋观鲸。
desc_en: A one-way deep journey across the Spanish Canary Islands, from the black-lava world of Lanzarote through Fuerteventura and Gran Canaria to Mount Teide on Tenerife. Explore César Manrique's volcanic-art caves at Jameos del Agua and Cueva de los Verdes, watch a live volcanic eruption show at Timanfaya, ride a submarine off Mogán, hike the Mars-like White Canyon below Teide's snow-capped summit, and sail the Atlantic to meet pilot whales and dolphins. With ferries, 4-star hotels, every listed attraction and a Chinese-speaking guide-driver included, it is an effortless way to see four utterly different islands in a single trip.
desc_zh: 一条单程深度的西班牙加那利群岛之旅，从兰萨罗特岛的黑色熔岩世界，经富埃特文图拉岛、大加那利岛，直达特内里费岛的泰德峰。探访塞萨尔·曼里克设计的哈迈奥斯水洞与绿洞火山艺术馆，观看蒂曼法亚国家公园的真实火山喷发表演，在莫甘港乘潜水艇潜入海底，在泰德峰雪山脚下徒步火星般的白色峡谷，并出海与领航鲸、海豚相遇。渡轮、四星酒店、行程内全部景点门票及中文司导全程含，让你在一次旅程中轻松领略四座截然不同的海岛。

highlights.en: Whale and dolphin watching by boat on the Atlantic, in a certified Whale Heritage Site
highlights.zh: 出海观赏大西洋鲸鱼与海豚，置身世界认证的鲸鱼遗产地

highlights.en: Cable car to the snow-capped summit of Mount Teide and a hike through the White Canyon
highlights.zh: 乘缆车登顶泰德峰雪山之巅，徒步穿行火星般的白色峡谷

highlights.en: Timanfaya National Park live volcanic-eruption demonstration
highlights.zh: 蒂曼法亚国家公园现场火山喷发表演

highlights.en: César Manrique's volcanic-art caves: Jameos del Agua and Cueva de los Verdes
highlights.zh: 塞萨尔·曼里克火山艺术杰作：哈迈奥斯水洞与绿洞

highlights.en: Ride a real submarine to 25m off Mogán to see the underwater Atlantic world
highlights.zh: 在莫甘港乘坐潜水艇下潜25米，探索海底大西洋世界

highlights.en: Three inter-island ferries — see four distinct island landscapes in one route
highlights.zh: 三段跨岛渡轮，一程看遍四座风格迥异的海岛

highlights.en: Camel ride across the black volcanic fields of Lanzarote
highlights.zh: 兰萨罗特岛黑色火山原野骑骆驼漫游

highlights.en: City-centre 4-star hotels, all listed attractions and Chinese-speaking guide-driver included — no forced shopping
highlights.zh: 市中心四星酒店、全部景点门票及中文司导全程含，绝无强制购物

includes.en: [Hotels] 7 nights in 4-star hotels (star rating per Booking.com / Ctrip standards).
includes.zh: 【酒店】四星级酒店7晚（酒店星级参考Booking或携程酒店星级标准）。

includes.en: [Meals] 7 buffet or other-format breakfasts in-hotel and 7 buffet or other-format dinners in-hotel, 14 meals in total.
includes.zh: 【餐饮】酒店内自助早餐或其他形式早餐7餐；酒店内自助晚餐或其他形式晚餐7餐；共计14餐。

includes.en: [Operating costs] Tourist/city tax, city-entry fees, residence tax, road and bridge tolls, parking and fuel, driver-and-guide meal allowances and other in-itinerary operating costs.
includes.zh: 【执行】游客城市税、进城费、居住税、过路过桥费、停车燃油费、司导餐补等行程内执行费用。

includes.en: [Vehicle] Tourist coach or tourist business van.
includes.zh: 【车辆】旅游巴士或旅游商务车。

includes.en: [Guide] Professional driver plus Chinese-speaking guide, or a Chinese driver-guide for the whole trip (note: for 8 people or fewer, a business van with a Chinese-speaking driver-guide is arranged).
includes.zh: 【导游】职业司机+中文导游或者全程中文华人司机兼导游（备注：8人及以下则安排为商务旅行车+中文司机兼导游）。

includes.en: [Baggage] One checked bag of 23 kg plus one carry-on bag.
includes.zh: 【行李】1件23公斤行李及1件随身行李。

includes.en: [Tickets] Jameos del Agua; Cueva de los Verdes (incl. guide narration fee); Mirador del Río; Cactus Garden; Timanfaya National Park combined ticket; La Geria winery; Museo Lagomar; Dragon Tree Park; Teide cable car round-trip ticket; camel ride; Mogán submarine; whale & dolphin watching at sea.
includes.zh: 【门票】哈迈奥斯水洞、绿洞（含向导讲解费）、里奥观景台、仙人掌花园、蒂曼法亚国家公园通票、拉赫里亚酒庄、拉戈马尔博物馆、龙血树公园、泰德峰缆车往返票、骆驼之旅、莫甘港潜水艇、出海观鲸鱼与海豚。

includes.en: [Major transport] The three ferry segments: Lanzarote–Fuerteventura, Fuerteventura–Gran Canaria, and Gran Canaria–Tenerife.
includes.zh: 【大交通】兰萨罗特岛-富埃特文图拉岛、富埃特文图拉岛-大加那利岛、大加那利岛-特内里费岛的三段渡轮费用。

excludes.en: Passport: personal passport fees.
excludes.zh: 护照：个人护照费用。

excludes.en: Visa: the tourist visa fees required for the countries on the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 签证：行程中所列旅游国家所需的观光签证费用。

excludes.en: Insurance: travel insurance fees (if the itinerary involves high-risk activities, verify whether your travel insurance covers them).
excludes.zh: 保险：旅游保险费用；（如行程内涉及到高风险运动，请核实旅游保险是否包含该项运动）。

excludes.en: Tips: guide and driver tips totalling EUR 10 per person per day, same rate for adults and children.
excludes.zh: 小费：游客支付导游和司机小费一共10欧/人/天，大小同价。

excludes.en: Meals: apart from the special meals included in the itinerary, lunch and dinner are not included.
excludes.zh: 餐饮：除行程内包含的特色餐外，行程中不包含午、晚正餐费用。

excludes.en: Tickets: any sight not noted as fee-included (including but not limited to sights marked "exterior" / "(exterior)", and all "recommended", "optional", "experience" items not stated as included) — if you wish to visit, please pay on your own.
excludes.zh: 门票：行程中未注明费用包含的景点（包括但不仅限于行程中注明"外观"的景点，"推荐"、"可选"、"体验"等等所有未提及费用包含的项目，如游客需要参观，敬请自理）。

excludes.en: Extended stay: extra accommodation, transport and sightseeing beyond the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 延长住宿：行程外额外延长的住宿、交通、观光费用。

excludes.en: Personal spending: drinks/alcohol, taxis, phone charges and other personal expenses.
excludes.zh: 私人消费：如饮料酒类、出租车、电话费等个人消费。

excludes.en: Other transport: transport not mentioned in the inclusions beyond the included business van or minibus, e.g. Venice gondolas, and sightseeing trains or electric carts in vehicle-restricted zones — please pay on your own.
excludes.zh: 其他交通：除包含商务旅行车或者中巴之外，费用包含中未提及的其他交通费用，如威尼斯贡多拉，以及车辆限行区的观光火车、电瓶出租车等费用敬请自理。

excludes.en: Free-time activities: night-time self-guided sightseeing and recommended items on the itinerary, plus the resulting transport, dining, tickets and shopping costs.
excludes.zh: 自由活动：游客夜间自行游览及行程中的推荐项目，以及产生的交通、餐饮、门票、购物等费用。

excludes.en: Experience activities: any travel experience activities not included in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 体验活动：行程中没有包含的各项旅游体验活动。

excludes.en: Other costs: any fees not mentioned in the inclusions. For extra costs caused by force majeure (natural disaster, war, strikes), transport delays, flight cancellations/changes, embassy visa delays, insufficient group numbers, etc. (e.g. overseas visa-extension fees, accommodation, food and transport, national airline fare adjustments), the operator reserves the right to charge the difference.
excludes.zh: 其他费用：费用包含中未提及的费用。如因天灾、战争、罢工等不可抗力的原因，及因交通延阻、航班取消或更改时间、使馆延误出签证、人数不足等特殊情况或其他非旅行社原因所引致的额外费用（如在外延期签证费、住食及交通费、国家航空运价调整等），旅行社有权追加差价。

timeline.title_en: Lanzarote | Arrival and free day by the warm West-Saharan sea breeze
timeline.title_zh: 兰萨罗特岛 | 抵达，自由活动，迎接西哈撒拉的微热海风
timeline.description_en: Travelers fly to Lanzarote on their own and, after arrival, head to the hotel to check in based on their booking confirmation.
