This is a free day with no unified meeting point, no coach, and no Chinese-speaking guide; check-in is available after 14:00, so you can rest or do some initial exploring depending on when you land (luggage can be left at the hotel). Overnight at the Los Jameos Playa Hotel or a comparable 4-star hotel, located in the beach district next to a seaside resort centre, built in the typical white low-rise Canary Island style amid lush tropical gardens and palm trees, with multiple themed restaurants including a buffet dinner restaurant rated by the operator as a "select gourmet restaurant". Note that requested bed types are noted to the hotel but assigned subject to availability, and the order of sightseeing throughout the trip may be adjusted without changing the content.
timeline.description_zh: 当天游客自行飞往兰萨罗特岛，抵达后根据酒店订单信息自行前往酒店办理入住手续。当天为自由活动，无统一集合、无用车、无中文导游服务；入住时间在14:00之后，您可根据抵达时间自行安排休息或初步探索目的地（行李可寄存到酒店）。夜宿洛斯哈梅奥斯海滨酒店或同等4星级酒店，酒店位于海滩区域、毗邻海滨度假中心，以典型加那利群岛白色低层建筑风格著称，错落于郁郁葱葱的热带花园与棕榈树之间，内设多主题餐厅，自助晚餐厅被旅行社评为"精选美食餐厅"。请注意：床型会备注给酒店，但实际由酒店视当日房态决定；全程游览前后顺序可能调整，但内容一致，不影响体验。

timeline.title_en: Lanzarote | North coast art and nature: Jameos del Agua, Cueva de los Verdes, Mirador del Río & Cactus Garden
timeline.title_zh: 兰萨罗特岛 | 北部自然与艺术之旅：哈迈奥斯水洞、绿洞、里奥观景台、仙人掌花园
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, gather at the hotel for a tour of Lanzarote's north, exploring nature and the art of César Manrique. You descend into the mysterious volcanic lava caves of Jameos del Agua (the water cave) and Cueva de los Verdes (the green cave), guided by a geology guide (in Spanish and English) into the roughly 6-km lava tube formed by the La Corona volcano, where a natural concert hall and a mirror-still saltwater channel await. At Jameos del Agua, the crystal-clear underground saltwater lagoon linked to the sea creates a surreal interplay of white, black and blue; sights include the water-cave café, the Jameos pool and the mirror water channel of the green cave (about 2 hours at Jameos, 1 hour at the green cave). You then climb to the Mirador del Río viewpoint, an almost invisible structure built into the volcanic cliff offering sweeping blue-green sea views and the "eighth island" panorama (about 1 hour), before strolling the uniquely designed Cactus Garden with over 4,500 cacti of thousands of species (about 1 hour). Overnight at the Los Jameos Playa Hotel or a comparable 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后在酒店集合，开启兰萨罗特岛北部自然与艺术之旅。在地质旅游向导（西语、英语）带领下深入神秘的火山熔岩洞穴——水之洞与绿洞，踏入由拉科罗纳火山塑造的约6公里巨大熔岩管道，感受其深处的天然音乐厅与如镜面般"绝对静止"的洞内水道。哈迈奥斯水洞由传奇艺术家塞萨尔·曼里克改造设计，晶莹剔透、与大海相连的地下咸水湖在阳光中形成纯白、极黑与极蓝的超现实视觉冲击；可游览水洞咖啡馆、哈迈奥斯泳池及绿洞镜面水道（哈迈奥斯水洞约2小时，绿洞约1小时）。随后登临宛如外星建筑、几乎"隐形"融入火山悬崖的里奥观景台，将层次丰富的蓝绿色海景与"第八岛屿"壮阔全景尽收眼底（约1小时）；最后漫步设计独特的仙人掌花园，欣赏来自世界各地4500余株、上千品种的仙人掌（约1小时）。夜宿洛斯哈梅奥斯海滨酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Lanzarote | South volcano tour: Timanfaya eruption show, camel ride, La Geria winery & Museo Lagomar
timeline.title_zh: 兰萨罗特岛 | 南部火山探索：蒂曼法亚火山喷发表演、骑骆驼、拉赫里亚酒庄、拉戈马尔博物馆
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, gather at the hotel for the south Lanzarote volcano tour. You go deep into Timanfaya National Park, a vast geothermal reserve of black-and-red lava fields and dramatic volcanic mountains where staff stage a live eruption demonstration using straw, water and volcanic heat, plus the famous "fire from the centre of the earth" cooking where food is grilled by volcanic heat (about 2 hours). A specially arranged camel ride (Montañas del Fuego) lets you cross the black volcanic plains from a unique vantage point under experienced handlers (about 45 minutes). You then visit the distinctive La Geria wine region, where vines grow in circular pits in volcanic black soil, with a winery visit and tasting (about 30 minutes), followed by the legendary Museo Lagomar, a cave-style museum built into the volcanic rock that was once the private residence of actor Omar Sharif and is a famous Instagram spot (about 1 hour 30 minutes). Overnight at the Los Jameos Playa Hotel or a comparable 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后在酒店集合，开启兰萨罗特岛南部火山探索之旅。深入蒂曼法亚国家公园——以独特火山地貌和熔岩荒原闻名的自然保护区，黑色熔岩与红色火山岩构成震撼画卷；现场工作人员通过稻草、水、地热等道具模拟火山喷发，让您直观感受地球内部力量，并可体验"地心之火"火山地热烤肉的独特烹饪方式（约2小时）。特别安排骆驼之旅（Montañas del Fuego），在经验丰富的工作人员指导下沿火山石岩道骑行，以独特视角穿行黑色火山原野（约45分钟）。随后走进风格独特的拉赫里亚葡萄种植区，葡萄藤生长在火山黑土的环状土坑中，可参观酒庄并品酒（约30分钟）；最后参观充满传奇色彩的拉戈马尔博物馆（Museo Lagomar），这座建于天然岩洞中、巧妙融入火山岩地形的博物馆曾是演员奥马尔·沙里夫的私人宅邸，也是岛上著名的出片圣地（约1小时30分钟）。夜宿洛斯哈梅奥斯海滨酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Lanzarote – Fuerteventura – Gran Canaria | Three islands in one day, the curve of the Earth across the Atlantic
timeline.title_zh: 兰萨罗特岛-富埃特文图拉岛-大加那利岛 | 一日跳三岛，大西洋深处看地球曲线
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, gather at the hotel for a memorable three-islands-in-one-day Atlantic crossing. Take the ferry to Fuerteventura to explore its wild west coast: the town of La Oliva (purple sea of "Madonna's mantle" flowers on Mount Tindaya after the rains, Dec–Apr; about 30 minutes), the striking Ajuy Caves of black volcanic rock eroded by the waves (about 1 hour 30 minutes), and the black volcanic-gravel beach in a quiet old fishing village (about 1 hour), with a seafood lunch on the black beach. You then continue by ferry to Gran Canaria; on the Fuerteventura–Gran Canaria crossing you can clearly see the curve of the Earth. That evening you may optionally join a Gran Canaria stargazing tour (min. 10 people, not included). Note: the ferries may be replaced by flights due to tides, storms, vessel faults, cancellations or seamen's strikes, in which case Lanzarote flies direct to Gran Canaria and the Fuerteventura sights are skipped — since those are free natural sights with no entry tickets, no refund applies, and any extra cost from the change is borne by the operator. Overnight at the AC Hotel by Marriott Gran Canaria or a comparable 4-star hotel in central Las Palmas, beside Santa Catalina Park and Las Canteras Beach.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后于酒店集合，开启精彩的一日跨三岛大西洋海面之旅。乘坐轮渡前往富埃特文图拉岛，探访原始壮丽的西海岸：La Oliva小镇（12月至4月大雨后聖体山Tindaya开满被称为"圣母披风"的紫色花海，约30分钟）、由火山岩与海浪长期侵蚀形成的震撼阿胡伊洞穴（约1小时30分钟），以及宁静老渔村的黑色火山砂砾海滩（约1小时），并在黑沙滩享用海鲜午餐。随后继续乘轮渡前往大加那利岛，富岛至大岛的渡轮上可一览无余地看到壮观的地球曲线。当晚可选择参加大加那利岛观星之旅（10人起成团，不含）。特别提醒：渡轮可能受潮汐、风暴、巨浪、天气、船只故障、班期取消、海员罢工等影响，届时将用航班代替渡轮，兰岛直飞大岛，无法游览富岛景点；因富岛景点均为自然景区、无需门票，故无门票费用可退，行程变更导致的费用增加由旅行社承担。夜宿大加那利岛万豪AC酒店或同等4星级酒店，位于拉斯帕尔马斯市中心、毗邻圣卡塔利娜公园与拉斯坎特拉斯海滩。

timeline.title_en: Gran Canaria | Puerto de Mogán flower harbour, submarine dive & Casa de Colón in Las Palmas old town
timeline.title_zh: 大加那利岛 | 鲜花碼头莫甘港、乘坐潜水艇探海底、哥伦布故居
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, gather at the hotel for a classic Gran Canaria island tour. First head to the Mediterranean-flavoured Puerto de Mogán, the "flower harbour" lined with colourful flower-covered houses along the port and canals, where you stroll the colourful town and quiet marina and take a submarine dive to explore the underwater world — descending to about 25 metres with no pressure change to see Atlantic shipwrecks, whale bones and fish (about 2 hours at Mogán). You then visit the historic landmark Casa de Colón (Columbus's House), a museum in a 16th-century colonial building named for Christopher Columbus's stop here before sailing to the New World, displaying maps, ship models and navigation instruments (about 30 minutes), and the cobblestoned Las Palmas old town with its preserved Spanish colonial architecture (about 1 hour). Overnight at the AC Hotel by Marriott Gran Canaria or a comparable 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后于酒店集合，开启大加那利岛经典环岛之旅。首先前往充满地中海风情的莫甘港——因港口与运河两旁彩色房屋上开满鲜花而得名"鲜花海港"，漫步色彩缤纷的小镇与宁静港湾，并乘坐潜水艇探索海底世界，下潜至水下约25米却感受不到压力变化，欣赏大西洋的海底沉船、鲸鱼骸骨与鱼群（莫甘港约2小时）。随后参观历史文化地标哥伦布故居（哥伦布之家），这座博物馆建于16世纪殖民时期建筑内，因哥伦布前往新大陆前曾停留此地而得名，馆内展示航海地图、船只模型与航海器具（约30分钟）；并游览铺有鹅卵石、保存众多西班牙殖民时期建筑的拉斯帕尔马斯老城（约1小时）。夜宿大加那利岛万豪AC酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Gran Canaria – Tenerife | La Laguna's architecture, Puerto de la Cruz & the millennial Dragon Tree Park
timeline.title_zh: 大加那利岛-特内里费岛 | 拉拉古纳古城建筑美学、克鲁斯港、千年龙血树公园
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, gather at the hotel and take the ferry to Tenerife. On arrival, begin a cultural tour of the island's urban architecture: La Laguna, with its colonial-era historic buildings and colourful houses — the urban prototype for Havana — listed as a UNESCO World Heritage site in 1999, where you stroll the colonial streets and squares and admire stained-glass church art (about 2 hours); and Puerto de la Cruz, a lively traditional Canary seaside town famous for its natural rock tide pools formed between the rocks at low tide, set against black-sand and volcanic-gravel beaches (about 2 hours 30 minutes). You then head to the Dragon Tree Park to see the famous millennial Drago de Icod (now estimated at about 800 years old), considered the oldest dragon tree in the archipelago at over 16 m tall with a base circumference of about 20 m, surrounded by an endemic-species garden. That evening you stay at Playa de las Américas. Overnight at the H10 Las Palmeras Hotel or a comparable 4-star hotel, in the heart of Playa de las Américas.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后于酒店集合，乘轮渡前往特内里费岛。抵达后开启文化巡礼之旅，欣赏城市建筑美学：拉拉古纳——拥有殖民时代历史建筑、彩色洋房，是哈瓦那的城市原型，1999年被联合国教科文组织列为世界遗产，可深入老城区漫步殖民街道与广场，欣赏历史建筑雕刻与教堂彩色玻璃艺术（约2小时）；克鲁斯港——传统热闹的加纳利海滨小镇，以退潮时岩石间形成的天然水池为标志性景观，黑沙与火山砾石沙滩相映成趣（约2小时30分钟）。随后前往龙血树公园，观赏著名的千年龙树（伊科德龙树，现估树龄约800年），被认为是群岛中最古老的龙树，树高超过16米、底部周长约20米，周围建有特有物种花园。当晚入住美洲沙滩。夜宿拉斯帕尔梅拉斯H10酒店或同等4星级酒店，位于美洲海滩中心地带。

timeline.title_en: Tenerife | Cable car to the summit of Mount Teide & hike through the White Canyon (Cañada Blanca)
timeline.title_zh: 特内里费岛 | 徒步白色峡谷，乘缆车登顶泰德峰
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, gather at the hotel and go deep into the World Heritage Teide National Park (covering 18,900 hectares, listed in 2007). Take the cable car straight up toward the snow-capped summit of Mount Teide (over 3,715 m), then hike the White Canyon (Cañada Blanca, about 1 hour 15 minutes), the "palette of the earth" where pale volcanic pumice and ash glow silvery-white and pinkish against black lava, dotted with giant rock pillars like the "Five Fingers" (Cinco Dedos) and "The Cathedral" (La Catedral). The afternoon is free at Playa de las Américas, or you may optionally try paragliding after 16:00 (not included). Important: because the ground is sharp volcanic rock, the Teide operator requires lace-up hiking shoes or you will not be allowed on the cable car; summit stays are strictly limited to under 1 hour for altitude and cold safety; bring warm gear; the cable car may stop at any time due to volcanic alerts or bad weather. This is a high-risk activity (ages 6–60, weight 30–90 kg, good health required). Overnight at the H10 Las Palmeras Hotel or a comparable 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后于酒店集合，深入世界自然遗产——泰德国家公园（占地18900公顷，2007年列入世界遗产）。乘坐缆车直达泰德山雪山峰顶（海拔3715米以上），徒步火山熔岩塑造的白色峡谷（Cañada Blanca，约1小时15分钟）——被誉为"大地的调色盘"，浅色火山浮石与火山灰在阳光下泛出银白、淡粉光泽，与黑色熔岩形成强烈对比，峡谷中矗立着"五根手指"（Cinco Dedos）、"大教堂"（La Catedral）等巨型岩柱。当天下午自由游览美洲沙滩，或选择16:00后体验滑翔伞（不含）。重要提示：因路面火山石刺脚，泰德峰组织方要求必须穿"有系带徒步鞋"，否则不允许乘坐缆车；峰顶严格限制停留不超过1小时，以避免高海拔反应与失温；务必带好登山保暖装备；如遇火山预警或恶劣天气，缆车随时会停。本活动为高风险项目（年龄6–60周岁，体重30–90公斤，需身体健康）。夜宿拉斯帕尔梅拉斯H10酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Tenerife | Whale and dolphin watching at sea, then end of trip
timeline.title_zh: 特内里费岛 | 出海观赏鲸鱼与海豚，行程结束
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, gather at the hotel and set sail for a whale- and dolphin-watching tour, meeting wild marine life in the vast Atlantic (about 2 hours, of which about 30 minutes is snorkelling/swimming near the coast). The Teno–Rasca special marine reserve between Tenerife and La Gomera is one of the Atlantic's most biodiverse waters, home to over 400 resident short-finned pilot whales and certified a "Whale Heritage Site" in 2021 — one of the few places on Earth to reliably see whales year-round, alongside curious bottlenose dolphins and chance encounters with migrating humpback and fin whales. The trip ends after the cruise. High-risk note: the optional onboard ocean snorkelling/swimming carries drowning risk (ages 2–70, weight 5–90 kg, good health required); the operator does not recommend joining the boat's snorkelling, and standard travel insurance does not cover snorkelling, so check your policy. No overnight (final day).
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后于酒店集合，乘船开启观鲸与观海豚之旅，在浩瀚大西洋中邂逅野生海洋生物（约2小时，其中约30分钟在海岸边浮潜游泳），随后结束愉快的旅途。特内里费-拉戈梅拉海特别保护区是大西洋生物多样性最丰富的海域之一，超过400头短肢领航鲸长期栖息于此，2021年被世界鲸豚联盟正式认证为"鲸鱼遗产地"，是世界上少数可全年稳定观测鲸鱼的地方；温顺好奇的短肢领航鲸常成群巡游，活泼的宽吻海豚不时跃出水面，迁徙途中的座头鲸、长须鲸更带来不期而遇的惊喜。高风险提示：船上组织的海洋浮潜游泳为高风险项目，可能存在溺水风险（年龄2–70周岁，体重5–90公斤，需身体健康），旅行社不推荐参与，且普通旅游保险不包含浮潜风险，敬请自行查看保单。当天无住宿（行程最后一天）。

meeting_en: Lanzarote, Canary Islands (Spain) — travellers arrive independently; the tour begins at the Los Jameos seafront hotel (or equivalent 4-star), with the guide assembling the group at the hotel each morning.
meeting_zh: 西班牙加那利群岛兰萨罗特岛——游客自行抵达，于洛斯哈梅奥斯海滨酒店（或同等4星级酒店）开始行程，每日由导游在酒店集合出发。

faqs.question_en: Where do we meet on Day 1, and where does the group disperse on the last day?
faqs.question_zh: 第一天在哪里集合？最后一天在哪里解散？
faqs.answer_en: It depends on the route you book. Route A: after arriving on Lanzarote on Day 1, go to the hotel on your own (check-in after 14:00 or 15:00); there is no unified meeting on Day 1 and it is a free day, with no coach or Chinese-speaking guide (luggage can be left at the hotel). Route B: after arriving on Tenerife on Day 1, meet the group at the set time and place (you must reach the meeting point by at least 11:00 that day). On the last day, after hotel check-out (before 11:00/12:00) you arrange your own onward travel and the group disperses; again no coach or guide that day (luggage can be left at the hotel). Note Tenerife has two airports — the south airport (TFS) is closer to the hotel and the north airport (TFN) is farther; contact customer service with any questions about the Tenerife meeting point.
faqs.answer_zh: 视您报名的路线而定。A线：第一天抵达兰萨罗特岛后自行前往酒店（入住时间在14:00或15:00之后），当天无统一集合、为自由活动，无用车及中文导游服务（行李可寄存酒店）。B线：第一天抵达特内里费岛后，按集合时间及地点与团队汇合（要求当天至少11:00前抵达汇合点）。最后一天根据酒店退房时间（11:00/12:00之前）自行安排，退房后解散，当天同样无用车及中文导游服务（行李可寄存酒店）。注意：特内里费有两个机场，南部机场（TFS）距离酒店较近，北部机场（TFN）较远，任何疑问请联系客服沟通特内里费参团地点。

faqs.question_en: What is the weather like in the Canary Islands and what should I pack? Are hiking shoes required for Teide?
faqs.question_zh: 加那利群岛现在什么气候？需要带什么衣服？登泰德峰对鞋子有要求吗？
faqs.answer_en: The Canaries are warm year-round (average about 24°C thanks to the warm West-Saharan breeze) with little seasonal change, but altitude, volcanic areas and morning/evening swings can be large. Pack a light jacket, a windproof shell jacket, swimwear, sun-protective clothing, sunglasses, a hat and lace-up hiking shoes. For Teide, lace-up hiking shoes are mandatory: the trails have loose gravel and steep, uneven surfaces, and the park strictly bans leather shoes, board shoes, sandals, flip-flops, and any laceless casual shoes — anyone without lace-up hiking shoes is not allowed up. Even though Playa de las Américas 60 km away can be 30°C, Teide may have snow, so bring warm gear.
faqs.answer_zh: 加那利群岛常年温暖（因西哈撒拉暖风流过，年平均约24度），四季温差不大，但海拔、火山区域及早晚温差较大。建议携带薄外套、冲锋衣、泳衣、防晒衣、墨镜、帽子及有系带的徒步鞋。登泰德峰对鞋子有严格要求：山路多碎石、坡道陡峭且路面不平，当天务必穿带系带的徒步鞋，景区禁止穿皮鞋、板鞋、凉鞋、拖鞋、无系带休闲鞋等，否则一律禁止上山。即使相距60公里的美洲沙滩有30度，泰德峰也可能有积雪，请带好保暖装备。

faqs.question_en: How far is it from the airport to the hotel?
faqs.question_zh: 机场到酒店大概有多远（费用）？
faqs.answer_en: On Lanzarote, the airport to the hotel costs more than EUR 10–20. On Tenerife (south airport), it is about EUR 30–50. There is a taxi rank right outside the airport with no need to book; a business van or a party of 3 or more will be somewhat more expensive than a regular taxi.
faqs.answer_zh: 兰岛机场到酒店大于10-20欧元的费用，特岛（南部）机场到酒店约30-50欧元的费用。机场外就是出租车等候点，无需预约；商务车或3人以上会比普通出租车贵一些。

faqs.question_en: Is the three-islands-in-one-day quite tiring? Can I skip the island-hopping?
faqs.question_zh: 一天跳三岛会很累吗？可以放弃跳岛吗？
faqs.answer_en: The Gran Canaria–Tenerife ferry is about 2 hours, the Gran Canaria–Fuerteventura ferry about 25 minutes, and crossing Fuerteventura is about 120 km, during which you visit 2–3 sights and have lunch at the black beach. If you prefer to skip the island-hopping you can take a flight to the next island's hotel instead, but then you cannot visit the Fuerteventura sights.
faqs.answer_zh: 大岛与特岛之间约2小时渡轮，大岛与富岛之间约25分钟，横穿富岛约120公里，期间在富岛游览2-3个景点并在黑沙滩享用午餐。如果选择放弃跳岛，可以乘坐航班前往下一个岛的酒店，但无法游览富岛的景点。

faqs.question_en: Can activities be arranged on the evening of the Tenerife island-tour day?
faqs.question_zh: 特岛的环岛日当天晚上能安排活动吗？
faqs.answer_en: On the island-tour day you visit three sights (La Laguna, Puerto de la Cruz and the Dragon Tree Park), then have dinner at the hotel; after dinner, free exploring of Playa de las Américas is recommended, so no activity is advised that evening. On the Teide day you return to the hotel around 15:00, so you can book any activity after 16:00.
faqs.answer_zh: 环岛日当天游览三个景点（拉拉古纳、克鲁斯港和龙血树公园），到达酒店后享用晚餐，推荐晚餐后自由游览美洲沙滩，因此环岛日不推荐安排任何活动。泰德峰日约15点返回酒店，可以预约16点以后的任何活动。

faqs.question_en: We only have 7 days — can we still do the whole itinerary?
faqs.question_zh: 我们只有7天时间，是否能参加全部行程？
faqs.answer_en: Yes. You would give up the Tenerife hotel day and the Lanzarote hotel day; contact customer service to drop the Lanzarote hotel and apply for a refund. The 7-day itinerary still covers all the sights with free time at and around the hotel each afternoon, but the 8-day version is more relaxed.
faqs.answer_zh: 可以，需要放弃特岛的酒店日和兰岛的酒店日。联系客服放弃兰岛酒店可以申请退费！7天行程为完整游览行程，不会漏过所有景点，且每天下午仍能在酒店及周围游览，但8天行程会更加从容。

faqs.question_en: What does a "hotel day" mean? What meals are included?
faqs.question_zh: 酒店游览日是什么意思？旅游团包含什么样的餐饮？
faqs.answer_en: A hotel day means a full day at the hotel: on Tenerife at the red Moorish-palace hotel with a private beach, marina, sauna and thermal pools; the Lanzarote hotel day is at the Carmen seafront in the island's resort centre, with the beach right outside the door. The tour includes 7 select dinners; both the Lanzarote and Tenerife hotels offer select dinners with weekly-rotating buffets, and on Tenerife, depending on the departure, there may be one Chinese meal and one local specialty meal.
faqs.answer_zh: 酒店游览日是指整整一天在酒店：特岛在红色摩尔宫殿酒店，有私人沙滩、码头、游览区域及桑拿、温泉泳池等设施；兰岛酒店日位于卡门海滨、周围即兰岛度假中心，酒店门前即沙滩海滨。旅游团包含7晚精选晚餐，兰岛和特岛酒店均为精选晚餐，每周更换不同自助餐餐食，特岛根据不同团期可能选择一次中餐和一次当地特色菜。

faqs.question_en: Are all the island activities included? Why must I wear lace-up hiking shoes on the Teide day?
faqs.question_zh: 群岛上所有的活动都包含吗？特德峰日为什么一定要穿有系带的徒步鞋？
faqs.answer_en: All 12 signature activities are included, but paragliding and night stargazing are not, as they don't suit everyone; the itinerary leaves enough free time to join them and the organisers provide hotel pick-up/drop-off. On the Teide day, lace-up hiking shoes are required because the sharp volcanic rock means the operator won't let you on the cable car without them, and you also hike the White Canyon over gravel, volcanic rock and thorns. Both activities run back-to-back that day, and it can be cold — even with 30°C at Playa de las Américas 60 km away, Teide may have snow.
faqs.answer_zh: 具有特色的12项活动全部包含，但滑翔伞和晚间观星不适合所有人群，因此并未包含；行程留有足够时间可以自由游览，活动组织方提供酒店接送服务。泰德峰日必须穿有系带徒步鞋：因路面火山石刺脚，组织方要求必须穿徒步鞋，否则不允许乘坐缆车；其次会在白色峡谷徒步，有碎石、火山石和荆棘。当天两个活动前后进行，且当天可能产生低温，即使60公里外的美洲沙滩30度，泰德峰也有积雪。

faqs.question_en: Will I get seasick on the whale-watching and island-hopping boats? How long are the crossings?
faqs.question_zh: 出海观鲸、跳岛渡轮会不会晕船？总共坐船多久？
faqs.answer_en: The product includes 4 sea trips. The ferries are all large vessels, but if you hit waves, sitting on the lower deck in the centre helps a lot. The whale-watching boat is small and can be more prone to seasickness, though it's usually mild given how engaging the trip is; bring seasickness medicine if needed. Ferry times: Gran Canaria–Fuerteventura about 2 hours, Tenerife–Gran Canaria about 1 hour 20 minutes, Fuerteventura–Lanzarote 25 minutes. Whale watching is about 2 hours, of which roughly 30 minutes is snorkelling/swimming near the coast.
faqs.answer_zh: 本产品包含4次出海。渡轮全部是大型船只，但如遇海浪，推荐坐在船的底层中心位置，能大幅缓解晕船。出海观鲸为小型船只，可能会晕船，但通常因游览活动丰富，晕船情况不明显，如有必要请提前准备晕船药。渡轮时间：大岛-富岛段约2小时，特岛-大岛段约1小时20分钟，富岛-兰岛段25分钟；出海观鲸约2小时，其中约30分钟在海岸边浮潜游泳。

faqs.question_en: When is the great Canary Islands carnival?
faqs.question_zh: 加那利群岛的大嘉年华是什么时候开始？
faqs.answer_en: The Santa Cruz de Tenerife Carnival is hailed as the world's second-largest carnival after Rio's — a spectacular street party paying tribute to Latin rhythms and an elegant yet wild seaside arts festival. Tenerife ("Latin Rhythms"): 16 Jan – 22 Feb 2027. Gran Canaria ("Las Vegas"): 23 Jan – 1 Mar 2027.
faqs.answer_zh: 圣克鲁斯-德特内里费狂欢节被誉为继巴西里约之后世界第二大狂欢节，场面非常壮观，既是向拉丁节奏致敬的街头派对，也是融合优雅与狂热的海滨艺术盛典。特内里费岛拉丁韵律（Latin Rhythms）：2027年1月16日-2月22日；大加那利岛拉斯维加斯（Las Vegas）：2027年1月23日-3月1日。

faqs.question_en: Do I need a visa?
faqs.question_zh: 是否需要签证？
faqs.answer_en: Yes. This product does not include visa fees and requires a Schengen visa (single- or multiple-entry); if you need one, choose a Schengen-visa product. After booking, the operator provides all the materials for the Schengen visa application free of charge, and if you entrust the operator with the visa service it will buy you Schengen-compliant travel insurance (otherwise you must arrange insurance and claims yourself). Your passport must be valid for at least 6 months from the date of departure or customs may refuse entry. Visa fees, visa service fees, Schengen insurance fees and visa-centre appointment fees are all non-refundable and non-transferable, even if the product is refunded/changed. Guarantee (保签无忧): if you sign the contract at least 61 days before departure and do not obtain the visa within 45 days before departure, the operator bears all losses and immediately refunds the full travel cost; otherwise, refunds follow the change-and-cancellation terms. On a refusal you must notify the operator within 48 hours with the consulate's refusal letter, submit any supplementary/amended materials within 5 days, and not unilaterally waive the right to a "visa defence".
faqs.answer_zh: 需要。本产品不包含签证费用，需办理申根签证（单次或多次入境）；如需办理请选择申根签证产品。预订后免费提供办理申根签证的全部材料；如委托旅行社办理签证服务，旅行社将为您购买符合申根要求的旅游保险，否则需自行购买保险并负责理赔。护照有效期需在离境之日起至少还有六个月，否则海关有权拒绝入境。签证费、签证服务费、申根保险费、签证中心预约费均不可退款，也无法更改使用者，即使产品退改签亦不可退。保签无忧：游客在出发前61天与旅行社签约，如在出发前45天内未获取签证，旅行社承担所有损失并立即退还全部旅游费用；不符合该条款者按"退改与取消条款"退费。如遇拒签需在48小时内通知旅行社并出具使领馆拒签函，需补充或更改材料的须在五天内提交，且不得单方面放弃"签证抗辩"权利。

faqs.question_en: Booking, changes & cancellation
faqs.question_zh: 预订、变更与取消须知
faqs.answer_en: Both sides may cancel without reason more than 30 days before departure (the 30th day excluded). This is a join-in group tour; the group is confirmed at 10 people — below that, the operator may cancel the group or any sub-group optional activity (which then becomes free time). You must arrive at the meeting point at least one day before the tour starts and leave one day after it ends, allowing reasonable flight connections (at least 5 hours for transfers at the same airport, 7 hours for different airports in the same city); the reasonable meeting/dispersal window is 07:00–21:00. All prices are quoted in EUR at booking; if you pay in CNY, the amount is the real-time CNY value auto-calculated from the Bank of China "EUR sell" rate on the day of payment (refunds likewise use the rate on the refund day; you bear any exchange differences and bank fees). Standard double rooms have bed types assigned by the hotel and cannot be specified; solo travellers pay a single-room supplement deposit, and since the operator offers 30-day free cancellation, a successful share cannot be guaranteed (partial-share refunds are pro-rated). Triple/family rooms vary by hotel (e.g. an extra bed, twin+single, or a double+sofa bed). Pay promptly after booking, as the order needs a second confirmation by the operating agency within 48 hours (otherwise it auto-refunds) — do not book connecting flights/hotels before the itinerary is confirmed. Itinerary order may be adjusted for ferry/flight connections without being a breach; the Gran Canaria–Fuerteventura ferry may be replaced by a flight (skipping the free Fuerteventura sights with no refund, extra cost borne by the operator). Outdoor/natural activities depend on weather and official notices and may be suspended or cancelled at any time (cancelled activities are refunded; suspended ones refunded pro-rata).
faqs.answer_zh: 出发前30天（不含第30天）双方均可无理由取消。本产品为散客拼团，成团人数为10人，未达10人旅行社有权取消旅游团或团内自费活动（该时段改为自由活动）。要求旅游者在旅游团开始前一天到达集合地、结束后一天离开集散地，并预留合理航班衔接时间（同一机场转机至少5小时，同城不同机场至少7小时），合理集合集散时段为07:00至21:00。所有定价以欧元为预订计价单位，如选择人民币支付，则以当天支付时本网站依据中国银行实时"欧元卖出价"自动计算的人民币实时价格为准（退款同样适用申请退款当日汇率，汇率差异及银行手续费由旅行者承担）。标准双人间床型由酒店安排、不可指定；单人报名需交单人房差押金，因旅行社有30天以上无理由取消承诺，故无法保证成功拼房（部分拼房按比例退还）；三人间/家庭间视酒店安排（可能加床、双床+单床或一大床+沙发床）。预订后请及时支付，订单需组团社在48小时内二次确认（超时自动退款），未获确认前请勿预订衔接机票及酒店。行程前后顺序可能因渡轮/航班衔接而调整，不视为违约；大加那利岛-富埃特文图拉岛渡轮可能用航班代替（届时无法游览富岛景点、无门票可退，费用增加由旅行社承担）。户外自然活动需视天气及官方通知而定，可能随时中止或取消（取消的退费，中止的按比例退款）。

faqs.question_en: Health & safety requirements
faqs.question_zh: 健康与安全须知
faqs.answer_en: For your safety, please have a health check before travelling and do NOT book if you have: infectious diseases (e.g. active TB, typhoid); cardiovascular disease (severe hypertension, cardiac insufficiency, myocardial ischaemia/infarction); cerebrovascular disease (embolism, haemorrhage, brain tumour); respiratory disease (emphysema, cor pulmonale); psychiatric illness or epilepsy; severe anaemia (haemoglobin below 50 g/L); or are recovering from major/medium surgery. Pregnancy: at 35 weeks or more you cannot join under any circumstances; at 28 weeks or more you must provide a doctor's report (within 7 days) and a physician's consent letter; under 28 weeks, book with caution, sign a liability waiver, and you cannot join adventure, skiing, sea, high-altitude or outdoor items. People with disabilities and elderly travellers (70+) need a recent medical report and physician's consent, a direct-relative companion, and at least 61 days' advance request for support/facilities; this is a long itinerary needing reasonable walking ability and stamina. Minors (under 18) must be accompanied by a direct relative/guardian; some sights have age limits (under 18/12/6); for infants under 6 or children under 30 kg confirm a child safety seat in advance; an unaccompanied minor needs parental authorisation (both parents' if travelling with non-parents); infants under 2 are not accepted. Per Article 15 of the Tourism Law, travellers must truthfully declare health information relevant to the trip (pregnancy, chronic illness, infectious-disease history, suspected symptoms or recent epidemic-area travel) and follow safety warnings; concealment that causes harm or transmission risk makes the traveller liable for their own losses, medical/quarantine costs and compensation, and the operator may terminate the contract without refund.
faqs.answer_zh: 为确保顺利出行、防止人身意外，请出行前做必要的身体检查，如有下列情况请勿报名：传染性疾病（如活动期肺结核、伤寒）；心血管疾病（如严重高血压、心功能不全、心肌缺氧、心肌梗塞）；脑血管疾病（如脑栓塞、脑出血、脑肿瘤）；呼吸系统疾病（如肺气肿、肺心病）；精神病及癫痫；严重贫血（血红蛋白50克/升以下）；大中型手术恢复期患者。孕妇：妊娠35周及以上任何情况都无法参团；28周及以上需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书；28周以下请慎重报名，需签署免责声明书，且无法参加探险、滑雪、出海、高空、户外等项目。残疾人及70周岁以上老年旅游者需提供7日内体检报告及主治医生同意书、需直系家属陪同，并至少提前61天申请预留位置及配套设施；本行程较长，需有一定步行能力与体力。未成年人（未满18周岁）须由直系亲属或监护人陪同，部分项目对未满18/12/6周岁有特殊限定；6岁以下婴儿或30公斤以下儿童请提前确认安全座椅；无父母陪同的未成年人需父母授权书（与父母以外人员同行需父母双方授权书）；不接受2周岁以下婴儿参团。根据《旅游法》第15条，旅游者需如实告知与旅游活动相关的个人健康信息（包括妊娠期、慢性病、传染病史、疑似症状或近期疫区旅居史）并遵守安全警示，若因隐瞒导致人身损害或传播风险，需自行承担损失、医疗隔离费用及赔偿，旅行社可解除合同且不退还费用。

title_en: Canary Islands 4-Island Escape: 9-Day Guided Tour (Lanzarote to Tenerife)
title_zh: 加那利群岛四岛探索9日跟团游（兰萨罗特岛—特内里费岛）
short_en: A one-way 9-day journey across four Canary Islands — volcanoes, lava caves, whale watching and Mount Teide, with included attractions and city hotels.
short_zh: 一段9天单程深度之旅，跨越加那利四座海岛：火山、熔岩洞穴、出海观鲸与泰德峰登顶，景点全含、入住海滨四星酒店。
desc_en: This 9-day one-way adventure island-hops across four of the Canary Islands, beginning on volcanic Lanzarote and ending on Tenerife. You will explore the surreal lava caves of Jameos del Agua and Cueva de los Verdes, ride a camel through Timanfaya National Park's black volcanic fields, ferry past the curve of the Earth to Gran Canaria, dive in a submarine off Mogan, climb snow-capped Mount Teide by cable car, and sail the Atlantic to watch resident pilot whales and dolphins. Eight nights of seafront 4-star hotels plus a final night in a 5-star Moorish-palace resort round out the trip, with all listed attractions, ferries and a Chinese-speaking guide included.
desc_zh: 这是一段9天单程的群岛跳岛之旅，从火山遍布的兰萨罗特岛出发，最终抵达特内里费岛，沿途跨越四座加那利海岛。您将深入超现实的哈迈奥斯水洞与绿洞熔岩洞穴，在蒂曼法亚国家公园的黑色火山原野上骑骆驼漫游，乘渡轮在大西洋上欣赏地球曲线前往大加那利岛，在莫甘港乘潜水艇探索海底世界，搭乘缆车登顶雪山泰德峰，并出海邂逅常年栖息于此的领航鲸与海豚。全程入住8晚海滨四星酒店，最后一晚升级入住五星红色摩尔宫殿度假酒店；所列景点、岛际渡轮及中文导游全部包含。

highlights.en: Whale and dolphin watching by boat in the Atlantic's certified 'Whale Heritage Site'
highlights.zh: 出海观赏鲸鱼与海豚，畅游获认证的大西洋“鲸鱼遗产地”

highlights.en: Cable-car ascent to the snow-capped summit of Mount Teide, a UNESCO World Heritage site
highlights.zh: 搭乘缆车登顶世界自然遗产泰德峰，俯瞰雪山云海

highlights.en: Hike the otherworldly White Canyon (Cañada Blanca) lava landscape in Teide National Park
highlights.zh: 徒步穿行泰德国家公园如火星般的白色峡谷火山地貌

highlights.en: Watch a simulated volcanic eruption at Timanfaya National Park and ride a camel across the lava
highlights.zh: 在蒂曼法亚国家公园观看模拟火山喷发表演，并体验火山熔岩骑骆驼漫游

highlights.en: Explore the surreal lava caves of Jameos del Agua and Cueva de los Verdes with a geo-guide
highlights.zh: 在地质向导带领下探索哈迈奥斯水洞与绿洞超现实熔岩洞穴

highlights.en: Dive in a real submarine off Mogan to see Atlantic reefs, shipwrecks and marine life
highlights.zh: 在莫甘港乘坐潜水艇下潜海底，观赏大西洋沉船、鱼群与海洋生态

highlights.en: One-day island-hop across Lanzarote, Fuerteventura and Gran Canaria — three islands, three worlds
highlights.zh: 一日跳三岛，跨越兰萨罗特、富埃特文图拉与大加那利岛，一岛一世界

highlights.en: Included attractions, inter-island ferries and Chinese-speaking guide — no forced shopping
highlights.zh: 景点门票、岛际渡轮与中文导游全含，无强制购物

includes.en: Hotels: 7 nights in 4-star hotels plus 1 night in a 5-star featured scenic hotel (star rating per Booking/Ctrip standards).
includes.zh: 【酒店】四星级酒店7晚，五星特色景观酒店1晚（酒店星级参考Booking或携程酒店星级标准）。

includes.en: Meals: 8 breakfasts (in-hotel buffet or other form) and 7 dinners (in-hotel buffet or other form), 15 meals in total (the 5-star Moorish-palace hotel includes breakfast but not dinner).
includes.zh: 【餐饮】酒店内自助早餐或其他形式早餐8餐；酒店内自助晚餐或其他形式晚餐7餐；共计15餐（五星级摩尔宫殿酒店含早餐不含晚餐）。

includes.en: Operating costs: tourist/city tax, city-entry fees, residence tax, road and bridge tolls, parking and fuel charges, driver/guide meal allowances and other costs within the itinerary.
includes.zh: 【执行】游客城市税、进城费、居住税、过路过桥费、停车燃油费、司导餐补等行程内执行费用。

includes.en: Vehicle: tourist coach or tourist business van.
includes.zh: 【车辆】旅游巴士或旅游商务车。

includes.en: Guide: professional driver plus Chinese-speaking guide, or a Chinese-speaking ethnic-Chinese driver-guide throughout (note: for 8 people or fewer, a business van with a Chinese-speaking driver-guide is arranged).
includes.zh: 【导游】职业司机+中文导游或者全程中文华人司机兼导游（备注：8人及以下则安排为商务旅行车+中文司机兼导游）。

includes.en: Baggage: one 23 kg checked bag and one piece of hand luggage.
includes.zh: 【行李】1件23公斤行李及1件随身行李。

includes.en: Admissions: Jameos del Agua, Cueva de los Verdes (incl. guide commentary fee), Mirador del Río, Cactus Garden, Timanfaya National Park pass, La Geria winery, Museo Lagomar, Drago (dragon tree) park, Teide cable car round-trip ticket, camel ride, Mogán submarine, and the whale & dolphin watching cruise.
includes.zh: 【门票】哈迈奥斯水洞、绿洞（含向导讲解费）、里奥观景台、仙人掌花园、蒂曼法亚国家公园通票、拉赫里亚酒庄、拉戈马尔博物馆、龙血树公园、泰德峰缆车往返票、骆驼之旅、莫甘港潜水艇、出海观鲸鱼与海豚。

includes.en: Inter-island transport: the three ferry segments Lanzarote–Fuerteventura, Fuerteventura–Gran Canaria, and Gran Canaria–Tenerife.
includes.zh: 【大交通】兰萨罗特岛—富埃特文图拉岛、富埃特文图拉岛—大加那利岛、大加那利岛—特内里费岛的三段渡轮费用。

excludes.en: Passport: personal passport fees.
excludes.zh: 护照：个人护照费用。

excludes.en: Visa: the tourist visa fees required for the countries on the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 签证：行程中所列旅游国家所需的观光签证费用。

excludes.en: Insurance: travel insurance fees (if the itinerary involves high-risk sports, please verify whether your travel insurance covers them).
excludes.zh: 保险：旅游保险费用（如行程内涉及到高风险运动，请核实旅游保险是否包含该项运动）。

excludes.en: Tips: guide and driver tips totaling EUR 10 per person per day, same price for adults and children.
excludes.zh: 小费：游客支付导游和司机小费一共10欧/人/天，大小同价。

excludes.en: Meals: apart from the featured meals included in the itinerary, lunches and other dinners are not included.
excludes.zh: 餐饮：除行程内包含的特色餐外，行程中不包含午、晚正餐费用。

excludes.en: Admissions: sights not marked as fee-included in the itinerary (including but not limited to sights marked "(exterior)", and any "recommended", "optional", "experience" or other items whose fee is not stated as included — if you wish to visit, please pay on your own).
excludes.zh: 门票：行程中未注明费用包含的景点（包括但不限于行程中注明“外观”的景点，以及“推荐”“可选”“体验”等所有未提及费用包含的项目，如游客需要参观，敬请自理）。

excludes.en: Extended stays: any additional accommodation, transport and sightseeing beyond the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 延长住宿：行程外额外延长的住宿、交通、观光费用。

excludes.en: Personal expenses: such as drinks and alcohol, taxis, phone charges and other personal spending.
excludes.zh: 私人消费：如饮料酒类、出租车、电话费等个人消费。

excludes.en: Other transport: transport not mentioned in the inclusions beyond the included business van or minibus, e.g. Venice gondolas, and tourist trains, electric taxis etc. in vehicle-restricted zones — please cover these yourself.
excludes.zh: 其他交通：除包含商务旅行车或者中巴之外，费用包含中未提及的其他交通费用，如威尼斯贡多拉，以及车辆限行区的观光火车、电瓶出租车等费用敬请自理。

excludes.en: Free-time activities: travelers' own evening sightseeing and the recommended/optional items in the itinerary, plus the resulting transport, dining, admission and shopping costs.
excludes.zh: 自由活动：游客夜间自行游览及行程中的推荐项目，以及产生的交通、餐饮、门票、购物等费用。

excludes.en: Experience activities: the various travel experience activities in the itinerary that are not included.
excludes.zh: 体验活动：行程中的没有包含的各项旅游体验活动。

excludes.en: Other costs: anything not mentioned in the inclusions. If force majeure (natural disaster, war, strike etc.), transport delays, flight cancellation or rescheduling, embassy visa delays, insufficient group numbers or other special/non-operator causes generate extra costs (e.g. overseas visa-extension fees, lodging, food and transport, national airfare adjustments), the operator reserves the right to charge the difference.
excludes.zh: 其他费用：费用包含中未提及的费用。如因天灾、战争、罢工等不可抗力的原因，及因交通延阻、航班取消或更改时间、使馆延误出签证、人数不足等特殊情况或其他非我公司原因所引致的额外费用（如在外延期签证费、住、食及交通费、国家航空运价调整等），我公司有权追加差价。

timeline.title_en: Arrive Lanzarote (free day, self check-in)
timeline.title_zh: 抵达兰萨罗特岛（自由活动，自行入住）
timeline.description_en: Travelers fly to Lanzarote on their own and make their own way to the hotel to check in according to their booking confirmation. There is no group meeting, guide or vehicle service today; the whole day is free time, with check-in available after 14:00. You can rest or do some initial exploring of the destination depending on your arrival time, and luggage may be stored at the hotel. Overnight at the Los Jameos seaside hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel, a low-rise white Canarian-style property set in lush tropical gardens by the beach resort area, with multi-theme restaurants including a buffet dinner venue rated as a featured dining restaurant.
timeline.description_zh: 游客自行飞往兰萨罗特岛，抵达后根据酒店订单信息自行前往酒店办理入住手续。当天没有统一集合，也没有用车和中文导游服务，全天为自由活动时间，14点后可办理入住，可根据抵达时间自行安排休息或初步探索目的地，行李可寄存在酒店。夜宿洛斯哈梅奥斯海滨酒店或同等4星级酒店——一座位于海滩度假区、典型加那利建筑风格的白色低层建筑，掩映于郁郁葱葱的热带花园之中，酒店内设多主题餐厅，自助晚餐厅被旅行社评为“精选美食餐厅”。

timeline.title_en: Northern Lanzarote: Jameos del Agua, Cueva de los Verdes, Mirador del Río & Cactus Garden
timeline.title_zh: 兰萨罗特岛北部：哈迈奥斯水洞、绿洞、里奥观景台与仙人掌花园
timeline.description_en: After breakfast you gather at the hotel for a tour of northern Lanzarote's nature and art. You descend into the mysterious volcanic lava caves — Jameos del Agua (the water cave) and Cueva de los Verdes (the Green Cave) — both formed within the same lava tunnel system created by the Corona volcano, accompanied by a Spanish/English geology guide; the Green Cave hides a natural concert hall and mirror-still underground water channels, while Jameos del Agua, redesigned by Lanzarote's legendary artist César Manrique, fuses a crystal-clear underground saltwater lake, light and architecture (about 2 hours). You then climb to the Mirador del Río viewpoint, almost invisibly built into the volcanic cliffs, for sweeping blue-green sea views toward the eighth island, and stroll the uniquely designed Cactus Garden with over 4,500 cacti of more than a thousand species. Overnight at the Los Jameos seaside hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后在酒店集合，开启兰萨罗特岛北部的自然与艺术之旅。在西班牙语、英语地质向导带领下深入神秘的火山熔岩洞穴——哈迈奥斯水洞（Jameos del Agua）与绿洞（Cueva de los Verdes），二者同属拉科罗纳火山形成的同一条熔岩隧道体系；绿洞深处隐藏着利用岩石天然声学结构的天然音乐厅与如镜面般静止的地下水道，而哈迈奥斯水洞由兰萨罗特传奇艺术家塞萨尔·曼里克改造设计，将晶莹剔透的地下咸水湖、光影与建筑融为一体（游玩约2小时）。随后登临几乎隐形地融入火山悬崖的里奥观景台（Mirador del Río），俯瞰层次丰富的蓝绿色海水与“第八岛屿”的壮阔美景；最后漫步设计精致的仙人掌花园，园中种植了来自世界各地的4500余株、上千品种仙人掌。夜宿洛斯哈梅奥斯海滨酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Southern Lanzarote: Timanfaya National Park, camel ride, La Geria winery & Museo Lagomar
timeline.title_zh: 兰萨罗特岛南部：蒂曼法亚国家公园、骑骆驼、拉赫里亚酒庄与拉戈马尔博物馆
timeline.description_en: After breakfast you gather at the hotel to explore southern Lanzarote's volcanoes. You go deep into Timanfaya National Park, a vast volcanic landscape of black lava fields and mountains ranging from black lava to red volcanic rock, where staff stage a live volcanic eruption demonstration using straw, water and geothermal heat, and food is cooked directly over the earth's heat (the "fire of the earth"). A specially arranged camel ride (Montañas del Fuego) lets you cross the black volcanic plains from a unique vantage point (about 45 minutes). You then visit the La Geria wine region, where vines grow in ring-shaped pits in the black volcanic soil, with a winery visit and tasting (about 30 minutes), and finally the legendary Museo Lagomar, built into natural caves and once the private residence of actor Omar Sharif (about 1.5 hours). Overnight at the Los Jameos seaside hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后在酒店集合，开启兰萨罗特岛南部火山探索之旅。深入蒂曼法亚国家公园，领略由黑色熔岩到红色火山岩构成的如外星球般壮丽的火山地貌；现场工作人员用稻草、水和地热模拟火山喷发表演，并以“地心之火”的方式直接用火山热量烤熟食物。特别安排骆驼之旅（Montañas del Fuego），以独特视角穿行于黑色火山原野（约45分钟）。随后走进风格独特的拉赫里亚（La Geria）葡萄种植区，葡萄藤生长在火山黑土的环状土坑中，酒庄提供参观与品酒体验（约30分钟）；最后参观充满传奇色彩的拉戈马尔博物馆（Museo Lagomar），它建在天然岩洞之中，曾是演员奥马尔·沙里夫的私人宅邸（约1小时30分钟）。夜宿洛斯哈梅奥斯海滨酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Three islands in one day: Lanzarote → Fuerteventura → Gran Canaria (optional stargazing)
timeline.title_zh: 一日跳三岛：兰萨罗特岛 → 富埃特文图拉岛 → 大加那利岛（可选观星）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast you gather at the hotel for an Atlantic crossing visiting three islands in one day. You take the ferry to Fuerteventura to explore its wild west coast: the town of La Oliva, whose Montaña de Tindaya hills fill with purple wildflowers after the rains from December to April (about 30 min); the striking Ajuy caves of black volcanic rock eroded by the waves (about 1.5 hours); and the black-sand beach and old fishing village (about 1 hour), where lunch is taken. You then continue by ferry to Gran Canaria, where in the evening you may join the optional Gran Canaria stargazing trip (minimum 10 people; welcome drink, two telescopes, two starlight-certified guides, laser-guided constellation tour and a photo under the stars). Note: if tides, storms, weather, vessel faults, ferry cancellations or seamen's strikes force a change, a flight may replace the ferry with a direct Lanzarote–Gran Canaria hop, skipping Fuerteventura — its sights are free natural areas so no ticket refund applies, and any extra cost from the change is borne by the operator. Overnight at the AC Hotel by Marriott Gran Canaria or an equivalent 4-star hotel in central Las Palmas.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后于酒店集合，开启精彩的一日跨三岛大西洋海面之旅。乘坐轮渡前往富埃特文图拉岛，探访原始壮丽的西海岸：La Oliva小镇，每年12月到4月雨季后聖体山（Tindaya）开满紫色花海（约30分钟）；由火山岩与海浪长期侵蚀形成的震撼阿胡伊洞穴（约1小时30分钟）；以及火山砂砾形成的黑沙滩与古老渔村，并在此享用午餐（约1小时）。随后继续乘轮渡前往大加那利岛，当晚可选择参加大加那利岛观星之旅（10人起成团，含迎宾饮品、2台望远镜、2位星光认证向导、激光引导星座之旅及星空照片）。特别提醒：如遇潮汐、风暴、巨浪、天气、船只故障、渡轮班期取消或海员罢工等，将以航班代替渡轮在兰萨罗特岛与大加那利岛之间直飞，无法游览富埃特文图拉岛景点，因其均为无需门票的自然景区故无门票费用可退，由行程变更导致的费用增加由旅行社承担。夜宿大加那利岛万豪AC酒店或同等4星级酒店（位于拉斯帕尔马斯市中心）。

timeline.title_en: Gran Canaria: Puerto de Mogán, submarine dive, Casa de Colón & Las Palmas old town
timeline.title_zh: 大加那利岛：莫甘港、潜水艇下潜、哥伦布故居与拉斯帕尔马斯老城
timeline.description_en: After breakfast you gather at the hotel for a classic round-island tour of Gran Canaria. You first head to the Mediterranean-flavored Puerto de Mogán, nicknamed the "flower harbor" for the blooms on its colorful houses, where you stroll the picturesque village and quiet marina and board a submarine to explore the underwater world, descending to about 25 metres with no pressure change to view shipwrecks, whale bones and fish through the windows (about 2 hours at Mogán). You then visit the historic landmark Casa de Colón (Columbus's House), a museum set in 16th-century colonial architecture named for Christopher Columbus's stop here before sailing to the New World, with maps, ship models and navigation instruments (about 30 min), and the cobbled colonial old town of Las Palmas (about 1 hour). Overnight at the AC Hotel by Marriott Gran Canaria or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后于酒店集合，开启大加那利岛经典环岛之旅。首先前往充满地中海风情的莫甘港（Puerto de Mogán），因港口两旁彩色房屋上开满鲜花而被誉为“鲜花海港”，在彩色小镇与宁静港湾漫步，并乘坐潜水艇探索海底世界——下潜至水下约25米且不会感受到压力变化，透过舷窗欣赏海底沉船、鲸鱼骸骨与鱼群（莫甘港游玩约2小时）。随后参观历史文化地标哥伦布故居（哥伦布之家），这座博物馆建在16世纪殖民时期建筑内，因克里斯托弗·哥伦布前往新大陆航行前曾停留此地而得名，馆内陈列航海地图、船只模型与航海器具（约30分钟）；并游览铺有鹅卵石、保存众多西班牙殖民时期建筑的拉斯帕尔马斯老城（约1小时）。夜宿大加那利岛万豪AC酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Gran Canaria → Tenerife: La Laguna old town, Puerto de la Cruz & Drago Milenario park
timeline.title_zh: 大加那利岛 → 特内里费岛：拉拉古纳古城、克鲁斯港与千年龙血树公园
timeline.description_en: After breakfast you gather at the hotel and take the ferry to Tenerife. On arrival you begin a cultural and architectural tour: La Laguna, whose colonial-era old town and colorful houses (the urban prototype for Havana) was listed by UNESCO as a World Heritage Site in 1999, where you wander cobbled streets and squares and admire stained-glass church art (about 2 hours); and Puerto de la Cruz, a lively traditional Canarian seaside town with black-sand and rocky beaches and natural rock tide pools (about 2.5 hours). You then visit the Drago Milenario park to see the famous thousand-year dragon tree of Icod (now estimated around 800 years old), over 16 metres tall with a base circumference of about 20 metres, surrounded by an endemic-species garden (about 45 min). Overnight at the H10 Las Palmeras hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel in Playa de las Américas. Note: depending on hotel availability the Tenerife round-island day and the Tenerife hotel day may be swapped — in that case you check into the 5-star red Moorish-palace hotel on arrival and finish at the Playa de las Américas hotel; the order may change but the content is identical and this is not considered an itinerary change.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后于酒店集合，乘轮渡前往特内里费岛。抵达后开启文化巡礼之旅，遊览城市建筑美学：拉拉古纳——殖民时代历史建筑与彩色洋房，是哈瓦那的城市原型，其老城街道于1999年被联合国教科文组织列为世界遗产，在殖民时期的街道与广场漫步并欣赏教堂彩色玻璃艺术（约2小时）；克鲁斯港（Puerto de la Cruz）——传统热闹的加纳利海滨小镇，从黑沙滩到岩石间形成的天然海水泳池（约2小时30分钟）。随后前往龙血树公园，观赏著名的伊科德千年龙树（目前估计树龄约800年），树高超过16米、底部周长约20米，周围建有特有物种花园（约45分钟）。夜宿拉斯帕尔梅拉斯H10酒店或同等4星级酒店（位于美洲海滩Playa de las Américas中心地带）。特别提醒：根据酒店可用性，特内里费的环岛日可能与酒店日对换，届时抵达特岛后先入住五星级红色摩尔宫殿酒店，最后一天在美洲沙滩酒店结束行程；游览前后顺序可能调整但内容一致，不影响全程体验，不视为行程更改。

timeline.title_en: Tenerife: Teide National Park cable car & Cañada Blanca hike (optional paragliding)
timeline.title_zh: 特内里费岛：泰德国家公园缆车与白色峡谷徒步（可选滑翔伞）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast you gather at the hotel and go deep into the UNESCO World Heritage Teide National Park (18,900 hectares, listed in 2007), taking the cable car up toward the snowy summit of Mount Teide (over 3,715 m), then hiking the Cañada Blanca, the "palette of the earth" — pale volcanic pumice and ash that gleams silver-white and pink against the black lava, with giant eroded rock pillars known as Cinco Dedos (Five Fingers) and La Catedral, and hardy plants like Teide violets and summit daisies (about 1 hour 15 min). In the afternoon you have free time at Playa de las Américas, or you may choose the optional paragliding experience after 16:00 (tandem flights over Teide National Park). Note: this is a high-risk activity (ages 6–60, weight 30–90 kg, good health required); laced hiking shoes are mandatory or you will not be allowed on the cable car, summit stays are strictly limited to 1 hour to avoid altitude/cold effects, and the cable car may be suspended at any time on volcano alerts or bad weather. Overnight at the H10 Las Palmeras hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后于酒店集合，深入世界自然遗产——泰德国家公园（占地18900公顷，2007年列入世界遗产），乘坐缆车直达海拔超过3715米的泰德山雪山峰顶，随后徒步白色峡谷（Cañada Blanca）。被誉为“大地的调色盘”的白色峡谷地表覆盖浅色火山浮石与灰烬，在阳光下泛出银白、淡粉光泽，与周围黑色熔岩形成强烈对比，峡谷中矗立着“五根手指”（Cinco Dedos）、“大教堂”（La Catedral）等巨型岩柱，并有泰德峰紫罗兰、峰顶雏菊等顽强生长的植物（约1小时15分钟）。当天下午自由游览美洲沙滩，或选择16:00后的双人滑翔伞高空体验（从空中俯瞰泰德国家公园）。特别提醒：本活动为高风险项目（年龄6—60周岁、体重30—90公斤、身体健康者方可参加）；必须穿着有系带的徒步鞋，否则不允许乘坐缆车，峰顶严格限制停留不超过1小时以避免高海拔反应与失温，如遇火山预警或恶劣天气缆车随时会停。夜宿拉斯帕尔梅拉斯H10酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Tenerife: whale & dolphin watching cruise, check in to 5-star Ritz-Carlton Abama
timeline.title_zh: 特内里费岛：出海观鲸与海豚，入住五星丽思卡尔顿阿巴马酒店
timeline.description_en: After breakfast you gather at the hotel and board a boat for a whale- and dolphin-watching cruise in the Teno–Rasca special marine reserve between Tenerife and La Gomera, one of the Atlantic's most biodiverse waters and certified a Whale Heritage Site in 2021. More than 400 short-finned pilot whales live here year-round, often cruising gently beside the boat, with energetic bottlenose dolphins leaping from the water and the chance of humpback or fin whales passing through (about 2 hours, of which roughly 30 minutes is snorkeling/swimming near the coast). You then check in to the Ritz-Carlton Abama, a 5-star red Moorish-palace resort built in tiers up a hillside amid palms, tropical plants and volcanic-rock landscaping, with outdoor pools, a spa, Michelin-starred dining and a private guest beach with sweeping ocean views. Overnight at the Ritz-Carlton Abama or an equivalent 5-star hotel (breakfast included, dinner not included). Note: the at-sea snorkeling/swimming is a high-risk activity (ages 2–70, weight 5–90 kg, good health required); do not enter the sea if you cannot swim, and standard travel insurance does not cover snorkeling — please check your policy.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后于酒店集合，乘船开启观鲸与观海豚之旅。在特内里费—拉戈梅拉海特别保护区——大西洋生物多样性最丰富的海域之一、2021年被世界鲸豚联盟认证为“鲸鱼遗产地”——超过400头短肢领航鲸常年栖息于此，它们温顺好奇常成群在船边巡游，活力充沛的宽吻海豚不时跃出水面，还可能与迁徙途中的座头鲸、长须鲸不期而遇（约2小时，其中约30分钟在海岸边浮潜游泳）。随后入住丽思卡尔顿阿巴马酒店——一座融合自然景观与建筑艺术的红色摩尔宫殿酒店，层层展开在山坡之上，棕榈与火山岩景观交织，设有室外泳池、Spa、米其林星级餐厅以及可远眺浩瀚海景的专属海滩。夜宿丽思卡尔顿阿巴马酒店或同等5星级酒店（含早餐，不含晚餐）。特别提醒：海上浮潜游泳为高风险项目（年龄2—70周岁、体重5—90公斤、身体健康者方可参加），不会游泳请勿下海，普通旅游保险不包含浮潜风险，敬请自行查看保单。

timeline.title_en: Tenerife: free time, departure
timeline.title_zh: 特内里费岛：自由活动，返程
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, check out by the hotel's stated time (check-out before 11:00/12:00) and then enjoy free time. Make your own way to the airport according to your individual flight time to take your departure flight and end the pleasant journey. There is no vehicle or Chinese-speaking guide service today, and luggage may be stored at the hotel; note Tenerife has two airports — the southern airport (TFS) is closer to the hotel and the northern airport (TFN) is farther.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，根据酒店规定时间办理退房手续（退房在11:00/12:00之前），随后自由活动。可根据个人航班时间自行前往机场，搭乘航班返回，结束愉快的旅程。当天无用车及中文导游服务，行李可寄存在酒店；特内里费有两个机场，南部机场（TFS）距离酒店较近，北部机场（TFN）距离酒店较远。

meeting_en: Lanzarote (Canary Islands), Spain — guests arrive independently and check in at the seafront 4-star hotel; the guided tour begins after breakfast on Day 2.
meeting_zh: 西班牙加那利群岛兰萨罗特岛——游客自行抵达并入住海滨四星酒店，跟团行程于第2天早餐后开始。

faqs.question_en: Where do we meet on Day 1, and where do we disperse on the last day?
faqs.question_zh: 第一天在哪里集合？最后一天在哪里解散？
faqs.answer_en: On Day 1, after arriving on Lanzarote (or Tenerife) you make your own way to the hotel and check in (check-in after 14:00/15:00); there is no group meeting and no vehicle or Chinese-speaking guide that day, and luggage can be stored at the hotel. On the last day you arrange your own departure after checking out (check-out before 11:00/12:00), again with no vehicle or guide service. Note Tenerife has two airports — the southern airport (TFS) is closer to the hotel, the northern airport (TFN) is farther; contact customer service for any questions about the Tenerife meeting point.
faqs.answer_zh: 第一天根据报名行程抵达兰萨罗特岛（或特内里费岛）后，自行前往酒店办理入住（入住时间在14:00或15:00之后），当天无统一集合、无用车及中文导游服务，行李可寄存到酒店。最后一天根据酒店退房时间（退房在11:00/12:00之前）自行安排，退房后解散，当天同样无用车及中文导游服务，行李可寄存到酒店。特内里费有两个机场，南部机场（TFS）距离酒店较近，北部机场（TFN）距离酒店较远，如有疑问请联系客服沟通特内里费参团地点。

faqs.question_en: What is the climate in the Canary Islands and what should I pack?
faqs.question_zh: 加那利群岛是什么气候？需要带什么衣服？
faqs.answer_en: The Canaries are warm year-round with little seasonal variation (average about 24°C thanks to the warm Western Sahara breeze), but temperatures vary greatly by altitude, in volcanic areas, and between morning and night. High-altitude areas can be cold (Teide can have snow even when Playa de las Américas 60 km away is 30°C). Pack a light jacket, a windbreaker/hardshell, swimwear, sun-protective clothing, sunglasses, a hat and laced hiking shoes; all the tour's hotels have heated pools.
faqs.answer_zh: 加那利群岛常年温暖、四季温差不大（因西哈撒拉暖风流过，全年平均约24度），但海拔区间、火山区域以及早晚的温差都很大。高海拔区域仍会很冷（即使相距60公里的美洲沙滩30度，泰德峰也可能有积雪）。建议携带薄外套、冲锋衣、泳衣、防晒衣、墨镜、帽子和有系带的徒步鞋；旅游团选择的所有酒店都有恒温泳池。

faqs.question_en: Why are laced hiking shoes mandatory on the Teide day?
faqs.question_zh: 登泰德峰为什么一定要求穿有系带的徒步鞋？
faqs.answer_en: The road surface has sharp volcanic rock, so the Teide organizers require laced hiking shoes or you are not allowed on the cable car; you also hike the Cañada Blanca where there is gravel, volcanic rock and thorns. The park strictly bans leather shoes, board shoes, sandals, slippers and all lace-free casual shoes. Both activities happen back-to-back that day, and it can be cold at altitude even when Playa de las Américas is warm.
faqs.answer_zh: 由于路面会有火山石刺脚，泰德峰组织方要求必须穿有系带的徒步鞋，否则不允许乘坐缆车；其次我们会在白色峡谷徒步，那里有碎石、火山石和荆棘，必须穿徒步鞋。景区严格禁止皮鞋、板鞋、凉鞋、拖鞋及无系带休闲鞋等所有其他鞋款，管理方一律禁止上山。当天两项活动前后进行，且高海拔可能产生低温（即使美洲沙滩30度，泰德峰也有积雪）。

faqs.question_en: How far is it from the airport to the hotel?
faqs.question_zh: 机场到酒店大概有多远？
faqs.answer_en: On Lanzarote the airport-to-hotel taxi costs about EUR 10–20; on Tenerife (southern airport) it is about EUR 30–50. There is a taxi rank just outside the airport with no need to book in advance. A business van or a group of 3+ people will be a bit more expensive than a regular taxi.
faqs.answer_zh: 兰岛的机场到酒店约10—20欧元的费用，特岛（南部）机场到酒店约30—50欧元的费用。机场外就是出租车等候点，无需预约；商务车或者3人以上会比普通出租车贵一些。

faqs.question_en: Is the three-islands-in-one-day very tiring? How long are the boat rides?
faqs.question_zh: 一天跳三岛会很累吗？一共坐船多久？
faqs.answer_en: The Gran Canaria–Tenerife ferry is about 2 hours and the Gran Canaria–Fuerteventura ferry about 25 minutes; you cross Fuerteventura over roughly 120 km, visiting 2–3 sights and having lunch at the black-sand beach. If you skip the island-hopping you can fly to the next island's hotel instead, but then you cannot visit Fuerteventura's sights. Ferry times: Gran Canaria–Fuerteventura about 2 hours, Tenerife–Gran Canaria about 1 hour 20 min, Fuerteventura–Lanzarote 25 minutes. (Ferries are large vessels; sit in the lower-deck center if seas are rough.)
faqs.answer_zh: 大岛与特岛之间约2小时渡轮，大岛与富岛之间约25分钟，横穿富岛约120公里，其中在富岛游览2—3个景点，并在黑沙滩享用午餐。如果选择放弃跳岛，可以乘坐航班前往下一个岛的酒店，但无法游览富岛的景点。渡轮时间为：大岛—富岛段约2小时，特岛—大岛段约1小时20分钟，富岛—兰岛段25分钟。（渡轮全部为大型船只，如遇海浪建议坐在船的底层中心位置以缓解晕船。）

faqs.question_en: Can activities be arranged on the evening of the Tenerife round-island day?
faqs.question_zh: 特岛环岛日当天晚上能安排活动吗？
faqs.answer_en: No — on the round-island day you visit three sights (La Laguna, Puerto de la Cruz and the dragon-tree park), have dinner on arrival at the hotel, and it is recommended to explore Playa de las Américas freely after dinner, so no activity is recommended that evening. On the Teide day you return to the hotel around 15:00, so you can book any activity after 16:00.
faqs.answer_zh: 不推荐。环岛日当天游览三个景点（拉拉古纳、克鲁斯港和龙血树公园），到达酒店后享用晚餐，推荐晚餐后自由游览美洲沙滩，因此环岛日不推荐安排任何活动。泰德峰日约15点返回酒店，可以预约16点以后的任何活动。

faqs.question_en: We are not interested in the red Moorish-palace hotel — can we skip it?
faqs.question_zh: 我们对红色摩尔宫殿酒店不感兴趣，是否可以放弃？
faqs.answer_en: Yes — choose product 48, which does not include the red Moorish-palace hotel (the Ritz-Carlton Abama).
faqs.answer_zh: 可以。选择产品48，不含红色摩尔宫殿酒店（丽思卡尔顿阿巴马酒店）。

faqs.question_en: We only have 7 days — can we do the whole itinerary?
faqs.question_zh: 我们只有7天时间，能参加全部行程吗？
faqs.answer_en: Yes. You give up the Tenerife hotel day and the Lanzarote hotel day; contact customer service to drop the Lanzarote hotel and you can apply for a refund. The 7-day version is a complete sightseeing itinerary that misses none of the sights, and you can still relax at and around the hotel each afternoon — though the 8-day version is more leisurely.
faqs.answer_zh: 可以，需要放弃特岛的酒店日和兰岛的酒店日。联系客服放弃兰岛酒店可申请退费。7天行程为完整的游览行程，不会漏过所有景点，并且每天下午依然能在酒店及周围游览；但选择8天行程会更加从容。

faqs.question_en: What does a "hotel day" mean?
faqs.question_zh: 酒店游览日是什么意思？
faqs.answer_en: It means a full day spent at the hotel. On Tenerife the hotel day is at the red Moorish-palace hotel, which has a private beach, marina, sauna and thermal pools. The Lanzarote hotel day is at the Carmen seaside, surrounded by the whole island's resort center with a beach and seafront right in front of the hotel.
faqs.answer_zh: 意思是整整一天在酒店。其中特岛在红色摩尔宫殿酒店游览，有私人沙滩、码头和游览区域，以及桑拿、温泉泳池等设施。兰岛酒店日位于卡门海滨，周围就是整个兰岛的度假中心，酒店门前即是沙滩、海滨。

faqs.question_en: What meals does the tour include?
faqs.question_zh: 旅游团包含什么样的餐饮？
faqs.answer_en: The tour includes 7 nights of featured dinners; the red Moorish-palace hotel does not include dinner (it has several restaurants). The Lanzarote and Tenerife hotels both serve featured dinners with weekly-changing buffets, and on Tenerife, depending on the departure, there may be one Chinese meal and one local-specialty meal.
faqs.answer_zh: 旅游团包含7晚精选晚餐，红色摩尔宫殿不包含晚餐（酒店内有多个餐厅）。其中兰岛和特岛的酒店均为精选晚餐，酒店每周更换不同的自助餐餐食，特岛根据不同的团期可能会选择一次中餐和一次当地特色菜。

faqs.question_en: Are all the island activities included?
faqs.question_zh: 群岛上所有的活动都包含吗？
faqs.answer_en: The 12 signature activities are all included. However, paragliding and evening stargazing are not suitable for everyone and are therefore not included — the itinerary leaves enough free time to join them, and the activity organizers provide hotel pick-up and drop-off.
faqs.answer_zh: 具有特色的12项活动全部包含。但滑翔伞和晚间观星不适合所有人群，因此并未包含；行程留有足够时间可自由游览参加，活动组织方提供酒店接送服务。

faqs.question_en: Will the ferries and whale-watching make me seasick?
faqs.question_zh: 出海观鲸、跳岛渡轮会不会晕船？
faqs.answer_en: The product includes 4 outings at sea. The ferries are all large vessels; in rough seas it is recommended to sit in the lower-deck center to greatly reduce seasickness. Whale-watching uses a small boat, which may cause seasickness, though the rich on-board activity usually keeps it mild — bring motion-sickness medicine if needed. The whale-watching trip is 2 hours, of which about 30 minutes is snorkeling/swimming near the coast.
faqs.answer_zh: 本产品包含4次出海。渡轮全部是大型船只，如遇海浪建议坐在船的底层中心位置，能大幅缓解晕船。出海观鲸为小型船只，可能会晕船，但通常因游览活动丰富，晕船情况不明显，如有必要请提前准备晕船药。出海观鲸为2小时，其中约30分钟在海岸边浮潜游泳。

faqs.question_en: When is the big Canary Islands carnival?
faqs.question_zh: 加那利群岛的大嘉年华是什么时候？
faqs.answer_en: The Santa Cruz de Tenerife Carnival is hailed as the world's second-largest after Rio de Janeiro and is a spectacular seaside street party. Dates: Tenerife (Latin Rhythms theme) 16 Jan – 22 Feb 2027; Gran Canaria (Las Vegas theme) 23 Jan – 1 Mar 2027.
faqs.answer_zh: 圣克鲁斯-德特内里费狂欢节被誉为继巴西里约之后世界第二大狂欢节，场面非常壮观，是一场融合优雅与狂热的海滨街头艺术盛典。日期：特内里费岛（拉丁韵律 Latin Rhythms 主题）2027年1月16日—2月22日；大加那利岛（拉斯维加斯 Las Vegas 主题）2027年1月23日—3月1日。

faqs.question_en: Do I need a visa?
faqs.question_zh: 是否需要签证？
faqs.answer_en: Yes — this product requires a Schengen visa (single or multiple entry) and the visa fee is not included; if you need one, choose a Schengen-visa product. After booking, the full set of materials for the Schengen visa application is provided free (see the detailed checklist), and if you commission us we will buy the Schengen-compliant travel insurance for you. Your passport must be valid for at least 6 months from the date of departure or customs may refuse entry. Visa fees, visa service fees, Schengen insurance fees and visa-center appointment fees are all non-refundable and non-transferable even if the product is changed or cancelled. "Worry-free visa" guarantee: if you sign the contract 61+ days before departure and have not obtained the visa within 45 days before departure, we bear all losses and immediately refund all travel fees; otherwise refunds follow the change-and-cancellation terms. In case of refusal, notify us within 48 hours with the consulate's rejection letter, submit any supplementary/changed materials within 5 days, and do not unilaterally waive the right of visa appeal.
faqs.answer_zh: 需要。本产品需要申根签证（单次或多次入境），不包含签证费用，如需办理请选择申根签证产品。预订后免费提供办理申根签证的全部材料（参考详细材料清单）；若委托我社办理签证，我社将为您购买符合申根要求的申根旅游保险。护照有效期需在离境之日起至少还有六个月，否则海关有权拒绝入境。签证费、签证服务费、申根保险费、签证中心预约费均不可退款，也无法更改使用者，即使产品退改签也无法退款。保签无忧：在出发日前61天与我社签约，如在出发前45天内未获取签证，我社承担所有损失并立即退还全部旅游费用；不符合该条款者按“退改与取消条款”退费。如遇拒签需在48小时内通知我社并出具使领馆拒签函，如需补充或更改材料需在5天内提交，且不得单方面放弃“签证抗辩”权利。

faqs.question_en: Booking, changes & cancellation
faqs.question_zh: 预订、变更与取消须知
faqs.answer_en: Free cancellation: both the operator and traveler may cancel without reason more than 30 days before departure (not counting the 30th day); after the group is confirmed, cancellation follows the change-and-cancellation terms. Group size: this is a shared (join-in) group that forms at 10 people — below that the operator may cancel the tour or an included optional activity (converting it to free time). Connections: because flights, ferries and order can shift, you must arrive 1 day before the tour starts and leave 1 day after it ends, with reasonable flight connection time (5h for a same-airport transfer, 7h for different airports in the same city; reasonable assembly window 07:00–21:00); losses from not doing so are the traveler's own. Rooms: two people booking together default to a standard double (bed type assigned by the hotel, not selectable); triple/family rooms are assigned by the hotel (extra bed, twin+single, double+sofa-bed, etc.) and if unavailable a same-gender share applies; solo travelers pay a single-room supplement deposit that is refunded pro-rata by the share ratio within 5 working days after the tour. All European hotels are non-smoking with 14:00 check-in / 11:00 check-out and are not standardly air-conditioned. Pricing: priced in EUR at booking; if you pay in CNY, the amount is the real-time CNY figure auto-calculated from Bank of China's "EUR sell" rate on the day of payment (refunds likewise use the day's rate, and any exchange/bank fees are the traveler's). Pay promptly to avoid rate increases. Itinerary contingencies: order may be adjusted (e.g. the Tenerife round-island day swapped with the hotel day) without it being a breach; if tides/storms/strikes etc. force a flight to replace the Gran Canaria–Fuerteventura ferry, Fuerteventura is skipped (its free natural sights mean no refund), with extra costs borne by the operator and cost savings refunded pro-rata; weather/volcano alerts may suspend or cancel outdoor activities (cancelled ones are refunded, suspended ones refunded pro-rata per the organizer's notice).
faqs.answer_zh: 免费取消：出发前30天（不含第30天）旅行社和旅行者均可无理由取消；宣布成团后取消按“更改与取消条例条款”承担责任。成团人数：本产品为散客拼团，10人成团，未达10人旅行社有权取消旅游团，团内自费活动未达10人也可能取消并改为“自由活动”。航班衔接：因航变、渡轮取消、罢工及顺序调整，行程时间常有调整，要求旅行者在参团前一天抵达集合地、离团后一天离开集散地，并预留合理衔接时间（同机场转机至少5小时，同城不同机场至少7小时，合理集散时段07:00—21:00），未预留导致的损失由旅行者自行承担。房型：两人同时报名默认标准双人间（床型由酒店安排不可选）；三人间/家庭间由酒店安排（加床、双床+单床、大床+沙发床等），无法安排时同性拼房；单人报名需交单人房差押金，按实际拼房比例在团结束后5个工作日内退还。欧洲酒店全部禁烟，入住14:00、退房11:00，并非以空调为标准设施。价格说明：以欧元计价，如选择人民币支付，则以支付当日中国银行“欧元卖出价”实时换算的人民币价格为准（退款同样适用当日汇率，汇率差及银行手续费由旅行者承担），请及时支付以避免汇率上涨。行程应变：游览前后顺序可能调整（如特内里费环岛日与酒店日对换）不视为违约；如遇潮汐、风暴、罢工等以航班代替大加那利岛—富埃特文图拉岛渡轮，则跳过富岛（自然景区无门票故无退款），费用增加由旅行社承担、减少按比例退还；如遇天气或火山预警，户外活动可能中止或取消（取消者退费，中止者按组织方通知按比例退款）。

faqs.question_en: Health & safety requirements
faqs.question_zh: 健康与安全须知
faqs.answer_en: Please have a health check before travel and do not book if you have: infectious diseases (e.g. active TB, typhoid); cardiovascular disease (severe hypertension, heart failure, myocardial ischemia/infarction); cerebrovascular disease (embolism, hemorrhage, brain tumor); respiratory disease (emphysema, cor pulmonale); mental illness (epilepsy or any psychiatric condition); severe anemia (hemoglobin below 50 g/L); or recovery from major surgery. Pregnancy: at 35 weeks or more you cannot join under any circumstances; at 28 weeks or more a doctor's report within 7 days plus the attending physician's consent is required; under 28 weeks please book with caution, sign a disclaimer, and you cannot join adventure, ski, at-sea, high-altitude or outdoor activities. People with disabilities and travelers over 70 need a doctor's report (within 7 days) plus consent, immediate-family accompaniment, and at least 61 days' advance request for special facilities; this is a long, physically demanding itinerary requiring walking ability. Minors (under 18) must be accompanied by immediate family/guardian and some sights restrict under-18/12/6; infants under 2 are not accepted, and children under 6 / under 30 kg need a confirmed EU-standard safety seat. Children under 6 cannot do paragliding or Teide stargazing. Per Article 15 of the Tourism Law, travelers must truthfully declare health information relevant to the trip (pregnancy, lactation, chronic and infectious diseases, suspected symptoms, recent epidemic-area travel) and follow safety warnings; concealment causing harm or transmission means the traveler bears liability, costs and compensation, and the operator may terminate the contract without refund.
faqs.answer_zh: 请在出行前做一次必要的身体检查，如存在以下情况请勿报名：传染性疾病（如活动期肺结核、伤寒）；心血管疾病（如严重高血压、心功能不全、心肌缺氧、心肌梗塞）；脑血管疾病（如脑栓塞、脑出血、脑肿瘤）；呼吸系统疾病（如肺气肿、肺心病）；精神病（如癫痫及各种精神病）；严重贫血（血红蛋白50克/升以下）；以及大中型手术恢复期患者。孕妇：妊娠35周及以上任何情况下都无法参团；28周及以上需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书；28周以下请慎重报名，需签署免责声明书，且无法参加探险、滑雪、出海、高空、户外等项目。残疾人及70周岁以上老年人需提供7日内体检报告及主治医生同意书、需直系家属陪同，并提前至少61天申请专用设施；本行程较长、对体力要求较高，体力不支者请慎重报名。未成年人（未满18周岁）需由直系亲属或监护人陪同，部分景点对未满18/12/6周岁有特殊限定；不接受2周岁以下婴儿参团，6岁以下或30公斤以下儿童需提前确认符合欧盟标准的安全座椅；6岁以下儿童无法参加滑翔伞与泰德峰观星。根据《旅游法》第15条，旅游者需如实告知与旅游活动相关的个人健康信息（包括妊娠期、哺乳期、慢性病、传染病史、疑似症状或近期疫区旅居史）并遵守安全警示，若因隐瞒导致人身损害或传播风险，旅游者需自行承担医疗、隔离费用及赔偿责任，旅行社可解除合同且不退还费用。

title_en: Denmark & Norway 4-Day Small-Group Tour: Oslo to Copenhagen
title_zh: 丹麦挪威4天跟团游：奥斯陆至哥本哈根
short_en: A one-way Scandinavian journey from Oslo to Copenhagen via Gothenburg, Aalborg and Andersen's fairy-tale town of Odense.
short_zh: 从奥斯陆到哥本哈根的单程斯堪的纳维亚之旅，途经哥德堡、奥尔堡与安徒生童话小镇欧登塞。
desc_en: This 4-day one-way small-group tour links the Scandinavian capitals of Oslo and Copenhagen, threading through Sweden's port city of Gothenburg, the Danish town of Aalborg, and Hans Christian Andersen's fairy-tale hometown of Odense. You'll wander Oslo's Vigeland Sculpture Park and waterfront opera house, cross the Kattegat Strait by ferry, step into 19th-century rural Denmark at the Funen Village open-air museum, and finish among the colourful canal houses of Copenhagen's Nyhavn and the Little Mermaid. Art, architecture, Nordic 'slow living' and fairy-tale charm unfold across four unhurried days.
desc_zh: 这是一条连接斯堪的纳维亚两大首都奥斯陆与哥本哈根的4天单程小团之旅，沿途串联瑞典港口城市哥德堡、丹麦城市奥尔堡，以及安徒生的童话故乡欧登塞。您将漫步奥斯陆的维格兰雕塑公园与海滨歌剧院，乘渡轮横渡卡特加特海峡，在菲英村露天博物馆走进19世纪的丹麦乡村，最后在哥本哈根新港色彩斑斓的运河小屋与小美人鱼像旁结束旅程。艺术、建筑、北欧式的慢生活与童话浪漫，在四天里徐徐展开。

highlights.en: One-way deep route linking the Scandinavian capitals Oslo and Copenhagen
highlights.zh: 单程深度线路，串联斯堪的纳维亚两大首都奥斯陆与哥本哈根

highlights.en: Vigeland Sculpture Park, Oslo's iconic meditation on life and humanity
highlights.zh: 维格兰雕塑公园，奥斯陆以思考生命与人生为主题的标志性艺术地标

highlights.en: Ferry crossing of the Kattegat Strait between Denmark and Sweden
highlights.zh: 乘渡轮横渡卡特加特海峡，往返丹麦与瑞典之间

highlights.en: Andersen's fairy-tale town of Odense, with the Andersen Museum and childhood home
highlights.zh: 安徒生童话小镇欧登塞，参观安徒生博物馆与儿时故居

highlights.en: Funen Village open-air museum recreating 19th-century rural Denmark
highlights.zh: 菲英村露天博物馆，重现19世纪丹麦乡村生活

highlights.en: Copenhagen highlights: the Little Mermaid, Nyhavn and Amalienborg Palace
highlights.zh: 哥本哈根经典：小美人鱼像、新港与阿美琳堡宫

highlights.en: Brand-name city-centre 4-star hotels, perfect for evening strolls and dining
highlights.zh: 入住品牌连锁市区4星级酒店，方便夜间自由漫步与用餐

highlights.en: All-inclusive pricing with attraction tickets and ferry included, no forced shopping
highlights.zh: 一价全含，含景点门票与渡轮，无强制购物

includes.en: Hotels: 3 nights in 4-star hotels (Norway has abolished its hotel star rating; star levels refer to the standards on Booking or Ctrip).
includes.zh: 【酒店】四星级酒店3晚。（挪威酒店取消星级评定，酒店星级参考Booking或携程的酒店星级标准）

includes.en: Meals: 3 Scandinavian-style hotel buffet breakfasts.
includes.zh: 【餐饮】斯堪的纳维亚式酒店自助早餐3餐。

includes.en: Operations: in-itinerary operating costs such as tourist city tax, city entry fees, residence tax, road and bridge tolls, parking and fuel fees, and driver/guide meal allowances.
includes.zh: 【执行】游客城市税、进城费、居住税、过路过桥费、停车燃油费、司导餐补等行程内执行费用。

includes.en: Vehicle: tourist coach or tourist business vehicle.
includes.zh: 【车辆】旅游巴士或旅游商务车。

includes.en: Guide: professional driver + Chinese-speaking guide, or a Chinese driver-guide throughout (note: for groups of 8 or fewer, a business vehicle + Chinese-speaking driver-guide is arranged).
includes.zh: 【导游】职业司机+中文导游或者全程中文华人司机兼导游（备注：8人及以下则安排为商务旅行车+中文司机兼导游）。

includes.en: Luggage: 1 piece of checked luggage up to 23 kg plus 1 carry-on bag.
includes.zh: 【行李】1件23公斤行李及1件随身行李。

includes.en: Tickets: Andersen Museum, Andersen's childhood home, Funen Village, the Frederikshavn-to-Gothenburg ferry, and Vigeland Sculpture Park.
includes.zh: 【门票】安徒生博物馆、安徒生兒时故居、菲英村、腓特烈港到哥德堡渡轮、维格兰雕塑公园。

excludes.en: Passport: personal passport costs.
excludes.zh: 护照：个人护照费用。

excludes.en: Visa: tourist visa fees required for the countries on the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 签证：行程中所列旅游国家所需的观光签证费用。

excludes.en: Insurance: travel insurance costs (if the itinerary involves high-risk sports, verify whether your travel insurance covers them).
excludes.zh: 保险：旅游保险费用；（如行程内涉及到高风险运动，请核实旅游保险是否包含该项运动）。

excludes.en: Tips: guide and driver tips totalling EUR 10 per person per day, same price for adults and children.
excludes.zh: 小费：游客支付导游和司机小费一共10欧/人/天，大小同价。

excludes.en: Meals: apart from any special meals included in the itinerary, lunch and dinner are not included.
excludes.zh: 餐饮：除行程内包含的特色餐外，行程中不包含午、晚正餐费用。

excludes.en: Tickets: sights not marked as included (including but not limited to those marked "exterior", "recommended", "optional", "experience" and any other items not stated as included); please pay on your own if you wish to enter.
excludes.zh: 门票：行程中未注明费用包含的景点（包括但不仅限于行程中注明“外观”的景点，“推荐”、“可选”、“体验”等等所有未提及费用包含的项目，如游客需要参观，敬请自理）。

excludes.en: Extended stays: any accommodation, transport and sightseeing extended beyond the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 延长住宿：行程外额外延长的住宿、交通、观光费用。

excludes.en: Personal spending: drinks/alcohol, taxis, phone charges and other personal expenses.
excludes.zh: 私人消费：如饮料酒类、出租车、电话费等个人消费。

excludes.en: Other transport: transport not mentioned in the inclusions beyond the included business vehicle or minibus, such as a Venice gondola, and sightseeing trains or electric taxis in vehicle-restricted zones, to be paid on your own.
excludes.zh: 其他交通：除包含商务旅行车或者中巴之外，费用包含中未提及的其他交通费用，如威尼斯贡多拉，以及车辆限行区的观光火车、电瓶出租车等费用敬请自理。

excludes.en: Free-time activities: night-time self-guided touring and recommended projects in the itinerary, plus any resulting transport, meals, tickets, shopping etc.
excludes.zh: 自由活动：游客夜间自行游览及行程中的推荐项目，以及产生的交通、餐饮、门票、购物等费用。

excludes.en: Experience activities: any travel experience activities in the itinerary that are not included.
excludes.zh: 体验活动：行程中的没有包含的各项旅游体验活动。

excludes.en: Other costs: any costs not mentioned in the inclusions. For force majeure such as natural disaster, war or strikes, or special situations such as traffic delays, flight cancellations/reschedules, embassy visa delays or insufficient numbers, or other extra costs not caused by us (e.g. overseas visa-extension fees, board, food and transport, national airfare adjustments), we reserve the right to charge the price difference.
excludes.zh: 其他费用：费用包含中未提及的费用。如因天灾、战争、罢工等不可抗力的原因，及因交通延阻、航班取消或更改时间、使馆延误出签证、人数不足等特殊情况或其他非我公司原因所引致的额外费（如在外延期签证费、住、食及交通费、国家航空运价调整等），我公司有权追加差价。

timeline.title_en: Oslo - Gothenburg: Nordic slow living, an art pilgrimage and harbour stroll
timeline.title_zh: 奥斯陆 - 哥德堡：北欧式的慢生活，艺术巡礼与海港漫步
timeline.description_en: Meet at 11:00 in central Oslo, the Norwegian capital, and visit Oslo City Hall (exterior), the venue where the Nobel Peace Prize is awarded; this red-brick building was completed in 1950 to mark Oslo's 900th anniversary and its halls display works by 323 artists tracing Norway's history and life. Watch the changing of the guard outside the Royal Palace (exterior), built 1825-1848 and the working office of the king, set on high ground facing Karl Johans gate. Continue to the medieval Akershus Fortress (exterior), built in 1299 next to the City Hall, then the glacier-like modern Oslo Opera House (exterior) on the Oslofjord, whose sloping white marble roof you are warmly encouraged to walk up for sweeping fjord-city views. Finally explore Vigeland Sculpture Park, named after Gustav Vigeland, with 192 sculptures and some 650 figures all built around the theme of human life. Afterwards drive to the Swedish west-coast harbour city of Gothenburg and check in. Overnight: Quality Hotel Gothenburg or an equivalent 4-star hotel, a 21-storey waterfront building with 360-degree views and Scandinavian-designed rooms.
timeline.description_zh: 上午11:00在挪威首都奥斯陆市区集合，前往参观诺贝尔和平奖颁奖地——奥斯陆市政厅（外观）；这座砖红色建筑于1950年为庆祝奥斯陆建城900年而建成，内部多个大厅展出323位艺术家的作品，全面展示挪威的历史与生活。在皇宫（外观）外观看卫兵换岗，皇宫建于1825至1848年，是国王的办公地，建在高地上正对卡尔·约翰大街。之后游览建于1299年、坐落于市政厅旁的中世纪城堡——阿克斯胡斯城堡（外观），再前往如同冰川般、正对奥斯陆峡湾的现代建筑——奥斯陆歌剧院（外观），强烈推荐走上其白色斜坡状屋顶俯瞰峡湾城市风光。最后参观以著名雕塑家古斯塔夫·维格兰命名、共有192座雕塑约650个人物、全部围绕“人生”主题的维格兰雕塑公园。结束后前往瑞典西海岸海港城市哥德堡入住。夜宿：哥德堡品质酒店或同等4星级酒店——一座21层的水畔建筑，可饱览360度景色，客房均为斯堪的纳维亚设计。

timeline.title_en: Gothenburg - Frederikshavn - Aalborg: Stepping into a canvas blending the ancient and the modern
timeline.title_zh: 哥德堡 - 腓特烈港 - 奥尔堡：踏入一幅融入古今色彩的画卷
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, freely explore Gothenburg: Masthugget Church (exterior), completed in 1914 on a hillside with a 60-metre bell tower and counted, together with the Lipstick building and the Poseidon statue, as one of the city's three landmarks; the Poseidon statue (completed 1931), a symbol of Sweden's maritime age; and Avenyn, the main boulevard lined with shops, cafes and restaurants, ending at the Poseidon statue and the Gothenburg Museum of Art. Then board the ferry at Gothenburg's port to cross the Kattegat to Frederikshavn (roughly a 3.5-hour crossing with onboard shops, bars and the famous shrimp sandwich). After a short rest in Frederikshavn, continue to Aalborg, where you freely visit the city's sights: Aalborg Castle (exterior), a 16th-century defensive fortress that later became a Danish royal residence; Budolfi Church, one of Aalborg's most important churches, a 14th-century Gothic landmark with a fine organ and stained glass; and the fairytale-like Duus old lane and pedestrian street, lined with colourful low houses and 16th-19th century brick-and-timber buildings full of shops, food, cafes and art. Overnight: Scandic Aalborg or an equivalent 4-star hotel in the city centre, steps from shops and dining.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后自由参观哥德堡：马斯塔盖特教堂（外观），1914年竣工，坐落于小山坡上，拥有60多米高的钟楼，与口红楼、海王波塞冬雕像并称哥德堡三大地标；海神波赛东雕塑（1931年完成），是瑞典海上霸权与航海时代的象征；以及Avenyn大道——哥德堡市中心的主干道，两旁满是商铺、咖啡馆与餐厅，尽头是波塞冬雕像和哥德堡艺术博物馆。之后在哥德堡港口乘坐渡轮横渡卡特加特海峡前往腓特烈港（约3.5小时，船上有商店、酒吧和著名的虾肉三明治）。在腓特烈港短暂休息后前往奥尔堡，抵达后自由参观市区景点：奥尔堡城堡（外观），建于16世纪、原为防御要塞、后成为丹麦王室官邸；Budolfi教堂，奥尔堡最重要的教堂之一，14世纪哥特式建筑，拥有精致管风琴与彩绘玻璃；以及童话般的杜赫芬老街和步行街，色彩斑斓的低矮房屋与16至19世纪砖木建筑林立，集购物、美食、咖啡与艺术于一体。夜宿：奥尔堡斯堪迪克酒店或同等4星级酒店，位于市中心，门口即是商店与购物中心。

timeline.title_en: Aalborg - Odense - Copenhagen: Into Andersen's town, becoming a character from a fairytale
timeline.title_zh: 奥尔堡 - 欧登塞 - 哥本哈根：走进安徒生小镇，当童话里的人物
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, drive to Odense, the fairytale town of Hans Christian Andersen. Visit the Andersen Museum and his birthplace and St. Canute's Cathedral; the Andersen Museum's new building, designed by Japanese architect Kengo Kuma and opened in 2021, has two-thirds of its space underground with a maze-like green garden above, 18 themed rooms displaying over 2,000 manuscripts, letters, drawings and personal items (including Andersen's patched old suitcase, top hat and cane), and a multimedia room where you can hear his tales in 96 languages from 68 countries. His childhood home at Munkemollestraede 3 is a tiny 18-square-metre yellow house where Andersen was born in 1805 and spent his childhood among society's poorest. St. Canute's Cathedral is a 14th-century Gothic cathedral with a pure-white interior, a Rococo pulpit, a dazzling 16th-century altar carving and over 300 sculptures, and is where King Knud (killed in 1086) is buried. Then experience 19th-century Danish country life at the Funen Village open-air museum, a complete reconstructed village of 18th- and 19th-century rural buildings with livestock pens, a duck pond, apple trees and gardens. In the afternoon continue to Copenhagen and check in. Overnight: AC Marriott Copenhagen or Scandic Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel, near the Bella Center, with a rooftop restaurant/bar on the 23rd floor at 76 metres.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往安徒生童话小镇欧登塞，参观安徒生博物馆和故居、圣克努特教堂；安徒生博物馆2021年由日本建筑大师隈研吾设计的新馆开幕，建筑三分之二位于地下，地上是迷宫般的绿意花园，18间主题陈列室展出2000余件手稿、信件、画稿及私人物品（包括安徒生那只有补丁的旧皮箱、礼帽、手杖），多媒体室可聆听68国96种语言的安徒生童话译本。安徒生兒时故居位于蒙基莫莱街3号，是一座仅18平方米的黄色小屋，安徒生1805年在此诞生并度过童年，周边多为社会最底层的居民。圣克努德教堂为建于14世纪的哥特式大教堂，内部纯白，有洛可可式讲道坛、令人眼花缭乱的16世纪圣坛雕刻及300多个雕塑作品，丹麦国王Knud（1086年遇刺）即葬于此。之后在菲英村露天博物馆体验19世纪的丹麦乡村生活——这是以18、19世纪鄉村建筑为原型重建的完整复古村庄，有畜栏、养鸭塘、苹果树和花园。下午前往哥本哈根入住。夜宿：哥本哈根AC万豪酒店或斯堪迪克酒店或同等4星级酒店，毗邻贝拉中心，设有位于23层76米高空的屋顶餐厅兼酒吧。

timeline.title_en: Copenhagen: The perfect meeting of a fairytale kingdom and a design capital
timeline.title_zh: 哥本哈根：童话王国与设计之都的完美邂逅
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, visit the symbol of Denmark, the Little Mermaid statue on the harbour rocks of Langelinie Park (commissioned in 1909 by Carl Jacobsen and sculpted in 1912 by Edvard Eriksen, based on Andersen's tale); the magnificent Gefion Fountain, as famous as the Little Mermaid, depicting the goddess Gefion driving four oxen; and the star-shaped Renaissance Kastellet five-pointed fortress, now an active military base where visitors may only photograph public areas. Watch the royal guard and the changing of the guard at Amalienborg Palace (exterior), keeping the requested 1.5-metre distance from the guards. In the afternoon visit Frederik's Church (exterior), also known as the Marble Church for its heavy use of Danish and Norwegian marble, with its great copper-green dome (begun 1779, completed 1894); the Round Tower (Rundetaarn, exterior), Europe's oldest functioning observatory built by Christian IV as part of the Trinitatis complex; the Royal Danish Library, Copenhagen's waterfront landmark clad in black granite and known as the Black Diamond; the colourful harbour landmark of Nyhavn (a canal built 1669-1673 lined with 17th-18th century houses, bars and cafes); and Europe's famous shopping pedestrian street, Stroget. The trip ends after all visits are complete. No hotel accommodation on this final day.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，参观丹麦的象征小美人鱼雕像——位于长堤公园港口岩石上（1909年受嘉士伯之子卡尔·雅各布森委托、1912年由雕塑家爱德华·艾瑞克森根据安徒生童话雕塑）；气势磅礴、与小美人鱼齐名的吉菲昂女神喷泉，由女神驱赶四头牛犁地的铜塑组成；以及文艺复兴时期星形要塞之一——卡斯特雷特五角要塞，如今为丹麦现役军事基地，游客只可在公共区域参观拍照。在阿美琳堡宫（外观）广场欣赏王室气派与皇家卫队换岗风采，与卫兵合影请保持1.5米距离。下午参观腓特烈教堂（外观），因大量使用丹麦和挪威大理石又名“大理石教堂”，拥有铜绿色巨大圆顶（始建于1779年，1894年竣工）；欧洲古老且仍在使用的天文台——圆塔（Rundetårn，外观），由克里斯钦四世修建、是三一教堂建筑群的一部分；哥本哈根的“黑钻石”——丹麦皇家图书馆，表面覆盖黑色花岗岩的滨水标志性建筑；著名地标之一新港（建于1669至1673年的人工运河，两旁是17、18世纪彩色房屋、酒吧与咖啡馆）；以及欧洲著名的购物步行街斯楚格街。所有参观完成后结束美好旅程。最后一天无酒店住宿。

meeting_en: Central Oslo, Norway. Group meets at 11:00 on Day 1 in the Oslo city centre.
meeting_zh: 挪威奥斯陆市区。第1天上午11:00在奥斯陆市区集合。

faqs.question_en: What are the meeting and dispersal times and places?
faqs.question_zh: 集合和集散的时间和地点是怎样的？
faqs.answer_en: Route A: meet at 11:00 in central Oslo; disperse in the afternoon of the last day in central Copenhagen. Route B: meet at 10:00 in central Copenhagen; disperse on the last day in central Oslo. For both routes, flights that land in Copenhagen on the joining day, or that depart Copenhagen on the ending day, are not recommended.
faqs.answer_zh: A线路：集合地点为当天上午11:00在奥斯陆市区集合，解散地点为行程最后一天下午在哥本哈根市中心。B线路：集合地点为当天上午10:00在哥本哈根市中心，解散地点为行程最后一天在奥斯陆市中心。两条线路均不推荐参团当天降落哥本哈根的航班，以及结束当天离开哥本哈根的航班。

faqs.question_en: How do I get to Copenhagen Airport?
faqs.question_zh: 如何前往哥本哈根机场？
faqs.answer_en: Copenhagen Airport (CPH) is about 8 km from the city centre. The most cost-effective option is the metro, with a direct line from the centre to the airport (about 15-20 minutes, single fare 30 Danish kroner, line M2). Taxis are picked up at the taxi rank outside the terminal; a taxi from the city centre to the airport costs roughly 250-350 Danish kroner.
faqs.answer_zh: 哥本哈根机场（CPH）距离市中心约8公里。推荐性价比高的地铁，市中心线路直达机场，约15-20分钟，单程票价30丹麦克朗，乘坐M2线。出租车在航站楼外的候客点上车，从市中心到机场的费用大约在250-350丹麦克朗之间。

faqs.question_en: Can I swim in the sea or fjord during the trip?
faqs.question_zh: 行程中可以下海或峡湾游泳吗？
faqs.answer_en: Most hotels are in city commercial centres, and the sea is generally within walking distance, so you can stroll along the shore during free evening time. However, Norway's sea water is not suitable for swimming; we suggest using the hotel's indoor pool instead.
faqs.answer_zh: 行程中的酒店大多数在城市商业中心，步行一般都可以到达海边，晚上自由活动时间可选择漫步海边，但是挪威的海水温度不适宜下水游泳，建议使用酒店内的室内游泳池。

faqs.question_en: My English isn't good — can I manage during free time?
faqs.question_zh: 我的英文不好，我有能力自由活动吗？
faqs.answer_en: The hotels are located around the sightseeing areas, so walking to and from is no problem. If you are worried about the language but want a deeper local experience, you can pair up with fellow travellers, and there are plenty of group members in the surrounding area each day.
faqs.answer_zh: 酒店位于游览景区的周边，步行往返没有任何问题。如果担心语言问题又希望深度体验当地人文，可以与其他团友结伴同行，并且每天都有大量团友在周边活动。

faqs.question_en: There are some sights I don't want to enter — can I get a refund?
faqs.question_zh: 行程内的部分景点我不想进去，可以退费吗？
faqs.answer_en: You may spend free time around the sight, but you must return to the meeting point at the agreed time, and no refund can be given.
faqs.answer_zh: 您可以在景点周边自由活动，但需要在约定的时间内到集合地点，并且无法退费。

faqs.question_en: What will I eat locally?
faqs.question_zh: 我在当地吃什么？
faqs.answer_en: Norwegians are expert at fish and seafood — commonly salmon and cod plus other seasonal seafood, and notably Norwegian reindeer meat. The cities en route have abundant local cuisine and seafood fish markets; even the street snacks are memorable. Most travellers won't miss the local food, and the guide also introduces and recommends local restaurants.
faqs.answer_zh: 挪威人吃鱼和海鲜比较专业，常见的是三文鱼和鳕鱼以及其他时令海鲜，另外比较有特色的是挪威的驯鹿肉。途经的城市里有繁多的特色餐饮，或是卖海鲜的鱼市，街边小吃也让人流连忘返，多数游客不会错过当地美食，同时导游也会给予大家当地餐厅的介绍和推荐。

faqs.question_en: Where are the staff from?
faqs.question_zh: 工作人员是哪里的？
faqs.answer_en: The guide is a Chinese-speaking guide who provides Chinese-language service throughout.
faqs.answer_zh: 导游为中文导游，全程提供中文服务。

faqs.question_en: Do I need a visa?
faqs.question_zh: 是否需要签证？
faqs.answer_en: Yes — this product requires a Schengen visa (single or multiple entry) and the visa fee is NOT included; if you need to apply, please choose a Schengen-visa product. After booking we provide all the materials for applying for the Schengen visa for free (see the detailed materials checklist). Your passport must be valid for at least six months from the date of departure, otherwise customs may refuse entry.
