Visa fees, visa service fees, Schengen insurance fees and visa-centre appointment fees are all non-refundable and cannot be transferred to another person, even if the product is changed or cancelled. "Worry-free visa" guarantee: for travellers who sign with us at least 61 days before departure, if the visa is not obtained within 45 days before departure, we bear all losses and immediately refund the full travel cost; travellers who do not meet this clause and fail to obtain the visa are refunded per the change & cancellation terms. A refusal must be notified to us within 48 hours with the embassy's refusal letter, and any supplementary/changed materials must be submitted within five days.
faqs.answer_zh: 需要。本产品需要申根签证（单次或多次入境），且不包含签证费用，如需办理请选择申根签证产品。预定后我社免费提供办理申根签证的全部材料（参考详细材料清单）。护照有效期需在离境之日起至少还有六个月，否则海关有权拒绝入境。签证费、签证服务费、申根保险费、签证中心预约费均不可退款，也无法更改使用者，即使产品退改签，签证费用亦无法退款。保签无忧：游客在出发日前61天与我社签约，如在出发前45天内未获取签证，我社承担所有损失并立即退还全部旅游费用；不符合该条款且未正常获取签证的游客，按“退改与取消条款”退费。如遇拒签需在48小时内通知我社并出具使领馆拒签函，如需补充或更改材料需在五天内提交。

faqs.question_en: Booking, changes & cancellation
faqs.question_zh: 预订、变更与取消须知
faqs.answer_en: Free cancellation: for group-tour products, both the agency and the traveller may cancel without reason more than 30 days before departure (the 30th day not included). This is a shared/joined group tour with a stated group size of 10 people to depart — if the minimum is not reached 30 days before departure either side may cancel, and if not reached 14 days before, you may choose another departure/product or a refund. Itinerary contingency: because of frequent flight changes, traffic congestion, ferry cancellations, strikes/marches or order optimisation, the actual arrival times and visiting order may change; travellers must therefore arrive at the meeting point at least one day before the joining date and leave the dispersal point one day after the ending date (allow at least 5 hours for connections at the same airport, 7 hours between different airports in the same city; reasonable meet/disperse window is 07:00-21:00). Rooms: two people booking together default to a standard twin (bed type assigned by the hotel, cannot be specified — may be a double or twin); single travellers default to paying a single-room supplement unless they request room-sharing; triple/family rooms default to two parents + one minor with hotel-assigned bed types. All European hotels are non-smoking, check-in 14:00 / check-out 11:00, and air conditioning is not a standard feature. Pricing: all pricing is quoted in EUR at booking; if you pay in CNY, the amount is calculated automatically from the Bank of China "EUR selling price" real-time exchange rate on the day of payment (refunds likewise use the rate on the refund-application day, and exchange differences or bank fees are borne by the traveller). Payment does not equal confirmation — orders need second confirmation by the group operator within 48 hours (auto-refund if not confirmed), so book at least 14 days ahead and do not buy connecting flights/hotels before confirmation.
faqs.answer_zh: 免费取消：跟团游产品出发前30天（不含第30天）旅行社和旅行者均可无理由取消。本产品为散客拼团，公布的成团人数为10人——出发前30天未达成团人数双方均可解约，若出发前14天仍未达最低成团人数，可改选其他组团方式/产品或退还旅游费用。行程应变：因航变频繁、交通拥堵、渡轮取消、罢工游行或顺序优化调整，实际到达时间与游览顺序可能变动，故要求旅游者在参团日前一天抵达集合地、离团日后一天离开集散地（同机场转机至少预留5小时，同城不同机场至少7小时，合理集散时段为07:00至21:00）。房型：两人同时报名默认标准双人间（床型由酒店安排，不可指定，可能为大床或双床）；单人报名默认含单房差，除非备注要求拼房；三人/家庭间默认两位父母与一位未成年儿童入住，床型由酒店安排。欧洲所有酒店禁烟，入住14:00、退房11:00，且不以空调为标准设施。价格：所有定价以欧元为预订计价单位，如选人民币支付，则以当天支付时本网站依据中国银行实时“欧元卖出价”自动计算的人民币价格为准（退款同样适用申请退款当日汇率，汇率差异或银行手续费由旅行者承担）。支付不等于确认行程，订单需组团社在48小时内二次确认（超时未确认默认自动退款），建议至少提前14天预订，未获确认前请勿预订衔接机票及酒店。

faqs.question_en: Health & safety requirements
faqs.question_zh: 健康与安全须知
faqs.answer_en: To prevent personal injury, please have a necessary health check before departure and DO NOT book if you have any of the following: infectious diseases (e.g. active tuberculosis, typhoid); cardiovascular disease (e.g. severe hypertension, cardiac insufficiency, myocardial ischemia, myocardial infarction); cerebrovascular disease (e.g. cerebral embolism, cerebral haemorrhage, brain tumour); respiratory disease (e.g. emphysema, cor pulmonale); psychiatric conditions including epilepsy; severe anaemia (haemoglobin below 50 g/L); or recovery period after major/medium surgery. Pregnancy: travel is not possible at all from week 35; from week 28 a doctor's report within 7 days plus the attending physician's consent is required; below week 28 please book with caution, sign the agency's disclaimer, and you cannot join any adventure/skiing/sea/high-altitude/outdoor activities. Disabled travellers: doctor's report within 7 days + attending physician's consent, accompaniment by a direct family member, and application at least 61 days in advance for reserved places and facilities. Elderly travellers (over 70): health certificate and physical exam report, accompaniment by a direct family member (or sign the disclaimer if not available); the trip is long and demands good walking ability and stamina, so those lacking fitness should book with caution. Minors (under 18) must be accompanied by a direct relative or guardian; some sights have special rules for those under 18/12/6; infants under 6 or children under 30 kg need a confirmed safety seat (otherwise bring an EU-compliant one); unaccompanied minors need parental authorisation. Infants under 2 are not accepted. Per Article 15 of the Tourism Law, travellers must truthfully declare health information relevant to the activity (including pregnancy, breastfeeding, chronic illness, infectious-disease history, suspected symptoms or recent travel to epidemic areas) and follow safety warnings; concealment leading to harm makes the traveller liable for the resulting losses, medical/isolation costs and compensation.
faqs.answer_zh: 为确保顺利出行、防止旅途中发生人身意外，请在出行前做一次必要的身体检查，如存在下列情况请勿报名：传染性疾病患者（如活动期肺结核、伤寒）；心血管疾病患者（如严重高血压、心功能不全、心肌缺氧、心肌梗塞）；脑血管疾病患者（如脑栓塞、脑出血、脑肿瘤）；呼吸系统疾病患者（如肺气肿、肺心病）；精神病患者（含癫痫及各种精神病）；严重贫血患者（血红蛋白水平在50克/升以下）；大中型手术恢复期患者。孕妇：妊娠第35周及以上在任何情况下均无法参团；妊娠第28周及以上需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书；妊娠第28周以下请慎重报名，需签署旅行社免责声明书，且无法参加探险、滑雪、出海、高空、户外等项目。残疾人：需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书、需直系家属陪同、并提前至少61天申请预留位置及专用配套设施。老年旅游者（70周岁以上）：需提供健康证明与体检报告、需直系家属陪同（无法提供则签署免责声明书）；因行程较长、对步行能力与体力要求较高，体力不支者请慎重报名。未成年旅游者（未满18周岁）须由直系亲属或监护人陪同，部分景点对未满18/12/6周岁有特殊限定；6岁以下婴儿或30公斤以下儿童需提前确认安全座椅（未确认需自备符合欧盟制式的座椅）；无父母陪同的未成年人须持父母授权书；本产品不接受2周岁以下婴儿参团。根据《旅游法》第15条，旅游者需如实告知与旅游活动相关的个人健康信息（包括妊娠期、哺乳期、慢性病、传染病史、疑似症状或近期疫区旅居史）并遵守安全警示规定，若因隐瞒导致人身损害或财产损失，旅游者须自行承担相应损失、医疗隔离费用及赔偿责任。

title_en: Norway Fjords in Depth: 8-Day Small-Group Tour from Copenhagen
title_zh: 挪威峡湾深度8天小团游（哥本哈根往返）
short_en: Fly into Norway and journey one-way through its greatest fjords, glaciers and clifftops over 8 days, returning to Copenhagen.
short_zh: 8天单程深度畅游挪威最壮丽的峡湾、冰川与悬崖奇石，哥本哈根航班往返，效率与美景兼得。
desc_en: An 8-day one-way journey through the heart of Norway's fjordland, beginning with a flight from Copenhagen to the millennium-old Viking city of Trondheim and ending with an art-and-architecture stroll through Oslo. Along the way you cross the iconic Atlantic Ocean Road, cruise the UNESCO-listed Geirangerfjord, walk to the blue ice of Briksdal Glacier, ride the world-famous Flam mountain railway, and hike to the legendary Preikestolen (Pulpit Rock) high above Lysefjord. With domestic flights and scenic rail included, fjord-view hotels and city-centre 4-star stays, and all six signature experiences pre-booked, it is an efficient, all-inclusive deep dive into western Norway.
desc_zh: 8天单程贯穿挪威峡湾腹地的深度旅程：从哥本哈根飞抵千年维京古城特隆赫姆开篇，以奥斯陆的艺术与建筑漫步收尾。沿途驰骋摄影圣地大西洋之路，乘船巡游世界遗产盖朗厄尔峡湾，徒步抵达布里克斯达尔冰川的蓝冰前沿，搭乘世界闻名的弗洛姆高山火车，并登顶吕瑟峡湾之上的传奇布道石。内陆机票与景观火车全包，入住峡湾特色景观酒店与市区四星级酒店，六大特色体验提前预订，是一次高效而全包的挪威西部深度之旅。

highlights.en: Cruise the UNESCO-listed Geirangerfjord past the Seven Sisters and Suitor waterfalls
highlights.zh: 乘船巡游世界遗产盖朗厄尔峡湾，近距离观赏七姐妹瀑布与求婚者瀑布

highlights.en: Drive the Atlantic Ocean Road, named one of the world's great road-trip routes
highlights.zh: 驰骋摄影师朝圣的大西洋之路，世界级公路旅行目的地之一

highlights.en: Walk to the blue ice of Briksdal Glacier aboard an open-top troll car
highlights.zh: 乘精灵敞篷车徒步至布里克斯达尔冰川蓝冰前沿

highlights.en: Ride the world-famous Flam mountain railway, one of Europe's top scenic rail journeys
highlights.zh: 搭乘世界闻名的弗洛姆陡峭高山火车，欧洲十大观光铁路之一

highlights.en: Hike to Preikestolen (Pulpit Rock) for breathtaking views over Lysefjord
highlights.zh: 徒步登顶布道石，俯瞰吕瑟峡湾令人窒息的壮阔美景

highlights.en: Explore the millennium-old Viking city of Trondheim and the World Heritage Bryggen in Bergen
highlights.zh: 探访千年维京古城特隆赫姆，打卡卑尔根世界遗产布吕根

highlights.en: Domestic flights and scenic rail included, with a one-way deep route for maximum sightseeing efficiency
highlights.zh: 内陆机票与景观火车全包，单程深度线路大幅提高游览效率

highlights.en: Licensed Chinese-speaking guide-driver, fjord-view and city-centre 4-star hotels, no forced shopping
highlights.zh: 中文司导全程随行，峡湾景观酒店+市区四星级酒店，全程无强制购物

includes.en: [Flights] Route A includes round-trip taxed domestic flights Copenhagen-Trondheim and Oslo-Copenhagen; Route B includes Copenhagen-Oslo and Trondheim-Copenhagen.
includes.zh: 【机票】A线路包含：哥本哈根-特隆赫姆和奥斯陆-哥本哈根的内陆含税机票；B线路包含：哥本哈根-奥斯陆和特隆赫姆-哥本哈根的内陆含税机票。

includes.en: [Hotels] 5 nights in 4-star hotels and 2 nights in characterful fjord-view hotels. (Norway has abolished official star ratings; hotel stars refer to the Booking.com or Ctrip rating standard.)
includes.zh: 【酒店】四星级酒店5晚，峡湾特色景观酒店2晚。（挪威酒店取消星级评定，酒店星级参考Booking或携程的酒店星级标准）

includes.en: [Meals] 9 meals in total: 1 Norwegian specialty fish dinner, 1 buffet dinner, and 7 Scandinavian breakfasts.
includes.zh: 【餐饮】1餐挪威特色鱼餐、1餐自助晚餐以及7次斯堪坦尼亚式早餐，共计9餐。

includes.en: [Operating costs] In-itinerary operating fees such as tourist city tax, city-entry fees, residence tax, road and bridge tolls, parking and fuel fees, and guide-driver meal allowances.
includes.zh: 【执行】游客城市税、进城费、居住税、过路过桥费、停车燃油费、司导餐补等行程内执行费用。

includes.en: [Vehicle] Tourist coach or tourist business van.
includes.zh: 【车辆】旅游巴士或旅游商务车。

includes.en: [Guide] A professional driver plus a Chinese-speaking guide, or a Chinese driver-guide throughout (note: groups of 8 or fewer are arranged with a business van plus a Chinese-speaking driver-guide).
includes.zh: 【导游】职业司机+中文导游或者全程中文华人司机兼导游（备注：8人及以下则安排为商务旅行车+中文司机兼导游）。

includes.en: [Baggage] 1 piece of 23 kg checked luggage and 1 piece of hand luggage.
includes.zh: 【行李】1件23公斤行李及1件随身行李。

includes.en: [Tickets] 6 experience items: Preikestolen hike with guide service, Fløibanen funicular up Mount Fløyen, Flåm mountain railway train ticket, Briksdal Glacier, open-top troll car, and Geirangerfjord cruise.
includes.zh: 【门票】布道石徒步及向导服务、弗罗伊恩山缆车、弗洛姆高山列车火车票、布里克斯达尔冰川、精灵敞篷车、蓋朗厄尔峡湾游船，共6项体验项目。

excludes.en: Passport: personal passport fees.
excludes.zh: 护照：个人护照费用。

excludes.en: Visa: tourist visa fees required for the countries listed in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 签证：行程中所列旅游国家所需的观光签证费用。

excludes.en: Insurance: travel insurance fees (if the itinerary involves high-risk sports, please verify whether your travel insurance covers them).
excludes.zh: 保险：旅游保险费用；（如行程内涉及到高风险运动，请核实旅游保险是否包含该项运动）。

excludes.en: Tips: guests pay a total of EUR 10 per person per day in tips to the guide and driver, same price for adults and children.
excludes.zh: 小费：游客支付导游和司机小费一共10欧/人/天，大小同价。

excludes.en: Meals: apart from the specialty meals included in the itinerary, lunches and dinners are not included.
excludes.zh: 餐饮：除行程内包含的特色餐外，行程中不包含午、晚正餐费用。

excludes.en: Tickets: attractions not stated as fee-included (including but not limited to sights marked "exterior", "recommended", "optional", "experience" and any item not stated as included); if you wish to visit them, please pay on your own.
excludes.zh: 门票：行程中未注明费用包含的景点（包括，但不仅限于行程中注明“外观”的景点，“推荐”、“可选”、“体验”等等所有未提及费用包含的项目，如游客需要参观，敬请自理）。

excludes.en: Extended stays: extra accommodation, transport and sightseeing costs beyond the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 延长住宿：行程外额外延长的住宿、交通、观光费用。

excludes.en: Personal spending: such as drinks and alcohol, taxis, phone charges and other personal consumption.
excludes.zh: 私人消费：如饮料酒类、出租车、电话费等个人消费。

excludes.en: Other transport: transport not mentioned in the inclusions beyond the business van or minibus, such as Venice gondolas, and sightseeing trains or electric taxis in traffic-restricted zones — please pay on your own.
excludes.zh: 其他交通：除包含商务旅行车或者中巴之外，费用包含中未提及的其他交通费用，如威尼斯贡多拉，以及车辆限行区的观光火车、电瓶出租车等费用敬请自理。

excludes.en: Free activities: night-time independent sightseeing and recommended programs in the itinerary, plus any resulting transport, meals, tickets and shopping costs.
excludes.zh: 自由活动：游客夜间自行游览及行程中的推荐项目，以及产生的交通、餐饮、门票、购物等费用。

excludes.en: Experience activities: any travel experience activities not included in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 体验活动：行程中没有包含的各项旅游体验活动。

excludes.en: Other costs: any fees not mentioned in the inclusions. Where force majeure (natural disaster, war, strike, etc.), traffic delays, flight cancellations or rescheduling, embassy visa delays, insufficient numbers and similar special circumstances or other non-company causes lead to extra costs (e.g. overseas visa-extension fees, accommodation, food and transport, national airline fare adjustments), the company reserves the right to charge the difference.
excludes.zh: 其他费用：费用包含中未提及的费用。如因天灾、战争、罢工等不可抗力的原因，及因交通延阻、航班取消或更改时间、使馆延误出签证、人数不足等特殊情况或其他非我公司原因所引致的额外费用（如在外延期签证费、住、食及交通费、国家航空运价调整等），我公司有权追加差价。

timeline.title_en: Copenhagen - Trondheim (visit the millennium-old city of the Viking kings)
timeline.title_zh: 哥本哈根 - 特隆赫姆（拜访维京王的千年古城）
timeline.description_en: Make your own way to Copenhagen Airport and check in for your flight to Trondheim according to your flight time; depending on the day's flights this leg may require a connecting flight rather than a direct one. A guide-driver meets you at Trondheim Airport and you transfer to the hotel, then explore the "millennium-old capital" of Trondheim, Norway's third-largest city and the coronation seat of its first king. Visit Nidaros Cathedral, the most important medieval building in Scandinavia, a magnificent purely Gothic cathedral begun in 1070 over the tomb of St Olav. Walk to the colourful Old Town Bridge (the red wooden "Gate of Happiness") and the Bakklandet district to photograph the evening light along the Nidelva river, and try the local century-old traditional pastry, the Trondheim ball. Overnight at the Grand Olav House Hotel or a similar 4-star hotel, located in Trondheim's historic Bakklandet quarter within walking distance of the cathedral and bridge.
timeline.description_zh: 请各位游客自行前往哥本哈根机场，根据航班时间办理登机手续，乘机前往特隆赫姆；视当天具体航班情况，此段可能无法直飞，需安排转机航班。司导在特隆赫姆机场接机，之后入住酒店，参观挪威第三大城市、第一任国王加冕地的“千年古都”特隆赫姆。参观斯堪的纳维亚半岛最重要的中世纪建筑——尼德罗斯主教座堂（尼达洛斯大教堂），这座始建于1070年、建于挪威守护神圣奥拉夫墓葬之上的雄伟纯哥特式大教堂。步行至色彩缤纷的老城桥（红色木桥、人称“幸福之门”）和巴克兰德街区，沿尼德河拍摄傍晚美景，并品尝当地百余年历史的传统甜品——特隆赫姆球。夜宿格兰德奥拉夫之家酒店或同等4星级酒店，酒店位于特隆赫姆历史悠久的巴克兰德街区，步行即可到达大教堂与老城桥。

timeline.title_en: Trondheim - Kristiansund - Atlantic Ocean Road - Molde - Stranda (the photographer's pilgrimage: the Atlantic Ocean Road)
timeline.title_zh: 特隆赫姆 - 克里斯蒂安松 - 大西洋之路 - 莫尔德 - 斯特兰达（摄影师的朝圣景点——大西洋之路）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, drive to the pretty town of Kristiansund at the eastern end of the famous Atlantic Ocean Road, built on four islands in the North Sea with beautiful coastal scenery; visit the harbour quay and the Innlandet old-town district, home to one of Norway's oldest opera houses (1914, Art Nouveau) and rare buildings that survived WWII. After lunch, drive the scenic Atlantic Ocean Road (Atlanterhavsveien), a 36 km route from Kårvåg to Bud weaving across islands via bridges and causeways, with 11 sharp bends and a high point of 858 m; named a "Norwegian Construction of the Century" and listed by The Guardian as a photographer's road trip. Then visit Molde, the "City of the Midnight Sun" and jazz festival town on the wide Romsdalsfjord, where the Varden viewpoint (407 m) overlooks the city, fjord and 222 snow-capped peaks. Continue to Stranda or the Valldal valley. Overnight at the Dregge Riverside Hotel - a classic Norwegian hotel, or a similar 3-4 star hotel, set deep in the Geirangerfjord area on the Storelva riverbank with fjord views, restaurant, indoor pool and sauna.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，前往坐落在著名大西洋之路东端的美丽小镇克里斯蒂安松，该城建于北海中的四个小岛上，享有美丽的海岸景观；参观港口码头与因兰德（Innlandet）老城区，这里有挪威最古老的歌剧院之一（始建于1914年的新艺术运动风格建筑）以及二战中幸存的少数建筑。午餐后乘车驶上景观公路——大西洋之路（Atlanterhavsveien），全长36公里、从Kårvåg到比德（Bud），桥梁与堤道将一座座岛屿相连，途经11个急弯、最高处海拔858米，被挪威人评为“挪威世纪性建筑”，《卫报》将其列入“摄影师之旅”名单。随后前往午夜阳光之城、爵士之城莫尔德参观，这里位于宽阔的罗姆达尔峡湾河口，登海拔407米的瓦尔登观景台可一览城市、峡湾、岛屿及222座白雪覆盖的山峰全景。之后到达斯特兰达或瓦尔河谷入住。夜宿德雷格斯河畔酒店——经典挪威酒店或同等3-4星级酒店，酒店坐落在蓋朗厄尔峡湾深处的斯托雷尔瓦河畔，拥有峡湾美景、餐厅、室内泳池与桑拿。

timeline.title_en: Stranda - Geiranger - Briksdal Glacier - Sogndal (the epic of "ice" and the masterpiece of "water")
timeline.title_zh: 斯特兰达 - 蓋朗厄尔 - 布里克斯达尔冰川 - 松达尔（“冰”的史诗与“海”的杰作之旅）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, board a Geirangerfjord cruise to admire the fjord scenery, sailing between sheer cliffs surrounded by countless waterfalls and viewing the Seven Sisters waterfall (one of its falls has a 250 m drop) and the facing Suitor waterfall, most spectacular from May to July. Then drive the Eagle Road (Ørnevegen), the route 63 with 11 hairpin bends and the Ørnesvingen (620 m) viewpoint, and stop at the Flydalsjuvet clifftop viewpoint overlooking the town of Geiranger and the fjord. In the afternoon, head to the village of Olden to visit the Briksdal Glacier, an arm of mainland Europe's largest glacier Jostedalsbreen within Jostedal Glacier National Park; ride the open-top "troll car" past the Volefossen waterfall to walk up to the blue ice front, where the 1200 m glacier descends amid lush forest. Overnight at the Sundal Hofslund Fjord Hotel or Best Western, or a similar 3-star hotel, a family-run hotel founded in 1912 in the centre of Sogndal on the Sognefjord, with its own garden and outdoor heated pool.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，乘坐蓋朗厄尔峡湾游轮欣赏峡湾美景，巡游于陡峭崖壁之间、被无数瀑布环绕，近距离观赏七姐妹瀑布（其中一条落差达250米）以及对面的求婚者瀑布，这些瀑布在5月至7月间最为壮观。随后前往老鹰之路（Ørnevegen，63号公路），以接连11个发夹弯和老鹰之翼（Ørnesvingen，620米）观景台闻名，并在弗里达斯悬崖观景台（Flydalsjuvet）俯瞰峡谷中的蓋朗厄尔小城与峡湾。下午前往奥尔登小镇游览布里克斯达尔冰川，它是欧洲大陆体量最大的约斯特达尔布林冰川（Jostedalsbreen）的分支，位于约斯特达尔冰川国家公园内；乘坐有趣的精灵敞篷山地车途经沃伦福斯大瀑布，徒步至蓝冰前沿，欣赏高达1200米的冰川自上而下直入河道、衬以茂盛森林的壮丽景观。夜宿松达尔霍芬桑德峡湾酒店或Best Western酒店或同等3星级酒店，这是一家始建于1912年、位于松恩达尔（Sogndal）中心松恩峡湾畔的家庭经营酒店，拥有自己的花园和室外温水游泳池。

timeline.title_en: Sogndal - Flåm - Voss - Bergen (meet the "troll spirits" aboard the steep Flåm mountain railway)
timeline.title_zh: 松达尔 - 弗洛姆 - 沃斯 - 卑尔根（弗洛姆陡峭高山列车遇见“山妖精灵”）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, drive to Flåm to visit the Flåm Railway Museum, Flåm village and the Sognefjord (Norway's largest and most famous fjord, 204 km long and up to 1308 m deep). Ride the world-famous steep Flåm mountain railway from Flåm up to Myrdal (20 km, 80% of it on a 5.5% gradient, begun 1923), passing the Kjosfossen waterfall; the railway museum displays the real El9 locomotive and the engineering history. At Myrdal, transfer to the regular Norwegian train to the lovely town of Voss, one of the most beautiful fjord towns on the Oslo-Bergen line. Then continue to the "rain city" of Bergen: visit the UNESCO World Heritage Bryggen Hanseatic wharf with its colourful waterfront wooden houses (a Hanseatic trading post since 1360), ride the Fløibanen funicular up Mount Fløyen for a panorama of the city, harbour and fjord, stroll the Bergen waterfront and enjoy a seafood feast at the Fisketorget fish market, then return to the hotel on your own. Overnight at the Bergen Moxy, Thon or Scandic hotel, or a similar 4-star hotel, a stylish modern hotel in the Solheimsviken / Marineholmen waterfront business district.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，乘车前往弗洛姆，游览弗洛姆铁路博物馆、弗洛姆小镇和松恩峡湾（挪威第一大、也是世界最著名峡湾，全长204公里、最深处1308米）。乘坐世界闻名的陡峭高山火车从弗洛姆上行至米达尔（Myrdal，全长20公里，80%路段建在5.5%坡度的山坡上，始建于1923年），途经克尤斯福森瀑布；铁路博物馆内展出真实的El9火车头并介绍这段铁路的建造历史。在米达尔换乘挪威官方火车前往美丽小镇沃斯（奥斯陆至卑尔根铁路沿线最美峡湾小镇之一）。随后前往“雨城”卑尔根，参观世界遗产布吕根（Bryggen）汉萨同盟商业建筑群，欣赏面向海港的彩色木屋老城（自1360年起的汉萨贸易站，1979年列入世界文化遗产）；乘坐弗罗伊（Fløibanen）索道登上弗罗伊恩山顶俯瞰整座城市、海港与峡湾全景；漫步卑尔根海滨，在Fisketorget鱼市品尝海鲜大餐，之后自行返回酒店。夜宿卑尔根Moxy或Thon或Scandic酒店或同等4星级酒店，酒店位于索尔海姆斯维肯与马林霍尔门海滨商业区，融合北欧风与工业风的现代时尚酒店。

timeline.title_en: Bergen - Hardangerfjord - Odda - Haugesund (Hardangerfjord, pastoral scenery like an oil painting)
timeline.title_zh: 卑尔根 - 哈当厄尔峡湾 - 奥达 - 海于格松（哈当厄尔峡湾——油画般的田园风光）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, drive to the Steinsdalsfossen waterfall near Norheimsund, whose unique feature is that you can walk along a path behind the falling water curtain and stay completely dry while the sun creates rainbows through the spray, like a "water-curtain cave". Then continue to the Hardangerfjord, the gentlest and most pastoral of Norway's four great fjords, its shores dotted with colourful cottages and famous apple and cherry orchards planted by monks some 800 years ago. Travel through Western Norway's rolling hills and forests to the quiet town of Odda, the gateway town set at the innermost reach of the Hardangerfjord, surrounded by mountains, waterfalls and glaciers and a starting point for several classic Norwegian hikes. Then arrive in Haugesund. Overnight at the Haugesund Amanda Hotel or a similar 4-star hotel, a landmark in the city centre within walking distance of the Amanda statue, the pink town hall and the library park, famous for its maritime history and Art Nouveau architecture and decorated like a museum of nostalgic sea-travel elements.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，乘车来到诺海姆桑德（Norheimsund）附近的斯坦达尔瀑布（斯坦达斯大瀑布），体验“水帘洞”般的奇观——其独特之处在于您可以从瀑布后方穿行而过却一点都不被打湿，阳光透过水幕形成彩虹，水声震耳欲聋。之后前往哈当厄尔峡湾，这是四大峡湾中最为平缓、最具田园风景的峡湾，两岸点缀着彩色小屋的田园以及约800年前僧侣种下的著名苹果园与樱桃园（5月开花、夏季结果）。一路欣赏挪威西部多变的丘陵与森林地貌，前往宁静古朴的奥达小镇——它坐落在哈当厄尔峡湾最深处，被群山、瀑布和冰川环绕，是探索挪威多条经典徒步路线的门户与起点。随后到达海于格松入住酒店。夜宿海于格松阿曼达酒店或同等4星级酒店，酒店位于市中心核心区，步行即可到达阿曼达雕像、粉红色市政厅和图书馆公园，以悠久航海历史和新艺术运动建筑风格闻名，内部装饰宛如一座怀旧海上旅行主题博物馆。

timeline.title_en: Haugesund - Preikestolen (Pulpit Rock) - Stavanger (hike to the miracle rock of Preikestolen for the grand views of the Lysefjord)
timeline.title_zh: 海于格松 - 布道石 - 斯塔万格（徒步布道台奇迹之石，领略吕瑟峡湾壮阔美景）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, set out from Haugesund to the Preikestolen (Pulpit Rock) area on the Lysefjord and hike up to the miracle rock - Pulpit Rock, also one of the best vantage points to look down over the Lysefjord. The flat rock platform sits 604 m vertically above the fjord, projecting 30 m from the ridge, with a top surface of about 600 m2; it was voted the world's most spectacular viewpoint by CNN's travel site. The trail is 3.8 km one way (about 330 m of ascent), marked with red T-signs, a moderate-intensity round trip of roughly 4-5 hours over 8 km of rugged mountain path. Please bring your own lunch and drinking water (there are no shops or restaurants en route) and wear non-slip, waterproof, high-cut hiking boots; if you feel unwell you can return to the visitor centre, which has a restaurant, café and beautiful lakes nearby. In the afternoon arrive in Stavanger and check in. Overnight at the Stavanger Sola / Scandic hotel or a similar 4-star hotel, a Nordic chain hotel in the city centre, about 750 m from the old town square where the July Gladmatfestivalen food festival is held.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，从海于格松出发前往吕瑟峡湾布道石景区，徒步奇迹之石——布道台，此处也是俯瞰吕瑟峡湾、领略峡湾大美的绝佳地点之一。布道石是一块天然凌空形成的巨型石台，台顶与下方峡湾的垂直落差达604米，从山脊突出30多米，岩石平面面积约600平方米，曾被美国CNN旗下旅游网站评为全球最壮丽景色第一名。通往布道石的登山径单程3.8公里（约330米上坡），沿途有红色T字标记，往返约4-5小时、中等强度，全程约8公里、山路崎岖。请自备午餐及饮用水（沿途没有商店及餐厅），建议穿着防滑防水加高帮的登山鞋；如身体不适，可返回到景区服务中心，那里有餐厅、咖啡店，周围也有美丽的湖泊可自由游览。下午到达斯塔万格，随后入住酒店。夜宿斯塔万格松恩/斯坎迪克酒店或同等4星级酒店，这是一家位于市中心的精选北欧连锁酒店，距离七月举办斯塔万格美食节（Gladmatfestivalen）的老城中心广场仅约750米。

timeline.title_en: Stavanger - Kristiansand - Sandefjord (a seaside slow journey to the cultural colours of the oil capital)
timeline.title_zh: 斯塔万格 - 克里斯蒂安桑 - 桑讷菲尤尔（海滨慢旅到石油之都的文化色彩）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, explore Stavanger, Norway's oil capital and a European Capital of Culture: stroll Gamle Stavanger (Old Stavanger) on the west side of the harbour, a cluster of about 173 elegant white 18th-19th-century wooden houses, home to Michelin restaurants Renaa and Sabi Omakase. Then visit the colourful, photogenic Fargegaten district, a barber-initiated street of brightly painted old wooden houses lined with cafés, restaurants, bars and gift and candy shops, contrasting strikingly with the white old town. After lunch, follow the guide to the Sverd i fjell (Swords in Rock) monument by the sea, three Viking swords over ten metres tall commemorating the Battle of Hafrsfjord and symbolising peace, unity and freedom. Then drive to Sandefjord, stopping for a rest at Kristiansand (a southern Norwegian gem and the country's fifth-largest city, known for its beaches and lively culture) en route. On arrival in Sandefjord, check in. Overnight at the Sandefjord Atlantic House Hotel or a similar 4-star hotel, within walking distance of Sandefjord harbour and old town, themed throughout around the town's whaling history with a local-specialty restaurant serving Norwegian cuisine and fresh seafood.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后参观挪威的石油之都、欧洲文化之都斯塔万格：漫步港口西侧的斯塔万格老城区（Gamle Stavanger），这里由约173套建于18世纪末19世纪初的纯白雅致木质房屋组成，城中有Renaa和Sabi Omakase两家米其林餐厅。随后前往色彩缤纷的网红街区法格卡腾（Fargegaten），这条由理发师发起改造的街道把古老木屋粉刷成各类鲜艳颜色，沿街遍布咖啡馆、餐厅、小酒吧及礼品糖果店，与素雅的老城形成鲜明对比。午餐后跟随导游参观海边的斯塔万格巨剑阵（岩中之劍），由三把十几米高的维京巨剑组成，纪念“Hafrsfjord之战”，分别代表和平、统一和自由，现已成为斯塔万格的城市标志。随后乘车前往桑讷菲尤尔，中途在克里斯蒂安桑（挪威南部明珠、第五大城市，以海滩与活跃文化闻名）休息。到达桑讷菲尤尔后入住酒店。夜宿桑讷菲尤尔大西洋之家酒店或同等4星级酒店，酒店步行即可到达港口与老城区，整体以小镇捕鲸业历史为主题装饰宛如一座博物馆，设有当地特色餐厅提供挪威美食与新鲜海产。

timeline.title_en: Sandefjord - Oslo - Copenhagen (a Nordic seaside slow rhythm: an art tour and harbour walk)
timeline.title_zh: 桑讷菲尤尔 - 奥斯陆 - 哥本哈根（北欧式的海滨慢节奏——艺术巡礼与海港漫步）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, visit Vigeland Sculpture Park, named after sculptor Gustav Vigeland and containing 192 sculptures totalling 650 figures on the theme of "life", from birth to death. Then see Oslo City Hall (exterior), the brick-red building where the Nobel Peace Prize is awarded each 10 December, watch the changing of the guard at the Royal Palace (exterior), and tour the medieval Akershus Fortress (exterior), built from 1299 and never captured in its history, with open views over Oslo City Hall, the Bygdøy peninsula, the busy Oslofjord, the Aker Brygge waterfront and the opera district. Visit the Oslo Opera House (exterior), a glacier-like modern building rising from the Oslofjord whose sloping white marble roof you are highly encouraged to walk up for panoramic fjord-city views. Then, according to your flight time, the guide directs you to take the train from central Oslo to Oslo Airport, where you check in on your own for the flight back to Copenhagen, ending this wonderful trip. No hotel accommodation tonight.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，前往以思考生命与人生为主题的维格兰雕塑公园，公园以著名雕塑大师古斯塔夫·维格兰（Gustav Vigeland）命名，共有192座雕塑、总计650个人物雕像，集中突出“人生”主题，表现人从出生至死亡的各个阶段。之后参观诺贝尔和平奖颁奖地——奥斯陆市政厅（外观），这座磚红色建筑于1950年为庆祝建城900年建成，每年12月10日在此举行诺贝尔奖颁奖仪式；在皇宫（外观）外观看卫兵换岗；游览中世纪城堡阿克斯胡斯城堡（外观），其始建于1299年、历史上从未被攻克，可漫步厚重石墙、塔楼与庭院，无遮挡眺望市政厅、比格迪半岛、繁忙的奥斯陆峡湾、阿克码头（Aker Brygge）与歌剧院区域。参观如同冰川般的现代建筑奥斯陆歌剧院（外观），其白色斜坡状大理石屋顶从奥斯陆峡湾拔地而起，强烈推荐走上倾斜的屋顶俯瞰峡湾城市风光。之后根据航班时间，导游指导游客乘坐火车从奥斯陆市区前往奥斯陆机场，自行办理登机手续飞回哥本哈根，结束美好旅行。今晚无酒店住宿。

meeting_en: Copenhagen Airport, Denmark. Travellers make their own way to Copenhagen and fly to Norway; the guide-driver meets the group on arrival in Trondheim (Route A) or Oslo (Route B).
meeting_zh: 丹麦哥本哈根机场。游客自行前往哥本哈根并乘机飞往挪威，司导在抵达特隆赫姆（A线）或奥斯陆（B线）时接机。

faqs.question_en: Where and when do we meet and disperse?
faqs.question_zh: 集合和集散的时间和地点是怎样的？
faqs.answer_en: Route A — Meeting: on Day 1, make your own way to Copenhagen Airport and fly to Trondheim; the guide meets you at Trondheim Airport according to your flight time. Dispersal: on the last day the guide directs you to take the train to Oslo Airport, where you check in on your own for the flight back to Copenhagen. Route B — Meeting: on Day 1 fly from Copenhagen to Oslo, then take the train from Oslo Airport to Oslo Central Station, where the guide meets you. Dispersal: on the last day you are seen off at Trondheim Airport for your flight back to Copenhagen. For both routes, flights that only land in Copenhagen on the joining day, or that leave Copenhagen on the final day, are not recommended.
faqs.answer_zh: A线路——集合：行程第一天根据航班时间自行前往哥本哈根机场，乘机到达特隆赫姆，导游根据航班时间在特隆赫姆机场接机。解散：行程最后一天导游指导游客乘坐火车前往奥斯陆机场，之后自行办理登机手续乘机返回哥本哈根。B线路——集合：行程第一天从哥本哈根飞抵奥斯陆，再从奥斯陆机场乘火车到奥斯陆中央火车站，导游在奥斯陆中央火车站接团。解散：行程最后一天在特隆赫姆机场送机解散，游客乘机返回哥本哈根机场。两条线路均不推荐参团当天才降落哥本哈根、以及结束当天才离开哥本哈根的航班。

faqs.question_en: How do I get to Copenhagen Airport?
faqs.question_zh: 如何前往哥本哈根机场？
faqs.answer_en: Copenhagen Airport (CPH) is about 8 km from the city centre. The recommended option is the metro, which is good value and runs directly from the city centre to the airport in about 15-20 minutes; take line M2, single fare 30 DKK. Taxis can be taken from the rank outside the terminal; the fare from the city centre to the airport is roughly 250-350 DKK.
faqs.answer_zh: 哥本哈根机场（CPH）距离市中心约8公里。推荐方式是乘坐地铁，性价比高，市中心线路直达机场，约15-20分钟，乘坐M2线，单程票价30丹麦克朗。出租车在航站楼外的候客点上车，从市中心到机场费用大约在250-350丹麦克朗之间。

faqs.question_en: Can we swim in the sea or the fjords during the trip?
faqs.question_zh: 行程中可以下海或在峡湾游泳吗？
faqs.answer_en: Most hotels are in city business centres and you can usually walk to the shore, so during free evening time you may stroll along the seafront. However, Norway's sea-water temperature is not suitable for swimming; we recommend using the hotel's indoor swimming pool instead.
faqs.answer_zh: 行程中的酒店大多在城市商业中心，步行一般都可到达海边，晚上自由活动时可选择漫步海边；但挪威海水温度不适宜下水游泳，建议使用酒店内的室内游泳池。

faqs.question_en: My English isn't good — will I be able to manage free time on my own?
faqs.question_zh: 我的英文不好，有能力自由活动吗？
faqs.answer_en: The hotels are located near the sightseeing areas, so walking there and back is no problem. If you are worried about the language but want a deeper experience of local culture, you can team up with fellow group members, and there are plenty of fellow travellers active in the surrounding area every day.
faqs.answer_zh: 酒店位于游览景区周边，步行往返没有任何问题。如果担心语言又希望深度体验当地人文，可与其他团友结伴同行，而且每天都有大量团友在周边活动。

faqs.question_en: There are some attractions I don't want to enter — can I get a refund?
faqs.question_zh: 行程内部分景点我不想进去，可以退费吗？
faqs.answer_en: You may spend time freely around the attraction, but you must return to the meeting point at the agreed time, and no refund can be given.
faqs.answer_zh: 您可以在景点周边自由活动，但需要在约定的时间内到集合地点，并且无法退费。

faqs.question_en: What will I eat locally?
faqs.question_zh: 我在当地吃什么？
faqs.answer_en: Norwegians are expert at eating fish and seafood — salmon and cod are common, along with other seasonal seafood, and a distinctive local specialty is Norwegian reindeer meat. The cities we pass through have a wide range of specialty dining and seafood fish markets, with street snacks well worth trying. The guide will introduce and recommend local restaurants.
faqs.answer_zh: 挪威人吃鱼和海鲜比较专业，常见的是三文鱼和鳕鱼以及其他时令海鲜，比较有特色的还有挪威的驯鹿肉。我们经过的城市里有繁多的特色餐饮和卖海鲜的鱼市，街边小吃也让人流连忘返；导游也会给予大家当地餐厅的介绍和推荐。

faqs.question_en: Where are the staff from?
faqs.question_zh: 工作人员是哪里的？
faqs.answer_en: The guide is a Chinese-speaking guide providing Chinese-language service throughout.
faqs.answer_zh: 导游为中文导游，全程提供中文服务。

faqs.question_en: What gear and fitness do I need to hike up Preikestolen (Pulpit Rock), and how hard is it?
faqs.question_zh: 登上布道台需要带什么装备、需要什么样的体力？徒步强度如何？
faqs.answer_en: Girafe specially arranges the hike up to Pulpit Rock on the Lysefjord — something different from any other group tour. From the coach park to Pulpit Rock is 3.8 km one way, generally 4-5 hours round trip; we give all guests of differing fitness levels ample time to climb, enjoy the views and return, and you can walk and rest along the way according to your own stamina. As there are no shops on the mountain, you need to bring your own water bottle and a simple lunch; the fjord mountain paths are rugged, so non-slip, waterproof, high-cut hiking boots are recommended, and waterproof clothing in case of rain is even better.
faqs.answer_zh: 长颈鹿特别安排了在吕瑟峡湾徒步登山去布道台，这是有别于任何其他跟团游的地方。从大巴停车场到布道台单程3.8公里，一般往返在4到5个小时左右；我们给予所有不同体力的贵宾足够时间来登山、赏景和返回，沿途可根据自己的体力走走停停。由于山上没有商店，登山时需自带水壶和简单的午餐；峡湾地区山路崎岖，建议穿着防滑防水加高帮的登山鞋，若自备防水衣以备下雨则更佳。

faqs.question_en: Are there any signs on the mountain — will I get lost?
faqs.question_zh: 山上有指示吗？会不会迷路？
faqs.answer_en: Pulpit Rock is a famous Norwegian attraction visited by hundreds of thousands of hikers each year, so there are signs the whole way and red T-marks along the route. July is also peak season with many visitors, so following the crowd you won't get lost.
faqs.answer_zh: 布道台是挪威出名的景点，每年都有数十万人来登山，所以全程都有指示、沿途都有红色T字标记；另外七月是旅游旺季，游客很多，跟着人走不会迷路。

faqs.question_en: About the Flåm mountain railway
faqs.question_zh: 关于弗洛姆高山列车
faqs.answer_en: The mountain railway starts in Flåm and ends at Myrdal at the top. The train stops for 5 minutes at the Kjosfossen waterfall to hear the song of the troll spirits, then for 10 minutes at Myrdal — but passengers may not get off to catch the next train, as all tickets are valid only for that specific service. Myrdal station is very small with only a few shops and is not worth staying at; you take the same train back to Flåm.
faqs.answer_zh: 高山列车始于弗洛姆、终点是山顶的米达尔。火车会在克尤斯福森瀑布处停留5分钟聆听山妖精灵的歌声，随后在米达尔停留10分钟，但乘客不可以下车乘坐下一班火车，所有火车票都仅当次车次有效。米达尔火车站很小、只有几个商店，不建议停留，需乘同一班火车返回弗洛姆。

faqs.question_en: Will sea fishing make me seasick?
faqs.question_zh: 海钓会晕船吗？
faqs.answer_en: The fishing guide and captain choose between in-fjord or open-sea fishing depending on the day's weather. Even when winds and waves are stronger, the water inside the fjord is very calm; and when the weather is poor, the catch tends to be much larger, so bad weather is well worth trying.
faqs.answer_zh: 海钓的向导和船长会根据当天天气选择在峡湾内海钓或远海海钓。即使风浪较大，峡湾内也是非常平静的水面；而如果天气不好，捕获的鱼类反而非常多，非常值得去碰一碰坏天气。

faqs.question_en: Can the seafood I catch be cooked for me at a restaurant?
faqs.question_zh: 我钓上来的海鲜可以在餐厅加工吗？
faqs.answer_en: No. Norwegian restaurants strictly observe food-hygiene laws and may not process ingredients from non-regular sources. However, guests may cook and eat their catch themselves in their own room — fresh cod and herring are delicious pan-fried or blanched.
faqs.answer_zh: 不可以。挪威的餐厅严格遵守食品卫生法，不可以加工非正规食品来源的食材；但游客可以在自己的房间自行加工食用，新鲜的鳕鱼和青鱼生煎或汆烫都非常可口。

faqs.question_en: I'm not used to Norwegian seafood, am allergic to seafood, or am vegetarian — can I change the meal set?
faqs.question_zh: 我不太习惯挪威海鲜、对海鲜过敏，或我是素食主义者，可以更改套餐吗？
faqs.answer_en: Please note this before registering or contact the sales agent to change the meal set or opt for a meal refund. After registration, meals are booked by default and the company cannot cancel the restaurant reservation.
faqs.answer_zh: 请在报名前备注或与销售员联系，更改套餐或选择餐饮退费。如报名后，则按默认餐饮预订后，我社不可取消餐厅预定。

faqs.question_en: Does the Lofoten route overlap with the Norway Fjords route, or how do they connect?
faqs.question_zh: 挪威罗浮敦路线是否和挪威峡湾路线有重叠，或如何衔接？
faqs.answer_en: Lofoten is within Norway's Arctic Circle, about 2000 km from the southern fjords, with completely different scenery, landscape and customs. This product departs Monday to Friday (returning to Oslo on Friday night), while the fjord route usually departs Saturday, so they can be connected on Friday — we suggest booking the Radisson hotel at Oslo Airport on the Friday. The recommended best connection is: join the fjord route on Saturday morning (returning to Oslo Friday night), tour the Oslo waterfront, opera house and palace area on Saturday and Sunday, then join the Lofoten route on Monday; or do Lofoten on Monday, return to Oslo on Friday, do the fjord route on Saturday, and finally tour Oslo after returning on Friday.
faqs.answer_zh: 罗浮敦在挪威的北极圈境内，与挪威南部的峡湾相差2000公里，两地的风景、地貌、习俗都不同。本产品为每周一到周五发团（周五晚上返回奥斯陆），通常峡湾路线都是周六发团，因此可以在周五衔接，建议预定周五奥斯陆机场的Radisson酒店。建议最佳衔接路线为：周六上午参加峡湾路线（周五晚返回奥斯陆），周六及周日游览奥斯陆码头、歌剧院及皇宫区域，周一参加罗浮敦路线；或者周一参加罗浮敦路线、周五返回奥斯陆，周六再参加峡湾路线，最后周五返回后游览奥斯陆。

faqs.question_en: Do I need a visa?
faqs.question_zh: 是否需要签证？
faqs.answer_en: This product does not include visa fees; if you need a visa, please choose a Schengen-visa product. It requires a Schengen visa (single or multiple entry). After booking we provide, free of charge, the full set of materials for the Schengen visa application (see the detailed materials checklist). Your passport must be valid for at least six months from the date of departure, or customs has the right to refuse entry. "Visa worry-free" guarantee: for travel products contracted with us 61 days or more before departure, if the visa is not obtained within 45 days before departure, we bear all losses and immediately refund the full travel cost; guests who do not meet this clause and fail to obtain the visa are refunded per the change-and-cancellation terms. A visa refusal must be reported to us within 48 hours with the consulate's refusal letter; any supplementary or revised materials must be submitted within five days, and you may not unilaterally waive the right of "visa defence". Visa fees, visa service fees, Schengen insurance fees and visa-centre appointment fees are all non-refundable and non-transferable, even if the product is changed or cancelled.
faqs.answer_zh: 本产品不包含签证费用，如需办理签证请选择申根签证产品。本产品需要申根签证（单次或多次入境）。预订后免费提供办理申根签证的全部材料（参考详细材料清单）。护照有效期需在离境之日起至少还有六个月，否则海关有权拒绝入境。“保签无忧”：游客在出发日前61天与我社签约的旅游产品，如在出发前45天内未获取签证，我社承担所有损失并立即退还全部旅游费用；不符合该条款的游客如未正常获取签证，将按照退改与取消条款退费。如遇拒签需在48小时内通知我社并出具使领馆拒签函，如需补充或更改材料需在五天内提交，且不得单方面放弃“签证抗辩”权利。签证费、签证服务费、申根保险费、签证中心预约费均不可退款，也无法更改使用者，即使产品退改签，签证费用亦无法退款。

faqs.question_en: Booking, changes & cancellation
faqs.question_zh: 预订、变更与取消须知
faqs.answer_en: Free, no-reason cancellation is allowed by both the agency and the traveller more than 30 days before departure (not including the 30th day). Because flights, traffic, ferries and order are often adjusted, the itinerary order and visiting sequence may frequently change; you are required to arrive at the meeting point one day before the tour starts and leave the dispersal point one day after it ends, allowing reasonable flight-connection time (at least 5 hours for a transfer at the same airport, 7 hours for different airports in the same city; reasonable meet/disperse window is 07:00-21:00). All pricing is in EUR at the time of booking; if you pay in RMB, the amount is the real-time RMB price auto-calculated from the Bank of China "euro selling rate" on the day of payment, and refunds likewise use the rate of the refund-application day (the traveller bears any exchange differences or bank fees). The named hotels are preferred; if full, a similar same-star hotel is substituted without separate notice. Two people booking together default to a standard double room (bed type assigned by the hotel, not selectable); solo bookings include a single-room-difference deposit by default, refunded proportionally if successfully sharing. This is a join-in group tour (拼团) that may share vehicles with other agencies' guests; the group forms (成团) at 10 people, and if 10 is not reached the agency may cancel. Orders are confirmed within 48 hours after payment; do not book connecting flights/hotels before confirmation. Note that part of the itinerary order may be reversed on some departures (Route B: outbound Copenhagen-Oslo, return Trondheim-Copenhagen) — the content is unchanged and the final departure notice prevails.
faqs.answer_zh: 出发前30天（不含第30天）旅行社和旅行者均可无理由取消。由于航变、交通拥堵、渡轮取消、罢工游行等不可抗力以及行程顺序优化，行程时间及游览先后顺序经常调整，要求旅行者至少在参团日期前一天抵达集合地、离团日期后一天离开集散地，并预留合理航班衔接时间（同一机场转机至少5小时，同城不同机场至少7小时；合理集合集散时间段为07:00至21:00）。所有定价以欧元为预订计价单位，如选择人民币支付，则以当天支付时本网站依据中国银行实时外汇牌价中“欧元卖出价”自动计算的人民币实时价格为准，退款同样适用申请退款当日即时汇率（汇率差异或银行手续费由旅行者承担）。行程内列明酒店为优先入住酒店，如订满则换为相近条件、相同星级的酒店，恕不另行通知。两人同时报名默认入住标准双人间（床型由酒店安排、不可选）；单人报名默认含单人房差押金，成功拼房后按比例退还。本产品为散客拼团，可能与其他旅行社客人合并用车；成团人数为10人，未达10人我社有权取消。订单支付后需等待二次确认（48小时内），未确认前请勿预订衔接机票及酒店。请注意部分团期行程前后次序相反（B线：去程哥本哈根-奥斯陆，回程特隆赫姆-哥本哈根），游览内容不变，具体以出团通知书为准。

faqs.question_en: Health & safety requirements
faqs.question_zh: 健康与安全须知
faqs.answer_en: To ensure a safe trip, please have a health check before departure and do NOT register if you have any of the following: infectious diseases (e.g. active tuberculosis, typhoid); cardiovascular disease (e.g. severe hypertension, heart insufficiency, myocardial ischaemia or infarction); cerebrovascular disease (e.g. cerebral embolism, haemorrhage, tumour); respiratory disease (e.g. emphysema, cor pulmonale); psychiatric illness (e.g. epilepsy and various mental illnesses); severe anaemia (haemoglobin below 50 g/L); or recovery period after major/medium surgery. Pregnancy: at week 35 or beyond you may not join under any circumstances; at week 28 or beyond you must provide a doctor's report within 7 days plus the attending physician's consent; below week 28, register with great caution, sign the agency's liability waiver, and you cannot take part in adventure, ski, sea, high-altitude or outdoor activities. Disabled travellers need a doctor's report within 7 days plus the physician's consent, must be accompanied by an immediate family member, and must apply at least 61 days in advance for reserved spaces and facilities. Travellers over 70 need a health certificate and physical exam report and an accompanying immediate family member (or sign the waiver), need adequate walking ability and stamina given the long itinerary, and a physician's consent for any adventure/ski/sea/outdoor items. Minors under 18 must be accompanied by an immediate relative or guardian; some sights have restrictions for those under 18/12/6; infants under 30 kg need a confirmed safety seat; minors under 18 travelling without parents need parental authorisation, and infants under 2 are not accepted. Per Article 15 of the Tourism Law, travellers must truthfully declare health information relevant to the trip (including pregnancy, lactation, chronic and infectious diseases, suspected symptoms or recent travel to epidemic areas) and obey safety warnings; concealment that causes injury, loss or transmission risk means the traveller bears their own liability and may face civil compensation and administrative penalties, with the agency entitled to terminate the contract without refund.
faqs.answer_zh: 为确保旅游顺利、防止旅途中发生人身意外，请出行前做一次必要的身体检查，如存在下列情况请勿报名：传染性疾病（如活动期肺结核、伤寒等）；心血管疾病（如严重高血压、心功能不全、心肌缺氧、心肌梗塞等）；脑血管疾病（如脑栓塞、脑出血、脑肿瘤等）；呼吸系统疾病（如肺气肿、肺心病等）；精神病（如癫痫及各种精神病）；严重贫血（血红蛋白50克/升以下）；大中型手术恢复期患者。孕妇：妊娠第35周及以上任何情况下都无法参团；第28周及以上需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书；第28周以下请慎重报名，需签署旅行社免责声明书，且行程内探险、滑雪、出海、高空、户外等项目均无法参加。残疾人需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书，需直系家属陪同，并至少提前61天申请预留位置及专用配套设施。70周岁以上老年人出游需提供健康证明、体检报告并由直系家属陪同（如无法提供则需签署免责声明书），因行程较长需要一定步行能力与体力，体力不支者请慎重报名，涉及探险/滑雪/出海/高空/户外项目需主治医师同意书。未成年人（未满18周岁）需直系亲属或监护人陪同，部分项目对未满18/12/6周岁有特殊限定；30公斤以下儿童需提前确认安全座椅；无父母陪同的18岁以下未成年人出境须持父母授权书；本产品不接受2周岁以下婴儿参团。根据《旅游法》第15条，旅游者需如实告知与旅游活动相关的个人健康信息（包括妊娠期、哺乳期、慢性病、传染病史、疑似症状或近期疫区旅居史）并遵守安全警示规定，若因隐瞒导致人身损害、财产损失或传播风险，旅游者需自行承担责任，并可能面临民事赔偿及行政处罚，旅行社可解除合同且不退还费用。

title_en: Denmark & Norway Fjords 11-Day Group Tour
title_zh: 丹麦挪威峡湾11天跟团游
short_en: An 11-day Scandinavian odyssey from Copenhagen through Norway's epic fjords, glaciers and the Atlantic Road, ending in Andersen's fairy-tale Denmark.
short_zh: 11天斯堪的纳维亚深度之旅，从哥本哈根穿越挪威壮丽峡湾、冰川与大西洋之路，最后回到安徒生的童话丹麦。
desc_en: This 11-day small-group journey loops out from Copenhagen across the heart of Scandinavia. Fly north to the Viking city of Trondheim, then trace Norway's western coast along the world-famous Atlantic Road, cruise the Geirangerfjord, hike to the Briksdal Glacier, ride the Flåm Railway, and explore Bergen, the Hardangerfjord and the Pulpit Rock above Lysefjorden. The route then crosses into Sweden at Gothenburg and returns through Denmark via Aalborg and Hans Christian Andersen's Odense to finish in Copenhagen. It blends dramatic fjord scenery, signature rail and ferry rides, two Scandinavian capitals and a Danish fairy-tale town into one seamless one-way deep route.
desc_zh: 这是一段为期11天的精品小团旅程，以哥本哈根为起点环游斯堪的纳维亚腹地。先飞抵维京古城特隆赫姆，随后沿挪威西海岸驶上举世闻名的大西洋之路，乘船巡游盖朗厄尔峡湾，徒步布里克斯达尔冰川，搭乘弗洛姆高山火车，畅游卑尔根、哈当厄尔峡湾以及吕瑟峡湾之上的布道石。行程随后跨入瑞典哥德堡，再经丹麦奥尔堡与安徒生故乡欧登塞返回哥本哈根。壮丽峡湾、特色火车与渡轮、两国首都和丹麦童话小镇尽在一条单程深度线路之中。

highlights.en: Cruise the UNESCO-listed Geirangerfjord past the Seven Sisters waterfall and towering cliffs
highlights.zh: 巡游世界遗产盖朗厄尔峡湾，近赏七姐妹瀑布与近乎垂直的峭壁

highlights.en: Drive the Atlantic Road, named Norway's 'construction of the century' and a photographer's pilgrimage
highlights.zh: 驾驶被誉为挪威世纪性建筑、摄影师朝圣地的大西洋之路

highlights.en: Ride the Flåm Railway, one of the world's steepest and most scenic mountain trains
highlights.zh: 搭乘世界上最美、最陡峭的高山铁路之一——弗洛姆高山火车

highlights.en: Hike to the Pulpit Rock (Preikestolen) for breathtaking views over Lysefjorden
highlights.zh: 徒步奇迹之石布道石，俯瞰呂瑟峡湾令人窒息的壮阔美景

highlights.en: Walk to the blue ice of the Briksdal Glacier aboard a fun open-top troll car
highlights.zh: 乘坐有趣的精灵敞篷车前往布里克斯达尔冰川的蓝冰前沿

highlights.en: Step into Hans Christian Andersen's fairy-tale world in Odense and the Funen open-air village
highlights.zh: 走进安徒生童话故乡欧登塞与菲英村，重温19世纪丹麦乡村生活

highlights.en: Internal/domestic flight sector & scenic rail included, with city-centre 4-star hotels and fjord-view stays
highlights.zh: 含内陆段航班与观光火车，入住市区四星级酒店及峡湾特色景观酒店

highlights.en: All-inclusive one-way deep route with listed attractions, no forced shopping
highlights.zh: 全含单程深度线路，包含所列景点门票，无强制购物

includes.en: Flights: Line A includes the tax-inclusive domestic flight Copenhagen–Trondheim; Line B includes the tax-inclusive domestic flight Trondheim–Copenhagen.
includes.zh: 【机票】A线路包含哥本哈根-特隆赫姆的内陆含税机票，B线路包含特隆赫姆-哥本哈根的内陆含税机票。

includes.en: Hotels: 8 nights in 4-star hotels and 2 nights in fjord-view feature hotels. (Norway has abolished hotel star ratings; star levels refer to the Booking/Ctrip hotel star standard.)
includes.zh: 【酒店】四星级酒店8晚，峡灣特色景观酒店2晚。（挪威酒店取消星级评定，酒店星级参考Booking或携程的酒店星级标准）

includes.en: Meals: 1 Norwegian specialty fish meal, 1 buffet dinner, and 10 Scandinavian breakfasts — 12 meals in total.
includes.zh: 【餐饮】1餐挪威特色鱼餐、1餐自助晚餐，以及10次斯堪的纳维亚式早餐，共计12餐。

includes.en: Operating costs: tourist city tax, city-entry fees, residence tax, road and bridge tolls, parking and fuel charges, driver-guide meal allowances and other in-itinerary operating fees.
includes.zh: 【执行】游客城市税、进城费、居住税、过路过桥费、停车燃油费、司导餐补等行程内执行费用。

includes.en: Vehicle: a tour coach or tour business van.
includes.zh: 【车辆】旅游巴士或旅游商务车。

includes.en: Guide: a professional driver plus a Chinese-speaking guide, or a Chinese driver-cum-guide for the whole trip (note: for 8 guests or fewer, a business van plus a Chinese-speaking driver-cum-guide is arranged).
includes.zh: 【导游】职业司机+中文导游，或者全程中文华人司机兼导游（备注：8人及以下则安排为商务旅行车+中文司机兼导游）。

includes.en: Luggage: one 23 kg checked bag and one carry-on per person.
includes.zh: 【行李】1件23公斤行李及1件随身行李。

includes.en: Admissions: H.C. Andersen Museum, Andersen's childhood home, Funen Village, the Frederikshavn–Gothenburg ferry, Vigeland Sculpture Park, the Pulpit Rock hike and guide service, the Fløibanen funicular, the Flåm mountain railway train ticket, Briksdal Glacier, the open-top Troll Car, and the Geirangerfjord cruise.
includes.zh: 【门票】安徒生博物馆、安徒生兒时故居、菲英村、腓特烈港到哥德堡渡轮、维格兰雕塑公园、布道石徒步及向导服务、弗罗伊恩山缆车、弗洛姆高山列车火车票、布里克斯达尔冰川、精灵敞篷车、蓋朗厄尔峡灣游船。

excludes.en: Passport: the cost of your personal passport.
excludes.zh: 护照：个人护照费用。

excludes.en: Visa: the tourist visa fees for the countries on the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 签证：行程中所列旅游国家所需的观光签证费用。

excludes.en: Insurance: travel insurance fees (if the itinerary involves high-risk sports, verify whether your travel insurance covers them).
excludes.zh: 保险：旅游保险费用（如行程内涉及到高风险运动，请核实旅游保险是否包含该项运动）。

excludes.en: Tips: guests pay the guide and driver a total of EUR 10 per person per day, the same rate for adults and children.
excludes.zh: 小费：游客支付导游和司机小费一共10欧/人/天，大小同价。

excludes.en: Meals: apart from the specialty meals included in the itinerary, lunches and proper dinners are not included.
excludes.zh: 餐饮：除行程内包含的特色餐外，行程中不包含午、晚正餐费用。

excludes.en: Admissions: sights not marked as fee-included in the itinerary (including but not limited to those marked '(exterior)', and all 'recommended', 'optional', 'experience' etc. items not stated as included) — please pay on your own if you wish to enter.
excludes.zh: 门票：行程中未注明费用包含的景点（包括但不仅限于行程中注明“外观”的景点，以及“推荐”“可选”“体验”等所有未提及费用包含的项目，如游客需要参观，敬请自理）。

excludes.en: Extended stays: lodging, transport and sightseeing costs for any nights extended beyond the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 延长住宿：行程外额外延长的住宿、交通、观光费用。

excludes.en: Personal spending: drinks and alcohol, taxis, phone charges and other personal expenses.
excludes.zh: 私人消费：如饮料酒类、出租车、电话费等个人消费。

excludes.en: Other transport: transport not mentioned in 'fee included' beyond the business van or minibus — e.g. a Venice gondola, and sightseeing trains, electric taxis etc. in vehicle-restricted zones — please pay on your own.
excludes.zh: 其他交通：除包含商务旅行车或者中巴之外，费用包含中未提及的其他交通费用，如威尼斯贡多拉，以及车辆限行区的观光火车、电瓶出租车等费用敬请自理。

excludes.en: Free-time activities: independent evening sightseeing and recommended items during the trip, plus any transport, dining, admissions, shopping etc. they incur.
excludes.zh: 自由活动：游客夜间自行游览及行程中的推荐项目，以及产生的交通、餐饮、门票、购物等费用。

excludes.en: Experience activities: any travel-experience activities not included in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 体验活动：行程中没有包含的各项旅游体验活动。

excludes.en: Other costs: any fees not mentioned in 'fee included'. In cases of force majeure (natural disasters, war, strikes etc.), transport delays, flight cancellations/reschedules, embassy visa delays, insufficient group numbers or other special situations not caused by our company, we reserve the right to charge the additional cost difference (e.g. overseas visa-extension fees, extra accommodation/meals/transport, national airfare adjustments).
excludes.zh: 其他费用：费用包含中未提及的费用。如因天灾、战争、罢工等不可抗力的原因，及因交通延阻、航班取消或更改时间、使馆延误出签证、人数不足等特殊情况或其他非我公司原因所引致的额外费用（如在外延期签证费、住、食及交通费、国家航空运价调整等），我公司有权追加差价。

timeline.title_en: Copenhagen – Trondheim: visiting the millennium-old city of the Viking kings
timeline.title_zh: 哥本哈根-特隆赫姆：拜访维京王的千年古城
timeline.description_en: Make your own way to Copenhagen Airport and check in for the flight to Trondheim according to your flight time; depending on the day's flights this may be a connecting (non-direct) flight, and there is no guide on board. Your driver-guide meets you on arrival in Trondheim, the thousand-year-old former capital. Visit Nidaros Cathedral, the most important medieval building in Scandinavia, then stroll to the colourful Old Town Bridge (the red 'Gate of Happiness') and the Bakklandet district to photograph the evening scenery. If you can, try Trondheim's traditional century-old local sweet. Overnight at the Grand Olav's House Hotel or a similar 4-star hotel, set in the charming historic Bakklandet quarter within walking distance of the cathedral, the Old Town Bridge and the district's colourful wooden alleys. Note: for some departures (e.g. 10 & 24 Jun, 8 & 22 Jul, 5 & 19 Aug, 2, 16 & 30 Sep) the routing reverses to the B itinerary, with the outbound leg by coach and the return Trondheim–Copenhagen by air; sightseeing content is unchanged.
timeline.description_zh: 请各位游客自行前往哥本哈根机场，根据航班时间自行办理登机手续，乘坐飞机前往特隆赫姆；视当天航班情况可能无法直飞，需安排转机，且航班上无导游陪同，需游客自行乘机前往目的地。司导在特隆赫姆机场接机，随后参观“千年古都”特隆赫姆，参观拥有斯堪的纳维亚半岛最重要中世纪建筑的尼达罗斯主教座堂（始建于1070年，挪威国王加冕教堂），步行至色彩缤纷的老城桥（红色木桥，又称“幸福之门”）和巴克兰德街区拍摄傍晚美景，有机会可品尝当地百余年历史的传统甜品——特隆赫姆球。夜宿格兰德奥拉夫之家酒店或同等4星级酒店，酒店位于迷人的巴克兰德历史街区，步行即可到达主教座堂、老城桥与街区彩色木屋小巷。提醒：部分团期（如6月10日、6月24日、7月8日、7月22日、8月5日、8月19日、9月2日、9月16日、9月30日）行程调整为B线，去程坐车、回程特隆赫姆飞哥本哈根，游览内容不变。

timeline.title_en: Trondheim – Kristiansund – Atlantic Ocean Road – Molde – Stranda: the photographer's pilgrimage, the Atlantic Ocean Road
timeline.title_zh: 特隆赫姆-克里斯蒂安松-大西洋之路-莫尔德-斯特兰达：摄影师的朝圣景点——大西洋之路
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, drive to the pretty town of Kristiansund at the eastern end of the famous Atlantic Ocean Road, visiting its harbour wharf and the Innlandet old-town district, where some of the rare WWII-surviving seaside buildings are preserved. After lunch, travel the scenic Atlantic Ocean Road (Atlanterhavsveien) — 36 km from Kårvåg to Bud, an island-hopping ribbon of causeways and bridges with 11 sharp bends, voted one of the world's best road trips by The Guardian and named a 'national construction of the century'. Continue to Molde, the 'town of the midnight sun' and home of Europe's storied jazz festival, with panoramic views of its 222 snow-capped peaks. Arrive at Stranda or the Valldal valley for the overnight. Stay at the Dreges by the River Hotel – a classic Norwegian hotel, or similar 3–4 star, set deep in the Geirangerfjord by the Storelva river, with a restaurant, indoor pool, sauna and pretty garden where you can sample local Norwegian cuisine.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，前往坐落在著名大西洋之路东端的美丽小镇克里斯蒂安松，参观港口码头、Innlandet老城区（可见独特美丽的海边建筑及二战中幸存并完善保存的建筑），市内还有始建于1914年的新艺术运动风格歌剧院。午餐后乘车驶上景观公路——大西洋之路（Atlanterhavsveien），从Kårvåg到Bud全长36公里，桥梁与堤道将一座座岛屿相连，途经11个急弯，被挪威人评为“世纪性建筑”、被英国《卫报》列入“摄影师之旅”。随后前往午夜阳光之城莫尔德，这里以爵士乐和每年七月的国际午夜爵士音乐节闻名，瓦尔登观景台可一览以222座雪峰著称的城市、峡湾与岛屿全景。之后到达斯特兰达或瓦尔河谷入住。夜宿德雷格斯河畔酒店——经典挪威酒店或同等3-4星级酒店，酒店坐落于蓋朗厄尔峡湾深处、斯托雷尔瓦河畔，设有餐厅、室内泳池、桑拿与后花园，可在此品鉴挪威当地特色美食。

timeline.title_en: Stranda – Geiranger – Briksdal Glacier – Sogndal: an epic of ice and a masterpiece of water
timeline.title_zh: 斯特兰达-蓋朗厄尔-布里克斯达尔冰川-松达尔：“冰”的史诗与“水”的杰作之旅
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, set out on the Eagle Road (Ørnevegen, Route 63), the road of 11 hairpin bends between Geiranger and Eidsdal, stopping at viewpoints such as the Ørnesvingen overlook. Board a Geirangerfjord cruise to glide between sheer cliffs ringed by countless waterfalls, viewing up close the Seven Sisters Falls (one drop of 250 m) and the facing Suitor Falls, with a chance to take in the Flydalsjuvet (Geiranger rock) viewpoint over the village and fjord. Then drive to the town of Olden to visit the Briksdal Glacier, an arm of mainland Europe's largest glacier (Jostedalsbreen) in Jostedal Glacier National Park, riding the open-top 'Troll Car' past the Volefossen waterfall to the ice front to feel the stillness and power of the ancient blue ice. In the afternoon continue to Sogndal. Overnight at the Sogndal Hofslund Fjord Hotel or a Best Western, or similar 3-star — a family-run hotel founded in 1912 on the Sognefjord, with its own garden and outdoor heated pool.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，出发前往老鹰之路（Ørnevegen，蓋朗厄尔与埃兹达尔之间的63号公路，以接连11个发夹弯闻名），途经Ørnesvingen等特色观景台。乘坐蓋朗厄尔峡湾游轮，于陡峭崖壁之间巡游，被无数瀑布环绕，近距离观赏七姐妹瀑布（其中一条落差250米）与对面的求婚者瀑布，并有机会在弗里达斯悬崖观景台俯瞰峡谷中的蓋朗厄尔小城与峡湾。随后乘车前往奥尔登小镇游览布里克斯达尔冰川——欧洲大陆最大冰川约斯特达尔布林冰川（Jostedalsbreen）的分支，位于约斯特达尔冰川国家公园内，乘坐有趣的精灵敞篷山地车途经沃伦福斯大瀑布，徒步至蓝冰前沿，感受万古寒冰的静谧与力量。下午前往松达尔入住酒店。夜宿松达尔霍芬桑德峡湾酒店或Best Western酒店或同等3星级酒店——一间始建于1912年的家庭经营酒店，位于松恩峡湾畔，拥有自己的花园与室外温水游泳池，复古温馨的欧式风格。

timeline.title_en: Sogndal – Flåm – Voss – Bergen: meeting the troll spirits aboard the steep Flåm mountain railway
timeline.title_zh: 松达尔-弗洛姆-沃斯-卑尔根：弗洛姆陡峭高山列车遇见“山妖精灵”
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, drive to Flåm to visit the Flåm Railway Museum (with its real El9 locomotive and exhibits on building Europe's steepest line), the village of Flåm and the Sognefjord — Norway's longest fjord at 204 km and up to 1308 m deep. Ride the world-famous steep Flåm mountain railway up to Myrdal (20 km, 80% of it on a 5.5% gradient), then take the official Norwegian railway to the beautiful lakeside town of Voss. Continue to the 'rainy city' of Bergen, where you freely visit the UNESCO World Heritage Bryggen wharf — the colourful Hanseatic wooden houses that are the city's postcard symbol — ride the Fløibanen funicular up Mount Fløyen for a panorama of the harbour, fjord and city, stroll the Bergen waterfront and feast on seafood at the Fisketorget fish market. Overnight at the Bergen Moxy, Thon or Scandic, or similar 4-star, a stylish modern hotel in the Solheimsviken / Marineholmen waterfront business district with a gym and a few minutes' walk to the seaside promenade.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，乘车前往弗洛姆，游览弗洛姆铁路博物馆（馆内展出真实的El9火车头及欧洲最陡峭铁路线的建设历程）、弗洛姆小镇和松恩峡灣（挪威第一大峡灣，全长204公里，最深处达1308米）。随后乘坐世界闻名的陡峭高山火车上行至米达尔（全长20公里，80%路段建在5.5%坡度的山坡上），在米达尔换乘挪威官方火车前往美丽的湖畔小镇沃斯。之后前往“雨城”卑尔根，自由参观世界遗产布吕根碼头（自1979年列入联合国教科文组织世界文化遗产，面对海港的彩色汉萨同盟木屋已成为城市象征），打卡明信片拍照点；乘坐弗罗伊恩山缆车（弗罗伊索道）登上弗罗伊恩山顶俯瞰整个城市、海港与峡灣，漫步卑尔根海滨，在Fisketorget鱼市品尝一顿海鲜大餐。夜宿卑尔根Moxy或Thon或Scandic酒店或同等4星级酒店——融合北欧风与工业风的现代时尚酒店，位于索尔海姆斯维肯与马林霍尔门商业区海滨地段，设有健身中心，步行几分钟可达海边步道。

timeline.title_en: Bergen – Hardangerfjord – Odda – Haugesund: the Hardangerfjord, oil-painting pastoral scenery
timeline.title_zh: 卑尔根-哈当厄尔峡灣-奥达-海于格松：哈当厄尔峡灣——油画般的田园风光
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, drive to the Steinsdalsfossen waterfall at Norheimsund, whose unique feature is that you can walk along the path behind the curtain of water without getting wet, sunlight forming rainbows through the falling spray. Continue to the Hardangerfjord, the gentlest of the four great fjords, its shores dotted with colourful cottages, pastures and the famous apple and cherry orchards planted by monks some 800 years ago — like an unrolled giant oil painting. Then visit the quiet little town of Odda, whose orchards are part of a World Heritage site, soaking up local life along the way through western Norway's rolling hills and forests. Arrive at Haugesund for the overnight. Stay at the Amanda Hotel Haugesund or similar 4-star, in the heart of the city centre, a local landmark with a long maritime history and a distinctive Art Nouveau style, within walking distance of the Amanda statue, the pink town hall and the library park, cafés, shops and restaurants.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，乘车来到诺海姆桑德的斯坦达尔瀑布，体验“水帘洞”般的奇观——瀑布从近乎垂直的山坡奔腾而下，旅行者可从瀑布后方穿行而过却一点都不被打湿，阳光透过水幕形成彩虹。之后前往哈当厄尔峡灣，这是四大峡灣中最为平缓、有田园般风景的峡灣，两岸点缀着彩色小屋的田园和约800年前僧侣种植的著名苹果园与樱桃园，如同一幅展开的巨幅油画。随后前往奥达小镇（其果园被列入世界文化遗产），一路欣赏挪威西部多变的丘陵与森林地貌，在这个宁静的小镇游览，感受当地生活气息。随后到达海于格松入住酒店。夜宿海于格松阿曼达酒店或同等4星级酒店，酒店位于市中心核心区，是海于格松的地标之一，以悠久的航海历史和独特的“新艺术运动”建筑风格闻名，步行即可到达阿曼达雕像、粉红色市政厅和图书馆公园，周边遍布咖啡馆、商店和餐厅。

timeline.title_en: Haugesund – Pulpit Rock (Preikestolen) – Stavanger: hiking the miracle rock over the magnificent Lysefjord
timeline.title_zh: 海于格松-布道石-斯塔万格：徒步布道台奇迹之石，领略吕瑟峡灣壮阔美景
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, drive from Haugesund to the Preikestolen (Pulpit Rock) area on the Lysefjord and hike up to this 'miracle rock' — a natural platform some 604 m sheer above the fjord, voted the world's most spectacular viewpoint by CNN's travel site, with breathtaking views over the mirror-still Lysefjord. Note: the trail is 3.8 km each way (about 8 km round trip), taking 4–5 hours at moderate intensity over rugged mountain paths — please mind your safety and go at your own pace, and wear non-slip, waterproof, high-top hiking boots. Bring your own lunch and drinking water as there are no shops or restaurants on the trail; if you feel unwell you can return to the visitor centre, which has a restaurant and café and pretty lakes nearby. In the afternoon arrive in Stavanger and check in. Overnight at the Stavanger Sola / Scandic hotel or similar 4-star in the city centre, just 750 m from the old-town square that hosts the Gladmat food festival in July.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，从海于格松出发前往吕瑟峡灣布道石景区，徒步奇迹之石——布道台。布道石位于吕瑟峡灣中部，是一块天然凌空形成的巨型石台，台顶与下方峡灣垂直落差604米，岩石平面约600平方米，被美国CNN旗下旅游生活网站评为全球最壮丽景色第一名，也是俯瞰吕瑟峡灣、领略峡灣之美的最佳地点之一。备注：布道石往返8公里（登山径单程3.8公里），需要4-5小时，中等强度，山路崎岖，请客人注意安全、量力而为，建议穿着防滑防水加高帮的登山鞋；请自备午餐及饮用水，沿途没有商店及餐厅，如身体不适可返回景区服务中心（设有餐厅、咖啡店，周围有美丽湖泊）。下午到达斯塔万格入住酒店。夜宿斯塔万格松恩/斯坎迪克酒店或同等4星级酒店，位于市中心，距离七月举行的爱食节（Gladmatfestivalen，斯塔万格美食节）所在的老城中心广场仅750米。

timeline.title_en: Stavanger – Kristiansand – Sandefjord: from a seaside stroll to the cultural colours of the oil capital
timeline.title_zh: 斯塔万格-克里斯蒂安桑-桑讷菲尤尔：海滨慢旅到石油之都的文化色彩
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, tour Stavanger, Norway's oil capital and a European Capital of Culture: stroll Gamle Stavanger, the old town of 173 well-preserved white wooden houses from the late 18th–early 19th centuries (home to the Michelin restaurants Renaa and Sabi Omakase), then the contrasting colourful Fargegaten ('colour street'), a barber-led street-art makeover lined with cafés, bars and gift shops. After lunch, follow your guide to the Sverd i fjell (Swords in Rock) monument — three giant Viking swords commemorating the Battle of Hafrsfjord, symbolising peace, unity and freedom, now a city emblem. Pause at Kristiansand, Norway's fifth city and a southern coastal jewel known for its beaches and lively cultural life. In the afternoon arrive at the southern seaside town of Sandefjord and check in. Overnight at the Sandefjord Atlantic House Hotel or similar 4-star, within walking distance of the harbour and old town, the whole hotel like a living museum of the coastal town's whaling heritage, with a local restaurant serving fresh Norwegian seafood.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，开始游览挪威的石油之都、欧洲文化之都斯塔万格：穿梭于Gamle Stavanger老城区保存完好的173套18世纪末19世纪初白色木屋小巷中（城中有Renaa和Sabi Omakase两家米其林餐厅），再到与素雅老城截然不同、色彩缤纷的网红街区法格卡腾（由理发师发起改造、充满街头艺术，沿街遍布咖啡馆、餐厅、小酒吧与礼品糖果店）。午餐后跟随导游参观斯塔万格巨剑阵（岩中之剑），这组纪念“Hafrsfjord之战”的雕塑由三把十几米高的维京巨剑组成，分别代表和平、统一与自由，现为斯塔万格的城市标志。中途在挪威第五大城市、南部海滨明珠克里斯蒂安桑休息。下午到挪威南部海滨城市桑讷菲尤尔入住酒店。夜宿桑讷菲尤尔大西洋之家酒店或同等4星级酒店，步行即可到达桑讷菲尤尔港口与老城区，整座酒店宛如一座活生生的博物馆，展现这座沿海小镇的捕鲸业历史，酒店餐厅提供新鲜海产等挪威特色美食。

timeline.title_en: Sandefjord – Oslo – Gothenburg: Nordic slow living — an art tour and harbour stroll
timeline.title_zh: 桑讷菲尤尔-奥斯陆-哥德堡：北欧式的慢生活——艺术巡礼与海港漫步
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, head to Oslo. Visit Oslo City Hall (exterior), where the Nobel Peace Prize is awarded each 10 December; watch the changing of the guard outside the Royal Palace (exterior); explore the medieval Akershus Fortress (exterior), which guarded Oslo for 700 years and was never captured; and see the glacier-like modern Oslo Opera House (exterior) — you are strongly encouraged to walk up its sloping marble roof rising from the fjord for views over the city. Then visit Vigeland Sculpture Park, themed on the journey of human life, with 192 sculptures and some 650 figures by Gustav Vigeland. Afterwards drive to the Swedish west-coast harbour city of Gothenburg and check in. Overnight at the Quality Hotel Gothenburg or similar 4-star — a 21-storey waterfront tower with 360-degree views, Scandinavian-design rooms, family activities (mascots Lollo & Bernie on weekends/school holidays) and The Social Bar Bistro.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，前往奥斯陆，参观诺贝尔和平奖颁奖地——奥斯陆市政厅（外观，每年12月10日在此举行诺贝尔奖颁奖仪式），在皇宫（外观）外观看卫兵换岗，之后游览中世纪城堡阿克斯胡斯城堡（外观，始建于1299年，见证奥斯陆700多年历史，历史上从未被攻克），参观如同冰川般的现代建筑奥斯陆歌剧院（外观），强烈推荐走上从峡灣中拔地而起的倾斜大理石屋顶，俯瞰峡灣城市风光。之后参观以思考生命与人生为主题的维格兰雕塑公园——以雕塑大师古斯塔夫·维格兰命名，共有192座雕塑、总计约650个人物雕像，集中突出“人生”主题。结束后前往瑞典西海岸海港城市哥德堡入住酒店。夜宿哥德堡品质酒店或同等4星级酒店——这座21层高的水畔建筑可饱览360度壮丽景色，客房采用斯堪的纳维亚设计，周末及学校假期有吉祥物Lollo和Bernie狗狗带来寻宝、手工等活动，并设有The Social Bar Bistro餐厅。

timeline.title_en: Gothenburg – Frederikshavn – Aalborg: stepping into a canvas of old and new colours
timeline.title_zh: 哥德堡-腓特烈港-奥尔堡：踏入一幅融入古今色彩的画卷
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, freely visit Masthugget Church (exterior) — set on a Gothenburg hilltop with sweeping city views, one of the city's three landmarks alongside the Poseidon statue — the Poseidon Sculpture (completed 1931, symbol of Sweden's seafaring age) and the Avenyn boulevard, Gothenburg's main thoroughfare lined with shops, cafés and restaurants. Then board a ferry at Gothenburg harbour, crossing the Kattegat to Frederikshavn (the 3.5-hour crossing has shops, restaurants, bars and a children's play area — the famous shrimp sandwich is highly recommended). After a short break in Frederikshavn, continue to Aalborg, where you freely explore the city sights: Aalborg Castle (exterior, a 16th-century fortress turned royal residence), Budolfi Church (a 14th-century Gothic cathedral with fine organ and stained glass), and the fairy-tale Duusgang lane and pedestrian street with its colourful low houses and 16th–19th-century brick-and-timber buildings. Overnight at the Scandic Aalborg or similar 4-star in the city centre, with shops and a shopping mall at the door, Scandinavian-style rooms, the URBAN Food & Drink restaurant and a gym.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，自由参观马斯塔蓋特教堂（外观，位于哥德堡山坡上，前方平台可俯瞰半个城市，与口红楼、海王波塞冬雕像并称哥德堡三大地标）、海神波塞冬雕塑（完成于1931年，是瑞典海上霸权与航海时代的象征）、Avenyn大道（哥德堡市中心主干道，两旁遍布商铺、咖啡馆、餐厅）。之后在哥德堡港口乘坐渡轮前往腓特烈港（3.5小时横渡卡特加特海峡，船上有商店、简餐、酒吧和儿童游乐区，强烈推荐品尝著名的虾肉三明治）。在腓特烈港短暂休息后，前往奥尔堡，抵达后自由参观市区景点：奥尔堡城堡（外观，建于16世纪，原为防御性要塞，后成为丹麦王室官邸）、Budolfi教堂（始建于14世纪的哥特式大教堂，内有精致管风琴与彩绘玻璃）、杜赫芬老街（童话般的色彩斑斓小巷）和步行街（保留大量16至19世纪砖木结构建筑）。随后入住酒店。夜宿奥尔堡斯堪迪克酒店或同等4星级酒店，位于市中心，门口即是商店和购物中心，房间采用斯堪的纳维亚风格，设有URBAN Food & Drink餐厅和健身房。

timeline.title_en: Aalborg – Odense – Copenhagen: into Andersen's town, becoming a fairy-tale character
timeline.title_zh: 奥尔堡-欧登塞-哥本哈根：走进安徒生小镇，当童话里的人物
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, travel to Odense, Hans Christian Andersen's fairy-tale town. Visit the H.C. Andersen House Museum (the new 2021 museum designed by Japanese architect Kengo Kuma, two-thirds underground with a maze-like garden above, 18 themed rooms displaying over 2,000 manuscripts, letters and personal items including Andersen's patched old suitcase, top hat and cane), his childhood home (the tiny 18 m² yellow house at Munkemøllestræde 3 where he was born in 1805), and St. Canute's Cathedral (a 14th-century Gothic cathedral with a white interior, Rococo pulpit, dazzling 16th-century altar and the tomb of King Canute). Then experience 19th-century Danish rural life at the Funen Village open-air museum, an authentically reconstructed village of 18th–19th-century farm buildings with pens, duck ponds, apple trees and gardens, evoking the countryside of Andersen's time. In the afternoon drive to Copenhagen and check in. Overnight at the AC Hotel Marriott Copenhagen or Scandic, or similar 4-star, near the Bella Center, with modern Danish-design rooms, a gym and a rooftop Asian restaurant-bar on the 23rd floor, 76 m up.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，前往安徒生童话小镇欧登塞，参观安徒生故居博物馆（2021年由日本建筑大师隈研吾设计的新馆，三分之二位于地下，地上是迷宫般的绿意花园，18间主题陈列室展出2000余件手稿、信件、画稿及私人物品，包括安徒生那只有补丁的旧皮箱、礼帽、手杖，多媒体室可聆听68国96种语言的安徒生童话译本）、安徒生兒时故居（位于蒙基莫莱街3号、仅18平方米的黄色小屋，是安徒生1805年诞生地）、圣克努德教堂（建于14世纪的哥特式大教堂，内部纯白，有精心装饰的洛可可式讲道坛、16世纪圣坛雕刻及国王Knud之墓）。之后在菲英村（菲英岛露天博物馆）里体验19世纪的丹麦乡村生活——以18、19世纪遗留的乡村建筑重建的完整村庄，有畜栏、养鸭塘、苹果树和花园，感受故乡带给安徒生的创作灵感。下午前往哥本哈根入住酒店。夜宿哥本哈根AC万豪酒店或斯堪迪克酒店或同等4星级酒店，毗邻贝拉中心，客房配备纯正丹麦设计，设有健身中心，并在76米高空的23层设有屋顶亚洲餐厅兼酒吧。

timeline.title_en: Copenhagen: a perfect meeting of the fairy-tale kingdom and the design capital
timeline.title_zh: 哥本哈根：童话王国与设计之都的完美邂逅
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, visit Denmark's emblem, the Little Mermaid statue (cast in 1913 by Edvard Eriksen), and the imposing Gefion Fountain in Langelinie park; the Renaissance star-shaped Kastellet (Five-Pointed Fortress); and watch the royal guard at Amalienborg Palace (exterior) — keep 1.5 m away if you photograph them. In the afternoon see Frederik's Church (exterior), known as the 'Marble Church' for its copper-green dome; the Round Tower (Rundetårn, exterior), Europe's oldest still-functioning observatory; the Royal Danish Library, Copenhagen's 'Black Diamond' clad in black granite; the famous landmark Nyhavn canal (built 1669–1673) with its colourful houses, bars and cafés; and Europe's renowned shopping street Strøget. The tour then concludes in central Copenhagen. There is no hotel overnight on this final day. Note: the product does not recommend booking flights that land in Copenhagen on the joining day or depart Copenhagen on the final day.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，参观丹麦的象征小美人鱼雕像（1913年由丹麦雕塑家爱德华·艾瑞克森铸造）、气势磅礴的吉菲昂女神喷泉（位于长堤公园）、文艺复兴时期星形要塞之一卡斯特雷特五角要塞，在阿美琳堡宫（外观）广场欣赏王室气派与皇家卫队换岗风采（合影记得保持1.5米距离）。下午参观腓特烈教堂（外观，又名“大理石教堂”，丹麦最著名的铜绿色圆顶教堂）、欧洲古老的天文台——圆塔（Rundetårn，外观，由克里斯钦四世修建）、哥本哈根的“黑钻石”丹麦皇家图书馆（表面覆盖黑色花岗岩）、著名地标之一新港（建于1669至1673年间的人工运河，两岸彩色房屋、酒吧、咖啡馆、餐馆林立）、欧洲有名的购物步行街斯楚格街。随后在哥本哈根市区结束美好旅程。当日无酒店住宿。提醒：本产品不推荐参团当天降落哥本哈根的航班，以及结束当天离开哥本哈根的航班。

meeting_en: Copenhagen, Denmark. Travellers make their own way to Copenhagen Airport for the flight to Trondheim, where the guide-driver meets the group.
meeting_zh: 丹麦哥本哈根。游客自行前往哥本哈根机场乘机飞往特隆赫姆，由司导在特隆赫姆接机。

faqs.question_en: Where and when do we meet and disperse?
faqs.question_zh: 集合和集散的时间和地点是？
faqs.answer_en: Line A — Meet: make your own way to Copenhagen Airport, fly to Trondheim, and the guide meets you at Trondheim Airport according to your flight time. Disperse: on the morning of the last day in central Copenhagen. Line B — Meet: 10:00 on the day in central Copenhagen. Disperse: on the last day at Trondheim Airport, where you are seen off to fly back to Copenhagen. For both lines, the product does not recommend booking flights that land in Copenhagen on the joining day or leave Copenhagen on the final day.
faqs.answer_zh: A线路——集合：当天自行前往哥本哈根机场乘坐航班到达特隆赫姆，导游根据航班时间在特隆赫姆机场接机；解散：行程最后一天上午在哥本哈根市中心。B线路——集合：当天上午10:00在哥本哈根市中心集合；解散：行程最后一天在特隆赫姆机场送机，游客乘机返回哥本哈根机场。两条线路均不推荐参团当天降落哥本哈根、以及结束当天离开哥本哈根的航班。

faqs.question_en: How do I get to Copenhagen Airport?
faqs.question_zh: 如何前往哥本哈根机场？
faqs.answer_en: Copenhagen Airport (CPH) is about 8 km from the city centre. The recommended option is the metro line M2, which runs directly from the city centre to the airport in about 15–20 minutes for a single fare of DKK 30 — good value. Taxis board at the rank outside the terminal; a city-centre-to-airport ride costs roughly DKK 250–350.
faqs.answer_zh: 哥本哈根机场（CPH）距离市中心约8公里。推荐乘坐地铁，性价比高且市中心线路直达机场，乘坐M2线约15-20分钟，单程票价30丹麦克朗。出租车在航站楼外的候客点上车，从市中心到机场费用大约在250-350丹麦克朗之间。

faqs.question_en: Can we swim in the sea or fjord during the trip?
faqs.question_zh: 行程中可以下海或峡灣游泳吗？
faqs.answer_en: Most hotels are in city commercial centres and are generally within walking distance of the shore, so you can stroll by the sea during free time in the evening. However, Norway's sea-water temperature is not suitable for swimming — we suggest using the hotel's indoor pool instead.
faqs.answer_zh: 行程中的酒店大多数在城市商业中心，步行一般都可以到达海边，晚上自由活动时间可选择漫步海边，但是挪威的海水温度不适宜下水游泳，建议使用酒店内的室内游泳池。

faqs.question_en: My English isn't good — will I manage during free time?
faqs.question_zh: 我的英文不好，我有能力自由活动吗？
faqs.answer_en: The hotels are located around the sightseeing areas, so walking back and forth is no problem at all. If you are worried about the language but want a deeper local experience, you can pair up with other group members, and there are plenty of fellow travellers active in the area every day.
faqs.answer_zh: 酒店位于游览景区的周边，步行往返没有任何问题。如果担心语言问题又希望深度体验当地人文，可以与其他团友结伴同行，并且每天都有大量的团友在周边活动。

faqs.question_en: I don't want to enter some of the sights in the itinerary — can I get a refund?
faqs.question_zh: 行程内的部分景点我不想进去，可以退费吗？
faqs.answer_en: You may spend free time around the sight, but you must return to the meeting point by the agreed time, and no refund can be given.
faqs.answer_zh: 您可以在景点周边自由活动，但是需要在约定的时间内到集合地点，并且无法退费。

faqs.question_en: What do I eat locally?
faqs.question_zh: 我在当地吃什么？
faqs.answer_en: Norwegians are expert at fish and seafood — salmon and cod are common, along with other seasonal seafood, and a local specialty is Norwegian reindeer meat. The cities we pass through have abundant specialty dining and seafood fish markets, with even the street snacks well worth lingering over. Most guests don't miss the local food, and the guide will introduce and recommend local restaurants.
faqs.answer_zh: 挪威人吃鱼和海鲜比较专业，常见的是三文鱼和鳕鱼，以及其他时令海鲜，另外比较有特色的是挪威的驯鹿肉。我们经过的城市里有着繁多的特色餐饮，或者是卖海鲜的鱼市，街边小吃也让人流连忘返，多数游客不会错过当地美食，同时导游也会给予大家当地餐厅的介绍和推荐。

faqs.question_en: Where are the staff from?
faqs.question_zh: 工作人员是哪里的？
faqs.answer_en: The guide is a Chinese-speaking guide and provides Chinese-language service throughout the trip.
faqs.answer_zh: 导游为中文导游，全程提供中文服务。

faqs.question_en: What gear and fitness do I need to hike up Pulpit Rock, and how hard is it?
faqs.question_zh: 登上布道台需要带什么装备，需要什么样的体力？徒步强度如何？
faqs.answer_en: Girafe specially arranges the hike up to Pulpit Rock on the Lysefjord — something that sets it apart from other group tours. From the coach car park to Pulpit Rock is 3.8 km each way, normally about 4–5 hours round trip, and we allow ample time for guests of all fitness levels to climb, enjoy the views and return, taking breaks as your strength allows. As there are no shops on the mountain, bring your own water bottle and a simple lunch; the fjord mountain paths are rugged, so non-slip, waterproof, high-top hiking boots are recommended, and waterproof clothing in case of rain is even better.
faqs.answer_zh: 长颈鹿特别安排了在吕瑟峡灣徒步登山去布道台，这是有别于其他跟团游的地方。从大巴停车场到布道台单程3.8公里，一般往返在4到5个小时左右，我们给予所有不同体力的贵宾足够时间来登山、赏景和返回，可根据自己的体力走走停停。由于山上没有商店，登山时都需要自带水壶和简单的午餐；峡灣地区山路崎岖，建议穿着防滑防水加高帮的登山鞋，若自备防水衣以备下雨则更优。

faqs.question_en: Are there signs on the mountain? Will I get lost?
faqs.question_zh: 山上有任何指示吗？不会迷路吧？
faqs.answer_en: Pulpit Rock is a famous Norwegian sight that hundreds of thousands of people hike each year, so there is signage throughout and red 'T' marks all along the trail. July is also peak season with many visitors, so you won't get lost — just follow the crowd.
faqs.answer_zh: 布道台是挪威出名的景点，每年都有数十万人来登山，所以全程都有指示，沿途都有红色T字标记。另外七月是旅游旺季，游客很多，跟着人走不会迷路。

faqs.question_en: About the Flåm mountain railway
faqs.question_zh: 关于弗洛姆高山列车
faqs.answer_en: The mountain railway starts at Flåm and ends at the summit station of Myrdal. The train stops for 5 minutes at Kjosfossen waterfall to hear the song of the troll spirits, then stops 10 minutes at Myrdal — but passengers may not get off to catch the next train, as all tickets are valid only for that specific service. Myrdal station is very small with only a few shops and is not worth lingering at; you take the same train back to Flåm.
faqs.answer_zh: 高山列车始于弗洛姆，终点在山顶的米达尔。火车会在克尤斯福森瀑布处停留5分钟，聆听山妖精灵的歌声，随后在米达尔停留10分钟，但乘客不可以下车乘下一班火车，所有车票都是当次车次有效。米达尔火车站很小，只有几个商店，不建议停留，需乘同一班火车返回弗洛姆。

faqs.question_en: Will sea fishing make me seasick?
faqs.question_zh: 海钓会晕船吗？
faqs.answer_en: The sea-fishing guide and skipper choose between fishing inside the fjord or in the open sea according to the day's weather. Even when winds and waves are stronger, the water inside the fjord is very calm; but if the weather is poor, far more fish are caught, so it's well worth braving the bad weather.
faqs.answer_zh: 海钓的向导和船长会根据当天的天气选择峡灣内海钓或者远海海钓。即使风浪较大，在峡灣内是非常平静的水面；但如果天气不好，捕获的鱼类就会非常多，非常值得去碰一碰坏天气。

faqs.question_en: Can the seafood I catch be cooked at a restaurant?
faqs.question_zh: 我钓上来的海鲜可以在餐厅加工吗？
faqs.answer_en: No. Norwegian restaurants strictly follow food-hygiene law and cannot process ingredients from non-formal sources. However, guests may prepare and eat it themselves in their own room — fresh cod and herring are delicious pan-fried or blanched.
faqs.answer_zh: 不可以，挪威的餐厅严格遵守食品卫生法，不可以加工非正规食品来源的食材。但游客可以在自己的房间自行加工食用，新鲜的鳕鱼和青鱼，生煎或汆烫都非常可口。

faqs.question_en: I'm not used to Norwegian seafood, am allergic to seafood, or am vegetarian — can I change the meal?
faqs.question_zh: 我不太习惯挪威海鲜或者海鲜过敏，或者我是素食主义者，是否可以更改套餐？
faqs.answer_en: Please note it when you register or contact your sales agent to change the meal package or choose a meal refund. If you raise it only after registration, the default meals will already be booked and we cannot cancel the restaurant reservation.
faqs.answer_zh: 请在报名前备注或与销售员联系，更改套餐或者选择餐饮退费。如报名后才提出，则按默认餐饮预订后，我社不可取消餐厅预定。

faqs.question_en: Does the Lofoten route overlap with the fjord route, and how do they connect?
faqs.question_zh: 挪威罗浮墩路线是否和挪威峡灣路线有重叠，或者如何衔接？
faqs.answer_en: Lofoten lies within Norway's Arctic Circle, about 2,000 km from the southern fjords, and the two areas differ entirely in scenery, landforms and customs. This product departs Monday–Friday (returning to Oslo on Friday evening), whereas fjord routes usually depart Saturday, so you can connect on Friday — we suggest booking the Radisson hotel at Oslo Airport on Friday. The best suggested link: join the fjord route Saturday morning, return to Oslo Friday evening, tour Oslo's harbour, opera house and palace area Saturday and Sunday, then join the Lofoten route Monday. Alternatively, do the Lofoten route from Monday, return to Oslo by Friday, then join the fjord route Saturday and tour Oslo after returning Friday.
faqs.answer_zh: 罗浮墩在挪威的北极圈境内，与挪威南部的峡灣相差2000公里，两地的风景、地貌、习俗都不同。本产品为每周一到周五发团（周五晚上返回奥斯陆），通常峡灣路线都是周六发团，因此可以在周五衔接，建议预定周五奥斯陆机场的Radisson酒店。最佳衔接路线为：周六上午参加峡灣路线，周五晚上返回奥斯陆，周六及周日游览奥斯陆碼头、歌剧院及皇宫区域，周一参加罗浮墩路线；或者周一参加罗浮墩路线，周五返回奥斯陆，周六再参加峡灣路线，最后周五返回后游览奥斯陆。

faqs.question_en: Do I need a visa?
faqs.question_zh: 是否需要签证？
faqs.answer_en: Yes. This product does not include visa fees — you need a Schengen visa (single- or multiple-entry); if you need visa processing, please choose a Schengen-visa product. After booking we provide free of charge all the materials needed to apply for the Schengen visa (see the detailed checklist). Your passport must be valid for at least six months from the date of departure, or customs may refuse entry. Visa fees, visa service fees, Schengen insurance fees and visa-centre appointment fees are all non-refundable and non-transferable, even if the product is changed or cancelled. 'Visa-worry-free' guarantee: for products signed with us at least 61 days before departure, if the visa is not obtained within 45 days before departure we bear all losses and immediately refund all travel fees; guests who do not meet this clause and fail to obtain a visa are refunded per the change & cancellation terms. If refused, notify us within 48 hours and provide the consulate's rejection letter; any supplementary/changed materials must be submitted within five days, and you may not unilaterally waive the right to 'visa defence'. If you commission us to process the Schengen visa, we purchase Schengen travel insurance meeting visa requirements; if not, you must buy travel insurance and handle claims yourself.
faqs.answer_zh: 需要。本产品不包含签证费用，需要办理申根签证（单次或多次入境）；如需办理签证请选择申根签证产品。预订后我社免费提供办理申根签证的全部材料（参考详细材料清单）。护照有效期需在离境之日起至少还有六个月，否则海关有权拒绝入境。签证费、签证服务费、申根保险费、签证中心预约费均不可退款，也无法更改使用者，即使产品退改签签证费用也无法退款。保签无忧：游客在出发日前61天与我社签约的旅游产品，如在出发前45天内未获取签证，我社承担所有损失，立即退还游客全部旅游费用；不符合该条款的游客如未正常获取签证，将按“退改与取消条款”退费。如遇拒签需在48小时内通知我社并出具使领馆拒签函，如需补充或更改材料需在五天内提交，且不得单方面放弃“签证抗辩”权利。游客委托我社办理申根签证的，我社为其购买符合申根签证要求的旅游保险；若未委托办理，需自行购买旅游保险并自行负责理赔。

faqs.question_en: Booking, changes & cancellation
faqs.question_zh: 预订、变更与取消须知
faqs.answer_en: Free no-reason cancellation: both the agency and the traveller may cancel without reason more than 30 days before departure (not including the 30th day). Payment does not equal confirmation — book at least 14 days ahead; orders need a second confirmation within at most 48 hours, and if not confirmed within 48 hours they are auto-refunded, so don't book connecting flights/hotels until confirmed. This is a shared (join-in) group tour that may share vehicles with other agencies' guests. Group size: this product is announced as formed at 10 people; if the minimum is not reached more than 30 days before departure, either party may cancel without liability. Connection rule: due to frequent flight changes, traffic, ferry cancellations, strikes and itinerary re-sequencing, you are required to arrive at the meeting point the day before the tour starts and leave the dispersal point the day after it ends, leaving sensible flight-connection buffers (≥5 hours for connections at the same airport, ≥7 hours for different airports in the same city; reasonable meet/disperse window 07:00–21:00) — losses from not doing so are the traveller's own. Rooms: single travellers default to a single-room supplement deposit (refunded pro-rata if successfully paired); twin rooms have beds assigned by the hotel (double or twin, not selectable); triple/family rooms are for two parents plus one minor, bed type not selectable. All European hotels are non-smoking, no cooking in rooms, no free toiletries or boiling water, check-in 14:00 / check-out 11:00, and air-conditioning is not standard. Listed hotel names are preferred; if full, a similar same-star hotel is substituted without separate notice. Pricing: all prices are quoted in EUR at the time of booking; if you pay in CNY, the rate is the real-time CNY price auto-calculated from the Bank of China 'euro selling price' on the day of payment, and the same applies to refunds (bank fees/rate differences borne by the traveller). Some departures have re-sequenced sightseeing order with unchanged content; where the itinerary sheet conflicts with the dispatch notice, the dispatch notice prevails, and where the dispatch notice conflicts with the guide's on-site notice, the guide's on-site notice prevails.
