faqs.answer_zh: 免费取消：出发前30天（不含第30天）旅行社和旅行者均有权无理由取消。支付不等于确认行程，建议提前至少14天预订，订单需在最多48小时内二次确认，超48小时未确认则自动退款，未获确认前请勿预订衔接机票及酒店。本产品为散客拼团，全部或部分行程可能与其他旅行社客人合并用车。成团：本产品宣布成团人数为10人，行程开始前30天（不含第30天）未达成团人数的，双方均可解除合同且不承担违约责任。衔接要求：由于航变频繁、交通拥堵、渡轮取消、罢工游行及行程顺序调整，旅行者须在参团日前一天抵达集合地、离团日后一天离开集散地，并预留合理航班衔接时间（同一机场转机至少5小时，同城不同机场至少7小时，合理集散时间段为07:00至21:00），未预留导致的损失由旅行者自行承担。房型：单人报名默认含单人房差押金（成功拼房后按比例退款）；标准双人间床型由酒店安排（大床或双床，不可指定）；三人家庭间默认两位父母与一位未成年儿童入住，床型不可选。欧洲所有酒店禁烟、禁止在房间内做饭、不提供一次性洗漱用品及免费开水，入住时间14:00、退房时间11:00，且不以安装空调为标准设施。行程内列明酒店名称为优先入住酒店，如订满则换为相同星级的相近酒店，不再另行通知。价格：所有定价以欧元为预订时计价单位，如选择人民币支付，则以当天支付时按中国银行实时“欧元卖出价”自动计算的人民币价格为准，退款同样适用当日即时汇率（汇率差及银行手续费由旅行者承担）。部分团期游览先后次序有调整但内容一致；如行程单与出团通知书冲突，以出团通知书为准；如出团通知书与导游现场通知冲突，以导游现场通知为准。

faqs.question_en: Health & safety requirements
faqs.question_zh: 健康与安全须知
faqs.answer_en: To ensure a smooth trip and prevent personal injury, please have a necessary medical check before departure and do NOT sign up if you have any of the following: infectious diseases (e.g. active tuberculosis, typhoid); cardiovascular disease (severe hypertension, heart failure, myocardial ischemia, myocardial infarction); cerebrovascular disease (cerebral embolism, cerebral haemorrhage, brain tumour); respiratory disease (emphysema, cor pulmonale); psychiatric conditions including epilepsy; severe anaemia (haemoglobin below 50 g/L); or being in the recovery period from major/medium surgery. Pregnancy: at 35 weeks or more you cannot join under any circumstances; at 28 weeks or more you must provide a doctor's exam report (within 7 days) and the attending doctor's consent; under 28 weeks please sign up with caution, sign a liability waiver, and you cannot take part in adventure, skiing, sea-going, high-altitude or outdoor activities. Disabled travellers need a doctor's report (within 7 days) plus the attending doctor's consent, an immediate-family companion, and must apply at least 61 days ahead for a reserved place and special facilities. Elderly (70+) need a health certificate and physical-exam report and an immediate-family companion (or sign a waiver if not provided); this is a long trip requiring a certain walking ability and good fitness, so those not physically up to it should sign up with caution, and adventure/ski/sea/high-altitude/outdoor activities require the attending physician's consent; apply at least 61 days ahead for age-friendly service. Minors (under 18) must be accompanied by an immediate relative or guardian; some sights have special limits for under-18/12/6; for infants under 6 or children under 30 kg confirm a safe child seat in advance or bring an EU-compliant one; an under-18 travelling abroad without parents needs a parental authorisation letter (both parents' if travelling with others). The product does not accept infants under 2. Per Article 15 of the Tourism Law, travellers must truthfully declare health information relevant to the activity (including pregnancy, lactation, chronic illness, infectious-disease history, suspected symptoms or recent epidemic-area travel) and follow safety warnings; concealment causing harm or transmission risk makes the traveller liable, and the agency may terminate the contract without refund while the traveller compensates other guests' and the agency's losses.
faqs.answer_zh: 为确保顺利出行、防止旅途中发生人身意外伤害，请在出行前做一次必要的身体检查，如存在下列情况请勿报名：传染性疾病患者（如活动期肺结核、伤寒）；心血管疾病患者（如严重高血压、心功能不全、心肌缺氧、心肌梗塞）；脑血管疾病患者（如脑栓塞、脑出血、脑肿瘤）；呼吸系统疾病患者（如肺气肿、肺心病）；精神病患者（如癫痫及各种精神病）；严重贫血患者（血红蛋白水平在50克/升以下）；大中型手术恢复期病患者。孕妇：妊娠第35周及以上任何情况下都无法参团；第28周及以上需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书；第28周以下请慎重报名，需签署旅行社免责声明书，且无法参加探险、滑雪、出海、高空、户外等项目。残疾人需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书、需直系家属陪同、并提前至少61天申请预留位置及专用配套设施。70周岁以上老年人需提供健康证明、体检报告并需直系家属陪同（如无法提供则需签署免责声明书）；因行程较长需要一定步行能力和较高体力，体力不支者请慎重报名，涉及探险、滑雪、出海、高空、户外等项目需持主治医师同意书，并提前至少61天申请适老化服务。未成年人（未满18周岁）需由直系亲属或监护人陪同；部分项目对未满18/12/6周岁有特殊限定；6岁以下婴儿或30公斤以下儿童请提前确认安全座椅或自备符合欧盟制式的座椅；无父母陪同的18岁以下未成年人出境须持父母授权书（与他人同行需父母双方授权书）；本产品不接受2周岁以下婴儿参团。根据《旅游法》第15条，旅游者需如实告知与旅游活动相关的个人健康信息（包括妊娠期、哺乳期、慢性病、传染病史、疑似症状或近期疫区旅居史）并遵守安全警示规定；如因隐瞒导致人身损害或传播风险，旅游者需自行承担责任，旅行社可解除合同且不退还费用，旅游者还需赔偿其他游客及旅行社的损失。

title_en: Scandinavia 3 Capitals: Oslo to Stockholm 6-Day Small-Group Tour
title_zh: 北欧三国6天小团游：奥斯陆至斯德哥尔摩
short_en: A one-way 6-day small-group journey across Norway, Denmark and Sweden, linking three Nordic capitals, Andersen's fairytale town and a Kattegat ferry crossing.
short_zh: 6天单程小团之旅，串联挪威、丹麦、瑞典三国首都，畅游安徒生童话小镇，体验卡特加特海峡渡轮，尽享北欧慢生活。
desc_en: This one-way Scandinavian adventure runs from Oslo to Stockholm, weaving together three Nordic capitals with the charm of small Danish towns. Cross the Kattegat by ferry, wander Hans Christian Andersen's hometown of Odense, admire Copenhagen's Little Mermaid and royal palaces, and glide by sightseeing boat to Stockholm's UNESCO-listed Drottningholm Palace. Along the way you experience the relaxed Nordic pace of life, blending art, architecture, fairytales and waterside cities into one seamless route.
desc_zh: 这是一段从奥斯陆到斯德哥尔摩的单程北欧之旅，串联挪威、丹麦、瑞典三国首都，融汇丹麦小镇的温柔与浪漫。乘渡轮横渡卡特加特海峡，走进安徒生故乡欧登塞的童话世界，欣赏哥本哈根的小美人鱼与皇家宫殿，再乘观光游船驶向斯德哥尔摩的世界文化遗产卓宁霍姆宫。一路体验北欧式慢生活，将艺术、建筑、童话与水畔城市完美融合于一条线路之中。

highlights.en: Three Nordic capitals in one trip: Oslo, Copenhagen and Stockholm
highlights.zh: 一次畅游三国首都：奥斯陆、哥本哈根与斯德哥尔摩

highlights.en: Vigeland Sculpture Park and Oslo's striking opera house and waterfront architecture
highlights.zh: 维格兰雕塑公园，以及奥斯陆歌剧院与峡湾海港建筑之美

highlights.en: Step into Hans Christian Andersen's fairytale town of Odense and the Funen Village
highlights.zh: 走进安徒生童话小镇欧登塞与菲英村，化身童话里的人物

highlights.en: Copenhagen icons: the Little Mermaid, Nyhavn harbour and Amalienborg Palace
highlights.zh: 哥本哈根经典：小美人鱼雕像、彩色新港与阿美琳堡宫

highlights.en: Ferry across the Kattegat from Frederikshavn to Gothenburg
highlights.zh: 乘渡轮横渡卡特加特海峡，从腓特烈港抵达哥德堡

highlights.en: Sightseeing cruise to Stockholm's UNESCO World Heritage Drottningholm Palace
highlights.zh: 乘观光游船前往世界文化遗产卓宁霍姆宫

highlights.en: One-way deep route with city-centre 4-star hotels and all attractions included
highlights.zh: 单程深度线路，入住市区品牌4星级酒店，景点门票一价全含

highlights.en: Small group with Chinese-speaking guide-driver and no forced shopping
highlights.zh: 中文司导陪同的享乐小团，绝无强制购物

includes.en: Hotels: 5 nights in 4-star hotels (Norway has abolished its hotel star rating; Norwegian hotel star levels refer to the Booking or Ctrip hotel star standard)
includes.zh: 【酒店】四星级酒店5晚；（挪威酒店取消星级评定，酒店星级参考Booking或携程的酒店星级标准）

includes.en: Meals: 5 Scandinavian-style hotel buffet breakfasts
includes.zh: 【餐饮】斯堪迪纳维亚式酒店自助早餐5餐

includes.en: Operating fees: tourist city tax, city entry fees, residence tax, road and bridge tolls, parking and fuel fees, driver-guide meal allowances and other in-itinerary operating costs
includes.zh: 【执行】游客城市税、进城费、居住税、过路过桥费、停车燃油费、司导餐补等行程内执行费用

includes.en: Vehicle: tourist coach or tourist business van
includes.zh: 【车辆】旅游巴士或旅游商务车

includes.en: Guide: professional driver + Chinese-speaking guide, or a Chinese driver-guide throughout (note: for groups of 8 or fewer, a business van + Chinese-speaking driver-guide is arranged)
includes.zh: 【导游】职业司机+中文导游，或者全程中文华人司机兼导游（备注：8人及以下则安排为商务旅行车+中文司机兼导游）

includes.en: Luggage: 1 piece of checked luggage up to 23 kg and 1 piece of carry-on luggage
includes.zh: 【行李】1件23公斤行李及1件随身行李

includes.en: Tickets: Stockholm City Hall (admission + official guided commentary), Vasa Museum (admission + official guided commentary), Stockholm sightseeing cruise, Hans Christian Andersen Museum, Andersen's childhood home, Funen Village, the Frederikshavn-to-Gothenburg ferry, and Vigeland Sculpture Park
includes.zh: 【门票】斯德哥尔摩市政厅（门票+官导讲解）、瓦萨沉船博物馆（门票+官导讲解）、斯德哥尔摩观光游船、安徒生博物馆、安徒生儿时故居、菲英村、腓特烈港到哥德堡渡轮、维格兰雕塑公园

excludes.en: Passport: personal passport fees
excludes.zh: 护照：个人护照费用

excludes.en: Visa: tourist visa fees required for the countries listed in the itinerary
excludes.zh: 签证：行程中所列旅游国家所需的观光签证费用

excludes.en: Insurance: travel insurance fees (if the itinerary involves high-risk sports, please verify whether your travel insurance covers that activity)
excludes.zh: 保险：旅游保险费用；（如行程内涉及到高风险运动，请核实旅游保险是否包含该项运动）

excludes.en: Tips: tips for the guide and driver totaling EUR 10 per person per day, same price for adults and children
excludes.zh: 小费：游客支付导游和司机小费一共10欧/人/天，大小同价

excludes.en: Meals: apart from the specialty meals included in the itinerary, lunch and dinner are not included
excludes.zh: 餐饮：除行程内包含的特色餐外、行程中不包含午、晚正餐费用

excludes.en: Tickets: attractions not stated as included (including but not limited to sights marked "exterior", and all "recommended", "optional", "experience" and any other items whose admission is not stated as included; if you wish to enter, please pay on your own)
excludes.zh: 门票：行程中未注明费用包含的景点（包括，但不仅限于行程中注明“外观”的景点，“推荐”、“可选”、“体验”等等所有未提及费用包含的项目，如游客需要参观，敬请自理）

excludes.en: Extended accommodation: extra accommodation, transport and sightseeing costs outside the itinerary
excludes.zh: 延长住宿：行程外额外延长的住宿、交通、观光费用

excludes.en: Personal expenses: such as drinks and alcohol, taxis, telephone charges and other personal spending
excludes.zh: 私人消费：如饮料酒类、出租车、电话费等个人消费

excludes.en: Other transport: transport not mentioned in the inclusions beyond the included business van or minibus, such as Venice gondolas, and sightseeing trains or electric taxis in traffic-restricted zones - please pay on your own
excludes.zh: 其他交通：除包含商务旅行车或者中巴之外，费用包含中未提及的其他交通费用，如威尼斯贡多拉，以及车辆限行区的观光火车、电瓶出租车等费用敬请自理

excludes.en: Free activities: night-time self-touring and recommended items in the itinerary, and any resulting transport, dining, admission, shopping and other costs
excludes.zh: 自由活动：游客夜间自行游览及行程中的推荐项目，以及产生的交通、餐饮、门票、购物等费用

excludes.en: Experience activities: various travel experience activities not included in the itinerary
excludes.zh: 体验活动：行程中的没有包含的各项旅游体验活动

excludes.en: Other costs: any costs not mentioned in the inclusions. In cases of force majeure (natural disasters, war, strikes, etc.) or special circumstances such as transport delays, flight cancellations or time changes, embassy visa delays, insufficient group numbers, or other extra costs not caused by our company (such as overseas visa extension fees, accommodation, meals and transport, national airline fare adjustments, etc.), our company reserves the right to charge the price difference
excludes.zh: 其他费用：费用包含中未提及的费用。如因天灾、战争、罢工等不可抗力的原因，及因交通延阻、航班取消或更改时间、使馆延误出签证、人数不足等特殊情况或其他非我公司原因所引致的额外费（如在外延期签证费、住、食及交通费、国家航空运价调整等），我公司有权追加差价

timeline.title_en: Oslo - Gothenburg: Nordic Slow Living, an Art Tour and Harbor Stroll
timeline.title_zh: 奥斯陆-哥德堡：北欧式的慢生活，艺术巡礼与海港漫步
timeline.description_en: Meet at 11:00 in the center of the Norwegian capital, Oslo. Visit Oslo City Hall (exterior), where the Nobel Peace Prize is awarded, then watch the changing of the guard outside the Royal Palace (exterior). Continue to the medieval Akershus Fortress (exterior, built 1299, beside the city hall), and to the glacier-like modern Oslo Opera House (exterior) - the sloping marble roof rising from the Oslofjord is highly recommended for the panoramic fjord-city views from the top. Then explore Vigeland Sculpture Park, named after sculptor Gustav Vigeland, with 192 sculptures and 650 figures on the theme of the human life cycle. After the visit, drive to the Swedish west-coast harbor city of Gothenburg and check in. Overnight at Quality Hotel Gothenburg or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午11:00在挪威首都奥斯陆市中心集合，前往参观诺贝尔和平奖颁奖地——奥斯陆市政厅（外观），在皇宫（外观）外观看卫兵换岗。之后游览始建于1299年、坐落在市政厅旁的中世纪城堡阿克斯胡斯城堡（外观），并参观如同冰川般的现代建筑奥斯陆歌剧院（外观），强烈推荐走上自峡湾拔地而起的倾斜白色大理石屋顶，俯瞰峡湾城市风光。随后参观以思考生命与人生为主题、由著名雕塑家古斯塔夫·维格兰命名的维格兰雕塑公园，园内共有192座雕塑、650个人物雕像，表现人从出生至死的各个阶段。结束参观后前往瑞典西海岸海港城市哥德堡入住酒店。夜宿：哥德堡品质酒店或同等四星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Gothenburg - Frederikshavn - Aalborg: Stepping into a Canvas of Old and New
timeline.title_zh: 哥德堡-腓特烈港-奥尔堡：踏入一幅融入古今色彩的画卷
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, freely visit Masthugget Church (exterior), the Poseidon statue and Avenyn boulevard in Gothenburg. Masthugget Church (completed 1914) sits on a hill with a 60-plus-meter bell tower and, together with the Lipstick Building and the Poseidon statue, is one of Gothenburg's three landmarks; the 1931 Poseidon statue symbolizes Sweden's seafaring era. Then board a ferry at Gothenburg harbor and cross the Kattegat strait (about 3.5 hours) to Frederikshavn in Denmark - the onboard shops, restaurants and famous shrimp sandwiches make the crossing a relaxing scenic journey. After a short break in Frederikshavn, continue to Aalborg, where you freely visit the city sights: Aalborg Castle (exterior), Budolfi Church, and the Hjelmerstald old street and pedestrian street. Overnight at Scandic Hotel Aalborg or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，自由参观马斯塔盖特教堂（外观）、海神波塞冬雕塑和Avenyn大道。马斯塔盖特教堂于1914年竣工，坐落在哥德堡的小山坡上，60多米高的钟楼是其标志，与口红楼、海神波塞冬雕像并称哥德堡三大地标；1931年完成的波塞冬雕像是瑞典航海时代的象征。之后在哥德堡港口乘坐渡轮横渡卡特加特海峡（约3.5小时）前往丹麦腓特烈港，船上商店、简餐与著名的虾肉三明治让横渡成为一段惬意的观景旅程。在腓特烈港短暂休息后前往奥尔堡，抵达后自由参观奥尔堡市区景点：奥尔堡城堡（外观）、Budolfi教堂、杜赫芬老街和步行街。夜宿：奥尔堡斯堪迪克酒店或同等四星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Aalborg - Odense - Copenhagen: Into Andersen's Town, a Fairy-tale Character
timeline.title_zh: 奥尔堡-欧登塞-哥本哈根：走进安徒生小镇，当童话里的人物
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, travel to Odense, the fairy-tale town of Hans Christian Andersen. Visit the Hans Christian Andersen Museum (the new building, designed by Japanese architect Kengo Kuma and opened in 2021, with two-thirds underground and 18 themed rooms displaying over 2,000 manuscripts, letters and personal items), Andersen's childhood home (the 18-square-meter yellow house at Munkemollestraede 3 where he was born in 1805), and St. Canute's Cathedral (a 14th-century Gothic cathedral where Danish King Knud is buried). Then experience 19th-century rural Danish life at the Funen Village open-air museum, the source of much of Andersen's creative inspiration. In the afternoon, continue to Copenhagen and check in. Overnight at AC Hotel Marriott Copenhagen or Scandic Hotel, or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，前往安徒生童话小镇欧登塞，参观安徒生博物馆（由日本建筑大师隈研吾设计、2021年开幕的新馆，三分之二位于地下，设18间主题陈列室，展出2000余件手稿、信件及私人物品）、安徒生儿时故居（位于蒙基莫莱街3号、安徒生1805年诞生的18平方米黄色小屋）和圣克努特教堂（建于14世纪的哥特式大教堂，丹麦国王Knud安葬于此）。之后在菲英村露天博物馆体验19世纪的丹麦乡村生活，感受故乡带给安徒生的创作灵感。下午前往哥本哈根入住酒店。夜宿：哥本哈根AC万豪酒店或斯堪迪克酒店，或同等四星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Copenhagen - Malmo: A Perfect Encounter Between Fairy-tale Kingdom and Design Capital
timeline.title_zh: 哥本哈根-马尔默：童话王国与设计之都的完美邂逅
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, visit the Little Mermaid statue (Denmark's symbol, created in 1912 by sculptor Edvard Eriksen), the majestic Gefion Fountain, and the Renaissance star-shaped Kastellet five-pointed fortress; then admire the royal grandeur and the changing of the guard at Amalienborg Palace (exterior). In the afternoon, visit Frederik's Church (exterior), also known as the Marble Church (begun 1779, completed 1894, with a 31-meter dome); the Round Tower (Rundetaarn, exterior), Europe's oldest functioning observatory built by Christian IV; the Royal Danish Library, Copenhagen's waterfront "Black Diamond"; the famous landmark Nyhavn (the colorful canal dug 1669-1673); and Stroget, one of Europe's well-known pedestrian shopping streets. After the visit, cross the Oresund Bridge to Malmo and check in. Overnight at Scandic Hotel Malmo or Quality Hotel, or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，参观丹麦的象征小美人鱼雕像（由雕塑家爱德华·艾瑞克森于1912年创作）、气势磅礴的吉菲昂女神喷泉、文艺复兴时期星形要塞之一卡斯特雷特五角要塞，在阿美琳堡宫（外观）欣赏王室气派与卫队换岗风采。下午参观腓特烈教堂（外观）又名“大理石教堂”（始建于1779年、1894年竣工，内部直径31米的巨大圆顶）、欧洲古老且仍在使用的天文台圆塔（Rundetaarn，外观，由克里斯钦四世修建）、哥本哈根滨水的“黑钻石”丹麦皇家图书馆、著名地标之一新港（建于1669至1673年间的人工运河）、以及欧洲有名的购物步行街斯楚格街。结束参观后穿越厄勒海峡大桥前往马尔默入住酒店。夜宿：马尔默斯堪迪克酒店或品质酒店，或同等四星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Malmo - Jonkoping - Stockholm: An Old-and-Modern Hybrid City Linking Denmark and Sweden
timeline.title_zh: 马尔默-延雪平-斯德哥尔摩：古老又现代的混血城市——联接丹麦和瑞典的重镇
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, visit the HSB Turning Torso (the 54-storey, 190-meter landmark that twists 90 degrees, ranked among the world's top five skyscrapers by Travel + Leisure in 2012), Ribersborg Beach (about 2 km long beside the Oresund strait, with views of the Oresund Bridge), Stortorget square and the City Hall (exterior, the Dutch Renaissance Radhuset built in 1546, with King Karl X's equestrian statue), St. Peter's Church (exterior, a 14th-century Baltic Gothic church with a 105-meter spire and a 15-meter wooden altar), and Lilla Torg, the small square (built 1591, surrounded by 16th-18th century half-timbered houses). After lunch, travel to the "match city" of Jonkoping, located in the Smaland region on the shore of Lake Vattern, a 19th-century match-manufacturing center with a unique match museum. Then check in. Overnight at Home Hotel Nacka Stockholm or Scandic Hotel, or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，参观HSB旋转中心（旋转大楼，共54层、高190米，整栋旋转90度，2012年被美国Travel + Leisure杂志评为全球摩天大楼前五强）、里伯斯堡海滩（位于厄勒海峡旁，海滩长约2公里，可远眺厄勒海峡大桥）、斯托特广场与市政厅（外观，市政厅Radhuset建于1546年，为荷兰文艺复兴式建筑，广场中间为瑞典国王卡尔十世的青铜骑像）、圣彼得教堂（外观，14世纪波罗的海哥特式教堂，尖塔高105米，内有高达15米的北欧第一木质祭坛）、Lilla Torg小广场（建于1591年，四周是16至18世纪半木结构的房子）。午餐后，前往“火柴之城”延雪平——位于瑞典南部斯莫兰地区、地处韦特恩湖畔，是19世纪有名的火柴制造中心，拥有一座独特的火柴博物馆。随后入住酒店。夜宿：斯德哥尔摩纳卡Home酒店或斯堪迪克酒店，或同等四星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Stockholm: The Majesty and Grace of the "Capital of the North"
timeline.title_zh: 斯德哥尔摩：领略“斯京”的大气磅礴和娇柔似水
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, visit Stockholm City Hall (built from 1911, taking 12 years to complete, on the shore of Lake Malaren) and the Old Town (Gamla Stan, dating from the 13th century, with medieval lanes, cobblestone streets and the SALUHALL traditional market, open daily 10:00-16:00), then the Vasa Museum (housing the world's only preserved 17th-century ship, which sank in 1628 on its maiden voyage just 2 km from the harbor). Afterwards, board a sightseeing cruise to view Stockholm's skyline from the water before gliding into the tranquil Lake Malaren and arriving at the UNESCO World Heritage site of Drottningholm. Freely visit Drottningholm Palace (exterior), the "Versailles of Sweden" and current royal residence, and its palace gardens (free, with French Baroque and English landscape sections), before the tour ends in the city center. No hotel accommodation tonight.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，前往参观斯德哥尔摩市政厅（建于1911年、历时12年完成，坐落在梅拉伦湖畔）和老城区（建立于13世纪，保留中世纪小巷、圆石街道，以及每天10点至16点营业的SALUHALL传统市集），之后参观瓦萨沉船博物馆（馆藏世界上独有保存完好的17世纪船舶瓦萨号，1628年首航时在距港口仅2公里处沉没）。随后乘坐观光游船从水上视角欣赏斯德哥尔摩的城市轮廓，缓缓驶入宁静的梅拉伦湖，最终抵达世界文化遗产皇后岛，自由参观卓宁霍姆宫（外观）——被誉为“瑞典的凡尔赛”、瑞典国王王后现居于此——及免费开放的宫廷花园（分法式巴洛克与英式两部分），随后在市区结束美好旅程。当晚无酒店住宿。

meeting_en: Central Oslo, Norway. Group meets at 11:00 in the city centre on Day 1; the tour ends one-way in Stockholm, Sweden.
meeting_zh: 挪威奥斯陆市中心。第1天上午11:00在市中心集合；单程线路，于瑞典斯德哥尔摩结束。

faqs.question_en: Where and when do we meet and disperse?
faqs.question_zh: 集合和集散的时间和地点是怎样的？
faqs.answer_en: Route A: meet at 11:00 (the source notes "this afternoon 11:00") in central Oslo; disperse around 15:00 on the last day in central Stockholm. Route B: meet at 11:00 in the morning at Stockholm City Hall; disperse in central Oslo on the last day. For both routes, flights that land in Stockholm on the joining day or depart Stockholm on the ending day are not recommended.
faqs.answer_zh: A线路：当天11:00在奥斯陆市区集合；行程最后一天15:00左右在斯德哥尔摩市区解散。B线路：当天上午11:00在斯德哥尔摩市政厅集合；行程最后一天在奥斯陆市中心解散。两条线路均不推荐参团当天降落斯德哥尔摩的航班，以及结束当天离开斯德哥尔摩的航班。

faqs.question_en: How do I get from Stockholm Airport to the city center?
faqs.question_zh: 如何从斯德哥尔摩机场到达斯德哥尔摩市区？
faqs.answer_en: Stockholm Arlanda Airport (ARN) is about 42 km from the city center. If you are short on time or have large luggage, the Arlanda Express is the best choice: it runs non-stop from Stockholm Central to the airport in about 20 minutes, with a one-way fare of 340 SEK per person (tickets from machines at the express entrance and platform). A taxi from the city to the airport costs around 800 SEK, while ride-hailing apps Bolt and Uber are widely available and usually cheaper, around 650 SEK.
faqs.answer_zh: 斯德哥尔摩机场（ARN）距离市中心约42公里。如果赶时间或拖着大件行李，机场快线Arlanda Express是最佳选择：从斯德哥尔摩中央站到机场约20分钟、中间不停车，单程票价340瑞典克朗/人（可在机场快线入口和站台的自动售票机购买）。出租车从市区到机场约800瑞典克朗；网约车Bolt和Uber在斯德哥尔摩都很普及，价格通常比出租车便宜，约650瑞典克朗。

faqs.question_en: Can I swim in the sea or fjord during the trip?
faqs.question_zh: 行程中可以下海或峡湾游泳吗？
faqs.answer_en: Most hotels are in the city's commercial center and the seaside is usually within walking distance, so during free evening time you can stroll along the shore. However, the sea-water temperature in Norway is not suitable for swimming, so we suggest using the hotel's indoor swimming pool instead.
faqs.answer_zh: 行程中的酒店大多位于城市商业中心，步行一般都可到达海边，晚上自由活动时间可选择漫步海边。但挪威的海水温度不适宜下水游泳，建议使用酒店内的室内游泳池。

faqs.question_en: My English is not good - can I manage the free-activity time?
faqs.question_zh: 我的英文不好，我有能力自由活动吗？
faqs.answer_en: The hotels are located near the sightseeing areas, so walking back and forth poses no problem at all. If you are worried about the language but want a deeper local experience, you can pair up with fellow travelers, and there are plenty of group members active in the surrounding area every day.
faqs.answer_zh: 酒店位于游览景区的周边，步行往返没有任何问题。如果担心语言问题又希望深度体验当地人文，可以与其他团友结伴同行，并且每天都有大量团友在周边活动。

faqs.question_en: I don't want to enter some of the attractions in the itinerary - can I get a refund?
faqs.question_zh: 行程内的部分景点我不想进去，可以退费吗？
faqs.answer_en: You may take free time around the attraction, but you must return to the meeting point at the agreed time, and no refund is available for the attractions you skip.
faqs.answer_zh: 您可以在景点周边自由活动，但需要在约定的时间内到集合地点，并且无法退费。

faqs.question_en: What will I eat locally?
faqs.question_zh: 我在当地吃什么？
faqs.answer_en: Nordic people are expert with fish and seafood - common choices are salmon and cod and other seasonal seafood, and a notable specialty is Norwegian reindeer meat. The cities along the route offer abundant local food and seafood fish markets, with even street snacks worth lingering over. Most travelers won't want to miss the local cuisine, and the guide will also introduce and recommend local restaurants.
faqs.answer_zh: 北欧人吃鱼和海鲜比较专业，常见的是三文鱼和鳕鱼以及其他时令海鲜，另外比较有特色的是挪威的驯鹿肉。途经的城市里有繁多的特色餐饮，或是卖海鲜的鱼市，街边小吃也让人流连忘返。多数游客不想错过当地美食，同时导游也会为大家提供当地餐厅的介绍和推荐服务。

faqs.question_en: Where are the staff from?
faqs.question_zh: 工作人员是哪里的？
faqs.answer_en: The guide is a Chinese-speaking guide who provides Chinese-language service throughout.
faqs.answer_zh: 导游为中文导游，全程提供中文服务。

faqs.question_en: Do I need a visa?
faqs.question_zh: 是否需要签证？
faqs.answer_en: Yes. This product does not include visa fees and requires a Schengen visa (single or multiple entry); if you need a visa, please choose a Schengen-visa product. After booking, we provide free of charge all the materials needed to apply for the Schengen visa (see the detailed material checklist). "Worry-free visa" guarantee: for travelers who sign a contract with us 61 days before departure, if the visa is not obtained within 45 days before departure, we bear all losses and immediately refund the full travel fee; travelers who do not meet this clause and fail to obtain the visa normally are refunded per the "change and cancellation terms". A refusal must be reported to us within 48 hours with the consulate's refusal letter, supplementary or amended materials must be submitted within 5 days, and you may not unilaterally waive your "visa appeal" right. Your passport must be valid for at least 6 months from the date of departure, or customs may refuse entry. Visa fees, visa service fees, Schengen insurance fees and visa-center appointment fees are all non-refundable and non-transferable, even if the product is changed or cancelled.
faqs.answer_zh: 需要。本产品不包含签证费用，需办理申根签证（单次或多次入境）；如需办理签证请选择申根签证产品。预订后我社免费提供办理申根签证的全部材料（参考详细材料清单）。保签无忧：游客在出发日前61天与我社签约的旅游产品，如在出发前45天内未获取签证，我社承担所有损失，立即退还全部旅游费用；不符合该条款的游客如未正常获取签证，将按照“退改与取消条款”退费。如遇拒签需在48小时内通知我社并出具使领馆拒签函，如需补充或更改材料须在五天内提交，且不得单方面放弃“签证抗辩”权利。护照有效期需自离境之日起至少还有六个月，否则海关有权拒绝入境。签证费、签证服务费、申根保险费、签证中心预约费均不可退款，也无法更改使用者，即使产品退改签也无法退款。

faqs.question_en: Booking, changes & cancellation
faqs.question_zh: 预订、变更与取消须知
faqs.answer_en: Both the agency and the traveler may apply for no-reason cancellation more than 30 days before departure (the 30th day excluded); within that window, cancellations, partial withdrawals, itinerary changes and date changes follow the "Change and Cancellation Terms". Payment does not equal confirmation: book at least 14 days ahead and allow up to 48 hours for the operator's second confirmation - do not book connecting flights or hotels before the itinerary is confirmed. Because flights, traffic, ferry cancellations, strikes and order optimization often shift timing and sequence, travelers must arrive at the meeting point one day before the group starts and leave the dispersal point one day after it ends (reasonable meet/disperse window 07:00-21:00; allow 5 hours for same-airport transfers, 7 hours for different airports in the same city). This is a join-in group tour requiring a minimum group size of 10; if not reached 30 days before departure, either party may cancel. Room types: a single traveler defaults to including a single-room supplement deposit (refunded pro-rata if sharing succeeds); two travelers default to a standard twin (bed type, double or twin, assigned by the hotel and not selectable); a triple family room is for two parents plus one minor with hotel-assigned beds. All European hotels are non-smoking, no cooking in rooms, no free disposable toiletries or boiled water, check-in 14:00 / check-out 11:00, and air conditioning is not a standard fitting. All pricing is in EUR; if you pay in CNY, the amount is the real-time CNY figure auto-calculated from Bank of China's "EUR selling price" on the day of payment, and refunds likewise use the day's rate (exchange differences and bank fees are borne by the traveler).
faqs.answer_zh: 出发前30天（不含第30天）旅行社和旅行者均可申请无理由取消；在此期限内，取消、部分退团、更改行程及更改日期均按《更改与取消条例条款》执行。支付不等于确认行程：建议至少提前14天预订，并预留最多48小时等待组团社二次确认，未获确认前请勿预订衔接机票及酒店。由于航变频繁、交通拥堵、渡轮取消、罢工游行或顺序调整常导致行程时间及游览先后顺序调整，本产品要求旅游者在旅游团开始前一天到达集合地、结束后一天离开集散地（合理集合集散时段为07:00至21:00；同一机场转机至少预留5小时，同城不同机场至少预留7小时）。本产品为散客拼团，成团人数为10人，行程开始前30天未达到成团人数时双方均有权解除合同。房型说明：单人报名默认含单人房差押金（拼房成功按比例退款）；两人报名默认标准双人间（大床或双床由酒店安排，不可指定）；三人家庭间默认两位父母与一位未成年儿童入住，床型由酒店安排。欧洲所有酒店禁烟、禁止在房间内做饭、不提供一次性洗漱用品及免费开水，入住14:00、退房11:00，空调并非酒店标准设施。所有定价以欧元为计价单位，如选择人民币支付，则以付款当日中国银行实时“欧元卖出价”自动计算的人民币价格为准，退款同样适用当日汇率（汇率差异及银行手续费由旅行者承担）。

faqs.question_en: Health & safety requirements
faqs.question_zh: 健康与安全须知
faqs.answer_en: For your safety, please have a health check before departure and do not sign up if you have any of the following: infectious diseases (e.g. active tuberculosis, typhoid); cardiovascular disease (e.g. severe hypertension, heart insufficiency, myocardial ischemia, myocardial infarction); cerebrovascular disease (e.g. cerebral embolism, hemorrhage, brain tumor); respiratory disease (e.g. emphysema, cor pulmonale); mental illness (e.g. epilepsy or other psychiatric conditions); severe anemia (hemoglobin below 50 g/L); or recovery from major/medium surgery. Pregnancy: women at 35 weeks or more cannot join under any circumstances; at 28 weeks or more, a doctor's exam report within 7 days plus the attending physician's consent letter is required; below 28 weeks, sign up with caution, sign the agency's disclaimer, and adventure/skiing/sailing/aerial/outdoor items cannot be joined. People with disabilities and travelers over 70 need a recent (within 7 days) medical report, attending-physician consent and an immediate-family escort, and must apply at least 61 days in advance. Minors (under 18) must be accompanied by an immediate relative or guardian, and unaccompanied minors need parental authorization; infants under 2 are not accepted. Per Article 15 of the Tourism Law, travelers must truthfully declare health information relevant to the trip (pregnancy, lactation, chronic illness, infectious disease history, suspected symptoms or recent epidemic-area travel) and follow safety warnings; concealment causing harm makes the traveler liable.
faqs.answer_zh: 为确保顺利出行、防止旅途中发生人身意外，请出行前做必要的身体检查，如有以下情况请勿报名：传染性疾病（如活动期肺结核、伤寒）；心血管疾病（如严重高血压、心功能不全、心肌缺氧、心肌梗塞）；脑血管疾病（如脑栓塞、脑出血、脑肿瘤）；呼吸系统疾病（如肺气肿、肺心病）；精神病（如癫痫及各种精神病）；严重贫血（血红蛋白低于50克/升）；大中型手术恢复期病患者。孕妇：妊娠第35周及以上在任何情况下都无法参团；第28周及以上需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书；第28周以下请慎重报名，需签署旅行社免责声明书，且行程内探险、滑雪、出海、高空、户外等项目均无法参加。残疾人及70周岁以上老年人需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书、需直系家属陪同，并须提前至少61天申请。未成年人（未满18周岁）须由直系亲属或监护人陪同，无父母陪同的未成年人须持父母授权书；本产品不接受2周岁以下婴儿参团。根据《旅游法》第15条，旅游者须如实告知与旅游活动相关的个人健康信息（包括妊娠期、哺乳期、慢性病、传染病史、疑似症状或近期疫区旅居史）并遵守安全警示规定，若因隐瞒健康信息导致人身损害或财产损失，须自行承担责任。

title_en: Norway Fjords 8-Day Group Tour (Stockholm Round-Trip)
title_zh: 挪威峡湾8天跟团游（斯德哥尔摩往返）
short_en: An 8-day one-way deep route through Norway's greatest fjords from Stockholm: Geirangerfjord cruise, Briksdal Glacier, Flam railway and the iconic Pulpit Rock hike.
short_zh: 8天斯德哥尔摩往返、单程深度畅游挪威经典峡湾：盖朗厄尔峡湾游船、布里克斯达尔冰川、弗洛姆高山火车与布道石徒步。
desc_en: This 8-day small-group journey loops out of Stockholm by air to explore the heart of Norway's western fjordland on an efficient one-way deep route. From the Viking city of Trondheim you follow the famous Atlantic Ocean Road south through Geiranger, Briksdal Glacier, Flam, Bergen and the orchard-lined Hardangerfjord, then hike the legendary Pulpit Rock above Lysefjord before finishing in Stavanger, Sandefjord and Oslo. Highlights blend epic nature (fjord cruises, glaciers, waterfalls, mountain rail) with Scandinavian city culture, brand-name 4-star and scenic fjord hotels, and Norwegian fish-feast dining.
desc_zh: 这是一条8天的小团旅程，从斯德哥尔摩飞抵挪威，以高效的单程深度线路畅游挪威西部峡湾腹地。行程从维京古城特隆赫姆出发，沿著名的大西洋之路一路南下，途经盖朗厄尔峡湾、布里克斯达尔冰川、弗洛姆、卑尔根和点缀着果园的哈当厄尔峡湾，随后攀登吕瑟峡湾之上的传奇布道石，最后游览斯塔万格、桑讷菲尤尔与奥斯陆。行程将壮丽自然（峡湾游船、冰川、瀑布、高山火车）与北欧城市文化相融合，入住品牌4星级及峡湾特色景观酒店，并品鉴挪威鱼餐等当地美食。

highlights.en: Geirangerfjord cruise past the Seven Sisters and Suitor waterfalls beneath near-vertical cliffs
highlights.zh: 乘船巡游盖朗厄尔峡湾，于近乎垂直的峭壁间近观七姐妹瀑布与求婚者瀑布

highlights.en: Briksdal Glacier by open-top troll car, hiking to the edge of the ancient blue ice
highlights.zh: 乘精灵敞篷车前往布里克斯达尔冰川，徒步至万古蓝冰前沿

highlights.en: Flam Railway, one of the world's steepest and most scenic mountain trains, into the Sognefjord
highlights.zh: 搭乘世界最美、最陡峭的弗洛姆高山火车，深入松恩峡湾美景

highlights.en: Pulpit Rock (Preikestolen) hike for breathtaking views over Lysefjord
highlights.zh: 徒步布道石（奇迹之石），俯瞰呂瑟峡湾壮阔美景

highlights.en: The Atlantic Ocean Road, voted Norway's Construction of the Century and a photographer's dream
highlights.zh: 驰骋大西洋之路，被誉为挪威世纪性建筑，更是摄影师的朝圣之旅

highlights.en: Bergen's UNESCO Bryggen wharf and the Floibanen funicular over the rainy harbour city
highlights.zh: 游览卑尔根世界遗产布吕根码头，乘弗洛伊恩山缆车俯瞰雨城全景

highlights.en: All-inclusive pricing with internal flights, fjord cruise, mountain rail and six experiences included
highlights.zh: 一价全含：内陆机票、峡湾游船、高山火车及六项体验项目全部包含

highlights.en: Efficient one-way deep route from Stockholm, city-centre 4-star and scenic fjord hotels, no forced shopping
highlights.zh: 斯德哥尔摩往返单程深度线路，入住市中心4星级及峡湾特色景观酒店，全程无强制购物

includes.en: [Flights] Line A includes the domestic flights (incl. tax) Stockholm-Trondheim and Oslo-Stockholm; Line B includes Stockholm-Oslo and Trondheim-Stockholm.
includes.zh: 【机票】A线路包含：斯德哥尔摩-特隆赫姆和奥斯陆-斯德哥尔摩的内陆含税机票；B线路包含：斯德哥尔摩-奥斯陆和特隆赫姆-斯德哥尔摩的内陆含税机票。

includes.en: [Hotels] 5 nights in 4-star hotels and 2 nights in fjord-view feature hotels. (Norway has abolished its hotel star rating; star levels refer to the Booking or Ctrip rating standard.)
includes.zh: 【酒店】四星级酒店5晚，峡湾特色景观酒店2晚。（挪威酒店取消星级评定，酒店星级参考Booking或携程的酒店星级标准。）

includes.en: [Meals] 9 meals in total: 1 Norwegian specialty fish meal, 1 buffet dinner, and 7 Scandinavian-style breakfasts.
includes.zh: 【餐饮】共计9餐：1餐挪威特色鱼餐、1餐自助晚餐以及7次斯堪的纳维亚式早餐。

includes.en: [Operating fees] In-itinerary operating costs such as tourist city tax, city-entry fees, residence tax, road and bridge tolls, parking and fuel charges, and driver-guide meal allowances.
includes.zh: 【执行】游客城市税、进城费、居住税、过路过桥费、停车燃油费、司导餐补等行程内执行费用。

includes.en: [Vehicle] Tour coach or tour business van.
includes.zh: 【车辆】旅游巴士或旅游商务车。

includes.en: [Guide] Professional driver plus Chinese-speaking guide, or a Chinese driver-guide throughout (note: for groups of 8 or fewer, a business van with a Chinese-speaking driver-guide is arranged).
includes.zh: 【导游】职业司机+中文导游，或者全程中文华人司机兼导游（备注：8人及以下则安排为商务旅行车+中文司机兼导游）。

includes.en: [Baggage] 1 piece of checked baggage (23 kg) and 1 piece of carry-on baggage.
includes.zh: 【行李】1件23公斤行李及1件随身行李。

includes.en: [Tickets] 6 experience items: the Preikestolen (Pulpit Rock) hike with guide service, the Fløibanen Mount Fløyen funicular, the Flåm mountain railway train ticket, Briksdal Glacier, the open-top troll car, and the Geirangerfjord cruise.
includes.zh: 【门票】布道石徒步及向导服务、弗洛伊恩山缆车、弗洛姆高山列车火车票、布里克斯达尔冰川、精灵敞篷车、蓋朗厄尔峡湾游船，共6项体验项目。

excludes.en: Passport: personal passport fees.
excludes.zh: 护照：个人护照费用。

excludes.en: Visa: the tourist visa fees required for the countries listed in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 签证：行程中所列旅游国家所需的观光签证费用。

excludes.en: Insurance: travel insurance fees (if the itinerary involves high-risk sports, verify whether your travel insurance covers them).
excludes.zh: 保险：旅游保险费用；（如行程内涉及到高风险运动，请核实旅游保险是否包含该项运动）。

excludes.en: Tips: tips for the guide and driver totaling EUR 10 per person per day, same price for adults and children.
excludes.zh: 小费：游客支付导游和司机小费一共10欧/人/天，大小同价。

excludes.en: Meals: apart from the specialty meals included in the itinerary, lunch and dinner are not included.
excludes.zh: 餐饮：除行程内包含的特色餐外，行程中不包含午、晚正餐费用。

excludes.en: Tickets: attractions not marked as included (including but not limited to sights noted as "exterior", "recommended", "optional", "experience" and any item not stated as included); if you wish to enter, please arrange it at your own expense.
excludes.zh: 门票：行程中未注明费用包含的景点（包括，但不仅限于行程中注明“外观”的景点，“推荐”、“可选”、“体验”等等所有未提及费用包含的项目，如游客需要参观，敬请自理）。

excludes.en: Extended stay: additional accommodation, transport and sightseeing costs beyond the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 延长住宿：行程外额外延长的住宿、交通、观光费用。

excludes.en: Personal spending: drinks and alcohol, taxis, phone charges and other personal expenses.
excludes.zh: 私人消费：如饮料酒类、出租车、电话费等个人消费。

excludes.en: Other transport: transport not mentioned in the inclusions other than the included business van or coach, e.g. a Venice gondola, and sightseeing trains or electric taxis in vehicle-restricted zones, are at your own expense.
excludes.zh: 其他交通：除包含商务旅行车或者中巴之外，费用包含中未提及的其他交通费用，如威尼斯贡多拉，以及车辆限行区的观光火车、电瓶出租车等费用敬请自理。

excludes.en: Free activities: night-time self-touring and recommended items during the trip, plus the resulting transport, meals, tickets and shopping costs.
excludes.zh: 自由活动：游客夜间自行游览及行程中的推荐项目，以及产生的交通、餐饮、门票、购物等费用。

excludes.en: Experience activities: the various travel experience activities not included in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 体验活动：行程中的没有包含的各项旅游体验活动。

excludes.en: Other costs: any fees not mentioned in the inclusions. In cases of force majeure such as natural disasters, war or strikes, or special situations such as transport delays, flight cancellations or rescheduling, embassy visa delays, or insufficient group numbers, or extra costs arising from causes not attributable to our company (e.g. overseas visa extension, accommodation, food and transport, national airline fare adjustments), our company reserves the right to charge the price difference.
excludes.zh: 其他费用：费用包含中未提及的费用。如因天灾、战争、罢工等不可抗力的原因，及因交通延阻、航班取消或更改时间、使馆延误出签证、人数不足等特殊情况或其他非我公司原因所引致的额外费（如在外延期签证费、住、食及交通费、国家航空运价调整等），我公司有权追加差价。

timeline.title_en: Stockholm - Trondheim (Visit the millennium-old city of the Viking kings)
timeline.title_zh: 斯德哥尔摩 - 特隆赫姆（拜访维京王的千年古城）
timeline.description_en: Make your own way to Stockholm Airport and check in for the flight to Trondheim according to your flight time; because there is no direct flight, a connecting flight is arranged from Stockholm. Your driver-guide meets you at Trondheim Airport and transfers you to the hotel. Explore the "thousand-year-old capital" of Trondheim, including Nidaros Cathedral, the most important medieval building on the Scandinavian Peninsula, then walk to the colorful Old Town Bridge (the red "Gate of Happiness") and the Bakklandet district to capture the evening scenery; if you have the chance, try the local century-old traditional sweet, the Trondheim ball. Overnight at Grand Olav's House Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel, located in Trondheim's historic Bakklandet quarter within walking distance of the cathedral, Old Town Bridge and Bakklandet. Note: depending on flights and departure date the itinerary order may be reversed (Line B: outbound Stockholm-Oslo, return Trondheim-Stockholm) without changing the content; there is no guide on the flight, so passengers travel to the destination on their own.
timeline.description_zh: 请各位游客自行前往斯德哥尔摩机场，根据航班时间办理登机手续飞往特隆赫姆；由于无直飞，需安排转机航班。司导在特隆赫姆机场接机后送往酒店。参观“千年古都”特隆赫姆，包括拥有斯堪的纳维亚半岛最重要中世纪建筑的尼德罗斯主教座堂，随后步行至色彩缤纷的老城桥（红色“幸福之门”）和巴克兰德街区拍摄傍晚美景；有机会一定要品尝当地百余年历史的传统甜品——特隆赫姆球。夜宿格兰德奥拉夫之家酒店或同等4星级酒店，酒店位于特隆赫姆历史悠久的巴克兰德街区，步行即可到达主教座堂、老城桥和巴克兰德。提示：根据航班和团期，部分团期游览顺序或前后调整（B线：去程斯德哥尔摩飞奥斯陆，回程特隆赫姆飞斯德哥尔摩），游览内容不变；航班上无导游陪同，需游客自行乘机前往目的地。

timeline.title_en: Trondheim - Kristiansund - Atlantic Ocean Road - Molde - Stranda (Photographer's pilgrimage: the Atlantic Ocean Road)
timeline.title_zh: 特隆赫姆 - 克里斯蒂安松 - 大西洋之路 - 莫尔德 - 斯特兰达（摄影师的朝圣景点——大西洋之路）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, drive to the beautiful town of Kristiansund at the eastern end of the famous Atlantic Ocean Road, visiting its harbor quay and the Innlandet old-town district with its distinctive surviving WWII-era seafront buildings. After lunch, travel along the scenic Atlantic Ocean Road (Atlanterhavsveien), the 36 km route from Bud to Kårvåg that links a chain of islands with bridges and causeways, voted one of Norway's "Construction of the Century" and listed by The Guardian as a "photographer's road trip". Then visit the "city of the midnight sun", Molde, on the broad mouth of the Romsdalsfjord, famous for its jazz festival and for the panorama of 222 snow-capped peaks seen from the 407 m Varden viewpoint. Continue to Stranda or the Valldal valley for the night. Overnight at Dragsund Riverside Hotel - Classic Norway Hotel or an equivalent 3-4 star hotel, set deep in the Geirangerfjord area by the Storelva river, with a restaurant, indoor pool, sauna and garden.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，前往坐落在著名大西洋之路东端的美丽小镇克里斯蒂安松，参观港口码头和拥有二战幸存海边建筑的因兰德特（Innlandet）老城区。午餐后乘车驶上景观公路——大西洋之路（Atlanterhavsveien），这段从比德（Bud）到Kårvåg、全长36公里的路线以桥梁和堤道将一座座岛屿连接起来，被挪威人评为“挪威的世纪性建筑”，《卫报》将其列入“摄影师之旅”名单。随后前往午夜阳光之城莫尔德参观，它位于罗姆达尔峡湾（Romsdalsfjord）宽阔河口处，以爵士音乐节闻名，在海拔407米的瓦尔登观景台可一览以222座雪峰著称的莫尔德全景。之后到达斯特兰达或瓦尔河谷入住。夜宿德雷格斯河畔酒店—经典挪威酒店或同等3-4星级酒店，酒店坐落于蓋朗厄尔峡湾深处、斯托雷尔瓦河畔，设有餐厅、室内泳池、桑拿和后花园。

timeline.title_en: Stranda - Geiranger - Briksdal Glacier - Sogndal (Epic of ice and masterpiece of water)
timeline.title_zh: 斯特兰达 - 蓋朗厄尔 - 布里克斯达尔冰川 - 松达尔（“冰”的史诗与“海”的杰作之旅）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, take a Geirangerfjord cruise to admire the fjord, sailing between near-vertical cliffs to view the Seven Sisters Waterfall, the Suitor Waterfall and other cascades up close. Then drive the Eagle Road (Ørnevegen, Route 63) with its 11 hairpin bends, stopping at the Flydalsjuvet viewpoint that takes in the town of Geiranger, the Geirangerfjord and the cruise ships at anchor. In the afternoon head to the town of Olden to visit Briksdal Glacier, an arm of the Jostedalsbreen ice cap (the largest on mainland Europe) within Jostedalsbreen National Park, riding the open-top "troll car" past the Volefossen waterfall to reach the prehistoric ice front. Overnight at Sogndal Hofslund Fjord Hotel or Best Western or an equivalent 3-star hotel, a family-run hotel founded in 1912 in the center of Sogndal on the Sognefjord, with its own garden and an outdoor heated pool.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，乘坐蓋朗厄尔峡湾游轮欣赏峡湾美景，在陡峭崖壁之间航行，近距离观赏七姐妹瀑布、求婚者瀑布等飞瀑流泉。随后前往老鹰之路（Ørnevegen，63号公路），这条公路以接连11个发夹弯闻名，途中在弗里达斯（Flydalsjuvet）悬崖观景台俯瞰蓋朗厄尔小城、蓋朗厄尔峡湾和靠港的邮轮。下午前往奥尔登小镇游览布里克斯达尔冰川，它是欧洲大陆体量最大的冰川——约斯特达尔布林冰川（Jostedalsbreen）的分支，位于约斯特达尔冰川国家公园中；乘坐有趣的精灵敞篷山地车途经沃伦福斯大瀑布，前往史前冰盖前沿。夜宿松达尔霍芬桑德峡湾酒店或Best Western酒店或同等3星级酒店——一家始建于1912年的家庭经营酒店，位于松恩达尔（Sogndal）中心、松恩峡湾畔，拥有自己的花园和室外温水游泳池。

timeline.title_en: Sogndal - Flåm - Voss - Bergen (The steep Flåm mountain railway and the city of "troll spirits")
timeline.title_zh: 松达尔 - 弗洛姆 - 沃斯 - 卑尔根（弗洛姆陡峭高山列车遇见“山妖精灵”）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, drive to Flåm to visit the Flåm Railway Museum, Flåm village and the Sognefjord, then ride the world-famous, steep Flåm mountain railway up to Myrdal, where you board a regular Norwegian train to the beautiful town of Voss. The Flåm Railway (20 km from Myrdal at 865 m down to the Aurlandsfjord, built from 1923, with 80% of the line on a 5.5% gradient) is rated among the world's great train journeys by National Geographic Traveler and Lonely Planet. Continue to the "rainy city" of Bergen to see the UNESCO World Heritage Bryggen Hanseatic wharf, ride the Fløibanen funicular up Mount Fløyen for a panorama of the city, harbor and fjords, stroll the waterfront and enjoy a seafood meal at the Bergen Fish Market (Fisketorget); afterwards return to the hotel on your own. Overnight at Bergen Moxy or Thon or Scandic or an equivalent 4-star hotel, a stylish modern hotel mixing Nordic and industrial design on the waterfront near the Solheimsviken and Marineholmen business district, with a 24-hour snack bar and a fitness center.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，乘车前往弗洛姆，游览弗洛姆铁路博物馆、弗洛姆小镇和松恩峡湾，随后乘坐世界闻名的陡峭高山火车到达米达尔，在米达尔换乘挪威官方火车前往美丽小镇沃斯。弗洛姆高山铁路从海拔865米的米达尔（Myrdal）直下艾于兰峡湾深处的弗洛姆，全长20公里，80%路段建在5.5%坡度的山坡上，始建于1923年，被《国家地理旅行者》和《孤独星球》列入全球推荐火车观光路线。之后前往“雨城”卑尔根，参观世界遗产布吕根（汉萨同盟商业建筑群），乘坐弗洛伊恩山缆车（Fløibanen）登上弗洛伊恩山俯瞰城市、海港与峡湾全景，漫步卑尔根海滨，在卑尔根鱼市（Fisketorget）品尝一顿海鲜大餐；之后自行返回酒店休息。夜宿卑尔根Moxy或Thon或Scandic酒店或同等4星级酒店——一家融合北欧风与工业风的时尚现代酒店，坐落于索尔海姆斯维肯和马林霍尔门商业区的海滨地段，设有24小时自助小食吧和健身中心。

timeline.title_en: Bergen - Hardangerfjord - Odda - Haugesund (Hardangerfjord, an oil-painting of pastoral scenery)
timeline.title_zh: 卑尔根 - 哈当厄尔峡湾 - 奥达 - 海于格松（哈当厄尔峡湾——油画般的田园风光）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, drive to Steinsdalsfossen waterfall near Norheimsund, whose unique feature is that you can walk behind the curtain of water without getting wet, like a "water-curtain cave". Then continue to the Hardangerfjord, the gentlest of the four great fjords, where both banks are dotted with colorful cottages, farmland and the famous apple and cherry orchards planted by monks some 800 years ago, like an unfolding oil painting. Drive on through western Norway's rolling hills and forests to the small town of Odda, the gateway town set at the innermost reach of the Hardangerfjord and surrounded by mountains, waterfalls and glaciers, a base for several classic hiking routes; explore this quiet, rustic town and soak up the local atmosphere. Then arrive in Haugesund for the night. Overnight at Haugesund Amanda Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel, in the heart of Haugesund's town center within walking distance of the Amanda statue, the pink town hall and the library park, a landmark known for its maritime history and Art Nouveau architecture.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，乘车来到诺海姆桑德（Norheimsund）附近的斯坦达尔瀑布，其独特之处在于可以从瀑布后方“穿行而过”而不被打湿，体验“水帘洞”般的奇观。之后前往哈当厄尔峡湾——四大峡湾中最为平缓、田园般风景的峡湾，两岸点缀着彩色小屋的田园，以及约800年前僧侣种植的著名苹果园与樱桃园，如同一幅展开的巨幅油画。一路欣赏挪威西部多变的丘陵与森林地貌，前往奥达小镇，它坐落在哈当厄尔峡湾最深处，被群山、瀑布和冰川环绕，是通往峡湾及多条经典徒步路线的门户基地；在这个宁静古朴的小镇参观游览，感受当地生活气息。随后到达海于格松入住。夜宿海于格松阿曼达酒店或同等4星级酒店，酒店位于海于格松市中心核心区，步行即可到达阿曼达雕像、粉红色市政厅和图书馆公园，以其悠久航海历史和“新艺术运动”建筑风格闻名，是当地地标之一。

timeline.title_en: Haugesund - Preikestolen (Pulpit Rock) - Stavanger (Hike the miracle rock and behold the Lysefjord)
timeline.title_zh: 海于格松 - 布道石 - 斯塔万格（徒步布道台奇迹之石，领略吕瑟峡湾壮阔美景）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, depart Haugesund for the Preikestolen (Pulpit Rock) area on the Lysefjord and hike to the "miracle rock", a natural rock platform standing 604 m sheer above the fjord and one of the best vantage points to take in the magnificent Lysefjord. The trail is 3.8 km each way (about 8 km round trip), takes 4-5 hours and is of medium difficulty over rugged mountain paths, so please mind your safety and pace yourself; non-slip, waterproof high-top hiking boots are recommended, and bring your own lunch and drinking water as there are no shops or restaurants along the way (the visitor center at the start has a restaurant and café, with beautiful lakes nearby to explore). In the afternoon arrive in Stavanger and check in. Overnight at Stavanger Sola/Scandic or an equivalent 4-star hotel, a select Nordic chain hotel in the city center about 750 m from the old-town square where the Gladmat food festival is held in July.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，从海于格松出发前往吕瑟峡湾布道石景区，徒步奇迹之石——布道台，这块天然凌空的巨型石台台顶与下方峡湾垂直落差604米，是俯瞰吕瑟峡湾、领略峡湾壮丽美景的最佳地点之一。通往布道石的登山径单程3.8公里（往返约8公里），往返大概需要4-5小时，中等强度，山路崎岖，请客人注意安全、量力而为，建议穿着防滑防水加高帮的登山鞋；沿途没有商店及餐厅，请自备午餐及饮用水（景区起点服务中心设有餐厅、咖啡店，周围也有美丽的湖泊可自由游览）。下午到达斯塔万格，随后入住酒店。夜宿斯塔万格松恩/斯坎迪克酒店或同等4星级酒店——精选北欧连锁酒店，位于斯塔万格市中心，距离七月举行斯塔万格美食节（Gladmatfestivalen）的老城中心广场仅750米。

timeline.title_en: Stavanger - Kristiansand - Sandefjord (From a seaside stroll in the oil capital to a town of cultural color)
timeline.title_zh: 斯塔万格 - 克里斯蒂安桑 - 桑讷菲尤尔（海滨慢旅到石油之都的文化色彩）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, explore Norway's oil capital and former European Capital of Culture, Stavanger, savoring Gamle Stavanger (the old town) with its 173 well-preserved white wooden houses from the late 18th-early 19th century, home to the Michelin restaurants Renaa and Sabi Omakase, in contrast with the vibrant, colorful Fargegaten (the "colorful street" repainted on a hairdresser's initiative). After lunch, follow the guide to the Sword in Rock monument (Swords in Rock / Hafrsfjord), three giant Viking swords commemorating the Battle of Hafrsfjord and symbolizing peace, unity and freedom, now the city's emblem. Then drive to Sandefjord, resting en route at Kristiansand, southern Norway's fifth-largest city known for its beaches and lively culture. Overnight at Sandefjord Atlantic Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel, within walking distance of Sandefjord harbor and old town; the whole hotel is like a living museum reflecting the town's whaling history, with a local restaurant serving Norwegian specialties and fresh seafood.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后参观挪威的石油之都——斯塔万格，品味曾为欧洲文化之都的斯塔万格老城区（Gamle Stavanger），它由建于18世纪末19世纪初的173套纯白雅致木质房屋组成，城中有Renaa和Sabi Omakase两家米其林餐厅；与之形成鲜明对比的是色彩缤纷、活泼的网红景点法格卡腾（Fargegaten）街区，这条由理发师发起改造的街道充满活力与创意。午餐后跟随导游参观斯塔万格岩中之剑（巨剑阵），这座纪念“Hafrsfjord之战”的雕塑由三把维京巨剑组成，分别代表和平、统一和自由，现为斯塔万格的城市标志。随后乘车前往桑讷菲尤尔，中途在克里斯蒂安桑（Kristiansand）休息——这座挪威南部第五大城市以自然美景、海滩和活跃文化生活闻名。到达桑讷菲尤尔后入住。夜宿桑讷菲尤尔大西洋之家酒店或同等4星级酒店，步行即可到达桑讷菲尤尔港口和老城区，整座酒店宛如一座活生生的博物馆，展现着这座沿海小镇的捕鲸历史，设有提供挪威特色餐和新鲜海产的当地特色餐厅。

timeline.title_en: Sandefjord - Oslo - Stockholm (An art pilgrimage and harbor stroll in the capital, then back to Stockholm)
timeline.title_zh: 桑讷菲尤尔 - 奥斯陆 - 斯德哥尔摩（北欧式的海滨慢节奏——艺术巡礼与海港漫步）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, visit Vigeland Sculpture Park, the sculpture park themed on the journey of human life, with 192 sculptures and 650 figures by Gustav Vigeland depicting all stages of life. Then see Oslo City Hall (exterior), venue of the Nobel Peace Prize ceremony each December 10; watch the changing of the guard outside the Royal Palace (exterior); tour the medieval Akershus Fortress (exterior), begun in 1299 and never captured in its history, with unobstructed views over the City Hall, the Oslofjord, Aker Brygge and the opera district; and admire the glacier-like modern Oslo Opera House (exterior), whose sloping white marble roof rises from the Oslofjord and which you are strongly encouraged to walk up for fjord and city views. Then, according to flight times, the guide directs you to take the train from central Oslo to Oslo Airport, where you check in on your own and fly back to Stockholm, ending this wonderful journey. No hotel accommodation on this day.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，前往以思考生命与人生为主题的雕塑公园——维格兰雕塑公园，公园以雕塑大师古斯塔夫·维格兰（Gustav Vigeland）命名，共有192座雕塑、650个人物雕像，集中表现人从出生至死的各个阶段。之后参观诺贝尔和平奖颁奖地——奥斯陆市政厅（外观，每年12月10日在此举行颁奖仪式），在皇宫外观看卫兵换岗（外观），随后游览中世纪城堡阿克斯胡斯城堡（外观），它始建于1299年、历史上从未被攻克，在古老城墙上可毫无遮挡地眺望市政厅、奥斯陆峡湾、Aker Brygge码头和歌剧院区域；再参观如同冰川般的现代建筑——奥斯陆歌剧院（外观），其白色斜坡状石制屋顶从奥斯陆峡湾中拔地而起，强烈推荐走上倾斜的屋顶俯瞰峡湾城市风光。之后根据航班时间，导游指导游客乘坐火车从奥斯陆市区前往奥斯陆机场，自行办理登机手续飞回斯德哥尔摩，结束美好旅行。当天无酒店住宿。

meeting_en: Stockholm Arlanda Airport (Sweden); travellers make their own way to the airport for the internal flight to Trondheim, where the guide-driver meets the group.
meeting_zh: 瑞典斯德哥尔摩阿兰达机场；游客自行前往机场搭乘内陆航班飞往特隆赫姆，由司导在特隆赫姆接机。

faqs.question_en: Where and when do we meet and disperse?
faqs.question_zh: 集合和集散的时间和地点是怎样的？
faqs.answer_en: Line A — Meeting: on day 1 make your own way to Stockholm Airport and fly to Trondheim; the guide meets you at Trondheim Airport according to your flight time. Dispersal: on the last day the guide directs you to take the train to Oslo Airport, where you check in on your own and fly back to Stockholm. Line B — Meeting: on day 1 fly from Stockholm to Oslo, then take the train from Oslo Airport to Oslo Central Station, where the guide meets you. Dispersal: on the last day you are seen off at Trondheim Airport and fly back to Stockholm. For both lines, flights that land in Stockholm on the join day or depart Stockholm on the finish day are NOT recommended.
faqs.answer_zh: A线路——集合：行程第一天根据航班时间自行前往斯德哥尔摩机场乘机到达特隆赫姆，导游根据航班时间在特隆赫姆机场接机；解散：最后一天导游指导游客乘坐火车前往奥斯陆机场，之后自行办理登机手续乘机返回斯德哥尔摩。B线路——集合：第一天自行飞往奥斯陆，再从奥斯陆机场乘火车前往奥斯陆中央火车站，导游在火车站接团；解散：最后一天在特隆赫姆机场送机解散，乘机返回斯德哥尔摩。两条线路均不推荐参团当天降落斯德哥尔摩、以及结束当天离开斯德哥尔摩的航班！

faqs.question_en: How do I get to Stockholm Airport?
faqs.question_zh: 如何前往斯德哥尔摩机场？
faqs.answer_en: Stockholm Arlanda Airport (ARN) is about 42 km from the city center. If you are in a hurry or have large luggage, the Arlanda Express airport train is the best choice: about 20 minutes non-stop between Stockholm Central and the airport, single ticket 340 SEK per person, bought from the machines at the entrance and platform. A taxi from the city to the airport costs about 800 SEK; ride-hailing apps Bolt and Uber are common in Stockholm and usually cheaper than taxis, around 650 SEK.
faqs.answer_zh: 斯德哥尔摩机场（Stockholm Arlanda Airport，ARN）距市中心约42公里。若赶时间或拖着大件行李，机场快线是最佳选择：Arlanda Express从斯德哥尔摩中央车站到机场约20分钟、中途不停车，单程票价340瑞典克朗/人，可在机场快线入口和站台的自动售票机购买。出租车从市区到机场约800瑞典克朗；网约车Bolt和Uber在斯德哥尔摩很普及，通常比出租车便宜，约650瑞典克朗。

faqs.question_en: Can I swim in the sea or fjord during the trip?
faqs.question_zh: 行程中可以下海或峡湾游泳吗？
faqs.answer_en: Most hotels are in the city commercial center and you can usually walk to the seaside, so during free time in the evening you can stroll along the shore. However, the sea temperature in Norway is not suitable for swimming, so we recommend using the indoor pool at the hotel.
faqs.answer_zh: 行程中的酒店大多数在城市商业中心，步行一般都可以到达海边，晚上自由活动时间可选择漫步海边；但挪威的海水温度不适宜下水游泳，建议使用酒店内的室内游泳池。

faqs.question_en: My English is poor — can I manage free activities on my own?
faqs.question_zh: 我的英文不好，我有能力自由活动吗？
faqs.answer_en: The hotels are located near the sightseeing areas, so walking there and back is no problem. If you are worried about the language but still want a deeper local experience, you can pair up with other group members, and there are plenty of fellow travelers in the surrounding area each day.
faqs.answer_zh: 酒店位于游览景区的周边，步行往返没有任何问题；如果担心语言问题又希望深度体验当地人文，可以与其他团友结伴同行，并且每天都有大量的团友在周边活动。

faqs.question_en: There are some attractions I don't want to enter — can I get a refund?
faqs.question_zh: 行程内的部分景点我不想进去，可以退费吗？
faqs.answer_en: You may spend free time around the attraction, but you must return to the meeting point at the agreed time, and no refund can be given.
faqs.answer_zh: 您可以在景点周边自由活动，但需要在约定的时间内到集合地点，并且无法退费。

faqs.question_en: What will I eat locally?
faqs.question_zh: 我在当地吃什么？
faqs.answer_en: Norwegians are expert at fish and seafood — salmon and cod are common, along with other seasonal seafood, and a local specialty is Norwegian reindeer meat. The cities along the route have a wide range of specialty restaurants and fish markets selling seafood; even the street snacks are memorable, and most travelers don't miss the local cuisine. The guide will also introduce and recommend local restaurants.
faqs.answer_zh: 挪威人吃鱼和海鲜比较专业，常见的是三文鱼和鳕鱼以及其他时令海鲜，另外比较有特色的是挪威的驯鹿肉。我们经过的城市里有繁多的特色餐饮或卖海鲜的鱼市，街边小吃就让人流连忘返，多数游客不会错过当地美食；同时导游也会给予大家当地餐厅的介绍和推荐服务。

faqs.question_en: Where is the staff from?
faqs.question_zh: 工作人员是哪里的？
faqs.answer_en: The guide is a Chinese-speaking guide who provides Chinese-language service throughout.
faqs.answer_zh: 导游为中文导游，全程提供中文服务。

faqs.question_en: What gear and fitness do I need for the Pulpit Rock hike, and how strenuous is it?
faqs.question_zh: 登上布道台需要带什么装备、需要什么样的体力？徒步强度如何？
faqs.answer_en: Girafe specially arranges the hike up to Preikestolen (Pulpit Rock) in the Lysefjord — this sets us apart from other group tours. From the coach parking lot to Pulpit Rock is 3.8 km one way, generally 4-5 hours round trip; we give all guests of differing fitness levels enough time to climb, enjoy the views and return, and you can walk and rest along the way as your fitness allows. Since there are no shops on the mountain, bring your own water bottle and a simple lunch; the fjord mountain paths are rugged, so non-slip, waterproof high-top hiking boots are recommended, and waterproof clothing in case of rain is even better.
faqs.answer_zh: 长颈鹿特别安排了在吕瑟峡湾徒步登山去布道台，这是有别于任何其他跟团游的地方。从大巴停车场到布道台单程3.8公里，一般往返在4到5个小时左右；我们给予所有不同体力的贵宾足够时间来登山、赏景和返回，沿途风光秀美也可根据自己的体力走走停停。由于山上没有商店，登山时需自带水壶和简单的午餐；峡湾地区山路崎岖，建议穿着防滑防水加高帮的登山鞋，若自备防水衣以备下雨则更优。

faqs.question_en: Are there any signs on the mountain — won't I get lost?
faqs.question_zh: 山上有任何指示吗？不会迷路吧？
faqs.answer_en: Pulpit Rock is a famous Norwegian attraction with hundreds of thousands of hikers each year, so there are signs the whole way and red "T" markers along the trail. In addition, July is peak season with many visitors, so you won't get lost if you follow the crowd.
faqs.answer_zh: 布道台是挪威出名的景点，每年都有数十万人来登山，所以全程都有指示，沿途都有红色T字标记；另外七月是旅游旺季、游客很多，跟着人走不会迷路。

faqs.question_en: About the Flåm mountain railway
faqs.question_zh: 关于弗洛姆高山列车
faqs.answer_en: The mountain railway starts at Flåm and ends at Myrdal at the top. The train stops 5 minutes at Kjosfossen waterfall to hear the song of the troll spirits, then 10 minutes at Myrdal, but passengers may not get off to take the next train — every ticket is valid only for its specific service. Myrdal station is very small with only a few shops and is not worth lingering at; you must take the same train back to Flåm.
faqs.answer_zh: 高山列车始于弗洛姆，终点在山顶的米达尔。火车会在克尤斯福森瀑布处停留5分钟，聆听山妖精灵的歌声，随后在米达尔停留10分钟，但乘客不可以下车乘下一班火车，所有火车票都是当次车次有效。米达尔火车站很小，只有几个商店，不建议停留，需乘同一班火车返回弗洛姆。

faqs.question_en: Will I get seasick sea-fishing?
faqs.question_zh: 海钓会晕船吗？
faqs.answer_en: The sea-fishing guide and captain choose fishing inside the fjord or out at open sea depending on the day's weather. Even when the wind and waves are stronger, the water inside the fjord is very calm; and in bad weather you tend to catch a lot more fish, so it's well worth braving rougher conditions.
faqs.answer_zh: 海钓的向导和船长会根据当天天气选择峡湾内海钓或远海海钓。即使风浪较大，峡湾内也是非常平静的水面；但如果天气不好，捕获的鱼类会非常多，非常值得去碰一碰坏天气。

faqs.question_en: Can the seafood I catch be cooked at a restaurant?
faqs.question_zh: 我钓上来的海鲜可以在餐厅加工吗？
faqs.answer_en: No. Norwegian restaurants strictly follow food hygiene law and cannot process ingredients that are not from a formal source. However, you may prepare and eat it yourself in your own room — fresh cod and herring are delicious pan-fried or blanched.
faqs.answer_zh: 不可以。挪威的餐厅严格遵守食品卫生法，不可以加工非正规食品来源的食材；但是游客可以在自己的房间自行加工食用，新鲜的鳕鱼和青鱼，生煎或汆烫都非常可口。

faqs.question_en: I'm not used to Norwegian seafood / am allergic to seafood / am vegetarian — can I change the meal set?
faqs.question_zh: 我不太习惯挪威海鲜或者海鲜过敏，或者我是素食主义者，是否可以更改套餐？
faqs.answer_en: Please note this before booking or contact the sales agent to change the meal set or choose a meal refund. After booking, meals are reserved by default and we cannot cancel the restaurant reservation.
faqs.answer_zh: 请在报名前备注或与销售员联系，更改套餐或选择餐饮退费；如报名后则按默认餐饮预订，我社不可取消餐厅预定。

faqs.question_en: Does the Lofoten route overlap with the fjord route, and how do they connect?
faqs.question_zh: 挪威罗浮墩路线是否和挪威峡湾路线有重叠，或者如何衔接？
faqs.answer_en: Lofoten is within Norway's Arctic Circle, some 2,000 km from the southern fjords, with completely different scenery, terrain and customs. This product departs Monday to Friday (returning to Oslo on Friday evening), while the fjord route usually departs on Saturday, so the two can connect on Friday — we suggest booking the Radisson hotel at Oslo Airport on Friday night. Best connection: take the fjord route Saturday morning, return to Oslo Friday, tour Oslo's harbor, opera house and palace area on Saturday and Sunday, then do the Lofoten route on Monday. Alternatively, do the Lofoten route on Monday, return to Oslo Friday, take the fjord route the following Saturday, and tour Oslo after returning on Friday.
faqs.answer_zh: 罗浮墩在挪威的北极圈境内，与挪威南部的峡湾相差2000公里，两地的风景、地貌、习俗都不同。本产品为每周一到周五发团（周五晚上返回奥斯陆），通常峡湾路线都是周六发团，因此可以在周五衔接，建议预定周五奥斯陆机场的Radisson酒店。最佳衔接路线为：周六上午参加峡湾路线、周五返回奥斯陆，周六及周日游览奥斯陆码头、歌剧院及皇宫区域，周一参加罗浮墩路线；或周一参加罗浮墩路线、周五返回奥斯陆，周六再参加峡湾路线，最后周五返回后游览奥斯陆。

faqs.question_en: Do I need a visa?
faqs.question_zh: 是否需要签证？
faqs.answer_en: Yes. This product does NOT include the visa fee, and you need a Schengen visa (single or multiple entry); if you need a visa, please choose a Schengen-visa product. After booking we provide all the materials for applying for the Schengen visa free of charge (refer to the detailed materials checklist), and we can buy you Schengen travel insurance that meets the visa requirements (if you do not entrust us with the visa, you must arrange your own travel insurance and claims). Your passport must be valid for at least six months from the date of departure, or customs may refuse entry. Visa fees, visa service fees, Schengen insurance fees and visa-center appointment fees are all non-refundable and non-transferable, even if the product is changed or cancelled. "Worry-free visa guarantee": for travelers who sign a contract with us at least 61 days before departure, if no visa is obtained within 45 days before departure, we bear all losses and immediately refund the full travel cost; travelers who do not meet this clause and fail to obtain a visa are refunded per the change-and-cancellation terms. In case of a visa refusal, notify us within 48 hours with the embassy's refusal letter; any supplementary or changed materials must be submitted within five days, and you may not unilaterally waive the "visa defense" right.
faqs.answer_zh: 需要。本产品不包含签证费用，需要申根签证（单次或多次入境）；如需办理签证请选择申根签证产品。预订后免费提供办理申根签证的全部材料（参考详细材料清单），我社可为游客购买符合申根签证要求的申根旅游保险（若未委托我社办理签证，需自行购买旅游保险及负责理赔）。护照有效期需在离境之日起至少还有六个月，否则海关有权拒绝入境。签证费、签证服务费、申根保险费、签证中心预约费均不可退款、也无法更改使用者，即使产品退改签，签证费用也无法退款。“保签无忧”：游客在出发日前61天与我社签约的旅游产品，如在出发前45天内未获取签证，我社承担所有损失，立即退还全部旅游费用；不符合该条款的游客如未正常获取签证，将按照“退改与取消条款”退费。如遇拒签需在48小时内通知我社并出具使领馆拒签函，如需补充或更改材料须在五天内提交，且不得单方面放弃“签证抗辩”权利。

faqs.question_en: Booking, changes & cancellation
faqs.question_zh: 预订、变更与取消须知
faqs.answer_en: Free, no-reason cancellation is available to both parties more than 30 days before departure (not including the 30th day); after that the change-and-cancellation terms apply. Because flights change frequently and there may be traffic, ferry cancellations, strikes or itinerary re-ordering, you must arrive at the meeting point one day before the tour starts and leave one day after it ends, allowing reasonable connection time (at least 5 hours for a connection at the same airport, 7 hours for different airports in the same city; reasonable meet/disperse window 07:00-21:00); losses from not following this are borne by the traveler. This is a join-in group tour (shared coach with other agencies' guests); the disclosed maximum group size is the daily average cap, and the group is confirmed at 10 people — if 10 is not reached, the tour or any optional activity may be cancelled. Room types: two people booking together default to a standard twin/double (bed type assigned by the hotel, not selectable); solo travelers pay a single-room supplement unless they request share-a-room; three people default to a family room (two adults + one minor). All European hotels are non-smoking, no cooking in rooms, check-in 14:00 / check-out 11:00, and air conditioning is often not standard. Listed hotels are preferred; if full, a comparable same-star hotel is used without separate notice. Itinerary order may be adjusted for flight/transport reasons without changing the route or sights, and is not a breach of contract. All prices are quoted in EUR at the time of booking; if you pay in CNY, the amount is the real-time CNY price auto-calculated from Bank of China's "EUR selling price" on the day of payment (refunds use the same-day rate, and any exchange-rate differences or bank fees are borne by the traveler). Pay promptly after booking to avoid rate-driven increases; orders need a second confirmation by the operator within 48 hours or are auto-refunded, so do not book connecting flights/hotels before the itinerary is confirmed.
faqs.answer_zh: 出发前30天（不含第30天）双方均可无理由取消，之后按“更改与取消条例条款”执行。由于航班变动频繁，可能遇交通拥堵、渡轮取消、罢工游行或行程顺序调整，旅游者须在开团前一天到达集合地、结束后一天离开集散地，并预留合理衔接时间（同机场转机至少5小时、同城不同机场至少7小时；合理集合集散时间段为07:00至21:00），未遵守由此造成的损失由旅行者自行承担。本产品为散客拼团（与其他旅行社客人合并用车），披露的最多参团人数为每天平均人数上限，成团人数为10人——未达10人时旅行社有权取消旅游团或相应自费活动。房型：两人同时报名默认入住标准双人间（床型由酒店安排、不可指定）；单人报名默认含单人房差，如愿拼房按实际拼房比例退款；三人间默认为两位父母与一位未成年儿童入住。欧洲所有酒店禁烟、禁止房间内做饭，入住14:00、退房11:00，并非以空调为标准设施。行程内列明酒店为优先入住酒店，如订满则换为相同星级相近条件酒店、不再另行通知。因航班、交通等原因可能调整游览先后顺序，在不改变路线及景点的情况下不视为违约。所有定价以欧元为预订时计价单位，如选择人民币支付，则以当天支付时本网站依据中国银行实时“欧元卖出价”自动计算出的人民币实时价格为准（退款同样适用申请当日即时汇率，汇率差异或银行手续费由旅行者承担）。预订后请及时支付以避免汇率上涨；订单需组团社在48小时内二次确认，超时未确认默认自动退款，未确认行程前请勿预订衔接机票及酒店。

faqs.question_en: Health & safety requirements
faqs.question_zh: 健康与安全须知
faqs.answer_en: To ensure a safe trip, please have a health check before departure and do NOT sign up if you have: infectious diseases (e.g. active tuberculosis, typhoid); cardiovascular disease (e.g. severe hypertension, heart failure, myocardial ischemia or infarction); cerebrovascular disease (e.g. cerebral embolism, hemorrhage, tumor); respiratory disease (e.g. emphysema, cor pulmonale); psychiatric illness (e.g. epilepsy and various mental illnesses); severe anemia (hemoglobin below 50 g/L); or are recovering from major/medium surgery. Pregnancy: at 35 weeks or more you cannot join under any circumstances; at 28 weeks or more you must provide a doctor's exam report from within 7 days plus the attending doctor's consent; under 28 weeks please sign up with caution, sign a liability waiver, and you cannot join adventure/skiing/sea/high-altitude/outdoor items. Disabled travelers need a doctor's report within 7 days plus the attending doctor's consent, must be accompanied by an immediate family member, and must apply at least 61 days in advance for reserved space and facilities. Elderly travelers over 70 need a health certificate and physical exam and must be accompanied by an immediate family member (otherwise sign a liability waiver); the long itinerary requires walking ability and good stamina, any adventure/ski/sea/high-altitude/outdoor items require the attending doctor's consent, and age-friendly service must be requested at least 61 days ahead. Minors (under 18) must be accompanied by an immediate relative or guardian, some sights have rules for under-18/12/6, child seats (for infants under 6 or children under 30 kg) must be confirmed in advance, an unaccompanied minor needs both parents' authorization (one parent's authorization plus the other's written authorization if only one accompanies), and infants under 2 are not accepted. Per Article 15 of the Tourism Law, travelers must truthfully declare health information relevant to the tour (pregnancy, lactation, chronic disease, infectious-disease history, suspected symptoms, recent travel to epidemic areas) and follow safety warnings; concealment that causes harm or transmission risk makes the traveler liable for the consequences, and the agency may terminate the contract without refund.
faqs.answer_zh: 为确保顺利出行、防止意外，请出行前做必要的身体检查，如存在以下情况请勿报名：传染性疾病（如活动期肺结核、伤寒）；心血管疾病（如严重高血压、心功能不全、心肌缺氧、心肌梗塞）；脑血管疾病（如脑栓塞、脑出血、脑肿瘤）；呼吸系统疾病（如肺气肿、肺心病）；精神病（如癫痫及各种精神病）；严重贫血（血红蛋白50克/升以下）；大中型手术恢复期病患者。孕妇：妊娠35周及以上任何情况都无法参团；28周及以上需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书；28周以下请慎重报名，需签署免责声明书，且行程内探险、滑雪、出海、高空、户外等项目都无法参加。残疾人需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书，需直系家属陪同，并提前至少61天申请预留位置及专用设施。70周岁以上老年人需提供健康证明、体检报告并由直系家属陪同（否则签署免责声明书）；本程行程较长，需有一定步行能力和较高体力，体力不支者请慎重报名，涉及探险、滑雪、出海、高空、户外等项目需持主治医师同意书，并需提前至少61天申请适老化服务。未成年人（未满18周岁）需由直系亲属或监护人陪同，部分景点对未满18/12/6周岁有特殊限定；6岁以下婴儿或30公斤以下儿童需提前确认安全座椅；无父母陪同的未成年人须持父母授权书（仅一方陪同需另一方书面授权）；本产品不接受2周岁以下婴儿参团。根据《旅游法》第15条，旅游者需如实告知与旅游活动相关的个人健康信息（包括妊娠期、哺乳期、慢性病、传染病史、疑似症状或近期疫区旅居史）并遵守安全警示规定，若因隐瞒导致人身损害或传播风险，旅游者需自行承担责任，旅行社可解除合同且不退还费用。

title_en: Nordic Three-Country Fjord Tour: Norway, Sweden & Denmark, 13 Days
title_zh: 北欧三国峡湾13天跟团游：挪威·瑞典·丹麦
short_en: A 13-day Scandinavian loop from Stockholm through Norway's grand fjords to Sweden and Denmark, with one domestic flight, scenic rail and ferries included.
short_zh: 13天斯堪的纳维亚环线，从斯德哥尔摩深入挪威壮丽峡湾，再到瑞典与丹麦，含一段内陆航班、景观火车与渡轮。
desc_en: This 13-day small-group journey loops out of Stockholm and into the heart of Scandinavia, pairing Norway's four great fjords with the capitals and coastal towns of three countries. You fly to the Viking city of Trondheim, drive the legendary Atlantic Road, cruise the Geirangerfjord, walk to the Briksdal glacier, ride the world-famous Flåm Railway into Bergen, and hike to the cliff-top Preikestolen above Lysefjord. The route then winds through Oslo's art and architecture, the harbour cities of Gothenburg and Aalborg, Andersen's fairy-tale Odense, design-capital Copenhagen and Malmö before returning to Stockholm. With city-centre 4-star hotels, fjord-view lodges, included attractions and a one-way deep route, it captures both the wild beauty of the fjords and the slow living of the North.
desc_zh: 这趟13天精品小团从斯德哥尔摩出发，深入斯堪的纳维亚腹地，把挪威四大峡湾与三国首都及海港小镇串联成一条环线。您将飞往维京古城特隆赫姆，驾行传奇的大西洋之路，乘船巡游盖朗厄尔峡湾，徒步布里克斯达尔冰川，搭乘举世闻名的弗洛姆高山火车进入卑尔根，并登上吕瑟峡湾之上的布道石。随后途经奥斯陆的艺术与建筑、海港城市哥德堡与奥尔堡、安徒生童话故乡欧登塞、设计之都哥本哈根与马尔默，最终返回斯德哥尔摩。市中心四星级酒店、峡湾景观酒店、含门票、单程深度环线，让您一次领略峡湾的磅礴之美与北欧的慢生活。

highlights.en: Hike to Preikestolen (Pulpit Rock), the cliff-top platform high above Lysefjord
highlights.zh: 徒步布道石，登上吕瑟峡湾之巅的悬崖平台

highlights.en: Cruise the UNESCO Geirangerfjord past the Seven Sisters waterfalls
highlights.zh: 巡游世界遗产盖朗厄尔峡湾，近赏七姐妹瀑布

highlights.en: Ride the world-famous Flåm Railway, one of Europe's great scenic train routes
highlights.zh: 乘坐举世闻名的弗洛姆高山火车，欧洲十大观光铁路之一

highlights.en: Drive the Atlantic Road, a 'photographer's journey' bridging islands across the sea
highlights.zh: 驾行大西洋之路，跨海连岛的摄影师朝圣公路

highlights.en: Walk to the Briksdal glacier by 'troll car' and explore Andersen's Odense
highlights.zh: 乘精灵车前往布里克斯达尔冰川，并探访安徒生故乡欧登塞

highlights.en: Three capitals and four great fjords on one deep one-way route, internal flight & scenic rail included
highlights.zh: 三国首都＋四大峡湾，单程深度环线，含内陆段航班与景观火车

highlights.en: City-centre brand-name 4-star hotels plus 2 nights in fjord-view lodges, more sightseeing time
highlights.zh: 市区品牌连锁四星级酒店，外加2晚峡湾景观酒店，大幅增加游览时间

highlights.en: All listed attractions included, no forced shopping, all-inclusive pricing
highlights.zh: 所有列明景点门票全含，无强制购物，全包价格

includes.en: [Flights] Route A includes the Stockholm–Trondheim domestic flight with taxes; Route B includes the Trondheim–Stockholm domestic flight with taxes.
includes.zh: 【机票】A线路包含：斯德哥尔摩-特隆赫姆内陆含税机票；B线路包含：特隆赫姆-斯德哥尔摩的内陆含税机票。

includes.en: [Hotels] 10 nights in 4-star hotels and 2 nights in special fjord-view hotels. (Norway has abolished hotel star ratings; star levels refer to the Booking or Ctrip hotel-rating standard.)
includes.zh: 【酒店】四星级酒店10晚，峡湾特色景观酒店2晚。（挪威酒店取消星级评定，酒店星级参考Booking或携程的酒店星级标准）

includes.en: [Meals] 1 Norwegian-style fish dinner, 1 buffet dinner, and 12 Scandinavian breakfasts — 14 meals in total.
includes.zh: 【餐饮】1餐挪威特色鱼餐、1餐自助晚餐，以及12次斯堪的纳维亚式早餐，共计14餐。

includes.en: [Operating costs] City/tourist tax, city-entry fees, accommodation tax, road and bridge tolls, parking and fuel fees, driver-guide meal allowances and other in-itinerary operating costs.
includes.zh: 【执行】游客城市税、进城费、居住税、过路过桥费、停车燃油费、司导餐补等行程内执行费用。

includes.en: [Vehicle] Tourist coach or tourist business van.
includes.zh: 【车辆】旅游巴士或旅游商务车。

includes.en: [Guide] A professional driver plus a Chinese-speaking guide, or a Chinese driver-guide for the whole trip. (Note: for groups of 8 or fewer, a business van with a Chinese-speaking driver-guide is arranged.)
includes.zh: 【导游】职业司机+中文导游或者全程中文华人司机兼导游（备注：8人及以下则安排为商务旅行车+中文司机兼导游）。

includes.en: [Luggage] One 23 kg checked bag and one carry-on bag.
includes.zh: 【行李】1件23公斤行李及1件随身行李。

includes.en: [Admissions] Stockholm City Hall (ticket + official guided commentary), Vasa Museum (ticket + official guided commentary), Stockholm sightseeing cruise, Hans Christian Andersen Museum, Andersen's childhood home, Funen Village, the Frederikshavn–Gothenburg ferry, Vigeland Sculpture Park, the Pulpit Rock (Preikestolen) hike and guide service, the Fløibanen funicular, the Flåm mountain railway train ticket, the Briksdal Glacier, the open-top troll cars, and the Geirangerfjord cruise.
includes.zh: 【门票】斯德哥尔摩市政厅（门票+官导讲解）、瓦萨沉船博物馆（门票+官导讲解）、斯德哥尔摩观光游船、安徒生博物馆、安徒生兒时故居、菲英村、腓特烈港到哥德堡渡轮、维格兰雕塑公园、布道石徒步及向导服务、弗洛伊恩山缆车、弗洛姆高山列车火车票、布里克斯达尔冰川、精灵敞篷车、蓋朗厄尔峡湾游船。

excludes.en: Passport: personal passport fees.
excludes.zh: 护照：个人护照费用。

excludes.en: Visa: the tourist visa fees required for the countries listed in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 签证：行程中所列旅游国家所需的观光签证费用。

excludes.en: Insurance: travel insurance fees. (If the itinerary involves high-risk sports, please verify whether your travel insurance covers that activity.)
excludes.zh: 保险：旅游保险费用；（如行程内涉及到高风险运动，请核实旅游保险是否包含该项运动）。

excludes.en: Tips: guide and driver tips of EUR 10 per person per day in total, same price for adults and children.
excludes.zh: 小费：游客支付导游和司机小费一共10欧/人/天，大小同价。

excludes.en: Meals: apart from the special meals included in the itinerary, lunches and dinners are not included.
excludes.zh: 餐饮：除行程内包含的特色餐外，行程中不包含午、晚正餐费用。

excludes.en: Admissions: any attractions not marked as fee-included in the itinerary (including but not limited to those marked '(exterior)', and all 'recommended', 'optional', 'experience' etc. items not stated as included) — if you wish to visit, please pay on your own.
excludes.zh: 门票：行程中未注明费用包含的景点（包括但不仅限于行程中注明“外观”的景点，“推荐”、“可选”、“体验”等等所有未提及费用包含的项目，如游客需要参观，敬请自理）。

excludes.en: Extended stays: accommodation, transport and sightseeing costs for any extension beyond the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 延长住宿：行程外额外延长的住宿、交通、观光费用。

excludes.en: Personal expenses: such as drinks/alcohol, taxis, phone charges and other personal spending.
excludes.zh: 私人消费：如饮料酒类、出租车、电话费等个人消费。

excludes.en: Other transport: transport not included beyond the business van or minibus, e.g. Venice gondolas, and sightseeing trains or electric taxis in vehicle-restricted zones — please pay on your own.
excludes.zh: 其他交通：除包含商务旅行车或者中巴之外，费用包含中未提及的其他交通费用，如威尼斯贡多拉，以及车辆限行区的观光火车、电瓶出租车等费用敬请自理。

excludes.en: Free-time activities: night-time independent sightseeing and recommended items in the itinerary, plus any transport, meals, admissions and shopping costs they incur.
excludes.zh: 自由活动：游客夜间自行游览及行程中的推荐项目，以及产生的交通、餐饮、门票、购物等费用。

excludes.en: Experience activities: any travel experience activities not included in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 体验活动：行程中没有包含的各项旅游体验活动。

excludes.en: Other costs: any costs not mentioned in the inclusions. In cases of force majeure (natural disasters, war, strikes, etc.), transport delays, flight cancellations or rescheduling, embassy visa delays, insufficient group size and similar special circumstances, or other reasons not attributable to our company, the company reserves the right to charge a price difference for the additional costs incurred.
excludes.zh: 其他费用：费用包含中未提及的费用。如因天灾、战争、罢工等不可抗力的原因，及因交通延阻、航班取消或更改时间、使馆延误出签证、人数不足等特殊情况或其他非我公司原因所引致的额外费用（如在外延期签证费、住、食及交通费、国家航空运价调整等），我公司有权追加差价。

timeline.title_en: Stockholm – Trondheim (visit the millennium-old city of the Viking kings)
timeline.title_zh: 斯德哥尔摩 – 特隆赫姆（拜访维京王的千年古城）
timeline.description_en: Travelers make their own way to Stockholm Airport and check in according to their flight time, then fly to Trondheim where the driver-guide meets the group on arrival. We explore the 'thousand-year-old capital' of Trondheim, visiting Nidaros Cathedral, the most important medieval building in Scandinavia, a majestic Gothic cathedral first built in 1070 over the tomb of St. Olav, and the place where Norway's first king was crowned. We then walk to the colorful Old Town Bridge (the red wooden 'Gate of Happiness') and the Bakklandet district to catch the beautiful evening light, and if there is a chance, sample the local century-old traditional dessert, the Trondheim ball. Note: due to flight and departure-date scheduling, some departures reverse the itinerary order (the same sights, run as 'Route B' with the coach used outbound and a Trondheim–Stockholm flight on the return); there is no guide on the flight, so travelers fly to the destination on their own, and the final order follows the departure notice. Overnight: Grand Olav's House Hotel or a similar 4-star hotel, located in Trondheim's charming, photogenic Bakklandet historic district within walking distance of the cathedral, the Old Town Bridge and the colorful wooden alleyways.
timeline.description_zh: 各位游客自行前往斯德哥尔摩机场，根据航班时间自行办理登机手续，乘飞机前往特隆赫姆，由司导在特隆赫姆机场接机。随后游览“千年古都”特隆赫姆，参观拥有斯堪的纳维亚半岛最重要中世纪建筑的尼德罗斯主教座堂——这座雄伟的哥特式大教堂始建于1070年，坐落在挪威守护神圣奥拉夫的墓葬之上，也是挪威第一任国王的加冕地；之后步行至色彩缤纷的老城桥（红色木桥，常被称为“幸福之门”）和巴克兰德街区，拍摄傍晚美景，有机会还可品尝当地百余年历史的传统甜品——特隆赫姆球。重要提醒：根据航班和团期排列，部分团期行程游览顺序前后调整、往返次序相反（游览内容一致，调整为去程坐车、回程特隆赫姆飞斯德哥尔摩的B线），航班上无导游陪同需自行乘机，具体以出团通知书为准。夜宿：格兰德奥拉夫之家酒店或同等4星级酒店，位于特隆赫姆迷人上镜的“Bakklandet”巴克兰德历史街区，可步行至尼德罗斯主教座堂、老城桥和巴克兰德街区。

timeline.title_en: Trondheim – Kristiansund – the Atlantic Road – Molde – Stranda (the Atlantic Road, a photographer's pilgrimage)
timeline.title_zh: 特隆赫姆 – 克里斯蒂安松 – 大西洋之路 – 莫尔德 – 斯特兰达（摄影师的朝圣景点——大西洋之路）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast we drive to the pretty town of Kristiansund at the eastern end of the famous Atlantic Road, visiting its harbor wharf and old town (Innlandet); Kristiansund sits on four small islands in the North Sea, with one of Norway's oldest opera houses (built 1914 in Art Nouveau style) and well-preserved buildings that survived WWII. After lunch we drive the Atlantic Road (Atlanterhavsveien), the scenic coastal route running 36 km between Kårvåg and Bud, voted one of the world's best road trips by The Guardian, which winds across islands on bridges and causeways with 11 sharp bends. We then visit Molde, the 'city of the midnight sun' on the Romsdalsfjord, famous for its July international jazz festival and the panorama of 222 snow-capped peaks from the 407 m Varden viewpoint, before reaching Stranda or the Valldal valley. Overnight: Dregges Riverside Hotel – a classic Norwegian hotel, or a similar 3-4 star hotel, set deep in the Geirangerfjord area on the Storelva river, with a restaurant, indoor pool, sauna and a pretty back garden.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，前往坐落在著名大西洋之路东端的美丽小镇克里斯蒂安松，参观港口码头和老城区（Innlandet区）；克里斯蒂安松位于北海中的4个小岛上，市内歌剧院是挪威古老的歌剧院之一，1914年始建于新艺术运动风格，是二战中幸存并完善保存的少数建筑之一。午餐后乘车驶上景观公路——大西洋之路（Atlanterhavsveien），这条从Kårvåg到Bud全长36公里的海滨风景公路由桥梁和堤道将一座座岛屿连接在一起，沿途经过11个急弯，被英国《卫报》列入“摄影师之旅”名单。随后前往午夜阳光之城莫尔德参观——莫尔德位于罗姆达尔峡湾宽阔河口的河岸上，以国际午夜爵士音乐节闻名，站在海拔407米的瓦尔登观景台上可一览城市、峡湾、岛屿以及222座白雪覆盖山峰的全景。之后到达斯特兰达或瓦尔河谷，入住酒店。夜宿：德雷格斯河畔酒店——经典挪威酒店或同等3-4星级酒店，坐落于蓋朗厄尔峡湾深处的斯托雷尔瓦河畔，设有餐厅、室内泳池、桑拿浴室和漂亮的后花园。

timeline.title_en: Stranda – Geiranger – Briksdal Glacier – Sogndal (an epic of 'ice' and a masterpiece of 'water')
timeline.title_zh: 斯特兰达 – 蓋朗厄尔 – 布里克斯达尔冰川 – 松达尔（“冰”的史诗与“海”的杰作之旅）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast we set off along the Eagle Road (Ørnevegen), Route 63 between Geiranger and Eidsdal famous for its 11 hairpin bends, and cruise the Geirangerfjord by boat, gliding between sheer 1,500 m cliffs past flowing waterfalls. We see the Seven Sisters waterfall (one of its falls drops about 250 m) facing the Suitor falls across the fjord, and the Flydalsjuvet cliff viewpoint overlooking Geiranger village and the fjord. We then drive to the village of Olden to visit the Briksdal Glacier, an arm of mainland Europe's largest glacier Jostedalsbreen in Jostedal Glacier National Park, riding the open-top 'troll' mountain cars past the Volefossen waterfall toward the prehistoric ice cap. In the afternoon we continue to Sogndal. Overnight: Sogndal Hofslund Fjord Hotel or Best Western, or a similar 3-star hotel — a family-run hotel built in 1912 in the center of Sogndal on the Sognefjord, with its own garden and an outdoor heated pool.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，出发前往老鹰之路（Ørnevegen，蓋朗厄尔与埃兹达尔之间的63号公路，以接连11个发夹弯闻名），在蓋朗厄尔峡湾乘坐游轮，于海拔1500米以上的陡峭崖壁之间航行，被无数飞瀑环绕，近距离观赏七姐妹瀑布（其中一条瀑布有250米落差）及其对面永不停歇追求的求婚者瀑布，并在弗里达斯悬崖观景台俯瞰峡谷中的蓋朗厄尔小城与峡湾。随后乘车前往奥尔登小镇游览布里克斯达尔冰川——它是欧洲大陆体量首位的冰川约斯特达尔布林冰川（Jostedalsbreen）的分支，位于乔斯特达尔冰川国家公园中；乘坐有趣的精灵敞篷山地车途经沃伦福斯大瀑布，前往史前冰盖，徒步至蓝冰前沿。下午前往松达尔，入住酒店。夜宿：松达尔霍芬桑德峡湾酒店或Best Western酒店或同等3星级酒店——一间始建于1912年的家庭经营酒店，位于松恩达尔（Sogndal）中心的松恩峡湾畔，拥有自己的花园和室外温水游泳池。

timeline.title_en: Sogndal – Flåm – Voss – Bergen (the steep Flåm mountain railway and the land of trolls)
timeline.title_zh: 松达尔 – 弗洛姆 – 沃斯 – 卑尔根（弗洛姆陡峭高山列车遇见“山妖精灵”）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast we drive to Flåm to visit the Flåm Railway Museum and the village of Flåm on the Sognefjord (Norway's largest and most famous fjord, 204 km long and up to 1,308 m deep), then ride the world-famous steep Flåm mountain railway up to Myrdal — a 20 km line, 80% of it on a 5.5% gradient, built between 1923 and 1944, that climbs past streams, waterfalls, cliffs and snow peaks. At Myrdal we transfer to the regular Norwegian railway to the beautiful lakeside town of Voss, then continue to the 'rainy city' of Bergen. There we freely explore the UNESCO World Heritage Bryggen wharf with its colorful Hanseatic timber buildings, ride the Fløibanen funicular up Mount Fløyen for a panorama of the city, harbor and fjord, stroll the waterfront and enjoy a seafood feast at the Fisketorget fish market. Overnight: Bergen Moxy, Thon or Scandic, or a similar 4-star hotel, a stylish modern hotel blending Nordic and industrial design in the Solheimsviken/Marineholmen waterfront business district, a few minutes' walk from the seaside promenade.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，乘车前往弗洛姆，游览弗洛姆铁路博物馆、弗洛姆小镇和松恩峡湾（挪威第一大、也是世界最著名的峡湾，全长204公里，最深处达1308米），随后乘坐世界闻名的陡峭高山火车到达米达尔（Myrdal）——这段全长20公里的铁路80%路段建在5.5%坡度的山坡上，始建于1923年、历时20年完成，沿途可见溪流、瀑布、悬崖与雪山。在米达尔换乘挪威官方火车前往美丽的湖畔小镇沃斯，之后前往“雨城”卑尔根，自由参观世界遗产布吕根（自1979年列为世界文化遗产的汉萨同盟商业建筑及彩色木屋），乘坐弗洛伊恩山缆车（弗罗伊索道）登上弗洛伊恩山顶俯瞰整个城市、海港与峡湾，漫步卑尔根海滨，并在卑尔根鱼市（Fisketorget）品尝一顿海鲜大餐。夜宿：卑尔根Moxy或Thon或Scandic酒店或同等4星级酒店——一家混合北欧风与工业风的时尚现代酒店，坐落于索尔海姆斯维肯和马林霍尔门商业区的海滨地段，步行几分钟可达海边步道。

timeline.title_en: Bergen – Hardangerfjord – Odda – Haugesund (the Hardangerfjord, painting-like pastoral scenery)
timeline.title_zh: 卑尔根 – 哈当厄尔峡湾 – 奥达 – 海于格松（哈当厄尔峡湾——油画般的田园风光）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast we drive to the Steinsdalsfossen waterfall near Norheimsund, whose unique feature is that you can walk along the path behind the falling water without getting wet — a 'water curtain cave' experience with sunlight forming rainbows through the spray. We then travel along the Hardangerfjord, the gentlest of the four great fjords, dotted with colorful cottages, pastoral farmland and the famous apple and cherry orchards planted by monks some 800 years ago. We visit the quiet little town of Odda, whose orchards are part of a World Heritage site, enjoying the changing hills and forests of western Norway along the way, before reaching Haugesund. Overnight: Haugesund Amanda Hotel or a similar 4-star hotel, in the heart of Haugesund within walking distance of the Amanda statue, the pink town hall and the library park, a local landmark known for its maritime history and distinctive Art Nouveau architecture, decorated inside like a museum of nostalgic seafaring elements.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，乘车来到诺海姆桑德（Norheimsund）附近的斯坦达尔瀑布，体验“水帘洞”般的奇观——这座瀑布的独特之处在于旅行者可以从瀑布后方穿行而过却一点都不被打湿，阳光透过水幕形成彩虹。之后前往哈当厄尔峡湾——四大峡湾中最为平缓、田园般风景的峡湾，两岸点缀着彩色小屋的田园和著名的苹果园与樱桃园（约800年前僧侣在此种植果树）；前往奥达（Odda）小镇，其中的果园被列入世界文化遗产，一路欣赏挪威西部多变的丘陵与森林地貌，在这宁静的小镇游览，感受当地生活气息。随后到达海于格松，入住酒店。夜宿：海于格松阿曼达酒店或同等4星级酒店——位于海于格松市中心核心区，步行即可到达阿曼达雕像、粉红色的市政厅和美丽的图书馆公园，是当地以悠久航海历史和独特“新艺术运动”建筑风格闻名的地标，内部装饰宛如一座怀旧海上旅行主题的博物馆。
