timeline.title_en: Haugesund – Preikestolen (Pulpit Rock) – Stavanger (hike the miraculous Pulpit Rock over the Lysefjord)
timeline.title_zh: 海于格松 – 布道石 – 斯塔万格（徒步布道台奇迹之石，领略吕瑟峡湾壮阔美景）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast we drive from Haugesund to the Preikestolen (Pulpit Rock) area on the Lysefjord and hike up to this miraculous flat-topped cliff, named for its resemblance to a preacher's pulpit. The natural rock platform stands 604 m sheer above the fjord with a flat surface of about 600 m², and the 3.8 km trail (marked with red Ts) takes roughly 4-5 hours round trip at moderate difficulty — it was voted the most magnificent of the world's 50 best views by CNN's travel site, and is one of the finest places to take in the calm, mirror-like Lysefjord. In the afternoon we reach Stavanger. Note: the round trip is 8 km and takes 4-5 hours over rugged mountain paths — please mind your safety and your own limits, wear non-slip, waterproof high-top hiking boots, and bring your own lunch and water as there are no shops or restaurants along the way (the trailhead service center has a restaurant and café). Overnight: Stavanger Sola/Scandic Hotel or a similar 4-star hotel in the city center, about 750 m from the old town square where the July Gladmat food festival is held.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，从海于格松出发前往吕瑟峡湾布道石景区，徒步奇迹之石——布道台（又叫布道石，因形状类似教堂牧师的讲台而得名）。布道石位于吕瑟峡湾中部，是一块天然凌空形成的巨型石台，台顶与下方峡湾垂直落差604米，岩石平面面积约600平方米；通往布道石的登山径全长3.8公里、沿途有红色T字标记，从起点来回大概4-5小时、中等强度，曾被美国CNN旗下旅游网站评为全球50处最壮丽景色之首，也是俯瞰宁静如镜的吕瑟峡湾的最佳地点之一。下午到达斯塔万格，入住酒店。备注：布道石往返8公里、需4-5小时，山路崎岖，请客人注意安全量力而为，建议穿着防滑防水加高帮的登山鞋；请自备午餐及饮用水，沿途没有商店及餐厅（景区服务中心设有餐厅、咖啡店），如身体不适可返回景区服务中心。夜宿：斯塔万格松恩/斯坎迪克酒店或同等4星级酒店——精选北欧连锁酒店，位于斯塔万格市中心，距七月举行的Gladmatfestivalen美食节所在的老城中心广场仅750米。

timeline.title_en: Stavanger – Kristiansand – Sandefjord (from a seaside stroll to the cultural colors of the oil capital)
timeline.title_zh: 斯塔万格 – 克里斯蒂安桑 – 桑讷菲尤尔（海滨慢旅到石油之都的文化色彩）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast we tour Norway's oil capital, Stavanger, a European Capital of Culture: we wander Gamle Stavanger, the well-preserved old town of 173 white wooden houses from the late 18th and early 19th centuries (home to two Michelin restaurants, Renaa and Sabi Omakase), and then the colorful, photogenic Fargegaten ('color street') district, a vibrant lane full of cafés, restaurants, bars and gift and candy shops that overturns the staid image of Norway. With the guide we visit the Sverd i fjell (Swords in Rock) monument by the sea, three giant 10 m Viking swords commemorating the Battle of Hafrsfjord, symbolizing peace, unity and freedom and now a symbol of the city. We rest mid-way in Kristiansand, Norway's fifth-largest city and a southern coastal gem, then continue to the coastal town of Sandefjord in the afternoon. Overnight: Sandefjord Atlantic House Hotel or a similar 4-star hotel, within walking distance of Sandefjord's harbor and old town, decorated throughout like a living museum of the town's whaling history with elegant early-1990s interior design and a restaurant serving local Norwegian specialties.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，开始游览挪威的石油之都、欧洲文化之都斯塔万格：穿梭于Gamle Stavanger保存完好的老城区（由18世纪末19世纪初的173套白色木质房屋组成，城中有Renaa和Sabi Omakase两家米其林餐厅），再到色彩缤纷的网红景点法格卡腾（Fargegaten）街区——这条由理发师发起改造、刷成各类颜色的街道充满活力与创意，沿街都是咖啡馆、餐厅、小酒吧和各类礼品糖果商店。午餐后跟随导游参观斯塔万格海边的巨剑阵（岩中之剑），这组由三把十几米高的维京巨剑组成的雕塑纪念“Hafrsfjord之战”，分别代表和平、统一和自由，如今也是斯塔万格的城市标志。中途在挪威第五大城市、南部海滨明珠克里斯蒂安桑休息，下午到挪威南部海滨城市桑讷菲尤尔，入住酒店。夜宿：桑讷菲尤尔大西洋之家酒店或同等4星级酒店——可步行到达桑讷菲尤尔港口和老城区，整个酒店宛如一座活生生的博物馆，处处展现这座沿海小镇的捕鲸业历史，酒店设有当地特色餐厅，推荐尝试新鲜海产。

timeline.title_en: Sandefjord – Oslo – Gothenburg (Nordic slow living: an art tour and a harbor walk)
timeline.title_zh: 桑讷菲尤尔 – 奥斯陆 – 哥德堡（北欧式的慢生活——艺术巡礼与海港漫步）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast we drive to Oslo to see Oslo City Hall (exterior), the brick-red building where the Nobel Peace Prize is awarded each December 10, watch the changing of the guard outside the Royal Palace (exterior), and visit the medieval Akershus Fortress (exterior), begun in 1299 and never conquered in 700 years of history. We see the glacier-like modern Oslo Opera House (exterior) — we strongly recommend walking up its sloping roof for views over the fjord city — and Vigeland Sculpture Park, with 192 sculptures and 650 figures by Gustav Vigeland on the theme of the cycle of human life. We then continue to the Swedish west-coast port city of Gothenburg. Overnight: Gothenburg Quality Hotel or a similar 4-star hotel, a 21-storey waterfront building with 360-degree views, Scandinavian-designed rooms, the Social Bar Bistro, and weekend kids' activities led by its mascots Lollo and Bernie.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，前往奥斯陆，参观诺贝尔和平奖颁奖地——奥斯陆市政厅（外观，这座磚红色建筑于1950年为庆祝奥斯陆建城900年而建成，每年12月10日诺贝尔奖颁奖仪式在此举行），在皇宫（外观）外观看卫兵换岗，之后游览中世纪城堡阿克斯胡斯城堡（外观，始建于1299年，由哈康五世国王下令修建，见证奥斯陆700多年历史且从未被攻克）。参观如同冰川般的现代建筑奥斯陆歌剧院（外观），强烈推荐走上倾斜的白色石制屋顶俯瞰峡湾城市风光；之后参观以思考生命与人生为主题的维格兰雕塑公园（共有192座雕塑、650个人物雕像，出自雕塑大师古斯塔夫·维格兰之手）。结束参观后前往瑞典西海岸海港城市哥德堡，入住酒店。夜宿：哥德堡品质酒店或同等4星级酒店——坐落于水畔的21层高建筑，可饱览360度壮丽景色，客房享有斯堪的纳维亚设计，设有The Social Bar Bistro餐厅，周末及学校假期酒店吉祥物Lollo和Bernie狗狗还会带来寻宝、手工等亲子活动。

timeline.title_en: Gothenburg – Frederikshavn – Aalborg (step into a canvas of past and present colors)
timeline.title_zh: 哥德堡 – 腓特烈港 – 奥尔堡（踏入一幅融入古今色彩的画卷）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast we freely visit Masthugget Church (exterior), one of Gothenburg's three great landmarks built in 1914 on a hilltop with city views and a 60 m bell tower; the Poseidon statue (completed 1931, a symbol of Sweden's seafaring age); and Avenyn, the city's main boulevard lined with shops, cafés and restaurants leading to the Poseidon statue and the art museum. We then take the ferry from Gothenburg harbor across the Kattegat strait (about 3.5 hours, with shops, cafés and the famous shrimp sandwich on board) to Frederikshavn in Denmark. After a short rest we continue to Aalborg and freely visit its sights: Aalborg Castle (exterior, a 16th-century defensive fortress later a royal residence), Budolfi Church (a 14th-century Gothic landmark with a fine organ and stained glass), and the fairytale Hjelmerstald lane and pedestrian street with colorful 16th-19th century half-timbered houses. Overnight: Aalborg Scandic Hotel or a similar 4-star hotel in the city center with shops and a mall at the door, Scandinavian-style rooms, the URBAN Food & Drink restaurant and a gym.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，自由参观马斯塔蓋特教堂（外观，哥德堡三大地标之一，1914年竣工于小山坡上，可俯瞰半个城市，标志是60多米高的钟楼）、海神波赛东雕塑（完成于1931年，是瑞典海上霸权和航海时代的象征）和Avenyn大道（哥德堡市中心主干道，两旁都是商铺、咖啡馆、餐厅，尽头是波塞冬雕像和哥德堡艺术博物馆）。之后在哥德堡港口乘坐渡轮横渡卡特加特海峡（约3.5小时，船上有商店、简餐及著名的蝦肉三明治）前往丹麦的腓特烈港，短暂休息后前往奥尔堡，抵达后自由参观市区景点：奥尔堡城堡（外观，建于16世纪的防御性要塞，后成为丹麦王室官邸）、Budolfi教堂（始建于14世纪、典型哥特式建筑，内有精致管风琴与彩绘玻璃）、杜赫芬老街（色彩斑斓的童话般低矮房屋小巷）和步行街（保留大量16至19世纪砖木结构建筑的主要商业街区）。随后入住酒店。夜宿：奥尔堡斯堪迪克酒店或同等4星级酒店——位于奥尔堡市中心，门口即是商店和购物中心，房间采用斯堪的纳维亚风格装饰，设有URBAN Food Drink餐厅及健身房。

timeline.title_en: Aalborg – Odense – Copenhagen (into Andersen's town, becoming a character from the fairy tales)
timeline.title_zh: 奥尔堡 – 欧登塞 – 哥本哈根（走进安徒生小镇，当童话里的人物）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast we head to Odense, the fairytale town of Hans Christian Andersen, to visit the Hans Christian Andersen Museum — its new wing, designed by Japanese master Kengo Kuma and opened in 2021, has two-thirds of its space underground and a maze-like green garden above, with 18 themed rooms displaying over 2,000 manuscripts, letters and personal items, and recordings of his tales in 96 languages from 68 countries. We also see Andersen's childhood home, the tiny 18 m² yellow house at 3 Munkemøllestræde where he was born in 1805, and St. Knud's Cathedral, a 14th-century Gothic church with a Rococo pulpit and an ornate 16th-century altarpiece. We then experience 19th-century Danish rural life at the Funen Village open-air museum, a complete reconstructed village of 18th- and 19th-century farm buildings, fences, ponds and livestock that inspired Andersen. In the afternoon we drive to Copenhagen. Overnight: Copenhagen AC Marriott or Scandic Hotel, or a similar 4-star hotel, next to the Bella Center, with modern Danish-designed rooms and a rooftop restaurant/bar on the 23rd floor (76 m up).
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，前往安徒生童话小镇欧登塞，参观安徒生博物馆（2021年由日本建筑大师隈研吾设计的新馆开幕，建筑三分之二位于地下、地上是迷宫般的绿意花园，18间主题陈列室展出2000余件手稿、信件、画稿及私人物品，多媒体室可聆听68国96种语言的安徒生童话译本）和安徒生兒时故居（位于蒙基莫莱街3号、仅18平方米的黄色小屋，是安徒生1805年诞生地）、圣克努特教堂（建于14世纪的哥特式大教堂，内部纯白，有洛可可式讲道坛和16世纪聖坛雕刻）。之后在菲英村（菲英岛露天博物馆）里体验19世纪的丹麦乡村生活——这是以18、19世纪遗留的乡村建筑重建的完整复古村庄，有畜栏、养鸭塘、苹果树和花园，生动展示安徒生时期丹麦乡村的生活样貌，感受故乡带给安徒生的创作灵感。下午前往哥本哈根入住酒店。夜宿：哥本哈根AC万豪酒店或斯堪迪克酒店或同等4星级酒店——毗邻哥本哈根贝拉中心，现代客房配备落地窗和纯正丹麦设计，酒店在76米高空的23层设有屋顶餐厅兼酒吧。

timeline.title_en: Copenhagen – Malmö (a perfect encounter between the fairytale kingdom and the design capital)
timeline.title_zh: 哥本哈根 – 马尔默（童话王国与设计之都的完美邂逅）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast we visit the symbol of Denmark, the Little Mermaid statue (sculpted in 1913 by Edvard Eriksen at Langelinie), the majestic Gefion Fountain (Gefion and four oxen plowing, from a folk legend), and the Renaissance star-shaped Kastellet fortress, and watch the royal guard at Amalienborg Palace (exterior). In the afternoon we see Frederik's Church (exterior), the copper-domed 'Marble Church' facing Amalienborg; the Round Tower (Rundetårn, exterior), one of Europe's oldest observatories built by Christian IV; the 'Black Diamond' Royal Danish Library on the waterfront; the famous landmark Nyhavn with its colorful 17th-18th century houses, bars and cafés; and Strøget, one of Europe's most famous shopping streets. We then cross the Øresund Bridge to Malmö. Overnight: Malmö Scandic or Quality Hotel, or a similar 4-star hotel in central Malmö, within walking distance of the city sights, with Nordic-style rooms and a restaurant serving a generous Scandinavian breakfast and Nordic dinner.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，参观丹麦的象征小美人鱼雕像（1913年由丹麦雕塑家爱德华·艾瑞克森在长堤公园港口雕塑而成）、气势磅礴的吉菲昂噴泉（由吉菲昂女神和四条牛及套犁组成，灵感来源于美丽的民间传说）、文艺复兴时期星形要塞之一卡斯特雷特五角要塞，并在阿美琳堡宫（外观）欣赏王室气派与卫队风采。下午参观腓特烈教堂（外观，又名“大理石教堂”，丹麦最著名的銅绿色圆顶教堂，与阿美琳堡王宫隔路相望）、欧洲古老的天文台圆塔（Rundetårn，外观，由克里斯欽四世修建）、哥本哈根的“黑钻石”丹麦皇家图书馆（表面覆盖黑色花崗岩的滨水标志性建筑）、著名地标之一新港（建于1669至1673年的人工运河，两岸彩色房屋、酒吧、咖啡馆林立）以及欧洲有名的购物步行街斯楚格街。结束参观后穿越厄勒海峡大桥前往马尔默入住酒店。夜宿：马尔默斯堪迪克酒店或品质酒店或同等4星酒店——位于马尔默市中心，步行即可抵达市区各景点，房间采用北欧风格现代装修，餐厅提供丰盛的斯堪的纳维亚式早餐及北欧特色晚餐。

timeline.title_en: Malmö – Jönköping – Stockholm (the ancient-and-modern hybrid city linking Denmark and Sweden)
timeline.title_zh: 马尔默 – 延雪平 – 斯德哥尔摩（古老又现代的混血城市——联接丹麦和瑞典的重镇）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast we tour Malmö, Sweden's third-largest city: the Turning Torso (HSB Turning Torso), the landmark 54-storey, 190 m skyscraper that twists 90 degrees over 9 segments; Ribersborg Beach beside the Øresund with views of the long Øresund Bridge; Stortorget square and the Town Hall (exterior, a 1546 Dutch Renaissance building, with the bronze equestrian statue of King Karl X Gustav at the center of Sweden's oldest square); St. Peter's Church (exterior), a 14th-century Baltic Gothic church modeled on St. Mary's in Lübeck, with a 105 m spire and 15th-century medieval murals; and Lilla Torg, the lively little square from 1591 surrounded by 16th-18th century half-timbered houses. After lunch we visit Jönköping, the 'matchstick city' on Lake Vättern, a famous 19th-century European match-making center with a unique match museum. We then continue to Stockholm. Overnight: Stockholm Nacka Home Hotel or Scandic Hotel, or a similar 4-star hotel, 15 minutes from Stockholm's old town in a converted former wallpaper factory in Nacka, with industrial-elegant decor, a gym, and daily breakfast, afternoon tea and dinner.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，参观HSB旋转中心（旋转大楼，马尔默地标，直译为“扭动的腰”，共54层高190米、分9个区层旋转了90度）、里伯斯海滩（里伯斯堡海滩，位于厄勒海峡旁、长约2公里，可远眺厄勒海峡大桥）、斯托特广场与市政厅（外观，城里最古老的广场，市政厅建于1546年、是荷兰文艺复兴式建筑，广场中间是瑞典国王卡尔十世的青銅骑像）、聖彼得教堂（外观，14世纪波罗的海哥特式教堂，以德国吕贝克瑪丽亚教堂为样本，尖塔高105米，北边小礼拜堂屋顶有15世纪中世纪壁画）、Lilla Tory小广场（建于1591年，四周都是16至18世纪半木结构房子，广场上有座2006年建成、高5.8米的巨型台灯）。午餐后，前往游览“火柴之城”延雪平（位于瑞典南部斯莫兰地区、浩瀚的韦特恩湖畔，是欧洲19世纪有名的火柴制造中心，拥有一座独特的火柴博物馆）；随后前往斯德哥尔摩入住酒店。夜宿：斯德哥尔摩纳卡Home酒店或斯堪迪克酒店或同等4星级酒店——距斯德哥尔摩老城仅15分钟，坐落于纳卡的旧壁纸厂内，精心保留了精美砖砌外墙与历史氛围、融合工业风格，设有健身房，每日提供早餐、下午茶和晚餐。

timeline.title_en: Stockholm (the grandeur and gentle grace of the 'Venice of the North')
timeline.title_zh: 斯德哥尔摩（领略“斯京”的大气磅礴和娇柔似水）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast we visit Stockholm City Hall — the city's emblem on the shores of Lake Mälaren, built between 1911 and 1923, with a soaring tower that makes the whole building resemble a great ship (entry ticket and official guided commentary included) — and the old town (Gamla Stan), established in the 13th century with medieval lanes, cobbled streets and the SALUHALL traditional market (open 10:00-16:00). We tour the Vasa Museum (ticket and official guide included), home to the world's only preserved 17th-century ship, which sank on her maiden voyage in 1628 just 2 km from harbor. We then board a sightseeing cruise to view the city skyline from the water and glide into the calm Lake Mälaren to reach the World Heritage Drottningholm Palace ('the Versailles of Sweden', exterior) and freely explore its free royal gardens (a geometric French Baroque garden and a natural English garden). The wonderful itinerary ends in central Stockholm. No hotel accommodation on the final night.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，前往参观斯德哥尔摩市政厅（位于梅拉伦湖畔，是斯德哥尔摩的形象和代表，建于1911年、历时12年完成，整个建筑犹如一艘航行中的大船，含门票+官导讲解）和老城（斯德哥尔摩老城区建立于13世纪，有中世纪小巷、圆石街道和古式建筑，其中有著名的SALUHALL传统市集，每天10点营业到16点），并参观瓦薩沉船博物馆（含门票+官导讲解，馆内的瓦薩号是世界上独有保存完好的17世纪船舶，1628年首航时不幸遭遇强风沉没在距港口仅2公里处）。之后乘坐观光游船从水上视角欣赏斯德哥尔摩的城市轮廓，缓缓驶入宁静的梅拉伦湖，最终抵达世界文化遗产皇后岛，自由参观卓宁霍姆宫（外观，被誉为“瑞典的凡尔赛”）及免费开放的宫廷花园（分为法式巴洛克花园和更自然野趣的英式花园两部分）。在斯德哥尔摩市区结束美好行程！最后一晚无酒店住宿。

meeting_en: Stockholm, Sweden. Travellers make their own way to Stockholm Arlanda Airport on Day 1 for the flight to Trondheim, where the driver-guide meets the group; tour ends back in central Stockholm on Day 13.
meeting_zh: 瑞典斯德哥尔摩。第1天游客自行前往斯德哥尔摩机场乘机飞往特隆赫姆，由司导在特隆赫姆接机；第13天在斯德哥尔摩市区结束行程。

faqs.question_en: Where and when do we meet and disperse?
faqs.question_zh: 集合和集散的时间和地点是怎样的？
faqs.answer_en: Route A: meet on day 1 by flying from Stockholm Airport to Trondheim, where the guide meets you at Trondheim Airport based on your flight time; disperse on the morning of the last day in central Stockholm. Route B: meet at 11:00 a.m. on day 1 in front of Stockholm City Hall; disperse on the last day at Trondheim Airport, from where you fly back to Stockholm Airport. For both routes, we do NOT recommend booking flights that land in Stockholm on the meeting day or depart Stockholm on the ending day.
faqs.answer_zh: A线路：集合地点为当天自行前往斯德哥尔摩机场乘飞机到达特隆赫姆，导游根据航班时间在特隆赫姆机场接机；解散地点为行程最后一天上午在斯德哥尔摩市中心。B线路：集合地点为当天上午11:00在斯德哥尔摩市政厅门口集合；解散地点为最后一天在特隆赫姆机场送机，游客乘飞机返回斯德哥尔摩机场。两条线路均不推荐参团当天降落斯德哥尔摩、以及结束当天离开斯德哥尔摩的航班！

faqs.question_en: How do I get to Stockholm Airport?
faqs.question_zh: 如何前往斯德哥尔摩机场？
faqs.answer_en: Stockholm Arlanda Airport (ARN) is about 42 km from the city center. The Arlanda Express airport train is the fastest option — about 20 minutes non-stop between Stockholm Central and the airport, with a one-way fare of about 340 SEK (buy from machines at the entrance/platform). A taxi from the city is around 800 SEK, and ride-hailing via Bolt or Uber (widely available in Stockholm) is usually cheaper, around 650 SEK.
faqs.answer_zh: 斯德哥尔摩机场（ARN）距离市中心约42公里。机场快线（Arlanda Express）是最佳选择，从Stockholm Central到机场约20分钟、中间不停车，单程票价340 SEK/人（在入口和站台的自动售票机购买）。出租车从市区到机场约800 SEK；网约车Bolt和Uber在斯德哥尔摩很普及，价格通常更便宜，约650 SEK。

faqs.question_en: Can I swim in the sea or fjord during the trip?
faqs.question_zh: 行程中可以下海或峡湾游泳吗？
faqs.answer_en: Most hotels are in city commercial centers and are generally within walking distance of the sea, so you can stroll along the shore during free evening time. However, Norway's sea water temperature is not suitable for swimming — we suggest using the hotel's indoor pool instead.
faqs.answer_zh: 行程中的酒店大多数在城市商业中心，步行一般都可以到达海边，晚上自由活动时间可选择漫步海边，但挪威的海水温度不适宜下水游泳，建议使用酒店内的室内游泳池。

faqs.question_en: My English isn't good — can I manage free time on my own?
faqs.question_zh: 我的英文不好，我有能力自由活动吗？
faqs.answer_en: Hotels are located near the sightseeing areas, so walking back and forth is no problem. If you are worried about the language but still want a deeper local experience, you can pair up with fellow travelers — every day there are many group members exploring the surroundings.
faqs.answer_zh: 酒店位于游览景区的周边，步行往返没有任何问题。如果担心语言问题又希望深度体验当地人文，可以与其他团友结伴同行，并且每天都有大量团友在周边活动。

faqs.question_en: I don't want to enter some of the attractions — can I get a refund?
faqs.question_zh: 行程内的部分景点我不想进去，可以退费吗？
faqs.answer_en: You may spend free time around the attraction, but you must return to the meeting point at the agreed time, and no refund is available for skipped attractions.
faqs.answer_zh: 您可以在景点周边自由活动，但需要在约定的时间内到集合地点，并且无法退费。

faqs.question_en: What will I eat locally?
faqs.question_zh: 我在当地吃什么？
faqs.answer_en: Norwegians are expert with fish and seafood — salmon and cod are common, along with other seasonal seafood, and reindeer meat is a notable specialty. The cities we pass through offer a wide range of local cuisine and seafood markets, and even the street snacks are memorable. Your guide will also introduce and recommend local restaurants.
faqs.answer_zh: 挪威人吃鱼和海鲜比较专业，常见的是三文鱼和鳕鱼以及其他时令海鲜，另外比较有特色的是挪威的驯鹿肉。我们经过的城市里有着繁多的特色餐饮，或是卖海鲜的鱼市，街边小吃也让人流连忘返；同时导游也会给予大家当地餐厅的介绍和推荐。

faqs.question_en: Where are the staff from?
faqs.question_zh: 工作人员是哪里的？
faqs.answer_en: The guide is a Chinese-speaking guide who provides Chinese-language service throughout the trip.
faqs.answer_zh: 导游为中文导游，全程提供中文服务。

faqs.question_en: What gear and fitness do I need for the Pulpit Rock hike, and how hard is it?
faqs.question_zh: 登上布道台需要带什么装备、需要什么样的体力？徒步强度如何？
faqs.answer_en: Girafe specially arranges this hike to Pulpit Rock on the Lysefjord, setting us apart from other group tours. It is 3.8 km one way from the coach parking lot to the rock, usually 4-5 hours round trip; we give all guests of differing fitness levels ample time to climb, enjoy the views and return, and you can take it at your own pace. Since there are no shops on the mountain, bring your own water bottle and a simple lunch. The fjord mountain paths are rugged, so non-slip, waterproof high-top hiking boots are recommended, and waterproof clothing for possible rain is even better.
faqs.answer_zh: 长颈鹿特别安排了在吕瑟峡湾徒步登山去布道台，这是有别于其他跟团游的地方。从大巴停车场到布道台单程3.8公里，一般往返4到5个小时，我们给予不同体力的贵宾足够时间登山、赏景和返回，可根据自己的体力走走停停。由于山上没有商店，登山时需自带水壶和简单午餐；峡灣地区山路崎岖，建议穿着防滑防水加高帮的登山鞋，若自备防水衣以备下雨则更优。

faqs.question_en: Are there signs on the mountain? Will I get lost?
faqs.question_zh: 山上有任何指示吗？不会迷路吧？
faqs.answer_en: Pulpit Rock is one of Norway's most famous attractions with hundreds of thousands of hikers each year, so there are signs along the whole route marked with red 'T's. July is peak season with many visitors, so you won't get lost just following the crowd.
faqs.answer_zh: 布道台是挪威出名的景点，每年都有数十万人来登山，所以全程都有指示、沿途有红色T字标记；另外七月是旅游旺季，游客很多，跟着人走不会迷路。

faqs.question_en: About the Flåm mountain railway
faqs.question_zh: 关于弗洛姆高山列车
faqs.answer_en: The mountain railway starts at Flåm and ends at Myrdal at the top. The train stops for 5 minutes at the Kjosfossen waterfall to hear the 'song of the troll spirits', then stops for 10 minutes at Myrdal — but passengers may NOT get off to catch the next train, as all tickets are valid only for that specific departure. Myrdal station is very small with only a few shops and is not worth lingering at; you must take the same train back to Flåm.
faqs.answer_zh: 高山列车始于弗洛姆，终点在山顶的米达尔。火车会在克尤斯福森瀑布处停留5分钟，聆听山妖精灵的歌声，随后在米达尔停留10分钟，但乘客不可下车乘下一班火车——所有火车票都是当次车次有效。米达尔火车站很小、只有几个商店，不建议停留，需乘同一班火车返回弗洛姆。

faqs.question_en: Will I get seasick on the sea fishing?
faqs.question_zh: 海钓会晕船吗？
faqs.answer_en: The fishing guide and captain choose between in-fjord fishing or open-sea fishing depending on the day's weather. Even when winds and waves are strong, the water inside the fjord is very calm; and in bad weather the catch tends to be much larger, so it can be worth braving the rough conditions.
faqs.answer_zh: 海钓的向导和船长会根据当天天气选择峡灣内海钓或远海海钓。即使风浪较大，峡灣内也是非常平静的水面；不过如果天气不好，捕获的鱼类反而会非常多，非常值得去碰一碰坏天气。

faqs.question_en: Can the seafood I catch be cooked at a restaurant?
faqs.question_zh: 我钓上来的海鲜可以在餐厅加工吗？
faqs.answer_en: No. Norwegian restaurants strictly follow food-hygiene law and cannot process ingredients from non-formal sources. However, you may cook and eat your catch yourself in your own room — fresh cod and herring are delicious pan-fried or quickly blanched.
faqs.answer_zh: 不可以。挪威的餐厅严格遵守食品卫生法，不可以加工非正规食品来源的食材；但游客可以在自己的房间自行加工食用，新鲜的鳕鱼和青鱼，生煎或汆烫都非常可口。

faqs.question_en: I'm not used to Norwegian seafood, have a seafood allergy, or am vegetarian — can I change the meal set?
faqs.question_zh: 我不太习惯挪威海鲜、海鲜过敏或是素食主义者，是否可以更改套餐？
faqs.answer_en: Please note this when booking or contact your sales rep before booking to change the meal set or opt for a meal refund. After booking, meals are reserved by default and, once the restaurant reservation is made, our company cannot cancel it.
faqs.answer_zh: 请在报名前备注或与销售员联系，更改套餐或选择餐饮退费。如报名后则按默认餐饮预订，餐厅预订后我社不可取消。

faqs.question_en: Does the Lofoten route overlap with the fjord route, and how do they connect?
faqs.question_zh: 挪威罗浮敦路线是否和挪威峡湾路线有重叠，或者如何衔接？
faqs.answer_en: Lofoten is inside Norway's Arctic Circle, about 2,000 km from the southern fjords, with completely different scenery, terrain and customs. This product departs Monday to Friday (returning to Oslo on Friday evening), while fjord routes usually depart Saturday — so they connect on Friday, and we suggest booking the Radisson at Oslo Airport on Friday night. The best suggested connection: do the fjord route Saturday morning (returning to Oslo Friday), tour the Oslo harbor/opera house/palace area Saturday and Sunday, then join the Lofoten route on Monday. Alternatively, do Lofoten on Monday, return to Oslo Friday, then the fjord route Saturday, and tour Oslo after returning the following Friday.
faqs.answer_zh: 罗浮敦在挪威北极圈境内，与挪威南部的峡灣相差2000公里，两地的风景、地貌、习俗都不同。本产品为每周一到周五发团（周五晚上返回奥斯陆），通常峡灣路线都是周六发团，因此可在周五衔接，建议预定周五奥斯陆机场的Radisson酒店。最佳衔接路线：周六上午参加峡灣路线（周五返回奥斯陆），周六及周日游览奥斯陆码头、歌剧院及皇宫区域，周一参加罗浮敦路线；或周一参加罗浮敦路线、周五返回奥斯陆后周六再参加峡灣路线，最后周五返回后游览奥斯陆。

faqs.question_en: Do I need a visa?
faqs.question_zh: 是否需要签证？
faqs.answer_en: Yes. This product does NOT include visa fees — you will need a Schengen visa (single- or multiple-entry); please choose a Schengen-visa product if you need one processed. After booking, we provide all materials needed for the Schengen visa application free of charge, and if you commission us we will buy the Schengen-compliant travel insurance for you. 'Worry-free visa guarantee': if you sign with us 61+ days before departure and have not obtained the visa within 45 days before departure, we bear all losses and immediately refund the full travel cost. Travelers who do not meet this clause and fail to obtain the visa are refunded per the change/cancellation terms; in case of refusal, notify us within 48 hours with the consulate's refusal letter, submit any supplementary/amended materials within 5 days, and do not unilaterally waive the right of 'visa defense'. Your passport must be valid for at least 6 months from the date of departure, or customs may deny entry. Visa fees, visa service fees, Schengen insurance fees and visa-center appointment fees are all non-refundable and non-transferable, even if the product itself is cancelled or changed.
faqs.answer_zh: 需要。本产品不包含签证费用，需要办理申根签证（单次或多次入境），如需办理请选择申根签证产品。预定后免费提供办理申根签证的全部材料；若委托我社办理签证，我社将为您购买符合申根要求的申根旅游保险。保签无忧：游客在出发日前61天与我社签约，如在出发前45天内未获取签证，我社承担所有损失、立即退还全部旅游费用；不符合该条款且未正常获签者按“退改与取消条款”退费。如遇拒签需在48小时内通知我社并出具使领馆拒签函，如需补充或更改材料须在5天内提交，且不得单方面放弃“签证抗辩”权利。护照有效期需在离境之日起至少还有六个月，否则海关有权拒绝入境。签证费、签证服务费、申根保险费、签证中心预约费均不可退款，也无法更改使用者，即使产品退改签亦无法退款。

faqs.question_en: Booking, changes & cancellation
faqs.question_zh: 预订、变更与取消须知
faqs.answer_en: Free cancellation: up to 30 days before departure (excluding the 30th day), both the travel agency and the traveler may apply for cancellation without cause. After booking, no refund is given for partially skipped projects, voluntary mid-trip departure, or hotels not stayed in; reducing the party size triggers recalculation at the adjusted room-type unit price. Change fees follow each carrier's terms (typically EUR 6-18 hotel name change, EUR 100-120 per flight segment, EUR 35-180 per train/ferry/cruise ticket), and multi-segment/round-trip tickets must be used in order. Because of frequent flight changes, traffic, ferry cancellations, strikes or itinerary reordering, the visiting order is often adjusted; you must arrive at the meeting point one day before the group starts and leave the dispersal point one day after it ends, allowing buffer time (at least 5 hours for connections at the same airport, 7 hours for different airports in the same city; reasonable meet/disperse window 07:00-21:00). Hotels: single travelers pay a single-room supplement deposit by default (refunded proportionally if room-sharing succeeds); standard double rooms have a hotel-assigned bed type (double or twin, not selectable); triple/family rooms are for two parents + one minor with hotel-assigned bedding. All European hotels are non-smoking, prohibit cooking in rooms, do not provide disposable toiletries or free boiling water, have 14:00 check-in / 11:00 check-out, and often have no air conditioning. Group formation (成团): this is a shared-seat group tour requiring 10 people; if 10 is not reached 30 days before departure, either party may cancel without liability (and self-paid activities not reaching 10 people may be converted to free time). Pricing: all prices are quoted in EUR at booking; if you pay in CNY, the amount is auto-calculated from the Bank of China 'EUR sell' real-time rate on the payment day, and the same applies to refunds (you bear any exchange-rate difference and bank fees). Per the Tourism Law, no extra fees may be charged based on a traveler's age, occupation or region. Orders need timely payment and a second confirmation within 48 hours (else auto-refunded); booking at least 14 days ahead is recommended. No leader accompanies the trip — a local Chinese-speaking guide serves on the ground; there are no forced-shopping stops, and optional self-paid items are recommended on the spot with no compulsory consumption.
faqs.answer_zh: 免费取消：出发前30天（不含第30天）旅行社和旅行者均有权无理由取消。报名后，自愿放弃已含项目、中途离团或未入住的酒店均无法退款；如减少人数，需按调整后的房型和产品单价重新核算单价。交通变更费用参考各承运方条款（通常酒店更名6-18欧、航空更名每程100-120欧、火车及游轮每张35-180欧），往返/联程票必须按顺序使用。由于航变频繁、交通拥堵、渡轮取消、罢工或行程顺序调整，游览先后顺序经常调整，要求旅游者在团开始前一天到达集合地、结束后一天离开集散地并预留合理衔接时间（同机场转机至少5小时、同城不同机场至少7小时，合理集合集散时段为07:00至21:00）。酒店：单人报名默认含单人房差押金（成功拼房后按比例退款）；标准双人间床型由酒店安排不可选（可能大床或双床）；三人家庭间默认两位父母与一位未成年儿童入住、床型由酒店安排；欧洲酒店全部禁烟、禁止在房间内做饭、不提供一次性洗漱用品及免费开水，入住14:00、退房11:00，多数不以空调为标准设施。成团：本产品为散客拼团，成团人数为10人，行程开始前30天（不含第30天）未达成团人数，游客和我社均有权解除合同（自费活动未达10人也可改为自由活动）。价格：所有定价以欧元为计价单位，如选择人民币支付，则按当天本网站依据中国银行实时“欧元卖出价”自动计算的人民币价格为准，退款同样适用申请当日即时汇率，汇率差异及银行手续费由旅行者承担。根据旅游法，不得因年龄、职业、地区等差异加收费用。订单需及时支付并在48小时内二次确认（超时默认自动退款），建议至少提前14天预订。本产品全程不含领队，由当地中文导游提供服务；全程无购物店、无强制消费，自费项目由随团人员现场推荐、可自愿选择。

faqs.question_en: Health & safety requirements
faqs.question_zh: 健康与安全须知
faqs.answer_en: Please have a health check before departure. Do NOT book if you have: an infectious disease (e.g. active tuberculosis, typhoid); cardiovascular disease (e.g. severe hypertension, heart insufficiency, myocardial ischemia, myocardial infarction); cerebrovascular disease (e.g. cerebral embolism, hemorrhage, brain tumor); respiratory disease (e.g. emphysema, cor pulmonale); psychiatric illness (e.g. epilepsy and other mental illness); severe anemia (hemoglobin below 50 g/L); or are recovering from major/medium surgery. Pregnancy: from week 35 you may not join under any circumstances; from week 28 you must provide a doctor's exam report (within 7 days) and the attending physician's consent letter; under week 28, book with caution, sign a liability waiver, and you cannot join adventure, skiing, sea-going, high-altitude or outdoor projects. Persons with disabilities need a 7-day medical report + physician consent, an immediate-family escort, and at least 61 days' advance request for reserved seats/facilities. Seniors over 70 need a health certificate, physical exam report and immediate-family escort (or sign a waiver); the trip is long and physically demanding, so those of weak stamina should book with caution. Minors (under 18) must be accompanied by an immediate relative/guardian; some attractions have age limits (under 18/12/6); infants under 30 kg need an EU-standard child safety seat confirmed in advance; unaccompanied minors need parental authorization (both parents' if not traveling with a parent); infants under 2 are NOT accepted. Per Article 15 of the Tourism Law and the Infectious Disease Prevention Law (2025 revision), travelers must truthfully declare health information relevant to the trip (pregnancy, lactation, chronic disease, infectious-disease history, suspected symptoms, recent epidemic-area travel); concealment causing harm makes the traveler liable for their own losses, medical/quarantine costs and compensation, and the agency may terminate the contract without refund.
faqs.answer_zh: 出行前请做一次必要的身体检查，如存在下列情况请勿报名：传染性疾病患者（如活动期肺结核、伤寒等）；心血管疾病患者（如严重高血压、心功能不全、心肌缺氧、心肌梗塞等）；脑血管疾病患者（如脑栓塞、脑出血、脑肿瘤等）；呼吸系统疾病患者（如肺气肿、肺心病等）；精神病患者（如癫痫及各种精神病）；严重贫血患者（血红蛋白50克/升以下）；大中型手术恢复期病患者。孕妇：妊娠35周及以上任何情况都无法参团；28周及以上需提供7日内的医生检查报告及主治医生同意书；28周以下请慎重报名，需签署免责声明书，且行程内探险、滑雪、出海、高空、户外等项目都无法参加。残疾人需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书、需直系家属陪同、并至少提前61天申请预留位置及专用设施。70周岁以上老年人需提供健康证明、体检报告并由直系家属陪同（否则需签免责声明书）；本次行程较长、对体力要求较高，体力不支者请慎重报名。未成年人（未满18周岁）需由直系亲属或监护人陪同，部分项目对未满18/12/6周岁有特殊限定；30公斤以下儿童需提前确认符合欧盟标准的安全座椅；无父母陪同的未成年人须持父母授权书；本产品不接受2周岁以下嬰儿参团。根据《旅游法》第15条及《传染病防治法》（2025修订），旅游者需如实告知与旅游活动相关的个人健康信息（妊娠期、哺乳期、慢性病、传染病史、疑似症状或近期疫区旅居史），若因隐瞒健康信息导致损害，旅游者需自行承担相应责任、医疗及隔离费用与赔偿，旅行社可解除合同且不退还费用。

title_en: Nordic Four-Country Fjords: 14-Day Scandinavia Grand Tour (Norway, Sweden, Denmark, Finland)
title_zh: 北欧四国峡湾14天跟团游（挪威·瑞典·丹麦·芬兰）
short_en: 14 days across Norway, Sweden, Denmark and Finland: Atlantic Road, Geiranger fjord, Flam railway, Preikestolen and four capitals, by flight, rail and cruise ferry.
short_zh: 14天畅游挪威、瑞典、丹麦、芬兰四国：大西洋之路、盖朗厄尔峡湾、弗洛姆高山火车、布道石与四大首都，含航班、火车与维京号游轮。
desc_en: This 14-day small-group journey traces a deep one-way arc through Scandinavia, starting and ending in Helsinki. You will fly into the Viking city of Trondheim, drive the legendary Atlantic Road, cruise the Geiranger fjord and hike to the Briksdal glacier, ride the world-famous Flam mountain railway, and stand on the Preikestolen (Pulpit Rock) above Lysefjord. From the fjords of western Norway the route turns to the four Nordic capitals and Hans Christian Andersen's Odense, finishing with a scenic Viking Line cruise from Stockholm back to Helsinki. The trip blends Norway's wild fjord scenery with the culture, design and fairy-tale charm of Sweden, Denmark and Finland.
desc_zh: 这是一条由赫尔辛基出发、最终回到赫尔辛基的14天单程深度小团北欧之旅。您将飞抵维京古城特隆赫姆，自驾般驰骋传奇的大西洋之路，乘船巡游盖朗厄尔峡湾并徒步布里克斯达尔冰川，搭乘举世闻名的弗洛姆高山火车，登上吕瑟峡湾之上的布道石。从挪威西海岸的壮丽峡湾，行程转入北欧四大首都与安徒生故乡欧登塞，最后乘坐维京号游轮从斯德哥尔摩跨海返回赫尔辛基。一路将挪威的野性峡湾风光，与瑞典、丹麦、芬兰的文化、设计与童话气息完美交织。

highlights.en: Drive the Atlantic Road, one of the world's great coastal routes and Norway's 'building of the century'
highlights.zh: 驰骋被誉为挪威世纪性建筑、世界级海滨景观公路的大西洋之路

highlights.en: Cruise the Geiranger fjord past the Seven Sisters waterfalls and hike to the blue ice of Briksdal Glacier by troll buggy
highlights.zh: 乘船巡游盖朗厄尔峡湾，观赏七姐妹瀑布，并乘精灵敞篷车徒步布里克斯达尔冰川蓝冰

highlights.en: Ride the Flam Railway, one of the world's steepest and most scenic mountain trains
highlights.zh: 搭乘弗洛姆高山火车，体验世界上最陡峭、最壮美的观光铁路之一

highlights.en: Hike to Preikestolen (Pulpit Rock) for breathtaking views over Lysefjord
highlights.zh: 徒步登上布道石，俯瞰震撼人心的吕瑟峡湾壮阔美景

highlights.en: Visit all four Nordic capitals - Oslo, Copenhagen, Stockholm and Helsinki - plus Bergen and Aalborg
highlights.zh: 遍览北欧四大首都奥斯陆、哥本哈根、斯德哥尔摩、赫尔辛基，以及卑尔根、奥尔堡等名城

highlights.en: Step into Hans Christian Andersen's fairy-tale world in Odense and the Funen open-air village
highlights.zh: 走进安徒生故乡欧登塞与菲英村，沉浸于童话大师的世界

highlights.en: Sail the Baltic overnight on a Viking Line cruise with a sea-view cabin, watching the Nordic midnight sun
highlights.zh: 乘坐维京号游轮跨越波罗的海，入住海景舱，欣赏北欧夏夜的午夜阳光

highlights.en: Intercity flight and Flam rail included, city-centre 4-star hotels, all listed attractions covered, no forced shopping
highlights.zh: 含内陆航班与弗洛姆火车票，城市市区4星级酒店，所含景点门票全包，无强制购物

includes.en: Flights: Line A includes the tax-inclusive domestic flight Helsinki-Trondheim; Line B includes the tax-inclusive domestic flight Trondheim-Helsinki.
includes.zh: 【机票】A线路包含：赫尔辛基-特隆赫姆的内陆含税机票；B线路包含：特隆赫姆-赫尔辛基的内陆含税机票。

includes.en: Hotels: 10 nights in 4-star hotels, 2 nights in fjord-view specialty hotels, and 1 night in a four-person sea-view cabin on the Viking Line cruise. (Norwegian hotels no longer use star ratings; star levels refer to the Booking or Ctrip hotel star standard.)
includes.zh: 【酒店】四星级酒店10晚，峡湾特色景观酒店2晚，维京号游轮四人海景舱1晚。（挪威酒店取消星级评定，酒店星级参考Booking或携程的酒店星级标准。）

includes.en: Meals: 1 Norwegian specialty fish meal, 1 buffet dinner, and 13 Scandinavian breakfasts, for a total of 15 meals.
includes.zh: 【餐饮】1餐挪威特色鱼餐、1餐自助晚餐，以及13次斯堪的纳维亚式早餐，共计15餐。

includes.en: Operations: in-itinerary operating fees including tourist city tax, city-entry fees, residence tax, road and bridge tolls, parking and fuel, and driver-guide meal allowances.
includes.zh: 【执行】游客城市税、进城费、居住税、过路过桥费、停车燃油费、司导餐补等行程内执行费用。

includes.en: Vehicle: tour coach or business touring vehicle.
includes.zh: 【车辆】旅游巴士或旅游商务车。

includes.en: Guide: professional driver + Chinese-speaking guide, or a Chinese-speaking driver-guide throughout (note: for groups of 8 or fewer, a business touring vehicle + Chinese-speaking driver-guide is arranged).
includes.zh: 【导游】职业司机+中文导游，或者全程中文华人司机兼导游（备注：8人及以下则安排为商务旅行车+中文司机兼导游）。

includes.en: Luggage: one 23 kg checked bag and one carry-on bag.
includes.zh: 【行李】1件23公斤行李及1件随身行李。

includes.en: Admissions: Stockholm City Hall (ticket + official guide commentary), Vasa Museum (ticket + official guide commentary), Stockholm sightseeing cruise, H.C. Andersen Museum, Andersen's childhood home, Funen Village, Frederikshavn-Gothenburg ferry, Vigeland Sculpture Park, Preikestolen hike with guide service, Floibanen funicular, Flam mountain railway train ticket, Briksdal Glacier, the open-top Troll Car, and the Geirangerfjord cruise.
includes.zh: 【门票】斯德哥尔摩市政厅（门票+官导讲解）、瓦萨沉船博物馆（门票+官导讲解）、斯德哥尔摩观光游船、安徒生博物馆、安徒生兒时故居、菲英村、腓特烈港到哥德堡渡轮、维格兰雕塑公园、布道石徒步及向导服务、弗洛伊恩山缆车、弗洛姆高山列车火车票、布里克斯达尔冰川、精灵敞篷车、蓋朗厄尔峡湾游船。

excludes.en: Passport: personal passport fees.
excludes.zh: 护照：个人护照费用。

excludes.en: Visa: the tourist visa fees required for the countries on the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 签证：行程中所列旅游国家所需的观光签证费用。

excludes.en: Insurance: travel insurance fees (if the itinerary involves high-risk sports, please verify whether your travel insurance covers them).
excludes.zh: 保险：旅游保险费用；（如行程内涉及到高风险运动，请核实旅游保险是否包含该项运动）。

excludes.en: Tips: guide and driver tips totaling EUR 10 per person per day, same price for adults and children.
excludes.zh: 小费：游客支付导游和司机小费一共10欧/人/天，大小同价。

excludes.en: Meals: apart from the specialty meals included in the itinerary, lunches and dinners are not included.
excludes.zh: 餐饮：除行程内包含的特色餐外，行程中不包含午、晚正餐费用。

excludes.en: Admissions: sights not marked as fee-included in the itinerary (including but not limited to sights marked "exterior," and any "recommended," "optional," "experience" or similar items not stated as included); if you wish to enter, please pay on your own.
excludes.zh: 门票：行程中未注明费用包含的景点（包括但不仅限于行程中注明“外观”的景点，“推荐”、“可选”、“体验”等等所有未提及费用包含的项目，如游客需要参观，敬请自理）。

excludes.en: Extended stays: any extra accommodation, transport or sightseeing beyond the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 延长住宿：行程外额外延长的住宿、交通、观光费用。

excludes.en: Personal expenses: such as drinks and alcohol, taxis, phone charges and other personal spending.
excludes.zh: 私人消费：如饮料酒类、出租车、电话费等个人消费。

excludes.en: Other transport: transport not mentioned in the inclusions beyond the included business touring vehicle or minibus, such as Venice gondolas and, in vehicle-restricted zones, sightseeing trains, electric rental carts, etc. — please pay on your own.
excludes.zh: 其他交通：除包含商务旅行车或者中巴之外，费用包含中未提及的其他交通费用，如威尼斯贡多拉，以及车辆限行区的观光火车、电瓶出租车等费用敬请自理。

excludes.en: Free activities: independent evening sightseeing and recommended items in the itinerary, and any transport, dining, admission or shopping costs they incur.
excludes.zh: 自由活动：游客夜间自行游览及行程中的推荐项目，以及产生的交通、餐饮、门票、购物等费用。

excludes.en: Experience activities: any tourist experience activities not included in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 体验活动：行程中的没有包含的各项旅游体验活动。

excludes.en: Other costs: any fees not mentioned in the inclusions. In cases of force majeure (natural disasters, war, strikes, etc.) or special situations such as transport delays, flight cancellations or rescheduling, embassy visa delays, or insufficient group numbers, or other extra costs not caused by our company (e.g. overseas visa extension fees, accommodation, food and transport, national airfare adjustments, etc.), our company reserves the right to charge the price difference.
excludes.zh: 其他费用：费用包含中未提及的费用。如因天灾、战争、罢工等不可抗力的原因，及因交通延阻、航班取消或更改时间、使馆延误出签证、人数不足等特殊情况或其他非我公司原因所引致的额外费（如在外延期签证费、住、食及交通费、国家航空运价调整等），我公司有权追加差价。

timeline.title_en: Helsinki - Trondheim (Visiting the Viking Kings' millennium-old city)
timeline.title_zh: 赫尔辛基 - 特隆赫姆（拜访维京王的千年古城）
timeline.description_en: Make your own way to Helsinki-Vantaa Airport and complete check-in according to your flight time, then fly to Trondheim where a driver-guide meets you on arrival. Explore the "thousand-year-old capital" Trondheim, visiting Nidaros Cathedral, the most important medieval building on the Scandinavian peninsula, then walk to the colorful Old Town Bridge (the red "Gate of Happiness") and the Bakklandet district to photograph the evening scenery. If you have the chance, try the local century-old traditional sweet, the Trondheim ball. Overnight at the Grand Olav House Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel, located in Trondheim's historic Bakklandet quarter within walking distance of the cathedral and bridge. Note: depending on flights and departure dates, some departures run the itinerary in reverse order with the same content (Line B); the Helsinki-Trondheim leg may require a connecting flight as no direct flight is available.
timeline.description_zh: 当天自行前往赫尔辛基万塔机场，根据航班时间自行办理登机手续，乘坐飞机前往特隆赫姆，由司导在特隆赫姆接机。之后参观“千年古都”特隆赫姆，参观拥有斯堪的纳维亚半岛最重要中世纪建筑的尼德罗斯主教座堂，步行至色彩缤纷的老城桥（红色木桥又称“幸福之门”）和巴克兰德街区，拍摄傍晚美景；有机会一定要品尝当地百余年历史的传统甜品——特隆赫姆球。夜宿格兰德奥拉夫之家酒店或同等4星级酒店，酒店位于特隆赫姆历史悠久的巴克兰德街区，步行即可到达大教堂与老城桥。提醒：根据航班和团期，部分团期行程往返次序相反但游览内容一致（调整为B线）；赫尔辛基飞特隆赫姆无直飞，需安排转机航班。

timeline.title_en: Trondheim - Kristiansund - Atlantic Road - Molde - Stranda (The photographer's pilgrimage: the Atlantic Ocean Road)
timeline.title_zh: 特隆赫姆 - 克里斯蒂安松 - 大西洋之路 - 莫尔德 - 斯特兰达（摄影师的朝圣景点——大西洋之路）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, drive to the pretty town of Kristiansund at the eastern end of the famous Atlantic Road, visiting its harbor quay and old town; Kristiansund sits on four islands in the North Sea and preserves rare buildings that survived WWII, including its 1914 Art Nouveau opera house. After lunch, drive the 36 km Atlantic Ocean Road (Atlanterhavsveien) from Kårvåg to Bud, a scenic coastal route of bridges and causeways linking islets that Norwegians voted their "Construction of the Century" and The Guardian listed among the world's best road trips. Continue to Molde, the "city of the midnight sun" on the Romsdalsfjord, then arrive at Stranda or the Valldal valley. Overnight at the Dragsund Riverside Hotel - a Classic Norway hotel, or an equivalent 3-4 star hotel, set deep in the Geirangerfjord area by the Stordalselva river with a restaurant, indoor pool and sauna.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，前往坐落在著名大西洋之路东端的美丽小镇克里斯蒂安松，参观港口码头与老城区；克里斯蒂安松位于北海中的4个小岛上，保存了二战中幸存的少数建筑，市内还有始建于1914年的新艺术运动风格歌剧院。午餐后乘车驶上长36公里的景观公路——大西洋之路（从Kårvåg到Bud），这条修筑在海边、以桥梁和堤道连接座座小岛的公路被挪威人评为“挪威的世纪性建筑”，《卫报》也将其列入“摄影师之旅”名单。随后前往位于罗姆达尔峡湾河口、午夜阳光之城莫尔德参观，之后到达斯特兰达或瓦尔河谷入住。夜宿德雷格斯河畔酒店（经典挪威酒店）或同等3-4星级酒店，酒店坐落于蓋朗厄尔峡湾深处的斯托雷尔瓦河畔，设有餐厅、室内泳池和桑拿。

timeline.title_en: Stranda - Geiranger - Briksdal Glacier - Sogndal (An epic of ice and a masterpiece of water)
timeline.title_zh: 斯特兰达 - 蓋朗厄尔 - 布里克斯达尔冰川 - 松达尔（“冰”的史诗与“海”的杰作之旅）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, set out along the Eagle Road (Ørnevegen), the Route 63 famous for its eleven hairpin bends, pausing at the Flydalsjuvet viewpoint overlooking the town of Geiranger and its fjord. Board a Geirangerfjord cruise to admire the steep cliffs and countless waterfalls, viewing the Seven Sisters and the Suitor falls up close. Then drive to the village of Olden to visit the Briksdal Glacier, an arm of mainland Europe's largest glacier Jostedalsbreen, riding the fun open-top "Troll Car" past the Volefossen waterfall up to the prehistoric ice. In the afternoon continue to Sogndal. Overnight at the Sogndal Hofslund Fjord Hotel or a Best Western hotel or an equivalent 3-star hotel, a family-run hotel founded in 1912 in the center of Sogndal on the Sognefjord, with its own garden and outdoor heated pool.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，出发前往老鹰之路（Ørnevegen，63号公路，以接连11个发夹弯闻名），在弗里达斯悬崖观景台俯瞰峡谷中的蓋朗厄尔小城与峡湾。乘坐蓋朗厄尔峡湾游轮欣赏陡峭崖壁与无数瀑布环绕的峡湾美景，近距离观赏七姐妹瀑布与对面的求婚者瀑布。随后乘车前往奥尔登小镇游览布里克斯达尔冰川——欧洲大陆体量最大的约斯特达尔布林冰川（Jostedalsbreen）的分支，乘坐有趣的精灵敞篷山地车途经沃伦福斯大瀑布前往史前冰盖。下午前往松达尔入住。夜宿松达尔霍芬桑德峡湾酒店或Best Western酒店或同等3星级酒店，这是一间始建于1912年的家庭经营酒店，位于松恩峡湾畔松达尔中心，拥有自己的花园和室外温水游泳池。

timeline.title_en: Sogndal - Flam - Voss - Bergen (Meeting the troll spirits aboard the steep Flam mountain railway)
timeline.title_zh: 松达尔 - 弗洛姆 - 沃斯 - 卑尔根（弗洛姆陡峭高山列车遇见“山妖精灵”）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, drive to Flam to visit the Flam Railway Museum, the village of Flam and the Sognefjord (Norway's longest and deepest fjord, 204 km long and 1,308 m deep). Then ride the world-famous Flam mountain railway, one of the steepest standard-gauge lines, up 865 m to Myrdal, where you transfer to a scheduled Norwegian train to the pretty town of Voss. Continue to the "rainy city" of Bergen, where you freely explore the UNESCO World Heritage Bryggen wharf and its iconic Hanseatic buildings, ride the Floibanen funicular to the summit of Mount Floyen for panoramic city views, stroll the waterfront and feast on seafood at the Fisketorget fish market. Overnight at the Moxy, Thon or Scandic hotel in Bergen or an equivalent 4-star hotel, a stylish modern hotel on the waterfront with a fitness center.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，乘车前往弗洛姆，游览弗洛姆铁路博物馆、弗洛姆小镇和松恩峡湾（挪威第一大峡湾，全长204公里，最深1308米）。随后乘坐世界闻名的陡峭高山火车上行至海拔865米的米达尔（Myrdal），在米达尔换乘挪威官方火车前往美丽小镇沃斯。之后前往“雨城”卑尔根，自由参观世界遗产布吕根碼头及其汉萨同盟商业建筑、打卡明信片拍照点；乘坐弗洛伊恩山缆车（弗罗伊索道）登上弗洛伊恩山顶俯瞰整个城市美景，漫步卑尔根海滨，并在卑尔根Fisketorget鱼市品尝一顿海鲜大餐。夜宿卑尔根Moxy或Thon或Scandic酒店或同等4星级酒店，这是一家融合北欧风与工业风、坐落于海滨地段的时尚现代酒店，设有健身中心。

timeline.title_en: Bergen - Hardangerfjord - Odda - Haugesund (Hardangerfjord, idyllic scenery like an oil painting)
timeline.title_zh: 卑尔根 - 哈当厄尔峡湾 - 奥达 - 海于格松（哈当厄尔峡湾——油画般的田园风光）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, drive to the Steinsdalsfossen waterfall near Norheimsund for a "behind the waterfall" experience, where a path leads you behind the cascading water without getting wet. Then travel to the Hardangerfjord, the gentlest of the four great fjords, its shores dotted with colorful cottages, idyllic farms and the famous apple and cherry orchards planted by monks some 800 years ago, like an unfolding oil painting. Visit the small town of Odda, whose orchards are part of a World Heritage site, taking in western Norway's rolling hills and forests along the way and soaking up local life. Then arrive in Haugesund. Overnight at the Amanda Hotel in Haugesund or an equivalent 4-star hotel, a landmark in the city center known for its maritime history and Art Nouveau architecture, within walking distance of the Amanda statue, the pink town hall and the library park.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，乘车来到诺海姆桑德附近的斯坦达尔瀑布，体验“水帘洞”般的奇观——可以走到瀑布后方穿行而过却一点不被打湿。之后前往四大峡湾中最为平缓的哈当厄尔峡湾，峡湾两岸点缀着彩色小屋的田园、和约800年前僧侣种下的著名苹果园与樱桃园，如同一幅展开的巨幅油画。前往小镇奥达（其果园被列入世界文化遗产）游览，一路欣赏挪威西部多变的丘陵与森林地貌，感受当地生活气息。随后到达海于格松入住。夜宿海于格松阿曼达酒店或同等4星级酒店，酒店位于市中心，以悠久的航海历史和“新艺术运动”建筑风格闻名，步行可达阿曼达雕像、粉红色市政厅和图书馆公园。

timeline.title_en: Haugesund - Preikestolen - Stavanger (Hiking the Pulpit Rock for sweeping views of the Lysefjord)
timeline.title_zh: 海于格松 - 布道石 - 斯塔万格（徒步布道台奇迹之石，领略吕瑟峡湾壮阔美景）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, depart Haugesund for the Preikestolen (Pulpit Rock) area on the Lysefjord and hike the "miracle rock," a natural cliff platform towering 604 m above the fjord with sweeping views ranked by CNN's travel site as one of the world's 50 most spectacular sights. The trail is 3.8 km each way, a round trip of about 4-5 hours of moderate intensity over rugged terrain; wear non-slip, waterproof high-top hiking boots and bring your own lunch and water as there are no shops along the way. In the afternoon arrive in Stavanger. Overnight at the Sola/Scandic hotel in Stavanger or an equivalent 4-star hotel, a select Nordic chain hotel in the city center about 750 m from the old town square where the July Gladmat food festival is held.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，从海于格松出发前往呂瑟峡湾布道石景区，徒步奇迹之石布道台——这块天然凌空的巨型石台台顶与下方峡湾垂直落差604米，是俯瞰呂瑟峡湾的绝佳地点，曾被美国CNN旗下旅游网站评为全球50处最壮丽景色之首。登山径单程3.8公里，往返约4-5小时、中等强度，山路崎岖，请注意安全量力而为，建议穿着防滑防水加高帮的登山鞋；沿途没有商店及餐厅，请自备午餐及饮用水。下午到达斯塔万格入住。夜宿斯塔万格松恩/斯坎迪克酒店或同等4星级酒店，这是精选北欧连锁酒店，位于市中心，距七月举办斯塔万格美食节（Gladmatfestivalen）的老城中心广场仅750米。

timeline.title_en: Stavanger - Kristiansand - Sandefjord (From a seaside slow journey to the cultural colors of the oil capital)
timeline.title_zh: 斯塔万格 - 克里斯蒂安桑 - 桑讷菲尤尔（海滨慢旅到石油之都的文化色彩）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, explore Norway's "oil capital" Stavanger: wander Gamle Stavanger old town with its well-preserved white 18th-19th century wooden houses (some 173 of them, home to two Michelin restaurants, Renaa and Sabi Omakase), then the vivid, internet-famous Fargegaten quarter, a street revived by a barber and now full of cafes, restaurants and gift shops. After lunch, follow the guide to the Sverd i fjell (Swords in Rock) monument, three towering Viking swords commemorating the Battle of Hafrsfjord and symbolizing peace, unity and freedom. Rest in Kristiansand en route, then arrive in the southern coastal city of Sandefjord. Overnight at the Atlantic House Hotel in Sandefjord or an equivalent 4-star hotel, within walking distance of the harbor and old town, itself like a living museum showcasing the town's whaling history.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，开始游览挪威的石油之都斯塔万格：穿梭于斯塔万格老城区（Gamle Stavanger）保存完好的18-19世纪纯白木屋小巷（约173套木质房屋，城中有Renaa与Sabi Omakase两家米其林餐厅），再游览色彩缤纷的网红景区法格卡腾街区（由理发师发起改造、满是咖啡馆与餐厅小店的街道）。午餐后跟随导游参观斯塔万格巨剑阵（岩中之劍），由三把十几米高的维京巨剑组成，纪念“Hafrsfjord之战”，分别代表和平、统一与自由。中途在克里斯蒂安桑休息，下午到挪威南部海滨城市桑讷菲尤尔入住。夜宿桑讷菲尤尔大西洋之家酒店或同等4星级酒店，酒店步行即可到达港口与老城区，本身宛如一座展现小镇捕鲸业历史的活博物馆。

timeline.title_en: Sandefjord - Oslo - Gothenburg (Nordic slow living: an art tour and a harbor stroll)
timeline.title_zh: 桑讷菲尤尔 - 奥斯陆 - 哥德堡（北欧式的慢生活——艺术巡礼与海港漫步）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, travel to Oslo to see Oslo City Hall (exterior), the venue of the Nobel Peace Prize ceremony held each December 10, watch the changing of the guard outside the Royal Palace (exterior), and visit the medieval Akershus Fortress (exterior, built 1299). Visit the Oslo Opera House (exterior), a modern building like a glacier or a ship, where you are encouraged to walk up its sloping roof for views over the fjord city, then the Vigeland Sculpture Park, devoted to the theme of human life with 192 sculptures by Gustav Vigeland. Afterward continue to the Swedish west-coast port city of Gothenburg. Overnight at the Quality Hotel in Gothenburg or an equivalent 4-star hotel, a 21-story waterfront building with 360-degree views, Scandinavian design and family-friendly activities.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，前往奥斯陆，参观诺贝尔和平奖颁奖地——奥斯陆市政厅（外观，每年12月10日在此举行颁奖仪式），在皇宫（外观）外观看卫兵换岗，之后游览中世纪城堡阿克斯胡斯城堡（外观，建于1299年）。参观如同冰川般、外形像一艘船的现代建筑奥斯陆歌剧院（外观），强烈推荐走上倾斜的屋顶俯瞰峡湾城市风光，之后参观以“人生”为主题的维格兰雕塑公园（共192座雕塑，由古斯塔夫·维格兰创作）。结束参观后前往瑞典西海岸海港城市哥德堡入住。夜宿哥德堡品质酒店或同等4星级酒店，这是一座21层高的水畔建筑，可饱览360度壮丽景色，享有斯堪的纳维亚设计，并设有适合儿童的丰富活动。

timeline.title_en: Gothenburg - Frederikshavn - Aalborg (Stepping into a canvas blending past and present)
timeline.title_zh: 哥德堡 - 腓特烈港 - 奥尔堡（踏入一幅融入古今色彩的画卷）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, freely visit Masthugget Church (exterior, completed 1914, one of Gothenburg's three landmarks), the Poseidon statue (1931) and Avenyn, the city's main boulevard. Then board a ferry at Gothenburg harbor to Frederikshavn, crossing the Kattegat Strait in about 3.5 hours (try the famous shrimp sandwich on board). After a short rest in Frederikshavn, continue to Aalborg, where you freely explore the city sights: Aalborg Castle (exterior, 16th-century fortress and former royal residence), Budolfi Church (14th-century Gothic), and the fairy-tale Hjelmerstald lane and pedestrian street with its 16th-19th century half-timbered buildings. Overnight at the Scandic Hotel in Aalborg or an equivalent 4-star hotel, in the city center with shops and a shopping mall at the door for convenient evening strolls and dining.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，自由参观马斯塔蓋特教堂（外观，1914年竣工，与口红楼、海王波塞冬雕像并称哥德堡三大地标）、海神波赛东雕塑（1931年完成）、Avenyn大道。之后在哥德堡港口乘坐渡轮前往腓特烈港，约3.5小时横渡卡特加特海峡（强烈推荐品尝著名的虾肉三明治）。在腓特烈港短暂休息后，前往奥尔堡，抵达后自由参观市区景点：奥尔堡城堡（外观，建于16世纪的防御要塞、曾为丹麦王室官邸）、Budolfi教堂（始建于14世纪的哥特式教堂）、杜赫芬老街（童话般的彩色小巷）和步行街（保留大量16至19世纪砖木结构建筑）。夜宿奥尔堡斯堪迪克酒店或同等4星级酒店，酒店位于市中心，门口即是商店和购物中心，方便晚上自由游览和用餐。

timeline.title_en: Aalborg - Odense - Copenhagen (Into Andersen's town, becoming a fairy-tale character)
timeline.title_zh: 奥尔堡 - 欧登塞 - 哥本哈根（走进安徒生小镇，当童话里的人物）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, travel to Odense, the fairy-tale town of Hans Christian Andersen, to visit the H.C. Andersen Museum (the new building designed by Japanese architect Kengo Kuma, two-thirds underground, with 18 themed rooms displaying over 2,000 manuscripts, letters and personal items) and his childhood home (the tiny 18 sqm yellow house at Munkemollestraede 3 where he was born in 1805), as well as St. Canute's Cathedral (a 14th-century Gothic church). Then experience 19th-century Danish rural life at the Funen Village open-air museum, a reconstructed village of 18th-19th century rural buildings with pens, duck ponds, apple trees and gardens that inspired Andersen. In the afternoon continue to Copenhagen. Overnight at the AC Marriott or Scandic hotel in Copenhagen or an equivalent 4-star hotel, near the Bella Center, with a rooftop Asian restaurant and bar on the 23rd floor at 76 m.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，前往安徒生童话小镇欧登塞，参观安徒生故居博物馆（由日本建筑大师隈研吾设计的新馆，三分之二位于地下，设有18间主题陈列室，展出2000余件手稿、信件、画稿及私人物品）和安徒生兒时故居（位于蒙基莫莱街3号、仅18平方米的黄色小屋，安徒生1805年在此诞生），以及圣克努特教堂（建于14世纪的哥特式大教堂）。之后在菲英村露天博物馆体验19世纪的丹麦乡村生活，这里以18、19世纪遗留的乡村建筑为原形重建了完整村庄，有畜栏、养鸭塘、苹果树和花园，感受故乡带给安徒生的创作灵感。下午前往哥本哈根入住。夜宿哥本哈根AC万豪酒店或斯堪迪克酒店或同等4星级酒店，酒店毗邻贝拉中心，在76米高空的23层设有屋顶亚洲餐厅兼酒吧。

timeline.title_en: Copenhagen - Malmo (A perfect encounter between the fairy-tale kingdom and the design capital)
timeline.title_zh: 哥本哈根 - 马尔默（童话王国与设计之都的完美邂逅）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, see Denmark's symbol the Little Mermaid statue (1913), the majestic Gefion Fountain, and the Renaissance star-shaped Kastellet five-point citadel, then admire the royal grandeur and guard at Amalienborg Palace (exterior). In the afternoon, visit Frederik's Church (exterior), also known as the Marble Church with its great copper-green dome; the Round Tower (exterior), one of Europe's oldest working observatories; the "Black Diamond" Royal Danish Library; the famous Nyhavn landmark with its colorful 17th-18th century houses, bars and cafes; and Stroget, one of Europe's longest pedestrian shopping streets. Then cross the Oresund Bridge to Malmo. Overnight at the Scandic or Quality hotel in Malmo or an equivalent 4-star hotel, ideally located in the city center within walking distance of the sights, with restaurants, malls and a cinema nearby.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，参观丹麦的象征小美人鱼雕像（1913年完成）、气势磅礴的吉菲昂女神喷泉、文艺复兴时期星形要塞之一卡斯特雷特五角要塞，在阿美琳堡宫（外观）欣赏王室气派与卫队风采。下午参观腓特烈教堂（外观，又名“大理石教堂”、铜绿色巨大圆顶）、欧洲古老的天文台之一圆塔（外观）、哥本哈根的“黑钻石”丹麦皇家图书馆、著名地标新港（建于1669—1673年的人工运河，两岸尽是17、18世纪初的彩色房屋、酒吧与咖啡馆）、以及欧洲有名的购物步行街斯楚格街。结束参观后穿越厄勒海峡大桥前往马尔默入住。夜宿马尔默斯堪迪克酒店或品质酒店或同等4星级酒店，酒店位于市中心，步行即可抵达各景点，周边餐厅、商场、电影院齐全。

timeline.title_en: Malmo - Jonkoping - Stockholm (An ancient yet modern hybrid city, the hub linking Denmark and Sweden)
timeline.title_zh: 马尔默 - 延雪平 - 斯德哥尔摩（古老又现代的混血城市——联接丹麦和瑞典的重镇）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, see the HSB Turning Torso (Sweden's tallest building, 54 floors and 190 m, twisting 90 degrees), Ribersborg Beach beside the Oresund Strait with views of the Oresund Bridge, the Stortorget square and Town Hall (exterior, 1546 Dutch Renaissance, with the bronze equestrian statue of King Karl X Gustav), St. Peter's Church (exterior, 14th-century Baltic Gothic with a 105 m spire), and the Lilla Torg little square (1591, surrounded by 16th-18th century half-timbered houses). After lunch, travel to the "city of matches" Jonkoping on the shore of Lake Vattern, a 19th-century match-making center with a unique match museum. Then continue to Stockholm. Overnight at the Nacka Home hotel or Scandic hotel in Stockholm or an equivalent 4-star hotel, set in a former wallpaper factory in Nacka about 15 minutes from the Old Town, with a gym and daily meals.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，参观HSB旋转中心（旋转大楼，瑞典地标，共54层、高190米，整栋大楼旋转90度）、里伯斯海滩（位于厄勒海峡旁，可远眺厄勒海峡大桥）、斯托特广场与市政厅（外观，市政厅建于1546年、荷兰文艺复兴式样，广场中央是瑞典国王卡尔十世骑像）、圣彼得教堂（外观，14世纪波罗的海哥特式、尖塔高105米）、Lilla Torg小广场（建于1591年、四周是16至18世纪半木结构房子）。午餐后，前往“火柴之城”延雪平（位于韦特恩湖畔，是欧洲19世纪有名的火柴制造中心，拥有独特的火柴博物馆）；随后前往斯德哥尔摩入住。夜宿斯德哥尔摩纳卡Home酒店或斯堪迪克酒店或同等4星级酒店，酒店坐落于纳卡的旧壁纸厂内、距老城仅15分钟，设有健身房并每日提供餐食。

timeline.title_en: Stockholm - Helsinki (The grandeur and grace of the "Venice of the North")
timeline.title_zh: 斯德哥尔摩 - 赫尔辛基（领略“斯京”的大气磅薄和娇柔似水）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, visit Stockholm City Hall (built 1911-1923, with ticket and official guide) and the Old Town (Gamla Stan), and the Vasa Museum (with ticket and official guide), home to the only preserved 17th-century ship, which sank just 2 km from the harbor on her 1628 maiden voyage. Then take a sightseeing cruise to admire Stockholm's skyline from the water, gliding into tranquil Lake Malaren to reach the World Heritage Drottningholm Palace (exterior) and its court gardens, the "Versailles of Sweden" with French Baroque and English landscape sections. Please arrive at Stockholm harbor at least 1 hour early to check in, then board the Viking Line cruise ferry to the Finnish capital Helsinki. Overnight in a Viking Line cruise sea-view cabin; you may prepare dinner in town to bring aboard or dine in the ship's restaurants, which also offer a spa, shopping and entertainment.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，前往参观斯德哥尔摩市政厅（建于1911—1923年，含门票+官导讲解）和老城区（Gamla Stan），以及瓦萨沉船博物馆（含门票+官导讲解，瓦萨号是世界上独有保存完好的17世纪船舶，1628年首航即沉没在距港口仅2公里处）。之后乘坐观光游船从水上视角欣赏斯德哥尔摩城市轮廓，缓缓驶入宁静的梅拉伦湖，最终抵达世界文化遗产皇后岛，自由参观卓宁霍姆宫（外观）及宫廷花园（被誉为“瑞典的凡尔赛”，分法式巴洛克与英式两部分）。请至少提前1小时到斯德哥尔摩港口自行办理登船手续，乘坐维京号游轮前往芬兰首都赫尔辛基。夜宿维京号游轮海景舱；可提前在市区备好晚餐带上船享用，也可在船上餐厅用餐，船上另有水疗SPA、购物及丰富的娱乐设施。

timeline.title_en: Helsinki (Daughter of the Baltic, World Design Capital)
timeline.title_zh: 赫尔辛基（波罗的海的女儿，世界设计之都）
timeline.description_en: Arriving in Helsinki around 10 a.m., you arrange your own Helsinki sightseeing. The city's sights are fairly compact: you can start from Senate Square and the Cathedral (the White Church, a Lutheran church built in 1852 on the square, with the 1894 statue of Tsar Alexander II in front), the Uspenski Cathedral (the Red Church, built 1862-1868 in Russian style with gold-green domes and red brick walls), the Viking terminal and the harbor fish market, plus the Rock Church and the waterfront Market Square district, the historic heart of the city. Then the wonderful journey comes to an end. No hotel accommodation tonight. Tip: on the ferry deck in summer you can enjoy stunning scenery and the long "midnight sun" twilight.
timeline.description_zh: 早晨10点抵达赫尔辛基后自行安排赫尔辛基游览。赫尔辛基市区景点比较集中，当天可从赫尔辛基参议院广场、白教堂（赫尔辛基大教堂，1852年建的路德派教堂，广场上立有1894年的沙皇亚历山大二世铜像）、红教堂（乌斯本斯基大教堂，建于1862—1868年、金绿圆顶与红砖墙、俄罗斯建筑风格）、维京码头和码头鱼市等景点开始游览，再到岩石教堂、紧邻集市广场与参议院广场的广场街区（赫尔辛基的历史中心）等景点，随后结束美好旅程！当天无酒店住宿。提示：夏季在游轮甲板上可欣赏绝美风景和“午夜太阳”般的漫长黄昏。

meeting_en: Helsinki, Finland - travellers make their own way to Helsinki Vantaa Airport on Day 1 for the flight to Trondheim, where the driver-guide meets the group.
meeting_zh: 芬兰赫尔辛基 - 第1天自行前往赫尔辛基万塔机场乘机飞往特隆赫姆，司导在特隆赫姆接机。

faqs.question_en: Where and when do we meet and disperse?
faqs.question_zh: 集合和集散的时间和地点是怎样的？
faqs.answer_en: Line A: meeting point is at Trondheim Airport, where the guide meets you according to your flight time after you fly in from Helsinki; dispersal is on the last morning at the Viking Line terminal in Helsinki. Line B: meeting point is at 16:00 on the day at the Helsinki Viking Line port; dispersal is at Trondheim Airport on the last day, from where you fly back to Helsinki Airport. This product does not recommend booking a flight that lands in Helsinki on the joining day, nor one that leaves Helsinki on the ending day.
faqs.answer_zh: A线路：集合地点为当天自行乘机抵达特隆赫姆机场，导游根据航班时间在特隆赫姆机场接机；解散地点为行程最后一天上午在赫尔辛基维京号码头解散。B线路：集合地点为当天下午16:00在赫尔辛基维京号港口集合；解散地点为行程最后一天在特隆赫姆机场送机解散，游客乘机返回赫尔辛基机场。本产品不推荐参团当天降落赫尔辛基的航班，和结束当天离开赫尔辛基的航班！

faqs.question_en: How do I get to the Helsinki port?
faqs.question_zh: 如何前往赫尔辛基港口？
faqs.answer_en: Viking Line ships dock at the Katajanokka Terminal, which is near the city center, close to the Helsinki Eye Ferris wheel and Market Square. If you stay in the city center, for example near the Uspenski Cathedral (the Red Church), you can easily walk there in a few minutes.
faqs.answer_zh: 卡塔亚诺卡碼头（Katajanokka Terminal）是Viking Line的船停靠处，这个碼头就在市中心附近，离赫尔辛基之眼摩天轮和集市广场很近。如果住在市中心，比如乌斯别斯基大教堂（红教堂）附近，完全可以步行到达，大概几分钟路。

faqs.question_en: Can I swim in the sea or fjords during the trip?
faqs.question_zh: 行程中可以下海或峡湾游泳吗？
faqs.answer_en: Most hotels are in the city commercial center and you can usually walk to the seaside, and during free evening time you can stroll along the shore. However, the Norwegian sea temperature is not suitable for swimming; we recommend using the hotel's indoor pool instead.
faqs.answer_zh: 行程中的酒店大多数在城市商业中心，步行一般都可以到达海边，晚上自由活动时间可选择漫步海边，但是挪威的海水温度不适宜下水游泳，建议使用酒店内的室内游泳池。

faqs.question_en: My English is poor — can I manage free activities?
faqs.question_zh: 我的英文不好，我有能力自由活动吗？
faqs.answer_en: The hotels are located around the sightseeing areas, so walking back and forth is no problem at all. If you are worried about the language but still want a deeper local experience, you can pair up with other group members, and there are plenty of fellow travelers active nearby every day.
faqs.answer_zh: 酒店位于游览景区的周边，步行往返没有任何问题，如果担心语言问题又希望深度体验当地人文，可以与其他团友结伴同行，并且每天都有大量的团友在周边活动。

faqs.question_en: I don't want to enter some of the sights in the itinerary — can I get a refund?
faqs.question_zh: 行程内的部分景点我不想进去，可以退费吗？
faqs.answer_en: You may take free time around the sight, but you must return to the meeting point at the agreed time, and no refund is available.
faqs.answer_zh: 您可以在景点周边自由活动，但是需要在约定的时间内到集合地点，并且无法退费。

faqs.question_en: What will I eat locally?
faqs.question_zh: 我在当地吃什么？
faqs.answer_en: Norwegians are skilled with fish and seafood — salmon and cod are common, along with other seasonal seafood, and a notable specialty is Norwegian reindeer meat. The cities we pass through have many specialty restaurants and fish markets where even the street snacks are delightful; most travelers won't miss the local cuisine, and the guide will also introduce and recommend local restaurants.
faqs.answer_zh: 挪威人吃鱼和海鲜比较专业，常见的是三文鱼和鳕鱼，以及其他时令海鲜，另外比较有特色的是挪威的驯鹿肉。我们经过的城市里有着繁多的特色餐饮，或者是卖海鲜的鱼市，街边的小吃就让人流连忘返，多数游客不会错过当地美食，同时导游也会给予大家当地餐厅的介绍和推荐服务。

faqs.question_en: Where are the staff from?
faqs.question_zh: 工作人员是哪里的？
faqs.answer_en: The guide is a Chinese-speaking guide who provides Chinese-language service throughout the trip.
faqs.answer_zh: 导游为中文导游，全程提供中文服务。

faqs.question_en: What equipment, fitness and hiking intensity are needed for the Pulpit Rock?
faqs.question_zh: 登上布道台需要带什么装备、需要什么样的体力？徒步强度如何？
faqs.answer_en: Girafe specially arranges the hike to Preikestolen on the Lysefjord, which sets us apart from other group tours. It is 3.8 km each way from the coach parking lot to the rock, with a round trip of about 4-5 hours, and we give all guests of different fitness levels enough time to climb, enjoy the views and return at their own pace. Since there are no shops on the mountain, bring your own water bottle and a simple lunch; the fjord trails are rugged, so non-slip, waterproof high-top hiking boots are recommended, and waterproof clothing in case of rain is even better.
faqs.answer_zh: 长颈鹿特别安排了在呂瑟峡湾徒步登山去布道台，这是有别于其他跟团游的地方。从大巴停车场到布道台单程3.8公里，一般往返在4到5个小时左右，我们给予所有不同体力的贵宾足够时间来登山、赏景和返回，可根据自己的体力走走停停。由于山上没有商店，登山时都需要自带水壶和简单的午餐；峡湾地区山路崎岖，建议穿着防滑防水加高帮的登山鞋，若自备防水衣以备下雨则更优。

faqs.question_en: Are there signs on the mountain? Will I get lost?
faqs.question_zh: 山上有任何指示吗？不会迷路吧？
faqs.answer_en: Preikestolen is a famous Norwegian sight visited by hundreds of thousands of hikers each year, so there are signs throughout and red "T" markers along the way. July is peak season with many tourists, so just follow the crowd and you won't get lost.
faqs.answer_zh: 布道台是挪威出名的景点，每年都有数十万人来登山，所以全程都有指示，沿途都有红色T字标记；另外七月是旅游旺季，游客很多，跟着人走不会迷路。

faqs.question_en: About the Flam mountain railway
faqs.question_zh: 关于弗洛姆高山列车
faqs.answer_en: The mountain railway starts in Flam and ends at Myrdal on the mountain top. The train stops for 5 minutes at the Kjosfossen waterfall to hear the song of the mountain-spirit, then 10 minutes at Myrdal, but passengers cannot get off and catch the next train — every ticket is valid only for that specific service. Myrdal station is small with just a few shops and is not worth lingering at; you take the same train back to Flam.
faqs.answer_zh: 高山列车始于弗洛姆，终点在山顶的米达尔。火车会在克尤斯福森瀑布处停留5分钟，聆听山妖精灵的歌声，随后在米达尔停留10分钟，但乘客不可以下车乘坐下一班火车，所有的火车票都是当次车次有效。米达尔火车站很小，只有几个商店，不建议停留，需乘同一班火车返回弗洛姆。

faqs.question_en: Will sea fishing make me seasick?
faqs.question_zh: 海钓会晕船吗？
faqs.answer_en: The guide and skipper choose between fjord fishing and open-sea fishing depending on the day's weather. Even with bigger waves outside, the water surface within the fjord is very calm; and if the weather is bad, you often catch far more fish, so it's well worth braving the rough weather.
faqs.answer_zh: 海钓的向导和船长会根据当天的天气选择峡湾内海钓或者远海海钓，即使风浪较大，在峡湾内是非常平静的水面；但如果天气不好，捕获的鱼类就会非常多，非常值得去碰一碰坏天气。

faqs.question_en: Can the seafood I catch be cooked at a restaurant?
faqs.question_zh: 我钓上来的海鲜可以在餐厅加工吗？
faqs.answer_en: No. Norwegian restaurants strictly follow food hygiene law and cannot process ingredients from non-formal sources. However, you may cook and eat it yourself in your own room — fresh cod and herring are delicious whether pan-fried or blanched.
faqs.answer_zh: 不可以，挪威的餐厅严格遵守食品卫生法，不可以加工非正规食品来源的食材；但游客可以在自己的房间自行加工食用，新鲜的鳕鱼和青鱼，生煎或汆烫都非常可口。

faqs.question_en: I'm not used to Norwegian seafood, or I'm allergic, or I'm a vegetarian — can the set meal be changed?
faqs.question_zh: 我不太习惯挪威海鲜或者海鲜过敏，或者我是素食主义者，是否可以更改套餐？
faqs.answer_en: Please note it before booking or contact your salesperson to change the set meal or choose a meal refund. After booking, meals are reserved by default, and once reserved we cannot cancel the restaurant booking.
faqs.answer_zh: 请在报名前备注或与销售员联系，更改套餐或者选择餐饮退费。如报名后，则按默认餐饮预订，预订后我社不可取消餐厅预定。

faqs.question_en: Does the Norway Lofoten route overlap with the fjord route, and how do they connect?
faqs.question_zh: 挪威罗浮墩路线是否和挪威峡湾路线有重叠，或者如何衔接？
faqs.answer_en: Lofoten lies within Norway's Arctic Circle, about 2,000 km from the southern fjords, with completely different scenery, terrain and customs. This product departs Monday to Friday (returning to Oslo on Friday evening), while the fjord route usually departs Saturday, so they can connect on Friday — we recommend booking the Radisson hotel at Oslo Airport on Friday. The best suggested connection: join the fjord route Saturday morning and return to Oslo Friday evening, sightsee the Oslo wharf, opera house and palace area on Saturday and Sunday, then join the Lofoten route on Monday.
faqs.answer_zh: 罗浮墩在挪威的北极圈境内，与挪威南部的峡湾相差2000公里，两地的风景、地貌、习俗都不同。本产品为每周一到周五发团（周五晚上返回奥斯陆），通常峡湾路线都是周六发团，因此可以在周五衔接，建议预定周五奥斯陆机场的Radisson酒店。建议最佳衔接路线为：周六上午参加峡湾路线、周五晚上返回奥斯陆，周六及周日游览奥斯陆碼头、歌剧院及皇宫区域，周一参加罗浮墩路线。

faqs.question_en: Do I need a visa?
faqs.question_zh: 是否需要签证？
faqs.answer_en: Yes. This product does not include visa fees and requires a Schengen visa (single or multiple entry); if you need visa processing, please choose a Schengen-visa product. After booking, we provide all the materials for the Schengen visa application for free. "Worry-free visa guarantee": for travelers who sign the contract with us at least 61 days before departure, if the visa is not obtained within 45 days before departure, we bear all losses and immediately refund the full travel fee; travelers who do not meet this clause and fail to obtain the visa are refunded per the change-and-cancellation terms. A rejection must be reported to us within 48 hours with the consulate's rejection letter, and any supplementary or amended materials must be submitted within five days. Your passport must be valid for at least six months from the departure date or customs may refuse entry. Visa fees, visa service fees, Schengen insurance fees and visa-center appointment fees are all non-refundable and non-transferable, even if the product itself is changed or cancelled.
faqs.answer_zh: 需要。本产品不包含签证费用，需要申根签证（单次或多次入境）；如您需要办理签证请选择申根签证产品。预订后免费提供办理申根签证的全部材料。保签无忧：游客在出发日前61天与我社签约旅游产品，如在出发前45天内未获取签证，我社承担所有损失，立即退还游客全部旅游费用；不符合该条款的游客如未正常获取签证，将按照退改与取消条款退费。如遇拒签需在48小时内通知我社并出具使领馆的拒签函，如需补充或更改材料须在五天内提交。护照有效期需在离境之日起至少还有六个月，否则海关有权拒绝入境。签证费、签证服务费、申根保险费、签证中心预约费均不可退款，也无法更改使用者，即使产品退改签，签证费用亦无法退款。

faqs.question_en: Booking, changes & cancellation
faqs.question_zh: 预订、变更与取消须知
faqs.answer_en: Free cancellation: both agency and traveler may apply for no-reason cancellation more than 30 days before departure (not including the 30th day). After that, cancellations, reductions in headcount, itinerary changes or date changes follow the Change & Cancellation Terms. Because flight changes, traffic, ferry cancellations, strikes or itinerary-order adjustments are frequent, you must arrive at the meeting point one day before the tour starts and leave the dispersal point one day after it ends, with reasonable flight-connection buffer (at least 5 hours for a same-airport transfer, 7 hours for a different-airport transfer in the same city; reasonable meeting/dispersal window 07:00-21:00). Rooms: two people booking together default to a standard twin (bed type assigned by the hotel, cannot be specified); single travelers include a single-room supplement deposit (refunded proportionally if successfully sharing); a triple family room defaults to two parents plus one minor. Group size (group/拼团): the announced maximum is the per-day average cap; this tour is announced to run (成团) at 10 people, and if not reached 30 days before start either party may cancel. Pricing is quoted in EUR; if paying in CNY, the amount is the real-time CNY computed from the Bank of China "EUR sell" rate on the day of payment. Itinerary contingencies: order and arrival times may be adjusted due to flights/ferries/strikes without being a breach; in case of force majeure the guide may adjust or swap sights, and the Tour Notice (出团通知书) prevails over the itinerary, with the guide's on-site notice prevailing over that.
faqs.answer_zh: 免费取消：跟团游产品出发前30天（不含第30天）旅行社和旅行者均有权申请无理由取消。之后的取消、减少人数、更改行程或更改出行日期按《更改与取消条例条款》执行。由于航变、交通拥堵、渡轮取消、罢工游行或行程顺序调整频繁，本产品要求旅行者在旅游团开始前一天到达集合地、结束后一天离开集散地，并预留合理航班衔接时间（同一机场转机至少5小时、同城不同机场转机至少7小时；合理集合集散时段为07:00至21:00）。房型：两人同时报名默认入住标准双人间（床型由酒店安排不可指定）；单人报名默认含单人房差押金（成功拼房后按比例退款）；三人家庭间默认为两位父母与一位未成年儿童入住。成团：产品披露的最多参团人数为每天平均人数上线，本产品宣布成团人数为10人，行程开始前30天（不含第30天）未达成团人数，双方均有权解除合同。价格：所有定价以欧元为计价单位，如选择人民币支付，则按当天支付时中国银行实时“欧元卖出价”自动计算的人民币实时价格为准。行程应变：因航班、渡轮、罢工等可能调整游览顺序和到达时间，不视为违约；如遇不可抗力，导游可调整或更换景点，行程以出团通知书为准、现场以导游通知为准。

faqs.question_en: Health & safety requirements
faqs.question_zh: 健康与安全须知
faqs.answer_en: For your safety, please have a physical check before departure and do NOT join if you have: infectious diseases (e.g. active tuberculosis, typhoid); cardiovascular disease (severe hypertension, heart insufficiency, myocardial ischemia, myocardial infarction); cerebrovascular disease (cerebral embolism, hemorrhage, tumor); respiratory disease (emphysema, cor pulmonale); psychiatric illness (epilepsy and various mental illnesses); severe anemia (hemoglobin below 50 g/L); or recovery from major/medium surgery. Pregnancy: those at 35+ weeks cannot join under any circumstances; at 28+ weeks a doctor's report within 7 days and the attending physician's consent are required; under 28 weeks, join with caution, sign the agency disclaimer, and adventure/skiing/sea/aerial/outdoor items cannot be joined. People with disabilities and travelers over 70 need a recent (within 7 days) medical report, attending-physician consent and an accompanying immediate family member, applying at least 61 days in advance for special facilities; this is a long, walk-intensive trip with high fitness demands, so those with limited stamina should book carefully. Minors (under 18) must be accompanied by an immediate family member or guardian; infants under 2 are not accepted, and children under 30 kg / under 6 may require an EU-standard safety seat. Per Article 15 of the Tourism Law (and the Infectious Disease Prevention Law, 2025 revision), travelers must truthfully declare health information relevant to the trip (pregnancy, lactation, chronic illness, infectious-disease history, suspected symptoms or recent travel to outbreak areas); concealment leading to harm or transmission risk means the traveler bears liability, and the agency may terminate the contract without refund.
faqs.answer_zh: 为确保顺利出行、防止旅途中发生人身意外，请出行前做必要的身体检查，如有下列情况请勿报名：传染性疾病（如活动期肺结核、伤寒）；心血管疾病（如严重高血压、心功能不全、心肌缺氧、心肌梗塞）；脑血管疾病（如脑栓塞、脑出血、脑肿瘤）；呼吸系统疾病（如肺气肿、肺心病）；精神病（如癫痫及各种精神病）；严重贫血（血红蛋白低于50克/升）；大中型手术恢复期。孕妇：妊娠35周及以上任何情况下都无法参团；28周及以上需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书；28周以下请慎重报名，需签署旅行社免责声明书，且探险、滑雪、出海、高空、户外等项目无法参加。残疾人及70周岁以上老年人需提供7日内体检报告、主治医师同意书并由直系家属陪同，需至少提前61天申请专用配套设施；本行程较长、需要一定步行能力且对体力要求较高，体力不支者请慎重报名。未成年人（未满18周岁）需由直系亲属或监护人陪同，本产品不接受2周岁以下婴儿参团，6岁以下或30公斤以下儿童可能需要欧盟安全制式儿童座椅。根据《旅游法》第15条及《传染病防治法（2025修订）》，旅游者须如实告知与旅游活动相关的个人健康信息（包括妊娠期、哺乳期、慢性病、传染病史、疑似症状或近期疫区旅居史），若因隐瞒导致人身损害或传播风险，旅游者需自行承担责任，旅行社可解除合同且不退还费用。

title_en: Nordic Four Capitals: Oslo to Helsinki 7-Day Small-Group Tour
title_zh: 北欧四国7天小团游：奥斯陆至赫尔辛基
short_en: A one-way 7-day journey across four Nordic capitals plus Andersen's fairy-tale Odense, with Viking Line cruise, scenic boat trips and all attractions included.
short_zh: 7天单程畅游北欧四国首都，外加安徒生童话小镇欧登塞，含维京号游轮、观光游船与全程门票，一价全含。
desc_en: Travel one-way from Oslo to Helsinki across Norway, Sweden, Denmark and Finland, taking in four Nordic capitals plus Hans Christian Andersen's fairy-tale town of Odense. The route blends art and architecture (Vigeland Sculpture Park, the Oslo Opera House, Malmo's Turning Torso) with classic Scandinavian experiences: a ferry across the Kattegat, a sightseeing cruise to the UNESCO-listed Drottningholm Palace, and an overnight Viking Line cruise across the Baltic Sea. With city-centre 4-star hotels, a Chinese-speaking guide and all listed attractions included, it is an all-inclusive, deep dive into Scandinavian culture and design.
desc_zh: 从挪威奥斯陆单程畅游至芬兰赫尔辛基，途经挪威、瑞典、丹麦、芬兰四国，饱览四座北欧首都，并探访安徒生的童话故乡欧登塞。线路将艺术建筑（维格兰雕塑公园、奥斯陆歌剧院、马尔默旋转大厦）与经典北欧体验融为一体：渡轮横渡卡特加特海峡、乘观光游船前往世界文化遗产卓宁霍姆宫、搭乘维京号游轮夜渡波罗的海。入住市区四星级酒店，配中文导游，全程门票一价全含，深度领略斯堪的纳维亚的文化与设计。

highlights.en: Four Nordic capitals on one route: Oslo, Copenhagen, Stockholm and Helsinki
highlights.zh: 一条线路畅游四国首都：奥斯陆、哥本哈根、斯德哥尔摩、赫尔辛基

highlights.en: Andersen's fairy-tale town of Odense with the Andersen Museum and the Funen Village open-air museum
highlights.zh: 安徒生童话小镇欧登塞，参观安徒生博物馆与菲英村露天博物馆

highlights.en: Overnight Viking Line cruise across the Baltic Sea in a sea-view cabin
highlights.zh: 搭乘维京号游轮夜渡波罗的海，入住海景舱

highlights.en: Sightseeing cruise to the UNESCO World Heritage Drottningholm Palace via Lake Malaren
highlights.zh: 乘观光游船经梅拉伦湖前往世界文化遗产卓宁霍姆宫

highlights.en: Iconic Scandinavian sights: Copenhagen's Little Mermaid, Nyhavn, and Stockholm's Vasa Museum
highlights.zh: 北欧地标尽收眼底：哥本哈根小美人鱼、新港，斯德哥尔摩瓦萨沉船博物馆

highlights.en: Architecture and art tour: Vigeland Sculpture Park, Oslo Opera House and Malmo's Turning Torso
highlights.zh: 艺术与建筑巡礼：维格兰雕塑公园、奥斯陆歌剧院、马尔默旋转大厦

highlights.en: City-centre 4-star hotels and a Chinese-speaking guide-driver throughout
highlights.zh: 全程入住市区四星级酒店，配中文司导

highlights.en: One-way deep route with all listed attractions, ferries and cruises included (all-inclusive pricing)
highlights.zh: 单程深度线路，门票、渡轮与游轮一价全含

includes.en: Accommodation: 1 night in a four-person sea-view cabin on the Viking Line cruise, plus 5 nights in 4-star hotels (Norwegian hotels no longer use star ratings; star levels refer to the Booking or Ctrip hotel star standard).
includes.zh: 【酒店】维京号游轮四人海景舱1晚，四星级酒店5晚。（挪威酒店取消星级评定，酒店星级参考Booking或携程的酒店星级标准）

includes.en: Meals: 6 Scandinavian-style hotel buffet breakfasts.
includes.zh: 【餐饮】斯堪的纳维亚式酒店自助早餐6餐。

includes.en: Operating costs: tourist city tax, city entry fees, residence tax, road and bridge tolls, parking and fuel charges, driver/guide meal allowances and other in-itinerary operating expenses.
includes.zh: 【执行】游客城市税、进城费、居住税、过路过桥费、停车燃油费、司导餐补等行程内执行费用。

includes.en: Vehicle: tour coach or tourist business van.
includes.zh: 【车辆】旅游巴士或旅游商务车。

includes.en: Guide: professional driver plus Chinese-speaking guide, or a Chinese driver-cum-guide throughout (note: for 8 people or fewer, a business van with a Chinese-speaking driver-cum-guide is arranged).
includes.zh: 【导游】职业司机+中文导游，或者全程中文华人司机兼导游（备注：8人及以下则安排为商务旅行车+中文司机兼导游）。

includes.en: Luggage: 1 piece of checked luggage up to 23 kg plus 1 carry-on bag.
includes.zh: 【行李】1件23公斤行李及1件随身行李。

includes.en: Admission tickets: Stockholm City Hall (ticket + official guided commentary), Vasa Museum (ticket + official guided commentary), Stockholm sightseeing cruise, Hans Christian Andersen Museum, Andersen's childhood home, Funen Village, the Frederikshavn-Gothenburg ferry, and Vigeland Sculpture Park.
includes.zh: 【门票】斯德哥尔摩市政厅（门票+官导讲解）、瓦萨沉船博物馆（门票+官导讲解）、斯德哥尔摩观光游船、安徒生博物馆、安徒生儿时故居、菲英村、腓特烈港到哥德堡渡轮、维格兰雕塑公园。

excludes.en: Passport: personal passport application fees.
excludes.zh: 护照：个人护照费用。

excludes.en: Visa: the tourist visa fees required for the countries listed in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 签证：行程中所列旅游国家所需的观光签证费用。

excludes.en: Insurance: travel insurance fees (if the itinerary involves high-risk activities, please confirm whether the insurance covers that activity).
excludes.zh: 保险：旅游保险费用；（如行程内涉及到高风险运动，请核实旅游保险是否包含该项运动）。

excludes.en: Tips: travellers pay a total of EUR 10 per person per day in tips for the guide and driver, the same rate for adults and children.
excludes.zh: 小费：游客支付导游和司机小费一共10欧/人/天，大小同价。

excludes.en: Meals: apart from the special meals included in the itinerary, lunch and dinner are not included.
excludes.zh: 餐饮：除行程内包含的特色餐外，行程中不包含午、晚正餐费用。

excludes.en: Admission tickets: sights not marked as included (including but not limited to sights noted as "exterior," plus all "recommended," "optional," "experience" and any other items where the fee is not stated as included; if you wish to visit, please pay on your own).
excludes.zh: 门票：行程中未注明费用包含的景点（包括但不仅限于行程中注明“外观”的景点，“推荐”、“可选”、“体验”等等所有未提及费用包含的项目，如游客需要参观，敬请自理）。

excludes.en: Extended stays: accommodation, transport and sightseeing costs for any extension beyond the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 延长住宿：行程外额外延长的住宿、交通、观光费用。

excludes.en: Personal expenses: such as drinks and alcohol, taxis, phone charges and other personal spending.
excludes.zh: 私人消费：如饮料酒类、出租车、电话费等个人消费。

excludes.en: Other transport: transport not mentioned in the inclusions beyond the included business van or minibus, such as a Venice gondola, and sightseeing trains, electric taxis etc. in vehicle-restricted zones, all at your own expense.
excludes.zh: 其他交通：除包含商务旅行车或者中巴之外，费用包含中未提及的其他交通费用，如威尼斯贡多拉，以及车辆限行区的观光火车、电瓶出租车等费用敬请自理。

excludes.en: Free activities: travellers' independent night-time sightseeing and recommended activities in the itinerary, plus the resulting transport, dining, admission and shopping costs.
excludes.zh: 自由活动：游客夜间自行游览及行程中的推荐项目，以及产生的交通、餐饮、门票、购物等费用。

excludes.en: Experience activities: the various travel experience activities not included in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 体验活动：行程中的没有包含的各项旅游体验活动。

excludes.en: Other costs: any costs not mentioned in the inclusions. In cases of force majeure such as natural disasters, war or strikes, or special circumstances such as transport delays, flight cancellations or schedule changes, embassy visa delays, insufficient group numbers, or other extra costs not caused by our company (such as overseas visa-extension fees, lodging, meals and transport, national airfare adjustments, etc.), our company reserves the right to charge the price difference.
excludes.zh: 其他费用：费用包含中未提及的费用。如因天灾、战争、罢工等不可抗力的原因，及因交通延阻、航班取消或更改时间、使馆延误出签证、人数不足等特殊情况或其他非我公司原因所引致的额外费（如在外延期签证费、住、食及交通费、国家航空运价调整等），我公司有权追加差价。

timeline.title_en: Oslo - Gothenburg: Nordic slow living, an art pilgrimage and harbour stroll
timeline.title_zh: 奥斯陆 - 哥德堡：北欧式的慢生活，艺术巡礼与海港漫步
timeline.description_en: Meet at 11:00 in the city centre of the Norwegian capital Oslo. Visit Oslo City Hall (exterior), the venue where the Nobel Peace Prize is awarded, then watch the changing of the guard outside the Royal Palace (exterior). Continue to the medieval Akershus Fortress (exterior), built in 1299 beside the city hall, and the glacier-like modern Oslo Opera House (exterior) on the Oslofjord, whose sloping marble roof you are strongly encouraged to walk up for sweeping fjord-city views. Then explore Vigeland Sculpture Park, named after sculptor Gustav Vigeland, with 192 sculptures and around 650 figures all built around the theme of human life. Afterwards drive to the Swedish west-coast port city of Gothenburg and check in. Overnight: Quality Hotel Gothenburg or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 上午11:00在挪威首都奥斯陆市中心集合，前往参观诺贝尔和平奖颁奖地——奥斯陆市政厅（外观），在皇宫（外观）外观看卫兵换岗，之后游览紧邻市政厅、建于1299年的中世纪城堡阿克斯胡斯城堡（外观），并参观如同冰川般、矗立于奥斯陆峡湾之上的现代建筑——奥斯陆歌剧院（外观），强烈推荐走上倾斜的大理石屋顶，俯瞰峡湾城市风光。随后参观以著名雕塑大师古斯塔夫·维格兰命名、以“人生”为主题的维格兰雕塑公园，公园共有192座雕塑、约650个人物雕像，呈现人从出生至死的各个阶段。结束参观后前往瑞典西海岸海港城市哥德堡，入住酒店。夜宿：哥德堡品质酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Gothenburg - Frederikshavn - Aalborg: stepping into a canvas of old and new
timeline.title_zh: 哥德堡 - 腓特烈港 - 奥尔堡：踏入一幅融入古今色彩的画卷
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, freely visit Masthugget Church (exterior), the Poseidon Statue and the Avenyn boulevard in Gothenburg. Masthugget Church, completed in 1914 on a hilltop, is counted among Gothenburg's three landmarks together with the "lipstick tower" and the Poseidon statue; the Poseidon Statue (completed 1931) is one of the city's most famous sculptures and a symbol of Sweden's maritime era; Avenyn is the city's main avenue lined with shops, cafes and restaurants, ending at the Poseidon statue and the art museum. Then board a ferry at Gothenburg harbour across the Kattegat to Frederikshavn (a roughly 3.5-hour crossing; the famous shrimp sandwich is recommended on board). After a short rest in Frederikshavn, continue to Aalborg and freely explore the city centre: Aalborg Castle (exterior, a 16th-century defensive fortress that later became a Danish royal residence), Budolfi Church (a 14th-century Gothic church with a fine organ and stained glass), and the fairytale Hjelmerstald old lane and pedestrian street. Overnight: Scandic Aalborg or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，自由参观哥德堡的马斯塔盖特教堂（外观）、海神波塞冬雕塑和Avenyn大道。马斯塔盖教堂于1914年竣工，位于一座小山坡上，与口红楼、波塞冬雕像并称哥德堡三大地标；海神波塞冬雕塑完成于1931年，是瑞典海上霸权与航海时代的象征，也是哥德堡最著名的雕像之一；Avenyn大道是哥德堡市中心的主干道，两旁满是商铺、咖啡馆和餐厅，尽头是波塞冬雕像和哥德堡艺术博物馆。之后在哥德堡港口乘坐渡轮横渡卡特加特海峡前往腓特烈港（约3.5小时航程，船上强烈推荐品尝著名的虾肉三明治）。在腓特烈港短暂休息后前往奥尔堡，抵达后自由参观奥尔堡市区景点：奥尔堡城堡（外观，建于16世纪、原为防御性要塞、后成为丹麦王室官邸）、Budolfi教堂（始建于14世纪的哥特式教堂，内有精致的管风琴与彩绘玻璃），以及童话般的杜赫芬老街和步行街。夜宿：奥尔堡斯堪迪克酒店或同等4星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Aalborg - Odense - Copenhagen: into Andersen's town, becoming a fairytale character
timeline.title_zh: 奥尔堡 - 欧登塞 - 哥本哈根：走进安徒生小镇，当童话里的人物
