timeline.description_zh: 上午在特罗姆瑟集合，随后游览特罗姆瑟城区、峡湾镇与极地教堂，之后前往纳尔维克。在特罗姆斯达伦（与本岛特罗姆索伊亚由跨海大桥相连的村庄），可乘菲耶尔海森缆车或自行徒步登上约1250米的菲优雅山（Mt Fløya），抵达特罗姆瑟景观台（Tromsø Utsiktspunkt），360度俯瞰城市与峡湾全景，山顶还有冰雪栈道、空中观景台和异国风情餐厅，这里正是Ins热门的"蓝调时刻"暮色发源地（提示：缆车与自行登顶都对天气要求严苛，天气不佳缆车将关闭，届时不推荐自行攀爬）。沿途还可观赏特罗姆瑟大桥（建于1958年，连接特罗姆索伊亚岛与特罗姆斯达伦的标志性跨海大桥）和极地教堂（建于1965年，后部有高12米、重6吨的彩色玻璃窗）。被誉为"通往北极的门户"的特罗姆瑟融合了活力夜生活、北欧文化、极地科研与萨米传统，漫长冬夜（9月至次年4月）大幅提升极光邂逅概率。夜宿：纳尔维克皇家品质酒店或同等四星级酒店（一座20世纪初的历史性地标，二战期间曾作军事基地，设有Rallar'n Pub Kro餐厅及俯瞰奥福特峡湾的顶层Linken Restaurant Bar餐厅）。

timeline.title_en: Narvik - Svolvær | Along "King Olav V's Road" through the five linked islands at the edge of Europe
timeline.title_zh: 纳尔维克-斯沃尔维尔 | 由"奥拉夫五世国王之路"贯穿欧洲尽头的五个岛屿
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, tour the Lofoten Islands and then continue to Svolvær. The Lofoten archipelago is formed of seven main islands stretching into the sea, but only five are linked by bridges and tunnels along the scenic 130-km stretch known as "King Olav V's Road." Svolvær, the capital and an important port of Lofoten, offers unrivalled panoramas of the cold ocean and snow-capped mountains, with a bustling quay where every restaurant displays the day's catch and the Hurtigruten cruise pier is a favourite photo spot. Overnight: Anker Brygge (or an equivalent 5-star hotel) — a celebrated traditional Norwegian fishing-village rorbu (timber stilt-cabin) hotel on the central Svolvær quay whose five-star status comes from the preservation of authentic fishing-village culture rather than luxury, with antique woodwork interiors and mountain and sea views. Note: each rorbu cabin contains standard rooms with private bathrooms and is shared by two to three groups of guests — rooms are private space while areas outside the rooms are shared; because Lofoten lies within the Arctic Circle, winter daylight is short, local activities are less rich than in summer, and during Christmas some may not operate (the operator then recommends touring Lofoten's sights by coach).
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后游览罗弗敦群岛，随后前往斯沃尔维尔。罗弗敦群岛由七个延伸入海的主岛组成，但其中仅有五个岛屿通过桥梁和隧道相连，这段约130公里的优美路段被称为"奥拉夫五世国王之路"。斯沃尔维尔是罗弗敦群岛的首府与重要港口城市，可饱览冰冷海洋与白雪皑皑群山的壮丽全景，热闹的码头熙熙攘攘，每家餐厅都摆出当天的渔获，海达路德探险邮轮的码头是游客取景圣地。夜宿：安克尔布里嘉酒店或同等五星级酒店——位于斯沃尔维尔市中心码头、著名的挪威传统渔村水木屋（rorbu）酒店，其五星定位源于对原生态渔村文化与水木屋建筑的保护与传承，而非奢华，内部古色古香原木装潢，享有壮丽山景与海景。提示：每栋水木屋含带独立卫生间的标准间，每栋供两到三组游客使用，房间内为私人空间，房间外的公共区域为全体游客共用；由于罗弗敦地处北极圈内，冬季日照时间较短，当地特色活动的体验不如夏季，圣诞期间可能不营业（届时旅行社推荐跟随大巴车游览罗弗敦各景点）。

timeline.title_en: Svolvær - Å - Reine - Henningsvær | Visiting Lofoten's fishing grounds and savouring North Atlantic flavours
timeline.title_zh: 斯沃尔维尔-奥镇-雷纳-亨宁斯韦尔 | 拜访罗弗敦海洋渔场、尽享北大西洋美味
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, first head to Leknes, Lofoten's commercial centre, then continue to the end of the European road at Å — the town with the world's shortest name ("Å" is the last character/syllable in Norwegian, symbolising both the end and a fresh start), a protected traditional fishing village beloved by photographers for its 19th-century dark-red wooden rorbuer. Drive on to Reine to take in the magnificent view of Reinebringen from the steep Reine pass, then visit the iconic red-house village of Hamnøy (one of three pristine fishing villages on Moskenesøya, featured among the world's most stunning photos in 2014 — the bridge west of the village offers the best shooting angle; if weather, fitness or children prevent climbing Reinebringen, the village still captures sea, fjord, snow mountains and fishing huts). Stop at the yellow fishing huts of Sakrisøy (an island famed for rows of bright-yellow rorbuer reflected in the calm fjord against snowstorm backdrops), then on to the fishing village of Henningsvær (about 20 km southwest of Svolvær) to see its famous football pitch built on a rocky islet (a 500-person village whose pitch was built to fulfil the wish of a local 14-year-old). Return to the traditional fishing village of Svolvær. Overnight: Anker Brygge or an equivalent 5-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，首先前往莱肯奈斯（Leknes）——罗弗敦的商业中心，随后前往欧洲公路的尽头、世界上名字最短的小镇奥镇（Å，"Å"是挪威语的最后一个音节字符，代表一切的结束与重启），这是一座受保护的传统渔村，以19世纪保存至今的深红色木质渔人小屋而成为摄影师的天堂。继续前往雷纳（Reine），从陡峭的雷纳山口俯览雷讷山（Reinebringen）壮丽景色；再前往挪威标志性红房子小镇哈姆诺伊（Hamnøy，莫斯克斯内斯岛上三个原生态渔村之一，曾位列2014年全球震撼照片之中，村口西面通往雷讷的桥上是最佳拍摄角度；如因天气、体力或儿童无法攀登雷纳山，当天前往哈姆诺伊村也能拍到海水、峡湾、雪山、渔村等经典主题）。途中游览萨克里索伊黄色渔屋（Sakrisøy，该岛以一排排鲜黄油亮的渔屋倒影在平静峡湾、与暴雪背景形成反差而闻名）；之后前往亨宁斯韦尔（Henningsvær，位于斯沃尔维尔西南约20公里）小镇，参观修建在岩礁之上的小岛足球场（这个仅约500人的小渔村的足球场，是为当地一名14岁孩子的心愿而建）。随后返回斯沃尔维尔传统渔村。夜宿：安克尔布里嘉酒店或同等五星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Svolvær - Senja | From polar fjords to an aurora paradise; staying at the Senja Quay hotel
timeline.title_zh: 斯沃尔韦尔-塞尼亚群岛 | 从极地峡湾到极光天堂，入住塞尼亚码头酒店
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, you may choose to go cod fishing in the North Atlantic with local fishermen, or explore central Svolvær freely, then drive along the Ofotfjord to Evenskjer for more postcard-perfect scenery, and on to Norway's island of Senja — nicknamed "Norway in miniature" for its full range of Norwegian landscapes. Overnight: the Senja Quay (Mefjord Brygge) hotel, called an aurora paradise, half facing the Arctic Ocean and half ringed by fjords and snow mountains, whose aurora suites set a much-imitated "Senja style." The Quay Suite faces the harbour with mountain-and-sea views and huge floor-to-ceiling windows for watching the aurora from the room; the Standard small-window room sits opposite, with a private bathroom but high, small, poorly oriented windows and a smaller floor area, with no sea or aurora view (Product A uses the small-window room, Product B the quay suite — hence the price difference; if six guests book together, they may apply to customer service for "one quay suite plus two standard small-window rooms"). Optional add-ons: Lofoten cod fishing (group price EUR 149 — Lofoten is one of the world's best fishing destinations year-round; a catch cannot be guaranteed, the outing itself is the experience) and night Arctic Ocean floating (group price EUR 59 — drift in a special drysuit on the dark winter sea, with a chance of the aurora overhead; minimum age 10, height 1.50 m).
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，可选择跟随当地渔民海钓北大西洋鳕鱼，或自由游览斯沃尔维尔市区，随后沿着奥福特峡湾前往伊温斯科尔（Evenskjer），欣赏更多如明信片般美丽的风景，之后前往挪威塞尼亚岛——因岛上拥有挪威各种地貌而被誉为挪威的"缩影"。夜宿：被称为极光天堂的塞尼亚码头酒店，一半风景被北冰洋覆盖，另一半坐落于峡湾与雪山环绕之中，其极光套房构成了备受争相模仿的独特"塞尼亚风"建筑。码头套房面向码头，拥有群山环绕的山海景观与巨大的落地窗，可在房间内一览极光爆发；标准小窗房位于码头套房对面，带独立卫生间但窗户高而小、朝向不佳、房间面积较小，无法欣赏海景和极光（A套餐入住小窗房，B套餐入住码头套房，故价格不同；如遇6人同时报名，可向客服申请预定"一个码头套房和两个标准小窗房"）。推荐自费项目：罗弗敦出海钓鳕鱼（团队预定价149欧——罗弗敦群岛是全球最佳钓鱼目的地之一，一年四季皆宜，但无法保证一定捕到鱼，乘船出海本身就是一种体验）；夜间北冰洋漂浮（团队预定价59欧——穿上特制氯丁橡胶潜水服在漆黑冰冷的北冰洋海面上漂浮，冬季有机会看到头顶翩翩起舞的北极光；活动最低年龄10岁，身高1.50米）。

timeline.title_en: Senja - Sommarøy | Crossing the "Arctic Caribbean" — an island loop through Norway's distilled landscapes
timeline.title_zh: 塞尼亚群岛-索玛罗伊 | 横渡极地加勒比——浓缩挪威独特地貌风景的环岛之旅
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, you may optionally go sea-eagle watching, then drive the Senja national scenic route around the peninsula. First reach the Bergsbotn viewpoint, overlooking the magnificent Bergsfjord; then the Tungeneset viewpoint, where a Siberian-larch boardwalk crosses the rocks toward Senja's famous Okshornan peaks — a row of sharp rocks resembling giant teeth, also called the "Devil's Jaw." Finally arrive at Ersfjord beach, a fantastic sheltered white-sand bay famed for its uniquely designed "Golden toilet," where you rest briefly and enjoy the calm beauty. Then board the Brensholmen polar fjord ferry to Sommarøy island near Tromsø, enjoying Norwegian fjord scenery en route. Overnight: Sommarøy Arctic Hotel near Tromsø (or an equivalent 4-star hotel), the "Arctic Caribbean" hotel set amid stunning Arctic nature, with midnight sun in summer and aurora in winter. Important notes: the polar fjord ferry's daily departure time varies (per the on-tour schedule); on the Dec 21 departure the ferry company does not operate during Christmas, so that group cannot take the polar ferry (no price refund) and will drive to Sommarøy instead — the touring content is identical and this is not considered an itinerary change. The Brensholmen ferry may be unavailable in extreme weather, strikes, public holidays, maritime bans or when full, in which case the trip automatically switches to a coastal coach drive along the fjord, with no refundable difference.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，可自费选择出海观鹰，随后乘车沿挪威国家公园旅游路线进行塞尼亚环半岛之旅。第一站抵达贝格斯景观台（Bergsbotn），俯瞰壮美的贝格斯峡湾（Bergsfjord）；接着来到奇迹山峦瞭望台（Tungeneset），一段由西伯利亚落叶松制成的人行栈桥横跨岩石，远眺塞尼亚岛最著名的奥克斯曼群峰（Okshornan）——这排酷似巨大牙齿的独特岩石形成，也被称为"恶魔之齿"；最后来到精灵峡湾海滩（Ersfjord），美丽的白沙滩上有一座享有"黄金厕所"之称、设计独特的厕所而闻名，在此短暂休息、享受海滩的宁静与美丽。随后乘坐极地峡湾渡轮前往特罗姆瑟附近的索玛罗伊岛，沿途欣赏挪威峡湾景观。夜宿：特罗姆瑟索玛罗伊北极酒店或同等四星级酒店——被誉为"极地加勒比"的酒店，坐拥壮丽北极自然风光，夏季可赏午夜阳光，冬季可观北极光。重要提示：极地峡湾渡轮每日出发时间不定（以团上时间安排为准）；12月21日团期因圣诞期间渡轮公司不营业，该团期无法体验极地轮渡且无差价可退，当天将开车前往索玛罗伊岛，全程游览内容一致，不视为行程变更。波特汉姆极地峡湾渡轮如遇极端天气、罢工、法定假期或海事禁令以及满载情况下将无法乘坐，行程自动更改为乘坐大巴沿海岸线游览峡湾，无可退差价费用。

timeline.title_en: Sommarøy - Tromsø | North Atlantic whale-watching cruise
timeline.title_zh: 索玛罗伊-特罗姆瑟 | 观鲸轮北冰洋观鲸之旅
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, enjoy free time in town or optionally take a sightseeing boat out to watch polar fjords and migrating large whales, then return to Tromsø and tour the city before the cruise ends. Walk the Storgata old-town street, which has played a key role in many of history's great polar expeditions: from its promenade you can see across the water to the Arctic Cathedral, admire the distinctive polar Viking-style timber architecture, and find Roald Amundsen's statue nodding to Tromsø's nickname "Gateway to the Arctic." Optional add-ons: Tromsø whale-watching (adult EUR 180; child aged 6–15 on activity day EUR 90 — a 5–7 hour outing in winter to seek orcas, humpbacks and fin whales drawn by the herring shoals in the Lyngen channel; sightings cannot be guaranteed but recent success rates have been high; Tromsø whale season mid-Oct to mid-Feb) and Tromsø king-crab fishing (adult EUR 290; child aged 6–15 EUR 150 — sail to a fjord fishing ground, take part in baiting, setting traps and hauling, then enjoy a king-crab feast cooked on board; available outside whale season, and during whale season choose one of the two activities). Note: all activities are guided in English only by local guides, with no Chinese-language guide service. There is no hotel on this final day.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，市区自由活动，或自费选择乘坐观光船出海，观赏极地峡湾及大型鲸鱼迁移后返回特罗姆瑟，巡航即将结束后参观特罗姆瑟城市。漫步斯托加塔老城街区（Storgata）——它在许多历史上伟大的极地探险中始终发挥着重要作用，在步行道上可看到水面到北极大教堂的景色，欣赏独特的极地维京式木屋建筑，并能在罗尔德·阿蒙森的雕像上发现特罗姆瑟"通往北极的门户"的绰号。推荐自费项目：特罗姆瑟出海观鲸（成人价180欧，活动当天6-15岁儿童价90欧——挪威海灵恩海峡受暖流影响冬季不冰封，大量鲱鱼群吸引鲸鱼前来，5-7小时出海，冬季有机会看到虎鲸、座头鲸和长须鲸，虽不能保证一定看到鲸鱼，但近来成功率较高；特罗姆瑟观鲸季节10月中旬至次年2月中）；特罗姆瑟帝王蟹（成人价290欧，6-15岁儿童价150欧——前往峡湾指定渔场，参与准备鱼饵、设置陷阱、收网的全过程，船员将在船上烹制美味帝王蟹大餐；非观鲸季可选此活动，观鲸季两项活动二选一）。备注：以上活动均由当地英文导游提供全程英文服务，全程无中文向导服务。当天无酒店。

meeting_en: Tromsø, Norway — group meets in the morning of Day 1; tour is a round-trip ending back in Tromsø.
meeting_zh: 挪威特罗姆瑟——第1天上午集合；行程为特罗姆瑟往返，最终返回特罗姆瑟。

faqs.question_en: Where and when do we meet and disperse?
faqs.question_zh: 集合时间和集合地点是什么？
faqs.answer_en: On departure day, meet at Tromsø Aquarium (Hjalmar Johansens gate 12, 9007 Tromsø, Norway) at either 09:00 or 16:00. On the final day the group disperses at the same Tromsø Aquarium at 16:00. These times and places are for reference only — actual departure follows the tour confirmation letter. Local transport is easily affected by weather, departure information may be adjusted, and delays are frequent, so always allow ample time to connect onward travel and book connecting flights/hotels only after seeing the confirmation letter.
faqs.answer_zh: 出发当天，在特罗姆瑟水族馆（Hjalmar Johansens gate 12, 9007 Tromsø, Norway）09:00或16:00集合。结束当天在同一地点特罗姆瑟水族馆16:00散团。以上时间地点仅供参考，实际出发时间以出团通知书为准。当地交通容易受天气影响，出发信息可能调整且晚点现象频繁发生，请务必保留合理时间衔接后续行程，看到出团通知书后再预定衔接机票及酒店。

faqs.question_en: What is the weather and temperature like?
faqs.question_zh: 天气和温度情况如何？
faqs.answer_en: The whole itinerary is within the Arctic Circle. Summer (June–August) brings the midnight sun with an average temperature of about 10°C — a hardshell jacket is recommended. Winter (December–February) averages around -10°C outdoors (extreme weather can reach about -25°C), so a warm down jacket is needed.
faqs.answer_zh: 本产品全部行程都在北极圈内。每年夏季（6-8月）为极昼天气，平均气温约10度，推荐穿冲锋衣；每年冬季（12月至2月）室外平均约零下10度（极端天气可达零下25度左右），需要穿保暖羽绒服。

faqs.question_en: Are admission and experience-activity fees included?
faqs.question_zh: 门票、体验项目费用是否包含？
faqs.answer_en: Activity fees are not included in the itinerary. Paid tour projects are joined voluntarily at extra cost.
faqs.answer_zh: 行程内并未包含活动费用，自愿参加另行付费旅游项目。

faqs.question_en: What is the difference between the room types at the Senja Quay hotel?
faqs.question_zh: 塞尼亚码头酒店的房型有什么差异？
faqs.answer_en: The Senja Quay hotel's rooms are in the quay area; the view outside is blocked by the harbour and mountains, though still beautiful. There are two room types: the Quay Suite consists of a living room with a large window plus a small-window bedroom; the Standard small-window room has relatively high and small windows and cannot enjoy the sea view.
faqs.answer_zh: 塞尼亚码头酒店的房间位于码头区，窗外景观被码头和山峦所阻挡，但景色仍然美丽。这里有两种不同房型：码头套房为一个有大窗户的客厅和一个小窗房卧室组成；码头区标准小窗房的窗户相对比较高且较小，无法欣赏海景。

faqs.question_en: What are the triple-room options, and can six people who book together choose two triples?
faqs.question_zh: 三人间入住房型如何？六人同时报名能否选择两个三人间？
faqs.answer_en: The product supports triple-room booking: three people travelling together stay in a triple, which by default is a family room for two parents plus one minor child. Bed type is assigned by the hotel and cannot be chosen (it may be three singles, one double plus one single, one double plus a sofa bed, or a double plus an extra bed). If three book a triple and one cancels, the rate is recalculated as a twin. If a triple is unavailable, two rooms are arranged (as in Svolvær and Senja). If six people book together, you may apply to customer service for one suite (on Senja: one quay suite plus two standard small-window rooms; in Lofoten: a whole three-bedroom rorbu); after written agreement, and subject to a whole unit being available, you will be allocated an independent suite containing one quay-view living room and three standard small-window rooms.
faqs.answer_zh: 本产品支持三人间报名，三人同行入住三人间，默认为两位父母与一位未成年儿童入住家庭间；床型根据酒店安排不可选，可能是三张单人床、一张大床加一张单人床、一张大床加一张沙发床，或双人间加一个加床。三人选择入住三人间，如取消一位，则需按两人间重新计费。如三人间不可用，安排入住2间房（如斯沃尔维尔和塞尼亚）。如遇6人同时报名，可向客服申请预定一栋套房（塞尼亚岛为一个码头套房和两个标准小窗房，罗弗敦岛为整套三房水屋），经客服书面同意并视整套房间是否可用，将分配一个独立套房，含一个码头景观客厅和三间标准小窗房。

faqs.question_en: What about meals?
faqs.question_zh: 餐饮如何安排？
faqs.answer_en: The itinerary includes breakfast only; other meals are not included. During Christmas, dining within the Arctic Circle may be inconvenient, so the operator coordinates with campsites and restaurants near each hotel to provide traditional hot food. Guests are also advised to prepare some ready-to-eat food of their own.
faqs.answer_zh: 行程内包含早餐，不含其他餐饮。圣诞期间北极圈内可能会有就餐不便的情况，我社联络营地及各个酒店附近餐厅提供传统热食，同时敬请旅客自行准备一些熟食。

faqs.question_en: If we don't choose any activities on the Lofoten islands, can we still sightsee?
faqs.question_zh: 如果在罗弗敦岛不选择任何活动，是否可以游览？
faqs.answer_en: Yes — exploring freely beside the hotel is highly recommended, as the city's sights and restaurants are within walking distance, and from the hotel itself you can also enjoy the magnificent jagged mountains and North Atlantic views.
faqs.answer_zh: 非常推荐在酒店旁边自由游览，这里步行可达城市的各个景点和餐厅，同时在酒店内也能欣赏到壮丽的巨齿山峦和北大西洋景观。

faqs.question_en: Does this product include the Brensholmen polar fjord ferry?
faqs.question_zh: 本产品是否包含波特汉姆极地峡湾渡轮？
faqs.answer_en: Because the Brensholmen polar fjord ferry is heavily affected by weather and climate — especially in the winter snowstorm season, when it is often cancelled — the ferry is not included in the trip price. We do build it into the itinerary at no extra charge; but if a snowstorm, gale, drifting sea ice or the shipping company's capacity prevent boarding, we will detour inland to the destination, again with no refund.
faqs.answer_zh: 由于波特汉姆极地峡湾渡轮受天气及气候影响严重，特别是冬季暴风雪季节经常会取消渡轮，因此行程费用内未包含该渡轮。我们在行程设计内乘坐波特汉姆极地峡湾渡轮，不会产生额外收费；如遇暴风雪、狂风、海面冰川移动或船运公司由于运载能力无法乘坐，我们将绕内陆前往目的地，也不会退费。

faqs.question_en: Do I need a visa?
faqs.question_zh: 是否需要签证？
faqs.answer_en: This product does not include visa fees; you need a Schengen visa (single or multiple entry) — if you need to apply, please choose a Schengen-visa product. "Visa worry-free guarantee": for guests who sign with us 61 days before departure, if the visa is not obtained within 45 days before departure, we bear all losses and immediately refund the full travel fee; guests not meeting this clause who fail to get the visa are refunded per the change-and-cancellation terms. A refusal must be reported within 48 hours with the consulate's rejection letter, and any supplementary/changed materials submitted within 5 days. After booking we provide all materials needed to apply for the Schengen visa free of charge. Your passport must be valid for at least 6 months from the date of departure, or customs may refuse entry. Visa fees, visa service fees, Schengen insurance fees and visa-centre appointment fees are all non-refundable and non-transferable, even if the product is changed or cancelled.
faqs.answer_zh: 本产品不包含签证费用，需要申根签证（单次或多次入境），如需办理请选择申根签证产品。"保签无忧"：游客在出发日前61天与我社签约的旅游产品，如在出发前45天内未获取签证，我社承担所有损失，立即退还全部旅游费用；不符合该条款的游客如未正常获取签证，将按"退改与取消条款"退费。如遇拒签需在48小时内通知我社并出具使领馆拒签函，如需补充或更改材料需在五天内提交。预定后免费提供办理申根签证的全部材料。护照有效期需在离境之日起至少还有六个月，否则海关有权拒绝入境。签证费、签证服务费、申根保险费、签证中心预约费均不可退款，也无法更改使用者，即使产品退改签，签证费用亦无法退款。

faqs.question_en: Booking, changes & cancellation
faqs.question_zh: 预订、变更与取消须知
faqs.answer_en: Free, no-reason cancellation is allowed by either side more than 30 days before departure (the 30th day excluded). The group price requires 10 people to form (成团); below 10, the group may not form and either side may cancel up to 30 days before, with no liability before formation is announced. Pricing is in EUR; if you pay in CNY, the rate is the Bank of China "euro sell" rate auto-calculated on the day of payment (refunds likewise use the rate on the refund-application day, and any rate difference or bank fees are borne by the traveller). Product A and B share the same itinerary but differ in price and Senja room type (A = small-window room, B = quay suite). Twin rooms are default for two bookers (bed type assigned by hotel); single travellers pay a single-room supplement unless a same-sex share succeeds. Because flights, ferries (often cancelled) and order may change frequently, travellers must arrive one day before the tour starts and leave one day after it ends, allowing reasonable connection time — losses from not doing so are the traveller's own. The first/last day's itinerary may be swapped on holidays (content unchanged, not deemed a route change), and during holidays the ferry company may not operate (drive instead, no refund). All payments require a second confirmation within up to 48 hours.
faqs.answer_zh: 出发前30天（不含第30天）旅行社和旅行者均有权无理由取消。本产品为散客拼团，成团人数为10人，未达10人则可能不成团，行程开始前30天（不含第30天）未达成团人数双方均可解除合同，宣布成团前互不承担违约责任。定价以欧元为单位，如选择人民币支付，则以当天支付时本网站依据中国银行实时"欧元卖出价"自动计算的人民币价格为准（退款同样适用申请退款当日即时汇率，汇率差异及银行手续费由旅行者承担）。A、B套餐行程一致、价格不同、塞尼亚房型不同（A为小窗房，B为码头套房）。两人同时报名默认入住标准双人间（床型由酒店安排）；单人报名默认含单人房差，拼房成功后按比例退款。由于航变频繁、渡轮常被取消及行程顺序常调整，本产品要求旅游者在旅游团开始前一天到达集合地、结束后一天离开集散地，并预留合理航班衔接时间，未遵守导致的衔接损失由旅行者自行承担。第一天和最后一天行程可能对调（游览内容一致，不视为更改路线），节假日期间渡轮公司可能不营业（改为开车前往，无差价可退）。所有订单支付后需在最多48小时内二次确认行程。

faqs.question_en: Health & safety requirements
faqs.question_zh: 健康与安全须知
faqs.answer_en: For your safety, please have a health check before travelling and do NOT join if you have: infectious diseases (e.g. active TB, typhoid); cardiovascular disease (severe hypertension, heart failure, myocardial ischemia/infarction); cerebrovascular disease (cerebral embolism, hemorrhage, tumour); respiratory disease (emphysema, cor pulmonale); psychiatric illness (e.g. epilepsy); severe anemia (hemoglobin below 50 g/L); or recovery from major surgery. Pregnancy: from week 35 you may not join under any circumstances; from week 28 a doctor's report within 7 days plus the attending physician's consent are required; under 28 weeks, book with caution, sign a waiver, and you cannot join any adventure, ski, sea-going, aerial or outdoor activities. Disabled travellers need a doctor's report (within 7 days) plus consent, a direct-family escort, and must apply at least 61 days ahead for a reserved place and facilities. Travellers over 70 need a health certificate, physical exam and direct-family escort (or sign a waiver), must have walking ability for this long itinerary, need the attending physician's consent for any adventure/ski/sea/aerial/outdoor activities, and should apply 61 days ahead for elderly-care service. Minors (under 18) must be accompanied by a direct relative or guardian; some sights restrict those under 18, 12 or 6; infants under 30 kg / under 6 need a confirmed child seat; unaccompanied minors need parental authorization; infants under 2 years are not accepted. Per Article 15 of the Tourism Law, travellers must truthfully declare health information relevant to the trip (including pregnancy, lactation, chronic disease, infectious-disease history, suspected symptoms or recent travel to epidemic areas) and comply with safety warnings; concealment causing harm or transmission makes the traveller liable for the consequences, including medical, quarantine and compensation costs, and may allow the operator to terminate the contract without refund.
faqs.answer_zh: 为确保安全出行，请出行前做必要的身体检查，如存在以下情况请勿报名：传染性疾病患者（如活动期肺结核、伤寒等）；心血管疾病患者（严重高血压、心功能不全、心肌缺氧、心肌梗塞等）；脑血管疾病患者（脑栓塞、脑出血、脑肿瘤等）；呼吸系统疾病患者（肺气肿、肺心病等）；精神病患者（癫痫及各种精神病）；严重贫血患者（血红蛋白低于50克/升）；大中型手术恢复期病患者。孕妇：妊娠第35周及以上任何情况下都无法参团；第28周及以上需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书；28周以下请慎重报名，需签署旅行社免责声明书，且无法参加探险、滑雪、出海、高空、户外等项目。残疾人需提供7日内医生检查报告及同意书、需直系家属陪同、并提前至少61天申请预留位置及专用设施。70周岁以上老年人需提供健康证明、体检报告并由直系家属陪同（否则需签免责声明书），本行程较长需有一定步行能力，如涉及探险、滑雪、出海、高空、户外项目需持主治医师同意书，并提前至少61天申请适老化服务及设施。未成年人（未满18周岁）需由直系亲属或监护人陪同，部分项目对未满18/12/6周岁有特殊限定；6岁以下或30公斤以下儿童需提前确认安全座椅；无父母陪同的未成年人需持父母授权书；不接受2周岁以下婴儿参团。根据《旅游法》第15条，旅游者需如实告知与旅游活动相关的个人健康信息（包括妊娠期、哺乳期、慢性病、传染病史、疑似症状或近期疫区旅居史）并遵守安全警示规定；如因隐瞒导致人身损害或传播风险，旅游者需自行承担医疗、隔离及赔偿责任，旅行社可解除合同且不退还费用。

title_en: Norway Lofoten & Arctic Fjords: 6-Day Small-Group Tour (Oslo–Tromsø)
title_zh: 挪威罗弗敦群岛与北极峡湾6天小团游（奥斯陆—特罗姆瑟）
short_en: A 6-day one-way Arctic adventure through Lofoten's fishing villages, Senja's wild coast, Narvik's fjords and Tromsø, with domestic flight legs, whale watching and city-centre hotels included.
short_zh: 6天单程北极深度之旅，畅游罗弗敦渔村、塞尼亚野性海岸、纳尔维克峡湾与特罗姆瑟，含两段内陆航班、出海观鲸及市中心酒店。
desc_en: This 6-day small-group journey runs one-way through Arctic Norway, from Oslo via a flight to Evenes, then deep into the Lofoten archipelago, on through Narvik, the dramatic Senja island loop and finally Tromsø. You will photograph the iconic red-and-yellow fishing houses of Reine and Hamnøy, drive the scenic 'King Olav V Road' linking the islands, watch sea eagles and seals from a boat, and end with a winter whale-watching cruise on the Arctic Ocean. Highlights include two nights in traditional five-star fishing-village water cabins, a panoramic glass-house stay overlooking Narvik's fjord, and the famous 'blue hour' over Tromsø. International flights are excluded, but the two domestic flight legs, all hotels, and listed activities are included.
desc_zh: 这是一趟单程的6天北极挪威小团之旅，从奥斯陆飞往埃沃内斯，深入罗弗敦群岛，再经纳尔维克、壮丽的塞尼亚环岛之旅，最终抵达特罗姆瑟。您将拍摄雷纳与哈姆诺伊标志性的红黄渔屋，行驶贯穿群岛的“奥拉夫五世国王之路”，乘船观赏海鹰与海豹栖息地，并以一场北冰洋冬季出海观鲸结束旅程。亮点包括两晚传统五星级渔村水上木屋、俯瞰纳尔维克峡湾的全景玻璃屋，以及著名的特罗姆瑟“蓝调时刻”。行程不含国际段机票，但包含两段内陆机票、全程酒店及所列活动。

highlights.en: Deep exploration of the Lofoten archipelago, called 'heaven fallen to earth' by Lonely Planet
highlights.zh: 深度游览被《孤独星球》誉为落入人间天堂的罗弗敦群岛

highlights.en: Photographer's paradise: Reine, Hamnøy's red houses and Å, the village at Europe's road's end
highlights.zh: 摄影天堂：雷纳、哈姆诺伊红房子与欧洲公路尽头小镇奥镇（Å）

highlights.en: Senja island scenic loop — Tungeneset, Bergsbotn viewpoint and Ersfjord beach
highlights.zh: 塞尼亚环岛景观路线——奇迹山峦、贝格斯观景台与精灵峡湾海滩

highlights.en: Winter Arctic Ocean whale-watching cruise (mid-Oct to mid-Feb), spotting orcas and humpbacks
highlights.zh: 北冰洋冬季出海观鲸（10月中至次年2月中），有机会看到虎鲸与座头鲸

highlights.en: Two nights in traditional five-star fishing-village water cabins plus a panoramic glass-house stay
highlights.zh: 两晚传统五星级渔村水上木屋，外加全景玻璃屋特色住宿

highlights.en: Two internal/domestic flight legs and the scenic 'King Olav V Road' linking five islands included
highlights.zh: 含两段内陆航班及贯穿五岛的“奥拉夫五世国王之路”

highlights.en: One-way deep route — no backtracking, no wasted sightseeing time
highlights.zh: 单程深度线路，不走回头路，绝不浪费宝贵游览时间

highlights.en: 6–15 person small group with professional driver and Chinese-speaking guide
highlights.zh: 6-15人享乐小团，职业司机与中文导游深度讲解

includes.en: Flights: two domestic legs, Oslo-Evenes and Tromso-Oslo (round trip)
includes.zh: 机票：奥斯陆-埃沃内斯、特罗姆瑟-奥斯陆往返2程内陆段机票

includes.en: Ground transport: tour coach
includes.zh: 地面交通：旅游巴士

includes.en: Hotel accommodation: 5 nights total - 2 nights in 5-star fishing-village hotels and 3 nights in 4-star hotels (note: Nordic hotels no longer use a star rating, so star levels follow Booking.com or Ctrip)
includes.zh: 酒店住宿：五星级渔村酒店2晚，四星级酒店3晚，共计5晚酒店（备注：由于北欧酒店取消星级评定，酒店星级以Booking.com或者携程酒店星级为标准）

includes.en: Meals included: breakfast at the hotel or in another form throughout, 5 meals in total
includes.zh: 包含餐饮：全程酒店或其他形式早餐，共计5餐

includes.en: Guide service: professional guide service, or a Chinese-speaking driver doubling as guide (note: for groups of 8 or fewer a driver-guide is arranged)
includes.zh: 导游服务：专业导游服务或者中文司机兼职导游（备注：8人及以下则安排司机兼职导游）

includes.en: Baggage allowance: 1 piece of 23 kg checked baggage plus 1 small carry-on
includes.zh: 行李说明：1件23公斤行李及1件随身小行李

includes.en: Activities: boat trip to the sea-eagle and seal habitat, and Tromso whale-watching cruise (15 Oct to mid-Feb; no whale-watching on the September departure or on departures after 14 Feb)
includes.zh: 活动项目：乘船游览海鹰海豹栖息地，特罗姆瑟出海观鲸（10月15日至次年2月中旬，9月份以及2月14日之后班期无观鲸活动）

excludes.en: Passport: personal passport fees
excludes.zh: 护照：个人护照费用

excludes.en: Visa: the tourist visa fees required for the countries on the itinerary
excludes.zh: 签证：行程中所列旅游国家所需的观光签证费用

excludes.en: Insurance: travel insurance fees (if the itinerary involves high-risk sports, please confirm whether your travel insurance covers them)
excludes.zh: 保险：旅游保险费用（如行程内涉及到高风险运动，请核实旅游保险是否包含该项运动）

excludes.en: Tips: guests pay a total of EUR 10 per person per day in tips for the guide and driver, the same rate for adults and children
excludes.zh: 小费：游客支付导游和司机小费一共10欧/人/天，大小同价

excludes.en: Meals: apart from the special meals included in the itinerary, lunches and dinners are not included
excludes.zh: 餐饮：除行程内包含的特色餐外，行程中不包含午、晚正餐费用

excludes.en: Admission tickets: any sight not marked as included (including but not limited to sights marked "exterior" (外观), "recommended", "optional", "experience" and any item not stated as included); please pay on your own if you wish to visit
excludes.zh: 门票：行程中未注明费用包含的景点（包括但不仅限于行程中注明“外观”的景点，“推荐”、“可选”、“体验”等所有未提及费用包含的项目，如游客需要参观，敬请自理）

excludes.en: Extended stays: any additional accommodation, transport or sightseeing beyond the itinerary
excludes.zh: 延长住宿：行程外额外延长的住宿、交通、观光费用

excludes.en: Personal expenses: drinks and alcohol, taxis, phone charges and other personal spending
excludes.zh: 私人消费：如饮料酒类、出租车、电话费等个人消费

excludes.en: Other transport: any transport not mentioned in the inclusions beyond the included coach or minibus, such as the Venice gondola, sightseeing trains or electric taxis in vehicle-restricted zones (please pay on your own)
excludes.zh: 其他交通：除包含商务旅行车或者中巴之外，费用包含中未提及的其他交通费用，如威尼斯贡多拉，以及车辆限行区的观光火车、电瓶出租车等费用敬请自理

excludes.en: Free-time activities: guests' own evening sightseeing and the itinerary's recommended items, plus any transport, meals, tickets and shopping they incur
excludes.zh: 自由活动：游客夜间自行游览及行程中的推荐项目，以及产生的交通、餐饮、门票、购物等费用

excludes.en: Experience activities: any travel experience activities not included in the itinerary
excludes.zh: 体验活动：行程中没有包含的各项旅游体验活动

excludes.en: Other costs: anything not mentioned in the inclusions; the operator reserves the right to add a price difference for extra costs arising from force majeure (natural disaster, war, strikes), traffic delays, flight cancellation or rescheduling, embassy delays in issuing visas, insufficient group size and similar situations, or other costs not caused by the operator (such as overseas visa-extension fees, accommodation, food and transport, or national air-fare adjustments)
excludes.zh: 其他费用：费用包含中未提及的费用。如因天灾、战争、罢工等不可抗力原因，及因交通延阻、航班取消或更改时间、使馆延误出签证、人数不足等特殊情况或其他非我公司原因所导致的额外费用（如在外延期签证费、住、食及交通费、国家航空运价调整等），我公司有权追加差价

timeline.title_en: Oslo - Evenes - Svolvaer | Snow peaks, fjords and fishing villages: into an Arctic fairy tale
timeline.title_zh: 奥斯陆 - 埃沃内斯 - 斯沃尔维尔 | 雪山、峡湾、渔村，走进北极童话世界
timeline.description_en: In the morning you make your own way to Oslo Airport for a direct domestic flight to Evenes; there is no guide on the flight, so please arrive early and check in yourself. On arrival the guide meets you and you tour Harstad (about 30 minutes), set on the Lofoten island of Hinnoya and known as Norway's Nordic culinary capital, with memorable scenery, fresh island seafood and an unspoiled archipelago. You then continue to the traditional fishing village of Svolvaer. Overnight at the Anker Brygge Hotel or an equivalent 5-star hotel, a famous Norwegian rorbu (fishing-cabin) hotel on the harbour in the centre of Svolvaer, with mountain and sea views, antique timber interiors and a restaurant and quay bar that are the most popular in town.
timeline.description_zh: 当天上午自行前往奥斯陆机场乘坐航班直飞埃沃内斯，航班上无导游陪同，请提前抵达机场自行办理登机手续。抵达后导游接机，前往哈尔斯塔游览（约30分钟），它位于罗浮敦群岛的欣岛（Hinnoya），是挪威的北欧美食之都，拥有令人难忘的自然风光、群岛海鲜与众多餐饮体验。随后前往斯沃尔维尔传统渔村。夜宿安克尔布里嘉酒店或同等五星级酒店——这是一家著名的挪威传统渔村水木屋（rorbu）酒店，位于斯沃尔维尔市中心码头，享有壮丽的山景与海景，内部古色古香的原木装潢，酒店餐厅与码头酒吧是镇上最受欢迎的餐厅。

timeline.title_en: Svolvaer - A village - Reine - Svolvaer | The photographer's paradise of the Lofoten islands
timeline.title_zh: 斯沃尔维尔 - 奥镇 - 雷纳 - 斯沃尔维尔 | 罗浮敦群岛摄影师眼中的天堂风景
timeline.description_en: After breakfast you drive to the very end of the European road to A (the town with the world's shortest name, a protected traditional fishing village at the end of the Lofoten road, famous for its 19th-century deep-red wooden fishermen's cabins). You then head to Reine to take in the magnificent views of Reinebringen, before continuing to Hamnoy, Norway's iconic red-house village (and one of the world's most stunning photo spots in 2014), and the yellow fishing houses on the island of Sakrisoy, whose rows of bright yellow cabins reflect in the calm fjord. If weather, energy levels or children make climbing Reinebringen impossible, the day is spent photographing Hamnoy village instead, which still offers the classic combination of sea, fjord, snow mountains and fishing village. Afterwards you return to the traditional fishing village of Svolvaer for the night at the Anker Brygge Hotel or an equivalent 5-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，前往欧洲公路的尽头——世界上名字最短的城市奥镇（Å），它是位于罗浮敦群岛公路尽头的受保护传统渔村，以建于十九世纪、外墙漆成深红色的木质渔人小屋闻名。随后前往雷纳，从陡峭的雷纳山口全览雷讷山（Reinebringen）的壮丽景色；再前往挪威标志性的红房子小镇哈姆诺伊（Hamnoy，2014年全球震撼照片之一），以及位于萨克里索伊岛（Sakrisoy）的黄色渔屋，一排排明黄色的渔屋倒映在峡湾平静的海面上。如当天因天气、体力或儿童原因无法攀登雷纳山，则前往哈姆诺伊村拍摄，在这里同样能拍到海水、峡湾、雪山、渔村等经典主题。之后返回斯沃尔维尔传统渔村，夜宿安克尔布里嘉酒店或同等五星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Svolvaer - Henningsvaer - Narvik | Five islands at the end of Europe along the King Olav V Road
timeline.title_zh: 斯沃尔维尔 - 亨宁斯韦尔 - 纳尔维克 | 由“奥拉夫五世国王之路”贯穿欧洲尽头的五个岛屿
timeline.description_en: After breakfast you drive to the small town of Henningsvaer to see the famous football pitch built on a rocky islet, surrounded by beautiful fjord and deep-blue sea (the pitch, in a fishing village of only 500 people, was built to fulfil the wish of a local 14-year-old). The route follows the scenic 130 km stretch known as the King Olav V Road, which links five of the seven main Lofoten islands by bridges and tunnels, and passes Ofotfjorden (Ofotfjord), the gateway to the Vesteralen islands, on the way to Narvik. Narvik, at 68 degrees north and ringed by mountains and fjords, is a famous ski resort and home to the world's northernmost railway station, where you can sample rich seafood including whale meat, large halibut and purple sea urchin. Note that the operator organises no ski activities and ski sports are not covered by standard travel insurance. Overnight at the Narvikfjellet ski-resort hotel, set on the mountainside with panoramic views; rooms are either the one-bedroom apartment or the panoramic glass house (270-degree glass plus a bedroom skylight, a high-frequency aurora viewing spot).
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，前往亨宁斯韦尔小镇，参观修建在岩石小岛上的足球场，四周被优美的峡湾与湛蓝海水环绕（这个仅有500人的小渔村，足球场是为当地一名14岁孩子的心愿而建）。沿途经过被称为“奥拉夫五世国王之路”的130公里风景路段——罗浮敦由七个主岛组成，其中五个通过桥梁和隧道相连；并途经通往韦斯特罗伦群岛门户的奥福特峡湾（Ofotfjorden）前往纳尔维克。纳尔维克位于北纬68度，群山环绕，是挪威著名滑雪胜地，拥有地球最北的火车站，在这里可品尝鲸鱼肉、大型比目鱼、紫色海胆等丰富海鲜。请注意：我社不组织任何滑雪相关运动，普通旅游保险也不包含滑雪运动。夜宿纳尔维克滑雪场度假村酒店，酒店藏在Narvikfjellet山腰，可270度欣赏雪山与峡湾；房型分为一室公寓与全景玻璃屋（270度落地玻璃加卧室天窗，为北极光高频观测地）。

timeline.title_en: Narvik - Senja | A round-island tour of Senja, Norway's landscape in miniature
timeline.title_zh: 纳尔维克 - 塞尼亚群岛 | 塞尼亚群岛——浓缩挪威独特地貌风景的环岛之旅
timeline.description_en: After breakfast you drive to Senja island and follow the Senja National Tourist Route around the peninsula, which is one of the best-known of Norway's 18 scenic routes. The first stop is the Bergsbotn viewing platform, set high above the surrounding terrain with magnificent views over fjord, mountains and lush greenery, ideal for photography or a picnic (about 30 minutes). You then reach Tungeneset, the best vantage point for the jagged Okshornan peaks (the so-called Devil's Teeth), reached by a Siberian-larch boardwalk across the rocks (about 20 minutes). The last stop is Ersfjord beach, a dreamlike white-sand beach in a sheltered bay with clear water, where you can also visit the famous golden toilet for a quirky photo (about 30 minutes). Overnight at the Senja Brygge Hotel, the "aurora paradise" where one side faces the Arctic Ocean and the other the surrounding fjords and snow mountains.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，前往塞尼亚岛，沿途游览挪威国家公园旅游路线塞尼亚环半岛之旅——它是挪威18条景观路线中著名的一条。第一站抵达贝格斯景观台（Bergsbotn），它坐落在斯卡兰风景区的高处，可俯瞰峡湾、山脉与郁郁葱葱的绿色植物，是摄影或野餐的理想之地（约30分钟）。随后来到欣赏“恶魔之齿”的最佳地点奇迹山峦瞭望台（Tungeneset），它位于斯坦斯峡湾与精灵峡湾之间的岬角顶端，一段西伯利亚落叶松制成的人行桥横跨岩石，可欣赏欧克斯曼群峰（Okshornan）锋利的山峰（约20分钟）。最后来到精灵峡湾海滩（Ersfjord Beach），这是一片位于受庇护海湾中的梦幻白沙滩，海水清澈，别忘了参观独特的“黄金厕所”拍一张奇特照片（约30分钟）。夜宿塞尼亚码头酒店，这座被称为极光天堂的酒店一半面向北冰洋，另一半被峡湾与雪山环绕。

timeline.title_en: Senja - Tromso | The exquisite blue hour, with views of the bridge from the troll fjord town
timeline.title_zh: 塞尼亚群岛 - 特罗姆瑟 | 美轮美奂的蓝调时刻，山妖峡湾镇眺望跨海大桥
timeline.description_en: After breakfast you take a boat trip to a seal and sea-eagle habitat, sailing deep into the Norwegian fjords with repeated stops by the cliffs for close-up wildlife viewing; in summer the highlight is the white-tailed sea eagle (wingspan up to 2.65 m) and in winter the courting seals (about 1 hour). You then drive to Tromso to visit the Arctic Cathedral (the snow-mountain-shaped landmark built in 1965, whose 12 m, 6-tonne stained-glass window depicts Christ with arms outstretched) and the Tromso Bridge (built in 1958, spanning the city and the troll town and a classic postcard view, about 15 minutes), and you can also see the Gateway to the Arctic Ocean, a soaring Gothic-arch sculpture of metal and blue glass mosaic by artist Marit Bockelie. Conditions permitting, you may also ride the Fjellheisen cable car to the Tromso viewpoint below Mt Floya for a 360-degree panorama at the famous "blue hour" (the cable car closes in poor weather and the operator does not recommend climbing on foot). Overnight at the Tromso Saga Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel near the main shopping street.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，乘船游览海豹、海鹰栖息地，乘船深入挪威峡湾，沿途在壮丽海面和悬崖畔多次停靠近距离观察野生动物；夏季亮点是翼展可达2.65米的北极海鹰，冬季则是求偶季的海豹（约1小时）。随后前往特罗姆瑟，游览极地教堂（建于1965年、雪山造型的标志建筑，教堂后部高12米、重6吨的彩色玻璃窗间是张开双臂站立的耶稣）与跨海大桥（特罗姆瑟大桥建于1958年，横跨特罗姆瑟与山妖小镇，是许多明信片的取景地，约15分钟），并可观赏北极之门——由艺术家Marit Bockelie创作、呈高耸哥特式拱门形态、由金属与蓝色玻璃马赛克组成的标志性雕塑。如天气条件允许，还可乘菲耶尔海森缆车直达菲优雅山（Mt Floya）下方的特罗姆瑟景观台，在著名的“蓝调时刻”360度眺望城市与峡湾全景（天气不佳缆车将关闭，我社也不推荐自行攀爬）。夜宿特罗姆瑟松恩酒店或同等四星级酒店，酒店邻近市中心主要购物街。

timeline.title_en: Tromso - Oslo | Arctic Ocean whale-watching
timeline.title_zh: 特罗姆瑟 - 奥斯陆 | 北冰洋观鲸之旅
timeline.description_en: After breakfast you head to Tromso harbour for a whale-watching cruise (about 5-7 hours), sailing the polar fjords to watch the great whale migration; in winter you may spot orca, humpback and fin whales as they hunt the herring shoals that pour into the ice-free Lyngen sound, with the guide explaining the whales as you go. Whale-watching season runs from mid-October to mid-February; sightings cannot be guaranteed, and outside this window (the September departure and the 14 Feb-30 Mar period) there is no whale-watching and the day is replaced by free time in the city. In case of hurricane, sea closures, blizzards or other force majeure the day's sailing may be cancelled, and the operator follows the rules of the local maritime authority on which vessels may sail. Afterwards, depending on flight times, you are transferred to the airport to check in yourself and fly to Oslo, where the wonderful journey ends. There is no hotel on this final day.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，前往特罗姆瑟海港，乘坐出海观鲸船（约5—7小时），观赏极地峡湾及大型鲸鱼迁移；冬季有机会看到虎鲸、座头鲸和长须鲸等“海底霸主”——挪威海的灵恩海峡受暖流影响冬季不会冰封，大量鲱鱼群涌入吸引鲸鱼前来捕猎繁殖，巡航期间向导会为你介绍鲸鱼相关信息。特罗姆瑟观鲸季节为10月中旬至次年2月中旬，无法保证一定能看到鲸鱼；9月班期及2月14日至3月30日期间无观鲸活动，将改为市区自由活动。如遇飓风、海面管制、暴雪等不可抗力，当天行程可能取消，我社将根据当地海事部门的规则执行；由于燃油船向电力船过渡时期，不同船只有不同的安全要求。之后根据航班时间送至机场自行办理登机手续，乘飞机前往奥斯陆，结束美好行程！当天无酒店。

meeting_en: Oslo, Norway — depart on a morning domestic flight from Oslo Airport to Evenes (no guide on the flight); your guide meets the group on arrival.
meeting_zh: 挪威奥斯陆——上午自行乘奥斯陆机场国内航班飞往埃沃内斯（航班无导游陪同），抵达后由导游接机集合。

faqs.question_en: Where are the meeting and dispersal points?
faqs.question_zh: 集合与集散地点在哪里？
faqs.answer_en: Oslo Airport (OSL), at Gate 3. Guests check in themselves and fly to the Arctic Circle, gathering at Tromso Airport or Evenes Airport, and complete the whole trip back at Oslo OSL Airport. There is no guide on the flights.
faqs.answer_zh: 奥斯陆机场（OSL机场）3号门口（Gate 3）。游客自行办理乘机手续前往极圈，在特罗姆瑟机场或埃沃内斯机场集散，到达奥斯陆OSL机场完成全部行程，航班上无导游陪同。

faqs.question_en: How do I get to Oslo Airport?
faqs.question_zh: 如何前往奥斯陆机场？
faqs.answer_en: Oslo Airport (Gardermoen, OSL) is about 45 km from the city centre. From Oslo S central station you can take a VY train (R11/R10/L12, every 30 min, about 25 min with one stop, 84 NOK), the FLYTOGET airport express (every 10 min, about 20 min direct, 210 NOK), or a taxi (about 1 hr 10 min, roughly 860 NOK from the airport to the central station). Departure details may change, so please confirm against the departure notice before booking connecting transport.
faqs.answer_zh: 奥斯陆机场（Gardermoen，OSL机场）距离市中心约45公里。从市中心火车站Oslo S出发，可乘地铁VY Trains R11/R10/L12（每30分钟一趟，约25分钟、中间停一站，84挪威克朗），或机场快线FLYTOGET（每10分钟一趟，约20分钟直达，210挪威克朗），或出租车（约1小时10分钟，机场到中央火车站约860挪威克朗）。出发信息可能调整，敬请参见出团通知书后再预订衔接行程。

faqs.question_en: What is the weather and temperature like?
faqs.question_zh: 天气和温度如何？
faqs.answer_en: The whole itinerary is inside the Arctic Circle. In summer (June-August) it is polar daylight, averaging about 10 degrees C, so a windproof shell is recommended. In winter (December-February) the outdoor average is about minus 10 degrees C (extreme weather can reach about minus 25 degrees C), so a warm down jacket is needed.
faqs.answer_zh: 本产品全部行程都在北极圈内。每年夏季（6-8月）为极昼天气，平均气温约10度，推荐穿冲锋衣；每年冬季（12月到2月）室外平均约零下10度（极端天气可达零下25度左右），需穿保暖羽绒服。

faqs.question_en: What about meals?
faqs.question_zh: 餐饮如何安排？
faqs.answer_en: Breakfast is included; other meals are not. During the Christmas period dining inside the Arctic Circle can be inconvenient, so the operator arranges traditional hot meals at restaurants near the camps and hotels. Guests are also advised to bring some prepared food of their own.
faqs.answer_zh: 行程内包含早餐，不含其他餐饮。圣诞期间北极圈内可能就餐不便，我社联络营地及各酒店附近餐厅提供传统热食，同时敬请旅客自行准备一些熟食。

faqs.question_en: If we don't choose any activities in Lofoten, can we still sightsee?
faqs.question_zh: 如果我们在罗浮敦岛不选择任何活动，是否可以游览？
faqs.answer_en: Yes, we highly recommend exploring freely around the hotel; the town's sights and restaurants are all within walking distance, and from the hotel itself you can enjoy the magnificent jagged mountains and the North Atlantic views.
faqs.answer_zh: 可以，我们非常推荐在酒店旁边自由游览，步行即可到达城市的各个景点和餐厅；同时在酒店内也能欣赏到壮丽的巨齿山峦和北大西洋景观。

faqs.question_en: Does this product include the Botnhamn polar fjord ferry?
faqs.question_zh: 本产品是否包含波特汉姆极地峡湾渡轮？
faqs.answer_en: Yes, the polar fjord ferry is included for all departures. The operator is still waiting for the ferry company's winter 2026 timetable; if the timing works out, the Botnhamn polar fjord ferry will be used at no extra charge.
faqs.answer_zh: 本产品在全部团期包含极地峡湾渡轮。目前还在等待渡轮公司关于2026年冬季的时刻表，如时间可以使用，我们将乘坐波特汉姆极地峡湾渡轮，不会额外收费。

faqs.question_en: What is the difference between the room types at the Narvik ski-resort hotel?
faqs.question_zh: 纳尔维克滑雪度假村酒店的房型有什么差异？
faqs.answer_en: The Narvik hotel offers two room types, both with 270-degree views of the snow mountains and fjords. The one-bedroom apartment is a normal apartment-style room with a private terrace for enjoying the views. The panoramic glass house has 270-degree glass plus a bedroom skylight, so you can watch for the aurora from inside. (Package A stays in the one-bedroom apartment and Package B in the panoramic glass house, which is why their prices differ.)
faqs.answer_zh: 纳尔维克特色酒店分为一室公寓和全景玻璃屋两种房型，均可270度欣赏雪山和峡湾壮丽景色。一室公寓为正常公寓类酒店，私享露台可欣赏美景；全景玻璃屋为270度落地玻璃加卧室天窗，室内可追寻北极光。（A套餐入住一室公寓，B套餐入住全景玻璃屋，因此价格不同。）

faqs.question_en: Do I need a visa?
faqs.question_zh: 是否需要签证？
faqs.answer_en: Yes. This product does not include the visa fee; it requires a Schengen visa (single or multiple entry). If you need a visa, please choose a Schengen-visa product. After booking, the operator provides all the materials needed to apply for the Schengen visa free of charge, and arranges Schengen-compliant travel insurance if it handles your visa. Your passport must be valid for at least six months from the date of departure, otherwise customs may refuse entry. Visa fees, visa service fees, Schengen insurance fees and visa-centre appointment fees are all non-refundable and non-transferable, even if the product is cancelled or changed. Under the "worry-free visa guarantee", guests who sign with the operator at least 61 days before departure and have not obtained a visa within 45 days before departure will have all travel costs refunded immediately; refusals must be notified within 48 hours with the consulate's refusal letter.
faqs.answer_zh: 需要。本产品不包含签证费用，需要申根签证（单次或多次入境）；如需办理签证，请选择申根签证产品。预订后我社免费提供办理申根签证的全部材料，若委托我社办理签证，我社会为您购买符合申根要求的申根旅游保险。护照有效期需在离境之日起至少还有六个月，否则海关有权拒绝入境。签证费、签证服务费、申根保险费、签证中心预约费均不可退款，也无法更改使用者，即使产品退改签也无法退还。“保签无忧”：游客在出发前61天与我社签约，如在出发前45天内未获取签证，我社承担所有损失并立即退还全部旅游费用；如遇拒签需在48小时内通知我社并出具使领馆拒签函。

faqs.question_en: Booking, changes and cancellation
faqs.question_zh: 预订、变更与取消须知
faqs.answer_en: Free cancellation: both the operator and the traveller may cancel without reason more than 30 days before departure (the 30th day not included). Group size: this is a shared (pin-tuan) tour; the group is formed at 10 people, and either party may cancel if 10 is not reached more than 30 days before departure. Because flights, traffic, ferries, strikes and itinerary order change frequently, travellers must arrive at the meeting point one day before the tour starts and leave one day after it ends, allowing reasonable flight-connection time (at least 5 hours for connections at the same airport, 7 hours for different airports in the same city; reasonable meet/disperse window 07:00-21:00). Room types: two people booking together default to a standard twin (bed type assigned by the hotel, not selectable); a single traveller pays a single supplement deposit; three-person family rooms are for two parents plus one minor with bed type set by the hotel. Pricing is all quoted in EUR at the time of booking; if you pay in CNY, the amount is the real-time CNY price auto-calculated from the Bank of China "euro selling price" on the day of payment, and refunds use the same-day rate (exchange differences and bank fees are borne by the traveller). Packages A and B have the same itinerary but different prices and Narvik room types (A: one-bedroom apartment; B: panoramic glass house); bed types are not guaranteed to be twin. Itinerary order may be adjusted for holidays without changing the content, per the departure notice. For groups of 8 or fewer a minibus is used and the driver also acts as guide.
faqs.answer_zh: 免费取消：出发前30天（不含第30天）旅行社和旅行者均可无理由取消。成团：本产品为散客拼团，成团人数为10人，行程开始前30天（不含第30天）未达成团人数，双方均有权解除合同。由于航变、交通、渡轮、罢工及行程顺序常有调整，本产品要求旅游者在旅游团开始前一天到达集合地，团结束后一天离开集散地，并预留合理航班衔接时间（同机场转机至少5小时，同城不同机场至少7小时，合理集合集散时间段07:00-21:00）。房型：两人同时报名默认入住标准双人间（床型由酒店安排、不可选）；单人报名默认含单人房差押金；三人家庭间默认为两位父母与一位未成年儿童入住，床型由酒店安排。所有定价以欧元为预订时计价单位；如选择人民币支付，则以当天支付时本网站依据中国银行实时“欧元卖出价”自动计算的人民币实时价格为准，退款同样适用申请退款当日即时汇率（汇率差异及银行手续费由旅行者承担）。本产品A、B套餐行程一致，价格与纳尔维克房型不同（A为一室公寓，B为全景玻璃屋），床型不保证双床。行程游览顺序或将根据节假日调整但内容一致，具体以出团通知书为准；8人及以下安排商务车，由司机兼任导游。

faqs.question_en: Health and safety requirements
faqs.question_zh: 健康与安全须知
faqs.answer_en: For your safety, please have a health check before departure and do NOT join if you have: infectious diseases (e.g. active tuberculosis, typhoid); cardiovascular disease (e.g. severe hypertension, heart failure, myocardial ischemia, myocardial infarction); cerebrovascular disease (e.g. cerebral embolism, cerebral hemorrhage, brain tumor); respiratory disease (e.g. emphysema, cor pulmonale); psychiatric illness (e.g. epilepsy and other mental illnesses); severe anaemia (hemoglobin below 50 g/L); or are recovering from major surgery. Pregnancy: not allowed at 35 weeks or more under any circumstances; at 28 weeks or more a doctor's exam report (within 7 days) and attending physician's consent are required; under 28 weeks please book with caution, sign the disclaimer and note that adventure, skiing, sea trips, aerial and outdoor activities cannot be joined. Elderly travellers over 70 need a health certificate, medical report and an immediate-family companion (or must sign the disclaimer); the trip is long and physically demanding, so those not physically fit should book with caution. Minors (under 18) must be accompanied by an immediate relative or guardian, infants under 2 are not accepted, and unaccompanied minors need parental authorisation. Per Article 15 of the Tourism Law, travellers must truthfully declare health information relevant to the trip (including pregnancy, lactation, chronic and infectious diseases); concealment leading to harm or loss is the traveller's own responsibility, and the operator may terminate the contract without refund.
faqs.answer_zh: 为确保安全，请在出行前做必要的身体检查，如有以下情况请勿报名：传染性疾病（如活动期肺结核、伤寒）；心血管疾病（如严重高血压、心功能不全、心肌缺氧、心肌梗塞）；脑血管疾病（如脑栓塞、脑出血、脑肿瘤）；呼吸系统疾病（如肺气肿、肺心病）；精神病（如癫痫及各种精神病）；严重贫血（血红蛋白低于50克/升）；大中型手术恢复期患者。孕妇：妊娠35周及以上任何情况下都无法参团；28周及以上需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书；28周以下请慎重报名，需签署免责声明书，且探险、滑雪、出海、高空、户外等项目无法参加。70周岁以上老年人需提供健康证明、体检报告并由直系家属陪同（否则需签免责声明书）；因行程较长、对体力要求高，体力不支者请慎重报名。未成年人（未满18岁）须由直系亲属或监护人陪同，不接受2周岁以下婴儿参团，无父母陪同的未成年人须持父母授权书。根据《旅游法》第15条，旅游者需如实告知与旅游活动相关的个人健康信息（包括妊娠期、哺乳期、慢性病、传染病史等），并遵守安全警示规定，若因隐瞒健康信息导致人身损害或财产损失，由旅游者自行承担责任，旅行社可解除合同且不退还费用。

title_en: Norway Lofoten & Arctic Coast 6-Day Group Tour
title_zh: 挪威罗弗敦群岛与北极海岸6天跟团游
short_en: A 6-day Arctic odyssey through Lofoten's fairy-tale fishing villages, Senja's scenic peninsula and Tromsø, with internal Norwegian flights and city-centre hotels included.
short_zh: 6天北极奇境之旅，深度游览罗弗敦童话渔村、塞尼亚风景半岛与特罗姆瑟，含挪威内陆段往返机票及特色酒店。
desc_en: Fly into the Arctic and journey one-way through Norway's most photographed landscapes, from the fairy-tale fishing villages of the Lofoten Islands to the dramatic peninsula of Senja and the gateway city of Tromsø. Over six days you'll see the red and yellow rorbu cabins of Hamnøy and Reine, the island football pitch of Henningsvær, the viewpoints of Senja's national scenic route, and the chance to chase whales or cod off the Arctic coast. Two nights are spent in a five-star traditional Lofoten waterside cabin hotel, with the route ending at Narvik, the world's northernmost ice-free port.
desc_zh: 飞入北极圈，单程深度穿越挪威最上镜的风景线——从罗弗敦群岛的童话渔村，到雄奇壮丽的塞尼亚半岛，再到北极门户之城特罗姆瑟。六天行程中，您将欣赏哈姆诺伊与雷纳的红黄渔屋、亨宁斯韦尔岩石上的小岛足球场、塞尼亚国家风景之路的观景台，并有机会出海观鲸或海钓北大西洋鳕鱼。其中两晚入住罗弗敦传统五星级水上木屋酒店，行程终点纳尔维克是世界最北的不冻港。

highlights.en: Lofoten Islands deep-dive: the 'heaven on earth' archipelago praised by Lonely Planet
highlights.zh: 罗弗敦群岛深度游览：被《孤独星球》誉为落入人间的天堂

highlights.en: Iconic red and yellow fishing cabins of Hamnøy and Reine, a photographer's paradise
highlights.zh: 哈姆诺伊与雷纳标志性红黄渔屋，摄影爱好者的天堂

highlights.en: Senja scenic peninsula loop with Bergsbotn, Tungeneset and Ersfjord viewpoints
highlights.zh: 塞尼亚风景半岛环线：贝格斯、奇迹山峦与精灵峡湾观景台

highlights.en: Two nights in a traditional five-star Lofoten waterside rorbu cabin hotel
highlights.zh: 两晚入住罗弗敦传统五星级水上木屋特色景观酒店

highlights.en: Henningsvær's famous island football pitch built on the rocks
highlights.zh: 参观亨宁斯韦尔修建在岩石上的著名小岛足球场

highlights.en: Optional Arctic whale-watching cruise and traditional cod fishing trip
highlights.zh: 可选北冰洋观鲸巡航及罗弗敦传统海钓鳕鱼体验

highlights.en: Round-trip Oslo-Evenes internal/domestic flights included; relaxed one-way deep route
highlights.zh: 含奥斯陆-埃沃内斯往返内陆段机票，宽松行程单程深度游

highlights.en: Professional driver, Chinese-speaking guide and city-centre hotels throughout
highlights.zh: 全程职业司机、专业中文导游及市中心特色酒店

includes.en: Flights: round-trip domestic flight tickets on the Oslo - Evenes sector (2 legs)
includes.zh: 机票：奥斯陆-埃沃内斯往返2程内陆段机票

includes.en: Ground transport: tour coach or minibus
includes.zh: 地面交通：旅游巴士或小型巴士

includes.en: Hotels: 2 nights in five-star fishing-village hotels + 3 nights in four-star hotels, 5 nights total (note: as Nordic hotels no longer use official star ratings, star levels follow Booking.com or Ctrip ratings)
includes.zh: 酒店住宿：五星级渔村酒店2晚，四星级酒店3晚，共计5晚酒店（备注：由于北欧酒店取消星级评定，酒店星级以Booking.com或携程酒店星级为标准）

includes.en: Meals: hotel or other-form breakfast throughout, 5 meals in total
includes.zh: 包含餐饮：全程酒店或其他形式早餐，共计5餐

includes.en: Guide service: professional guide, or Chinese-speaking driver doubling as guide (note: for 15 people or fewer, a driver-guide is arranged)
includes.zh: 导游服务：专业导游服务或中文司机兼职导游（备注：15人及以下则安排司机兼职导游）

includes.en: Driver service: professional driver, or Chinese-speaking driver doubling as guide (note: for 15 people or fewer, a driver-guide is arranged)
includes.zh: 司机服务：职业司机服务或中文司机兼职导游（备注：15人及以下则安排司机兼职导游）

includes.en: Baggage: 1 checked bag of 23 kg plus 1 small carry-on bag
includes.zh: 行李说明：1件23公斤行李及1件随身小行李

excludes.en: Passport: personal passport fees
excludes.zh: 护照：个人护照费用

excludes.en: Visa: tourist visa fees required for the destination countries listed in the itinerary
excludes.zh: 签证：行程中所列旅游国家所需的观光签证费用

excludes.en: Insurance: travel insurance (if the itinerary involves high-risk sports, please verify whether your travel insurance covers them)
excludes.zh: 保险：旅游保险费用（如行程内涉及到高风险运动，请核实旅游保险是否包含该项运动）

excludes.en: Tips: guide and driver tips totaling EUR 10 per person per day, same price for adults and children
excludes.zh: 小费：游客支付导游和司机小费一共10欧/人/天，大小同价

excludes.en: Meals: apart from the special meals included in the itinerary, lunches and dinners are not included
excludes.zh: 餐饮：除行程内包含的特色餐外，行程中不包含午、晚正餐费用

excludes.en: Admissions: attractions not marked as fee-included in the itinerary (including but not limited to sights marked '(exterior)', and all 'recommended', 'optional', 'experience' and other items where the fee is not mentioned as included - to be paid by guests who wish to visit)
excludes.zh: 门票：行程中未注明费用包含的景点（包括但不限于行程中注明“外观”的景点，以及“推荐”、“可选”、“体验”等所有未提及费用包含的项目，如游客需要参观，敬请自理）

excludes.en: Extended stays: any extra accommodation, transport and sightseeing beyond the itinerary
excludes.zh: 延长住宿：行程外额外延长的住宿、交通、观光费用

excludes.en: Personal spending: drinks/alcohol, taxis, phone charges and other personal expenses
excludes.zh: 私人消费：如饮料酒类、出租车、电话费等个人消费

excludes.en: Other transport: transport beyond the included coach or minibus and not mentioned in the inclusions, e.g. Venice gondolas, sightseeing trains in vehicle-restricted zones, electric taxis, etc. - to be paid by guests
excludes.zh: 其他交通：除包含商务旅行车或中巴之外、费用包含中未提及的其他交通费用，如威尼斯贡多拉，以及车辆限行区的观光火车、电瓶出租车等费用敬请自理

excludes.en: Free-time activities: guests' own evening sightseeing and the recommended items in the itinerary, plus the resulting transport, meals, admissions, shopping, etc.
excludes.zh: 自由活动：游客夜间自行游览及行程中的推荐项目，以及产生的交通、餐饮、门票、购物等费用

excludes.en: Experience activities: the various travel experience activities in the itinerary that are not included
excludes.zh: 体验活动：行程中没有包含的各项旅游体验活动

excludes.en: Other fees: anything not mentioned in the inclusions. For force majeure (natural disaster, war, strike, etc.) or special circumstances such as transport delays, flight cancellation/rescheduling, consular visa delays, insufficient numbers, or other causes not attributable to us, we reserve the right to charge the difference (e.g. overseas visa-extension fees, accommodation/food/transport, national airfare adjustments, etc.)
excludes.zh: 其他费用：费用包含中未提及的费用。如因天灾、战争、罢工等不可抗力，及因交通延阻、航班取消或更改时间、使馆延误出签证、人数不足等特殊情况或其他非我公司原因所致的额外费用（如在外延期签证费、住、食及交通费、国家航空运价调整等），我公司有权追加差价

timeline.title_en: Oslo - Evenes - Svolvaer | Snowy peaks, fjords and fishing villages: into the Arctic fairy-tale world
timeline.title_zh: 奥斯陆-埃沃内斯-斯沃尔维尔 | 雪山、峡湾、渔村，走进北极童话世界
timeline.description_en: Make your own way to Oslo Airport according to your flight time and take a domestic flight directly to Evenes. On arrival your guide meets you at the airport and you transfer to Svolvaer, the traditional fishing-village heart of the Lofoten Islands. Overnight at the Anker Brygge Hotel (or an equivalent five-star property), a renowned Norwegian rorbu (water-cabin) hotel on the Svolvaer harbour quay, where the timber cabins are classic Lofoten fishing-village buildings: each cabin holds standard rooms with private bathrooms and is shared by two to three travelling groups, with the room interiors as private space and the common areas outside shared by all guests. The hotel enjoys magnificent mountain and sea views, with antique timber decor, vintage kitchenware as decoration, and its restaurant and quayside bar are the most popular in town, serving a hearty breakfast and tasty traditional Lofoten dishes. Please note: there is no guide on the inbound or outbound flights, so arrive early and check in yourself; the order of sightseeing may be adjusted around holidays but the content stays the same; and group-rate experience activities require 10+ people and may be cancelled in extreme polar weather.
timeline.description_zh: 当天根据航班时间自行前往奥斯陆机场，乘坐航班直飞埃沃内斯，抵达后导游接机，前往罗弗敦群岛传统渔村中心斯沃尔维尔。夜宿安克尔布里嘉酒店（或同等五星级酒店），这是位于斯沃尔维尔市中心码头的著名挪威传统渔村水木屋酒店：水木屋为挪威传统渔村建筑，每栋包含拥有独立卫生间的标准间，每栋供两到三组游客使用，房间内为私人空间，房间外公共区域为全体游客共用。酒店享有壮丽的山景和海景，内部古色古香原木装潢、以古董厨具作装饰，餐厅和码头酒吧是镇上最受欢迎的餐厅，提供丰盛早餐及美味的罗弗敦当地传统菜肴。重要提示：往返航班上均无导游陪同，请提前抵达机场自行办理登机手续；行程游览顺序可能根据节假日调整，但游览内容一致；体验活动10人以上为团队价格，遇极端极地天气活动可能取消。

timeline.title_en: Svolvaer - A (Å) - Reine - Svolvaer | The photographer's paradise of the Lofoten Islands
timeline.title_zh: 斯沃尔维尔-奥镇(A镇)-雷纳-斯沃尔维尔 | 罗弗敦群岛摄影师眼中的天堂风景
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, drive to the end of the European highway and the town with the world's shortest name, A (Å) - a protected traditional fishing village at the very end of the Lofoten road, where you are immediately drawn to the dark-red 19th-century Norwegian fishermen's cabins, all timber-built single- and double-storey houses (about 30 min). Then continue to Reine to take in its magnificent scenery from the steep Reine mountain pass (an ideal viewpoint; if weather, stamina or children make the climb impossible you instead shoot from Hamnoy), and on to Hamnoy, home to Norway's iconic red houses - a classic photographic scene captured from the bridge toward Reine at the western edge of the village (about 30 min). You also visit Hamnoy fishing village, one of three pristine villages on Moskenes island and famously among the world's most stunning 2014 photographs (about 30 min), plus the Yellow Fishing Houses on the island of Sakrisoy, known for its rows of vivid yellow cabins reflected in the calm fjord against the snowstorm backdrop (about 15 min). Return to the traditional fishing village of Svolvaer for the night at the Anker Brygge Hotel or an equivalent five-star property.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，前往欧洲公路的尽头、世界上名字最短的小镇——奥镇(Å镇)，这是位于罗弗敦群岛公路尽头的受保护传统渔村，初到时立刻会被镇上建于十九世纪、外墙漆着深红色、全数以木头建造的挪威渔人小屋所吸引（游玩约30分钟）。随后前往雷纳，从陡峭的雷纳山口全览雷纳壮丽景色（这是有利的观赏地点，当天若因天气、体力原因或儿童无法攀雷纳山，则前往哈姆诺伊村拍摄）；再前往挪威标志性红房子小镇——哈姆诺伊，村口西面前往雷纳的桥上即为经典拍摄角度（游玩约30分钟）。哈姆诺伊渔村是莫斯克内斯岛上三个美丽原生态渔村之一，曾位列2014年全球震撼照片之中（游玩约30分钟）。还将欣赏位于Sakrisøy岛的黄色渔屋，岛上一排排鲜艳黄色渔屋倒影在峡灣平静海面上，配合暴雪背景成为罗弗敦美丽的明信片（游玩约15分钟）。随后返回斯沃尔维尔传统渔村，夜宿安克尔布里嘉酒店或同等五星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Svolvaer - Henningsvaer - Harstad | The edge of the world and the most beautiful sea-side football pitch
timeline.title_zh: 斯沃尔维尔-亨宁斯韦尔-哈尔斯塔 | 探秘世界尽头，最美海上足球场
timeline.description_en: After breakfast you can either join local fishermen to fish for North Atlantic cod (optional, group booking price EUR 149 - the crew take you to the best grounds by season, and while a catch can't be guaranteed the voyage itself is the experience) or freely explore central Svolvaer. Then head to the little town of Henningsvaer to see the football pitch built on a rocky islet, surrounded by beautiful fjords and azure water - this village of just 500 people built the pitch to fulfil the wish of a local 14-year-old child (about 15 min for the pitch; about 1 hour for the village, which feels like a celestial terrace floating on the sea). Continue along the E10 highway to Harstad on the island of Hinnoya, one of the most romantic places in Norway, sitting in the middle of the aurora belt, with midnight sun, unspoilt archipelago and a celebrated food scene that has earned it the title of Norway's Nordic culinary capital (about 15 min). Overnight at the Scandic Harstad Hotel (or an equivalent four-star property), a famous Nordic chain hotel in Harstad's old-town commercial street facing the harbour, walking distance from the renowned Umami restaurant, offering a rich Nordic breakfast buffet of fresh-baked bread, cold cuts, Norwegian sea fish, fruit, vegetables and drinks.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，可选择跟随当地渔民海钓北大西洋鳕鱼（自费推荐项目，团队预定价149欧——船员将根据季节和时间带您前往最佳渔场，无法保证一定能捕到鱼，乘船出海本身就是一种体验），或自由游览斯沃尔维尔市区。之后前往亨宁斯韦尔小镇，参观修建在岩礁上的小岛足球场，四周被优美峡灣和湛蓝海水环绕——这座仅有500人的小渔村为满足当地一个14岁孩子的心愿而建（足球场游玩约15分钟；小镇本身宛如海上瑶台般仙境，游玩约1小时）。随后沿E10公路前往位于Hinnøya岛的哈尔斯塔，这是挪威最浪漫的地方之一，位于北极光带中间，可看到午夜阳光，拥有未受破坏的群岛和享誉盛名的美食，被誉为挪威北欧美食之都（游玩约15分钟）。夜宿斯堪迪克哈尔斯塔酒店（或同等四星级酒店）——北欧著名连锁品牌，位于哈尔斯塔老城商业街区、面向海港，步行可达著名的Umami餐厅，提供涵盖新鲜现烤面包、冷切肉类、挪威特色海鱼、各种果蔬与饮品的丰富北欧自助早餐。

timeline.title_en: Harstad - Senja - Sommaroy | Crossing the Arctic Caribbean: an island loop of Norway's most distinctive landscapes
timeline.title_zh: 哈尔斯塔-塞尼亚群岛-索玛罗伊 | 横渡极地加勒比——浓缩挪威独特地貌风景的环岛之旅
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, drive to Senja island and follow the Senja National Tourist Route around the peninsula. Senja is hailed as Norway in miniature for hosting the country's full range of landscapes, prized for its magnificent scenery, long aurora season, abundant marine wildlife and tranquil fishing villages. First stop is the Bergsbotn viewing platform, set high above the surrounding terrain with sweeping views of fjords, mountains and lush greenery (about 15 min). Next is the Tungeneset / Devil's Teeth viewpoint, where a Siberian-larch boardwalk crosses the rocks at the headland between Steinsfjord and Ersfjord to reveal the sharp Okshornan peaks, known as the Devil's Teeth (about 15 min). Then reach the Ersfjord (Elf Fjord) beach, a dreamlike white-sand beach in a sheltered bay with clear water, home to the famous golden toilet for a quirky photo (about 15 min). Finally board the Botnhamn polar fjord ferry, cruising about 35 min through Arctic fjord scenery and the grandeur of the Arctic Ocean to Sommaroy island. Overnight at the Sommaroy Arctic Hotel near Tromso (or an equivalent four-star property), nicknamed the Arctic Caribbean, with midnight sun in summer and the magical aurora in winter. Please note: the polar ferry departure time varies daily; if a holiday prevents the ferry, the day is driven to Sommaroy with no fare refund and the content stays the same - this is not deemed an itinerary change.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，前往塞尼亚岛，沿途游览挪威国家公园旅游路线塞尼亚环半岛之旅。塞尼亚岛因岛上拥有挪威的各种地貌而被誉为挪威的“缩影”，以壮丽自然风光、长时段北极光爆发期、丰富野生海洋动物和宁静渔村而闻名。第一站抵达贝格斯观景台(Bergsbotn)，它位于周围地形的高处，可饱览峡灣、山脉和郁郁葱葱绿色植物的壮丽景色（游玩约15分钟）。接着来到欣赏“恶魔之齿”的最佳地点——奇迹山峦瞭望台(Tungeneset)，一段西伯利亚落叶松人行桥横跨岩石，位于斯坦斯峡灣(Steinsfjord)与精灵峡灣(Ersfjord)之间的岬角顶端，可欣赏被称为“恶魔之齿”的欧克斯曼群峰(Okshornan)锋利山峰（游玩约15分钟）。最后来到精灵峡灣海滩，这是位于受庇护海湾中的梦幻白沙海滩，海水清澈，别忘了参观独特的“黄金厕所”拍一张奇特照片（游玩约15分钟）。随后乘坐波特汉姆极地峡灣渡轮，沿途欣赏北极峡灣的秀美与北冰洋的壮观（约35分钟）前往索玛罗伊岛。夜宿特罗姆瑟索玛罗伊北极酒店（或同等四星级酒店），被誉为“极地加勒比”酒店，夏季可欣赏午夜阳光、冬季可欣赏神奇北极光。重要提示：极地峡灣轮渡每日出发时间不定，以团上时间安排为准；如因节假日无法体验极地轮渡，并无差价可退，当天将开车前往索玛罗伊岛，全程游览内容一致，该调整不视为行程变更。

timeline.title_en: Sommaroy - Tromso - Narvik | The mysterious gateway to the Arctic and a whale-watching voyage on the Arctic Ocean
timeline.title_zh: 索玛罗伊-特罗姆瑟-纳尔维克 | 神秘莫测的极地之门，观鲸轮北冰洋观鲸之旅
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, drive to the Tromso harbour quay. Here you can either explore the pedestrian streets of this gateway-to-the-Arctic city and visit the Arctic library, or join an optional whale-watching boat trip out to sea to watch polar fjords and the migration of large whales, before continuing to Narvik. The optional whale-watching cruise (Recommended Option 1: adult EUR 180; children aged 6-15 on the activity day EUR 90) lasts about 5-7 hours: the warm-current Lyngen sound stays ice-free in winter, drawing herring shoals that attract whales to hunt and breed, so with luck you may see orcas, humpback and fin whales (Tromso whale-watching season: November to mid-February); the guide narrates whale facts on board and you can watch these gentle giants up close, with high recent success rates though sightings are not guaranteed. An alternative is Recommended Option 2: Tromso king-crab fishing (adult EUR 290; children 6-15 EUR 150), an Arctic boat expedition baiting, setting traps and hauling nets followed by a king-crab feast cooked on board - available outside whale season, or chosen instead of whale-watching during it; both optional activities are guided in English only with no Chinese-language guide. Overnight at the Quality Hotel Royal in Narvik (or an equivalent four-star property), a historic early-20th-century hotel that served as a military base in WWII, with the Rallar'n Pub Kro and the top-floor Linken Restaurant Bar overlooking the mountains and the azure Ofotfjord. Please note: whales migrate to warmer Tromso to mate and give birth, and after about mid-February they may no longer be visible, in which case the route changes to fjord sightseeing (no separate notice, not deemed a route change); ferry/boat safety standards vary during the local transition from fuel to electric boats, and the day's program follows the local maritime authority's rules in hurricanes, sea-traffic control or blizzards.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，前往特罗姆瑟海港码头，在这里或游览北极门户之城的市区步行街、参观北极图书馆，或选择自费乘坐观光船出海，观赏极地峡灣及大型鲸鱼迁移，随后前往纳尔维克。自费观鲸巡航（推荐项目一：成人价180欧，活动当天6-15岁儿童价90欧）约5-7小时：挪威海的灵恩海峡受暖流影响冬季不结冰，大量鲱鱼群涌入吸引鲸鱼前来捕猎及繁殖，冬季有机会看到虎鲸、座头鲸和长须鲸等（特罗姆瑟观鲸季节：11月至次年2月中旬）；巡航期间向导会介绍鲸鱼相关信息，可近距离观看，近来成功率较高但无法保证一定看到。另可选推荐项目二：特罗姆瑟帝王蟹（成人价290欧，6-15岁儿童价150欧），北极探险出海前往指定渔场，参与准备鱼饵、设置陷阱、收网的整个帝王蟹捕捞作业，结束后船员在船上烹制美味帝王蟹大餐（非观鲸季可选此活动，观鲸季两项活动二选一）。以上自费活动均由当地英文导游提供全程英文服务，全程无中文向导。夜宿纳尔维克斯皇家品质酒店（或同等四星级酒店），这所历史性酒店建于20世纪初、曾作为二战军事基地，拥有Rallar'n Pub Kro餐厅及坐拥山脉峡灣景致的顶层Linken Restaurant Bar餐厅，可欣赏奥福特峡灣湛蓝海水。重要提示：鲸鱼每年冬季洄游到温暖的特罗姆瑟交配生育，预计每年2月中旬之后可能受动物迁徙影响无法看到鲸鱼，届时将改为峡灣游览（不再另行通知，不视为线路更改）；由于当地燃油船向电力船过渡，不同船只安全要求不同，如遇飓风、海面管制、暴雪等不可抗力，我社将按当地海事部门规则执行当天行程。

timeline.title_en: Narvik - Evenes - Oslo | The world's northernmost ice-free port and a mid-point of Arctic exploration
timeline.title_zh: 纳尔维克-埃沃内斯-奥斯陆 | 世界最北不冻港，北极探险中点站
timeline.description_en: After breakfast you are transferred to the airport according to your flight time, take your own flight to Oslo, and the happy journey comes to an end. On this day the service provides only the transfer from Narvik to Evenes Airport based on your flight information - no sightseeing, guide or other vehicle service is provided, and the itinerary ends on arrival at Evenes Airport. No accommodation tonight.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，根据航班时间送至机场，自行乘坐航班到达奥斯陆，结束愉快旅行！当天行程根据航班信息提供纳尔维克到机场的送机服务，无法提供游览、导游及其它车辆服务，到达埃沃内斯机场后行程结束。今晚无住宿。

meeting_en: Oslo Airport — depart on the included domestic flight to Evenes; your guide meets you on arrival at Evenes.
meeting_zh: 奥斯陆机场——乘坐含内陆段航班飞往埃沃内斯，导游在埃沃内斯接机。

faqs.question_en: Where are the meeting and dispersal points?
faqs.question_zh: 集合与集散地点在哪里？
faqs.answer_en: Meeting point is Oslo Airport (OSL), Gate 3, where guests check in themselves for the flight into the Arctic Circle; the group gathers/disperses at Tromso Airport; the whole trip ends back at Oslo OSL Airport. There is no guide on the flights. Departure information may be adjusted - please check the detailed departure info in the Tour Confirmation Letter before booking connecting flights. All times are planned times; the actual schedule follows on-site confirmed timetables, and delays are frequent, so leave ample time for onward arrangements.
faqs.answer_zh: 集合地点为奥斯陆机场(OSL)3号门口(Gate 3)，游客自行办理乘机手续前往极圈；在特罗姆瑟机场集散；到达奥斯陆OSL机场完成全部行程，航班上无导游陪同。出发信息有可能调整，敬请参见出团通知书详细出发信息后再预定衔接行程。所有时间均为计划时间，行程时间以现场确认时刻表为准，晚点现象频繁发生，请留出足够时间安排后续行程。

faqs.question_en: How do I get to Oslo Airport?
faqs.question_zh: 如何前往奥斯陆机场？
faqs.answer_en: Oslo Airport (Gardermoen, OSL) is about 45 km from the city centre. From Oslo S (the central railway station) to the airport you can take the metro/train (VY Trains R11/R10/L12) every 30 minutes, about 25 min with one intermediate stop, for 84 NOK; or the FLYTOGET airport express every 10 minutes, about 20 min direct, for 210 NOK; or a taxi, about 1 hour 10 min, roughly 860 NOK from the airport to the central station.
faqs.answer_zh: 奥斯陆机场(Gardermoen, OSL)距离市中心约45公里。由市中心火车站Oslo S到机场可乘坐地铁/火车(VY Trains R11/R10/L12)，每30分钟一趟、约25分钟车程（中间停留一站），价格84 NOK；或乘坐机场快线FLYTOGET，每10分钟一趟、约20分钟直达，价格210 NOK；或乘坐出租车，行程约1小时10分钟，机场到中央火车站价格约860 NOK。

faqs.question_en: What about the weather and temperature?
faqs.question_zh: 天气和温度如何？
faqs.answer_en: The entire itinerary is inside the Arctic Circle. In summer (June-August) it is the midnight-sun period with an average temperature around 10 C, and a shell/hardshell jacket is recommended. In winter (December-February) the outdoor average is around -10 C (extreme weather can reach about -25 C), so a warm down jacket is needed.
faqs.answer_zh: 本产品全部行程都在北极圈内。每年夏季（6-8月份）为极昼天气，平均气温约10度，推荐穿着冲锋衣；每年冬季（12月到2月）室外平均约零下10度（极端天气可达零下25度左右），需要穿保暖羽绒服。

faqs.question_en: Are admission and experience-activity fees included?
faqs.question_zh: 门票及体验项目费用是否包含？
faqs.answer_en: Activity fees are not included in the itinerary. These are optional, separately paid travel activities that you join voluntarily.
faqs.answer_zh: 行程内并未包含活动费用，为自愿参加、另行付费的旅游项目。

faqs.question_en: What is the meal arrangement?
faqs.question_zh: 餐饮如何安排？
faqs.answer_en: The itinerary includes breakfast only and no other meals. During Christmas, dining inside the Arctic Circle may be inconvenient, so we arrange traditional hot meals with the camp and restaurants near each hotel, and we also recommend that guests bring some ready-to-eat food.
faqs.answer_zh: 行程内包含早餐，不含其它餐饮。圣诞期间北极圈内可能会有就餐不便的情况，我社联络营地及各个酒店附近餐厅提供传统热食，同时敬请旅客自行准备一些熟食。

faqs.question_en: If we don't choose any activities in Lofoten, can we still sightsee?
faqs.question_zh: 如果我们在罗弗敦岛不选择任何活动，是否可以游览？
faqs.answer_en: We highly recommend exploring freely around the hotel - the town's various sights and restaurants are within walking distance, and from the hotel itself you can also enjoy the magnificent Devil's Teeth peaks and the North Atlantic views.
faqs.answer_zh: 我们非常推荐在酒店旁边自由游览，这里步行可达城市的各个景点和餐厅，同时在酒店内也能欣赏到壮丽的巨齿山峦和北大西洋景观。

faqs.question_en: Is the Botnhamn polar fjord ferry included?
faqs.question_zh: 本产品是否包含波特汉姆极地峡灣渡轮？
faqs.answer_en: Yes - the polar fjord ferry is included for all departures between 1 September and 30 April, taking the Botnhamn polar fjord ferry at no extra charge. If the ferry is suspended on holidays, we drive by coach to the destination instead.
faqs.answer_zh: 本产品在每年9月1号到4月底的全部团期包含极地峡灣渡轮，我们将乘坐波特汉姆极地峡灣渡轮，不会额外收费；如节假日轮渡停运，将改大巴车拉车前往目的地。

faqs.question_en: Do I need a visa?
faqs.question_zh: 是否需要签证？
faqs.answer_en: Yes. This product does not include visa fees; if you need a visa, please choose a Schengen visa product. A Schengen visa (single or multiple entry) is required. Your passport must be valid for at least six months from the date of departure, or customs may refuse entry. After booking we provide free of charge all materials for the Schengen visa application, and if you commission us to handle the visa we will purchase the matching Schengen travel insurance for you. Worry-free visa guarantee: if you sign with us at least 61 days before departure and the visa is still not obtained within 45 days before departure, we bear all losses and immediately refund your full tour cost; guests not meeting this clause who fail to obtain the visa are refunded per the Change & Cancellation Terms. In case of refusal, notify us within 48 hours with the consulate's rejection letter, submit any supplementary/amended materials within five days, and do not unilaterally waive the 'visa appeal' right. Note: visa fees, visa service fees, Schengen insurance fees and visa-centre appointment fees are all non-refundable and cannot be transferred to another user, even if the product is changed or cancelled.
faqs.answer_zh: 需要。本产品不包含签证费用，如需办理签证请选择申根签证产品；本产品需要申根签证（单次或多次入境）。护照有效期需在离境之日起至少还有六个月，否则海关有权拒绝入境。预定后免费提供办理申根签证的全部材料；如委托我社办理签证，我社将为您购买符合申根要求的申根旅游保险。保签无忧：游客在出发日前61天与我社签约，如在出发前45天内未获取签证，我社承担所有损失，立即退还全部旅游费用；不符合该条款且未正常获签者，按《退改与取消条款》退费。如遇拒签需在48小时内通知我社并出具使领馆拒签函，如需补充或更改材料须在五天内提交，且不得单方面放弃“签证抗辩”权利。注意：签证费、签证服务费、申根保险费、签证中心预约费均不可退款，也无法更改使用者，即使产品退改签，签证费用也无法退款。

faqs.question_en: Booking, changes and cancellation
faqs.question_zh: 预订、变更与取消须知
faqs.answer_en: Both the agency and the traveller may apply for a no-reason cancellation more than 30 days before departure (excluding the 30th day); within that window, refunds for reducing numbers, cancelling the whole order, or changing the itinerary/date follow the Change & Cancellation Terms. This is a shared/group tour with a minimum group size of 10 (max disclosed numbers are a daily-average upper limit); below 10 the agency may cancel, and below 15 a minibus is used with the driver also acting as guide. Because flights, traffic, ferry cancellations, strikes and order optimisation often shift the timing and sequence, travellers must arrive at the meeting point at least one day before the tour and leave one day after, leaving sensible flight-connection time (at least 5 hours for transfers at the same airport, 7 hours for different airports in the same city; reasonable meet/disperse window 07:00-21:00). Payment does not equal confirmation - book at least 14 days ahead and await the operator's second confirmation within 48 hours, or it auto-refunds. Rooms: two people booking together default to a standard twin (bed type assigned by hotel, not selectable); a three-person family room is for two parents + one minor child with bed type assigned by the hotel, and if unavailable two rooms are arranged (e.g. in Svolvaer) - if one of three cancels, it is recalculated as a twin; solo travellers pay a single-room supplement deposit (refunded pro-rata if room-sharing succeeds, e.g. 3/5 for 3 of 5 nights shared). All European hotels are non-smoking with no in-room cooking, no disposable toiletries and no free hot water; check-in 14:00, check-out 11:00; air-conditioning is not a standard amenity. The listed hotel is the preferred property; if full it is replaced by a same-star hotel of similar standard without separate notice. Pricing is in EUR at booking; if you pay in CNY, the amount follows that day's Bank of China 'EUR sell' rate, and any exchange/bank fees on refunds are borne by the traveller.
faqs.answer_zh: 出发前30天（不含第30天）旅行社和旅行者均可申请无理由取消；在此期限内，减少人数、取消整张订单、更改行程或更改出行日期的退费，按《更改与取消条例条款》执行。本产品为散客拼团，成团人数为10人（产品披露的最多参团人数为每天平均人数的上限）；不足10人旅行社有权取消，报名15人及以下将安排小型巴士、司机兼任导游。由于航变频繁、交通拥堵、渡轮取消、罢工游行及顺序调整常导致时间与游览先后调整，旅行者须在参团日前一天到达集合地、离团日后一天离开集散地，并预留合理航班衔接时间（同一机场转机至少5小时，同城不同机场至少7小时，合理集散时段07:00至21:00）。所有订单支付不等于确认行程，建议提前至少14天预订，并最多48小时内等待组团社二次确认，超48小时未确认则默认自动退款。房型：两人同时报名默认入住标准双人间（床型由酒店安排、不可指定）；三人家庭间默认为两位父母与一位未成年儿童入住，床型由酒店安排，如三人间不可用则安排2间房（如斯沃尔维尔），三人间如取消一位则按两人间重新计费；单人报名默认含单人房差押金，部分拼房成功按比例退款（如5晚中3晚拼房成功退3/5）。欧洲所有酒店禁烟、禁止房间内做饭、不提供一次性洗漱用品及免费开水，入住14:00、退房11:00，空调非标准设施。行程内列明酒店为优先入住酒店，如订满则换为相同星级、相近条件酒店，不再另行通知。所有定价以欧元为预定计价单位，如选择人民币支付，则以当天本网站依据中国银行实时“欧元卖出价”计算的人民币价格为准，退款如有汇率差异或银行手续费由旅行者承担。

faqs.question_en: Health and safety requirements
faqs.question_zh: 健康与安全须知
faqs.answer_en: To prevent personal-injury accidents, please have a health check before departure. Do NOT join if you have: an infectious disease (e.g. active tuberculosis, typhoid); cardiovascular disease (severe hypertension, cardiac insufficiency, myocardial ischaemia, myocardial infarction); cerebrovascular disease (cerebral embolism, cerebral haemorrhage, brain tumour); respiratory disease (emphysema, cor pulmonale); mental illness (epilepsy and various psychiatric conditions); severe anaemia (haemoglobin below 50 g/L); or are recovering from major/medium surgery. Pregnancy: at 35+ weeks you cannot join under any circumstances; at 28+ weeks you must provide a doctor's exam report (within 7 days) plus your attending physician's consent; under 28 weeks, book with caution, sign the agency's disclaimer, and you cannot join adventure, skiing, sea-going, aerial or outdoor activities. Disabled travellers need a doctor's report (within 7 days) + physician's consent, a direct-family companion, and to apply at least 61 days ahead for a reserved place and facilities. Travellers over 70 need a health certificate, exam report and direct-family companion (or sign a disclaimer), have a fair walking ability for this long trip, and a physician's consent for adventure/ski/sea/aerial/outdoor items. Minors (under 18) must be accompanied by a direct relative or guardian; some sights have special rules for under-18/12/6; infants under 30 kg need a child seat (confirm in advance or bring an EU-compliant one); under-18s without parents need parental authorisation, and the product does not accept infants under 2 years old. Per Article 15 of the Tourism Law, travellers must truthfully declare health information relevant to the trip (including pregnancy, lactation, chronic disease, infectious-disease history, suspected symptoms or recent travel to epidemic areas) and follow safety warnings; concealment causing harm makes the traveller liable for the resulting losses, medical/quarantine costs and compensation.
faqs.answer_zh: 为确保顺利出行、防止旅途中发生人身意外伤害，请出行前做一次身体检查。如存在以下情况请勿报名：传染性疾病（如活动期肺结核、伤寒）；心血管疾病（严重高血压、心功能不全、心肌缺氧、心肌梗塞）；脑血管疾病（脑栓塞、脑出血、脑肿瘤）；呼吸系统疾病（肺气肿、肺心病）；精神病（癫痫及各种精神病）；严重贫血（血红蛋白低于50克/升）；大中型手术恢复期患者。孕妇：妊娠35周及以上任何情况下都无法参团；28周及以上需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书；28周以下请慎重报名，需签署旅行社免责声明书，且无法参加探险、滑雪、出海、高空、户外等项目。残疾人需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书、需直系家属陪同，并提前至少61天申请预留位置及专用设施。70周岁以上老年人需提供健康证明、体检报告并直系家属陪同（否则需签署免责声明书）；本次行程较长、对体力要求较高，体力不支者请慎重报名，涉及探险/滑雪/出海/高空/户外项目需持主治医师同意书，并提前至少61天申请适老化服务及设施。未成年人（未满18周岁）须由直系亲属或监护人陪同；部分项目对未满18/12/6周岁有特殊限定；6岁以下婴儿或30公斤以下儿童请提前确认安全座椅（否则自行携带符合欧盟标准的座椅）；无父母陪同的18岁以下未成年人须持父母授权书；本产品不接受2周岁以下婴儿参团。根据《旅游法》第15条，旅游者需如实告知与旅游活动相关的个人健康信息（包括妊娠期、哺乳期、慢性病、传染病史、疑似症状或近期疫区旅居史）并遵守安全警示规定，若因隐瞒健康信息导致人身损害或财产损失，需自行承担相应责任及医疗、隔离费用与赔偿。

title_en: Iceland 5-Day Small-Group Tour: Blue Lagoon, Golden Circle & Glacier Lagoon
title_zh: 冰岛5天跟团游：蓝湖温泉、黄金圈与冰河湖
short_en: A 5-day Iceland adventure from Reykjavik soaking in the Blue Lagoon, circling the Golden Circle, crossing black-sand beaches and reaching the Jokulsarlon glacier lagoon and Diamond Beach.
short_zh: 5天冰岛深度跟团游，从雷克雅未克出发，畅泡蓝湖温泉、环游黄金圈、穿越黑沙滩，直抵杰古沙龙冰河湖与钻石沙滩。
desc_en: This 5-day round trip from Reykjavik distills Iceland's greatest hits into one relaxed itinerary. You'll spend an extended session soaking in the geothermal Blue Lagoon (or head out whale-watching instead), tour the classic Golden Circle of Thingvellir, Geysir and Gullfoss, then drive the south coast past Seljalandsfoss, Vik's black-sand beaches and the DC-3 plane wreck. The journey climaxes at the Jokulsarlon glacier lagoon and Diamond Beach, with optional glacier hiking or a super-jeep ride into a crystal blue ice cave. Two nights in Reykjavik and two nights at a glacier-lagoon hotel keep the pace comfortable, with northern-lights chances from your window.
desc_zh: 这条以雷克雅未克为起终点的5天环线，把冰岛最经典的精华浓缩进一段轻松的行程。您将用超长时间畅泡地热蓝湖温泉（也可改为出海观鲸），游览辛格维利尔、盖歇尔间歇泉与黄金瀑布组成的经典黄金圈，再沿南海岸经过塞里雅兰瀑布、维克黑沙滩与DC-3飞机残骸。行程高潮是杰古沙龙冰河湖与钻石沙滩，并可选择冰川徒步或乘超级吉普车探访水晶蓝冰洞。雷克雅未克两晚加冰河湖景观酒店两晚，节奏从容，幸运时还能在房间窗前邂逅极光。

highlights.en: Extended soak in the geothermal Blue Lagoon (or whale-watching alternative)
highlights.zh: 超长时间畅泡地热蓝湖温泉（或可选出海观鲸）

highlights.en: Classic Golden Circle: Thingvellir National Park, Geysir geothermal area and Gullfoss waterfall
highlights.zh: 经典黄金圈：辛格维利尔国家公园、盖歇尔间歇泉区与黄金瀑布

highlights.en: South-coast wonders: Seljalandsfoss, Vik black-sand beach, Reynisdrangar basalt columns and the DC-3 plane wreck
highlights.zh: 南海岸奇景：塞里雅兰瀑布、维克黑沙滩、雷尼斯岩柱群与DC-3飞机残骸

highlights.en: Jokulsarlon glacier lagoon and the dazzling Diamond Beach
highlights.zh: 杰古沙龙冰河湖与璀璨的钻石沙滩

highlights.en: Optional crystal blue ice-cave exploration by glacier hike or super-jeep
highlights.zh: 可选冰川徒步或超级吉普车探访水晶蓝冰洞

highlights.en: Comfortable city-centre 4-star hotels and scenic glacier-lagoon lodging with northern-lights chances
highlights.zh: 市中心舒适四星级酒店及冰河湖景观住宿，有机会邂逅极光

highlights.en: Professional Chinese-speaking guide or guide-driver throughout, with private touring vehicle
highlights.zh: 全程专业中文导游或中文司机兼导游，专用旅游车接送

highlights.en: Reykjavik city walk: Hallgrimskirkja cathedral, Harpa concert hall, Tjornin lake and the Sun Voyager sculpture
highlights.zh: 雷克雅未克城市漫步：大教堂、哈帕音乐厅、托宁湖与太阳航海者雕塑

includes.en: Ground transport: dedicated tourist coach or business-class travel vehicle.
includes.zh: 地面交通：专用旅游巴士或者商务旅行车。

includes.en: Hotel accommodation: 4 nights in comfortable 4-star hotels (note: as Iceland has abolished local star ratings, the star level follows Booking.com or Ctrip hotel ratings).
includes.zh: 酒店住宿：舒适型四星级酒店 4 晚（备注：由于冰岛当地取消星级评定，酒店星级以 Booking.com 或者携程酒店星级为标准）。

includes.en: Meals: breakfast throughout, at the hotel or in another form.
includes.zh: 包含餐饮：全程酒店或其他形式早餐。

includes.en: Guide service: professional Chinese-speaking guide, or a Chinese-speaking driver doubling as guide (note: for groups of 15 or fewer, a driver-guide is arranged).
includes.zh: 导游服务：专业中文导游服务或者中文司机兼职导游（备注：15 人及以下则安排司机兼职导游）。

includes.en: Driver service: professional European driver, or a Chinese-speaking driver doubling as guide (note: for groups of 15 or fewer, a driver-guide is arranged).
includes.zh: 司机服务：专业欧洲司机服务或者中文司机兼职导游（备注：15 人及以下则安排司机兼职导游）。

includes.en: Baggage allowance: 1 piece of 23 kg checked luggage plus 1 small carry-on.
includes.zh: 行李说明：1 件 23 公斤行李及 1 件随身小行李。

excludes.en: Passport: personal passport fees.
excludes.zh: 护照：个人护照费用。

excludes.en: Visa: the tourist visa fees required for the countries listed in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 签证：行程中所列旅游国家所需的观光签证费用。

excludes.en: Insurance: travel insurance (if the itinerary involves high-risk sports, please verify that your travel insurance covers them).
excludes.zh: 保险：旅游保险费用（如行程内涉及到高风险运动，请核实旅游保险是否包含该项运动）。

excludes.en: Tips: guests pay tips for the guide and driver totalling 10 EUR per person per day, same rate for adults and children.
excludes.zh: 小费：游客支付导游和司机小费一共 10 欧/人/天，大小同价。

excludes.en: Meals: apart from the special meals included in the itinerary, lunch and dinner are not included.
excludes.zh: 餐饮：除行程内包含的特色餐外，行程中不包含午、晚正餐费用。
