excludes.en: Admissions: any sights not explicitly noted as included (including but not limited to sights marked "exterior" and all "recommended", "optional", "experience" etc. items not stated as included; if you wish to visit them, please arrange at your own expense).
excludes.zh: 门票：行程中未注明费用包含的景点（包括但不仅限于行程中注明"外观"的景点，"推荐"、"可选"、"体验"等等所有未提及费用包含的项目，如游客需要参观，敬请自理）。

excludes.en: Extended stays: accommodation, transport and sightseeing costs for any nights extended beyond the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 延长住宿：行程外额外延长的住宿、交通、观光费用。

excludes.en: Personal spending: drinks/alcohol, taxis, phone charges and other personal expenses.
excludes.zh: 私人消费：如饮料酒类、出租车、电话费等个人消费。

excludes.en: Other transport: sightseeing cars in vehicle-restricted zones, mini-trains, electric shuttle buggies, taxis, scenic-area vehicles and any other transport not explicitly included — at your own expense.
excludes.zh: 其他交通：如车辆限行区的观光车、小火车、电瓶摆渡车、出租车、景区车辆等上述未明确包含的其他交通费用敬请自理。

excludes.en: Free activities: guests' independent night-time sightseeing and the itinerary's recommended/optional projects, plus the resulting transport, dining, admissions and shopping costs.
excludes.zh: 自由活动：游客夜间自行游览及行程中的推荐项目，以及产生的交通、餐饮、门票、购物等费用。

excludes.en: Experience activities: any travel experience activities not included in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 体验活动：行程中没有包含的各项旅游体验活动。

excludes.en: Other costs: anything not mentioned under "included". In cases of force majeure such as natural disaster, war or strike, or special circumstances such as traffic delays, flight cancellation/rescheduling, embassy delays in issuing visas, or insufficient group numbers, or extra costs caused by reasons not attributable to our company (e.g. overseas visa extension, lodging, meals and transport, national air-fare adjustments), our company reserves the right to charge the price difference.
excludes.zh: 其他费用：费用包含中未提及的费用。如因天灾、战争、罢工等不可抗力的原因，及因交通延阻、航班取消或更改时间、使馆延误出签证、人数不足等特殊情况或其他非我公司原因所引致的额外费用（如在外延期签证费、住、食及交通费、国家航空运价调整等），我公司有权追加差价。

timeline.title_en: Reykjavik – Blue Lagoon – Reykjavik | A long, leisurely soak in Iceland's Blue Lagoon
timeline.title_zh: 雷克雅未克 – 蓝湖温泉 – 雷克雅未克 | 超长时间体验冰岛蓝湖温泉
timeline.description_en: Meet your group in the morning in central Reykjavik, then transfer to Keflavik Airport to gather, before heading to the Blue Lagoon (Blue Lagoon) geothermal spa area where you may opt for a Blue Lagoon ticket package; alternatively you can stay near Reykjavik and choose a midday whale-watching cruise out into the North Atlantic. There are four meeting options on departure day: 09:00 in central Reykjavik or 09:45 at Keflavik Airport (both of these allow you to choose Blue Lagoon or whale watching), and 16:00 in central Reykjavik or 16:45 at Keflavik Airport (these later times cannot include the Blue Lagoon). Because the Blue Lagoon is remote and the visit is long, if you do not enter the Blue Lagoon there is no way to arrange sightseeing or rest around the lagoon area. The optional Blue Lagoon Comfort package (lagoon ticket + towel + one drink + one face mask + booking fee) is 128 EUR per adult, children 2–13 sharing a wristband with parents are free but pay a 20 EUR booking/transport fee, and your own swimsuit is required (T-shirts/shorts/underwear are not allowed in the water); the optional whale-watching cruise in the waters around Reykjavik (Faxaflói Bay, home to fin whales, orcas, pilot whales and basking sharks, roughly a 3-hour trip boarding around 12:30 and returning around 16:00) is 120 EUR per person. Overnight at the Reykjavik Grandi Central Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel, set in Iceland's creative cultural district by the old harbour, within walking distance of the whale-watching dock and the city centre, with a Nordic-modern Grandi Spa, geothermal pools and saunas; the lobby offers lockers for luggage storage after check-out.
timeline.description_zh: 上午在雷克雅未克市区集合，随后前往凯夫拉维克机场集合，再前往蓝湖温泉景区（Blue Lagoon），可选择享受蓝湖温泉门票套票；或者也可随车留在雷克雅未克，选择中午出海到北大西洋观鲸。出发当天共有四个集合选项：09:00 雷克雅未克市区、09:45 凯夫拉维克机场（这两个时段可在蓝湖温泉或观鲸中二选一），以及 16:00 雷克雅未克市区、16:45 凯夫拉维克机场（这两个较晚的时段无法选择蓝湖温泉）。由于蓝湖温泉地处偏僻且游览时间较长，如果不入内蓝湖温泉，则无法在蓝湖景区周围安排游览和休息。可选的蓝湖温泉 Comfort 套票（含蓝湖门票 + 浴巾 + 饮品一份 + 面膜一份 + 预订服务费）为 128 欧/成人，2–13 岁儿童与父母同行共用手环免门票、但需 20 欧预订及交通费，须自备泳衣（T恤、短裤或内衣将被拒绝下水）；可选的雷克雅未克北大西洋出海观鲸（在法赫萨峡湾常年出没长须鲸、虎鲸、领航鲸、姥鲨等，约 3 小时，约 12:30 登船、16:00 返回海港）为 120 欧/人。夜宿雷克雅未克格兰迪中央酒店或同等四星级酒店——酒店坐落于冰岛创意文化区、紧邻港口（步行即可抵达赏鲸码头）并毗邻市中心，拥有北欧现代风装饰、豪华的格兰迪 Spa、多个温泉浴池和桑拿房；酒店大堂提供储物柜，退房后可寄存行李。

timeline.title_en: Reykjavik – Golden Circle – Reykjavik | Volcanic and geothermal wonders atop the Þingvellir rift valley
timeline.title_zh: 雷克雅未克 – 黄金圈 – 雷克雅未克 | 在辛格维利尔大裂谷上看火山地热奇观
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, set out for Iceland's Golden Circle (Gullni hringurinn): Þingvellir National Park, the Geysir geothermal area and Gullfoss (the Golden Waterfall), three sights strung along a ring road that together make up Iceland's most famous tourist route. At Þingvellir National Park, the cradle of Icelandic history and one of the birthplaces of Western parliamentary democracy (a UNESCO World Heritage Site since 2004), you walk the rift where the Eurasian and North American tectonic plates have pulled apart into a fault valley over ten metres deep, with views over the Þingvellir plain and the mirror-still Þingvallavatn (Parliament Lake); visit time is about 1 hour 30 minutes. At the Geysir area, geysers erupt with a rising rumble every so often, each eruption lasting 1–2 minutes with water over 100°C shooting up to more than 30 metres; visit time about 1 hour. At Gullfoss, the torrent plunges over a drop of more than 50 metres with a thunderous roar, golden droplets and rainbows shimmering in the spray; visit time about 1 hour. Return to Reykjavik for the night at the Reykjavik Grandi Central Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，前往冰岛黄金圈（Gullni hringurinn）：辛格维利尔国家公园（Þingvellir National Park）、盖歇尔间歇泉区（Geysir）、黄金瀑布（Gullfoss），这些景点散布在一条环形公路上，因此被称为旅游黄金圈，是冰岛游的精华所在。在辛格维利尔国家公园——冰岛历史最负盛名的摇篮、西方议会民主的发源地之一，2004 年被联合国教科文组织列入世界遗产名录——您可以走在欧亚与美洲两大板块运动形成的十余米落差断裂谷地之中，远眺辽阔的辛格维利尔平原与波平如镜的辛格瓦尔德拉湖（国会湖），游玩时间约 1 小时 30 分钟。在盖歇尔间歇泉区，间歇泉隆隆作响、不时喷发，每次持续 1–2 分钟，水温高达 100 多度，水柱可高达 30 多米，游玩时间约 1 小时。黄金瀑布气势宏大，湍急水流落差达 50 多米、发出震耳欲聋的轰鸣，蒸腾水雾中闪着金光的水滴若隐若现、彩虹时而浮现，游玩时间约 1 小时。结束后返回雷克雅未克，夜宿雷克雅未克格兰迪中央酒店或同等四星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Reykjavik – Vík – Glacier Lagoon | Across the basalt-canyon black sand beach, exploring the secret realm of Seljalandsfoss
timeline.title_zh: 雷克雅未克 – 维克 – 冰河湖 | 穿越玄武岩峡谷黑沙滩，探访塞里雅兰秘境
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, head to Seljalandsfoss and Skógafoss (the "Rainbow Waterfall"), then continue toward Vík. Here you may reach the DC-3 plane wreckage on the sand by hiking, or choose the dedicated electric shuttle buggy, or an ATV all-terrain ride across the black sand beach — the broken metal fuselage on the black gravel makes for a hauntingly powerful photo (an American navy C-47 made an emergency landing on the black sand at Sólheimasandur on 24 Nov 1973; all crew survived and the wreck remains; visit time about 1.5 hours). The two add-ons are mutually exclusive — pick only one: Option 1, the polar electric shuttle buggy, is 36 EUR (it's about 4 km one way from the car park, ~2 hours round trip on foot or ~20 minutes by buggy; if extreme weather or peak-season/holiday supply issues mean no buggy is available, the visit may be cancelled or you may walk, so prepare windproof clothing and grippy warm footwear). Option 2, the ATV ride across the black sand beach, is 198 EUR and requires a driving licence (a Chinese car or motorcycle licence is accepted; about 2 hours of riding with a professional guide after a safety briefing). You then visit the black sand beach (Reynisfjara, formed of volcanic lava grit beside the picturesque village of Vík, with organ-pipe basalt cliffs; visit time about 30 minutes), Seljalandsfoss (a roughly 60-metre vertical waterfall in south Iceland, 25 m wide, beside the Ring Road, with a famous "secret" hidden falls nearby; about 30 minutes), Skógafoss (another striking ~60 m, 25 m-wide waterfall framed by green-clad cliffs; about 30 minutes) and the Reynisdrangar sea stacks (basalt columns rising from the Atlantic below Mt. Reynisfjall near Vík, with the Hálsanefshellir basalt cave, filming location for Game of Thrones; about 30 minutes). Continue to the Glacier Lagoon and overnight at the Glacier Lagoon Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel, a typical Nordic stone-and-timber building blending into the surrounding mountains and lakes, with signature cod and lobster at its restaurant and floor-to-ceiling windows where, if lucky, you may see the aurora.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，前往塞里雅兰瀑布、彩虹瀑布（斯科加瀑布），随后前往维克。在此可选择徒步抵达飞机残骸所在的沙滩，或选择搭乘专用电瓶摆渡车、或选择 ATV 全地形越野车穿越黑沙滩，残破的粗糙金属机身在黝黑砂石映衬下更显凄美震撼（1973 年 11 月 24 日一架美国海军 C-47 飞机迫降于冰岛南部 Sólheimasandur 黑沙滩，机组人员全部生还，残骸至今留存；游玩时间约 1 小时 30 分钟）。以下两个推荐项目仅可二选一、不能同时参加：项目一，极地专用电瓶摆渡车 36 欧（从停车点到飞机残骸单程约 4 公里，徒步往返约 2 小时、电瓶车往返约 20 分钟；若遇极端天气或节假日旺季供货商无法提供电瓶车，则该游览取消，可自愿选择徒步，需提前准备防风防滑保暖鞋及防风防雨衣物）；项目二，ATV 越野车穿越黑沙滩 198 欧，需持有驾驶证（中国汽车或摩托驾照同样可用，安全讲解后由专业向导带队约 2 小时骑行）。随后游览黑沙滩（由火山熔岩砂砾构成，毗邻风景如画的维克小镇，与风琴岩峭壁相伴，游玩约 30 分钟）、塞里雅兰瀑布（Seljalandsfoss，冰岛西南部一座垂直高度约 60 米、宽约 25 米的瀑布，南临一号环岛公路，连通的秘密瀑布是摄影师的宠儿，约 30 分钟）、彩虹瀑布（Skógafoss，冰岛南部另一座壮丽瀑布，宽 25 米、落差约 60 米，两旁山崖长满绿色植物，约 30 分钟）以及雷尼斯岩柱群（Reynisdrangar，矗立于大西洋中、位于维克附近雷尼斯山下的玄武岩海叠层，崖下有 Halsanefshellir 玄武岩柱洞穴，《权力的游戏》曾在此取景，约 30 分钟）。结束后前往冰河湖，夜宿冰河泻湖酒店或同等四星级酒店——典型北欧砖石木结构建筑，与周围山川湖泊融为一体，自带餐厅招牌菜为鳕鱼和龙虾，幸运的话可在巨大落地窗前观测到极光。

timeline.title_en: Glacier Lagoon – Diamond Beach – Glacier Lagoon | Super-jeep to the crystal-blue ice cave and giant ice palace
timeline.title_zh: 冰河湖 – 钻石沙滩 – 冰河湖 | 乘坐超级冰川吉普车，直达水晶蓝冰洞巨型冰宫殿
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, you may choose to go to the foot of Vatnajökull National Park for a guided glacier hike to explore the blue ice cave, or take a glacier super-jeep to reach the ice cave. The two add-ons are mutually exclusive — pick only one: Option 1, glacier hike + blue ice cave + round-trip transport + booking fee, is 178 EUR per adult; Option 2, super-jeep + blue ice cave + round-trip transport + booking fee, is 198 EUR per adult. The crystal-blue ice cave is a rare natural phenomenon available only from October to April each year, and its location, shape, size and shade of blue differ every season; if extreme weather or the guide's safety judgement makes entry unsafe the ice-cave portion (or the whole activity) is cancelled. Dress for outdoor glacier conditions: waterproof jacket and trousers, sturdy waterproof/non-slip hiking boots are essential (crampons go over them), with warm layers underneath, gloves and a thin hat under the helmet; glacier gear (helmet, crampons) is provided, but damage to crampons/snowmobile/boat and similar accidents are at the customer's own cost and not covered by overseas travel insurance. Note that snow activities carry inherent risk and are usually not covered by ordinary travel insurance, the minimum age for the glacier hike or ice cave is 6, and glacier tours usually run in groups of 12 or 14 (smaller groups are merged with the operator's other teams). In the afternoon, visit the jewel in Vatnajökull's crown — Jökulsárlón Glacier Lagoon (where thousand-year icebergs in white, blue, green, grey and brown drift, with time to photograph up close and possibly spot basking seals; about 1 hour) — and Diamond Beach. You also take in Vatnajökull National Park, where much of Game of Thrones' Wall and beyond was filmed; Vatnajökull, Europe's largest ice cap outside the poles, covers about 8% of Iceland with an average ice thickness of 400 m (up to 1,000 m), with Hvannadalshnúkur volcano to its south (about 1 hour). Overnight at the Glacier Lagoon Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，可选择前往瓦特纳冰川国家公园脚下，由专业向导带领体验冰川徒步、探索蓝冰洞；或选择乘坐冰川吉普车到达蓝冰洞。以下两个推荐项目仅可二选一、不能同时参加：项目一，冰川徒步 + 探索蓝冰洞 + 往返交通 + 预订服务费，178 欧/成人；项目二，超级吉普车 + 探索蓝冰洞 + 往返交通 + 预订服务费，198 欧/成人。水晶蓝冰洞是大自然的天然馈赠，每年仅 10 月到次年 4 月可以体验，冰洞形成的位置、形状、大小与颜色都不尽相同；如遇极端天气或专业向导出于安全考虑认为不适宜进入，则取消蓝冰洞入内（或取消活动）。请穿着适合户外冰川活动的衣物：防水外衣裤、舒适防水防滑的登山鞋是必备（冰爪套在登山鞋外），里面穿保暖易穿脱的衣服，并备手套及薄帽子（戴在头盔下面）；活动提供头盔、冰爪等专业冰川器材，但如发生冰爪、摩托、游船损坏等事故，费用由顾客自理、境外旅游保险不含此类情况。注意：所有雪地项目具有一定危险性且普通旅游保险通常不含，参加冰川徒步或蓝冰洞的最低年龄为 6 周岁，冰川游览通常 12 人或 14 人一组，不足者将与活动商的其他团队同组。下午前往瓦特纳冰川皇冠上的明珠——杰古沙龙冰河湖（湖里漂浮着形态各异的千年浮冰，呈白、蓝、绿及因火山灰形成的灰、棕色，有充分时间近距离观赏拍摄，运气好可看到成群晒太阳的海狮，约 1 小时）以及钻石沙滩。沿途还游览瓦特纳冰川国家公园，《权力的游戏》中绝境长城及长城以北的大部分场景均在此拍摄；瓦特纳冰原是世界上极地以外最大的冰盖，覆盖冰岛约 8% 的面积，平均厚度 400 米（较厚处达千米），其南方为华纳达尔斯赫努克火山（Hvannadalshnúkur），约 1 小时。夜宿冰河泻湖酒店或同等四星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Glacier Lagoon – Reykjavik – Keflavik Airport | Strolling the gourmet capital of new maritime art
timeline.title_zh: 冰河湖 – 雷克雅未克 – 凯夫拉维克机场 | 自由行走在新航海艺术的美食之都
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, drive back to Reykjavik, then enjoy free time to visit Hallgrímskirkja / Reykjavik Cathedral (on event days the interior may be closed to visitors; this landmark organ-pipe-shaped church, one of the city's tallest buildings, has an elevator to a top-floor viewpoint over the capital; about 20 minutes), Harpa Concert Hall and Conference Centre (Iceland's large modern concert and conference venue, its kaleidoscopic glass façade inspired by the aurora and basalt, with a main hall seating 1,800; about 30 minutes), a stroll along Tjörnin lake (the city-centre pond home to swans, terns, greylag geese and ducks year-round; about 20 minutes) and the Sun Voyager sculpture (Sólfar, the ark-like steel work on Sæbraut designed by Jón Gunnar Árnason and unveiled in 1990, an ode to the sun, hope and freedom; about 20 minutes), wandering the Grandi old-harbour district. You may then disperse in central Reykjavik or follow the coach to Keflavik Airport to end the trip. Dispersal times that day: 15:30 in central Reykjavik, 17:00 (cathedral/Harpa section notes 16:45) at Keflavik Airport. There is no accommodation on this final day.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，乘车返回雷克雅未克，随后自由参观雷克雅未克大教堂（哈尔格林姆教堂；当日如遇教堂内举办活动，可能无法入内参观；这座管风琴造型的地标教堂是冰岛较高建筑之一，可乘电梯登顶俯瞰首都全貌，约 20 分钟）、哈帕音乐厅和会议中心（冰岛又新又大的综合音乐厅与会议中心，玻璃外型灵感源自极光与火山石，较大音乐厅可容纳 1800 人，约 30 分钟）、托宁湖边漫步（Tjörnin，位于市中心，天鹅、燕鸥、灰雁、鸭子等水禽常年栖息于此，约 20 分钟）以及太阳航海者雕塑（Sólfar，位于海边 Sæbraut 路上、形似方舟的现代艺术作品，由 Jón Gunnar Árnason 设计、1990 年揭幕，是一曲对太阳、希望与自由的颂歌，约 20 分钟），遊走在雷克雅未克格兰迪旧港地区。之后可选择在雷克雅未克市区下团，或跟随大巴车前往凯夫拉维克机场，结束美好行程。当日集散时间安排：雷克雅未克市区 15:30 散团，凯夫拉维克机场 17:00（约 16:45）散团。当天无住宿。

meeting_en: Central Reykjavik (09:00) or Keflavik Airport (09:45); afternoon meeting options at 16:00 (city) / 16:45 (airport) also available. Exact times per the dispatch notice.
meeting_zh: 雷克雅未克市区（09:00）或凯夫拉维克机场（09:45）集合；亦提供下午16:00（市区）/16:45（机场）集合选项，具体时间以《出团通知书》为准。

faqs.question_en: What are the meeting and dispersal times and places?
faqs.question_zh: 集合/散团的时间和地点是怎样的？
faqs.answer_en: On departure day there are four meeting options: central Reykjavik 09:00 (must choose Blue Lagoon or whale watching), Keflavik Airport 09:45 (must choose Blue Lagoon or whale watching), central Reykjavik 16:00 (no activity can be chosen) and Keflavik Airport 16:45 (no activity can be chosen). On the final day, dispersal is at central Reykjavik 15:30 and Keflavik Airport 16:45. This is not a private transfer, so latecomers cannot be waited for — if your flight is delayed you must make your own way to the Blue Lagoon (or that day's hotel) to join the group. Reykjavik international airport is about a 45-minute drive to/from the city centre and about 15 minutes to the Blue Lagoon; the airport bus is roughly 24–30 EUR per person (one about every 30 minutes) and taxis (60–80 EUR per car) queue outside the terminal. All Blue Lagoon time slots can be swapped for whale watching; if you skip the Blue Lagoon it is recommended you sightsee in central Reykjavik or go whale watching. Final departure details may be adjusted — please refer to your Departure Notice.
faqs.answer_zh: 出发当天共有四个集合选项：雷克雅未克市区 09:00（需在蓝湖温泉或观鲸中二选一）、凯夫拉维克机场 09:45（需在蓝湖温泉或观鲸中二选一）、雷克雅未克市区 16:00（不可选择任何活动）、凯夫拉维克机场 16:45（不可选择任何活动）。结束当天：雷克雅未克市区 15:30 散团，凯夫拉维克机场 16:45 散团。本产品并非专车接送，游客迟到无法等待，如航班晚点，当天需自行乘车前往蓝湖温泉（或当天入住的酒店）与团队集合。雷克雅未克国际机场往返市中心约 45 分钟车程，到蓝湖温泉约 15 分钟车程；机场大巴约每人 24–30 欧元（约 30 分钟一趟），出租车每车 60–80 欧元、在航站楼外排队等候。所有蓝湖温泉时间都可对换出海观鲸时间；如不去蓝湖温泉，建议留在雷克雅未克市区游览或选择出海观鲸。出发信息有可能调整，敬请以《出团通知书》为准。

faqs.question_en: Any guidance for the Blue Lagoon?
faqs.question_zh: 蓝湖温泉有什么指引？
faqs.answer_en: A swimsuit is required — T-shirts and shorts are not allowed in the water. After collecting your items at the entrance, change in the changing room, lock away clothes and anything you can't bring into the spa, take a quick shower to clean off, then enter the lagoon. Free Blue Lagoon volcanic mud is provided at the lagoon edge for your face and body. There is no time limit on soaking as long as you leave within opening hours; the Blue Lagoon has rest areas and restaurants, and guests typically stay 4–6 hours.
faqs.answer_zh: 泡温泉要求穿泳衣，T恤短裤将被拒绝下水。在温泉入口领取用品后，先到更衣室换好泳衣，将衣服及其他不能带去温泉的物品锁好在柜子里，随后经过浴室作简单淋浴清洁身体，再到温泉区泡。温泉边上提供免费的蓝湖火山泥，可自行取用敷脸和身体。泡温泉并不限时，只要在开放时间内离开即可；蓝湖温泉内有休息区域和餐厅，通常在这里停留 4–6 小时。

faqs.question_en: What is the weather and daylight like?
faqs.question_zh: 温度和日照情况如何？
faqs.answer_en: Although Iceland lies in northern Europe, its winters are not bitterly cold — usually between -5°C and 0°C — but the wind is strong; summers are not hot, usually around 10°C. Reference daylight hours: November decreasing from about 8 to 5 hours, December from 5 to 4 hours, January increasing from 4 to 7 hours, February from 7 to 10 hours, March from 10 to 13 hours.
faqs.answer_zh: 冰岛虽然位于北欧地区，但冬季并不冷，通常温度在零下 5 度到 0 度之间，但冰岛的风强烈；冰岛的夏天并不炎热，通常温度在 10 度左右。参考日照时间：11 月份 8–5 小时递减，12 月份 5–4 小时递减，1 月份 4–7 小时递增，2 月份 7–10 小时递增，3 月份 10–13 小时递增。

faqs.question_en: What should I wear for the glacier hike or super-jeep blue-ice-cave trip?
faqs.question_zh: 冰川徒步或超级吉普车探索蓝冰洞要穿什么？
faqs.answer_en: Wear clothing suitable for outdoor activity on a glacier. A waterproof jacket and trousers and comfortable hiking boots are essential, with warm, easy-to-layer clothes underneath. Bring a backpack with some snacks and water. Professional glacier gear such as helmet and crampons is provided (crampons go over your hiking boots, so boots are mandatory). If you feel the cold, wear gloves and a thin hat (under the helmet). Follow the professional guide's instructions at all times — glaciers are vast with changeable terrain, so never explore on your own.
faqs.answer_zh: 请一定穿着适合户外活动、进入冰川地区的衣服。防水外衣裤、舒适的登山鞋是必须，里面请穿保暖易穿脱的衣服。建议随身携带一个双肩包，装上少许零食和水。活动会提供专业冰川器材，如头盔、冰爪鞋（套在登山鞋外，因此登山鞋为必须）。如果怕冷，请戴手套、薄帽子（戴在头盔下面）。届时请听从专业向导的指导，冰川是庞然大物、地貌多变，请一定不要自行探索。

faqs.question_en: What about meals?
faqs.question_zh: 餐饮是如何安排的？
faqs.answer_en: Breakfast is included in the itinerary. For other meals, our guide will recommend restaurants and you can choose where to dine on your own.
faqs.answer_zh: 行程内包含早餐，其余餐饮我社导游会推荐餐厅，大家可以自行选择就餐。

faqs.question_en: What are the rules and costs for children?
faqs.question_zh: 儿童费用和参团规则是怎样的？
faqs.answer_en: Children under 16 and under 1.6 m sharing a room with their parents may use the three-person price. The group does not accept infants under 2 years old. Children under 6 may be unable to take part in the glacier hike and blue-ice-cave exploration; if a child does not join the ice activities, at least one parent must stay at the hotel to accompany the child.
faqs.answer_zh: 16 岁以下及 1 米 6 以下随父母同住，可以享受三人行价格。该团不接受 2 岁以下的婴幼儿报名。6 岁以下儿童可能无法参与冰川徒步与蓝冰洞入内探险活动；如果儿童不参与冰上活动，需要父母至少留一位在酒店陪伴儿童。

faqs.question_en: Are airport transfers included?
faqs.question_zh: 是否含接送机费用？
faqs.answer_en: No. This product is a group that assembles and disperses at the airport at fixed times and does not include airport transfer service. As it is not a private transfer, if your flight is delayed you must make your own way to the sight to join the group (and if your arrival time that day is unsuitable, go to the hotel and check in yourself). Reykjavik international airport is about 45 minutes to/from the city centre and about 15 minutes to the Blue Lagoon; the airport bus is about 25–30 EUR per person (roughly one every 30 minutes) and taxis queue outside the terminal.
faqs.answer_zh: 本产品为指定时间内旅游团机场集散，并不包含接送机服务。由于并非专车接送机，如航班晚点，当天需自行前往景点与团队集合（如当天抵达时航班时间不合适，请自行前往酒店入住）。雷克雅未克国际机场往返市中心约 45 分钟车程，到蓝湖温泉约 15 分钟车程；大巴车约每人 25–30 欧元（约 30 分钟一趟），出租车在航站楼外排队等候。

faqs.question_en: If we book the same activities ourselves, will they match the ones in the product?
faqs.question_zh: 如果我们自行预订相同的活动项目，是否和产品内的一致？
faqs.answer_en: We cannot confirm whether the whale-watching/sea trips or blue-ice-cave activities you book yourself will incur extra transport costs or fail to connect with the itinerary.
faqs.answer_zh: 我社无法确认客户自行预订的观鲸或出海项目、或蓝冰洞项目是否会产生额外交通费用或无法衔接行程。

faqs.question_en: How are the driver and guide arranged?
faqs.question_zh: 司机及导游是如何安排的？
faqs.answer_en: The vehicle and staffing depend on group size: for 15 or fewer it is a minibus or business van with a Chinese-speaking driver doubling as guide; for more than 15 it is a tourist coach with a professional driver and a dedicated guide.
faqs.answer_zh: 本产品根据报名人数安排旅游巴士或小型巴士：15 人以下为小型巴士或商务车，由中文司机兼导游；15 人以上为旅游巴士，配职业司机及专职导游。

faqs.question_en: Do I need a visa?
faqs.question_zh: 是否需要签证？
faqs.answer_en: Yes. This product does not include visa fees — it requires a Schengen visa (single or multiple entry); if you need a visa, please choose a Schengen-visa product. After booking we provide free of charge all the materials needed to apply for the Schengen visa. Your passport must be valid for at least 6 months from your departure date or customs may refuse entry. "Worry-free visa guarantee": for guests who sign a tour contract with us 61 or more days before departure, if the visa is not obtained within 45 days before departure we bear all losses and immediately refund the full tour fee; guests not meeting this clause who fail to obtain the visa are refunded per the change-and-cancellation terms. If refused, notify us within 48 hours with the consulate's refusal letter, and submit any supplementary/amended materials within five days. If you commission us to handle the Schengen visa we buy compliant Schengen travel insurance for you; otherwise you arrange your own insurance and claims. Visa fees, visa service fees, Schengen insurance fees and visa-centre appointment fees are all non-refundable and non-transferable, even if the product is changed or cancelled.
faqs.answer_zh: 需要。本产品不包含签证费用，需要申根签证（单次或多次入境）；如需办理签证请选择申根签证产品。预订后免费提供办理申根签证的全部材料。护照有效期需在离境之日起至少还有六个月，否则海关有权拒绝入境。"保签无忧"：游客在出发日前 61 天与我社签约的旅游产品，如在出发前 45 天内未获取签证，我社承担所有损失、立即退还全部旅游费用；不符合该条款的游客如未正常获取签证，将按"退改与取消条款"退费。如遇拒签需在 48 小时内通知我社并出具使领馆拒签函，如需补充或更改材料需在五天内提交。委托我社办理申根签证的，我社为您购买符合要求的申根旅游保险；若未委托，则需自行购买保险并负责理赔。签证费、签证服务费、申根保险费、签证中心预约费均不可退款，也无法更改使用者，即使产品退改签，签证费用亦无法退款。

faqs.question_en: Booking, changes & cancellation
faqs.question_zh: 预订、变更与取消须知
faqs.answer_en: Both the agency and the traveller may cancel without reason more than 30 days before departure (the 30th day excluded). Booked room/bed types cannot be guaranteed — all room and bed types are assigned randomly by the hotel on the day. This is a shared/join-in group: minimum group size is 10; if 10 is not reached more than 30 days before departure, either party may terminate, and self-pay activities that don't reach 10 people may be cancelled and changed to free time. If you reduce numbers after booking, the per-person price is recalculated on the adjusted room type (multi-person pricing no longer applies); voluntarily skipping included items, leaving the group midway, or unused hotels/items are non-refundable as costs are already incurred. Because Iceland's winter weather is changeable and storms can strand travellers, we strongly advise arriving one day before the tour and leaving one day after, allowing reasonable flight-connection buffers (at least 5 hours for transfers at the same airport, 7 hours between different airports in the same city; reasonable assembly/dispersal window is 07:00–21:00); losses from not doing so are the traveller's own. If a local orange warning or above gale-force wind is issued, all outdoor activities are cancelled per the tourism bureau and travellers are sheltered nearby with no price difference refundable. Itinerary order may shift between departures (content stays the same); the Departure Notice prevails over the itinerary sheet, and the guide's on-site notice prevails over the Departure Notice. All pricing is quoted in EUR; if paying in CNY, the amount is calculated from the Bank of China "euro sell" rate at the moment of payment (the same applies to refunds, with any exchange differences or bank fees borne by the traveller).
faqs.answer_zh: 出发前 30 天（不含第 30 天）旅行社和旅行者均有权申请无理由取消。订单内备注的床型/房型无法保证，所有房型/床类均由酒店当天随机分配。本产品为散客拼团，成团人数为 10 人；行程开始前 30 天（不含第 30 天）未达成团人数，双方均可解除合同，团内自费活动未达 10 人也可能取消并改为"自由活动"。报名后如减少人数，需按调整后的房型和单价重新核算（不再适用多人间价格）；自愿放弃费用包含的项目、中途离团，或未入住的酒店/未参加的项目，因费用已产生均无法退款。由于冰岛冬季气象多变、易被暴风雪围困，强烈建议团前一天到达、团后一天离开，并预留合理航班衔接时间（同一机场转机至少 5 小时、同城不同机场至少 7 小时，合理集散时段为 07:00–21:00），未遵守由此造成的损失由旅行者自行承担。如当地发布橙色警告或狂风以上级别，按旅游局要求取消一切户外活动并就近避险，无差价可退。不同团期游览先后顺序可能调整（内容一致）；行程单与《出团通知书》冲突以出团通知书为准，出团通知书与导游现场通知冲突以导游现场通知为准。所有定价以欧元为计价单位，如选择人民币支付，则以当天支付时依据中国银行实时"欧元卖出价"自动计算的人民币价格为准（退款同样适用申请当日即时汇率，汇率差异或银行手续费由旅行者承担）。

faqs.question_en: Health & safety requirements
faqs.question_zh: 健康与安全须知
faqs.answer_en: Please have a health check before travelling. Do not book if you have: a contagious disease (e.g. active TB, typhoid); cardiovascular disease (e.g. severe hypertension, heart failure, myocardial ischaemia/infarction); cerebrovascular disease (e.g. cerebral embolism, haemorrhage, tumour); respiratory disease (e.g. emphysema, cor pulmonale); psychiatric illness (e.g. epilepsy); severe anaemia (haemoglobin below 50 g/L); or are recovering from major/medium surgery. Pregnancy: at 35 weeks or beyond you cannot join under any circumstances; at 28 weeks or beyond you must provide a doctor's report within 7 days plus the attending physician's consent; under 28 weeks please book with caution, sign a liability waiver, and you cannot take part in adventure/skiing/sea/aerial/outdoor activities. People with disabilities: provide a doctor's report within 7 days plus physician's consent, be accompanied by an immediate family member, and apply at least 61 days ahead for a reserved spot and facilities. Travellers over 70: provide a health certificate and physical exam, be accompanied by an immediate family member (or sign a waiver), and note the long itinerary demands a degree of walking ability and stamina. Minors (under 18) must be accompanied by an immediate relative or guardian; some sights have special limits for under-18s/under-12s/under-6s; for infants under 6 or children under 30 kg confirm a safety child seat in advance; an unaccompanied minor needs a parental authorisation letter; the product does not accept infants under 2. Per Article 15 of the Tourism Law (and the 2025 Infectious Disease Prevention Law), travellers must truthfully declare health information relevant to the trip (pregnancy, lactation, chronic illness, infectious-disease history, suspected symptoms, recent travel to epidemic areas) and comply with safety warnings; concealment causing harm or transmission risk makes the traveller liable for the resulting medical, isolation, compensation and other losses, and the agency may terminate the contract without refund.
faqs.answer_zh: 请在出行前做一次必要的身体检查，如存在以下情况请勿报名：传染性疾病患者（如活动期肺结核、伤寒）；心血管疾病患者（如严重高血压、心功能不全、心肌缺氧、心肌梗塞）；脑血管疾病患者（如脑栓塞、脑出血、脑肿瘤）；呼吸系统疾病患者（如肺气肿、肺心病）；精神病患者（如癫痫及各种精神病）；严重贫血患者（血红蛋白水平在 50 克/升以下）；大中型手术恢复期病患者。孕妇：处于妊娠第 35 周及以上的，任何情况下都无法参团；第 28 周及以上需提供 7 日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书；第 28 周以下请慎重报名，需签署旅行社免责声明书，且行程内探险、滑雪、出海、高空、户外等项目均无法参加。残疾人：需提供 7 日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书，需直系家属陪同，并提前至少 61 天申请预留位置及专用配套设施。70 周岁以上老年人：需提供健康证明、体检报告并由直系家属陪同（否则需签署免责声明书），因行程较长需有一定步行能力和体力，体力不支者请慎重报名。未成年人（未满 18 周岁）须由直系亲属或监护人陪同，部分项目对未满 18/12/6 周岁有特殊限定；6 岁以下婴儿或 30 公斤以下儿童请提前确认安全儿童座椅；无父母陪同的未成年人须持父母授权书；本产品不接受 2 周岁以下婴儿参团。根据《旅游法》第 15 条及《传染病防治法（2025 修订）》，旅游者须如实告知与旅游活动相关的个人健康信息（包括妊娠期、哺乳期、慢性病、传染病史、疑似症状或近期疫区旅居史）并遵守安全警示规定，因隐瞒导致人身损害或传播风险的，需自行承担医疗、隔离费用及赔偿责任，旅行社可解除合同且不退还费用。

title_en: Winter Iceland 6-Day Boutique Small-Group Tour
title_zh: 冬季冰岛6天精品小团游
short_en: A relaxed 6-day winter circuit from Reykjavik: Blue Lagoon, Golden Circle, black sand beaches, glacier lagoon, blue ice cave and whale watching.
short_zh: 雷克雅未克出发的6天悠闲冬季环线：蓝湖温泉、黄金圈、黑沙滩、冰河湖、蓝冰洞与出海观鲸。
desc_en: This boutique small-group tour explores the wonders of winter Iceland at an unhurried pace, beginning and ending in Reykjavik. Soak in the famous Blue Lagoon, follow the classic Golden Circle past Thingvellir, Geysir and Gullfoss, then chase the wild south coast with its DC-3 plane wreck, Reynisfjara black sand beach, glacier lagoon and a super-jeep expedition into a blue ice cave. The journey closes with the otherworldly Snaefellsnes Peninsula and a whale-watching cruise from the capital. With scenic landmark hotels, a deliberately spacious itinerary and all-inclusive pricing, it is built for savouring Iceland rather than rushing it.
desc_zh: 这趟精品小团以悠闲的节奏深度探索冬季冰岛之美，往返均在雷克雅未克。畅泡著名的蓝湖温泉，沿经典黄金圈饱览辛格维利尔国家公园、间歇泉与黄金瀑布，再深入狂野的南部海岸：DC-3飞机残骸、雷尼斯黑沙滩、傑古沙龙冰河湖，并乘超级吉普车探秘蓝冰洞。行程尾声前往宛如外星球的斯奈山半岛，并在首都乘船出海观鲸。配合特色景观酒店、刻意宽松的行程与一价全含的报价，旨在让你细细品味冰岛，而非赶路。

highlights.en: Full-day soak at the iconic Blue Lagoon with a Premium VIP ticket and lava-view hotel stay
highlights.zh: 畅享标志性蓝湖温泉一整天，含Premium VIP门票及熔岩景观酒店住宿

highlights.en: Classic Golden Circle: Thingvellir National Park, Geysir geothermal area and Gullfoss waterfall
highlights.zh: 经典黄金圈：辛格维利尔国家公园、蓋歇尔间歇泉地热区与黄金瀑布

highlights.en: Wild south coast: DC-3 plane wreck, Reynisfjara black sand beach and basalt columns
highlights.zh: 狂野南岸：DC-3飞机残骸、雷尼斯黑沙滩与玄武岩柱

highlights.en: Super-jeep expedition and hike into a natural blue ice cave inside Vatnajokull glacier
highlights.zh: 乘超级吉普车并徒步深入瓦特纳冰川的天然蓝冰洞

highlights.en: Jokulsarlon glacier lagoon and the sparkling Diamond Beach
highlights.zh: 傑古沙龙冰河湖与璀璨的钻石沙滩

highlights.en: Snaefellsnes Peninsula photo spots: Kirkjufell (Church Mountain) and Arnarstapi fishing village
highlights.zh: 斯奈山半岛摄影胜地：草帽山（教会山）与阿尔纳斯塔皮小渔村

highlights.en: Whale-watching cruise from Reykjavik old harbour with English-speaking guide
highlights.zh: 从雷克雅未克旧港乘船出海观鲸，配英文向导

highlights.en: All-inclusive pricing, scenic landmark hotels and a deliberately relaxed, no-rush itinerary
highlights.zh: 一价全含、特色景观酒店、刻意宽松不赶路的行程

includes.en: Transport: a business touring van.
includes.zh: 交通：商务旅行车。

includes.en: Hotels: 3 nights in comfortable 4-star hotels plus 2 nights in special scenic hotels. (As Iceland has abolished official star ratings, star levels follow Booking.com; the Seljalandsfoss/Horizon hotel and the Jökulsárlón hotel do not participate in Booking.com star rating.)
includes.zh: 酒店：舒适型四星级酒店 3 晚、特色景观酒店 2 晚。（由于冰岛当地取消星级评定，酒店星级以 Booking.com 酒店星级为标准，其中塞里雅兰酒店和杰古沙龙酒店不参与 Booking.com 星级评选。）

includes.en: Meals: buffet breakfast at the hotels or breakfast in another form, 5 meals in total.
includes.zh: 餐饮：酒店内自助早餐或其他形式早餐共计 5 餐。

includes.en: Driver-guide: a Chinese-speaking driver-cum-guide throughout (driver also serves as guide).
includes.zh: 司导：全程中文司机兼导游服务。

includes.en: Baggage: one 23 kg checked bag plus one carry-on small bag.
includes.zh: 行李：1 件 23 公斤行李及 1 件随身小包。

includes.en: Activities: Blue Lagoon (Premium VIP), the plane-wreck shuttle buggy, the jeep blue-ice-cave adventure (winter route), and the whale-watching cruise.
includes.zh: 活动：蓝湖温泉（Premium VIP）、飞机残骸摆渡车、吉普车蓝洞探险（冬季路线）、出海观鲸。

excludes.en: Passport: personal passport costs.
excludes.zh: 护照：个人护照费用。

excludes.en: Visa: the tourist visa fees required for the countries listed in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 签证：行程中所列旅游国家所需的观光签证费用。

excludes.en: Insurance: travel insurance costs. (If the itinerary involves high-risk sports, please verify whether your travel insurance covers them.)
excludes.zh: 保险：旅游保险费用。（如行程内涉及高风险运动，请核实旅游保险是否包含该项运动。）

excludes.en: Tips: guests pay the guide and driver a tip totalling EUR 10 per person per day, the same rate for adults and children.
excludes.zh: 小费：游客支付导游和司机小费一共 10 欧/人/天，大小同价。

excludes.en: Meals: apart from the special meals included in the itinerary, lunch and dinner (main meals) are not included.
excludes.zh: 餐饮：除行程内包含的特色餐外，行程中不包含午、晚正餐费用。

excludes.en: Admission: sights not marked as fee-included in the itinerary (including but not limited to any sight marked "exterior", "recommended", "optional", "experience", etc.); if you wish to visit them, please cover the cost yourself.
excludes.zh: 门票：行程中未注明费用包含的景点（包括但不仅限于行程中注明“外观”的景点，“推荐”“可选”“体验”等所有未提及费用包含的项目，如游客需要参观，敬请自理）。

excludes.en: Extended stays: any additional accommodation, transport or sightseeing beyond the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 延长住宿：行程外额外延长的住宿、交通、观光费用。

excludes.en: Personal spending: drinks and alcohol, taxis, phone bills and other personal expenses.
excludes.zh: 私人消费：如饮料酒类、出租车、电话费等个人消费。

excludes.en: Other transport: sightseeing shuttles in vehicle-restricted areas, small trains, electric buggies, taxis, in-park vehicles and any other transport not explicitly included above — please cover these yourself.
excludes.zh: 其他交通：如车辆限行区的观光车、小火车、电瓶摆渡车、出租车、景区车辆等上述未明确包含的其他交通费用敬请自理。

excludes.en: Free-time activities: recommended evening activities guests undertake on their own, and any transport, meals, admission, shopping etc. arising from them.
excludes.zh: 自由活动：游客夜间自行游览行程中的推荐项目，以及产生的交通、餐饮、门票、购物等费用。

excludes.en: Experience activities: any travel experience activities not included in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 体验活动：行程中没有包含的各项旅游体验活动。

excludes.en: Other costs: anything not mentioned under "included". For force-majeure causes such as natural disasters, war or strikes — or special situations such as transport delays, flight cancellation/rescheduling, embassy visa delays or insufficient group numbers, or any extra costs arising from causes not attributable to our company (e.g. overseas visa-extension fees, accommodation/meals/transport, national airline fare adjustments) — our company reserves the right to charge the price difference.
excludes.zh: 其他费用：费用包含中未提及的费用。如因天灾、战争、罢工等不可抗力的原因，因交通延阻、航班取消或更改时间、使馆延误出签证、人数不足等特殊情况或其他非我公司原因所引致的额外费用（如在外延期签证费、住、食及交通费、国家航空运价调整等），我公司有权追加差价。

timeline.title_en: Reykjavik – Blue Lagoon | Check in at the Blue Lagoon Retreat hotel and enjoy a private lava-field sunset over the lagoon
timeline.title_zh: 雷克雅未克－蓝湖 | 入住冰岛蓝湖温泉酒店，私享蓝湖落日熔岩景观
timeline.description_en: Today you head to the Blue Lagoon thermal-spa hotel, skipping the rush of sightseeing to savour a slow, relaxed full day at the lagoon. After arriving, check in on your own with your booking confirmation, then freely enjoy the Blue Lagoon Premium VIP spa. The room rate includes one Premium ticket per person (lagoon entry, a silica mud mask, and one free towel and bathrobe rental); the spa ticket is non-refundable if unused, and the minimum age is 2 years. Bathing temperatures average around 40°C in mineral-rich water; even in winter the steaming lagoon sits amid snow and moss-covered lava, so you can soak while watching green tundra nearby and distant snowy peaks (roughly 3 hours of soaking time). Overnight at the Blue Lagoon Retreat hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel; note there is no vehicle or guide on the Blue Lagoon day.
timeline.description_zh: 今天前往冰岛蓝湖温泉酒店，拒绝赶景点，品味慢生活，在蓝湖温泉享受一整天的舒适放松。抵达后凭订单自行办理入住，随后自由享用蓝湖 Premium VIP 温泉。酒店房费包含每人蓝湖温泉门票（Premium 票），套餐含蓝湖温泉入场券、蓝湖硅泥面膜、毛巾浴袍免费租用一次；温泉门票如不使用不可退费，年龄要求为 2 周岁及以上。蓝湖洗浴礁湖水温平均约 40℃，水体富含矿物质；即使在飘雪的冬季，四周一片冰天雪地而湖里热气腾腾，长满苔藓的火山熔岩如铺上一层软软的地毯，可一边泡温泉一边欣赏近处绿色苔原与远处雪山（游玩时间约 3 小时）。住宿于蓝湖温泉酒店或同等级 4 星级酒店；蓝湖温泉当日无用车、无导游陪同。

timeline.title_en: Blue Lagoon – Golden Circle – Seljalandsfoss (Hótel Hvolsvöllur/Horizon area) | Geysir, Gullfoss and Þingvellir: the Golden Circle hidden-gem journey
timeline.title_zh: 蓝湖－黄金圈－塞里雅兰瀑布地平线酒店 | 间歇泉、黄金瀑布、辛格维利尔，冰岛黄金圈秘境之旅
timeline.description_en: After meeting at the Blue Lagoon hotel, you set off for Iceland's Golden Circle (Gullni hringurinn), the must-do touring route that links three famous sights along a loop road. You visit Þingvellir National Park, the site of Iceland's parliament (Alþingi) founded in 930 AD and a UNESCO World Heritage Site, where you can see the rift between the Eurasian and North American tectonic plates widening a few centimetres each year. Next is the Geysir geothermal area in the Haukadalur valley, where the great Geysir is mostly dormant but its neighbour Strokkur erupts every few minutes, sending scalding water columns 10–20 m (occasionally up to 40 m) into the air. You then see Gullfoss (the Golden Waterfall), where the glacial Hvítá river plunges in two cascades (11 m and 22 m) into a 32 m-deep canyon, and finally Seljalandsfoss, the roughly 60 m waterfall on Route 1 whose walkable path behind the water curtain earns it the nickname the Bride's Veil. Overnight at Hótel Hvolsvöllur (Horizon hotel) by Seljalandsfoss, the ION Adventure Hotel, the UMI hotel or equivalent; note the ION sits in a valley prone to winter snowstorms, so it is not used on December–March departures.
timeline.description_zh: 当天在蓝湖酒店集合后前往冰岛黄金圈（Gullni hringurinn）——冰岛旅游的必游之路，由散布在环形公路上的三大著名景点组成。先游览辛格维利尔国家公园（Þingvellir），冰岛议会（Alþingi）于公元 930 年在此成立，2004 年被列入联合国教科文组织世界文化遗产名录，在这里可看到穿过冰岛陆地的欧亚板块与北美板块间的裂缝，板块持续背离使裂缝每年以数厘米的速度张裂扩大。随后前往位于 Haukadalur 山谷的盖歇尔间歇泉地热区（Geysir），大盖歇尔间歇泉现已久未喷发，但其邻居史托克间歇泉（Strokkur）十分活跃，每隔几分钟喷发一次，水柱通常高 10–20 米、有时滚烫蒸汽水柱高达 40 米。接着游览黄金瀑布（Gullfoss），白河（Hvítá）冰川水流分两级（11 米与 22 米）倾泻而下，落入 32 米深的幽深峡谷，气势宏大、水雾蒸腾常现彩虹。最后游览塞里雅兰瀑布（Seljalandsfoss），高约 60 米，就在一号公路边，水幕后面有一条可步行的通道，因此又被称为“新娘面纱”。夜宿冰岛地平线酒店（位于塞里雅兰瀑布）、ION 冒险酒店、UMI 酒店或同等级酒店；由于 ION 酒店地处山谷、冬季易被暴风雪围困，每年 12 月至次年 3 月团期均无法使用。

timeline.title_en: Seljalandsfoss (Horizon hotel) – DC-3 plane wreck – Black Sand Beach – Reynisdrangar sea stacks – Jökulsárlón | Wilderness plane wreck and giant basalt-column black beach
timeline.title_zh: 塞里雅兰瀑布地平线酒店－飞机残骸－黑沙滩－雷尼斯岩柱群－冰河湖 | 旷野荒原飞机残骸、巨型玄武岩柱黑沙滩
timeline.description_en: After breakfast you leave the hotel for the DC-3 plane wreck (a US Navy C-47 that crash-landed on the black sands of Sólheimasandur on 24 November 1973; the crew survived but the wreckage remains, also a filming location for Justin Bieber's "I'll Show You" MV). It is about 4 km one way from the parking point; we book the shuttle buggy (about 20 minutes round trip) in place of the roughly 3-hour walk. You then visit Reynisfjara Black Sand Beach next to the picturesque village of Vík, where Atlantic surf contrasts with jet-black volcanic sand and puffins nest in summer (May–August), and the Reynisdrangar basalt sea stacks rising offshore beneath Mount Reynisfjall, with the organ-pipe basalt cliffs and the Hálsanefshellir cave — scenery featured in Game of Thrones. Important safety note: the black beach is a high-risk area where sudden sneaker waves have caused drownings, so do not linger below the cliffs at high tide, do not climb the slippery basalt, do not turn your back to the sea, and obey all warning lights and barriers. Overnight at the Jökulsárlón / Fosshótel Glacier Lagoon hotel or an equivalent hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后从酒店出发前往 DC-3 飞机残骸——1973 年 11 月 24 日一架美国海军飞机（C-47）迫降于冰岛南部 Sólheimasandur 黑沙滩，机组人员全部生还，残骸却一直留在这里，贾斯汀·比伯也曾在此拍摄《I'll Show You》音乐 MV。从停车点前往残骸单程约 4 公里，徒步往返约 3 小时，我们预订电瓶车代替徒步（往返约 20 分钟）。随后游览毗邻风景如画的维克小镇的雷尼斯黑沙滩（Reynisfjara），大西洋白浪与黝黑火山砂形成梦幻色彩对比，夏季（5–8 月）有成千上万的海鹦在此栖居；以及矗立于海中的雷尼斯岩柱群（Reynisdrangar），位于雷尼斯山（Reynisfjall）下，岸边整齐排列的玄武岩柱如教堂管风琴般庄严，崖下有玄武岩柱洞穴（Hálsanefshellir），多部影视剧（包括《权力的游戏》）曾在此取景。安全风险提示：黑沙滩为高风险区域，平静海面随时会掀起突发性巨浪并多次发生溺水事故，潮位高时禁止在悬崖下逗留，行动不便者及老人请勿靠近，禁止攀爬湿滑的玄武岩柱、禁止背对大海拍照、禁止越过围栏或无视红/黄警示灯。夜宿杰古沙龙冰河湖酒店或其他同等级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Jökulsárlón – Blue Ice Cave – Reykjavik | Diamond Beach and the glacier lagoon, exploring the blue ice cave by Vatnajökull super-jeep
timeline.title_zh: 冰河湖－蓝冰洞－雷克雅未克 | 钻石沙滩冰河湖，瓦特纳吉普车探索蓝冰洞
timeline.description_en: After breakfast you head to the jewel in the glacier's crown — Vatnajökull National Park — then board a glacier super-jeep and, after reaching the area, hike to and explore the blue ice cave. Each year the location, shape, size and colour of the ice cave differ, and the experience blends off-road jeep travel with hiking to bring you closer to the glacier's blue beauty (about 3 hours; minimum age 6, and children unable to take part must be accompanied by a parent). Vatnajökull is the largest ice cap outside the polar regions, covering about 8% of Iceland with an average ice thickness of 400 m (up to 1 km), and served as a Game of Thrones filming location for the Wall and beyond. You then visit the Jökulsárlón glacier lagoon and Diamond Beach, where the boundless icy-blue scenery and crystal ice walls form a hidden dreamland. Overnight at the Reykjavik Grandi hotel (Grandi creative district, walkable to the whale-watching harbour and downtown) or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后从酒店出发前往冰川皇冠上的明珠——瓦特纳冰川国家公园，之后乘坐冰川吉普车，到达藍冰洞附近后徒步抵达蓝冰洞，探秘蓝冰洞。每年蓝冰洞形成的位置、形状、大小与颜色都不尽相同，产品内的蓝冰洞探险融合了越野吉普车与徒步，更贴近地探索冰川的蓝色魅力（游玩时间约 3 小时；参加需年满 6 周岁，如当天参加不了需家长陪同）。瓦特纳冰原（Vatnajökull）是世界上极地以外最大的冰盖，覆盖冰岛约 8% 的面积，冰层平均厚度 400 米、厚处达千米，《权力的游戏》中绝境长城及长城以北的大部分场景在此拍摄。随后深度游览冰河湖景区——傑古沙龙冰湖（Jökulsárlón）与钻石沙滩，无垠的冰蓝色彩与水晶般的冰壁搭成一座座隐秘的梦幻仙境。夜宿雷克雅未克格兰迪酒店（位于格兰迪创意文化区，步行可达观鲸码头与市中心）或同等 4 星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Reykjavik – Snæfellsnes Peninsula – Reykjavik | An alien planet by the sea and the charm of a small fishing village
timeline.title_zh: 雷克雅未克－斯奈山半岛－雷克雅未克 | 海边的异域星球，感受小渔村的魅力
timeline.description_en: After breakfast you drive to Kirkjufell (the "Straw-Hat Mountain"), a famous photography spot on the Snæfellsnes Peninsula about 460 m high — the classic photo angle is reached by a five-minute walk from the parking area across the road, crossing a bridge to use the Kirkjufell waterfall as foreground. You then visit the small fishing village of Arnarstapi, with its old elegant seaside houses and dramatic coastal sea-eroded rock formations, including sights such as the "Octopus Grandpa" rock, the "Bird's Kiss" arch and the sea-stack cliffs. Afterwards you return to Reykjavik. Note: because Iceland's weather is changeable, if the local authorities issue an orange-or-above warning or a blizzard/storm, the day's itinerary — especially the Snæfellsnes portion — will be affected and automatically changed to a Perlan or FlyOver Iceland day trip, with the travel agency providing the activity ticket free of charge but with no refund or other compensation. Overnight at the Reykjavik Grandi hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往草帽山（Kirkjufell），它是斯奈山半岛公认的摄影胜地，海拔约 460 米——前往经典摄影机位需从教会山马路对面的停车区域沿路径走约五分钟、过桥到瀑布另一边，以教会山瀑布为前景。随后游览阿尔纳斯塔皮小镇（Arnarstapi），这是斯奈山半岛南海岸线上一座有天然港口的小渔村，海滨古老优雅的房屋与沿岸奇诡海蚀岩石是小镇的人文与自然特色，可参观章鱼爷爷、鸟之吻、海蚀柱悬崖等景点。结束后返回雷克雅未克。提示：由于冰岛气象多变，如当地气象部门发布橙色以上警告或其他灾难警告、暴雪暴风，当天行程（尤其是斯奈山行程）将受影响，自动更改为珍珠楼或飞跃冰岛的一日游活动，旅行社免费提供当天活动门票，但无法退费或给予其他赔偿。夜宿雷克雅未克格兰迪酒店或同等 4 星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Reykjavik – whale-watching cruise | Free time in the artistic, foodie capital
timeline.title_zh: 雷克雅未克－出海观鲸 | 自由行走在艺术与美食之都
timeline.description_en: After breakfast you have free time to explore the capital's landmarks: Hallgrímskirkja (Reykjavik Cathedral), a famous church begun in 1940 and largely completed in the late 1960s, with an elevator to the top for panoramic city views; Lake Tjörnin in the city centre, home to swans, terns and ducks; the Sun Voyager (Sólfar) sculpture on Sæbraut by the shore, unveiled in 1990; the Old Harbour in the 101 district with its galleries and the colourful "Harbor Path"; the Grandi arts district (museums, bars and restaurants); and Harpa Concert Hall, the glass-clad music and conference centre. At midday you make your own way to the pier, where an English-speaking guide leads a whale-watching cruise of roughly 2.5–3.5 hours on Faxaflói bay (minke and humpback whales, white-beaked dolphins and harbour porpoises are common, with chances of fin, killer and pilot whales). Note: there is no transport or guide service within the city / harbour area today, and after the whale-watching ends in Reykjavik the group disperses; the hotel can hold luggage until about 11:00. No accommodation tonight.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后自由游览首都地标性建筑：雷克雅未克大教堂（哈尔格林姆斯教堂），设计新颖、为冰岛最高建筑之一，1940 年奠基、20 世纪 60 年代末基本完工，可乘电梯上顶楼俯瞰首都全貌；坐落于市中心的托宁湖（Tjörnin），天鹅、燕鸥、灰雁、鸭子等水禽栖息于此；海边 Sæbraut 路上的太阳航海者雕塑（Sólfar），由 Jón Gunnar Árnason 设计、1990 年揭幕；雷克雅未克旧港（101 区），林立着船只与建筑艺术品、并刷有黄蓝相间的“Harbor Path”路径；格兰迪艺术新区（博物馆、酒吧与餐厅集中区）；以及哈帕音乐厅和会议中心（玻璃外型如巨大万花筒）。中午自行前往码头，在英文向导带领下体验乘船出海观鲸，活动时长约 2.5–3.5 小时——Faxaflói 湾常见小须鲸、座头鲸、白吻斑纹海豚与大西洋鼠海豚，还有机会看到长须鲸、虎鲸、领航鲸等。提示：雷克雅未克市区（海港区）当天无用车、无导游陪同，市区为自由活动；最后一天在雷克雅未克观鲸结束后解散，酒店可保留行李至当天中午 11 点左右。当天无住宿。

meeting_en: Reykjavik, Iceland — tour begins at the Blue Lagoon spa hotel (near Keflavik International Airport) and ends in Reykjavik after the whale-watching cruise.
meeting_zh: 冰岛雷克雅未克——行程从蓝湖温泉酒店（邻近凯夫拉维克国际机场）开始，观鲸结束后在雷克雅未克散团。

faqs.question_en: Where and when do we meet and disperse?
faqs.question_zh: 集合时间和集合地点是什么？
faqs.answer_en: On the departure day, you check in at the Blue Lagoon hotel on your own in the early afternoon of Day 1 (free time that day, with no vehicle and no Chinese-speaking guide). On the final day, the group disperses after the whale-watching ends in Reykjavik; you make your own way to the meeting point for whale-watching and to explore central Reykjavik. The hotel can hold your room until 11:00 that day. There is no vehicle and no Chinese-speaking guide service on the final day.
faqs.answer_zh: 出发当天：第一天午后自行在蓝湖温泉酒店办理入住（当天自由活动，无车、无中文导游）。结束当天：最后一天在雷克雅未克观鲸结束后解散，当日自行前往集合地点观鲸及游览雷克雅未克市区，酒店可保留到当天中午 11 点。当天无用车以及中文导游服务。

faqs.question_en: Any guidance for the Blue Lagoon spa?
faqs.question_zh: 蓝湖温泉有哪些注意事项？
faqs.answer_en: A swimsuit is required to enter the hot spring; please bring your own, as T-shirts and shorts will not be allowed in the water. After collecting your items at the entrance, change into your swimsuit in the changing room, lock away clothes and anything you cannot bring to the lagoon, take a quick shower to clean off, then enter the spring. Free Blue Lagoon volcanic mud is provided at the lagoon edge for your face and body. There is no time limit on soaking — you just need to leave within opening hours. The Blue Lagoon has rest areas and restaurants, and guests usually stay 4–6 hours.
faqs.answer_zh: 泡温泉要求穿泳衣，请自备泳衣，T 恤短裤将被拒绝下水。在温泉入口领取用品后，先到更衣室换好泳衣，将衣服及其他不能带去温泉的物品锁好在柜子里，随后经过浴室作简单淋浴清洁身体，再到温泉区泡。温泉边上提供免费的蓝湖火山泥，可自行取用敷脸和身体。泡温泉并不限时，只要在开放时间内离开即可。蓝湖温泉内有休息区域和餐厅，通常在这里停留 4–6 小时。

faqs.question_en: What is the temperature like in Iceland?
faqs.question_zh: 冰岛的温度怎么样？
faqs.answer_en: Although Iceland is in Northern Europe, its winters are not very cold — usually between about -5°C and 0°C — but the wind is strong. Summers are not hot, usually around 10°C. Reference daylight hours: November decreasing from 8 to 5 hours; December decreasing from 5 to 4 hours; January increasing from 4 to 7 hours; February increasing from 7 to 10 hours; March increasing from 10 to 13 hours.
faqs.answer_zh: 冰岛虽然位于北欧地区，但冬季并不冷，通常温度在零下 5 度到 0 度之间，但冰岛的风强烈。冰岛的夏天并不炎热，通常温度在 10 度左右。参考日照时间：11 月份 8–5 小时日照递减，12 月份 5–4 小时递减，1 月份 4–7 小时递增，2 月份 7–10 小时递增，3 月份 10–13 小时递增。

faqs.question_en: Which admission/experience activities are included, and what do they cover?
faqs.question_zh: 门票体验项目费用是否包含，都包含哪些？
faqs.answer_en: Summer: whale-watching cruise, Blue Lagoon, super-jeep + Katla volcano + ice cave, and the amphibious boat on the glacier lagoon. Winter: whale-watching cruise, Blue Lagoon, and super-jeep + glacier hike + blue-ice-cave exploration.
faqs.answer_zh: 夏季：出海观鲸、蓝湖温泉、超级吉普车+卡特拉火山+冰岩洞、冰河湖水陆两栖船。冬季：出海观鲸、蓝湖温泉、超级吉普车+冰川徒步+探索蓝冰洞。

faqs.question_en: What is the difference between the volcanic blue ice cave (summer) and the crystal blue ice cave (winter)?
faqs.question_zh: 火山蓝冰洞（夏季）与水晶蓝冰洞（冬季）有什么区别？
faqs.answer_en: Both the volcanic blue ice cave and the crystal blue ice cave are natural Icelandic formations and both are product names. From May to September the ice-cave structures inside the glacier are not stable, so the local government prohibits visiting glacier ice caves (which lack support) in summer; during that period local glacier guides take guests to safer volcanic ice caves that have some ice-rock support. Because of Iceland's high latitude, the angle of sunlight differs between winter and summer, producing different reflected light and hence the names blue ice cave versus black ice cave. The activity always starts by taking a super-jeep deep into the national glacier park, then hiking to explore the volcano and glacier, and finally visiting the inner structure of the ice cave — about 3 hours in total.
faqs.answer_zh: 火山蓝冰洞和水晶蓝冰洞都是冰岛自然的产物，并且都是商品名称。由于每年夏季 5 月到 9 月份蓝冰洞的结构支撑并不稳定，当地政府禁止在夏季游览冰川冰洞（无支撑体），在此期间当地专业冰川向导会带游客前往更为安全、具有一定冰岩支撑的火山冰洞；由于冰岛地处纬度较高，冬季和夏季的阳光折线不同，由此产生不同的反射光线，从而有蓝冰洞和黑冰洞之称。活动流程都是先乘坐超级越野车前往国家冰川公园深处，随后步行探险火山和冰川，最后前往冰洞内部结构游览，活动时间约为 3 小时。

faqs.question_en: Are meals included? Can we book restaurants?
faqs.question_zh: 行程内是否包含餐饮？我们可以订餐吗？
faqs.answer_en: Only hotel breakfasts are included; main meals are not. On the first day the Blue Lagoon hotel has three of its most famous restaurants: the Lava Restaurant has excellent lagoon views and a private viewing area, with reasonably priced traditional Icelandic dishes (recommended: Icelandic sea fish about EUR 40, highland lamb chops about EUR 60), needs about two hours, and advance reservation is recommended; the Moss Restaurant is a renowned Michelin-starred, world-ranked creative "chef's 7-course tasting" restaurant that must be prepaid and reserved in advance, costs about EUR 250 and takes around three hours; and the Spa Restaurant, which surrounds the whole lagoon, serves local specialties, is livelier, usually needs no reservation, lets you rest and eat while soaking, and costs about EUR 30–40. The Blue Lagoon snack bar also offers pre-cooked fast food at relatively low prices, and the café sells light bites such as sandwiches and hot dogs for around EUR 10–20. On the last day you have free time in the central Reykjavik pedestrian area, where there are many restaurants to choose from; for other meals the guide will recommend restaurants and you choose where to eat. Some sights have no proper lunch restaurant, so light meals or fast food usually replace lunch.
faqs.answer_zh: 行程内仅包含酒店内的早餐，正餐并未包含。到达首日的蓝湖酒店有三所最出名的餐厅：岩浆餐厅（Lava 餐厅）有非常好的蓝湖风景区和独立观赏区，传统冰岛菜式价格相对合理，推荐冰岛海鱼约 40 欧元、高山羊排约 60 欧元，需要两小时左右就餐时间，推荐提前预定位置；苔藓餐厅（Moss 餐厅）是冰岛著名的米其林餐厅，也是世界排名前列的创意餐厅，为“主厨推荐 7 道式餐厅”，必须提前付费预约，价格约 250 欧元，就餐约需三小时；温泉餐厅（Spa 餐厅）环绕整个蓝湖温泉，提供当地特色菜式，餐厅比较热闹，通常不需要预约，可以边泡温泉边休息享受美食，价格约 30–40 欧元。此外蓝湖快餐店也提供预煮快餐、价格相对低廉，蓝湖咖啡厅也卖三明治、热狗等简餐，大概 10–20 欧元。行程最后一天在雷克雅未克市中心的步行街区域自由活动，周围有很多餐厅可供选择；其余餐饮导游会推荐餐厅，大家自行选择就餐。部分景点午间没有正餐厅，通常以简餐或快餐代替午餐。

faqs.question_en: The last day has no transport included — how do we tour the city?
faqs.question_zh: 最后一天不含交通，我们如何游览城市？
faqs.answer_en: Reykjavik's sights are quite concentrated. The hotel sits in the central business district by the city-centre harbour, next to the Reykjavik sights mentioned above. It is only a 5–10 minute walk to the whale-watching pier, Harpa Concert Hall and Lake Tjörnin, and only a 10–15 minute walk to Hallgrímskirkja and the Sun Voyager.
faqs.answer_zh: 雷克雅未克的景点比较集中，酒店位于雷克雅未克市中心碼头边的商业中心区域，毗邻上述雷克市区景点：距观鲸码头、哈帕音乐厅、托宁湖仅 5–10 分钟步行距离，距哈尔格林姆斯教堂、太阳航海者仅 10–15 分钟步行距离。

faqs.question_en: Can a triple room be booked at the Blue Lagoon hotel?
faqs.question_zh: 蓝湖温泉酒店是否可以入住三人间？
faqs.answer_en: Under the hotel's management rules, the Blue Lagoon only accepts children under 10 sharing a room with their parents. Therefore the triple-room price for this product only applies when the third occupant on the check-in day is a child under 10.
faqs.answer_zh: 根据酒店管理规范，蓝湖温泉仅接受 10 岁以下儿童与父母同住。因此本产品的三人间价格，仅适用于入住当天为 10 岁以下儿童的情况。

faqs.question_en: Do I need a visa?
faqs.question_zh: 是否需要签证？
faqs.answer_en: This product does not include visa fees. It requires a Schengen visa (single or multiple entry); if you need a visa, please choose a Schengen-visa product. "Visa-worry-free" guarantee: for guests who sign with us 61 days before departure, if the visa is not obtained within 45 days before departure we bear all losses and immediately refund the full tour cost; guests who do not meet this clause and fail to obtain the visa are refunded per the change-and-cancellation terms. If refused, you must notify us within 48 hours and provide the consulate's refusal letter; any supplementary or changed materials must be submitted within five days, and you may not unilaterally waive your right to a visa appeal. If you commission us to handle the Schengen visa, we will buy you Schengen travel insurance meeting the visa requirements; if not, you must buy your own travel insurance and handle claims yourself. After booking, we provide all the materials needed for the Schengen visa free of charge. Your passport must be valid for at least six months from the date of departure, or customs may refuse entry. Visa fees, visa-service fees, Schengen insurance fees and visa-centre appointment fees are all non-refundable and the applicant cannot be changed, even if the product is amended or cancelled.
faqs.answer_zh: 本产品不包含签证费用，需要申根签证（单次或多次入境）；如需办理签证请选择申根签证产品。保签无忧：游客在出发日前 61 天与我社签约的旅游产品，如在出发前 45 天内未获取签证，我社承担所有损失、立即退还全部旅游费用；不符合该条款的游客如未正常获取签证，将按照“退改与取消条款”进行退费。如遇拒签需在 48 小时内通知我社并出具使领馆的拒签函，如需补充或更改材料须在五天内提交，且不得单方面放弃“签证抗辩”权利。如委托我社办理申根签证，我社为游客购买符合申根签证要求的申根旅游保险；若未委托，需自行购买旅游保险并自行负责理赔。预定后免费提供办理申根签证的全部材料。护照有效期需在离境之日起至少还有六个月，否则海关有权拒绝入境。签证费、签证服务费、申根保险费、签证中心预约费均不可退款，也无法更改使用者，即使产品退改签也无法退款。

faqs.question_en: Booking, changes & cancellation
faqs.question_zh: 预订、变更与取消须知
faqs.answer_en: Free cancellation: for group-tour products, both the agency and the traveller may apply for a no-reason cancellation up to 30 days before departure (not including the 30th day); after the group is confirmed, the change-and-cancellation terms apply. This is a shared (join-in) group tour and the confirmed group size for this product is 10 people; if 10 is not reached, either party may terminate the contract up to 30 days before departure. You should arrive at the meeting point one day before the tour starts and leave the dispersal point one day after it ends, allowing reasonable flight-connection time (at least 5 hours for same-airport transfers, 7 hours for different airports in the same city; meet/disperse window 07:00–21:00); losses from not doing so are borne by the traveller. Hotel rooms: a twin/double is assigned for two travellers with bed type decided by the hotel (not selectable); a triple family room defaults to two parents plus one minor child with bed type not selectable; the hotel named in the itinerary is the preferred one and may be replaced by a similar same-star hotel without separate notice. Pricing: all prices are quoted in EUR; if you pay in CNY, the amount is calculated in real time on the day of payment using Bank of China's "EUR selling price", and refunds likewise use the same-day exchange rate (the traveller bears any exchange differences or bank fees). Key itinerary contingencies: the order of sightseeing may be adjusted on the day without it counting as a change; bed type and floor are noted but not guaranteed; there is no vehicle or guide on the Blue Lagoon day and the Reykjavik whale-watching day; the ION hotel cannot be used December–March; if an orange-or-above weather warning or storm is issued, outdoor activities are cancelled (no price difference, refundable) and the Snæfellsnes day is automatically changed to Perlan or FlyOver Iceland (free ticket, but no refund or other compensation); the plane-wreck shuttle buggy may be cancelled in extreme weather or peak periods (you may then choose to walk); and the blue-ice-cave activity requires age 6+, with children unable to take part accompanied by a parent.
faqs.answer_zh: 免费取消：跟团游产品出发前 30 天（不含第 30 天）旅行社和旅行者均有权申请无理由取消；宣布成团后按“退改与取消条款”执行。本产品为散客拼团，宣布成团人数为 10 人，若 30 天前未达成团人数，双方均有权解除合同。请于参团日期前一天抵达集合地、离团日期后一天离开集散地，并预留合理航班衔接时间（同机场转机至少 5 小时、同城不同机场至少 7 小时，集合集散时段为 07:00–21:00），未预留合理时间所致损失由旅行者自行承担。房型：两人报名默认入住标准双人间，床型由酒店安排不可选；三人家庭间默认两位父母与一位未成年儿童入住，床型不可选；行程内列明酒店为优先入住酒店，如订满可换为相同星级的相近酒店，恕不另行通知。价格：所有定价以欧元为计价单位，如选择人民币支付，则以当天支付时按中国银行实时“欧元卖出价”自动计算的人民币价格为准，退款同样适用申请退款当日即时汇率（汇率差异或银行手续费由旅行者承担）。关键行程提示：当天游览前后顺序可能调整、不视为行程更改；床型及楼层有备注但不做保证；蓝湖温泉当日及雷克雅未克市区观鲸当日无用车无导游陪同；ION 酒店冬季 12 月–次年 3 月无法使用；如发布橙色以上警告或狂风以上级别，需取消一切户外活动（无差价可退），斯奈山行程将自动更改为珍珠楼或飞跃冰岛（免费提供门票，但无法退费或赔偿）；飞机残骸电瓶车在极端天气或旺季可能取消（届时可选择徒步）；蓝冰洞活动需年满 6 周岁，不能参加的儿童需家长陪同。

faqs.question_en: Health & safety requirements
faqs.question_zh: 健康与安全须知
faqs.answer_en: To ensure a smooth trip and prevent personal-injury accidents, please have a necessary medical check before travelling and do not sign up if any of the following apply: infectious diseases (e.g. active tuberculosis, typhoid); cardiovascular disease (e.g. severe hypertension, heart failure, myocardial ischemia, myocardial infarction); cerebrovascular disease (e.g. cerebral embolism, cerebral haemorrhage, brain tumour); respiratory disease (e.g. emphysema, cor pulmonale); psychiatric conditions (e.g. epilepsy and various mental illnesses); severe anaemia (haemoglobin below 50 g/L); or recovery period after major/medium surgery. Pregnancy: at 35 weeks or more you cannot join under any circumstances; at 28 weeks or more you must provide a doctor's report from within 7 days plus a physician's consent letter; under 28 weeks please consider carefully, sign a liability waiver, and you cannot take part in adventure, skiing, sea, high-altitude or outdoor activities. People with disabilities need a doctor's report within 7 days plus a physician's consent letter, must be accompanied by an immediate family member, and must apply at least 61 days in advance for a reserved spot and special facilities. Elderly travellers over 70 need a health certificate and medical report and must be accompanied by an immediate family member (otherwise sign a liability waiver); as the trip is long and physically demanding, those with limited stamina should consider carefully, adventure/ski/sea/high-altitude/outdoor items require a physician's consent letter, and "age-friendly" services must be requested at least 61 days ahead. Minors (under 18) must be accompanied by an immediate relative or guardian; some sights have special limits for those under 18, 12 or 6; for infants under 6 or children under 30 kg, confirm a child safety seat in advance (otherwise bring/buy an EU-compliant one); unaccompanied minors need parental authorisation; and this product does not accept infants under 2. Per Article 15 of the Tourism Law, travellers must truthfully disclose health information relevant to the trip (including pregnancy, lactation, chronic illness, infectious-disease history, suspected symptoms or recent travel to epidemic areas) and obey safety warnings; concealment leading to harm or losses is the traveller's own responsibility and may bring civil or administrative liability.
faqs.answer_zh: 为确保旅游顺利、防止旅途中发生人身意外伤害，请出行前做一次必要的身体检查，如存在下列情况请勿报名：传染性疾病患者（如活动期肺结核、伤寒等）；心血管疾病患者（如严重高血压、心功能不全、心肌缺氧、心肌梗塞等）；脑血管疾病患者（如脑栓塞、脑出血、脑肿瘤等）；呼吸系统疾病患者（如肺气肿、肺心病等）；精神病患者（如癫痫及各种精神病）；严重贫血患者（血红蛋白水平在 50 克/升以下）；大中型手术恢复期病患者。孕妇：妊娠 35 周及以上任何情况下都无法参团；妊娠 28 周及以上需提供 7 日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书；妊娠 28 周以下请慎重报名，需签署旅行社免责声明书，且行程内探险、滑雪、出海、高空、户外等项目都无法参加。残疾人：需提供 7 日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书、需直系家属陪同、需至少提前 61 天申请预留位置及专用配套设施。老年旅游者：70 周岁以上需提供健康证明、体检报告并需直系家属陪同（否则需签署免责声明书）；本次行程较长、对体力要求较高，体力不支者请慎重报名；涉及探险、滑雪、出海、高空、户外等项目需持主治医师同意书；需至少提前 61 天申请适老化服务及专属设施。未成年人（未满 18 周岁）需由直系亲属或监护人陪同，部分项目对未满 18/12/6 周岁有特殊限定；6 岁以下婴儿或 30 公斤以下儿童请提前确认安全儿童座椅，否则需自行购买或携带符合欧盟安全制式的座椅；无父母陪同的未成年人需持父母授权书；本产品不接受 2 周岁以下婴儿参团。根据《旅游法》第 15 条，旅游者需如实告知与旅游活动相关的个人健康信息（包括妊娠期、哺乳期、慢性病、传染病史、疑似症状或近期疫区旅居史）并遵守安全警示规定，若因隐瞒健康信息导致人身损害或财产损失，旅游者需自行承担责任，并可能面临民事赔偿及行政处罚。

title_en: Iceland in Depth: 6-Day Small-Group Tour from Reykjavik
title_zh: 冰岛深度6天跟团游（雷克雅未克往返）
short_en: 6 days circling Iceland's south coast: Blue Lagoon, Golden Circle, black-sand beaches, glacier lagoon, blue ice caves and Northern Lights.
short_zh: 6天畅游冰岛南岸：蓝湖温泉、黄金圈、黑沙滩、冰河湖、蓝冰洞与北极光，雷克雅未克往返一价全包。
desc_en: This 6-day round-trip from Reykjavik takes you across Iceland's most iconic landscapes, from the geothermal Blue Lagoon and the classic Golden Circle to the volcanic black-sand beaches of Vik and the otherworldly Jokulsarlon glacier lagoon. Venture inside a crystal-blue ice cave by glacier jeep or on foot, chase the Northern Lights over Faxafloi Bay, and finish with the dramatic fjord scenery of the Snaefellsnes Peninsula. With city-centre 4-star hotels, a Chinese-speaking guide-driver and all transport included, it's an all-inclusive deep dive into Iceland's fire and ice.
desc_zh: 本行程从雷克雅未克出发往返，6天串联冰岛最具标志性的自然奇观：从地热蓝湖温泉、经典黄金圈，到维克的火山黑沙滩，再到宛如仙境的杰古沙龙冰河湖。可乘超级冰川吉普车或徒步深入水晶蓝冰洞，在法赫萨海湾乘船追猎北极光，最后在斯奈山半岛饱览格陵兰风情的峡湾小镇风光。全程入住市中心四星级酒店，配中文司机兼导游，含全部交通，是一次深入冰岛冰与火世界的一价全包之旅。

highlights.en: Long, relaxed soak in the geothermal Blue Lagoon amid otherworldly lava fields
highlights.zh: 超长时间畅享地热蓝湖温泉，沉浸于嶙峋熔岩环抱的梦幻湖水

highlights.en: Classic Golden Circle: Thingvellir rift valley, Geysir geothermal area and Gullfoss waterfall
highlights.zh: 经典黄金圈：辛格维利尔大裂谷、盖歇尔间歇泉地热区与黄金瀑布

highlights.en: Reynisfjara black-sand beach, basalt columns and the DC-3 plane wreck
highlights.zh: 雷尼斯黑沙滩、玄武岩柱群与DC-3飞机残骸网红打卡地

highlights.en: Jokulsarlon glacier lagoon and Diamond Beach, the crown jewels of Vatnajokull
highlights.zh: 瓦特纳冰川皇冠上的明珠——杰古沙龙冰河湖与钻石沙滩

highlights.en: Explore a natural crystal-blue ice cave by super glacier jeep or glacier hike
highlights.zh: 乘超级冰川吉普车或冰川徒步，探索天然水晶蓝冰洞巨型冰宫殿

highlights.en: Northern Lights cruise across Faxafloi Bay with onboard aurora guides
highlights.zh: 法赫萨海湾乘船出海追猎北极光，船上配专业极光向导

highlights.en: Snaefellsnes Peninsula panorama: Kirkjufell, Arnarstapi village and the Black Church
highlights.zh: 斯奈山半岛全景游：草帽山、阿尔纳斯塔皮渔村与黑教堂

highlights.en: All-inclusive pricing with city-centre 4-star hotels and a Chinese-speaking guide-driver
highlights.zh: 一价全包，入住市中心四星级酒店，配中文司机兼导游

includes.en: Ground transport: dedicated tour coach or business travel vehicle.
includes.zh: 地面交通：专用旅游巴士或者商务旅行车。

includes.en: Accommodation: 5 nights in comfortable 4-star hotels (note: as Iceland has abolished official star ratings, hotel star levels follow Booking.com or Ctrip ratings).
includes.zh: 酒店住宿：舒适型四星级酒店5晚（备注：由于冰岛当地取消星级评定，酒店星级以Booking.com或者携程酒店星级为标准）。

includes.en: Meals: breakfast throughout, at the hotel or in another form.
includes.zh: 包含餐饮：全程酒店或其他形式早餐。

includes.en: Guide service: professional Chinese-speaking guide, or a Chinese-speaking driver doubling as guide (note: for 15 people or fewer, a driver-cum-guide is arranged).
includes.zh: 导游服务：专业中文导游服务或者中文司机兼职导游（备注：15人及以下则安排司机兼职导游）。

includes.en: Driver service: professional European driver, or a Chinese-speaking driver doubling as guide (note: for 15 people or fewer, a driver-cum-guide is arranged).
includes.zh: 司机服务：专业欧洲司机服务或者中文司机兼职导游（备注：15人及以下则安排司机兼职导游）。

includes.en: Baggage allowance: one piece of checked baggage up to 23 kg plus one small carry-on.
includes.zh: 行李说明：1件23公斤行李及1件随身小行李。

excludes.en: Passport: personal passport fees.
excludes.zh: 护照：个人护照费用。

excludes.en: Visa: the tourist visa fees required for the countries listed in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 签证：行程中所列旅游国家所需的观光签证费用。

excludes.en: Insurance: travel insurance fees (if the itinerary involves high-risk sports, please verify whether your travel insurance covers them).
excludes.zh: 保险：旅游保险费用（如行程内涉及到高风险运动，请核实旅游保险是否包含该项运动）。

excludes.en: Tips: guests pay tips to the guide and driver totalling EUR 10 per person per day, same price for adults and children.
excludes.zh: 小费：游客支付导游和司机小费一共10欧/人/天，大小同价。

excludes.en: Meals: apart from the special meals included in the itinerary, lunches and dinners are not included.
excludes.zh: 餐饮：除行程内包含的特色餐外，行程中不包含午、晚正餐费用。

excludes.en: Admission: attractions not noted as fee-included (including but not limited to sights marked '(exterior)', and all 'recommended', 'optional' and 'experience' items not stated as included); please pay on your own if you wish to visit.
excludes.zh: 门票：行程中未注明费用包含的景点（包括但不仅限于行程中注明“外观”的景点，“推荐”、“可选”、“体验”等等所有未提及费用包含的项目，如游客需要参观，敬请自理）。

excludes.en: Extended stays: any extra accommodation, transport or sightseeing beyond the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 延长住宿：行程外额外延长的住宿、交通、观光费用。

excludes.en: Personal spending: drinks and alcohol, taxis, phone charges and other personal expenses.
excludes.zh: 私人消费：如饮料酒类、出租车、电话费等个人消费。

excludes.en: Other transport: sightseeing cars, mini-trains, electric shuttle cars, taxis, in-park vehicles and other transport in vehicle-restricted areas not explicitly included above are at your own expense.
excludes.zh: 其他交通：如车辆限行区的观光车、小火车、电瓶摆渡车、出租车、景区车辆等上述未明确包含的其他交通费用敬请自理。

excludes.en: Free-time activities: guests' own evening sightseeing and the recommended optional projects, plus any transport, meals, admission and shopping costs arising from them.
excludes.zh: 自由活动：游客夜间自行游览及行程中的推荐项目，以及产生的交通、餐饮、门票、购物等费用。

excludes.en: Experience activities: the various travel experience activities not included in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 体验活动：行程中的没有包含的各项旅游体验活动。

excludes.en: Other costs: anything not mentioned in the inclusions. In cases of force majeure (natural disaster, war, strike, etc.) or special circumstances such as transport delays, flight cancellations/reschedules, embassy visa delays, or insufficient group numbers, and any extra costs not caused by us (e.g. overseas visa-extension fees, accommodation/meals/transport, national airfare adjustments), we reserve the right to charge the difference.
excludes.zh: 其他费用：费用包含中未提及的费用。如因天灾、战争、罢工等不可抗力的原因，及因交通延阻、航班取消或更改时间、使馆延误出签证、人数不足等特殊情况或其他非我公司原因所引致的额外费（如在外延期签证费、住、食及交通费、国家航空运价调整等），我公司有权追加差价。

timeline.title_en: Reykjavik - Blue Lagoon - Reykjavik | A long, leisurely soak in Iceland's Blue Lagoon
timeline.title_zh: 雷克雅未克-蓝湖温泉-雷克雅未克丨超长时间体验冰岛蓝湖温泉
timeline.description_en: Meet in central Reykjavik in the morning and head toward Keflavik Airport and on to the Blue Lagoon geothermal spa (Blue Lagoon). Here you can take the optional Blue Lagoon ticket package, or instead ride back toward Reykjavik for an optional midday whale-watching trip on the North Atlantic. Departure points and times vary by group date: 09:00 Reykjavik city or 09:45 Keflavik Airport (recommended to choose either Blue Lagoon or whale watching); 16:00 Reykjavik city or 16:45 Keflavik Airport (Blue Lagoon not available at these later times). Because the Blue Lagoon is remote and the visit is long, guests who do not enter the lagoon cannot be arranged to sightsee or rest around the lagoon area. Overnight at the Reykjavik Grandi Central Hotel or a comparable 4-star hotel, ideally located in Iceland's creative cultural district near the old harbour and within walking distance of the city centre.
timeline.description_zh: 上午在雷克雅未克市区集合，前往凯夫拉维克机场，随后前往蓝湖温泉景区（Blue Lagoon），可选择享受蓝湖温泉门票套票；或随车返回雷克雅未克选择中午出海观鲸。集合时间地点随团期不同而变化：09:00雷克雅未克市区或09:45凯夫拉维克机场（推荐蓝湖温泉或观鲸二选一）；16:00雷克雅未克市区或16:45凯夫拉维克机场（这两个较晚时段无法选择蓝湖温泉）。由于蓝湖温泉地处偏僻且游览时间较长，如果不入内蓝湖温泉，则无法安排在蓝湖景区周围游览和休息。夜宿雷克雅未克格兰迪中央酒店或同等四星级酒店；酒店地理位置优越，坐落于冰岛创意文化区，毗邻港口与赏鲸码头，步行即可抵达市中心。

timeline.title_en: Reykjavik - Golden Circle - Reykjavik | Volcanic and geothermal wonders along the Thingvellir rift valley
timeline.title_zh: 雷克雅未克-黄金圈-雷克雅未克丨辛格维利尔大裂谷上看火山地热奇观
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, set off to explore Iceland's Golden Circle (Gullni hringurinn): Thingvellir National Park (Pingvellir), the Geysir geothermal area, and Gullfoss (the Golden Falls). These three landmarks lie along a loop road, which is why the route is called the Golden Circle, and its scenery is unique to Iceland and world-famous. Thingvellir National Park is one of the cradles of Western parliamentary democracy and a UNESCO World Heritage Site (2004), where the Eurasian and North American tectonic plates pull apart to form a rift valley with a drop of more than ten metres, overlooking the vast Thingvellir plain and the mirror-still Thingvallavatn (Parliament Lake). At Geysir, the geothermal field roars and erupts every 1-2 minutes, sending columns of 100C-plus water as high as 30 metres. Gullfoss thunders down a drop of over 50 metres, its spray often crossed by rainbows in the sunlight. Return to Reykjavik for the night at the Reykjavik Grandi Central Hotel or a comparable 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往冰岛黄金圈（Gullni hringurinn）：辛格维利尔国家公园（Pingvellir National Park）、盖歇尔间歇泉区（Geysir）、黄金瀑布（Gullfoss）。这些景点散布在一条环形公路上，因而被称为旅游黄金圈，其壮丽景观为冰岛所独有、闻名世界。辛格维利尔国家公园是西方议会民主的发源地之一，2004年被联合国教科文组织列入世界遗产名录；欧亚与美洲两大板块在此运动，形成十余米落差的断裂谷地，可远眺辽阔的辛格维利尔平原与平静如镜的辛格瓦尔德拉湖（国会湖）。盖歇尔间歇泉每隔1-2分钟喷发一次，水温高达100多度，水柱可高达30多米。黄金瀑布气势宏大，落差达50多米，阳光下水雾中常现彩虹。结束后返回雷克雅未克，夜宿雷克雅未克格兰迪中央酒店或同等四星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Reykjavik - Vik - Glacier Lagoon | Crossing the basalt black-sand beach, discovering the secret of Seljalandsfoss
timeline.title_zh: 雷克雅未克-维克-冰河湖丨穿越玄武岩峡谷黑沙滩，探访塞里雅兰秘境
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, visit Seljalandsfoss and Skogafoss waterfalls, then continue to Vik. Here you can reach the DC-3 plane wreckage on the sand on foot, or choose the dedicated electric shuttle car, or cross the black-sand beach by ATV all-terrain vehicle for photos: the broken, rugged metal fuselage looks all the more hauntingly beautiful against the jet-black sand. Then visit the black-sand beach and the Reynisdrangar basalt sea stacks. Seljalandsfoss is one of Iceland's larger and more magnificent falls, about 60 metres high, with a famous hidden waterfall beloved by photographers. Skogafoss, 25 metres wide and dropping some 60 metres, thunders down between green-clad cliffs. The Reynisdrangar basalt sea stacks rise from the Atlantic near Vik below Mount Reynisfjall, with the Halsanefshellir basalt cave hollowed out beneath the cliff; the columnar basalt and white surf featured in films and series including Game of Thrones. The DC-3 wreckage is a US Navy aircraft (C-47) that crash-landed on the Solheimasandur black sand on 24 November 1973; the crew all survived but the wreck remains there to this day. Afterward head to the Glacier Lagoon and overnight at the Glacier Lagoon Hotel or a comparable 4-star hotel, where you may glimpse the aurora through its huge picture windows.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往塞里雅兰瀑布、彩虹瀑布（斯科加瀑布），随后前往维克。可选择徒步抵达飞机残骸所在的沙滩，或搭乘专用电瓶摆渡车，或乘ATV全地形越野车穿越黑沙滩拍照游览；残破粗糙的金属机身在黝黑砂石映衬下更显凄美震撼。之后游览黑沙滩及雷尼斯岩柱群。塞里雅兰瀑布（Seljalandsfoss）位于冰岛南部，落差约60米，其连通的秘密瀑布是摄影师镜头下的宠儿；彩虹瀑布（Skogafoss）宽25米、落差达60米，奔腾而下气势壮观。雷尼斯岩柱群（Reynisdrangar）矗立于大西洋中，位于维克村附近雷尼斯山下，崖下被海水掏空形成奇特的玄武岩柱洞穴（Halsanefshellir），《权力的游戏》等多部影视剧曾在此取景。DC-3飞机残骸为1973年11月24日迫降于Solheimasandur黑沙滩的美国海军飞机（C-47），机组全部生还、残骸至今留存。之后前往冰河湖，夜宿冰河泻湖酒店或同等四星级酒店，幸运的话可在酒店巨大落地窗前观测到极光。

timeline.title_en: Glacier Lagoon - Diamond Beach - Glacier Lagoon | Super-jeep ride to the crystal-blue ice cave and giant ice palace
timeline.title_zh: 冰河湖-钻石沙滩-冰河湖丨乘坐超级冰川吉普车，直达水晶蓝冰洞巨型冰宫殿
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, you can choose to head to the foot of Vatnajokull National Park for a guided glacier hike to explore the blue ice cave, or instead take a glacier super-jeep to reach the ice cave. Witness one of the world's rare natural wonders, the crystal-blue ice cave: standing inside an ancient glacier where a natural blue cave shows varied shades and structures of blue. The crystal-blue ice cave is only accessible from October to April, and each cave differs in location, shape, size and colour. In the afternoon, visit the jewel in Vatnajokull's crown, Jokulsarlon Glacier Lagoon, where thousand-year-old icebergs of white, blue, green, grey and brown drift; with luck you may see seals basking on the ice. Vatnajokull, the largest ice cap outside the poles, covers about 8% of Iceland with ice averaging 400 metres thick (over 1,000 metres at its thickest), and provided filming locations for Game of Thrones (the Wall and most scenes beyond it). Note: glacier and ice-cave activities require waterproof outerwear and sturdy waterproof, non-slip hiking boots; the minimum age for the glacier hike or ice cave is 6, and groups are usually 12 or 14 people. Overnight at the Glacier Lagoon Hotel or a comparable 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，可选择前往瓦特纳冰川国家公园脚下，由专业向导带领体验冰川徒步、探索蓝冰洞；或选择乘坐冰川吉普车到达蓝冰洞。见证世界稀有自然现象之一——水晶蓝冰洞：站在古老冰川内，那里有一个天然的蓝色冰洞，呈现不同的蓝色与结构。水晶蓝冰洞每年仅10月到4月可以体验，冰洞形成的位置、形状、大小与颜色都不尽相同。下午前往游览瓦特纳冰川皇冠上的明珠——杰古沙龙冰河湖，湖里漂浮着形态各异的千年浮冰，呈现白、蓝、绿及因火山灰掺杂而成的灰、棕等色彩，运气好还能看到成群晒太阳的海狮。瓦特纳冰原（Vatnajokull）是极地以外世界上极大的冰盖，覆盖冰岛约8%的面积，平均厚度400米、较厚处达千米，《权力的游戏》绝境长城及以北的多数场景在此拍摄。注意：冰川及冰洞活动须穿着防水外衣裤与防水防滑登山鞋，参加冰川徒步或蓝冰洞的最低年龄为6周岁，通常12人或14人一组。夜宿冰河泻湖酒店或同等四星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Glacier Lagoon - Reykjavik | Sailing out into Faxafloi Bay, an encounter with the northern lights and whales
timeline.title_zh: 冰河湖-雷克雅未克丨法赫萨海湾出海，北极光与鲸鱼偶遇
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, drive back to Reykjavik, then explore the city freely: Hallgrimskirkja (Reykjavik Cathedral; you may not be able to go inside if an event is being held that day), Harpa Concert Hall, a stroll along Lake Tjornin, the Sun Voyager sculpture, and a wander through the Grandi old-harbour district. In the evening you may optionally make your own way to the pier and, after boarding with your booking voucher, set out on a roughly 2-hour aurora-hunting cruise into Iceland's Faxafloi Bay (no Chinese-speaking guide that day; an English-speaking guide is on board). Reykjavik Cathedral, consecrated in 1940 and largely finished in the late 1960s, is a landmark with an elevator to the top for a panoramic city view. Lake Tjornin (Tjornin) sits in the heart of the city, home to swans, terns and ducks year-round. The Sun Voyager (Solfar), unveiled in 1990 and designed by Jon Gunnar Arnason, is a boat-shaped ode to the sun. Harpa Concert Hall and Conference Centre, with its kaleidoscopic glass facade inspired by basalt and the aurora, seats up to 1,800 in its main hall. Return to your hotel on your own after the cruise. Overnight at the Reykjavik Grandi Central Hotel or a comparable 4-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往雷克雅未克，随后自由参观雷克雅未克大教堂（当日如遇教堂内举办活动，可能无法入内参观）、哈帕音乐厅、托宁湖边漫步、太阳航海者雕塑，游走在雷克雅未克格兰迪旧港地区。也可选择当晚自行前往码头，持预订单办理登船后开启追光之旅，时长约2小时（当日无中文导游，船上有英文向导），游船将带大家到冰岛法赫萨峡湾追猎极光，活动结束后自行返回酒店。雷克雅未克大教堂是市地标性建筑，于1940年奠基、20世纪60年代末基本完工，可乘电梯上顶楼俯瞰首都全貌；托宁湖（Tjornin）坐落于市中心，天鹅、燕鸥、鸭子等水禽常年栖息；太阳航海者（Solfar）由Jon Gunnar Arnason设计、1990年揭幕，形似方舟，是一曲对太阳的颂歌；哈帕音乐厅和会议中心玻璃外型如巨大万花筒，灵感来自极光与火山石，较大的音乐厅可容纳1800人。夜宿雷克雅未克格兰迪中央酒店或同等四星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Reykjavik - Snaefellsnes - Reykjavik | Greenland-style fjord village and a panoramic tour of the Snaefellsnes Peninsula
timeline.title_zh: 雷克雅未克-斯奈山-雷克雅未克丨格林兰风情峡湾镇斯奈山全景游
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, head to the Snaefellsnes Peninsula. First visit Kirkjufell (Church Mountain, often called Mount Hat), about 460 metres high; the classic photo spot is reached by walking about five minutes from the parking area across the road, over the bridge, using Kirkjufellsfoss waterfall as foreground. Then continue to the village of Arnarstapi to see landmarks such as 'Grandpa Octopus' and the Kiss of the Sea (Bird's Kiss), an old, elegant fishing village on the peninsula's south coast known for its weathered houses and bizarre sea-eroded rocks. Afterward visit the Black Church before returning to Reykjavik, where the trip concludes. Note: Snaefellsnes lies in a blizzard-prone zone; if local authorities issue an orange-or-above warning or there is heavy snow/wind, the day's Snaefellsnes itinerary is automatically changed to a Reykjavik day tour including 'Perlan' or 'FlyOver Iceland', with the agency providing those tickets free of charge (no refund or other compensation). No overnight on this final day.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往斯奈山半岛，首先游览草帽山，随后前往阿尔纳斯塔皮小镇，参观章鱼爷爷、鸟之吻（海之吻）等景点，之后前往参观黑教堂，结束后返回雷克雅未克，结束美好行程。草帽山（Kirkjufell）海拔约460米，冰岛语意为“教会山”，因形似草帽而得名；前往经典摄影机位需从教会山马路对面停车区域沿路径走约五分钟，过桥到瀑布另一边，以教会山瀑布为前景。阿尔纳斯塔皮（Arnarstapi）是斯奈山半岛南海岸线上著名的冰雪渔村，海滨古老优雅的房屋与沿岸奇诡的海蚀岩石是小镇特色。注意：斯奈山半岛地处暴风雪区，如当地气象部门发布橙色以上警告或暴雪暴风，当天斯奈山行程将自动更改为含“珍珠楼”或“飞跃冰岛”的雷克雅未克一日游，旅行社免费提供当天活动门票，但无法退费或获得其他赔偿。最后一天无住宿。

meeting_en: Central Reykjavik (morning meet-up; pickup also available at Keflavik Airport). Exact times per the final departure notice.
meeting_zh: 雷克雅未克市区（上午集合，亦可在凯夫拉维克机场上车）。具体时间以《出团通知书》为准。

faqs.question_en: What are the meeting times and points, and is airport pickup/drop-off included?
faqs.question_zh: 集合时间地点是哪里？是否含接送机？
faqs.answer_en: Meeting/dispersal points vary by route. Route A (Snaefellsnes on the last day; choose whale watching OR Blue Lagoon): departure day 09:00 Reykjavik city or 09:45 Keflavik Airport (must choose Blue Lagoon or whale watching), or 16:00 Reykjavik city / 16:45 Keflavik Airport (no Blue Lagoon at these times); final day disperse 18:30 Reykjavik city. Route B (Snaefellsnes on day 1): 09:00 meet at a Reykjavik city hotel; final day disperse 15:30 Reykjavik city or 17:00 Keflavik Airport. Route C (no Snaefellsnes, whale watching available): departure as Route A; final-day dispersal 10:00 Keflavik Airport / 11:00 Reykjavik city / 17:00 Keflavik Airport. Route D: self check-in after 14:00 in Reykjavik city (optional 12:30 whale watching) or 16:45 Keflavik Airport; final day disperse 15:30 Reykjavik city / 17:00 Keflavik Airport. This product is a scheduled group that meets/disperses along the way at the airport and does NOT include private airport transfers (neither charged nor refunded). As it is not a private shuttle, latecomers cannot be waited for; if your flight is delayed you must make your own way to the Blue Lagoon or your hotel to join the group. Keflavik Airport is about 45 minutes from the city centre and about 15 minutes from the Blue Lagoon; the airport bus costs roughly EUR 25-30 per person and runs about every 30 minutes, with taxis queuing outside the terminal.
faqs.answer_zh: 集散点因线路而异。A线（最后一天游览斯奈山，观鲸或蓝湖二选一）：出发当天09:00雷克雅未克市区或09:45凯夫拉维克机场（需选蓝湖或观鲸二选一），或16:00雷克雅未克市区／16:45凯夫拉维克机场（这两个时段无法选蓝湖）；结束当天18:30雷克雅未克市区集散。B线（第一天游览斯奈山）：09:00雷克雅未克市区酒店集合；结束当天15:30雷克雅未克市区或17:00凯夫拉维克机场集散。C线（无法游览斯奈山，可观鲸）：出发同A线；结束当天10:00凯夫拉维克国际机场／11:00雷克雅未克市区／17:00凯夫拉维克国际机场集散。D线：出发当天14:00后雷克雅未克市区自助入住（可选12:30出海观鲸）或16:45凯夫拉维克机场集合；结束当天15:30雷克雅未克市区／17:00凯夫拉维克国际机场集散。本产品为指定时间内旅游团顺路机场集散，不包含接送机服务，既不收费也不退费；由于并非专车接送，游客迟到无法等待，如航班晚点需自行前往蓝湖温泉或当天入住酒店与团队集合。雷克雅未克国际机场往返市中心约45分钟车程，到达蓝湖温泉约15分钟车程，大巴车约25-30欧/人、约30分钟一趟，出租车在航站楼外排队等候。

faqs.question_en: How does the Blue Lagoon visit work, and who can or cannot do it?
faqs.question_zh: 蓝湖温泉如何游览？哪些团期可以参加？
faqs.answer_en: You must wear a swimsuit; T-shirts and shorts are not allowed in the water. After collecting your items at the entrance, change in the changing room, lock away anything you can't bring into the spa, take a quick shower to clean off, then enter the lagoon. Free blue volcanic mud is available at the lagoon's edge for your face and body. There is no time limit on the soak as long as you leave within opening hours; there are rest areas, restaurants and two snack bars inside, and people typically stay 4-6 hours. The recommended packages are: Blue Lagoon Comfort package (lagoon admission + towel + one drink + one mask + booking service fee) at EUR 128 per adult; and a children's package (booking service fee + transport) at EUR 20 for ages 2-13. Children aged 2-13 enter free sharing a parent's wristband. Important: only morning departures (airport/city) are organized into the Blue Lagoon. Because the lagoon is remote, guests who do not go to the Blue Lagoon cannot be arranged to sightsee or rest there, so afternoon-departure guests cannot do the Blue Lagoon. If you want the Blue Lagoon, book a morning-departure option.
faqs.answer_zh: 泡温泉要求穿泳衣，T恤短裤将被拒绝下水。在温泉入口领取用品后，先到更衣室换好泳衣，将不能带去温泉的物品锁好在柜子里，随后经过浴室作简单淋浴清洁身体，再到温泉区泡。温泉边提供免费的蓝湖火山泥，可自行取用敷脸和身体。泡温泉并不限时，只要在开放时间内离开即可；内有休息区域和餐厅及两个简餐吧，通常停留4-6小时。推荐套票：蓝湖温泉Comfort套票（含门票+浴巾+饮品一份+面膜一份+预定服务费）128欧/成人；儿童票（预定服务费+交通费）20欧/2-13岁；2-13岁儿童与父母同行免门票、共用手环。注意：仅第一天上午参团（机场、市区）的游客会组织蓝湖温泉活动；由于蓝湖温泉地处偏僻，不参加蓝湖则无法安排游览和休息，因此第一天下午参团（市区、机场）的游客无法游览蓝湖。如需游览蓝湖温泉，请选择当天上午参团的行程。

faqs.question_en: What is the weather and daylight like in Iceland?
faqs.question_zh: 冰岛的温度和日照情况如何？
faqs.answer_en: Although Iceland is in Northern Europe, winters are not bitterly cold, usually between -5C and 0C, but the wind is strong. Summers are not hot, typically around 10C. Reference daylight hours: November daylight decreases from about 8 to 5 hours; December from 5 to 4 hours; January increases from 4 to 7 hours; February from 7 to 10 hours; March from 10 to 13 hours.
faqs.answer_zh: 冰岛虽位于北欧地区，但冬季并不冷，通常温度在零下5度到0度之间，不过冰岛的风很强烈；夏天并不炎热，通常温度在10度左右。参考日照时间：11月份8-5小时日照递减，12月份5-4小时递减，1月份4-7小时递增，2月份7-10小时递增，3月份10-13小时递增。

faqs.question_en: What should I prepare for the glacier hike or super-jeep ice-cave trip?
faqs.question_zh: 冰川徒步或吉普车探索蓝冰洞有哪些注意事项？
