faqs.answer_en: Wear clothing suitable for outdoor activity in glacier terrain: waterproof outerwear and trousers and comfortable hiking boots (waterproof, non-slip soles) are essential, with warm, easily layered clothes underneath. Bring a small backpack with snacks and water. Professional glacier gear such as a helmet and crampons (worn over your hiking boots, so hiking boots are required) is provided. If you feel the cold, wear gloves and a thin hat (under the helmet). Follow the professional guide's instructions at all times and never explore the glacier on your own. The blue ice cave is nature's gift; its location, shape, size and colour differ every year and from place to place, and this product's ice-cave trip also includes a small amount of glacier hiking.
faqs.answer_zh: 请一定穿着适合户外活动、进入冰川地区的衣服。防水外衣裤、舒适的登山鞋（鞋底防水防滑）是必须，里面请穿着保暖易穿脱的衣服；建议随身携带一个双肩包，装上少许零食和水。活动会提供专业冰川器材，比如头盔、冰爪鞋（套在登山鞋外，因此登山鞋为必须）。如果怕冷，请戴手套、薄帽子（戴在头盔下面）。届时请听从专业向导的指导，冰川是庞然大物、地貌多变，请一定不要自行探索。蓝冰洞是大自然最天然的馈赠，每年形成的位置、形状、大小与颜色都不尽相同，本产品内的蓝冰洞探险也融入了少量冰川徒步体验。

faqs.question_en: What is the meal arrangement?
faqs.question_zh: 餐饮如何安排？
faqs.answer_en: Breakfast is included in the itinerary. For all other meals, our guide will recommend restaurants and you can choose where to dine on your own.
faqs.answer_zh: 行程内包含早餐，其余餐饮我社导游会推荐餐厅，大家可以自行选择就餐。

faqs.question_en: What are the rules and pricing for children?
faqs.question_zh: 儿童费用与限制是怎样的？
faqs.answer_en: Children under 16 and under 1.6 m who share a room with their parents qualify for the three-person (triple) price. This tour does not accept infants under 2 years old. Children under 6 may not be able to take part in the glacier hike or enter the blue ice cave; if a child does not join the on-ice activities, at least one parent must stay at the hotel to accompany the child.
faqs.answer_zh: 16岁以下及1米6以下随父母同住，可以享受三人行价格；该团不接受2岁以下的婴幼儿报名。6岁以下儿童可能无法参与冰川徒步与蓝冰洞入内探险活动，如果儿童不参与冰上活动，需要父母至少留一位在酒店陪伴儿童。

faqs.question_en: If I book the same activities myself, will they match the ones in this product?
faqs.question_zh: 如果我自行预订相同的活动项目，是否和产品内的一致？
faqs.answer_en: We cannot confirm whether whale-watching/sea trips or ice-cave activities you book yourself will incur extra transport costs or whether they will connect properly with the itinerary.
faqs.answer_zh: 我社无法确认客户自行预订的观鲸或出海项目、或蓝冰洞项目是否会产生额外交通费用或无法衔接行程。

faqs.question_en: How are the driver and guide arranged?
faqs.question_zh: 司机及导游如何安排？
faqs.answer_en: Arrangements depend on the number of registered guests: for 15 people or fewer, a minibus or business vehicle is used and a Chinese-speaking driver doubles as guide; for more than 15 people, a tour coach is used with a professional driver and a dedicated guide.
faqs.answer_zh: 本产品根据报名人数安排旅游巴士或者小型巴士或商务车：15人以下为小型巴士或商务车，则由中文司机兼导游；15人以上为旅游巴士，配职业司机及专职导游。

faqs.question_en: Do I need a visa?
faqs.question_zh: 是否需要签证？
faqs.answer_en: Yes. This product does not include visa fees; it requires a Schengen visa (single or multiple entry). If you need to apply, choose a Schengen visa product. Booking-guarantee: if you sign with us at least 61 days before departure and have not obtained the visa within 45 days before departure, we bear all losses and immediately refund your full tour cost; guests who do not meet this clause and fail to obtain a visa are refunded per the change-and-cancellation terms. A refusal must be reported to us within 48 hours with the consulate's refusal letter; supplementary/changed materials must be submitted within five days, and you may not unilaterally waive the 'visa appeal' right. If we handle your Schengen visa, we will buy you Schengen-compliant travel insurance; if not, you must buy your own and handle claims yourself. After booking we provide all materials for the Schengen application free of charge. Your passport must be valid for at least six months from the departure date, or customs may refuse entry. Visa fees, visa service fees, Schengen insurance fees and visa-centre appointment fees are all non-refundable and non-transferable, even if the product itself is refunded or changed.
faqs.answer_zh: 需要。本产品不包含签证费用，需要申根签证（单次或多次入境）；如需办理请选择申根签证产品。保签无忧：游客在出发日前61天与我社签约的旅游产品，如在出发前45天内未获取签证，我社承担所有损失，立即退还全部旅游费用；不符合该条款的游客如未正常获取签证，将按照退改与取消条款进行退费。如遇拒签需在48小时内通知我社并出具使领馆拒签函，如需补充或更改材料需在五天内提交，且不得单方面放弃“签证抗辩”权利。如委托我社办理申根签证，我社为游客购买符合申根要求的旅游保险；若未委托办理，需自行购买保险并自行负责理赔。预定后免费提供办理申根签证的全部材料。护照有效期需在离境之日起至少还有六个月，否则海关有权拒绝入境。签证费、签证服务费、申根保险费、签证中心预约费均不可退款，也无法更改使用者，即使产品退改签也无法退款。

faqs.question_en: Booking, changes and cancellation
faqs.question_zh: 预订、变更与取消须知
faqs.answer_en: Both the agency and traveller may cancel without reason up to 30 days before departure (the 30th day excluded). Pay promptly after booking to avoid CNY price rises from exchange-rate moves; payment does not equal confirmation, the group operator re-confirms within 48 hours, and if not confirmed within 48 hours the order auto-refunds (so don't book connecting flights/hotels until confirmed). All pricing is quoted in EUR; if you pay in CNY, the rate is the real-time Bank of China 'euro selling price' on the day of payment (refunds use the rate on the refund-application day; any rate difference or bank fees are borne by the traveller). This is a shared (join-in) group with a minimum group size of 10; if fewer than 10 register by 14 days before departure it may not run and you can switch products or get a refund without that being a breach by the agency. Bed types and room types noted in the order cannot be guaranteed and are assigned randomly by the hotel on the day; single travellers are charged a single-room supplement unless successfully matched for room-sharing. European hotels are non-smoking, check-in 14:00 / check-out 11:00. Because Iceland's weather is changeable, the agency strongly recommends arriving in Iceland one day before the tour starts and leaving one day after it ends, leaving reasonable flight-connection time; losses from not doing so are borne by the traveller. Sightseeing order may be adjusted by group date without changing the route or sights. If an orange-or-above weather warning or gale forces it, all outdoor activities are cancelled and guests sheltered nearby with no compensation; weather/disaster losses are non-refundable.
faqs.answer_zh: 跟团游产品出发前30天（不含第30天），旅行社和旅行者均有权申请无理由取消。预订后请及时支付，以避免汇率变动导致人民币支付价格上涨；支付不等于确认行程，组团社需在48小时内二次确认，如超48小时未确认则默认自动退款（未获确定行程前请勿预订衔接机票及酒店）。所有定价以欧元为计价单位，如选择人民币支付，则以当天支付时本网站依据中国银行实时外汇牌价中“欧元卖出价”自动计算的人民币实时价格为准（退款同样适用申请退款当日即时汇率，汇率差异或银行手续费由旅行者承担）。本产品为散客拼团，成团人数为10人；如发团前14天仍未达到最低成团人数，可按合同约定选择其他组团方式、其他产品或退还旅游费用，因未成团不构成旅行社违约。订单内备注的床型和房型无法保证，所有房型/床类均由酒店当天随机分配；单人报名默认含单人房差，如成功拼房则按实际比例退还房差。欧洲酒店全面禁烟，入住14:00、退房11:00。由于冰岛气象多变，旅行社强烈建议游客团前一天到达冰岛、团后一天离开冰岛并预留合理航班衔接时间，未遵守本条款导致的损失由旅行者自行承担。根据团期不同，游览先后顺序可能调整，但在不改变路线及景点的情况下不视为旅行社违约。如遇橙色以上警告或狂风级别，按当地旅游局要求需取消一切户外活动、就近紧急避险，无差价可退；因天气或自然灾害造成的行程损失无法退款或获得其他赔偿。

faqs.question_en: Health and safety requirements
faqs.question_zh: 健康与安全须知
faqs.answer_en: Please have a health check before departure. Do NOT sign up if you have: infectious diseases (e.g. active TB, typhoid); cardiovascular disease (e.g. severe hypertension, cardiac insufficiency, myocardial ischaemia or infarction); cerebrovascular disease (e.g. embolism, haemorrhage, brain tumour); respiratory disease (e.g. emphysema, cor pulmonale); psychiatric conditions (e.g. epilepsy); severe anaemia (haemoglobin below 50 g/L); or are recovering from major/medium surgery. Pregnancy: at 35 weeks or more you cannot join under any circumstances; at 28 weeks or more you must provide a doctor's report from within 7 days plus the attending doctor's consent; under 28 weeks, sign up with caution, sign a liability waiver, and you cannot join adventure, skiing, sea, aerial or outdoor activities. People with disabilities need a 7-day medical report and attending-doctor consent, an accompanying immediate family member, and to apply at least 61 days ahead for reserved space/facilities. Travellers over 70 need a health certificate, a physical-exam report and an accompanying immediate family member (or sign a waiver), must have a certain walking ability and stamina, and need an attending-doctor consent letter for adventure/skiing/sea/aerial/outdoor items. Minors under 18 must be accompanied by an immediate family member or guardian; under 18 travelling without parents need a parental authorization (or the other parent's written authorization if only one parent is present); infants under 2 are not accepted; children under 6 or under 30 kg need a confirmed safety seat. Under Tourism Law Article 15 (and the 2025 Infectious Disease Prevention Law), travellers must truthfully declare health information relevant to the trip (pregnancy, lactation, chronic disease, infectious-disease history, suspected symptoms or recent epidemic-area travel); concealment that causes harm or transmission makes the traveller liable, and the agency may terminate the contract without refund.
faqs.answer_zh: 出行前请做一次必要的身体检查，如存在下列情况请勿报名：传染性疾病患者（如活动期肺结核、伤寒）；心血管疾病患者（如严重高血压、心功能不全、心肌缺氧、心肌梗塞）；脑血管疾病患者（如脑栓塞、脑出血、脑肿瘤）；呼吸系统疾病患者（如肺气肿、肺心病）；精神病患者（如癫痫及各种精神病）；严重贫血患者（血红蛋白50克/升以下）；大中型手术恢复期病患者。孕妇：妊娠35周及以上任何情况下都无法参团；28周及以上需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书；28周以下请慎重报名，需签署免责声明书，且无法参加探险、滑雪、出海、高空、户外等项目。残疾人需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书、需直系家属陪同、需提前至少61天申请预留位置及专用设施。70周岁以上老年人需提供健康证明、体检报告并由直系家属陪同（否则需签免责声明书），需具备一定步行能力和体力，涉及探险/滑雪/出海/高空/户外项目需持主治医师同意书。未成年人（未满18周岁）需由直系亲属或监护人陪同；无父母陪同的18岁以下未成年人须持父母授权书（仅一方陪同需另一方书面授权）；不接受2周岁以下婴儿参团；6岁以下或30公斤以下儿童需提前确认安全座椅。根据《旅游法》第15条及《传染病防治法（2025修订）》，旅游者需如实告知与旅游活动相关的个人健康信息（包括妊娠期、哺乳期、慢性病、传染病史、疑似症状或近期疫区旅居史），若因隐瞒导致人身损害或传播风险，需自行承担责任，旅行社可解除合同且不退还费用。

title_en: Iceland Ring of Wonders: 7-Day Small-Group Tour from Reykjavik
title_zh: 冰岛奇境环线：7天雷克雅未克小团跟团游
short_en: 7 days from Reykjavik through the Blue Lagoon, Golden Circle, black-sand beaches, the Glacier Lagoon and Snaefellsnes, with northern-lights and whale-watching options.
short_zh: 7天从雷克雅未克出发，畅游蓝湖温泉、黄金圈、黑沙滩、冰河湖与斯奈山半岛，可选追极光与出海观鲸。
desc_en: This 7-day round-trip from Reykjavik traces Iceland's most iconic landscapes: soak in the geothermal Blue Lagoon, witness erupting geysers and thundering Gullfoss on the Golden Circle, then drive the south coast past Seljalandsfoss, the Vik black-sand beach and basalt columns to the dazzling Jokulsarlon Glacier Lagoon and Diamond Beach. Explore crystal-blue ice caves beneath Vatnajokull, then return via the wild Snaefellsnes Peninsula with Kirkjufell and its Greenlandic fishing villages. Optional northern-lights cruises and whale-watching round out an all-inclusive journey staying in city-centre 4-star hotels.
desc_zh: 本行程为7天雷克雅未克往返之旅，串联冰岛最经典的风景：先在地热蓝湖温泉舒缓身心，再于黄金圈饱览喷涌的间歇泉与气势磅礴的黄金瀑布；沿南海岸一路前往塞里雅兰瀑布、维克黑沙滩与玄武岩柱群，直抵璀璨的杰古沙龙冰河湖与钻石沙滩。深入瓦特纳冰川探访水晶蓝冰洞，最后取道狂野的斯奈山半岛，欣赏草帽山与格陵兰风情渔村。可选出海追极光与观鲸，全程入住市中心四星级酒店，价格全包。

highlights.en: Long, unhurried soak in the geothermal Blue Lagoon
highlights.zh: 超长时间畅享地热蓝湖温泉

highlights.en: Golden Circle: Thingvellir rift, Geysir hot springs and Gullfoss waterfall
highlights.zh: 黄金圈：辛格维利尔大裂谷、盖歇尔间歇泉与黄金瀑布

highlights.en: South coast: Seljalandsfoss, Vik black-sand beach and Reynisdrangar basalt columns
highlights.zh: 南海岸：塞里雅兰瀑布、维克黑沙滩与雷尼斯岩柱群

highlights.en: Jokulsarlon Glacier Lagoon and Diamond Beach
highlights.zh: 杰古沙龙冰河湖与钻石沙滩

highlights.en: Crystal-blue ice cave beneath the Vatnajokull glacier
highlights.zh: 瓦特纳冰川下的水晶蓝冰洞

highlights.en: Snaefellsnes Peninsula: Kirkjufell, Arnarstapi and the black church
highlights.zh: 斯奈山半岛：草帽山、阿尔纳斯塔皮与黑教堂

highlights.en: Optional Faxafloi northern-lights cruise and Reykjavik whale-watching
highlights.zh: 可选法赫萨峡湾出海追极光与雷克雅未克观鲸

highlights.en: Central 4-star hotels, all-inclusive pricing, no forced shopping
highlights.zh: 市中心四星级酒店、价格全包、全程无强制购物

includes.en: Ground transport: tour coach or minibus
includes.zh: 地面交通：旅游巴士或小型巴士

includes.en: Accommodation: 6 nights in comfort-class four-star hotels (note: Iceland has abolished official star ratings locally, so star levels follow Booking.com or Ctrip standards)
includes.zh: 酒店住宿：舒适型四星级酒店 6 晚（备注：由于冰岛当地取消星级评定，酒店星级以 Booking.com 或携程酒店星级为标准）

includes.en: Meals: breakfast throughout, served at the hotel or in another form
includes.zh: 包含餐饮：全程酒店或其他形式早餐

includes.en: Guide service: professional guide service, or a Chinese-speaking driver doubling as guide (note: for groups of 15 people or fewer, a driver-guide is arranged)
includes.zh: 导游服务：专业导游服务或者中文司机兼职导游（备注：15 人及以下则安排司机兼职导游）

includes.en: Driver service: professional driver service, or a Chinese-speaking driver doubling as guide (note: for groups of 15 people or fewer, a driver-guide is arranged)
includes.zh: 司机服务：职业司机服务或者中文司机兼职导游（备注：15 人及以下则安排司机兼职导游）

includes.en: Luggage allowance: 1 piece of 23 kg checked baggage plus 1 piece of small carry-on luggage
includes.zh: 行李说明：1 件 23 公斤行李及 1 件随身小行李

excludes.en: Passport: personal passport fees
excludes.zh: 护照：个人护照费用

excludes.en: Visa: tourist/visitor visa fees for the countries listed in the itinerary
excludes.zh: 签证：行程中所列旅游国家所需的观光签证费用

excludes.en: Insurance: travel insurance fees (if the itinerary involves high-risk sports, please verify whether your travel insurance covers that activity)
excludes.zh: 保险：旅游保险费用（如行程内涉及到高风险运动，请核实旅游保险是否包含该项运动）

excludes.en: Tips: a total of EUR 10/person/day in tips for the guide and driver, same price for adults and children
excludes.zh: 小费：游客支付导游和司机小费一共 10 欧/人/天，大小同价

excludes.en: Meals: apart from any special meals included in the itinerary, lunch and dinner are not included
excludes.zh: 餐饮：除行程内包含的特色餐外，行程中不包含午、晚正餐费用

excludes.en: Admission: any sights not noted as included (including but not limited to sights marked "(exterior)", and all "recommended", "optional", "experience" and other items where inclusion is not stated; if you wish to visit, please pay on your own)
excludes.zh: 门票：行程中未注明费用包含的景点（包括但不仅限于行程中注明「外观」的景点，「推荐」、「可选」、「体验」等等所有未提及费用包含的项目，如游客需要参观，敬请自理）

excludes.en: Extended stays: any accommodation, transport or sightseeing beyond the itinerary
excludes.zh: 延长住宿：行程外额外延长的住宿、交通、观光费用

excludes.en: Personal spending: drinks and alcohol, taxis, phone charges and other personal expenses
excludes.zh: 私人消费：如饮料酒类、出租车、电话费等个人消费

excludes.en: Other transport: transport not mentioned in the inclusions beyond the business coach or minibus, such as sightseeing trains or electric shuttle taxis in vehicle-restricted zones (at your own expense)
excludes.zh: 其他交通：除包含商务旅行车或者中巴之外，费用包含中未提及的其他交通费用，如车辆限行区的观光火车、电瓶出租车等费用敬请自理

excludes.en: Free-time activities: self-guided sightseeing at night, recommended/optional projects, and any resulting transport, meals, admission and shopping costs
excludes.zh: 自由活动：游客夜间自行游览及行程中的推荐项目，以及产生的交通、餐饮、门票、购物等费用

excludes.en: Experience activities: any travel experience activities not included in the itinerary
excludes.zh: 体验活动：行程中没有包含的各项旅游体验活动

excludes.en: Other costs: any fees not mentioned in the inclusions; for force majeure such as natural disasters, war or strikes, and special circumstances such as transport delays, flight cancellations/reschedules, embassy visa delays or insufficient group numbers, the agency reserves the right to charge a price difference for extra costs incurred (e.g. overseas visa extension, lodging, meals and transport, national air-fare adjustments)
excludes.zh: 其他费用：费用包含中未提及的费用。如因天灾、战争、罢工等不可抗力的原因，及因交通延阻、航班取消或更改时间、使馆延误出签证、人数不足等特殊情况或其他非我公司原因所导致的额外费用（如在外延期签证费、住、食及交通费、国家航空运价调整等），我公司有权追加差价

timeline.title_en: Reykjavik - Blue Lagoon - Reykjavik | An extra-long soak in Iceland's Blue Lagoon
timeline.title_zh: 雷克雅未克-蓝湖温泉-雷克雅未克丨超长时间体验冰岛蓝湖温泉
timeline.description_en: Gather in central Reykjavik in the morning and head toward Keflavik Airport and on to the Blue Lagoon (Blue Lagoon) geothermal spa, where you can choose to enjoy a long soak in the milky-blue, lava-ringed waters; in the afternoon you return via Keflavik Airport to downtown Reykjavik. There are four meeting options: 09:00 Reykjavik city or 09:45 Keflavik Airport (recommended, allows the Blue Lagoon), and 16:00 Reykjavik city or 16:45 Keflavik Airport (cannot do the Blue Lagoon). Because the Blue Lagoon is remote and the visit is long, there is no sightseeing or rest area arranged nearby if you don't go inside; note that Day 1 and Day 7 follow exactly the same coach route, so if you arrive late on Day 1 you can opt to do the Blue Lagoon on Day 7 instead. The lagoon area is home to the Lava restaurant beside the water and the Michelin-listed Moss restaurant, plus several eateries and snack bars. Overnight at the Reykjavik Grandi Central Hotel or an equivalent four-star hotel, set in the city's creative cultural district within walking distance of the whale-watching harbour and the city centre, featuring Nordic-modern decor and the Grandi Spa with geothermal pools.
timeline.description_zh: 上午在雷克雅未克市区集合，前往凯夫拉维克机场，随后抵达蓝湖温泉景区（Blue Lagoon），可选择在被嶙峋熔岩环绕的淡蓝色温泉中尽情泡浴；下午途经凯夫拉维克机场返回雷克雅未克市区。集合共四档：09:00 雷克雅未克市区或 09:45 凯夫拉维克机场（推荐，可选择蓝湖温泉），以及 16:00 雷克雅未克市区或 16:45 凯夫拉维克机场（无法选择蓝湖温泉）。由于蓝湖温泉地处偏僻、游览时间较长，如不入内则无法在景区周围安排游览和休息；请注意第一天与第七天的大巴路线完全相同，若第一天到达较晚，可改在第七天游览蓝湖。蓝湖之畔有岩浆餐厅（Lava 餐厅）和世界排名前列的米其林苔藓餐厅（Moss 餐厅），另设多家餐厅与简餐吧。夜宿雷克雅未克格兰迪中央酒店或同等四星级酒店，酒店坐落于冰岛创意文化区，步行可达赏鲸港口与市中心，北欧现代风装饰并配豪华格兰迪 Spa 温泉浴池。

timeline.title_en: Reykjavik - Golden Circle - Reykjavik | Volcanic and geothermal wonders above the Thingvellir rift
timeline.title_zh: 雷克雅未克-黄金圈-雷克雅未克丨辛格维利尔大裂谷上看火山地热奇观
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, set out for Iceland's Golden Circle (Gullni hringurinn), whose three signature sights lie along one looping road: Thingvellir National Park (Thingvellir National Park), the Geysir geothermal field (Geysir), and Gullfoss (Golden Falls). At Thingvellir, a UNESCO World Heritage Site since 2004 and cradle of one of the world's oldest democratic assemblies, you walk a rift valley of more than ten metres where the Eurasian and North American plates pull apart, with views over the Thingvellir plain and the mirror-still Thingvallavatn (Parliament Lake); about 1.5 hours. At Geysir you watch the geothermal field rumble and erupt, each burst lasting 1-2 minutes with water over 100C shooting up to 30 metres; about 1 hour. Gullfoss thunders down a drop of more than 50 metres, its mist often crowned by rainbows in the sunlight, so it seems made of gold; about 1 hour. Overnight at the Reykjavik Grandi Central Hotel or an equivalent four-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往冰岛黄金圈（Gullni hringurinn），三大精华景点散布在一条环形公路上：辛格维利尔国家公园（Thingvellir National Park）、盖歇尔间歇泉地热区（Geysir）和黄金瀑布（Gullfoss）。辛格维利尔国家公园 2004 年被联合国教科文组织列入世界遗产名录，是世界最古老民主议会会址之一，欧亚与美洲两大板块运动形成十余米落差的断裂谷地，可远眺辽阔的辛格维利尔平原与波平如镜的辛格瓦尔德拉湖（国会湖），游玩约 1 小时 30 分钟。盖歇尔间歇泉一带泉水灼热、热气弥漫，每次喷发持续 1-2 分钟，水温高达 100 多度，水柱可达 30 多米，游玩约 1 小时。黄金瀑布气势宏大，湍急水流落差达 50 多米，阳光下水雾中彩虹若隐若现，仿佛由黄金造就，游玩约 1 小时。夜宿雷克雅未克格兰迪中央酒店或同等四星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Reykjavik - Vik - Glacier Lagoon | Through basalt canyons and the black-sand beach to the Seljalandsfoss secret world
timeline.title_zh: 雷克雅未克-维克-冰河湖丨穿越玄武岩峡谷黑沙滩，探访塞里雅兰秘境
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, drive to Seljalandsfoss (Seljalandsfoss), a roughly 60-metre-high, 25-metre-wide fall in southern Iceland whose connecting hidden waterfall is a photographer's favourite (about 30 min), then to Skogafoss (Skogafoss), a powerful fall flanked by green-covered cliffs (about 30 min). Continuing toward Vik, you can choose how to reach the DC-3 plane wreckage on Solheimasandur's black sand: hike, take the dedicated electric shuttle buggy [EUR 36], or cross the black sand on an ATV all-terrain vehicle [EUR 198] (the buggy and the ATV are mutually exclusive). The wreck is a 1973 US Navy C-47 forced down on the beach, made famous by Justin Bieber's "I'll Show You" MV (about 1.5 hours); note the buggy/ATV may be cancelled in extreme weather or unavailable on holidays/peak dates, in which case you may walk, and the ATV requires a driving licence (a Chinese car or motorcycle licence is accepted). You then explore the black-sand beach beside the village of Vik (about 30 min) and the Reynisdrangar basalt sea stacks (Reynisdrangar) beneath Reynisfjall, with their organ-pipe basalt columns and the Halsanefshellir cave, featured in Game of Thrones (about 30 min). Overnight at the Glacier Lagoon Hotel or an equivalent four-star hotel, a Nordic brick-and-timber building beside glaciers and lakes whose restaurant is known for cod and lobster, and from whose huge windows you may glimpse the aurora.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往塞里雅兰瀑布（Seljalandsfoss），这座冰岛南部约 60 米高、25 米宽的瀑布与连通的秘密瀑布是摄影师镜头下的宠儿（约 30 分钟），随后前往彩虹瀑布（即斯科加瀑布 Skogafoss），水流奔腾、两旁山崖绿植环绕（约 30 分钟）。继续前往维克，可三选一抵达索尔黑马桑都（Solheimasandur）黑沙滩上的 DC-3 飞机残骸：徒步、乘坐极地专用电瓶摆渡车【36 欧】，或乘 ATV 全地形越野车穿越黑沙滩【198 欧】（电瓶车与 ATV 仅可二选一）。该残骸为 1973 年迫降于此的美国海军 C-47，因贾斯汀·比伯《I'll Show You》MV 而成网红景点（约 1 小时 30 分钟）；遇极端天气或节假日旺季，电瓶车/越野车可能取消或无法预定，可改为徒步，ATV 项目需持驾照（中国汽车或摩托驾照同样可用）。随后游览紧邻维克小镇的黑沙滩（约 30 分钟），以及雷尼斯山（Reynisfjall）下矗立于大西洋中的雷尼斯岩柱群（Reynisdrangar），管风琴状玄武岩柱与海蚀洞穴（Halsanefshellir）曾为《权力的游戏》取景地（约 30 分钟）。夜宿冰川泻湖酒店或同等四星级酒店——典型北欧砖石木质建筑，与山川湖泊融为一体，餐厅招牌为当日新鲜鳕鱼和龙虾，幸运时可在巨大落地窗前观测到极光。

timeline.title_en: Glacier Lagoon - Diamond Beach - Glacier Lagoon | Super-jeep to the crystal-blue ice cave and giant ice palace
timeline.title_zh: 冰河湖-钻石沙滩-冰河湖丨乘坐超级冰川吉普车，直达水晶蓝冰洞巨型冰宫殿
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, choose one of two mutually exclusive options at the foot of Vatnajokull National Park: a guided glacier hike to explore the blue ice cave [EUR 178/adult], or a super-jeep ride to the crystal-blue ice cave [EUR 198/adult]; both run only October-April, the cave's shape, size and colour differ each year, and the visit may be cancelled if the guide judges the weather unsafe. Dress for the outdoors with waterproof jacket and trousers and sturdy waterproof, non-slip hiking boots (crampons fit over hiking boots, so boots are required); helmets and crampons are provided, the minimum age is 6, and groups are usually 12 or 14 people. The crystal-blue ice cave glows pure translucent blue as sunlight angles in through the high glacier, its walls flowing like a frozen blue sea with prehistoric ice patterns and ancient bubbles sealed inside. In the afternoon, visit the jewel of Vatnajokull, the Jokulsarlon Glacier Lagoon, where thousand-year-old icebergs in white, blue, green and ash-grey drift past and seals sometimes bask (about 1 hour), plus the Diamond Beach. Vatnajokull National Park, where the Wall and the lands beyond it were filmed for Game of Thrones, holds Vatnajokull, the largest ice cap outside the poles, covering about 8% of Iceland and averaging 400 metres thick (about 1 hour). Overnight at the Glacier Lagoon Hotel or an equivalent four-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后在瓦特纳冰川国家公园脚下二选一（不可同时参加）：由专业向导带领的冰川徒步＋探索蓝冰洞【178 欧/成人】，或乘坐超级吉普车欣赏蓝冰洞【198 欧/成人】；两项均仅每年 10 月至 4 月可体验，冰洞的位置、形状、大小与颜色每年不同，如向导出于天气与安全因素认为不适宜进入则取消蓝冰洞入内。请穿着适合户外及进入冰川地区的衣物，防水外衣裤与防水防滑登山鞋为必备（冰爪鞋套在登山鞋外，故登山鞋必须），活动提供头盔与冰爪，最低参加年龄 6 周岁，冰川游览通常 12 人或 14 人一组。水晶蓝冰洞宛若蓝色水晶宫殿，高海拔斜射的阳光令其呈现纯净透亮的蓝色光芒，冰壁如凝固的蓝色海洋般流动，封存着亿万年前的史前冰纹与气泡。下午游览瓦特纳冰川皇冠上的明珠——杰古沙龙冰河湖，湖中漂浮着白、蓝、绿及火山灰造成的灰、棕色千年浮冰，运气好可见成群海狮晒太阳（约 1 小时），并游览钻石沙滩。瓦特纳冰川国家公园曾为《权力的游戏》绝境长城及长城以北取景地，园内的瓦特纳冰原是世界上极地以外最大的冰盖，覆盖冰岛约 8% 面积、平均厚度约 400 米（约 1 小时）。夜宿冰川泻湖酒店或同等四星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Glacier Lagoon - Reykjavik | Sailing Faxafloi bay to meet the aurora and whales
timeline.title_zh: 冰河湖-雷克雅未克丨法赫萨海湾出海，北极光与鲸鱼偶遇
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, drive back to Reykjavik and explore the city freely: Hallgrimskirkja, the city's landmark church (about 20 min; may be closed if an event is held inside), the Harpa Concert Hall and Conference Centre with its kaleidoscopic glass facade inspired by the aurora and volcanic basalt (about 30 min), a stroll around Lake Tjornin (Tjornin) at the heart of the city (about 20 min), and the Sun Voyager sculpture (Solfar) by Jon Gunnar Arnason on Saebraut by the sea (about 20 min), wandering the old Grandi harbour district. In the evening you may optionally head to the pier on your own and board the aurora-hunting cruise [EUR 128, same price for adults and children], a roughly two-hour sailing out to Faxafloi bay with a warm cabin, a 360-degree viewing deck and an English-speaking aurora guide (no Chinese guide on board); typical schedule is boarding 20:45, hunting from 21:00, returning around 23:00, after which you make your own way back to the hotel. The hotel is about 500 metres from the pier and walkable; in extreme weather the sailing may be cancelled with a refund or rescheduling, but if conditions allow sailing yet no aurora is seen, the trip counts as delivered and is non-refundable. Overnight at the Reykjavik Grandi Central Hotel or an equivalent four-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后返回雷克雅未克，自由参观：雷克雅未克大教堂（哈尔格林姆教堂，市地标，约 20 分钟，当日如遇教堂内举办活动可能无法入内）、哈帕音乐厅和会议中心（玻璃外型如巨大万花筒，灵感源自夜幕极光与火山石，约 30 分钟）、市中心的托宁湖（Tjornin，约 20 分钟）边漫步，以及海边 Saebraut 路上由 Jon Gunnar Arnason 设计的太阳航海者雕塑（Solfar，约 20 分钟），并游走于格兰迪旧港地区。当晚可选择自行前往码头，持预订单登船，开启约 2 小时的追光之旅前往法赫萨峡湾追猎北极光（当日无中文导游，船上有英文向导），船内温暖舒适、设 360 度全景平台并有专业极光向导【出海追猎极光 128 欧，大小同价】；时间通常为 20:45 登船、21:00 开始、约 23:00 结束，活动后自行返回酒店。酒店距码头约 500 米可步行到达；如遇极端天气出海可能取消，可退款或换时间，但若天气适合出海而实际未观测到极光，则视为该行程已产生、费用不可退。夜宿雷克雅未克格兰迪中央酒店或同等四星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Reykjavik - Snaefellsnes - Reykjavik | A panoramic tour of the Greenland-style fjord peninsula
timeline.title_zh: 雷克雅未克-斯奈山-雷克雅未克丨格林兰风情峡湾镇斯奈山全景游
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, head to the Snaefellsnes Peninsula in western Iceland, nicknamed the "Gateway to the Centre of the Earth," which packs almost all of Iceland's geological wonders into one peninsula. First visit Kirkjufell (Kirkjufell), the much-photographed 460-metre "church mountain" better known as the straw-hat mountain, with the classic shot framing Kirkjufellsfoss waterfall in the foreground (about 1 hour). Then go to the fishing village of Arnarstapi (Arnarstapi) on the southern coast, with its elegant old seaside houses and bizarre sea-eroded rocks, to see the Bardur stone statue (the giant figure affectionately called "Grandpa Octopus," guardian spirit of the peninsula; about 15 min) and the bird's-kiss viewpoint, before visiting the Budakirkja black church (Budakirkja), a small black timber chapel that has stood for three centuries on the open lava field with a quiet, solitary beauty (about 15 min). Note: Snaefellsnes lies in a blizzard zone, so if the local weather service issues an orange-or-higher warning or a blizzard, the day automatically changes to a Reykjavik day tour including "Perlan" or "FlyOver Iceland," with free admission provided by the agency but no refund or other compensation. Overnight at the Reykjavik Grandi Central Hotel or an equivalent four-star hotel.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往冰岛西部的斯奈山半岛，被称为《地心之门》，几乎展现了冰岛所有地质地貌奇观。首先游览草帽山（Kirkjufell），这座海拔约 460 米的山因形似草帽而得名（冰岛语意为「教会山」），经典机位需走到教会山马路对面停车区沿路径走约五分钟、过桥以教会山瀑布为前景（约 1 小时）。随后前往南海岸线上的格林兰风情渔村阿尔纳斯塔皮（Arnarstapi），海滨古老优雅的房屋与沿岸奇诡海蚀岩石是小镇特色，参观 Bardur 石像（被游客亲切称为「章鱼爷爷」的巨型石像，斯奈山半岛守护神的化身，约 15 分钟）与鸟之吻景点，之后参观布迪尔黑教堂（Budakirkja），这座在空旷熔岩原上倔强挺立了三个世纪的小黑屋，带着沉静而孤独之美（约 15 分钟）。重要提示：斯奈山半岛地处暴风雪区，如当地气象部门发布橙色以上警告或暴雪暴风，当天行程将自动更改为含「珍珠楼」或「飞跃冰岛」的雷克雅未克一日游，旅行社免费提供门票，但无法退费或获得其他赔偿。夜宿雷克雅未克格兰迪中央酒店或同等四星级酒店。

timeline.title_en: Reykjavik - Keflavik Airport | Free time in the gastronomic capital of the new age of seafaring
timeline.title_zh: 雷克雅未克-凯夫拉维克机场丨自由行走在新航海艺术的美食之都
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, choose to explore downtown Reykjavik freely, follow the coach to Keflavik Airport, or make your own way to the pier for a whale-watching trip, then end your journey. There are three dispersal options: 10:00 Keflavik Airport (cannot do whale watching), 11:00 Reykjavik city after self check-out (recommended, allows whale watching), or 17:00 Keflavik Airport (recommended, allows whale watching). You must check out by 11:00 to avoid extra hotel charges, but may store luggage at the hotel, which sits near the harbour pier in a commercial street within walking distance of the departure pier. Day 1 and Day 7 share the exact same coach route, so if you arrived late on Day 1 you can do the Blue Lagoon today. The optional North Atlantic whale-watching cruise out of Reykjavik [EUR 120/person] is about three hours over Faxafloi bay, home to fin whales, orcas, pilot whales and basking sharks, with a professional guide; typical schedule is boarding 12:30, returning to harbour 16:00, then 16:15 to the airport. As on Day 5, in extreme weather the sailing may be cancelled with refund or rescheduling, but if conditions allow sailing and no whales are seen the trip counts as delivered and is non-refundable. No accommodation is provided on this final day.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后可选择自由游览雷克雅未克市区、跟随大巴车前往凯夫拉维克机场，或自行前往码头出海观鲸，随后结束美好行程。集散共三档：10:00 凯夫拉维克机场（无法选择观鲸）、11:00 雷克雅未克市区自助退房后集散（推荐，可选观鲸），或 17:00 凯夫拉维克机场（推荐，可选观鲸）。请务必于 11 点前主动退房，否则将产生额外酒店费用，行李可寄存酒店；酒店位于雷克雅未克海港码头附近的商业街区，步行可达出海码头。第一天与第七天大巴行程路线完全相同，如第一天到达较晚，可在最后一天选择蓝湖温泉。可选的雷克雅未克北大西洋出海观鲸【120 欧/人】约 3 小时，法赫萨峡湾常年出没长须鲸、虎鲸、领航鲸、姥鲨等，船上有专业向导讲解；时间通常为 12:30 登船、16:00 返回海港、16:15 前往机场。与第五天相同，如遇极端天气出海可能取消，可退款或换时间，但若天气适合出海而未观测到鲸鱼，则视为该行程已产生、费用不可退。当天无住宿。

meeting_en: Central Reykjavik (morning meet-up); pick-up also available at Keflavik Airport per the departure notice.
meeting_zh: 雷克雅未克市区集合（上午）；亦可按出团通知书安排在凯夫拉维克机场集合。

faqs.question_en: What are the meeting times and points, and which routes are available?
faqs.question_zh: 集合时间和集合地点有哪些？有哪些线路？
faqs.answer_en: Route A (standard recommended): Departure day, meet 09:00 Reykjavik city or 09:45 Keflavik Airport (both require choosing the Blue Lagoon), or 16:00 Reykjavik city / 16:45 Keflavik Airport (no activity possible). End day, dispersal at 10:00 Keflavik Airport (no activity), 11:00 Reykjavik city after self check-out (whale watching possible), or 17:00 Keflavik Airport (whale watching or Blue Lagoon possible). Because Day 1 and Day 7 share the same route, if you arrive late on Day 1 you may do the Blue Lagoon on Day 7 (confirm the end point with sales). Any Blue Lagoon slot can be swapped for a whale-watching slot; if you skip the Blue Lagoon, stay in Reykjavik or do whale watching. Route B (afternoon arrival): departure day self check-in after 14:00 in Reykjavik (12:30 whale watching possible) or meet 16:45 Keflavik Airport; end day dispersal 15:30 Reykjavik city or 17:00 Keflavik Airport. Route C: departure 09:00 Reykjavik city; end 10:00 airport (no whale watching), 11:00 Reykjavik after self check-out (whale watching recommended) or 17:00 airport (whale watching recommended). Route D: departure self check-in after 14:00 Reykjavik (12:30 whale watching possible) or meet 16:45 airport (no activity); end 18:00 Reykjavik city. Departure details may change, so confirm them against the Group Notice before booking connecting travel. This product is an airport meet-and-disperse tour and does NOT include airport pick-up/drop-off (no charge and no refund for it); if your flight is delayed you make your own way to meet the group. Reykjavik airport to the city is about 45 minutes; to the Blue Lagoon about 15 minutes; the coach is about EUR 25-30/person roughly every 30 minutes; taxis queue outside the terminal at about EUR 120 (2-3 people) or EUR 150-200 (4-7 people).
faqs.answer_zh: A 线（标准推荐路线）：出发当天 09:00 雷克雅未克市区或 09:45 凯夫拉维克机场集合（均需选择蓝湖温泉），或 16:00 市区 / 16:45 机场（不可选择任何活动）。结束当天 10:00 机场（不可选活动）、11:00 市区自助退房后集散（可选观鲸）或 17:00 机场（可选观鲸或蓝湖）。因第一天与第七天路线相同，若第一天到达较晚可在第七天前往蓝湖，请与销售再次确认结束地点；所有蓝湖时段都可对换出海观鲸时段，如不去蓝湖建议留在市区游览或选择观鲸。B 线（午后到达路线）：出发当天 14:00 后市区自助入住（可选 12:30 观鲸）或 16:45 机场集合；结束当天 15:30 市区或 17:00 机场集散。C 线：出发当天 09:00 市区集合；结束当天 10:00 机场（不可观鲸）、11:00 市区自助退房后集散（推荐观鲸）或 17:00 机场（推荐观鲸）。D 线：出发当天 14:00 后市区自助入住（可选 12:30 观鲸）或 16:45 机场集合（不可选任何活动）；结束当天 18:00 市区集散。出发信息可能调整，请见出团通知书后再预订衔接行程。本产品为机场集散，不含接送机服务（既不收费也不退费），如航班晚点需自行前往与团队集合。机场往返市中心约 45 分钟，机场到蓝湖约 15 分钟；大巴约每人 25-30 欧、约 30 分钟一趟；出租车在航站楼外排队，约 120 欧（2-3 人）或 150-200 欧（4-7 人）。

faqs.question_en: How does the Blue Lagoon visit work?
faqs.question_zh: 蓝湖温泉游览有哪些注意事项？
faqs.answer_en: Collect your towel at the entrance and change into a swimsuit in the changing room first; the package includes one face mask and one drink. There is no time limit on soaking, but you must change one hour before departure to be ready to leave. Inside there are rest areas, several restaurants and two snack bars, and people usually stay 4-6 hours. A swimsuit is required; T-shirts and shorts are refused entry to the water. Since you cannot wait around inside the lagoon area, the coach leaves within 5 minutes of meeting, so finish getting ready in advance. Any Blue Lagoon slot can be swapped for a whale-watching slot. Guests joining on the morning of Day 1 (airport or city) are organised for the Blue Lagoon; because the lagoon is remote, if you don't join it there is no sightseeing or rest arranged, so please buy the afternoon-departure option instead. Guests joining on the afternoon of Day 1 (city or airport) cannot visit the Blue Lagoon; to do it, choose a morning departure.
faqs.answer_zh: 在温泉入口领取浴巾后，先到更衣室换好泳衣，套票内含一次面膜和一份饮料。泡温泉不限时，但需在出发前一小时更衣、提前做好离开准备。景区内设休息区、多个餐厅和两个简餐吧，通常停留 4-6 小时。泡温泉要求穿泳衣，T 恤短裤将被拒绝下水。由于蓝湖景区内无法等候，集合后 5 分钟内即出发前往酒店，敬请提前梳妆准备。所有蓝湖时段都可对换出海观鲸时段。第一天上午参团（机场、市区）的游客将组织蓝湖活动，因蓝湖地处偏僻，如不参加则无法安排游览和休息，请购买当天下午参团的产品；第一天下午参团（市区、机场）的游客无法游览蓝湖，如需游览请选择当天上午参团的行程。

faqs.question_en: Can I choose a different number of days?
faqs.question_zh: 这个团是否可以选择不同的天数？
faqs.answer_en: Yes. This is a loop-route tour running a fixed route each day, so you can freely choose 5 days (group no. 959), 6 days (group no. 969) or 7 days (group no. 979) according to your own plans. Different itineraries have different boarding times and activity combinations, which you select via the booking form for your join time and place.
faqs.answer_zh: 可以。本产品为循环路线团（每天走固定路线），游客可根据个人行程自由选择 5 天（团号 959）、6 天（团号 969）或 7 天（团号 979）。不同行程有不同的上团时间和活动项目搭配，可在报名表格内选择不同的参团时间和地点。

faqs.question_en: What should I note about the glacier hike or super-jeep blue-ice-cave option?
faqs.question_zh: 冰川徒步或吉普车探索蓝冰洞有哪些注意事项？
faqs.answer_en: All glacier activities are not open to children under 6, who must be accompanied by a guardian. Wear clothing suitable for the outdoors and glacier terrain: waterproof outerwear and trousers and comfortable hiking boots are required, with warm, easy-to-layer clothing underneath. Bring a backpack with snacks and water. Professional equipment such as helmet and crampons (worn over hiking boots, so boots are essential) is provided; if you feel the cold, wear gloves and a thin hat under the helmet. Follow the professional guide and never explore on your own, as the glacier is huge and the terrain changeable. The blue ice cave is a natural gift whose location, shape, size and colour differ every year; this product's cave adventure also includes a little glacier hiking. Both the glacier hike and the super-jeep run long, and the agency does not strongly recommend doing both since the scenery and area are largely the same: the super-jeep goes deeper into the glacier and may find larger caves, while the glacier hike offers more outdoor experience.
faqs.answer_zh: 所有冰川活动 6 岁以下无法参加，必须监护人陪同。请穿着适合户外及进入冰川地区的衣服，防水外衣裤与舒适登山鞋为必须，里面穿保暖易穿脱的衣服，建议随身带双肩包装少许零食和水。活动提供专业冰川器材如头盔、冰爪鞋（套在登山鞋外，故登山鞋为必须）；怕冷请戴手套、薄帽子（戴在头盔下面）。届时请听从专业向导指导，冰川地貌多变，请勿自行探索。蓝冰洞为大自然天然馈赠，每年形成的位置、形状、大小与颜色都不尽相同，本产品的蓝冰洞探险也融入少量冰川徒步体验。冰川徒步与超级吉普车活动时间都较长，因景观和游览区域基本相同，我社不强烈建议同时选择两项：超级吉普车深入冰川较深区域、可能发现更大冰洞，冰川徒步则有更多户外体验。

faqs.question_en: What about meals?
faqs.question_zh: 餐饮如何安排？
faqs.answer_en: The itinerary includes breakfast; for all other meals you choose where to eat on your own, and the guide can recommend restaurants.
faqs.answer_zh: 行程内包含早餐，其余餐饮请自行选择就餐，导游可推荐餐厅。

faqs.question_en: What are the rules and fees for children?
faqs.question_zh: 儿童费用如何规定？
faqs.answer_en: Children under 16 and under 1.6 m who share a room with their parents may enjoy the triple-occupancy price. The tour does not accept infants under 2 years old. Children under 6 may be unable to join the blue-ice-cave adventure; if a child does not take part in ice activities, at least one parent must stay at the hotel to accompany the child.
faqs.answer_zh: 16 岁以下及 1 米 6 以下随父母同住，可享受三人行价格。该团不接受 2 岁以下婴幼儿报名。6 岁以下儿童可能无法参与蓝冰洞入内探险活动；如儿童不参与冰上活动，需父母至少留一位在酒店陪伴儿童。

faqs.question_en: Is airport transfer included?
faqs.question_zh: 是否含接送机费用？
faqs.answer_en: No. This product is an airport meet-and-disperse tour and does not include pick-up/drop-off; since it is not a private transfer, if your flight is delayed you must make your own way to meet the group that day (and if your arrival time doesn't fit, go to the hotel to check in on your own). Reykjavik airport to the city is about 45 minutes and to the Blue Lagoon about 15 minutes; the coach is about EUR 25-30/person roughly every 30 minutes, and taxis queue outside the terminal.
faqs.answer_zh: 不含。本产品为指定时间内旅游团机场集散，不包含接送机服务；由于并非专车接送，如航班晚点，当天需自行前往景点与团队集合（如当天抵达航班时间不合适，请自行前往酒店入住）。雷克雅未克国际机场往返市中心约 45 分钟车程，到蓝湖温泉约 15 分钟车程；大巴车约每人 25-30 欧、约 30 分钟一趟，出租车在机场航站楼外排队等候。

faqs.question_en: If I book the same activities myself, will they match the ones in the product?
faqs.question_zh: 如果我们自行预订相同的活动项目，是否和产品内的一致？
faqs.answer_en: The agency cannot confirm whether whale-watching, sailing or blue-ice-cave activities you book yourself will incur extra transport costs or fail to connect with the itinerary. In particular, for whale watching before boarding: if you choose the 12:30 sailing, the coach leaves Reykjavik at 16:15, so if you buy a different time or pier yourself the coach may not connect smoothly.
faqs.answer_zh: 我社无法确认客户自行预订的观鲸、出海或蓝冰洞项目是否会产生额外交通费用或无法衔接行程。特别是上团前的出海观鲸时间：若当天选择 12:30 出海观鲸，则 16:15 大巴车离开雷克雅未克市区，如游客自行购买不同时刻或码头，大巴车将无法顺利衔接。

faqs.question_en: How are the driver and guide arranged?
faqs.question_zh: 司机及导游如何安排？
faqs.answer_en: Arrangement depends on the number of registrants: groups of 15 or fewer use a minibus or business van with a Chinese-speaking driver doubling as guide; groups of more than 15 use a tour coach with a professional driver and a dedicated guide.
faqs.answer_zh: 本产品根据报名人数安排旅游巴士或小型巴士：15 人以下为小型巴士或商务车，由中文司机兼导游；15 人以上为旅游巴士，配职业司机及专职导游。

faqs.question_en: What's the difference between the whale-watching sailing and the aurora-hunting sailing?
faqs.question_zh: 出海观鲸和出海追猎极光活动有什么区别？
faqs.answer_en: The routes and activity areas differ somewhat: whale watching is scheduled in daylight hours, while aurora hunting is at night. Although both are sailings, the content and experience are completely different. If you love the ocean, in winter both aurora hunting and whale watching are recommended; in summer, whale watching alone is recommended.
faqs.answer_zh: 游览行程和活动区域有一定差异：出海观鲸安排在日照时间，追猎极光安排在夜晚。虽同为出海，但活动内容和体验完全不同。如果喜欢海洋，冬季推荐极光追猎和出海观鲸两项，夏季推荐出海观鲸一项。

faqs.question_en: Is the Snaefellsnes Peninsula itinerary recommended?
faqs.question_zh: 是否推荐游览斯奈山半岛的行程？
faqs.answer_en: Iceland's south coast, the capital/Golden Circle and the Snaefellsnes Peninsula are three different types of landscape. The Snaefellsnes route is fairly long, has only natural scenery and no activities, and offers only simple meals; but its distinctive fjord towns and rich Greenland-style villages are very much worth visiting. If you have enough time, the itinerary including Snaefellsnes is recommended.
faqs.answer_zh: 冰岛的南部海岸线、首都黄金圈和斯奈山半岛为三种不同地貌特征。斯奈山半岛路程较长，只有自然风光、没有活动项目，也只有简餐；但独特的峡湾镇风景和浓郁格林兰风情的小镇非常值得推荐游览。如果时间充分，推荐选择含斯奈山半岛的行程。

faqs.question_en: Can you recommend Icelandic food?
faqs.question_zh: 是否可以推荐冰岛美食？
faqs.answer_en: Restaurants along the south coast and on Snaefellsnes are few, mainly the hotel restaurants and simple meals at sights. But Reykjavik, the gastronomic capital of the new age of seafaring, has many famous restaurants within walking distance of the hotel, including the very popular Sjavargrillid (Icelandic creative cuisine), the traditional seafood restaurant Messin, the highly-ranked Caruso, and the grill house Grillmarkadurinn.
faqs.answer_zh: 南部海岸线和斯奈山半岛餐厅较少，主要推荐酒店餐厅和景点简餐；但首都雷克雅未克被称为新航海时代的美食之都，多所著名餐厅均在酒店步行范围内，特别是火爆的 Sjavargrillid 冰岛创意佳肴餐厅、冰岛传统海鲜餐厅 Messin、当地排名前茅的 Caruso 餐厅，以及特色烤肉店 Grillmarkadurinn。

faqs.question_en: Does this product include aurora-hunting activities?
faqs.question_zh: 本产品是否包含追猎极光的活动？
faqs.answer_en: Iceland is entirely within the aurora belt, and the south coast often sees aurora especially from October to April. On clear, cloudless nights you don't need to hunt: the itinerary stays at a Glacier Lagoon view hotel, a great spot to watch for the aurora. You can also choose a professional aurora-hunting cruise for a higher success rate.
faqs.answer_zh: 作为追光圣地的冰岛全境都在极光带内，尤其 10 月到 4 月在南部海岸线常能看到极光。晴朗无云的夜晚无需追猎，行程中安排住冰河湖景观酒店，是守候极光的好位置；也可选择专业出海追光船，成功率更高。

faqs.question_en: Do I need a visa?
faqs.question_zh: 是否需要签证？
faqs.answer_en: Yes. This product does not include visa fees; you need a Schengen visa (single or multiple entry) — if you need it arranged, choose a Schengen-visa product. After booking, the agency provides all materials for the Schengen visa application free of charge (see the detailed materials list), and arranges Schengen travel insurance meeting visa requirements if you entrust the visa to us (otherwise buy your own insurance). Your passport must be valid for at least six months from the departure date or customs may refuse entry. "Visa Worry-Free" guarantee: if you sign the tour contract 61 days before departure but have not obtained the visa within 45 days before departure, the agency bears all losses and immediately refunds your full tour cost; guests who don't meet this clause and fail to obtain the visa are refunded per the change-and-cancellation terms. A refusal must be reported within 48 hours with the consulate's refusal letter, and any supplementary/changed materials submitted within 5 days. Visa fees, visa service fees, Schengen insurance fees and visa-centre appointment fees are all non-refundable and non-transferable, even if the product is changed or cancelled.
faqs.answer_zh: 需要。本产品不包含签证费用，需办理申根签证（单次或多次入境）；如需代办，请选择申根签证产品。预订后免费提供办理申根签证的全部材料（参考详细材料清单），如委托我社办理签证，我社为您购买符合申根要求的申根旅游保险（未委托则需自行购买保险并自行负责理赔）。护照有效期需在离境之日起至少还有六个月，否则海关有权拒绝入境。「保签无忧」：游客在出发日前 61 天与我社签约，如在出发前 45 天内未获取签证，我社承担所有损失并立即退还全部旅游费用；不符合该条款且未正常获签者按「退改与取消条款」退费。如遇拒签需在 48 小时内通知我社并出具使领馆拒签函，补充或更改材料需在 5 天内提交。签证费、签证服务费、申根保险费、签证中心预约费均不可退款、不可更改使用者，即使产品退改签也无法退款。

faqs.question_en: Booking, changes & cancellation
faqs.question_zh: 预订、变更与取消须知
faqs.answer_en: Both the agency and traveller may cancel without reason up to 30 days before departure (excluding the 30th day); after that, refunds follow the Change and Cancellation Terms. Because Iceland's weather is changeable and winter blizzards can strand travellers, the agency strongly recommends arriving one day before the tour and leaving one day after, with reasonable flight-connection buffers (at least 5 hours for transfers at the same airport, 7 hours for different airports in the same city); losses from not following this are borne by the traveller. The visiting order may shift with flights, traffic, ferry cancellations or strikes without counting as a breach, but the route and sights stay the same. This is a shared/join-in group tour with a minimum group size of 10 people; if 10 is not reached 30 days before departure either side may cancel, and self-paid activities not reaching 10 people may be cancelled and become free time. Rooms: single travellers pay a single-room-difference deposit (refunded pro-rata if successfully matched to share); two registrants default to a standard double (bed type assigned by the hotel, not selectable); triples default to two parents plus a minor in a family room. Booking does not equal confirmation — pay promptly, expect second confirmation within 48 hours, and book connecting flights only after confirmation. All pricing is in EUR; if you pay in CNY the amount uses that day's Bank of China "EUR sell" rate at the time of payment, and refunds likewise use the rate on the refund day, with any exchange/bank fees borne by the traveller. Note the weather contingencies: if an orange-or-higher/severe-wind warning is issued, all outdoor activities are cancelled and travellers sheltered nearby with no price difference refundable; the Snaefellsnes day may be replaced by a Reykjavik day tour with free "Perlan"/"FlyOver Iceland" admission but no refund; whale-watching/aurora sailings that go ahead but sight nothing count as delivered and are non-refundable.
faqs.answer_zh: 出发前 30 天（不含第 30 天）旅行社和旅行者均可无理由取消，之后按《更改与取消条例条款》退费。因冰岛天气多变、冬季易被暴风雪围困，我社强烈建议团前一天到达、团后一天离开，并预留合理航班衔接时间（同机场转机至少 5 小时、同城不同机场至少 7 小时），未遵守导致的损失由旅行者自行承担。受航班、交通、渡轮取消或罢工影响，游览先后顺序可能调整，但路线及景点不变，不视为旅行社违约。本产品为散客拼团，成团人数为 10 人；出发前 30 天未达成团人数双方均可解约，自费活动未达 10 人可取消并改为自由活动。房型：单人报名默认含单人房差押金（成功拼房后按比例退还）；两人报名默认标准双人间（床型由酒店当天安排，不可选）；三人家庭间默认两位父母与一位未成年儿童。支付不等于确认行程，请及时支付，最多 48 小时二次确认，未确认前请勿预订衔接机票酒店。所有定价以欧元为单位，如选择人民币支付，以当天支付时中国银行「欧元卖出价」实时换算为准，退款同样适用申请退款当日汇率，汇率差及银行手续费由旅行者承担。请留意天气应急：发布橙色以上或狂风警告时取消一切户外活动并就近避险，无差价可退；斯奈山当天可能更改为含「珍珠楼」或「飞跃冰岛」的雷克雅未克一日游，免费提供门票但无法退费；出海观鲸/追极光如成行而未见鲸鱼或极光，视为行程已产生、费用不可退。

faqs.question_en: Health & safety requirements
faqs.question_zh: 健康与安全须知
faqs.answer_en: Please have a health check before travelling and do NOT sign up if you have any of the following: infectious diseases (e.g. active tuberculosis, typhoid); cardiovascular disease (e.g. severe hypertension, heart insufficiency, myocardial ischemia or infarction); cerebrovascular disease (e.g. cerebral embolism, hemorrhage, tumour); respiratory disease (e.g. emphysema, cor pulmonale); psychiatric conditions including epilepsy; severe anemia (hemoglobin below 50 g/L); or recovery from major surgery. Pregnancy: at 35 weeks or more you cannot join under any circumstances; at 28 weeks or more you must provide a doctor's report within 7 days plus the attending doctor's consent; under 28 weeks please consider carefully, sign the agency's disclaimer, and you cannot join adventure, skiing, sailing, aerial or outdoor activities. Disabled travellers need a 7-day medical report and attending-doctor consent, an accompanying immediate family member, and at least 61 days' advance request for a reserved place and facilities. Travellers over 70 need a health certificate and medical report and an accompanying immediate family member (or sign the disclaimer); the tour involves long days requiring a certain walking ability and stamina, so those not fit should reconsider, and adventure/ski/sailing/aerial/outdoor items need attending-doctor consent. Minors (under 18) must be accompanied by an immediate relative or guardian; some sights have special limits for those under 18, 12 or 6; infants under 2 are not accepted; children under 30 kg or infants under 6 need a confirmed EU-standard child safety seat; an unaccompanied minor needs both parents' authorization letter (or the absent parent's written authorization). Per Article 15 of the Tourism Law (and the 2025-revised Infectious Disease Prevention Law), travellers must truthfully declare health information relevant to the trip (pregnancy, lactation, chronic illness, infectious-disease history, suspected symptoms or recent travel to epidemic areas) and follow safety warnings; concealment causing harm makes the traveller liable for resulting medical, isolation, compensation costs and the agency may terminate the contract without refund.
faqs.answer_zh: 为确保顺利出行，请出行前做一次必要的身体检查，如有下列情况请勿报名：传染性疾病（如活动期肺结核、伤寒）；心血管疾病（如严重高血压、心功能不全、心肌缺氧、心肌梗塞）；脑血管疾病（如脑栓塞、脑出血、脑肿瘤）；呼吸系统疾病（如肺气肿、肺心病）；精神病（含癫痫及各种精神病）；严重贫血（血红蛋白低于 50 克/升）；大中型手术恢复期。孕妇：妊娠 35 周及以上任何情况下都无法参团；28 周及以上需提供 7 日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书；28 周以下请慎重报名，需签署旅行社免责声明书，且无法参加探险、滑雪、出海、高空、户外等项目。残疾人需提供 7 日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书、需直系家属陪同，并至少提前 61 天申请预留位置及专用设施。70 周岁以上老年人需提供健康证明、体检报告并由直系家属陪同（否则需签免责声明书）；本行程较长、需要一定步行能力和体力，体力不支者请慎重报名，涉及探险、滑雪、出海、高空、户外等项目需持主治医师同意书。未成年人（未满 18 周岁）需由直系亲属或监护人陪同，部分项目对未满 18/12/6 周岁有特殊限定；不接受 2 周岁以下婴儿参团；6 岁以下婴儿或 30 公斤以下儿童请提前确认安全座椅；无父母陪同的未成年人须持父母授权书（仅一方陪伴需另一方书面授权）。根据《旅游法》第 15 条及《传染病防治法（2025 修订）》，旅游者需如实告知与旅游相关的个人健康信息（包括妊娠期、哺乳期、慢性病、传染病史、疑似症状或近期疫区旅居史）并遵守安全警示，若因隐瞒导致人身或财产损害、传播风险，需自行承担医疗、隔离及赔偿责任，旅行社可解除合同且不退还费用。

title_en: Ring Road Iceland: 7-Day Small-Group Tour
title_zh: 环冰岛7天精品小团
short_en: A 7-day small-group loop around Iceland from Reykjavik: erupting volcanoes, glacier lagoons, waterfalls, the Snaefellsnes peninsula and the Golden Circle.
short_zh: 雷克雅未克出发的7天环岛精品小团：火山熔岩、冰河湖、瀑布、斯奈山半岛与黄金圈一次看遍。
desc_en: This relaxed 7-day small-group tour traces a full loop around Iceland from Reykjavik, pairing the country's most dramatic natural sights with comfortable city-centre and landscape hotels. Cruise the Jokulsarlon glacier lagoon by amphibious boat, walk the black-sand and Diamond beaches, soak in the Myvatn geothermal baths, photograph Vestrahorn and the Snaefellsnes peninsula, then close the loop on the classic Golden Circle of Thingvellir, Geysir and Gullfoss. With a Chinese-speaking guide-driver and no forced shopping, it is an easy, all-in way to see the island's volcanoes, glaciers and waterfalls.
desc_zh: 这条轻松的7天环岛精品小团从雷克雅未克出发，绕冰岛一整圈，把全国最震撼的自然奇景与市中心及景观酒店巧妙串联。乘水陆两栖船畅游杰古沙龙冰河湖，漫步黑沙滩与钻石沙滩，浸泡米湖地热温泉，在西角山与斯奈山半岛尽情取景，最后以辛格维利尔国家公园、盖歇尔间歇泉和黄金瀑布组成的经典黄金圈收官。全程华人中文司兼导、无强制购物，是一次省心又尽兴的火山、冰川与瀑布之旅。

highlights.en: Cruise Jokulsarlon glacier lagoon by amphibious boat among floating icebergs
highlights.zh: 乘水陆两栖船穿行于杰古沙龙冰河湖的浮冰之间

highlights.en: Walk the Diamond Beach and the dramatic Reynisfjara black-sand beach
highlights.zh: 漫步钻石沙滩与气势磅礴的黑沙滩

highlights.en: Soak in the Myvatn Nature Baths geothermal springs in Iceland's 'Diamond Circle'
highlights.zh: 在北境钻石圈泡米湖地热温泉

highlights.en: Photograph iconic Vestrahorn and the fairytale Snaefellsnes peninsula
highlights.zh: 拍摄经典西角山与梦幻斯奈山半岛

highlights.en: Classic Golden Circle: Thingvellir National Park, Geysir and Gullfoss waterfall
highlights.zh: 经典黄金圈：辛格维利尔国家公园、盖歇尔间歇泉与黄金瀑布

highlights.en: Seljalandsfoss, Studlagil basalt canyon, Godafoss and more waterfalls and falls en route
highlights.zh: 塞里雅兰瀑布、玄武岩大峡谷、众神瀑布等沿途瀑布奇景

highlights.en: Relaxed 6-15 person small group with a Chinese-speaking guide-driver, no forced shopping
highlights.zh: 6-15人轻松精品小团，华人中文司兼导，无强制购物

highlights.en: All-inclusive: 6 nights of 3-4 star hotels, breakfasts and listed attraction entries
highlights.zh: 全包价：6晚三到四星酒店、每日早餐及指定景点门票

includes.en: Accommodation: 6 nights in comfortable 3-4 star hotels (since Iceland has abolished official star ratings, star levels follow Booking.com; note the Hofn Bogarbyggia Ice Hotel and the Herad Bogarbyggia Hotel do not participate in Booking.com star ratings).
includes.zh: 【酒店】舒适型3-4星级酒店6晚（由于冰岛当地取消星级评定，酒店星级以Booking.com酒店星级为标准，其中霍芬博加亚冰酒店和赫德博加亚酒店不参与Booking.com星级评选）。

includes.en: Meals: 6 buffet breakfasts at the hotels; due to Iceland's geography, if a hotel has no breakfast the guide will lead guests to buy breakfast.
includes.zh: 【餐饮】酒店内自助式早餐6餐，受冰岛地理环境影响，若所住酒店没有早餐，由导游带领购买早餐。

includes.en: Transport: tour coach plus a Chinese-speaking driver-guide service; for groups of fewer than 8 people this automatically changes to a business travel van with driver-guide service.
includes.zh: 【交通】旅游巴士及中文司兼导服务，如8人以下成团则自动更改为商务旅行车及司兼导服务。

includes.en: Guide: Chinese-speaking driver-guide service.
includes.zh: 【导游】华人中文司兼导服务。

includes.en: Luggage: 1 checked bag of 23 kg plus 1 piece of hand luggage.
includes.zh: 【行李】1件23公斤行李及1件随身行李。

includes.en: Tickets: glacier-lagoon amphibious boat ticket, Myvatn Nature Baths, and Vestrahorn (Batman Mountain) admission.
includes.zh: 【门票】冰河湖两栖船票、米湖温泉、西角山门票。

excludes.en: Passport: personal passport fees.
excludes.zh: 护照：个人护照费用。

excludes.en: Visa: tourist visa fees for the countries listed in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 签证：行程中所列旅游国家所需的观光签证费用。

excludes.en: Insurance: travel insurance fees (if the itinerary involves high-risk sports, please verify whether your travel insurance covers them).
excludes.zh: 保险：旅游保险费用（如行程内涉及到高风险运动，请核实旅游保险是否包含该项运动）。

excludes.en: Tips: guests pay the guide and driver a total tip of 10 EUR per person per day, same rate for adults and children.
excludes.zh: 小费：游客支付导游和司机小费一共10欧/人/天，大小同价。

excludes.en: Meals: apart from the special meals included in the itinerary, lunch and dinner are not included.
excludes.zh: 餐饮：除行程内包含的特色餐外，行程中不包含午、晚正餐费用。

excludes.en: Admissions: attractions not noted as fee-included (including but not limited to sites marked "exterior" (exterior view), and all "recommended"/"optional"/"experience" items not stated as included); if a guest wishes to enter, please pay on your own.
excludes.zh: 门票：行程中未注明费用包含的景点（包括但不仅限于行程中注明“外观”的景点，以及“推荐”、“可选”、“体验”等等所有未提及费用包含的项目，如游客需要参观，敬请自理）。

excludes.en: Extended stay: any extra accommodation, transport or sightseeing beyond the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 延长住宿：行程外额外延长的住宿、交通、观光费用。

excludes.en: Personal spending: such as drinks/alcohol, taxis, phone charges and other personal expenses.
excludes.zh: 私人消费：如饮料酒类、出租车、电话费等个人消费。

excludes.en: Other transport: transport not mentioned in the inclusions beyond the included business van or midi-coach, such as sightseeing trains, electric/golf-cart taxis in vehicle-restricted zones, etc. (e.g. a Venice gondola), to be paid by the guest.
excludes.zh: 其他交通：除包含商务旅行车或者中巴之外，费用包含中未提及的其他交通费用，如威尼斯贡多拉，以及车辆限行区的观光火车、电瓶出租车等费用敬请自理。

excludes.en: Free activities: guests' own evening sightseeing and the itinerary's recommended optional items, plus any resulting transport, dining, admission and shopping costs.
excludes.zh: 自由活动：游客夜间自行游览及行程中的推荐项目，以及产生的交通、餐饮、门票、购物等费用。

excludes.en: Experience activities: the various travel experience activities not included in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 体验活动：行程中没有包含的各项旅游体验活动。

excludes.en: Other costs: any costs not mentioned in the inclusions. Due to force majeure such as natural disaster, war or strikes, and special situations such as traffic delays, flight cancellation/rescheduling, embassy visa delays, or insufficient group numbers, or other costs not caused by our company (such as overseas visa-extension fees, accommodation/meals/transport, national airfare adjustments, etc.), our company reserves the right to charge the price difference.
excludes.zh: 其他费用：费用包含中未提及的费用。如因天灾、战争、罢工等不可抗力的原因，及因交通延阻、航班取消或更改时间、使馆延误出签证、人数不足等特殊情况或其他非我公司原因所引致的额外费用（如在外延期签证费、住、食及交通费、国家航空运价调整等），我公司有权追加差价。

timeline.title_en: Reykjavik - Fagradalsfjall Valley - Seljalandsfoss Area - Black Sand Beach
timeline.title_zh: 雷克雅未克 - 法格拉达尔火山峡谷 - 塞里雅兰瀑布区 - 黑沙滩
timeline.description_en: After pickup in downtown Reykjavik or at Keflavik International Airport, you drive past Fagradalsfjall Valley for a vehicle/distance view of the lava remnants left by the volcano's eruptions (a drive-by viewing only; no professional hiking guide is provided and volcanic activity cannot be guaranteed). You then visit Seljalandsfoss, the roughly 60-meter "bride's veil" rainbow waterfall with a walkable path behind the water curtain, followed by Skogafoss (about 25 m wide, 60 m drop). The day continues to Reynisfjara black sand beach with its dramatic Atlantic surf, the offshore Reynisdrangar basalt sea stacks and the Halsanefshellir basalt columns (a Game of Thrones filming location). Note: the black beach is a high-risk area with sudden sneak waves and very slippery basalt sand; stay back from the water and obey all warnings. Overnight in the Vik/Kirkjubaejarklaustur area (Hotel Loki Iceland or an equivalent 3-4 star hotel).
timeline.description_zh: 在雷克雅未克市区或凯夫拉维克国际机场接机后，车览法格拉达尔火山峡谷，远观火山喷发后留下的熔岩遗迹（仅车览/远观，不配备专业徒步向导，且无法保证火山产生地质活动）。随后游览塞里雅兰瀑布——落差约60米、可从水帘后步行穿过的彩虹瀑布，俗称“新娘面纱”；接着是斯科加瀑布（宽约25米、落差60米）。当天继续前往雷尼斯黑沙滩，感受大西洋白浪与黑色火山砂的梦幻对比，欣赏屹立海中的雷尼斯岩柱群与玄武岩柱洞穴（Halsanefshellir，《权力的游戏》取景地）。备注：黑沙滩为高风险区域，平静海面会毫无征兆掀起突发巨浪，黑色玄武岩砂极为湿滑，请勿背对大海、勿越过围栏并遵守所有警示。夜宿教堂城/维克一带（冰岛洛基酒店或同等级三到四星酒店）。

timeline.title_en: Fjadrargljufur Canyon - Diamond Beach - Hofn (Amphibious Boat on the Glacier Lagoon)
timeline.title_zh: 羽毛峡谷 - 钻石沙滩 - 霍芬（乘水陆两栖船游冰河湖）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast you set out for Fjadrargljufur, the feather canyon in southeast Iceland (about 100 m deep, 2 km long, carved over roughly two million years, with the Fjadra river running through it). You then reach the glacier lagoon area to see Jokulsarlon glacier lagoon and Diamond Beach, where thousand-year-old icebergs in white, blue, green and ash-grey hues drift in the water and seals often bask on the ice. The highlight is an amphibious boat ride on Jokulsarlon, weaving between giant ice blocks with an English-speaking guide who explains the lagoon's history and future, and you may even taste centuries-old ice. The day ends in the "lobster town" of Hofn. Overnight in Hofn (Hofn Bogarbyggia Ice Hotel or an equivalent 3-4 star hotel) near the harbor, convenient for the legendary lobster restaurant Humarhofnin.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，从酒店出发前往羽毛峡谷参观——位于冰岛东南部，深约100米、长约2公里，由Fjadra河历经约两百万年侵蚀而成。随后前往冰河湖景区，游览杰古沙龙冰河湖与钻石沙滩，湖中漂浮着白、蓝、绿及夹杂火山灰的灰、棕色千年浮冰，常能见到在冰块上晒太阳的海豹。当天高亮项目为冰河湖水陆两栖船：在杰古沙龙冰河湖巨型冰块间穿梭，船上英文导游详细讲解冰湖历史与未来，您还有机会品尝承载千年岁月的冰块。随后前往龙虾镇——霍芬。夜宿霍芬（霍芬博加亚冰酒店或同等级三到四星酒店），酒店位于海港码头，方便前往冰岛传奇龙虾店渔村餐厅Humarhofnin。

timeline.title_en: Hofn - Vestrahorn (Batman Mountain) - Stuolagil Basalt Canyon - Egilsstadir
timeline.title_zh: 霍芬 - 西角山 - 玄武岩大峡谷 - 埃伊尔斯塔迪尔镇
timeline.description_en: After breakfast you head to Vestrahorn, also called Batman Mountain (454 m high, 8-10 million years old, one of Iceland's rare gabbro mountains, about 12 km east of Hofn). Its sharply layered peaks reflected in the calm bay and the black sand beach below make it a photographer's favorite, gentle under the midnight sun in summer and crowned by the aurora in winter (a filming location for the Bollywood film). You then visit the basalt canyon (Stuolagil) in the Jokuldalur valley of east Iceland, a newly famous spot where towering hexagonal basalt columns line both sides of a glacial river whose water shifts from a beautiful blue-green (March-July) to glacial pale grey by late summer. Overnight in the town of Egilsstadir (Herad Bogarbyggia Hotel or an equivalent 3-4 star hotel), surrounded by green meadows and tranquil lakes.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，从酒店出发前往西角山参观。西角山又称蝙蝠山，高454米，有800万至1000万年历史，是冰岛为数不多的辉长岩山脉之一，位于霍芬镇以东约12公里，层次分明的山峰倒影于山脚宁静海湾与黑沙滩之上，深受摄影师喜爱；夏季有午夜阳光更显温柔，冬季峰顶常现北极光（曾为宝莱坞电影取景地）。随后前往参观玄武岩大峡谷（位于冰岛东部约屈尔河谷内），是冰岛新晋网红景点，壮观的六棱玄武岩柱整齐耸立于湍急冰川河两侧，河水颜色随季节变化——3至7月呈蓝绿色，到夏末因冰川融水上升而变为冰川河特有的浅灰色。夜宿埃伊尔斯塔迪尔镇（赫德博加亚酒店或同等级三到四星酒店），周围尽是青翠原野与宁静湖泊。

timeline.title_en: Krafla & Myvatn Nature Baths - Dimmuborgir - Godafoss - Akureyri
timeline.title_zh: 克拉夫拉火山与米湖温泉 - 黑暗城堡 - 众神瀑布 - 阿克雷里
timeline.description_en: After breakfast you visit the Krafla volcano in the Myvatn region of north Iceland, a caldera that is part of the Krafla volcanic system and one of Iceland's most frequently erupting volcanoes (29 recorded eruptions since settlement). You then soak in the Myvatn Nature Baths, a geothermal lagoon about 2 km from Reykjahlid where the water stays at 36-40 C and is rich in sulphur and minerals (about 2 hours). Next is Dimmuborgir, the "dark castle" lava field said in folklore to be home to trolls and a Game of Thrones filming location, followed by Godafoss, the "waterfall of the gods" on Iceland's fourth-largest river Skjalfandafljot, an arc roughly 30 m wide with a 12 m drop. Overnight in Akureyri (Akureyri Hotel or an equivalent 3-4 star hotel) in the city center, near the fjord and Akureyri's landmark church.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，前往冰岛北部米湖地区的克拉夫拉火山参观——属破火山口，是克拉夫拉火山系统的一部分，也是冰岛喷发频繁的火山之一，自有人定居以来已有29次喷发记录。随后前往米湖温泉体验（位于雷恰利兹小镇约两公里处的地热潟湖，水温常年36～40摄氏度，富含硫等矿物质，约2小时）。接着游览黑暗城堡熔岩群——传说中巨魔的栖居地，也是美剧《权力的游戏》重要取景地。随后前往众神瀑布：坐落于冰岛第四大河Skjalfandafljot之上，呈弧形，宽约30米、落差12米，与冰岛宗教历史渊源深厚。夜宿阿克雷里（阿克雷里酒店或同等级三到四星酒店），酒店位于市中心，毗邻峡湾及阿克雷里地标教堂。

timeline.title_en: Akureyri - Blonduoskirkja (Whale Church) - Stykkisholmur - Kirkjufell (Church Mountain) - Hellissandur
timeline.title_zh: 阿克雷里 - 鲸鱼教堂 - 斯蒂基斯霍尔米 - 草帽山（教会山） - 海德利桑德
timeline.description_en: After breakfast you set out for the Whale Church, officially Blonduoskirkja in the northwest town of Blonduos, a dark concrete church whose form, inspired by an erupting volcano, resembles a whale arching its tail. You then visit Stykkisholmur, the town that "played" Greenland in The Secret Life of Walter Mitty, with its quirky church, volcano museum, Stykkisholmur cathedral and the cute little red lighthouse on a harbor island. Next is Kirkjufell, known in Icelandic as Church Mountain but more often called Hat Mountain for its shape (about 460 m); the classic photo spot is a five-minute walk across from the parking area, over the bridge, using Kirkjufellsfoss waterfall as foreground. The day ends at Hellissandur, home to the famous little church set against road and balloon used in optometry test images, built of cement in 1903 and ringed by fields of lupine flowers in summer. Overnight in Hellissandur (Hellissandur Adventure Hotel or an equivalent 3-4 star hotel), surrounded by black beaches and lava remnants.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，出发前往鲸鱼教堂——官方名称“布伦迪欧斯教堂”（Blonduoskirkja），位于冰岛西北部城镇Blonduos，外观黝黑，造型源自火山喷发模样，宛如鲸鱼俯身翘起尾翼。随后前往斯蒂基斯霍尔米游览：小镇曾在电影《白日梦想家》中“扮演”格陵兰，镇上有造型奇异的教堂、火山博物馆、斯蒂基斯霍尔米大教堂，港口小岛上还有萌萌的红色小灯塔，是鸟瞰全镇的好地方。接着前往教会山（草帽山，斯奈山半岛公认的摄影胜地，海拔约460米，因形似草帽得名）；经典机位需从教会山马路对面的停车区沿步道走五分钟、过桥，以教会山瀑布为前景。随后前往网红红顶教堂所在的海德利桑德（Hellissandur）——那座电脑验光仪图中“一条公路、一个气球、一座小房子”的本体即建于1903年的水泥教堂，每年夏季周围绽放漫山遍野的鲁冰花。夜宿海德利桑德（海德利桑德冒险酒店或同等级三到四星酒店），四周被黑色沙滩与火山遗迹环绕。

timeline.title_en: Hellissandur - Arnarstapi - Budakirkja (Black Church) - Seal Beach - Reykjavik (Optional Whale Watching)
timeline.title_zh: 海德利桑德 - 阿尔纳斯塔皮 - 黑教堂 - 海豹沙滩 - 雷克雅未克（可选出海观鲸）
timeline.description_en: After breakfast you visit a black pebble beach, then the small fishing village of Arnarstapi on the south coast of the Snaefellsnes peninsula, known for its old seaside houses and bizarre sea-eroded rock formations and natural harbor. You continue to Budakirkja, the historic Black Church first built in 1701 (rebuilt in the 1950s and 1980s while keeping its original Danish design, a popular proposal and aurora spot), and to Seal Beach on the peninsula's south coast where seals rest on the golden sand. You then head into downtown Reykjavik for free time to see the city's landmarks: Hallgrimskirkja (Reykjavik's cathedral, organ-pipe form, one of the country's tallest buildings with an elevator to a viewing top), Harpa Concert Hall, the Perlan (Pearl) building, and a stroll by Lake Tjornin, or you may choose an optional whale-watching cruise (about 3 hours in Faxafloi bay; minke and humpback whales, white-beaked dolphins and harbour porpoises are common, with chances of fin, orca and pilot whales and basking sharks). Note: the hotel is about 500 m from the pier; whale watching may be cancelled in extreme weather (refund or reschedule), and if the boat sails but no whales are seen the trip is deemed completed with no refund. Overnight in Reykjavik (Center Plaza Hotel or an equivalent 3-4 star hotel) in the city center near Hallgrimskirkja.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，前往黑卵石沙滩，随后前往斯奈山半岛南海岸的小渔村阿尔纳斯塔皮（Arnarstapi）游览——以海滨古老优雅的房屋、沿岸奇诡的海蚀岩石及天然港口闻名。之后参观布迪尔黑教堂（始建于1701年，上世纪五十及八十年代两次修缮但保持原始丹麦设计风格，是热门求婚地及观赏午夜阳光与北极光之地）和海豹沙滩（位于半岛南海岸中段，众多海豹栖息于金色沙滩）。结束后前往雷克雅未克市区，自由游览首都地标：雷克雅未克大教堂（哈尔格林姆斯大教堂，管风琴结构，冰岛最高建筑之一，可乘电梯登顶俯瞰全城）、哈帕音乐厅、珍珠楼，并在托宁湖（Tjornin）边漫步，或可自由选择出海观鲸（约3小时，于Faxafloi湾常见小须鲸、座头鲸、白吻斑纹海豚与大西洋鼠海豚，还有机会看到长须鲸、虎鲸、领航鲸、姥鲨等）。温馨提示：酒店距碼头约500米，可步行到达；如遇极端天气出海可能取消（可退款或换时间），如适合出海但实际未观测到鲸鱼则视为行程已产生、费用不可退。夜宿雷克雅未克（中央广场酒店或同等级三到四星酒店），位于市中心，毗邻哈尔格林姆斯大教堂。

timeline.title_en: Reykjavik - Golden Circle (Geysir, Gullfoss, Thingvellir National Park) - Departure
timeline.title_zh: 雷克雅未克 - 黄金圈（间歇泉、黄金瀑布、辛格维利尔国家公园） - 送机
timeline.description_en: After breakfast you tour Iceland's Golden Circle (Gullni hringurinn), the country's essential sightseeing route made up of three famous sites. Thingvellir National Park is one of Iceland's most important historic sites, where the world's first democratic parliament (Althingi) was founded in 930 AD; it is a UNESCO World Heritage Site and sits on the rift between the Eurasian and North American tectonic plates (about 2 hours). The Geysir geothermal area in the Haukadalur valley is world-famous, with the very active Strokkur geyser erupting every few minutes, sometimes up to 40 m (usually 10-20 m), amid the strong smell of sulphur. Gullfoss (the golden waterfall) thunders down a wide "staircase" into a deep 32 m canyon, its two cascades dropping 11 m and 22 m. The tour then passes through Reykjavik to Keflavik International Airport for departure, ending the program at the Blue Lagoon. Optional add-ons today (not included): the Blue Lagoon Comfort package (100 EUR/person; bring your own swimwear, T-shirts/underwear are not allowed in the water) and Silfra fissure snorkeling (180 EUR/person, a high-risk activity not included in ordinary travel insurance; the agency only offers a booking-agent service). No accommodation tonight (departure day).
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后，前往冰岛黄金圈（Gullni hringurinn）——冰岛旅游必游之路，由三大著名景点组成。辛格维利尔国家公园是冰岛重要历史遗址之一，公元930年在此成立全世界第一个民主议会（Althingi），1930年被宣布为国家公园，2004年列入联合国教科文组织世界文化遗产名录，还可看到欧亚板块与北美板块间的裂缝（约2小时）。盖歇尔间歇泉位于Haukadalur山谷的地热区，举世闻名，其中史托克间歇泉（Strokkur）十分活跃，每隔几分钟喷发一次，有时水柱高达40米（一般10-20米），空气中弥漫浓烈硫磺味。黄金瀑布气势宏大，宽阔的白河沿“三级阶梯”倾泻入32米深的幽深峡谷，两级落差分别达11米和22米。结束后途经雷克雅未克前往凯夫拉国际机场送机，最后于蓝湖温泉结束行程。当天可选自费项目（不含）：蓝湖温泉Comfort套票（100欧元/人，需自备泳衣，T恤短裤或内衣将被拒绝下水）、丝浮拉大裂缝浮潜（180欧元/人，属高危活动，普通旅游保险并不包含，本社仅提供代预订服务）。当天无住宿（送机日）。

meeting_en: Reykjavik city centre or Keflavik International Airport (KEF) pickup; the tour begins and ends in Reykjavik.
meeting_zh: 雷克雅未克市区或凯夫拉维克国际机场（KEF）接机；行程在雷克雅未克起止。

faqs.question_en: What are the meeting and dispersal points and times?
faqs.question_zh: 集合时间地点和结束地点是怎样安排的？
faqs.answer_en: Meeting point: 9:00 in the morning at downtown Reykjavik, or 9:30 at Keflavik International Airport. Dispersal on the last day: 18:00 in downtown Reykjavik, or 16:30 at Keflavik International Airport. If you purchase the Blue Lagoon spa / Blue Lagoon hotel option, you can ride along and be dropped off at the Blue Lagoon. Please tell us your pickup point in advance; the exact times are subject to the departure notice.
faqs.answer_zh: 集合地点：早上9:00在雷克雅未克市中心上团，或9:30在凯夫拉维克国际机场上团。结束地点：最后一天18:00在雷克雅未克市中心下团，或16:30在凯夫拉维克国际机场下团。如选择购买蓝湖温泉/蓝湖酒店项目，可以随车到达蓝湖后下团。请务必提前告知上团地点，具体时间以出团通知书为准。

faqs.question_en: How do I get to the meeting point?
faqs.question_zh: 如何到达集合地？
faqs.answer_en: It is about a 1-hour drive from Keflavik airport to downtown Reykjavik. The airport coach stops at hotels around the city and costs about 30 EUR per person; a taxi is about 150 EUR (1-4 people) and queues outside the airport terminal.
faqs.answer_zh: 从冰岛机场到达雷克雅未克市中心约1小时车程，大巴车沿途停留市区各个酒店，约为每位30欧元；出租车约为150欧元（1-4人），出租车在机场航站楼外排队等候。

faqs.question_en: What is the weather like and what clothing/gear should I bring?
faqs.question_zh: 冰岛的气温和衣着装备如何准备？
faqs.answer_en: Iceland's summer is not hot but rainy, with temperatures usually between -2 C and +10 C. Reference daylight hours: about 20 hrs in June, 21 hrs in July, 18 hrs in August, 14 hrs in September, 11 hrs in October. Because of the frequent summer rain, please bring your own waterproof hiking boots and a waterproof shell jacket (summer).
faqs.answer_zh: 冰岛的夏天并不炎热，雨水较多，通常温度在零下2度到零上10度之间。参考日照时间：6月约20小时，7月约21小时，8月约18小时，9月约14小时，10月约11小时。由于冰岛夏季雨水较多，需要自备防水徒步鞋及防水冲锋衣（夏季）。

faqs.question_en: Do I need to bring my own swimwear for the hot springs?
faqs.question_zh: 冰岛旅游团需要自备泳衣吗？
faqs.answer_en: Yes. All hot springs in Iceland require your own swimwear; T-shirts, shorts or underwear will not be allowed in the water.
faqs.answer_zh: 是的。冰岛的所有温泉要求自备泳衣，T恤短裤或内衣将被拒绝下水。

faqs.question_en: Will joining the Silfra fissure snorkeling tour affect my itinerary?
faqs.question_zh: 如果我选择参加《丝浮拉大裂缝浮潜团》，行程会受影响吗？
faqs.answer_en: Thingvellir National Park is scheduled for 3 hours; joining the snorkeling tour there reduces the park sightseeing time by 1 hour, with the rest of the itinerary unchanged. Because snorkeling is affected by weather, temperature and visibility, and ordinary tourists differ greatly from professional adventurers, if the guide judges the day's weather or water conditions unsuitable for ordinary tourists the activity is cancelled and fully refunded within 5 working days. The Silfra snorkeling tour is unsuitable for: people over 65, children under 13, pregnant women, pacemaker users, those with high blood pressure, etc. A dry suit is worn inside and a wet suit outside, so even in 4-5 C water there is no hypothermia; after a typical 30-40 minute snorkel you feel slightly cold on landing and exposed parts (hair) may get wet. The dry suit gives strong buoyancy and the fins give power, so even non-swimmers can master the basics quickly.
faqs.answer_zh: 辛格维利尔国家公园计划时间为3小时，如在此参加浮潜团，将减少1小时的游览时间，其余行程不变。由于浮潜受天气、温度、能见度影响，普通旅游者与专业探险者差异巨大，因此如向导认为当天气候或水利条件不允许普通旅游者浮潜，则会取消该活动，并在5个工作日内全额退款。《丝浮拉大裂缝浮潜团》不适用人群：65岁以上老人、13岁以下儿童、孕妇、心脏起搏器安装者、高血压等。浮潜提供干式潜水服穿在内部、湿式潜水服穿在外部，因此即使在4-5度水温中也不会失温；通常30-40分钟浮潜上岸后略感寒冷，身体外露部分（头发）可能浸水。干式泳衣浮力大、脚蹼提供动力，即使不会游泳者也能在很短时间内掌握浮潜要领。

faqs.question_en: Will I be able to see an active volcano erupting with flowing lava?
faqs.question_zh: 我是否能够看到活火山爆发及岩浆四溢？
faqs.answer_en: Due to the unpredictability of active volcanoes, we cannot make any promise or prediction about volcano viewing. If eruptions become frequent, especially if instability of the magma fissures causes frequent eruptions of the Fagradalsfjall group, the Blue Lagoon will close; in that case we will arrange a city hotel instead and refund the price difference between the Blue Lagoon and the city hotel.
faqs.answer_zh: 由于活火山的不可预测性，我社无法对火山的游览做任何承诺或预测。如果火山爆发频繁，特别是岩浆裂缝的不稳定性导致法格拉达尔火山群频发爆发，蓝湖温泉将会关闭，届时将安排在市区酒店，并退还蓝湖和市区酒店的价格差。

faqs.question_en: Can the order of the itinerary change on the day?
faqs.question_zh: 行程的游览先后顺序会调整吗？
faqs.answer_en: Yes. Based on actual conditions on the day, the order of the sightseeing may be adjusted, but the content stays the same and the overall experience is unaffected; this is not considered an itinerary change. For Reykjavik whale watching, conditions for water and weather are strict and Iceland is prone to high winds; if the chosen time slot cannot sail, we will discuss rescheduling, and if the cruise cannot go ahead and cannot be rescheduled, the whale-watching fee is refunded within 5 working days after the trip.
faqs.answer_zh: 会的。根据当天实际情况，行程游览的前后顺序可能会调整，但游览内容一致，不影响全程体验，不视为行程更改。雷克雅未克出海观鲸对水利和气候条件要求严苛，冰岛容易产生大风天气，如所选时间段无法出海观鲸，则会与游客协商更改为其他时间段；如出海观鲸无法前往也无法调整日期，则在行程结束后5个工作日内退还出海观鲸的费用。

faqs.question_en: Do I need a visa?
faqs.question_zh: 是否需要签证？
faqs.answer_en: This product does not include visa fees. It requires a Schengen visa (single or multiple entry); if you need to apply, please choose a Schengen visa product. After booking we provide all materials for the Schengen visa application free of charge (see the detailed materials list), and if you commission us we will purchase Schengen-compliant travel insurance for you (otherwise you must arrange insurance and claims yourself). Your passport must be valid for at least six months from the date of departure, or customs may refuse entry. "Visa-secured" guarantee: if you sign with us 61 or more days before departure and have not obtained the visa within 45 days before departure, we bear all losses and immediately refund all travel fees; guests not meeting this clause who fail to obtain a visa are refunded per the change-and-cancellation terms. If refused, notify us within 48 hours with the consulate's refusal letter; any supplementary or amended materials must be submitted within five days, and you may not unilaterally waive the "visa defense" right. Visa fees, visa service fees, Schengen insurance fees and visa-center appointment fees are all non-refundable and non-transferable, even if the product is changed or cancelled.
faqs.answer_zh: 本产品不包含签证费用，需要申根签证（单次或多次入境），如需办理请选择申根签证产品。预订后免费提供办理申根签证的全部材料（参考详细材料清单）；如委托我社办理，我社将为您购买符合申根签证要求的申根旅游保险，若未委托我社办理则需自行购买旅游保险并自行负责理赔。护照有效期需在离境之日起至少还有六个月，否则海关有权拒绝入境。保签无忧：游客在出发日前61天与我社签约的旅游产品，如在出发前45天内未获取签证，我社承担所有损失，立即退还全部旅游费用；不符合该条款的游客如未正常获取签证，将按照退改与取消条款退费。如遇拒签需在48小时内通知我社并出具使领馆拒签函，如需补充或更改材料需在五天内提交，且不得单方面放弃“签证抗辩”权利。签证费、签证服务费、申根保险费、签证中心预约费均不可退款，也无法更改使用者，即使产品退改签，签证费用亦无法退款。

faqs.question_en: Booking, changes & cancellation
faqs.question_zh: 预订、变更与取消须知
faqs.answer_en: Free cancellation: both the agency and the traveler may cancel without reason up to 30 days before departure (the 30th day not included). This is a shared/joining group (拼团); the announced group size for departure is 10 people, and if 10 is not reached by 30 days before (or 14 days for the join-group minimum) either side may cancel without penalty. Travelers must arrive at the meeting point one day before the tour starts and leave the dispersal point one day after it ends, leaving reasonable flight-connection time (at least 5 hours for same-airport transfers, 7 hours for different airports in the same city); losses from not doing so are borne by the traveler. Hotels: standard double rooms are auto-assigned for two travelers with bed type decided by the hotel (cannot be specified); solo travelers pay a single-room supplement (refunded proportionally if successfully matched for room-sharing); triple/family rooms vary in bed configuration; European hotels are non-smoking, no cooking in rooms, check-in 14:00 / check-out 11:00, and air-conditioning is not standard. We note your requested bed type and floor when booking but cannot guarantee them. Pricing is in EUR at time of booking; if you pay in CNY, the amount is auto-calculated at that day's Bank of China "EUR selling" rate, and refunds likewise use the day's rate (exchange differences and bank fees are borne by the traveler). Itinerary contingency: the order of sightseeing may be adjusted without changing route or sights (not deemed a breach); for spa activities bring standard one-piece or two-piece swimwear; if you select the Silfra snorkeling option it may be cancelled by the guide for weather/visibility and refunded within 5 working days; whale watching may be rescheduled or refunded within 5 working days if it cannot sail.
faqs.answer_zh: 免费取消：出发前30天（不含第30天）旅行社和旅行者均有权无理由取消。本产品为散客拼团，宣布成团人数为10人；行程开始前30天（不含第30天）未达成团人数，或拼团发团前14天仍未达最低成团人数，双方均可解除合同且不承担违约责任。游客须在旅游团开始前一天到达集合地、结束后一天离开集散地，并预留合理航班衔接时间（同一机场转机至少5小时，同城不同机场至少7小时），未遵守由此造成的损失由旅行者自行承担。酒店：两人报名默认入住标准双人间，床型由酒店安排不可指定；单人报名含单人房差押金（成功拼房后按比例退款）；三人/家庭间床型不可选；欧洲酒店全面禁烟、禁止房内做饭，入住14:00、退房11:00，且空调并非标准设施。我社预订时会备注床型及楼层要求，但实际以酒店当日房态为准，不做保证。定价以欧元为预订计价单位，如选择人民币支付，则按当天中国银行实时“欧元卖出价”自动换算，退款同样适用申请当日汇率，汇率差及银行手续费由旅行者承担。行程应变：在不改变路线及景点情况下游览先后顺序可能调整，不视为违约；如选温泉请自备标准（连体或分体）泳衣；如选丝浮拉大裂缝浮潜，因天气/能见度被取消则在结束后5个工作日内退还浮潜费用；出海观鲸如无法成行则协商改期或在5个工作日内退款。

faqs.question_en: Health & safety requirements
faqs.question_zh: 健康与安全须知
faqs.answer_en: For your safety please have a health check before travel and do not book if you have any of the following: infectious diseases (e.g. active tuberculosis, typhoid); cardiovascular disease (e.g. severe hypertension, heart failure, myocardial ischemia/infarction); cerebrovascular disease (e.g. cerebral embolism, hemorrhage, tumor); respiratory disease (e.g. emphysema, cor pulmonale); psychiatric illness (e.g. epilepsy); severe anemia (hemoglobin below 50 g/L); or recovery from major/medium surgery. Pregnancy: not permitted on the tour from week 35; from week 28 a doctor's report within 7 days plus the attending physician's consent is required; under 28 weeks please book with caution, sign a liability waiver, and you cannot join adventure/skiing/sea-going/aerial/outdoor items. People with disabilities: a doctor's report within 7 days plus physician's consent, an accompanying immediate family member, and a reservation at least 61 days in advance. Elderly travelers over 70: a health certificate and physical exam report, an accompanying immediate family member (or sign a waiver), and physician's consent for any adventure/skiing/sea/aerial/outdoor items; this is a long itinerary requiring a certain walking ability. Minors (under 18) must be accompanied by an immediate relative or guardian, some sights have age limits (under 18/12/6), infants under 30 kg or under 6 need a confirmed EU-standard child safety seat, and unaccompanied minors need parental authorization letters; infants under 2 are not accepted. Per Article 15 of the Tourism Law, travelers must truthfully declare health information relevant to the trip (including pregnancy, lactation, chronic and infectious diseases); concealment that causes harm makes the traveler liable, and concealing an infectious disease may incur civil and administrative penalties, self-borne medical/quarantine/compensation costs, contract termination without refund, and liability for losses to other guests and the agency.
faqs.answer_zh: 为确保安全出行，请出行前做必要的身体检查，如有下列情况请勿报名：传染性疾病（如活动期肺结核、伤寒）；心血管疾病（如严重高血压、心功能不全、心肌缺氧、心肌梗塞）；脑血管疾病（如脑栓塞、脑出血、脑肿瘤）；呼吸系统疾病（如肺气肿、肺心病）；精神病（如癫痫及各种精神病）；严重贫血（血红蛋白低于50克/升）；大中型手术恢复期。孕妇：妊娠第35周及以上任何情况下都无法参团；第28周及以上需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书；28周以下请慎重报名，需签署旅行社免责声明书，且无法参加探险、滑雪、出海、高空、户外等项目。残疾人：需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书、需直系家属陪同，并至少提前61天申请预留位置及专用设施。70周岁以上老年人：需提供健康证明、体检报告、需直系家属陪同（或签署免责声明书），涉及探险/滑雪/出海/高空/户外项目需主治医师同意书；本行程较长、对体力要求高，体力不支者请慎重报名。未成年人（未满18周岁）须由直系亲属或监护人陪同，部分景点对未满18/12/6周岁有特殊限定，6岁以下或30公斤以下儿童需提前确认欧盟安全制式儿童座椅，无父母陪同需父母授权书，本产品不接受2周岁以下婴儿参团。根据《旅游法》第15条，旅游者须如实告知与旅游活动相关的个人健康信息（包括妊娠期、哺乳期、慢性病、传染病史等），并遵守安全警示规定；若隐瞒导致人身损害或财产损失需自行承担责任，隐瞒传染病情况还可能面临民事赔偿及行政处罚，须自行承担医疗、隔离费用及赔偿，旅行社可解除合同且不退还费用。

title_en: Iceland Ring Road Grand Tour - 8-Day Small-Group Adventure
title_zh: 冰岛环岛全景8日精品小团游
short_en: Circle all of Iceland in 8 days: soak in the Blue Lagoon, cruise Jokulsarlon glacier lagoon by amphibian boat, and chase waterfalls, black sands and the Golden Circle.
short_zh: 8天环游整个冰岛：畅享蓝湖温泉，乘水陆两栖船巡游杰古沙龙冰河湖，追逐瀑布、黑沙滩与黄金圈秘境。
desc_en: This 8-day round-Iceland loop departs and returns to Reykjavik, tracing the full Ring Road through the island's most dramatic landscapes. Begin with a full relaxing day at the iconic Blue Lagoon geothermal spa, then journey past the Fagradalsfjall lava fields, Seljalandsfoss waterfall and the famed Black Sand Beach. Ride an amphibian boat among the icebergs of Jokulsarlon glacier lagoon, photograph Vestrahorn and the basalt canyon in the east, bathe in the Myvatn Nature Baths, and explore the Snaefellsnes peninsula made famous by The Secret Life of Walter Mitty. The route closes with the classic Golden Circle - Thingvellir National Park, Geysir and Gullfoss - on a relaxed small-group itinerary staying in distinctive scenic hotels throughout.
desc_zh: 这条8天环冰岛线路从雷克雅未克出发并返回，沿著名的一号环岛公路串联起冰岛最震撼的自然景观。首日在标志性的蓝湖地热温泉酒店悠享一整天慢生活，随后途经法格拉达尔火山熔岩区、塞里雅兰瀑布与著名的黑沙滩；乘坐水陆两栖船穿行于杰古沙龙冰河湖的冰山之间，在东部拍摄西角山与玄武岩大峡谷，畅泡米湖温泉，并探访因电影《白日梦想家》而闻名的斯奈山半岛。行程以经典黄金圈——辛格维利尔国家公园、间歇泉与黄金瀑布——收尾，全程入住各具特色的景观酒店，是一条轻松舒适的深度全景小团路线。

highlights.en: A full relaxing day at the iconic Blue Lagoon, staying at the Blue Lagoon spa hotel with private access to the Premium VIP geothermal area
highlights.zh: 在标志性蓝湖整整悠享一天，入住蓝湖温泉酒店并私享Premium VIP高级温泉区

highlights.en: Amphibian boat cruise on Jokulsarlon glacier lagoon, weaving among icebergs beside the Diamond Beach
highlights.zh: 乘水陆两栖船巡游杰古沙龙冰河湖，在冰山间穿行并游览邻近的钻石沙滩

highlights.en: Waterfall hunting: Seljalandsfoss (the Bridal Veil), Godafoss (Falls of the Gods) and Gullfoss on the Golden Circle
highlights.zh: 瀑布巡礼：新娘面纱塞里雅兰瀑布、众神瀑布与黄金圈的黄金瀑布

highlights.en: Geothermal soaking at both the Blue Lagoon and the Myvatn Nature Baths in the north
highlights.zh: 南北双温泉体验：蓝湖与北部的米湖温泉

highlights.en: Snaefellsnes peninsula and Stykkisholmur, the Greenland stand-in from The Secret Life of Walter Mitty
highlights.zh: 斯奈山半岛与斯蒂基斯霍尔米——电影《白日梦想家》中的格陵兰取景地

highlights.en: Iconic photo stops: Vestrahorn (Batman Mountain), the basalt canyon, Black Sand Beach and the Golden Circle's Thingvellir & Geysir
highlights.zh: 经典打卡:西角山(蝙蝠山)、玄武岩大峡谷、黑沙滩，以及黄金圈的辛格维利尔国家公园与间歇泉

highlights.en: Relaxed 6-15 person small group with a licensed Chinese-speaking guide-driver and distinctive scenic hotels every night
highlights.zh: 6-15人轻松小团，职业华人中文司兼导，每晚入住各具特色的景观酒店

highlights.en: All-inclusive pricing with intercity transport, listed attraction entries and daily breakfast - no forced shopping
highlights.zh: 一价全包，含城际交通、列明景点门票及每日早餐，全程无强制购物

includes.en: Hotels: 7 nights in comfort-class 3-4 star hotels (since Iceland has abolished official star ratings, hotel stars follow the Booking.com standard; the Hofn Bogja ice hotel does not participate in Booking.com star ratings).
includes.zh: 【酒店】：舒适形3-4星级酒店7晚（由于冰岛当地取消星级评定，酒店星级以Booking.com酒店星级为标准，其中霍芬博加亚冰酒店不参与Booking.com星级评选）。

includes.en: Meals: 7 in-hotel buffet breakfasts; due to Iceland's geography, if your hotel has no breakfast the guide will lead you to buy breakfast.
includes.zh: 【餐饮】：酒店内自助式早餐7餐，受冰岛地理环境影响，若所住酒店没有早餐，由导游带领购买早餐。

includes.en: Transport: tour coach plus Chinese-speaking driver-guide service; if the group is fewer than 8 people it automatically changes to a business travel vehicle with driver-guide service.
