includes.zh: 【交通】：旅游巴士及中文司兼导服务，如8人以下成团则自动更改为商务旅行车及司兼导服务。

includes.en: Guide: ethnic-Chinese Chinese-speaking driver-guide service.
includes.zh: 【导游】：华人中文司兼导服务。

includes.en: Luggage: one 23 kg checked bag and one piece of hand luggage.
includes.zh: 【行李】：1件23公斤行李及1件随身行李。

includes.en: Admission tickets: Blue Lagoon (Premium VIP), the glacier-lagoon amphibious boat ticket, Myvatn Nature Baths, and Vestrahorn (West Horn) admission.
includes.zh: 【门票】：蓝湖温泉（Premium VIP）、冰河湖两栖船票、米湖温泉、西角山门票。

excludes.en: Passport: personal passport fees.
excludes.zh: 护照：个人护照费用。

excludes.en: Visa: tourist visa fees for the destination countries listed in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 签证：行程中所列旅游国家所需的观光签证费用。

excludes.en: Insurance: travel insurance fees (if the itinerary involves high-risk sports, please verify whether your travel insurance covers them).
excludes.zh: 保险：旅游保险费用；（如行程内涉及到高风险运动，请核实旅游保险是否包含该项运动）。

excludes.en: Tips: gratuities for the guide and driver totaling 10 EUR per person per day, same rate for adults and children.
excludes.zh: 小费：游客支付导游和司机小费一共10欧/人/天，大小同价。

excludes.en: Meals: apart from any special meals included in the itinerary, lunches and dinners are not included.
excludes.zh: 餐饮：除行程内包含的特色餐外、行程中不包含午、晚正餐费用。

excludes.en: Admissions: sights not marked as fee-included in the itinerary (including but not limited to sights marked 'exterior', and all 'recommended', 'optional', 'experience' and similar items not noted as fee-included) are at your own expense if you wish to visit.
excludes.zh: 门票：行程中未注明费用包含的景点（包括，但不仅限于行程中注明“外观”的景点，“推荐”、“可选”、“体验”等等所有未提及费用包含的项目，如游客需要参观，敬请自理）。

excludes.en: Extended stays: any extra accommodation, transport or sightseeing beyond the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 延长住宿：行程外额外延长的住宿、交通、观光费用。

excludes.en: Personal expenses: drinks, alcohol, taxis, phone charges and other personal spending.
excludes.zh: 私人消费：如饮料酒类、出租车、电话费等个人消费。

excludes.en: Other transport: any transport beyond the included business vehicle or minibus that is not mentioned in the inclusions, such as the Venice gondola, sightseeing trains in restricted-traffic zones, electric taxis, etc., at your own expense.
excludes.zh: 其他交通：除包含商务旅行车或者中巴之外，费用包含中未提及的其他交通费用，如威尼斯贡多拉，以及车辆限行区的观光火车、电瓶出租车等费用敬请自理。

excludes.en: Free activities: any sightseeing you do on your own in the evening, plus recommended items in the itinerary and their associated transport, meals, admissions, shopping, etc.
excludes.zh: 自由活动：游客夜间自行游览及行程中的推荐项目，以及产生的交通，餐饮，门票，购物等费用。

excludes.en: Experience activities: any travel-experience activities not included in the itinerary.
excludes.zh: 体验活动：行程中的没有包含的各项旅游体验活动。

excludes.en: Other costs: any expense not mentioned in the inclusions. In cases of force majeure (natural disaster, war, strike, etc.), or special situations such as traffic delays, flight cancellations or rescheduling, embassy visa delays or insufficient group numbers, or other causes not attributable to our company, the company reserves the right to charge the additional cost (e.g. overseas visa extension, board, lodging and transport, national airline fare adjustments, etc.).
excludes.zh: 其他费用：费用包含中未提及的费用。如因天灾、战争、罢工等不可抗力的原因，及因交通延阻、航班取消或更改时间、使馆延误出签证、人数不足等特殊情况或其他非我公司原因所引致的额外费用（如在外延期签证费、住、食及交通费、国家航空运价调整等），我公司有权追加差价。

timeline.title_en: Reykjavik - Blue Lagoon: Stay at the Blue Lagoon Retreat, private lava-field sunset over the geothermal spa
timeline.title_zh: 雷克雅未克—蓝湖：入住冰岛蓝湖温泉酒店，私享蓝湖落日熔岩景观
timeline.description_en: The whole day is spent slowly savoring the Blue Lagoon geothermal retreat - no rushing between sights, just relaxed slow living. After arriving at the Blue Lagoon hotel, check in on your own with your booking voucher, then freely enjoy the Premium VIP spa. The room rate includes one Blue Lagoon Premium ticket per person (admission, a silica mud mask, and free one-time towel and bathrobe rental); the ticket is non-refundable if unused, and the minimum age is 2 years. The lagoon is open 08:00-21:00 (hours vary by month, confirmed on site), and the Keflavik airport-to-lagoon shuttle runs at roughly 07:30, 09:30, 12:30 and 16:30. There is no vehicle and no guide on this Blue Lagoon day. Overnight at the Blue Lagoon hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel, where guests have access to a private spa area surrounded by volcanic lava, looking out over green moss and distant snow peaks, with four distinctive restaurants and breakfast served amid the spa scenery.
timeline.description_zh: 第一天将一整天细细品味冰岛蓝湖温泉酒店，拒绝赶景点、品味慢生活。抵达蓝湖温泉酒店后持订单自行办理入住，随后自由享用蓝湖Premium VIP温泉。酒店房费包含每人蓝湖温泉门票（PREMIUM TICKET），套餐含蓝湖温泉入场券、蓝湖矽泥面膜、毛巾浴袍免费租用一次；门票如不使用不可退费，年龄要求为2周岁及以上。蓝湖温泉开放时间为08:00–21:00（不同月份各异，以当日现场为准），凯夫拉维克机场到蓝湖温泉的shuttle bus参考时刻为07:30、09:30、12:30、16:30。蓝湖温泉当日无用车、无导游陪同。夜宿蓝湖温泉酒店或同等四星级酒店——住客私享蓝湖温泉区域（Premium VIP），被火山熔岩环绕，可观赏近处绿色苔藓与远处雪山，酒店配有四个风格迥异的餐厅，享有温泉风景的蓝湖早餐更是视觉与味觉的双重震撼。

timeline.title_en: Reykjavik - Fagradalsfjall Valley - Seljalandsfoss area - Black Sand Beach: fresh lava from an active volcano, old lava standing nearby
timeline.title_zh: 雷克雅未克—法格拉达尔火山峡谷—塞里雅兰瀑布区—黑沙滩：活火山新熔岩四溢，旧熔岩前年耸立
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, pass by Fagradalsfjall Valley to view the lava remains from the volcano's eruptions by coach, then visit Seljalandsfoss, the rainbow waterfall likened to a bride's veil, feeling the cool spray and grandeur of its 60-meter drop. Continue to Skogafoss, the 25-meter-wide, 60-meter-high rainbow waterfall, and on to Reynisfjara Black Sand Beach with its surreal contrast of white Atlantic surf and black volcanic sand, and the Reynisdrangar basalt sea stacks beneath Reynisfjall (a Game of Thrones filming location, with the Halsanefshellir basalt cave nearby). Note: due to volcanic unpredictability we cannot guarantee any activity at Fagradalsfjall (viewed by car or from afar); if Route 427 is not closed you may see the vast lava fields formed during eruptions. Safety warning: the black beach is high-risk with sudden sneaker waves and slippery basalt - do not linger under cliffs at high tide, do not climb the wet basalt columns, do not turn your back to the sea, and the elderly or those with limited mobility should stay away. Overnight at the Iceland Loki Hotel or an equivalent 3-4 star hotel at the foot of the Eyjafjallajokull area, ideal for aurora and starry-sky viewing.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后途径法格拉达尔火山峡谷，车览火山喷发后的熔岩遗迹，随后游览塞里雅兰瀑布——如同新娘面纱的彩虹瀑布，感受60米落差带来的清凉水花和恢弘气势。随后前往斯科加瀑布（Skogafoss彩虹瀑布，宽25米、落差60米），再前往雷尼斯黑沙滩，感受大西洋白浪与黝黑火山砂石的梦幻对比，以及矗立海中的雷尼斯岩柱群（位于雷尼斯山下的玄武岩海叠层，是《权力的游戏》取景地，崖下有Halsanefshellir玄武岩柱洞穴）。备注：由于活火山不可预测，我社无法对法格拉达尔火山（车游或远观）的地质活动做任何判断，如427公路未封闭，将能看到火山喷发期间形成的广阔熔岩区遗迹。风险提示：黑沙滩为高风险区域，平静海面随时会掀起突发性巨浪，黑色玄武岩砂被海水冲刷极为湿滑，禁止在潮汐高位时在悬崖下逗留、禁止攀爬湿滑岩石和玄武岩柱、禁止背对大海拍照，行动不便者及老人请勿靠近。夜宿冰岛洛基酒店或同等级三到四星酒店，位于艾佛瑞维克火山脚下，享有埃亚菲亚德拉冰盖景色，远离杂光，非常适合欣赏极光与银河星空。

timeline.title_en: Fjadrargljufur Canyon - Diamond Beach - Hofn: ride an amphibious boat to touch the otherworldly glacier lagoon
timeline.title_zh: 羽毛峡谷—钻石沙滩—霍芬：乘坐水陆两栖船触摸宛若外星的冰河湖
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, depart the hotel for Fjadrargljufur (the Feather Canyon), a 100-meter-deep, roughly 2-kilometer-long canyon with steep, narrow, winding rock walls carved over some two million years, where the Fjadra river runs down from Geirlandshraun toward the Skafta; most visitors admire it from the walking path along the upper rim. Then head to the glacier-lagoon area to visit Jokulsarlon and Diamond Beach, and ride the lagoon's amphibious boat for a close encounter with the glacier - sailing among giant blue icebergs and the carved glacier tongue, with an English-speaking guide explaining the lagoon's history and a chance to taste thousand-year-old glacier ice (keep an eye out for seals swimming and sunbathing on the floes). Finally continue to the lobster town of Hofn for the overnight. Overnight at the Hofn Bogja ice hotel or an equivalent 3-4 star hotel, set on Hofn's harbor quay near the legendary lobster-village restaurant Humarhofnin, where Vatnajokull glacier flows down into Hornafjordur fjord.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后从酒店出发前往羽毛峡谷参观——这条位于冰岛东南部、深100米、长约2公里的峡谷两侧是陡峭岩壁，狭窄而弯曲，起源可追溯到约两百万年前的冰河时期，Fjadra河源自Geirlandshraun山在崖壁间奔流而下汇入Skafta河，多数人选择在峡谷上方边缘沿步行道俯瞰。随后前往冰河湖景区，游览杰古沙龙冰河湖与钻石沙滩，体验冰河湖两栖船，在巨型蓝色冰块与冰川冰舌间穿梭近距离接触冰川——船上的英文导游会详细讲解冰湖历史与未来，您还有机会品尝承载千年岁月的冰块，并留心湖中嬉戏、晒太阳的海豹。随后前往龙虾镇——霍芬，夜宿霍芬。夜宿霍芬博加亚冰酒店或同等级三到四星酒店，酒店位于霍芬海港码头，方便前往冰岛传奇龙虾店渔村餐厅（Humarhofnin），瓦特纳冰川的磅礴力量在此流入霍尔纳峡湾（Hornafjordur）。

timeline.title_en: Hofn - Vestrahorn - Studlagil basalt canyon: the Batman Mountain reflection and the basalt canyon
timeline.title_zh: 霍芬—西角山—玄武岩大峡谷：西角蝙蝠山倒影，玄武岩大峡谷
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, depart the hotel for Vestrahorn (the West Horn), then visit the Studlagil basalt canyon. Vestrahorn, also called Batman Mountain, is 454 meters high, 8-10 million years old, one of Iceland's few gabbro massifs, and lies about 12 km east of Hofn - a must for photographers, its sharp peaks mirrored in the still bay at its foot above a black-sand beach by the Norwegian Sea; because it is off the standard tour routes most travelers have never seen it in person. The Studlagil basalt canyon, in the Jokuldalur valley of eastern Iceland, is a newly famous spot where giant, sharply defined hexagonal basalt columns tower over both sides of a rushing glacial river; the water is a beautiful blue-green from March to July, turning the glacial-river's characteristic pale grey by late summer as meltwater rises. Overnight at the Heradsbogja Hotel or an equivalent 3-4 star hotel in the town of Egilsstadir in eastern Iceland, surrounded by green fields and tranquil lakes, with a restaurant featuring fresh local ingredients, homemade berry jams and syrups.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后从酒店出发前往西角山参观，随后参观玄武岩大峡谷。西角山又称蝙蝠山，高454米，有800万至1000万年历史，是冰岛为数不多的辉长岩山脉之一，位于霍芬镇以东12公里处，是摄影爱好者的必去之处——俊美陡峭的山峰倒影于山脚宁静海湾、矗立在黑沙滩与挪威海之上；因不在常规旅行团线路内，绝大部分游客都未曾见过它的真面目。玄武岩大峡谷坐落于冰岛东部的约屈尔河谷内，是冰岛新晋的“网红景点”之一，壮观的巨型六棱玄武岩柱整齐划一、棱角分明，高高耸立于湍急冰川河两侧；水的颜色随季节变化，从三月到七月呈美丽的蓝绿色，到夏末随冰川融水上升而变成冰川河流特有的浅灰色。夜宿赫德博加亚酒店或同等级三到四星酒店，坐落于冰岛东部埃伊尔斯塔迪尔镇，周围尽是青翠原野与宁静湖泊，餐厅主打新鲜当地食材、自制漿果果酱与糖浆。

timeline.title_en: Krafla & Myvatn Nature Baths - Dimmuborgir - Godafoss - Akureyri: the 'Diamond Circle' capital of the North and the Myvatn sulphur springs
timeline.title_zh: 克拉夫拉火山·米湖温泉—黑暗城堡—众神瀑布—阿克雷里：看“北境”之都“钻石圈”，享米湖硫磺泉群
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, visit Krafla volcano in the Myvatn area of northern Iceland - a caldera and part of the Krafla volcanic system, one of Iceland's most frequently erupting volcanoes with 29 recorded eruptions since settlement. Then experience the Myvatn Nature Baths, a geothermal spa built around a large lagoon with water held at 36-40 degrees year-round, rich in sulphur and other minerals beneficial for the respiratory tract and skin. Next visit the Dimmuborgir lava field - in Icelandic folklore lava caves are home to legendary trolls, and Dimmuborgir was an important Game of Thrones filming location (the wildlings' winter camp) and the namesake of a Norwegian black-metal band. Finally visit Godafoss, the 'waterfall of the gods,' an arc-shaped fall about 30 meters wide with a 12-meter drop on the Skjalfandafljot, Iceland's fourth-largest river, steeped in the country's religious history. Overnight in Akureyri. Overnight at the Akureyri Hotel or an equivalent 3-4 star hotel in the city center, next to Eyjafjordur fjord and the landmark Akureyri church, with Nordic-minimalist rooms full of wood elements.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往克拉夫拉火山参观——位于冰岛北部米湖地区，地质形态属破火山口，是克拉夫拉火山系统的一部分，自冰岛有人定居以来已有29次喷发记录。之后前往米湖温泉体验：米湖温泉围绕一座大型潟湖而建，水温常年维持在36～40摄氏度，富含硫等矿物质，对改善呼吸道及皮肤问题有显著效果。随后游览黑暗城堡熔岩群——在冰岛文化中熔岩洞穴常被认为是传说中巨魔的栖居地，这里是大热美剧《权力的游戏》的重要取景地之一（曼斯·雷德的野人阵营），挪威重金属乐队Dimmu Borgir也以此为名。随后前往众神瀑布——坐落于冰岛第四大河流Skjalfandafljot之上，呈弧形，宽约30米、落差12米，与冰岛宗教历史渊源深厚。夜宿阿克雷里。夜宿阿克雷里酒店或同等级三到四星酒店，位于市中心，毗邻埃亚菲厄泽峡湾及阿克雷里地标教堂，房间主打北欧简约风、木质元素满满。

timeline.title_en: Akureyri - Stykkisholmur - Kirkjufell (Church Mountain) - Hellissandur: be the hero of 'The Secret Life of Walter Mitty' and see hillsides of lupines
timeline.title_zh: 阿克雷里—斯蒂基斯霍尔米—草帽山—海德利桑德：成为《白日梦想家》的主角，看满山鲁冰花
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, set out for the Whale Church (officially the Blonduoskirkja in Blonduos, northwest Iceland), a dark, avant-garde church whose shape - inspired by a volcanic eruption with an uplifting 'wing' - resembles a whale arching over the ground. Then visit Stykkisholmur, a small town that played 'Greenland' in 'The Secret Life of Walter Mitty,' with its mailbox lighthouse, volcano museum, the Stykkisholmur church, and a cute little red lighthouse on a harbor islet offering a fine view over the town. Continue to Kirkjufell - on the Snaefellsnes peninsula, a renowned photography spot whose name translates as 'Church Mountain' but which, shaped like a straw hat, is more often called Straw Hat Mountain (about 460 m high); reach the classic photo spot by walking five minutes from the parking area opposite Church Mountain and crossing a bridge to use Kirkjufellsfoss waterfall as the foreground. Finally head to the red-roofed photogenic church at Hellissandur (built 1903 in cement, the 'little house' from computer-screen test images), where lupines bloom across the hillsides every summer, especially enchanting under the midnight sun. Overnight at the Hellissandur Adventure Hotel or an equivalent 3-4 star hotel, surrounded by black-sand beaches and volcanic remains - a real-world 'end of the world.'
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后出发前往鲸鱼教堂——官方名称为“布伦迪欧斯教堂”，位于冰岛西北部城镇Blonduos，因外观黝黑、造型宛如鲸鱼俯身而得名，建筑灵感源自火山喷发的模样，有个飞起来的墙，造型前卫、设计感十足。随后前往斯蒂基斯霍尔米游览——这座小镇曾在电影《白日梦想家》中“扮演”格陵兰，镇上有郵筒灯塔、火山博物馆、斯蒂基斯霍尔米大教堂，港口边小岛上有一个萌萌的红色小灯塔，是鸟瞰全镇的好地方。结束后前往教会山（草帽山）——斯奈山半岛公认的摄影胜地，冰岛语意为“教会山”，但因形状像草帽更多人叫它草帽山，海拔约460米；前往经典机位需从教会山马路对面的停车区域沿路径走五分钟、过桥到瀑布另一边，以教会山瀑布（Kirkjufellsfoss）为前景。随后前往网红红顶教堂，夜宿海德利桑德——海德利桑德（Hellissandur）的这座教堂建于1903年、以水泥建造，正是电脑验光仪图片里那座“一条公路、一个小房子”的本体，每年夏季周围绽放漫山遍野的鲁冰花，午夜阳光下尤其令人醉心。夜宿海德利桑德冒险酒店或同等级三到四星酒店，四周被黑色沙滩、火山遗迹环绕，堪称现实版的世界尽头。

timeline.title_en: Hellissandur - Arnarstapi - Budakirkja (Black Church) - Reykjavik: the dreamlike Snaefellsnes, optional Atlantic whale-watching
timeline.title_zh: 海德利桑德—阿尔纳斯塔皮—黑教堂—雷克雅未克：梦幻画卷斯奈山，北大西洋出海观鲸
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, visit the black-pebble beach, then the small fishing village of Arnarstapi on the southern coast of the Snaefellsnes peninsula, with its elegant old seaside houses and bizarre sea-eroded rock formations around a natural harbor. Next see the Budir Black Church (Budakirkja), built after 1701 - a popular Icelandic proposal spot and a favorite place to watch the midnight sun and aurora, restored twice (1950s and 1980s) while keeping its original Danish design - and the Seal Beach on the mid-southern coast, one of Iceland's spots to watch seals on its golden sand. Then head into central Reykjavik for free time around the landmark Hallgrimskirkja (Reykjavik Cathedral, a 1940-founded modernist church you can ride a lift up for a city panorama), Harpa Concert Hall (its kaleidoscope-like glass facade inspired by Iceland's auroras and volcanic basalt), the Pearl (Perlan, built from six giant hot-water tanks as a Reykjavik landmark), and a stroll by Tjornin lake. Optional: Reykjavik whale-watching [120 EUR] - a roughly 3-hour trip in Faxafloi bay to spot minke and humpback whales, white-beaked dolphins and harbor porpoises (hotel is about 500 m from the dock; in extreme weather the trip may be cancelled with refund or rescheduling; whale sightings are not guaranteed and if conditions are suitable but no whales are seen the trip is deemed completed and non-refundable). Overnight in Reykjavik. Overnight at the Central Plaza Hotel or an equivalent 4-star hotel in the heart of the city center, within walking distance of Hallgrimskirkja and surrounded by lively shopping streets.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往黑卵石沙滩，随后前往阿尔纳斯塔皮游览——它是冰岛斯奈山半岛南海岸线上的一座有天然港口的小渔村，海滨古老优雅的房屋与沿岸奇诡的海蚀岩石是其人文与自然特色。之后参观黑教堂——布迪尔黑教堂见证了村庄历史，1701年获主教许可后预备建造，是很受欢迎的冰岛求婚地点及观赏午夜阳光和北极光的热门地点，上世纪五十及八十年代两次修缮但保持其原始的丹麦设计风格；以及海豹沙滩——位于斯奈山半岛南海岸中段，众多海豹在此栖息的金色沙滩，是冰岛观看海豹的地点之一。结束后前往雷克雅未克市区，自由游览首都地标性建筑雷克雅未克大教堂（1940年奠基的著名教堂，可乘电梯上顶楼俯瞰首都全貌）、哈帕音乐厅（玻璃外型如巨大万花筒，灵感来自冰岛夜幕极光与火山石）、珍珠楼（利用6个巨大热水储存罐改建的集储水、餐厅、酒吧、展览馆和观景台于一体的雷克雅未克象征），并在托宁湖（Tjornin）边漫步。推荐项目：雷克雅未克出海观鲸【120欧元】——观鲸约3小时，在Faxafloi湾常见小须鲸、座头鲸、白吻斑纹海豚与大西洋鼠海豚（酒店距碼头约500米可步行；如遇极端天气项目可能取消，可退款或换时间；观鲸有随机性，若天气适合出海但未观测到鲸鱼则视为行程已产生、费用不可退）。夜宿雷克雅未克。夜宿中央广场酒店或同等四星酒店，位置堪称绝佳，处于市中心核心地段，周边满是热闹的商业街，距标志性的哈尔格林姆斯大教堂也很近，徒步便能抵达。

timeline.title_en: Reykjavik - Golden Circle: Geysir, Gullfoss and Thingvellir National Park - airport transfer
timeline.title_zh: 雷克雅未克—黄金圈：间歇泉、黄金瀑布、辛格维利尔国家公园，黄金圈秘境之旅
timeline.description_en: After breakfast, set out for Iceland's Golden Circle (Gullni hringurinn) - the must-do route taking in three famous sights along a ring road. Thingvellir National Park is one of Iceland's key historic sites, where the Althingi parliament was founded in 930 (the world's first democratic assembly, running until 1798), declared a national park in 1930 and a UNESCO World Heritage Site in 2004; here you can see the rift between the Eurasian and North American plates, which keeps widening several centimeters a year. At the Geysir geothermal area in the Haukadalur valley - the source of the word 'geyser' - the Great Geysir is now largely dormant, but its neighbor Strokkur erupts every few minutes to 10-20 m (sometimes 40 m), amid the strong smell of sulphur. Gullfoss, the 'golden waterfall,' fed by glacial water from Langjokull via the Hvita river, plunges over a wide three-step ledge into a 32-meter-deep canyon (drops of 11 m and 22 m). The route then passes through Reykjavik to Keflavik International Airport for the airport transfer, ending the trip. Optional: Silfra fissure snorkeling [180 EUR/person] - snorkeling/diving between two tectonic plates in pure glacial water with up to ~100 m visibility (a high-risk activity not included in the product; we only offer a paid booking service; it has age, health and weather requirements and may be cancelled; ordinary travel insurance does not cover diving). No hotel this night.
timeline.description_zh: 早餐后前往冰岛黄金圈（Gullni hringurinn）——冰岛旅游的必游之路，包含三个著名景点：辛格维利尔国家公园、盖歇尔间歇泉区与黄金瀑布。辛格维利尔国家公园是冰岛重要的历史遗址之一，冰岛议会（Althingi）于公元930年在此成立并持续运作至1798年，是全世界第一个民主议会，1930年被宣布为国家公园、2004年被录入联合国教科文组织世界文化遗产名录；在这里可看到穿过冰岛陆地的欧亚板块与北美板块间的裂缝，每年以数厘米速度不断张裂扩大。盖歇尔周围的地热区举世闻名（英文“Geyser”即源自冰岛语“Geysir”），位于Haukadalur山谷，大盖歇尔间歇泉现已久未喷发，但其邻居史托克间歇泉（Strokkur）十分活跃，每隔几分钟喷发一次、高度一般在10-20米（有时高达40米），空气中弥漫浓烈硫磺味。黄金瀑布水源来自朗格冰川（Langjokull）经白河（Hvita）汇入，宽阔河水冲下“三级阶梯”落入32米深的幽深峡谷（两级落差分别为11米和22米）。结束后途径雷克雅未克前往凯夫拉国际机场送机，结束行程。推荐项目：丝浮拉大裂缝浮潜【180欧元/人】——在两个构造板块之间的纯净冰川水中浮潜或潜水，水下能见度高达100余米（该活动属高危项目、本产品内不含，我社仅提供代预定服务并收取预定服务费；对年龄、身体状况、气候条件有要求，可能临时取消；普通旅游保险并不包含潜水运动）。当天无住宿。

meeting_en: Reykjavik, Iceland - tour starts and ends in the Reykjavik area; day 1 transfer to the Blue Lagoon spa hotel (Keflavik Airport shuttle reference times: 07:30 / 09:30 / 12:30 / 16:30).
meeting_zh: 冰岛雷克雅未克——行程在雷克雅未克地区出发并结束；第1天前往蓝湖温泉酒店（凯夫拉维克机场至蓝湖shuttle参考时刻：07:30 / 09:30 / 12:30 / 16:30）。

faqs.question_en: Can I join or leave the group at the airport?
faqs.question_zh: 能否在机场上团或者下团？
faqs.answer_en: Saturday departures: on the last day the route passes Keflavik airport on the way back to central Reykjavik, so you may join or leave at the airport - the airport pick-up/drop-off time is Saturday 16:30. Sunday departures: on the first day the route passes Keflavik airport on the way into central Reykjavik, so you may join at the airport - the airport pick-up time is Sunday 09:30. Airport pick-up is not a dedicated transfer but simply passing by the airport, so it costs nothing extra; if you cannot make it, there is no refund or compensation. Please tell us your boarding point in advance; the exact time is confirmed in the departure notice.
faqs.answer_zh: 周六出发：最后一天会途径凯夫拉维克机场，返回雷克雅未克市区，可选择机场上/下团，机场上下团时间为周六16:30。周日出发：第一天会途径凯夫拉维克机场，抵达雷克雅未克市区，可选择机场上团，机场上团时间为周日9:30。机场上团并非专程接送机场，而是路过机场，因此不产生额外费用，如无法前往，也不产生任何退费及赔偿。请务必提前告知上团地点，具体时间以出团通知书为准。

faqs.question_en: Can three adults choose the three-person price?
faqs.question_zh: 三位成人是否可以选择三人价？
faqs.answer_en: Yes, but because of the special nature of the Blue Lagoon hotel, its triple rooms are only available for a child aged 10 or under and under 1.5 m sharing with the parents. If three adults, or two adults plus a child over 10, travel together, one person must move out to a single room (paying the single-room supplement) or share with another same-sex group member.
faqs.answer_zh: 可以，但是由于蓝湖温泉酒店的特殊性，蓝湖温泉酒店三人间仅适用于10岁及1米5以下的儿童和父母同住；如三位成人或两位成人加一位10岁以上儿童出行，需要其中一位出来住单间（需要支付单房差）或和团上其他同性拼住。

faqs.question_en: What are the meeting times and points?
faqs.question_zh: 集合时间和集合地点？
faqs.answer_en: Saturday departures: start - check in on your own at the Blue Lagoon hotel at 15:00 on the day (hotel details in the departure notice; no guide on the first Blue Lagoon day); end - around 18:00 on the last day in front of the hotel in central Reykjavik. Sunday departures: start - gather at 08:45 in front of the hotel in central Reykjavik (hotel details in the departure notice); end - leave the group on your own at the Blue Lagoon hotel on the last day (no guide on the last Blue Lagoon day). Departure details may be adjusted; refer to the departure notice for specifics.
faqs.answer_zh: 周六出发：开始时间地点为当天15:00于蓝湖温泉酒店自行办理入住（酒店信息以出团通知书为准，第一天蓝湖温泉无导游）；结束时间地点为最后一天晚上18:00左右在雷克雅未克市中心酒店门口结束。周日出发：开始时间地点为早上8点45分在雷克雅未克市中心酒店门口集合（酒店信息以出团通知书为准）；结束时间地点为最后一天自行在蓝湖温泉酒店下团（最后一天蓝湖温泉无导游）。出发信息有可能调整，敬请参见出团通知书详细出发信息。

faqs.question_en: How do I get to the meeting point?
faqs.question_zh: 如何到达集合地？
faqs.answer_en: The Blue Lagoon is about a 20-minute drive from Keflavik (Reykjavik) International Airport; the bus from the airport to the Blue Lagoon is about 30 EUR per person, and a taxi about 80 EUR (1-4 people), with taxis queuing outside the terminal. From the airport to central Reykjavik is about a 1-hour drive; the bus stops at various city hotels en route and costs about 30 EUR per person, while a taxi is about 150 EUR (1-4 people), again queuing outside the terminal.
faqs.answer_zh: 蓝湖温泉靠近雷克雅未克国际机场约20分钟车程，从机场到达蓝湖温泉大巴车约为每人30欧元，出租车约为80欧元（1-4人），出租车在机场航站楼外排队等候。从冰岛机场到达雷克雅未克市中心约1小时车程，大巴车沿途停留市区各个酒店，约为每位30欧元，出租车约为150欧元（1-4人），出租车在机场航站楼外排队等候。

faqs.question_en: What is Iceland's temperature like?
faqs.question_zh: 冰岛的气温如何？
faqs.answer_en: Iceland's summer is not hot, usually between -2 and +10 degrees Celsius. Reference daylight hours: about 20 hours in June, about 21 hours in July, about 18 hours in August, about 14 hours in September, and about 11 hours in October.
faqs.answer_zh: 冰岛的夏天并不炎热，通常温度在零下2度到零上10度之间。参考日照时间：6月份20小时左右，7月份21小时左右，8月份18小时左右，9月份14小时左右，10月份11小时左右。

faqs.question_en: Important note: do I need to bring my own swimsuit?
faqs.question_zh: 冰岛旅游团需要自备泳衣吗？
faqs.answer_en: Yes. All hot springs in Iceland require you to bring your own swimsuit; T-shirts, shorts or underwear are not allowed in the water. Please bring your own swimsuit.
faqs.answer_zh: 冰岛的所有温泉要求自备泳衣，T恤短裤或内衣将被拒绝下水，敬请自备泳衣。

faqs.question_en: What are the Blue Lagoon restaurants like, and can I book a meal there?
faqs.question_zh: 蓝湖的餐厅如何，我可以在蓝湖订餐吗？
faqs.answer_en: The Blue Lagoon hotel has three best-known restaurants. The Lava Restaurant has excellent lagoon views and a separate viewing area, serving traditional Icelandic dishes at reasonable prices (recommended: Icelandic sea fish about 40 EUR, highland lamb chops about 60 EUR); it takes about two hours to dine and advance booking is recommended. The Moss Restaurant is Iceland's famous Michelin restaurant, one of the world's top creative restaurants, with a chef's 7-course tasting menu requiring paid advance reservation, around 250 EUR, taking about three hours. The Spa Restaurant wraps around the whole lagoon, serving local specialties; it is lively, usually needs no reservation, and lets you rest and eat while soaking, at around 30-40 EUR. There is also a Blue Lagoon fast-food outlet with cheaper pre-cooked meals, and the Blue Lagoon cafe sells sandwiches, hot dogs and similar light fare for about 10-20 EUR.
faqs.answer_zh: 蓝湖温泉酒店有三所最出名的餐厅。岩漿餐厅（Lava餐厅）有非常好的蓝湖风景区和独立观赏区，传统冰岛菜式价格相对合理，推荐菜式为冰岛海鱼约40欧元、高山羊排约60欧元，就餐需要两小时左右，推荐提前预定。苔藓餐厅（Moss餐厅）是冰岛著名的米其林餐厅、世界排名前列的创意餐厅，提供主厨推荐7道式餐厅，必须提前付费预约，价格约为250欧元，就餐需要三小时左右。温泉餐厅（Spa餐厅）环绕着整个蓝湖温泉，提供当地特色菜式，比较热闹，通常不需要预约，可以在泡温泉的同时一边休息一边享受美食，价格约为30-40欧元。另外蓝湖快餐店也提供预煮快餐，价格相对低廉，蓝湖咖啡厅也卖三明治、热狗之类的简餐，大概10-20欧元。

faqs.question_en: Will I be able to see an active volcano erupting with flowing lava?
faqs.question_zh: 我是否能够看到活火山爆发及岩浆四溢？
faqs.answer_en: Because of the unpredictability of active volcanoes, we cannot make any promise or prediction about volcano viewing. If eruptions become very frequent - especially if the instability of the magma fissures causes the Fagradalsfjall volcanic group to erupt frequently - the Blue Lagoon will close; in that case you will be arranged into a city hotel in Reykjavik, and the price difference between the Blue Lagoon and the city hotel will be refunded.
faqs.answer_zh: 由于活火山的不可预测性，我社无法对火山的游览做任何承诺或预测。并且如果火山爆发频繁，特别是岩浆裂缝的不稳定性导致法格拉达尔火山群频发爆发，蓝湖温泉将会关闭，届时将会安排在市区酒店，并且退还蓝湖和市区酒店的价格差。

faqs.question_en: If I choose to join the Silfra fissure snorkeling, will my itinerary be affected?
faqs.question_zh: 如果我选择参加《丝浮拉大裂缝浮潜团》，我的行程会受到影响吗？
faqs.answer_en: Thingvellir National Park is scheduled for 3 hours; if you snorkel there it reduces sightseeing time by 1 hour, with the rest of the itinerary unchanged. Because snorkeling is affected by weather, temperature and visibility - and ordinary travelers differ greatly from professional adventurers - if the guide judges that the day's climate or water conditions do not allow snorkeling for ordinary travelers, the activity is cancelled and a full refund is made within 5 working days. The snorkeling tour is NOT suitable for: people over 65, children under 13, pregnant women, people with pacemakers, those with high blood pressure, etc. A dry suit is worn inside and a wet suit outside, so even in 4-5 degree water there is no hypothermia; after the usual 30-40 minutes you feel slightly cold on landing and exposed parts (hair) may get wet. The dry suit has great buoyancy and the fins provide propulsion, so even non-swimmers can master the basics quickly.
faqs.answer_zh: 辛格维利尔国家公园计划时间为3小时，如果在此参加浮潜团，将会减少1小时的游览时间，其余行程不变。由于浮潜受天气、温度、能见度影响，普通旅游者与专业探险者有巨大差异，因此如向导认为当天气候或水利条件不允许普通旅游者浮潜，则会取消该活动，并在5个工作日内全额退款。《丝浮拉大裂缝浮潜团》不适用人群：65岁以上老人、13岁以下儿童、孕妇、心脏起搏器安装者、高血压等。浮潜提供干式潜水服穿在内部、湿式潜水服穿在外部，因此即使在4-5度水温中也不会产生失温现象，通常30-40分钟上岸后略感寒冷、身体外露部分（头发）可能侵水；由于干式泳衣有很大浮力、脚蹼提供很大动力，即使不会游泳者也能在很短时间掌握浮潜要领。

faqs.question_en: Do I need a visa?
faqs.question_zh: 是否需要签证？
faqs.answer_en: This product does NOT include the visa fee. A Schengen visa (single- or multiple-entry) is required; if you need to apply, please choose a Schengen-visa product. After booking we provide free of charge all the materials needed to apply for the Schengen visa (see the detailed checklist), and if you commission us to handle the visa we purchase a Schengen travel insurance meeting visa requirements (if you do not, you must buy your own insurance and handle claims yourself). Your passport must be valid for at least six months from the date of departure, or customs may refuse entry. 'Worry-free visa' guarantee: for travelers who sign with us 61 days before departure, if the visa is not obtained within 45 days before departure we bear all losses and immediately refund the full tour fee; travelers who do not meet this clause and fail to obtain the visa are refunded per the change-and-cancellation terms. In case of refusal, notify us within 48 hours with the consulate's rejection letter, and submit any supplementary or amended materials within five days (and you may not unilaterally waive the right of 'visa defense'). Visa fees, visa service fees, Schengen insurance fees and visa-center appointment fees are all non-refundable and non-transferable, even if the product itself is changed or cancelled.
faqs.answer_zh: 本产品不包含签证费用，需要申根签证（单次或多次入境）；如需办理请选择申根签证产品。预定后我社免费提供办理申根签证的全部材料（参考详细材料清单），如委托我社办理申根签证，我社为游客购买符合申根签证要求的申根旅游保险（若未委托我社办理，需自行购买旅游保险及自行负责理赔手续）。护照有效期需在离境之日起至少还有六个月，否则海关有权拒绝入境。保签无忧：游客在出发日前61天与我社签约，如在出发前45天内未获取签证，我社承担所有损失，立即退还全部旅游费用；不符合该条款的游客如未正常获取签证，将按“退改与取消条款”退费。如遇拒签需在48小时内通知我社并出具使领馆拒签函，如需补充或更改材料须在五天内提交，且不得单方面放弃“签证抗辩”权利。签证费、签证服务费、申根保险费、签证中心预约费均不可退款，也无法更改使用者，即使产品退改签，签证费用亦无法退款。

faqs.question_en: Booking, changes & cancellation
faqs.question_zh: 预订、变更与取消须知
faqs.answer_en: Free cancellation: both the agency and the traveler may cancel without reason more than 30 days before departure (not including the 30th day); within that window, refunds follow the Change and Cancellation Terms. Itinerary contingency: the actual order of sightseeing may be adjusted on the day while keeping the same content (not treated as an itinerary change); because of frequent flight changes, traffic, ferry cancellations, strikes and route-order optimization, you are required to arrive at the meeting point one day before the tour starts and leave the dispersal point one day after it ends, allowing reasonable connection time (at least 5 hours for same-airport transfers, 7 hours for different airports in the same city; reasonable meeting/dispersal window 07:00-21:00). Where the printed itinerary order conflicts with the departure notice, the departure notice prevails; where the notice conflicts with the guide's on-site notice, the guide prevails. Group formation: this is a shared/join-in group tour; the confirmed group size is 10 people - if not reached 30 days before departure (not including the 30th day) either side may cancel without liability, and before 14 days out, if the minimum is still unmet you may switch to another arrangement/product or get a refund with no compensation owed. Rooms: single travelers default to a single-supplement deposit (refunded pro-rata if successfully share-roomed); two travelers default to a standard twin (bed type assigned by the hotel, cannot be specified); a triple/family room is for two parents and one minor, bed type assigned by the hotel. Blue Lagoon specifics: if the Blue Lagoon is closed due to volcanic eruption, you are automatically moved to a Reykjavik city hotel and the price difference is refunded at the real-time booking rate; the Blue Lagoon room rate includes one Premium ticket per person (admission, silica mud mask, one free towel/bathrobe rental), non-refundable if unused, minimum age 2; the lagoon is open 08:00-21:00 (varies by month). There is no vehicle or guide on the Blue Lagoon day and on the Reykjavik whale-watching day. Whale-watching requires strict water and weather conditions; if your chosen slot cannot sail it will be rescheduled, and if it cannot go ahead or be rescheduled the whale-watching fee is refunded within 5 working days. Pricing: all pricing is quoted in EUR at booking; if you pay in CNY, the amount is the real-time CNY value auto-calculated from the Bank of China 'EUR sell' rate on the day of payment, and the same applies to refunds (exchange-rate differences or bank fees borne by the traveler). Payment does not equal confirmation - book at least 14 days ahead and allow up to 48 hours for second confirmation; do not book connecting flights/hotels before confirmation. The product includes no shopping stops and no forced spending.
faqs.answer_zh: 免费取消：出发前30天（不含第30天）旅行社和旅行者均有权无理由取消；在此之内的退费按《更改与取消条例条款》执行。行程应变：根据当天实际情况，游览的前后顺序可能调整但内容一致，不视为行程更改；因航班变动、交通拥堵、渡轮取消、罢工游行及行程顺序优化，要求旅行者至少在参团日期的前一天抵达集合地，并在离团日期的后一天离开集散地，预留充足衔接时间（同一机场转机至少5小时，同城不同机场至少7小时；合理集合集散时段为07:00至21:00）。如行程单前后顺序与出团通知书有冲突，以出团通知书为准；如通知书与导游现场通知有冲突，以导游现场通知为准。成团：本产品为散客拼团，宣布成团人数为10人，出发前30天（不含第30天）未达成团人数双方均可解约且互不承担违约责任，发团前14天仍未达到最低成团人数可改选其他组团方式/产品或退还旅游费用且不产生赔偿。房型：单人报名默认含单人房差押金（成功拼房按比例退款）；两人同时报名默认标准双人间（床型由酒店安排、不可指定）；三人家庭间默认两位父母与一位未成年儿童，床型由酒店安排。蓝湖专项：蓝湖温泉如因火山爆发宣布关闭，则自动更换为雷克雅未克市区酒店并退还差价（以即时预定价格为标准）；蓝湖房费含每人Premium门票（入场券、矽泥面膜、毛巾浴袍免费租用一次），如不使用不可退费，年龄要求2周岁及以上；开放时间08:00–21:00（不同月份各异）。蓝湖温泉当日和雷克雅未克市区观鲸当日无用车、无导游陪同。出海观鲸对水利和气候条件要求严苛，如所选时间段无法出海则协商更改时间段，如无法前往也无法调整日期，则在行程结束后5个工作日内退还观鲸费用。价格：所有定价以欧元为预定时计价单位，如选择人民币支付，则以当天支付时按中国银行实时“欧元卖出价”自动计算的人民币价格为准，退款同理（汇率差异或银行手续费由旅行者承担）。支付不等于确认行程，建议提前至少14天预订并最多48小时由组团社二次确认，未获确认前请勿预定衔接机票及酒店。本产品全程不含购物店行程、无强制消费。

faqs.question_en: Health & safety requirements
faqs.question_zh: 健康与安全须知
faqs.answer_en: To ensure a safe trip, please have a medical check before departure and do NOT enroll if you have: infectious diseases (e.g. active tuberculosis, typhoid); cardiovascular disease (e.g. severe hypertension, heart failure, myocardial ischemia or infarction); cerebrovascular disease (e.g. cerebral embolism, hemorrhage, tumor); respiratory disease (e.g. emphysema, cor pulmonale); psychiatric conditions including epilepsy; severe anemia (hemoglobin below 50 g/L); or if you are recovering from major/medium surgery. Pregnancy: travel is not permitted at all from week 35; from week 28 a doctor's report within 7 days plus an attending physician's consent letter is required; below week 28, enroll with caution, sign a liability waiver, and you cannot join any adventure/skiing/sea/high-altitude/outdoor activities. Travelers with disabilities need a doctor's report within 7 days plus a consent letter, must be accompanied by an immediate family member, and must apply at least 61 days ahead for reserved seating and dedicated facilities. Elderly travelers over 70 need a health certificate, physical exam report and an accompanying immediate family member (otherwise sign a waiver); because the trip is long, it requires a good walking ability and stamina - those who tire easily should enroll with caution; adventure/skiing/sea/high-altitude/outdoor items require an attending physician's consent letter; aging-friendly services/facilities must be requested at least 61 days ahead. Minors (under 18) must be accompanied by an immediate relative or guardian; some sights have special rules for those under 18/12/6; for infants under 6 or children under 30 kg, confirm a safety child seat in advance (or bring an EU-standard seat yourself); a minor under 18 traveling without parents needs parental authorization (a single accompanying parent needs the other parent's written authorization, and travel with non-parents needs both parents' guardian authorization); the product does not accept infants under 2 years old. Per Article 15 of the Tourism Law (and the Infectious Disease Prevention Law, 2025 revision), travelers must truthfully declare health information relevant to the trip (pregnancy, lactation, chronic illness, infectious-disease history, suspected symptoms or recent travel to epidemic areas) and comply with safety warnings; concealment that causes harm makes the traveler liable, and in the case of concealed infectious disease the agency may terminate the contract without refund and the traveler may also owe medical, isolation and compensation costs.
faqs.answer_zh: 为确保旅游顺利出行、防止旅途意外伤害，请出行前做一次必要的身体检查，如存在下列情况请勿报名：传染性疾病患者（如活动期肺结核、伤寒）；心血管疾病患者（如严重高血压、心功能不全、心肌缺氧、心肌梗塞）；脑血管疾病患者（如脑栓塞、脑出血、脑肿瘤）；呼吸系统疾病患者（如肺气肿、肺心病）；精神病患者（如癫痫及各种精神病）；严重贫血（血红蛋白量50克/升以下）；大中型手术恢复期病患者。孕妇：妊娠第35周及以上任何情况下都无法参团；第28周及以上需提供7日内医生检查报告及主治医生同意书；第28周以下请慎重报名，需签署旅行社免责声明书，且行程内探险、滑雪、出海、高空、户外等项目都无法参加。残疾人：需提供7日内医生检查报告及同意书，需直系家属陪同，并提前至少61天申请预留位置及专用配套设施。老年旅游者：70周岁以上需提供健康证明、体检报告并需直系家属陪同（否则签署免责声明书）；因本次行程较长，需要有一定步行能力且对体力要求较高，体力不支者请慎重报名，行程内探险、滑雪、出海、高空、户外等项目需持主治医师同意书，并需提前至少61天申请《适老化》服务规范及专属设施。未成年（未满18周岁）需由直系亲属或监护人陪同；部分项目对未满18/12/6周岁有特殊限定；6岁以下婴儿或30公斤以下儿童请提前确认安全儿童座椅（否则需自备符合欧盟安全制式的座椅）；无父母陪同的未成年人须持父母授权书（仅父母一方陪伴需另一方书面授权，与父母以外亲友同行需父母双方监护人授权书）；本产品不接受2周岁以下婴儿参团。根据《旅游法》第15条及《中华人民共和国传染病防治法（2025修订）》，旅游者需如实告知与旅游活动相关的个人健康信息（包括妊娠期、哺乳期、慢性病、传染病史、疑似症状或近期疫区旅居史）并遵守安全警示规定；因隐瞒导致人身或财产损害的旅游者需自行承担责任，隐瞒传染病情况的，旅行社可解除合同且不退还费用，旅游者还需承担医疗、隔离费用及赔偿其他游客和旅行社损失。
